35Awã naa, Yesu do hũhũ a onukpɛ̃ kĩ, “Tse kɔdzɛla kanɛ nɛ oti a kamɛ!” Hũhũ a bɔɛ oti a emuni nɛ tite nɛ bati a anɛ kamɛ na, ɛnɛ nɛ ye kamɛ, ade lɛtsama tákɛna ye a.
36Fɔtsa a kɛna bati a flee wãwã ade bivia be akũ kĩ, “Litsa fɔlɛtsa odu nɛ awĩ a? Oti kĩĩ deĩ otumi mɔ kɔbɛ̃ yawũni nɛ hũhũ kpa akũ ade batse a.” 37Yesu akũ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ gba nɛ kayite a na flee.
Yesu Tsa Bati Pii.
38Yesu to Yudafɔ katsɛnakɔ̃ a ɛnaa Simon awã. Lɔkɔ a na Simon nyina waa yasɔ atilili mɔ ɔsĩ, foesũ bɛkpa Yesu kanyi kĩ ɛyaadã ye. 39Ade ke Yesu nadza nɛ ye mpa ɔwɛ̃, ewũni nɛ fɔsɔ a akũ, ade fɔnɛ nɛ ye kamɛ eyidza mɔatsɛ ɛkɛna fɔdɛtsa ɛkpa be a. 40Kĩ fɔkɔ ka a, bati kpã be bakɔba a kĩ basɔ fɔsɔ kumɛkumɛ a bɛma Yesu. Ete awɛ nɛ be kamɛ odi nyɛ odi akũ ɛtsa be flee. 41Hũhũ kpa nɛ́ nɛ bati pii kamɛ mɔ fɔwɔla kabɔa kĩ, “Nɔ nyɛ Baguma obi a!” Lɛmɛ Yesu bɔa hũhũ kpa a onukpɛ̃ ade ɛtákpa be osi kĩ bɛlɛ kɔdzɛla kitonɛkĩ binyina kĩ ye nyɛ Kristo a.
Yesu Tsa Fɔtsa Nɛ Yudafɔ Fɔtsɛnakɔ̃.
42Odenyinawi a, Yesu dzakũ nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ ɛnaa kakɔ dĩĩ kadi, ade bati a do ye kawɛ awɛ a. Kĩ bɛmɔ́ ye a bike ye aduli kĩ ɛtadzakũ nɛ be sɛkɛ̃. 43Lɛmɛ ebi be kĩ, “Kɛnɛ kĩ nnaalɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a nɛ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ akũ a nɛ tɛmatɔ bɛbã lɛmɛ kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ ade foe Baguma do yĩ kĩ ĩyaakɛna a.”
44Foesũ ɛkalɛ Baguma kalɛ a nɛ Yudafɔ fɔtsɛnakɔ̃ a nɛ tite a na akũ flee.

Title: LUKA 5
Content:
Yesu Vɛ Ye Fɔtsa Bakɔlɛnɛ Batɔnyade a.
1Luwi a, kĩ Yesu dza nɛ Genezaret ɔwɔ lutubu baũ a abuĩ a, bati kapili kĩ bafuã ye bitse Baguma fɔlɛtsa a. 2Yesu mɔ́ tɔkɔlɔ nviã nɛ lutubu a abuĩ ade kɔfɔabi banyɛnɛ a nɛ́ bɛlamɛna be tɛsau kavɔlɛ a. 3Yesu wo nɛ ɔkɔlɔ a kĩ ɛnya Simon ode a kamɛ ebi ye kĩ edu ɔkɔlɔ a ɛnamɛna mui anɛ sukuloo. Ɛkɛna akũ edzi nɛ ye kamɛ ɛtsa bati a fɔtsa.
4Kĩ Yesu tsa fɔtsa eyua a, ebi Simon kĩ, “Ta ɔkɔlɔ a kanamɛna awã kĩ kidzũ, lɔkɔa mimɔ nɔ babumɛnanɛ mita mi tɛsau minyɛ kɔfɔabi.”
5Ade Simon kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃, bɔkɛna adzuma mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kadzɔ lɛnyɛ flee lɛmɛ bɔtána lɛtsama. Lɛmɛ ntɛ ɔlɛ lɔmɔ ni maafɔ̃ bɔta tɛsau a.” 6Kĩ bɛta tɛsau a bɛnyɛ kɔfɔabi beblebee kĩ fɔfɔ̃ be tɛsau a do kakpeli awɛ. 7Foesũ bɛbɔa awɛ bɛvɛ be bakɔba nɛ ɔkɔlɔ ɔyade a kamɛ kĩ bɛyaabumɔ be. Bɛya bɛyanyɛ kɔfɔabi biyula tɔkɔlɔ nviã a tiyi limii kĩ tido kayɛla awɛ.
8Kĩ Simon Petro mɔ́ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya a, eke aduli nɛ Yesu anɛ kamɛ ebi ye kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, nɛ liti nɛ yĩ ɔwɛ̃, kitonɛkĩ tɔkpa ɔkɛnanɛ manɛ.” 9Simon mɔ ye bade a kɛna saa nɛ kɔfɔabi beblebee a kĩ bɛnyɛ a sũ. 10Ade ayea fɔkɛna ye adzuma bakɔba Yakobo mɔ Yohanes kĩ bɛnyɛ Zebedeo babi a lɛmɛ wãwã a.
Ade Yesu bi Simon kĩ, “Tavila. Kito finyaakĩĩ kanaa ni, bati aakanyɛ.” 11Ke liti a, bɛta be tɔkɔlɔ bɛnadzɛla nɛ ɔwɔ abuĩ, bɛfɔnɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa awɛ biyi ade bitomɔ Yesu nɛ liti a.
Yesu Tsa Ɔkɔatani Odi.
12Lɔkɔ lidi, Yesu na nɛ ɔmatɔ odi kamɛ awã kĩ onyole odi kĩ ɛkasɔ fɔsɔ ngbã na. Kĩ onyole kĩĩ mɔ́ Yesu a, ɛnatɔ nɛ ye abɔa kamɛ eke ye aduli kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, ntɛ fɔnyɛ nɔ kawɛ ni, aapuli ɔfɔ̃ fɔsɔ kĩĩ lɛwɔ nɛ yĩ akũ.”
13Yesu yo awɛ ɛta ye ade ebi ye kĩ, “Mawɛ lɔmɔ. Nɔ akũ ɛkpalɛ.” Deedimɔapɛ fɔsɔ a wɔ nɛ ye akũ.
14Ade Yesu si ye mbla ɛlɛ kĩ, “Tabi odima kadima mbom naa tĩĩ kanaakɔa nɔ akũ katsa ɔsɔfɔ, kafɔ̃ ɛsɛla nɔ akũ ɛdã, lɔkɔa edi adansiɛ ɛkpa odi nyɛ odi kĩ nuwĩnuwĩ fɔsɔ a wɔ nɛ nɔ akũ. Kpa afɔlibɔ fɔtsa a kĩ Mose mbla tsa a lɛmɛ.”
15Lɛmɛ Yesu akũ fɔlɛtsa gba fɔnaa mɔ lugo, ade bati pii kaya kĩ bayaatse ye fɔtsa katsa, bɛna fɔsɔ katsa lɛmɛ a. 16Lɛmɛ fɔkɔ fudi Yesu adzakũ kanaa kakɔ kĩ kɛkɛna dĩĩ kanaabɔa mpaɛ.
Yesu Tsa Onyole Odi Kĩ Eveliveli.
17Luwi a, kĩ Yesu katsa fɔtsa a, Farisifɔ mɔ Yudafɔ mbla batsanɛ a kĩ bito tɛmatɔ kumɛkumɛ nɛ Galilea mɔ Yudea tite akũ, mɔ Yerusalem na nɛ awã. Baguma kɔbɛ̃ a na nɛ Yesu kamɛ kĩ ɛkɔa ɛtsa fɔsɔ. 18Ade bati badi lɔ oti odi kĩ eveliveli nɛ ɔkɛna akũ bɛyamɛna a. Bɛbɔa mbɔdi bɛwɛ osi kĩ batsã biwo nɛ kɔla a kamɛ bɛkɔa oti a biyi nɛ Yesu anɛ kamɛ. 19Lɛmɛ nɛ bati lidede sũ ni, bɛtána osi biwomɔ ye. Foesũ bɛbɔɛ oti a bide nɛ lɛtsã. Ade bitinya fɔkpã bɛnyɛ ɔkɛ bɛkamɛna ɔsɔnɛ a mɔ ye ɔkɛna biyi nɛ Yesu mɔ bati a flee anɛ kamɛ a.
20Kĩ Yesu mɔ be katɛkado a, ebi onyole a kĩ, “Nwaɛ̃, bɛkɔa nɔ titikpa bite nɔ!”
21Ade Farisifɔ mɔ mbla batsanɛ a do akũ kavia awɛ kĩ, “Owei nyɛ oti kĩĩ kĩ yalɛ fubusuotsa nɛ Baguma akũ? Baguma odi keĩ aapuli ɛkɔa titikpa ete!”
22Yesu nyi be kakɔna, foesũ evia be kĩ, “Nde sũ miakɔna fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ odu? 23Fɔɔdabe kalɛ deĩ ɔsĩ fɔbɛ̃, ‘Bɛkɔa nɔ titikpa bite nɔ’ mbɔɛɛ kĩ, ‘Yidza kadza, katsã’? 24Lɛmɛ kĩ míamɔ miyi ɔsũ kĩ yĩ a kĩ ĩnyɛ Otidziwa Obi a ndeĩ kɔbɛ̃ kĩ makɔa bati titikpa kate nɛ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ sũ ni, midã o-o!” Kĩ ɛlɛ fukĩĩ eyua a, ɛdani ebi oti a kĩ eveliveli a kĩ, “Mabi nɔ kĩ yidza kabɔɛ nɔ ɔkɛna kanaa kɔla!”
25Lɛtalɛta onyole kĩĩ ta eyidza nɛ bati a flee anɛ kamɛ, ɛbɔɛ ye ɔkɛna a kĩ ye akũ ɛwa a, ɛnaa kɔla mɔ Baguma kamu. 26Fukĩĩ kɛna bati a flee wãwã. Akũ nyɛnɛ be flee, ade bimu Baguma, bɛkalɛ kĩ, “Litsa awãwã fɔtsa bɔmɔ́ nviã kĩĩ a!”
Yesu Vɛ Levi.
27Ke liti a, kĩ Yesu anɛ nɛ tɔtɔ a kamɛ a, ɛmɔ́ ɔgɔlɛ ɔtɛnɛ odi kĩ bavɛ Levi edzi nɛ ye adzumamu. Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Tomɔ yĩ.” 28Levi yidza ɛfɔnɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa eyi ade etomɔ ye a.
29Owi tábuna mɔ Levi te opunu kpale ɛkpa Yesu nɛ ye tɔtɔ kamɛ. Tɔgɔlɛ batɛnɛ pii mɔ bati bɛbã lɛmɛ na nɛ awã. 30Farisifɔ mɔ be bakɔba Yudafɔ mbla batsanɛ a badi kɛna hũhũhũhũ bivia Yesu fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ, “Nde sũ mianya kamɔa mɔ tɔgɔlɛ batɛnɛ mɔ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ?”
31Ade ke Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Basɔnɛ lisĩ bɛkpa tutsonu ɔkɛnanɛ, nnɛ́ bikĩ bideĩ akũ ɔsĩ. 32Ntáya kĩ mayaavɛ bati kĩ bidzi kpĩĩ, mbom ĩya kĩ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ bɛdani be tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ.”
Yesu Lɛ Kalɛ Nɛ Baguma Osi Vɔɛ̃ Mɔ Ɔkɔɛ Akũ.
33Bati badi bi Yesu kĩ, “Yohanes fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a awɛ onukpɛ̃ kasui mɔatsɛ mɔatsɛ kabɔa mpaɛ ade ayea Farisifɔ bade a lɛmɛ akɛna a. Nde sũ nɔ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ anya, kamɔa?”
34Ade Yesu kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Miakɔna kĩ bati a kĩ bɛvɛ nɛ obolitsɔ̃ kapikɔ̃ a adzi kɔlɛ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ obolitsɔ̃ ɔnyɔ a deĩ nɛ be sɛkɛ̃? Oowo! Fɔlá lɔmɔ! 35Lɛmɛ luwi aaya kĩ baakpã obolitsɔ̃ ɔnyɔ a nɛ be sɛkɛ̃. Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ ni, baasui onukpɛ̃.”
36Yesu buki ɛbɔa be lɛgbã kĩ, “Odima lábɛ̃ lima vɔɛ̃ kakɔa katalɛ lima kɔɛ ɔkɛ. Ntɛ ɛkɛna foe lɔmɔ ni, yaabɛ̃ lima vɔɛ̃ a, lɛmɛ lɔvɔɛ̃ mɔ lɔkɔɛ a lɛláaketimɔ akũ. 37Ade ayea baáko waĩ vɔɛ̃ nɛ ɔyaɛ ovoli kuvũ kɔɛ kamɛ a, kitonɛkĩ waĩ vɔɛ̃ a aafɔ̃ kuvũ a lɛbɛ̃ lɔkɔa waĩ a lɛmɛ aawula. 38Nɛ foesũ kɛnɛ kĩ biko waĩ vɔɛ̃ nɛ ɔyaɛ ovoli kuvũ vɔɛ̃ kamɛ. 39Finyaa, ntɛ odi mɔa waĩ kɔɛ ni, ɛláawɛ kĩ yamɔa bavɔɛ̃. Lɛtsa a kĩ yaalɛ nyɛ kĩ, ‘Waĩ kɔɛ a nɛnɛ ɛbɛ̃.’ ”

Title: LUKA 6
Content:
Yesu Mɔ Farisifɔ Vɛlɛ Fɔlɛtsa Nɛ Kawɛya Luwi a Akũ.
1Nɛ Kawɛya Luwi mɔa lidi akũ ni, Yesu mɔ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ tsã fugbanɔ kɔba kudi kayite batɛ̃. Ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a ve fudi bɛtsɛ̃ foe bɛkaba. 2Ade ke Farisifɔ a badi via be kĩ, “Nde sũ miakɛna lɛtsa a kĩ boe mbla tákpa osi kĩ bɛkɛna nɛ Kawɛya Luwi akũ?”
3Yesu kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Mitákã nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ, mimɔ́ lɛtsa a kĩ Lɛgã Dawid kɛna nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ kɔlɛ kakɔ bɛmɔ ye bade a? 4Lɛgã Dawid nawo nɛ Baguma kɔla kamɛ ɛbɔɛ abodoo a kĩ bɛkɔa bɛbɔa afɔliɛ bɛkpa Baguma a ɛnya, ade ɛkɔa adi ɛkpa ye bakɔba a lɛmɛ bɛnya a. Fɔnyɛ boe mbla kĩ odima lɛlá osi kĩ yanya foe, mbɔɛntɛ basɔfɔ odi keĩ.”
5Yesu wũna kĩ, “Otidziwa Obi a nyɛ Kawɛya Luwi a Ɔlate.”
Yesu Tsa Onyole Odi Kĩ Ye Kɔkpɔ Ku.
6Nɛ Kawɛya Luwi bɛbã akũ ni, Yesu naa Yudafɔ katsɛnakɔ̃ a ɛnaatsa fɔtsa. Onyole odi kĩ ye kɔkpɔ ku na nɛ awã. 7Yudafɔ mbla batsanɛ mɔ Farisifɔ badi kawɛ osi a kĩ ye akũ baatsã bɛwɛ fɔlɛtsa bite nɛ Yesu akũ. Foesũ biko anɛ bɛdã flee ntɛ yaatsa fɔsɔ nɛ Kawɛya Luwi akũ. 8Lɛmɛ Yesu nyi be kakɔna ade ebi onyole a kĩ, “Yidza kayaadza nɛ bati anɛ kamɛ nɛ awĩ.” Onyole a nɛ ɛyadza nɛ awã.
9Ade Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mavia mi ntse ni, litsa boe mbla kpa osi kĩ bɛkɛna nɛ Kawɛya Luwi akũ? Fɔnɛnɛ kĩ bɛkɛna tuwĩ nɛ Kawɛya Luwi akũ, mbɔɛɛ kĩ bɛkɛna tɔkpa? Fɔnyɛ luwi kĩ de akũ bɛtɛ oti nkpã, mbɔɛɛ kĩ bɛfɔnɛ ye awɛ eku?”
10Yesu dã be flee ɛtɛ̃mɛna ade ebi onyole a kĩ, “Yo awɛ.” Eyo awɛ ade ye awɛ a lɛ pɛpɛɛpɛ a. 11Yudafɔ mɔ mbla batsanɛ a na kalɔkpa mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ ade bɛkapi adzuni nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ baakɛna ye akũ a.
Yesu Nyɛ Fɔtɔ Banyanɛ Ewua-nviã.
12Luwi a Yesu de ɛnaa ɔtɔ akũ kĩ yanaabɔa mpaɛ, ade ɛbɔa mpaɛ lɛnyɛ flee ɛkpa Baguma a. 13Kĩ kade nyina a, ɛvɛ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a flee ɛkpɔta ade ɛnyɛ be kamɛ bati ewua-nviã ɛvɛ be kĩ fɔtɔ banyanɛ a. 14Ade be nyɛ Simon kĩ ete dĩ kĩ Petro mɔ ɔwaɛ̃ Andrea, Yakobo mɔ Yohanes, Filipo mɔ Bartolomeo. 15Babɛbã nyɛ Mateo mɔ Toma, Yakobo kĩ ɛnyɛ Alfeo obi mɔ Simon a kĩ epili ye kade lɔlɔ. 16Be nkaɛ nyɛ Yuda kĩ ɛnyɛ Yakobo obi mɔ Yuda Iskariot kĩ ye lɛyatsa Yesu liti osi.
Yesu Tsa Fɔtsa Ɛtsa Bati Lɛmɛ.
17Kĩ Yesu mɔ ye fɔtɔ banyanɛ a ka bito ɔtɔ akũ a, bɛyadza nɛ kakɔ tɛɛwa kĩ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ pii mɔ bati kɔdabu baũ kudi na. Bati pii to Yudea tite akũ, Yerusalem ɔmatɔ mɔ tɛmatɔ a kĩ tɛwaa nɛ Tiro mɔ Sidon mpo abuĩ a kamɛ bɛya. 18Bɛya kĩ bayaatse Yesu fɔtsa katsa bɛna fɔsɔ ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ katsa. Bikĩ hũhũ kpa kaha be a lɛmɛ ya ade ɛtsa be a. 19Bati a flee kabɔa mbɔdi kĩ bata Yesu kitonɛkĩ kɔbɛ̃ kudi kanɛ kato ye kamɛ katsa be flee.
Bati Badi Aamɔ Kawɔlɛ Ade Badi Lɛmɛ Aamɔ Lubo a.
20Yesu dzɛla anɛ ɛdã ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a ade ebi be kĩ,
“Baguma aahila mi a kĩ minyɛ ahiãfɔ a,
kitonɛkĩ mi kade nyɛ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a
21Baguma aahila mi a kĩ kɔlɛ akɔ mi finyaakĩĩ a,
kitonɛkĩ míawĩ!
Baguma aahila mi a kĩ miabe finyaa a,
kitonɛkĩ miaya kamɛmɛ kɔ̃!
22Baguma aahila mi ntɛ bati akesĩ mi,
bisĩ mi, bavũna mi,
ĩye balɛ kĩ minyɛ bati kpa nɛ Otidziwa Obi a sũ!
23“Mimɔ kawɔlɛ, ntɛ fɔya lɔmɔ a, mito, mimɔ kawɔlɛ kitonɛkĩ mideĩ kɔtɔkase kpale nɛ ode. Mite anɛ lɛmɛ kĩ ade fukĩĩ odu be bawanyɔ kɛna Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ kɔɛ a.
24Lɛmɛ bɔbɔɛ makpa mi a kĩ mideĩ akũ a,
kitonɛkĩ mimɔ́ mi kawɔlɛ kɔkɔɛ nɛ awĩ!
25Bɔbɔɛ makpa mi a kĩ miwĩ finyaakĩĩ a,
kitonɛkĩ kɔlɛ aakɔ mi!
Bɔbɔɛ makpa mi a kĩ miamɛmɛ finyaakĩĩ a,
kitonɛkĩ míawo ɔblɔ, mibe.
26Bɔbɔɛ makpa mi ntɛ bati flee abɔa mi buĩ wĩ,
kitonɛkĩ ade aye be bawanyɔ mu fɔvã onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a.
Miwɛ Mi Bakesĩnɛ Kalɛ.
27“Lɛmɛ mabi mi a kĩ miatse yĩ kalɛ a kĩ miwɛ mi bakesĩnɛ kalɛ, mikɛna tuwĩ mikpa be. 28Mikpa bikĩ badumu mi a nhila. Mibɔa mpaɛ mikpa bikĩ bakɛna mi tɛnya a. 29Ntɛ odi balɛ nɔ awɛ nɛ ɔlɔtɔ mɔa ni, fɔ̃ ɛbalɛ nɔ nɛ ɔyade a lɛmɛ. Ntɛ odi tɛ nɔ atadiɛ wulaa ni kɔa nɔ atadiɛ anyanglede a lɛmɛ kakpa ye. 30Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaawã nɔ fɔtsa ni, kpa ye, ade ntɛ odi bɔɛ nɔ litsedi ni, tabuki ɔlɛ kĩ atɛ foe. 31Lɛtsa a kĩ miawɛ kĩ bati bɛbã bɛkɛna bɛkpa mi ni, mikɛna foe lɔmɔ mikpa be.
32“Ntɛ miawɛ bati a kĩ bawɛ mi kalɛ odi ni, nde sũ kɛnɛ kĩ bihila mi? Tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ malo awɛ bikĩ bawɛ be kalɛ a. 33Ade ntɛ bati a kĩ bakɛna mi sɛmɛ kalɛ odi mɔ miakɛna sɛmɛ kalɛ kakpa a ni, nde sũ kɛnɛ kĩ bihila mi? Tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ malo akɛna lɔmɔ. 34Ade ntɛ bikĩ baapuli bise mi kɔtɔ odi mɔ miakpa tɛvɛ ni, nde sũ kɛnɛ kĩ bihila mi? Tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ malo akpa be akũ tɛvɛ, nɛ ayekĩ baase foe flee bɛkpa be sũ! 35Oowo! Miwɛ mi bakesĩnɛ kalɛ mikɛna be tuwĩ. Mikpa be tɛvɛ lɛmɛ mitate anɛ kĩ baase bɛkpa mi. Ntɛ mikɛna foe lɔmɔ ni, míana kɔtɔkase kpale lɔkɔa míanya Baguma Kpale Nɛ Ode a babi. Kitonɛkĩ Baguma deĩ sɛmɛ kalɛ ɛkpa bikĩ baáyi bati ayɛ mɔ bati kpa malo. 36Mimɔ bati kɔnya ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma amɔ kɔnya.
Yesu Tsa Fɔtsa Nɛ Bati Bɛbã Kadzɛmɛna Akũ.
37“Mitadzɛmɔ bati bɛbã ayekĩ Baguma lɛmɛ lɛláadzɛmɔ mi. Mitakɔ bati bɛbã kɔtɔ lɔkɔa Baguma lɛmɛ lɛláakɔ mi kɔtɔ. Mikɔa bati tɔkpa mite be, lɔkɔa Baguma lɛmɛ aakɔa ete mi. 38Mikpa bati fɔtsa lɔkɔa Baguma lɛmɛ aakpa mi. Nuwĩnuwĩ Baguma aakɔna, edo ɛmɛnana fuyi tsɔnɔnɔɔnɔ fuwula nɛ ye sɛmɛ kalɛ onukpɛ̃. Fɔtsa kakɔna odu a kĩ mikɔa mikɔna mikpa bati bɛbã a, ade foe odu Baguma lɛmɛ aakɔa ɛkɔna ɛkpa mi a.”
39Ade Yesu bɔa be lɛgbã kĩ, “Ɔnɛkunɛ lɛláapuli ɛkpã ɔkɔba ɔnɛkunɛ. Ntɛ ɛkɛna foe ni be nviã a flee baatɔ lɛkɛ. 40Fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ lɛbɛ́ ye fɔtsa ɔtsanɛ, lɛmɛ ntɛ ɛkɔlɛ fɔtsa eyua ni, yaana ndɛ ye fɔtsa ɔtsanɛ aye.
41“Nde sũ adã sukuluku kĩ sideĩ nɛ awaɛ̃ linebi kamɛ lɛmɛ ɔtsɛ́la luvokũ a kĩ lideĩ nɛ nɔ mɔawɛ linebi kamɛ a? 42Nde aapuli obi awaɛ̃ kĩ, ‘Make nɔ aduli, fɔ̃ ĩnyɛ sukuluku nɛ nɔ linebi kamɛ’ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ luvokũ deĩ nɛ nɔ mɔawɛ linebi kamɛ a? Anɛ kamɛ kɛkɛ fɔtsa ɔkɛnanɛ anɛ! Nya lɔtɔ kanyɛ luvokũ a nɛ nɔ linebi kamɛ lɔkɔa aapuli ɔmɔ́ yededeede ɔnyɛ sukuluku nɛ awaɛ̃ linebi kamɛ.
Kutse Kudi Nyɛ Kudi Mɔ Koe Libi Kĩ Kɔawũ.
43“Kutse wĩ láwũ babi kpa, ade kutse kĩ kɔnɛ́nɛ lɛmɛ láwũ babi wĩ a. 44Babi a kĩ kutse nyɛ kutse awũ a bakɔa kamɔ koe kayi ɔsũ. Baána figi babi nɛ fu kutse kamɛ ade baána akutu nɛ ɔgɔabi akũ a. 45Oti wĩ anyɛ fɔtsa wĩ a kĩ fudeĩ nɛ ye ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ a kanya, ade aye oti kpa lɛmɛ anyɛ fɔtsa kpa a kĩ fudeĩ nɛ ye ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ a kanya a. Kitonɛkĩ lɛtsa a kĩ lideĩ nɛ oti ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ a, ade de anɛ nɛ ye onukpɛ̃ a.
Fɔla Kake Nɛ Litekũ Lɛyɔde Mɔ Ɔsĩ Akũ.
46“Nde sũ miavɛ yĩ kĩ, ‘Boe Ɔlate, boe Ɔlate’ lɛmɛ miákɛna nɛ fɔtsa a kĩ matsa mi a akũ? 47Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ katse yĩ fɔlɛtsa, kakɛna nɛ foe akũ ni, maatsa mi oti a odu kĩ yanɛ. 48Ɛla ndɛ oti kĩ ntɛ eyi kɔla kake kayɔ etu ɔkã dzununuunu eke litekũ lɛyɔde nɛ boe akũ. Ntɛ ɔwɔ yili mɔ mui yalɔmɔ kɔla a ni, lɛtsama lɛláakɛna kɔla a, kitonɛkĩ bike koe kake wĩ. 49Lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaátse yĩ fɔlɛtsa, ade yaákɛna nɛ foe akũ lɛmɛ ni, ɛla ndɛ oti kĩ eke kɔla kĩ koe kayɔ litekũ a lɛla ɔsĩ. Ntɛ ɔwɔ yili ɛyalɔmɔ kɔla a na ni, kɔ́aveli kɔtɔ gbloo!”

Title: LUKA 7
Content:
Yesu Tsa Romafɔ Sodzafɔ Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Odi Ɔsumunɛ.
1Kĩ Yesu bi bati fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ flee eyua a, ɛdzakũ ɛnaa Kapernaum. 2Awã naa, Romafɔ sodzafɔ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ odi nɛ awã na ɔsumunɛ kĩ yaátunɔ kalɛ. Ɔsumunɛ kĩĩ kasɔ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ ewo wuda onukpɛ̃. 3Kĩ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ kĩĩ nu Yesu nkã a, edo Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ badi kĩ bɛnaabi ye ɛyaatsa ye ɔsumunɛ a. 4Bɛya nɛ Yesu sɛkɛ̃ ade bike ye aduli mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ, “Oti kĩĩ fɛta ɛkpa nɔ kabumɛna paa, 5kitonɛkĩ yawɛ boe kade bati kalɛ, ade ye like boe katsɛnakɔ̃ a ɛkpa boe a.” 6Nɛ foe sũ Yesu tomɔ be ɛnaa.
Ki kite sukuloo kĩ Yesu awo nɛ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a tɔtɔ kamɛ a, ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a do ye bakɔba kĩ bibi Yesu kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, tabuki ɔha nɔ akũ. Ntákpɔla nkpa kĩ awo nɛ yĩ tɔtɔ kamɛ, 7ade ke ntákpɔla lɛmɛ kĩ maya nɛ nɔ sɛkɛ̃ a. Foesũ lɛ kalɛ mɔapɛ lɔkɔa yĩ ɔsumunɛ a aasaɛ. 8Yĩ malo ĩnyɛ oti kĩ ndeĩ nɛ banɔkɔɛ̃ kĩ bɛbɛ̃ yĩ lɔnɔkɔɛ̃ kayɔ, ade ndeĩ sodzafɔ nɛ yĩ kayɔ a. Ntɛ mbi odi kĩ, ‘Naa ni’ yanaa, ntɛ mbi ɔbɛbã kĩ, ‘Ya ni’ yaya, ade ntɛ mbi yĩ ɔsate lɛmɛ kĩ ‘Kɛna fukĩĩ ni’ yakɛna foe.”
9Kĩ Yesu nu fukĩĩ a fɔkɛna ye saa. Ɛdani ebi bati kɔdabu a kĩ bitomɔ ye a kĩ, “Mabi mi kĩ ntámɔ tɔ̃ katɛkado kĩĩ odu nɛ Israelfɔ malo kamɛ da!” 10Batɔ a kĩ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a do a muniki bɛnaa tɔtɔ a kamɛ, ade bɛnamɔ kĩ ɔsumunɛ a saɛ a.
Yesu Nyina Okunawa Odi Obinyole.
11Ke liti a, Yesu mɔ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a mɔ bati pii naa Nain ɔmatɔ kamɛ. 12Kĩ ewo nɛ ɔmatɔ a koletia a, ɛtsɛlamɔ bati kɔdza kĩ bɛnɔnɛ ɔnɔkpa banaabila. Ɔnɔkpa a nyɛ otsole odi kĩ ɛnyɛ okunawa obinyole mɔapɛ, ade ke ɔmatɔ a kamɛ bati pii lɛmɛ tomɔ okunawa a. 13Kĩ boe Ɔlate mɔ́ otsole a, ye fɔlɛtsa kɔ ye kɔnya ade ke ebi ye kĩ, “Fɔ̃ kabe.”
14Awã naa Yesu fuã ɛnata ɔnɔkpa apaka a ade bikĩ bɛnɔnɛ ye a fɔ̃ bɛdza a. Ade Yesu lɛ kĩ, “Opopo! Mabi nɔ kĩ yidza!” 15Ɔnɔkpa a yidza edzi edo kɔdzɛla kalɛ awɛ, ade Yesu kɔa ye edo nɛ ɔma awɛ a.
16Libe wo bati a flee ade bimu Baguma bɛlɛ kĩ, “Baguma Onukpɛ̃ Ɔnyɛnɛ kpale odi nɛ́ ɛta nɛ boe kamɛ! Baguma ka ɛya kĩ yayaanyɛ ye bati!” 17Yesu akũ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ gba nɛ Yudea tite mɔ fɔkɔ a kĩ fufuã a flee kamɛ.
Yohanes Mui Ɔwɔlanɛ Do Batɔ Nɛ Yesu Sɛkɛ̃.
18Kĩ Yohanes fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a bi ye fɔtsa kĩ Yesu lamɛna kakɛna flee a, ɛvɛ be kamɛ bati nviã, 19ade edo be nɛ boe Ɔlate sɛkɛ̃ kĩ bɛnaavia ye kĩ, “Nɔ nyɛ oti a kĩ bɛlɛ kĩ yaaya a, mbɔɛɛ kĩ bɔdã oti bɛbã anɛ?” 20Kĩ biwo Yesu sɛkɛ̃ a bibi ye kĩ, “Yohanes Mui Ɔwɔlanɛ a do boe kĩ bɔyaavia nɔ kĩ, ‘Nɔ nyɛ oti a kĩ bɛlɛ kĩ yaaya mbɔɛɛ kĩ bɔdã oti bɛbã anɛ?’ ”
21Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ pɛpɛɛpɛ a, Yesu tsa bati beblebee fɔsɔ, ɛblɔmɛna hũhũ kpa etomɛna bati kamɛ ade ɛfɔ̃ banɛkunɛ pii lɛmɛ mɔ́ fɔkɔ a. 22Ade ɛkpa Yohanes batɔ a mbuayɛ kĩ, “Mimuniki minaabi Yohanes lɛtsa a kĩ mimɔ́ mɔ lɛtsa a kĩ minu a, banɛkunɛ mɔ́ fɔkɔ, bikĩ biveliveli yidza bɛtsɛ̃, bikĩ basɔ fɔsɔ ngbã akũ kpalɛ, batɔsĩnɛ anu fɔkɔ, bɛdzɛla banɔkpa bidzi nkpã, ade bɛlamɛna ahiãfɔ Kalɛ Wĩ a kabi a. 23Baguma hila oti a kĩ ɛtamɔ́ nfumusu adima nɛ yĩ akũ.”
24Kĩ Yohanes batɔ a dzakũ a, Yesu yi kayɔ mɔ kɔdzɛla kalɛ nɛ Yohanes akũ kabi bati kɔdabu a kĩ, “Kĩ minaa Yohanes sɛkɛ̃ nɛ kɔsa kamɛ a, litsa mikɔna kĩ míamɔ? Mimɔ́ ye ndɛ kɔkaɛ sɔɔta kĩ ɔwɛ abɔa katomɛna katɛ̃mɛna? 25Litsa koũ minɛ minaadã? Oti kĩ ɛkɛɛlɛ ye akũ mɔ fɔtsa mɔ kalɛ yanɛ? Bikĩ bɛkɛɛlɛ be akũ mɔ fɔtsa mɔkalɛ bidzi nɛ ɔmɛnɛ kamɛ ni, fɔgã tɔtɔ kamɛ bamɔ be. 26Mibi yĩ lɛtsa a koũ sũ miti mina a? Kĩ míamɔ Baguma onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ mbɔɛɛ? Mifɔ̃ nti mbi mi kĩ mimɔ́ oti kĩ ɛbɛ̃ Baguma onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ kɔlaa. 27Ade Yohanes akũ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ,
‘Maado yĩ fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ ɛnya nɔ lɔtɔ,
ɛyaalɔla osi eyi ɛkpa nɔ.’ ”
28Yesu buki ebi be kĩ, “Yohanes bɛ̃ odi nyɛ odi kĩ edzi tɔ̃ nɛ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ. Lɛmɛ odi kĩ ɛnyɛ obisɛ̃ kɔlaa nɛ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kamɛ bɛ̃ Yohanes.”
29Fɔmɔ fukĩĩ aayanɛ a, bati a flee nu Yohanes fɔlɛtsa a, bɛmɔ tɔgɔlɛ batɛnɛ a titiliwu nyɛ bikĩ bɛkɛna nɛ Baguma kawɛ akũ, ade bɛfɔ̃ Yohanes kɛna be mui kawɔla amaniɛ a. 30Lɛmɛ Farisifɔ mɔ Yudafɔ mbla batsanɛ a sĩ Baguma nhihiɛ a kĩ ɛkɛna eyi ɛkpa be a, ade bɛtátunɔ kĩ Yohanes ɛwɔla be mui a.
31Yesu lɛ ɛnamɛna lɔtɔ kĩ, “Finyaakĩĩ litsa maakɔa nviã babi nkɔna mɔ? 32Bɛla ndɛ babisɛ̃ kĩ bikoni nɛ kɔya bagulo. Babɔa fɔwɔla kabi bakɔba kĩ,
‘Bɔsã obolitsɔ̃ kapi tɔnɔ bɔkpa mi,
lɛmɛ mitáto!
Bɔsã tukutɔnɔ bɔkpa mi,
lɛmɛ mitábe.’
33Yohanes Mui Ɔwɔlanɛ a ya, ɛkasui onukpɛ̃, ɛtámɔa waĩ, lɛmɛ milɛ kĩ, ‘Hũhũ kpa deĩ nɛ ye kamɛ!’ 34Otidziwa Obi a lɛmɛ ya, ɛnya, ɛmɔa lɛmɛ, ade mialɛ kĩ, ‘Midã ɔnyakpanɛ mɔ bavɛ ɔmɔanɛ kĩĩ! Ɛnyɛ tɔgɔlɛ batɛnɛ mɔ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ ɔkɔba!’ 35Lɛmɛ bati flee a kĩ bɛtɛ Baguma kadikanyi ni, be fɔkɛlatsa atsa kĩ fɔnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali fɔlɛtsa.”
Yesu Naa Simon Farisini a Awã.
36Farisini odi vɛ Yesu kĩ ɛyaanya nɛ ye awã. Yesu tunɔ ɛnaa ɛnadzi bɛkanya. 37Otsole odi kĩ ɛtábɔa ɔbla wĩ na nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ. Kĩ enu kĩ Yesu na nɛ Farisini a tɔtɔ kamɛ ɛkanya a, ɛbɔɛ tumpã mɔkalɛ mɔ kugua mɔ ɔlɛ̃ mɔlɛ̃ ɛyamɛna nɛ awã. 38Ɛdza nɛ Yesu liti nɛ ye abɔa ɔwɛ̃ ade ɛkabe kako nɛ ye fɔnɛta akũ a. Otsole kĩĩ kɔa ye lɔlɔ tɔlɔ ɛyɔ babe a nɛ Yesu fɔnɛta, ade efifi foe akũ, ɛkɔa kugua a lɛmɛ eko nɛ foe akũ a.
39Kĩ Farisini a mɔ fukĩĩ a, ɛlɛ nɛ ye lɔlɔ kamɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ obi kĩĩ mɔ nuwĩ Baguma onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ yanɛ ni, kufɛ yaanyi kĩ otsole a odu kĩ ɛlamɛna ye katalɛ a nyɛ titikpa ɔkɛnanɛ!”
40Ade Yesu bi Farisini a kĩ, “Simon, ndeĩ kalɛ kĩ mabi nɔ.”
Simon kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, bi yĩ lɛtsa a.”
41Ade Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Banyole nviã badi dzimɔ sika ɔvɛ ɔkpanɛ odi kɔtɔ. Ɔmɔa dzimɔ ye sika kĩ siwo tidetɔ ewua kɔtɔkase, ade ɔyade a lɛmɛ dzimɔ ye odetɔ mɔa kɔtɔkase a. 42Bati kĩĩ tápuli bise ye fɔtɔ kĩĩ, foesũ ɛkɔa ete be. Bati nviã kĩĩ kamɛ ɔwɔdabe aawɛ sika ɔvɛ ɔkpanɛ a kalɛ ɛba?”
43Ade Simon kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Matɛ kado kĩ oti a kĩ bɛkɔa kɔtɔ kpale bite ye a.”
Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Ɔlɛ ɔnɔkɔali.”
44Ade Yesu dani ɛdã otsole a ebi Simon kĩ, “Amɔ otsole kĩĩ? Kĩ nwo nɛ nɔ tɔtɔ kamɛ a, ɔtákpa yĩ mui kĩ nvɔlɛ fɔnɛta, lɛmɛ otsole kĩĩ kɔa ye babe ɛvɔlɛ yĩ fɔnɛta, ɛkɔa ye tɔlɔ lɛmɛ ɛyɔ be. 45Ɔtákɛna yĩ atuu, lɛmɛ kito lɔkɔ a kĩ ĩya nɛ awĩ a, otsole kĩĩ táfɔ̃ yĩ fɔnɛta kafifi. 46Ɔtákpa yĩ kugua ntsɛla nɛ lɔlɔ kamɛ, lɛmɛ ɛkɔa kugua mɔ ɔlɛ̃ mɔ ɔlɛ̃ ɛtsɛla yĩ fɔnɛta. 47Foesũ mabi nɔ kĩ nɛ ɔdɔ a kĩ ɛnyɛ ɛtsa kĩĩ a sũ ni, bɛkɔa ye titikpa beblebee a bite ye. Lɛmɛ oti kĩ bɛkɔa fɔtsa kabii bite ni, ɔdɔ kabii yanyɛ katsa.” 48Yesu bi otsole a kĩ, “Bɛkɔa nɔ titikpa bite nɔ.”
49Bati a kĩ bɛna nɛ kanyakɔ̃ a kavia be akũ kĩ, “Owei nɛ awĩ a kĩ yakɔa bati tɔkpa malo kate?”
50Ade Yesu bi otsole a kĩ, “Nɔ katɛkado tɛ nɔ. Naa nɛ lukudɔ kamɛ.”

Title: LUKA 8
Content:
Batsole Badi Kĩ Bitomɔ Yesu.
1Nɛ fukĩĩ liti a, Yesu tsã emini nɛ tɛmatɔ mɔ tukula a kĩ tifuã a kamɛ ɛkalɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a nɛ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a akũ. Ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ ewua-nviã a lɛmɛ tomɔ ye. 2Batsole badi kĩ Yesu blɔmɛna hũhũ kpa nɛ be kamɛ, mɔ bikĩ ɛtsa be fɔsɔ lɛmɛ tomɔ ye. Be kamɛ ɔmɔa nyɛ Maria Magdalani kĩ ye kamɛ ɛblɔmɛna hũhũ kpa evũkɔnɔ etomɛna a. 3Otsole a odi lɛmɛ nyɛ Yohana, kĩ bavɛ ɔnyɔ kĩ Kusa kĩ ɛnya ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ nɛ Lɛgã Herodes fɔlɛtsa kadzɛkɔ̃, Susana mɔ batsole bɛbã pii kĩ bɛkɔa be mɔawɛ akũ fɔtsa bɛkadãmɛna Yesu mɔ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ akũ a.
Lɛgbã Nɛ Okuani Odi Akũ.
4Bati kato tɛmatɔ pii kamɛ kaya nɛ Yesu sɛkɛ̃, ade kĩ bati beblebee yakpɔta a, ɛbɔa be lɛgbã kĩĩ kĩ, 5“Luwi a okuani odi naasã funitsã babi. Kĩ ɛkasã be a badi wula nɛ osi ɔɔwɛ̃ ade ke bati sumini be, kɔvɔlabi lɛmɛ tsuli be a. 6Badi wula nɛ apibɔ akũ, ade kĩ bɛmɛ a bɛvɛ biku, kitonɛkĩ apibɔ a kamɛ lɛla mui. 7Badi wula nɛ tuwĩ mɔ fu kamɛ. Tuwĩ mɔ fu a mɛ tipi be. 8Badi lɛmɛ wula nɛ tite wĩ akũ, bɛmɛ bibo anɛ, kutse nyɛ kutse wũ babi kpasaa.”
Ade Yesu wũna kĩ, “Oti kĩ edeĩ atɔ ni, etse katse wĩ!”
Lɛtsa Sũ a Kĩ Yesu Bɔa Fɔgbã.
9Yesu fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a via ye lɛgbã a kayɔ. 10Ade ebi be kĩ, “Bɛnyɛ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ fɔtsa kɔlawa a bɛtsa mi, lɛmɛ bati bɛbã a kɔ̃ ni, fɔgbã kamɛ fɔaya kakpa be ayekĩ,
‘Baadã lɛmɛ bɛláamɔ biyi ɔsũ,
baanu lɛmɛ bɛláa nu foe kayɔ.’
Yesu Nyɛ Lɛgbã Nɛ Okuani Akũ a Kayɔ.
11“Lɛgbã a kayɔ nyɛ fukĩĩ. Funitsã babi a nyɛ Baguma kalɛ a. 12Babi a kĩ biwula nɛ osi ɔɔwɛ̃ nyɛ bati a kĩ binu kalɛ a, lɛmɛ Abonsam yanyɛ kalɛ a nɛ be tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ, ayekĩ bɛláatɛ bido bɛna katɛ 13Bikĩ biwula nɛ apibɔ akũ a nyɛ bati a kĩ binu kalɛ a, bɛtɛ ke mɔ kawɔlɛ, lɛmɛ kɛtáwo nɛ be kamɛ dzununuunu. Bɛtɛ bido nɛ lɔkɔ lukũ odi kamɛ, ade ntɛ sɔhuiɛ adi ya ni, bamuniki liti. 14Babi a kĩ biwula nɛ tuwĩ mɔ fu kamɛ a nyɛ bati a kĩ binu kalɛ a bɛtɛ ke lɛmɛ katinya kamɛ ɔhau, akũ fɔtsa kawɛ mɔ katinya kamɛ kawɔlɛkamɔ anya be akũ, kafɔ̃ baábo anɛ kawũ babi kayɔɔlɛ. 15Lɛmɛ babi a kĩ biwula nɛ tite wĩ akũ a nyɛ bati a kĩ binu kalɛ a, bɛtɛ ke nɛ tɔwɔlɛ wĩ mɔ obu kamɛ ade bipini ke mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kɛnawo kĩ biwũ babi a.
Fɔ̃ Ɔsɛdza Ɛkpalɛ Fɔkɔ Ɛkpa Bati.
16“Odima látɛna ɔsɛdza kakɔa lɔɔda kasua ye, ĩye kakɔa ye kado nɛ mpa kayɔ. Mbom yadɛla ye kate nɛ ɔsɛdza otse akũ ayekĩ bati aamɔ fɔkɔ ntɛ bawo nɛ tɔtɔ kamɛ.
17“Lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ bɛkɔa bɛkɔla ni, baanyɛ de kanya. Ade lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ bisua de ni, baamɔ de bɛnyɛ bɛyamɛna nɛ ɔhaĩ kamɛ. 18Mitse lɛtsa a kĩ mianu a katse wĩ, kitonɛkĩ okĩ edeĩ fɔlɛtsa kayɔkanu ni, baakpa ye kayɔkanu bibu, lɛmɛ okĩ ɛla kayɔkanu kadima ni, baatɛ sukuloo a kĩ ɛkɔna kĩ edeĩ a malo nɛ ye awɛ.”
Bawei Koũ Nyɛ Yesu Ɔma Mɔ Bawaɛ̃?
19Luwi a, Yesu ɔma mɔ bawaɛ̃ ya nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ lɛmɛ bɛtápuli bifuã ye nɛ bati lidede sũ. 20Ade ke odi bi Yesu kĩ, “Ama mɔ awaɛ̃ amɛ dzɛ̃ nɛ kanya kĩ bawɛ bɛmɔ́ nɔ.”
21Yesu kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Mma mɔ nwaɛ̃ amɛ nyɛ bikĩ batse Baguma kalɛ, bakɛna nɛ ke akũ.”
Yesu Dina Ɔwɛ Onukpɛ̃.
22Luwi a Yesu mɔ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a wo nɛ ɔkɔlɔ kamɛ ade ebi be kĩ, “Mifɔ̃ bunyina ɔwɔ lutubu baũ a bɔnaa abuĩ atide a.” Ade biyi ɔwɔ a kanyina kayɔ a. 23Kĩ biteĩ nɛ mui anɛ banaa a, Yesu wa tida. Deedimɔapɛ ɔwɛ mɔ ɔsĩ odi vũ nɛ lutubu baũ a akũ, ade ɛkabɔa mui kako nɛ ɔkɔlɔ a kamɛ, fɔfɔ̃ bɛna nɛ wuda mɔ nkpã kayite a.
24Ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a nadzɛla Yesu bibi ye kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate! Boe Ɔlate! Buku buyua!”
Awã naa Yesu yidza ɛdza ewũni nɛ ɔwɛ mɔ mui a akũ. Ɔwɛ mɔ mui a onukpɛ̃ dɔ, ade awã flee kɛna dĩĩ a. 25Ade evia ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ, “Nde mi katɛkado?”
Bɛkɛna saa, libe wo be lɛmɛ, ade bivia be akũ kĩ, “Owei nyɛ oti kĩĩ? Yado ɔwɛ mɔ mui onukpɛ̃ ade batse ye a!”
Yesu Blɔmɛna Hũhũ Kpa Nɛ Onyole Odi Kamɛ.
26Yesu mɔ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a nyina ɔwɔ lutubu baũ a bito Galilea tite akũ bɛyawo Gadara nɛ tite a sɛkɛ sitide a. 27Kĩ Yesu nɛ́ nɛ ɔkɔlɔ a kamɛ a, onyole odi kĩ hũhũ kpa na nɛ ye kamɛ nɛ eto ɔmatɔ a kamɛ ɛyatsɛlamɔ ye. Owi buna kĩ onyole kĩĩ tsã ɔdzɔ, ade yaádzi nɛ tɔtɔ kamɛ, mbom asie mɔ funikɛ kamɛ yadzi. 28Kĩ ɛmɔ Yesu a, ɛbɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba ade ɛbɔɛ ye akũ emuni nɛ Yesu abɔa kamɛ mɔ fɔwɔla kĩ, “Yesu Baguma Kpale Nɛ Ode Obi! Litsa akamɔ yĩ? Make nɔ aduli, takɛna yĩ awɔda!” 29Onyole a lɛ fukĩĩ kitonɛkĩ Yesu wũni nɛ hũhũ kpa a akũ kĩ ɛnɛ nɛ oti a kamɛ. Lɔkɔ pii hũhũ kpa a adzi nɛ ye akũ ade ntɛ bido ye nkɔsɔnkɔsɔ nɛ akpɔ mɔ abɔa malo a, yaveliveli ye lɔkɔa hũhũ kpa a akpã ye kanamɛna kɔsa kamɛ.
30Yesu via ye kĩ, “Nde bavɛ nɔ?”
Ade ɛkpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Bavɛ yĩ Lidede,” kitonɛkĩ hũhũ kpa beblebee wo nɛ ye kamɛ. 31Hũhũ kpa a ke Yesu aduli kĩ ɛtablɔmɛna be bɛnaawo nɛ lɛkɛ dzununuunu a kĩ lɛlá kakpulakɔ̃ a kamɛ.
32Baplakuo beblebee na nɛ ɔtɔ odi akũ bɛkadɛ. Foesũ hũhũ kpa a ke Yesu aduli kĩ ɛfɔ̃ bɛnɛ bɛnawo nɛ be kamɛ, ade Yesu lɛmɛ kpa osi a. 33Ade bɛnɛ nɛ onyole a kamɛ bɛnawo nɛ baplakuo a kamɛ a. Be kɔdabu a flee wula atsɛ bɛka ɔtɔ sɛkɛ geĩ a biwo nɛ mui kamɛ, bɛmɔa mui biku.
34Kĩ bikĩ badãmɛna baplakuo akũ a mɔ́ lɛtsa kĩ lɛya a, bilo bɛnaa ɔmatɔ mɔ tukula kamɛ bɛkabi bati lɛtsa kĩ lɛya a. 35Bati nɛ bɛyaadã lɛtsa kĩ lɛya. Ade kĩ biwo Yesu sɛkɛ̃ a bɛmɔ́ onyole a kĩ ye kamɛ hũhũ kpa a nɛ a kĩ edzi nɛ ye abɔa kayɔ. Edo atadiɛ ade ye anɛ kamɛ lɛmɛ kpalɛ. Libe wo bati a flee. 36Bikĩ bɛmɔ́ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya a bi bati ayekĩ bɛblɔmɛna hũhũ kpa nɛ oti a kamɛ. 37Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ bati a flee nɛ Gadara kayite a na ke Yesu aduli kĩ ɛdzakũ nɛ be tite akũ, kitonɛkĩ libe wo be paa. Nɛ foesũ ewo nɛ ɔkɔlɔ a kamɛ ɛdzakũ.
38Onyole a kĩ ye kamɛ hũhũ kpa a nɛ a ke Yesu aduli kĩ, “Fɔ̃ ntomɔ nɔ bɔnaa.” Lɛmɛ Yesu nyɛ ye osi, ebi ye kĩ, 39“Muniki kanaa ɔtɔ kanaalɛ lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma kɛna ɛkpa nɔ a.”
Onyole a tsã nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ ɛkalɛ lɛtsa a kĩ Yesu kɛna ɛkpa ye a.
Yesu Tsa Yairo Obitsole Mɔ Otsole Odi.
40Kĩ Yesu muniki ɛnaa ɔwɔ lutubu baũ sɛkɛ sitide a, bati a tɛ ye mɔ kawɔlɛ kitonɛkĩ be flee bidzi bɛkadzɔlɛ ye. 41Ade ke onyole odi kĩ bavɛ Yairo kĩ ɛnyɛ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ ɔmɔa nɛ Yudafɔ katsɛnakɔ̃ ya nɛ awã a. Ɛyake aduli nɛ Yesu abɔa kamɛ ɛwã ye kĩ ɛfɔ̃ bɛnaa ye tɔtɔ kamɛ, 42kitonɛkĩ ye obitsole mɔapɛ kĩ ɛtɛ futeli ewua-nviã waa nɛ wuda mɔ nkpã kayite.
Kĩ Yesu kanaa a, bati pii yi ye akũ. 43Otsole odi kĩ akũ awula ye futeli ewua-nviã flee lɛmɛ na nɛ bati a kamɛ. Otsole kĩĩ bula ye sika flee kade nɛ fɔsɔ batsanɛ sɛkɛ̃ lɛmɛ odima tápuli ɛtsa ye. 44Ɛkɛna bɔɛɛ ɛtsã bati a kamɛ nɛ Yesu liti ɛta ye atadiɛ sɔtɔ. Deedimɔapɛ babɔanɛ a fɔ̃ kawula.
45Ade ke Yesu via kĩ, “Owei lɛta yĩ?”
Lɛmɛ odima tákpeti. Foesũ Petro bi ye kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, dã ayekĩ bati beblebee yi nɔ akũ!”
46Lɛmɛ Yesu lɛ kĩ, “Mmɔ́ nɛ yĩ kamɛ kĩ odi ta yĩ ni, kitonɛkĩ kɔbɛ̃ kudi nɛ kuto yĩ kamɛ.”
47Kĩ otsole a mɔ eyi ɔsũ kĩ bɛmɔ́ ye sũ ni, ɛna nɛ kukũtila kamɛ ɛnɛ ɛyake aduli nɛ Yesu abɔa kamɛ. Nɛ bati a flee anɛ kamɛ na, ebi ye lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa. Ebi ye lɛtsa a kĩ de sũ ɛta ye, mɔ ayekĩ ɛsaɛ lɛtalɛta a. 48Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Yĩ obitsole, nɔ katɛkado kpa nɔ akũ ɔsĩ. Naa nɛ lukudɔ kamɛ.”
49Lɔkɔ a kĩ Yesu kalɛ fukĩĩ a, ɔtɔ to Yudafɔ katsɛnakɔ̃ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a awã ɛyabi Yairo kĩ, “Nɔ obitsole a ku, fɔtábuki fusĩ kĩ aha fɔtsa ɔtsanɛ a.”
50Lɛmɛ kĩ Yesu nu fɔlɛtsa a ebi Yairo kĩ, “Tavila. Nɔ kɔ̃ tɛ kado, obisɛ̃ a aasaɛ.”
51Kĩ Yesu wo Yairo tɔtɔ kamɛ a, ɛtákpa odima osi ewo nɛ kɔla a kamɛ, mbɔɛntɛ Petro mɔ Yohanes mɔ Yakobo mɔ obisɛ̃ a ɔlɛga mɔ ɔma odi. 52Bati pii dza nɛ awã bɛkabe mɔ kɔnya nɛ obisɛ̃ a wuda sũ. Ade Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mifɔ̃ kabe. Obisɛ̃ a táku. Tida kɛkɛ ɛwaa.”
53Lɛmɛ bati a flee mɛmɛ ye kitonɛkĩ binyina kĩ obisɛ̃ a ku. 54Ade Yesu pi obisɛ̃ a nɛ kɔkpɔ ɛvɛ ye kɔɔba kĩ, “Yĩ obi, yidza kadza!” 55Ade ke katsolebi a nyinya kiyidza kɛdza deedimɔapɛ a. Yesu bi be kĩ bɛkpa ke funitsã kɛnya. 56Fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ nyɛnɛ bamanɛ a akũ, lɛmɛ Yesu si be mbla kĩ bɛtabi odima lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya a.

Title: LUKA 9
Content:
Yesu Do Ye Fɔtsa Bakɔlɛnɛ Ewua-nviã a Fɔtɔ.
1Luwi a, Yesu vɛ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ ewua-nviã a ɛkpɔta, ade ɛkpa be kɔbɛ̃ mɔ otumi kĩ bɛblɔmɛna hũhũ kpa flee, bɛtsa fɔsɔ kumɛkumɛ lɛmɛ. 2Edo be kĩ bɛnaalɛ kalɛ nɛ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a akũ, lɔkɔa bɛtsa basɔnɛ. 3Fɔmɔ baanaa ni, Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mitabɔɛ lɛtsama ndɛ otse kĩ bake katsã, fɔtsa bawãnɛ kuvũ, funitsã ĩye sika milɛ. Mitabɔɛ atadiɛ ayade malo mibu. 4Kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ kĩ mise ni, mina nɛ tɔtɔ a kamɛ kɛnaawo lɔkɔ a kĩ míadzakũ nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ. 5Awã kĩ bati tátɛ mi ni, minɛ nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ lɔkɔa mikpa mi abɔa kudu miko nɛ be akũ, fɔnya nsɛntsɛlɛni fɔkpa be kĩ Baguma aavɛlɛ be sɔtɔ.” 6Ade fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a namini nɛ tukula a flee kamɛ bɛkalɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a, bɛkatsa basɔnɛ a nɛ kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ a.
Lɛgã Herodes Kɛna Basaa.
7Kĩ Lɛgã Herodes, Galilea tite akũ ɔnyanɛ a nu fɔtsa kĩ fɔlamɛna kaya a, ɛkɛna basaa, kitonɛkĩ bati badi kalɛ kĩ Yohanes Mui Ɔwɔlanɛ a libuki eyidza edzi nkpã. 8Bati bɛbã lɛmɛ lɛ kĩ Eliya libuki ɛya, ade babɛbã lɛmɛ lɛ kĩ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ kɔɛ a kamɛ odi liyidza edzi nkpã. 9Lɛgã Herodes lɛ kĩ, “Nfɔ̃ bitsua Yohanes lɔlɔ, mɔ owei nyɛ oti a kĩ ye akũ fɔlɛtsa manu a?” Foesũ Lɛgã Herodes kabɔa mbɔdi kĩ yamɔ Yesu.
Yesu Kpa Bati Mpim Elo Funitsã Bɛnya.
10Kĩ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a muniki bɛya a, bibi Yesu lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bɛkɛna. Ade ɛkpã be odi bɛnɛ bɔɛɛ bɛnaa Betsaida ɔmatɔ a kamɛ a. 11Lɛmɛ kĩ bati kɔdabu a nu foe a, bitomɔ ye bɛnaa awã. Yesu tɛ be ade ebi be fɔlɛtsa nɛ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ akũ, ɛtsa bikĩ bisĩ fɔsɔ katsa lɛmɛ a.
12Kĩ suwa anaa katomukɔ̃ a, Yesu fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ ewua-nviã yabi ye kĩ, “Fɔ̃ bati a bɛdzakũ bɛnaa tukula mɔ fɔpɛ a kĩ fufuã a kamɛ bɛnaawɛ funitsã mɔ fɔwakɔ̃ kitonɛkĩ awĩ lɛnyɛ́ bati kadzikɔ̃.”
13Lɛmɛ Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mi mɔawɛ a miwɛ litsedi mikpa be bɛnya.”
Ade bɛkpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Funitsã flee kĩ bɔnɛɛ nyɛ abodoo elo mɔ kɔfɔabi tɔlɛwa nviã. Awɛ kĩ bɔnaaya funitsã bɔma bati beblebee kĩĩ?” 14Banyole ndɛ be mpim elo na nɛ awã.
Ade Yesu bi ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ, “Mifɔ̃ bati a bidzi nɛ kutsukutsu kamɛ. Katsu nyɛ katsu kiwo ndɛ bati aduenum.” 15Kĩ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kɛna foe lɔmɔ biyua a, 16Yesu bɔɛ abodoo elo mɔ kɔfɔabi nviã a, ɛdɛla anɛ ɛdã odetɔ́ kamɛ, ɛnyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ, ade ebulibuli ye ɛkɔa ɛkpa ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ bɛsɛ̃ bɛkpa bati a. 17Bati a flee nya biwĩ, ade ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a fila fukĩ fute a biyula tɛtsɛtsɛ ewua-nviã a.
Petro Nyɛ Ɛtsa Kĩ Yesu Nyɛ Kristo a.
18Luwi a, kĩ Yesu odi na ɛkabɔa mpaɛ a, ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a ya nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ ade evia be kĩ, “Owei bati alɛ kĩ ye manɛ?”
19Bɛlɛ kĩ, “Badi alɛ kĩ nɔ nyɛ Yohanes Mui Ɔwɔlanɛ a. Badi alɛ kĩ nɔ nyɛ Baguma Onukpɛ̃ Ɔnyɛnɛ Eliya, ade babɛbã lɛmɛ alɛ kĩ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ kɔɛ a kamɛ odi liyidza edzi nkpã.”
20Ade evia be kĩ, “Nde nyɛ mi lɛmɛ? Owei mialɛ kĩ ye manɛ?”
Awã naa, Petro kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Nɔ nyɛ Baguma Kristo a.” 21Ade Yesu si be mbla mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ bɛtabi odima fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ.
Yesu Lɛ Kalɛ Nɛ Ye Lubokamɔ Mɔ Wuda Akũ.
22Yesu buki ebi be kĩ, “Kɛnɛ kĩ Otidziwa Obi a ɛmɔ lubo paa nɛ ɔmaĩ banɔkɔɛ̃, Yudafɔ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ Yudafɔ mbla batsanɛ a awɛ. Baasĩ ye lɔkɔa bɛkɔ ye, lɛmɛ nɛ luwi lɛlalɛde akũ ni, Baguma aadzɛla ye etomɛna banɔkpa kamɛ edzi nkpã.”
23Ade ebi bati a flee kĩ, “Ntɛ odi awɛ kĩ yatomɔ yĩ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ yafɔnɛ ye apɛdiɛ awɛ, ɛbɔɛ ye lubo kamɔ fɔlɔtsa luwi nyɛ luwi lɔkɔa etomɔ yĩ nɛ liti. 24Kitonɛkĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ kĩ yapili ye nkpã ni, yaayɛla ye, lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛfɔnɛ ye nkpã awɛ ɛkpa nɛ yĩ katomɛna sũ ni, yaana nkpã wĩ a kĩ ɛlá kawũna a. 25Litsa nfasɔ oti aana ntɛ ɛna katinya kamɛ fɔtsa flee lɛmɛ ɛyɛla ye mɔawɛ nkpã? 26Ntɛ yĩ mɔ yĩ fɔtsa a kĩ matsa a nyɛ fɔnyɔãtsa fɔkpa odi ni, ye malo yaanya fɔnyɔãtsa ɛkpa Yĩ Otidziwa Obi a, ntɛ ĩya nɛ yĩ kukũkpalɛ mɔ Nda mɔ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ kpalɛwa kukũkpalɛ a kamɛ. 27Mabi mi pipiipi kĩ badi deĩ nɛ mi kamɛ nɛ awĩ kĩ bɛláaku kɛnaawo kĩ Baguma aanyɛ ye lɛgãkanya a ɛtsa be.”
Yesu Vɛmɛna Ye Akũ Nɛ Ɔtɔ Akũ.
28Ndɛ ɛkwansieda mɔa liti kĩ Yesu lɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a, ɛkpã Petro, Yohanes mɔ Yakobo bide bɛnaa ɔtɔ odi akũ kĩ banaabɔa mpaɛ. 29Kĩ ɛkabɔa mpaɛ a ye anɛ kamɛ dani, ade ye tɛtadiɛ kɛna fita fita, tɛkata muamua a. 30Ade banyole nviã kĩ bɛnyɛ Mose mɔ Eliya nɛ bɛdza bɛmɔ Yesu bɛkalɛ kɔdzɛla a. 31Bɛna nɛ ode kukũkpalɛ kamɛ ade bɛkalɔmɛna mɔ Yesu nɛ osi a kĩ ye akũ yaatsã ɛkɛna nɛ Baguma nhihiɛ a kĩ ɛkɛna eyi kĩ yaaku nɛ Yerusalem akũ a. 32Titɔ kĩ Petro mɔ ye bade a wa tida kɔlaa malo ni, binyinya bɛmɔ́ Yesu kukũkpalɛ mɔ bati nviã a kĩ bɛdza nɛ ye ɔwɛ̃ a. 33Kĩ bati a adzakũ a, Petro bi Yesu kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, fɔnɛnɛ paa kĩ bɔya nɛ awĩ. Bɔ́abɔa fɔpɛ ɛlalɛ, nɔ lide lɔmɔa, Mose lide lɔmɔa, Eliya lɛmɛ lide lɔmɔa.” Lɛmɛ ɛtáti enyi lɛtsa a kĩ de ɛkalɛ a malo.
34Kĩ ɛkalɛ kɔdzɛla a, luflututu ka ade de kuyo ko nɛ be akũ a. Fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a vila nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ luflututu a ka lisua be akũ a. 35Ade odo odi nɛ eto luflututu a kamɛ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Ade yĩ obi a kĩ mpau a. Mitse ye kalɛ.” 36Kĩ odo a tsua a, Yesu odi lite nɛ awã. Fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a sua onukpɛ̃ nɛ fukĩĩ flee akũ ade bɛtábi odima kadima nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bɛmɔ́ a akũ nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ a.
Yesu Tsa Kanyolebi Kĩ Hũhũ Kpa Deĩ Nɛ Ke Kamɛ.
37Kĩ kade nyina a, Yesu mɔ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ ɛlalɛ a ka ɔtɔ a, ade bati kɔdabu baũ kudi yatsɛlamɔ ye a. 38Onyole odi nɛ bati a kamɛ bɔa fɔwɔla ɛlɛ kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ! Make nɔ aduli dã yĩ obi kakpa yĩ, yĩ obi mɔapɛ! 39Hũhũ kpa adi adzi nɛ ye akũ lɔkɔa yabɔa fɔwɔla. Odetɔ́ fɔsɔ ade kadzi nɛ ye akũ, kabɔɛ ye kamuni, lɔkɔa kuvũ anɛ nɛ ye onukpɛ̃. Fɔafɔ̃ yapila ade hũhũ a lɛvá ye awɛ kafɔnɛ lɛmɛ a. 40Nke nɔ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a aduli kĩ bɛblɔmɛna hũhũ kpa a, lɛmɛ bɛtápuli.”
41Ade Yesu bi be kĩ, “O nviã babi mɔ atɔ ɔsĩ kĩ milá katɛkado! Lɔkɔ lɔwɔdabe maana nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃, nna ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ lɛmɛ nkpa mi?” Ade ebi onyole a kĩ, “Kpã nɔ obi a kayamɛna nɛ awĩ.”
42Kĩ kanyolebi a yɛlɛ kaya a, hũhũ kpa a bɔɛ ye emuni nɛ tite ade ke odetɔ́ fɔsɔ de fudzi nɛ ke akũ a. Awã naa Yesu do hũhũ kpa a onukpɛ̃, ade ɛtsa kanyolebi a ɛkɔa ke ɛkpa ɔlɛga a. 43Baguma kɔbɛ̃ baũ lɛkɛnana kĩĩ kɛna bati a flee saa.
Yesu Buki Ɛlɛ Kalɛ Nɛ Ye Wuda Akũ.
Kĩ bati a kakɔna lɔlɔ kamɛ nɛ awãwã fɔtsa a kĩ Yesu kɛna akũ a, ebi ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ, 44“Mitalɛla lɛtsa a kĩ maabi mi a! Baakɔa Otidziwa Obi a bido nɛ bati awɛ.” 45Lɛmɛ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a tánu foe kayɔ. Bɛkɔa foe bɛkɔla be kĩ bɛtanu foe kayɔ ade bivila kĩ bavia ye foe kayɔ a.
Yesu Tsa Oti a Odu Kĩ Ɛbɛ̃ Flee a.
46Fɔlɛtsa kavɛlɛ ya nɛ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kamɛ nɛ owula a kĩ ye bɛ̃ flee nɛ be kamɛ. 47Kĩ Yesu nyi lɛtsa kĩ bɛkakɔna a, ɛvɛ obisɛ̃ odi ɛyadzɛla nɛ ye ɔwɛ̃. 48Ade ebi be kĩ, “Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ obisɛ̃ kĩĩ nɛ yĩ dĩ akũ ni, ade yĩ ɛtɛ a, ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ yĩ ni, ɛtɛ owula a kĩ edo yĩ fɔtɔ a. Kitonɛkĩ owula kĩ ɛnyɛ obisɛ̃ kɔlaa nɛ mi kamɛ a, ade ye lɛtɛ kɔya ɛbɛ̃ a.”
Oti Kĩ Ɛdzɛ́ Nɛ Mi Akũ Ni, Etomɔ Mi.
49Yohanes bi Yesu kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, bɔmɔ́ onyole odi kĩ ɛkablɔmɛna hũhũ kpa nɛ nɔ dĩ akũ, lɛmɛ busua ye osi, kitonɛkĩ ɛláa boe kamɛ.”
50Yesu bi ye mɔ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ bɛbã a kĩ, “Mitasua ye osi, kitonɛkĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛdzɛ́ nɛ mi akũ ni, mi etomɛna.”
Samariafɔ Badi Sĩ Yesu.
51Kĩ lɔkɔ kawo ɔtɔ kĩ Baguma aabɔɛ Yesu ɛnamɛna ode a, esipi kĩ yanaa Yerusalem. 52Edo fɔtɔ banyanɛ badi bɛnya ye lɔtɔ bɛnaa Samaria akula adi kamɛ kĩ bɛnaamanɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa bɛkpa ye kaya. 53Lɛmɛ akula a kamɛ bati sĩ kĩ baátɛ Yesu, kitonɛkĩ binyina kĩ ɛtɛ̃ yanaa Yerusalem. 54Kĩ Yohanes mɔ Yakobo nu fɔlɛtsa a, bivia Yesu kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, awɛ kĩ bɔvɛ fi butomɛna ode fɔyaawɔla be?” 55Lɛmɛ Yesu dani ɛkã be anɛ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Minyína Hũhũ a kĩ ye bade mianɛ! Yĩ Otidziwa Obi a ntáya kĩ mayaawɔla bati, mbom ĩya kĩ maatɛ be nkpã.” 56Foesũ Yesu mɔ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a tɛ̃ bɛnaa akula bɛbã kamɛ.
Bati Badi Wɛ Kĩ Batomɔ Yesu.
57Kĩ bɛtsɛ̃ banaa a, onyole odi bi Yesu kĩ, “Maatomɔ nɔ nnaa kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ kĩ aanaa.”
58Ade Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Kulikii deĩ fudzikɔ̃, kɔvɔlabi lɛmɛ deĩ fɔtsɔɛ, lɛmɛ Otidziwa Obi a lɛlá awã kĩ yate lɔlɔ malo.”
59Ebi oti bɛbã kĩ, “Tomɔ yĩ.”
Lɛmɛ oti a lɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, maatomɔ nɔ, lɛmɛ fɔ̃ nnaabila nda tɔ̃.”
60Ade Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Fɔnɛ bikĩ bɛlá Baguma nkpã mɔawɛ a bibila be banɔkpa. Nɔ kɔ̃ naa kanaade lɛtsã nɛ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a akũ.”
61Oti bɛbã kɔ̃ lɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, maatomɔ nɔ, lɛmɛ fɔ̃ nnaakla yĩ kɔla bati tɔ̃.”
62Ade ke Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Oti kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ yapupu, mɔ yadani kadã liti ni, ɛtáfɛta ɛkpa Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ adzuma a.”

Title: LUKA 10
Content:
Yesu Do Fɔtsa Bakɔlɛnɛ Adueson-nviã Fɔtɔ.
1Fukĩĩ liti a, boe Ɔlate pau bati aduesɔũ-nviã bɛbã, ade edo be nviã nviã kĩ bɛnya lɔtɔ bɛnaa tɛmatɔ mɔ tukula a kĩ ye mɔawɛ yaatsã te kamɛ a kamɛ. 2Ade ebi be kĩ, “Fudutsa a kĩ míave a pɔnɛ lɛmɛ adzuma bakɛnanɛ a lɛpɔ́nɛ. Mibɔa mpaɛ mikpa kɔba ɔlate a kĩ edo adzuma bakɛnanɛ pii bɛyaave fudutsa a. 3Minaa! Mado mi fɔtɔ ndɛ bavelibi nɛ kulikii kamɛ. 4Mitabɔɛ sika kuvũ, ĩye osi katsã fuvũ, ĩye mpabua milɛ, ade mitafɔ̃ midza nɛ osi kĩ miawɔ̃na odima a.
5“Ntɛ miwo tɔtɔ tidi kamɛ ni, minya lɔtɔ milɛ kĩ, ‘Lukudɔ lɛya nɛ tɔtɔ kĩĩ kamɛ.’ 6Ntɛ oti kĩ yawɛ lukudɔ deĩ nɛ awã ni, mifɔ̃ mi lukudɔ a litomɔ ye. Lɛmɛ ntɛ odima lɛláa ni, mi nhila a aamuniki ɛya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃. 7Mina nɛ tɔtɔ mɔapɛ a kamɛ, minya mimɔa lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bɛkpa mi. Kitonɛkĩ adzuma ɔkɛnanɛ odi nyɛ odi sĩ kɔtɔkase. Mitatu nɛ tɔtɔ mɔa kamɛ minaa tɔtɔ bɛbã kamɛ.
8“Ntɛ miwo ɔmatɔ odi kamɛ mɔ bɛtɛ mi ni, minya lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bɛkpa mi. 9Mitsa basɔnɛ nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ lɔkɔa mibi bati a kĩ, ‘Baguma lɛgãkanya lɔkɔ a fuã mi.’ 10Lɛmɛ ntɛ miwo ɔmatɔ odi kamɛ mɔ bɛtátɛ mi ni, midzakũ minaa ye tɔblɔnu akũ lɔkɔa milɛ kĩ, 11‘Bɔkpa mi ɔmatɔ kudu a nɛ boe abɔa buko nɛ mi akũ. Lɛmɛ mite anɛ kĩ Baguma lɛgãkanya lɔkɔ a fuã mi!’ 12Ade mabi mi pipiipi kĩ nɛ bati kadzɛmɛna luwi a akũ ni, Baguma aamɔ Sodom ɔmatɔ a kɔnya ɛba ɔmatɔ a na!
Tɛmatɔ Tidi Kĩ Tisĩ Kalɛ a.
13“Bɔbɔɛ makpa nɔ Korasin ɔmatɔ, bɔbɔɛ makpa nɔ Betsaida ɔmatɔ a lɛmɛ! Ntɛ Tiro mɔ Sidon tɛmatɔ a kamɛ nkɛna awãwã fɔtsa ni, kufɛ bidzi nɛ tite, bisua fumakũ akũ, bɛtsɛla batɔ kɔkɔɛ, bɛkɔa bɛtsa kĩ bɛdani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ. 14Baguma aamɔ Tiro mɔ Sidon kɔnya nɛ kadzɛmɛna luwi a akũ ɛba mi. 15Ade nɔ Kapernaum ɔmatɔ! Kawɛ ɔwɛ kĩ adɛla nɔ akũ nɛ ode? Baakɛna nɔ nɛ kayɔ ɔnaa kanɔkpade!”
16Yesu bi ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ, “Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yatse mi kalɛ ni, ade yĩ yatse a. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ esĩ mi ni, ade yĩ esĩ a. Ade ke odi nyɛ odi kĩ esĩ yĩ ni, esĩ Baguma a kĩ edo yĩ fɔtɔ a lɛmɛ.”
Bati Adueson-nviã a Muniki Bɛya Nɛ Yesu Sɛkɛ̃.
17Bati aduesɔũ-nviã a muniki bɛya mɔ kawɔlɛ bɛyalɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, hũhũ kpa malo tse boe ntɛ buwũni nɛ be akũ nɛ nɔ dĩ akũ.”
18Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mmɔ́ Abonsam ndɛ odetɔ́ kamɛ kamɔanɛ aye kĩ eto ode ɛyatɔ. 19Mitse! Nkpa mi kɔbɛ̃ ayekĩ míapuli misuma bɔɛ mɔ kɔkpɔ̃na, ade míanya Okesĩnɛ a kɔbɛ̃ akũ kĩ lɛtsama lɛláakɛna mi a. 20Lɛmɛ kawɔlɛ kɛtade mi kĩ hũhũ kpa tse mi kalɛ, mbom mimɔ kawɔlɛ kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ mi buĩ biyi nɛ ode.”
Yesu Mu Baguma.
21Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ a, Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a kawɔlɛ wo nɛ Yesu kamɛ ade ɛlɛ kĩ, “Yĩ Ɔlɛga, tite mɔ ode Ɔlate, manyɛ nɔ kɔlɛ kitonɛkĩ fɔtsa a kĩ bɛkɔa bɛkɔla kadi banyinɛ mɔ tuvoli banyinɛ a, ɔnyɛ foe ɔtsa bikĩ binyína tuvoli ndɛ babisɛ̃ aye. Oo, Nda, ade aye koũ ɔwɛ kĩ fɔna a.”
22Yesu buki ɛlɛ kĩ, “Nda kɔa lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa edo nɛ yĩ awɛ. Odima linyína oti a kĩ Baguma Obi a anɛ mbɔɛntɛ Ɔlɛga a odi keĩ. Ade aye odima lɛmɛ linyína oti a kĩ Ɔlɛga a anɛ, mbɔɛntɛ Obi odi mɔ bikĩ Obi aawɛ kĩ yanyɛ Ɔlɛga ɛtsa a.”
23Ade Yesu dani ebi ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a odi bɔɛɛ kĩ, “Lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃ Baguma hila mi! Mi anɛ amɔ ade mi atɔ lɛmɛ anu fɔkɔ a. 24Mabi mi kĩ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ pii mɔ fɔgã wɛ kĩ bamɔ lɛtsa a kĩ mimɔ́ finyaa, lɛmɛ bɛtápuli bɛmɔ́, ade bɛwɛ kĩ banu lɛtsa a kĩ mianu a, lɛmɛ bɛtánu foe.”
Yesu Bi Be Kalɛ Nɛ Samariani Sɛmɛ Kalɛ Ɔkɛnanɛ Odi Akũ.
25Luwi a, Yudani mbla ɔtsanɛ a odi ya kĩ yasɔ Yesu ɛdã. Evia ye kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, litsa kɛnɛ kĩ nkɛna nna nkpã a kĩ ɛlá kawũna a?”
26Yesu kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Litsa Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ? Nde onu foe kayɔ?”
27Onyole a kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Wɛ nɔ Ɔlate, nɔ Baguma kalɛ mɔ nɔ ɔwɔlɛ flee, nɔ ɔkla flee nɔ kɔbɛ̃ flee mɔ nɔ kakɔna flee, kawɛ nɔ ɔkɔba kalɛ ndɛ ayekĩ awɛ nɔ mɔawɛ akũ a.”
28Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Ɔlɛ ɔnɔkɔali. Kɛna fukĩĩ lɔkɔa aana nkpã.”
29Lɛmɛ mbla ɔtsanɛ kĩĩ wɛ kĩ yakpa ye akũ ɔtɔbɛ, foesũ evia Yesu kĩ, “Owei nyɛ yĩ ɔkɔba?”
30Yesu kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Luwi a, onyole odi to Yerusalem yanaa Yeriko ɔmatɔ kamɛ, ade bayekpanɛ napi ye nɛ osi a. Bibo ye bɛyɛlɛ ye akũ tɛtadiɛ, ade bɛfɔnɛ ye awɛ biyi nɛ wuda mɔ nkpã kayite a. 31Fɔyaya kĩ ɔsɔfɔ odi yatsã nɛ osi a na akũ yatɛ̃, lɛmɛ kĩ ɛmɔ oti kĩĩ a ɛtsã ɔɔwɛ̃ ɛtɛ̃. 32Ade ayea Levini lɛmɛ yatɛ̃ a. Efuã ɛnadã onyole a, ade ye malo ɛtsã ɔɔwɛ̃ ɛtɛ̃ a. 33Lɛmɛ Samariani odi kĩ ɛtsɛ̃ osi a akũ yamɔ oti a. Kĩ ɛmɔ oti a, ye akũ kɔ ye kɔnya. 34Efuã ye ade ɛkɔa kugua mɔ bavɛ eko nɛ ye fɔɔkpa kamɛ esui foe a. Ade ɛbɔɛ onyole a ete nɛ ye mɔawɛ ɔyaɛ akũ, ɛkɔa ye ɛnamɛna banɔvɔɛ̃ kasɛkɔ̃ ade ɛdã ye akũ a. 35Kĩ kade nyina a, ɛnyɛ sika ɛkpa kasɛkɔ̃ a akũ ɔdãmɛnanɛ a ebi ye kĩ, ‘Dã ye akũ. Ntɛ mmuniki matɛ̃ ni maase nɔ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ aabuki obula kade nɛ ye akũ a kɔtɔ.’ ”
36Ade Yesu wũna evia ye kĩ, “Nɛ nɔ kakɔna onukpɛ̃ ni, bati ɛlalɛ kĩĩ kamɛ a, ɔwɔdabe lɛnyɛ ye tɔkɔba kakɛna ɛtsa oti a kĩ ewo nɛ bayekpanɛ awɛ kamɛ a?”
37Ade mbla ɔtsanɛ a kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Oti a kĩ ɛmɔ ye kɔnya a.” Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Kekɔ̃ nɔ malo naa kanaakɛna foe lɔmɔ.”
Yesu Nasɛla Marta Mɔ Maria.
38Luwi a, Yesu mɔ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a tsɛ̃ nɛ osi ade bɛnawo akula adi kamɛ a. Otsole odi kĩ bavɛ Marta tɛ ye nɛ ye tɔtɔ kamɛ. 39Marta deĩ ɔwaɛ̃tsole kĩ bavɛ Maria. Edzi nɛ boe Ɔlate ɔwɛ̃ ɛkatse ye fɔtsa katsa. 40Fɔha Marta kĩ tɔtɔ kamɛ adzuma ko nɛ ye odi akũ, foesũ ɛnabi Yesu kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, fɔtsɛ́la nɔ akũ kĩ nwaɛ̃ kɔa tɔtɔ kamɛ tudzuma a flee eko nɛ yĩ odi akũ? Bi ye ɛyaabumɛna yĩ!”
41Ade boe Ɔlate kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “O Marta! Dã, aha nɔ akũ nɛ fɔtsa pii akũ, 42lɛmɛ lɛtsa mɔapɛ lisĩ. Maria nyɛ lɛtsa wĩ a kĩ bɛláatɛ nɛ ye awɛ.”

Title: LUKA 11
Content:
Yesu Tsa Fɔtsa Nɛ Mpaɛ Kabɔa Akũ.
1Luwi a, Yesu kabɔa mpaɛ nɛ kakɔ kadi. Kĩ eyua a, ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kamɛ ɔmɔa bi ye kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, tsa boe mpaɛ kabɔa ndɛ ayekĩ Yohanes tsa ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a.”
2Yesu bi be kĩ, “Ntɛ miabɔa mpaɛ ni, milɛ kĩ,
‘Boe Ɔlɛga,
fɔ̃ bɛkpalɛ nɔ dĩ akũ.
Nɔ lɛgãkanya a kɛya.
Bɛkɛna nɛ nɔ kawɛ akũ,
nɛ tite akũ ndɛ ayekĩ bakɛna nɛ ode a.
3Kpa boe luwi nyɛ luwi funitsã a kĩ fusĩ boe a
4Kɔa boe tɔkpa kate boe
kitonɛkĩ boe malo bɔakɔa odi nyɛ odi tɔkpa kĩ ɛkɛna nɛ boe akũ a kate.
Tafɔ̃ buwo nɛ sɔhuiɛ kamɛ,
mbom nyɛ boe katomɛna tɔkpa kamɛ.’ ”
5Ade Yesu bi ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ, “Mibɔɛ foe kĩ mi kamɛ odi naa ɔkɔba sɛkɛ̃ mɔ lɛnyɛ kayite ɛnabi ye kĩ, ‘Ɔkɔba, vɛ abodoo fɔbɔ ɛlalɛ kakpa yĩ, 6kitonɛkĩ yĩ ɔkɔba odi to osi mɔ lugo akũ ɛyase yĩ finyaakĩĩ, ade nlá funitsã fudima kĩ makpa ye a!’
7“Bɔɛ foe kĩ nɔ ɔkɔba a nɛ́ nɛ kɔla kamɛ ɛkpa mbuayɛ kĩ, ‘Taha yĩ kɔlaa! Ndo kɔla safi ade bɔmɔ yĩ babi bɔwa kɔkɔɛ. Nláapuli mbuki ĩyidza mbɔɛ lɛtsama nkpa nɔ finyaa.’ 8Mabi mi kĩ ntɛ nɛ be tɔkɔba kakɛna sũ ni, ɛláayidza. Lɛmɛ nɛ ayekĩ ɛdzɛ̃mɛna opunu kabɔa sũ ni, yaayidza ɛkpa ye lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ lisĩ ye a.
9“Foesũ mabi mi kĩ mivia fɔtsa lɔkɔa baakpa mi, miwɛ lɔkɔa míamɔ foe, mibɔa opunu lɔkɔa baabinya bɛkpa mi. 10Kitonɛkĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛwã fɔtsa ni, yaana foe. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛwɛ litsedi ni, yaamɔ de, ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ yabɔa opunu ni, baabinya bɛkpa ye.
11“Mi kamɛ ɔwɔdabe kĩ ɛnyɛ obilɛga, aakɔa kɔɛ ɛkpa obi ntɛ evia ye kafɔabi? 12Ĩye ɛkɔa kakpɔ̃na ɛkpa ye ntɛ evia ye ɔkɔkɔ lige? 13Titɔ kĩ minyɛ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ malo ni, minyina ayekĩ miate mi babi fɔtsa wĩ. Nde fɔ́aya mɔ boe Ɔlɛga nɛ ode lɛláakɔa ye Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a ɛkpa bikĩ baavia ye a!”
Bati Badi Tɛ Atsindze Nɛ Yesu Kɔbɛ̃ Akũ.
14Luwi a, Yesu kablɔmɛna hũhũ kpa kĩ yaálɛ kɔdzɛla etomɛna odi kamɛ. Kĩ hũhũ kpa a nɛ a, oti a yi kɔdzɛla kalɛ kayɔ. Fukĩĩ kɛna bati a kĩ bɛdza nɛ awã a wãwã. 15Lɛmɛ bati a badi lɛ kĩ, “Hũhũ kpa lɛgã a kĩ bavɛ Beelzebul a lɛkpa ye kɔbɛ̃ ɛkɔa ɛblɔmɛna hũhũ kpa a.” 16Ade badi lɛmɛ wɛ kĩ basɔ Yesu bɛdã, foesũ bibi ye kĩ ɛkɛna awãwã fɔtsa ɛkɔa ɛtsa kĩ Baguma sɛkɛ̃ eto.
17Lɛmɛ Yesu nyi lɛtsa a kĩ bɛkakɔna a, foesũ ebi be kĩ, “Ɔmaĩ kĩ ɛsɛ̃ nɛ kutsu kutsu kamɛ, mɔ lɛma nɛ́ nɛ ye kamɛ ni, ɔmaĩ a na aawɔ. Ade aye tɔtɔ nyɛ tɔtɔ kĩ te kamɛ bati sɛ̃ be akũ ni, tayalɛ. 18Foesũ ntɛ Abonsam lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a sɛ̃ nɛ kutsu kutsu kamɛ mɔ banɔ akũ lɛma ni, nde kanyakɔ̃ a na aapuli kɛdza? Mialɛ kĩ mablɔmɛna hũhũ kpa kitonɛkĩ Beelzebul lɛkpa yĩ kɔbɛ̃ sũ. 19Ntɛ aye mablɔmɛna hũhũ kpa a ni, nde bikĩ bitomɔ mi a ablɔmɛna hũhũ kpa? Mi mɔawɛ bati a nyɛ mi kayɔ bɛtsa kĩ fɔvã miama. 20Oowo! Mbom Baguma kɔbɛ̃ akũ fɔtsɛ̃ mɔ mablɔmɛna hũhũ kpa, foesũ fukĩĩ atsa yededeede kĩ Baguma lɛgãkanya a wo mi sɛkɛ̃ kɔkɔɛ.
21“Ntɛ odi kĩ edeĩ kɔbɛ̃ dzi akpadza, edzi yadzɔlɛ ye tɔtɔ ni, enyina kĩ ye akũ fɔtsa waa pɛpɛɛpɛ. 22Lɛmɛ ntɛ odi kĩ edeĩ kɔbɛ̃ ɛbɛ̃ ye yanɔ mɔ ye ɛnya ye akũ ni, yafila ye kawũkanɔ fɔtsa a kĩ ete anɛ nɛ foe akũ a ɛsɛ̃ fɔtsa a kĩ ɛtɛ a.
23“Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛnyɛ́ yĩ ode ni, ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ yĩ akũ paa, ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaábumɔ yĩ bɔkpɔta ni, fɔtsa ɛlamɛna kayalɛ paa.”
Hũhũ Kpa Kamuniki Kaya.
24“Ntɛ hũhũ kpa nɛ́ nɛ oti kamɛ ni yanaatsã kamini nɛ fɔkɔ wɔlɛwa kawɛ kasekɔ̃. Ntɛ ɛtána kasekɔ̃ ni, yabi ye akũ kĩ, ‘Maamuniki nnaa yĩ tɔtɔ a kĩ te kamɛ nnɛ́ nto a kamɛ.’ 25Foesũ yamuniki kanaamɔ kĩ bɛyɔ tɔtɔ a kamɛ bɛmanɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa pɛpɛɛpɛ. 26Lɔkɔa yamuniki kanaawɛ hũhũ kpa evũkɔnɔ kĩ bideĩ ablɔ bɛbɛ̃ ye kabumɔ ye akũ bayaadzi nɛ awã. Ntɛ fɔya lɔmɔ a, oti a kadzi kamɛ abu kade kaba ayekĩ fɔna nɛ kayɔkayi a.”
Yesu Tsa Fɔtsa Nɛ Kawɔlɛ Wĩ a Akũ.
27Kĩ Yesu kalɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a, otsole odi bɔa fɔwɔla nɛ bati kɔdabu a kamɛ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Baguma hila otsole a kĩ ɛma nɔ, mɔ lɛmɛ a kĩ de ɔmɛmɛ a!”
28Lɛmɛ Yesu kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Mbom bihila bikĩ batse Baguma kalɛ, kĩ bakɛna nɛ ke akũ lɛmɛ a!”
Yesu Sĩ Kĩ Yaákɛna Awãwã Fɔtsa Ɛtsa.
29Kĩ bati kɔdabu a bɔa opim nɛ Yesu akũ a, ɛlɛ ɛnaa lɔtɔ kĩ, “Nviã babi nyɛ bati kpa paa! Bawɛ nsɛntsɛlɛni fɔtsa bɛmɔ́ lɛmɛ bɛláamɔ fudima kɛba Baguma Onukpɛ̃ Ɔnyɛnɛ Yona fude a. 30Ndɛ ayekĩ Yona nya nsɛntsɛlɛni ɛkpa Ninivefɔ a, ade aye Otidziwa Obi a lɛmɛ aanya nsɛntsɛlɛni nkpa nviã babi a. 31Nɛ Kadzɛ Luwi a akũ ni, Seba Lɛgãtsole a aayidza ɛdza ɛkɔ nviã babi kɔtɔ kitonɛkĩ eto ye tite akũ nɛ kakɔ mɔ lugo ɛnatse Lɛgã Salomo kadikanyi fɔtsa katsa a, lɛmɛ mabi mi kĩ odi kĩ ɛbɛ̃ Salomo deĩ nɛ awĩ. 32Ninivefɔ lɛmɛ aayidza bɛkɔ mi kɔtɔ nɛ Kadzɛ Luwi a akũ, kitonɛkĩ bɛdani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ Yona bi be Baguma kalɛ a. Lɛmɛ mabi mi kĩ odi kĩ ɛbɛ̃ Yona deĩ nɛ mi kamɛ nɛ awĩ.
Yesu Tsa Lɛtsa a Kĩ Lakpalɛ Oti Akũ.
33“Odima látɛna ɔsɛdza kakɔla ye ĩye kakɔa lɔɔda kasua ye. Mbom bakɔa ye kate nɛ ɔsɛdza otse akũ ayekĩ ntɛ bati awo nɛ tɔtɔ kamɛ ni, baamɔ fɔkɔ yededeede. 34Oti banebi kɛna ndɛ ɔsɛdza ɛkpa ye kutitse. Ntɛ nɔ anɛ amɔ kamɔ wĩ ni, nɔ kutitse a flee deĩ nɛ ɔhaĩ kamɛ. Lɛmɛ ntɛ nɔ anɛ lɛnɛ́nɛ ni, nɔ kutitse a flee aana nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ. 35Foesũ dã kadã wĩ lɔkɔa ɔhaĩ a kĩ edeĩ nɛ nɔ kamɛ a ɛtadani ɛkɛna ɔtũ. 36Ntɛ nɔ akũ flee kɛna haĩ mɔ nɔ kakɔma lɛláa ɔtũ kamɛ ni, nɔ akũ flee aakpalɛ ndɛ ayekĩ ɔsɛdza ako nɛ fɔtsa akũ kakpalɛ foe a.”
Yesu Kã Farisifɔ Mɔ Mbla Batsanɛ Anɛ.
37Kĩ Yesu yua kɔdzɛla a, Farisini odi tsɛlamɔ ye kĩ ɛyaanya nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃. Foesũ ɛnaa awã ɛnɛ edzi kĩ yanya. 38Fɔkɛna Farisini a wãwã kĩ ɛmɔ kĩ Yesu távɔlɛ awɛ ndɛ ayekĩ mbla tsa a fɔmɔ eyi kanya kayɔ.
39Foesũ boe Ɔlate bi ye kĩ, “Finyaa ni, mi Farisifɔ miavɔlɛ mi tɔkɔɔpu mɔ fɔɔdaɛ liti, lɛmɛ anɛngbã mɔ ablɔ yi mi kamɛ tɛtɛɛtɛ. 40Bakɔasia! Nnɛ́ Baguma a kĩ ɛkɛna fɔtsa fɔmɛde a lɛkɛna kanya fude a lɛmɛ mbɔɛɛ? 41Mikɔa fɔtsa a kĩ fudeĩ nɛ tɔkɔɔpu mɔ fɔɔdaɛ kamɛ a mikpa ahiãfɔ lɔkɔa mi lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa akũ aakpalɛ nɛ Baguma anɛ.
42“Bɔbɔɛ makpa mi Farisifɔ! Miakɔa tɛnyɛ kumɛkumɛ kĩ tabɔa mɔ ɔlɛ̃ mɔ ɔlɛ̃ a te katsu kawuade kakpa Baguma, lɛmɛ misĩ ɔtɔbɛ kakpa bati ade miáwɛ Baguma kalɛ lɛmɛ a. Ade fukĩĩ bamɛ kɛnɛ kĩ miakɛna mibumɔ foe nkaɛ a.
43“Bɔbɔɛ makpa mi Farisifɔ! Miawɛ banɔkɔɛ̃ fudzikɔ̃ nɛ mi katsɛnakɔ̃ ade miawɛ kĩ bati bɛwɔ̃na mi mɔ obu nɛ kɔya a.
44“Bɔbɔɛ makpa mi! Mila ndɛ funi kĩ bɛtáyi foe ɔsũ, kĩ bati tsɛ̃ nɛ foe akũ nɛ katanyi kamɛ.”
45Nɛ awã naa Yudafɔ mbla batsanɛ a kamɛ ɔmɔa bi ye kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, ntɛ ɔlɛ fukĩĩ ni, ovũna boe malo.”
46Yesu kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Bɔbɔɛ makpa mi mbla batsanɛ a lɛmɛ. Milɔ́la bati fɔlɔtsa kĩ foe kalɔ deĩ ɔlɔmɛ, lɛmɛ mi mɔawɛ miáyo awɛ kĩ míabumɔ be fɔtsa a kalɔ.
47“Bɔbɔɛ makpa mi paa kitonɛkĩ mike funi mɔkalɛ mikpa Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a. Ade Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a kĩ mi bawanyɔ kɔ a. 48Mi mɔawɛ a mitunɔ kĩ lɛtsa a kĩ mi bawanyɔ kɛna a nɛnɛ. Bɛkɔ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a ade mi mike be funi a. 49Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ Baguma nɛ ye kadikanyi kamɛ lɛ kĩ, ‘Maado Yĩ onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ mɔ fɔtɔ banyanɛ nɛ be sɛkɛ̃. Baakɔ badi, bitomɔ babɛbã lɛmɛ liti.’ 50Foesũ baavɛlɛ nviã bati sɔtɔ nɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ flee a kĩ bɛkɔ, kito anɛ katinya kayɔkayi a. 51Kito Abel kakɔ kɛnawo Zakaria kĩ bɛkɔ nɛ afɔlibɔ atɛnyɛ mɔ kakɔ kpalɛwa kayite a. Nuwĩ paa kĩ, baavɛlɛ nviã babi sɔtɔ nɛ fukĩĩ flee sũ!
52“Bɔbɔɛ makpa mi mbla batsanɛ a. Kitonɛkĩ mikɔla safi a kĩ sabinya kadikanyi kɔla a. Mi mɔawɛ misĩ kĩ miáwo nɛ koe kamɛ ade miasua bikĩ babɔa mbɔdi kĩ bawo a lɛmɛ osi a!”
53Kĩ Yesu dzakũ nɛ awã a, Farisifɔ mɔ Yudafɔ mbla batsanɛ yi fɔlɛtsa kavɛlɛ kayɔ mɔ Yesu mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ, ade bɛkavia ye fɔlɛtsa nɛ fɔtsa pii akũ, 54bɛkabɔa mbɔdi kanaĩ kĩ bapi ye nɛ ye kɔdzɛla kalɛ kamɛ a.

Title: LUKA 12
Content:
Kɔdɛ Nɛ Anɛ Kamɛ Kɛkɛ Odi Fɔkɛlatsa Akũ.
1Bati mpim mpim yakpɔta limii kĩ bɛkasumini akũ malo. Yesu nya lɔtɔ ebi ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ, “Midã kadã wĩ paa nɛ Farisifɔ oyila fɔtsa a kĩ fɔnyɛ anɛ kamɛ kɛkɛ fɔtsa katsa a akũ. 2Lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ bisua bido ni, baanyɛ de kanya, ade fɔlɛtsa kɔlawa fudi nyɛ fudi ni, bati aanu foe. 3Foesũ kalɛ nyɛ kalɛ kĩ bɛlɛ nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ ni, baanu ke mɔ suwa ketee ade kalɛ kĩ biwusa mido nɛ odi sɔtɔ kamɛ ni, baade lɛtsã nɛ ke akũ.
Mivila Baguma, Nnɛ́ Otidziwa.
4“Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mabi mi kĩ mitavila bikĩ baakɔ sukɛna lɛmɛ ke liti bɛláapuli bɛkɛna lɛtsama fɔba foe. 5Maatsa mi oti a kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ miavila. Mivila Baguma a kĩ ntɛ ɛkɔ bati eyua edeĩ kɔbɛ̃ kĩ yaata be edo nɛ fi kĩ fɔádĩ kamɛ. Mitɛ yĩ mido, ade ye nyɛ oti kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ miavila a. 6Nnɛ́ kaplɛ nviã banɔ funitataɛ elo? Lɛmɛ Baguma lálɛla kamɔapɛ malo. 7Mi lɔlɔ tɔlɔ malo bɛkã te flee, foesũ mitavila, kitonɛkĩ mitɛ kɔya mibɛ̃ funitataɛ beblebee.
Midza Nɛ Kristo Liti Pintii.
8“Mabi mi yededeede kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛlɛ nɛ bati anɛ kĩ ɛnyɛ yĩ ode ni, Otidziwa Obi lɛmɛ aakɛna lɔmɔ ɛkpa ye nɛ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ a anɛ. 9Lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ esĩ yĩ nɛ bati anɛ ni, Otidziwa Obi lɛmɛ aasĩ ye nɛ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ a anɛ. 10Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaalɛ kalɛ kadi etia Otidziwa Obi ni, baakɔa bite ye, lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaalɛ fubusuotsa nɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa akũ ni, bɛláakɔa bite ye da.
11“Foesũ ntɛ bɛkpã mi banaadzɛmɔ mi nɛ Yudafɔ katsɛnakɔ̃, ĩye abãã banɔkɔɛ̃ anɛ ĩye fɔgã anɛ ni, mitaha akũ nɛ ayekĩ míapili mi lɔlɔ ĩye lɛtsa a kĩ míalɛ a akũ. 12Kitonɛkĩ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa aatsa mi lɛtsa a kĩ míalɛ nɛ lɔkɔ a kamɛ.”
Lɛgbã Nɛ Osikani Ɔkɔasia Odi Akũ.
13Onyole odi nɛ bati kɔdabu a kamɛ bi Yesu kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, bi nwaɛ̃nyole ɛfɔ̃ bɔsɛ̃ boe ɔlɛga adzapadiɛ a kĩ ɛkɔa eyi boe a.”
14Ade ke Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Nwaɛ̃, owei lɛkpa yĩ osi kĩ ndzɛ mi fɔlɛtsa ĩye nsɛ̃ adzapadiɛ nkpa mi bati nviã kĩĩ?” 15Ade ebi be flee kĩ, “Midã kadã wĩ, lɔkɔa mipi mi akũ nɛ anɛngbã akũ, kitonɛkĩ oti nkpã lɛláa akũ fɔtsa kamɛ.”
16Ade Yesu bɔa be lɛgbã ɛlɛ kĩ, “Luwi a, osikani odi kĩ edzi tɔ̃ na tite kĩ yanyɛ funitsã wĩ nɛ te kamɛ. 17Ɛlɛ nɛ ye kamɛ kĩ, ‘Nlá awã kĩ mako yĩ funitsã kĩĩ flee. Litsa maapuli nkɛna?’
18“Ebi ye akũ kĩ, ‘Ade fukĩĩ maakɛna a. Maapansam yĩ tɛpata lɔkɔa nke tɛbaũbaũ awã kĩ maatɛɛ yĩ fugbanɔ mɔ yĩ fɔtsa bɛbã flee. 19Lɔkɔa maabi yĩ ɔkla kĩ, “Ɔna lɔlɔ wĩ paa. Odeĩ fɔtsa wĩ kĩĩ flee kĩ fɔ́akpã nɔ nɛ futeli pii kamɛ. Dzi kawɛya, kanya, kamɔa, kamɔ kawɔlɛ.” ’
20“Lɛmɛ Baguma bi ye kĩ, ‘Ɔkɔasia! Lɛnyɛ mɔapɛ kĩĩ baatɛ nɔ nkpã nɛ nɔ awɛ, lɔkɔa owei aanya fɔtsa a kĩ ɔmanɛ oyi ɔkpa nɔ akũ a?’ ”
21Ade Yesu wũna ɛlɛ kĩ, “Ade aye fɔla fɔkpa bikĩ a kĩ bɛmanɛ fɔtsa pii bɛkpa be akũ lɛmɛ bɛtátɛ kɔya nɛ Baguma anɛ a.”
Mite Anɛ Nɛ Baguma Akũ.
22Ke liti a, Yesu bi ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ, “Foesũ mabi mi kĩ mitaha akũ nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ míanya midzi nkpã, ĩye lɛtsa a kĩ míasua akũ a akũ. 23Minyi kĩ nkpã tɛ kɔya ɛba funitsã, ade kutitse lɛmɛ tɛ kɔya kɔba tilima a. 24Midã anande, yaádu funitsã ade yaákpɔta funitsã lɛmɛ a. Ɛlá oli ĩye funitsã kakokɔ̃ lɛmɛ Baguma adɔɔla ye. Mi kɔ̃ mitɛ kɔya kɔlaa miba kɔvɔlabi. 25Mi kamɛ owei aapuli ɛkɔa luwi mɔa ete nɛ ye nkpã fuwi akũ ntɛ eti ɛha ye akũ bo aye malo? 26Ntɛ ɔláapuli ɔkɛna lɛtsama nɛ fɔtsa kabii kĩĩ akũ ni, nde sũ aha nɔ akũ nɛ fɔtsa bɛbã akũ?
27“Midã ayekĩ flawasi abo anɛ. Fɔákɛna adzuma ade fɔánɔ tilima kakpa foe akũ a. Lɛmɛ mabi mi kĩ Lɛgã Salomo mɔ ye akũ kana fɔtsa a flee malo táhɛhɛ fɔlɛ kadã ndɛ nhuilɛ kĩĩ kamɛ fɔmɔa. 28Baguma akɛɛlɛ lupo kamɛ tuwĩ. Tuwĩ adza nviã, kunya tiku, lɔkɔa bipila te. Nde sũ Baguma lɛláadã kĩ ɛkpa mi lɛtsa a kĩ míasua akũ ɛba tuwĩ a? Mi katɛkado adã kabii koũ! 29Foesũ mitakaha akũ kɔlaa, mitakabu lɔlɔ kamɛ luwi daa nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ míanya mɔ likĩ míamɔa akũ. 30Kitonɛkĩ bikĩ bɛtátɛ Baguma bido a, ade be adzi kabu lɔlɔ kamɛ nɛ fukĩĩ bamɛ odu akũ a. Mi Ɔlɛga nyina kĩ misĩ fɔtsa kĩĩ flee. 31Mbom miwɛ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a akũ osi lɔkɔa yaakpa mi fɔtsa kĩĩ flee lɛmɛ.
Mite Anɛ Nɛ Ode Lɛgãkanya Fɔtsa Akũ.
32“Mi sukuloo a kĩ mitomɔ yĩ a, mitavila, kitonɛkĩ fɔnyɛ Baguma kawɛ kĩ yaakpa mi fudzikɔ̃ nɛ ye lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kamɛ. 33Minɔ mi akũ kana fɔtsa mikɔa foe sika a mite ahiãfɔ. Minɔ sika fuvulumi a kĩ fɔláakpeli a mikpa mi akũ, lɔkɔa mikɔla mi akũ kana fɔtsa nɛ ode lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a. Awã naa, foe akũ lɛláatinya kitonɛkĩ oyekpanɛ lɛláapuli ɛta foe ade lupuka lidima lɛmɛ lɛláapuli libula foe kade a. 34Kitonɛkĩ awã kĩ nɔ akũ kana fɔtsa sĩwa deĩ ni, ade awã nɔ ɔwɔlɛ lɛmɛ aana a.
Mina Nɛ Kukũmanɛ Kamɛ.
35“Mina nɛ kukũmanɛ kamɛ mikpa lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ laaya, mido tɛtadiɛ mikpa adzuma kakɛna lɔkɔa mifɔ̃ mi tɛsɛdza tɛkaatɛ̃, 36ndɛ basumunɛ kĩ bidzi badzɔlɛ be Ɔlate kamuniki kato obolitsɔ̃ kapikɔ̃ kaya. Ntɛ ɛyabɔa opunu ni baabinya bɛkpa ye mɔatsɛ. 37Kawɔlɛ aade basumunɛ ntɛ be Ɔlate a yamɔ kĩ bɛmanɛ akũ bidzi badzɔlɛ ye kaya. Mabi mi kĩ yaakɔa ye lima efili nɛ kate, ɛfɔ̃ bidzi lɔkɔa ɛsɛ̃ funitsã ɛkpa be bɛnya. 38Kawɔlɛ aade bikĩ baana nɛ kukũmanɛ kamɛ titiliwu ntɛ ɛya nɛ lɛnyɛ kayite ĩye odenyinawi. 39Ade minyina kĩ ntɛ tɔtɔ ɔlate a enyi lɔkɔ a kĩ oyekpanɛ aya ni, kufɛ ɛláakpa ye osi ebubuli ye kɔla ewo. 40Ade ayea kɛnɛ kĩ mi malo mina nɛ kukũmanɛ kamɛ a, kitonɛkĩ Otidziwa Obi aaya nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ miláate anɛ a kamɛ.”
Osumunɛ Kĩ Yadi Ɔnɔkɔali Mɔ Ekĩ Yaádi Ɔnɔkɔali.
41Ade Petro via Yesu kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, boe odi ɔbɔa lɛgbã kĩĩ ɔkpa mbɔɛɛ kĩ latamɔ odi nyɛ odi?”
42Yesu kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Owei nyɛ osumunɛ ɔnɔkɔalini mɔ kadi onyinɛ? Ade ye nyɛ ekĩ ye ɔlate kɔa ɛdzɛla kĩ ɛkaadã tɔtɔ akũ, ɛkpa basumunɛ bɛbã a funitsã nɛ lɔkɔ wĩ akũ. 43Kawɔlɛ aade osumunɛ a kĩ ye ɔlate ayamɔ ye kĩ ɛlamɛna fukĩĩ kakɛna! 44Ɔnɔkɔali, mabi mi kĩ Ɔlate a aakɔa osumunɛ kĩĩ ɛdzɛla nɛ ye fɔtsa a kĩ edeĩ flee a onukpɛ̃. 45Lɛmɛ ntɛ osumunɛ a bi ye akũ kĩ, ‘Yĩ ɔlate buna owi nɛ osi akũ.’ mɔ eyi ye bakɔba basumunɛ batsole mɔ banyole kabo kayɔ, kanya pɔtɔɔ, kamɔa bavɛ kawuga lɛmɛ ni, 46ye ɔlate ayafuta ye luwi mɔa nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ ɛtáte anɛ ĩye ɛláanyi kamɛ. Ɔlate a aavɛlɛ ye sɔtɔ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ ndɛ bikĩ bideĩ atɔ ɔsĩ aye.
47“Osumunɛ a kĩ enyina ye adzuma kĩ ye ɔlate kpa ye lɛmɛ ɛtámanɛ akũ ɛkpa foe kakɛna ni, yaatɛ sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ mɔ ɔsĩ paa. 48Lɛmɛ osumunɛ kĩ enyína lɛtsa kĩ ye ɔlate awɛ, lɛmɛ ɛkɛna lɛtsa kĩ a lɛfɛta sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ ni, baavɛlɛ ye sɔtɔ sukuloo. Oti kĩ bɛkɔa fɔtsa pii bido nɛ ye awɛ ni, baavia foe pii bitomɛna ye awɛ. Ade oti kĩ bɛkɔa fɔtsa pii kĩ fublusu bido nɛ ye awɛ ni, baavia foe pii kĩ fublusu bitomɛna ye awɛ.
Bati Aasɛ̃ Be Akũ Nɛ Yesu Sũ.
49“Nkɔa kadani vɔɛ̃ kĩ fɔnyɛ fi ĩyaatɛna nɛ katinya kamɛ ade nwɛ kĩ kufɛ fi a fuyi katɛ̃ kayɔ kɔkɔɛ a. 50Ndeĩ mui kawɔla lubo kamɔ adi kĩ maatɛ ade ke fɔ́akaha yĩ ɔwɔlɛ flee kɛnaawo luwi a kĩ lubo kamɔ a atɛ̃ nɛ yĩ akũ a. 51Miakɔna kĩ lukudɔ nkɔa ĩyamɛna nɛ katinya kamɛ mbɔɛɛ? Oowo! Nnɛ́ lukudɔ mbom ɔdzɛ mɔ kasɛ̃ ĩyamɛna. 52Kito finyaa kanaa a, tɔtɔ kĩ bati elo deĩ nɛ te kamɛ ni, kasɛ̃ aaya nɛ be kamɛ. Be ɛlalɛ ayidza bɛdza nɛ be nviã akũ ade be nviã aayidza bɛdza nɛ be ɛlalɛ akũ a. 53Babilɛga aayidza bɛdza nɛ be babinyole akũ, ade babinyole aayidza bɛdza nɛ be balɛga akũ a. Babima aayidza bɛdza nɛ be babitsole akũ ade babitsole aayidza bɛdza nɛ be bama akũ a. Nyina amɛ aayidza bɛdza nɛ be babi batsɔ̃ akũ ade babi batsɔ̃ aayidza bɛdza nɛ be nyina amɛ akũ a.”
Miyi Lɔkɔ a Ɔsũ.
54Yesu buki ebi bati a kĩ, “Ntɛ mimɔ́ kĩ oni dza nɛ suwa katomukɔ̃ ni mialɛ kĩ oni aako, ade yako lɛmɛ a. 55Ade ke ntɛ mimɔ́ kĩ ɔwɛ bɔa eto kayɔ sɛmakɛ ni, mialɛ kĩ ovio ya, ade fɔaya lɔmɔ a. 56Mi anɛ kamɛ kɛkɛ fɔtsa bakɛnanɛ, miapuli kadã tite mɔ odetɔ́ kamɛ kamɔ kalɛ lɛtsa a kĩ laaya. Nde sũ miápuli minyɛ nviã lɔkɔ kĩĩ kayɔ?
Kɛna Ɔmɔa Mɔ Nɔ Okesĩnɛ.
57“Nde sũ miápuli mike otse mikpa mi akũ nɛ lɛtsa wĩ a kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ mikɛna akũ? 58Ntɛ odi bɔɛ kalɛ nɛ nɔ akũ ni, tsã osi nyɛ osi akũ mimɔ ye milɛ foe fɔmɔ yanaadza nɛ fɔlɛtsa kadzɛkɔ̃. Ntɛ nnɛ́ aye ni yaavɛlɛ nɔ ɛma fɔlɛtsa ɔdzɛnɛ ade ye malo yaakɔa nɔ ɛkpa polisifɔ bɛnaado nɔ nɛ kɔla a. 59Mabi nɔ kĩ ade awã aana flee kɛnaawo lɔkɔ a kĩ ose kɔtɔ a flee oyua a.”

Title: LUKA 13
Content:
Ntɛ Mitádani Tɔwɔlɛ Kamɛ Ni, Míaku.
11 Lɔkɔ a na kamɛ a, bati badi yakpa Yesu kanyi kĩ Pilato kɔ Galileafɔ badi nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ bɛkabɔa afɔliɛ nɛ Asɔli Kɔla kamɛ nɛ Yerusalem. 2Yesu kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Mikɔna kĩ Galileafɔ a kĩ bɛkɔ a tɛnɛ titikpa kakɛna kaba Galileafɔ bɛbã flee a sũ? 3Oowo, nnɛ́ aye kɔlaa! Mabi mi kĩ ntɛ mitádani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ ni, mi a flee míaku ndɛ be aye. 4Nde nyɛ bati ewua-alɛ̃ a kĩ Siloam kɔla gɛlɛɛlɛ veli kɔkɔ be a? Mikɔna kĩ be nyɛ titikpa bakɛnanɛ bɛba bikĩ nɛ Yerusalem flee a? 5Oowo! Nnɛ́ aye fɔla kɔlaa! Mabi mi kĩ ntɛ mitádani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ ni, míaku ndɛ be aye.”
Lɛgbã Nɛ Atɔ Kutse Kĩ Kɔáwũ Akũ.
6Ade Yesu bɔa be lɛgbã ɛlɛ kĩ, “Lɔkɔ lidi onyole odi du atɔ kutse nɛ ye kɔba kamɛ. Ɛkasɛla kadã ntɛ yaana atɔ babi nɛ koe akũ lɛmɛ ɛtána badima. 7Ade ke ebi ekĩ yadãmɛna kɔba akũ kĩ, ‘Dã! Ade futeli ɛlalɛ mɔa flee kĩ maya nɛ awĩ kayaawɛ kutse kĩĩ babi lɛmɛ maámɔ badima. Tsua koe kamuni. Nde sũ kɔadza kɔkabula tite a kade?’
8“Lɛmɛ kɔba akũ ɔdãmɛnanɛ a kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, ‘Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃, fɔ̃ kɔdza, kpa yĩ kateli mɔa kabu. Maatu nsinya koe lɔkɔa nko fɔtsa a kĩ fɔ́akpa koe tite kanɔ. 9Ntɛ kuwũ atɔ babi kateliva ni, kekɔ̃ fɔnɛnɛ. Lɛmɛ ntɛ kɔtáwũ babi ni, aapuli ɔfɔ̃ bitsua koe bimuni.’ ”
Yesu Tsa Otsole Odi Kĩ Eveliveli Nɛ Kawɛya Luwi Akũ.
10Nɛ Kawɛya Luwi lidi akũ ni, Yesu katsa fɔtsa nɛ Yudafɔ katsɛnakɔ̃ kadi. 11Otsole odi kĩ hũhũ kpa do ye fɔsɔ mɔ akũ futeli ewua-alɛ̃ flee na nɛ awã. Fɔsɔ a fɔ̃ ekũũkũ ebuki yaápuli eyo akũ kpĩĩ. 12Kĩ Yesu mɔ ye a ɛvɛ ye ebi ye kĩ, “Boe ɔma, bɛnyɛ nɔ nɛ fɔsɔ kamɛ!” 13Yesu kɔa awɛ ete nɛ ye akũ. Lɛtalɛta otsole a puli eyo akũ kpĩĩ ade ke emu Baguma a.
14Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a kĩ yadãmɛna Yudafɔ katsɛnakɔ̃ a na kalɔkpa paa kĩ Yesu tsa ɔsɔnɛ nɛ Kawɛya Luwi akũ, foesũ ebi bati a kĩ, “Fuwi evũ deĩ kĩ foe kamɛ kɛnɛ kĩ bɔkɛna adzuma. Foesũ miya nɛ fuwi kĩĩ kamɛ bɛtsa mi fɔsɔ, lɛmɛ nnɛ́ nɛ Kawɛya Luwi a akũ!”
15Boe Ɔlate kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Mi anɛ kamɛ kɛkɛ fɔtsa bakɛnanɛ, mianyɛ mi bayaɛ tɔwɛ̃ banaamɔa mui nɛ Kawɛya Luwi akũ. 16Finyaakĩĩ amɔ Abraham kasinu kamɛ obi kĩ Abonsam do ye fɔsɔ mɔ akũ futeli ewua-alɛ̃ flee. Fɔnɛ́nɛ kĩ banyɛ ye nɛ tɔwɛ̃ kamɛ nɛ Kawɛya Luwi a akũ?”
17Mbuayɛ a kĩ Yesu kpa a fɔ̃ kɔnyɔã wo ye bakesĩnɛ a, lɛmɛ kawɔlɛ de bati a nɛ awãwã fɔtsa flee a kĩ ɛkɛna a sũ.
Yesu Kɔa Ode Lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a Ɛkɔnamɔ Kutse Libi Kabii Lidi.
18Ade Yesu via kĩ, “Nde Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a la? Litsa maakɔa nkɔnamɔ de? 19Fɔla ndɛ fudutsa libi kabii ki onyole odi bɔɛ ɛnadu nɛ ye kɔba. Libi a mɛ libo anɛ lɛkɛna kutse, ade kɔvɔlabi yakɛna fɔtsɔɛ nɛ koe tɛnanɛ kamɛ a.”
Yesu Kɔa Ode Lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a Ɛkɔnamɔ Oyila Fɔtsa.
20Yesu buki evia kĩ, “Litsa maakɔa Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a nkɔnamɔ? 21Fɔla ndɛ ayekĩ otsole kɔa oyila fɔtsa ɛtsɛka nɛ bodobodo onuvoe baũ kamɛ, fɔna flee kɛnawo kĩ evuya puu.”
Onyukpɛ̃ Kĩ Ɛtása.
22Lɔkɔ a kĩ Yesu anaa Yerusalem a, ɛnatsã tɛmatɔ mɔ tukula kamɛ ɛkatsa bati fɔtsa. 23Ade odi via ye kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, mbɔɛɛ bati sukuloo aana katɛ?”
Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, 24“Bɔa mbɔdi katsã onyukpɛ̃ a kĩ ɛtása a kamɛ kawo, kitonɛkĩ bati pii abɔa mbɔdi kĩ bawo lɛmɛ bɛláapuli. 25Kɔla ɔlate a aayidza ɛyaabalɛ kɔla a, ade ntɛ midza nɛ kanya mikabɔa opunu kalɛ kĩ, ‘Boe Ɔlate, binya kakpa boe ni.’
“Ɔlate a aakpa mbuayɛ kĩ, ‘Ĩnyína mi mɔ awã kĩ mito!’
26“Ade ke míalɛ kĩ, ‘Bɔmɔ nɔ lɛnya bɔmɔa ade ɔtsa fɔtsa nɛ boe ɔmatɔ kamɛ lɛmɛ a!’
27“Lɛmɛ yaakpa mbuayɛ kĩ, ‘Ĩnyína awã kĩ mito! Midzakũ nɛ yĩ ɔwɛ̃, mi tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ.’
28“Awã naa, kabe kadi kĩ míabe, miba adɔ̃ ntɛ mimɔ́ Abraham, Isak mɔ Yakob mɔ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a flee nɛ ode lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kamɛ, lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃ bɛblɔmɛna mi kĩ mitawo. 29Bati aato suwa kadekɔ̃ mɔ suwa katomukɔ̃, kayɔ mɔ nyangɛ bɛyaanya bɛmɔa nɛ ode lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a. 30Ade bati a kĩ bɛkpa liti finyaa a, badi aadani batɔnyade, ade bikĩ bɛnyaa lɔtɔ finyaa a, badi aadani liti bakpanɛ.”
Yesu Deĩ Ɔdɔ Ɛkpa Yerusalem.
31Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ a, Farisifɔ badi yabi Yesu kĩ, “Wɛ sɔwa kadzakũ nɛ awĩ kĩĩ kanaa kakɔ bɛbã, kitonɛkĩ lɛgã Herodes wɛ kĩ yaakɔ nɔ.”
32Ade ke Yesu bi be kĩ, “Minaabi kalikii a kĩ, ‘Nviã mɔ kunya flee maakablɔmɛna hũhũ kpa, maatsa fɔsɔ lɛmɛ, ade nɛ luwi lɛlalɛde a akũ ni, maayua yĩ adzuma.’ 33Lɛmɛ kɛnɛ kĩ mpi osi, nviã, kunya mɔ kukunya, kitonɛkĩ fɔtáfɛta kĩ bakɔ Baguma onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ nɛ kakɔma kɛba Yerusalem.
34“Yerusalem, Yerusalem! Nɔ bati kɔ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a ade bɛtalɛ bikĩ Baguma do nɛ nɔ sɛkɛ̃ a boe bɛkɔ be a. Titi eni ntáwɛ kĩ makpɔta nɔ babi ndɛ ayekĩ ɔkɔkɔbima api ye babi kado nɛ ye fupoki kayɔ, lɛmɛ ɔtákpa yĩ osi. 35Nɛ foesũ finyaa nɔ Asɔli Kɔla aawaa luto. Ade mabi mi kĩ miláabuki mimɔ́ yĩ kɛnaawo lɔkɔ a kĩ míalɛ kĩ, ‘Baguma hila ekĩ yaya nɛ boe Ɔlate dĩ akũ a!’ ”

Title: LUKA 14
Content:
Yesu Tsa Ɔsɔnɛ Odi Nɛ Nɛ Kawɛya Luwi Akũ.
1Nɛ Kawɛya Luwi lidi akũ ni, kĩ Yesu naanya nɛ Farisifɔ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ odi awã a, bati a ko anɛ bɛkadã ye. 2Onyole odi kĩ ye akpɔ mɔ abɔa wumi dzi nɛ ye anɛ kamɛ. 3Ade ke Yesu via Farisifɔ mɔ mbla batsanɛ a kĩ, “Boe mbla kpa osi kĩ bɛtsa oti nɛ Kawɛya Luwi akũ mbɔɛɛ kĩ ɛtákpa osi?” 4Lɛmɛ bisĩ bɛtákpa ye mbuayɛ. Ade Yesu ta oti a ɛtsa ye, ɛnyɛ ye osi ɛdzakũ a.
5Ade ɛdani ebi be kĩ, “Ntɛ mi kamɛ odi obi ĩye ɔnantsue tɔ mui lɛkɛ nɛ Kawɛya Luwi akũ ni, miáwɛ sɔwa kanaanyɛ ye nɛ lɛkɛ a kamɛ?” 6Lɛmɛ bɛtápuli bɛkpa ye foe mbuayɛ.
Yesu Fɔtsa Katsa Nɛ Akũ Kadɔla Mɔ Sɛmɛ Kalɛ Kakɛna Akũ.
7Kĩ Yesu mɔ́ ayekĩ bati a kĩ bɛvɛ nɛ kanyakɔ̃ kawãnɛ banɔkɔɛ̃ fudzikɔ̃ a, ɛbɔa be lɛgbã kĩĩ kĩ, 8“Ntɛ odi vɛ nɔ nɛ obolitsɔ̃ kapikɔ̃ ni, tanaadzi nɛ banɔkɔɛ̃ kadzikɔ̃, kitonɛkĩ fɔ́apuli fɔya kĩ ɛvɛ odi kĩ edeĩ obu ɛbɛ̃ nɔ, 9lɔkɔa oti a kĩ ɛvɛ mi bati nviã ayabi nɔ kĩ, ‘Kɔa nɔ lukpo kakpa oti kĩĩ’ ade ke aakɔa kɔnyɔã oyidza ɔnaadzi nɛ kakɔ nkaɛ a. 10Mbom ntɛ bɛvɛ nɔ nɛ kakɔ kadi ni, naadzi nɛ kakɔ a kĩ kɛtátɛ kɔya, ayekĩ ntɛ ekĩ ɛvɛ nɔ a yamɔ nɔ ni, yaabi nɔ kĩ, ‘Ɔkɔba, yidza kanaadzi nɛ awã kĩ kɛtɛ kɔya a.’ Awã naa bati bɛbã flee a kĩ bɛvɛ a aakɔa obu bɛkpa nɔ, 11kitonɛkĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛdɛla ye akũ nɛ ode ni, baakɛna ye nɛ kayɔ, ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛdɔla ye akũ ni, baadɛla ye nɛ ode!”
12Ade Yesu bi oti a kĩ ɛtsɛlamɔ ye nɛ kanyakɔ̃ a kĩ, “Ntɛ ote opunu ɔkpa bati ni, tavɛ nɔ bakɔba, awaɛ̃ amɛ, nɔ kɔla babi ĩye nɔ badzi kɔba a kĩ bideĩ akũ a, ayekĩ baavɛ nɔ malo ɔnaanya nɛ be sɛkɛ̃ bise kɔtɔ. 13Mbom ntɛ ate opunu ni, vɛ ahiãfɔ, bikĩ bɛnɛ lɛkpɛ̃, bikĩ biveliveli mɔ banɛkunɛ. 14Fukĩĩ aafɔ̃ Baguma lihila nɔ kusɛkusɛ, kitonɛkĩ bɛláapuli bise nɔ foe kɔtɔ. Lɛmɛ Baguma aase nɔ kɔtɔ nɛ luwi a kĩ bati wĩ aayidza bito kanɔkpa a.”
Lɛgbã Nɛ Ode Opunu Kpale Kate Akũ.
15Kĩ bati a kĩ bidzi nɛ opunu akũ bɛkanya kamɛ ɔmɔa nu fɔlɛtsa a kĩ Yesu lɛ a, ebi ye kĩ, “Kawɔlɛ aade bati a kĩ baadzi nɛ opunu akũ nɛ ode lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a.”
16Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Luwi a onyole odi te opunu ɛvɛ bati beblebee. 17Kĩ kanya lɔkɔ wo ɔtɔ a edo ye osumunɛ kĩ ɛnaavɛ bikĩ ɛtsɛlamɛna a kĩ, ‘Miya. Buyua Lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa!’ ”
18“Lɛmɛ bati a kĩ ɛtsɛlamɛna a flee kamɛ odi nyɛ odi nyɛ onukpɛ̃. Oti ɔtɔnyade bi osumunɛ a kĩ, ‘Nnaya tite finyaa, foesũ kɛnɛ kĩ nnaadã te, make nɔ aduli nláapuli ĩya.’
19“Oti bɛbã lɛmɛ lɛ kĩ, ‘Ĩya banantsue ewua, kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ nkpã be nnaasɔ be ndã ntɛ baapuli bɛkɛna adzuma kakɛna wĩ. Makɛ nɔ aduli, nláapuli ĩya.’
20“Oti bɛbã lɛmɛ lɛ kĩ, ‘Wɔadzɔ nkɔã ɔtsɔ̃, foesũ nláapuli ĩya.’
21“Osumunɛ a muniki ɛnabi ye ɔlate lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya a flee. Awã naa ɔlate a na kalɔkpa paa ade ebi ye osumunɛ a kĩ, ‘Wɛ sɔwa kanaa tɔblɔnu mɔ fɔla fuyite nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ, kakpã ahiãfɔ, lɛkpɛ̃ banɛnɛ, banɛkunɛ mɔ bikĩ biveliveli a kayamɛna.’
22“Owi tábuna mɔ osumunɛ a yabi ye kĩ, ‘Yĩ ɔlate nkɛna nɛ nɔ ɔlɛdo akũ, lɛmɛ fudzikɔ̃ buki fute.’
23“Ade ke ɔlate a bi ye kĩ, ‘Naa tɔblɔnu mɔ fusikũ akũ nɛ tukula kamɛ, kabi be kĩ bɛya ayekĩ kɔla a kamɛ aayi. 24Mabi mi a flee kĩ, bikĩ be ĩnya lɔtɔ nvɛ a kamɛ odima lɛláata yĩ funitsã a onukpɛ̃!’ ”
Kɔdɛ Nɛ Fɔtsa Ɔkɔlɛnɛ Lubokamɔ Akũ.
25Luwi a, kĩ bati kɔdabu tomɔ Yesu a, ɛdani ebi be kĩ, 26“Ntɛ odi ya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃, mɔ yawɛ ye ɔlɛga, ɔma, ɔtsɔ̃, babi, bawaɛ̃nyole mɔ bawaɛ̃tsole, mɔ ye mɔawɛ akũ kalɛ kaba yĩ ni, ɛláapuli ɛnya yĩ fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ. 27Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtábɔɛ ye asendua ɛlɔ etomɔ yĩ ni, ɛláapuli ɛnya yĩ fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ.
28“Ntɛ mi kamɛ odi awɛ kĩ yake kɔla baũ kudi ni, yaánya lɔtɔ kadzi kabu kɔla a kake akũ akunta kadã, kamɔ ntɛ yaana sika epuli eke kɔla a ewũna? 29Ntɛ ɛtákɛna foe lɔmɔ ni, ɛláapuli eyua kɔla a titɔ kĩ eke kayɔkayi futekũ malo. Ade ke bati flee a kĩ bamɔ foe a aadi ye nsekuo bɛlɛ kĩ, 30‘Oti kĩĩ yi kɔla kake kayɔ lɛmɛ ɛtápuli eke koe ewũna.’
31“Ntɛ lɛgã lidi aabɔɛ kawũ nɛ lɛgã bɛbã akũ ni, yaanya lɔtɔ edzi ɛkɔna foe akũ ɛdã ntɛ yaapuli ɛkɔa sodzafɔ mpim ewua ɛnya lɛgã bɛbã a kĩ lideĩ sodzafɔ mpim tɛya a akũ. 32Ntɛ ɛláapuli ni, yaanya lɔtɔ edo batɔ nɛ lɛgã kĩ a sɛkɛ̃ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ bɛtáfuã akũ lɔkɔa ɛkpa lɔlɔ.” 33Yesu lɛ ewũna kĩ, “Ade aye mi kamɛ odima lɛláapuli ɛnya yĩ fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ ntɛ ɛtáfɔnɛ ye lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ edeĩ awɛ a.
Fɔtsa Kĩ Fɔlá Nfasɔ Ni, Baata Foe Biwula.
34“Lɛdɛmɛ nɛnɛ, lɛmɛ ntɛ lɛyɛla de ɔmɛnɛ ni, osi odima lɛláa kĩ aatsã ye akũ obuki odo de ɔmɛnɛ. 35Lɛnɛ́nɛ lɛkpa ndɛ tite kanɔ, ĩye lɛkpa fukluku kawulakɔ̃ malo. Kata bata de kawula.
“Okĩ edeĩ atɔ ni, etse katse wĩ!”

Title: LUKA 15
Content:
Bɛmɔ́ Kuveli a Kĩ Kɔyɛla a.
1Luwi a, tɔgɔlɛ batɛnɛ mɔ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ bɛbã ya nɛ Yesu sɛkɛ̃ bɛyaatse ye fɔlɛtsa. 2Nɛ awã naa, Farisifɔ mɔ mbla batsanɛ a kakɛna hũhũhũhũ kalɛ kĩ, “Oti kĩĩ atɛ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ ade yado awɛ kanya mɔ be malo a!”
3Foesũ Yesu bɔa be lɛgbã kĩĩ kĩ, 4“Ntɛ mi kamɛ odi ɔmɔa deĩ baveli ɔha mɔ kɔmɔa yɛla nɛ be kamɛ a, litsa yaakɛna? Yaafɔnɛ baveli aduekrɔũ-evedi a nɛ kanyakɔ̃ a ɛnaatsã ɛwɛ kukĩ kɔyɛla a kɛnaawo kĩ ɛmɔ koe. 5Ntɛ ɛmɔ koe a, yaamɔ kawɔlɛ paa lɔkɔa ɛbɔɛ koe ete nɛ lɔbɔtɛɛ ɛyamɛna nɛ kɔla. 6Ade yaavɛ ye bakɔba mɔ banunɛ ebi be kĩ, ‘Kawɔlɛ de yĩ kĩ mmɔ́ yĩ kuveli a kĩ kɔyɛla a, foesũ mifɔ̃ bɔmɔ́ kawɔlɛ!’ 7Mabi mi kĩ ade aye baamɔ kawɔlɛ nɛ ode lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a nɛ oti mɔa kĩ ɛdani ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ akũ, kɛba bati aduekrɔũ-evedi kĩ be akũ kpalɛ kĩ bɛtásĩ ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kadani.
Bɛmɔ́ Sika Ovoe a Kĩ Sɛyɛla a.
8“Ntɛ otsole odi deĩ sika ovoe babi ewua mɔ ɛyɛla libi mɔa ni, litsa yaakɛna? Yaatɛna ɔsɛdza ɛyɔ kɔla kamɛ ɛdã kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ yededeede kɛnawo kĩ ɛmɔ sika libi a. 9Ntɛ ɛmɔ de a, yaavɛ ye bakɔba mɔ banunɛ ɛkpɔta ebi be kĩ, ‘Kawɔlɛ de yĩ paa kitonɛkĩ mmɔ́ yĩ sika libi a kĩ lɛyɛla a. Mifɔ̃ bɔmɔ́ kawɔlɛ!’ 10Mabi mi kĩ ade aye Baguma ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ aamɔ kawɔlɛ nɛ tɔkpa ɔkɛnanɛ mɔa kĩ ɛdani ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ akũ a.”
Obinyole a Kĩ Ɛyɛla a Muniki Ɛya.
11Yesu lɛ ɛnaa lɔtɔ kĩ, “Onyole odi na babinyole nviã. 12Ade obisɛ̃de a bi ɔlɛga kĩ, ‘Papa, kɔa adzapadiɛ a kĩ yaanya yĩ kanyakɔ̃ a kakpa yĩ finyaa.’ Foesũ onyole a sɛ̃ ye adzapadiɛ kamɛ ɛkpa ye babinyole nviã a.
13“Nɛ fuwi fudi liti ni, obisɛ̃de a nɔ ye kanyakɔ̃ fɔtsa a flee ade ɛdzakũ mɔ foe sika a. Ɛnaa katide mɔ lugo ɛnabula sika a kade nɛ nkpã basabasa kadzi kamɛ. 14Ebula lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ edeĩ a kade. Ke liti a kɔlɛ kudi nɛ nɛ tite a na flee akũ ade ohiã pi ye a. 15Nɛ foesũ ɛnaa onyole odi nɛ tite a akũ sɛkɛ̃ kĩ yanaakɛna adzuma ɛkpa ye. Onyole a kpa ye baplakuo akũ kadãmɛna nɛ ye kɔba. 16Nɛ kɔlɛ sũ ɛwɛ kĩ yanya funitsã a kĩ bɛkako baplakuo a fudi lɛmɛ odima tákpa ye lɛtsama.
17“Nɛ ke kawũna a, ɛyamɔ ye akũ eyi ɔsũ, ade ɛlɛ kĩ, ‘Bati a kĩ nda bɔɛ bakɛna tudzuma a ana kanya kawĩ pɔtɔɔ fɔate malo. Amɔ yĩ dzi nɛ awĩ kɔlɛ ayua yĩ kakɔ. 18Maayidza nnaa nda sɛkɛ̃ nnaabi ye kĩ, “Papa, nkɛna tɔkpa nɛ Baguma mɔ nɔ akũ. 19Ntáfɛta kĩ abuki ɔvɛ yĩ kĩ nɔ obi, mbom kɔa yĩ kakɛna ndɛ nɔ tudzuma bakɛnanɛ a kamɛ ɔmɔa.” ’ 20Foesũ eyidza epi osi yanaa ɔlɛga sɛkɛ̃.
“Ɔlɛga mɔ́ ye mɔ lugo kĩ yaya. Obi akũ kɔ ye kɔnya ade ewula atsɛ ɛnatu eboomu ye a.
21“Ade ke obi a bi ye kĩ, ‘Papa, nkɛna tɔkpa nɛ Baguma mɔ nɔ akũ. Ntáfɛta kĩ abuki ɔvɛ yĩ kĩ nɔ obi.’
22“Lɛmɛ ɔlɛga a vɛ ye basumunɛ a ebi be kĩ, ‘Miwɛ sɔwa mibɔɛ tɛtadiɛ kĩ tɛnɛnɛ paa mido ye. Mido ye lipetia nɛ lawobi mɔ mpabua nɛ abɔa. 23Ke liti ni, minaanyɛ ɔnantsue kĩ ɛdɔli paa mikɔ, lɔkɔa bɔnya bɔmɔ́ kawɔlɛ. 24Kitonɛkĩ bɔbɔɛ foe kĩ yĩ obi kĩĩ ku lɛmɛ finyaakĩĩ edzi nkpã. Ɛyɛla lɛmɛ bɛmɔ́ ye.’ Foesũ biyi luwi a kanya kayɔ.
25“Nɛ lɔkɔ kĩĩ kamɛ a, obinyolenɔkɔɛ̃ a na nɛ kɔba. Kĩ eto yade, efuã tɔtɔ kamɛ a, enu tɔnɔ mɔ kuto nkã. 26Foesũ ɛvɛ basumunɛ a kamɛ ɔmɔa evia ye kĩ, ‘Litsa lámɔ kaya nɛ tɔtɔ kamɛ?’
27“Osumunɛ a kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, ‘Awaɛ̃ muniki ɛya nɛ ɔtɔ ade ke aga fɔ̃ bɛkɔ ɔnantsue dɔliwa a, kitonɛkĩ emuniki ɛya mɔ akũ ɔsĩ.’
28“Tuwũna ba ɔnɔkɔɛ̃de a, ade esĩ kĩ yaáwo nɛ tɔtɔ kamɛ, foesũ ɔlɛga naa ye sɛkɛ̃ ɛnake ye aduli kĩ ewo ɛya nɛ tɔtɔ kamɛ. 29Lɛmɛ obi bi ɔlɛga kĩ, ‘Dã, nkɛna adzuma ndɛ ɔsate nɛ futeli pii kĩĩ kamɛ nkpa nɔ, kĩ ntáyidza ndza nɛ nɔ akũ da. Ade ɔtákpa tɔ̃ yĩ midi katukpabi malo kĩ nkɔ bɔmɔ yĩ bakɔba bɔmɔ́ kawɔlɛ a. 30Lɛmɛ nɔ obi kĩĩ nabula nɔ akũ kana fɔtsa flee kade nɛ adɔpaafɔ akũ ade kĩ emuniki ɛya ni, ɔkɔ ɔnantsue dɔliwa akpa ye!’
31“Awã naa, ɔlɛga bi ye kĩ, ‘Yĩ obi, odeĩ nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ luwi daa, ade lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ ndeĩ a, nɔ lide lanɛ. 32Lɛmɛ kɛnɛ kĩ bɔanya luwi bɔmɔ́ kawɔlɛ, kitonɛkĩ bɔbɔɛ foe kĩ awaɛ̃ kĩĩ ku lɛmɛ finyaa edzi nkpã, ɛyɛla lɛmɛ bɔmɔ́ ye.’ ”

Title: LUKA 16
Content:
Fɔtsa Katsa Nɛ Akũ Ɔdãmɛnanɛ Ɔnyansãni Odi Akũ.
1Yesu bi ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ, “Osikani odi na adzuma ɔkɛnanɛ kĩ edzi nɛ ye tudzuma onukpɛ̃. Bati yabi osikani a kĩ ye tudzuma onukpɛ̃ ɔdzanɛ a abula ye sika kade. 2Foesũ osikani a vɛ tudzuma onukpɛ̃ ɔdzanɛ a evia ye kĩ, ‘Litsa fɔlɛtsa manu kĩ balɛ nɛ nɔ akũ a? Kɛna akunta yededeede nɛ ayekĩ ɔnɛɛ yĩ tudzuma akũ, kitonɛkĩ ɔláapuli obuki ɔnya yĩ fɔtsa akũ ɔdãmɛnanɛ.’
3“Ade ke tudzuma akũ ɔdãmɛnanɛ a bi ye akũ kĩ, ‘Yĩ ɔlate aablɔmɛna yĩ nɛ adzuma kamɛ. Litsa maakɛna? Nlá kɔbɛ̃ kĩ maatu tɔbɔnkam ade ke kɔnyɔã akɔ yĩ mɔ fɔtsa kawã lɛmɛ a. 4Ahãã! Ĩnyina lɛtsa a kĩ maakɛna. Ntɛ adzuma nɛ́ nɛ yĩ awɛ ni, maana bakɔba kĩ baatɛ yĩ mɔ kawɔlɛ nɛ be awã!’
5“Foesũ ɛvɛ bati a kĩ bidzimɔ ye ɔlate fɔtɔ a. Evia ɔtɔnyade a kĩ, ‘Ani odzimɔ yĩ ɔlate?’
6“Ekĩ edzimɔ kɔtɔ a kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, ‘Bɔ̃ tɛkantsi ɔha.’
“Ade tudzuma akũ ɔdãmɛnanɛ a bi ye kĩ, ‘Amɔ nɔ akunta nɛ awĩ. Kɛna akũ kadzi katsɛlɛ aduenum.’
7“Ade evia ɔbɛbã lɛmɛ kĩ, ‘Nɔ malo ani odzimɛna?’
“Kɔtɔ odzimɛnanɛ a lɛ kĩ, ‘Fugbanɔ fuvũ baũbaũ ɔha mɔa.’
“Oti a kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ tudzuma onukpɛ̃ a bi ye kĩ, ‘Amɔ nɔ akunta nɛ awĩ. Tsɛlɛ aduesɔũ kayi.’
8“Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ ɔlate a mu ye tudzuma ɔdãmɛnanɛ a nɛ nyansã tɛdake tisi a kĩ ɛbɔɛ a sũ. Ɔnɔkɔali ni, katinya kamɛ bati deĩ nyansã tisi nɛ be fɔtsakɛlawa kamɛ bɛbɛ̃ bikĩ batse Baguma kalɛ a.”
9Ade Yesu lɛ ɛnaa lɔtɔ kĩ, “Mikɔa katinya kamɛ akũ kana fɔtsa mikɛna tɔkɔba, ayekĩ ntɛ fuwoli ni, baatɛ mi nɛ daa nkpã ɔtɔ a kamɛ.
10“Odi nyɛ odi kĩ edi oni nɛ fɔtsa kabii akũ ni, yaadi fɔtsa baũ akũ oni. Ade ayea odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtádi oni nɛ fɔtsa kabii akũ ni, ɛláadi fɔtsa baũ akũ oni lɛmɛ. 11Ade ntɛ mitádi katinya kamɛ fɔtsa akũ oni a, nde baapuli bɛkɔa fɔtsa kĩ fɔtɛ kɔya fɔba katinya kamɛ fɔtsa bido nɛ mi awɛ? 12Ntɛ mitádi lɛtsa a kĩ lɛnyɛ oti bɛbã fude kĩ fɔtɛ kɔya akũ oni ni, owei aakɔa litsedi kĩ laanya mi fude ɛkpa mi?
13“Osumunɛ odima lɛláapuli esum balate nviã. Yaakesĩ ɔmɔa lɔkɔa ɛwɛ ɔyade a kalɛ. Ĩye yaakɔa ye akũ ɛkpa ɔmɔa lɔkɔa ɛvɛlɛ akũ nɛ ɔyade a akũ. Ɔnɔkɔali nyɛ kĩ, ɔláapuli osum Baguma mɔ katinya kamɛ fɔtsa.”
Yesu Tsa Fɔtsa Bɛbã.
14Kĩ Farisifɔ a nu fɔlɛtsa a kĩ Yesu lɛ a, bɛnyɛ ye ahĩsɛm kitonɛkĩ sika bawɛnɛ banɛ. 15Yesu bi be kĩ, “Minyɛ bati kĩ bakɛna be akũ ndɛ badã yedede nɛ bati bɛbã anɛ, lɛmɛ Baguma nyina mi tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ. Kitonɛkĩ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔtɛ kɔya nɛ otidziwa anɛ a, fɔnyɛ kɔwɛ̃ fɔtsa nɛ Baguma anɛ.
16“Mose mbla mɔ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ fɔtsa a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ biyi a kɛna adzuma kɛyawo Yohanes Mui Ɔwɔlanɛ a lɔkɔ. Kito ke a, balɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a nɛ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a akũ, ade odi nyɛ odi lamɛna kapili kĩ yawo nɛ de kamɛ. 17Lɛmɛ fɔadã bɔɛɛ kĩ tite mɔ ode aawɔ kɛba kĩ baafɔnɛ fɔlɛtsa kabiiwɛ awɛ nɛ mbla a kamɛ.
18“Onyole nyɛ onyole kĩ esĩ ɔtsɔ̃, mɔ ɛnakɔã ɔbɛbã ni, ɛbɔa adɔpaa. Ade onyole kĩ ɛkɔã otsole kĩ bisĩ ni, ye malo ɛbɔa adɔpaa.
Yesu Lɛ Kalɛ Nɛ Osikani Odi Mɔ Lazaro Akũ.
19“Osikani odi dzi nkpã. Ɛkahihiɛ ye akũ nɛ tilima kĩ tɛtɛ kɔya kamɛ, ade ɛkanya nkpã mɛnɛmɛnɛ luwi daa a. 20Ohiãni odi lɛmɛ kĩ bavɛ Lazaro lɛmɛ dzi nkpã tɔ̃. Fɔɔkpa nɛ́ nɛ ye akũ flee ade bɛkabɔɛ ye kanaadzina nɛ osikani a kɔla onyukpɛ̃ a. 21Ɛkakɔna kĩ yaana funitsã wuliwa a kĩ fɔato osikani opunu akũ katɔ nɛ tite a ɛnya. Bakpete malo kayadzɛmɛ ye fɔɔkpa a kamɛ.
22“Ohiãni a ku, ade ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ yabɔɛ ye bɛnamɛna ode bɛnadzina nɛ Abraham ɔwɛ̃ a. Osikani a lɛmɛ yaku, ade ke bibila ye a. 23Nɛ kanɔkpade awã kĩ ɛkamɔ lubo paa a, ɛdzɛla anɛ ɛmɔ Abraham mɔ lugo nɛ ode, mɔ Lazaro lɛmɛ kĩ edzi nɛ ye ɔwɛ̃. 24Ade osikani a bɔa fɔwɔla ɛvɛ ye kĩ, ‘Boe Ɔlɛga Abraham! Mɔ yĩ kɔnya kafɔ̃ Lazaro edo lawobi nɛ mui kamɛ ɛta nɛ yĩ sɛmɛ akũ, ayekĩ fɔ́adɔla yĩ ɔmɔado, kitonɛkĩ nlamɛna lubo kamɔ nɛ fi kĩĩ kamɛ!’
25“Lɛmɛ Abraham bi ye kĩ, ‘Yĩ obi, te anɛ kĩ bɛkpa nɔ fɔtsa wĩ flee nɛ nɔ nkpã kamɛ, lɛmɛ Lazaro kɔ̃ ni, fɔtsa kpa nɛnɛ ɛna. Lɛmɛ finyaakĩĩ a, ɛlamɛna kawɔlɛ kamɔ, ade nɔ malo ɔlamɛna lubo kamɔ a. 26Ade lɛtsa kĩ lɛbɛ̃ kɔlaa nyɛ kĩ, lɛkɛ dzununuunu waa nɛ boe kayite, kĩ ntɛ odi wɛ kĩ yato awĩ ɛnyina ɛya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ ni, ɛláapuli. Ade ayea ntɛ odi lɛmɛ wɛ kĩ yato awã ɛnyina ɛya nɛ boe sɛkɛ̃, ɛláapuli a.’
27“Awã naa, osikani a bi ye kĩ, ‘Boe Ɔlɛga Abraham, make nɔ aduli kĩ do Lazaro ɛnaa nda tɔtɔ kamɛ, 28awã kĩ ndeĩ bawaɛ̃nyole elo. Fɔ̃ ɛnaabɔa be kɔkɔ ayekĩ be malo bɛláayawo nɛ lubo kamɔ kĩĩ kamɛ.’
29“Ade Abraham bi ye kĩ, ‘Awaɛ̃ amɛ deĩ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ Mose mɔ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a tsɛlɛ biyi a. Kɛnɛ kĩ bitse fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ a lɔkɔa bɛkɛna nɛ foe akũ.’
30“Osikani a kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, ‘Boe Ɔlɛga Abraham, fɔláawĩ be! Lɛmɛ ntɛ odi aayidza eto kanɔkpa ɛnaa be sɛkɛ̃ ni, baadani be tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ.’
31“Lɛmɛ Abraham bi ye kĩ, ‘Ntɛ bɛláatse Mose mɔ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a fɔlɛtsa ni, ntɛ odi to kanɔkpa ɛnaa be sɛkɛ̃ malo a, bɛláatɛ ye fɔlɛtsa a bido.’ ”

Title: LUKA 17
Content:
Tafɔ̃ Odima Lɛkɛna Tɔkpa.
1Yesu bi ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ, “Fɔtsa a kĩ foe aafɔ̃ bati liwo nɛ tɔkpa kamɛ a aaya kokooko, lɛmɛ bɔbɔɛ makpa oti a kĩ ye akũ fɔ́atsã fɔya a! 2Fɔnɛnɛ fɔkpa ye ntɛ bɛkɔa kɔwɔlɛ kpale bɛvɛla ye nɛ sɔmɔ bɛta bido nɛ mpo kamɛ, kɛba kĩ yaafɔ̃ babisɛ̃ kamɛ ɔmɔa liwo nɛ tɔkpa kamɛ. 3Foesũ midã kadã wĩ nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ miakɛna a akũ.
“Ntɛ awaɛ̃ kɛna nɔ tɔkpa ni, kã ye anɛ. Ntɛ etunɔ kĩ eku kɔtɔ ni, kɔa kate ye. 4Ntɛ ɛkɛna tɔkpa nɛ nɔ akũ titi evũkɔnɔ nɛ luwi mɔa kamɛ mɔ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ ɛyabi nɔ kĩ eku kɔtɔ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ akɔa ote ye.”
Bivia Yesu Katɛkado Kɔbɛ̃.
5Fɔtɔ banyanɛ a bi Yesu kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, fɔ̃ boe katɛkado kide nɛ ode kibu.”
6Ade Yesu kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ odeĩ katɛkado kĩ kɛpɔnɛ lububu ndɛ kutse libi kabiiwɛ flee ni, aapuli obi kutse kĩĩ kĩ, ‘Bɔlɛ mɔ tunu kanaadza nɛ mpo kamɛ’ ade kɔ́atse nɔ a.
Yesu Lɛ Ayekĩ Osumunɛ Wĩ Akɛna Adzuma.
7“Mibɔɛ foe kĩ mi kamɛ odi deĩ ɔpaani kĩ yadã nɔ kɔba akũ, ĩye ekĩ yadãmɛna nɔ baveli akũ, ntɛ eto ede a, aabi ye kĩ ɛwɛ sɔwa ɛyadzi ɛnya? 8Oowo! Mbom aabi ye kĩ, ‘Manɛ akũ katɔ funitsã, kadza kasum yĩ, ĩnya, mmɔa ĩyua tɔ̃ fɔmɔ nɔ malo aanya.’ 9Osumunɛ tásĩ ɛkpa kɔlɛkanyɛ ntɛ ɛkɛna nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ ɛkɛna akũ. Mbɔɛɛ esĩ? 10Ade ayea fɔla fɔkpa mi a. Ntɛ mikɛna lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ mbi mi kĩ mikɛna ni, milɛ kĩ, ‘Basumunɛ odi bɔanɛ, lɛtsa a kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ de bɔakɛna a, ade de bɔkɛna a.’ ”
Yesu Tsa Banyole Ewua Badi Fɔsɔ Ngbã.
11Kĩ Yesu anaa Yerusalem a, ɛnatsã Samaria mɔ Galilea ɔbɛ̃ akũ. 12Kĩ ɛkɔa yawo akula adi kamɛ a, banyole ewua kĩ basɔ fɔsɔ ngbã yatsɛlamɔ ye. 13Bɛdza mɔ lugo ade bɛbɔa fɔwɔla kĩ, “Boe Ɔlɛga Yesu, mɔ boe kɔnya!”
14Yesu dã be ade ebi be kĩ, “Minaa, minaakɔa mi akũ mitsa basɔfɔ bɛsɛla mi akũ bɛdã.” Kĩ bɛyɛlɛ banaa nɛ osi a, fɔsɔ a wɔ nɛ be akũ.
15Kĩ be kamɛ ɔmɔa mɔ kĩ fɔsɔ a wɔ nɛ ye akũ a, emuniki ɛya mɔ Baguma kamu mɔ fɔwɔla kɔɔba. 16Ɛyatɔ nɛ Yesu abɔa kamɛ ɛnyɛ ye kɔlɛ. Onyole kĩĩ nyɛ Samariani.
17Yesu via ye kĩ, “Nnɛ́ banyole ewua ntsa fɔsɔ a? Nde be evedi nkaɛ a? 18Nde sũ ɔnɔvɔɛ̃ kĩĩ odi limuniki ɛyaanyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ?” 19Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Yidza kanaa. Nɔ katɛkado fɔ̃ ɔsaɛ.”
Yesu Lɛ Ayekĩ Baguma Lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a Aana.
20Farisifɔ badi via Yesu lɔkɔ a kĩ de kamɛ Baguma lɛgãkanya a aaya. Yesu kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Baguma lɛgãkanya a lɛlaaya nɛ osi a kĩ bati amɔ mɔ anɛ a. 21Odima lɛláalɛ kĩ, ‘Dã, amɔ foe nɛ awĩ’ ĩye ‘amɔ foe nɛ akĩĩ,’ kitonɛkĩ Baguma lɛgãkanya a deĩ nɛ mi kamɛ.”
22Ke liti a ebi ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ, “Lɔkɔ lidi aaya kĩ míawɛ kĩ miamɔ Yĩ Otidziwa Obi fuwi a kamɛ lɔmɔa lɛmɛ miláamɔ de. 23Bati badi aana, ade baabi mi kĩ, ‘Midã ye nɛ akĩĩ!’ ĩye ‘Midã ye nɛ awĩ!’ Lɛmɛ mitatomɔ foe liti. 24Kitonɛkĩ ayekĩ odetɔ́ kamɛ amɔanɛ kato sɛkɛ kĩĩ kanaa sikĩĩ a, ade aye Otidziwa Obi a kaya aana a. 25Lɛmɛ kɛnɛ kĩ ɛnya lɔtɔ ɛmɔ lubo pii, ade nviã bati lɛmɛ aasĩ ye a.
26“Ayekĩ fɔna nɛ Noa lɔkɔ a, ade aye fɔ́ana nɛ Otidziwa Obi a kabuki kaya fuwi a kamɛ a. 27Bati flee kanya bɛkamɔa, banyole mɔ batsole kakɔã akũ, kɛnawo luwi a kĩ Noa de ewo nɛ ɔkɔlɔ a kamɛ, ade oni ko eyili fɔkɔ ɛwɔla bati flee a.
28“Ade ayea fɔ́ana ndɛ ayekĩ fɔna nɛ Lot lɔkɔ lɛmɛ a. Bati kanya, bɛkamɔa, bɛkanya kɔyaatɔ, kadu fɔtsa ade badi lɛmɛ kake fɔla a. 29Ade luwi a kĩ Lot nɛ́ nɛ Sodom ɔmatɔ kamɛ a, fi mɔ fukpokpo kĩ fudeĩ nfiã kpitii wula futo ode fɔyawɔla be a flee.
30“Ade aye fɔ́ana nɛ luwi a kĩ Otidziwa Obi a aanɛ ɛta a. 31Nɛ luwi a na, oti kĩ edeĩ nɛ kɔla ode ɛtabuki eduma kĩ yanaafila ye akũ fɔtsa nɛ kɔla kamɛ. Ade ayea odi kĩ edeĩ nɛ kɔba kamɛ ni, ɛtabuki emuniki ɛnaa tɔtɔ kamɛ kĩ yanaabɔɛ litsedi. 32Mite anɛ nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya nɛ Lot ɔtsɔ̃ akũ a! 33Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛbɔa mbɔdi kĩ yapili ye nkpã ni, yaayɛla ye, ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛyɛla ye nkpã ni yaana nkpã a bio. 34Luwi a lɛnyɛ ni, mabi mi kĩ bati nviã aawa nɛ ɔkɛna mɔa akũ, baabɔɛ ɔmɔa bɛdzakũmɛna lɔkɔa bɛfɔnɛ ɔyade a biyi. 35Batsole nviã aakawɔlɛ onuvoe nɛ kɔwɔlɛ akũ, baabɔɛ ɔmɔa lɔkɔa bɛfɔnɛ ɔyade a awɛ biyi. 36Banyole nviã aakakɛna adzuma nɛ kɔba. Baabɔɛ ɔmɔa bɛnamɛna, bɛfɔnɛ ɔmɔa biyi.”
37Ade fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a via ye kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, nɛ ndia?”
Yesu kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Awã kĩ fɔtsa kuwa waa ni, ade awã fɔpɛtɛ akpɔta a.”

Title: LUKA 18
Content:
Lɛgbã Nɛ Okunawa Mɔ Fɔlɛtsa Ɔdzɛnɛ Odi Akũ.
1Yesu bɔa ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a lɛgbã lidi, ɛkɔa yatsa be kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ bɛkaabɔa mpaɛ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ, kĩ akpɔ ɛtaveli be da. 2Ebi be kĩ, “Fɔlɛtsa ɔdzɛnɛ odi na nɛ ɔmatɔ odi kamɛ kĩ ɛtávila Baguma ĩye ɛkɔa obu ɛkpa odima lɛmɛ. 3Okunawa odi lɛmɛ na nɛ ɔmatɔ mɔapɛ a kamɛ, ade ɛkayake ye aduli kĩ, ‘Bumɔ yĩ kanyɛ yĩ nɛ yĩ okesĩnɛ awɛ kamɛ.’
4“Fɔtɛ lɔkɔ pii kĩ fɔlɛtsa ɔdzɛnɛ a sĩ ɛtákɛna lɛtsama nɛ foe akũ. Lɛmɛ nɛ ke kawũna kamɛ a, ebi ye akũ kĩ, ‘Titɔ kĩ maávila Baguma ade maákɔa obu kakpa otidziwa malo ni, 5nɛ ɔhau beblebee kĩ okunawa kĩĩ akpa yĩ sũ ni, maadã kĩ ɛna ye ɔtɔbɛ. Ntɛ ntákɛna lɔmɔ ni, yaakaya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ lɔkɔa ɛláafɔ̃ nna kawɛya.’ ” 6Ade boe Ɔlate lɛ ɛnaa lɔtɔ kĩ, “Mitse lɛtsa a kĩ fɔlɛtsa ɔdzɛnɛ kĩ yaádi ɔnɔkɔali kĩĩ lɛ. 7Finyaakĩĩ a, miatɛ kado kĩ Baguma lɛláadzɛ ɛkpa ye bati a kĩ babe kavɛ ye lɛnyɛ mɔ suwa, kavia kabumɛna a ɔtɔbɛ? Mbɔɛɛ miatɛ kado kĩ ɛláabumɛna be mɔatsɛ? 8Mabi mi kĩ yaadzɛ ɛkpa be ɔtɔbɛ mɔatsɛ. Lɛmɛ ntɛ Otidziwa Obi a ya nɛ katinya kamɛ ni, yaamɔ kĩ bati deĩ katɛkado?”
Yesu Bɔa Lɛgbã Nɛ Farisini Mɔ Tɔgɔlɛ Ɔtɛnɛ Odi Akũ.
9Yesu bɔa lɛgbã kĩĩ ɛkpa bati a kĩ bɛtɛ bido kĩ bɛkpalɛ yedede ade basupa bati nkaɛ a. 10Ebi be kĩ, “Luwi a, bati nviã badi naa Asɔli Kɔla kamɛ kĩ banaabɔa mpaɛ. Ɔmɔa nyɛ Farisini, ɔyade a nyɛ tɔgɔlɛ ɔtɛnɛ. 11Farisini a kpɛ̃ ye akũ ɛnadza ɛbɔa mpaɛ kĩ, ‘Baguma, manyɛ nɔ kɔlɛ, kitonɛkĩ nlá anɛngbã. Maádi bati ablɔ ade maákɛna adɔpaa ndɛ ayekĩ bati bɛbã akɛna a. Manyɛ nɔ kɔlɛ lɛmɛ kĩ nlá ndɛ tɔgɔlɛ ɔtɛnɛ a kĩ ɛdzɛ nɛ akĩĩ a aye. 12Masui onukpɛ̃ fuwi nviã nɛ ɛkwansieda mɔa kamɛ, ade makɔa lɛtsa a kĩ mana a foe katsu kawuade a kakpa nɔ a.’
13“Lɛmɛ tɔgɔlɛ ɔtɛnɛ a dza mɔ lugo, ade ɛtáwɛ kĩ yadzɛla anɛ ɛdã ode malo a. Lɛmɛ ɛkɔa awɛ ɛbɔamɔ ɔwɔlɛ ɛlɛ kĩ, ‘Baguma, titikpa ɔkɛnanɛ manɛ, mɔ yĩ kɔnya!’ ”
14Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mabi mi kĩ tɔgɔlɛ ɔtɛnɛ a akũ lɛkpalɛ yedede nɛ Baguma anɛ kĩ emuniki ɛnaa kɔla a, nnɛ́ Farisini a. Kitonɛkĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛdɛla ye akũ nɛ ode ni, baakɛna ye nɛ kayɔ, ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛdɔla ye akũ ni, baadɛla ye nɛ ode.”
Yesu Hila Babisɛ̃.
15Bati badi kɔa be babi bɛyamɛna kĩ Yesu ete awɛ nɛ be akũ. Kĩ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a mɔ́ fukĩĩ a, bɛkã be anɛ. 16Lɛmɛ Yesu vɛ babisɛ̃ a ɛyamɛna nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃, ɛlɛ kĩ, “Mifɔ̃ babisɛ̃ bɛya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃, mitasua be osi.
