Kitonɛkĩ bikĩĩ bamɛ odu lá Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a. 17Mite fukĩĩ anɛ! Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtátɛ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a ndɛ obisɛ̃ aye ni ɛláapuli ewo nɛ de kamɛ dadaada.”
Yesu Lɛ Fɔlɛtsa Nɛ Asikafɔ Mɔ Baguma Lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a Akũ.
18Yudafɔ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ odi via Yesu kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ wĩ, litsa kɛnɛ kĩ nkɛna fɔmɔ maana nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna dadaada a?”
19Ade Yesu via ye kĩ, “Nde sũ avɛ yĩ oti wĩ? Odima lɛnyɛ́ oti wĩ, mbɔɛntɛ Baguma mɔapɛ. 20Onyina mbla a kĩ ɛtsa kĩ, ‘Tabɔa adɔpaa, takɔ oti, taye, tama fɔvã ote nɛ odima akũ, bu aga mɔ ama.’ ”
21Oti a kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Kito anɛ yĩ tibisɛ̃ kamɛ a, nkɛna nɛ tɛbla kĩĩ flee akũ.”
22Kĩ Yesu nu foe a, ebi ye kĩ, “Lɛtsa mɔa te nɔ kakɛna. Naanɔ nɔ fɔtsa flee a kĩ odeĩ a kakɔa foe sika a kakpa ahiãfɔ, lɔkɔa aana akũ kana fɔtsa nɛ ode. Ke liti muniki kayaatomɔ yĩ.”
23Lɛmɛ kĩ onyole a nu fɔlɛtsa a ewo ɔblɔ paa, kitonɛkĩ ɛna akũ kana fɔtsa beblebee. 24Yesu mɔ ayekĩ ewo ɔblɔ a, ade ɛlɛ kĩ, “Fɔ́ana ɔsĩ fɔkpa asikafɔ kĩ baapuli biwo nɛ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kamɛ! 25Fɔadã bɔɛɛ kĩ ɔpɔnkɔ mɔ kapu aatsã ɔnɔbɔ̃ ɔkɛ kamɛ ɛnɛ, kɛba kĩ osikani aawo nɛ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kamɛ.”
26Ade bati a kĩ binu kalɛ kĩĩ a via Yesu kĩ, “Kekɔ̃ owei koũ aana katɛ?”
27Yesu kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Lɛtsa a kĩ otidziwa lɛláapuli ɛkɛna dadaada ni, Baguma kɔ̃ aapuli ɛkɛna.”
28Awã naa Petro bi Yesu kĩ, “Dã, bɔfɔnɛ boe tɔtɔ awɛ buyi bɔya butomɔ nɔ.”
29Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mafɔ̃ minyi yededeede kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛfɔnɛ ye tɔtɔ, ɔtsɔ̃ ĩye bawaɛ̃, ĩye bamanɛ ĩye babi eyi nɛ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a sũ ni, 30baase ye fɔtsa kĩĩ fublusu nɛ nviã katinya kĩĩ kamɛ mɔ nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna a nɛ kikĩ kaaya a kamɛ.”
Yesu Buki Ɛlɛ Kalɛ Nɛ Ye Wuda Akũ.
31Yesu kpã ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ ewua-nviã a ɛnamɛna ɔɔwɛ̃ ade ebi be kĩ, “Mitse! Bɔanaa Yerusalem, awã kĩ fɔtsa flee a kĩ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ tsɛlɛ nɛ Otidziwa Obi akũ biyi a, aaya nɛ foe kamɛ. 32Baakɔa ye bido nɛ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ awɛ, bidi ye nsekuo, bivũna ye, bitua tanɛ biko nɛ ye akũ. 33Baabo ye lɔkɔa bɛkɔ ye, lɛmɛ nɛ luwi lɛlalɛde akũ ni, yaabuki eyidza edzi nkpã.”
34Lɛmɛ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ tánu fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ fudima kayɔ. Bɛkɔa foe kayɔkanu bɛkɔla be, ade ke bɛtányi lɛtsa a kĩ de akũ Yesu kalɛ kɔdzɛla a.
Yesu Tsa Ɔnɛkunɛ Odi Kĩ Ɛkawã Fɔtsa.
35Kĩ Yesu fuã Yeriko ɔmatɔ a, ɔnɛkunɛ odi dzi nɛ osi ɔɔwɛ̃ ɛkawã fɔtsa. 36Kĩ enu bati kɔdabu nkã kĩ batɛ̃ a, evia kĩ, “Litsa lamɔ kaya?”
37Ade bibi ye kĩ, “Yesu Nazaretni a lɛyaatɛ̃.”
38Awã naa, ɛbɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba kĩ, “Yesu, Lɛgã Dawid Obi! Mɔ yĩ kɔnya!”
39Bati a kĩ bɛnyaa lɔtɔ a wũni nɛ ye akũ kĩ esua onukpɛ̃. Lɛmɛ ɛdanɛ fɔwɔla kabɔa kɔɔba kalɛ kĩ, “Lɛgã Dawid Obi! Mɔ yĩ kɔnya!”
40Foesũ Yesu fɔ̃ ɛdza ade ɛlɛ kĩ bɛkpã ɔnɛkunɛ a bɛma ye a. Kĩ ewo Yesu sɛkɛ̃ a, evia ye kĩ, 41“Litsa awɛ kĩ nkɛna nkpa nɔ?”
Ɔnɛkunɛ a akpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, mawɛ kĩ mbuki mmɔ́ fɔkɔ.”
42Ade Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Kekɔ̃ mɔ fɔkɔ. Nɔ katɛkado fɔ̃ ɔsaɛ.” 43Deedimɔapɛ epuli ɛmɔ fɔkɔ ade ke etomɔ Yesu mɔ Baguma kɔlɛ kanyɛ a. Kĩ bati kɔdabu a mɔ fukĩĩ a, be flee bimu Baguma.

Title: LUKA 19
Content:
Yesu Nase Nɛ Zakeo Sɛkɛ̃.
1Yesu nawo nɛ Yeriko ɔmatɔ a kamɛ, ɛtsã ye kamɛ ɛtɛ̃. 2Tɔgɔlɛ ɔtɛnɛnɔkɔɛ̃ osikani paa odi kĩ bavɛ Zakeo dzi nɛ awã. 3Ɛkabɔa mbɔdi kĩ yamɔ Yesu enyi ye, lɛmɛ kĩ ɛnyɛ oti lukũ sũ, bati lidede fɔ̃ ɛtápuli ɛmɔ ye. 4Foesũ ewula atsɛ ɛnya bati kɔdabu a lɔtɔ ɛnade nɛ kutse gɛlɛɛlɛ kudi kamɛ ayekĩ yaamɔ Yesu kitonɛkĩ enyina kĩ yaatsã awã ɛtɛ̃.
5Kĩ Yesu wo kutse a kayɔ a, ɛdzɛla anɛ ɛmɔ Zakeo ade ɛvɛ ye kĩ, “Zakeo, duma mɔatsɛ, kɛnɛ kĩ mase nɛ nɔ awã nviã.” 6Zakeo wɛ sɔwa eduma ade ɛyatɛ Yesu mɔ kawɔlɛ a.
7Bati a flee kĩ bɛmɔ́ fukĩĩ a kɛna hũhũhũhũ nɛ Yesu akũ bɛlɛ kĩ, “Oti kĩĩ nase nɛ titikpa ɔkɛnanɛ tɔtɔ kamɛ.”
8Zakeo yidza ɛdza ebi boe Ɔlate a kĩ, “Boe Ɔlɛga, dã! Maakɔa yĩ akũ fɔtsa sɛkɛ mɔa nte ahiãfɔ, ade ntɛ nsisi odi ni, maase ye foe titi ɛna kɔtɔ.”
9Ade Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Nkpã katɛ ya nɛ tɔtɔ kĩĩ kamɛ nviã, kitonɛkĩ oti kĩĩ lɛmɛ nyɛ Abraham kasinu a kamɛ obi. 10Otidziwa Obi a ya kĩ yawɛ bikĩ bɛyɛla ɛnyɛ be lɛmɛ.”
Yesu Bɔa Lɛgbã Nɛ Sika Akũ.
11Ade kĩ bati katse fɔlɛtsa a kĩ Yesu kabi be a, ɛlɛ ɛnamɛna lɔtɔ, ɛbɔa be lɛgbã lidi. Lɔkɔ kĩĩ a, efuã Yerusalem ade bati a kɔna kĩ Baguma lɛgãkanya a do kanɛ kata awɛ a. 12Foesũ ebi be kĩ “Nɛ lɔkɔ lidi kamɛ ni, ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ odi yidza kĩ yanaa tite tidi akũ mɔlugo mɔlugo bɛnaadzina ye lɛgã. Ehihiɛ eyi kĩ yaamuniki ɛya nɛ ɔtɔ nɛ foe liti. 13Fɔmɔ yaapi osi a, ɛvɛ ye basumunɛ ewua ɛkpɔta ade ɛkpa be kamɛ odi nyɛ odi sika ngbã sɔmɔa sɔmɔa ebi be kĩ, ‘Mikɔa sika a minya kɔyaatɔ mina kute nɛ yĩ liti.’
14“Lɛmɛ ye ɔtɔ bati akesĩ ye foesũ bido batɔ bitomɔ ye liti kĩ bɛnaalɛ kĩ, ‘Bɔáwɛ onyole kĩĩ kĩ ɛnya boe lɛgã.’
15“Bidzina onyole a lɛgã ade emuniki ɛya nɛ ɔtɔ a. Kĩ ɛya a, ɛfɔ̃ bɛvɛ ye basumunɛ a bɛyadzɛla nɛ ye anɛ kamɛ kĩ yawɛ enyi kute a kĩ bɛna.
16“Osumunɛ ɔtɔnyade a bi ye kĩ, ‘Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃, nna sika a sɔmɔa sɔmɔa foe ewua nte nɛ sikĩ ɔkpa yĩ a akũ.’
17“Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a kpa ye mbo ɛlɛ kĩ, ‘Ɔkɛna foe kakɛna wĩ! Ɔnyɛ osumunɛ kĩ yadi ɔnɔkɔali! Nɛ ayekĩ odi ɔnɔkɔali nɛ fɔtsa kabii akũ sũ ni, maakɛna nɔ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ nɛ tɛmatɔ ewua akũ.’
18“Osumunɛ ɔyade a lɛmɛ yalɛ kĩ, ‘Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃, nna sika sɔmɔa sɔmɔa foe elo nte nɛ sikĩ ɔkpa yĩ a akũ!’
19“Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a bi ye kĩ, ‘Mbo, ɔkɛna foe kakɛna wĩ! Aanya ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ nɛ tɛmatɔ elo akũ!’
20“Osumunɛ ɔlalɛde a yalɛ kĩ, ‘Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃, amɔ nɔ sika sɔmɔa kĩ ɔkɔa ɔkpa yĩ a. Nsui se nɛ limakũ kamɛ nkɔa nkɔla. 21Nvila nɔ kitonɛkĩ oti mɔ ɔsĩ odi anɛ. Abɔɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔnyɛ́ nɔ fude, ade ana fɔtsa a kĩ ɔtádu lɛmɛ a.’
22“Ade Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a bi ye kĩ, ‘Nɔ osumunɛ kpa, maakɔa nɔ mɔawɛ onukpɛ̃ kamɛ kɔdzɛla kalɛ nkɔ nɔ kɔtɔ. Onyina kĩ oti mɔ ɔsĩ manɛ kĩ mabɔɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔnyɛ́ yĩ fude, ade mana fɔtsa kĩ ntádu a. 23Kĩ onyina lɔmɔ a, nde sũ ɔtákɔa yĩ sika ɔnaado nɛ sika kakɔlakɔ̃ kĩ ntɛ mmuniki ĩya ni, maatɛ se mɔ se akũ kute?’
24“Ade ebi bati a kĩ bɛdzɛ̃ nɛ awã kĩ, ‘Mitɛ sika sɔmɔa nɛ ye awɛ mikɔa mikpa osumunɛ a kĩ ɛna sika sɔmɔa sɔmɔa ewua a.’
25“Lɛmɛ bati a bi ye kĩ, ‘Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃, oti a na deĩ sika sɔmɔa sɔmɔa se ewua kɔkɔɛ!’
26“Ade Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, ‘Mabi mi kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ edeĩ litsedi ni, ade ye baakɔa foe pii bibu a, lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛlá lɛtsama a ni, foe kabii a kĩ edeĩ a malo baatɛ foe nɛ ye awɛ. 27Finyaa ni, mivɛlɛ yĩ bakesĩnɛ a kĩ bɛtáwɛ kĩ ĩnya be lɛgã a miyamɛna nɛ awĩ, lɔkɔa mikɔ be nɛ yĩ anɛ kamɛ.’ ”
Yesu Wo Nɛ Yerusalem Ɔmatɔ Kamɛ.
28Kĩ Yesu bi be fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ eyua a, ɛnya ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a lɔtɔ epi osi yanaa Yerusalem. 29Kĩ efuã Betfage mɔ Betania tɛmatɔ a nɛ Kugua Futse Ɔtɔ ɔwɛ̃ a, edo ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ nviã ɛnyamɛna lɔtɔ, ebi be kĩ, 30“Minaa ɔmatɔ kabii a kĩ ɛwa nɛ mi lɔtɔ a kamɛ. Ntɛ miawo nɛ ye kamɛ ni, míamɔ aflim obi kĩ odima tádzi nɛ ye akũ tɔ̃ kĩ edeĩ nɛ ɔwɛ̃ kamɛ. Miwũnya ye lɔkɔa mikɔa miyamɛna nɛ awĩ. 31Ntɛ odi via mi kĩ litsa sũ miawũnya ye ni, mibi ye kĩ, ‘Boe Ɔlate sĩ ye.’ ”
32Fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a naa ade bɛmɔ́ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa ndɛ ayekĩ Yesu bi be a. 33Kĩ bɛkawũnya aflim obi a, ye balate via be kĩ, “Nde sũ miawũnya ye?”
34Fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ nviã a kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate sĩ ye.”
35Bɛkɔa aflim obi a bɛma Yesu ade bɛdzɛlɛ be tɛtadiɛ wulaa biko nɛ ye akũ bibumɛna Yesu ede edzi nɛ ye akũ a. 36Kĩ edzi nɛ ye akũ banaa a, bati dzɛlɛ be tɛtadiɛ biko nɛ tite.
37Kĩ Yesu fuã Yerusalem nɛ awã kĩ osi a ka eto Kugua Futse Ɔtɔ akũ a, ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ kɔdabu flee a yi kayɔ mɔ Baguma kɔlɛ kanyɛ, mɔ ye kahulu mɔ fɔwɔla kɔɔba nɛ awãwã fɔtsa flee a kĩ bɛmɔ́ a sũ. 38Ade ke bɛlɛ kĩ,
“Baguma ehila Lɛgã a kĩ laya nɛ Boe Ɔlate dĩ akũ!
Lukudɔ lɛna nɛ ode, obu ɛnya Baguma nɛ ode flefle fude!”
39Farisifɔ badi kĩ bideĩ nɛ bati kɔdabu a kamɛ bi Yesu kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, bi nɔ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a bisua onukpɛ̃!”
40Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Mabi mi kĩ ntɛ bisua onukpɛ̃ ni, boe nɛ osi ɔɔwɛ̃ a mɔawɛ aayi fɔwɔla kabɔa kayɔ.”
Yesu Be Nɛ Yerusalem Lɔlɔ.
41Kĩ Yesu fuã Yerusalem ɛkɔa anɛ ɛmɔ ɔmatɔ kĩĩ a, ewula babe nɛ ye lɔlɔ. 42Ade ɛlɛ kĩ, “Mawɛ kĩ nviã kĩĩ malo ni, aanyi lɛtsa a kĩ laakpa nɔ lukudɔ. Lɛmɛ finyaa kĩĩ a, ɔláapuli ɔmɔ́ de! 43Lɔkɔ lidi aya kĩ nɔ bakesĩnɛ aatsua bisinya nɔ nɛ sɛkɛ nyɛ sɛkɛ. 44Baawɔla nɔ mɔ bati a kĩ bideĩ nɛ nɔ kamɛ a, ade bɛláafɔnɛ de lidima lɛwa nɛ de kawakɔ̃ malo a, kitonɛkĩ ɔtámɔ lɔkɔ a kĩ Baguma yatɛ nɔ a oyi ɔsũ!”
Yesu Blɔmɛna Kɔyaatɔ Banyanɛ Nɛ Asɔli Kɔla Kamɛ.
45Kĩ Yesu nawo nɛ Asɔli Kɔla kamɛ a, eyi kayɔ mɔ fɔtsa banɔnɛ kablɔmɛna awɛ nɛ awã. 46Ebi be kĩ, “Bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ kĩ Baguma lɛ kĩ, ‘Baavɛ yĩ asɔli kɔla kĩ mpaɛ kabɔakɔ̃.’ Lɛmɛ mikɔa koe mikɛna bayekpanɛ kabɛlakɔ̃!”
47Luwi nyɛ luwi ni, Yesu katsa fɔtsa nɛ Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ. Yudafɔ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃, mbla batsanɛ mɔ ɔmaĩ banɔkɔɛ̃ wɛ kĩ bakɔ ye. 48Lɛmɛ bɛtámɔ osi a kĩ ye akũ baatsã, kitonɛkĩ bati a flee dzɛmɛna ye fɔlɛtsa kayaatse, ade bɛtáwɛ kĩ ye kalɛ kadima kɛtɛ̃ nɛ be akũ a.

Title: LUKA 20
Content:
Bati Vɛlɛ Fɔlɛtsa Mɔ Yesu Nɛ Ye Otumi Akũ.
1Luwi a, kĩ Yesu na nɛ Asɔli Kɔla kamɛ ɛkatsa fɔtsa, ɛkalɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a, Yudafɔ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃, mbla batsanɛ mɔ ɔmatɔ a banɔkɔɛ̃ ya nɛ awã. 2Ade bibi ye kĩ, “Bi boe osi a kĩ odeĩ fɔmɔ akɛna fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ a. Owei lɛkpa nɔ osi?”
3Yesu kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Mifɔ̃ ĩnya lɔtɔ nvia mi kalɛ mɔa. Mibi yĩ, 4Yohanes bati mui kawɔla amaniɛ a ni, Baguma sɛkɛ̃ futo mbɔɛɛ kĩ bati sɛkɛ̃ futo?”
5Nɛ awã a, biyi fɔlɛtsa kavɛlɛ mɔ be akũ kĩ, “Litsa bɔ́alɛ? Ntɛ bɔlɛ kĩ futo Baguma sɛkɛ̃ ni, yaavia kĩ, ‘Nde sũ mitátɛ Yohanes mido?’ 6Ade ntɛ bɔlɛ kĩ bati sɛkɛ̃ futo ni, bati kɔdabu a flee aanɔ boe boe, kitonɛkĩ be flee bɛtɛ bido kĩ Yohanes nyɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ.”
7Nɛ foesũ bɛkpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Bunyína awã kĩ futo.”
8Ade Yesu lɛmɛ bi be kĩ, “Kekɔ̃ yĩ malo nláabi mi awã kĩ ntomɛna kɔbɛ̃ nnɛɛ makɛna fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ.”
Yesu Bɔa Lɛgbã Nɛ Apaafɔ Akũ.
9Ade Yesu bɔa bati a lɛgbã kĩ, “Lɔkɔ lidi kamɛ ni, onyole odi nɛ waĩ kɔba. Ɛkɔa koe edo nɛ apaafɔ awɛ ɛnaa osi akũ, ɛnadzi nɛ awã ebuna owi. 10Kĩ lɔkɔ wo ɔtɔ kĩ bana waĩ babi a, edo ye osumunɛ odi kĩ ɛnaatɛ ye kanyakɔ̃ nɛ apaafɔ a sɛkɛ̃ ɛma ye. Lɛmɛ apaafɔ a bo osumunɛ a, bɛlɔla ye mɔ awɛ pupulidza. 11Nɛ foesũ edo osumunɛ bɛbã, lɛmɛ apaafɔ a bo ye malo, bido ye kɔnyɔã, ade bɛnyɛ ye osi mɔ awɛ pupulidza a. 12Ade edo osumunɛ ɔlalɛde a. Apaafɔ a bo ye malo bipila ye ade bɛblɔmɛna ye a.
13“Kɔba ɔlate a via ye akũ kĩ, ‘Litsa maakɛna? Maado yĩ obi kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ ade matɛ kado kĩ baabu ye.’
14“Lɛmɛ kĩ apaafɔ a mɔ́ obi a, bibi akũ kĩ, ‘Ade kɔba ɔlate a obi nɛ awĩ a. Mifɔ̃ bɔkɔ ye lɔkɔa ye adzapadiɛ ɛkɛna boe ade.’ 15Foesũ bɛvɛlɛ ye bɛnɛmɛna nɛ kɔbã a kamɛ ade bɛkɔ ye a.”
Ade Yesu via be kĩ “Litsa mikɔna kĩ kɔba ɔlate a aakɛna apaafɔ a? 16Mabi mi kĩ yaayakɔ apaafɔ a na flee lɔkɔa ɛkɔa kɔba a edo nɛ apaafɔ bɛbã awɛ.”
Kĩ bati a nu fukĩĩ a, bɛlɛ kĩ, “Kusɛ! Baguma lɛláakpa osi fɔya nɛ foe kamɛ lɔmɔ da!”
17Yesu ko anɛ ɛdã be ade evia be kĩ, “Litsa Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ fɔlɛtsa atsa?
‘De a kĩ fɔla bakenɛ sĩ a,
ade de lɛdani kɔla akũ de titiliwu a!’
18Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaatula ɛtɔ nɛ de a na akũ ni, yaaveliveli gblɛgblɛgblɛ, ade ke odi nyɛ odi kĩ de a na aatɔ nɛ ye akũ ni, laanuna ye kpɛtɛkpɛtɛkpɛtɛ.”
Yesu Lɛ Kɔdzɛla Nɛ Ɔgɔlɛ Katɛ Akũ.
19Yudafɔ mbla batsanɛ a mɔ Yudafɔ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a bɔa mbɔdi kĩ bapi Yesu nɛ awã, kitonɛkĩ bɛmɔ́ biyi ɔsũ kĩ be sũ mɔ ɛbɔa lɛgbã a, lɛmɛ bivila bati a. 20Nɛ foesũ bɛwɛ osi bɛbã kĩ ye akũ baatsã bipi ye. Bɛkpa banyole badi sika kĩ bɛkɛna be akũ ndɛ bati kĩ badi ɔnɔkɔali. Bido be kĩ bɛnaanaĩ Yesu nɛ fɔlɛtsa kavia katse kamɛ, lɔkɔa bɛna osi bɛkɔa ye bido nɛ banɔkɔɛ̃, mɔ Roma abãã ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ awɛ. 21Bikĩ banaĩ Yesu a ya nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃, bibi ye kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, bunyina kĩ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ alɛ mɔ fukĩ atsa a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali. Bunyina lɛmɛ kĩ aádã oti anɛ, mbom atsa Baguma tisi a nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ. 22Finyaakĩĩ ni, bi boe ntɛ boe mbla kpa osi kĩ buse ɔgɔlɛ bɔkpa Romafɔ Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃, mbɔɛɛ kĩ ɛtákpa osi?”
23Lɛmɛ Yesu mɔ́ be tɛdake a eyi ɔsũ ade ebi be kĩ, 24“Miyamɛna sika ovoe a sidi ndã. Owei lɔlɔ mɔ dĩ teĩ nɛ se akũ?”
25Bɛkpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃ Kaisare fude fɔanɛ.”
Yesu bi be kĩ, “Kekɔ̃ mikɔa fukĩ fɔnyɛ Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃ fude a mikpa Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃, ade mikɔa fukĩ fɔnyɛ Baguma fude lɛmɛ mikpa Baguma a.”
26Nɛ bati kɔdabu a anɛ kamɛ na a, bɛtápuli bipi ye nɛ osi odima akũ, foesũ bisua be tunukpɛ̃ nɛ Yesu mbuayɛ a kĩ ɛkɛna be wãwã sũ.
Yesu Lɛ Kɔdzɛla Nɛ Banɔkpa Kabuki Kayidza Akũ.
27Ade Zadukifɔ kĩ balɛ kĩ kayidza kato kanɔkpa lɛláa a, ya nɛ Yesu sɛkɛ̃, bibi ye kĩ, 28“Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, Mose tsɛlɛ mbla ɛkpa boe kĩ, ‘Ntɛ onyole odi ku ɛfɔnɛ ɔtsɔ̃ kĩ bɛmɔ ye bɛtáma ni, onyole a ɔwaɛ̃ ɛkɔã otsole a lɔkɔa bɛmɔ ye bɛma babi bɛnya ekĩ eku a bade.’ 29Lɔkɔ lidi ni, bawaɛ̃nyole evũkɔnɔ badi dzi nkpã. Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃de a kɔã ɔtsɔ̃ lɛmɛ eku, kĩ bɛtáma obi odima. 30Ɔwaɛ̃ ɔyade a mɔ ɔlalɛde a lɛmɛ kɔã okunawa, ade be malo biku kĩ bɛtáma babi badima a. 31Ade lɛtsa mɔapɛ a lɛkɛna bawaɛ̃nyole evũkɔnɔ a flee a. Be flee biku nɛ kĩ otsole a táma obi ɛkpa be kamɛ odima. 32Nɛ foe kawũna kamɛ a, otsole a mɔawɛ yaku. 33Lɔkɔa nɛ luwi a kĩ banɔkpa aabuki biyidza bidzi nkpã a ni, be kamɛ owei ɔtsɔ̃ yaanya, nɛ kĩ be evũkɔnɔ a flee bɛkɔã tɔ̃ ye a?”
34Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Katinya kĩĩ kamɛ mɔ́ otsole mɔ onyole akɔã akũ, 35lɛmɛ banyole mɔ batsole a kĩ bɛkpɔla kĩ baayidza bito kanɔkpa bidzi nkpã nɛ katinya kĩ kaaya a kamɛ a ni, bɛláakɔã batsɔ̃ ĩye bidzi fɔnyɔ. 36Baana ndɛ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ, ade bɛláabuki biku da a. Bɛnyɛ Baguma babi kitonɛkĩ biyidza bito kanɔkpa. 37Mose nyɛ ɛtsa yededeede nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ kĩ badzɛla banɔkpa babuki kadzi nkpã, kitonɛkĩ lɔkɔ a kĩ ɛdza nɛ kutse a kĩ kɔkatɛ̃ anɛ kamɛ a, ɛvɛ Baguma kĩ Abraham Baguma Isak Baguma mɔ Yakob lɛmɛ Baguma. 38Fukĩĩ atsa kĩ ɛnyɛ bikĩ bidzi nkpã a Baguma, nnɛ́ banɔkpa Baguma yanɛ. Kitonɛkĩ nɛ Baguma sɛkɛ̃ ni, be flee bidzi nkpã.”
39Nɛ awã a Yudafɔ mbla batsanɛ badi lɛ kĩ. “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, ɔkpa mbuayɛ kakpa wĩ paa!” 40Ke liti odima tábuki edo ɔwɔlɛ evia ye kadima.
Owei Obi Nyɛ Kristo a?
41Yesu via be kĩ, “Nde sũ bati alɛ kĩ Kristo a aanya Lɛgã Dawid kasinu kamɛ obi? 42Ade Dawid mɔawɛ a lɛ nɛ Tɔnɔ Ovoli a kamɛ kĩ,
‘Boe Ɔlate bi yĩ Ɔlate kĩ,
“Dzi nɛ yĩ sɔmɔna
43kɛnaawo lɔkɔ a kĩ nkɔa nɔ bakesĩnɛ
nkɛna nɔ abɔa katekɔ̃.” ’
44Ade ntɛ Dawid vɛ ye kĩ boe Ɔlate a, nde fɔya mɔ Kristo a aanya Dawid kasinu kamɛ obi?”
Yesu Bɔa Bati Kɔkɔ Nɛ Yudafɔ Mbla Batsanɛ Akũ.
45Kĩ bati a flee dza bɛkatse Yesu fɔlɛtsa a, ɛdani ebi ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ, 46“Midã kadã wĩ nɛ Yudafɔ mbla batsanɛ a akũ. Bati kĩĩ ado tɛtadiɛ wulaa katsã kamini, ade bawɛ kĩ bati bɛwɔ̃na be nɛ obu kamɛ nɛ kɔya a. Bawɛ banɔkɔɛ̃ fudzikɔ̃ nɛ Yudafɔ fɔtsɛnakɔ̃, mɔ fudzikɔ̃ wĩ nɛ fuwi kanyakɔ̃. 47Bakɔa tɛdake kasisi bakunawa katɛ be tɔtɔ ade babɔa mpaɛ gɛlɛɛlɛ kakɔa kamu akũ a. Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ be sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ aaba bati flee fude!”

Title: LUKA 21
Content:
Okunawa Odi Fɔtsa Kate.
1Nɛ Yudafɔ Asɔli Kɔla kamɛ a, Yesu ko anɛ ɛmɔ asikafɔ kĩ bɛkɔa be futetsa bɛkado nɛ ɔgɔlɛ adakã kamɛ. 2Ade ɛmɔ okunawa ohiãni odi kĩ ɛyakɔa kaplɛ nviã edo nɛ adakã a kamɛ a. 3Ade ebi be kĩ, “Mabi mi kĩ okunawa ohiãni kĩĩ te fɔtsa ɛba bati bɛbã a flee. 4Kitonɛkĩ bati bɛbã a kɔ̃ ni, be akũ kana fɔtsa a kĩ fublusu a kamɛ fudi sukuloo bite, lɛmɛ otsole ohiãni kĩĩ kɔa lɛtsa a kĩ de akũ yaadzi nkpã a flee ɛyate nɛ awĩ.”
Yesu Lɛ Lɔkɔ a Kĩ Baabubuli Asɔli Kɔla a.
5Fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kamɛ badi kalɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ Asɔli Kɔla a akũ, mɔ boe mɔ kalɛ a kĩ bɛkɔa bike koe, mɔ ayekĩ bɛkɛɛlɛ kɔla foebi a, mɔ fɔtsatewa a kĩ bakpa Baguma a. Lɛmɛ Yesu bi be kĩ, 6“Lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ miamɔ nɛ awĩ a, lɔkɔ aaya kĩ de lidima lɛláabuki lite nɛ lɔkɔba akũ. Baadzuli be flee biwula.”
Lubokamɔ Mɔ Bati Liti Katomɛna Aaya.
7Ade ke bivia ye kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, lɔkɔ lɔwɔdabe fukĩĩ aaya? Ade litsa bɔ́akɔa buyi ɔsũ kĩ lɔkɔ a wo ɔtɔ?”
8Yesu bi be kĩ, “Midã kadã wĩ, mitafɔ̃ bɛkɛ mi. Bati pii aaya nɛ yĩ dĩ akũ bɛlɛ kĩ, ‘Yĩ nyɛ Ɔtɛnɛ a,’ mɔ ‘Lɔkɔ a wo ɔtɔ.’ Lɛmɛ mitatomɔ be. 9Mitafɔ̃ libe liwo mi ntɛ minu kawũkanɔ mɔ bati kayidza kadza nɛ bati akũ nkã. Kɛnɛ kĩ fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ flee fɔnya lɔtɔ fɔya nɛ foe kamɛ, lɛmɛ fɔátsa kĩ katinya kawũna a fuã kiyua.”
10Yesu lɛ ɛnamɛna lɔtɔ kĩ, “Ɔmaĩ mɔ ɔmaĩ aanɔ akũ, fɔgã mɔ fɔgã lɛmɛ aanɔ akũ. 11Tite kakuna mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ, kɔlɛ mɔ fɔsɔ kpa kumɛkumɛ lɛmɛ aaya nɛ kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ, ade libe mɔ awãwã fɔtsa aanɛ nɛ odetɔ́ kamɛ a.
12“Fɔmɔ fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ flee aaya ni, baatomɔ mi liti, bipili mi bɛnamɛna Yudafɔ fɔtsɛnakɔ̃ bɛdzɛ̃mɔ mi, bibo mi lɔkɔa bido mi nɛ kɔla. Ade baakpã mi bɛnaadzɛla nɛ fɔgã mɔ abãã banɔkɔɛ̃ anɛ nɛ yĩ sũ. 13Fukĩĩ aakpa mi osi kĩ milɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a. 14Mipi miyi kĩ miláaha akũ nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ míalɛ minyɛ mi akũ a akũ. 15Kitonɛkĩ maakpa mi fɔlɛtsa mɔ kadikanyi ayekĩ mi bakesĩnɛ kamɛ odima lɛláapuli esĩ ĩye ɛlɛ kalɛ etia lɛtsa a kĩ míalɛ a. 16Mi bamanɛ, bawaɛ̃, akũ bati mɔ bakɔba aanyɛ mi bɛkpa ade baakɔ mi kamɛ badi a. 17Odi nyɛ odi aakesĩ mi nɛ yĩ sũ. 18Lɛmɛ mi lɔlɔ sɔlɔ mɔapɛ malo lɛláayɛla. 19Midza pintii lɔkɔa míana katɛ.
Yesu Lɛ Lɔkɔ a Kĩ Baabubuli Yerusalem Ɔmatɔ a.
20“Ntɛ mimɔ́ kĩ sodzafɔ dza bisinya Yerusalem ni, minyi kĩ ɔmatɔ a kawɔla wo ɔtɔ. 21Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ ni, bati a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Yudea bilo bɛnaa tɔtɔ akũ. Bikĩ bideĩ nɛ Yerusalem ɔmatɔ a kamɛ bilo bɛnɛ, ade bikĩ bɛláa ɔmatɔ a kamɛ bɛtabuki bimuniki bɛya nɛ ye kamɛ. 22Kitonɛkĩ lɔkɔ a na aanya Sɔtɔ Kavɛlɛ fuwi fɔkpa bati, ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa fɔlɛtsa a aaya nɛ foe kamɛ. 23Fɔ́ana ɔsĩ paa fɔkpa bamatsɔ̃ mɔ babima a kĩ babi amɛmɛ be a. Lubokamɔ baũ aaya nɛ tite kĩĩ akũ, ade Baguma sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ aaya nɛ bati kĩĩ akũ a. 24Bati badi aatɔ nɛ lɛpamɛ onukpɛ̃, ade baapili badi ndom bɛnamɛna tite bɛbã akũ a. Ade bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ aade bidzi nɛ Yerusalem bati akũ kɛnaawo lɔkɔ a kĩ Baguma yi ɛkpa be a wũna.
Otidziwa Obi a Aabuki Ɛya.
25“Awãwã fɔtsa aanɛ nɛ odetɔ́ kamɛ fɔkatsa nsɛntsɛlɛni nɛ suwa, odetɔ mɔ fusibii anɛ. Katinya kamɛ tɛmaĩ akũ aayɛla be, libe liwo be nɛ mpo kayili mɔ kavũ basabasa sũ. 26Libe aafɔ̃ anɛ lisinya bati nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ baakadã anɛ kakpa lɛtsa a kĩ de aaya nɛ katinya kamɛ flee akũ a, kitonɛkĩ odetɔ́ kamɛ kɔbɛ̃ fɔtsa lɛláabuki fɔdza nɛ foe kadzakɔ̃. 27Ke liti a Otidziwa Obi a aanɛ ɛta, ɛya nɛ luflututu kamɛ mɔ kɔbɛ̃ kpale mɔ ɔhaĩ. 28Ntɛ fukĩĩ bamɛ flee do kaya awɛ ni, midzɛla fɔlɔ midã ode kitonɛkĩ mi katɛ lɔkɔ wo ɔtɔ.”
Mikɔlɛ Fɔtsa Nɛ Atɔ Kutse Akũ.
29Ade Yesu bɔa be lɛgbã kĩ, “Midã atɔ kutse mɔ futse bɛbã a. 30Ntɛ mimɔ́ kĩ kɔnyɛ tɔɔta vɔɛ̃ ni, minyina kĩ kanɔde lɔkɔ wo ɔtɔ. 31Ade ayea ntɛ mimɔ́ fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ kĩ fɔlamɛna kaya ni, míanyi kĩ Baguma lɛgãkanya a fuã.
32“Mabi mi pipiipi kĩ bati a kĩ bidzi finyaa lɛláaku biwoli fɔmɔ fɔtsa kĩĩ flee aaya nɛ foe kamɛ. 33Tite mɔ ode flee onukpɛ̃ aatɛ̃ lɛmɛ yĩ fɔlɛtsa a kɔ̃ aana daa.
Kɛnɛ Kĩ Miana Nɛ Kukũmanɛ Kamɛ.
34“Midã akũ kadã wĩ. Mitakɔa mi akũ mikpa kanya mɔ kamɔa pɔtɔɔ, mɔ katinya kamɛ ɔhau. Ntɛ nnɛ́ aye ni, Luwi a aayafuta mi, 35ndɛ ayekĩ ɔyaɛ atɔ kpeĩ, kitonɛkĩ Luwi a aaketimɔ odi nyɛ odi kĩ edzi nkpã. 36Foesũ mina nɛ kukũmanɛ kamɛ, mikaabɔa mpaɛ luwi nyɛ luwi ayekĩ míana kɔbɛ̃ mitsã yedede nɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔ́aya a flee kamɛ, lɔkɔa miyaadza nɛ Otidziwa Obi a anɛ kamɛ.”
37Yesu kanaatsa bati fɔtsa luwi nyɛ luwi nɛ Yudafɔ Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ, ade ntɛ olobe wo ɔtɔ lɔkɔa yadzakũ kanaa Kugua Futse Ɔtɔ a akũ kawa nɛ awã. 38Ɔnɔnɛ nyɛ ɔnɔnɛ ni, bati kɔdabu atsɛna nɛ Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ katse ye fɔtsa katsa.

Title: LUKA 22
Content:
Basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Tsa Fɔlɔ Kĩ Bakɔ Yesu.
1Yudafɔ Abodoo Kĩ Ɛtáyila Luwi a kĩ bavɛ Wuda Katɛ̃ Luwi a kanya wo ɔtɔ. 2Yudafɔ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ mbla batsanɛ a kavila bati a, foesũ bɛkabɔa mbɔdi kawɛ osi kĩ baatsã bɛna Yesu bɛkɔ nɛ kabɛla kamɛ.
Yuda Tunɔ Kĩ Yaanyɛ Yesu Ɛkpa.
3Ade Abonsam wo nɛ Yuda kĩ bavɛ Iskariot, kĩ ɛnyɛ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ ewua-nviã a kamɛ ɔmɔa kamɛ a. 4Foesũ Yuda naa Yudafɔ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ Yudafɔ mɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a kĩ badãmɛna Asɔli Kɔla akũ a sɛkɛ̃, ade bipi adzuni nɛ osi wĩ a kĩ ye akũ yaatsã ɛnyɛ Yesu ɛkpa a. 5Kawɔlɛ de be ade bike otse kĩ baakpa ye sika. 6Yuda tunɔ nɛ foe akũ, foesũ ɛkawɛ lɔkɔ wĩ kĩ yaanyɛ Yesu ɛkpa nɛ bati kɔdabu a katanyi kamɛ.
Yesu Manɛ Akũ Ɛkpa Wuda Katɛ̃ Luwi Funitsã a Kanya.
7Luwi a kĩ bakɔ Wuda Katɛ̃ kavelibi nɛ Abodoo Kĩ Ɛtáyila Luwi Kanya kamɛ a wo ɔtɔ. 8Ade ke Yesu do Petro mɔ Yohanes kĩ, “Minaa lɔkɔa minaamanɛ Wuda Katɛ̃ funitsã a miyi mikpa boe kanya.”
9Nɛ awã a bivia ye kĩ, “Nɛ ndia awɛ kĩ bɔnaamanɛ foe buyi?”
10Yesu kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ miawo nɛ Yerusalem ɔmatɔ a kamɛ ni, onyole odi kĩ ɛnɔnɛ kugumi mɔ mui aatsɛlamɔ mi. Mitomɔ ye miwo nɛ tɔtɔ a kĩ te kamɛ yaawo a. 11Mibi tɔtɔ ɔlate a kĩ, ‘Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ bo buvia nɔ kĩ, “Nde kɔla kĩ koe kamɛ bɔmɔ yĩ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a bɔ́anya Wuda Katɛ̃ funitsã a?” ’ 12Yaatsa mi kɔla kpale kudi nɛ abansulu ode kĩ bike opunu mɔ fukpo nɛ koe kamɛ. Mifɔ̃ bɛmanɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa biyi nɛ awã.”
13Bipi osi ade bɛnamɔ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa pɛpɛɛpɛ ndɛ ayekĩ Yesu bi be a, ade bɛtɔ Wuda Katɛ̃ funitsã a nɛ awã a.
Bɛnya Boe Ɔlate Funitsã a.
14Yesu mɔ ye fɔtɔ banyanɛ a nadzi nɛ opunu akũ kĩ banya. 15Ade ebi be kĩ, “Fɔnyɛ yĩ kawɛ kɔkɔɛ kĩ bɔmɔ mi bɔnya Wuda Katɛ̃ Funitsã kĩĩ fɔmɔ maamɔ lubo. 16Mabi mi kĩ nláabuki ĩnya funitsã kĩĩ kɛnaawo lɔkɔ a kĩ foe kayɔkanu flee a ya nɛ Baguma lɛgãkanya a kamɛ.”
17Ke liti a, Yesu bɔɛ kɔɔpu, ɛnyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ ade ɛlɛ kĩ, “Mitɛ fukĩĩ misɛ̃ mikpa akũ. 18Mabi mi kĩ kito finyaa kanaa ni, nláabuki mmɔa waĩ kɛnaawo kĩ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a ya.”
19Ade ɛbɔɛ abodoo, ɛnyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ, ebulibuli ye ɛkpa be ɛlɛ kĩ, “Ade yĩ sukɛna kĩ bɛkɔa bakpa nɛ mi lɔlɔ a. Mikɛna fukĩĩ mikɔa mikai yĩ.”
20Ade ayea kĩ bɛnya biyua a, ɛbɔɛ kɔɔpu mɔ waĩ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Kɔɔpu kĩĩ nyɛ Baguma nhihiɛ vɔɛ̃ kĩ esipi nɛ foe akũ mɔ yĩ babɔanɛ a kĩ maako nɛ tite nɛ mi lɔlɔ. 21Lɛmɛ midã, oti a kĩ yaanyɛ yĩ ɛkpa a, bɔmɔ ye budzi nɛ kanyakɔ̃ nɛ awĩ. 22Otidziwa Obi a kɔ̃, aaku ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma hihiɛ eyi a. Lɛmɛ bɔbɔɛ bakpa owula a kĩ yaanyɛ ye ɛkpa a.” 23Nɛ awã a biyi akũ kavia kayɔ kĩ be kamɛ owei aakɛna fukĩĩ odu.
Owei Bɛ̃ Flee Nɛ Fɔtɔ Banyanɛ a Kamɛ?
24Fɔlɛtsa kavɛlɛ fudi yawo nɛ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kamɛ kĩ be kamɛ owei baabu kĩ ɛbɛ̃ flee. 25Ade ke Yesu bi be kĩ, “Bati a kĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a, be fɔgã deĩ otumi mɔ ɔsĩ nɛ be akũ, ade fɔgã kĩĩ te be akũ buĩ kĩ, Bati Bakɔba. 26Lɛmɛ fɔtana lɔmɔ nɛ mi kamɛ. Mbom oti a kĩ ɛbɛ̃ flee nɛ mi kamɛ ni, ɛkɛna ye akũ ndɛ obisɛ̃ kɔlaa. Ade kɛnɛ kĩ lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ nɛ mi kamɛ ɛna ndɛ osumunɛ ayea. 27Owei bɛ̃ ɔkɔba, ekĩ edzi yanya mbɔɛɛ ekĩ yasum ye a? Fɔwaa yededeede kĩ ekĩ edzi yanya a bɛ̃. Lɛmɛ ndeĩ nɛ mi kamɛ ndɛ osumunɛ aye. 28Mina nɛ yĩ akũ nɛ yĩ sɔhuiɛ flee kamɛ. 29Ndɛ ayekĩ Nda kpa yĩ kɔbɛ̃ kĩ ĩnya bati akũ a, ade ayea maakpa mi kɔbɛ̃ a na odu a. 30Míanya mimɔa mɔ yĩ nɛ opunu akũ nɛ yĩ lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kamɛ, ade míadzi nɛ fɔgãkpo akũ minya Israel futete ewua-nviã a akũ a.”
Yesu Lɛ Eyi Kĩ Petro Aasĩ Ye.
31Yesu vɛ Simon Petro ɛlɛ kĩ, “Simon, Simon! Tse katse wĩ! Bɛkpa Abonsam osi kĩ ɛsɔ mi ɛdã lɔkɔa ɛsa bati wĩ a nɛ bakpa kamɛ, ndɛ ayekĩ okuani awɛ afafa kanyɛ nɛ kamɔnɛ kamɛ a. 32Lɛmɛ Simon, mbɔa mpaɛ nkpa nɔ kĩ nɔ katɛkado kɛtadĩ. Ade ntɛ ɔyamuniki ɔya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ ni, do awaɛ̃ amɛ kɔbɛ̃.”
33Awã naa Petro kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Boe ɔlate, mmanɛ akũ nkpa kĩ bɔmɔ nɔ aawa kɔla ĩye kĩ bɔmɔ nɔ aaku!”
34Ade Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Petro, mabi nɔ kĩ fɔmɔ ɔkɔkɔ aanyɛ onukpɛ̃ nviã lɛnyɛ kĩĩ ni, aalɛ titi ɛlalɛ kĩ onyína yĩ.”
Sika Kuvũ Mɔ Kuvũ Kĩ Babɛla Mɔ Lɛpamɛ Gɛlɛɛlɛ.
35Yesu via ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ, “Lɔkɔ a kĩ ndo mi fɔtɔ kĩ ntáfɔ̃ mibɔɛ sika kuvũ, ĩye kuvũ kĩ babɛla ĩye mpabua a ni, litsedi nasĩ mi?”
Bɛkpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Lɛtsama tásĩ boe.”
36Ade Yesu bi be kĩ, “Finyaakĩĩ kɔ̃ ni, odi nyɛ odi kĩ edeĩ sika kuvũ ĩye osi akũ kanaa kuvũ ni, ɛbɔɛ ɛlɛ, ade oti kĩ ɛlá lɛpamɛ gɛlɛɛlɛ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ ɛnɔ ye atadiɛ wulaa lɔkɔa ɛya lɔmɔa. 37Mabi mi kĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ fɔlɛ kĩ, ‘Bibu ye bido nɛ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ kamɛ,’ a kɛnɛ kĩ fɔya nɛ yĩ akũ. Kitonɛkĩ fɔtsa a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ yĩ akũ a lamɛna kaya nɛ foe kamɛ pɛpɛɛpɛ.”
38Fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a bi ye kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, amɔ, fɔpamɛ gɛlɛɛlɛ nviã nɛ awĩ!”
Ade Yesu bi be kĩ, “Fɔlɛ!”
Yesu Bɔa Mpaɛ Nɛ Kugua Futse Ɔtɔ Akũ.
39Yesu dzakũ ɛnɛ nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ ɛnaa Kugua Futse Ɔtɔ akũ ndɛ ayekĩ yawɛ kakɛna a, ade ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ lɛmɛ to mɔ ye a. 40Kĩ ewo awã a, ebi be kĩ, “Mibɔa mpaɛ ayekĩ sɔhuiɛ lɛláanya nɛ mi akũ.” 41Ɛvɛlɛ akũ nɛ be sɛkɛ̃ ɛnaa lɔtɔ sukuloo, ade ɛnake aduli ɛbɔa mpaɛ a. 42Ɛlɛ kĩ, “Nda, ntɛ fɔnyɛ nɔ kawɛ ni, tinya lubo kamɔ kɔɔpu kĩĩ nɛ yĩ akũ. Lɛmɛ takɛna nɛ yĩ kawɛ akũ, mbom kɛna nɛ nɔ kawɛ akũ.” 43Nɛ awã naa, ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ odi to ode ɛnyɛ ye akũ ɛtsa ye, edo ye kɔbɛ̃. 44Ɛna nɛ ayɔlɔhɔ mɔ kɔnɛyɔɔlɛ kamɛ, ɛbɔa mpaɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ ebu ade ye olulu na ndɛ babɔanɛ fɔbɔ, kako nɛ tite a.
45Kĩ Yesu yidza nɛ mpaɛbɔ kamɛ a, emuniki ɛnaa ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a sɛkɛ̃, ɛnamɔ be kĩ bɛwaa tida nɛ ayɔlɔhɔ a kĩ epi be a sũ. 46Ebi be kĩ, “Nde sũ miawa tida? Miyidza mibɔa mpaɛ ayekĩ miláawo nɛ sɔhuiɛ kamɛ.”
Yesu Kapi.
47Lɔkɔ a kĩ Yesu lamɛna kɔdzɛla kalɛ a, bati kɔdabu kudi de kɔnɛ. Yuda kĩ ɛnyɛ fɔtɔ banyanɛ ewua-nviã a kamɛ ɔmɔa nyaa be lɔtɔ. Efuã Yesu, etu eboomu ye. 48Lɛmɛ Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Yuda, ɔkɔa onukpɛ̃ kadzɛmɛ anyɛ Otidziwa Obi a ɔkpa bati?”
49Kĩ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ bɛna nɛ ye akũ a mɔ́ lɛtsa a kĩ laya nɛ Yesu akũ a, bivia ye kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, bɔkɛna boe fɔpamɛ gɛlɛɛlɛ a akũ adzuma?” 50Lɛtalɛta be kamɛ ɔmɔa tsua Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee a osumunɛ sɔmɔna sɔtɔ emuni.
51Lɛmɛ Yesu lɛ kĩ, “Oowo! Fukpula nɛ awã!” Ade ke ɛta awã kĩ bitsua sɔtɔ a ɛtsa ye a.
52Ke liti a, Yesu bi basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a kĩ badãmɛna Asɔli Kɔla akũ a mɔ ɔmaĩ banɔkɔɛ̃ a kĩ bɛyaapi ye a kĩ, “Nde sũ minɛɛ futsekpa mɔ fɔpamɛ miyaapi yĩ ndɛ tɔkpa ɔkɛnanɛ aye? 53Nna nɛ mi kamɛ nɛ Yudafɔ Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ luwi nyɛ luwi, ade ke mitádo ɔwɔlɛ mipi yĩ a. Lɛmɛ mi lɔkɔ liwo ɔtɔ kĩ mikɛna mi adzuma a, nɛ lɔkɔ kĩ Abonsam ɔtũ kɔbɛ̃ a anya akũ finyaa.”
Petro Sĩ Yesu.
54Foesũ bipi Yesu ade bɛkpã ye bɛnamɛna Yudafɔ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee a awã a. Petro lɛmɛ tomɔ be ɛna nɛ liti flee. 55Bɛkpɔta fi nɛ tɔtɔ a lɔwabe ade Petro lɛmɛ nadzi nɛ bati a kamɛ a. 56Kĩ bikĩ banya abawa kamɛ adi yamɔ Petro kĩ edzi yawa fi a, eke anɛ nɛ ye akũ ade ɛlɛ kĩ, “Obi kĩĩ malo tomɔ Yesu.”
57Lɛmɛ Petro sĩ ade ɛlɛ kĩ, “Otsole dã, ĩnyina ye kɔlaa!”
58Owi tábuna mɔ onyole odi mɔ́ Petro eyi ɔsũ a ade ɛlɛ kĩ, “Nɔ malo ɔnyɛ be kamɛ ɔmɔa!”
Lɛmɛ Petro kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Onyole dã, nnɛ́ yĩ manɛ!”
59Ndɛ ndɔũhuilɛ mɔa liti a, onyole bɛbã yalɛ pipiipi kĩ, “Atsindze katɛ lɛláa nɛ foe kamɛ kĩ oti kĩĩ tomɔ Yesu, kitonɛkĩ ɛnyɛ Galileani!”
60Lɛmɛ Petro kpa mbuayɛ kĩ “Onyole dã, ĩnyína lɛtsa a kĩ de ɔlamɛna kalɛ!” Mɔ Petro onukpɛ̃ katɔ pɛ, ɔkɔkɔ nyɛ onukpɛ̃. 61Boe Ɔlate dani ɛdã Petro, ade Petro te anɛ kĩ boe Ɔlate bi ye kĩ, “Fɔmɔ ɔkɔkɔ aanyɛ onukpɛ̃ lɛnyɛ kĩĩ ni, aalɛ titi ɛlalɛ kĩ onyína yĩ.” 62Ade ke Petro nɛ ɛnaa kanya ɛnabe blobloblo a.
Bidi Yesu Nsekuo.
63Bati a kĩ bɛdãmɛna Yesu akũ a di ye nsekuo bibo ye lɛmɛ. 64Bisui ye anɛ ade bivia ye kĩ, “Bi boe owula a kĩ ɛbɔa nɔ.” 65Ade bibi ye fuvũnatsa pii lɛmɛ a.
Yesu Dza Nɛ Ɔmaĩ Banɔkɔɛ̃ Fɔlɛtsa Badzɛnɛ Anɛ.
66Kĩ kade nyina a, ɔmaĩ banɔkɔɛ̃, basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ mbla batsanɛ a yakpɔta ade bɛkpã Yesu bɛyadzɛla nɛ be anɛ kamɛ a. 67Nɛ awã a, bivia Yesu kĩ, “Bi boe ntɛ nɔ nyɛ Kristo a.”
Ade Yesu kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ nlɛ kadi malo miláatɛ yĩ mido. 68Ade ntɛ nvia mi kadi malo ni, miláakpa mbuayɛ. 69Lɛmɛ kito nviã kĩĩ kanaa ni, baadzina Otidziwa Obi a nɛ Baguma Kpale Nɛ Ode a sɔmɔna.”
70Ade ke be a flee bivia ye kĩ, “Foesũ Baguma obi anɛ?”
Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Mi lamɛna kalɛ kĩ ye manɛ.”
71Ade bɛlɛ kĩ, “Bɔtásĩ adansifɔ badima. Boe mɔawɛ a bunu lɛtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ a.”

Title: LUKA 23
Content:
Pilato Dzɛmɔ Yesu.
1Ade bati kɔdabu a flee yidza bɛkpã Yesu bɛnamɛna Pilato sɛkɛ̃ a. 2Ade bido ye onukpɛ̃ katsua awɛ kalɛ kĩ, “Bupi obi kĩĩ kĩ ɛlamɔ boe kade bati adzuni kadani. Yabi be kĩ bɛtate ɔgɔlɛ bɛkpa Romafɔ Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃. Ɛbɔɛ ye akũ kĩ ye nyɛ Kristo, lɛgã a.”
3Pilato via ye kĩ, “Nɔ nyɛ Yudafɔ Lɛgã a?”
Yesu kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Oo, fɔla ndɛ aye kĩ ɔlɛ a.”
4Ade Pilato bi Yudafɔ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ bati kɔdabu a kĩ, “Ntámɔ lɛtsama nɛ ye akũ kĩ madza nɛ foe akũ nkɔ oti kĩĩ kɔtɔ.”
5Lɛmɛ bɛdzɛmɛna kalɛ kabuli kĩ, “Ɛnɛɛ ye fɔtsa katsa yado ɔtutũ nɛ bati kamɛ nɛ Yudea tite flee akũ. Eyi fukĩĩ kayɔ nɛ Galilea ade finyaa ɛkɔa foe ɛyamɛna nɛ awĩ lɛmɛ a.”
Herodes Dzɛmɔ Yesu.
6Kĩ Pilato nu fukĩĩ a, evia be kĩ, “Galileani yanɛ?” 7Foesũ kĩ enyi kĩ Yesu to Galilea nɛ awã kĩ Lɛgã Herodes anya akũ a, ɛkɔa ye ɛma Herodes, kĩ ɛna nɛ Yerusalem nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ.
8Kawɔlɛ de Herodes paa kĩ ɛmɔ Yesu, kitonɛkĩ enu ye nkã ade ɛkawɛ kĩ yamɔ ye anɛ kɔkɔkɔɛ a. Ɛkadã anɛ kĩ Yesu aakɛna awãwã fɔtsa fudi ɛtsa ye. 9Foesũ Herodes via Yesu fɔlɛtsa pii lɛmɛ Yesu tábinya onukpɛ̃. 10Awã naa Yudafɔ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ mbla batsanɛ a nɛ bɛyadza nɛ lɔtɔ bitsua fɔlɛtsa mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ bite nɛ Yesu akũ. 11Lɛgã Herodes mɔ ye sodzafɔ a di Yesu nsekuo bisupa ye. Bido ye atadiɛ wulaa mɔ kalɛ ndɛ lɛgã aye, bimuniki mɔ ye bɛma Pilato. 12Luwi a na, Herodes mɔ Pilato dani bɛkɛna bakɔba, kufɛ kɔkɔɛ a bakesĩ akũ.
Pilato Kɔ́ Yesu Kɔtɔ Ɛkpa Wuda.
13Pilato vɛ Yudafɔ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃, ɔmaĩ banɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ bati a ɛkpɔta. 14Ade ebi be kĩ, “Mikpã oti kĩĩ mima yĩ ade milɛ kĩ ɛlamɔ bati adzuni kadani a. Finyaa nɛ mi anɛ kamɛ nɛ awĩ a, nvia ye onukpɛ̃ kamɛ tuwuli, ade fɔlɛtsa a kĩ mibɔɛ nɛ ye akũ a, ntámɔ tɔkpa tidima nɛ foe kamɛ kĩ makɔ ye kɔtɔ. 15Lɛgã Herodes lɛmɛ támɔ tɔkpa tidima nɛ ye akũ foesũ emunikimɔ ye ɛma boe. Oti kĩĩ tákɛna tɔkpa tidima kĩ ɛfɛta ɛkpa wuda. 16Foesũ maafɔ̃ bibo ye nfɔnɛ ye awɛ ɛdzakũ ɛnaa.” 17Nɛ Wuda Katɛ̃ Luwi kanya kamɛ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ Pilato ɛfɔnɛ bati a kĩ bɛwaa kɔla a kamɛ ɔmɔa awɛ ɛkpa be.
18Bati kɔdabu a flee bɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba kĩ, “Kɔ ye! Fɔnɛ Baraba awɛ kakpa boe!” 19Bido Baraba nɛ kɔla kĩ edo ɔtutũ nɛ ɔmatɔ kpale kamɛ, ɛkɔ bati lɛmɛ.
20Pilato wɛ kĩ yafɔnɛ Yesu awɛ foesũ ebuki ɛnyɛ fɔlɛtsa kamɛ ɛtsa bati kɔdabu a. 21Lɛmɛ bɛbɔa fɔwɔla biko nɛ ye akũ kĩ, “Bɔa ye nɛ asendua akũ! Bɔa ye nɛ asendua akũ!”
22Pilato buki ebi be lɛlalɛde kĩ, “Mɔ litsa tɔkpa oti kĩĩ kɛna? Ntámɔ lɛtsa kĩ ɛkɛna kĩ yana foe akũ wuda! Maafɔ̃ bibo ye lɔkɔa nfɔnɛ ye awɛ.”
23Lɛmɛ bati a dzɛmɛna fɔwɔla kabɔa kɔɔba kĩ bɛbɔa Yesu nɛ asendua akũ. Nɛ foe kawũna kamɛ a, bati a fɔwɔla kabɔa nya Pilato akũ. 24Foesũ Pilato kɔ Yesu kɔtɔ ndɛ ayekĩ bati a wɛ a. 25Ade ɛfɔnɛ oti a kĩ bawɛ a awɛ ɛkpa be a, oti kĩ bido nɛ kɔla nɛ ɔtutũ mɔ bati kakɔ sũ, ade ɛkɔa Yesu edo nɛ be awɛ kĩ bɛkɛna ye ndɛ ayekĩ bɛwɛ a.
Sodzafɔ Bɔa Yesu Nɛ Otse Akũ.
26Sodzafɔ a kpã Yesu bɛnamɛna. Ade kĩ banaa nɛ osi a, bɛtsɛlamɛna Kireneni onyole odi kĩ bavɛ Simon, kĩ eto akula adi kamɛ yanna Yerusalem. Bipi ye bɛhɛ ye kĩ ɛlɔ asendua a etomɔ Yesu nɛ liti. 27Bati kɔdabu baũ a tomɔ Yesu nɛ liti, ade batsole nɛ be kamɛ kabe kakpa ye a. 28Yesu dani ɛtsɛlamɔ be ebi be kĩ, “Yerusalem batsole, mitabe mikpa yĩ mbom mibe mikpa mi babi mɔ mi akũ. 29Kitonɛkĩ lɔkɔ aaya kĩ bati aalɛ kĩ, ‘Be a kĩ bɛnyɛ baduko, be a kĩ bɛtátsãmɔ kɔma bɛma tɔ̃, mɔ be a kĩ bɛtámɛmɛ be tɛmɛ tɔ̃ a na lɔlɔ wĩ!’ 30Ade lɔkɔ a na mɔ bati aabi tɔtɔ kĩ, ‘Midzuli miko nɛ boe akũ!’ Ade baabi kɔtɔbii kĩ, ‘Mikɔla boe!’ 31Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ bɛkɛna fukĩĩ nɛ kutse gɔ̃ akũ ni, nde fɔána fɔkpa kutse wɔlɛwa?”
32Bɛkpã banyole bɛbã nviã kĩ bɛnyɛ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ bibumɔ Yesu kĩ bɛnaakɔ be. 33Kĩ biwo awã kĩ bavɛ kĩ Oti Lɔlɔ Fɔtsɔ̃ a, bɛbɔa Yesu nɛ asendua akũ. Bɛbɔa banyole nviã a lɛmɛ nɛ asendua akũ, ɔmɔa nɛ ye sɔmɔna, ɔyade a nɛ ye sɛbã. 34Ade Yesu lɛ kĩ, “Nda, kɔa kate be, kitonɛkĩ binyína lɛtsa a kĩ bɛlamɛna kakɛna.” Ke liti a sodzafɔ a wole ade bɛsɛ̃ Yesu tɛtadiɛ bɛkpa be akũ a.
35Bati a flee dza nɛ awã bɛkadã foe. Ade Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a di Yesu nsekuo bɛlɛ kĩ, “Ɛtɛ bati bɛbã nkpã foesũ ntɛ ye nyɛ Kristo a kĩ Baguma pau a ni, ɛnyɛ ye akũ!”
36Ade ayea sodzafɔ a lɛmɛ di Yesu nsekuo a. Bifuã ye bɛkɔa waĩ mɔ ɔnyɛ mɔ ɔnyɛ bɛkpa ye kĩ ɛmɔa. 37Ade bibi ye kĩ, “Ntɛ nɔ nyɛ Yudafɔ lɛgã a ni, tɛ nɔ akũ!”
38Bɛtsɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ nɛ ye lɔlɔ nyangɛ kĩ, “Ade Yudafɔ Lɛgã nɛ awĩ a.” 39Tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ a kĩ bɛbɔa nɛ asendua akũ a kamɛ ɔmɔa vũna Yesu kĩ, “Nnɛ́ nɔ nyɛ Kristo a? Tɛ nɔ akũ katɛ boe malo!”
40Lɛmɛ ɔyade a wũni nɛ ye akũ kĩ, “Aávila Baguma mbɔɛɛ? Ɔtɛ sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ mɔapɛ a kĩ ɛtɛ a. 41Lɛmɛ boe sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ a fɛta boe, kitonɛkĩ lɛtsa a kĩ bɔkɛna a, ade de sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ bɔtɛ a. Lɛmɛ ɛtákɛna tɔkpa tidima.”
42Ade ebi Yesu kĩ, “Yesu, te anɛ nɛ yĩ akũ ntɛ owo nɔ lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kamɛ.”
43Awã naa Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Mabi nɔ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ nviã kĩĩ aana nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ nɛ Paradiso kamɛ.”
Bɛkɔ Yesu.
44Kĩ kite sukuloo suwa tɔdɔũ ewua-nviã abɔa a, suwa fɔ̃ kata, ade ɔtũ ke nɛ katinya flee kamɛ kɛnawo tɔdɔũ ɛlalɛ kamɛ a. 45Ade lima a kĩ lɛvanɛ nɛ Asɔli Kɔla kamɛ a bɛ̃ nɛ kayite a. 46Yesu bɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba kĩ, “Nda, nkɔa yĩ kawɛya ndo nɛ nɔ awɛ.” Kĩ ɛlɛ fukĩĩ a, eku.
47Sodzafɔ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a mɔ́ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya, ade emu Baguma ɛlɛ kĩ, “Fɔnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kĩ oti wĩ yanɛ.” 48Kĩ bati a kĩ bɛkpɔta nɛ awã bɛkadã foe flee a mɔ́ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya a, bɛdzakũ bɛnaa kɔla mɔ ayɔlɔhɔ mɔ akpɔ kako nɛ lɔlɔ mɔ ɔwɔlɛ. 49Bati a kĩ binyina Yesu kanyina wĩ a, mɔ batsole a kĩ bitomɔ ye bito Galilea a, dza mɔ lugo bɛkadã fɔtsa kĩĩ.
Yosef Kĩ Eto Arimatia a Bila Yesu.
50Onyole odi kĩ bavɛ Yosef kĩ edzi nɛ Arimatia ɔmatɔ a kamɛ nɛ Yudea tite akũ na nɛ awã. Ɛnya oti wĩ kĩ ye akũ deĩ obu, ade ɛkadã anɛ kakpa lɔkɔ a kĩ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a aaya. 51Titɔ kĩ ɛna nɛ Yudafɔ ɔmaĩ banɔkɔɛ̃ fɔlɛtsa badzɛnɛ katsɛna a kamɛ malo ni, ɛtátunɔ nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ de akũ bike otse, mɔ lɛtsa a kĩ bɛkɛna a akũ. 52Ɛnaa Pilato anɛ kamɛ ade ɛnawã Yesu ɔnɔkpa a. 53Ade ke ɛvɛnya ɔnɔkpa a ɛkɔa lima ovoe esuli ye a. Ɛkɔa ye ɛwɔla nɛ linikɛ kĩ bɛnyɛ nɛ de kamɛ, kĩ bɛtábila odima nɛ de kamɛ tɔ̃ a kamɛ. 54Luwi a nya Efieda ade Kawɛya Luwi a lamɔ ɔtɔ kawo a.
55Batsole a kĩ bitómɔ Yesu bito Galilea tomɔ Yosef bɛnadã linikɛ a, mɔ ayekĩ bɛkɔa Yesu ɔnɔkpa bɛwɔla nɛ de kamɛ. 56Ke liti a, bimuniki bɛnaa kɔla bɛnamanɛ tutsonu mɔ fugua mɔ ɔlɛ̃ mɔ ɔlɛ̃ kĩ baakɔa bɛtsɛla ɔnɔkpa a biyi. Nɛ Kawɛya Luwi akũ a, bidzi bɛwɛya nɛ be mbla a onukpɛ̃.

Title: LUKA 24
Content:
Yesu Yidza Eto Kanɔkpa
1Ɛkwansieda ɔnɔnɛ tutuutu a, batsole a naa linikɛ a ɔwɛ̃, bɛnɛɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bɛmanɛ biyi a. 2Awã naa bɛmɔ́ kĩ bimininya de kpale a kĩ bɛkɔa bisua linikɛ onukpɛ̃ a biyi nɛ ɔɔwɛ̃. 3Foesũ biwo nɛ de kamɛ lɛmɛ bɛtámɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu ɔnɔkpa a. 4Bɛkɛna saa bɛdzɛ̃ bakɔna foe akũ, ade lɛtalɛta bati nviã kĩ bɛna nɛ tɛtadiɛ kĩ tata muamua kamɛ nɛ bɛta nɛ be akũ a. 5Libe wo be paa foesũ bɛkɛna akũ nɛ kayɔ bɛkpa be, ade banyole a bi be kĩ, “Nde sũ miawɛ oti kĩ edzi nkpã nɛ banɔkpa kamɛ? 6Ɛláa awĩ. Eyidza eto kanɔkpa! Mite anɛ nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ ebi mi nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ ɛna nɛ Galilea kĩ, 7kɛnɛ kĩ bɛkɔa Otidziwa Obi a bido nɛ bati kpa awɛ, baabɔa ye nɛ asendua akũ, lɔkɔa nɛ fuwi ɛlalɛ liti a, eyidza edzi nkpã.” 8Ade batsole a te anɛ nɛ ye fɔlɛtsa a akũ a.
9Bimuniki bito linikɛ a ɔwɛ̃ bɛnabi fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ ewua-odi a mɔ bati bɛbã fɔlɛtsa a flee. 10Batsole a nyɛ Maria Magdalani, Yohana mɔ Maria kĩ ɛnyɛ Yakobo ɔma. Bɛmɔ batsole bɛbã a bɛnabi fɔtɔ banyanɛ a fɔlɛtsa a flee. 11Lɛmɛ fɔtɔ banyanɛ a kɔna kĩ lɛtsa a kĩ bibi be a nyɛ fɔkɔasiatsa, foesũ bɛtátɛ be bido. 12Lɛmɛ Petro ta eyidza ewula atsɛ ɛnaa linikɛ a ɔwɛ̃. Ɛkɛna akũ ɛdã de kamɛ ade ɛmɔ ɔnɔkpa tilima odi a. Ɛkɛna saa emuniki ɛnaa kɔla nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya a sũ.
Yesu Nyɛ Akũ Ɛtsa Bati Badi Nɛ Emaus Osi.
13Nɛ luwi mɔapɛ a akũ a, bikĩ bitómɔ Yesu a be kamɛ bati nviã tsɛ̃ osi banaa akula adi kĩ bavɛ Emaus kamɛ. Osi a lugo aana ndɛ fusikũ evũkɔnɔ kito awã kɛnaa Yerusalem. 14Bati a kalɔmɛna nɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ fɔya a flee akũ. 15Kĩ bɛkalɔmɛna kanyɛ fɔlɛtsa kamɛ a, Yesu yapi be ade bɛtsã bɛnaa a. 16Bɛmɔ́ ye lɛmɛ bɛtáyi ɔsũ kĩ ye yanɛ.
17Yesu via be kĩ, “Litsa akũ milamɛna kalɔmɛna nɛ osi a?”
Bɛfɔ̃ bɛdza dĩĩ mɔ anɛ kamɛ mɔ kɔnya. 18Ade be kamɛ ɔmɔa kĩ bavɛ Kleopa via ye kĩ, “Nɔ odi nyɛ ɔnɔvɔɛ̃ nɛ Yerusalem kĩ ɔtánu lɛtsa a kĩ de lɛya nɛ fuwi lukũ kĩĩ kamɛ a mbɔɛɛ?”
19Yesu via be kĩ, “Litsa fɔlɛtsa lɛya?”
Bɛkpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Fɔlɛtsa a kĩ fɔya nɛ Yesu Nazaretni akũ a. Oti kĩĩ nyɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ kĩ edeĩ kɔbɛ̃ yakɛna awãwã fɔtsa pii, ɛnyɛ fɔtsa ɔtsanɛ kpale kĩ Baguma mɔ bati flee akpa ye obu. 20Lɛmɛ Yudafɔ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ ɔmaĩ banɔkɔɛ̃ pi ye bɛkɔa ye bido nɛ Roma abãã awɛ, kĩ bɛkɔ ye kɔtɔ bɛkpa wuda, bɛbɔa ye nɛ asendua akũ. 21Bɔna kɔnɛte nɛ ye akũ kĩ ye aanya oti a kĩ yaanyɛ Israel. Ade nviã nyɛ fuwi ɛlalɛ kĩ fukĩĩ flee ya nɛ foe kamɛ a. 22Boe katsu a kĩ kitomɔ ye a kamɛ batsole badi fɔ̃ akũ nyɛnɛ boe, kitonɛkĩ ɔnɔnɛ tutuutu kĩĩ bɛnaa ye linikɛ ɔwɛ̃, 23lɛmɛ bɛtámɔ ɔnɔkpa a. Bimuniki bɛyabi boe kĩ Baguma ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ nyɛ be akũ bɛtsa be, bibi be kĩ Yesu dzi nkpã. 24Boe katsu a kamɛ banyole badi naa linikɛ a ɔwɛ̃ bɛnamɔ foe pɛpɛɛpɛ ndɛ ayekĩ batsole a lɛ a, lɛmɛ bɛtámɔ Yesu.”
25Ade Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mitɛnɛ kadzimbi! Mi adzuni lɛlá sɔwa kĩ miatɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a fɔlɛtsa a flee mido! 26Mitányi tɔ̃ kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ Kristo a ɛmɔ lubo kĩĩ bamɛ flee fɔmɔ yaaawo nɛ ye lɛgãkanya kukũkpalɛ a kamɛ?” 27Ade ke Yesu kpalɛ fɔlɛtsa kamɛ ɛtsa be nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a tsɛlɛ nɛ ye akũ, kito Mose tuvoli akũ kɛyake nɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ flee katsɛlɛ a akũ a.
28Kĩ bifuã akula a kĩ ye kamɛ banaa biyua a, Yesu kɛna ndɛ yatɛ̃ ɛnaa lɔtɔ. 29Lɛmɛ biwũnya ye ade bibi ye kĩ, “Dzi nɛ boe sɛkɛ̃. Kade dɔ kiyua ade ɔtũ do kake awɛ a.” Foesũ ɛnase nɛ be sɛkɛ̃.
30Kĩ bɛmɔ be bidzi kĩ banya a, ɛbɔɛ abodoo ɛnyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ, ɛsɛ̃ ɛkpa be. 31Nɛ awã naa, be anɛ binya ade bɛmɔ́ ye biyi ɔsũ a, lɛmɛ ɛyɛla nɛ be anɛ kamɛ. 32Ade ke bibi be akũ kĩ, “Fɔtákɛna ndɛ fi fudi lɛkatɛ̃ nɛ boe tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ, kĩ ɛkanyɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa fɔlɛtsa a kamɛ katsa boe nɛ osi a?”
33Ade biyidza bimuniki mɔatsɛ bɛnaa Yerusalem, bɛnamɔ fɔtɔ banyanɛ ewua-odi a mɔ bati bɛbã a kĩ bɛkpɔta a. 34Bɛnabi be kĩ, “Nuwĩ boe Ɔlate yidza eto kanɔkpa ade ɛnyɛ ye akũ ɛtsa Simon a.” 35Bati nviã a bi be lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya nɛ osi akũ a, mɔ ayekĩ bɛmɔ́ boe Ɔlate a biyi ɔsũ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ ɛyɛlɛ abodoo ɛkpa be a.
Yesu Nyɛ Ye Akũ Ɛtsa Ye Fɔtsa Bakɔlɛnɛ a.
36Kĩ bati nviã kĩĩ kabi be fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a, deedimɔapɛ Yesu mɔawɛ nɛ ɛdza nɛ be kayite, ade ebi be kĩ, “Lukudɔ litomɔ mi.”
37Libe wo be paa ade bɛkakɔna kĩ ɔnɔkpa bɛmɔ. 38Lɛmɛ Yesu bi be kĩ, “Nde sũ mibɔa obili lɔmɔ? Nde sũ miatɛ atsindze nɛ mi kamɛ? 39Midã yĩ awɛ mɔ yĩ fɔnɛta. Mita yĩ midã mimɔ kĩ nnɛ́ ɔnɔkpa manɛ, kitonɛkĩ hũhũ lɛlá sukɛna mɔ fɔtsɔ̃ ndɛ ayekĩ miamɔ kĩ ndeĩ a.”
40Kĩ ɛlɛ foe a, ɛkɔa ye awɛ mɔ fɔnɛta ɛtsa be. 41Kawɔlɛ de be paa, lɛmɛ fɔkɛna be wãwã, foesũ biti bɛtátɛ bido. Ade ke Yesu via be kĩ, “Mideĩ funitsã fudi nɛ awĩ?” 42Bɛkpa ye kafɔabi tɔlɛwa kadi, 43ɛtɛ ke ɛba nɛ be anɛ kamɛ.
44Ke liti a ebi be kĩ, “Ade fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ bamɛ mbi mi nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ nna nɛ mi kamɛ a. Kɛnɛ kĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ biyi nɛ Mose mbla, Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ tuvoli mɔ Tɔnɔ Ovoli a kamɛ fɔya nɛ foe kamɛ lɔmɔ.”
45Ebinya be adzuni ayekĩ baanu Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ fɔlɛtsa a kayɔ. 46Ebi be kĩ, “Bɛtsɛlɛ biyi kĩ Kristo a aamɔ lubo, lɔkɔa eyidza eto kanɔkpa nɛ luwi lɛlalɛde a akũ. 47Nɛ ye dĩ akũ ni, bikĩ bitomɔ ye a aade lɛtsã nɛ ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kadani mɔ tɔkpa kakɔakate akũ bɛkpa katinya kamɛ bati flee. Baayi lɛtsã kĩĩ kade kayɔ bitomɛna Yerusalem. 48Mi nyɛ fukĩĩ bamɛ flee adansifɔ. 49Yĩ mɔawɛ a maakɔa Hũhũ Kpalɛwa mma mi ndɛ ayekĩ Nda lɛ eyi a. Lɛmɛ midzi nɛ Yerusalem nɛ awĩ kɛnaawo lɔkɔ a kĩ kɔbɛ̃ a aato ode kɔyaatɛ mi kamɛ.”
Baguma Bɔɛ Yesu Ɛnamɛna Ode.
50Ade ɛkpã be bɛnɛ nɛ Yerusalem ɔmatɔ a kamɛ bɛnaa Betania, awã kĩ ɛdzɛla awɛ nɛ ode ehila be a. 51Kĩ ɛkahila be a, ɛdzakũ ɛfɔnɛ be ade bɛbɔɛ ye bɛnamɛna ode a. 52Ade ke bisum ye bimuniki bɛnaa Yerusalem nɛ kawɔlɛ kpale kamɛ a. 53Bidzi nɛ Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ daa, bɛkamu Baguma.

Title: YOHANES 1
Content:
Kalɛ a Kĩ Kakpa Nkpã.
1Fɔmɔ baabɔa katinya ni, Baguma Kalɛ a deĩ kɔkɔɛ. Kalɛ a mɔ Baguma deĩ, ade Kalɛ a nyɛ Baguma a. 2Kalɛ a mɔ Baguma deĩ anɛ kayɔkayi a fɔmɔ bɛbɔa katinya. 3Baguma bɔa fɔtsa flee ɛtsãmɛna ye akũ, ade lɛtsama lɛláa kĩ ɛnɛ ye liti ɛbɔa. 4Kalɛ a kamɛ nkpã deĩ, ade nkpã kĩĩ lɛma batidziwa ɔhaĩ a. 5Ɔhaĩ a avɔlɛ nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ, ade ɔtũ tápuli edina ye da a.
6Baguma do onyole odi kĩ bavɛ Yohanes. 7Ɛya kĩ yayaadi adansiɛ nɛ ɔhaĩ a akũ ayekĩ bati flee aatsã ye akũ bɛtɛ bido. 8Nnɛ́ Yohanes nyɛ ɔhaĩ a, mbom adansiɛ ɛyadi nɛ ɔhaĩ a akũ. 9Ɔhaĩ wĩ a kĩ yatɛ̃ kakpa odi nyɛ odi a, aya nɛ katinya kamɛ.
10Kalɛ a na nɛ katinya kamɛ, lɛmɛ titɔ kĩ Baguma bɔa katinya ɛtsãmɛna ye akũ malo ni, batidziwa támɔ ye biyi ɔsũ. 11Ɛya nɛ ye mɔawɛ bati sɛkɛ̃, lɛmɛ ye bati a tátɛ ye. 12Lɛmɛ bati flee a kĩ bɛtɛ ye, ade bɛtɛ ye bido lɛmɛ a, ɛkpa be kɔbɛ̃ kĩ bɛdani Baguma babi. 13Bɛtádani Baguma babi nɛ batidziwa kama onukpɛ̃, ĩye ndɛ ayekĩ otinyole ama babi aye, mbom Baguma mɔawɛ lɛwɛ kĩ yakɛna be ye babi.
14Kalɛ a dani kɛkɛna otidziwa, edzi nɛ boe kamɛ, ade kɔnyakamɔ mɔ ɔnɔkɔali yi ye kamɛ a. Bɔmɔ́ ye kukũkpalɛ a, kukũkpalɛ a kĩ ɛtɛ ndɛ Ɔlɛga a Obi mɔapɛ a aye.
15Yohanes di adansiɛ nɛ ye akũ, ɛbɔa fɔwɔla ɛlɛ kĩ, “Ade oti kĩĩ akũ fɔlɛtsa mbi mi kĩ, ‘Oti odi aya nɛ yĩ liti, lɛmɛ ɛbɛ̃ yĩ kitonɛkĩ edzi nkpã kɔkɔɛ fɔmɔ bɛma yĩ.’ ”
16Nɛ ye kɔnyakamɔ beblebee sũ ni, ehila boe flee ɛkpa boe nhila ete nɛ nhila akũ. 17Mose akũ Baguma mbla a tsã ɛya, lɛmɛ ye kɔnyakamɔ mɔ ɔnɔkɔali a tsã Yesu Kristo akũ fɔya. 18Odima támɔ tɔ̃ Baguma. Ye Obi mɔapɛ a kĩ eketimɔ Baguma a, kĩ edeĩ nɛ Ɔlɛga sɛkɛ̃ a, ade ye lɛnyɛ ayekĩ Baguma la a ɛtsa boe a.
Yohanes Mui Ɔwɔlanɛ a De Lɛtsã.
19Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ nɛ Yerusalem do be basɔfɔ mɔ Levifɔ nɛ Yohanes sɛkɛ̃ kĩ bɛnaavia ye kĩ, “Nɔ nyɛ owei?”
20Yohanes tásĩ be mbuayɛ kakpa, mbom ɛkpalɛ fɔlɛtsa kamɛ yededeede ɛlɛ kĩ, “Nnɛ́ yĩ nyɛ Kristo a.”
21Ade bivia ye kĩ, “Kekɔ̃ nɔ nyɛ owei? Mbɔɛɛ nɔ nyɛ Baguma Onukpɛ̃ Ɔnyɛnɛ Eliya a?”
Ɛkpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Oowo, nnɛ́ ye manɛ.”
Bibuki bivia ye kĩ, “Nɔ nyɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi kĩ yaaya a?”
Ɛkpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Oowo.”
22Adeke bibi ye kĩ, “Kekɔ̃ bi boe oti a kĩ anɛ, kitonɛkĩ kɛnɛ kĩ bɔkɔa mbuayɛ bɔma bikĩ bido boe fɔtɔ a. Owei koũ anɛ?”
23Yohanes kpa be mbuayɛ ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma Onukpɛ̃ Ɔnyɛnɛ Yesaya tsɛlɛ eyi a kĩ, “Yĩ nyɛ oti a kĩ ɛtsɛ̃ nɛ kɔsa kamɛ yabɔa fɔwɔla a odo kĩ bɛkɛna osi kpĩĩ bɛkpa Ɔlate a.”
24Batɔ a kĩ bido bito Farisifɔ sɛkɛ̃ a, 25via Yohanes kĩ, “Ntɛ nnɛ́ nɔ nyɛ Kristo a, ĩye Eliya, ĩye Baguma onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ a ni, nde sũ akɛna mui kawɔla amaniɛ?”
26Ade Yohanes kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Yĩ kɔ̃ ni, mawɔla bati mui, lɛmɛ odi kĩ minyína ye dzɛ̃ nɛ mi kamɛ. 27Ade ye tomɔ yĩ nɛ liti yaya a, lɛmɛ ntáfɛta kĩ mawũnya ye mpabua tɔwɛ̃ malo.”
28Fukĩĩ flee ya nɛ foe kamɛ nɛ Betania ɔmatɔ kamɛ, nɛ Yordan ɔwɔ liti, awã kĩ Yohanes kawɔla bati mui a.
Yesu Nyɛ́ Baguma Kavelibi a.
29Kĩ kade nyina a, Yohanes mɔ́ Yesu kĩ yaya nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃, ade ɛlɛ kĩ, “Midã Baguma Kavelibi a kĩ yaakɔa katinya kamɛ bati tɔkpa ɛnamɛna a! 30Ade oti kĩĩ akũ fɔlɛtsa mbi mi kĩ, ‘Oti odi aya nɛ yĩ liti, kĩ ɛbɛ̃ yĩ, kitonɛkĩ edzi nkpã kɔkɔɛ fɔmɔ bɛma yĩ.’ 31Yĩ mɔawɛ a ntányi oti a kĩ ye yanɛ, lɛmɛ ĩyaawɔla bati mui, ayekĩ maanyɛ ye ntsa Israel kade a.”
32Ade Yohanes lɛ nɛ Yesu akũ kĩ, “Mmɔ́ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a kĩ ɛka eto ode ndɛ mblɔduma aye ɛyadzi nɛ ye akũ. 33Nɛ kayɔkayi a, ntányi ye, lɛmɛ Baguma kĩ edo yĩ kĩ nwɔla bati mui a bi yĩ kĩ, ‘Oti a kĩ aamɔ kĩ yĩ Hũhũ a ka ɛyadzi nɛ ye akũ a ni, ade ye aakɔa Hũhũ Kpalɛwa ɛwɔla bati mui a.’ 34Mmɔ́ foe lɔmɔ, ndi adansiɛ kĩ ade oti kĩĩ nyɛ Baguma Obi a.”
Yesu Vɛ Ye Fɔtsa Bakɔlɛnɛ Batɔnyade a.
35Luwi lɛyade a, kĩ Yohanes mɔ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ nviã dzɛ̃ nɛ awã a, 36bɛmɔ́ Yesu kĩ yatɛ̃ a, Yohanes lɛ kĩ, “Midã Baguma Kavelibi a!”
37Fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ nviã a nu fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ a, foesũ bitomɔ Yesu bɛnaa.
38Yesu dani, ɛmɔ́ be kĩ bitomɔ ye, ade evia be kĩ, “Litsa miawɛ?”
Bɛkpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Rabi,” foe kayɔ nyɛ Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, “ndia odzi?”
39Yesu bi be kĩ, “Miyaadã.”
Lɔkɔ a aana ndɛ olobe tɔdɔũ ɛna kamɛ, foesũ bitomɔ ye bɛnamɔ awã kĩ edzi a, ade bidzi nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ olobe a flee a.
40Fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ nviã a kamɛ ɔmɔa nyɛ Andrea, Simon Petro ɔwaɛ̃nyole. 41Lɛtsa a kĩ Andrea nya lɔtɔ ɛkɛna nyɛ kĩ ɛnawɛ ɔwaɛ̃ Petro ebi ye kĩ, “Bɔmɔ́ Mesia a!” De kayɔ nyɛ Kristo. 42Ke liti a, Andrea kpã Simon ɛnamɛna Yesu sɛkɛ̃.
Yesu dã Simon kɛnanaana ade ebi ye kĩ, “Nɔ dĩ nyɛ Simon kĩ ɛnyɛ Yohanes obi a, lɛmɛ kito finyaa baavɛ nɔ Kefas,” ĩye Petro. Buĩ nviã a kayɔ nyɛ de.
Yesu Vɛ Filipo Mɔ Nataniel.
43Kĩ kade nyina a, Yesu wɛ kĩ yadzakũ ɛnaa Galilea tite akũ, ade ɛmɔ Filipo ebi ye kĩ, “Yaatomɔ yĩ.”
44Filipo lɛmɛ to Betsaida, ɔmatɔ a kĩ Andrea mɔ Simon dzi a kamɛ. 45Filipo mɔ Nataniel ade ebi ye kĩ, “Bɔmɔ́ oti a kĩ Mose mɔ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ tsɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa nɛ ye akũ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa kamɛ a. Ade ye nyɛ Yosef obi Yesu, kĩ eto Nazaret a!”
46Nataniel via kĩ, “Fɔtsa wĩ fudi aapuli fɔnɛ futo Nazaret lɛmɛ kamɛ?”
Filipo kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Yaadã!”
47Kĩ Yesu mɔ́ Nataniel yaya nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ a, ɛlɛ nɛ ye akũ kĩ, “Ade Israelni kpanunuunu nɛ awĩ a, ɛnyɛ́ anɛ kamɛ kɛkɛ fɔtsa ɔkɛnanɛ!”
48Nataniel via Yesu kĩ, “Nde ɔkɛna onyi yĩ?”
Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Mmɔ́ nɔ kɔkɔɛ nɛ kɔya kutse a kayɔ fɔmɔ Filipo yavɛ nɔ.”
49Ade Nataniel lɛ kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, nɔ nyɛ Baguma Obi a. Nɔ nyɛ Israel Lɛgã a!”
50Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Ayekĩ mbi nɔ kĩ mmɔ́ nɔ nɛ kɔya kutse a kayɔ sũ mɔ ɔtɛ odo a? Aamɔ fɔtsa baũ kĩ fɔbɛ̃ fukĩĩ!” 51Ade ke ebi be kĩ, “Mabi mi flee nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ míamɔ ode kĩ ebinya, ade míamɔ kĩ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ aakade bɛkaka nɛ yĩ, Otidziwa Obi a, akũ.”

Title: YOHANES 2
Content:
Bipi Obolitsɔ̃ Nɛ Kana.
1Nɛ luwi lɛlalɛde akũ a, bipi obolitsɔ̃ nɛ Kana ɔmatɔ kĩ edeĩ nɛ Galilea tite akũ. Yesu ɔma na nɛ awã, 2ade bɛvɛ Yesu mɔ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a lɛmɛ bɛya nɛ obolitsɔ̃ kapikɔ̃ a. 3Kĩ waĩ woli a, Yesu ɔma fuã Yesu ebi ye kĩ, “Be waĩ a woli.”
4Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Otsole, nnɛ́ nɔ aabi yĩ lɛtsa a kĩ nkɛna. Yĩ lɔkɔ táwo tɔ̃ ɔtɔ.”
5Yesu ɔma nabi basumunɛ a kĩ, “Lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ yaabi mi ni, mikɛna.”
6Ayekĩ fɔnyɛ Yudafɔ amaniɛ kĩ bavɔlɛ akũ fɔmɔ bawo nɛ tɔtɔ kamɛ sũ ni, bake boe tɔpɔɔlɔ evũ nɛ tɔtɔ a kamɛ. Mui fugumi tsɛtsɛɛ ɛna ĩye foe elo awo nɛ lɔmɔa kamɛ.
7Yesu bi basumunɛ a kĩ, “Minu mui miyula tɔpɔɔlɔ a.” Foesũ binu mui biyula foe tsɔnɔnɔɔnɔ.
8Ade Yesu bi be kĩ, “Minu mui a badi mima oti a kĩ yadãmɛna funitsã akũ a.” Ade binu badi bɛma ye a.
9Funitsã akũ ɔdãmɛnanɛ a tá mui a kĩ bɛdani bavɛ a onukpɛ̃ ɛdã. Ɛtányi awã kĩ bitomɛna be, lɛmɛ basumunɛ a kɔ̃ nyina. Foesũ ɛvɛ obolitsɔ̃ ɔnyɔ a, 10evia ye kĩ, “Odi nyɛ odi akpa bati a bavɛ vɔɛ̃ kanyamɛna lɔtɔ, lɔkɔa ntɛ bɛmɔa be biwĩ a, yabɔɛ bakɔɛ a kayamɛna. Nde fɔya mɔ nɔ kɔ̃ ɔkɔa bavɛ vɔɛ̃ a oke kɛyawo lɔkɔ kĩĩ?”
11Yesu kɛna ye awãwã fɔtsa fɔtɔnyade kĩĩ nɛ Kana nɛ Galilea tite akũ, ɛkɔa ɛnyɛ ye kukũkpalɛ ɛtsa, ade ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a tɛ ye bido a.
12Ke liti a, Yesu mɔ ɔma, mɔ bawaɛ̃nyole mɔ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a dzakũ bɛnaa Kapernaum, bɛnadzi nɛ awã fuwi sukuloo.
Yesu Blɔmɛna Kɔyaatɔ Banyanɛ Nɛ Baguma Asɔli Kɔla a Kamɛ.
13Kĩ Yudafɔ Wuda Katɛ̃ luwi kanya a wo ɔtɔ liyua a, Yesu naa Yerusalem. 14Nɛ Asɔli Kɔla kamɛ a, ɛmɔ kĩ bati dzi banɔ banantsue, baveli mɔ mblɔduma. Ɛmɔ́ lɛmɛ kĩ sika babɛ̃nɛ dzi nɛ be tupunu akũ nɛ awã. 15Foesũ ɛnɔ ɔwɛ̃ ɛkɛna mple ɛkɔa ɛblɔmɛna bayaɛ a flee, banantsue mɔ baveli a nɛ Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ. Edu be tupunu lɛmɛ ewula, ɛpansam sika babɛ̃nɛ a sika ɛsã. 16Ade ebi bikĩ banɔ mblɔduma a kĩ, “Mifila fɔtsa kĩĩ minɛmɛna nɛ awĩ, mitakɔa Nda kɔla mikɛna kɔyaatɔ.”
17Ade ke ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a te anɛ kĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “O Baguma, nɔ kɔla akũ mbɔdibɔ atɛ̃ nɛ yĩ kamɛ ndɛ fi aye.”
18Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ yavia Yesu kĩ, “Litsa nsɛntsɛlɛni aapuli ɔkɛna ɔtsa boe kĩ odeĩ osi kĩ akɛna fukĩĩ?”
19Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Miveli Baguma Kɔla kĩĩ, ade nɛ fuwi ɛlalɛ liti ni, maabuki nke koe.”
20Yudafɔ a bi ye kĩ, “Bɛkɔa futeli tɛna-avũ bike Asɔli Kɔla kĩĩ, ke mɔ alɛ kĩ aakɔa fuwi ɛlalɛ obuki oke koe a?”
21Lɛmɛ asɔli kɔla a kĩ Yesu lamɛna kalɛ a nyɛ ye sukɛna. 22Foesũ kĩ Baguma dzɛla ye etomɛna kanɔkpa liti a, ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a te anɛ kĩ ɛlɛ fukĩĩ eyi, ade bɛtɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa fɔlɛtsa mɔ lɛtsa a kĩ Yesu lɛ a bido a.
Yesu Nyina Otidziwa Kutitse.
23Kĩ Yesu na nɛ Yerusalem nɛ Wuda Katɛ̃ luwi kanya kamɛ a, bati pii tɛ ye bido nɛ awãwã fɔtsa a kĩ bɛmɔ́ kĩ ɛkɛna a sũ. 24Lɛmɛ Yesu tákɔa ye akũ ɛkpa be, kitonɛkĩ enyina bati flee. 25Foesũ fɔtásĩ kĩ odima abi ye kadi nɛ bati akũ, kitonɛkĩ ye mɔawɛ a enyina lɛtsa a kĩ lideĩ nɛ be tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ.

Title: YOHANES 3
Content:
Yesu Nyɛ Fɔlɛtsa Kamɛ Ɛtsa Nikodemo.
1Nɛ lɔkɔ a naa kamɛ a, Yudafɔ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔa na kĩ ɛnyɛ Farisini, kĩ bavɛ Nikodemo. 2Luwi a lɛnyɛ, ɛya nɛ Yesu sɛkɛ̃ ɛyabi ye kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, bunyina kĩ Baguma sɛkɛ̃ oto ɔya, kitonɛkĩ odima lɛláapuli ɛkɛna nsɛntsɛlɛni a kĩ akɛna a, ntɛ Baguma lítomɔ ye.”
3Ade Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔali mabi nɔ kĩ ntɛ bɛtábuki bɛlɔla oti kama ni, ɛláapuli ɛmɔ Baguma lɛgãkanya a.”
4Nikodemo via ye kĩ, “Nde baapuli bibuki bɛma oti kĩ ebo anɛ? Ɛláapuli ewo nɛ ɔma sɛmɛ kamɛ bɛlɔla ye kama lɛyade.”
5Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔali a mabi nɔ kĩ, ntɛ bɛtáma oti bitomɛna mui mɔ Baguma Hũhũ kamɛ ni, ɛláapuli ewo nɛ ye lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kamɛ. 6Sukɛna kamɛ bama sukɛna oti katomɛna, lɛmɛ Baguma Hũhũ kamɛ bama hũhũ ode. 7Foesũ fɔtakɛna nɔ wãwã kĩ nlɛ kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ bɛlɔla mi flee kama. 8Ɔwɛ abɔa kanaa awã kĩ yawɛ, anu ye nkã, lɛmɛ onyína awã kĩ eto ĩye awã kĩ yanaa. Ade aye fɔla fɔkpa odi nyɛ odi kĩ bɛma ye nɛ Hũhũ a kamɛ a.”
9Ade Nikodemo via ye kĩ, “Nde fukĩĩ aapuli fɔya nɛ foe kamɛ?”
10Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛnɔkɔɛ̃ anɛ nɛ Israel, mɔ onyína fukĩĩ a? 11Mabi nɔ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ bɔalɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bunyina a akũ, ade bɔadi adansiɛ nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bɔmɔ́ akũ a, lɛmɛ mi kamɛ odima láwɛ kĩ yatɛ boe fɔlɛtsa a. 12Ntɛ mbi nɔ tite akũ fɔlɛtsa mɔ́ ɔtátɛ foe odo a, lɔkɔa ntɛ mbi nɔ ode fɔlɛtsa a ni, aapuli ɔtɛ foe odo? 13Ade odima táde tɔ̃ ɛnaa ode, mbɔɛntɛ yĩ, Otidziwa Obi a, kĩ nto ode ĩya a odi.
14“Ndɛ ayekĩ Mose dɛla kɔɛ kĩ bɛkɔa kɔɔble bɛkɛna a nɛ otse akũ nɛ kɔsa kamɛ a, ade ayea kɛnɛ kĩ baadɛla yĩ, Otidziwa Obi a, lɛmɛ nɛ asendua akũ a, 15ayekĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ yĩ edo aana nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna a.
16“Kitonɛkĩ Baguma ti ɛwɛ katinya kalɛ paa kĩ ɛkɔa ye Obi mɔapɛ a ɛkpa kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ ye edo lɛláaku ɛwɔ, mbom yaana nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna a. 17Kitonɛkĩ Baguma tádo ye Obi kĩ ɛyaakɔ katinya kamɛ bati kɔtɔ, mbom kĩ fɔtsã ye akũ bati bɛna katɛ.
18“Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ Obi a edo ni, bɛtákɔ ye kɔtɔ, lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtátɛ edo ni, bɛkɔ ye kɔtɔ kɔkɔɛ, kitonɛkĩ ɛtátɛ Baguma Obi mɔapɛ a edo. 19Ayekĩ badzɛmɔ katinya kakɔ bati kɔtɔ a nyɛ kĩ ɔhaĩ a ya nɛ katinya kamɛ lɛmɛ bati wɛ ɔtũ kalɛ bɛba ɔhaĩ a, kitonɛkĩ be fɔtsakɛlawa nyɛ tɔkpa. 20Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna tɔkpa akesĩ ɔhaĩ a, ade ɛláaya nɛ ɔhaĩ a sɛkɛ̃ a, kitonɛkĩ yaáwɛ kĩ yanyɛ ye tɔkpa kanya. 21Lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ edzi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, yaya nɛ ɔhaĩ a kamɛ ayekĩ ɔhaĩ a aafɔ̃ bɛmɔ́ kĩ yakɛna fɔtsa nɛ Baguma kawɛ akũ.”
Yohanes Mui Ɔwɔlanɛ a Kpalɛ Yesu Akũ.
22Fukĩĩ liti a, Yesu mɔ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a naa Yudea amantam a kamɛ a. Edzi nɛ awã fuwi sukuloo ɛwɔla bati mui. 23Yohanes lɛmɛ kawɔla bati mui nɛ Ainon kĩ efuã Salim, kitonɛkĩ mui bɔ nɛ awã. Bati kaya nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ kĩ ɛwɔla be mui. 24Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ a, bɛtápi tɔ̃ Yohanes bido nɛ kɔla kamɛ.
25Luwi a, fɔlɛtsa kavɛlɛ ya nɛ Yohanes fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ mɔ Yudani odi kayite nɛ Yudafɔ akũ mui kawɔla amaniɛ akũ. 26Foesũ bɛya nɛ Yohanes sɛkɛ̃ bɛyabi ye kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, ate anɛ nɛ onyole a kĩ ɛna nɛ nɔ sɛkɛ̃ nɛ Yordan ɔwɔ liti, kĩ odi adansiɛ nɛ ye akũ a? Ɛlamɛna bati mui kawɔla ade bati flee lamɛna ye sɛkɛ̃ kanaa a!”
27Yohanes kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Odima lɛláapuli ɛna litsedi mbɔɛntɛ Baguma lɛkpa ye de. 28Mi mɔawɛ a nyɛ yĩ adansifɔ kĩ nlɛ kĩ, ‘Nnɛ́ yĩ nyɛ Kristo a, mbom Baguma do yĩ kĩ ĩnya ye lɔtɔ.’ 29Obolitsɔ̃ ɔnyɔ nyɛ oti a kĩ ɛla obolitsɔ̃ a, lɛmɛ obolitsɔ̃ ɔnyɔ ɔkɔba kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ ɔɔwɛ̃ yatse a kɔ̃, kawɔlɛ ade ye pii ntɛ enu obolitsɔ̃ ɔnyɔ a odo. Ade ayea kĩ nnu ye odo a, yĩ kawɔlɛkamɔ akpɔla a. 30Kɛnɛ kĩ ye dĩ lide nɛ ode lɔkɔa yĩ lide lɛka nɛ kayɔ.
Oti a Kĩ Eto Ode Ɛya a Bɛ̃ Be Flee.
31“Oti a kĩ eto ode ɛya a bɛ̃ be flee. Oti a kĩ eto tite akũ a nyɛ tite akũ oti, ade tite akũ fɔlɛtsa yalɛ a, lɛmɛ oti a kĩ eto ode a bɛ̃ be flee. 32Yalɛ lɛtsa a kĩ ɛmɔ́, mɔ lɛtsa a kĩ enu, lɛmɛ odima látɛ ye adansiɛ kadi a. 33Lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ ye fɔlɛtsa a, asipi kĩ Baguma adi ɔnɔkɔali. 34Oti a kĩ Baguma do a alɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa, kitonɛkĩ Baguma kɔa Hũhũ eyula ye kamɛ. 35Ɔlɛga a awɛ ye Obi kalɛ, ade foesũ ɛkɔa fɔtsa flee edo nɛ ye awɛ a.
36“Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ Obi a edo ni, edeĩ nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a, odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaátse Obi a ni, ɛláana nkpã, mbom Baguma kalɔkpa aana nɛ ye akũ.”

Title: YOHANES 4
Content:
Yesu Mɔ Samaria Otsole Odi Lɔmɛna.
1Farisifɔ a nu kĩ Yesu kawɔla bati mui, kĩ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kapɔ kaba Yohanes bade. 2Lɛmɛ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, Yesu mɔawɛ táwɔla odima mui, mbom ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a odi lɛwɔla bati mui. 3Foesũ kĩ Yesu nu fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a, ɛdzakũ nɛ Yudea emuniki ɛnaa Galilea tite akũ. 4Kɛnɛ kĩ ɛtsã Samaria tite kamɛ ɛnaa awã.
5Yesu yawo Samaria ɔmatɔ odi kĩ bavɛ Sikar. Ɔmatɔ a fuã mɔ tite a kĩ be ɔwanyɔ Yakob kɔa ɛkpa ye obi Yosef. 6Yakob lɔwɔkɛ deĩ nɛ awã. Yesu yawo awã ndɛ suwa tɔdɔũ ewua-nviã kamɛ, ade kĩ osi katsã piã ye sũ ni, ɛkɛna akũ edzi nɛ lɔwɔkɛ a ɔwɛ̃.
7Owi tábuna mɔ Samaria otsole odi ya kĩ yaanu mui. Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Kpa yĩ mui badi mmɔa.” 8Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ ni, ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a naa ɔmatɔ kamɛ bɛnaaya funitsã.
9Otsole a bi Yesu kĩ, “Nde fɔya mɔ nɔ Yudani avia yĩ Samaria otsole kĩ nkpa nɔ mui kamɔa?” Ɛlɛ lɔmɔ kitonɛkĩ Yudafɔ mɔ Samariafɔ lákã.
10Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ kanyina onyina lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma akpa, mɔ oti a kĩ ye lamɛna nɔ mui mɔawa kavia ni, kufɛ nɔ aavia ye lɔkɔa ɛkpa nɔ mui kĩ bakpa nkpã a.”
11Otsole a bi ye kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃, ɔnɛ́ɛ bokiti kĩ bakɔa kanu mui, ade lɔwɔkɛ a lɛmɛ dzũ a. Ndia aatomɛna mui a kĩ bakpa nkpã a? 12Boe ɔwanyɔ Yakob lɛnyɛ lɔwɔkɛ kĩĩ ɛkpa boe, ade ye mɔawɛ, ye babi mɔ ye bayaɛ flee mɔa mui bitomɛna de kamɛ a. Mbɔɛɛ katsa atsa kĩ ɔbɛ̃ Yakob?”
13Ade Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛmɔa mui kĩĩ ni, ɔmɔado aabuki ɛkɔ ye, 14lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yamɔa mui a kĩ maakpa ye a ni, ɔmɔado lɛláabuki ɛkɔ ye da. Kitonɛkĩ mui a kĩ maakpa oti a aadani mui katokɔ̃ kĩ nkpã mui deĩ a nɛ ye kamɛ, bɛkpa ye nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna a.”
15Otsole a bi Yesu kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃, kpa yĩ mui a na badi ayekĩ ɔmɔado lɛláabuki ɛkɔ yĩ da, ĩye mbuki ĩya nɛ awĩ kĩ maanu mui.”
16Ade Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Naakpã nɔ ɔnyɔ miya.”
17Otsole a bi ye kĩ, “Nlá ɔnyɔ.”
Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Ɔlɛ ɔnɔkɔali kĩ ɔlá ɔnyɔ. 18Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, odzimɔ banyole elo tɔ̃, ade onyole a kĩ mimɔ ye midzi finyaakĩĩ malo liti ɛnyɛ́ nɔ ɔnyɔ a.”
19Ade otsole a bi Yesu kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃, mmɔ́ kĩ Baguma onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ anɛ. 20Boe Samariafɔ bawanyɔ sum Baguma nɛ ɔtɔ kĩĩ akũ, lɛmɛ mi Yudafɔ mibo Yerusalem nyɛ awã kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ bati bisum Baguma.”
21Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Boe ɔma, tɛ yĩ kado kĩ lɔkɔ aaya kĩ bati lɛláabuki bisum Ɔlɛga a nɛ ɔtɔ kĩĩ akũ ĩye nɛ Yerusalem. 22Mi Samariafɔ miti minyína oti a kĩ ye miasum. Lɛmɛ boe Yudafɔ kɔ̃ bunyina oti a kĩ bɔasum, kitonɛkĩ Yudafɔ akũ nkpã katɛ a tsã kɛya. 23Lɛmɛ lɔkɔ aya, ade lɛya kɔkɔɛ malo kĩ bati a kĩ basum Baguma nɛ osi wĩ akũ a, aasum Ɔlɛga a nɛ Baguma Hũhũ mɔ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ. Ade bati a kĩ basum ye lɔmɔ a Baguma awɛ a. 24Baguma ni, Hũhũ yanɛ, foesũ kɛnɛ kĩ bati a kĩ basum ye a, bisum ye nɛ Hũhũ mɔ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ.”
25Ade otsole a bi ye kĩ, “Ĩnyina kĩ Mesia kĩ bavɛ Kristo a aaya, ade ntɛ ɛya ni, yaabi boe lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa.”
26Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Yĩ nyɛ ye, yĩ a kĩ nlamɛna kɔdzɛla kalɛ mɔ nɔ a.”
27Lɔkɔ a na kamɛ mɔ Yesu fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a muniki bɛya. Fɔkɛna be wãwã paa kĩ bɛmɔ́ kĩ ye mɔ otsole bɛlamɛna kɔdzɛla kalɛ. Lɛmɛ be kamɛ odima távia otsole a kĩ, “Litsa awɛ?” ĩye bivia Yesu kĩ, “Nde sũ mimɔ ye mialɔmɛna?”
28Ade otsole a fɔnɛ ye kugumi awɛ eyi nɛ awã, ɛnaa ɔmatɔ kamɛ ɛnabi bati kĩ, 29“Miyaadã onyole odi kĩ ebi yĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ nkɛna tɔ̃. Mbɔɛɛ ye nyɛ Kristo a?” 30Foesũ bati nɛ́ nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ bɛnaa Yesu sɛkɛ̃.
31Nɛ lɔkɔ a kamɛ a, Yesu fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kake ye aduli kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, yaanya litsedi.”
32Lɛmɛ Yesu bi be kĩ, “Ndeĩ funitsã kĩ maanya, kĩ minyína foe akũ lɛtsama.”
33Foesũ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kavia be akũ kĩ, “Mbɔɛɛ odi ma ye funitsã?”
34Yesu bi be kĩ, “Yĩ funitsã nyɛ kĩ makɛna nɛ oti a kĩ edo yĩ a kawɛ akũ, lɔkɔa nwũna ye adzuma a kĩ ɛkpa yĩ a. 35Nnɛ́ mi alɛ kĩ kite tidetɔ ɛna sɔũ kĩ funitsã kakpɔta lɔkɔ awo ɔtɔ? Lɛmɛ mabi mi kĩ miko anɛ midã fɔba a! Funitsã a bo kĩ bakpɔta. 36Oti a kĩ yakpɔta funitsã a atɛ kɔtɔkase, ade ɔkpɔtanɛ akpɔta foe kakpa nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a. Foesũ funitsã odunɛ a mɔ ɔkpɔtanɛ a flee aamɔ kawɔlɛ bɛkpɔta. 37Foesũ kalɛ a kĩ balɛ kĩ, ‘Oti mɔa adu fɔtsa, oti bɛbã akpɔta foe’ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali. 38Ndo mi kĩ minaakpɔta funitsã nɛ fɔba a kĩ mitákɛna adzuma nɛ foe kamɛ a. Bati bɛbã lɛkɛna adzuma nɛ awã, lɛmɛ mi mina nfasɔ mitomɛna be adzuma kakɛna kamɛ.”
Samariafɔ Pii Tɛ Yesu Bido.
39Samariafɔ pii kĩ bito ɔmatɔ a kamɛ a tɛ Yesu bido nɛ otsole a adansiɛ a kĩ edi kĩ, “Ebi yĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ nkɛna tɔ̃ nɛ yĩ nkpã kamɛ,” a sũ. 40Foesũ kĩ bɛyamɔ Yesu a, bike ye aduli kĩ edzi nɛ be sɛkɛ̃, ade Yesu dzi nɛ awã fuwi nviã fudi a.
41Bati bɛbã pii lɛmɛ tɛ Yesu bido nɛ ye mɔawɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ a sũ.
42Ade bibi otsole a kĩ, “Finyaa kɔ̃, nnɛ́ nɔ fɔlɛtsa a sũ bɔtɛ budo, kitonɛkĩ boe mɔawɛ a bunu fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ a, ade bunyi kĩ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, ye nyɛ katinya kamɛ Ɔtɛnɛ a.”
Yesu Tsá Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Odi Obinyole.
43Nɛ fuwi nviã a liti a, Yesu dzakũ nɛ awã ɛnaa Galilea tite akũ. 44Ye mɔawɛ a ɛlɛ kĩ, “Baguma onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ lɛ́la obu nɛ ye mɔawɛ kade bati kamɛ.” 45Lɛmɛ kĩ ewo Galilea tite akũ a, bati a tɛ ye katɛ wĩ, kitonɛkĩ bɛnaa Yerusalem nɛ Wuda Katɛ̃ Luwi kanya a kamɛ, ade bɛmɔ́ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ ɛkɛna a nɛ luwi kanya a kamɛ.
46Ke liti a, Yesu muniki ɛnaa Kana nɛ Galilea tite akũ, awã kĩ ɛdani mui bɛkɛna bavɛ a. Abãã ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ odi deĩ nɛ awã, ye obinyole asɔ nɛ Kapernaum. 47Kĩ enu kĩ Yesu to Yudea ɛya nɛ Galilea a, ɛnaa ye sɛkɛ̃ ɛnake ye aduli kĩ ɛyatsa ye obi kĩ edeĩ nɛ wuda mɔ nkpã kayite a ɛkpa ye.
48Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Ntɛ mitámɔ awãwã mɔ nsɛntsɛlɛni fɔtsa ni, miátɛ kado.”
49Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a ke ye aduli kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, ntɛ ɔtáya mɔatsɛ ni, yĩ obi aaku.”
50Ade Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Naa, nɔ obi aana nkpã.”
Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a tɛ Yesu fɔlɛtsa a edo ade epi ɔtɔsi a. 51Kĩ yanaa a, ye basumunɛ yatsɛlamɔ ye bibi ye kĩ ye obinyole a saɛ. 52Evia be lɔkɔ a kĩ de kamɛ obinyole a saɛ, ade bibi ye kĩ, “Kadzɔ suwa ɔdɔũ mɔa kamɛ mɔ atilili a fɔnɛ ye awɛ.”
53Ade ɔlɛga a te anɛ kĩ ade lɔkɔ a na kamɛ pɛpɛɛpɛ Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Nɔ obi aana nkpã.” Nɛ foesũ ye mɔ ye tɔtɔ kamɛ bati flee tɛ Yesu bido.
54Ade fukĩĩ nyɛ nsɛntsɛlɛni ayade kĩ Yesu kɛna nɛ Galilea, kĩ emuniki eto Yudea ɛya a.

Title: YOHANES 5
Content:
Yesu Tsá Abafã Adi Nɛ Betesda Lutubu Abuĩ.
1Ke liti a, kĩ Yudafɔ luwi lidi kanya wo ɔtɔ a, Yesu muniki ɛnaa Yerusalem. 2Lutubu lidi deĩ nɛ Yerusalem kakɔ a kĩ bavɛ Baveli Onyukpɛ̃ a ɔwɛ̃, kĩ bavɛ nɛ Hebri tide kamɛ kĩ Betesda. Bike tɛpata elo nɛ de atɔ. 3Basɔnɛ beblebee awa nɛ tɛpata a kamɛ, be badi nyɛ banɛkunɛ, babɛbã nyɛ lɛkpɛ̃ banɛnɛ mɔ abafã amɛ. Bawa nɛ awã kadzɔlɛ kĩ bɛyaakputua mui a. 4(Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ kideĩ kideĩ Baguma ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ odi ato ode kayaakputua mui a. Ɔsɔnɛ ɔtɔnyade kĩ yawo nɛ mui a kamɛ nɛ be kakputua liti a, asaɛ nɛ fɔsɔ nyɛ fɔsɔ kĩ yasɔ a kamɛ.) 5Onyole odi kĩ ɛkasɔ futeli taalɛ-alɛ̃ flee na nɛ awã. 6Kĩ Yesu mɔ́ ye kĩ ɛwaa nɛ awã a, enyi kĩ ɛkasɔ owi buna, foesũ evia ye kĩ, “Awɛ kĩ asaɛ?”
7Ɔsɔnɛ a kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃, ntɛ bikputua mui a ni, nlá odima kĩ yabɔɛ yĩ ɛnaado nɛ lutubu a kamɛ. Ntɛ mbɔa mbɔdi ĩyidza manaa a, lɔkɔa oti bɛbã tɛ̃ ɛnya yĩ lɔtɔ.”
8Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Yidza kadza, kabɔɛ nɔ ɔkɛna katsã!” 9Lɛtalɛta ɔsɔnɛ a na akũ ɔsĩ, ɛbɔɛ ye ɔkɛna edo katsã awɛ.
Luwi a kĩ fukĩĩ ya a nyɛ Yudafɔ Kawɛya Luwi, 10foesũ Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a bi oti a kĩ Yesu tsa a kĩ ɛnɔnɛ ye ɔkɛna a kĩ, “Nviã nyɛ Kawɛya Luwi. Boe mbla a tákpa osi kĩ alɔ nɔ ɔkɛna.”
11Onyole a kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Oti a kĩ ɛtsa yĩ a libi yĩ kĩ, ‘Yidza kadza, kabɔɛ nɔ ɔkɛna katsã!’ ”
12Ade ke bivia ye kĩ, “Owei nyɛ oti a kĩ ebi nɔ kĩ bɔɛ nɔ ɔkɛna katsã?”
13Lɛmɛ oti a kĩ bɛtsa a linyína Yesu, kitonɛkĩ bati yi awã, ade Yesu lɛmɛ vɛlɛ akũ ɛnɛ nɛ bati a kamɛ a.
14Ke liti a, Yesu mɔ́ ye nɛ Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ ade ebi ye kĩ, “Dã! Finyaa ɔna akũ ɔsĩ, foesũ fɔ̃ tɔkpa kakɛna, ntɛ nnɛ́ aye ni, lɛtsa kpa bɛbã kĩ lɛbɛ̃ fukĩĩ aaya nɛ nɔ akũ.” 15Ade ke onyole a dzakũ ɛnabi Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a kĩ Yesu lɛtsa ye.
16Foesũ bido Yesu liti katomɛna awɛ, kitonɛkĩ ɛtsa oti nɛ Kawɛya Luwi akũ. 17Lɛmɛ Yesu bi be kĩ, “Nda akɛna adzuma luwi nyɛ luwi, ade yĩ malo kɛnɛ kĩ nkɛna adzuma a.”
18Fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ fɔ̃ Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a buki bɛwɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ bakɔ Yesu, kitonɛkĩ nnɛ́ Kawɛya Luwi mbla a odi efum, mbom ebuki ɛlɛ kĩ Baguma nyɛ Ɔlɛga, kĩ fɔatsa kĩ ɛkɔa ye akũ eketimɔ Baguma.
Baguma Kpa Obi Kɔbɛ̃.
19Foesũ Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ Obi a lɛláapuli ɛkɛna lɛtsama nɛ ye mɔawɛ akũ. Lɛtsa a kĩ Obi a amɔ kĩ Ɔlɛga akɛna a, ade de odi ye malo yakɛna a. 20Kitonɛkĩ Ɔlɛga a awɛ Obi a kalɛ, ade yatsa ye lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ ye mɔawɛ yakɛna a. Yaatsa Obi fɔtsa kpale kɔlaa kĩ fɔbɛ̃ fukĩĩ kĩ ɛkɛna, kĩ fɔ́akɛna mi wãwã. 21Ndɛ ayekĩ Ɔlɛga a adzɛla banɔkpa badzi nkpã a, ade aye Obi a lɛmɛ aakpa bikĩ ɛpau a nkpã a. 22Ɔlɛga mɔawɛ a ládzɛmɔ odima, mbom ɛkɔa kɔbɛ̃ flee edo nɛ Obi a awɛ kĩ ɛdzɛmɔ bati flee, 23ayekĩ be flee baakɔa obu bɛkpa Obi a ndɛ ayekĩ bakɔa kakpa Ɔlɛga a. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaábu Obi a ni, yaábu Ɔlɛga a kĩ ye lido ye a lɛmɛ.
24“Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yatse yĩ fɔlɛtsa, mɔ yatɛ oti a kĩ edo yĩ a kado ni, edeĩ nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a. Bɛláadzɛmɔ ye, mbom ɛtsã wuda kamɛ ɛtɛ̃, ɛna nkpã kɔkɔɛ. 25Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ lɔkɔ lidi aya, ade lɛya kɔkɔɛ malo, kĩ banɔkpa aanu Baguma Obi a odo, ade bikĩ binu ye odo a aadzi nkpã a. 26Ndɛ ayekĩ Ɔlɛga a mɔawɛ kamɛ nkpã deĩ a, ade ayea ɛfɔ̃ nkpã deĩ nɛ Obi a lɛmɛ kamɛ a. 27Ɛkpa ye kɔbɛ̃ kĩ ɛdzɛ ɛkɔ kɔtɔ lɛmɛ, kitonɛkĩ ye nyɛ Otidziwa Obi a.
28“Fukĩĩ fɔtakɛna mi wãwã, kitonɛkĩ lɔkɔ lidi aya kĩ banɔkpa flee aanu ye odo, 29lɔkɔa baanɛ nɛ be funikɛ kamɛ. Bikĩ bɛkɛna tuwĩ a aayidza bidzi nkpã, ade bikĩ bɛkɛna tɔkpa a aayidza bɛkpa kɔtɔkaku.”
Bati a Kĩ Bidi Adansiɛ Nɛ Yesu Akũ.
30Yesu buki ɛlɛ kĩ, “Nláapuli nkɛna lɛtsama nɛ yĩ mɔawɛ otumi akũ. Madzɛ fɔlɛtsa ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma abi yĩ, foesũ madzɛ nɛ osi kpĩĩ akũ, kitonɛkĩ maákɛna nɛ yĩ mɔawɛ kawɛ akũ, mbom makɛna nɛ oti a kĩ edo yĩ a kawɛ akũ.
31“Ntɛ ndi adansiɛ nɛ yĩ mɔawɛ akũ ni, yĩ adansiɛ a tákpɔla. 32Lɛmɛ oti bɛbã deĩ kĩ yadi adansiɛ nɛ yĩ akũ, ade ĩnyina kĩ lɛtsa a kĩ yalɛ nɛ yĩ akũ a kpɔla.
33“Mido batɔ nɛ Yohanes sɛkɛ̃, ade ebi mi ɔnɔkɔali nɛ yĩ akũ a. 34Ntásĩ otidziwa adansiɛ kadi nɛ yĩ akũ, mbom nlɛ fukĩĩ ayekĩ míana nkpã katɛ. 35Yohanes la ndɛ ɔsɛdza kĩ yatɛ̃ kakpalɛ fɔkɔ, ade miawɛ kĩ miamɔ kawɔlɛ sukuloo nɛ ye ɔhaĩ a kamɛ a.
36“Lɛmɛ ndeĩ adansiɛ kĩ ɛbɛ̃ Yohanes ade a. Fɔtsa a kĩ makɛna a kĩ fɔnyɛ tudzuma kĩ Nda kpa yĩ kĩ nkɛna nwũna a, ade foe adi adansiɛ nɛ yĩ akũ, katsa lɛmɛ kĩ Ɔlɛga a lido yĩ a. 37Ɔlɛga a kĩ edo yĩ a, ade ye adi adansiɛ nɛ yĩ akũ a. Mitánu tɔ̃ ye odo ĩye mimɔ́ tɔ̃ ayekĩ ɛla a. 38Mitátɛ ye fɔlɛtsa a nɛ mi tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ mitátɛ oti a kĩ edo a mido. 39Miatsã Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a fɔlɛtsa kamɛ fininiini, kitonɛkĩ miakɔna kĩ foe kamɛ míatsã mina nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a. Ade ovoli kĩĩ kamɛ fɔlɛtsa mɔapɛ a adi adansiɛ nɛ yĩ akũ a, 40lɛmɛ miáwɛ kĩ miaya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ ayekĩ míana nkpã.
41“Maáwɛ kamu ntomɛna batidziwa sɛkɛ̃, 42kitonɛkĩ ĩnyina bati a odu kĩ be mianɛ, ade ĩnyina lɛmɛ kĩ milá ɔdɔ mikpa Baguma nɛ mi tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ a. 43Ĩya nɛ Nda dĩ akũ lɛmɛ mitátɛ yĩ. Lɛmɛ ntɛ oti bɛbã lɛya nɛ ye mɔawɛ dĩ akũ ni, míatɛ ye. 44Miawɛ kĩ miatɛ mi akũ akũ kamu, lɛmɛ miáwɛ kamu a kĩ kito oti a kĩ ye odi nyɛ Baguma a sɛkɛ̃, lɔkɔa nde míapuli mitɛ yĩ mido?
45“Lɛmɛ mitakɔna kĩ yĩ aatsua mi onukpɛ̃ nkpa Nda. Mose a kĩ ye akũ mikɔa anɛ mite a, ade ye nyɛ oti kĩ yaatsua mi onukpɛ̃ a. 46Ntɛ miti mitɛ Mose mido ni, kufɛ míatɛ yĩ malo mido, kitonɛkĩ ɛtsɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa eyi nɛ yĩ akũ. 47Lɛmɛ ntɛ mitátɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ɛtsɛlɛ eyi a mido ni, nde míakɛna mitɛ yĩ fɔlɛtsa a mido?”

Title: YOHANES 6
Content:
Yesu Kpa Bati Mpim Elo Funitsã Bɛnya.
1Ke liti a, Yesu nyina Galilea ɔwɔ lutubu baũ a kĩ bavɛ lɛmɛ kĩ Tiberia ɔwɔ lutubu baũ a, ɛnaa sɛkɛ sitide a. 2Bati kɔdabu kpale tomɔ ye kitonɛkĩ bɛmɔ́ awãwã fɔtsa a kĩ ɛkɛna, nɛ basɔnɛ katsa kamɛ a. 3Ade Yesu de ɛnaa ɔtɔ akũ ɛnakɛna akũ edzi mɔ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ. 4Finyaa, Wuda Katɛ̃ Luwi kanya lɔkɔ a wo ɔtɔ liyua.
5Kĩ Yesu dzɛla anɛ ɛdã fɔkɔ a, ɛmɔ́ kĩ bati kɔdabu baũ kudi lamɛna ye sɛkɛ̃ kaya, foesũ evia Filipo kĩ, “Ndia bɔ́ana funitsã bɔya bɔkpa bati kĩĩ flee?” 6Yesu mɔawɛ nyina lɛtsa a kĩ yaakɛna, lɛmɛ evia Filipo kalɛ kĩĩ kĩ yasɔ ye ɛdã.
7Ade Filipo kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ bɔya funitsã sika ovoe ɔha nviã malo ni, fɔláawĩ be ntɛ odi nyɛ odi tɛ sukuloo sukuloo malo.”
8Awã naa, Yesu fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kamɛ ɔmɔa, Andrea, kĩ ɛnyɛ Simon Petro ɔwaɛ̃ bi ye kĩ, 9“Opopo odi nɛɛ abodoo fɔbɔ elo mɔ kɔfɔabi nviã nɛ awĩ. Lɛmɛ futi fɔláato bati beblebee kĩĩ?”
10Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mifɔ̃ bati a flee bɛkɛna akũ bidzi.” Tuwĩ blɔblɔ deĩ nɛ awã ade bati a flee kɛna akũ bidzi nɛ te akũ a. Banyole a lidede aana ndɛ mpim elo. 11Ade ke Yesu tɛ abodoo a ɛnyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ, ade ɛsɛ̃ ye ɛkpa bati a. Ɛkɛna kɔfɔabi a lɛmɛ lɔmɔ, ade be flee bɛna funitsã ndɛ ayekĩ bawɛ a.
12Kĩ bɛnya biwĩ a, Yesu bi ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ, “Mikpɔta fukĩ fute a. Mitafɔ̃ bubula fudima kade.” 13Foesũ bifila fukĩ bati a nya bitina nɛ abodoo elo a kamɛ a biyula tɛtsɛtsɛ ewua-nviã.
14Kĩ bati a mɔ́ awãwã fɔtsa a kĩ Yesu kɛna nɛ awã a, bɛlɛ kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔali, ade Baguma onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ a kĩ yaya nɛ katinya kamɛ a!” 15Kĩ Yesu mɔ́ kĩ baayatimtim ye bipi bidzina lɛgã a, foesũ ɛnɛ́ nɛ be kamɛ ebuki ede ɛnaa ɔtɔ akũ ye odi.
Yesu Tsã Mui Anɛ.
16Kĩ olobe lɔkɔ wo ɔtɔ a, Yesu fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a ka bɛnaa ɔwɔ lutubu baũ a abuĩ. 17Biwo nɛ ɔkɔlɔ kamɛ bimuniki binyina banaa Kapernaum. Nɛ lɔkɔ a, kade dɔ lɛmɛ Yesu táyawo tɔ̃ be sɛkɛ̃. 18Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ a, ɔwɛ kpale odi kavũ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kabɔa mui kadɛla kakamɛna. 19Kĩ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a tá ɔkɔlɔ a banaa lɔtɔ ndɛ fusikũ ɛlalɛ ĩye foe ɛna a, bɛmɔ́ Yesu kĩ ɛtsɛ̃ mui anɛ yaya nɛ ɔkɔlɔ a sɛkɛ̃, ade libe wo be a. 20Lɛmɛ Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mitavila. Yĩ manɛ!” 21Ɔwɔlɛ ka edzi be ade bɛfɔ̃ Yesu wo nɛ ɔkɔlɔ a kamɛ a. Lɛtalɛta ɔkɔlɔ a wo lɔwɔtuni nɛ awã kĩ banaa a.
Bati a Tsã Bɛwɛ Yesu.
22Kĩ kade nyina a, bati kɔdabu a kĩ bɛkahɔ nɛ ɔwɔ lutuni litide kadzɔ a mɔ́ biyi ɔsũ kĩ ɔkɔlɔ mɔapɛ lɛna nɛ awã. Bɛmɔ́ lɛmɛ kĩ Yesu táwo nɛ ɔkɔlɔ a kamɛ ebumɔ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a, mbom bɛdzakũ bɛfɔnɛ ye. 23Lɔkɔ a na kamɛ a, tɔkɔlɔ bɛbã tidi kĩ tito Tiberia ɔmatɔ a yadza tifuã awã kĩ bati nya abodoo a kĩ boe Ɔlate bɔa mpaɛ nɛ ye akũ a. 24Kĩ bati kɔdabu a mɔ́ kĩ Yesu ĩye ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kamɛ odima lɛláa awã a, biwo nɛ tɔkɔlɔ a kamɛ bɛnaa Kapernaum bɛnaawɛ ye.
Yesu Nyɛ́ Nkpã Abodoo a.
25Kĩ bati a mɔ́ Yesu nɛ lɔwɔtuni litide a ni, bivia ye kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, lɔkɔ lɔwɔdabe ɔyawo awĩ?”
26Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ, nnɛ́ awãwã fɔtsa a kĩ nkɛna mimɔ́ a sũ mitsɛ̃ miawɛ yĩ, mbom abodoo a kĩ mina minya miwĩ a sũ. 27Mitaha akũ nɛ funitsã kĩ fɔ́abu kade akũ, mbom miha akũ miwɛ funitsã a kĩ fɔ́awa fɔkpa daa nkpã a kĩ Otidziwa Obi a aakpa mi a, kitonɛkĩ ade ye akũ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga a te awɛ a.”
28Foesũ bati a via Yesu kĩ, “Litsa kɛnɛ kĩ bɔkɛna fɔtsa kĩ bɔakɛna Baguma adzuma?”
29Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma awɛ kĩ mikɛna nyɛ kĩ mitɛ oti a kĩ edo a mido.”
30Ade bivia ye kĩ, “Nsɛntsɛlɛni awɔdabe aakɛna bɔmɔ́ lɔkɔa bɔtɛ nɔ budo? Litsa aakɛna? 31Boe bawanyɔ nya funitsã a kĩ bavɛ mana a nɛ kɔsa kamɛ ndɛ ayekĩ bɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ kĩ, ‘Ɛkpa be abodoo etomɛna ode kĩ bɛnya.’ ”
32Yesu bi be kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔali a mabi mi kĩ, nnɛ́ Mose lɛkpa mi abodoo a etomɛna ode, mbom Nda akpa abodoo wĩ katomɛna ode. 33Kitonɛkĩ Baguma abodoo a nyɛ́ oti a kĩ eto ode ɛya kĩ yakpa katinya nkpã.”
34Ade bibi ye kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, kpa boe abodoo kĩĩ daa.”
35Yesu bi be kĩ, “Yĩ nyɛ abodoo a kĩ yakpa nkpã. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ ni, kɔlɛ lɛláakɔ ye da, ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ yĩ edo ni, ɔmɔado lɛláakɔ ye da. 36Finyaa mbi mi kĩ, mimɔ́ yĩ, lɛmɛ miátɛ mido. 37Odi nyɛ odi kĩ Nda kɔa ɛkpa yĩ ni, yaaya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃, ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ ni, nláablɔmɛna ye da, 38kitonɛkĩ nto ode ĩya, nnɛ́ kĩ mayaakɛna nɛ yĩ mɔawɛ kawɛ akũ, mbom kĩ makɛna oti a kĩ edo yĩ a odi kawɛ akũ. 39Ade oti a kĩ edo yĩ a kawɛ nyɛ kĩ bati a kĩ ɛkɔa ɛkpa yĩ a kamɛ odima ɛtayɛla, mbom kĩ ndzɛla be flee bidzi nkpã nɛ luwi nkaɛ a akũ. 40Kitonɛkĩ Nda kawɛ nyɛ kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛmɔ́ Obi a mɔ ɛtɛ ye edo lɛmɛ ni, ɛna nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a. Ade maadzɛla ye edzi nkpã nɛ luwi nkaɛ a akũ a.”
41Yudafɔ a do hũhũhũhũ kakɛna awɛ nɛ Yesu akũ, kitonɛkĩ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Yĩ nyɛ abodoo a kĩ eto ode ɛya a.” 42Foesũ bɛlɛ kĩ, “Nnɛ́ Yesu, Yosef obinyole a kĩ bunyina ɔlɛga mɔ ɔma flee a nɛ awĩ a? Nde fɔya mɔ finyaa yalɛ kĩ ode eto ɛya?”
43Ade Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Mifɔ̃ hũhũhũhũ kakɛna nɛ mi kamɛ. 44Odima lɛláapuli ɛya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ mbɔɛntɛ Nda a kĩ edo yĩ a vɛlɛ ye ɛma yĩ, ade maadzɛla ye edzi nkpã nɛ luwi nkaɛ a akũ a. 45Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a tsɛlɛ biyi kĩ, ‘Baguma aatsa bati flee fɔtsa!’ Odi nyɛ odi kĩ etse Ɔlɛga a, ɛkɔlɛ fɔtsa etomɛna ye sɛkɛ̃ ni, aya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃. 46Lɛmɛ fukĩĩ látsa kĩ odi mɔ́ tɔ̃ Ɔlɛga a, mbɔɛntɛ oti a kĩ eto Baguma sɛkɛ̃ a odi lɛmɔ Ɔlɛga a. 47Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ edo ni, edeĩ nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a. 48Yĩ nyɛ abodoo a kĩ yakpa nkpã. 49Mi bawanyɔ nya mana nɛ kɔsa kamɛ, lɛmɛ biku. 50Lɛmɛ abodoo a kĩ eto ode ɛya a aafɔ̃ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yanya ye a lɛláaku. 51Yĩ nyɛ abodoo a kĩ yakpa nkpã, kĩ eto ode ɛya a. Ntɛ odi nya abodoo kĩĩ ni, yaadzi nkpã daa, ade ke abodoo a kĩ maakpa ye a nyɛ yĩ sukɛna, kĩ makpa katinya kamɛ bati bɛna nkpã.”
52Fukĩĩ fɔ̃ Yudafɔ a yi fɔlɛtsa kavɛlɛ kayɔ nɛ kalɔkpa kamɛ nɛ be kamɛ ade bivia kĩ, “Nde oti kĩĩ aapuli ɛkɔa ye sukɛna ɛkpa boe kĩ bɔba?”
53Ade Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ ntɛ mitába Otidziwa Obi a sukɛna, mimɔa ye babɔanɛ a ni, miláana nkpã nɛ mi kamɛ. 54Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛba yĩ sukɛna ɛmɔa yĩ babɔanɛ lɛmɛ ni, yaana daa nkpã a, ade maadzɛla ye edzi nkpã nɛ luwi nkaɛ a akũ a. 55Kitonɛkĩ yĩ sukɛna nyɛ funitsã wĩ a, ade yĩ babɔanɛ lɛmɛ nyɛ bavɛ wĩ a. 56Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaba yĩ sukɛna, kĩ yamɔa yĩ babɔanɛ lɛmɛ ni, edeĩ nɛ yĩ kamɛ ade yĩ malo ndeĩ nɛ ye kamɛ a. 57Ndɛ ayekĩ Ɔlɛga a kĩ edzi nkpã do yĩ a, kĩ ndzi nkpã nɛ ye sũ a, ade ayea odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛba yĩ sukɛna lɛmɛ aadzi nkpã nɛ yĩ sũ a. 58Ade abodoo a kĩ eto ode a nɛ awĩ a. Ɛlá ndɛ mana a kĩ mi bawanyɔ nya lɛmɛ ke liti, biku a. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛnya abodoo kĩĩ aadzi nkpã daa.” 59Yesu lɛ fukĩĩ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ ɛkatsa fɔtsa nɛ Yudafɔ katsɛnakɔ̃ nɛ Kapernaum.
Yesu Tsa Fɔtsa Nɛ Daa Nkpã a Akũ.
60Yesu fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a pii nu fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ ade bɛlɛ kĩ, “Fɔtsa katsa kĩĩ tɛnɛ́ ɔsĩ! Owei aapuli ɛtɛ foe?”
61Yesu mɔ́ eyi ɔsũ kĩ bɛkakɛna hũhũhũhũ, foesũ ebi be kĩ, “Mbɔɛɛ fukĩĩ fɔ̃ miawɛ kĩ miakpa lɔlɔ? 62Kekɔ̃ nde fɔ́ana ntɛ mimɔ́ Otidziwa Obi a kĩ emuniki ede yanaa ode, awã kĩ ɛna tɔ̃ a? 63Baguma Hũhũ a akpa nkpã, otidziwa kɔbɛ̃ lɛláa lɛtsama kamɛ. Fɔlɛtsa a kĩ mbi mi a nyɛ Hũhũ kamɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩ foe kamɛ nkpã deĩ. 64Lɛmɛ mi kamɛ badi tátɛ bido.” Kitonɛkĩ Yesu nyi kito anɛ kayɔkayi a bati a kĩ bɛláatɛ bido mɔ oti a kĩ ye aanyɛ ye ɛkpa a. 65Ɛlɛ ebu kĩ, “Ade fukĩĩ sũ mbi mi kĩ odima lɛláapuli ɛya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ mbɔɛntɛ Ɔlɛga a kpa ye osi.”
66Kito fukĩĩ akũ a, Yesu fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a badi pii muniki nɛ ye liti, ade bɛtábuki bitomɔ ye a.
67Foesũ evia fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ ewua-nviã a kĩ, “Mi malo miawɛ kĩ miadzakũ mbɔɛɛ?”
68Ade Simon Petro kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, owei sɛkɛ̃ bɔ́adzakũ bɔnaa? Nɔ deĩ daa nkpã a fɔlɛtsa. 69Finyaa kɔ̃ bɔtɛ budo ade bunyina kĩ nɔ nyɛ Oti Kpalɛwa a kĩ eto Baguma sɛkɛ̃ a.”
70Ade ke Yesu kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Nnɛ́ mi bati ewua-nviã mpau? Lɛmɛ mi kamɛ ɔmɔa nyɛ Abonsam!” 71Yuda, Simon Iskariot obi a akũ fɔlɛtsa ɛkalɛ, kitonɛkĩ titɔ kĩ ɛnyɛ be ewua-nviã a kamɛ ɔmɔa malo ni, ade ye aanyɛ ye ɛkpa a.

Title: YOHANES 7
Content:
Yesu Mɔ Bawaɛ̃.
1Ke liti a, Yesu natsã emini nɛ Galilea tite akũ, ɛtáwɛ kĩ yamini nɛ Yudea tite kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ nɛ awã kawɛ kĩ bakɔ ye. 2Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ a, Yudafɔ Tɛpatampa Kayɔ Kadzi Luwi kanya a fuã, 3foesũ Yesu bawaɛ̃nyole bi ye kĩ, “Dzakũ nɛ awĩ kanaa Yudea tite akũ, lɔkɔa nɔ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a lɛmɛ bɛmɔ adzuma a kĩ ɔlamɛna kakɛna a. 4Odima lákɔla ye adzuma ntɛ yawɛ kĩ bati binyi ye kanyi wĩ. Ntɛ nuwĩ ɔlamɛna fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ flee kakɛna ni, nyɛ nɔ akũ katsa katinya kamɛ bati flee!” 5Yesu bawaɛ̃nyole a lɛ fukĩĩ kitonɛkĩ be malo bɛtátɛ ye bido.
6Ade Yesu bi be kĩ, “Yĩ lɔkɔ wĩ táwo tɔ̃ ɔtɔ, lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ nɛnɛ lɛkpa mi. 7Katinya kamɛ bati lɛláapuli bikesĩ mi, lɛmɛ yĩ kɔ̃ bakesĩ yĩ, kitonɛkĩ ndzɛmɔ be kabi kĩ be tudzuma nyɛ tɔkpa. 8Minaa luwi a kanyakɔ̃. Yĩ kɔ̃ nláanaa luwi kĩĩ kanyakɔ̃, kitonɛkĩ yĩ lɔkɔ wĩ táwo tɔ̃ ɔtɔ.” 9Kĩ Yesu lɛ fukĩĩ eyua a, ebuki ɛkahɔ nɛ Galilea.
Yesu Naa Tɛpatampa Kayɔ Kadzi Luwi Kanyakɔ̃.
10Kĩ Yesu bawaɛ̃nyole a dzakũ bɛnaa luwi kanyakɔ̃ a, ye malo ɛyanaa awã, lɛmɛ ɛtányɛ ye akũ ɛtsa, mbom ɛbɛla ye akũ. 11Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a kawɛ ye nɛ luwi a kanyakɔ̃, bɛkavia kĩ, “Nde oti a?”
12Bati kɔdabu a kalɛ kɔdzɛla pɛtɛɛ pɛtɛɛ nɛ Yesu akũ. Be kamɛ badi lɛ kĩ, “Oti wĩ yanɛ.”
Ade babɛbã lɛmɛ lɛ kĩ, “Oowo, ɛtsɛ̃ yakɛ bati.” 13Lɛmɛ odima tápuli ɛlɛ foe kɔɔba, kitonɛkĩ bivila Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a.
14Kĩ kite sukuloo luwi kanya a atɛ̃ de kayite a, Yesu naa Baguma Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ ɛnado bati fɔtsa katsa awɛ. 15Ye fɔtsa katsa a kɛna Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a wãwã paa, ade bɛlɛ kĩ, “Nde oti kĩĩ kɛna enyina ovoli lɔmɔ, kĩ ɛtána fɔtsa kakɔlɛ kadima?”
16Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Fɔtsa a kĩ matsa a lɛnyɛ́ yĩ mɔawɛ fude, mbom futo Baguma kĩ edo yĩ a sɛkɛ̃. 17Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ kĩ yakɛna nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma awɛ akũ a, aanyi ntɛ fɔtsa a kĩ matsa a to Baguma sɛkɛ̃ ĩye malɛ foe nɛ yĩ mɔawɛ kɔbɛ̃ akũ. 18Oti kĩ yatsa fɔtsa nɛ ye mɔawɛ kɔbɛ̃ akũ ni, obu yawɛ ɛkpa ye akũ. Lɛmɛ ntɛ oti awɛ obu ɛkpa oti a kĩ edo ye a ni, ɛnyɛ ɔnɔkɔalini, ade tɔkpa tidima lɛláa ye kamɛ a. 19Mbɔɛɛ nnɛ́ Mose lɛkpa mi mbla a? Lɛmɛ mi kamɛ odima lákɛna nɛ mbla a akũ. Nde sũ miawɛ kĩ miakɔ yĩ?”
20Ade bati kɔdabu a bi ye kĩ, “Hũhũ kpa deĩ nɛ nɔ kamɛ! Owei awɛ kĩ yakɔ nɔ?”
21Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Awãwã fɔtsa mɔa kĩĩ nkɛna, ade mi flee mikɛna saa a. 22Mose kpa mi mbla kĩ mitsua mi babinyole fɔkpati, ade titɔ kĩ nnɛ́ Mose sɛkɛ̃ futo, mbom mi bawanyɔ liyi foe kayɔ malo ni, miatsua onyole lɛkpati nɛ Kawɛya Luwi akũ. 23Ntɛ bitsua obi lɛkpati nɛ Kawɛya luwi akũ ayekĩ bɛláafum Mose mbla a ni, nde sũ mina kalɔkpa nɛ yĩ akũ kĩ ntsa oti fɔsɔ nɛ Kawɛya Luwi a akũ? 24Mitadã bati anɛ midzɛ mikɔ kɔtɔ, mbom midzɛ kalɛ nɛ ke osi kpĩĩ akũ.”
Bati Badi Tɛ Atsindze Kĩ Nnɛ́ Yesu Nyɛ Kristo a.
25Yerusalem ɔmatɔ a kamɛ bati badi via kĩ, “Nnɛ́ oti kĩĩ Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a lamɛna kawɛ kĩ bakɔ a nɛ awĩ a? 26Midã kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ kanade yalɛ kɔdzɛla, kĩ bɛtávia ye kadima. Mbɔɛɛ fɔ́anya kĩ ɔmaĩ banɔkɔɛ̃ a nyina nuwĩ kĩ ye nyɛ Kristo a? 27Boe flee bunyina awã kĩ oti kĩĩ kɔ̃ to, lɛmɛ ntɛ Kristo a ya ni, odima lɛláanyi awã kĩ eto.”
28Kĩ Yesu katsa fɔtsa nɛ Baguma Asɔli Kɔla kamɛ a, ɛbɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba ɛlɛ kĩ, “Kalɛ mialɛ kĩ miti minyina yĩ mɔ awã kĩ nto a? Ntáya nɛ yĩ mɔawɛ kɔbɛ̃ akũ. Oti a kĩ edo yĩ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔalini kĩ mi minyína ye, 29lɛmɛ yĩ kɔ̃ ĩnyina ye, kitonɛkĩ ye sɛkɛ̃ nto ĩya ade ye lido yĩ a.”
30Nɛ foesũ bɛwɛ kĩ bapi Yesu, lɛmɛ odima tákɔa awɛ ɛta ye, kitonɛkĩ ye lɔkɔ táwo tɔ̃ ɔtɔ. 31Lɛmɛ bati kɔdabu a kamɛ bati pii tɛ ye bido ade bivia kĩ, “Ntɛ Kristo a ya ni, yaakɛna awãwã fɔtsa pii fɔba fukĩ oti kĩĩ lamɛna kakɛna a?”
Bido Asɔli Kɔla Akũ Badãmɛnanɛ Kĩ Bɛnaapi Yesu.
32Farisifɔ nu fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bati kɔdabu a lamɛna kalɛ pɛtɛɛ pɛtɛɛ nɛ Yesu akũ a, foesũ bɛmɔ Yudafɔ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a bido Asɔli Kɔla akũ badãmɛnanɛ a kĩ bɛnaapi ye.
33Ade Yesu lɛ kĩ, “Maana nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ fubuna owi sukuloo, lɔkɔa maadzakũ nnaa oti a kĩ edo yĩ a sɛkɛ̃. 34Míawɛ yĩ lɛmɛ miláamɔ yĩ, kitonɛkĩ miláapuli miya nɛ awã kĩ maana a.”
35Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a via akũ kĩ, “Nɛ ndia ɛwɛ kĩ yanaa kĩ bɔláapuli bɔmɔ́ ye? Mbɔɛɛ kĩ yanaa Yudafɔ a kĩ bɛgba biko nɛ Helafɔ kamɛ a ɛnaatsa Helafɔ a fɔtsa? 36Ɛlɛ kĩ bɔ́awɛ ye lɛmɛ bɔláamɔ ye, ade bɔláapuli bɔnaa awã kĩ yaana a. Foe kayɔ nyɛ litsa?”
Yesu Nyɛ́ Nkpã Mui a.
37Nɛ luwi nkaɛ a kĩ lɛnyɛ luwi titiliwu nɛ fuwi kanya kamɛ akũ a, Yesu yidza ɛdza ade ɛbɔa fɔwɔla ɛlɛ kĩ, “Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɔmɔado akɔ ye ni, ɛya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ ɛyaamɔa mui. 38Ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ a, ‘Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ yĩ edo ni, nkpã tɔwɔ aatini bito ye ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ.’ ” 39Yesu kalɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ Hũhũ a kĩ bikĩ bɛtɛ ye bido a aayatɛ a akũ. Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ a, bɛtákpa tɔ̃ Hũhũ a, kitonɛkĩ bɛtádzɛla Yesu ewo nɛ kukũkpalɛ kamɛ.
Kasɛ̃ Wo Nɛ Yudafɔ a Kamɛ.
40Kĩ bati a badi nu fɔlɛtsa a kĩ Yesu lɛ a, bɛlɛ kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔali, Baguma Onukpɛ̃ Ɔnyɛnɛ a nyɛ oti kĩĩ.”
41Babɛbã lɛ kĩ, “Ade Kristo a nɛ awĩ a.”
Lɛmɛ bati bɛbã kɔ̃ via kĩ, “Mbɔɛɛ Galilea tite akũ Kristo a aato ɛya? 42Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a tálɛ kĩ Kristo aato Lɛgã Dawid kasinu a kamɛ, ade baama ye nɛ Betlehem, ɔmatɔ a kĩ Dawid dzi a kamɛ?” 43Foesũ kasɛ̃ wo nɛ bati kɔdabu a kamɛ nɛ Yesu sũ. 44Badi wɛ kĩ bapi ye, lɛmɛ odima tákɔa awɛ ɛta ye.
Yudafɔ Banɔkɔɛ̃ a Tátɛ Yesu Bido.
45Kĩ Asɔli Kɔla akũ badãmɛnanɛ a muniki bɛya nɛ Yudafɔ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ Farisifɔ a sɛkɛ̃ a, bivia be kĩ, “Nde sũ mitápi ye miyamɛna?”
46Asɔli Kɔla akũ badãmɛnanɛ a kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Odima tálɛ tɔ̃ kɔdzɛla ndɛ ayekĩ oti kĩĩ alɛ a!”
47Ade Farisifɔ a via be kĩ, “Mbɔɛɛ ɛnakɛ mi malo? 48Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ ĩye Farisini ɔdabe lɛtɛ ye edo kĩ minyina? 49Ade bati kɔdabu kĩĩ, kĩ binyína Mose mbla a sũ ni, Baguma dumu be!”
50Nikodemo kĩ ɛnyɛ Farisifɔ a kamɛ ɔmɔa, kĩ ɛnaa Yesu sɛkɛ̃ tɔ̃ a na nɛ awã. Edo onukpɛ̃ ebi be kĩ, 51“Boe mbla tákpa boe osi kĩ bɔakɔ oti kɔtɔ, mbɔɛntɛ bɔdzɛmɔ ye butse ye onukpɛ̃ kamɛ fɔlɛtsa bunyi lɛtsa a kĩ ɛkɛna a.”
52Bibi ye kĩ, “Mbɔɛɛ Galilea nɔ malo oto? Tsã Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ kadã, lɔkɔa aamɔ kĩ Baguma onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ odima láto Galilea.” 53(Ke liti a, odi nyɛ odi dzakũ ɛnaa kɔla.)

Title: YOHANES 8
Content:
Bipi Otsole Odi Kĩ Ɛnɛ́ Ɔnyɔ Liti.
1Lɛmɛ Yesu de ɛnaa Kugua Futse Ɔtɔ a akũ. 2Kĩ kade nyina ɔnɔnɛ tutuutu a, Yesu muniki ɛya nɛ Baguma Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ. Bati pii yakpɔta nɛ ye akũ, ade ɛkɛna akũ edzi eyi be fɔtsa katsa kayɔ a. 3Yudafɔ mbla batsanɛ mɔ Farisifɔ a kpã otsole odi nɛ adɔpaa kabɔa kamɛ bɛyadzɛla nɛ bati a flee anɛ kamɛ. 4Ade bibi Yesu kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, bipi otsole kĩĩ kĩ onyole bɛbã awa mɔ ye. 5Nɛ boe mbla a kamɛ ni, Mose kpa otumi kĩ bɛtalɛ otsole kĩĩ odu boe bɛkɔ. Litsa nɔ kɔ̃ alɛ nɛ foe akũ?” 6Bivia fukĩĩ kĩ bakɔa banaĩ ye, ayekĩ baana kalɛ kadi bɛkɔa bitsua ye onukpɛ̃.
Lɛmɛ Yesu kɛna akũ ɛkɔa lawobi ɛtsɛlɛ fɔtsa nɛ tite.
7Kĩ bɛdza bɛkavia ye fɔlɛtsa a, ɛdzɛla akũ ade ebi be kĩ, “Mi kamɛ owula a kĩ ɛtákɛna tɔkpa tidima tɔ̃ ni, ɛnya lɔtɔ ɛta de ɛbɔa otsole a.” 8Ade ke ebuki ɛkɛna akũ ɛtsɛlɛ fɔtsa nɛ tite a.
9Kĩ binu fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a, be flee bɛdzakũ ɔmɔa ɔmɔa, kito banɔkɔɛ̃ a akũ kɛnawo kĩ kite Yesu mɔ otsole a odi nɛ awã.
10Yesu dzɛla akũ evia otsole a kĩ, “Boe ɔma, nde bati a? Be kamɛ odima táte kĩ yakɔ nɔ kɔtɔ?”
11Otsole a kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃, oowo.”
Ade ke Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Kekɔ̃ yĩ malo ntákɔ nɔ kɔtɔ. Dzakũ kanaa, lɛmɛ tabuki ɔkɛna tɔkpa.”
Yesu Nyɛ́ Katinya Kamɛ Ɔhaĩ.
12Yesu buki ebi bati a kĩ, “Yĩ nyɛ katinya kamɛ ɔhaĩ, odi nyɛ odi kĩ etomɔ yĩ ni, yaana nkpã ɔhaĩ a, ade ɛláatsã nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ da a.”
13Farisifɔ a bi ye kĩ, “Adi adansiɛ nɛ nɔ mɔawɛ akũ, foesũ nɔ adansiɛ a tákpɔla.”
14Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ madi adansiɛ nɛ yĩ mɔawɛ akũ malo ni, lɛtsa a kĩ malɛ a kpɔla, kitonɛkĩ ĩnyina awã kĩ nto mɔ awã kĩ manaa a. Mi linyína awã kĩ nto ĩye awã kĩ manaa a. 15Miadzɛ fɔlɛtsa nɛ batidziwa kamɔ onukpɛ̃, lɛmɛ yĩ kɔ̃ maádzɛmɔ odima. 16Lɛmɛ ntɛ maadzɛ mɔ bati ni, yĩ kadzɛ a aakpɔla, kitonɛkĩ nnɛ́ yĩ odi adzɛ kalɛ, mbom bɔmɔ Nda a kĩ edo yĩ a adzɛ fɔlɛtsa. 17Bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ mi mbla a kamɛ kĩ ntɛ adansifɔ nviã onukpɛ̃ kɛna ɔmɔa ni, lɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ a kpɔla. 18Madi adansiɛ kakpa yĩ akũ, ade Nda a kĩ edo yĩ a lɛmɛ adi yĩ akũ adansiɛ a.”
19Bati a via Yesu kĩ, “Ndia aga deĩ?”
Ɛkpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Minyína yĩ, ĩye Nda. Ntɛ kanyina minyina yĩ ni, kufɛ míanyi Nda lɛmɛ.” 20Yesu lɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ flee nɛ tɔgɔlɛ katekɔ̃ a, kĩ ɛkatsa fɔtsa nɛ Asɔli Kɔla kamɛ a, lɛmɛ odima tápi ye, kitonɛkĩ ye lɔkɔ táwo tɔ̃ ɔtɔ.
Yesu Bi Yudafɔ Banɔkɔɛ̃ a Kĩ Bɛláapuli Bɛnaa Awã Kĩ Yanaa a.
21Yesu buki ebi be kĩ, “Maadzakũ, ade míawɛ yĩ, lɛmɛ míaku nɛ mi tɔkpa kamɛ. Miláapuli minaa awã kĩ manaa a.”
22Ade ke Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a via kĩ, “Ye akũ yanaakɔ sũ mɔ ɛlɛ kĩ, ‘Miláapuli miya nɛ awã kĩ manaa a’?”
23Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Tite kĩĩ akũ mito, lɛmɛ yĩ kɔ̃ ode nto ĩya. Katinya kĩĩ kamɛ bati mianɛ, lɛmɛ nnɛ́ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ oti manɛ. 24Ade foesũ mbi mi kĩ míaku nɛ mi tɔkpa kamɛ a. Míaku nɛ mi tɔkpa kamɛ ntɛ mitátɛ mido kĩ yĩ nyɛ oti a kĩ ye manɛ a.”
25Bɛdani bivia ye kĩ, “Owei anɛ?”
Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Lɛtsa a kĩ mbi mi kito anɛ kayɔkayi a, ade foe mɔapɛ a. 26Ndeĩ fɔlɛtsa pii kĩ maalɛ nɛ mi akũ nkɔa nkɔ mi kɔtɔ, lɛmɛ oti a kĩ edo yĩ a adi ɔnɔkɔali, ade lɛtsa a kĩ nnu ntomɛna ye sɛkɛ̃ a odi mabi katinya kamɛ bati a.”
27Bati a tánu foe kayɔ kĩ Ɔlɛga akũ fɔlɛtsa Yesu kabi be. 28Foesũ ebi be kĩ, “Ntɛ midɛla Otidziwa Obi a nɛ ode a fɔmɔ míanyi kĩ yĩ nyɛ oti a kĩ ye manɛ a. Ade ke míanyi kĩ maákɛna lɛtsama nɛ yĩ mɔawɛ kɔbɛ̃ akũ, mbom lɛtsa a kĩ Nda tsa yĩ kĩ nlɛ a odi malɛ. 29Oti a kĩ edo yĩ a deĩ nɛ yĩ ɔwɛ̃. Ɛtáfɔnɛ yĩ odi eyi, kitonɛkĩ makɛna lɛtsa a kĩ lawo ye anɛ a daa.” 30Kĩ Yesu lɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a, bati pii tɛ ye bido.
Bati a Kĩ Bɛnyɛ Abraham Babi.
