31Yesu bi Yudafɔ a kĩ bɛtɛ ye bido a kĩ, “Ntɛ mitɛ yĩ fɔtsa katsa a midomɔ akũ ni, kekɔ̃ yĩ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ wĩ mianɛ. 32Míanyi ɔnɔkɔali a, ade ɔnɔkɔali a aakpa mi akũ akũ kadzi a.”
33Bati a kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Abraham babi mɔ bawa bɔanɛ, ade bɔtánya tɔ̃ odima basate a. Nde sũ alɛ kĩ, ‘Míana akũ akũ kadzi’?”
34Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mabi mi ɔnɔkɔali a kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna tɔkpa ni, ɛnyɛ tɔkpa ɔsate. 35Ɔsate lánya kɔla obi daa, lɛmɛ obinyole kɔ̃ nyɛ kɔla obi daa. 36Foesũ ntɛ Obi a kpa mi akũ akũ kadzi ni, lɔkɔa mina akũ akũ kadzi wĩ. 37Ĩnyina kĩ Abraham babi mɔ bawa mianɛ, lɛmɛ miawɛ kĩ miakɔ yĩ, kitonɛkĩ yĩ fɔtsa katsa a táwo nɛ mi kamɛ. 38Fɔtsa a kĩ mmɔ́ nɛ Nda sɛkɛ̃ a, ade foe akũ malɛ kɔdzɛla a, lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃ miakɛna lɛtsa a kĩ mi ɔlɛga bi mi a.”
39Bibi ye kĩ, “Boe ɔlɛga nyɛ Abraham.”
Yesu kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ Abraham babi mɔ bawa paa mianɛ ni, kufɛ míakɛna fɔtsa ndɛ ayekĩ ɛkɛna a. 40Lɛmɛ miawɛ kĩ miakɔ yĩ oti a kĩ mbi mi ɔnɔkɔali fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ntɛ ntomɛna Baguma sɛkɛ̃ a. Abraham tákɛna fukĩĩ odu. 41Mi miakɛna lɛtsa a kĩ mi ɔlɛga a kɛna a.”
Bɛkpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ɔlɛga mɔapɛ budeĩ, ade ye nyɛ Baguma a. Bɔnyɛ́ adɔpaa kamɛ babi.”
42Yesu bi be kĩ, “Ntɛ Baguma liti ɛnyɛ mi Ɔlɛga ni, kufɛ míawɛ yĩ kalɛ, kitonɛkĩ Baguma sɛkɛ̃ nto ĩya. Ntáya nɛ yĩ mɔawɛ kɔbɛ̃ akũ, mbom Baguma lido yĩ. 43Nde sũ miánu fɔlɛtsa a kĩ malɛ a kayɔ? Kitonɛkĩ miáwɛ kĩ miatse yĩ fɔlɛtsa a. 44Mi ɔlɛga Abonsam bade mianɛ, ade miawɛ kĩ miakɛna nɛ mi ɔlɛga a fɔwɛtsa akũ a. Owudini yanɛ kito anɛ kayɔkayi, ade yaátomɔ ɔnɔkɔali liti a, kitonɛkĩ ɔnɔkɔali lɛláa ye kamɛ da. Ntɛ ɛma fɔvã ni, ye kutitse ɛnyɛ yatsa, kitonɛkĩ ɛnyɛ ɔvãlɛvã mɔ fɔvã ɔlɛga. 45Lɛmɛ yĩ kɔ̃ ɔnɔkɔali a mabi mi, ade foesũ miátɛ yĩ mido a. 46Mi kamɛ owei aapuli ɛkɔ yĩ kɔtɔ kĩ nkɛna tɔkpa? Ntɛ nlɛ ɔnɔkɔali a ni, nde sũ mitátɛ yĩ mido? 47Oti kĩ eto Baguma kamɛ a, atse Baguma fɔlɛtsa. Lɛmɛ ayekĩ mitáto Baguma kamɛ sũ ni, miátɛ yĩ fɔlɛtsa.”
Yesu Mɔ Abraham.
48Yudafɔ a via Yesu kĩ, “Ntɛ bɔlɛ kĩ Samariani anɛ, ade hũhũ kpa lɛmɛ deĩ nɛ nɔ kamɛ a ni, bɔtálɛ ɔnɔkɔali?”
49Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Hũhũ kpa adima lɛláa yĩ kamɛ. Makpa Nda obu lɛmɛ mi miasupa yĩ. 50Maáwɛ kĩ mado yĩ akũ obu, lɛmɛ odi deĩ kĩ yawɛ foe ade ye adzɛ kakpa yĩ a. 51Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ, odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna nɛ yĩ fɔtsa katsa a akũ a, lɛláaku da.”
52Yudafɔ a bi ye kĩ, “Ade owi bɔmɔ́ pefee kĩ hũhũ kpa deĩ nɛ nɔ kamɛ a! Abraham ku, Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a lɛmɛ ku. Lɛmɛ nɔ kɔ̃ alɛ kĩ, ‘Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna nɛ yĩ fɔtsa katsa a akũ a, lɛláaku da.’ 53Mbɔɛɛ nɔ bɛ̃ boe ɔwanyɔ Abraham kĩ eku a? Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a lɛmɛ ku. Owei abu kĩ ye anɛ?”
54Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ mado yĩ mɔawɛ akũ obu ni, yĩ obu a lɛláana nfasɔ. Oti a kĩ ye ado yĩ obu a nyɛ Nda, oti kĩ mialɛ kĩ ɛnyɛ mi Baguma a. 55Minyína Nda a, lɛmɛ yĩ kɔ̃ ĩnyina ye. Ntɛ nlɛ kĩ ĩnyína ye ni, maakɛna ɔvãlɛvã ndɛ mi aye. Lɛmɛ nti ĩnyina ye ade makɛna nɛ ye kalɛ a akũ a. 56Mi ɔwanyɔ Abraham mɔ́ kawɔlɛ kĩ yaamɔ yĩ kaya. Ɛmɔ́ ke lɛmɛ ade kawɔlɛ de ye a.”
57Ade ke Yudafɔ a bi ye kĩ, “Ɔtátɛ tɔ̃ futeli aduenum malo, ke mɔ alɛ kĩ ɔmɔ́ Abraham a?”
58Yesu kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ, yĩ ndeĩ fɔmɔ bɛma Abraham.”
59Ade ke bati a fila boe kĩ bata bɛbɔa ye a, lɛmɛ Yesu bɛla, ade ɛnɛ́ nɛ Baguma Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ a.

Title: YOHANES 9
Content:
Yesu Binya Oti Kĩ Bɛma Ɔnɛkunɛ Anɛ.
1Kĩ Yesu anaa a, ɛmɔ́ onyole odi kĩ bɛma ye ɔnɛkunɛ. 2Ade ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a via ye kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, owei tɔkpa sũ bɛma onyole kĩĩ ɔnɛkunɛ? Ye mɔawɛ tɔkpa mbɔɛɛ ye bamanɛ tɔkpa sũ?”
3Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Nnɛ́ onyole kĩĩ ĩye ye bamanɛ lɛkɛna tɔkpa, mbom bɛma ye ɔnɛkunɛ, ayekĩ baanyɛ Baguma kɔbɛ̃ adzuma bɛtsãmɛna ye akũ. 4Ntɛ budeĩ nɛ kade kanyina kamɛ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ bɔakɛna adzuma bɔkpa oti a kĩ edo yĩ a. Kade aya kadɔkɔ̃ kĩ odima lɛláapuli ɛkɛna adzuma. 5Kĩ ndeĩ nɛ katinya kamɛ kĩĩ ni, yĩ nyɛ katinya kamɛ ɔhaĩ a.”
6Kĩ Yesu lɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ eyua a, etua tanɛ eyi nɛ tite, ɛfɔnɛ te ɛkɔa ɛtsɛla onyole a nɛ banebi. 7Ade ebi ye kĩ, “Naavɔlɛ anɛ nɛ Siloam Lutubu a kamɛ.” Dĩ Siloam kayɔ nyɛ, bido ye. Ade onyole a navɔlɛ anɛ, ade ɛmɔ́ fɔkɔ kĩ emuniki yaya a.
8Ye badzikɔba mɔ bikĩ bɛkamɔ ye kĩ ɛkawã fɔtsa a via kĩ, “Mbɔɛɛ nnɛ́ oti kĩĩ adzi kawã fɔtsa a?”
9Badi lɛ kĩ, “Ade ye a.” Lɛmɛ babɛbã lɛ kĩ, “Oowo, nnɛ́ ye yanɛ, kanɛ ɛnɛ́ ye.”
Nɛ foesũ oti a mɔawɛ lɛ kĩ, “Ye manɛ.”
10Bivia ye kĩ, “Nde fɔya mɔ finyaa kɔ̃ mɔ amɔ fɔkɔ?”
11Ɛkpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Onyole a kĩ bavɛ Yesu lɛfɔnɛ tite ekputa yĩ banebi ade ebi yĩ kĩ naavɔlɛ anɛ nɛ Siloam Lutubu a kamɛ. Foesũ nnaa adeke, kĩ nsila nvɔlɛ anɛ pɛ, mpuli mmɔ́ fɔkɔ.”
12Bivia ye kĩ, “Nɛ ndia edeĩ?”
Ɛkpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ĩnyína.”
Farisifɔ Via Oti a Kĩ Ye Anɛ Bibinya a Fɔlɛtsa.
13Ade ke bati a kpã onyole a kĩ eku tɔ̃ anɛ a bɛma Farisifɔ a. 14Luwi a kĩ de akũ Yesu fɔnɛ tite ɛkɔa ebinya ye anɛ a nyɛ Kawɛya Luwi.
15Foesũ Farisifɔ a lɛmɛ via ye ayekĩ fɔkɛna fɔmɔ bibinya ye anɛ. Ɛkpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ɛkɔa tite fɔnɛwa ekputa yĩ banebi. Ɛfɔ̃ nnavɔlɛ anɛ, ade finyaakĩĩ mpuli mamɔ fɔkɔ a.”
16Farisifɔ a badi lɛ kĩ, “Oti a kĩ ɛkɛna fukĩĩ táto Baguma sɛkɛ̃, kitonɛkĩ yaákɛna nɛ Kawɛya Luwi mbla a akũ.”
Ade babɛbã lɛmɛ via kĩ, “Nde fɔ́aya kĩ tɔkpa ɔkɛnanɛ aapuli ɛkɛna nsɛntsɛlɛni kĩĩ odu?” Nɛ foesũ kasɛ̃ wo nɛ be kamɛ.
17Farisifɔ a buki bivia onyole a kĩ, “Kĩ ɔlɛ kĩ ye libinya nɔ anɛ a ni, nɔ malo litsa odeĩ kĩ alɛ nɛ ye akũ?”
Onyole a kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Baguma onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ yanɛ.”
18Lɛmɛ Yudafɔ a táwɛ kĩ batɛ bido kĩ onyole a nya tɔ̃ ɔnɛkunɛ fɔmɔ ye anɛ binya, kɛnawo kĩ bɛvɛ ye bamanɛ bɛyamɛna.
19Ade bivia be kĩ, “Mi obi a kĩ milɛ kĩ mima ye ɔnɛkunɛ a nɛ awĩ a? Nde fɔya mɔ finyaa kɔ̃ yamɔ fɔkɔ?”
20Ye bamanɛ a kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Bunyina kĩ boe obi yanɛ, ade bunyina kĩ bɔma ye ɔnɛkunɛ a. 21Lɛmɛ ayekĩ fɔkɛna fɔmɔ yamɔ fɔkɔ a ni, bunyína foe kɔ̃, ade bunyína oti a kĩ ye libinya ye anɛ a lɛmɛ a. Mivia ye mɔawɛ a, ebo anɛ, yaapuli ɛnyɛ ye akũ onukpɛ̃.” 22Ye bamanɛ lɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ ayekĩ bɛkavila Yudafɔ a sũ. Kitonɛkĩ Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a lɛ biyi kɔkɔɛ kĩ ntɛ odi tɛ edo kĩ Yesu nyɛ Kristo a ni, baablɔmɛna ye nɛ Yudafɔ katsɛnakɔ̃ a. 23Ade foesũ ye bamanɛ a lɛ kĩ, “Ebo anɛ, mivia ye mɔawɛ a!”
24Banɔkɔɛ̃ a vɛ onyole a kĩ bɛma ɔnɛkunɛ a lɛyade ade bibi ye kĩ, “Lɛ ɔnɔkɔali a nɛ Baguma anɛ! Bunyina kĩ onyole a kĩ ɛtsa nɔ a nyɛ tɔkpa ɔkɛnanɛ.”
25Onyole a lɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ ɛnyɛ tɔkpa ɔkɛnanɛ o-o, ĩye ɛnyɛ́ tɔkpa ɔkɛnanɛ o-o, ĩnyína. Lɛtsa mɔapɛ kĩ ĩnyina nyɛ kĩ ĩnya tɔ̃ ɔnɛkunɛ, lɛmɛ finyaa mamɔ fɔkɔ.”
26Banɔkɔɛ̃ a via ye kĩ, “Litsa ɛkɛna nɔ? Nde ɛkɛna ebinya nɔ anɛ?”
27Ɛkpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Mbi mi foe kɔkɔɛ lɛmɛ miáwɛ kĩ miatse foe. Nde sũ miawɛ kĩ miabuki mitse foe? Mbɔɛɛ mi malo miawɛ kĩ minya ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ?”
28Bivũna ye bɛlɛ kĩ, “Nɔ odi nyɛ ye fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ, lɛmɛ boe kɔ̃ Mose fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ bɔanɛ. 29Bunyina kĩ Baguma bi Mose fɔlɛtsa, lɛmɛ oti a naa kɔ̃ bunyína awã kĩ eto malo!”
30Ade onyole a bi be kĩ, “Litsa awãwã fɔlɛtsa a? Minyína awã kĩ eto, lɛmɛ ade ye libinya yĩ anɛ a! 31Bunyina kĩ Baguma látse tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ, lɛmɛ yatse bati a kĩ bakpa ye obu, kakɛna nɛ ye yawɛ akũ a. 32Kito anɛ katinya kayɔkayi a, bɔtánu tɔ̃ kĩ odi puli ebinya oti kĩ bɛma ɔnɛkunɛ anɛ. 33Ntɛ ɛtato Baguma sɛkɛ̃ ni, kufɛ ɛláapuli ɛkɛna lɛtsama.”
34Banɔkɔɛ̃ a via ye kĩ, “Katsa atsa kĩ nɔ a kĩ bɛma bɛdɔɔla nɛ tɔkpa kamɛ a, nɔ mbom awɛ kĩ atsa boe fɔtsa?” Ade bɛblɔmɛna ye nɛ Yudafɔ katsɛnakɔ̃ a.
Yesu Tsá Bati a Kĩ Biku Anɛ Nɛ Hũhũ Kamɛ.
35Yesu nu kĩ bɛblɔmɛna onyole a nɛ be kamɛ, foesũ kĩ ɛmɔ́ onyole a, evia ye kĩ, “Ɔtɛ Otidziwa Obi a odo?”
36Onyole a kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃, bi yĩ oti a kĩ yanɛ, ayekĩ maapuli ntɛ ye ndo!”
37Ade Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Ɔmɔ́ ye kɔkɔɛ, ade ye nyɛ oti a kĩ ɛlamɛna kɔdzɛla kalɛ mɔ nɔ finyaakĩĩ a.”
38Onyole a lɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, ntɛ ndo!” Ade ke eke aduli nɛ Yesu anɛ a. 39Yesu lɛ kĩ, “Ĩya nɛ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ kĩ mayaadzɛmɔ bati, ayekĩ banɛkunɛ aamɔ fɔkɔ, ade bikĩ bamɔ fɔkɔ a aadani banɛkunɛ.”
40Farisifɔ a kĩ bɛdzɛ̃ nɛ awã a badi nu lɛtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ a, ade bivia ye kĩ, “Katsa atsa kĩ boe malo banɛkunɛ bɔanɛ mbɔɛɛ?”
41Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ kaku mi anɛ eku ni, kufɛ bɛláakɔ mi kɔtɔ, lɛmɛ kĩ mialɛ kĩ miamɔ fɔkɔ sũ ni, tɔkpa deĩ nɛ mi akũ.”

Title: YOHANES 10
Content:
Yesu Bɔa Lɛgbã Nɛ Baveli Ɔkpãnɛ Akũ.
1Yesu lɛ kĩ, “Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ, oti kĩ ɛtátsã onyukpɛ̃ a ewo nɛ baveli kɔbã kamɛ, mbom ede ɛtsã kɔbã a akũ ewo ni, ɛnyɛ oyekpanɛ mɔ ɔblɔfɔ. 2Oti a kĩ ɛtsã kɔbã onyukpɛ̃ ewo a nyɛ baveli ɔkpãnɛ a. 3Ade ye mɔ kɔbã onyukpɛ̃ ɔdzɔlɛnɛ a abinya kakpa ye, ade baveli a anu ye odo a. Yavɛ ye bade a buĩ a kĩ ete be a, kakpã be kanɛmɛna kanya. 4Ntɛ ɛkpã be ɛnɛmɛna a, yanya be lɔtɔ, ade baveli a atomɔ ye, kitonɛkĩ binyina ye odo. 5Bɛláatomɔ oti bɛbã, mbom baalo nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃, kitonɛkĩ binyína ye odo.”
6Yesu bɔa be lɛgbã kĩĩ, lɛmɛ bɛtánu lɛtsa a kĩ yatsa a kayɔ.
Yesu Nyɛ́ Baveli Ɔkpãnɛ Wĩ a.
7Nɛ foesũ Yesu buki ɛlɛ kĩ, “Mabi mi ɔnɔkɔali a kĩ yĩ nyɛ baveli a kɔbã onyukpɛ̃ a. 8Bati bɛbã a kĩ bɛnya yĩ lɔtɔ bɛya flee a nyɛ bayekpanɛ mɔ bablɔfɔ, foesũ baveli a tátse be fɔlɛtsa. 9Yĩ nyɛ kɔbã onyukpɛ̃ a. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtsã yĩ akũ ewo ni, yaana katɛ. Yaawo ɛnɛ, ade yaana funitsã kanyakɔ̃ a. 10Oyekpanɛ aya kĩ yayaaye, edi awu, ebula fɔtsa kade. Yĩ kɔ̃ ĩya ayekĩ bati aana nkpã kĩ ɛkpɔla nɛ osi nyɛ osi akũ.
11“Yĩ nyɛ baveli ɔkpãnɛ wĩ a, baveli ɔkpãnɛ wĩ a akɔa ye nkpã kakpa nɛ baveli a lɔlɔ. 12Ntɛ ɔpaani kĩ ɛnyɛ́ baveli ɔkpãnɛ, ade ɛnyɛ́ baveli a ɔlate lɛmɛ mɔ́ kalikii kaya ni, yalo kafɔnɛ baveli a. Foesũ kalikii a apili baveli a kapansam be. 13Ɔpaani a alo kadzakũ kitonɛkĩ kabɔɛ bɛbɔɛ ye kĩ ɛkɛna adzuma a, ade ɛtsɛ́la baveli a lɛtsama akũ a.
14-15“Yĩ nyɛ baveli ɔkpãnɛ wĩ a. Ndɛ ayekĩ Nda nyina yĩ, yĩ malo ĩnyina Nda a ni, ade aye ĩnyina yĩ mɔawɛ baveli ade be malo binyina yĩ a. Nkɔa yĩ nkpã nkpa nɛ be lɔlɔ. 16Ndeĩ baveli bɛbã kĩ bɛláa baveli kɔbã kĩĩ kamɛ. Kɛnɛ kĩ nkpã be malo ĩyamɛna, bitse yĩ odo lɔkɔa be flee baanya baveli katsu mɔa, bɛna nɛ baveli ɔkpãnɛ mɔa kayɔ.
17“Nda awɛ yĩ kalɛ, kitonɛkĩ nkɔa yĩ nkpã nkpa, kĩ maabuki ntɛ ye. 18Odima lɛláatɛ ye nɛ yĩ awɛ, mbom yĩ mɔawɛ lɛkɔa ye nkpa. Ndeĩ osi kĩ makɔa ye nkpa, ade ndeĩ osi kĩ mabuki ntɛ ye a. Ade lɛtsa a kĩ Nda do yĩ kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ nkɛna a.”
19Nɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ sũ kasɛ̃ buki kiwo nɛ Yudafɔ a kamɛ. 20Be pii, bɛkalɛ kĩ, “Hũhũ kpa deĩ nɛ ye kamɛ! Ye lɔlɔ kamɛ bu kade! Nde sũ koũ miatse ye?”
21Lɛmɛ babɛbã lɛ kĩ, “Oti kĩ hũhũ kpa deĩ nɛ ye kamɛ lɛláapuli ɛlɛ kɔdzɛla lɔmɔ! Nde koũ hũhũ kpa aapuli ebinya banɛkunɛ anɛ?”
Yudafɔ a Sĩ Yesu.
22Osili lɔkɔ wo ɔtɔ, ade Yudafɔ kanya Baguma Asɔli Kɔla Akũ kakpalɛ Luwi nɛ Yerusalem a. 23Yesu kamini nɛ Baguma Asɔli Kɔla a kakɔ a kĩ bavɛ Salomo Ablanda a kamɛ. 24Ade Yudafɔ a nakpɔta nɛ ye akũ, ade bivia ye kĩ, “Nde sũ ɔfɔ̃ bɔlamɛna anɛ kadã kavia? Ntɛ nɔ nyɛ Kristo a ni, bi boe ɔnɔkɔali a faa.”
25Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Mbi mi kɔkɔɛ, lɛmɛ miátɛ yĩ mido. Fɔtsa a kĩ makɛna nɛ Nda kɔbɛ̃ akũ a, adi yĩ akũ adansiɛ. 26Lɛmɛ miátɛ kado kitonɛkĩ minyɛ́ yĩ baveli. 27Yĩ baveli atse yĩ ɔlɛdo, ĩnyina be ade batomɔ yĩ a. 28Makpa be nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a, ade bɛláaku bɛwɔ da. Odima lɛláapuli ɛwãnɛ be ɛtɛ nɛ yĩ awɛ. 29Fɔtsa a kĩ Nda kɔa edo nɛ yĩ awɛ a deĩ kɔbɛ̃ fɔbɛ̃ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa, ade odima lɛláapuli ɛwãnɛ foe ɛtɛ nɛ Nda awɛ a. 30Bɔmɔ́ Nda ni, ɔmɔa bɔanɛ.”
31Foesũ Yudafɔ a buki bifila boe kĩ batalɛ Yesu. 32Ade Yesu bi be kĩ, “Nkɛna fɔtsa wĩ pii kĩ Nda do yĩ kĩ nkɛna nɛ mi anɛ. Foe kamɛ fɔɔdabe sũ miawɛ kĩ miatalɛ yĩ boe?”
33Bɛkpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Nnɛ́ fɔtsa wĩ a kĩ ɔkɛna a sũ bɔawɛ kĩ bɔatalɛ nɔ boe, mbom nɛ mbusuo fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ɔlɛ a sũ! Otidziwa kɛkɛ anɛ, lɛmɛ awɛ kĩ akɛna nɔ akũ Baguma!”
34Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ mi mbla ovoli a kamɛ kĩ Baguma lɛ kĩ, ‘Minyɛ baguma amɛ.’ 35Bunyina kĩ lɛtsa a kĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa lɛ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali daa. Baguma vɛ bati a kĩ ɛkpa be ye ɔlɛdo a kĩ baguma amɛ. 36Yĩ kɔ̃, Ɔlɛga a lɛpau yĩ edo yĩ nɛ katinya kamɛ. Lɔkɔa nde sũ miti mialɛ kĩ nlɛ fubusuotsa nɛ ayekĩ nlɛ kĩ Baguma Obi manɛ a sũ? 37Foesũ ntɛ nlámɛna fɔtsa a kĩ Nda do yĩ kĩ nkɛna a kakɛna ni, mitatɛ yĩ mido. 38Lɛmɛ ntɛ makɛna foe, titɔ kĩ miátɛ yĩ kado malo ni, mitɛ fɔtsa a kĩ makɛna a mido, ayekĩ míanyi, minu foe kayɔ yededeede kĩ Ɔlɛga a deĩ nɛ yĩ kamɛ ade yĩ malo ndeĩ nɛ Ɔlɛga a kamɛ a.”
39Yudafɔ a buki bɛwɛ kĩ bapi Yesu, lɛmɛ ɛnɛ́ nɛ be kamɛ ɛdzakũ.
40Ade Yesu muniki enyina Yordan Ɔwɔ a ɛnaa awã kĩ Yohanes wɔla bati mui tɔ̃ a, ɛnadzi nɛ awã. 41Bati pii ya nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃, ade bɛlɛ kĩ, “Yohanes tákɛna awãwã fɔtsa fudima, lɛmɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ nɛ oti kĩĩ akũ a flee nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali.” 42Bati pii nɛ awã tɛ ye bido.

Title: YOHANES 11
Content:
Lazaro Wuda.
1Onyole odi kĩ bavɛ Lazaro kasɔ. Eto Betania, ɔmatɔ a kĩ bawaɛ̃tsole nviã Maria mɔ Marta dzi a kamɛ. 2Ade Maria kĩĩ lɛkɔa kugua mɔ ɔlɛ̃ eko nɛ boe Ɔlate fɔnɛta, ɛkɔa ye lɔlɔ tɔlɔ ɛyɔ foe a. Ye ɔwaɛ̃nyole nyɛ Lazaro kĩ yasɔ a. 3Bawaɛ̃tsole a do lɔtɔ nɛ Yesu sɛkɛ̃ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, nɔ ɔkɔba a kĩ aátunɔ ye kalɛ a asɔ.”
4Kĩ Yesu nu fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a, ɛlɛ kĩ, “Fɔsɔ kĩĩ lɛnyɛ wuda fɔsɔ, mbom fɔnyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ baatsã foe akũ bɛdɛla Baguma dĩ nɛ ode, ade baadɛla Baguma Obi a lɛmɛ dĩ nɛ ode a.” 5Yesu awɛ Marta, mɔ ɔwaɛ̃tsole mɔ Lazaro kalɛ. 6Lɛmɛ kĩ Yesu nu Lazaro fɔsɔ a, ebuki ɛkahɔ nɛ awã kĩ edeĩ a fuwi nviã.
7Ke liti a, ebi ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ, “Mifɔ̃ bumuniki bɔnaa Yudea.”
8Ade ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a bi ye kĩ, “Fɔtsa ɔtsanɛ, wádzɔ nɛ awĩ mɔ Yudafɔ a wɛ kĩ batalɛ nɔ boe, mɔ obuki anaa awã a?”
9Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Nnɛ́ dɔũhuilɛ ewua-nviã deĩ nɛ kade kanyina kamɛ? Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtsɛ̃ nɛ suwa ni, ɛláatula kitonɛkĩ katinya kamɛ ɔhaĩ a afɔ̃ yamɔ fɔkɔ. 10Lɛmɛ ntɛ odi tsɛ̃ nɛ lɛnyɛ ni, yatula kitonɛkĩ ɔhaĩ lɛláa.”
11Kĩ Yesu lɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ eyua a, ebuki ɛlɛ kĩ, “Boe ɔkɔba Lazaro wa tida, lɛmɛ maanaadzɛla ye.”
12Ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, ntɛ tida ɛwaa kɔ̃ ni, yaasaɛ.” 13Lɛtsa a kĩ Yesu atsa a nyɛ kĩ Lazaro ku, lɛmɛ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kɔ̃ kɔna kĩ tida pupulidza kawa ɛlɛ.
14Foesũ Yesu binya ebi be pefee kĩ, “Lazaro ku. 15Lɛmɛ nɛ mi sũ ni, kawɔlɛ de yĩ kĩ ntána nɛ awã ayekĩ míatɛ mido. Mifɔ̃ bɔnaa ye sɛkɛ̃.”
16Ade Toma kĩ bavɛ Ata a bi ye bakɔba fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ, “Mifɔ̃ boe malo butomɔ Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ a bɔnaa, bɔnaaku mɔ ye!”
Yesu Nyɛ́ Kayidza Kadzi Nkpã Mɔ Nkpã a.
17Kĩ Yesu wo awã a, ɛmɔ́ kĩ fɔtɛ fuwi ɛna kĩ bibila Lazaro. 18Kito Betania kɛnaa Yerusalem aana ndɛ fusikũ nviã, 19ade Yudafɔ pii ya kĩ bayaadzam Maria mɔ Marta nɛ be ɔwaɛ̃nyole wuda a sũ.
20Kĩ Marta nu kĩ Yesu aya a, ɛnɛ́ ɛnaatsɛlamɔ ye, lɛmɛ Maria kɔ̃ kahɔ nɛ tɔtɔ kamɛ. 21Ade Marta bi Yesu kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, ntɛ kana ɔna nɛ awĩ kufɛ nwaɛ̃nyole táku! 22Lɛmɛ ĩnyina kĩ finyaa malo Baguma aakpa nɔ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ ovia ye.”
23Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Awaɛ̃nyole a aabuki eyidza edzi nkpã.”
24Ade Marta bi ye kĩ, “Ĩnyina kĩ yaabuki eyidza edzi nkpã nɛ Luwi Nkaɛ a kĩ banɔkpa aayidza a akũ.”
25Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Yĩ nyɛ kayidza kadzi nkpã mɔ nkpã a. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ yĩ edo, ntɛ eku malo ni, yaayidza edzi nkpã. 26Odi nyɛ odi kĩ edzi nkpã mɔ́ ɛtɛ yĩ edo ni, ɛláaku da. Ɔtɛ fukĩĩ odo?”
27Marta kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Oo, boe Ɔlate! Ntɛ ndo kĩ nɔ nyɛ Kristo a, Baguma Obi a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi kĩ yaaya nɛ katinya kamɛ a.”
Yesu Be.
28Kĩ Marta lɛ fukĩĩ eyua a, emuniki ɛnaa kɔla ɛnavɛ ɔwaɛ̃tsole Maria pɛtɛɛ. Ebi ye kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ a ya nɛ awĩ, ade evia nɔ akũ a.” 29Kĩ Maria nu foe pɛ, ɛta eyidza ewula atsɛ ɛnaatsɛlamɔ ye. 30Nɛ lɔkɔ a naa Yesu táwo tɔ̃ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ, mbom ebuki ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ awã kĩ Marta yatsɛlamɔ ye a. 31Kĩ bati a kĩ bideĩ nɛ tɔtɔ kamɛ bɛkadzam Maria a mɔ́ kĩ ɛta eyidza ɛnɛ a, bitomɔ ye, kitonɛkĩ bɛkɔna kĩ yanaa linikɛ a ɔwɛ̃ ɛnaabe.
32Maria yawo awã kĩ Yesu dzɛ̃ a, ade kĩ esila ɛmɔ́ ye pɛ ɛtɔ nɛ Yesu abɔa kamɛ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, ntɛ ɔna nɛ awĩ kufɛ nwaɛ̃nyole a táku.”
33Kĩ Yesu mɔ́ ayekĩ ɛkabe, mɔ ayekĩ bati a kĩ bitomɔ ye kabe a, fɔkɛna adzuma nɛ ye kamɛ ade ɛwɛya eke hũũ a. 34Evia be kĩ, “Nɛ ndia mibila ye?”
Bɛkpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, yaadã.”
35Nɛ awã naa, Yesu be.
36Ade Yudafɔ a lɛ kĩ, “Midã tɔ̃ ayekĩ yawɛ ye kalɛ!”
37Lɛmɛ badi lɛ kĩ, “Ebinya ɔnɛkunɛ anɛ. Kapuli ɛláapuli ɛfɔ̃ kĩ onyole kĩĩ ɛtaku?”
Yesu Dzɛla Lazaro Etomɛna Kanɔkpa.
38Kalɔɛ a buki kɛna nɛ Yesu kamɛ ade ɛnaa linikɛ a ɔwɛ̃ a. Linikɛ a nyɛ de ɔkɛ kĩ bɛkɔa de bisua de onukpɛ̃. 39Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mibɔɛ de a nɛ lɛkɛ a onukpɛ̃.”
Ade Marta, ɔnɔkpa a ɔwaɛ̃tsole, bi Yesu kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, finyaa kɔ̃ edo kakũ awɛ, kitonɛkĩ ade fuwi ɛna kĩ bibila ye a.”
40Yesu bi Marta kĩ, “Mbɔɛɛ ntábi nɔ kĩ ntɛ ɔtɛ odo ni, aamɔ Baguma kukũkpalɛ a?”
41Bati a bɔɛ de a bɛnyɛ. Yesu dɛla anɛ nɛ ode ɛlɛ kĩ, “Nda, manyɛ nɔ kɔlɛ kĩ atse yĩ. 42Ĩnyina kĩ atse yĩ daa, lɛmɛ bikĩ bɛdzɛ̃ nɛ awĩ a sũ malɛ fukĩĩ, ayekĩ baatɛ bido kĩ nɔ lido yĩ.”
43Kĩ ɛlɛ fukĩĩ eyua a, ɛbɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba kĩ, “Lazaro, nɛ́ kaya!” 44Ade ɔnɔkpa a nɛ́ ɛya a. Lima a kĩ bɛkɔa bisuli ye akpɔ mɔ abɔa a buki lɛna nɛ ye akũ, ade duku a kĩ bɛkɔa bisuli ye anɛ a lɛmɛ na nɛ ye akũ a.
Yesu bi be kĩ, “Miwũnya tilima a nɛ ye akũ mifɔ̃ ɛnaa.”
Yudafɔ a Nasui Kĩ Baakɔ Yesu.
45Yudafɔ a kĩ bɛya nɛ Maria sɛkɛ̃ mɔ́ lɛtsa a kĩ Yesu kɛna a, ade be pii tɛ ye bido a. 46Lɛmɛ be kamɛ badi muniki bɛnaa Farisifɔ a sɛkɛ̃ bɛnabi be lɛtsa a kĩ Yesu kɛna a. 47Foesũ Farisifɔ a mɔ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a natsa fɔlɔ mɔ Yudafɔ ɔmaĩ banɔkɔɛ̃ a ade bɛlɛ kĩ, “Litsa bɔ́akɛna? Kitonɛkĩ oti kĩĩ lamɛna awãwã fɔtsa pii kakɛna! 48Ntɛ bɔkpa ye osi lɔmɔ ni, odi nyɛ odi aayatɛ ye edo, ade Roma abãã ayabubuli boe Asɔli Kɔla a, ɛwɔla boe ɔmaĩ lɛmɛ.”
49Be kamɛ ɔmɔa kĩ bavɛ Kaiafa, kĩ ɛnyɛ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee nɛ kateli a na kamɛ a bi be kĩ, “Minyína lɛtsama kɔlaa! 50Minyína kĩ fɔnɛnɛ fɔkpa mi kĩ oti mɔa aaku nɛ bati a flee lɔlɔ kɛba kĩ baawɔla ɔmaĩ a flee a?”
51Nnɛ́ ye mɔawɛ kakɔna ɛkɔa ɛlɛ fukĩĩ, mbom ndɛ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee nɛ kateli a kamɛ ni, ɛlɛ eyi kĩ Yesu aaku nɛ Yudafɔ a lɔlɔ. 52Nnɛ́ Yudafɔ a odi yaku ɛkpa, mbom kĩ yaakpɔta Baguma bade a kĩ bɛgba biko nɛ katinya kamɛ a bɛkɛna ɔmɔa.
53Kito luwi a kanaa a, Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ kapi adzuni kĩ baakɔ Yesu. 54Nɛ foesũ Yesu tábuki ɛkanɛ kanya Yudafɔ a lɛmɔ ye. Ɛdzakũ ɛnaa ɔmatɔ odi kĩ bavɛ Efrayim kamɛ nɛ kɔsa kudi kamɛ, ade awã bɛmɔ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a bidzi nɛ awã a.
55Finyaa Yudafɔ Wuda Katɛ̃ luwi kanya a fuã, ade bati pii to ɔmaĩ a fɔkɔ kumɛkumɛ bɛya nɛ Yerusalem, kĩ bayaakpalɛ be akũ fɔmɔ luwi a aawo ɔtɔ. 56Kĩ bɛna nɛ Asɔli Kɔla kamɛ a, bɛkawɛ Yesu, ade bɛkavia akũ kĩ, “Nde akɔna? Mbɔɛɛ ɛláaya nɛ luwi a kanyakɔ̃?” 57Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ a, basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ Farisifɔ a si mbla kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ enyina awã kĩ Yesu deĩ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ ɛyaakpa kanyi lɔkɔa bɛnaapi ye.

Title: YOHANES 12
Content:
Maria Tsɛla Yesu Kugua Mɔ Ɔlɛ̃ Nɛ Betania.
1Kĩ kite fuwi evũ kĩ banya Wuda Katɛ̃ Luwi a, Yesu naa Betania, Lazaro ɔtɔ, awã kĩ ɛdzɛla ye etomɛna kanɔkpa a. 2Bɛtɔ olobe funitsã bɛkpa ye nɛ awã. Marta sum nɛ opunu akũ, ade Lazaro lɛmɛ na nɛ bati a kĩ bidzi bɛkanya mɔ Yesu a kamɛ a. 3Ade Maria bɔɛ kugua mɔ ɔlɛ̃ baũ, kĩ bavɛ koe nard, kĩ kudeĩ kɔya paa lita sɛkɛ ɛyatsɛla Yesu fɔnɛta, ade ɛkɔa ye lɔlɔ tɔlɔ ɛyɔ foe akũ a. Kugua a ɔlɛ̃ tɛ tɔtɔ a flee kamɛ.
4Ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kamɛ ɔmɔa, Yuda Iskariot, kĩ ye aanyɛ Yesu ɛkpa a lɛ kĩ, 5“Nde sũ bɛtánɔ kugua kĩĩ sika ovoe ɔha ɛlalɛ lɔkɔa bɛkɔa sɛ bɛkpa ahiãfɔ?” 6Nnɛ́ kĩ ɛtsɛla ahiãfɔ akũ sũ ɛlɛ fukĩĩ, mbom oyekpanɛ yanɛ. Ye nɛɛ sika kuvũ a ade yado awɛ nɛ koe kamɛ a.
7Ade Yesu lɛ kĩ, “Mifɔnɛ ye awɛ! Mifɔ̃ ɛmanɛ koe eyi ɛkpa yĩ kabila. 8Ahiãfɔ deĩ nɛ mi kamɛ luwi nyɛ luwi, lɛmɛ yĩ kɔ̃ nláana nɛ mi kamɛ daa.”
Yudafɔ a Sui Nɛ Lazaro Akũ.
9Yudafɔ pii nu kĩ Yesu deĩ nɛ Betania, foesũ bɛya nɛ awã. Nnɛ́ Yesu odi sũ bɛya, mbom kĩ bayaadã Lazaro a kĩ Yesu dzɛla etomɛna kanɔkpa a. 10Nɛ foesũ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a pi adzuni kĩ baakɔ Lazaro lɛmɛ, 11kitonɛkĩ ye sũ Yudafɔ a pii kasĩ be kanaatɛ Yesu kado.
Yesu Wo Nɛ Yerusalem Ɔmatɔ a Kamɛ Mɔ Osee Katu.
12Kĩ kade nyina a, bati kɔdabu a kĩ bɛya nɛ Wuda Katɛ̃ Luwi kanyakɔ̃ a nu kĩ Yesu aya nɛ Yerusalem. 13Foesũ bɛbɔɛ tuko bɛnɛ kĩ banaatsɛlamɔ ye, ade bɛkabɔa fɔwɔla kĩ,
“Mimu Baguma!
Baguma hila oti a kĩ yaya nɛ boe Ɔlate dĩ akũ a!
Baguma hila Israel Lɛgã a!”
14Yesu mɔ́ aflimu adi, ade ede edzi nɛ ye akũ ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ,
15“Zion ɔmatɔ, tavila!
Amɔ nɔ Lɛgã kĩ laya!
Edzi nɛ aflimu obi akũ.”
16Ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a tánu fukĩĩ kayɔ nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ, lɛmɛ kĩ Baguma dzɛla Yesu ɛkpalɛ ye akũ a, bɛyate anɛ kĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bɛkɛna bɛkpa ye a nɛ ye akũ.
17Bati a kĩ bɛna nɛ Yesu sɛkɛ̃, nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ ɛvɛ Lazaro etomɛna linikɛ kamɛ edzi nkpã a, di adansiɛ nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya a akũ. 18Ade fukĩĩ sũ bati kɔdabu a natsɛlɛmɔ Yesu a, kitonɛkĩ binu kĩ ɛkɛna awãwã fɔtsa kĩĩ. 19Foesũ Farisifɔ a bi akũ kĩ, “Midã kĩ bɔlámɔ kadzakɔ̃ kana kɔlaa. Midã, katinya kamɛ bati a flee nɛ́ bitomɔ ye!”
Helafɔ Badi Wɛ Kĩ Bamɔ Yesu.
20Helafɔ badi na nɛ bati a kĩ bɛnaa Yerusalem kĩ baasum Baguma nɛ luwi a kanya kamɛ a kamɛ. 21Ade bɛnaa Filipo, kĩ eto Betsaida a nɛ Galilea sɛkɛ̃, ade bibi ye kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃, bɔawɛ kĩ bɔamɔ Yesu.” 22Filipo nabi Andrea, ade be nviã a bɛnabi Yesu a.
23Ade Yesu bi be kĩ, “Finyaa kɔ̃ lɔkɔ a wo ɔtɔ kĩ baadɛla Otidziwa Obi a nɛ ode. 24Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ ntɛ ligbanɔbi táwo nɛ tite kamɛ lɛvɔ̃ ni, libi mɔapɛ keĩ a lanɛ, lɛmɛ ntɛ lɛvɔ̃ ni, lado babi beblebee. 25Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ ye nkpã kalɛ ni, yaayɛla ye, lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ekesĩ ye nkpã nɛ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ ni, ɛkɔla ye ɛkpa nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna a. 26Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ kĩ yasum yĩ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ etomɔ yĩ, kitonɛkĩ awã kĩ ndeĩ a, ade awã yĩ ɔsumunɛ lɛmɛ ana a. Ade Nda aado obu nɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yasum yĩ akũ.
Yesu Lɛ Kɔdzɛla Nɛ Ye Wuda Akũ.
27“Yĩ ɔwɔlɛ aha yĩ finyaa. Lɛmɛ litsa maalɛ? Kalɛ maalɛ kĩ, ‘Nda, nyɛ yĩ katomɛna lubo kamɔ lɔkɔ kĩĩ kamɛ mbɔɛɛ’? Oowo, ade foesũ ĩya nɛ katinya kamɛ a, ayekĩ maatsã lubo kamɔ lɔkɔ kĩĩ kamɛ. 28Nda, do nɔ dĩ akũ obu.”
Adeke odo odi to ode ɛlɛ kĩ, “Ndo de obu kɔkɔɛ, ade maabuki ndo de a.”
29Bati kɔdabu a kĩ bɛdzɛ̃ nɛ awã nu odo a, ade be kamɛ badi lɛ kĩ, ɔplala lɛnyɛ onukpɛ̃, lɛmɛ badi lɛ kĩ, “Ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ odi lɛlɛ kɔdzɛla mɔ ye!”
30Lɛmɛ Yesu bi be kĩ, “Nnɛ́ yĩ sũ odo a lɛ́ kɔdzɛla, mbom mi sũ.
31“Finyaa nyɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ Baguma aadzɛmɔ katinya kamɛ. Finyaa mɔ baablɔmɛna katinya kĩĩ kamɛ akũ ɔnyanɛ a. 32Ntɛ bɛdɛla yĩ nɛ ode nɛ asendua akũ ni, maavɛlɛ bati flee ĩyamɛna nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃.” 33Yesu lɛ fukĩĩ yakɔa ɛtsa wuda odu a kĩ yaaku.
34Adeke bati kɔdabu a kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Boe Mbla Ovoli a atsa boe kĩ Kristo a aadzi nkpã daa. Nde fɔya mɔ alɛ kĩ baadɛla Otidziwa Obi a nɛ ode nɛ asendua akũ? Owei nyɛ Otidziwa Obi kĩĩ a?”
35Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ɔhaĩ a aabuki ɛna nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ lɔkɔ lukũ lidi pɛ. Lɔkɔ kĩ ɔhaĩ a deĩ nɛ mi kamɛ ni, mitsã nɛ ye kamɛ ayekĩ ɔtũ lɛláake edo mi, kitonɛkĩ oti kĩ ɛtsɛ̃ nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ linyína awã kĩ yanaa. 36Kĩ ɔhaĩ a deĩ nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ kĩĩ ni, mitɛ ɔhaĩ mido ayekĩ míakɛna ɔhaĩ a kamɛ bati.”
Bati a Katatɛ Kado.
Kĩ Yesu lɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ eyua a, ɛdzakũ nɛ be sɛkɛ̃ ɛnabɛla.
37Titɔ kĩ Yesu kɛna awãwã fɔtsa kĩĩ flee nɛ be anɛ kamɛ malo ni, bɛtátɛ ye bido.
38Ayekĩ lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma Onukpɛ̃ Ɔnyɛnɛ Yesaya lɛ eyi a, aaya nɛ foe kamɛ kĩ,
“Boe Ɔlate, owei lɛtɛ nɔ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɔlɛ a edo?
Owei ɛnyɛ ye kɔbɛ̃ ɛtsa?”
39Nɛ foesũ bɛtápuli bɛtɛ bido, kitonɛkĩ Yesaya buki ɛlɛ kĩ,
40“Baguma kɔ be anɛ ade esua be adzuni
ayekĩ be anɛ lɛláamɔ fɔkɔ,
ade be adzuni lɛláanu fɔlɛtsa kayɔ a.
Baguma lɛ kĩ, ‘Bɛláamuniki bɛya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ lɔkɔa ntsa be.’ ”
41Yesaya lɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kitonɛkĩ ɛmɔ́ Yesu kukũkpalɛ a, ade ɛlɛ kalɛ nɛ foe akũ eyi a.
42Titɔ kĩ fɔla lɔmɔ malo a, Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a pii tɛ Yesu bido, lɛmɛ nɛ Farisifɔ a sũ bɛtálɛ foe akũ kɔdzɛla nɛ kanade, ayekĩ bɛláablɔmɛna be nɛ be katsɛnakɔ̃ a. 43Kitonɛkĩ bawɛ kĩ batidziwa bimu be kɛba kĩ Baguma aamu be.
Yesu Fɔlɛtsa a Aakɔ Bati Kɔtɔ.
44Ade Yesu bɔa fɔwɔla ɛlɛ kĩ, “Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ yĩ edo ni, nnɛ́ yĩ odi ɛtɛ edo, mbom mɔ oti a kĩ edo yĩ a ɛtɛ edo. 45Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yamɔ yĩ ni, yamɔ oti a kĩ edo yĩ a lɛmɛ. 46Ĩya nɛ katinya kamɛ ndɛ ɔhaĩ aye, ayekĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ yĩ edo ni, ɛláana nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ.
47“Ntɛ odi nu yĩ fɔlɛtsa a mɔ́ ɛtákɛna nɛ foe akũ ni, nláadzɛmɔ ye. Ntáya kĩ mayaadzɛmɔ katinya kamɛ bati, mbom ĩya kĩ mayaanyɛ be. 48Oti a kĩ esĩ yĩ, kĩ ɛtátɛ yĩ fɔlɛtsa a deĩ oti kĩ yaadzɛmɔ ye. Fɔlɛtsa a kĩ nlɛ a aadzɛmɔ ye nɛ luwi nkaɛ a akũ! 49Fukĩĩ nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali, kitonɛkĩ ntálɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ yĩ mɔawɛ otumi akũ, mbom Nda a kĩ edo yĩ a lɛkpa yĩ otumi kĩ nlɛ kɔdzɛla, nlɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ nlɛ a. 50Ade ĩnyina kĩ ye mbla a akpa nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a. Nɛ foesũ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ malɛ a nyɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩ Nda bi yĩ kĩ nlɛ.”

Title: YOHANES 13
Content:
Yesu Vɔlɛ Ye Fɔtsa Bakɔlɛnɛ a Abɔa.
1Luwi a kĩ lɛnyaa Wuda Katɛ̃ Luwi lɔtɔ a, Yesu nyi kĩ lɔkɔ kpɔla ye kĩ yaadzakũ nɛ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ ɛnaa Ɔlɛga sɛkɛ̃. Ɛwɛ bikĩ bɛnyɛ ye bade nɛ katinya kamɛ a kalɛ, ade ɛwɛ be kalɛ kɛnawo kawũnakɔ̃ a.
2Yesu mɔ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a dzi nɛ opunu akũ bɛkanya olobe funitsã. Abonsam kɔa edo nɛ Yuda kĩ ɛnyɛ Simon Iskariot obi a adzuni kamɛ kɔkɔɛ kĩ ɛnyɛ Yesu ɛkpa. 3Yesu nyina kĩ Ɔlɛga kpa ye kɔbɛ̃ flee. Enyina kĩ Baguma sɛkɛ̃ eto ɛya, ade Baguma sɛkɛ̃ yaabuki ɛnaa a. 4Foesũ eyidza nɛ opunu a akũ, ɛnyɛ ye atadiɛ wulaa eyi nɛ ɔɔwɛ̃, ade ɛkɔa ɔsa efili nɛ kate a. 5Ke liti a, eko mui nɛ lɔɔda kamɛ, eyi ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a abɔa kavɔlɛ kayɔ, ade ɛkɔa ɔsa a kĩ efili nɛ kate a ɛyɔ mui a. 6Kĩ ewo Petro sɛkɛ̃ a, Petro bi ye kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, ayaavɔlɛ yĩ abɔa?”
7Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Finyaa ɔláanu lɛtsa a kĩ makɛna a kayɔ, lɛmɛ ke liti aanu foe kayɔ.”
8Petro bi ye kĩ, “Owoo, ɔláavɔlɛ yĩ abɔa da.”
Ade Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Ntɛ ntávɔlɛ nɔ abɔa ni, ke kɔ̃ ɔláabuki ɔnya yĩ fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ.”
9Petro kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, ntɛ aye kɔ̃ ni, tavɔlɛ yĩ abɔa odi, mbom vɔlɛ yĩ awɛ mɔ lɔlɔ lɛmɛ!”
10Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Oti kĩ ewo mui ɛnɛ́ yededeede tábuki esĩ ɛkpa mui kawo, kɛba abɔa odi kavɔlɛ. Mi kɔ̃ mi flee akũ nɛ́, mbɔɛntɛ oti mɔapɛ.” 11Yesu nyina oti a kĩ yaanyɛ ye ɛkpa a kɔkɔɛ, ade foesũ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Mi a flee akũ nɛ́, mbɔɛntɛ oti mɔapɛ a.”
12Kĩ Yesu vɔlɛ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a abɔa eyua a, ɛbɔɛ ye atadiɛ wulaa a edo, emuniki ɛnadzi nɛ ye kadzikɔ̃ nɛ opunu akũ. Evia ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ, “Minu lɛtsa a kĩ nkɛna nkpa mi a finyaa kayɔ mbɔɛɛ? 13Miavɛ yĩ kĩ Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ mɔ Ɔlate. Ade aye fɔla pɛpɛɛpɛ a, kitonɛkĩ ade lɛtsa a kĩ manɛ a. 14Yĩ a kĩ ĩnyɛ mi Ɔlate mɔ Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ a, lɛvɔlɛ mi abɔa finyaa, foesũ kɛnɛ kĩ miavɔlɛ akũ akũ abɔa. 15Nfantuhũ fɔanɛ nkpa mi kĩ mi malo mikɛna lɛtsa mɔapɛ a kĩ nkɛna nkpa mi a. 16Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ ɔsumunɛ lɛbɛ́ ye ɔlate, ade ayea fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ lɛbɛ́ oti a kĩ edo ye fɔtɔ a. 17Finyaa, kĩ minyi ɔnɔkɔali kĩĩ a, Baguma aahila mi ntɛ mikɛna nɛ ke akũ.
18“Nnɛ́ mi flee malɛ, ĩnyina bati a kĩ mpau a. Lɛmɛ kɛnɛ kĩ Baguma fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ biyi a fɔya nɛ foe kamɛ kĩ, ‘Oti a kĩ bɔmɔ ye budo awɛ bɔanya a yidza ɛdza nɛ yĩ akũ.’
19“Mabi mi fukĩĩ ĩyi finyaa, fɔmɔ fɔ́aya nɛ foe kamɛ lɔkɔa míatɛ mido kĩ yĩ nyɛ oti a kĩ ye manɛ a. 20Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ oti odi kĩ ndo fɔtɔ ni, yĩ ɛtɛ. Ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ yĩ ni, ɛtɛ oti a kĩ edo yĩ a.”
Yesu Lɛ Eyi Kĩ Odi Aanyɛ Ye Ɛkpa.
21Kĩ Yesu lɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ eyua a, fɔha ye ɔwɔlɛ paa ade ɛlɛ yededeede kĩ, “Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ mi kamɛ odi aanyɛ yĩ ɛkpa.”
22Awã naa, ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a dã akũ anɛ, ade bɛkɛna saa kitonɛkĩ binyína be kamɛ oti a kĩ Yesu alɛ a. 23Fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kamɛ ɔmɔa kĩ Yesu awɛ kalɛ a dzi ɛmɛnamɔ Yesu. 24Adeke Simon Petro baa ye sɛnɛ kĩ, “Via ye owula a kĩ yalɛ a.”
25Foesũ fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ a fuã Yesu tsɛmɛtsɛmɛ evia ye kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, owei yanɛ?”
26Yesu kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Oti a kĩ maabuli abodoo ntamɔ kutu nkpa a ni, ade ye a.” Ade ebuli abodoo sɛkɛ̃, ɛta kutu ɛkɔa ɛkpa Yuda kĩ ɛnyɛ Simon Iskariot obi a. 27Kĩ Yuda sila ɛtɛ funitsã a pɛ, Satana wo nɛ ye kamɛ.
Ade Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Wɛ sɔwa nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ awɛ kĩ akɛna a akũ.” 28Lɛmɛ be a kĩ bidzi nɛ opunu akũ mɔ ye a kamɛ odima tánu lɛtsa a sũ kĩ Yesu bi ye tuwuli kayɔ. 29Ayekĩ Yuda nɛɛ be sika kuvũ sũ ni, fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a badi kɔna kĩ kabi Yesu bi ye kĩ ɛnaaya fɔtsa a kĩ baakɔa bɛnya luwi a, ĩye kĩ ɛnaakɔa litsedi ete ahiãfɔ.
30Kĩ Yuda tɛ funitsã a, deedimɔapɛ ɛnɛ́ ɛdzakũ. Kade dɔ paa.
Yesu Kpa Mbla Vɔɛ̃.
31Kĩ Yuda nɛ ɛdzakũ a, Yesu lɛ kĩ, “Finyaa bɛdɛla Otidziwa Obi a dĩ nɛ ode, ade finyaa bɛdɛla Baguma dĩ lɛmɛ nɛ ode bɛtsãmɛna ye akũ a. 32Ntɛ bɛdɛla Baguma dĩ nɛ ode bɛtsãmɛna Otidziwa Obi a akũ ni, lɔkɔa Baguma aadɛla Otidziwa Obi a dĩ nɛ ode nɛ ye mɔawɛ kamɛ lɛtalɛta.
33“Yĩ babi, nláabuki nna nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ owi libuna pii. Míawɛ yĩ, lɛmɛ finyaa mabi mi fɔlɛtsa a kĩ mbi Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a kĩ, ‘Miláapuli minaa awã kĩ manaa a.’
34“Finyaa makpa mi mbla vɔɛ̃. Miwɛ mi akũ kalɛ. Ayekĩ nwɛ mi kalɛ a ni, mi malo miwɛ mi akũ kalɛ lɔmɔ. 35Ntɛ miawɛ mi akũ kalɛ ni, odi nyɛ odi aamɔ eyi ɔsũ kĩ yĩ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ mianɛ.”
Yesu Lɛ Eyi Kĩ Petro Aasĩ Kĩ Enyína Ye.
36Ade Simon Petro via kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, nɛ ndia akpa?”
Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Awã kĩ manaa, ɔláapuli otomɔ yĩ finyaa bɔnaa, lɛmɛ ke liti ni, aatomɔ yĩ liti.”
37Petro via ye kĩ, “Nde sũ nláapuli ntomɔ nɔ finyaa? Mmanɛ akũ kĩ maaku nɛ nɔ lɔlɔ!”
38Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Kalɛ alɛ kĩ ɔmanɛ akũ kĩ aaku nɛ yĩ lɔlɔ? Mabi nɔ ɔnɔkɔali a kĩ fɔmɔ ɔkɔkɔ aabe ni, aalɛ titi ɛlalɛ kĩ onyína yĩ.”

Title: YOHANES 14
Content:
Yesu Nyɛ́ Osi a Kĩ Ɛnaa Ɔlɛga a Sɛkɛ̃.
1Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mitafɔ̃ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ lɛha mi. Mitɛ Baguma mido, mitɛ yĩ malo mido. 2Fɔla beblebee deĩ nɛ Nda tɔtɔ kamɛ. Manaamanɛ kakɔ kadi ĩyi mi. Ntɛ fɔlá lɔmɔ ni, kufɛ nláabi mi kĩ manaamanɛ kadzikɔ̃ ĩyi mi. 3Ade ntɛ nnaa nnamanɛ kadzikɔ̃ ĩyi mi ĩyua ni, maamuniki ĩyaakpã mi nnamɛna yĩ sɛkɛ̃, ayekĩ awã kĩ ndeĩ a mi malo míana nɛ awã. 4Minyina osi a kĩ ɛwaa ɛnaa awã kĩ manaa a.”
5Ade Toma bi Yesu kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, bunyína awã kĩ anaa, foesũ nde bɔ́akɛna bɔmɔ́ osi a kĩ yanaa awã a?”
6Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Yĩ nyɛ osi a, ɔnɔkɔali a mɔ nkpã a. Odima láya nɛ Nda sɛkɛ̃ mbɔɛntɛ ɛtsã yĩ akũ. 7Ntɛ kanyina minyina yĩ ni, kufɛ minyina Nda lɛmɛ. Lɛmɛ kito finyaa kanaa ni, minyina ye ade mimɔ́ ye lɛmɛ a.”
8Ade Filipo bi Yesu kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, tsa boe Ɔlɛga a, ade lɛtsa a kĩ liti lisĩ boe a.”
9Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Filipo, owi buna kĩ ndeĩ nɛ mi flee sɛkɛ̃, lɛmɛ onyína yĩ? Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛmɔ́ yĩ ni, ɛmɔ́ Nda lɛmɛ. Nde sũ obuki avia kĩ, ‘Tsa boe Ɔlɛga a’? 10Filipo, mbɔɛɛ ɔtátɛ odo kĩ ndeĩ nɛ Nda kamɛ ade kĩ ye malo edeĩ nɛ yĩ kamɛ? Fɔlɛtsa a kĩ mbi mi a flee táto yĩ sɛkɛ̃, mbom Nda a kĩ edeĩ nɛ yĩ kamɛ a lamɛna ye adzuma kakɛna. 11Mitɛ yĩ mido ntɛ nlɛ kĩ ndeĩ nɛ Nda kamɛ, ade Nda lɛmɛ deĩ nɛ yĩ kamɛ a. Ntɛ mitátɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ mido ni, ke kɔ̃ mitɛ mido nɛ adzuma a kĩ makɛna a sũ. 12Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ yĩ edo ni, yaakɛna lɛtsa a kĩ makɛna a. Nuwĩ yaapuli ɛkɛna fɔtsa ɛba yĩ fude a, kitonɛkĩ manaa Nda sɛkɛ̃. 13Lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ míavia nɛ yĩ dĩ akũ ni, maakɛna foe nkpa mi ayekĩ baatsã Obi a akũ bɛdɛla Nda dĩ nɛ ode. 14Ntɛ mivia litsedi nɛ yĩ dĩ akũ ni, maakɛna foe.”
Yesu Lɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a Kayamɛna Eyi.
15Yesu buki ɛlɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ miawɛ yĩ kalɛ ni, míakɛna nɛ yĩ tɛbla a akũ. 16Maake Nda aduli ɛkpa mi Obumɛnanɛ bɛbã kĩ yaana nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ daa. 17Ade ye nyɛ Hũhũ a kĩ yanyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ nɛ Baguma akũ a katsa a. Katinya kamɛ bati kɔ̃ lɛláapuli bɛtɛ ye, kitonɛkĩ bɛláapuli bɛmɔ́ ye mɔ baanyi ye. Lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃ minyina ye kitonɛkĩ yaana nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ ade edeĩ nɛ mi kamɛ a.
18“Nláafɔnɛ mi awɛ ĩyi ndɛ banɔkpabi aye. Maamuniki ĩya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃. 19Kite sukuloo katinya kamɛ bati lɛláabuki bɛmɔ́ yĩ, lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃ míamɔ yĩ. Ayekĩ ndzi nkpã sũ ni, mi malo míadzi nkpã. 20Ntɛ luwi a wo ɔtɔ ni, míanyi kĩ ndeĩ nɛ Nda kamɛ ade mi mideĩ nɛ yĩ kamɛ ade yĩ malo ndeĩ nɛ mi kamɛ a.
21“Oti a kĩ epini yĩ tɛbla, yakɛna nɛ te akũ ni, ade ye nyɛ oti a kĩ yawɛ yĩ kalɛ a. Oti a kĩ yawɛ yĩ kalɛ ni, Nda aawɛ ye kalɛ. Yĩ malo maawɛ ye kalɛ ade maanyɛ yĩ akũ ntsa ye a.”
22Ade Yuda, nnɛ́ ekĩ ɛnyɛ Iskariot a, via kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, nde sũ aanyɛ nɔ akũ ɔtsa boe, mɔ nnɛ́ katinya kamɛ bati a?”
23Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ yĩ kalɛ ni, yaapi yĩ fɔlɛtsa edomɔ akũ. Nda aawɛ ye kalɛ ade bɔmɔ Nda bɔ́aya nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ bɔkɛna kadzikɔ̃ nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃. 24Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaáwɛ yĩ kalɛ ni, yaápi yĩ fɔlɛtsa kadomɔ akũ. Fɔlɛtsa a kĩ minu a lɛnyɛ́ yĩ mɔawɛ fude, mbom futo Ɔlɛga a kĩ edo yĩ a fude fɔanɛ.
25“Mbi mi fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ mbuki ndeĩ nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃. 26Lɛmɛ Obumɛnanɛ a kĩ ɛnyɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa kĩ Baguma aado nɛ yĩ dĩ akũ a, aatsa mi lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa, ade yaate mi anɛ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ mbi mi a akũ a.
27“Lukudɔ nkɔa mayi mi. Yĩ lukudɔ nkɔa makpa mi, nnɛ́ ndɛ ayekĩ katinya kamɛ bati akpa a aye. Mitafɔ̃ mi ɔwɔlɛ lɛha mi ĩye mifɔ̃ libe liwo mi. 28Minu ayekĩ mbi mi kĩ, ‘Madzakũ, lɛmɛ maamuniki ĩya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃.’ Ntɛ miwɛ yĩ kalɛ ni, kufɛ kawɔlɛ de mi kĩ manaa Ɔlɛga a sɛkɛ̃, kitonɛkĩ ye ɛbɛ̃ yĩ. 29Finyaa mbi mi fukĩĩ ĩnyamɛna lɔtɔ fɔmɔ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa aaya nɛ foe kamɛ, ayekĩ ntɛ fɔya nɛ foe kamɛ ni, míatɛ mido. 30Nláabuki nlɛ mɔ mi kɔdzɛla nnamɛna lɔtɔ, kitonɛkĩ katinya kamɛ akũ ɔnyanɛ a aya, ade ɛlá kɔbɛ̃ nɛ yĩ akũ a. 31Lɛmɛ kɛnɛ kĩ katinya kamɛ bati binyi kĩ mawɛ Ɔlɛga a kalɛ, ade makɛna nɛ ye ɔlɛdo akũ pɛpɛɛpɛ a.
“Finyaa, miyidza bɔdzakũ nɛ awĩ.

Title: YOHANES 15
Content:
Yesu Nyɛ Kutse Wĩ a.
1“Yĩ nyɛ kutse wĩ a, ade Nda nyɛ futse kɔba ɔnɛnɛ a. 2Ɔnanɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ edeĩ nɛ yĩ akũ kĩ yaáwũ babi ni, yatsua ye kamuni, ade ɔnanɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawũ babi ni, yanyɛ ye akũ tɔɔta, ayekĩ yaawũ babi pii. 3Finyaa yĩ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ mbi mi a kpalɛ mi akũ kɔkɔɛ. 4Mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ yĩ, yĩ malo nkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ mi. Ndɛ ayekĩ kutse ɔnanɛ lɛláapuli kuwũ nɛ koe akũ, mbɔɛntɛ kɔmanɛ nɛ kutse ɔma akũ a, ade aye mi malo miláapuli miwũ babi ntɛ mitákɛna ɔmɔa mɔ yĩ a.
5“Yĩ nyɛ kutse a, ade mi minyɛ tɛnanɛ a. Oti a kĩ ɛkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ yĩ, mɔ yĩ malo nkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ ye ni, ade ye aawũ babi pii, kitonɛkĩ ntɛ nláa mi kamɛ ni, miláapuli mikɛna lɛtsama. 6Oti a kĩ ɛláa yĩ kamɛ ni, ɛla ndɛ ɔnanɛ kĩ bitsua bɛta bimuni ade yawɔlɛ a. Bakpɔta tɛnanɛ a kafila kado nɛ fi kamɛ tavio. 7Ntɛ mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ yĩ, mɔ yĩ fɔlɛtsa a deĩ nɛ mi kamɛ ni, míavia lɛtsa a kĩ miawɛ ade baakɛna foe bɛkpa mi a. 8Ntɛ miwũ babi beblebee ni, foe fɔnyɛ Nda kukũkpalɛ fɔtsa, ade fusipi kĩ yĩ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ mianɛ. 9Ayekĩ Nda awɛ yĩ kalɛ a ni, ade aye yĩ malo mawɛ mi kalɛ a. Foesũ mifɔ̃ yĩ ɔdɔ a ɛna nkɔsu nɛ mi kamɛ lɔmɔ. 10Ntɛ mipi yĩ tɛbla a midomɔ akũ ni, míana nɛ yĩ ɔdɔ a kamɛ ndɛ ayekĩ yĩ malo mpi Nda mbla ndomɔ akũ fɔfɔ̃ ye ɔdɔ deĩ nɛ yĩ kamɛ a.
11“Mbi mi fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ ayekĩ kawɔlɛ a kĩ kideĩ nɛ yĩ kamɛ a odu kɛna nɛ mi kamɛ, lɔkɔa mi kawɔlɛ a kɛkpɔla. 12Ade yĩ mbla kĩ makpa mi nyɛ kĩ, miwɛ mi akũ akũ kalɛ ndɛ ayekĩ nwɛ mi kalɛ a. 13Ɔdɔ titiliwu adima lɛláa kĩ oti akɔa ye nkpã ɛbɔa afɔliɛ nɛ bakɔba lɔlɔ. 14Ntɛ mikɛna nɛ yĩ mbla a kĩ nkpa mi a akũ a ni, lɔkɔa minyɛ yĩ bakɔba. 15Nláabuki nvɛ mi kĩ basumunɛ, kitonɛkĩ ɔsumunɛ linyína lɛtsa a kĩ ye ɔlate akɛna. Lɛmɛ mavɛ mi kĩ bakɔba kitonɛkĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ nnu ntomɛna Nda sɛkɛ̃ ni, nfɔ̃ minyi foe. 16Nnɛ́ mi lɛpau yĩ, mbom yĩ lɛpau mi ndzina mi kĩ minaawũ babi beblebee kĩ baawa daa. Nɛ foesũ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ míavia Ɔlɛga a nɛ yĩ dĩ akũ ni, yaakpa mi foe. 17Foesũ ade mbla kĩ makpa mi kĩ miwɛ mi akũ kalɛ.”
Katinya Kamɛ Likesĩ.
18Yesu buki ɛlɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ katinya kamɛ bati akesĩ mi ni, minyi kĩ bɛnya lɔtɔ bikesĩ yĩ. 19Ntɛ katinya kamɛ bade mianɛ ni, kufɛ baawɛ mi kalɛ ndɛ be bade aye. Lɛmɛ kĩ mpau mi ntomɛna katinya bati kamɛ ade mibuki minyɛ́ be bade a sũ ni, katinya kamɛ bati akesĩ mi. 20Mite anɛ nɛ kalɛ a kĩ mbi mi akũ a kĩ, ‘Ɔsumunɛ lɛbɛ́ ye ɔlate.’ Ntɛ bati yidza bɛdza nɛ yĩ akũ ni, baayidza bɛdza nɛ mi malo akũ. Ntɛ bipi yĩ fɔlɛtsa bidomɔ akũ ni, baapi mi fude lɛmɛ bidomɔ akũ. 21Lɛmɛ baakɛna fukĩĩ flee nɛ mi akũ nɛ yĩ dĩ sũ, kitonɛkĩ binyína oti a kĩ edo yĩ a. 22Ntɛ ntayaabi be fɔlɛtsa ni, kufɛ bɛtáku tɔkpa kɔtɔ. Lɛmɛ finyaa bɛkɛna tɔkpa ade bɛlá onukpɛ̃ kanyɛ kadima a. 23Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakesĩ yĩ ni, yakesĩ Nda lɛmɛ. 24Ntɛ ntakɛna fɔtsa kĩ odima tákɛna tɔ̃ nɛ be kamɛ ni, kufɛ bɛtákɛna tɔkpa, lɛmɛ kĩ finyaa bɛmɔ́ fɔtsa a kĩ nkɛna a malo ni, bakesĩ bɔmɔ Nda. 25Lɛmɛ fukĩĩ flee ya nɛ foe kamɛ ayekĩ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ be mbla ovoli kamɛ a, fɔya nɛ foe kamɛ kĩ, ‘Bikesĩ yĩ pupulidza.’
26“Maado Obumɛnanɛ eto Ɔlɛga a sɛkɛ̃ ɛya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃. Ade ye nyɛ Hũhũ a kĩ yaanyɛ ɔnɔkɔali a nɛ Baguma akũ ɛtsa a. Ntɛ eto Ɔlɛga a sɛkɛ̃ ɛya ni, yaadi adansiɛ nɛ yĩ akũ. 27Mi malo míadi adansiɛ, kitonɛkĩ mina nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ kito kayɔkayi a.

Title: YOHANES 16
Content:
1“Mbi mi fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ flee ayekĩ bati lɛláafɔ̃ akpɔ liveli mi nɛ mi katɛkado kamɛ. 2Baablɔmɛna mi nɛ Yudafɔ fɔtsɛnakɔ̃. Lɔkɔ aya kĩ ntɛ oti odi kɔ mi ni, yaakɔna kĩ Baguma adzuma ɛkɛna. 3Bati aakɛna fukĩĩ nɛ mi akũ kitonɛkĩ bɛtányi Ɔlɛga a ĩye yĩ. 4Lɛmɛ mabi mi fukĩĩ ayekĩ ntɛ lɔkɔ a wo ɔtɔ ni, míate anɛ kĩ mbi mi foe.
Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a Adzuma.
“Ntábi mi fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ nɛ kayɔkayi a, kitonɛkĩ nna nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃. 5Lɛmɛ finyaa kĩ madzakũ nnaa oti a kĩ edo yĩ a sɛkɛ̃ a, mi kamɛ odima távia yĩ awã kĩ manaa a. 6Finyaa, kĩ mbi mi fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a, mi flee miwo ɔblɔ. 7Lɛmɛ mabi mi ɔnɔkɔali a kĩ fɔnɛnɛ fɔkpa mi kĩ ndzakũ, kitonɛkĩ ntɛ ntánaa ni, Obumɛnanɛ a lɛláaya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃. Lɛmɛ ntɛ ndzakũ nnaa ni, maado ye ɛya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃. 8Ade ntɛ ɛya ni, yaakɔ katinya kamɛ bati kɔtɔ ɛfɔ̃ binyi lɛtsa a kĩ lɛnyɛ tɔkpa, mɔ kadzi kpĩĩ, mɔ Baguma kɔtɔkakɔ. 9Yaakɔ be kɔtɔ nɛ tɔkpa sũ, kitonɛkĩ bɛtátɛ yĩ bido. 10Yaakɔ be kɔtɔ bɛkɔa binyi kadzi kpĩĩ kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ manaa Nda sɛkɛ̃, kĩ miláabuki mimɔ́ yĩ, 11ade baanyi lɛtsa a kĩ lɛnyɛ kɔtɔkaku, kitonɛkĩ bɛkɔ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ akũ ɔnyanɛ a kɔtɔ kɔkɔɛ.
12“Ndeĩ fɔlɛtsa pii kĩ maabi mi, lɛmɛ fɔ́aba mi kalɔ finyaa. 13Lɛmɛ ntɛ Hũhũ a kĩ yanyɛ ɔnɔkɔali nɛ Baguma akũ katsa a ya ni, yaafɔ̃ minyi Baguma akũ ɔnɔkɔali a flee a. Ɛláalɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ ye mɔawɛ otumi akũ, mbom lɛtsa a kĩ enu a odi mɔ yaalɛ, ade yaafɔ̃ minyi fɔtsa a kĩ fɔ́ayaya a. 14Yaado yĩ obu ɛnyɛ yĩ kukũkpalɛ ɛtsa, kitonɛkĩ yaabi mi lɛtsa a kĩ ɛtɛ etomɛna yĩ sɛkɛ̃ a. 15Fɔtsa a kĩ fɔnyɛ Nda fude a flee, yĩ fude fɔanɛ. Ade foesũ nlɛ kĩ Hũhũ a aanu etomɛna yĩ sɛkɛ̃ ɛyaabi mi a.”
Fɔtsa Bakɔlɛnɛ Ɔblɔ Kawo Mɔ Kawɔlɛ Kamɔ.
16Yesu lɛ ɛnamɛna lɔtɔ kĩ, “Kite sukuloo kĩ miláabuki mimɔ́ yĩ, lɛmɛ owi lɛláabuna kĩ míabuki mimɔ́ yĩ.”
17Adeke ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a badi via akũ kĩ, “Foe kayɔ nyɛ litsa kĩ yabi boe kĩ, ‘Kite sukuloo miláabuki mimɔ́ yĩ, lɛmɛ owi lɛláabuna kĩ míabuki mimɔ́ yĩ.’ Ebuki ɛlɛ kĩ, ‘Kitonɛkĩ manaa Nda sɛkɛ̃.’ 18Fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ kĩ, ‘Kite sukuloo’ a kayɔ nyɛ litsa? Bɔánu lɛtsa a kĩ yalɛ a kayɔ!”
19Yesu mɔ́ kĩ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a wɛ kĩ bavia ye kalɛ kadi, foesũ ebi be kĩ, “Nlɛ kĩ kite sukuloo miláabuki mimɔ́ yĩ, lɛmɛ owi lɛláabuna kĩ míabuki mimɔ́ yĩ. Mbɔɛɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kamɛ milamɛna kasa mɔ akũ a? 20Mabi mi ɔnɔkɔali a kĩ míabe miwo ɔblɔ, lɛmɛ katinya kamɛ bati aamɔ kawɔlɛ. Míadi ayɔlɔhɔ lɛmɛ mi ayɔlɔhɔ a aadani kawɔlɛkamɔ. 21Ntɛ sɛmɛ pi otsole ni, yawo ɔblɔ kitonɛkĩ ye lubo kamɔ ɔdɔũ a bɔa. Lɛmɛ ntɛ ɛma eyua a, yalɛla ye lubo kamɔ a, kitonɛkĩ yamɔ kawɔlɛ kĩ ɛma obi edo nɛ katinya kamɛ. 22Ade aye fɔla fɔkpa mi a. Finyaa miwo ɔblɔ, lɛmɛ maabuki mmɔ́ mi, lɔkɔa mi tɔwɔlɛ lɛka tidzi mi mɔ kawɔlɛ paa a kĩ odima lɛláapuli ɛtɛ nɛ mi awɛ a.
23“Ntɛ luwi a wo ɔtɔ ni, miláabuki mivia yĩ lɛtsama. Ɔnɔkɔali a mabi mi kĩ, Nda aakpa mi lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ míavia ye nɛ yĩ dĩ akũ. 24Kito kɛyawo finyaa kĩĩ a, mitávia tɔ̃ lɛtsama nɛ yĩ dĩ akũ. Mivia, lɔkɔa míatɛ, ayekĩ mi kawɔlɛkamɔ aakpɔla.
Yesu Nya Katinya Kamɛ Akũ.
25“Mabi mi fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ nɛ fɔgbã kamɛ. Lɛmɛ lɔkɔ aaya kĩ nláabuki mbi mi fɔlɛtsa nɛ fɔgbã kamɛ, mbom maabi mi Nda akũ fɔlɛtsa pefee. 26Ntɛ luwi a wo ɔtɔ ni, mivia ye fɔtsa nɛ yĩ dĩ akũ. Maátsa kĩ yĩ maavia ye nkpa mi, 27kitonɛkĩ Nda mɔawɛ a awɛ mi kalɛ. Yawɛ mi kalɛ kitonɛkĩ miawɛ yĩ kalɛ ade mitɛ mido kĩ Baguma sɛkɛ̃ nto ĩya. 28Nuwĩ, Ɔlɛga a sɛkɛ̃ nto ĩya nɛ katinya kamɛ, ade finyaa madzakũ nɛ katinya kamɛ nnaa Nda sɛkɛ̃ a.”
29Ade ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a bi ye kĩ, “Dã, finyaa kɔ̃ alɛ kɔdzɛla pefee, kĩ obuki aábɔa fɔgbã. 30Finyaa kɔ̃ bunyina kĩ onyina lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa, ade fɔtásĩ kĩ odi abuki evia nɔ kalɛ kadima a. Fukĩĩ fɔ̃ bɔtɛ budo kĩ Baguma sɛkɛ̃ oto.”
31Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Finyaa kɔ̃ mitɛ mido? 32Lɔkɔ aya ade liwo ɔtɔ kɔkɔɛ malo, kĩ baapasam mi flee odi nyɛ odi lɛnaa ye tɔtɔ kamɛ kite yĩ odi. Lɛmɛ nnɛ́ yĩ odi aate, kitonɛkĩ Nda deĩ nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃. 33Mbi mi fukĩĩ kĩĩ flee ayekĩ míakɛna ɔmɔa mɔ yĩ bɔna lukudɔ. Katinya kamɛ bati aafɔ̃ mimɔ́ lubo. Lɛmɛ mido ɔwɔlɛ! Ĩnya katinya kamɛ akũ!”

Title: YOHANES 17
Content:
Yesu Bɔa Mpaɛ Nɛ Ye Fɔtsa Bakɔlɛnɛ a Lɔlɔ.
1Kĩ Yesu lɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ eyua a, ɛdɛla anɛ ɛdã ode, ade ɛlɛ kĩ, “Nda, ɔdɔũ a bɔa. Dɛla nɔ Obi dĩ nɛ ode lɔkɔa nɔ Obi lɛmɛ ɛdɛla nɔ dĩ nɛ ode. 2Kitonɛkĩ ɔkpa ye otumi nɛ batidziwa flee akũ ayekĩ yaakpa bati a kĩ ɔkɔa odo nɛ ye awɛ a nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a. 3Nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a nyɛ kĩ baanyi nɔ ɔnɔkɔali Baguma keĩ a mɔ Yesu Kristo a kĩ odo fɔtɔ a. 4Ndɛla nɔ dĩ nɛ ode nɛ tite akũ, ade ĩyua adzuma a kĩ ɔkpa yĩ kĩ nkɛna a. 5Foesũ Nda, dɛla yĩ dĩ nɛ ode nɛ nɔ anɛ kamɛ, ndɛ ayekĩ nna nɛ nɔ sɛkɛ̃ fɔmɔ bɛbɔa katinya a.
6“Ĩnyɛ nɔ ntsa bati a kĩ ɔnyɛ nɛ katinya kamɛ ɔkpa yĩ a. Nɔ bade banɛ, lɛmɛ ɔkɔa ɔkpa yĩ. Bɛkɛna nɛ nɔ kalɛ akũ. 7Finyaa kɔ̃ binyina kĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ ɔkɔa ɔkpa yĩ a flee to nɔ sɛkɛ̃. 8Nkɔa ɔlɛdo a kĩ ɔkpa yĩ a nkpa be, ade bɛtɛ ye a. Binyina kĩ ɔnɔkɔali fɔanɛ kĩ nɔ sɛkɛ̃ nto, ade bɛtɛ bido kĩ nɔ lido yĩ a.
9“Make aduli nɛ be lɔlɔ. Nlámɛna aduli kake nɛ katinya kamɛ bati lɔlɔ, mbom nɛ bati a kĩ ɔkɔa odo nɛ yĩ awɛ a lɔlɔ, kitonɛkĩ nɔ bade banɛ. 10Yĩ bati a flee nɔ bade banɛ, ade ayea nɔ bade flee lɛmɛ nyɛ yĩ bade a, ade bɛdɛla yĩ dĩ nɛ ode bɛtsãmɛna be akũ a. 11Ade finyaa maya nɛ nɔ sɛkɛ̃, mbuki nláa katinya kamɛ, lɛmɛ be kɔ̃ bideĩ nɛ katinya kamɛ. Ɔlɛga Kpalɛwa, kɔa nɔ dĩ akũ kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ ɔkpa yĩ a kadãmɛna be akũ ayekĩ baakɛna ɔmɔa ndɛ ayekĩ bɔmɔ nɔ bɔnyɛ ɔmɔa a. 12Kĩ nna nɛ be sɛkɛ̃ a, nkɔa nɔ dĩ akũ kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ ɔkpa yĩ a ndãmɛna be akũ. Ndã be akũ kĩ be kamɛ odima táyɛla, mbɔɛntɛ oti a kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ ɛyɛla a, ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa fɔlɛtsa a aaya nɛ foe kamɛ. 13Lɛmɛ finyaa maya nɛ nɔ sɛkɛ̃, ade malɛ fukĩĩ bamɛ nɛ katinya kamɛ ayekĩ baamɔ kawɔlɛ kɛkpɔla nɛ be kamɛ ndɛ ayekĩ yĩ malo mamɔ ke a.
14“Nkɔa nɔ ɔlɛdo a nkpa be lɛmɛ katinya kamɛ bati kesĩ be, kitonɛkĩ bɛtáto katinya kamɛ ndɛ ayekĩ yĩ malo ntáto katinya kamɛ a. 15Ntávia nɔ kĩ nyɛ be nɛ katinya kamɛ, mbom mawã nɔ kĩ nyɛ be nɛ Okesĩnɛ a awɛ kamɛ. 16Ndɛ ayekĩ ntáto katinya kamɛ sũ ni, be malo bɛnyɛ́ katinya kamɛ bade. 17Kɛna be bati kpalɛwa kakpa nɔ akũ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali a kamɛ, nɔ kalɛ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali. 18Ndo be nɛ katinya kamɛ ndɛ ayekĩ nɔ malo odo yĩ nɛ katinya kamɛ a. 19Ade nɛ be sũ ni, nkpalɛ yĩ akũ nkpa nɔ ayekĩ be malo baakpalɛ be malo akũ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali a kamɛ bɛkpa nɔ.
Yesu Bɔa Mpaɛ Nɛ Batɛ Badonɛ Flee Lɔlɔ.
20“Nnɛ́ bati kĩĩ odi lɔlɔ mabɔa mpaɛ, mbom mabɔa nkpa bati a kĩ baatɛ yĩ bido nɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ baabi be a sũ. 21Make nɔ aduli kĩ fɔ̃ be flee bɛkɛna ɔmɔa. Nda, fɔ̃ be malo bɛna nɛ boe kamɛ ndɛ ayekĩ odeĩ nɛ yĩ kamɛ, ade yĩ malo ndeĩ nɛ nɔ kamɛ a. Fɔ̃ bɛkɛna ɔmɔa ayekĩ katinya kamɛ bati aatɛ bido kĩ nɔ lido yĩ.
22“Ndɛla be buĩ nɛ ode ndɛ ayekĩ ɔdɛla yĩ dĩ nɛ ode, ayekĩ baakɛna ɔmɔa ndɛ ayekĩ bɔmɔ nɔ bɔnyɛ ɔmɔa a. 23Yĩ ndeĩ nɛ be kamɛ ade nɔ malo odeĩ nɛ yĩ kamɛ, kĩ baakɛna ɔmɔa bɛkpɔla, ayekĩ katinya kamɛ bati aanyi kĩ nɔ lido yĩ. Ade baanyi kĩ awɛ be kalɛ ndɛ ayekĩ awɛ yĩ kalɛ a.
24“Nda, mawɛ kĩ bati a kĩ ɔkɔa ɔkpa yĩ a bɛna nɛ awã kĩ ndeĩ a, ayekĩ baamɔ yĩ kukũkpalɛ a kĩ ɔkpa yĩ a, kitonɛkĩ ɔwɛ yĩ kalɛ fɔmɔ biyi katinya kayɔ.
25“Nda, Oti Kpĩĩ, katinya kamɛ bati linyína nɔ lɛmɛ yĩ kɔ̃ ĩnyina nɔ, ade bati kĩĩ lɛmɛ nyina kĩ nɔ lido yĩ a. 26Ĩnyɛ nɔ ntsa be yededeede, ade maakanyɛ nɔ nkatsa be, ayekĩ ɔdɔ a kĩ odeĩ ɔkpa yĩ a aana nɛ be kamɛ, lɔkɔa yĩ malo maana nɛ be kamɛ.”

Title: YOHANES 18
Content:
Yesu Kapi.
1Kĩ Yesu bɔa mpaɛ kĩĩ eyua a, bɛmɔ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a bɛdzakũ nɛ awã, bɛnanyina Kidron kawɔbi a ade bɛnawo nɛ kugua futse kɔba kudi kamɛ a.
2Yuda a kĩ ɛnyɛ ye ɛkpa a, nyina awã, kitonɛkĩ lɔkɔlɔkɔ Yesu mɔ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a awɛ katsɛna nɛ awã. 3Foesũ Yuda kpã Roma sodzafɔ mɔ Asɔli Kɔla akũ badãmɛnanɛ a kĩ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ Farisifɔ do a ɛnamɛna kɔba a kamɛ. Bɛnɛɛ kawũkanɔ fɔtsa, tɛsɛdza mɔ tibia tɛnawa. 4Ayekĩ Yesu nyina fɔtsa a kĩ fɔ́aya nɛ ye akũ a flee sũ ni, ɛnɛ ɛya nɛ lɔtɔ evia be kĩ, “Owei miawɛ?”
5Bɛkpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Yesu Nazaretni a.”
Yesu bi be kĩ, “Amɔ yĩ.” Yuda a kĩ ɛnyɛ ye ɛkpa a lɛmɛ dzɛ̃ nɛ awã. 6Kĩ Yesu bi be kĩ, “Amɔ yĩ” a, be flee bɛnaa litiliti bɛnatɔ nɛ tite. 7Ade Yesu buki evia be kĩ, “Owei miawɛ?”
Bɛkpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Yesu Nazaretni a.”
8Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mbi mi kɔkɔɛ kĩ yĩ nyɛ ye, foesũ ntɛ yĩ miawɛ kɔ̃ ni, mifɔ̃ bati kĩĩ bɛdzakũ.” 9Ɛlɛ fukĩĩ ayekĩ kalɛ a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi a aaya nɛ foe kamɛ pɛpɛɛpɛ kĩ, “Nda, bati a kĩ ɔkɔa odo nɛ yĩ awɛ a kamɛ odima táyɛla.”
10Ade Simon Petro nyɛ kɔpã a kĩ ɛnɛɛ a ɛbaa Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee a ɔsumunɛ sɔmɔna sɔtɔ emuni a. Ɔsumunɛ a dĩ nyɛ Malko.
11Ade Yesu bi Petro kĩ, “Kɔa nɔ kɔpã a kado nɛ kuvũ kamɛ! Ɔkɔna kĩ nláamɔa lubo kamɔ kɔɔpu a kĩ Nda kɔa ɛkpa yĩ a mbɔɛɛ?”
Yudafɔ Kpã Yesu Bɛnadzɛmɛna Nɛ Hana Anɛ.
12Ke liti a, Roma sodzafɔ mɔ be banɔkɔɛ̃, mɔ Yudafɔ Asɔli Kɔla akũ badãmɛnanɛ a pi Yesu ade bisui ye a. 13Bɛnya lɔtɔ bɛkpã ye bɛnamɛna Hana sɛkɛ̃. Hana kĩĩ nyɛ Kayafa, kĩ yanya Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee nɛ kateli a kamɛ a otse. 14Ade Kayafa kĩĩ lɛmɛ lɛkpa Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a adzuni kĩ fɔnɛnɛ fɔbɛ̃ kĩ oti mɔa aku nɛ ɔmaĩ a lɔlɔ.
Petro Sĩ Kĩ Enyína Yesu.
15Simon Petro mɔ fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ bɛbã odi tomɔ Yesu nɛ liti. Fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ bɛbã kĩĩ a nyɛ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee a oti nyiwa, foesũ etomɔ Yesu ewo nɛ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee a fɔlɛtsa kadzɛkɔ̃. 16Lɛmɛ Petro fɔ̃ ɛdza nɛ kanya nɛ onyukpɛ̃. Ade fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ bɛbã a nɛ́, ɛnaa kanya ɛnalɛmɔ oyitsɔ̃ a kĩ yadã onyukpɛ̃ akũ a kɔdzɛla, ade ɛkpã Petro ewomɛna nɛ tɔtɔ a kamɛ a.
17Oyitsɔ̃ a kĩ yadã onyukpɛ̃ akũ a via Petro kĩ, “Nɔ malo nnɛ́ onyole kĩĩ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kamɛ ɔmɔa anɛ?”
Petro kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Oowo, ĩnyɛ́ ye fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ.” 18Osili na, foesũ basumunɛ mɔ bikĩ badzɔlɛ awã akũ a tɛna futuã fi bɛdza bisinya bawa foe. Petro lɛmɛ nadza nɛ be ɔwɛ̃ ɛkawa fi a.
Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee a Via Yesu Fɔlɛtsa.
19Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee a via Yesu fɔlɛtsa nɛ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ mɔ ye fɔtsa katsa a akũ.
20Ade Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Malɛ kɔdzɛla daa nɛ kanade kakpa odi nyɛ odi. Matsa fɔtsa nɛ Yudafɔ fɔtsɛnakɔ̃ mɔ Baguma Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ, awã kĩ bati a flee atsɛna, ade maálɛ lɛtsama nɛ kabɛla kamɛ a. 21Mɔ nde sũ avia yĩ fɔlɛtsa? Via bikĩ binu yĩ fɔlɛtsa a. Ade be nyina lɛtsa a kĩ nlɛ a.”
22Kĩ Yesu lɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a, bikĩ badzɔlɛ awã akũ a kamɛ ɔmɔa balɛ ye awɛ nɛ ɔlɔtɔ ade ebi ye kĩ, “Nde mɔ odo ɔwɔlɛ ɔkpa Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee a mbuayɛ lɔmɔ?”
23Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ nlɛ fɔlɛtsa kpa ni, bi odi nyɛ odi nɛ awĩ kĩĩ lɛtsa a kĩ fɔanɛ. Lɛmɛ ntɛ lɛtsa a kĩ nlɛ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali ni, litsa sũ ɔbalɛ yĩ awɛ?”
24Ade Hana fɔ̃ bɛkpã Yesu kĩ ebuki edeĩ nɛ tɔwɛ̃ kamɛ a bɛma Kayafa, Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee a.
Petro Buki Enunya Kĩ Enyína Yesu.
25Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ a, Petro buki ɛdzɛ̃ yawa fi. Ade bati bɛbã a via ye kĩ, “Mbɔɛɛ nɔ malo ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kamɛ ɔmɔa anɛ?”
Lɛmɛ Petro nunya kĩ, “Oowo, ĩnyɛ́ ye fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ.”
26Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee a basumunɛ a kamɛ ɔmɔa kĩ ye akũ oti sɔtɔ Petro baa emuni a via ye kĩ, “Ntámɔ nɔ nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ nɛ kɔbã a kamɛ?”
27Petro buki ɛlɛ kĩ, “Oowo!” Deedimɔapɛ ɔkɔkɔ be.
Bɛkpã Yesu Bɛnamɛna Pilato Sɛkɛ̃.
28Ɔnɔnɛ tutuutu a, bɛkpã Yesu bitomɛna Kayafa sɛkɛ̃ bɛnamɛna abãã ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a tɔtɔ kamɛ. Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a mɔawɛ táwo nɛ abãã tɔtɔ a kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ bɛwɛ kĩ be akũ ɛkpalɛ nɛ be amaniɛ onukpɛ̃ ɛkpa Wuda Katɛ̃ funitsã a kanya. 29Foesũ Pilato nɛ́ ɛnaa be sɛkɛ̃ evia be kĩ, “Litsa fɔlɛtsa mibɔɛ nɛ oti kĩĩ akũ?”
30Bɛkpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ nnɛ́ tɔkpa ɔkɛnanɛ yanɛ ni, kufɛ bɔtákpã ye bɔma nɔ.”
31Ade Pilato bi be kĩ, “Kekɔ̃ mi mɔawɛ mikpã ye minaadzɛmɔ ye nɛ mi mbla onukpɛ̃.”
Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Bɛtákpa boe osi kĩ bɔakɔ oti odima.” 32Fukĩĩ ya lɔmɔ ayekĩ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ Yesu lɛ eyi nɛ wuda odu kĩ yaaku a akũ a fɔya nɛ foe kamɛ.
33Pilato dani ewo nɛ abãã tɔtɔ kamɛ ade ɛvɛ Yesu evia ye kĩ, “Nɔ nyɛ Yudafɔ lɛgã a mbɔɛɛ?”
34Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Nɔ mɔawɛ avia yĩ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ, mbɔɛɛ kĩ bati bɛbã libi nɔ yĩ akũ fɔlɛtsa?”
35Pilato kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Akɔna kĩ Yudani manɛ? Nɔ mɔawɛ kade bati mɔ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a lɛkpã nɔ bɛmɛ yĩ. Litsa ɔkɛna?”
36Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Yĩ lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ táto katinya kĩĩ kamɛ. Ntɛ yĩ lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ kito katinya kĩĩ kamɛ ni, kufɛ yĩ basumunɛ a pili yĩ lɔlɔ, mɔ baakɔa yĩ bido nɛ Yudafɔ awɛ kamɛ. Lɛmɛ yĩ lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a táto katinya kĩĩ kamɛ.”
37Pilato via ye kĩ, “Foesũ lɛgã anɛ kɔ̃?”
Yesu kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Nɔ lɛlɛ kĩ lɛgã manɛ. Yĩ kɔ̃ ni, ade fukĩĩ sũ bɛma yĩ a, ade foesũ ĩya nɛ katinya kamɛ kĩ mayaalɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a akũ. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ eto ɔnɔkɔali a kamɛ ni, yatse yĩ.”
38Pilato via ye kĩ, “Litsa nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali a?”
Pilato Kɔ Yesu Kɔtɔ Ɛkpa Wuda.
Kĩ Pilato lɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ eyua a, ɛnɛ́ ɛnaa Yudafɔ a sɛkɛ̃ nɛ kanya ade ebi be kĩ, “Ntámɔ tɔkpa tidima nɛ oti kĩĩ akũ kĩ makɔ ye kɔtɔ. 39Lɛmɛ nɛ mi amaniɛ onukpɛ̃ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ nfɔnɛ kɔla bawanɛ a kamɛ ɔmɔa nkpa mi nɛ Wuda Katɛ̃ Luwi kanya kamɛ. Miawɛ kĩ nfɔnɛ Yudafɔ lɛgã a awɛ nkpa mi mbɔɛɛ?”
40Ade bɛbɔa fɔwɔla bɛlɛ kĩ, “Oowo, nnɛ́ ye bɔawɛ! Baraba bɔawɛ!” Baraba nyɛ oti kĩ eyidza ɛdza nɛ abãã akũ.

Title: YOHANES 19
Content:
1Ade Pilato fɔ̃ bɛkpã Yesu bɛdzakũmɛna bɛnabo ye mɔ mple. 2Sodzafɔ kɔa fɔtsɔlɛwɛ bɛnɔ lɛgãbɔɛ bɛtsa ye. Kĩ bido ye atadiɛ ngbã biyua a, 3bifuã ye bibi ye kĩ, “Yiiduu! Yudafɔ Lɛgã o-o!” Ade bɛbalɛbalɛ ye awɛ nɛ tɔlɔtɔ a.
4Ke liti a, Pilato buki ɛnɛ́ ɛnaa kanya ɛnabi bati kɔdabu a kĩ, “Midã, maakpã ye nnɛmɛna mma mi mimɔ́ kĩ ntámɔ́ mfumsu adima nɛ ye akũ kĩ makɔ ye kɔtɔ.” 5Adeke Yesu nɛ́ ɛya nɛ kanya, fɔtsɔlɛwɛ lɔbɔɛ a tsanɛ nɛ ye lɔlɔ, edeĩ nɛ atadiɛ ngbã a kamɛ. Pilato bi bati a kĩ, “Midã! Amɔ oti a nɛ awĩ!”
6Kĩ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ Asɔli Kɔla akũ badzɔlɛnɛ a mɔ́ ye a, bɛbɔa fɔwɔla kĩ, “Bɔa ye nɛ asendua akũ! Bɔa ye nɛ asendua akũ!”
Ade Pilato bi be kĩ “Mi mɔawɛ mikpã ye minaabɔa ye nɛ asendua akũ. Yĩ kɔ̃ ntámɔ kĩ ɛkɛna lɛtsa kpa lidima.”
7Yudafɔ a kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Boe kɔ̃ budeĩ mbla, ade nɛ mbla a onukpɛ̃ ni, kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ eku, kitonɛkĩ ɛkɛna ye akũ Baguma Obi.”
8Kĩ Pilato nu fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a, ebuki evila ɛba kɔkɔɛ a. 9Foesũ emuniki ɛnaa abãã tɔtɔ a kamɛ ade evia Yesu kĩ, “Ndia oto?”
Lɛmɛ Yesu tákpa ye mbuayɛ adima. 10Ade Pilato bi ye kĩ, “Hei! Aákpa yĩ kalɛ a mbuayɛ? Mbɔɛɛ onyína kĩ ndeĩ kɔbɛ̃ kĩ mafɔnɛ nɔ awɛ, ĩye kĩ mafɔ̃ bɛbɔa nɔ nɛ asendua akũ?”
11Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ bɛtakpa nɔ kɔbɛ̃ bitomɛna ode ni, kufɛ ɔláana kɔbɛ̃ nɛ yĩ akũ. Foesũ oti a kĩ ɛnyɛ yĩ ɛkpa nɔ a tɔkpa bɛ̃ nɔ tide.”
12Kĩ Pilato nu fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a, ɛwɛ kĩ yatsã osi nyɛ osi akũ ɛfɔnɛ ye awɛ, lɛmɛ Yudafɔ a bɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba kĩ, “Ntɛ ɔfɔnɛ ye awɛ ni, fɔatsa kĩ ɔnyɛ́ Roma Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃ ɔkɔba! Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛkɛna ye akũ Lɛgã ni, eyidza ɛdza nɛ Roma Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃ akũ!”
13Kĩ Pilato nu fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a, ɛkpã Yesu ɛnamɛna kanya ade ye mɔawɛ ɛnadzi nɛ fɔlɛtsa kadzɛ lukpo kamɛ nɛ kakɔ a kĩ bavɛ kĩ Boe Ɔda a. Bavɛ kakɔ a nɛ Hebri tide kamɛ kĩ Gabata. 14Lɔkɔ a nyɛ Wuda Katɛ̃ kukũmanɛ luwi, ade fɔ́ana ndɛ suwa tɔdɔũ ewua-nviã a.
Ade Pilato bi Yudafɔ a kĩ, “Amɔ mi Lɛgã a nɛ awĩ!”
15Bati a bɔa fɔwɔla kĩ, “Kpã ye kanamɛna! Kpã ye kanamɛna! Bɔa ye nɛ asendua akũ!”
Ade Pilato via be kĩ, “Miawɛ kĩ mbɔa mi lɛgã nɛ asendua akũ?”
Basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Bɔlá Lɛgã lidima kɛba Roma Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃!”
16Adeke Pilato fɔnɛ Yesu awɛ ɛkpa sodzafɔ a kĩ bɛnaabɔa ye nɛ asendua akũ a.
Bɛbɔa Yesu Nɛ Asendua Akũ.
Foesũ bɛkpã Yesu bɛdzakũmɛna. 17Ye mɔawɛ ɛlɔ ye asendua ɛnawo awã kĩ bavɛ Oti Lɔlɔ Fɔtsɔ̃. Bavɛ awã nɛ Hebri tide kamɛ kĩ Golgata. 18Ade awã naa, bɛbɔa ye nɛ asendua akũ a. Bɛbɔa bati nviã bɛbã nɛ asendua akũ bibumɔ ye, ɔmɔa nɛ ye sɛba, ɔyade nɛ ye sɔmɔna, ade Yesu deĩ nɛ be kayite a.
19Pilato tsɛlɛ ye onukpɛ̃ katsua fɔlɛtsa bɛbɔa nɛ asendua a lɔlɔ nyangɛ. Fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ɛtsɛlɛ nyɛ, “Yesu Nazaretni, Yudafɔ Lɛgã a.” 20Yudafɔ pii kã fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ a, kitonɛkĩ awã kĩ bɛbɔa Yesu a fuãmɔ ɔmatɔ kamɛ. Pilato tsɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa a nɛ Hebri, Roma mɔ Hela lɛmɛ tide kamɛ. 21Ade basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a sĩ fɔlɛtsa a, ade bibi Pilato kĩ, “Tatsɛlɛ kĩ, ‘Yudafɔ Lɛgã,’ mbom ‘Oti kĩĩ lɛ kĩ, “Yĩ nyɛ Yudafɔ Lɛgã a.” ’ ”
22Pilato kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Lɛtsa a kĩ ntsɛlɛ ni, ntsɛlɛ de kɔkɔɛ.”
23Kĩ sodzafɔ a bɔa Yesu nɛ asendua akũ biyua a, bɛbɔɛ ye tɛtadiɛ bɛsɛ̃ nɛ kutsu ɛna kamɛ, ade sodzafɔ a kamɛ odi nyɛ odi bɔɛ kamɔa a. Ke liti a, bɛbɔɛ ye atadiɛ amɛde a kĩ bɛtápam, mbom bɛnɔ ye kito sɔmɔ kɛnake kayɔ a.
24Sodzafɔ a bi akũ kĩ, “Mitafɔ̃ bɔyɛlɛ atadiɛ a, mbom mifɔ̃ bɔta bavulibi bɔmɔ́ oti a kĩ yaatɛ ye.”
Fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ ya ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a aaya nɛ foe kamɛ kĩ,
“Bɛsɛ̃ yĩ tɛtadiɛ bɛkpa akũ.
Ade bɛta bavulibi nɛ yĩ atadiɛ akũ a.”
Ade lɛtsa a kĩ sodzafɔ a kɛna a.
25Finyaakĩiĩ a, Yesu ɔma, ɔma ɔwaɛ̃tsole, Maria kĩ ɛnyɛ Clopa ɔtsɔ̃, mɔ Maria Magdalani dzɛ̃ nɛ Yesu asendua a ɔwɛ̃. 26Kĩ Yesu mɔ́ ɔma mɔ ye fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ a kĩ yaátunɔ kalɛ a kĩ bɛdzɛ̃ nɛ awã a, ebi ɔma kĩ, “Mma, dã ade nɔ obi nɛ awĩ a!”
27Ade ebi fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ a kĩ, “Dã, ade ama nɛ awĩ a!” Kito luwi a akũ a, fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ a kpã Maria ɛnamɛna nɛ ye mɔawɛ tɔtɔ kamɛ.
Yesu Kaku.
28Finyaa Yesu nyi kĩ biyua lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kakɛna. Ayekĩ fɔ́afɔ̃ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛya nɛ foe kamɛ sũ ni, ɛlɛ kĩ, “Ɔmɔado akɔ yĩ.”
29Kugumi kudi keni nɛ awã kĩ kuyi mɔ waĩ yilawa. Ade bɛkɔa ɔsapɔ bɛta waĩ a bɛkɔa bido nɛ otse akũ bɛnatamɔ Yesu onukpɛ̃. 30Kĩ Yesu mɔa bavɛ a eyua a, ɛlɛ kĩ, “Fuwoli!”
Ɛkɛna lɔlɔ ade ye kawɛya nɛ a.
Bɛtsɔɛ Yesu Lɔtsɔɛ Nɛ Sɛklabi.
31Luwi a nyɛ Efieda, ade Kawɛya Luwi kĩ litomɔ de a nyɛ luwi kpalɛwa lɛkpa Yudafɔ, foesũ bɛtáwɛ kĩ banɔkpa a bɛkahɔ nɛ asendua akũ Kawɛya Luwi a liwo ɔtɔ. Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a navia Pilato kĩ ɛkpa be osi bɛnaaveliveli bati a kĩ bɛbɔa nɛ asendua akũ a abɔa, lɔkɔa bɛnyɛ be banɔkpa a. 32Foesũ sodzafɔ a yaveli oti ɔtɔnyade mɔ oti bɛbã a kĩ bɛbɔa nɛ asendua akũ bibumɔ Yesu a abɔa. 33Lɛmɛ kĩ biwo Yesu akũ a, bɛmɔ́ kĩ eku kɔkɔɛ, foesũ bɛtáveli ye abɔa. 34Lɛmɛ be kamɛ ɔmɔa kɔa lɔtsɔɛ ɛtsɔɛ ye sɛklabi, ade deedimɔapɛ babɔanɛ mɔ mui nɛ a.
35Oti a kĩ ɛmɔ́ fɔtsa kĩĩ lidi adansiɛ nɛ foe akũ ayekĩ nɔ malo aatɛ odo. Lɛtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali, ade enyina pefee kĩ ɔnɔkɔali ɛlɛ a. 36Fukĩĩ ya ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa fɔlɛtsa a aaya nɛ foe kamɛ kĩ, “Bɛláave ye lɔtsɔ̃ lidima.” 37Fɔlɛtsa bɛbã nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ lɛmɛ lɛ kĩ, “Bati aako anɛ bɛdã oti a kĩ bɛtsɔɛ ye lɔtsɔɛ a.”
Yesu Kabila.
38Ke liti a, Yosef kĩ eto Arimatia yavia Pilato kĩ ɛkpa ye osi ɛbɔɛ Yesu ɔnɔkpa a. Yosef kĩĩ nyɛ Yesu fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ odi nɛ kabɛla kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ ɛkavila Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a. Pilato kpa osi, ade Yosef yabɔɛ ɔnɔkpa a ɛdzakumɛna a. 39Ade Nikodemo kĩ ɛnya lɔtɔ ɛnaa Yesu sɛkɛ̃ mɔ lɛnyɛ a lɛmɛ tomɔ Yosef ɛya a. Ɛnɛɛ tutsonu mɔ ɔlɛ̃ kĩ bɛkɔa klubɔũ mɔ odi kĩ bavɛ aloa bɛkɛna ɛyamɛna. Te ɔlɔmɛ kamɛ aana ndɛ kilo taalɛ. 40Banyole nviã a kɔa tutsonu a bikputa Yesu ɔnɔkpa a, ade bɛkɔa aklala ovoe bisuli ye ndɛ ayekĩ Yudafɔ akɛna ɔnɔkpa fɔmɔ babila ye a. 41Kɔbã kudi deĩ nɛ awã kĩ bɛbɔa Yesu nɛ asendua akũ a. Linikɛ vɔɛ̃ kĩ bɛtábila oti tɔ̃ deĩ nɛ kɔbã a kamɛ. 42Ayekĩ luwi a nyɛ Kukũmanɛ luwi lɛkpa Kawɛya Luwi a, ade kĩ awã lɛmɛ fuã be sũ ni, bɛkɔa Yesu ɔnɔkpa a bibila nɛ awã.

Title: YOHANES 20
Content:
Bɛmɔ́ Kĩ Linikɛ a Waa Luto.
1Ɛkwansieda ɔnɔnɛ tutuutu a, kĩ fɔkɔ tákpalɛ tɔ̃ a, Maria Magdalani naa linikɛ a ɔwɛ̃, ade ɛmɔ́ kĩ bitinya de a nɛ linikɛ a onukpɛ̃. 2Foesũ ewula atsɛ ɛnaa Simon Petro mɔ fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ a kĩ Yesu látunɔ kalɛ a sɛkɛ̃, ebi be kĩ, “Bɛyabɔɛ boe Ɔlate nɛ linikɛ a kamɛ bɛdzakũmɛna, ade bunyína awã kĩ bɛkɔa ye biyi a.”
3Ade Petro mɔ fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ kĩ a yidza bɛnaa linikɛ a ɔwɛ̃. 4Be nviã a flee bɛkawula atsɛ, lɛmɛ fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ kĩ a wula atsɛ ɛtɛ̃ Petro ɛnya lɔtɔ ewo linikɛ a ɔwɛ̃. 5Ɛkɛna akũ ɛdã de kamɛ ɛmɔ́ aklala a kĩ bɛkɔa bisuli ɔnɔkpa a, lɛmɛ ɛtáwo nɛ linikɛ a kamɛ. 6Simon Petro kĩ etomɔ ye nɛ liti a, ya ade ye kɔ̃ ewo nɛ linikɛ a kamɛ a. Ɛmɔ́ aklala ovoe a kĩ ɛwaa nɛ awã. 7Ɛmɔ́ lima a kĩ bɛkɔa bisui Yesu lɔlɔ a lɛmɛ nɛ awã, lɛmɛ lɛwáa nɛ aklala a ɔwɛ̃, mbom bibuta de biyi de lite. 8Ke liti a, fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ bɛbã a kĩ ɛnya lɔtɔ ewo linikɛ a ɔwɛ̃ a, lɛmɛ wo nɛ de kamɛ. Ɛmɔ́ aklala mɔ lɔlɔ kasui lima a, ade ɛtɛ edo a. 9Ke malo ni, bɛtánu kayɔ kĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ Yesu eyidza eto kanɔkpa. 10Ke liti a, fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a dzakũ bɛnaa be tɔtɔ kamɛ.
Yesu Nyɛ Ye Akũ Ɛtsa Maria Magdalani
11Lɛmɛ Maria dza nɛ linikɛ a ɔwɛ̃ ɛkabe. Kĩ ɛkabe a, ɛkɛna akũ ɛdã linikɛ a kamɛ, 12ade ɛmɔ́ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ nviã kĩ bideĩ nɛ tɛtadiɛ fitaa kamɛ, kĩ bidzi nɛ awã kĩ bɛwɔ́la Yesu a. Ɔmɔa dzi nɛ ye lɔlɔ nyangɛ, ɔbɛbã dzi nɛ ye abɔa kayɔ.
13Bivia Maria kĩ, “Boe ɔma, litsa sũ abe?”
Maria kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Bɛbɔɛ yĩ Ɔlate bɛnamɛna, ade ĩnyína awã kĩ bɛkɔa ye bɛnamɛna a.” 14Kĩ ɛlɛ fukĩĩ eyua a, ɛdani akũ ade ɛmɔ́ Yesu kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ awã, lɛmɛ ɛtányi kĩ ye yanɛ.
15Yesu via ye kĩ, “Boe ɔma, nde sũ abe? Owei awɛ?”
Lɛmɛ Maria kɔna kĩ oti a kĩ yadãmɛna awã a yanɛ, foesũ ebi ye kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃, ntɛ nɔ lɛbɔɛ ye ni, bi yĩ awã kĩ oyi ye lɔkɔa nnaabɔɛ ye.”
16Ade Yesu vɛ ye kĩ, “Maria!”
Ɛdani ɛtsɛlamɔ ye ade ɛlɛ nɛ Hebri tide kamɛ kĩ, “Raboni!” Foe kayɔ nyɛ Fɔtsa ɔtsanɛ.
17Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Tata yĩ, kitonɛkĩ ntámuniki nnaa ode nɛ Nda sɛkɛ̃ tɔ̃. Lɛmɛ naa nwaɛ̃ amɛ sɛkɛ̃ kabi be kĩ mmuniki manaa oti a kĩ ɛnyɛ Nda mɔ mi Ɔlɛga, yĩ Baguma mɔ mi Baguma a sɛkɛ̃.”
18Foesũ Maria Magdalani a nabi fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ ɛmɔ́ Ɔlate a, ade ebi be fɔlɛtsa a kĩ Yesu bi ye a flee a.
Yesu Nyɛ Ye Akũ Ɛtsa Ye Fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a.
19Nɛ Ɛkwansieda a na olobe a, fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kpɔta nɛ kɔla kamɛ, ade bɛbalɛ onyukpɛ̃ tupunu a flee, kitonɛkĩ bɛkavila Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a. Lɛtalɛta Yesu yanɛ ɛdza nɛ be kayite, ade ebi be kĩ, “Lukudɔ litomɔ mi.” 20Kĩ ɛlɛ fukĩĩ eyua a, ɛkɔa ye awɛ mɔ sɛklabi ɛtsa be. Adeke kawɔlɛ de fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ bɛmɔ́ Ɔlate a.
21Yesu buki ebi be kĩ, “Lukudɔ litomɔ mi! Ndɛ ayekĩ Nda do yĩ a, ade aye mado mi a.” 22Adeke ɛwɛya eko nɛ be akũ, ɛlɛ kĩ, “Mitɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a. 23Ntɛ mikɔa bati tɔkpa mite be ni, bɛkɔa bite be, lɛmɛ ntɛ mitákɔa be tɔkpa mite be a ni, bɛtákɔa te bite be.”
Yesu Nyɛ Ye Akũ Ɛtsa Toma.
24Kĩ Yesu ya a, Toma kĩ ɛnyɛ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ ewua-nviã a kamɛ ɔmɔa, kĩ bibuki bavɛ Ata a, tána nɛ ye bade a kamɛ. 25Foesũ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ bɛbã a bi ye kĩ, “Bɔmɔ́ boe Ɔlate a!”
Ade Toma bi be kĩ, “Ntɛ ntámɔ ye awɛ kamɛ tiplego fɔɔkpa a, nkɔa lawobi nte nɛ fɔɔkpa a akũ ndo awɛ nɛ ye sɛklabi ni, nláatɛ ndo da.”
26Nɛ fuwi ɛlɛ̃ liti a, fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a buki bɛkpɔta nɛ kɔla a kamɛ, ade Toma lɛmɛ na nɛ be kamɛ a. Bɛbalɛ tupunu a flee, lɛmɛ Yesu yadza nɛ be kayite ade ɛlɛ kĩ, “Lukudɔ litomɔ mi!” 27Adeke ebi Toma kĩ, “Kɔa nɔ lawobi kate nɛ awĩ, kadã yĩ awɛ kamɛ. Yo kɔkpɔ kado awɛ nɛ yĩ sɛklabi kamɛ. Fɔ̃ atsindze katɛ, lɔkɔa katɛ kado!”
28Toma bi ye kĩ, “Yĩ Ɔlate mɔ yĩ Baguma!”
29Ade Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Ayekĩ ɔmɔ́ yĩ sũ ɔtɛ odo. Baguma hila bikĩ bɛtámɔ yĩ, lɛmɛ bɛtɛ bido a!”
Lɛtsa a Kĩ Lɛnyɛ Ovoli Kĩĩ Botaɛ.
30Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, Yesu kɛna awãwã fɔtsa bɛbã pii nɛ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a anɛ, kĩ bɛtátsɛlɛ bido nɛ ovoli kĩĩ kamɛ. 31Lɛmɛ bɛtsɛlɛ fukĩĩ biyi ayekĩ míatɛ mido kĩ Yesu nyɛ Kristo, Baguma Obi, ade mitɛ ye mido ni, míatsã ye akũ mina nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna a.

Title: YOHANES 21
Content:
Yesu Nyɛ Ye Akũ Ɛtsa Ye Fɔtsa Bakɔlɛnɛ Evũkɔnɔ.
1Ke liti a, Yesu buki ɛnyɛ ye akũ ɛtsa ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ nɛ Tiberia Lutubu Baũ a abuĩ. Ayekĩ ɛnyɛ ye akũ ɛtsa a nyɛ. 2Luwi a, ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ badi kpɔta. Ade be nyɛ Simon Petro, Toma kĩ bavɛ Ata obi, mɔ Nataniel kĩ eto Kana nɛ Galilea tite akũ, mɔ Zebedeo babi mɔ Yesu fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ bɛbã nviã. 3Ade Simon Petro bi be kĩ, “Manaata asau.”
Bibi ye kĩ, “Bɔ́atomɔ nɔ bɔnaa.” Foesũ bɛnawo nɛ ɔkɔlɔ kamɛ bɛnaa, lɛmɛ lɛnyɛ a flee bɛtányɛ lɛtsama.
4Kĩ kade aya kanyina kɔ̃ a, Yesu ya ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ ɔwɔ abuĩ, lɛmɛ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a linyína kĩ Yesu yanɛ. 5Ade evia be kĩ, “Bapopo, mbɔɛɛ mitányɛ kɔfɔabi kudima?”
Bɛkpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Oowo!”
6Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mita asau nɛ ɔkɔlɔ a sɔmɔna sɛmakɛ lɔkɔa míana kɔfɔabi a kudi.” Ade bɛta asau a bɛnyɛ kɔfɔabi beblebee kĩ bɛtápuli bɛvɛlɛ bɛnɛmɛna.
7Fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ a kĩ Yesu látunɔ kalɛ a bi Petro kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate a yanɛ!” Kĩ Petro nu kĩ boe Ɔlate yanɛ a, ɛbɔɛ ye atadiɛ anyanglede efili nɛ kate, kitonɛkĩ edzi ɔdzɔ, ade ɛvɛnya ewo nɛ mui a kamɛ a. 8Fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ nkaɛ a ta ɔkɔlɔ a, bɛvɛlɛ asau a kĩ eyi mɔ kɔfɔabi a bɛyamɛna nɛ ɔwɔ abuĩ a. Awã kĩ bɛna a mɔ ɔwɔ abuĩ lɛlá lugo, fɔ́ana ndɛ abasam ɔha. 9Kĩ biduma nɛ ɔkɔlɔ a kamɛ a, bɛmɔ́ kĩ bɛtɛna futuã fi kĩ kɔfɔabi teĩ nɛ foe akũ, ade abodoo adi lɛmɛ waa nɛ awã a.
10Ade Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mikɔa kɔfɔabi a kĩ minyɛ finyaa kudi miyamɛna.”
11Simon Petro wo nɛ ɔkɔlɔ a kamɛ, ɛnavɛlɛ asau a ɛyamɛna nɛ lɔwɔ tuni. Kɔfɔabi baũ baũ ɔha mɔa mɔ aduenum ɛlalɛ yi asau a. Titɔ kĩ kɔfɔabi a pɔnɛ malo ni, asau a tákpeli. 12Ade Yesu bi be kĩ, “Miyaanya.” Lɛmɛ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kamɛ odima tádo ɔwɔlɛ evia ye kĩ, “Owei anɛ?” kitonɛkĩ binyina kĩ Boe Ɔlate a yanɛ. 13Foesũ Yesu nabɔɛ abodoo a ɛkɔa ɛkpa be, ade ayea ɛbɔɛ kɔfɔabi a lɛmɛ ɛkpa be a.
14Ade fukĩĩ nyɛ lɛlade kĩ Yesu nyɛ ye akũ ɛtsa ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ, kĩ Baguma dzɛla ye etomɛna kanɔkpa a.
Yesu Lɛ Kɔdzɛla Mɔ Petro.
15Kĩ bɛnya biyua a, Yesu via Simon Petro kĩ, “Simon, Yona obi, awɛ yĩ kalɛ kaba ayekĩ bati bɛbã kĩĩ a awɛ yĩ kalɛ a?”
Ɛkpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Oo, Boe Ɔlate! Onyina kĩ mawɛ nɔ kalɛ.”
Ade Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Dãmɛna yĩ bavelibi akũ.”
16Yesu buki evia ye lɛyade kĩ, “Simon, Yona obi, awɛ yĩ kalɛ?”
Petro kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Oo, Boe Ɔlate! Nɔ mɔawɛ onyina kĩ mawɛ nɔ kalɛ.”
Ade Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Dãmɛna yĩ baveli a akũ.”
17Yesu buki evia Petro lɛlalɛde kĩ, “Simon, Yona obi, awɛ yĩ kalɛ?”
Petro wo ɔblɔ kitonɛkĩ Yesu via ye lɛlade kĩ, “Awɛ yĩ kalɛ?” Foesũ ebi Yesu kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, nɔ mɔawɛ onyina lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa. Nɔ mɔawɛ onyina kĩ mawɛ nɔ kalɛ!”
Ade Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Dãmɛna yĩ baveli a akũ. 18Mabi nɔ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ lɔkɔ a kĩ ɔnyɛ opopo a, apuli kafili lima, kanaa kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ kĩ awɛ, lɛmɛ ntɛ ɔdɛ a ni, aadzɛla akpɔ, oti bɛbã lifili nɔ lima, ɛkpã nɔ ɛnamɛna awã kĩ aáwɛ kĩ anaa.” 19Yesu lɛ fukĩĩ ɛkɔa ɛtsa wuda odu a kĩ Petro aaku, ɛkɔa ɛnyɛ Baguma kukũkpalɛ a ɛtsa.
Ke liti a, Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Tomɔ yĩ.”
20Petro dani ade ɛmɔ́ fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ a kĩ Yesu látunɔ kalɛ a kĩ etomɔ be nɛ liti yaya. Ade fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ kĩĩ lidzi ɛmɛnamɔ Yesu kĩ bidzi bɛkanya, ade evia ye kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, owei aanyɛ nɔ ɛkpa a?” 21Kĩ Petro mɔ́ ye a, evia Yesu kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, litsa aaya nɛ oti kĩĩ akũ?”
22Ade Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ mawɛ kĩ edzi nkpã kɛnaawo kĩ maaya a ni, fɔwɔdabe tsɛla nɔ akũ? Nɔ kɔ̃, tomɔ yĩ!”
23Fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ gba nɛ Yesu batomɛnanɛ a kamɛ kĩ fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ kĩĩ lɛláaku. Lɛmɛ Yesu tálɛ kĩ ɛláaku, mbom kalɛ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ mawɛ kĩ edzi nkpã kɛnaawo kĩ maaya a ni, fɔɔdabe tsɛla nɔ akũ?”
24Ade fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ kĩĩ adi adansiɛ nɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ akũ a, ade ye lɛmɛ lɛtsɛlɛ foe eyi a. Foesũ bunyina kĩ lɛtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali.
Fɔlɛtsa Fuwũnade.
25Fɔtsa bɛbã pii deĩ kĩ Yesu kɛna. Ntɛ katsɛlɛ bɛtsɛlɛ foe flee biyi fɔmɔa fɔmɔa ni, nkɔna kĩ katinya kĩĩ flee kamɛ malo lɛláana kakokɔ̃ kɛkpa tuvoli a kĩ baatsɛlɛ a.

Title: ADZUMA 1
Content:
1-2Nwaɛ̃ Tiofilo, nɛ yĩ ovoli ɔtɔnyade a kamɛ a, ntsɛlɛ ntsa lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ Yesu kɛna mɔ fukĩ ɛtsa, kito nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ eyi ye adzuma kayɔ, kɛnawo lɔkɔ a kĩ Baguma bɔɛ ye ɛnamɛna ode. Fɔmɔ Baguma bɔɛ ye bɛnamɛna ode a, Yesu tsã Hũhũ Kpalɛwa kɔbɛ̃ akũ ɛtsa ye fɔtɔ banyanɛ a kĩ ɛpau a fɔtsa. 3Nɛ ye wuda liti a, ɛnyɛ ye akũ ɛtsa be nɛ tisi pii akũ nɛ fuwi tɛna kamɛ, kĩ atsindze katɛ lɛláa foe kamɛ kĩ edzi nkpã. Ɛlɛmɔ bikĩ bɛmɔ́ ye a kɔdzɛla nɛ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ fɔlɛtsa a akũ. 4Lɔkɔ a kĩ bɛkpɔta a, esi be mbla kĩ, “Mitadzakũ nɛ Yerusalem, mbom midzi midzɔlɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a kĩ mbi mi kĩ yĩ Ɔlɛga lɛ eyi kĩ yaakpa mi a kaya. 5Yohanes kɔ̃ ni, mui ɛkɔa ɛwɔla bati. Lɛmɛ nɛ fuwi lukũ kamɛ ni, Baguma aakɔa Hũhũ Kpalɛwa ɛwɔla mi.”
Baguma Bɔɛ Yesu Ɛnamɛna Ode.
6Lɔkɔ a kĩ Yesu mɔ ye fɔtɔ banyanɛ a buki bɛkpɔta a, bivia ye kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, mbɔɛɛ finyaakĩĩ ɔwɛ kĩ ayaamunikimɔ Israelfɔ lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a ɔkpa be?”
7Ade Yesu bi be kĩ, “Fɔtásĩ kĩ mianyi lɔkɔ ĩye fuwi a kĩ yĩ ɔlɛga lɛ eyi ɛkpa kĩ litsedi lɛya a nɛ ye kɔbɛ̃ akũ a. 8Lɛmɛ ntɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a yawo nɛ mi kamɛ ni, yaado mi kɔbɛ̃ lɔkɔa milɛ yĩ fɔlɛtsa a nɛ Yerusalem, mɔ Yudea flee mɔ Samaria, kɛnaawo katinya kamɛ tite kawũnakɔ̃.”
9Kĩ ɛlɛ fukĩĩ eyua a nɛ be anɛ kamɛ naa, Baguma bɔɛ ye ɛnamɛna ode, ade ɛyɛla nɛ luflututu kamɛ a.
10Kĩ bɛdza bɛkadã koee kĩ yanaa odetɔ́ kamɛ a, lɛtalɛta banyole nviã badi kĩ bideĩ nɛ fɔtsa ovoe kamɛ nyɛ be akũ bɛtsa be, 11ade bibi be kĩ, “Galileafɔ, nde sũ midzɛ̃ miadã odetɔ́ kamɛ lɔmɔ? Yesu a kĩ Baguma bɔɛ nɛ mi ɔwɛ̃ nɛ awĩ ɛnamɛna ode a, aabuki ɛya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ ndɛ ayekĩ mimɔ́ kĩ yanaa ode a.”
Matias Yatɛ Yuda Kadzakɔ̃.
12Ke liti a, fɔtɔ banyanɛ kĩĩ dzakũ nɛ Kugua Futse Ɔtɔ akũ a bɛnaa Yerusalem ɔmatɔ kamɛ. Kito awã kɛnawo ɔmatɔ a kamɛ ana ndɛ lisikũ sɛkɛ. 13Kĩ biwo ɔmatɔ a kamɛ a, bɛnaa be kadzikɔ̃ nɛ abansulu kɔla ode. Bati a kĩ bɛna nɛ awã nyɛ Petro, Yohanes, Yakobo, Andrea, Filipo, Toma, Bartolomeo, Mateo, Yakobo kĩ ɛnyɛ Alfeo obi, mɔ Simon kĩ epili ye kade lɔlɔ, mɔ Yuda kĩ ɛnyɛ Yakobo obi. 14Bati kĩĩ flee katsɛna lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ mɔ kakɔna mɔa, kabɔa mpaɛ kakpa Baguma. Bati a badi lɛmɛ nyɛ batsole mɔ Yesu ɔma Maria, mɔ Yesu bawaɛ̃nyole.
15Nɛ fuwi a na kamɛ a, bikĩ bɛtɛ bido a tsɛna, be lidede aawo ndɛ bati ɔha mɔ be tɛya. Ade Petro yidza ɛdza ebi be kĩ, 16“Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, kɛnɛ kĩ lɛtsa a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ, kĩ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a lɛ eyi ɛtsãmɛna Lɛgã Dawid akũ nɛ Yuda kĩ ye lɛnya bati lɔtɔ bipi Yesu a, fɔya lɔmɔ. 17Yuda nya boe kamɛ ɔmɔa kĩ boe Ɔlate nyɛ ye kĩ ɛkɛna fɔtɔ banyanɛ adzuma.”
18Lɛmɛ ɛkɛna tɔkpa kĩ ɛnatɛ sika kĩ se bɛkɔa bɛya tite a kĩ te akũ eku a. Ade awã na kĩ eto ode ɛtɔ a, ye lupu tui lɛbɛ̃, ade ke ye fɔmɛtsa flee nɛ fuko nɛ tite a. 19Ye wuda a akũ fɔlɛtsa gba nɛ Yerusalem kĩ odi nyɛ odi nu foe. Foesũ awã kĩ ɛnaku ɛwa a bavɛ ke kĩ Akeldamak, foe kayɔ nyɛ Babɔanɛ Tite.
20Foesũ Petro buki ɛlɛ kĩ, “Bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ Dawid Tɔnɔ Ovoli a kamɛ kĩ,
‘Mifɔ̃ ye tɔtɔ tɛwa luto,
odima ɛtabuki edzi nɛ te kamɛ.’
Bɛtsɛlɛ lɛmɛ kĩ,
‘Mifɔ̃ oti bɛbã ɛtɛ ye kadzakɔ̃ a.’
21-22Foesũ fusĩ kĩ oti bɛbã ɛyaawo nɛ boe kamɛ ndɛ ɔdansini ɛkpa boe Ɔlate Yesu kayidza kato kanɔkpa a. Ade fusĩ lɛmɛ kĩ ɛnya oti kĩ ɛnya boe bati a kĩ bɔtsã butomɛna boe Ɔlate Yesu a kamɛ ɔmɔa, kito lɔkɔ a kĩ Yohanes de lɛtsã nɛ mui kawɔla amaniɛ akũ kɛyawo lɔkɔ a kĩ Baguma bɔɛ Yesu nɛ boe sɛkɛ̃ ɛnamɛna ode a.”
23Foesũ bɛnyɛ bati nviã ade be nyɛ Matias mɔ Yosef kĩ bavɛ Barsaba kĩ babuki kavɛ Yusto a.
24-25Ade bɛbɔa mpaɛ bɛvɛ Baguma kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, nɔ nyina odi nyɛ odi lɔlɔ kamɛ. Tsa boe bati nviã kĩĩ kamɛ ekĩ ɔnyɛ kĩ ɛdza ndɛ fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ nɛ kadzakɔ̃ a kĩ Yuda fɔnɛ awɛ eyi ɛnaa awã kĩ kɛfɛta ye a.” 26Kĩ bɛta bavulibi nɛ bati nviã kĩĩ fɔlɔ a, fɔyake nɛ Matias akũ, ade bɛkɔa ye bibumɛna fɔtɔ banyanɛ ewua-odi a akũ a.

Title: ADZUMA 2
Content:
Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a Kaya Nɛ Pentekoste Luwi a Akũ.
1Kĩ Pentekoste luwi a wo ɔtɔ a, batɛ badonɛ a flee natsɛna nɛ kakɔ mɔapɛ. 2Deedimɔapɛ, binu litsedi nkã ndɛ ayekĩ ɔwɛ kpale avũ a nɛ odetɔ́ kamɛ, ade ɔwɛ kĩĩ tɛ tɔtɔ a flee kĩ te kamɛ bɛna a kamɛ a. 3Bɛmɔ́ litsedi ndɛ fi fɔmɛ kĩ fɔka fudzi nɛ odi nyɛ odi akũ. 4Ade Hũhũ Kpalɛwa tɛ be kamɛ flee, ade bido kɔdzɛla kalɛ awɛ nɛ tide futefute kamɛ, ndɛ ayekĩ Hũhũ a kpa be a.
5Ade nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ a, Yudafɔ kĩ bavila Baguma kĩ bito fude kumɛkumɛ nɛ katinya kamɛ flee a ya bideĩ nɛ Yerusalem. 6Foesũ kĩ binu ɔwɛ baũ kĩĩ nkã a, bati pii bɔa obũ bɛnakpɔta nɛ awã. Kĩ binu kĩ batɛ badonɛ kĩĩ kalɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ be kamɛ odi nyɛ odi tide kamɛ a, fɔkɛna be wãwã. 7Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ libe wo be, bɛkɛna saa, ade bido akũ kavia awɛ kĩ, “Midã, mbɔɛɛ nnɛ́ Galileafɔ bati kĩĩ flee anɛ? 8Mɔ nde fɔya mɔ bɔanu kĩ bɛlamɛna kɔdzɛla kalɛ nɛ boe tide kamɛ? 9-10Bɔnyɛ Partiafɔ mɔ Mediafɔ mɔ Elamfɔ ade boe kamɛ badi to Mesopotamia mɔ Yudea mɔ Kapadokia mɔ Ponto mɔ Asia mɔ Frigia mɔ Pamfilia mɔ Egipte mɔ Libia kakɔ a kĩ kifuã Kirene. Boe badi buto Roma 11kĩ bɔnyɛ Yudafɔ ĩye bati kĩ bɛdani akũ bɛkɛna Yudafɔ, boe badi bɔnyɛ Kretafɔ mɔ Arabiafɔ. Ade boe flee bɔanu kĩ bɛlamɛna Baguma awãwã fɔtsa kalɛ nɛ boe tide kamɛ a.” 12Ade kĩ fɔkɛna be saa mɔ basaa lɔmɔ a, bɛkavia be akũ kĩ, “Litsa fɔlɛtsa nɛ awĩ a?”
13Lɛmɛ bikĩ bɛdza nɛ awã badi di be nsekuo bɛlɛ kĩ, “Bavɛ lamɛna be kawugɛla.”
Petro Bi Yudafɔ Yesu Akũ Fɔlɛtsa.
14Ade awã mɔ Petro yidza ɛdza mɔ be ewua-odi a, ɛdzɛla odo ɛlɛ kĩ, “Mi Yudafɔ mɔ mi a flee kĩ midzi nɛ Yerusalem, mawɛ kĩ manyɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩ flee kayɔ ntsa mi, foesũ mitse katse wĩ. 15Nnɛ́ bavɛ bati kĩĩ wuga ndɛ ayekĩ mikɔna a. Midã kĩ ade owi fɔmɔ ɔnɔnɛ tɔdɔũ evedi bɔa a. 16Mbom lɛtsa a kĩ de milamɛna kamɔ nɛ awĩ a nyɛ fukĩ Baguma Onukpɛ̃ Ɔnyɛnɛ Yoel lɛ eyi anɛ kɔkɔɛ a kĩ, 17‘Baguma lɛ kĩ,
“Nɛ fuwi nkaɛ a kamɛ ni,
maado yĩ Hũhũ ɛyaawo nɛ bati flee kamɛ,
lɔkɔa mi babinyole mɔ babitsole aade lɛtsã nɛ yĩ kalɛ a akũ.
Mi bapopo aamɔ ode fɔtsa kɛnawa nɛ hũhũ kamɛ,
ade mi banɔkɔɛ̃ lɛmɛ aawa fɔda a.
18Ɔnɔkɔali, nɛ fuwi a na kamɛ ni, yĩ Hũhũ aatɛ mi basumunɛ batsole mɔ banyole flee kamɛ,
lɔkɔa baadɛ lɛtsã nɛ yĩ fɔlɛtsa akũ.
19Ade maafɔ̃ awãwã fɔtsa lɛnɛ
nɛ odetɔ kamɛ mɔ tite akũ.
Míamɔ babɔanɛ, mɔ fi mɔ ɔnyɔ kusuu kĩ fɔgba nɛ tite akũ.
20Suwa aake ɔtũ,
odetɔ anɛ aadani ngbã ndɛ babɔanɛ aye,
ade owi fɔmɔ Baguma Luwi kpale
mɔ kukũkpalɛ a aaya a.
21Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ ni, odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaavɛ Ɔlate a dĩ
mɔ evia ye kɔnyakamɔ ni, yaana katɛ.” ’ ”
22Ade Petro buki ɛlɛ kĩ, “Nwaɛ̃ amɛ Israelfɔ, mitse fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ. Yesu Nazaretni nyɛ Oti a kĩ Baguma pau, kĩ ye deĩ Baguma kɔbɛ̃. Ɛnyɛ kɔbɛ̃ kĩĩ ɛtsa mi nɛ ye awãwã mɔ nsɛntsɛlɛni fɔtsa kɛnawa kamɛ, ndɛ ayekĩ mi mɔawɛ minyina lɛmɛ a. 23Lɛmɛ nɛ Baguma kawɛ mɔ nhihiɛ onukpɛ̃ ni ɛfɔnɛ ye awɛ ɛkpa mi, ade mitsã tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ akũ mikɔ ye, nɛ kĩ mibɔa ye nɛ asendua akũ a. 24Lɛmɛ Baguma buki ɛdzɛla ye etomɛna banɔkpa kamɛ ade ɛnɛ́ nɛ wuda awɛ kamɛ a, kitonɛkĩ wuda tápuli ɛfɔ̃ ɛkahɔ nɛ kanɔkpa da. 25Ade lɛgã Dawid lɛ eyi nɛ ye akũ kĩ,
‘Mamɔ kĩ yĩ Ɔlate dzɛ̃ nɛ yĩ anɛ kamɛ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ
Nɛ kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ yĩ sɔmɔna ndɛ yĩ obumɛnanɛ sũ maávila.
26Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ kawɔlɛ de yĩ ade fɔfɔ̃ mamu ye luwi daa.
Titɔ kĩ sukɛna pupulidza manɛ malo ni,
maadzi nɛ kɔnɛte kamɛ.
27Kitonɛkĩ ɔláafɔ̃nɛ yĩ ɔkla oyi nɛ kanɔkpade,
ade ɔláafɔ̃ nɔ Obi Kpalɛwa sukɛna lɛvɔ̃ nɛ linikɛ kamɛ a.
28Nɔ lɛtsa yĩ nkpã osi a,
ade nɔ sɛkɛ̃ kana aafɔ̃ mmɔ́ kawɔlɛ paa.’
29“Foesũ, nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mabi mi yededeede kĩ boe ɔwanyɔ Lɛgã Dawid ku, bibila ye, ade ye kuni waa nɛ boe kamɛ kɛyawo nviã kĩ a. 30Lɛmɛ kĩ ɛnya Baguma onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ sũ ni, enyi lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi kĩ yaakɛna ɛkpa ye. Baguma lɔ fubo kĩ yaakɛna Dawid kasinu a kamɛ obi mɔa odi ɛyaadzi ɛnya lɛgã ndɛ Dawid aye. 31Nɛ kĩ Dawid nyi fukĩĩ ɛnyamɛna lɔtɔ sũ ni, ɛlɛ eyi kĩ Kristo aayidza eto banɔkpa kamɛ. Ɛlɛ kĩ, ‘Baguma táfɔnɛ ye awɛ ɛkahɔ nɛ kanɔkpa, ade ye sukɛna lɛmɛ távɔ̃ nɛ linikɛ kamɛ a.’ 32Ade Yesu kĩĩ Baguma dzɛla etomɛna banɔkpa kamɛ a, ade boe a flee bɔnyɛ foe akũ adansifɔ a. 33Finyaakĩĩ ni, Ɔlɛga Baguma kpa ye lɔnɔkɔɛ̃ kadzikɔ̃ nɛ ye sɔmɔna, ade ɛkɔa ye Hũhũ ɛkpa ye ndɛ ayekĩ ɛlɛ eyi a. Foesũ ye malo ɛkɔa ye Hũhũ a, eko nɛ boe akũ. Ade foesũ mimɔ́, minu lɛmɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛlamɛna kaya nɛ awĩ a. 34-35Nnɛ́ Dawid liyidza ɛnaa ode, mbom ye lɛlɛ kĩ,
‘Baguma bi yĩ Ɔlate kĩ,
“Dzi nɛ yĩ sɔmɔna
kɛnaawo lɔkɔ a kĩ maakɔa nɔ bakesĩnɛ nkɛna
ndɛ nɔ abɔa katekɔ̃.” ’
36Foesũ mawɛ kĩ mi Israelfɔ flee minyi kĩ Yesu a kĩ mibɔa nɛ asendua akũ a, ade ye Baguma kɛna Ɔlate mɔ Kristo Oti a Kĩ Bɛbɔa Tɔdɔ̃ a.”
37Kĩ bati kĩĩ nu Petro fɔlɛtsa a, fɔha be paa. Foesũ bivia ye mɔ fɔtɔ banyanɛ bɛbã a kĩ, “Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, litsa kɛnɛ kĩ bɔkɛna?”
38Ade Petro bi be kĩ, “Fusĩ kĩ mi kamɛ odi nyɛ odi ɛdani ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ ɛtɛ Baguma edo, lɔkɔa ɛtɛ mui kawɔla amaniɛ nɛ Yesu Kristo dĩ akũ ayekĩ Baguma aakɔa ye titikpa ete ye, ɛtɛ Baguma futetsa a kĩ fɔnyɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a lɛmɛ. 39Kitonɛkĩ lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi kĩĩ a waa fɔkpa mi, mɔ mi babi mɔ bikĩ bito mɔ lugo, mɔ bikĩ boe Ɔlate Baguma aavɛ kĩ bɛya nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ a.”
40Ade Petro dɛ be pii ɛlɛ kĩ, “Minyɛ mi akũ mitomɛna sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ a kĩ saaya nɛ nviã katinya bati kpa kĩĩ akũ a kamɛ.” 41Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ bati pii nɛ be kamɛ tɛ Petro fɔlɛtsa a bido, ade bɛwɔla be mui nɛ Yesu dĩ akũ a. Be lidede aana ndɛ mpim ɛlalɛ kĩ bɛkɔa bibumɛna batɛ badonɛ a akũ nɛ luwi a. 42Bɛfɔnɛ be akũ awɛ bɛkpa fɔtɔ banyanɛ a bɛkatsa be fɔtsa, ade bɛkabɔa mpaɛ mɔ kanya kakpɔta mɔ ɔmɔa kakɛna a.
Batɛ Badonɛ a Dzi Mɔ Onukpɛ̃ Mɔa.
43Nɛ kĩ fɔtɔ banyanɛ a kakɛna awãwã fɔtsa mɔ nsɛntsɛlɛni pii sũ ni, fɔkɛna bati pii wãwã. 44Batɛ badonɛ kĩĩ flee katsɛna luwi daa kakɛna lɛtsa mɔa, ade bɛkasɛ̃ be fɔtsa kakpa akũ a. 45Ntɛ ɔsa bɛnɔ be akũ fɔtsa fudi ni, basɛ̃ sika a kakpa akũ nɛ be kamɛ odi nyɛ odi kasĩ onukpɛ̃. 46Bɛkanaa Baguma afɔliɛ kabɔakɔ̃ a luwi daa, ade bɛkatsɛna nɛ kutsu kutsu kamɛ nɛ be tɔtɔ kamɛ kanya kakpɔta nɛ kawɔlɛ mɔ akũ kadɔla kamɛ a. 47Ade bɛkanyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ, kamu ye lɛmɛ a. Bati flee kɔa obu bɛkpa be. Luwi daa boe Ɔlate akɔa bikĩ bɛtɛ bido a kĩ ɛtɛ a kayaabumɔ be.

Title: ADZUMA 3
Content:
Petro Mɔ Yohanes Tsa Oti Odi Kĩ Eveliveli.
1Luwi a Petro mɔ Yohanes naa Asɔli Kɔla kamɛ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ Yudafɔ abɔa mpaɛ a kamɛ. Fɔ́ana ndɛ olobe tɔdɔũ ɛlalɛ kamɛ. 2Kĩ biwo Asɔli Kɔla onyukpɛ̃ a kĩ bavɛ Onyukpɛ̃ Mɔ Kalɛ a, bɛmɔ́ onyole odi kĩ eveliveli kito ye lɛmawi, kĩ ɛwaa nɛ awã. Ye bati abɔɛ ye kanaayi nɛ awã luwi daa ayekĩ yaakawã sika katomɛna bikĩ batɛ̃ nɛ awã a sɛkɛ̃. 3Kĩ Petro mɔ Yohanes atɛ̃ a, ɛwã be sika. 4Bɛfɔ̃ bɛdza bɛdã ye koee ade Petro bi ye kĩ, “Dã boe anɛ kamɛ!” 5Ade oti a dzɛla anɛ ɛdã be mɔ kakɔna kĩ baakpa ye litsedi.
6Petro bi ye kĩ, “Nla sika sidima kĩ makpa nɔ, lɛmɛ maakpa nɔ lɛtsa a kĩ ndeĩ a! Nɛ Yesu Kristo Nazaretni dĩ akũ ni, mabi nɔ kĩ yidza kadza, katsã!” 7Ade Petro pi oti a nɛ sɔmɔna kɔkpɔ ɛdzɛla ye a. Deedimɔapɛ ye abɔa mɔ anya flee de ɔsĩ, 8ade ɛvɛnya ɛdza nɛ abɔa akũ, edo katokatɛ̃ awɛ a. Etomɔ be biwo nɛ Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ ade ɛkavɛnya kamu Baguma lɛmɛ a. 9Bati a kĩ bɛna nɛ awã a mɔ́ ye kĩ ɛtsɛ̃, ade binu ayekĩ ɛkamu Baguma a. 10Kĩ bɛmɔ́ biyi ɔsũ kĩ ye lɛkadzi nɛ Onyukpɛ̃ Mɔ Kalɛ ɔwɛ̃ kawã fɔtsa a, fɔnyɛnɛ be flee akũ ade bɛkɛna saa nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya nɛ ye akũ a.
Petro Lɛ Yesu Kɔbɛ̃ Akũ Fɔlɛtsa Nɛ Asɔli Kɔla a Kamɛ.
11Bati pii wula atsɛ bɛnaa be sɛkɛ̃ nɛ awã kĩ bavɛ Lɛgã Salomo Mblada nɛ Asɔli kɔla kamɛ a. Bɛyamɔ oti a kĩ ɛmanɛmɔ Petro mɔ Yohanes tsɛmɛtsɛmɛ ade ye kasaɛ a kɛna be saa a. 12Kĩ Petro mɔ́ bati kĩĩ a ebi be kĩ, “Nwaɛ̃ amɛ Israelfɔ, litsa koũ liti lakɛna mi wãwã nɛ fɔtsa kĩĩ akũ? Nde sũ miadã boe bãã lɔmɔ ndɛ bati kpalɛwa bɔanɛ? Mitakɔna kĩ boe awɛ kɔbɛ̃ bɔkɔa bɔtsa oti kĩĩ! 13Baguma a kĩ ɛnyɛ Abraham, Isak mɔ Yakob mɔ boe bawanyɔ Baguma a do ye Ɔsumunɛ Yesu obu. Ade ye obi Yesu mikɔa mikpa bɛkɔ a. Misĩ ye nɛ Pilato anɛ kamɛ, titɔ kĩ minyina ye nɛ kĩ Pilato wɛ kĩ yafɔnɛ ye awɛ kufɛ. 14Misĩ oti kpĩĩ mɔ oti kpalɛwa a, ade mitunɔ kĩ ɛfɔnɛ owudini awɛ ɛkpa mi nɛ ye kadokɔ̃ a. 15Mifɔ̃ bɛkɔ oti a kĩ yakpa nkpã a, lɛmɛ Baguma dzɛla ye etomɛna banɔkpa kamɛ. Boe awɛ a bɔmɔ́ ye mɔ anɛ. 16Yesu dĩ kɔbɛ̃ akũ futo mɔ oti kĩ miamɔ kĩĩ, minyina lɛmɛ a na akũ ɔsĩ. Nɛ kĩ ɛtɛ Yesu edo sũ ni, boe Ɔlate tsa ye nɛ mi anɛ kamɛ.
17“Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, finyaakĩĩ ĩnyina kĩ mi mɔ mi banɔkɔɛ̃ mikɛna fukĩĩ nɛ Yesu akũ nɛ katanyi kamɛ. 18Lɛmɛ Baguma lɛ eyi anɛ kɔkɔɛ ɛtsãmɛna ye onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ flee akũ kĩ ye Kristo a aatsã lubo kamɔ kamɛ. Ade foesũ ɛfɔ̃ fɔya nɛ foe kamɛ lɔmɔ a. 19-20Foesũ midani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ mimuniki miyaatómɔ Baguma ayekĩ yaakɔa mi tɔkpa ete mi. Ntɛ mikɛna lɔmɔ ni, fɔ́afɔ̃ mina hũhũ kamɛ kɔbɛ̃ mitomɛna boe Ɔlate sɛkɛ̃, ayekĩ yaado Yesu a kĩ ye nyɛ Kristo a nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃. 21Kɛnɛ kĩ Yesu ɛna nɛ ode kɛnawo lɔkɔ a kĩ Baguma lɔla lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa nɛ de osi akũ ndɛ ayekĩ ye onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ kpalɛwa a kĩ bidzi nkpã kɔkɔɛ a lɛ biyi a. 22Kitonɛkĩ Mose lɛ kĩ, ‘Mi Ɔlate Baguma aanyɛ onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ odi ndɛ yĩ aye etomɛna mi kamɛ. Foesũ mitse lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ yaabi mi. 23Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛláatse ye kalɛ ni, baanyɛ ye nɛ Baguma bati a kamɛ lɔkɔa bɛwɔla ye mɔ odu mɔ odu.’
24“Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ flee a, kito Samuel akũ kɛyawo bikĩ bitomɔ ye a, lɛ biyi bɛnyamɛna lɔtɔ nɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔlamɛna kaya nɛ nviã fuwi kĩĩ kamɛ a akũ. 25Baguma apam a kĩ ɛkɛna mɔ mi bawanyɔ ɛtsãmɛna ye onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ akũ a nyɛ mi fude, ade mi aanya tsɛfã nɛ apam kĩĩ fɔtsa akũ a. Ebi Abraham kĩ fɔ́atsã ye ɔwa akũ yaakɔa nhila ɛkpa katinya kamɛ bati flee. 26Foesũ kĩ Baguma pau ye Ɔsumunɛ a ni, mi sɛkɛ̃ ɛnya lɔtɔ edo ye kĩ ɛkɔa nhila ɛkpa mi, lɔkɔa ɛfɔ̃ mi kamɛ odi nyɛ odi ɛfɔ̃ tɔkpa kakɛna.”

Title: ADZUMA 4
Content:
Bipi Petro Mɔ Yohanes.
1Nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ Petro mɔ Yohanes dza bɛkabi bati a fɔlɛtsa a, Yudafɔ basɔfɔ badi, Asɔli kɔla a akũ ɔdãmɛnanɛ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ Zadukifɔ badi ya nɛ awã. 2Kĩ binu kĩ Petro mɔ Yohanes katsa fɔtsa nɛ Yesu kayidza fɔlɛtsa akũ, katsa kĩ banɔkpa aayidza bidzi nkpã a, bɛna kalɔkpa paa! 3Foesũ bipi be, lɛmɛ kĩ kade dɔ sũ ni, bɛkɔa be bido nɛ kɔla kamɛ kɛnawo kĩ kade nyina. 4Lɛmɛ bati pii kĩ binu be fɔlɛtsa a badi tɛ kalɛ wĩ a bido. Banyole batɛ badonɛ a kĩ bɛtɛ bido a pɔ biwo ndɛ mpim elo.
5Ade kĩ kade nyina a, Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ ɔmaĩ banɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ mbla batsanɛ a yakpɔta nɛ Yerusalem. 6Bɛyatsa fɔlɔ mɔ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee Hana mɔ Kayafa, Yohanes mɔ Aleksandro mɔ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee a akũ bati badi. 7Ade bɛnyɛ fɔtɔ banyanɛ a bɛyadzɛla nɛ be anɛ kamɛ a. Bivia be kĩ, “Osi ɔwɔdabe akũ mikɛna fukĩĩ? Owei dĩ akũ ĩye ɔwa kɔbɛ̃ akũ mikɛna fɔtsa kĩĩ?”
8Ade Petro kĩ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa tɛ ye kamɛ a yidza ɛlɛ kĩ, “Boe lɔtɔ banyanɛ mɔ ɔmaĩ banɔkɔɛ̃, 9ntɛ miwɛ fɔlɛtsa kamɛ kanyɛ nɛ lɛtsa wĩ a kĩ bɔkɛna bɔkpa oti kĩ eveliveli mɔ ayekĩ bɛtsa ye a akũ ni, 10mitse mbi mi, lɔkɔa Israelfɔ flee binyi kĩ, Yesu Kristo Nazaretni a kĩ mibɔa nɛ asendua akũ, lɛmɛ Baguma dzɛla ye etomɛna banɔkpa kamɛ a, ye dĩ akũ fɔtsã sũ mɔ oti kĩĩ na akũ ɔsĩ. 11Ade Yesu kĩĩ akũ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa lɛ kĩ,
‘De a kĩ fɔla bakenɛ sĩ a,
ade de lɛdani kɔla akũ de titiliwu a.’
12Ye odi nyɛ bati Ɔtɛnɛ, ade otidziwa odima lɛláa tite akũ kĩ ye akũ bɔ́atsã bɔna nkpã a.”
13Kĩ lɔtɔ banyanɛ mɔ ɔmaĩ banɔkɔɛ̃ a mɔ́ ayekĩ Petro mɔ Yohanes lɛ kɔdzɛla mɔ kɔbɛ̃, titɔ kĩ bɛtánaa sukuu malo ni, fɔkɛna be saa. Ade bɛmɔ́ biyi ɔsũ kĩ bɛtsã bitomɔ Yesu a. 14Lɛmɛ kĩ bɛmɔ́ oti a kĩ bɛtsa a kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ be ɔwɛ̃ sũ ni, bɛtápuli bɛlɛ kadima. 15Bibi be kĩ bɛnɛ nɛ katsɛnakɔ̃ a, kite be odi bɛkapi adzuni. 16Badi via kĩ, “Litsa bɔakɛna bati kĩĩ? Bɔláapuli busĩ kĩ lɛtsa a kĩ bɛkɛna a lɛnyɛ́ awãwã fɔtsa, kitonɛkĩ odi nyɛ odi nɛ Yerusalem nyina, enu kalɛ kĩĩ lɛmɛ. 17Nɛ kĩ fɔlɛtsa kĩ fɔtagba sũ ni, mifɔ̃ budo be libe kĩ bɛtabi odima kalɛ nɛ Yesu dĩ akũ.” 18Ade bibuki bɛvɛ be bɛnamɛna katsɛnakɔ̃ a bisĩ be mbla kĩ bɛtabuki bibi odima kalɛ ĩye bɛtsa fɔtsa nɛ Yesu dĩ akũ a.
19Lɛmɛ Petro mɔ Yohanes kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Mi awɛ mibu fukĩ fɔfɛta nɛ Baguma anɛ kĩ bɔkɛna, mi ɔlɛdo butse, mbɔɛɛ kĩ Baguma ode? 20Lɛtsa a kĩ de bɔmɔ́, bunu lɛmɛ a, bɔláapuli busua onukpɛ̃ nɛ de akũ budzi kulokulo.”
21Ade awã mɔ́ banɔkɔɛ̃ a kã be anɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ, bɛfɔnɛ be awɛ a. Nɛ kĩ bati a flee kamu Baguma nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya a akũ sũ ni, bɛtápuli bɛna osi a kĩ ye akũ baatsã bɛvɛlɛ be sɔtɔ. 22Oti a kĩ ye bɛtsa a, tɛ fɔba futeli tɛna.
Batɛ Badonɛ a Bɔa Mpaɛ Bɛkpa Ɔwɔlɛ Kado.
23Kĩ bɛfɔnɛ Petro mɔ Yohanes awɛ bɛnaa be bati sɛkɛ̃ a, bɛbɔa be amandiɛ nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ ɔmaĩ banɔkɔɛ̃ a bi be a akũ. 24Ade batɛ badonɛ a flee kpɔta bɛbɔa mpaɛ bɛvɛ Baguma bɛlɛ kĩ, “O boe Ɔlate, nɔ kĩ ɔkɛna tite mɔ ode, mpo mɔ fɔtsa a kĩ fudeĩ nɛ ye kamɛ, 25nɔ lɛtsã Hũhũ Kpalɛwa akũ ɔfɔ̃ boe ɔwanyɔ Dawid, nɔ ɔsumunɛ lɛ eyi kĩ,
‘Nde sũ katinya kamɛ bati de adɔ̃
mɔ bati tsa fɔlɔ nɛ tɔkpa akũ pupulidza?
26Katinya kamɛ fɔgã flee kɛna ɔmɔa
ade biyidza bɛdzɛ̃ nɛ boe Ɔlate mɔ ye Kristo akũ a.’
27Fɔnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kĩ Herodes mɔ Pontio Pilato mɔ Israelfɔ, mɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Israelfɔ a tsɛna nɛ ɔmatɔ kĩĩ kamɛ, ade biyidza bɛdza nɛ Yesu nɔ Ɔsumunɛ kpalɛwa a kĩ ɔbɔa tɔdɔ̃ a akũ a. 28Lɛmɛ nɛ nɔ kɔbɛ̃, mɔ nɔ kawɛ, ɔkpa osi bɛkpɔta bɛkɛna lɛtsa kĩ ohihiɛ oyi a fɔya nɛ foe kamɛ. 29Finyaakĩĩ, O boe Ɔlate, dã ɔhau a kĩ ye kamɛ bido boe, lɔkɔa kado boe nɔ adzuma bakɛnanɛ a ɔwɔlɛ, ayekĩ bɔ́apuli bɔlɛ nɔ kalɛ wĩ a nɛ katavila kamɛ. 30Te awɛ nɛ nɔ bati akũ bɛna kasaɛ, kafɔ̃ awãwã fɔtsa mɔ nsɛntsɛlɛni pii fɔya nɛ nɔ Ɔsumunɛ Kpalɛwa Yesu dĩ akũ.”
31Kĩ bɛbɔa mpaɛ biyua a, kɔla kĩ koe kamɛ bɛna a kuna. Hũhũ Kpalɛwa wo nɛ be flee kamɛ ade bido Baguma fɔlɛtsa kalɛ awɛ mɔ kɔbɛ̃ a.
Batɛ Badonɛ a Sɛ̃ Be Akũ Fɔtsa.
32Nɛ fuwi kĩĩ kamɛ a, batɛ badonɛ a flee kɛna ɔmɔa nɛ be fɔkɛnatsa mɔ adzuni kamɛ. Be kamɛ odima tákɔna kĩ ye odi la ye fɔtsa kĩ ɛna a, mbom fɔtsa kumɛkumɛ a nya be flee fude. 33Fɔtɔ banyanɛ kĩĩ de lɛtsã mɔ kɔbɛ̃ kĩ boe Ɔlate Yesu kayidza kato banɔkpa kamɛ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali, ade Baguma lukudɔ mɔ nhila na nɛ be flee akũ a. 34Odima tánya ohiãni kitonɛkĩ bikĩ bɛna fɔla mɔ tite a nɔ foe. 35Bɛkɔa sika a bɛma fɔtɔ banyanɛ a ade bɛsɛ̃ se bɛkpa odi nyɛ odi nɛ ye kasĩ onukpɛ̃ a.
36Onyole odi kĩ bavɛ Yosef na nɛ awã. Ɛnyɛ Levini kĩ bɛma nɛ Kipro tite akũ. Fɔtɔ banyanɛ a te ye dĩ kĩ Barnaba, dĩ a kayɔ nyɛ Ekĩ yado Bati Ɔwɔlɛ. 37Barnaba malo nɔ ye tite ɛkɔa sika a ɛma fɔtɔ banyanɛ a.

Title: ADZUMA 5
Content:
Anania Mɔ Safira Ma Fɔvã
1Lɛmɛ onyole odi kĩ bavɛ Anania mɔ ɔtsɔ̃ Safira na nɛ be kamɛ, be malo bɛnɔ be tite tidi. 2Anania kɔa sika a sidi ɛkɔla ade ɛkɔa se nkaɛ ɛma fɔtɔ banyanɛ a. Ɔtsɔ̃ Safira nyina foe akũ litsedi ade etunɔ kĩ bakɛna lɔmɔ a.
