3Ade Petro via ye kĩ, “Anania, nde sũ ɔfɔ̃ Abonsam nya nɔ akũ, ɔma fɔvã ɔkpa Hũhũ Kpalɛwa, fɔfɔ̃ ɔkɔla tite a kĩ ɔnɔ a sika a sidi? 4Nɔ tide nyɛ tite a fɔmɔ ɔnɔ te, sika a kĩ ɔtɛ a lɛmɛ nɔ side sanɛ. Litsa lɛfɔ̃ ɔbɔɛ adzuni kpa kĩĩ odu? Nnɛ́ boe batidziwa ɔkɛ, mbom Baguma ɔkɛ!”
5Kĩ Anania sila enu fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ pɛ, esinya ɛtɔ nɛ tite eku. Libe wo bati flee a kĩ binu fɔlɛtsa a paa. 6Bapopo a kĩ bɛna nɛ be kamɛ a kɔa lima bisuli ye bɛbɔɛ bɛnabila.
7Ɔtsɔ̃ yanɛ ɛta nɛ awã ndɛ ndɔũhuilɛ ɛlalɛ liti, kĩ enyína lɛtsa kĩ lɛya lɛtɛ̃ a. 8Ade Petro via ye kĩ, “Bi yĩ. Kĩ mimɔ nɔ ɔnyɔ minɔ tite a sika a kĩ bise mi a ni, se a flee nɛ awĩ a?”
Otsole a kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Oo, ade se a flee nɛ awã a.”
9Foesũ Petro bi ye kĩ, “Nde sũ mimɔ nɔ ɔnyɔ mikɛna onukpɛ̃ mɔa miasɔ boe Ɔlate Hũhũ midã? Dã, bapopo a kĩ bɛbɔɛ nɔ ɔnyɔ bɛnabila a dzɛ̃ nɛ onyukpɛ̃ finyaakĩĩ. Baabɔɛ nɔ malo bɛnaabila.”
10Deedimɔapɛ otsole a ka ɛtɔ nɛ tite, eku. Ade kĩ bapopo a yamɔ kĩ eku ɛwaa a, bɛbɔɛ ye malo bɛnabila nɛ ɔnyɔ ɔwɛ̃. 11Foesũ libe paa wo batɛ badonɛ a flee mɔ be flee a kĩ binu lɛtsa kĩ lɛya nɛ awã a.
Fɔtɔ Banyanɛ a Kɛna Awãwã Mɔ Nsɛntsɛlɛni Fɔtsa Pii.
12Nɛ lɔkɔ kĩĩ kamɛ a fɔtɔ banyanɛ a kakɛna awãwã mɔ nsɛntsɛlɛni fɔtsa pii nɛ bati a kamɛ. Batɛ badonɛ a flee katsɛna nɛ Yudafɔ Asɔli kɔla kakɔa kĩ bavɛ Salomo Mblada a kamɛ. 13Bikĩ bɛtána nɛ batɛ badonɛ a kamɛ a tádo ɔwɔlɛ kĩ bafuã be, titɔ kĩ bakɔa obu kakpa be malo. 14Bati pii, batsole mɔ banyole, dani ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ bɛtɛ boe Ɔlate bido. 15Ade bati pii bɔɛ be basɔnɛ mɔ tɛpa mɔ tɛkɛna bɛnayi nɛ kɔya nɛ awã kĩ ntɛ Petro atɛ̃ mɔ ye kuyo ako nɛ be akũ ni, lɔkɔa bɛsaɛ. 16Ade bɛkɔa basɔnɛ mɔ bikĩ hũhũ kpa deĩ nɛ be kamɛ a bitomɛna tɛmatɔ a kĩ tisinya Yerusalem a bɛyamɛna bɛtsa be flee a.
Yudafɔ Ɔmaĩ Banɔkɔɛ̃ Yidza Bɛdza Nɛ Yesu Fɔtɔ Banyanɛ a Akũ.
17Ade Yudafɔ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee mɔ bikĩ bideĩ nɛ ye akũ kĩ bito Zadukifɔ katsu kamɛ a yɔɔla anɛ nɛ fɔtɔ banyanɛ a akũ a. Foesũ bike otse kĩ baakɛna litsedi. 18Nɛ foesũ bipi be bɛnado nɛ kɔla kamɛ. 19Lɛmɛ ke lɛnyɛ a, boe Ɔlate ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ odi yabinya opunu a, ɛnyɛ be, ade ebi be kĩ, 20“Minaa Yudafɔ Asɔli kɔla a kamɛ lɔkɔa mibi bati fɔlɛtsa a flee nɛ nkpã vɔɛ̃ kĩĩ akũ!”
21Foesũ kĩ kade nyina a bɛnawo nɛ Asɔli kɔla a kamɛ ade biyi fɔtsa katsa kayɔ nɛ awã a.
Lɔkɔa na kamɛ, Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee a mɔ bikĩ bitomɔ ye a, mɔ Yudafɔ ɔmaĩ banɔkɔɛ̃ a tsɛna, ade bido bikĩ badã asɔli kɔla akũ kĩ bɛnaanyɛ fɔtɔ banyanɛ a nɛ kɔla a kamɛ bɛyamɛna. 22Lɛmɛ kĩ bati a naa awã a, bɛtámɔ be, foesũ bimuniki bɛyabi be kĩ, 23“Kĩ bɔnaa a, bɛbalɛ kɔla a kpakplakpa ade bikĩ badã kɔla a akũ lɛmɛ dzɛ̃ nɛ onyukpɛ̃ a pɛpɛɛpɛ a. Lɛmɛ kĩ bubinya kɔla a bati a kamɛ odima lɛláa koe kamɛ.” 24Kĩ asɔli kɔla akũ ɔdãmɛnanɛ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a nu kalɛ kĩĩ a, akũ dzuli be ade bɛkakɔna lɛtsa kĩ lɛya nɛ fɔtɔ banyanɛ a akũ a.
25Ade odi yabi be kĩ, “Bati a kĩ mipi mido nɛ kɔla kamɛ a, deĩ nɛ asɔli kɔla kamɛ ade bɛlamɛna bati fɔtsa katsa nɛ awã a.” 26Nɛ awã a Asɔli Kɔla ɔdãmɛnanɛ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ ye bati yidza bɛnakpã be bɛyamɛna. Nɛ kĩ bivila kĩ bati aanɔ be boe sũ ni, bɛtákpã be nɛ ɔhɛ kamɛ.
27Kĩ bɛkpã fɔtɔ banyanɛ a bɛyamɛna a, bɛfɔ̃ bɛdza nɛ ɔmaĩ banɔkɔɛ̃ a anɛ kamɛ.
Ade Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee a via be kĩ, 28“Bɔtábi mi kĩ mitabuki milɛ kadima nɛ Yesu dĩ akũ a? Lɛmɛ migbamɛna fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ flee nɛ Yerusalem, ade miawɛ kĩ miakɔa ye wuda sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ a mite nɛ boe akũ a.”
29Awã na Petro mɔ fɔtɔ banyanɛ bɛbã a kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Kɛnɛ kĩ bɔabu Baguma, nnɛ́ batidziwa. 30Yesu a kĩ mifɔ̃ bɛbɔa nɛ asendua akũ mikɔ ye a, boe bawanyɔ Baguma dzɛla ye etomɛna kanɔkpa, edzi nkpã. 31Baguma kpa ye kadzikɔ̃nɔkɔɛ̃ nɛ ye sɔmɔna, ade ɛkɛna ye Ɔkpãnɛ mɔ Ɔtɛnɛ, ayekĩ Israelfɔ aana osi bɛdani be tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ lɔkɔa bɛna be titikpa kakɔakate. 32Ade boe mɔ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a, kĩ ɛnyɛ Baguma futetsa kĩ ɛkpa bikĩ babu ye a, bɔnyɛ foe akũ adansifɔ a.”
33Kĩ ɔmaĩ banɔkɔɛ̃ a nu fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a, fɔfɔ̃ bɛna kalɔkpa paa ade bɛwɛ kĩ bakɔ fɔtɔ banyanɛ a. 34Lɛmɛ Farisifɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a kamɛ ɔmɔa kĩ bavɛ Gamaliel sua be osi. Ɛnyɛ fɔtsa ɔtsanɛ nɛ Mose mbla akũ, ade bati a flee akɔa obu baũ kakpa ye a. Eyidza ɛdza ade ɛlɛ kĩ bɛfɔ̃ fɔtɔ banyanɛ a bɛkpa be osi sukuloo bɛkɔna fɔlɛtsa a akũ. 35Ade ke liti ebi be kĩ, “Nwaɛ̃ Israelfɔ, midã kadã wĩ nɛ lɛtsa kĩ miawɛ kĩ miakɛna nɛ bati kĩĩ akũ a! 36Míate anɛ kĩ lɔkɔ lidi kĩ lɛyatɛ̃ a, onyole odi kĩ bavɛ Teuda yakɛna ye akũ kĩ oti titiliwu odi odu yanɛ. Bati ndɛ ɔha ɛna tomɔ ye nɛ liti. Ade kĩ bɛkɔ ye a bikĩ bitomɔ ye a flee pansam, ade ye fɔlɛtsa a lɛmɛ wɔ a. 37Ke liti, nɛ bati kakã lɔkɔ a, Yuda, Galileani a yayidza, ɛvɛlɛ bati kɔdabu ebumɔ ye akũ. Kĩ ye malo ɛyaku a bikĩ bitomɔ ye a flee yalɛ, ade ye fɔlɛtsa a lɛmɛ wɔ a. 38Foesũ lɛtsa kĩ mabi mi nyɛ kĩ mifɔnɛ bati kĩĩ awɛ bɛnaa. Ntɛ be fɔtsa katsa a mɔ bati fude fɔanɛ ni, owi lɛláabuna mɔ fɔ́awɔ. 39Lɛmɛ ntɛ Baguma sɛkɛ̃ futo kɔ̃ ni, bɔláapuli busua foe osi. Ntɛ mitádã kadã wĩ ni, luwi lidi míamɔ kĩ Baguma awɛ akũ buyidza bɔdza.”
Katsɛnakɔ̃ bati a tɛ Gamaliel kalɛ a. 40Foesũ bɛvɛ fɔtɔ banyanɛ a bimuniki bɛya ade bibo be a. Bisĩ be mbla kĩ bɛtabuki bɛlɛ kadima nɛ Yesu dĩ akũ dadaada, ade bɛfɔnɛ be awɛ a.
41Kĩ bɛdzakũ banaa a, bɛmɔ́ kawɔlɛ pii kitonɛkĩ Baguma bu be ndɛ bati kĩ bɛfɛta bɛkpa lubo kamɔ mɔ kɔnyɔãkado nɛ Yesu dĩ sũ. 42Nɛ fukĩĩ liti a, luwi daa bɛkatsa fɔtsa nɛ Asɔli kɔla kamɛ, mɔ bati tɔtɔ kamɛ, kade lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ akũ kĩ Yesu nyɛ Kristo a.

Title: ADZUMA 6
Content:
Batɛ Badonɛ a Pau Babumɛnanɛ Evũkɔnɔ.
1Ke liti a, kĩ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a lidede lamɛna kapɔ kabu a, ɔdzɛ yawo nɛ Yudafɔ a kĩ balɛ Tigriki mɔ Yudafɔ mɔawɛ a kayite. Grikifɔ a tsa kĩ ntɛ bɛsɛ̃ funitsã ni, baákpa be bakunawa. 2Nɛ foesũ fɔtɔ banyanɛ ewua-nviã a vɛ batɛ badonɛ a flee bɛkpɔta ade bibi be kĩ, “Fɔtáfɛta kĩ bɔakɔa lɔkɔ a kĩ bɔalɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa bɔkɛna funitsã kasɛ̃ lɔkɔ. 3-4Foesũ nwaɛ̃ amɛ, midã mi kamɛ minyɛ banyole evũkɔnɔ kĩ binyina kadi, kĩ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa lɛmɛ yi be kamɛ, lɔkɔa bɔkɔa adzuma kĩĩ budo nɛ be awɛ, ayekĩ boe mɔawɛ a bɔ́ana aya bɔkpa mpaɛ kabɔa mɔ Baguma fɔlɛtsa a kalɛ.”
5Fɔlɛtsa a de bati a flee kawɔlɛ ade bɛnyɛ Stefano, oti kĩ edeĩ katɛkado, kĩ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa lɛmɛ tɛ ye kamɛ, Filipo, Prokoro, Nikanora, Timona, Parmena mɔ Nikolao, kĩ ɛdani ɛkɛna Yudani. Eto Antiokia. 6Bɛnyɛ bati evũkɔnɔ a kĩ bɛpau a bɛtsa fɔtɔ banyanɛ a ade bɛbɔa mpaɛ nɛ be lɔlɔ, bite awɛ nɛ be akũ a.
7Bati pii tɛ Baguma kalɛ wĩ a. Fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ nɛ Yerusalem danɛ kapɔ ade Yudafɔ basɔfɔ a pii lɛmɛ dani bɛtɛ Yesu bido a.
Yudafɔ Ɔmaĩ Banɔkɔɛ̃ a Pi Stefano.
8Stefano kĩ Baguma kɔbɛ̃ mɔ sɛmɛ kalɛ yi ye kamɛ a, kɛna awãwã mɔ nsɛntsɛlɛni fɔtsa pii nɛ bati a kamɛ. 9Yudafɔ a kĩ bɛnyɛ be nɛ awɔba kamɛ a kĩ bito Kirene mɔ Aleksandria bibumɔ bikĩ bito Kilikia mɔ Asia yidza nɛ Stefano akũ, bɛkavɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa mɔ ye. 10Lɛmɛ Baguma Hũhũ kpa Stefano nyansã mɔ kadikanyi paa foesũ ntɛ ɛlɛ kɔdzɛla ni, be kamɛ odima lápuli katɛ ye atsindze.
11Foesũ bɛkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ badi kĩ bɛma fɔvã kĩ, “Bunu kĩ Stefano lɛ fubusuotsa nɛ Mose mɔ Baguma akũ.”
12Ye onukpɛ̃ katsua kĩĩ fɔ̃ bati a, banɔkɔɛ̃ a, mɔ mbla batsanɛ a na kalɔkpa paa, ade Yudafɔ mbla batsanɛ a yapi Stefano bɛnamɛna Ɔmaĩ banɔkɔɛ̃ katsɛnakɔ̃ a. 13Bati a kĩ bitsua Stefano onukpɛ̃ a yama fɔvã bɛlɛ kĩ, “Oti kĩĩ alɛ kɔdzɛla katia Asɔli Kɔla Kpalɛwa mɔ Mose mbla a luwi nyɛ luwi. 14Bunu lɛmɛ kĩ ɛlɛ kĩ Yesu Nazaretni a aaveli Asɔli kɔla kĩĩ lɔkɔa ɛdani tɛmaniɛ flee a kĩ Mose yi ɛkpa boe a.”
15Lɔkɔ a na kamɛ bati a flee kĩ bɛna nɛ katsɛnakɔ̃ a ke anɛ nɛ Stefano akũ ade bɛmɔ́ kĩ ye anɛ kamɛ dani ndɛ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ ade aye a.

Title: ADZUMA 7
Content:
Stefano De Lɛtsã Nɛ Baguma Kalɛ Wĩ a Akũ.
1Ade Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee a via Stefano kĩ, “Lɛtsa a kĩ bɛlamɛna kalɛ nɛ nɔ akũ a ni, nuwĩ fɔanɛ?”
2Stefano kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Nda amɛ mɔ nwãɛ amɛ, mitse katse wĩ! Fɔmɔ boe ɔwanyɔ Abraham aatu ɛnaadzi nɛ Haram tite akũ a, Baguma Kpalɛwa a nyɛ ye akũ ɛtsa ye nɛ Mesopotamia tite akũ. 3Ade awã ebi ye kĩ, ‘Yidza kafɔnɛ nɔ katete bati mɔ tite a na kanaa tite a kĩ maatsa nɔ a akũ.’
4“Foesũ ɛdzakũ nɛ Kaldea tite akũ ɛnadzi nɛ Haram kɛnawo lɔkɔ a kĩ ɔlɛga ku. Ade ke Baguma kpã ye ɛyamɛna nɛ awã kĩ midzi nviã kĩĩ a. 5Baguma tákpa Abraham tite kanyakɔ̃ sɛnɛta mɔa malo kĩ tɛnya ye tide. Lɛmɛ ɛlɛ eyi kĩ yaakɔa tite a na ɛkpa ye tɛnya ye mɔ ye babi mɔ bawa tide, titɔ kĩ nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ malo ɛtáma obi odima! 6Lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma bi ye nyɛ kĩ, ‘Nɔ bawa aanya banɔvɔɛ̃ nɛ tite bɛbã akũ, bɛnya abawa bɛkɛna be tɛnya futeli ɔha ɛna kpɔũ.’ 7Ebuki ɛlɛ kĩ, ‘Maadzɛ mɔ bati a kĩ be baasum a. Ke liti baadzakũ nɛ tite a akũ bɛyaasum yĩ nɛ awĩ kĩĩ.’ 8Ade ke Baguma kɛna lɛkpati katsua ndɛ apam aye nɛ Abraham mɔ Ye Baguma kayite a. Nɛ foesũ kĩ Abraham ma Isak a etsua ye lɛkpati kĩ ɛtɛ fuwi ɛlɛ̃ a. Isak lɛmɛ ma Yakob, Yakob lɛmɛ ma babi ewua-nviã kĩ bɛnyɛ Yudafɔ bawanyɔ ewua-nviã a.
9“Yakob babi kĩĩ yɔɔlɛ anɛ nɛ be ɔwaɛ̃ Yosef akũ ade bipi ye bɛnɔ bɛkpa bati badi bɛkpã ye bɛnamɛna Egipte tite akũ a. Lɛmɛ Baguma dã ye akũ, 10ade ɛnyɛ ye etomɛna ye lubo kamɔ mɔ ayɔlɔhɔ kamɛ a. Baguma kpa ye nyansã mɔ kɔnyakamɔ baũ foesũ Egiptefɔ Lɛgã Farao wɛ ye kalɛ ade ɛkɔa ye ɛkɛna ye tite mɔ lɛgã tɔtɔ a akũ ɔdãmɛnanɛ a.
11“Lɔkɔ lidi kamɛ ni, kɔlɛ kpale ya nɛ Egipte mɔ Kanan tite flee akũ kĩ fɔyamɛna lubo kamɔ beblebee kĩ boe bawanyɔ tána funitsã. 12Ade kĩ Yakob nu kĩ fugbanɔ na nɛ Egipte a, edo ye babi lɔtɔnyade a bɛnaaya funitsã bɛyamɛna. 13Kĩ Yakob babi buki bɛnaa awã lɛyade kĩ banaaya funitsã a, Yosef nyɛ ye akũ ɛtsa bawaɛ̃, ade ɛnyɛ be lɛmɛ ɛtsa Lɛgã Farao a. 14Yosef bi be kĩ ntɛ bɛnaa ni, bɛkpã ɔlɛga Yakob mɔ ye akũ bati flee a kĩ baana ndɛ bati aduesɔũ-elo bɛyamɛna nɛ Egipte. 15Foesũ Yakob mɔ ye babi dzakũ bɛnaa Egipte bɛnadzi nɛ awã kɛnawo kĩ biku. 16Ke liti a, bɛkɔa be banɔkpa bɛyamɛna nɛ Sekem bɛyabila nɛ linikɛ a kĩ Abraham ya mɔ sika etomɛna Hamor babi sɛkɛ̃ a kamɛ.
17“Kĩ lɔkɔ a kĩ Baguma sui mɔ Abraham wo ɔtɔ kiyua a, Israelfɔ nɛ Egipte a ma bɛsa beblebee. 18Fɔyaya lɛmɛ kĩ lɛgã vɔɛ̃ Farao a kĩ ɛnya Egipte akũ a tányi Yosef kɔlaa. 19Farao kĩĩ tsã tɛdake kamɛ ɛkɛna boe bawanyɔ tɛnya, ɛfɔ̃ bɛnyɛ be babi bakɔkɔa nɛ tɔtɔ kamɛ ayekĩ baaku.
20“Ade lɔkɔ a na kamɛ bɛma Mose a. Obisɛ̃ kĩĩ kalɛ kadã paa. Nɛ foesũ ye bamanɛ kɔla ye nɛ kɔla kamɛ tidetɔ ɛlalɛ. 21Kĩ bɛnyɛ ye nɛ be akũ a, Farao obitsole namɔ ye ɛbɔɛ, ade ɛdɔɔla ye ndɛ ye mɔawɛ sɛmɛ kamɛ obi a. 22Bɛtsa ye Egiptefɔ kadikanyi mɔ be kadzi kamɛ fɔkɛnatsa a flee, ade ɛyabo anɛ ɛkɛna oti a. Ɛna ovio nɛ kɔdzɛla kalɛ mɔ fɔkɛnatsa pii kamɛ.
23“Kĩ Mose tɛ futeli tɛna a, kakɔna wo nɛ ye kamɛ kĩ ɛnaasɛla ye bawaɛ̃ Israelfɔ ɛdã. 24Kĩ ewo awã a, ɛmɔ́ kĩ Egipteni odi lamɛna Israelni odi awɔda kakɛna foesũ ɛnabumɔ Israelni a, ade ebo Egipteni a ɛkɔ a. 25Mose kɔna kĩ bawaɛ̃ a aanu foe kayɔ kĩ Baguma lɛwɛ kĩ yatsã ye akũ ɛtɛ be lɛmɛ bɛtánu foe kayɔ lɔmɔ. 26Kĩ kade nyina a, ebuki ɛmɔ́ kĩ Israelfɔ bati nviã lamɛna kavũ. Ɛnaakpɔla lɛma a ade ebi be kĩ, ‘Midã, bawaɛ̃ mɔ bawaɛ̃ mianɛ, nde sũ miakɛna akũ awɔda lɔmɔ?’
27“Lɛmɛ ekĩ ɛwɛ sɔwã a du Mose ɛdzɛla nɛ ɔɔwɛ̃ ade evia ye kĩ, ‘Fɔɔdabe tsɛla nɔ? Owei lɛkɛna nɔ boe akũ ɔnyanɛ mɔ fɔlɛtsa ɔdzɛnɛ? 28Mbɔɛ awɛ kĩ akɔ yĩ ndɛ ayekĩ ɔkɔ Egipteni a kadzɔ a?’ 29Kĩ Mose nu fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a, libe wo ye paa, foesũ elo ɛnaa Midianfɔ tite akũ, awã kĩ ɛnadzi ndɛ ɔnɔvɔɛ̃ aye, ɛma babinyole nviã.
30“Futeli tɛna liti a, ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ odi nyɛ ye akũ ɛtsa Mose nɛ tuwĩ mɔ fu kĩ tɛkatɛ̃ nɛ kɔsa a kĩ kufuã Sinai ɔtɔ a kamɛ. 31Kĩ Mose mɔ́ fukĩĩ a, fɔkɛna ye saa foesũ efuã kĩ yanaadã lɛtsa a kadã wĩ. Ade Baguma vɛ ye ebi ye kĩ, 32‘Yĩ nyɛ nɔ bawanyɔ a Baguma, Abraham mɔ Isak mɔ Yakob Baguma.’ Mose katila bliblibli mɔ libe foesũ ɛtápuli ebuki ɛdã awã kadã wĩ.
33“Ade Baguma bi ye kĩ, ‘Nyɛ nɔ mpabua nɛ abɔa, kitonɛkĩ awã kĩ ɔdzɛ̃ a ni, tite kpalɛwa tanɛ. 34Ɔnɔkɔali mmɔ́ yĩ bati a lubo kamɔ mɔ tɛnya a kĩ bakɛna be nɛ Egipte tite akũ a. Nnu be kɔnyakabe foesũ ĩya kĩ mayaanyɛ be. Finyaakĩĩ ya, lɔkɔa ndo nɔ fɔtɔ nɛ Egipte.’
35“Ade Mose a kĩ bisĩ kĩĩ bivia kĩ, ‘Owei lɛkɔa nɔ ɛdzɛla ndɛ boe akũ ɔnyanɛ mɔ fɔlɛtsa ɔdzɛnɛ?’ Ade ye Mose kĩĩ a Baguma do kĩ ɛnaanya be akũ, lɔkɔa ɛnyɛ be nɛ ɔhau kamɛ fɔtsãmɛna ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a kĩ ɛnyɛ ye akũ ɛtsa ye nɛ tuwĩ a kĩ tɛkatɛ̃ a kamɛ a. 36Mose kpã bati a bɛdzakũ nɛ Egipte. Ɛkɛna awãwã fɔtsa pii nɛ Egipte mɔ Mpo Ngbã a abuĩ mɔ kɔsa kamɛ nɛ be osi katsã futeli tɛna a flee kamɛ.
37“Ade Mose kĩĩ mɔapɛ a libi Israelfɔ kĩ, ‘Baguma aanyɛ onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ odi ndɛ ayekĩ ɛnyɛ yĩ a etomɛna mimɔa a kamɛ.’ 38Mose nyɛ oti kĩ ɛna nɛ boe bawanyɔ a sɛkɛ̃ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ Israelfɔ na nɛ kɔsa kamɛ a. Ade ye mɔ Baguma fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ lɛmɔ kɔdzɛla nɛ Sinai ɔtɔ akũ, ɛtɛ Baguma nkpã kalɛ a ɛma boe a.
39“Lɛmɛ boe bawanyɔ táwɛ kĩ batse Mose, mbom bisĩ ye, ade bɛwɛ kĩ bamuniki bɛnaa Egipte tite akũ a. 40Foesũ bibi ɔwaɛ̃ Aron kĩ, ‘Kɛna baviɔ̃ kĩ baakpã boe, kakpa boe, kitonɛkĩ bunyína lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya nɛ Mose a kĩ ɛkpã boe etomɛna Egipte a akũ.’ 41Ade ke bɛmɛ baviɔ̃ ndɛ ɔnantsue obi aye, bɛkabɔa afɔliɛ kakpa ye a. Bɛmɔ́ kawɔlɛ bɛnya luwi bɛkpa lɛtsa a kĩ be mɔa bɛkɔa awɛ bɛkɛna a. 42Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ Baguma muniki nɛ be liti, ɛfɔ̃ bɛkasum suwa mɔ odetɔ mɔ fusibii, ndɛ ayekĩ bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ Ovoli a kamɛ kĩ,
‘Israelfɔ, nnɛ́ yĩ mikɔa bayaɛ mibɔa afɔliɛ mikpa
nɛ futeli tɛna a kĩ mina nɛ kɔsa kamɛ a.
43Mbom Molok pata mɔ Romfa fusibii
baviɔ̃ a kĩ mikɛna a mikabɔa afɔliɛ kakpa.
Foesũ maafɔ̃ bipili mi ndom bɛkpã mi bɛnamɛna mɔ lugo nɛ Babilonia liti flee.’
44“Boe bawanyɔ na patampa kĩ ye kamɛ Baguma kanyɛ akũ katsa be nɛ kɔsa a kamɛ. Bike patampa kĩĩ ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma nyɛ ɛtsa Mose kĩ ɛkɛna pɛpɛɛpɛ a. 45Patampa kĩĩ, kĩ boe bawanyɔ tɛ bitomɛna be balɛga sɛkɛ̃ a na nɛ be awɛ, nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ Yosua kpã be a, ade bɛtɛ bati a kĩ Baguma blɔmɛna nɛ be lɔtɔ a tite a. Patampa kĩĩ na nɛ be kamɛ kɛyawo Lɛgã Dawid lɔkɔ. 46Dawid fɔkɛnatsa wo Baguma anɛ, ade evia Baguma kĩ ɛkpa ye osi eke kadzikɔ̃ wĩ ɛkpa Yakob Baguma a. 47Lɛmɛ Salomo lɛyake kɔla a ɛkpa Baguma.
48“Lɛmɛ Baguma Kpale ládzi nɛ fɔla kĩ batidziwa ke a kamɛ. Baguma onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ lɛ kĩ,
49‘Ode nyɛ yĩ lɛgãkpo,
ade tite lɛmɛ nyɛ yĩ abɔa katekɔ̃ a.
Kɔla kɔɔdabe odu míapuli mike mikpa yĩ,
mbɔɛɛ kadzikɔ̃ mɔ nlá?
50Nnɛ́ yĩ mɔawɛ lɛkɛna fukĩĩ bamɛ flee a?’ ”
51Ade Stefano buki ebi be kĩ, “Bati kĩ mideĩ atɔ ɔsĩ mianɛ! Misĩ kĩ míatse Baguma kalɛ ndɛ ayekĩ mi balɛga kɛna a. Daa miayidza kadza nɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa akũ. 52Baguma onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ ɔɔdabe mɔ mi bawanyɔ tátomɔ ye liti? Bɛkɔ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi kĩ Oti a Kĩ Bɛpau kĩ ye akũ kpalɛ a aaya. Oti Kĩ Bɛpau kĩĩ malo, minyɛ ye mikpa bɛkɔ ye. 53Ɔnɔkɔali fɔanɛ kĩ mi a kĩ mitɛ Baguma mbla mitomɛna ye ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ sɛkɛ̃ a, misĩ ye akũ kakɛna.”
Bɛtalɛ Stefano Boe.
54Kĩ binu Stefano fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ nɛ be akũ a, be tɔwɔlɛ hulu, ade bɛkaba adɔ̃ dzadzadza mɔ kalɔkpa a. 55Lɛmɛ Stefano kĩ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa yi ye kamɛ, dzɛla anɛ ɛdã ode koee ade ɛmɔ Baguma kukũkpalɛ a mɔ Yesu kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ Baguma sɔmɔna a. 56Ade ebi be kĩ, “Midã! Mamɔ kĩ odetɔ́ kamɛ binya ade Otidziwa Obi a dzɛ̃ nɛ Baguma sɔmɔna a!”
57Bati a bɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba, bisua atɔ ade biwula atsɛ bɛnapi ye a. 58Bɛvɛlɛ ye bɛnɛmɛna nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ ade bɛtalɛ ye boe a. Bati a kĩ bɛvɛlɛ ye bɛnɛmɛna a nyɛ be tɛtadiɛ wulaa biyi nɛ opopo odi kĩ bavɛ Saulo sɛkɛ̃. 59Kĩ bɛkatalɛ Stefano boe a, ɛbɔa mpaɛ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate Yesu, tɛ yĩ hũhũ.” 60Ade ke eke aduli ɛbɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba ɛlɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, tase be tɔkpa kĩĩ akũ kɔtɔ!” Kĩ ɛlɛ fukĩĩ eyua a, ade eku a.

Title: ADZUMA 8
Content:
1Lɔkɔ a kĩ bɛkɔ Stefano a, Saulo mɔ́ kawɔlɛ nɛ ye wuda akũ.
Saulo Tómɔ Batɛ Badonɛ a Liti.
Kito luwi a na, ade bido batɛ badonɛ a liti katomɛna awɛ nɛ Yerusalem a. Batɛ badonɛ a flee pansam bilo bɛnaa Yudea mɔ Samaria tite akũ. Lɛmɛ fɔtɔ banyanɛ a kɔ̃ kahɔ nɛ awã. 2Bikĩ bavila Baguma a kamɛ badi bɔɛ Stefano ɔnɔkpa a bɛnabila, ade bibe ye paa a.
3Ade Saulo kɔa ete nɛ ye akũ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ yakɔ batɛ badonɛ a. Foesũ ɛkawo nɛ tɔtɔ tidi nyɛ tidi kamɛ kapili batsole mɔ banyole flee kavɛlɛ be kanaado nɛ kɔla kamɛ.
Filipo De Lɛtsa Nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a Akũ Nɛ Samaria.
4Lɛmɛ batɛ badonɛ a kĩ bilo nɛ Yerusalem a tsã bimini bɛkalɛ kalɛ wĩ a nɛ Yesu akũ. 5Ade Filipo naa Samaria ɔmatɔ odi kamɛ ɛnabi bati a Kalɛ Wĩ nɛ Kristo akũ a. 6Bati pii tse ye fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ a nɛ awãwã fɔtsa a kĩ ɛkɛna bɛmɔ́ a sũ. 7Ɛblɔmɛna hũhũ kpa etomɛna bati pii kamɛ. Hũhũ kpa a kabɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba ntɛ banɛ nɛ bati a kamɛ. Ɛtsa bati kĩ biveliveli mɔ bikĩ bɛnɛ lɛkpɛ̃ lɛmɛ. 8Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ Samaria ɔmatɔ a kamɛ bati mɔ kawɔlɛ paa!
9Kanɔkɔnɛ ɔdãnɛ odi kĩ bavɛ Simon na nɛ Samaria ɔmatɔ a kamɛ Ye kanɔkɔnɛ kadã a kakɛna bati wãwã kĩ fɔfɔ̃ yabu ye akũ kĩ oti mɔ kɔbɛ̃ odi odu yanɛ. 10Samariafɔ batsole mɔ banyole flee abu ye nɛ fukĩĩ sũ, ade balɛ nɛ ye akũ kĩ, “Ye nyɛ Baguma kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ bavɛ Kɔbɛ̃ Kpalede a.” 11Nɛ ayekĩ ye kanɔkɔnɛ kadã awo be anɛ sũ ni, bati atse ye ɔlɛdo. 12Lɛmɛ finyaakĩĩ kɔ̃, bɛtɛ Filipo fɔtsa katsa nɛ Baguma lɛgãkanya akũ a nɛ Yesu Kristo dĩ akũ bido. Nɛ foesũ batsole mɔ banyole pii tɛ mui kawɔla amaniɛ. 13Simon kĩĩ lɛmɛ tɛ edo ade ɛtɛ mui kawɔla amaniɛ a. Ɛtsã etomɔ Filipo bɛkamini ade Filipo awãwã fɔtsa kpale a kĩ ɛkakɛna a fɔ̃ akũ dzuli ye a!
14Kĩ fɔtɔ banyanɛ nɛ Yerusalem nu kĩ Samariafɔ tɛ Baguma kalɛ a bido a, bido Petro mɔ Yohanes kĩ bɛnaasɛla be. 15Kĩ biwo awã a, bɛbɔa mpaɛ nɛ batɛ badonɛ vɔɛ̃ a lɔlɔ kĩ bɛtɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a. 16Titɔ kĩ bɛkɛna be mui kawɔla amaniɛ a nɛ Yesu dĩ akũ malo ni, bɛtátɛ tɔ̃ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a. 17Foesũ Petro mɔ Yohanes te awɛ nɛ be akũ ade bɛtɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a.
18Kĩ Simon mɔ́ kĩ awɛ fɔtɔ banyanɛ a ate nɛ bati akũ fɔmɔ batɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a sũ ni, ɛbɔɛ sika ɛkpa, 19ade ebi be kĩ, “Mikpa yĩ kɔbɛ̃ kĩĩ odu ayekĩ ntɛ nte awɛ nɛ bati akũ ni, baana Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a.” 20Ade Petro bi ye kĩ, “Mimɔ nɔ sika a flee míawɔ, kitonɛkĩ ɔkɔna kĩ aapuli ɔya Baguma futetsa mɔ sika. 21Ɔláapuli ɔkɛna adzuma kĩĩ, kitonɛkĩ nɔ ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ lɛ́waa yededeede nɛ Baguma anɛ. 22Fɔnɛ adzuni kpa a kĩ ewo nɛ nɔ kamɛ a awɛ kabɔa mpaɛ kakpa boe Ɔlate, ɔsa yaakɔa nɔ ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kakɔna kpa kĩ ete nɔ, 23kitonɛkĩ mmɔ́ kĩ anɛngbã mɔ titikpa kakɛna nya nɔ kamɛ kamɛ!”
24Ade Simon bi Petro mɔ Yohanes kĩ, “Mike boe Ɔlate aduli mikpa yĩ ayekĩ kadumu fɔlɛtsa kĩ milɛ kĩĩ fudima lɛlaaya nɛ yĩ akũ.”
25Kĩ Petro mɔ Yohanes lɛ boe Ɔlate kalɛ wĩ a, bidi adansiɛ lɛmɛ nɛ ke akũ nɛ Samaria biyua a, bimuniki bɛnaa Yerusalem. Bɛnatsã Samaria tukula pii kamɛ bɛkade lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ.
Filipo Lɔmɛna Mɔ Etiopia Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Odi.
26Ade boe Ɔlate ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ odi yabi Filipo kĩ, “Yidza, kaka nɛ kayɔ, katsã kɔsa kamɛ osi a kĩ eto Yerusalem ɛnaa Gaza akũ a.” 27Ade ke eyidza epi osi a. Kĩ yanaa a, ɛnatsɛlamɛna onyole odi kĩ yaya. Onyole kĩĩ nyɛ Etiopia lɛgãtsole kĩ bavɛ Kandake, sika akũ fɔtsa ɔdãmɛnanɛ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃. Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ kĩĩ nabɔa mpaɛ nɛ Yerusalem. 28Emuniki yatsã, ade edzi nɛ ohilili kĩ bapɔnkɔ avɛlɛ kamɛ, ɛkakã Baguma Onukpɛ̃ Ɔnyɛnɛ Yesaya ovoli a. 29Ade Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a bi Filipo kĩ, “Tsã kanaapi ohilili a.”
30Foesũ Filipo wula atsɛ ɛnaa ye sɛkɛ̃ ade enu kĩ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a kakã Baguma Onukpɛ̃ Ɔnyɛnɛ Yesaya ovoli a kĩ ɛtsɛlɛ a. Ade evia ye kĩ, “Anu fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ɔlamɛna kakã a kayɔ?” 31Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Oowo, nde maakɛna nnu foe kayɔ ntɛ odima tányɛ foe kamɛ ɛtsa yĩ?” Eke Filipo aduli kĩ ede ewo nɛ ohilili a kamɛ edzi nɛ ye ɔwɛ̃. 32Fɔlɛtsa a kĩ foe ɛkakã nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ nyɛ kĩ,
“Bɛkpã ye ndɛ kuveli aye banamɛna kakɔkɔ̃.
Edzɛ̃ dĩĩ ndɛ kavelibi nɛ ke tɛtsã bakpelinɛ anɛ
ade ayea lɛmɛ ɛtábinya onukpɛ̃ a.
33Nɛ ye akũ kadɔla sũ, bɛtádzɛ bɛkpa ye ɔtɛbɛ
Owei aalɛ kadi etomɛna ye babi mɔ bawa akũ,
Kitonɛkĩ bɛtɛ ye nkpã nɛ ye awɛ nɛ katinya kamɛ.”
34Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a via Filipo kĩ, “Bi yĩ. Owei akũ fɔlɛtsa onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ a lamɛna kɔdzɛla kalɛ, ye mɔa akũ mbɔɛɛ kĩ oti bɛbã?” 35Filipo yi kayɔ etomɛna fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ akũ, ade ɛkɔa fɔbɛbã pii ebu, ebi ye Kalɛ Wĩ a nɛ Yesu akũ a.
36-37Kĩ banaa nɛ osi a bɛnawo kakɔ kadi kĩ mui dzɛ̃ nɛ osi ɔwɛ̃. Fɔtsa akũ ɔdãmɛnanɛ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a bi Filipo kĩ, “Aádã mui badi nɛ awĩ! Litsa sũ nláapuli ntɛ Baguma mui kawɔla amaniɛ a?”
Ade Filipo bi ye kĩ, “Ntɛ ɔtɛ odo mɔ nɔ ɔwɔlɛ flee kɔ̃ ni, aapuli ɔtɛ” 38Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a bi ye kĩ, “Ntɛ ndo kĩ Yesu Kristo nyɛ́ Baguma Obi a.” Ade awã ɛfɔ̃ ohilili a dza a. Biduma bɛnawo nɛ mui a kamɛ ade Filipo wɔla ye mui nɛ Yesu dĩ akũ a.
39Kĩ bɛnɛ nɛ mui a kamɛ a, Boe Ɔlate Hũhũ a bɔɛ Filipo ɛdzakũmɛna, ade ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a tabuki ɛmɔ ye a. Ɛtɔasu ye osi ɛnaa mɔ kawɔlɛ.
40Ke liti a, Filipo mɔ eyi ɔsũ kĩ ɛyanɛ ɛta nɛ Asoto ɔmatɔ kamɛ. Ɛtsã emini eto awã ɛkalɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a nɛ tɛmatɔ a kĩ tideĩ nɛ osi akũ a flee kɛnawo Kaisarea ɔmatɔ a kamɛ.

Title: ADZUMA 9
Content:
Saulo Dani Ɔwɔlɛ Kamɛ.
1Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ, Saulo kɔa kɔnɛyɔɔlɛ etomɔ batɛ badonɛ a liti kĩ yawɔla be.
Ɛnaa Yudafɔ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee a sɛkɛ̃. 2ɛnavia kĩ bɛkpa ye otumi tuvoli, lɔkɔa ɛnaa Yudafɔ fɔtsɛnakɔ̃ nɛ Damasko, ɛnaapili bikĩ bɛtsɛ̃ nɛ boe Ɔlate osi vɔɛ̃ a akũ, batsole mɔ banyole flee, esuli be ɛyamɛna nɛ Yerusalem.
3Lɔkɔ a kĩ Saulo fuã Damasko ɔmatɔ a eyua mɔ kakɔna kĩĩ a ni, deedimɔapɛ ɔhaĩ odi mɔanɛ eto ode etsua esinya ye. 4Ɛka ɛtɔ ade enu ɔlɛdo odi kĩ, “Saulo, Saulo litsa sũ otomɔ yĩ liti?”
5Ade Saulo via kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, nɔ owei anɛ?”
Ɔlɛdo kĩĩ kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Yĩ nyɛ Yesu a kĩ ye liti otomɛna a. 6Yidza finyaakĩĩ kanaa ɔmatɔ a kamɛ, lɔkɔa baabi nɔ lɛtsa a kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ akɛna.”
7Banyole a kĩ bɛmɔ Saulo bɛtsɛ̃ a fɔ̃ bɛdza lɛmɛ baámɔ lɛtsa a kĩ de balɛ. Binu ɔlɛdo a lɛmɛ bɛtámɔ oti odima. 8Ade kĩ Saulo yidza nɛ tite ebinya banebi a, ebuki yaámɔ fɔkɔ. Foesũ bipi ye nɛ kɔkpɔ bɛkpã ye bɛnamɛna Damasko ɔmatɔ a kamɛ. 9Edzi fuwi ɛlalɛ kĩ yaámɔ fɔkɔ, yaánya, yaámɔa lɛmɛ.
10Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ ɔtɛ odonɛ odi kĩ bavɛ Anania na nɛ Damasko. Boe Ɔlate nyɛ ye akũ ɛtsa ye ɛvɛ ye kĩ, “Anania!”
Anania tunɔ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, amɔ yĩ nɛ awĩ!”
11Ade boe Ɔlate bi ye kĩ, “Yidza katsã ɔblɔnu a kĩ bavɛ Ɔblɔnu Kpĩĩ a akũ, lɔkɔa ntɛ owo Yuda tɔtɔ kamɛ ni, via Saulo kĩ eto Tarso a akũ. 12Edeĩ nɛ awã ɛlamɛna mpaɛ kabɔa, kitonɛkĩ ĩnyɛ ntsa ye ɛmɔ nɛ hũhũ kamɛ kĩ onyole odi kĩ bavɛ Anania aayate awɛ nɛ ye akũ ebuki ɛmɔ fɔkɔ.”
13Ade ke Anania kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, nnu fɔlɛtsa pii ntomɛna oti kĩĩ akũ nɛ ayekĩ ɛkɛna nɔ bati awɔda nɛ Yerusalem a! 14Ade bunu kĩ ɛtɛ otumi tuvoli etomɛna Basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ sɛkɛ̃ kĩ epili nɔ batɛ badonɛ flee nɛ Damasko a.”
15Lɛmɛ boe Ɔlate bi ye kĩ, “Naa nɔ kɔ̃ kanaakɛna ayekĩ mbi nɔ a, kitonɛkĩ mpau ye kĩ ɛyaanya yĩ ɔsumunɛ ɛlɛ kalɛ wĩ a ɛtsa bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ, fɔgã, mɔ Israelfɔ flee. 16Ade yĩ mɔawɛ a maanyɛ lubo a kĩ yaamɔ nɛ yĩ sũ a ntsa ye a.”
17Foesũ Anania pi osi ɛnawo nɛ tɔtɔ a kĩ te kamɛ Saulo na, ade ete awɛ nɛ ye akũ ebi ye kĩ, “Nwaɛ̃ Saulo, Boe Ɔlate Yesu kĩ ɛnyɛ ye akũ ɛtsa nɔ nɛ osi a lido yĩ nɛ nɔ sɛkɛ̃ kĩ buki kamɔ fɔkɔ, lɔkɔa Hũhũ Kpalɛwa ɛtɛ nɔ kamɛ.” 18Deedimɔapɛ fɔkɛna Saulo ndɛ tupo lɛtsɛ nɛ ye anɛ tɛnɛ tɛtɔ, ade edo fɔkɔ kamɔ awɛ a. Eyidza ɛkpa osi bɛkɛna ye mui kawɔla amaniɛ. 19Ade kĩ ɛnya eyua a, akũ de ye ɔsĩ.
Saulo De Lɛtsã Nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ Akũ Nɛ Damasko.
Saulo dzi nɛ batɛ badonɛ a sɛkɛ̃ nɛ Damasko fuwi fudi. 20Nɛ fuwi a kamɛ a, ɛnaa Yudafɔ fɔtsɛnakɔ̃ a, ade ɛnalɛ kɔdzɛla ɛtsa kĩ Yesu nyɛ Baguma Obi a.
21Fɔkɛna bati flee a kĩ binu ye fɔtsa katsa a saa, ade bivia be akũ kĩ, “Nnɛ́ oti kĩĩ tsɛ̃ yakɔ bikĩ bɛtɛ Yesu bido a nɛ Yerusalem a mbɔɛɛ? Nnɛ́ ye lɛmɛ lɛya nɛ awĩ mɔ botaɛ kĩ yayaapili batɛ badonɛ a ɛma basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a mbɔɛɛ?” 22Lɛmɛ Saulo fɔtsa katsa na kɔbɛ̃ ade ye fɔlɛtsa kamɛ kanyɛ kĩ Yesu nyɛ Kristo a táfɔ̃ Yudafɔ a kĩ bɛna nɛ Damasko a lɛtɛmɔ ye atsindze a. 23Fuwi fudi liti ni, Yudafɔ a natsɛna ade bipi adzuni kĩ bakɔ ye a. 24Lɛmɛ bati bɔɛ bɛyabi Saulo. Lɛnyɛ mɔ suwa flee bɛkadzɔlɛ ɔmatɔ a seebi a kĩ bike bisinya a tunyukpɛ̃ ayekĩ baana ye bɛkɔ. 25Lɛmɛ lɛnyɛ mɔa kayite a, bikĩ bitomɔ Saulo a bɔɛ ye bido nɛ ɔtsɛtsɛ kamɛ bɛtsãmɛna seebi ɔkɛ kamɛ bɛkamɛna ye bɛdzɛla nɛ tite!
Saulo Naa Yerusalem.
26Kĩ Saulo naa Yerusalem a, ɛwɛ kĩ yanaawo nɛ batɛ badonɛ a kamɛ nɛ awã. Lɛmɛ be flee bivila ye kitonɛkĩ bɛtátɛ bido kĩ ɔtɛ odonɛ yanɛ. 27Ade Barnaba bumɔ ye ɛkpã ye ɛnamɛna fɔtɔ banyanɛ a sɛkɛ̃ a. Ebi be ayekĩ Saulo mɔ́ boe Ɔlate a nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ yanaa Damasko, mɔ ayekĩ boe Ɔlate lɛmɔ ye kɔdzɛla lɛmɛ a. Ebi be lɛmɛ ayekĩ Saulo lɛ kɔdzɛla mɔ kɔbɛ̃ nɛ Yesu dĩ akũ nɛ Damasko. 28Ade bɛtɛ ye ɛna nɛ be kamɛ a. Kito ke a, ɛna nɛ be kamɛ, emini nɛ Yerusalem flee ɛkalɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa a nɛ boe Ɔlate dĩ akũ mɔ kɔbɛ̃. 29Ade Yudafɔ badi kĩ balɛ Griki, kavɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa mɔ Saulo a, lɛmɛ bɛwɛ kĩ bakɔ ye. 30Kĩ batɛ badonɛ a badi nu fukĩĩ a bɛkpã Saulo bɛnamɛna Kaisarea ade bɛnyɛ ye osi ɛnaa ye ɔtɔ Tarso a.
31Fɔyaya kĩ nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ, batɛ badonɛ a kĩ bɛna nɛ Yudea, Galilea mɔ Samaria na nɛ lukudɔ kamɛ. Nɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa kɔbɛ̃ akũ sũ ni, bɛna ɔwɔlɛ kado. Bɛpɔ bibu ade bɛkɔa obu bɛkpa boe Ɔlate a.
Petro Naa Lida Mɔ Yopa.
32Petro mini ɛnaa fɔkɔ pii. Nɛ foe kamɛ a, ɛnasɛla batɛ badonɛ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ ɔmatɔ odi kĩ bavɛ Lida kamɛ. 33Awã na ɛmɔ onyole odi kĩ bavɛ Ainea. Ade futeli ɛlɛ̃ flee kĩ eveliveli kĩ yaápuli eyidza nɛ ɔkɛna akũ a. 34Kĩ Petro mɔ ye a, ebi ye kĩ, “Ainea! Yesu Kristo tsa nɔ fɔsɔ! Yidza kadza kabuta nɔ ɔkɛna.” Deedimɔapɛ Ainea yidza ɛdza, nɛ akũ ɔsĩ kamɛ. 35Bati a flee kĩ bidzi nɛ Lida mɔ Saron a, mɔ́ Ainea foesũ bɛkɔa be akũ bɛkpa boe Ɔlate.
36Ke liti a, otsole odi kĩ bavɛ Tabita na nɛ Yopa. Nɛ Griki tide kamɛ ni, bavɛ ye Dorkas kĩ de kayɔ nyɛ kayisie. Ɛnyɛ ɔtɛ odonɛ kĩ yakɛna tuwĩ daa, kabumɛna ahiãfɔ lɛmɛ. 37Fɔsɔ yabɔa ye ade eku a. Foesũ ye bati wɔla ye mui bihihiɛ ye bɛwɔla nɛ kɔla kamɛ nɛ abansulu ode. 38Yopa mɔ Lida kayite távɛlɛ, foesũ kĩ batɛ badonɛ a nu kĩ Petro na nɛ Lida a, bido bati nviã mɔ ɔlɛdo nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ kĩ, “Wɛ sɔwa kaya nɛ boe sɛkɛ̃.” 39Ade ke Petro yidza ɛmanɛ akũ etomɔ be a. Kĩ ewo awã a bɛkpã ye bɛnamɛna kɔla kĩ koe kamɛ bɛwɔla Dorkas a. Bakunawa batsole dza bisinya Petro nɛ awã bɛkabe ade bɛtsa ye tɛtadie flee a kĩ Dorkas kapamu nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ edzi nkpã a. 40Ade Petro nyɛ be flee nɛ kɔla a kamɛ, eke aduli ɛbɔa mpaɛ a. Ɛdani ɛtsɛlamɔ ɔnɔkpa a ade ɛlɛ kĩ, “Tabita! Yidza!” Awã na ebinya anɛ ade kĩ ɛmɔ Petro a, eyidza edzi. 41Ade Petro pi ye nɛ kɔkpɔ ɛdzɛla ye a. Foesũ Petro vɛ batɛ badonɛ mɔ bakunawa a, ade ɛkɔa ye nkpã ode edo nɛ be awɛ a. 42Fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ gba nɛ Yopa flee ade bati pii tɛ boe Ɔlate bido a. 43Ke liti a, Petro dzi nɛ Yopa fuwi pii ade ɛna nɛ Simon adi kĩ yakɔa bayaɛ tuvoli kapamu fɔtsa a sɛkɛ̃ a.

Title: ADZUMA 10
Content:
Petro Naa Kornelio Sɛkɛ̃.
1Lɔkɔ a na kamɛ, onyole odi kĩ bavɛ Kornelio na nɛ Kaisarea ɔmatɔ a kamɛ. Ɛnyɛ Romafɔ kawũ ɔnɔnɛ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃. 2Ɛnyɛ oti wĩ, ade ye mɔ ye kɔla flee basum Baguma a. Oti kĩĩ abumɔ Yudafɔ ahiãfɔ kĩ futo ye ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ, ade yabɔa mpaɛ luwi daa lɛmɛ a. 3Luwi a, kĩ kanaa olobe tɔdɔũ ɛlalɛ kamɛ a, ɛna hũhũ kamɛ kanyɛkatsa, ɛmɔ́ yededeede kĩ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ odi yabi ye kĩ, “Kornelio!”
4Kornelio dã ye koee mɔ libe ade evia ye kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, litsa fɔanɛ?”
Ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a bi ye kĩ, “Nɔ sɛmɛ kalɛ kakɛna mɔ mpaɛbɔ a wo Baguma sɛkɛ̃. 5Do bati bɛnaa Yopa bɛnaakpã onyole odi kĩ bavɛ Simon Petro bɛyamɛna. 6Edeĩ nɛ Simon kĩ yakɛna bayaɛ tuvoli akũ adzuma nɛ mpo abuĩ a sɛkɛ̃.” 7Kĩ Baguma ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a dzakũ a, Kornelio vɛ ye kɔla basumunɛ nviã mɔ kawũ ɔnɔnɛ mɔa kĩ ɛnyɛ oti kpĩĩ kĩ yadzɔlɛ ye akũ lɛmɛ. 8Ebi be lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya a, ade edo be kĩ bɛnaa Yopa a.
9Kĩ kade nyina a kĩ bɛkɔa bafuã Yopa a, Petro de ɛnaa lɛtsã ode nɛ awã kĩ ese a, ɛnaabɔa mpaɛ mɔ suwa tɔdɔũ ewua-nviã lɔkɔ a. 10Kɔlɛ kakɔ ye ade ɛwɛ litsedi kĩ yanya a. Lɛmɛ kĩ bɛkatɔ funitsã a, ɛna kanyɛkatsa. 11Awã na ɛmɔ́ kĩ odetɔ́ binya, ade ɛmɔ́ kĩ bɛkayɔna litsedi ndɛ lima kpale kĩ bipini de nɛ atɔ ɛna a. 12Bayaɛ ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ, bɔɛ mɔ kɔvɔlabi lɛmɛ na nɛ lima a kamɛ. 13Ade ɔlɛdo odi bi ye kĩ “Petro Yidza, kɔ, kaba!”
14Lɛmɛ Petro kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Oowo! Kusɛ! Boe Ɔlate yĩ onukpɛ̃ táta ɔyaɛ sɛkɛna kĩ boe Yudafɔ bɔakesĩ a da!”
15Ɔlɛdo a buki ɛlɛ kĩ, “Lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma kpalɛ de akũ ni, tabu kĩ efĩĩ deĩ nɛ de akũ!” 16Ɛna kanyɛkatsa kĩĩ titi ɛlalɛ, ade bɛvɛlɛ fɔtsa a bɛnamɛna ode a.
17Lɔkɔ a na kamɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kakɛna Petro basa basa, ade evia ye akũ kĩ, “Litsa fukĩĩ atsa?”
Ade ke kamɛ a mɔ bati a kĩ Kornelio do fɔtɔ a yawo ɔmatɔ a kamɛ a. Kĩ bɛmɔ́ tɔtɔ a kĩ bawɛ a, bɛnadza nɛ te onyukpɛ̃, 18ade bɛkavia katse awã kĩ Simon Petro dzi a.
19Petro buki edzimɔ lɔlɔ kamɛ kakɔna nɛ kanyɛkatsa a kayɔ kanu akũ, ade Baguma Hũhũ a bi ye kĩ, “Bati ɛlalɛ ya bɛlamɛna nɔ kawɛ. 20Yidza katsɛlamɔ be. Tavila be katomɛna kanaa kitonɛkĩ yĩ lido be.”
21Ade Petro duma ɛka ɛnabi be kĩ, “Yĩ nyɛ oti a kĩ milamɛna kawɛ a. Litsa sũ mitsɛ̃?”
22Bɛkpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Kornelio kĩ ɛnyɛ Romafɔ kawũ ɔnɔnɛ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ lido boe fɔtɔ. Ɛnyɛ oti kĩ edzi kpĩĩ, yasum Baguma, ade Yudafɔ flee akpa ye obu a. Baguma ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ odi bi ye kĩ edo batɔ nɛ nɔ sɛkɛ̃, lɔkɔa etse nɔ onukpɛ̃ kamɛ fɔlɛtsa.” 23Foesũ Petro kpa be kasɛkɔ̃ nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ ade ɛtɛ be ndɛ ye banɔvɔɛ̃ aye a.
Kĩ kade nyina a, ye mɔ batɛ badonɛ badi kĩ bito Yopa mɔ batɔ a bipi osi. 24Luwi lɛyade a, bɛnawo Kaisarea, awã kĩ Kornelio kpɔta ye tɔtɔ kamɛ bati mɔ bakɔba badi bidzi bɛkadzɔlɛ Petro kaya a. 25Kĩ Petro aawo nɛ tɔtɔ a kamɛ a, Kornelio natsɛlamɔ ye, eke aduli nɛ ye abɔa kayɔ ade ɛkɛna lɔlɔ a. 26Lɛmɛ Petro dzɛla ye ebi ye kĩ, “Yidza kadza! Yĩ malo otidziwa manɛ.” 27Kĩ bɛkalɔmɛna a, Kornelio kpã ye ewomɛna nɛ awã kĩ bati nkaɛ a kpɔta bidzi badzɔlɛ be a. 28Ade Petro bi be kĩ, “Minyina yededeede kĩ boe Yudafɔ mbla tákpa yĩ osi kĩ nnaa odi bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a sɛkɛ̃ ĩye nkɔa akũ mbɔamɔ be. Lɛmɛ Baguma nyɛ ɛtsa yĩ kĩ ntabu odima kĩ ye akũ tákpalɛ. 29Nɛ foesũ kĩ batɔ a yavɛ yĩ a, ntásĩ. Litsa sũ odo bati kĩ bɛyaavɛ yĩ?”
30Ade Kornelio bi ye kĩ, “Nviã fuwi ɛlalɛ, fɔ́ana ndɛ tɔdɔũ ɛlalɛ kamɛ, nkabɔa mpaɛ nɛ yĩ awã. Deedimɔapɛ onyole odi kĩ edeĩ nɛ tɛtadiɛ ovoe kĩ tata muamua kamɛ nɛ ɛta nɛ yĩ anɛ kamɛ, 31-32ade ebi yĩ kĩ, ‘Kornelio, Baguma nu nɔ mpaɛbɔ, eyi nɔ sɛmɛ kalɛ kakɛna lɛmɛ ɔsũ. Do bati bɛnaa Yopa bɛnaakpã odi kĩ bavɛ Simon Petro. Ɛyase nɛ Simon kĩ yakɔa bayaɛ tuvoli kapamu fɔtsa nɛ mpo abuĩ a sɛkɛ̃.’ 33Ade foesũ ndo batɔ nɛ nɔ sɛkɛ̃ lɛtalɛta a, ade odi foe akũ ɔya mɔatsɛ lɛmɛ a. Foesũ boe flee budzi nɛ awĩ nɛ Baguma anɛ kamɛ kĩ yaaabi boe lɛtsa a kĩ ebi nɔ kĩ bi boe a.”
Petro Kpalɛ Baguma Kalɛ Wĩ a Kamɛ.
34Ade Petro bi ye kĩ, “Finyaakĩĩ mmɔ́ ĩyi ɔsũ kĩ Baguma ládã bati anɛ. 35Mbom oti kĩ ɛdɔla ye akũ ɛkpa Baguma, yakɛna nɛ ye kawɛ akũ lɛmɛ ni, ade ye Baguma awɛ a. 36Matɛ kado kĩ minu kalɛ a kĩ ɛma Israelfɔ kĩ fɔnyɛ lukudɔ Kalɛ Wĩ a kĩ fɔtsɛ̃ Yesu Kristo akũ a. Ade ye lɛmɛ nyɛ katinya kamɛ bati flee Ɔlate a. 37Ade minyina kalɛ kpale a kĩ fɔya nɛ Israelfɔ tite akũ, kĩ kiyi kayɔ nɛ Galilea, kito lɔkɔ a kĩ Yohanes de lɛtsã nɛ mui kawɔla amaniɛ akũ a. 38Minu lɛmɛ ayekĩ Baguma kɔa ye Hũhũ mɔ kɔbɛ̃ eko nɛ Yesu kĩ eto Nazaret a akũ. Ɛtsã emini nɛ kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ ɛkakɛna tuwĩ, ade ɛtsa bikĩ hũhũ kpa kaha be a, kitonɛkĩ Baguma tomɔ ye.
39“Boe bɔnyɛ adansifɔ bɔkpa fɔtsa a kĩ ɛkɛna nɛ Israelfɔ tite akũ mɔ Yerusalem a. Ade ke bɛkɔ ye nɛ ye kabɔa kamɛna nɛ asendua akũ a. 40Lɛmɛ Baguma dzɛla ye eto kanɔkpa nɛ luwi lɛlalɛde akũ, ade ɛfɔ̃ ɛnyɛ ye akũ ɛtsa bati a. 41Lɛmɛ nnɛ́ bati flee lɔmɔ ye, mbom boe a kĩ Baguma pau ndɛ adansifɔ a lɛmɔ́ ye. Budo awɛ bɔnya, bɔmɔa mɔ ye kĩ eyidza eto kanɔkpa liti a. 42Ade boe edo kĩ bɔnaalɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a nɛ kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ, budi adansiɛ lɛmɛ kĩ Baguma kɛna Yesu batidziwa mɔ banɔkpa flee fɔlɛtsa ɔdzɛnɛ. 43Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ flee lɛ nɛ ye akũ kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaatɛ ye edo ni, Baguma aakɔa ye tɔkpa ete ye nɛ Yesu dĩ akũ.”
Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a Ka Eko Nɛ Bikĩ Bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a Lɛmɛ Akũ.
44Ade kĩ Petro kalɛ kɔdzɛla a, Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a ka eko nɛ bati a flee kĩ bidzi batsɛ ye fɔlɛtsa a akũ. 45Fɔkɛna Yudafɔ batɛ badonɛ a kĩ bitomɛna Petro nɛ Yopa bɛyaa a saa, nɛ ayekĩ Baguma Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a ka eko nɛ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ lɛmɛ a akũ. 46Kitonɛkĩ binu kĩ bɛkalɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ tide ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ kamɛ ade bɛkamu Baguma Kpale a. Ade ke Petro lɛ kĩ, 47“Ayekĩ bati kĩĩ tɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a ndɛ ayekĩ boe malo bɔtɛ a sũ ni, bɔ́apuli busĩ kĩ bɔákɛna be mui kawɔla amaniɛ?” 48Foesũ ɛkpa osi kĩ bɛkɛna be mui kawɔla amaniɛ nɛ Yesu Kristo dĩ akũ. Ke liti a, bɛwã ye kĩ edzi nɛ be sɛkɛ̃ fɔtɛ fuwi fudi.

Title: ADZUMA 11
Content:
Petro Nyɛ Fɔlɛtsa Kamɛ Ɛtsa Batɛ Badonɛ a Nɛ Yerusalem.
1Owi tábuna mɔ fɔtɔ banyanɛ a mɔ batɛ badonɛ bɛbã nɛ Yudea nu kĩ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a lɛmɛ tɛ Baguma Kalɛ Wĩ a. 2Lɛmɛ kĩ Petro muniki ɛya nɛ Yerusalem a, Yudafɔ a kĩ bɛna nɛ awã a tátunɔ mɔ ye, ade bibi ye kĩ, 3“Ɔnakɔa nɔ akũ ɔtsɛkamɔ banɔvɔɛ̃ kĩ bitómɛna Yudafɔ fɔtsa katsa a, ade odo awɛ ɔnyamɔ be malo a!”
4Ade ke Petro nyɛ fɔlɛtsa kamɛ ɛtsa be kĩ, 5“Lɔkɔ a kĩ nna nɛ Yopa nkabɔa mpaɛ a, nna kanyɛkatsa. Nɛ foe kamɛ a, mmɔ́ kĩ bɛkakɛna lima dzɛlɛwa baũ lidi kĩ bipini de nɛ atɔ ɛna, ade lɛka lɛyakpula nɛ yĩ ɔwɛ̃ a. 6Bayaɛ kumɛkumɛ na nɛ lima kpale kĩĩ kamɛ, bayaɛ kĩ bideĩ abɔa ɛna, bikĩ bɛtsɛ̃ nɛ sɛmɛ akũ, mɔ kɔvɔlabi kĩ bɔába malo. 7Ade nnu ɔlɛdo odi ebi yĩ kĩ, ‘Petro! Yidza kakɔ kaba!’
8“Lɛmɛ nkpa mbuayɛ kĩ, ‘Oowo! Kusɛ! Boe Ɔlate, yĩ onukpɛ̃ táta ɔyaɛ kĩ boe Yudafɔ bɔakesĩ a da.’
9“Ɔlɛdo a buki ɛlɛ kĩ, ‘Ntɛ lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma kpalɛ de akũ ni, tabu kĩ efĩĩ deĩ nɛ de akũ.’ 10Fɔtsa kĩĩ kɛna lɔmɔ titi ɛlalɛ flee. Ke liti a, bɛvɛlɛ lima kpale kĩĩ mɔ bayaɛ a flee bɛnamɛna ode.
11“Ade lɔkɔ a na kamɛ pɛpɛɛpɛ mɔ́ batɔ ɛlalɛ a kĩ bito Kaisarea bɛyaakpã yĩ a wo tɔtɔ a kĩ te kamɛ nse a. 12Baguma Hũhũ a bi yĩ kĩ ntasĩ, mbom ntomɔ be bɔnaa. Batɛ badonɛ evũ a kĩ bito Yopa a, tomɔ yĩ bɔnawo oti a kĩ ye lido batɔ a tɔtɔ kamɛ. 13Ye malo ebi boe ayekĩ Baguma fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ nyɛ ye akũ ɛtsa ye, ebi ye kĩ, ‘Naawɛ odi kado ye nɛ Yopa ɛnaavɛ onyole odi kĩ bavɛ Simon Petro. 14Yaabi nɔ ayekĩ mimɔ nɔ tɔtɔ kamɛ bati flee míana katɛ.’
15“Ke liti a, ĩyi kayɔ mɔ be Baguma fɔlɛtsa a kabi. Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a ka eko nɛ be akũ ndɛ ayekĩ eko nɛ boe flee akũ nɛ kayɔkayi a. 16Ade ke nte anɛ nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ boe Ɔlate lɛ eyi kĩ, ‘Nuwĩnuwĩ, Yohanes kɔa mui ɛwɔla bati mui, lɛmɛ Baguma aakɔa Hũhũ Kpalɛwa ɛwɔla mi mui.’ 17Ade kĩ Baguma lɛkpa bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a futetsa kĩĩ ndɛ ayekĩ ɛkpa boe kĩ bɔtɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo budo sũ ni, yĩ nyɛ owei kĩ masua Baguma osi!”
18Kĩ binu fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a bɛfɔ̃ atsindze katɛ ade bimu Baguma bɛlɛ kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔali, Baguma binya osi ɛkpa bati bɛbã lɛmɛ kĩ bɛdani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ lɔkɔa bɛna nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna a!”
Batɛ Badonɛ Nɛ Antiokia Pɔ Bibu.
19Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ kĩ fukĩĩ bamɛ lamɛna kaya a, batɛ badonɛ a kĩ bilo tɛnya kakɛna nɛ Stefano wuda sũ a, lo bɛnaa Foenike, Kipro mɔ Antiokia tɛmatɔ a kamɛ. Bimini bɛlɛ Baguma kalɛ a bɛkpa Yudafɔ odi. 20Lɛmɛ batɛ badonɛ bɛbã a kĩ bito Kipro mɔ Kirene naa Antiokia bɛnabi Grikifɔ Baguma kalɛ a nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu akũ. 21Nɛ kĩ boe Ɔlate kɔbɛ̃ na nɛ be kamɛ sũ bati pii tɛ bido. 22Kĩ batɛ badonɛ nɛ Yerusalem nu lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya nɛ Antiokia a, bido Barnaba kĩ ɛnaa awã. 23Kĩ ewo awã a, ɛmɔ́ ayekĩ Baguma bumɔ be a, kawɔlɛ de ye paa, ade ɛkpa be kɔdɛ kĩ bɛkɔa be tɔwɔlɛ flee bite nɛ boe Ɔlate akũ a. 24Barnaba nyɛ oti wĩ, edeĩ katɛkado ade Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a lɛmɛ tɛ ye kamɛ. Futo ye akũ sũ ni, bati pii tɛ boe Ɔlate bido. 25Ke liti a, Barnaba naa Tarso kĩ yanaawɛ Saulo nɛ awã a.
26Kĩ ɛmɔ ye a, ɛkpã ye bɛnaa Antiokia. Bɛna nɛ awã kateli mɔa flee, bɛkatsɛna bati pii katsa be fɔtsa. Ade Antiokia mɔ bɛnya lɔtɔ bɛvɛ batɛ badonɛ a kĩ Kristofɔ a.
27Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ ni, Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ badi to Yerusalem bɛya nɛ Antiokia a. 28Ade Agabo kĩ ɛnyɛ be kamɛ ɔmɔa yidza ɛdza nɛ be katsɛnakɔ̃, ade nɛ Baguma Hũhũ kɔbɛ̃ onukpɛ̃ ni, ɛlɛ eyi kĩ kɔlɛ kpale aanɛ nɛ katinya flee kamɛ. Fukĩĩ yaya nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ Klaudio nya Romafɔ Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃ a. 29Nɛ foesũ batɛ badonɛ a yake otse kĩ baate fɔtsa fudi bɛkɔa bɛmɛna be bawaɛ̃ nɛ Yudea. Be kamɛ odi nyɛ odi te ayekĩ yaapuli. 30Kĩ bɛkpɔta fɔtsa kĩĩ a, bɛkɔa foe bɛkpa Barnaba mɔ Saulo kĩ bɛkɔa bɛma batɛ badonɛ banɔkɔɛ̃ a nɛ Yudea.

Title: ADZUMA 12
Content:
Herodes Kɛna Fɔtɔ Banyanɛ a Tɛnya.
1Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ, Lɛgã Herodes pi batɛ badonɛ a badi kĩ bɛkɔ be. 2Ɛfɔ̃ bɛkɔ Yakobo kĩ ɛnyɛ Yohanes ɔwaɛ̃ a mɔ lɛpamɛ. 3Kĩ ɛmɔ kĩ kawɔlɛ de Yudafɔ a sũ ni, ɛfɔ̃ bipi Petro lɛmɛ. Ɛkɛna foe nɛ Abodoo Kĩ Ɛtáyila Fuwi Kanya a kamɛ. 4Bɛkɔa ye bido nɛ kɔla kamɛ, awã kĩ sodzafɔ ɛna ɛna na nɛ kutsu ɛna kamɛ kavɛmɛna akũ kadzɔlɛ ye akũ. Herodes nhihiɛ nyɛ kĩ yaakɔa ye ɛkpa kanade a bɛdzɛmɔ ye ntɛ bɛnya Wuda Katɛ̃ Luwi a biyua. 5Foesũ sodzafɔ a kadzɔlɛ ye akũ kadzɔlɛ wĩ nɛ kɔla a kamɛ. Lɛmɛ batɛ badonɛ a kabɔa mpaɛ nɛ ye lɔlɔ kakpa Baguma mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ.
Baguma Nyɛ Petro Nɛ Abãã Kɔla Kamɛ.
6Lɛnyɛ a kĩ ke kade kanyina kamɛ Herodes aakɔa Petro ɛkpa bati a, Petro waa tida nɛ sodzafɔ nviã kayite. Bido ye nkɔsɔnkɔsɔ nviã ade sodzafɔ bɛbã dzɛ̃ nɛ opunu liti badzɔlɛ kɔla akũ a. 7Deedimɔapɛ ɔhaĩ odi mɔanɛ nɛ kɔla a kamɛ. Ade ke ode Baguma fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ odi nɛ ɛdza nɛ Petro ɔwɛ̃ a. Ɛbɔa Petro nɛ lɔbɔtɛɛ enyina ye, ade ebi ye kĩ, “Yidza mɔatsɛ!” Lɛtalɛta nkɔsɔnkɔsɔ a nɛ́ nɛ ye akpɔ ɛtɔ nɛ tite. 8Ade ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a bi ye kĩ, “Bɔɛ nɔ tɛtadiɛ, kado nɔ mpabua lɛmɛ.” Petro kɛna foe lɔmɔ, ade ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a buki ɛlɛ kĩ, “Bɔɛ nɔ atadiɛ kpale katsa akũ katomɔ yĩ.” 9Foesũ Petro tomɔ ye bɛnɛ nɛ kɔla a kamɛ. Ɛtányi ntɛ lɛtsa a kĩ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a kakɛna a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali, mbom ɛkɔna kĩ kɔda kamɛ fɔanɛ. 10Bɛtɛ̃ kawũ banɔnɛ katsu katɔnyade mɔ kayade a kĩ badzɔlɛ tunyukpɛ̃ akũ a. Kĩ biwo fɔbɔtsaɛ onyukpɛ̃ a kĩ babinya kawo nɛ ɔmatɔ kamɛ a, onyukpɛ̃ a mɔawɛ binya nɛ ye akũ akũ ade bɛtɛ̃ a. Kĩ bɛnaa lɔtɔ sukuloo a, Baguma ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a dzakũ ɛfɔnɛ ye.
11Kĩ anɛ kamɛ kpalɛ Petro a, ɛyanyi lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya nɛ ye akũ, ade ebi ye akũ kĩ, “Finyaakĩĩ, mmɔ́ kĩ ɔnɔkɔali fɔanɛ. Boe Ɔlate do ye ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ kĩ ɛyaanyɛ yĩ etomɛna Herodes awɛ kamɛ mɔ lɛtsa a kĩ Yudafɔ hihiɛ kĩ baakɛna yĩ a kamɛ!”
12Kĩ ɛmɔ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya nɛ ye akũ a, ɛdzakũ ɛnaa Maria kĩ ɛnyɛ Yohanes Marko ɔma awã. Bati pii tsɛna nɛ awã bɛkabɔa mpaɛ. 13Ade kĩ Petro dza ɛkabɔa kanya opunu a, katsolebi abawa kĩ bavɛ Roda yabinya kɔla a. 14Kĩ eyi Petro odo ɔsũ a, kawɔlɛ de ye paa, foesũ ɛtábinya opunu a, mbom ewula atsɛ ɛnakpa bati a kanyi kĩ Petro dzɛ̃ nɛ opunu liti. 15Bati a tátɛ bido foesũ bibi ye kĩ, “Kamɔ aamɔ mbɔɛɛ?” Lɛmɛ kĩ ɛdzɛmɛna kalɛ kĩ nuwĩ fɔanɛ sũ ni, bibi be akũ kĩ, “Ɔsa fɔ́anya ye Baguma ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ.”
16Lɔkɔa na flee Petro dzɛmɔ opunu a kabɔa. Kĩ bibinya opunu bɛmɔ́ ye a, akũ dzuli be. 17Ete be awɛ kĩ bɛkɛna dĩĩ, ade ebi be ayekĩ boe Ɔlate nyɛ ye etomɛna kɔla a kamɛ a. Ebi be kĩ, “Mibi Yakobo mɔ batɛ badonɛ nkaɛ a lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya a.” Ke liti a, ɛdzakũ nɛ awã ɛnaa kakɔ bɛbã.
18Kĩ kade nyina, kukũtila mɔ ɔtutũ kpale wo nɛ sodzafɔ a kamɛ nɛ kawakɔ̃ a, ade bɛkavia be akũ kĩ, “Ndia koũ Petro tsã?” 19Kĩ Herodes wɛ Petro kayɛla evia a, ɛfɔ̃ bipi sodzafɔ a bivia be onukpɛ̃ kamɛ tuwuli. Ɛkɔ be kɔtɔ ɛfɔ̃ bɛkɔ be.
Ke liti a, Herodes dzakũ nɛ Yudea ɛnaa Kaisarea, ɛnadzi nɛ awã fuwi fudi.
Lɛgã Herodes Ku.
20Lɔkɔ a na kamɛ Herodes na kalɔkpa nɛ Tirofɔ mɔ Sidomfɔ akũ. Foesũ bɛkɛna ɔmɔa bɛya nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃. Bɛnya lɔtɔ bɛnamɔ Blasto, kĩ ɛnyɛ Herodes tɔtɔ akũ ɔdãmɛnanɛ, kĩ eke Herodes aduli ɛkpa be. Bɛwɛ kĩ tɛmatɔ nviã a tɛkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Herodes, kitonɛkĩ ye tite akũ bana funitsã katomɛna.
21Nɛ luwi a kĩ Herodes yi ɛkpa be akũ a, edo ye fɔgãtsa edzi nɛ ye lɛgãkpo akũ, ade ɛkabi ɔmaĩ a fɔlɛtsa a. 22Nɛ ye kɔdzɛla kawũna kamɛ a, bati a mu ye mɔ fɔwɔla bɛlɛ kĩ, “Fukĩĩ kɔ̃ nnɛ́ otidziwa lamɛna kɔdzɛla kalɛ. Baguma Kpale lamɔ kɔdzɛla kalɛ!” 23Deedimɔapɛ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ yabɔa Herodes emuni, kitonɛkĩ ɛtákpa Baguma obu. Ewo batsɛ bɛba ye kamɛ kamɛ, ade ke eku a.
24Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ Baguma kalɛ a gba nɛ fɔkɔ pii, ade batɛ badonɛ a lɛmɛ pɔ bibu a. 25Kĩ Barnaba mɔ Saulo yua be adzuma a kĩ bido be a, bɛdzakũ nɛ Yerusalem ade bɛkpã Yohanes Marko bibumɔ be akũ a.

Title: ADZUMA 13
Content:
Bɛpau Barnaba Mɔ Saulo Bido Be Fɔtɔ.
1Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ mɔ fɔtsa batsanɛ badi na nɛ batɛ badonɛ a kamɛ nɛ Antiokia. Ade be nyɛ Barnaba mɔ Simeon kĩ bavɛ Oti Ɔɔwa, Lukio kĩ eto Kirene tite akũ, Manahen kĩ bɛmɔ Lɛgã Herodes bɛdɔɔla nɛ be tibisɛ̃ kamɛ, mɔ Saulo. 2Kĩ bɛna nɛ awã bɛkamu boe Ɔlate, bɛkasui onukpɛ̃ lɛmɛ a, Hũhũ Kpalɛwa bi be kĩ, “Minyɛ Barnaba mɔ Saulo miyi lite lɔkɔa bɛnaakɛna adzuma a kĩ foesũ nvɛ be a.”
3Nɛ foesũ bisui onukpɛ̃ bɛbɔa mpaɛ, bite awɛ nɛ be akũ ade bɛnyɛ be osi a.
Barnaba Mɔ Saulo Naa Kipro.
4Kĩ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa lido be sũ ni, bɛnaa ɔmatɔ a kĩ bavɛ Seleukia kamɛ. Awã na bidzi ɔkɔlɔ binyina bɛnaa Kipro tite kĩ mui tsua bisinya te a akũ. 5Kĩ biwo Salami ɔmatɔ kamɛ a, bɛnalɛ Baguma Kalɛ Wĩ nɛ Yudafɔ fɔtsɛnakɔ̃. Yohanes Marko lɛmɛ tomɔ be ndɛ be obumɛnanɛ aye.
6Kĩ bɛtsã mpo akũ bɛnawo Pafo ɔmatɔ a kamɛ a, bɛtsɛlamɔ Yudani odi kĩ yaveli tɔɔta. Bavɛ ye kĩ Yesuobi, ade ɛbɔɛ ye akũ kĩ ɛnyɛ onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ a. 7Ɔwanɛ kĩĩ mɔ tite a akũ ɔdãnɛ kĩ bavɛ Sergio Paulo nyɛ bakɔba. Abãã ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ kĩĩ tsua linebi. Ɛvɛ Barnaba mɔ Saulo bɛnaa ye awã kitonɛkĩ ɛwɛ kĩ yatse Baguma fɔlɛtsa a. 8Lɛmɛ kĩ bɛnaa awã a, ɔwanɛ a kĩ babuki kavɛ Elima nɛ Griki tide kamɛ a, tɛ atsindze mɔ be. Ɛwɛ kĩ yadani ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a adzuni nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ Saulo mɔ Barnaba lɛ a akũ. 9-10Lɛmɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a kɔbɛ̃ tɛ Saulo kĩ babuki kavɛ Paulo kamɛ ade eke anɛ nɛ ɔwanɛ a akũ fɛɛ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Nɔ Abonsam obi! Ɔnyɛ okesĩnɛ ɔkpa tuwĩ tidi nyɛ tidi kakɛna. Tɛdake mɔ tɔkpa yi nɔ kamɛ flee. Luwi daa abɔa mbɔdi kĩ adani boe Ɔlate ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a liti mɔ lɔtɔ! 11Dã, boe Ɔlate aavɛlɛ nɔ sɔtɔ finyaakĩĩ. Yaafɔ̃ oku anɛ, ade ɔláabuki ɔmɔ́ suwa kɛnaawo lɔkɔ lidi a.”
Lɛtalɛta Elima anɛ kamɛ ke ɔtũ, ade ke ebuki yaámɔ fɔkɔ a. Ɛkatalɛ fɔkɔ kĩ yawɛ odi kĩ epi ye nɛ kɔkpɔ. 12Kĩ abãã ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ kĩĩ mɔ́ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya a, ɛtɛ edo kitonɛkĩ fɔtsa katsa nɛ boe Ɔlate kalɛ wĩ a akũ kɛna ye wãwã paa.
Barnaba Mɔ Paulo Naa Antiokia Nɛ Pisidia.
13Ke liti a, Paulo mɔ bikĩ bitomɔ ye a wo nɛ ɔkɔlɔ kamɛ bito Pafo bɛnaa Perge ɔmatɔ a kĩ edeĩ nɛ Pamfilia tite kamɛ. Ade awã mɔ Yohanes Marko dzakũ ɛfɔnɛ be emuniki ɛnaa Yerusalem a. 14Kĩ bito Perge a, bɛyawo Antiokia kĩ edeĩ nɛ Pisidia. Nɛ Kawɛya Luwi akũ a ni, bɛnaa Yudafɔ katsɛnakɔ̃ a bɛnadzi nɛ bati a kamɛ. 15Ade kĩ bɛkã fɔlɛtsa nɛ Mose mbla, mɔ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ tuvoli kamɛ biyua a, katsɛnakɔ̃ banɔkɔɛ̃ a bi be kĩ, “Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ntɛ mideĩ kadi kĩ míalɛ mido boe kɔbɛ̃ ni, osi waa, milɛ faa.”
16Ade Paulo yidza ɛdza ete be awɛ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Nwaɛ̃ Israelfɔ mɔ mi a kĩ minyɛ́ Israelfɔ lɛmɛ miasum Baguma a, mitse katse wĩ! 17Israelfɔ Baguma lɛpau boe bawanyɔ, ade ɛkɛna be ɔmaĩ kpale nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ bɛnya banɔvɔɛ̃ nɛ Egipte a. Ye mɔawɛ lɛnyɛ be etomɛna Egipte tɛsate kamɛ mɔ ye kɔbɛ̃. 18Ade ɛdãmɛna be akũ futeli tɛna flee nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ bɛna nɛ kɔsa kamɛ a. 19Ɛwɔla fude evũkɔnɔ bati nɛ Kanan tite akũ, ade ɛkɔa te ɛkpa Israelfɔ kĩ tɛnya be adzapadiɛ a. 20Fukĩĩ flee ya nɛ ndɛ futeli ɔha ɛna mɔ aduenum kamɛ.
“Ke liti a, Baguma kpa be fɔlɛtsa badzɛnɛ bɛnya be akũ flee kɛyawo Baguma Onukpɛ̃ Ɔnyɛnɛ Samuel akũ. 21Bivia ye kĩ edzina lɛgã ɛkpa be, ade Baguma pau Saulo, kĩ ɛnyɛ Kis obi ɛkpa be a. Eto Benyamin kasinu a kamɛ, ade ɛnya lɛgã futeli tɛna flee a. 22Lɛmɛ Baguma dzɛla ye nɛ lukpo a akũ, ade ɛkɔa Dawid ɛkɛna lɛgã a. Ade lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma lɛ nɛ ye akũ nyɛ kĩ, ‘Yese obi Dawid nyɛ oti kĩ yĩ ɔwɔlɛ awɛ, kitonɛkĩ yaakɛna nɛ yĩ kawɛ akũ.’
23“Ade Dawid kasinu a kamɛ Baguma nyɛ Ɔtɛnɛ a kĩ ɛnyɛ Yesu ɛkpa Israelfɔ ndɛ ayekĩ ɛlɛ eyi a. 24Fɔmɔ Yesu aayi ye adzuma kayɔ a, Yohanes mui ɔwɔlanɛ a de lɛtsã ebi bati Israelfɔ flee kĩ bɛdani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ lɔkɔa bɛtɛ mui kawɔla amaniɛ. 25Kĩ Yohanes aawũna ye adzuma kakɛna a, evia bati a kĩ, ‘Mikɔna kĩ yĩ nyɛ Oti a Kĩ Bɛbɔa Tɔdɔ̃ a mbɔɛɛ? Oowo! Lɛmɛ etomɛna yĩ nɛ liti yaya, ade ntáfɛta kĩ mawũnya mpabua nɛ ye abɔa malo a.’
26“Nwaɛ̃ amɛ Israelfɔ, Abraham babi mɔ bawa, mɔ mi a kĩ minyɛ́ Yudafɔ lɛmɛ miasum Baguma, bɛkɔa katɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ bɛma boe flee. 27Nɛ ayekĩ bikĩ bideĩ nɛ Yerusalem mɔ be banɔkɔɛ̃ a tányi kĩ ye nyɛ Ɔtɛnɛ, ĩye binu Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bakã nɛ Kawɛya Luwi lidi nyɛ lidi akũ kayɔ sũ ni, fɔlɛtsa a ya nɛ foe kamɛ lɔmɔ, ade bɛkɔ ye kɔtɔ a. 28Titɔ kĩ bɛtámɔ tɔkpa tidima nɛ ye akũ malo ni, bɛkɔ ye kɔtɔ ade bɛfɔ̃ Pilato kpa osi bɛkɔ ye a. 29Ade kĩ bɛkɛna lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa biyua ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ eyi nɛ ye akũ a, bɛnyɛ ye nɛ asendua akũ bɛnabila nɛ linikɛ kamɛ. 30Lɛmɛ Baguma dzɛla ye etomɛna kanɔkpa ebuki edzi nkpã. 31Nɛ fuwi pii na kamɛ ni, ɛnyɛ ye akũ ɛtsa bikĩ bɛmɔ ye bɛtsã bito Galilea bɛnaa Yerusalem. Ade be nyɛ ye adansifɔ bɛkpa Israelfɔ finyaakĩĩ a.
32-33“Finyaakĩĩ bɔkɔa Kalɛ Wĩ a bɔama mi, kĩ Baguma fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi nɛ boe bawanyɔ lɔkɔ a ya nɛ foe kamɛ nɛ boe lɔkɔ. Baguma fɔ̃ Yesu yidza edzi nkpã ndɛ ayekĩ Dawid tsɛlɛ nɛ ɔnɔ ɔyade a kamɛ kĩ,
‘Nɔ nyɛ yĩ obi.
Nviã kĩĩ nkɛna nɔ Ɔlɛga.’
34Ade lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi nɛ ye kadzɛla katomɛna kanɔkpa nyɛ kĩ ye sukɛna lɛláavɔ̃ nɛ linikɛ kamɛ da. Baguma lɛ kĩ,
‘Maakɔa nhila kpalɛwa a kĩ nlɛ ĩyi nkpa Dawid a nkpa nɔ.’
35Ebuki ɛlɛ nɛ Dawid ɔnɔ bɛbã kamɛ kĩ,
‘Ɔláafɔ̃ nɔ oti kpalɛwa a lɛvɔ̃ nɛ linikɛ kamɛ.’
36“Kĩ Dawid kɛna nɛ Baguma fɔwɛtsa akũ lɔkɔ a kĩ edzi nkpã eyua a, eku bɛbɔɛ ye bibila nɛ ye bawanyɔ ɔwɛ̃, ade ɛvɔ̃ nɛ linikɛ kamɛ lɛmɛ a. 37Lɛmɛ oti a kĩ Baguma dzɛla etomɛna kanɔkpa a sukɛna távɔ̃ nɛ linikɛ kamɛ.
38“Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, bɔwɛ kĩ minyi kĩ fɔtsɛ̃ Yesu akũ mɔ bide lɛtsã nɛ Baguma tɔkpa kakɔakate a bɛkpa mi. 39Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaatɛ Yesu edo ni, Baguma aabɔɛ ye kĩ ɛnya ɔtɔbɛ. Ade fukĩĩ Mose mbla a tápuli ɛkɛna a. 40Foesũ midã kadã wĩ ayekĩ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi a lɛlaaya nɛ mi akũ. 41Kitonɛkĩ Baguma lɛ kĩ,
‘Midã mi a kĩ miadi kalɛ a nsekuo!
Fɔkɛna mi saa lɔkɔa miwɔ.
Kitonɛkĩ lɛtsa a kĩ makɛna nviã kĩĩ a
ntɛ odi nyɛ foe kayɔ ɛtsa mi malo,
miláatɛ foe mido!’ ”
42Kĩ Paulo mɔ Barnaba adzakũ nɛ katsɛnakɔ̃ a, bati a bi be kĩ bibuki bɛya nɛ Kawɛya Luwi a kĩ laayaa akũ, lɔkɔa bɛyaaabi be fɔlɛtsa a bibu. 43Kĩ bɛpansam nɛ katsɛnakɔ̃ a, Yudafɔ pii mɔ bikĩ bɛdani bɛkɛna Yudafɔ bavila Baguma lɛmɛ a, tomɔ Paulo mɔ Barnaba. Fɔtɔ banyanɛ a dɛ be kĩ bɛdza pintii nɛ Baguma kɔnyakamɔ a kĩ edeĩ ɛkpa be a sũ.
44Nɛ Kawɛya Luwi lɛyade akũ a, kite sukuloo ɔmatɔ a flee yabɔa obũ nɛ katsɛnakɔ̃ a kĩ batse boe Ɔlate kalɛ a. 45Kĩ Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a mɔ́ bati lidede kĩĩ odu nɛ katsɛnakɔ̃ a, anɛ bɛɛlɛ be. Bɛvɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa mɔ Paulo nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ de ɛlɛ a akũ ade bivũna ye a.
46Lɛmɛ Paulo mɔ Barnaba lɛ kɔdzɛla mɔ kɔbɛ̃ kĩ, “Kɛnɛ kĩ bɔnya lɔtɔ bubi mi Yudafɔ Baguma kalɛ kĩĩ. Lɛmɛ kĩ misĩ ke kĩ mitákpɔla mikpa nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna a sũ ni, bɔkɔa ke bɔama bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a. 47Kitonɛkĩ ade ɔlɛdo kĩ Baguma kpa boe kĩ,
‘Nkɛna nɔ ndɛ ɔsɛdza nkpa bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a
ayekĩ katinya kamɛ bati flee aana katɛ.’ ”
48Kĩ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a nu fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a, kawɔlɛ de be, ade bimu boe Ɔlate kalɛ a. Ade bikĩ Baguma pau kĩ bɛna nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a, dani bɛkɛna batɛ badonɛ a.
49Baguma Kalɛ a gba nɛ tite a na flee akũ. 50Lɛmɛ Yudafɔ a fɔ̃ batsole badi kĩ obu deĩ nɛ be akũ kĩ basum Baguma lɛmɛ, mɔ ɔmatɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a biyidza bɛdza nɛ Paulo mɔ Barnaba akũ, ade bɛblɔmɛna be nɛ be kayite a. 51Ade kĩ Paulo mɔ Barnaba anɛ nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ a, bɛkpa be abɔa kudu biko ɔmatɔ a bɛkɔa batsa kĩ bisĩ be. Ke liti a, bɛdzakũ bɛnaa Ikonio. 52Kawɔlɛ de batɛ badonɛ nɛ Antiokia ade Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a lɛmɛ yi be kamɛ paa a.

Title: ADZUMA 14
Content:
Paulo Mɔ Barnaba Naa Ikonio.
1Kĩ biwo Ikonio a, Paulo mɔ Barnaba naa Yudafɔ katsɛnakɔ̃. Ayekĩ bɛlɛ kalɛ wĩ a fɔ̃ Yudafɔ mɔ Grikifɔ pii tɛ bido. 2Ade Yudafɔ a kĩ bɛtátɛ boe Ɔlate kalɛ wĩ kĩĩ bido a kɔa ɔdzɛ bido nɛ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a mɔ Paulo mɔ Barnaba kayite. 3Lɛmɛ fɔtɔ banyanɛ kĩĩ kahɔ nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ lɔkɔ gɛlɛɛlɛ, bɛlɛ kalɛ boe Ɔlate akũ mɔ kɔbɛ̃. Ade ɛnyɛ ye kawɛ ɛtsa ɛfɔ̃ bɛkɛna awãwã mɔ nsɛntsɛlɛni fɔtsa pii a. 4Fɔyaya kĩ bati nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ sɛ̃ nɛ kutsu nviã kamɛ, badi tomɔ Yudafɔ a ade badi lɛmɛ tomɔ fɔtɔ banyanɛ a.
5-6Nɛ lɔkɔ a kamɛ a, bamatɔnɛ a badi, Yudafɔ mɔ be banɔkɔɛ̃ a flee yidza kĩ bayaaha be, bɛnɔ be boe. Kĩ fɔtɔ banyanɛ a nu foe a bilo bɛnaa Likaonia tɛmatɔ a kĩ tɛnyɛ Listra mɔ Derbe mɔ tikĩ tideĩ nɛ kayite a kamɛ. 7Ade bɛnalɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a nɛ awã a.
Paulo Mɔ Barnaba Kɛna Adzuma Nɛ Listra Mɔ Derbe.
8Kĩ biwo Listra a bɛmɔ́ onyole odi kĩ eveliveli. Kito nɛ ye lɛmawi ɛtápuli eyidza ɛtsã da. 9Edzi nɛ awã ɛkatse fɔlɛtsa a kĩ Paulo kalɛ a. Kĩ Paulo mɔ eyi ɔsũ kĩ oti kĩĩ tɛ edo kĩ baapuli bɛtsa ye sũ ni, 10ɛdã ɔsɔnɛ a koee ade ɛlɛ kɔɔba kĩ, “Yidza kadza ɔkpalɛ!” Onyole kĩĩ ta eyidza ade edo kato katɛ̃ awɛ a.
11Kĩ bati a kĩ bɛdzɛ̃ nɛ awã batse kalɛ a mɔ́ lɛtsa a kĩ Paulo kɛna a, bɛbɔa fɔwɔla nɛ Likaonia tide kamɛ kĩ, “Baviɔ̃ banɛ, bɛka bɛya ndɛ batidziwa aye nɛ boe kayite!” 12Foesũ bite Barnaba dĩ kĩ Zeus. Bite Paulo lɛmɛ kĩ Herme, kitonɛkĩ ade ye lɛdza ɛkalɛ kɔdzɛla a. 13Adeke Zeus oviɔ̃late a kĩ ye kuviɔ̃la kpale dza nɛ ɔmatɔ ɔbaɛ̃ a, nakpã banantsue ɛbɔɛ flawasi lɛka lɛmɛ ɛyamɛna nɛ ɔmatɔ a kɔbã onyukpɛ̃ kĩ bayaabɔa afɔliɛ bɛkpa fɔtɔ banyanɛ a.
14Kĩ Paulo mɔ Barnaba nu lɛtsa kĩ bati a wɛ kĩ bakɛna a, bɛyɛlɛ be akũ tɛtadiɛ. Foesũ biwula atsɛ biwo nɛ bati a kamɛ, bɛbɔa fɔwɔla kĩ, 15“Nda amɛ, nde sũ miakɛna fukĩĩ odu? Boe malo batidziwa bɔanɛ ndɛ mi aye. Bɔya nɛ awĩ kĩ bɔkɔa kalɛ wĩ a bɔma mi. Mifɔ̃ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔlá kayɔ kakɛna lɔkɔa midani mimu Baguma kĩ edzi nkpã a. Ade ye lɛkɛna tite mɔ ode, mpo mɔ fɔtsa a kĩ fudeĩ nɛ foe kamɛ a flee a! 16Kɔkɔɛ a ɛnyɛ anɛ nɛ batidziwa flee akũ ɛfɔ̃ bɛkakɛna lɛtsa a kĩ bawɛ a. 17Lɛmɛ ebuki yanyɛ ye fɔkɛlatsa katsa boe kĩ fɔatsa kĩ nuwĩ edzi nkpã. Lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ fɔtsa deĩ kĩ fɔakai boe ye tudzuma wĩ a. Yakpa boe oni lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ, fudutsa nɛ lɔkɔ wĩ akũ, funitsã mɔ kawɔlɛ lɛmɛ.” 18Titɔ kĩ bɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ lɔmɔ malo ni, fɔna ɔsĩ fɔmɔ bati a fɔ̃ afɔliɛ kabɔa kakpa be.
19Ade Yudafɔ badi to Antiokia nɛ Pisidia, mɔ Ikonio bɛyadani bati a adzuni a. Bɛfɔ̃ bɛtalɛ Paulo boe bɛvɛlɛ ye bɛnɛmɛna nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ nɛ kĩ bɛkɔna kĩ eku sũ. 20Lɛmɛ kĩ batɛ badonɛ a yatsɛna nɛ ye akũ a, eyidza ɛdza ade emuniki ɛnaa ɔmatɔ a kamɛ a. Kĩ kade nyina a, bɛmɔ Barnaba bɛdzakũ bɛnaa Derbe.
Paulo Mɔ Barnaba Muniki Bɛnaa Antiokia Nɛ Siria Tite Akũ.
21Paulo mɔ Barnaba de lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ nɛ Derbe, ade bɛna batɛ badonɛ pii nɛ awã a. Bimuniki bito awã bɛnaa Listra, Ikonio mɔ Antiokia nɛ Pisidia. 22Awã na bɛdɛ batɛ badonɛ a, bido be kɔbɛ̃ lɛmɛ kĩ bidi ɔnɔkɔali nɛ be katɛkado kamɛ. Ade bibi be lɛmɛ kĩ, “Kɛnɛ kĩ bɔtsã lubo kamɔ pii kamɛ fɔmɔ bɔawo nɛ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kamɛ.” 23Ade ke Paulo mɔ Barnaba pau lɔtɔ banyanɛ bɛkpa asɔli adi nyɛ adi a. Bɛtsã mpaɛbɔ mɔ onukpɛ̃ kasui kamɛ bɛkɔa be bido nɛ boe Ɔlate a kĩ bɛtɛ bido a awɛ.
24Ade kĩ bimini nɛ Pisidia tɛmatɔ kamɛ biyua a, bɛdani bɛnaa Pamfilia tite kamɛ. 25Bɛlɛ kalɛ wĩ a nɛ Perge fɔmɔ bɛtɛ̃ bɛnaa Atalia. 26Ade awã binyina mpo bɛnaa Antiokia, awã kĩ bɛnya lɔtɔ bɛkɔa be bido nɛ Baguma awɛ kamɛ nɛ adzuma a kĩ bɛkɛna biyua finyaa a.
27Kĩ biwo Antiokia a, bɛkpɔta batɛ badonɛ a flee nɛ awã, bɛbɔa be osi akũ amandiɛ. Ade bibi be fɔtsa flee a kĩ Baguma kɛna ɛtsãmɛna be akũ mɔ ayekĩ ebinya katɛkado osi ɛkpa bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a. 28Bidzi nɛ batɛ badonɛ nɛ Antiokia sɛkɛ̃ owi buna kɔlaa.

Title: ADZUMA 15
Content:
Fɔtɔ Banyanɛ a Mɔ Banɔkɔɛ̃ a Tsɛna Nɛ Yerusalem.
1Kĩ Paulo mɔ Barnaba na nɛ Antiokia a, bati badi to Yudea bɛyatsa batɛ badonɛ nɛ awã fɔtsa kĩ, “Miláana katɛ mbɔɛntɛ bitsua mi lɛkpati nɛ Mose mbla a onukpɛ̃.” 2Lɛmɛ Paulo mɔ Barnaba vɛlɛ foe mɔ be mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ. Nɛ foesũ bɛnyɛ batɛ badonɛ a badi kĩ bito Antiokia kĩ bitomɔ be bɛnaa Yerusalem lɔkɔa bɛmɔ fɔtɔ banyanɛ mɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Yerusalem a bɛwɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kamɛ.
3Foesũ batɛ badonɛ a yi be osi. Bɛnatsã Foenike mɔ Samaria bɛsɛla batɛ badonɛ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ awã, ade bibi be ayekĩ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a kɔa be akũ bɛkpa Baguma a. Fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ de be kawɔlɛ paa. 4Kĩ biwo Yerusalem a, batɛ badonɛ a, fɔtɔ banyanɛ a mɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a flee tɛ be mɔ kawɔlɛ. Paulo mɔ Barnaba bɔa be amandiɛ nɛ fɔtsa a kĩ Baguma kɛna ɛtsãmɛna be akũ a flee.
5Lɛmɛ Farisifɔ batɛ badonɛ badi yidza bɛdza ade bɛlɛ kĩ, “Kɛnɛ kĩ batɛ badonɛ a kĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a bitsua fɔkpati lɔkɔa bɛkɛna nɛ Mose mbla a akũ.”
6Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ banɔkɔɛ̃ a mɔ fɔtɔ banyanɛ a tsɛna bɛkɔna fɔlɛtsa a akũ. 7Kĩ bɛsa foe kamɛ fɛɛ a, Petro yidza ɛdza ade ɛlɛ kĩ, “Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, miawɛ minyina kĩ lɔkɔ lidi Baguma pau yĩ etomɛna mi kamɛ kĩ nnaabi bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a Kalɛ Wĩ a, ayekĩ be malo baanu ke bɛtɛ bido lɛmɛ. 8Ade Baguma kĩ enyina otidziwa kakɔna a nyɛ ye kawɛ ɛtsa nɛ kĩ ɛkpa be Hũhũ Kpalɛwa ndɛ ayekĩ ɛkpa boe malo a. 9Ɛtátsa ntsitsemu adima nɛ bɔmɔ́ be kayite, kitonɛkĩ ɛtɛ be nɛ ayekĩ bɛtɛ bido sũ, ade ɛkɔa be tɔkpa ete be ndɛ boe aye a. 10Finyaakĩĩ, nde sũ bɔasɔ Baguma bɔdã? Nde sũ bɔkɔa fɔlɔtsa a kĩ bɔmɔ́ boe bawanyɔ bɔtápuli bɔlɔ a bɔate nɛ batɛ badonɛ kĩĩ akũ? 11Oowo! Ndɛ ayekĩ bɔtɛ budo kĩ boe a flee bɔna katɛ fɔtsã boe Ɔlate Yesu kɔnyakamɔ kamɛ a, ade ayea be malo bɛna katɛ a.”
12Ade ke be flee bɛkɛna dĩĩ, bitse Paulo mɔ Barnaba amandiɛ kabɔa nɛ ayekĩ Baguma tsã be akũ ɛkɛna awãwã fɔtsa ɛkpa bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a. 13Kĩ bɛbɔa amandiɛ biyua a, Yakobo lɛmɛ yidza ɛdza ade ɛlɛ kĩ, “Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mitse! 14Simon Petro bi boe ayekĩ Baguma nya lɔtɔ ɛnyɛ ye kawɛ ɛtsa bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a, ade ɛpau be badi kĩ bɛnya ye bade a. 15Ade Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi a ketimɔ fukĩĩ pɛpɛɛpɛ ndɛ ayekĩ katsɛlɛ kpalɛwa fɔlɛtsa a lɛ kĩ,
16‘Nɛ fukĩĩ liti ni, maamuniki ĩya.
Maayalɔla Dawid lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kadzɛla,
ade maalɔla fɔtsa a kĩ fubu kade nɛ awã kake a,
lɔkɔa awã libuki kɛdza pintii.
17Ade bati nkaɛ a aaya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃,
mɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a kĩ nvɛ
kĩ bɛnya yĩ bade a aatomɔ yĩ liti.
18Ade aye boe Ɔlate lɛ eyi anɛ kɔkɔɛ kĩ yaakɛna a.’
19“Foesũ nɛ yĩ, Yakobo, kakɔna onukpɛ̃ ni, kɛtánɛ kĩ bɔaha bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a kĩ bɛkɔa be akũ bakpa Baguma a. 20Mbom mifɔ̃ bɔtsɛlɛ ovoli bɔma be kĩ bɛfɔ̃ fukĩĩ bamɛ ndɛ bayaɛ kĩ bɛkɔa bɛbɔa afɔliɛ bɛkpa baviɔ̃ kaba, bɛfɔ̃ litsolewɛ mɔ linyolewɛ, bɛfɔ̃ ɔyaɛ kĩ bɛtátsua ye sɔmɔ kaba mɔ babɔanɛ kanya. 21Kitonɛkĩ kito anɛ kɔkɔɛ a bakã Mose mbla a kĩ ɛtsɛlɛ eyi a nɛ Kawɛya Luwi lidi nyɛ lidi akũ nɛ Yudafɔ katsɛnakɔ̃ ade bade lɛtsã nɛ ye fɔlɛtsa akũ nɛ ɔmatɔ nyɛ ɔmatɔ kamɛ a.”
Bɛtsɛlɛ Ovoli Bɛma Bikĩ Bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ Batɛ Badonɛ a.
22Ade ke fɔtɔ banyanɛ, banɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ batɛ badonɛ a flee kɛna onukpɛ̃ mɔa kĩ bɛnyɛ be kamɛ badi bibumɔ Paulo mɔ Barnaba bɛnaa Antiokia a. Bɛpau bati nviã kĩ batɛ badonɛ a akpa be obu paa. Ade be nyɛ Yuda kĩ bibuki bavɛ Barnaba mɔ Sila a.
23Ovoli a kĩ bɛnɛɛ banamɛna a kamɛ fɔlɛtsa nyɛ kĩ,
Ovoli kĩĩ to boe fɔtɔ banyanɛ, banɔkɔɛ̃, mɔ batɛ badonɛ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Yerusalem sɛkɛ̃. Bɔawɔ̃na mi, boe bawaɛ̃ kĩ minyɛ́ Yudafɔ a kĩ mito Antiokia, Siria mɔ Kilikia.
24Bunu kĩ batɛ badonɛ badi to boe kamɛ nɛ awĩ bɛyabi mi fɔlɛtsa fudi kĩ fɔha mi fudo ɔtutũ lɛmɛ nɛ mi kamɛ. Lɛmɛ nnɛ́ boe lido be. 25-26Nɛ foesũ bɔtsa fɔlɔ buke otse kĩ bɔado batɔ nviã nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃. Baatomɔ boe bawaɛ̃ nviã Barnaba mɔ Paulo, kĩ bɛkɔa be nkpã bɛkpa boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo ɔsum a. 27Budo Yuda mɔ Sila kĩ be mɔa awɛ bibi mi fɔlɛtsa a kĩ foe bɔtsɛlɛ a. 28Kitonɛkĩ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a mɔ boe mɔawɛ a bɔmɔ́ buyi ɔsũ kĩ kɛtánɛ kĩ bɔakɔa fɔlɔtsa kpale bɔlɔla mi kɛba tɛbla sĩwa kĩĩ. 29Ade te nyɛ kĩ mitanya funitsã kĩ bɛkɔa bɛbɔa afɔliɛ bɛkpa baviɔ̃, mitanya babɔanɛ, mitaba ɔyaɛ kĩ bɛtátsua ye sɔmɔ, mipi mi akũ nɛ linyolewɛ mɔ litsolewɛ kamɛ. Ntɛ mipi mi akũ limii ni, katinya kamɛ aalɛ kɛkpa mi.
Midzi nɛ lukudɔ kamɛ.
30Foesũ bɛnyɛ batɔ kĩĩ osi bɛnaa Antiokia. Bɛnakpɔta batɛ badonɛ a flee nɛ be katsɛnakɔ̃ a, ade bɛkɔa ovoli a bɛkpa be a. 31Kawɔlɛ de bati a nɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛkã nɛ ovoli a kamɛ a sũ. 32Yuda mɔ Sila kĩ bɛnyɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ nyɛ fɔlɛtsa pii kayɔ bɛtsa be nɛ lɔkɔ gɛlɛɛlɛ kamɛ, bido be kɔbɛ̃ lɛmɛ. 33Bidzi nɛ be sɛkɛ̃ bɛtɛ fuwi fudi, ade batɛ badonɛ a nyɛ be osi nɛ lukudɔ kamɛ kĩ bimuniki bɛnaa Yerusalem a. 34Lɛmɛ Sila kɔ̃ wɛ kĩ yakahɔ nɛ awã. 35Paulo mɔ Barnaba dzi nɛ Antiokia sukuloo. Bɛmɔ bati bɛbã pii bɛtsa fɔtsa ade bɛkade lɛtsã nɛ boe Ɔlate kalɛ a akũ a.
Paulo Mɔ Barnaba Sɛ̃ Tisi.
36Nɛ fuwi fudi liti ni, Paulo bi Barnaba kĩ, “Fɔ̃ bumuniki bɔnaasɛla boe bawaɛ̃ nɛ tɛmatɔ a kĩ bɔtsã te kamɛ bude lɛtsã nɛ boe Ɔlate kalɛ a akũ a, lɔkɔa bɔdã ni nde bidzi.” 37Barnaba tunɔ ade ɛwɛ kĩ bakpã Yohanes Marko bibumɔ be akũ a. 38Lɛmɛ Paulo tátunɔ kɔlaa kitonɛkĩ, kĩ bɛnaa Pamfilia a, Yohanes Marko dzakũ ɛfɔnɛ be nɛ awã ade ɛtábumɔ be biyua adzuma a. 39Bati nviã kĩĩ vɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa a mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ ade fɔfɔ̃ bɛyalɛ a. Barnaba kpã Marko ade binyina mpo bɛnaa Kipro a. 40Paulo lɛmɛ kpã Sila ade batɛ badonɛ a kɔa be bido nɛ boe Ɔlate awɛ kĩ ɛmɔ be kɔnya fɔmɔ bɛdzakũ a. 41Ɛtsã Siria mɔ Kilikia tite kamɛ ɛkado tɛsɔli nɛ awã a kɔbɛ̃.

Title: ADZUMA 16
Content:
Timoteo Tomɔ Paulo Mɔ Sila.
1Ade Paulo dzakũ ɛnaa ɔmatɔ odi kĩ bavɛ Derbe, ade ɛtɛ̃ ɛnaa Listra lɛmɛ a. Ade awã ɛnamɔ ɔtɛ odonɛ odi kĩ bavɛ Timoteo a. Ɔma nyɛ Yudani kĩ ɛtɛ Kristo edo. Lɛmɛ ɔlɛga kɔ̃ nyɛ Grikini. 2Batɛ badonɛ flee a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Listra mɔ Ikonio bɔa Timoteo dĩ wĩ. 3Ade ye Paulo wɛ kĩ yakpã ɛnamɛna a, foesũ etsua ye lɛkpati, kitonɛkĩ Yudafɔ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ kayite a na nyina kĩ ɔlɛga nyɛ Grikini. 4Ade kĩ bɛdzakũ a, bɛtsã bimini nɛ tɛmatɔ a kamɛ, bibi be tɛbla a kĩ fɔtɔ banyanɛ mɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ nɛ Yerusalem ke otse nɛ te akũ a. Bɛdɛ be kĩ bɛkɛna nɛ te akũ. 5Foesũ luwi daa bati a kapɔ ade be katɛkado lɛmɛ na ɔsĩ kibu a.
Paulo Na Kanyɛkatsa Nɛ Troa.
6Ke liti a, bɛtsã Frigia mɔ Galatia tite a kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a tákpa be osi kĩ bɛnaade lɛtsã kalɛ wĩ a akũ nɛ Asia tite akũ. 7Kĩ biwo Misia tite ɔbaɛ̃ a, bɛwɛ kĩ bawo nɛ Bitinia tite kamɛ, lɛmɛ Yesu Hũhũ a tákpa be osi. 8Foesũ bimuniki bɛtsã Misia bɛnawo Troa ɔmatɔ a kĩ ɛwaa nɛ mpo abuĩ a kamɛ. 9Ke lɛnyɛ a, Paulo na kanyɛkatsa nɛ kɔda kamɛ. Nɛ kɔda a kamɛ a, ɛmɔ onyole odi kĩ eto Makedonia, ɛdza ɛlamɛna ye aduli kake kĩ, “Nyina mpo kaya nɛ Makedonia kayaabumɔ boe!” 10Kĩ Paulo na kanyɛkatsa kĩĩ sũ ni, bɔmanɛ akũ bupi Makedonia osi, kitonɛkĩ fɔatsa kĩ Baguma lɛvɛ boe kĩ bɔnaade lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ nɛ awã.
Lidia Dani Ɔwɔlɛ Kamɛ Nɛ Filipi.
11Ade ke budzi nɛ ɔkɔlɔ kamɛ nɛ Troa bunyina kpĩĩ bɔnaa Samotrake a. Kĩ kade nyina a, buwo Neapoli. 12Kĩ buto awã a, bɔnawo Filipi kĩ ɛnyɛ Makedonia ɔmatɔ kpale flee a kamɛ. Awã lɛmɛ nyɛ tite kĩ Romafɔ adãmɛna te akũ. Budzi nɛ awã fuwi fudi.
13Nɛ Kawɛya Luwi akũ a, bɔnɛ nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ bɔnaa ɔwɔ abuĩ, awã kĩ bɔkɔna kĩ Yudafɔ atsɛna kabɔa mpaɛ. Ade budzi nɛ awã bɔkatsa batsole a kĩ bɛkpɔta nɛ awã Baguma kalɛ a. 14Bavɛ be kamɛ ɔmɔa kĩ eto Tiatira kĩ Lidia. Yanɔ tilima ngbã, ade ɛnyɛ oti kĩ yasum Baguma yededeede a. Ade lɔkɔ a kĩ ɛna nɛ awã ɛkatse boe a, Baguma binya ye ɔwɔlɛ kĩ ɛtɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ Paulo kalɛ a edo. 15Ade kĩ ye mɔ ye tɔtɔ kamɛ bati flee bɛtɛ mui kawɔla amaniɛ a, eke boe aduli kĩ, “Ntɛ mitunɔ kĩ ntɛ boe Ɔlate ndo paa kɔ̃ ni, miyaadzi nɛ yĩ tɔtɔ kamɛ” Ɛdza nɛ boe akũ flee kɛnawo kĩ butunɔ bɔnaa ye sɛkɛ̃.
Bido Paulo Mɔ Sila Nɛ Kɔla.
16Luwi mɔa lidi kĩ bɔanaa mpaɛ kabɔakɔ̃ a, bɔtsɛlamɔ oyitsɔ̃ abawa adi kĩ hũhũ kpa deĩ nɛ ye kamɛ, fɔafɔ̃ yapuli kadã kanɔkɔnɛ. Nɛ foesũ yakɛna sika baũ kakpa ye balate. 17Oyitsɔ̃ kĩĩ tomɔ boe mɔ Paulo mɔ fɔwɔla kabɔa kĩ, “Baguma Kpale basumunɛ bati kĩĩ anɛ, ade bɛya nɛ awĩ kĩ bayaatsa mi nkpã kana osi a!” 18Fukĩĩ na nkɔsu fuwi pii. Ade kĩ fuwo Paulo odo a, ɛdani ebi hũhũ a kĩ etomɔ oyitsɔ̃ a kĩ, “Nɛ Yesu Kristo dĩ akũ, mabi nɔ kĩ nɛ́ nɛ oti a kamɛ!” Lɛtalɛta hũhũ kpa a nɛ́ nɛ ye kamɛ.
19Kĩ ye balate a mɔ́ kĩ osi a kĩ ye akũ batsã kana sika yɛla be a, bipi Paulo mɔ Sila bɛma fɔlɛtsa badzɛnɛ banɔkɔɛ̃ a nɛ kɔya. 20Bɛlɛ nɛ kɔya kĩ, “Bati kĩĩ nyɛ Yudafɔ kĩ bɛyaabula boe ɔmatɔ a kade. 21Batsa bati fɔtsa kĩ boe ndɛ Romafɔ bɔláapuli bɔtɛ foe.”
22Ade bati kɔdabu a yidza bɛdza bisinya Paulo mɔ Sila, bido be katsootsoo awɛ a.
Fɔlɛtsa badzɛnɛ a fɔ̃ bɛyɛlɛ tɛtadiɛ nɛ be akũ, ade bɛkpa kɔbɛ̃ kĩ bibo be mɔ kutse a. 23Kĩ bibo be kabo kpa biyua a, bɛnado be nɛ kɔla, ade bibi ekĩ yadãmɛna bikĩ bɛwaa kɔla akũ a kĩ ɛbalɛ Paulo mɔ Sila kabalɛ wĩ. 24Kĩ bibi ye lɔmɔ sũ ni, ɛnado be nɛ kamɛ flee a, ade ɛbɔa be agba a.
25Lɛnyɛ kayite a, kĩ Paulo mɔ Sila kabɔa mpaɛ mɔ tɔnɔ kasã kakpa Baguma a, kɔlabawanɛ nkaɛ a katse be. 26Ade deedimɔapɛ tite kuna mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ ade kɔla a flee kuna kɔnake a. Lɛtalɛta kɔla tupunu a flee binya ade nkɔsɔnkɔsɔ a wɔlɔ nɛ kɔlabawanɛ a flee akũ tɛtɔ a. 27Kĩ kɔlabawanɛ akũ ɔdãmɛnanɛ a nyinya a, ɛmɔ kĩ kɔla a tunyukpɛ̃ flee waa luto. Ɛkɔna kĩ kɔlabawanɛ a nɛ bilo sũ ni, ɛbɔlɛ lɛpamɛ ɛnyɛ kĩ yatsɔɛ ye akũ ekɔ. 28Lɛmɛ Paulo bɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba kĩ, “Takɛna nɔ akũ lɛtsama. Boe a flee budeĩ nɛ awĩ!”
29Kɔla bawanɛ akũ ɔdãmɛnanɛ a fɔ̃ bɛma ye ɔsɛdza ade nɛ kukũtila kamɛ ewula atsɛ ɛnatɔ nɛ Paulo mɔ Sila abɔa kamɛ. 30Ade ke ɛnyɛ be nɛ kɔla a kamɛ, evia be kĩ, “Nda amɛ, litsa kɛnɛ kĩ nkɛna nna katɛ?”
31Bibi ye kĩ, “Tɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu kado lɔkɔa mimɔ nɔ tɔtɔ kamɛ bati flee míana katɛ.” 32Ade ke bɛnaa bɛnade lɛtsã nɛ boe Ɔlate kalɛ akũ bɛkpa ye tɔtɔ kamɛ bati a flee a. 33Lɛnyɛ a na, ɛkpã be ɛnasu be fɔkpa, ade ye mɔ ye tɔtɔ kamɛ bati bɛtɛ mui kawɔla amaniɛ a. 34Ɛkpã Paulo mɔ Sila ɛnamɛna ye awã, ade ɛkpa be funitsã bɛnya a. Ye mɔ ye tɔtɔ kamɛ bati a flee bɛmɔ́ kawɔlɛ paa kitonɛkĩ bɛtɛ Baguma bido.
35Kĩ kade nyina a, ɔmatɔ a kamɛ fɔlɛtsa badzɛnɛ do fɔtɔ banyanɛ bɛnabi kɔlabawanɛ akũ ɔdãmɛnanɛ a kĩ, “Fɔnɛ bati a awɛ bɛnaa.”
36Kɔla bawanɛ akũ ɔdãmɛnanɛ a bi Paulo mɔ Sila kĩ, “Fɔlɛtsa badzɛnɛ a bo nfɔnɛ mi awɛ midzakũ. Foesũ minaa faa nɛ lukudɔ kamɛ.”
37Lɛmɛ Paulo bi batɔ a kĩ, “Bibo boe nɛ kanade nɛ lɔkɔ kĩ bɛtádzɛmɔ boe bɛkɔ boe kɔtɔ, ade bido boe nɛ kɔla kamɛ a, titɔ kĩ Romafɔ bɔanɛ. Ade finyaa kɔ̃ bawɛ kĩ bɔdzakũ nɛ kabɛla kamɛ? Oowo! Ke kɔ̃ nviã nɛ awĩ! Fɔ̃ be mɔawɛ a bɛyaanyɛ boe!”
38Ade ke fɔtɔ banyanɛ a muniki bɛnabi fɔlɛtsa badzɛnɛ a ɔlɛdo a. Kĩ binu kĩ Paulo mɔ Sila nyɛ Romafɔ a, libe wo be paa. 39Foesũ bɛnaa be sɛkɛ̃ bɛnakpa be sɛmɛ bɔɛɛ, ade bɛnyɛ be nɛ kɔla a kamɛ a. Bike be aduli kĩ bɛdzakũ nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ bɛnaa kakɔ bɛbã. 40Paulo mɔ Sila dzakũ bɛnaa Lidia awã. Ade awã bɛnamɔ batɛ badonɛ bɛbã a. Bido be kɔbɛ̃ bibu ade bɛdzakũ a.

Title: ADZUMA 17
Content:
Paulo Mɔ Sila Naa Tesalonika.
1Paulo mɔ Sila tsã bito Amfipoli mɔ Apolonia bɛyawo Tesalonika, awã kĩ Yudafɔ katsɛnakɔ̃ kadi na. 2Ndɛ ayekĩ Paulo awɛ kakɛna a, ɛnaa Yudafɔ katsɛnakɔ̃ a Kawɛya Fuwi ɛlalɛ etomɔ akũ, ɛnyɛ fɔlɛtsa kayɔ ɛtsa bati a. 3Ɛnyɛ lubo a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi kĩ Kristo aayamɔ, mɔ ayekĩ yaabuki eyidza edzi nkpã ɛtsa. Ebi be kĩ, “Oti a kĩ ye akũ fɔlɛtsa nlamɔ mi kabi a nyɛ Yesu Kristo a.” 4Fɔlɛtsa a kĩ foe kayɔ ɛnyɛ ɛtsa nɛ awĩ fɔ̃ bati a badi dani be adzuni, ade bɛtɛ bido bitomɔ Paulo mɔ Sila a. Ade aye a nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ, Grikifɔ pii kĩ bipi be akũ nɛ Baguma kavila kamɛ, mɔ batsole pii kĩ obu deĩ nɛ be akũ lɛmɛ dani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ bitomɔ Baguma.
5Lɛmɛ anɛ bɛɛlɛ Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a, ade ke bɛnawɛ patapaafɔ nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ bibumɔ be akũ bido ɔtutũ nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ a. Bɛbɔa obũ bɛkɛna dede bɛnawo nɛ Yason tɔtɔ kamɛ kĩ bapi Paulo mɔ Sila bɛnamɛna ɔmatɔ a katsɛnakɔ̃. 6Kĩ bɛtamɔ be sũ ni, bɛvɛlɛ Yason mɔ batɛ badonɛ badi bɛnamɛna katsɛnakɔ̃ a. Awã na bɛkabɔa fɔwɔla kĩ, “Bati badi tsɛ̃mɔ ɔtutũ kado nɛ kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ, ade bɛkɔa foe bɛyamɛna nɛ awĩ kĩĩ lɛmɛ a. 7Ade Yason lɛmɛ tɛ be edo nɛ ye tɔtɔ kamɛ a. Bati kĩĩ yidza bɛdza nɛ Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃ Kaisare tɛbla akũ. Ade batsa kĩ onyole odi kĩ bavɛ Yesu nyɛ Lɛgã a.” 8Kĩ kɔdabu a mɔ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ banɔkɔɛ̃ nu fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a fɔha be paa. 9Banɔkɔɛ̃ a fɔ̃ Yason mɔ ye bade a se be akũ liti kadza kɔtɔ ade bɛfɔnɛ be awɛ a.
Paulo Mɔ Sila Dzakũ Bɛnaa Beroia.
10Kĩ kade sila kɛdɔ pɛ, batɛ badonɛ a kpã Paulo mɔ Sila bilo bɛnaa Beroia. Kĩ biwo awã a, bɛnaa Yudafɔ katsɛnakɔ̃ a. 11Beroia bati a tsua linebi bɛba bikĩ nɛ Tesalonika a. Biyi atɔ bitse kalɛ a. Luwi nyɛ luwi bɛkasa Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ fɔlɛtsa kadã ntɛ lɛtsa a kĩ Paulo kabi be a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali. 12Foesũ be kamɛ bati pii tɛ bido. Grikifɔ batsole pii kĩ obu deĩ nɛ be akũ mɔ banyole pii lɛmɛ tɛ bido.
13Lɛmɛ kĩ Yudafɔ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Tesalonika nu kĩ Paulo ya ɛlamɛna Baguma kalɛ a katsa nɛ Beroia, bɛnaa awã bɛnado ɔtutũ nɛ bati a kamɛ. 14Batɛ badonɛ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ awã a kpã Paulo mɔatsɛ mɔatsɛ bɛnamɛna mpo abuĩ. Lɛmɛ Sila mɔ Timoteo kɔ̃ kahɔ nɛ Beroia. 15Bikĩ biyi Paulo osi a naa flee bɛnawo Atene. Ade awã bimuniki a, ade Paulo kpa ɔlɛdo kĩ bibi Sila mɔ Timoteo kĩ bɛya nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ mɔatsɛ.
Paulo Na Nɛ Atene.
16Kĩ Paulo na nɛ Atene ɛkadzɔlɛ Sila mɔ Timoteo a, ɛtɛ kalɔɛ nɛ ayekĩ ɛmɔ kĩ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ flee yi mɔ baviɔ̃ kasum. 17Foesũ ɛnanyɛ fɔlɛtsa kamɛ ɛtsa Yudafɔ a mɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a kĩ basum Baguma a, mɔ bikĩ batɛ̃ nɛ kɔya luwi daa a. 18Bati kutsu kudi kĩ bɛnyɛ Epikurofɔ mɔ Stoafɔ kĩ bideĩ katinya kamɛ kadikanyi kavɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa mɔ Paulo. Badi via kĩ, “Litsa fɔlɛtsa koũ oti kĩĩ wɛ kĩ yalɛ?”
Bati bɛbã lɛmɛ kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Fɔadã ndɛ kade bɛbã baviɔ̃ akũ fɔlɛtsa ɛlamɛna kalɛ.” Bɛlɛ foe lɔmɔ kitonɛkĩ binu kĩ Paulo de lɛtsã nɛ Yesu mɔ bati kayidza kato kanɔkpa akũ. 19Nɛ foesũ bɛkpã ye bɛnɛmɛna be ɔmatɔ a banɔkɔɛ̃ katsɛnakɔ̃ nɛ Areopago, ade bibi ye kĩ, “Bɔawɛ kĩ bɔanu fɔlɛtsa vɔɛ̃ a kĩ ɔlamɛna katsa a kayɔ. 20Nɛ kĩ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ɔlamɛna kalɛ a kamɛ tákpalɛ boe sũ ni, bɔawɛ butse foe kamɛ.” 21Atenefɔ mɔ banɔvɔɛ̃ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ awã awɛ be lɔkɔ flee kakpa fɔlɛtsa vɔɛ̃ katse mɔ foe akũ kɔlɔmɛna.
22Ade Paulo yidza ɛdza nɛ bati a anɛ kamɛ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Atenefɔ! Mmɔ́ kĩ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ ni, miapi mi ɔsum kadunamɔ akũ paa. 23Kitonɛkĩ kĩ ntsɛ̃ nɛ ɔmatɔ kamɛ ndã mi fɔtsa kumɛkumɛ a kĩ miasum a ni, mmɔ́ kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ afɔliɛ kabɔa de lidi akũ kĩ, ‘Bɔkɔa bɔakpa Baguma a kĩ bunyína a.’ Baguma a kĩ minyina, lɛmɛ miabɔa afɔliɛ kakpa ye a, ade ye akũ fɔlɛtsa nlamɛna mi kabi finyaakĩĩ a.
24“Baguma kĩĩ nyɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa Ɔlate, kĩ ɛbɔa tite mɔ ode mɔ fɔtsa flee a kĩ fudeĩ nɛ foe kamɛ. Yaádzi nɛ kɔla a kĩ batidziwa ke mɔ awɛ a kamɛ. 25Ɛtási boe lɛtsama kĩ bɔkɔa awɛ bɔkɛna a, kitonɛkĩ ye mɔawɛ akpa oti nkpã mɔ kawɛya, mɔ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ lisĩ oti. 26Ɛnyɛ fude fude bati a a flee etomɛna otidziwa mɔapɛ kamɛ kĩ bidzi nɛ tite akũ. Ye mɔawɛ liyi lɔkɔ mɔ fudzikɔ̃ tɛbɛ̃ ɛkpa bati flee. 27Baguma kɛna fukĩĩ ayekĩ boe batidziwa baawɛ ye liti osi bɔmɔ́ ye, titɔ kĩ ɛláa mɔ lugo nɛ boe sɛkɛ̃ malo. 28Kitonɛkĩ ndɛ ayekĩ mi tɔnɔ bamɛnɛ badi alɛ kĩ, ‘Ade ye dzi fɔ̃ budzi, bɔtsɛ̃ budeĩ nkpã a.’ Ade bɛlɛ lɛmɛ kĩ, ‘Boe malo bɔnyɛ ye kasinu a kamɛ babi.’
29“Nɛ kĩ bɔnyɛ Baguma babi sũ ni, kɛtáfɛta kĩ bɔakɔna kĩ Baguma kutitse la ndɛ litsedi kĩ batidziwa kɔa awɛ bɛmɛ mɔ sika ngbã, suwovoe ĩye futse. 30Kito anɛ katinya kayɔkayi kɛyawo nviã kĩĩ a, Baguma távɛlɛ bati sɔtɔ kitonɛkĩ bɛtányi ye sũ. Lɛmɛ finyaakɔ̃ ɛkpa ɔlɛdo kĩ bati flee nɛ kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ bɛdani be tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ. 31Kitonɛkĩ ehihiɛ luwi eyi kĩ de akũ oti a kĩ ɛpau a, aadzɛmɔ katinya kamɛ flee nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ. Kĩ yaakɛna fukĩĩ sũ ni, ɛdzɛla Oti a Kĩ Baguma bɔa Tɔdɔ̃ a etomɛna kanɔkpa ade ke ɛnyɛ ye ɛtsa bati flee a!”
32Kĩ binu kĩ Paulo lɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ kayidza kato kanɔkpa akũ a, bati a badi di ye nsekuo, ade babɛbã lɛmɛ lɛ kĩ, “Bɔawɛ kĩ bɔabuki butse fɔlɛtsa fudi nɛ oti kabu kayidza a akũ.” 33Kĩ fɔya lɔmɔ a, Paulo dzakũ ɛfɔnɛ be. 34Lɛmɛ bati a badi tomɔ ye bɛdani bɛkɛna batɛ badonɛ. Be kamɛ badi nyɛ Dionisio, kĩ ɛnyɛ Areopago ɔnɔkɔɛ̃, mɔ otsole odi kĩ bavɛ Damari, mɔ bati bɛbã.

Title: ADZUMA 18
Content:
Paulo Naa Korinto.
1Fukĩĩ liti a, Paulo dzakũ nɛ Atene ɛnaa Korinto. 2Nɛ awã a ɛmɔ Yudani odi kĩ bavɛ Akwila kĩ eto Ponto. Bɛmɔ ɔtsɔ̃ Priskila bito Italia bɛya nɛ awã owi tábuna, kitonɛkĩ lɛgã a kĩ bavɛ Klaudio si mbla kĩ Yudafɔ flee bɛnɛ nɛ Roma. Paulo naa ɛnamɔ be, 3ade ɛna nɛ be sɛkɛ̃ ɛkabumɔ be adzuma, nɛ kĩ bɛmɔ be bakɛna adzuma mɔa sũ. Bɛkɔa bayaɛ tuvoli bɛkapam tilima fɔla fɔtsa ndɛ ayekĩ Paulo lɛmɛ akɛna a. 4Nɛ Kawɛya Luwi lidi nyɛ lidi akũ ni, Paulo kanaa Yudafɔ katsɛnakɔ̃, kanaanyɛ fɔlɛtsa kamɛ katsa Yudafɔ mɔ Grikifɔ, kĩ bɛdani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ.
5Kĩ Sila mɔ Timoteo to Makedonia bɛya a, Paulo na aya koũ ede lɛtsã nɛ kalɛ wĩ a akũ, ade edi adansiɛ ɛtsa Yudafɔ a kĩ Yesu nyɛ Kristo a. 6Lɛmɛ kĩ Yudafɔ a yidza bɛdza nɛ ye akũ bɛlɛ fuvũnatsa nɛ ye akũ sũ ni, ɛkpa ye akũ eko be ɛlɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ miyɛla ni, mi mɔawɛ aatɛ foe sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ. Yĩ akũ kpalɛ, ntáku kɔtɔ. Kito finyaakĩĩ kanaa ni, maanaa bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a sɛkɛ̃ nnaabi be kalɛ wĩ kĩĩ.” 7Kĩ ɛdzakũ nɛ be sɛkɛ̃ a, ɛnadzi nɛ onyole odi kĩ ɛnyɛ Yudani kĩ bavɛ Tito Yusto tɔtɔ kamɛ. Ɛnyɛ oti kĩ yasum Baguma ade ye awã lɛmɛ fuãmɔ Yudafɔ katsɛnakɔ̃ a. 8Katsɛnakɔ̃ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a kĩ bavɛ Krispo mɔ ye akũ bati flee tɛ boe Ɔlate bido ade bɛtɛ mui kawɔla amaniɛ a. Ade ayea bɛkɛna Korintofɔ pii a kĩ bɛtɛ bido a mui kawɔla amaniɛ lɛmɛ a.
9Luwi a lɛnyɛ ni, Paulo na kanyɛkatsa, ade boe Ɔlate bi ye kĩ, “Tavila. Tafɔ̃ kalɛ wĩ a kalɛ. 10Ntomɔ nɔ, odima lɛláapuli ɛkɛna nɔ lɛtsakpa lidima, kitonɛkĩ bati pii kĩ bɛnyɛ yĩ bade lɛmɛ deĩ nɛ ɔmatɔ kĩĩ kamɛ.” 11Foesũ Paulo dzi nɛ awã kateli mɔa mɔ sɛkɛ ɛkatsa bati Baguma kalɛ a.
12Lɛmɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ bɛyadzina Galio ndɛ Roma abãã ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ nɛ Akaia tite akũ a, Yudafɔ badi tsa fɔlɔ biyidza bɛdza nɛ Paulo akũ, bipi ye bɛnamɛna fɔlɛtsa kadzɛkɔ̃. 13Ade ke bibi ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a kĩ, “Obi kĩĩ lamɛna bati adzuni kadani kĩ bisum Baguma nɛ osi kĩ etia boe mbla akũ.”
14Lɛmɛ kĩ Paulo wɛ kĩ yanyɛ ye akũ onukpɛ̃ pɛ, Galio bi Yudafɔ a kĩ, “Yudafɔ mitse! Ntɛ mi kalɛ kĩ miyamɛna kĩĩ mɔ mfumsu baũ adi yanɛ kɔ̃ ni, kufɛ maana ɔwɔlɛ ntse mi. 15Lɛmɛ kĩ fɔnyɛ fɔlɛtsa kamɛ kanyɛ nɛ buĩ mɔ mi tɛmaniɛ akũ sũ ni, mi mɔawɛ minaasa foe kamɛ mimanɛ foe. Fɔnyɛ́ fɔlɛtsa kĩ madzi ndzɛ.” 16Foesũ ɛblɔmɛna be ɛnɛmɛna nɛ ye fɔlɛtsakadzɛkɔ̃ a. 17Ade bati kɔdabu a napi Sostene kĩ ɛnyɛ Yudafɔ katsɛnakɔ̃ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a bibo nɛ fɔlɛtsa kadzɛkɔ̃ kɔla kamɛ a. Lɛmɛ Galio tákpeti be kɔlaa.
Paulo Muniki Ɛnaa Antiokia.
18Paulo dzi nɛ Korinto fuwi beblebee. Ke liti a, ɛkla batɛ badonɛ a ade bɛmɔ Akwila mɔ Priskila binyina mpo bɛnaa Siria a. Fɔmɔ Paulo aadzakũ nɛ Kenkrea a, ɛfɔ̃ bɛkpa ye lɔlɔ tsɔlitsɔli nɛ fubo a kĩ ɛlɔ nɛ Yudafɔ amaniɛ osi sũ. 19Kĩ biwo Efeso a, ɛdzakũ ɛfɔnɛ Priskila mɔ Akwila nɛ awã. Ɛdzakũ ɛnaa Yudafɔ katsɛnakɔ̃ a ɛnanyɛ fɔlɛtsa kamɛ mɔ Yudafɔ a kĩ bɛna nɛ awã a. 20Bati a ke ye aduli kĩ edzi nɛ be sɛkɛ̃ sukuloo a, lɛmɛ ɛtátunɔ. 21Nɛ foesũ kĩ yadzakũ a, ebi be kĩ, “Ntɛ fɔnyɛ Baguma kawɛ ni, owi lɛláabuna mɔ maabuki ĩya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃.” Ade ke ewo nɛ ɔkɔlɔ kamɛ ɛdzakũ nɛ Efeso a.
22Kĩ ewo Kaisarea a, ɛnaa Yerusalem ɛnawɔ̃na batɛ badonɛ a, ade ebuki ɛtɛ̃ ɛnaa Antiokia a. 23Edzi nɛ awã sukuloo ɛtsã emini nɛ Galatia mɔ Frigia tite a kamɛ, ɛkado batɛ badonɛ a kɛbɛ̃.
Apolo Naa Efeso.
24Nɛ lɔkɔa na kamɛ ni, Yudani odi ya nɛ Efeso. Bavɛ ye Apolo ade bɛma ye nɛ Aleksandria a. Ɛnyɛ oti kĩ enyina kɔdzɛla kalɛ ade enyina Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ fɔlɛtsa lɛmɛ a. 25Titɔ kĩ bɛtsa ye fɔtsa nɛ boe Ɔlate kalɛ wĩ a akũ, yalɛ kɔdzɛla mɔ kɔbɛ̃ nɛ Yesu akũ malo ni, Yohanes mui kawɔla amaniɛ akũ fɔlɛtsa odi enyina. 26Ɛkalɛ kalɛ mɔ kɔbɛ̃ nɛ katsɛnakɔ̃ a. Kĩ Priskila mɔ Akwila tse ye fɔlɛtsa a, bɛkpã ye bɛnamɛna be awã ade bɛnanyɛ Baguma osi a bɛtsa ye yededeede a.
27Kĩ Apolo yake otse kĩ yaanaa Akaia, batɛ badonɛ nɛ Efeso a yado ye kɔbɛ̃. Bɛtsɛlɛ ovoli bɛkpa bikĩ nɛ Akaia kĩ bɛtɛ ye atuu. Kĩ ewo awã a ebumɔ bati pii a kĩ bɛdani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ nɛ Baguma kɔnyakamɔ sũ. 28Ade ke ɛnya Yudafɔ a akũ nɛ fɔlɛtsa kavɛlɛ kamɛ a, kitonɛkĩ ɛnyɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ fɔlɛtsa ɛtsa yededeede kĩ Yesu nyɛ Oti a kĩ Bɛbɔa tɔdɔ̃ a.

Title: ADZUMA 19
Content:
Paulo Naa Efeso.
1Kĩ Apolo na nɛ Korinto a, Paulo tsã abɔa, ɛtsã fuyite fuyite a ɛnanɛ nɛ Efeso. Awã naa, ɛmɔ batɛ badonɛ badi. 2Ade evia be kĩ, “Kĩ mitɛ mido a ni, mitɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a?”
Ade ke bɛkpa mbuayɛ kĩ “Oowo! Litsa nyɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a? Bɔtánu tɔ̃ foe akũ lɛtsama.”
3Ebuki evia be kĩ, “Litsa mui kawɔla amaniɛ mitɛ?”
Ade bibi ye kĩ, “Yohanes mui kawɔla amaniɛ a kĩ ke akũ ede lɛtsã a.”
4Paulo nyɛ foe kayɔ ɛtsa be kĩ, “Yohanes kɛna bati mui kawɔla amaniɛ kĩ bɛdani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ. Ade ebi be kĩ bɛtɛ oti a kĩ yaaya nɛ ye Yohanes liti a bido. Ade oti a nyɛ Yesu a.”
5Kĩ binu fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a, bɛfɔ̃ Paulo kɛna be mui kawɔla amaniɛ nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu dĩ akũ. 6Ade kĩ Paulo te awɛ nɛ be akũ a, Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a ka ɛyatɛ be flee kamɛ ade bɛlɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ tide ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ kamɛ a, bɛlɛ Baguma kalɛ a lɛmɛ a. 7Be lidede aawo ndɛ banyole ewua-nviã.
8Paulo kanaa katsɛnakɔ̃ a nɛ tidetɔ ɛlalɛ kamɛ, ɛkabi bati kalɛ wĩ a mɔ ɔwɔlɛ kado. Ɛnyɛ fɔlɛtsa kamɛ ɛtsa be, ɛbɔa mbɔdi kĩ yavɛlɛ be adzuni ɛyamɛna nɛ Baguma lɛgãkanya a akũ a. 9Lɛmɛ bati a badi na atɔ ɔsĩ, bɛtátse kalɛ wĩ a, ade bɛlɛ tuwuli kpa nɛ boe Ɔlate Osi Wĩ a akũ nɛ bati a flee anɛ kamɛ a. Foesũ Paulo dzakũ nɛ be sɛkɛ̃, ade ɛkpã bikĩ bɛtɛ bido a ɛnamɛna Tirano kadzikɔ̃. Ade awã ɛkatsa be fɔtsa luwi nyɛ luwi a. 10Ɛkɔa futeli nviã ɛtsa be fɔtsa lɔmɔ, ade Yudafɔ mɔ Helafɔ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Asia kamɛ kamɛ a lɛmɛ nu boe Ɔlate kalɛ a.
Skeva Babinyole Evũkɔnɔ Wɛ Kɔbɛ̃.
11Baguma kpa Paulo kɔbɛ̃ ɛkɛna awãwã fɔtsa pii. 12Ntɛ bɛkɔa ye tuduku mɔ tɛtadiɛ malo bɛtamɔ basɔnɛ ni, bana akũ ɔsi, ade fɔablɔmɛna hũhũ kpa katomɛna bikĩ edeĩ nɛ be kamɛ a kamɛ a.
13Ade Yudafɔ bawanɛ badi tsɛ̃ nɛ fɔkɔ kĩ be malo bablɔmɛna hũhũ kpa. Bɛkɔna kĩ baapuli bɛkɔa Yesu dĩ bɛblɔmɛna hũhũ a. Bibi hũhũ kpa a kĩ, “Mablɔmɛna mi nɛ Yesu a kĩ ye fɔlɛtsa Paulo tsɛ̃ yalɛ a dĩ akũ!” 14Bikĩ bɛkɛna fukĩĩ nyɛ bawaɛ̃nyole evũkɔnɔ kĩ bɛnyɛ Skeva, Yudafɔ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee babi.
15Lɛmɛ kĩ bɛnabi hũhũ kpa adi tuwuli kĩĩ a, ebi be kĩ, “Ĩnyina Yesu, ĩnyina Paulo malo. Lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃, ĩnyína mi! Bawei mianɛ?”
16Ade oti a kĩ ye kamɛ hũhũ a deĩ a wo nɛ be akũ ebo be a! Bilomɔ mɔ ɔdzɔ mɔ akũ fɔkpa bɛnɛ nɛ tɔtɔ a kamɛ.
17Fɔlɛtsa a kĩ fɔya a gba nɛ Efeso, ade Yudafɔ mɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ flee nu foe a. Nɛ foesũ libe wo bati paa, ade boe Ɔlate Yesu dĩ buki lide nɛ ode libu a. 18Bati pii kĩ bɛdani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ a, nɛ bɛya nɛ kanade bɛyanyɛ be tɔkpa bɛtsa. 19Bikĩ bɛnyɛ bawanɛ ĩye madzikifɔ a lɛmɛ lɔ be fuwa, fɔ́bɛ mɔ foe akũ tuvoli bɛyamɛna bipila nɛ kanade. Tuvoli a kɔya aawo ndɛ sika ovoe mpim aduenum. 20Fɔtsã osi kĩĩ akũ boe Ɔlate kalɛ a gba mɔ kɔbɛ̃, kɛtɛ awã lɛmɛ flee.
Ɔtutũ Ya Nɛ Efeso.
21Nɛ fukĩĩ liti a Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a fɔ̃ Paulo kɛna adzuni kĩ yanatsã Makedonia mɔ Akaia ɛnaa Yerusalem. Paulo lɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ nto awã ni, kɛnɛ kĩ ntɛ̃ nnaadã Roma lama.” 22Edo ye babumɛnanɛ nviã Timoteo mɔ Erasto kĩ bɛnya lɔtɔ bɛna Makedonia, ade ye mɔa edzi nɛ Asia kamɛ kamɛ fɛɛ a.
23Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ ni, ɔdzɛ kpale odi ya nɛ Efeso kĩ fɔtsɛ̃ Kristo katɛ kado osi a akũ sũ. 24Fukĩĩ yi kayɔ futo odi kĩ bavɛ Demetrio kĩ yakɔa sika ovoe katu Artemis asɔli kɔla akũ fɔtsa a. Bɛmɔ ye adzuma bakɛnanɛ a banɔ foe kakpa bikĩ bayaabɔa afɔliɛ kakpa baviɔ̃ a. Adzuma kĩĩ akpa be nfasɔ baũ paa. 25Luwi a, Demetrio ve sika fɔtsa batunɛ a flee ɛkpɔta ade ebi be kĩ, “Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, minyina kĩ boe akũ kana to adzuma kĩĩ kamɛ. 26Ade mi mɔawɛ minu, mimɔ́ yededeede ayekĩ Paulo do boe adzuma kĩĩ kɔnyɔã a. Epuli ebula bati a adzuni kade kĩ baviɔ̃ fɔtsa kĩ bɔatu a lɛnɛ́nɛ, nnɛ́ nɛ Efeso odi fukĩĩ lamɛna kaya, mbom nɛ Asia tite a flee akũ. 27Lɛmɛ nnɛ́ boe adzuma odi aabu kade! Boe baviɔ̃ kpale Artemis dĩ mɔ obu flee lɛmɛ aawɔ nɛ Asia mɔ katinya kamɛ flee!”
28Kĩ binu Demetrio fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a kalɔkpa wo be mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ ade bido fɔwɔla kabɔa awɛ kɔɔba kĩ, “Boe Ɔma Artemis nyɛ Efesofɔ baviɔ̃ kpale!” 29Fɔwɔla kĩĩ tɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ flee. Nɛ foesũ ɔmatɔ a bɔa obũ ade bipi Paulo batomɛnanɛ nviã a kĩ be nyɛ Gaio mɔ Aristarko kĩ bito Makedonia, bɛnamɛna ɔmatɔ a katsɛnakɔ̃ a. 30Paulo lɛmɛ wɛ kufɛ kĩ yanaa awã, lɛmɛ batɛ badonɛ bɛbã sua ye osi. 31Kayite a na banɔkɔɛ̃ kĩ bɛnyɛ Paulo bakɔba lɛmɛ do lɔtɔ nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃, bike ye aduli kĩ ɛtasuma katsɛnakɔ̃ a.
32Lɔkɔ a na ni, katsɛnakɔ̃ a flee kɛna yoo. Bati a badi lamɛna lɛtsa mɔa kalɛ, babɛbã lamɛna lɛtsa bɛbã kalɛ, ade be pii lɛmɛ ti binyína lɛtsa a kĩ de sũ bɛyatsɛna nɛ awã a. 33Ade Yudafɔ a vɛlɛ Aleksandro bɛyadzɛla nɛ lɔtɔ kĩ ɛyaanyɛ lɛtsa kĩ de lɛya a onukpɛ̃. Ade Aleksandro dzɛla akpɔ nɛ ode ete be awɛ kĩ bɛfɔ̃ ebi be kadi. 34Kĩ bati a mɔ biyi ɔsũ kĩ Yudani yanɛ sũ ni, bibuki bɛbɔa fɔwɔla, fɔtɛ ndɛ ndɔũhuilɛ nviã. Bɛkalɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔma Artemis nyɛ Efesofɔ baviɔ̃ kpale!”
35Owi tábuna fɔmɔ abãã ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ odi puli ɛyadina bati a ade ebi be kĩ, “Nwaɛ̃ amɛ Efesofɔ, mi kamɛ odi nyɛ odi nyina kĩ Efeso nyɛ Artemis, baviɔ̃ kpale a kadzikɔ̃, ade ke de kpalɛwa a kĩ lito ode lɛka a lɛmɛ deĩ nɛ boe sɛkɛ̃ a. 36Odima lɛláapuli ɛlɛ kĩ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ lɛnyɛ́ ɔnɔkɔali, foesũ mina ɔwɔlɛ lɔkɔa mitakɛna lɛtsama mɔ kalɔkpa. 37Kitonɛkĩ bati a kĩ mipi miyamɛna nɛ awĩ a táye Artemis kuviɔ̃la fɔtsa fudima ĩye bɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa kpa fudima bitia boe baviɔ̃ a. 38Lɛmɛ ntɛ Demetrio mɔ ye adzuma bakɛnanɛ a deĩ kalɛ mɔ odi kɔ̃ ni, fɔlɛtsa badzɛnɛ deĩ. Ade budeĩ fuwi kĩ foe akũ badzɛ fɔlɛtsa, kĩ baapuli bɛkɔa bɛtsa lɛtsa kĩ litia be a bɛnamɛna awã. 39Lɛmɛ ntɛ fɔlɛtsa bɛbã minɛɛ kɔ̃ ni, mifɔ̃ bɔkɔa foe bɔnaayi nɛ fɔlɛtsa badzɛnɛ a anɛ bɛdzɛ nɛ mbla onukpɛ̃. 40Kitonɛkĩ nviã ɔtutũ kĩĩ kɔ̃ kɛna ndɛ kayidza kadza nɛ abãã akũ kĩ baapuli bɛbɔɛ fɔlɛtsa nɛ boe akũ. Ade ntɛ banɔkɔɛ̃ a via boe kadi ni, bɔláapuli bɔnyɛ foe onukpɛ̃. Baavɛlɛ boe sɔtɔ.” 41Kĩ ɛlɛ fukĩĩ eyua, ɛnyɛ be flee a osi, ade bɛpansam a.

Title: ADZUMA 20
Content:
Paulo Naa Makedonia Mɔ Akaia.
1Kĩ ɔtutũ a onukpɛ̃ dɔ a, Paulo vɛ batɛ badonɛ a ɛkpɔta. Kĩ ɛna kadi ebi be, edo be kɔbɛ̃ lɛmɛ eyua a, evia osi ɛdzakũ ɛnaa Makedonia. 2Paulo tsã kamɛ kamɛ na flee ebi bati boe Ɔlate fɔlɛtsa pii ɛkado be kɔbɛ̃, ɛkɔa ɛyawo Akaia. 3Edzi nɛ awã tidetɔ ɛlalɛ. Lɔkɔ a kĩ ɛkamanɛ akũ kĩ yadzakũ ɛnaa Siria tite akũ, ɛyamɔ kĩ Yudafɔ a sui nɛ ye akũ. Nɛ foesũ eke otse kĩ yabuki ɛdani ɛtsã Makedonia kamɛ a. 4Bɛmɔ bati pii lɛtsã bɛnaa. Ade be nyɛ Sopater, Piro obi kĩ eto Beroia, Aristarko mɔ Sekundo kĩ bito Tesalonika. Babɛbã nyɛ Gaio kĩ eto Derbe, Tihiko mɔ Trofimo kĩ bito Asia, mɔ Timoteo. 5Bɛnya boe lɔtɔ bɛnadzɔlɛ boe nɛ Troa ɔmatɔ a kamɛ. 6Kĩ bɔnya Yudafɔ Abodoo kĩ Ɛtáyila Fuwi a buyua a, budzi ɔkɔlɔ nɛ Filipi ade bunyina bɔnaa be sɛkɛ̃ nɛ Troa a. Buwo awã nɛ fuwi elo liti, ade budzi nɛ awã fuwi evũkɔnɔ a.
Paulo Naa Troa Nkaɛ.
7Nɛ ɛkwansieda luwi lɛtɔnyade akũ a, bɔtsɛna kĩ bɔa nya boe Ɔlate funitsã a. Nɛ kĩ Paulo aadzakũ ntɛ kade nyina sũ ni, ɛlɛ kɔdzɛla flee kɛnawo lɛnyɛ kayite. 8Bɛtɛna tɛsɛdza nɛ abansulu kɔla a kamɛ. 9Kĩ Paulo lɛ kɔdzɛla gɛlɛɛlɛ sũ tida bɔɛ Eutiko, opopo kĩ ede edzi nɛ nfansili. Eto abansulu kɔla kɔlalɛde a ɛyatɔ nɛ tite. Bikĩ bɛnabɔɛ ye a mɔ́ kĩ eku. 10Lɛmɛ kĩ Paulo ka ɛnaa a, ɛkɛna akũ eboomu ye, ade ebi be kĩ, “Mitavila! Edeĩ nkpã!” 11Ade be flee bibuki bide bɛnaa abansulu ode a bɛnanya boe Ɔlate funitsã a. Paulo buki ɛlɛmɔ be kɔdzɛla flee kɛnawo odenyinawi ade ɛdzakũ a. 12Nɛ kĩ lɛtsama tákɛna opopo a sũ ni, bɛkpã ye bɛnamɛna kɔla, ade ɔwɔlɛ ka edzi be a.
Paulo To Troa Ɛnaa Mileto.
13Paulo tsã abɔa ɛnaa Aso a. Lɛmɛ boe a kĩ butomɔ ye a budzi ɔkɔlɔ bɔnya ye lɔtɔ kĩ bɔ́anatsɛlamɔ akũ nɛ awã, lɔkɔa bɔbɔɛ ye ndɛ ayekĩ ɛtsa a. 14Kĩ ɛyamɔ boe nɛ Aso a, boe flee bɔdzakũ bɔnaa Mitilene. 15Odenyinawi a buwo Kio ntintisɔ. Luwi lɛyade akũ ni bɔnawo Samo, ade nɛ luwi lɛlade a buwo Mileto a. 16Paulo fɔ̃ bɔtɛ̃ Efeso, kitonɛkĩ ɛtáwɛ kĩ yabula lɔkɔ pii kade nɛ Asia tite akũ. Eke otse lɛmɛ kĩ ntɛ fɔ́ana ye sɔwa ni, yaana nɛ Yerusalem nɛ Pentekoste luwi a akũ.
Paulo Kla Efeso Batɛ Badonɛ Banɔkɔɛ̃ a.
17Lɛmɛ kĩ buwo Mileto a Paulo do batɔ nɛ Efeso batɛ badonɛ banɔkɔɛ̃ a sɛkɛ̃ kĩ bɛyaatsɛlamɔ ye nɛ awã. 18Ade kĩ bɛyaa a, ebi be kĩ, “Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mi a flee minyina ayekĩ ndzi nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃, kito lɔkɔ a kĩ ĩya nɛ Asia tite akũ a kɛyawo nviã kĩĩ a. 19Mimɔ́ ayekĩ ndɔla yĩ akũ nsum Boe Ɔlate, titɔ kĩ nna nɛ lubo kamɔ mɔ kabe kamɛ, nɛ ayekĩ Yudafɔ wɛ kĩ bakɔ yĩ sũ. 20Lɛmɛ minyina kĩ ntákɔla mi ɔnɔkɔali a. Fɔtsa a flee kĩ ĩnyina nɛ boe Ɔlate akũ a, ade foe ntsa mi a. Ntsa foe nɛ kanade flee anɛ mɔ mi tɔtɔ kamɛ. 21Ade kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ kĩ ntsã mmini ni, ndɛ Yudafɔ mɔ Helafɔ flee mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ bɛdani be tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ bɛya nɛ Baguma sɛkɛ̃, lɔkɔa bɛtɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu bido.
22“Finyaakĩĩ manaa Yerusalem nɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa kawɛ onukpɛ̃, nɛ kĩ ĩnyína lɛtsa kĩ laaya nɛ yĩ akũ nɛ awã a. 23Lɛmɛ nɛ ɔmatɔ odi nyɛ odi kamɛ kĩ ntsã ni, Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a fɔ̃ ĩnyi kĩ maawa kɔla nɛ lubo kamɔ kamɛ. 24Yĩ nkpã lɛla nfasɔ adima, ntɛ ntápuli nkɛna lɛtsa a kĩ boe Ɔlate Yesu do yĩ kĩ nkɛna a. Lɛtsa kĩ edo yĩ kĩ nkɛna nyɛ kĩ nkaabi bati Baguma Kalɛ Wĩ a, mɔ ayekĩ edeĩ sɛmɛ kalɛ ɛkpa boe.
25“Finyaakĩĩ ĩnyina kĩ mi a flee kĩ minu kĩ ntsa mi fɔtsa nɛ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ akũ, bɔmɔ́ mi bɔlaabuki bɔmɔ́ akũ dadaada. 26Nɛ foesũ mabi mi paa nviã kĩĩ, kĩ ntɛ odi yɛla ye nkpã ni, nnɛ́ yĩ nfumusu fɔanɛ. 27Kitonɛkĩ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, ntákɔla mi lɛtsama nɛ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a akũ. 28Nɛ foesũ mina nɛ kukũmanɛ kamɛ. Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a lɛpau mi ndɛ lɔtɔ banyanɛ kĩ mipi ye babi a kĩ edo mi nɛ awɛ a kapi wĩ. Mipi be kapi wĩ, kitonɛkĩ Baguma kɔa ye Obi babɔanɛ eko nɛ tite ɛnyɛ be. 29Ade ĩnyina yededeede kĩ ntɛ ndzakũ ni, bati kpa aayawo nɛ mi kamɛ lɔkɔa bɛyalɛ mi ndɛ ayekĩ kulikii awo nɛ baveli kamɛ a. 30Nɛ mi mɔa awɛ kamɛ malo ni, bavãlɛvã aanɛ, lɔkɔa bɛkpã batɛ badonɛ pii bɛtsãmɛna fɔvã fɔtsa katsa a osi akũ. 31Foesũ midã kadã wĩ, lɔkɔa mite anɛ ayekĩ nkɔa anɛ mɔ babe ntsa mi fɔtsa lɛnyɛ mɔ suwa flee nɛ futeli ɛlalɛ a kĩ nna nɛ mi kamɛ a.
32“Finyaakĩĩ, nkɔa mi mado nɛ Baguma awɛ kĩ ɛdãmɛna mi akũ mɔ ye fɔlɛtsa a kĩ fɔabumɛna bati a, fudo mi katɛkado kɔbɛ̃ ayekĩ fɔ́akɛna mi ode fɔtsa banyanɛ ndɛ bikĩ ɛpau ɛkpa ye akũ a aye. 33Anɛ tábɛɛlɛ yĩ nɛ odima sika ngbã ĩye suwovoe ĩye tilima akũ. 34Mi awɛ minyina kĩ yĩ awɛ kĩĩ nkɔa nkɛna adzuma ndãmɛna yĩ mɔ bikĩ bitomɔ yĩ a lɛmɛ akũ a. 35Nkɛna fukĩĩ bamɛ flee nnɛɛ matsa mi ayekĩ mikɛna adzuma kɔɔba mibumɛna ahiãfɔ, ade mite anɛ nɛ lɛtsa kĩ boe Ɔlate Yesu lɛ a kĩ, ‘Kakpa deĩ nhila kɛbɛ̃ katɛ.’ ”
