36Ade ke kĩ Paulo lɛ kɔdzɛla eyua a, eke aduli ade bɛmɔ be flee bɔbɔa mpaɛ a. 37Lɔkɔ a kĩ ɛkakla be a, bɛkɔa anɛ mɔ babe bɛkatu kaboomu ye. 38Lɛtsa a kĩ de lɛfɔ̃ biwo ɔblɔ koũ a nyɛ ayekĩ ɛlɛ kĩ bɛmɔ be bɛláabuki bɛmɔ akũ dadaada a. Biyi ye osi bɛnawo ɔkɔlɔ a ɔwɛ̃ nɛ ɔwɔ abuĩ.

Title: ADZUMA 21
Content:
Paulo Naa Yerusalem.
1Kĩ bɔkla akũ buyua a, budzi ɔkɔlɔ bɔtsã kpĩĩ bunyina bɔnaa Kos. Kĩ kade nyina a buwo Rodo ade bɔtɛ̃ bɔnaa Patara a. 2Awã naa budzi ɔkɔlɔ odi kĩ yanaa Foenike. 3Bɔmɔ́ Kipro tite a nɛ lɔtɔ, ade bɔtsã te kayɔ kayɔ a bɔnaduma nɛ Tiro, nɛ Siria tite akũ, awã kĩ baanyɛ fɔtsa flee a kĩ ɔkɔlɔ a nɔnɛ a. 4Bɔmɔ́ batɛ badonɛ badi nɛ awã, ade bɔna nɛ be sɛkɛ̃ ɛkwansieda mɔa a, kitonɛkĩ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a tsã be akũ bibi Paulo kĩ ɛtanaa Yerusalem. 5Kĩ boe kadzakũ wo ɔtɔ a, batɛ badonɛ a mɔ batsɔ̃ mɔ babi flee yi boe osi bɛnawo mpo abuĩ. Awã na boe flee buke aduli bɔbɔa mpaɛ. 6Kĩ bɔkla akũ buyua a, buwo nɛ ɔkɔlɔ kamɛ ade be malo bimuniki bɛnaa fɔla a.
7Bɔbɔɛ buto Tiro ade bɔnadza nɛ Ptolemia a. Bɔnawɔ̃na batɛ badonɛ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ awã ade budzi nɛ be sɛkɛ̃ luwi mɔa a. 8Kĩ kade nyina a, bɔdzakũ nɛ awã bɔnaa Kaisarea. Bɔnase nɛ Filipo, Kalɛ Wĩ a Lɛtsã odenɛ a awã. Ɛnyɛ babumɛnanɛ evũkɔnɔ a kĩ bɛpau nɛ Yerusalem a kamɛ ɔmɔa. 9Edeĩ bayitsɔ̃ ɛna kĩ bidzí fɔnyɔ, ade bɛnyɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ lɛmɛ a.
10Bɔna nɛ awã fuwi fudi ade foe kamɛ a Baguma onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ a kĩ bavɛ Agabo to Yudea ɛya a. 11Ade kĩ ɛya nɛ boe sɛkɛ̃ a ɛbɔɛ Paulo ɔwɛ̃ a kĩ yakɔa kaboomu kate a esuli ye mɔa awɛ akpɔ mɔ abɔa, ade ɛlɛ kĩ, “Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a bo ni, ade aye Yudafɔ nɛ Yerusalem aasuli ɔwɛ̃ kĩĩ ɔlate bɛkɔa ye bido nɛ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a awɛ a.”
12Kĩ boe flee bunu fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a, bɔmɔ́ bati a kĩ bideĩ nɛ awã flee a buke Paulo aduli kĩ ɛtanaa Yerusalem. 13Lɛmɛ Paulo bi boe kĩ, “Litsa nyɛ kabe a kĩ mikɔa miaveli yĩ akpɔ? Mmanɛ akũ nkpa nnɛ́ kĩ bisuli yĩ nɛ Yerusalem odi lɛmɛ kĩ maaku nɛ awã nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu sũ.” 14Kĩ bɔmɔ́ kĩ bɔláapuli bɔdani ye adzuni sũ ni, bɔfɔnɛ ye awɛ ade bɔlɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate kawɛ kɛya nɛ foe kamɛ.”
15Fuwi fudi liti ni, bɔmanɛ akũ ade bɔdzakũ bɔnaa Yerusalem. 16Batɛ badonɛ badi to Kaisarea bitomɔ boe bɔnaa. Kĩ buwo awã a, bɛkpã boe bɔnase nɛ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ odi kĩ bavɛ Mnason awã. Eto Kipro ade ɛnyɛ batɛ badonɛ batɔnyade a kamɛ ɔmɔa a. 17Kĩ buwo Yerusalem a batɛ badonɛ a tɛ boe mɔ kawɔlɛ.
Paulo Namɔ Yakobo.
18Kĩ kade nyina a, Paulo kpã boe bɔnamɔ Yakobo mɔ batɛ badonɛ banɔkɔɛ̃ flee a nɛ Yerusalem. 19Ade kĩ bɔnawɔ̃nɔ akũ buyua a, Paulo bɔa be amandiɛ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma kɛna nɛ ye kamini nɛ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ kamɛ a akũ.
20Kĩ bitse fɔlɛtsa a biyua a, be flee bimu Baguma ade bibi ye kĩ, “Boe ɔwaɛ̃, dã ayekĩ Yudafɔ mpim mpim tɛ bido, ade bipini Mose mbla a mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ a. 21Bati badi bi be kĩ ɔtsa Yudafɔ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ fude fude a kĩ bɛtakɛna nɛ Mose mbla mɔ boe tɛmaniɛ a akũ, ade obuki ɔtsa kĩ bɛtatsua be babi fɔkpati lɛmɛ a. 22Baanu kokooko kĩ ɔya nɛ boe sɛkɛ̃. Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ litsa kɛnɛ kĩ bɔkɛna finyaa?”
23Ade ke bɛkpa ye adzuni kĩ “Budeĩ bati ɛna kĩ bido lidetɔ. 24Kpã be kanamɛna Yudafɔ Asɔli Kɔla kamɛ kabumɔ be minyɛ lɔlɔ kakpa lidetɔ a kase foe kɔtɔ. Fukĩĩ aafɔ̃ odi nyɛ odi lɔmɔ kĩ fɔvã bɛma bite nɛ nɔ akũ, lɔkɔa fɔtsa lɛmɛ kĩ opini Mose mbla a kapini wĩ. 25Batɛ badonɛ a kĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a kɔ̃ ni, bɔtsɛlɛ be ovoli bubi be kĩ bɛtabuki bɛnya fɔtsa kĩ bɛkɔa bɛbɔa afɔliɛ bɛkpa baviɔ̃, bɛfɔ̃ babɔanɛ kanya, bɛtaba bayaɛ kĩ bɛtátsua be fɔmɔ, lɔkɔa bɛfɔ̃ linyolewɛ mɔ litsolewɛ.”
26Foesũ kĩ kade nyina a, Paulo kpã banyole a, ade bɔnakɛna lɔlɔ kakpa tsɔli tsɔli amaniɛ a. Ke liti a, ɛnaa Yudafɔ afɔliɛ kabɔakɔ̃ a ɛnakpa basɔfɔ kanyi nɛ fuwi a kĩ tɔlɔ kakpa amaniɛ a aawũna, mɔ futetsa a lɛmɛ kĩ yaama be bɛkɔa bɛbɔa afɔliɛ a nɛ be lɔlɔ.
Bipi Paulo Nɛ Yudafɔ Asɔli Kɔla a Kamɛ.
27Ade kĩ kite sukuloo lɔkɔa fuwi evũkɔnɔ a aawo ɔtɔ a, Yudafɔ badi kĩ bito Asia kamɛ a yamɔ Paulo nɛ Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ. Bido ɔtutũ nɛ bati a badi kamɛ ade bipi Paulo a. 28Bɛkabɔa fɔwɔla kalɛ kĩ, “Israelfɔ miyaatɛ mɔ boe tsoo! Ade oti kĩĩ tsɛ̃ yamini nɛ kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ, yabi bati kĩ bɛtakɛna nɛ boe Yudafɔ mbla aku a. Ye lɛmɛ ɛkpã Grikifɔ ɛyawomɛna nɛ Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ, kĩ fɔatsa kĩ ebula boe kakɔ kpalɛwa kĩĩ.” 29Bɛlɛ foe lɔmɔ kitonɛkĩ luwi a bɛnya lɔtɔ bɛmɔ́ Paulo mɔ Trofimo kĩ eto Efeso a, kĩ bɛtsɛ̃ bamini nɛ Yerusalem. Nɛ foe sũ bɛkɔna kĩ ɛkpã ye ewomɛna nɛ Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ.
30Nɛ fɔwɔla kabɔa a sũ, akũ nyɛnɛ bati a flee ade biwula atsɛ yoo bɛnatsɛna nɛ Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ. Badi vɛlɛ Paulo bɛnɛmɛna ade bɛbalɛ tunyukpɛ̃ flee a. 31Lɔkɔ a kĩ bɛwɛ kĩ bakɔ ye a, Romafɔ sodzafɔ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ odi nu kĩ Yerusalem ɔmatɔ a flee deĩ nɛ ɔtutũ kamɛ mɔ fɔwɔla kabɔa. 32Deedimɔapɛ ɛkpã sodzafɔ badi bɛnaa awã kĩ bɛkakɛna hũnyɛhũnyɛ a. Kĩ bati kĩĩ mɔ sodzafɔ mɔ be ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a pɛ bɛfɔ̃ Paulo katuli.
33Awã naa, sodzafɔ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a fɔ̃ bipi Paulo ade bido ye nkɔsɔnkɔsɔ nviã a. Ade evia etse oti a odu kĩ yanɛ mɔ lɛtsa a kĩ de ɛkɛna a. 34Bati a flee kanyɛ tunukpɛ̃ futefute. Kĩ sodzafɔ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a lanu lɛtsama kayɔ pɔtii etomɛna be sɛkɛ̃ nɛ fɔwɔla mɔ ɔsĩ a sũ ni, ɛfɔ̃ bɛkɔa Paulo bɛnado nɛ kɔla a kamɛ. 35-36Kĩ bɛkɔa bade kɔla onyukpɛ̃ kadekɔ̃ a, fɔya nɛ sodzafɔ a kamɛ kĩ bɛbɔɛ Paulo bɛdɛla nɛ ode nɛ bati kɔdabu a kalɔkpa a kĩ bɛna nɛ Paulo akũ sũ. Ade bitomɔ be mɔ fɔwɔla kpaa kabɔa kĩ, “Mikɔ ye! Mikɔ ye!”
Paulo Pili Ye Lɔlɔ.
37Lɔkɔ a kĩ bɛkɔa ye bado nɛ kɔla kamɛ a, Paulo bi sodzafɔ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a kĩ. “Nwɛ kĩ malɔmɛna mɔ nɔ sukuloo.”
Ade ke sodzafɔ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a via ye kĩ, “Yie! Alɛ Griki tide?” 38Ade ebuki evia ye kĩ, “Nɛ nɔ nyɛ Egipteni a kĩ lɔkɔ lidi ɛkpã awudifɔ mpim ɛna biyidza bɛdza nɛ abãã akũ, kĩ bilo bɛnaa kɔsa kamɛ a?”
39Ade Paulo kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Yudani manɛ. Bɛma yĩ nɛ Tarso nɛ Kilikia tite akũ. Ade ɔmatɔ a na ni, nnɛ́ ɔmatɔ kabii yanɛ. Foesũ make nɔ aduli fɔ̃ nlɛmɔ bati kĩĩ kɔdzɛla.”
40Adeke ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ kĩĩ tunɔ kĩ Paulo ɛlɛmɔ be kɔdzɛla a. Paulo nɛ ɛyadza nɛ onyukpɛ̃ kadekɔ̃ a, ade ete awɛ nɛ bati kɔdabu akũ kĩ bɛkɛna dĩĩ a. Kĩ bɛfɔ̃ fɔwɔla kabɔa a, ɛlɛmɔ be kɔdzɛla nɛ Yudafɔ tide kamɛ kĩ,

Title: ADZUMA 22
Content:
1“Nda amɛ mɔ nwaɛ̃ amɛ, agoo! Mifɔ̃ ĩnyɛ yĩ onukpɛ̃ kamɛ fɔlɛtsa mitse.” 2Kĩ binu kĩ Yudafɔ tide kamɛ ɛlɛ kɔdzɛla a, bɛkɛna fɔwɔla kabɔa nɛ kayɔ bibu. Ade ke Paulo bi be kĩ,
3“Yudani manɛ ade bɛma yĩ nɛ Tarso, nɛ Kilikia tite akũ a. Lɛmɛ Yerusalem nɛ awĩ bɛdɔɔla yĩ, nkɔlɛ fɔtsa nɛ Gamaliel kayɔ. Bɛtsa yĩ boe bawanyɔ mbla a mɔ foe akũ amaniɛ a flee yededeede. Ade nkɔa yĩ ɔwɔlɛ flee nkpa Baguma ndɛ ayekĩ mi malo miakɛna nviã kĩĩ a. 4Kito lɔkɔ a na, ntomɔ batɛ badonɛ a kĩ bɛtsɛ̃ osi vɔɛ̃ a liti, nwɛ kĩ bɛkɔ be. Ade nkapi batsole mɔ banyole kado nɛ kɔla a. 5Boe Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee mɔ ɔmaĩ banɔkɔɛ̃ aapuli bidi adansiɛ nɛ fukĩ malɛ kĩĩ akũ, kitonɛkĩ bɛkatsɛlɛ tuvoli kakpa yĩ kĩ nkɔa nkɛna fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ. Ade lɔkɔ a kĩ manaa Damasko a ni, bɛkpa yĩ tuvoli kĩ nkɔa mma Yudafɔ nɛ awã ndza nɛ foe akũ mpili batɛ badonɛ a nsuli be nkɔa ĩyamɛna nɛ Yerusalem bɛvɛlɛ be sɔtɔ.
6“Lɔkɔ a kĩ ntsɛ̃ manaa, kĩ kite sukuloo mawo Damasko, ndɛ suwa tɔdɔũ ewua-nviã kamɛ a ni, deedimɔapɛ ɔhaĩ mɔ ɔsĩ odi to ode ɛka eko nɛ yĩ akũ! 7Adeke nka ntɔ nɛ tite, ade nnu ɔlɛdo odi kĩ ɛkavia yĩ kĩ, ‘Saulo, Saulo, nde sũ oyidza ɔdza nɛ yĩ akũ lɔmɔ?’
8“Ade nvia kĩ, ‘Boe Ɔlate, nɔ owei anɛ?’
“Ebuki ebi yĩ kĩ, ‘Yĩ nyɛ Yesu Nazaretni a kĩ ye akũ oyidza ɔdza a.’ 9Bati a kĩ bɔmɔ be tsɛ̃ a mɔ́ ɔhaĩ a lɛmɛ bɛtánu oti a kĩ bɔmɔ ye lɛkalɛ kɔdzɛla a odo.
10“Ade nvia ye kĩ, ‘Boe Ɔlate, litsa kɛnɛ kĩ nkɛna?’
“Ebi yĩ kĩ, ‘Yidza kanaa Damasko ɔmatɔ a kamɛ. Awã na maatsa nɔ lɛtsa a kĩ nwɛ kĩ kɛna a.’ 11Ɔhaĩ kĩĩ kɔ yĩ anɛ foesũ bati a kĩ bɔmɔ be tsɛ̃ a lipi yĩ nɛ kɔkpɔ bɛkpã yĩ bɔdzakũ bɔnawo Damasko ɔmatɔ a kamɛ.
12“Onyole odi kĩ bavɛ Anania na nɛ awã. Ɛnyɛ oti kĩ yavila Baguma ade yakɛna nɛ boe mbla lɛmɛ akũ yededeede a. Yudafɔ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ awã flee a akpa ye obu. 13Oti kĩĩ yadza nɛ yĩ ɔwɛ̃ ade ebi yĩ kĩ, ‘Nwaɛ̃ Saulo bu kamɔ fɔkɔ!’ Lɔkɔ a na kamɛ pɛpɛɛpɛ yĩ anɛ kamɛ kpalɛ yededeede ade mmɔ́ ye a.
14“Ade ebi yĩ kĩ, ‘Boe bawanyɔ Baguma lɛpau nɔ eyi kĩ nyi ye fɔwɛtsa, kamɔ ye Obi Kpalɛwa a kĩ Bɛpau a lɔkɔa kanu ye kɔdzɛla lɛmɛ. 15Kɛnɛ kĩ akɔa ɔlɛdo kĩĩ ɔnamɛna kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ, obi bati flee lɛtsa a kĩ ɔmɔ́ mɔ lɛtsa kĩ onu a. 16Finyaakĩĩ litsa adzɔlɛ? Yidza lɔkɔa katɛ mui kawɔla amaniɛ. Bɔa mpaɛ nɛ ye dĩ akũ lɔkɔa ɛkɔa nɔ titikpa ete nɔ.’
Baguma Do Paulo Ɛnaa Bikĩ Bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a Sɛkɛ̃.
17“Fukĩĩ liti a, mmuniki nnaa Yerusalem. Ade kĩ nna nɛ Asɔli Kɔla kamɛ nkabɔa mpaɛ a, fɔkɔna ndɛ tida abɔɛ yĩ, ade nna kanyɛkatsa kadi a. 18Ade awã na boe Ɔlate bi yĩ kĩ, ‘Wɛ sɔwa kadzakũ nɛ Yerusalem kitonɛkĩ awĩ bati lɛláatse nɔ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ aalɛ nɛ yĩ akũ a.’
19“Lɛmɛ nkpa mbuayɛ kĩ, ‘Boe Ɔlate, be flee binyina kĩ yĩ lɛkapili bikĩ bɛtɛ nɔ bido a nɛ Yudafɔ fɔtsɛnakɔ̃ a kabo be. 20Ade lɔkɔ a kĩ bɛkakɔ nɔ ɔdansini Stefano a, yĩ malo ntunɔ. Foesũ bɛnyɛ be tɛtadiɛ bɛkpa yĩ nlɛ ade bɛkatalɛ ye boe a.’
21“Lɛmɛ boe Ɔlate bi yĩ kĩ, ‘Yidza kanaa, maado nɔ mɔ lugo nɛ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a kamɛ!’ ”
22Lɔkɔ kĩĩ flee a, bati a dza dĩĩ bɛkatse ye kalɛ a. Lɛmɛ mɔ ye kalɛ nkaɛ kawũna pɛ, be flee bɔbɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba kĩ, “Aa! Kɛtáfɛta kĩ yadzi nkpã! Mikpã ye minamɛna minaakɔ ye!”
23Nɛ kĩ bɛna kalɔkpa paa sũ ni, bɛbɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba ade bido be tɛtadiɛ kayɛlɛ, mɔ kudu kata nɛ ɔwɛ kamɛ awɛ a. 24Ade ke kawũ banɔnɛ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a fɔ̃ bɛkpã ye biwomɛna nɛ kɔla kamɛ kĩ bɛnaabo ye lɔkɔa binyi lɛtsa a sũ kĩ Yudafɔ a kpa biko nɛ ye akũ lɔmɔ. 25Lɔkɔ a kĩ bɛkasuli ye a, Paulo via kawũ banɔnɛ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ odi kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ awã kĩ, “Osi waa kĩ babo Romani ntɛ bɛtádzɛ ye fɔlɛtsa tɔ̃?”
26Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ kĩĩ naa be lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a sɛkɛ̃ ade evia ye kĩ, “Litsa akɛna nɛ awĩ a? Onyole kĩĩ boni Romani yanɛ!”
27Foesũ kawũ banɔnɛ lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a ya nɛ Paulo sɛkɛ̃ ade evia ye kĩ, “Abo nde? Romani anɛ?”
Ade ke Paulo kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Romani manɛ!”
28Kawũ banɔnɛ lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a bi ye kĩ, “Yĩ malo Romani manɛ. Yĩ kɔ̃ nse kɔtɔ baũ fɔmɔ ndani nkɛna Romani!”
Ade Paulo bi ye kĩ, “Yĩ kɔ̃ yĩ bamanɛ flee nyɛ Romafɔ.”
29Ade ke kĩ bati a kĩ bɛdza kĩ babo ye bivia ye onukpɛ̃ kamɛ fɔlɛtsa nu kĩ Romani yanɛ a, bɛvɛlɛ akũ bɛnaa liti. Kĩ be lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a nyi kĩ Romani yanɛ a, libe wo ye paa, kitonɛkĩ ye lɛkpa osi kĩ bisuli Paulo bibo ye.
Bɛkpã Paulo Bɛyadzɛla Nɛ Fɔlɛtsa Badzɛnɛ Anɛ.
30Kĩ kade nyina, kawũ banɔnɛ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a wɛ kĩ yanyi lɛtsa a kĩ de sũ bɛbɔɛ fɔlɛtsa nɛ Paulo akũ. Ɛvɛ Yudafɔ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ be fɔlɛtsa badzɛnɛ ɛkpɔta. Ɛfɔ̃ biwũnya tɔwɛ̃ nɛ Paulo akũ ade bɛkpã ye bɛyadzɛla nɛ be anɛ kamɛ kĩ bawɛ ye fɔlɛtsa a kamɛ a.

Title: ADZUMA 23
Content:
1Ade kĩ Paulo ko anɛ ɛdã Yudafɔ fɔlɛtsa badzɛnɛ a kĩ bikoni dĩĩ nɛ fɔlɛtsa kadzɛkɔ̃ a, ebi be kĩ, “Nwaɛ̃ amɛ Israelfɔ, yĩ ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kpalɛ nɛ ayekĩ ndzi nkpã nɛ Baguma anɛ kɛyawo nviã kĩĩ a.” 2Kĩ Anania, Yudafɔ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee a kĩ ɛna nɛ awã nu ayekĩ Paulo kpa mbuayɛ a, ebi bikĩ bɛdza bifuãmɔ Paulo kĩ bɛbɔa ye nɛ onukpɛ̃. 3Ade awã mɔ Paulo bi ye kĩ, “Baguma lɛmɛ aabalɛ nɔ awɛ! Nɔ seebi kĩ bikputa se fɔtsa ovoe bɛdzɛla anɛ! Litsa fɔlɛtsa ɔdzɛnɛ anɛ? Mbla akũ ɔtsɛ̃ adzɛmɔ yĩ, lɛmɛ ade ye mɔapɛ a ɔlamɛna kafum a, nɛ kĩ ɔkpa kɔbɛ̃ bɛbalɛ yĩ ɔlɔtɔ sũ!”
4Ade ke bikĩ bɛdzɛ nɛ Paulo ɔwɛ̃ a via ye kĩ, “Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee ovũna lɔmɔ?”
5Paulo kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ntɛ ĩnyi kĩ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee yanɛ ni, kufɛ ntádo ye onukpɛ̃ lɔmɔ. Kitonɛkĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, ‘Talɛ tuwuli kpa nɛ bikĩ banya mi akũ a akũ.’ ”
6Ade kĩ Paulo mɔ eyi ɔsũ kĩ bati a kĩ bɛkpɔta nɛ awã a be kamɛ badi nyɛ Zadukifɔ ade badi lɛmɛ nyɛ Farisifɔ a sũ ni, ɛbɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba kĩ, “Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, Farisini manɛ! Farisifɔ lɛmɛ lɛma yĩ! Nviã kĩĩ badzɛmɔ yĩ kitonɛkĩ ntɛ banɔkpa kabuki kayidza kadzi nkpã a ndo sũ!” 7Kĩ Paulo sila ɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ eyua pɛ, kavɛlɛ ya nɛ Farisifɔ mɔ Zadukifɔ a kayite, ade bɛsɛ̃ be akũ a. 8Kitonɛkĩ Zadukifɔ alɛ kĩ banɔkpa lábuki kayidza, ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ lɛláa, ade hũhũ lɛmɛ lɛláa a. Lɛmɛ Farisifɔ kɔ̃ tɛ fukĩĩ bamɛ flee bido.
9Ɔtutũ kpale wo nɛ be kamɛ. Farisifɔ mbla batsanɛ a dza nɛ Paulo liti kĩ ye fɔlɛtsa a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali. Ade ke bɛbɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba kĩ, “Bɔtámɔ lɛtsa kpa lidima nɛ ye akũ! Ɔsa hũhũ adi ĩye ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ odi alɛmɔ ye kɔdzɛla!” 10Fɔwɔla kabɔa a buki fude nɛ ode fubu. Ade bati a flee pini Paulo bɛkavɛlɛ kadu kanamɛna kayamɛna a. Kĩ sodza ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a vila kĩ baavɛlɛ ye bɛpããpãã sũ ni, ebi ye sodzafɔ a kĩ bɛka bɛnaatɛ ye bɛnaado nɛ kɔla.
11Luwi a lɛnyɛ a, boe Ɔlate yadza nɛ Paulo ɔwɛ̃ ebi ye kĩ, “Paulo do ɔwɔlɛ. Ayekĩ odi adansiɛ nɛ yĩ akũ nɛ Yerusalem nɛ awĩ a, ade ayea kɛnɛ kĩ akɛna nɛ Roma lɛmɛ a.”
Yudafɔ Tsa Fɔlɔ Kĩ Bakɔ Paulo.
12Kĩ kade nyina a, Yudafɔ badi lɔ fubo bɛkpa be akũ kĩ ntɛ bɛtákɔ Paulo ni, bɛláanya ĩye bɛmɔa! 13Bati kĩĩ lidede aana ndɛ be tɛna mɔ liti. 14Ade ke bibuki bɛnaa basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ be lɔtɔ banyanɛ sɛkɛ̃ bibi be kĩ, “Bɔlɔ fubo kĩ bɔlaanya ĩye bɔmɔa kɛnaawo kĩ bɔkɔ Paulo. 15Foesũ mimɔ fɔlɛtsa badzɛnɛ a mibi sodzafɔ lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a kĩ, ebuki ɛkɔa Paulo ɛyamɛna nɛ katsɛnakɔ̃ nɛ awĩ. Mikɛna ndɛ miawɛ kĩ miavia ye fɔlɛtsa fudi mibu. Ntɛ bɛkɔa ye bayamɛna ni, bɔ́akɔ ye nɛ osi.”
16Lɛmɛ Paulo ɔfanyole odi nu fɔlɛtsa a flee kĩ bɛlɛ a, ade ewula atsɛ ɛnaa kɔla kamɛ, ɛnabi Paulo lɛtsa a kĩ de bɛlɛ a.
17Ade ke Paulo vɛ sodzafɔ a kĩ bɛdza nɛ awã kamɛ ɔmɔa ebi ye kĩ, “Kpã obisɛ̃ kĩĩ minaa ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ sɛkɛ̃. Ɛnɛɛ kalɛ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ yaabi ye.”
18Foesũ sodzani a kpã kabisɛ̃ɛ̃ a bɛnaa be lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a sɛkɛ̃, ade ebi ye kĩ, “Paulo a kĩ bido nɛ kɔla kamɛ nɛ awĩ a lɛvɛ yĩ ebi yĩ kĩ nkpã kabisɛ̃ɛ̃ kĩĩ mma nɔ, lɔkɔa kibi nɔ kalɛ kadi.”
19Ade sodzafɔ lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a pi kabisɛ̃ɛ̃ a nɛ kɔkpɔ bɛnaa ɔɔwɛ̃ ade evia ye kĩ, “Litsa awɛ kĩ abi yĩ?”
20Ade ke mɔ ebi ye kĩ, “Yudafɔ badi kɛna onukpɛ̃ mɔa mɔ be banɔkɔɛ̃ a kĩ bayaake nɔ aduli lɔkɔa kunya ɔkpã Paulo ɔyamɛna nɛ katsɛnakɔ̃, mɔ kakɔna kĩ bavia ye fɔlɛtsa fudi. 21Lɛmɛ tatse be kitonɛkĩ bati ndɛ be tɛna bɛla nɛ osi badzɔlɛ ye. Bati kĩĩ lɔ fubo kĩ mbɔɛntɛ bɛkɔ Paulo fɔmɔ baata funitsã onukpɛ̃. Nɛ foesũ bɛmanɛ akũ bɛnabɛla badzɔlɛ nɔ osi kakpa. Bɛnabɛla nɛ osi ɔɔwɛ̃ kitonɛkĩ bɛtɛ bido kĩ aatunɔ ɔkpa be.”
22Sodzafɔ lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a si ye mbla kĩ, “Tafɔ̃ odima libuki enu lɛtsa a kĩ ɔyabi yĩ nɛ awĩ a dadaada.” Ade ke ɛnyɛ ye osi ɛdzakũ a.
Bɛkpã Paulo Bɛma Abãã Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Felike.
23Ade ke sodzafɔ lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a vɛ ye banɔkɔɛ̃ nviã ade ebi be kĩ, “Miwɛ sodzafɔ ɔha nviã kĩ baanaa Kaisarea nviã lɛnyɛ. Miwɛ bikĩ balɛ fɔtsɔɛ ɔha nviã, mɔ bikĩ badzi bapɔnkɔ lɛmɛ be bati aduesɔũ. 24Miwɛ ɔpɔnkɔ mikpa Paulo edzi nɛ ye akũ lɔkɔa mikpã ye bɔɛɛ, mima abãã ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Felike.”
25Ade ke ɛtsɛlɛ ovoli odi ɛkpa abãã ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a kĩ,
26Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ Klaudio Lisia sɛkɛ̃. Mawɔ̃na nɔ, boe Abãã Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Felike.
27Yudafɔ badi pi oti kĩĩ, ade bɛwɛ kĩ bakɔ ye a. Lɛmɛ kĩ bɔmɔ sodzafɔ buwo awã a, nnu kĩ Romani yanɛ sũ ni, nfɔ̃ sodzafɔ a tɛ ye nɛ be awɛ. 28Foesũ nkpã ye ĩyamɛna nɛ be fɔlɛtsa kadzɛkɔ̃ kĩ manyi lɛtsa a kĩ ɛkɛna a. 29Ĩyamɔ kĩ lɛtsa kĩ bɛbɔɛ nɛ ye akũ a nyɛ Yudafɔ ɔsum mbla akũ fɔlɛtsa kĩ fɔnyɛ́ fukĩ bado ye nɛ kɔla kamɛ ĩye bɛkɔ ye. 30Adeke kĩ bibi yĩ kĩ bɛlamɔ nhihiɛ kakɛna kĩ baakɔ ye sũ ni, nkɔna kĩ makɔa ye mma nɔ. Mbi bikĩ bɛbɔɛ kalɛ nɛ ye akũ a ku kĩ bɛkɔa ke bɛma nɔ.
31Foesũ luwi a lɛnyɛ a sodzafɔ a kpã Paulo bɛnawo Antipatre. 32Kĩ kade nyina, sodzafɔ a kĩ bɛtsã abɔa a muniki bɛnaa kɔla kamɛ, ade bɛfɔ̃ bapɔnkɔ badzinɛ a kpã Paulo bɛnamɛna Kaisarea a. 33Kĩ biwo awã a, bɛkɔa Paulo mɔ ovoli a kĩ bɛnɛɛ a bɛkpa abãã ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a. 34Kĩ ɛkã ovoli a eyua a, evia Paulo amantam a kĩ eto. Ade kĩ enyi kĩ Paulo to Kilikia a, ebi ye kĩ, 35“Maanaa nɔ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kamɛ yededeede ntɛ bikĩ mimɔ be mina kalɛ a ya nɛ awĩ.” Ade ke ɛkpa sodzafɔ a kĩ bɛdza nɛ awã a kɔbɛ̃ kĩ bɛkɔa Paulo bido nɛ kɔla a kĩ Lɛgã Herodes ke a kamɛ lɔkɔa bɛkaadã ye akũ.

Title: ADZUMA 24
Content:
Yudafɔ Bɔɛ Fɔlɛtsa Nɛ Paulo Akũ.
1Fuwi elo liti a, Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee Anania, Yudafɔ lɔtɔ banyanɛ mɔ fɔlɛtsa ɔdzɛnɛ kĩ bavɛ Tertulo naa Kaisarea. Bɛya nɛ Felike sɛkɛ̃ kĩ bayaanyɛ Paulo nfumusu bɛtsa ye.
2Kĩ bɛvɛ Paulo bɛyamɛna a, Tertulo yi Paulo onukpɛ̃ katsua kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, nɛ nɔ nyansã mɔ adzuni kĩ ɔnɛɛ akpã boe sũ ni, bɔna lukudɔ nɛ lɔkɔ pii kamɛ. Ade kavɛmɛna pii lɛmɛ ya nɛ boe tite akũ a. 3Fukĩĩ nyɛ fɔtsa kĩ fuwo boe Yudafɔ flee anɛ. 4Bɔake nɔ aduli kĩ tse fɔlɛtsa a kĩ maabi nɔ nɛ onyole kĩĩ akũ a. 5Kitonɛkĩ bɔmɔ́ ye buyi ɔsũ kĩ ɔdzɛ odonɛ yanɛ, ade ɛtsɛ̃ nɛ kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ yadani Yudafɔ kakɔna nɛ katinya kamɛ kĩ bɛkɛna fɔtsa basa bitia abãã a. Ɛnyɛ lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ ɛkpa Nazaretfɔ katsu a. 6Foe liti a bɔmɔ́ lɛmɛ kĩ ɛtsɛ̃ yakɛna fɔtsa kĩ fɔado boe Yudafɔ Asɔli Kɔla a efĩĩ, ade bupi ye a. Foesũ bɔwɛ kĩ bɔadzɛmɔ ye nɛ boe mbla onukpɛ̃. 7Lɛmɛ kawũ banɔnɛ lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ Lisia kɔa kɔbɛ̃ ɛyate ye nɛ boe awɛ. 8Ntɛ ovia oti kĩĩ onukpɛ̃ kamɛ fɔlɛtsa ni, aapuli onyi fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɔbɔɛ nɛ ye akũ a otomɛna ye sɛkɛ̃.”
9Ade ke Yudafɔ a flee tunɔ mɔ onukpɛ̃ mɔa bɛlɛ kĩ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ Tertulo lɛ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali.
Paulo Nyɛ Onukpɛ̃ Nɛ Felike Anɛ.
10Kĩ abãã ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a vɛ Paulo kĩ ɛlɛ kɔdzɛla a, eyi kayɔ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlɛga, ĩnyina kĩ nɛ futeli pii kĩ fɔtɛ̃ kĩĩ kamɛ ni, nɔ adzɛ Yudafɔ fɔlɛtsa. Nɛ foesũ kawɔlɛ de yĩ kĩ maanyɛ yĩ onukpɛ̃ nɛ nɔ anɛ. 11Aanu kĩ fɔ́ana ndɛ fuwi ewua-nviã kĩ ĩya nɛ Yerusalem ĩyaabɔa afɔliɛ nɛ Yudafɔ Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ. 12Ade odima támɔ kĩ bɔmɔ odi bɔkɛna ɔdzɛ ĩye ndo ɔtutũ nɛ Yudafɔ Asɔli Kɔla kamɛ, be fɔtsɛnakɔ̃, ĩye kakɔ kadi nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ a. 13Ade bati kĩĩ kamɛ odima lɛláapuli eke otse nɛ lɛtsama akũ pɔtii kĩ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ nɛ awĩ a ni, ɔnɔkɔali fɔanɛ. 14Lɛmɛ lɛtsa a kĩ de akũ ntunɔ nyɛ kĩ masum boe bawanyɔ Baguma, ade ntomɛna Osi a kĩ balɛ kĩ ɛnyɛ́ osi wĩ a. Ntɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ Mose mbla a mɔ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ tuvoli a kamɛ a ndo. 15Ndeĩ kɔnɛte nɛ Baguma akũ ndɛ ayekĩ be malo bideĩ, kĩ Baguma aadzɛla bati wĩ mɔ bati kpa flee etomɛna kanɔkpa. 16Nɛ kɔnɛte kĩĩ sũ ni, mabɔa mbɔdi paa kĩ yĩ ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ ɛkpalɛ yededeede nɛ Baguma mɔ batidziwa anɛ.
17“Ade futeli pii kĩ ndzakũ nɛ Yerusalem a. Finyaakĩĩ ĩyaate ahiãfɔ fɔtsa lɔkɔa mbɔa afɔliɛ nkpa Baguma. 18Kĩ mayua lɔlɔ kakpa amaniɛ a, Yudafɔ badi yamɔ yĩ nɛ Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ. Nnɛ́ bɔmɔ́ bati kĩ banyɛ lɛma tsɛ̃. Ade ke ntádo ɔdzɛ odima lɛmɛ a. 19Yudafɔ a kĩ bito Asia tite akũ a na nɛ awã, ade be kɛnɛ kĩ bɛyaadza nɛ nɔ anɛ kamɛ a, lɔkɔa ntɛ bideĩ kalɛ kadi nɛ yĩ akũ ni, baalɛ. 20Ĩye afɔ̃ bati a kĩ bidzi nɛ awĩ a bɛlɛ kɔtɔ a kĩ bɛkɔ yĩ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ Yudafɔ ɔmaĩ fɔlɛtsa badzɛnɛ a dzɛmɔ yĩ a. 21Mbɔɛ ntɛ kalɛ mɔa a kĩ ndzɛla ɔlɛdo nlɛ kĩ, ‘Miadzɛmɔ yĩ nviã kĩĩ kitonɛkĩ ntɛ banɔkpa kayidza kadzi nkpã a ndo.’ ”
22Ade Felike, oti kĩ enyina katɛkado osi vɔɛ̃ kĩĩ paa a bi Yudafɔ a kĩ, “Midzɔlɛ yĩ kɛnaawo lɔkɔ a kĩ Lisia aaya fɔmɔ maatsua fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kamɛ.” 23Adeke ɛfɔ̃ bɛkɔa Paulo bɛnado nɛ kɔla a. Lɛmɛ ebi bikĩ badãmɛna ye akũ a kĩ bɛtakɛna ye tɛnya. Ntɛ ye bakɔba badi ya nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ ni, bɛkpa be osi lɔkɔa bɛkɛna lɛtsa a kĩ yawɛ a bɛkpa ye.
Paulo Nyɛ Fɔlɛtsa Kamɛ Ɛtsa Felike Mɔ Drusila.
24Nɛ fuwi fudi liti ni, Felike mɔ ɔtsɔ̃ Drusila kĩ ɛnyɛ Yudani ya. Ɛfɔ̃ bɛnyɛ Paulo bɛyamɛna ade ebi be kalɛ nɛ Yesu Kristo katɛkado fɔlɛtsa akũ a. 25Kĩ ɛkanyɛ fɔlɛtsa kamɛ nɛ kadzi wĩ, akũ kapi, mɔ Baguma kadzɛ a kĩ kaaya nɛ kunya kamɛ a akũ ni, libe wo Felike paa. Adeke Felike bi ye kĩ, “Yidza kanaa tɔ̃. Ntɛ nna lɔkɔ wĩ ni, maafɔ̃ bɛvɛ nɔ.” 26Nɛ kĩ ɛkɔna kĩ Paulo aakpa ye litsedi sũ ni, yado bavɛ ye mɔatsɛ mɔatsɛ bɛmɔ ye balɔmɛna.
27Nɛ futeli nviã liti a, bɛnyɛ Felike ade bɛkɔa Porkio Festo bɛyamɛna nɛ ye kadzakɔ̃ a. Lɛmɛ kĩ Felike wɛ kĩ Yudafɔ a bɛwɛ ye kalɛ sũ ni, ɛfɔ̃ Paulo buki ɛna nɛ kɔla nɛ awã.

Title: ADZUMA 25
Content:
Paulo Kɔa Ye Fɔlɛtsa Ɛma Lɛgã Kaisare Anɛ.
1Kĩ Festo yawo kayite a kĩ yanya lɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a, ke fuwi ɛlalɛ liti a, eto Kaisarea ɛnaa Yerusalem. 2Nɛ awã naa, basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a mɔ Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a yabi ye fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛbɔɛ nɛ Paulo akũ. Ade ke bike ye aduli kĩ, 3ɛmɔ be kɔnya ɛfɔ̃ bɛkɔa ye bɛyamɛna nɛ Yerusalem. Be kasui nyɛ kĩ baadzi ye osi lɔkɔa ntɛ yatɛ̃ a bɛkɔ ye. 4Lɛmɛ Festo bi be kĩ, “Paulo waa kɔla nɛ Kaisare. Yĩ malo maamuniki naa awã nɛ fuwi lukũ kamɛ. 5Foesũ mifɔ̃ mi banɔkɔɛ̃ a bɛya nɛ awã bɛyaanyɛ ye nfumusu a bɛtsa.”
6Nɛ fuwi ɛlɛ̃ ĩye foe ewua liti ni, Festo muniki ɛnaa Kaisare, ade ke luwi lɛyade a ɛvɛ Paulo fɔlɛtsa a. 7Ade ke kĩ Paulo yawo fɔlɛtsa kadzɛkɔ̃ a, Yudafɔ a kĩ bito Yerusalem a yadza bisinya ye. Bitsua fɔlɛtsa pii bite nɛ ye akũ lɛmɛ fudima tápi ye.
8Paulo nyɛ onukpɛ̃ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Ntáfum Yudafɔ mbla ĩye Yudafɔ Asɔli Kɔla a ĩye Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃ Kaisare.”
9Nɛ kĩ Festo awɛ kĩ Yudafɔ a bɛwɛ ye kalɛ sũ ni, evia Paulo kĩ, “Ɔwɛ kĩ anaa Yerusalem lɔkɔa ndzɛ nɔ fɔlɛtsa a nɛ awã mbɔɛɛ?”
10Ade ke Paulo bi ye kĩ, “Oowo. Romafɔ Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃ fɔlɛtsa kadzɛkɔ̃ ndzɛ̃. Ade awĩ kɛfɛta kĩ bɛdzɛmɔ yĩ a. Onyina yededeede kĩ ntákɛna tɔkpa tidima nɛ Yudafɔ akũ. 11Ntɛ nkɛna lɛtsa a kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ bɛkɔ yĩ ni, maatunɔ kĩ bɛkɔ yĩ. Lɛmɛ ntɛ ntákɛna tɔkpa ni, kɛtáfɛta kĩ nɔ ĩye oti bɛbã akɔa yĩ edo nɛ bati kĩĩ awɛ kamɛ kĩ bɛkɔ yĩ. Nɛ foesũ nkɔa yĩ fɔlɛtsa makpa Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃ Kaisare!”
12Fukĩĩ liti a, Festo mɔ ye fɔlɛtsa badzɛnɛ a tsa fɔlɔ ade bibi ye kĩ, “Kĩ ɔkɔa nɔ fɔlɛtsa akpa Kaisare sũ ni, Kaisare sɛkɛ̃ mɔ aanaa.”
Lɛgã Agripa Mɔ Bernike Tse Paulo Fɔlɛtsa.
13Fuwi fudi liti a, Lɛgã Agripa mɔ Bernike ya nɛ Festo sɛkɛ̃ nɛ Kaisare kĩ bɛyaawɔ̃na ye. 14Bidzi nɛ awã fuwi pii, ade Festo kɔa Paulo fɔlɛtsa a ebi lɛgã a kĩ, “Onyole odi waa kɔla nɛ awĩ kĩ Felike kɔa ye fɔlɛtsa ɛkpa yĩ kĩ ndzɛ. 15Kĩ nnaa Yerusalem a, basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ be banɔkɔɛ̃ a tsua ye onukpɛ̃ bɛkpa yĩ ade bɛwɛ kĩ nkɔ ye kɔtɔ a.
16“Nfɔ̃ binyi kĩ Romafɔ mbla tákpa osi kĩ bɛkɔ oti fɔmɔ baadzɛmɔ ye. Kɛnɛ kĩ bɛkpa ye osi bɛmɔ bikĩ bideĩ fɔlɛtsa a bɛkpɔta anɛ mɔ anɛ fɔmɔ bɛlɛ foe. 17Foesũ kĩ bɛya nɛ awĩ a, ntátɛ̃ ndzi nɛ kalɛ kĩĩ akũ. Kĩ kade sila kinyina a, nfɔ̃ bɛkpã oti kĩĩ bɛyamɛna. 18Lɛmɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ bitomɛna ye akũ a vɛmɛna nɛ fukĩ nkɔna kĩ baalɛ a akũ. 19Fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ nɛ awĩ a to be kasum mɔ onyole odi kĩ bavɛ Yesu kĩ eku, lɛmɛ Paulo kɔ̃ tsɛ̃ yalɛ kĩ ebuki edzi nkpã akũ! 20Fɔkɛna yĩ basaa ade ĩnyína ayekĩ matsua fɔlɛtsa a kamɛ a. Foesũ nvia Paulo ntɛ ɛwɛ kĩ nkɔa ye nnamɛna Yerusalem lɔkɔa ɛnaanyɛ ye akũ onukpɛ̃ nɛ awã. 21Lɛmɛ Paulo lɛ kĩ ɛwɛ kĩ bɛkɔa ye fɔlɛtsa bɛkpa Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃ Kaisare. Ade nfɔ̃ bimunikimɔ ye bɛnado nɛ kɔla kɛnawo kĩ maakɔa ye mma Kaisare a.”
22Ade ke Lɛgã Agripa bi Festo kĩ “Yĩ mɔawɛ mawɛ kĩ matse ye onukpɛ̃ kamɛ fɔlɛtsa a.”
Ade Festo bi ye kĩ, “Aatse ye kunya!”
Paulo Dza Nɛ Agripa Anɛ Kamɛ.
23Kĩ kade nyina a, Lɛgã Agripa mɔ Bernike hɛhɛ akũ mɔ fɔgãtsa, bɛnɛ bɛya nɛ fɔlɛtsa kadzɛkɔ̃ a. Ade kawũ banɔnɛ banɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ banɔkɔɛ̃ a tomɔ be bɛya a. Festo nyɛ onukpɛ̃ kĩ bɛkpã Paulo bɛyamɛna. 24Ade Festo lɛ kĩ, “Lɛgã Agripa mɔ mi a flee kĩ mikpɔta nɛ awĩ a, onyole kĩĩ nyɛ oti kĩ Yudafɔ nɛ Yerusalem mɔ Kaisare wɛ kĩ bɛkɔ! 25Lɛmɛ nɛ yĩ kamɔ kamɛ ni, ɛtákɛna lɛtsa a kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ bɛkɔ ye. Kĩ ye a lɛmɛ ɛlɛ kĩ ɛkɔa ye fɔlɛtsa yakpa boe Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃ sũ ni, yĩ malo ntásĩ. 26Lɛmɛ litsa koũ maatsɛlɛ nkɔa mmɛna yĩ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a? Kitonɛkĩ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, ɛtákɛna nfumusu adima. Ade foesũ nkɔa ye ĩyamɛna nɛ mi anɛ kamɛ titiliwu nɔ Lɛgã Agripa kĩ ntɛ bɔdzɛ ye fɔlɛtsa ni lɔkɔa maana kadi ntsɛlɛ nɛ ye akũ mma ye. 27Kitonɛkĩ fɔnɛ́nɛ kĩ bakɔa odi kĩ ɛwaa kɔla bɛma Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃ kĩ bɛtámɔ tɔkpa a kĩ ɛkɛna a bɛtsa.”

Title: ADZUMA 26
Content:
Paulo Nyɛ Ye Akũ Onukpɛ̃ Nɛ Agripa Anɛ.
1Ade ke Agripa bi Paulo kĩ, “Osi waa kĩ apuli ɔlɛ kɔdzɛla.”
Foesũ Paulo dɛla awɛ ade ɛlɛ kĩ, 2“Boe Ɔlate Agripa, nna lɔlɔ wĩ kĩ maanyɛ yĩ akũ onukpɛ̃ nɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ foesũ Yudafɔ bɔɛ kalɛ nɛ yĩ akũ a akũ, nɛ nɔ anɛ. 3Kitonɛkĩ onyina Yudafɔ tɛdzɛ mɔ be tɛmaniɛ a flee kanyina wĩ. Foesũ na ɔwɔlɛ katse yĩ fɔlɛtsa.
4“Yudafɔ flee nyina ayekĩ ndzi nkpã kito yĩ tibisɛ̃ kamɛ nɛ boe ɔtɔ mɔ Yerusalem lɛmɛ. 5Ade ntɛ baalɛ ɔnɔkɔali nɛ yĩ akũ ni, baanyi kĩ ĩnyɛ Farisini kĩ mabu Yudafɔ mbla mɔ tɛmaniɛ a flee kaba mbla adi nyɛ adi. 6Finyaakĩĩ ndzɛ̃ badzɛmɔ yĩ nɛ ayekĩ yĩ anɛ teĩ nɛ Baguma kalɛ a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi ɛkpa boe bawanyɔ a sũ. 7Ade foesũ Yudafɔ futete ewua-nviã bɔa mbɔdi kĩ basum Baguma lɛnyɛ mɔ suwa flee lɔkɔa bɛna kɔnɛte kĩĩ odu a. Boe Ɔlate, ade fukĩĩ sũ Yudafɔ a bɔɛ fɔlɛtsa nɛ yĩ akũ a. 8Nde sũ fudeĩ mi ɔsĩ kĩ miatɛ mido kĩ Baguma adzɛla banɔkpa?
9“Lɔkɔ lidi kamɛ ni, nkɔa nte nɛ yĩ akũ kĩ mayidza ndza nɛ bikĩ bitomɔ Yesu kĩ ɛnyɛ Nazaretni a akũ. 10Yudafɔ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a kpa yĩ kɔbɛ̃ kĩ mpili bati kpalɛwa pii ndo nɛ kɔla kamɛ nɛ Yerusalem. Ade ke ntɛ bakɔ be lɛmɛ matunɔ nɛ foe akũ a. 11Ntomɔ be nkakɛna be tɛnya flee kɛnawo tɛmatɔ bɛbã kĩ tideĩ mɔ lugo a malo kamɛ. Nfɔ̃ bɛvɛlɛ be sɔtɔ nɛ Yudafɔ fɔlɛtsa kadzɛkɔ̃ flee, ndza nɛ be akũ kĩ bɛlɛ fubusuotsa nɛ Yesu akũ.
Paulo Lɛ Ayekĩ Ɛdani Etomɔ Yesu.
12“Ade kakɔna kĩĩ odu nnɛɛ manaa Damasko, mɔ kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a kpa yĩ a. 13Boe Ɔlate, kĩ ntsɛ̃ nɛ osi manaa mɔ suwa ketee a, mmɔ́ ɔhaĩ odi kĩ ɛkpalɛ ɛba suwa, kĩ ɛmɔanɛ eto ode ɛyako nɛ bɔmɔ́ bikĩ bɔtsɛ̃ bɔanaa akũ. 14Kĩ boe flee bɔka bɔtɔ a, nnu ɔlɛdo odi nɛ Yudafɔ tide kamɛ evia kĩ, ‘Saulo, Saulo nde sũ otomɔ yĩ liti? Ntɛ ɔta fu sɛnɛta ni, nɔ mɔawɛ akũ opila.’
15“Ade ke nvia ye kĩ, ‘Boe Ɔlate, nɔ owei anɛ?’
“Ɔlɛdo a kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, ‘Yĩ nyɛ Yesu a kĩ ɔlamɛna ye kanɔ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ a. 16Finyaakĩĩ yidza kadza! Ĩnyɛ yĩ akũ ntsa nɔ kitonɛkĩ mawɛ kĩ nkɔa nɔ nkɛna yĩ tudzuma ɔkɛnanɛ. Aabi katinya kamɛ bati flee lɛtsa kĩ ɔmɔ́ nɛ awĩ, mɔ fɔtsa a kĩ maanyɛ ntsa nɔ a. 17Ade kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ kĩ maado nɔ ni, maadza nɛ nɔ liti nɛ nɔ awɛ bati mɔ kade bɛbã bati lɛmɛ kamɛ. 18Ade aabinya be anɛ bɛnɛ nɛ Abonsam ɔtũ kɔbɛ̃ kamɛ bɛya nɛ ɔhaĩ mɔ Baguma kɔbɛ̃ kamɛ a. Baguma aakɔa be titikpa ete be lɔkɔa ɛkɛna be ndɛ bati kĩ ɛnyɛ ɛkpa ye akũ, nɛ kĩ bɛtɛ ye bido sũ.’
Paulo Lɛ Ye Tudzuma Kakɛna Fɔlɛtsa.
19“Foesũ, boe Ɔlate Agripa, ntátu kanyɛ katsa a kĩ mmɔ́ ntomɛna ode a atsɛlɛ. 20Ĩyi kayɔ mɔ kalɛ wĩ a kabi Damaskofɔ, Yerusalemfɔ, Yudafɔ mɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a kĩ bɛdani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ bɛya nɛ Baguma sɛkɛ̃, lɔkɔa bɛkaakɛna fɔtsa a kĩ foe aatsa kĩ bɛdani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ yededeede a. 21Ade fukĩĩ sũ Yudafɔ a yapi yĩ nɛ be Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ kĩ ndza nkalɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ, ade ke bɛwɛ kĩ bakɔ yĩ a. 22Lɛmɛ Baguma nyɛ yĩ nɛ be awɛ kamɛ. Foesũ mbuki ndzi nkpã ade nlamɛna fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kamɛ kanyɛ katsa mi banɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ bati flee a. Lɛtsa a kĩ de nlamɛna kalɛ nɛ awĩ a nyɛ fukĩ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ mɔ Mose lɛ biyi kĩ fɔ́aya nɛ foe kamɛ a. 23Ade foe nyɛ kĩ Kristo aayamɔ lubo. Ade ye aanya oti ɔtɔnyade kĩ yaayidza eto banɔkpa kamɛ, lɔkɔa ɛkɔa ɔsɛdza ɛma Yudafɔ mɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a flee a.”
24Deedimɔapɛ Festo bɔa fɔwɔla ɛlɛ kĩ, “Paulo, nɔ lɔlɔ kamɛ bu kade! Nɔ fɔtsa beblebee kakɔlɛ fɔ̃ nɔ lɔlɔ kamɛ bu kade!”
25Ade Paulo kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate Festo, yĩ lɔlɔ kamɛ tábu kade. Takɔa fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ ɔkɛna kagulo. Kalɛ wĩ paa nlamɛna kalɛ. 26Ɔnɔkɔali ni, Lɛgã Agripa nyina fɔlɛtsa kĩ malɛ a. Foesũ maapuli nlɛ kɔdzɛla mɔ ye faa. Matɛ kado paa kĩ bɛtákɛna fɔtsa kĩĩ nɛ kabɛla kamɛ. 27Nda Agripa, ɔtɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a odo? Ĩnyina kĩ ɔtɛ be odo.”
28Ade Agripa bi Paulo kĩ, “Ɔkɔna kĩ aapuli ɔdani yĩ nkɛna okristoni nɛ lɔkɔ lukũ kĩĩ kamɛ?”
29Ade ke Paulo kpaa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ lɔkɔ lukũ ĩye lɔkɔ gɛlɛɛlɛ malo ni, mabɔa mpaɛ nkpa Baguma kĩ, nviã kĩĩ mi a flee kĩ mideĩ nɛ awĩ a, midani mikɛna ndɛ ayekĩ nla. Lɛmɛ bɛtádo mi nkɔsɔnkɔsɔ ndɛ yĩ aye!”
30Ade lɛgã, abãã ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ Bernike mɔ bati a flee yidza a. 31Kĩ biyidza a, bɛnaa adzina ade bibi be akũ kĩ, “Oti kĩĩ tákɛna lɛtsa kpa lidima kĩ bakɔ ye ĩye bido ye nɛ kɔla.”
32Ade Agripa bi Festo kĩ, “Ntɛ obi kĩĩ ɛtalɛ kĩ ɛkɔa ye fɔlɛtsa yama Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃ ni, kufɛ bɔ́apuli bɔfɔnɛ ye awɛ.”

Title: ADZUMA 27
Content:
Bɛkpã Paulo Bɛnamɛna Roma.
1Kĩ bike otse kĩ bɔanaa Italia a, bɛkɔa Paulo mɔ kɔla bawanɛ bɛbã bido nɛ Romafɔ sodzafɔ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ kĩ bavɛ Yulio awɛ kamɛ. Ade ye adãmɛna sodzafɔ katsu a kĩ bavɛ Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃ Sodzafɔ Katsu akũ a. 2Ade ke budzi ɔkɔlɔ kĩ eto Adramitio yanaa tɔkɔlɔ fɔdzakɔ̃ nɛ Asia kamɛ a. Bɔmɔ Makedoniani kĩ bavɛ Aristarko lidzi nɛ ɔkɔlɔ a kamɛ. Eto Tesalonika.
3Kĩ kade nyina a, bɔnadza nɛ Sidon mpo abuĩ. Ade Yulio kpa Paulo osi kĩ ɛnaa ɔmatɔ kamɛ ɛnaamɔ ye bakɔba, lɔkɔa bɛkpa ye fɔtsa a kĩ yaakɔa ɛtsã osi a. 4Kĩ bɔbɔɛ nɛ awã a nɛ kĩ ɔwɛ kabɔa katsɛlamɔ boe a onukpɛ̃ deĩ ɔsi sũ ni, bɔtsã Kipro kayɔ sɛmakɛ bɔbɛla ɔwɛ a. 5Kĩ bɔtɛ̃ awã a, bɔtsã Kilikia mɔ Pamfilia mpo abuĩ, ade bɔnadza nɛ Mira nɛ Likia a. 6Awĩ a sodzafɔ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a kĩ yakpã boe a mɔ́ ɔkɔlɔ odi kĩ eto Aleksandria yanaa Italia tite akũ, ade ke ɛkɔa boe flee edo nɛ ye kamɛ a.
7Osi a katsã kamɛ na boe ɔsĩ nɛ fuwi pii kamɛ fɔmɔ bupuli buwo Knido ɔmatɔ a kamɛ. Kĩ ɔwɛ mɔ ɔsĩ kabɔa sũ ni, bɔtápuli bɔtɛ̃ bɔnaa kpĩĩ. Foesũ kĩ buwo Salmone a, bɔblɛ bɔtsã Kreta ɔmatɔ a ɔlɔtɔ, awã kĩ tite a sua ɔwɛ a kɔbɛ̃ onukpɛ̃. 8Ɔsĩ kamɛ bɔkɔa bɔtsã mpo abuĩ a bɔnawo kakɔ a kĩ bavɛ Tɔkɔlɔ Kadzakɔ̃ Wĩ a. Awã mɔ Lasea kayite lɛlá lugo. 9Bubula fuwi kade, ade kĩ mui akũ katsã lɛmɛ na ɔsĩ sũ ni, Onukpɛ̃ Kasui Lɔkɔ a tɛ̃. Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ Paulo kpa be kakɔna ɛlɛ kĩ, 10“Nda amɛ, mmɔ́ ĩyi ɔsũ kĩ boe mui anɛ osi katsã aawo nɛ mbɛtahu kamɛ, kĩ fɔtsa pii mɔ bati malo aawɔ.” 11Lɛmɛ kawũ banɔnɛ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ kĩĩ tɛ ɔkɔlɔ ɔtanɛ mɔ ye ɔlate a kakɔna ɛba lɛtsa kĩ Paulo lɛ a. 12Nɛ kĩ tɔkɔlɔ kadzakɔ̃ a lɛnɛ́nɛ kadzi gɛlɛɛlɛ nɛ osili lɔkɔ sũ ni, osi batsãnɛ a wɛ kĩ bɛdzakũ ɔsa baawo Foenike. Baapuli bidzi nɛ awã nɛ osili lɔkɔ, kitonɛkĩ Foenike nyɛ ɔmatɔ nɛ Kreta tite akũ. Edeĩ tɔkɔlɔ fɔdzakɔ̃ kĩ futsua ɔwɛ onukpɛ̃ nɛ suwa katomukɔ̃ a.
Ɔwɛ Mɔ Ɔsĩ Vũ Nɛ Mpo Akũ.
13Kĩ ɔwɛ bɔɛɛ do kabɔa kademɛna awɛ a, fɔkɛna ndɛ fɔ́alɛ fɔkpa osi a akũ kanaa. Foesũ bɛmanɛ akũ ade bɛtsã Kreta mpo abuĩ a. 14Lɛmɛ owi tábuna mɔ ɔwɛ mɔ ɔsĩ odi vũ eto Kreta sɛba sɛmakɛ. 15Ɛvũ ɛtsɛlamɔ ɔkɔlɔ a lɔtɔ foesũ bɛtápuli bɛdani ɔkɔlɔ a anɛ bɛtsɛlamɔ mpo abuĩ. Nɛ foesũ bɛfɔnɛ ɔkɔlɔ a awɛ ade ɔwɛ a bɔa ye ɛkanamɛna a. 16Ke liti kɔlaa, bɔyana kablakɔ̃ kadi nɛ Kauda tite kĩ mui tsua bisinya te liti. Kɔbɛ̃ kamɛ fɔmɔ bupuli busuli boe ɔkɔlɔ kabii a budo nɛ ɔkpale a kĩ ye kamɛ bɔna a kamɛ. 17Kĩ bɛmanɛ ye biyua a, bɔkɔa tɔwɛ̃ bisuli bɔtɛ̃mɛna bupimɔ ɔkɔlɔ kpale a kitonɛkĩ bivila kĩ ɔwɛ aabɔa ye ɛnaabãã nɛ dã kamɛ nɛ Libia mpo abuĩ. Foesũ bɛkɛna tilima nɛ ɔkɔlɔ titse a akũ. Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ ɔwɛ a kabɔa ye kanamɛna bɔɛɛ. 18Kade nyina, lɛmɛ kĩ ɔwɛ a táfɔ̃ kavũ sũ ni, bido fɔtsa a kĩ ɔkɔlɔ a nɔnɛ a kanyɛ kawula nɛ mui kamɛ awɛ. 19Ade nɛ luwi lɛlalɛde a, bɛyatalɛ ɔkɔlɔ a akũ fɔtsa pii lɛmɛ biwula. 20Ɔwɛ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩĩ vũ fuwi beblebee kĩ bɛtámɔ suwa ĩye fusibii malo. Ade bɔtátɛ budo kĩ bɔ́ana nkpã a.
21Kĩ bidzi fuwi beblebee kĩ bɛtánya sũ ni, Paulo yidza ɛdza nɛ be anɛ kamɛ, ade ebi be kĩ, “Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ntɛ mitse yĩ kalɛ ni, kufɛ bɔtábɔɛ nɛ Kreta, kufɛ fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ flee taya nɛ boe akũ, bɔyɛla boe akũ fɔtsa. 22Finyaakĩĩ, make mi aduli kĩ mina ɔwɔlɛ. Ade mabi mi yededeede kĩ ɔkɔlɔ kĩĩ aayɛla lɛmɛ mi kamɛ odima lɛláaku. 23Kitonɛkĩ kadzɔ lɛnyɛ ni, Baguma a kĩ ye ode manɛ, mɔ ekĩ masum a, ye ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ yadza nɛ yĩ ɔwɛ̃. 24Ade ke ebi yĩ kĩ, ‘Paulo, tavila. Kɛnɛ kĩ akɔa nɔ kalɛ oyi nɛ Kaisare anɛ kamɛ! Nɛ Baguma kɔnyakamɔ sũ ni, nɔ mɔ bikĩ bɛtsɛ̃ osi a flee kamɛ odima lɛláaku.’ 25Foesũ, nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mina ɔwɔlɛ! Ntɛ Baguma ndo kĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa aaya nɛ foe kamɛ ndɛ ayekĩ ɛlɛ eyi a. 26Lɛmɛ ɔwɛ aabɔa boe ɛnamɛna tite tidi kĩ mui tsua bisinya te a akũ.”
27Ade ke ɔwɛ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩĩ kabɔa boe kanamɛna lɔtɔ mɔ liti fuwi ewuana flee nɛ Adria mpo akũ a. Luwi luwuanade lɛnyɛ a, boe ɔkɔlɔ kamɛ adzuma bakɛnanɛ a kɔna kĩ bifuã tite tidi. 28Awã na bɛkɔna mui a kadzũ bɛdã, ade bɛmɔ́ kĩ foe kadzũ aana ndɛ fɔnɛta ɔha mɔ foe tɛya. Ade kĩ bɛnaa lɔtɔ sukuloo a, bibuki bɛkɔna ade bɛmɔ́ kĩ mui a a kadzũ nyɛ fɔnɛta aduekrɔũ a. 29Nɛ kĩ bivila kĩ ɔwɛ a aabɔa ɔkɔlɔ a ɛnaasãmɔ boe kpale kpale sũ ni, bɛkɔa fɔbɔtsaɛ mɔ ɔlɔmɛ ɛna kĩ bido ɔwɛ̃ bipimɔ ɔkɔlɔ a nɛ liti bido nɛ mui a kamɛ. Fɔbɔtsaɛ a nabãã nɛ mui ɔda fɔfɔ̃ ɔkɔlɔ a dza. Ade ke bɛkadã anɛ kĩ kade wĩ kinyina a. 30Kĩ ɔkɔlɔ a kamɛ adzuma bakɛnanɛ wɛ kĩ balo sũ ni, bɛkɛna ɔkɔlɔ kabii a, nɛ tɛdake kamɛ kĩ banaakɛna fɔbɔtsaɛ mɔ ɔlɔmɛ a nɛ ɔkɔlɔ kpale a lɔtɔ. 31Lɛmɛ Paulo bi sodzafɔ a mɔ be lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a kĩ, “Ntɛ bati kĩĩ flee tána nɛ ɔkɔlɔ kĩĩ kamɛ kɔ̃ ni, míaku.” 32Foesũ sodzafɔ a tsua ɔwɛ̃ a kĩ epini ɔkɔlɔ kabii a, ade ɛka ewo nɛ mui a kamɛ a.
33Odenyinawi a, Paulo ke be flee aduli kĩ bɛnya. Ebi be kĩ, “Ade nviã nyɛ fuwi ewuana kĩ mi kamɛ odima táta lɛtsama onukpɛ̃ a. 34Nɛ foesũ, make mi aduli, minya litsedi lɔkɔa mina kɔbɛ̃ ayekĩ miláaku. Kitonɛkĩ odima sɔlɔ mɔapɛ malo lɛláakamu.” 35Ade ke Paulo bɔɛ abodoo adi, ade kĩ ɛbɔa mpaɛ ɛkpa Baguma nɛ be flee anɛ a, ebuli adi ɛba. 36Ade ke ɔwɔlɛ ka edzi odi nyɛ odi bido kanya awɛ a. 37Bati a kĩ bɛna nɛ ɔkɔlɔ a kamɛ lidede nyɛ ɔha nviã mɔ be aduesɔũ-evũ (276). 38Kĩ bati a nya biwĩ a, bɛnyɛ funitsã mɔ fuvũ a flee nɛ ɔkɔlɔ a kamɛ biko nɛ mui kamɛ ade ɔkɔlɔ a nɛ́ ɔlɔmɛ a.
Ɔkɔlɔ a Yɛlɛ.
39Kĩ fɔkɔ kpalɛ a, ɔkɔlɔ batanɛ a támɔ awã mpo abuĩ a biyi ɔsũ. Lɛmɛ bɛmɔ́ kadzakɔ̃ kadi kĩ bɛkɔna kĩ awã aalɛ bɛdza. Foesũ bɛwɛ kĩ ntɛ fɔ́alɛ ni bata ɔkɔlɔ a bɛnamɛna awã. 40Foesũ bikpeli fɔbɔtsaɛ mɔ ɔlɔmɛ kĩ fupini ɔkɔlɔ a tɔwɛ̃ bido nɛ mui kamɛ, ade biwũnya otse a kĩ ye atsa ɔkɔlɔ a osi a. Ke liti bɛdzɛla ɔkɔlɔ a tilima ayekĩ ɔwɛ aabɔa ye ɛnamɛna. 41Kĩ bɛyɛlɛ banaa a, ɔkɔlɔ a nabãã nɛ dã kamɛ ade ye anɛ sɛmakɛ tábuki epuli ekuna akũ a. Ɔwɛ mɔ ɔsĩ a lɛmɛ yabo ye nɛ liti sɛmakɛ a ɛyɛlɛ ye fɔkɛ fɔkɛ.
42Sodzafɔ a ke otse kĩ bakɔ kɔla bawanɛ a flee ayekĩ bɛláato mui bilo. 43Lɛmɛ be lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ wɛ kĩ yatɛ Paulo nkpã, foesũ ɛtátunɔ bɛkɛna nɛ be kawɛ akũ. Ade ɛkpa kɔbɛ̃ kĩ ntɛ bikĩ baapuli bito mui ni, bɛnya lɔtɔ bɛvɛnya biwo bito mui bɛnaa mpo abuĩ. 44Bati a kĩ bite a lɛmɛ bɛbɔɛ titse fɔkɛ mɔ fɔtsa bɛbã kĩ fɔ́apuli fɔtsãmɔ be nɛ mui anɛ lɔkɔa biwo ɔwɔ abuĩ. Ade aye bɔkɛna buwo ɔwɔ abuĩ sɔũ a.

Title: ADZUMA 28
Content:
Paulo Kɛna Awãwã Fɔtsa Nɛ Malta.
1Ade kĩ bɔnɛ nɛ mbɛtahu kamɛ a, bɔyamɔ kĩ tite a kĩ mui tsua bisinya te a bavɛ Malta. 2Bati nɛ tite kĩĩ akũ a tɛ boe mɔ kawɔlɛ paa a. Nɛ kĩ oni kako osili lɛmɛ na sũ ni, bɛkpɔta fi kpale nɛ mpo abuĩ a bɛkpa boe. 3Kĩ Paulo fila tuvotsei kĩ yako nɛ fi kamɛ a, nɛ fi a ɔwɛ ɔbɔ̃ sũ kɔɛ kudi nɛ nɛ avo a kamɛ kɔyadɔ̃ ye kɔvanɛ nɛ ye kɔkpɔ. 4Kĩ awã bati a mɔ kɔɛ a kĩ kɔvanɛ nɛ ye kɔkpɔ a, bibi akũ kĩ, “Owudini oti kĩĩ anɛ. Ade foesũ boe baviɔ̃ lɛláafɔ̃ edzi nkpã a, titɔ kĩ elo nɛ wuda awɛ kamɛ nɛ mpo kamɛ malo.” 5Ade Paulo wunya kɔɛ a edo nɛ fi a kamɛ a, lɛmɛ lɛtsama tákɛna ye. 6Ade bati a dza bɛkadã anɛ kĩ yaawumi ĩye yaaka ɛtɔ deedimɔapɛ eku. Owi buna kĩ bɛdza bɛkadã, ade kĩ lɛtsama tákɛna ye a, bɛdani be adzuni nɛ ye akũ, ade bɛlɛ kĩ, baguma adi yanɛ.
7Awã kĩ bɔnadza a, fuãmɔ Publio kĩ ɛnyɛ tite a lɛgã. Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ kĩĩ lɛmɛ tɛ boe mɔ kawɔlɛ ade ɛdã boe akũ fuwi ɛlalɛ flee a. 8Nɛ fuwi kĩĩ kamɛ ni, Publio ɔlɛga kasɔ atilili, ade ɛkayo kɔbɔa mɔatsɛ mɔatsɛ a. Paulo naa ye sɛkɛ̃, ɛnabɔa mpaɛ ete awɛ nɛ ye akũ, ade ɛsaɛ a. 9Kĩ binu fɔsɔ katsa kĩĩ a, basɔnɛ nɛ tite akũ flee nɛ bɛya, ade Paulo tsa be a. 10Nɛ lɛkɛnana kĩĩ sũ bɛkpa boe fɔtsa pii. Ade kĩ boe kadzakũ wo ɔtɔ a, bɛma boe fɔtsa a kĩ bɔ́akɔa bɔtsã osi.
Bɛtɛ̃ Malta Bɛnaa Roma.
11Bɔtɛ tidetɔ ɛlalɛ nɛ awã fɔmɔ bɔdzakũ. Kĩ bɔadzakũ a budzi ɔkɔlɔ kĩ bavɛ Nta Baviɔ̃ kĩ eto Aleksandria ɛyadza nɛ kasekɔ̃ a nɛ osili lɔkɔ. 12Kĩ bɔbɔɛ buto awã a, bɔnaa Sirakuse ɔmatɔ a, ade bɔna nɛ awã fuwi ɛlalɛ a. 13Ade ke luwi lɛyade buto awã bunyina bɔnaa Regio a. Ɔwɛ wĩ odi bɔa boe nɛ liti, ade bɔyawo Puteoli a. 14Awã naa, bɔmɔ́ batɛ badonɛ badi, ade bike boe aduli kĩ budzi nɛ be sɛkɛ̃ ɛkwansieda mɔa. Nɛ ke liti a, buto awã bɔnaa Roma. 15Kĩ boe bawaɛ̃ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Roma nu kĩ bɔaya a, bɛyatsɛlamɔ boe nɛ awã kĩ bavɛ Apia Kɔyaatɔ a. Badi lɛmɛ yatsɛlamɔ boe nɛ Fusekɔ̃ Ɛlalɛ a. Kĩ Paulo mɔ́ be a, ɛnyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ ade ke ebuki ɛna ɔwɔlɛ kado a.
Paulo Wo Roma.
16Kĩ buwo Roma a, bɛkpa Paulo osi kĩ edzi ye akũ akũ nɛ awã kĩ ɛwɛ a, lɛmɛ bɛfɔ̃ sodzafɔ a kamɛ ɔmɔa kadãmɛna ye akũ.
17Fuwi ɛlalɛ liti a, Paulo vɛ Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ awã a ɛkpɔta. Kĩ bɛtsɛna a, ebi be kĩ, “Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, bipi yĩ nɛ Yerusalem bɛkɔa bɛma Roma abãã kĩ ɛdzɛmɔ yĩ, titɔ kĩ ntáfum odima, ĩye nfum boe bawanyɔ amaniɛ adima malo. 18Romafɔ a dzɛmɔ yĩ, ade ke bɛwɛ kĩ bafɔnɛ yĩ awɛ kufɛ a, kitonɛkĩ bɛtámɔ lɛtsa a kĩ de akũ baadza bɛkɔ yĩ wuda kɔtɔ. 19Kĩ Yudafɔ a tátunɔ nɛ foe akũ sũ ni, fɔyasĩ kĩ nkɔa yĩ kalɛ mma Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃ Kaisare, titɔ kĩ ntábɔɛ fɔlɛtsa nɛ yĩ kade bati akũ malo. 20Ade fukĩĩ sũ nvɛ mi a, kitonɛkĩ Oti a kĩ Bɛbɔa Tɔdɔ̃ a, kĩ ye akũ Yudafɔ ate anɛ a, ade ye ntɛ ndo sũ nkɔsɔnkɔsɔ kĩĩ pini yĩ a.”
21Ade bibi ye kĩ, “Boe kɔ̃ bɔtánu kadima butomɛna nɔ akũ. Ade bɔtátɛ ovoli ĩye ɔlɛdo kpa odima nɛ nɔ akũ butomɛna bikĩ bito Yudea bɛya nɛ awĩ a sɛkɛ̃ a. 22Lɛmɛ bɔawɛ kĩ bɔatse litsedi butomɛna lɛtsa a kĩ de ɔtɛ odo a akũ. Kitonɛkĩ baálɛ kalɛ wĩ kadima nɛ katɛkado katsu a kĩ ke kamɛ odeĩ a akũ nɛ kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ.”
23Biyi luwi ade ke bati pii yatsɛna nɛ Paulo awã a. Awã naa, ebi be fɔlɛtsa nɛ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a akũ. Ade ɛtsa be fɔtsa nɛ Yesu akũ etomɛna Mose mɔ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a tuvoli kamɛ a. Ɛlɛ kɔdzɛla kito ɔnɔnɛ kɛnawo olobe. 24Be kamɛ badi tɛ fɔlɛtsa a bido, badi lɛmɛ tátɛ bido. 25Fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ dani kavɛlɛ nɛ be kamɛ, ade bɛsɛ̃ be akũ a. Paulo bi be kĩ, “Hũhũ Kpalɛwa lɛ ɔnɔkɔali ɛtsã Yesaya akũ ebi boe bawanyɔ kĩ,
26‘Naa kanaabi Yudafɔ a kĩ,
“Míanu yĩ fɔlɛtsa lɛmɛ miláanu foe kayɔ,
míako anɛ midã lɛmɛ miláamɔ foe miyi ɔsũ.”
27Kitonɛkĩ bati kĩĩ tɔwɔlɛ deĩ ɔsĩ,
ade be atɔ sĩ a,
ade bisua anɛ lɛmɛ a.
Ntɛ nnɛ́ aye ni, kufɛ be anɛ aamɔ
ade be atɔ aanu, be adzuni kamɛ lɛmɛ aakpalɛ,
ade baadani bɛya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ lɔkɔa ntsa be fɔsɔ.’ ”
28-29Paulo wũna kɔdzɛla kalɛ mɔ be kĩ, “Kɛnɛ kĩ minyi kĩ, bɛkɔa Baguma bati nkpã katɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a bɛma bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a lɛmɛ. Be ni, baatɛ foe!”
30Paulo dzi nɛ awã futeli nviã nɛ kɔla kĩ ɛwã a kamɛ. Ade awã ɛkatɛ bati a flee kĩ bɛkaya nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ a. 31Ɛkalɛ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ akũ fɔlɛtsa mɔ ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kɔbɛ̃ flee kakpa be, ɛtsa be fɔtsa etomɛna boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo akũ, ade odima tásua ye osi a.

Title: ROMAFƆ 1
Content:
1Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ, Paulo, Yesu Kristo ɔsumunɛ sɛkɛ̃. Baguma lɛpau yĩ, ɛvɛ yĩ kĩ ĩyadani ye fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ, nde lɛtsã nɛ ye Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ. 2Baguma lɛ Kalɛ Wĩ kĩĩ eyi anɛ kɔkɔɛ ɛtsãmɛna ye onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ akũ, ndɛ ayekĩ bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ a. 3Bɛlɛ Kalɛ Wĩ kĩĩ nɛ Obi, boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo akũ. Bɛma ye ndɛ otidziwa aye nɛ Lɛgã Dawid kasinu a kamɛ. 4Nɛ kakpalɛ nɛ hũhũ kamɛ ni, Baguma nyɛ ye ɛtsa mɔ kɔbɛ̃ ndɛ ye obi, lɔkɔ a kĩ ɛdzɛla ye etomɛna wuda kamɛ a. 5Baguma tsã Yesu Kristo akũ ɛmɔ́ boe kɔnya bɔyadani fɔtɔ banyanɛ, ayekĩ fɔ́atsã ye dĩ akũ, bɔ́akpã fude fude bati flee bɛtɛ ye bido, bitse ye. 6Mi Romafɔ lɛmɛ, mideĩ nɛ bati a kĩ Baguma vɛ kĩ bɛyaakɛna Yesu Kristo bade a kamɛ.
7Ade foesũ ntsɛlɛ ovoli kĩĩ mama mi flee a kĩ mideĩ nɛ Roma, kĩ Baguma awɛ mi kalɛ, ade ɛvɛ mi kĩ miyaakɛna bati kĩ ɛkpalɛ be akũ a.
Baguma boe Ɔlɛga mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo, bɛmɔ mi kɔnya, bɛkpa mi lukudɔ lɛmɛ!
Paulo Nyɛ Baguma Kɔlɛ.
8Lɛtsa a kĩ lɛnyaa lɔtɔ nyɛ kĩ, nkɔa Yesu Kristo manyɛ yĩ Baguma kɔlɛ nɛ mi flee lɔlɔ, kitonɛkĩ balɛ ayekĩ mitɛ Kristo mido a fɔlɛtsa nɛ katinya kamɛ flee. 9Baguma a kĩ masum mɔ yĩ ɔwɔlɛ flee, nɛ lɛtsã a kĩ made nɛ ye Obi Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ a, nyɛ yĩ adansiɛ kĩ lɛtsa a kĩ malɛ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali. Baguma nyina kĩ mate anɛ nɛ mi akũ, 10lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ kĩ mabɔa mpaɛ. Mawã Baguma kĩ ntɛ fɔnyɛ ye kawɛ ni, ɛkpa yĩ osi ĩyaasɛla mi finyaa.
11Kitonɛkĩ mawɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ bɔmɔ akũ, lɔkɔa nkɔa hũhũ kamɛ futetsa fudi mma mi nkɔa ndo mi kɔbɛ̃. 12Lɛtsa a kĩ matsa nyɛ kĩ bɔmɔ mi bɔ́ado akũ kɔbɛ̃. Yĩ katɛkado ado mi kɔbɛ̃, ade mi kade lɛmɛ aado yĩ kɔbɛ̃ a.
13Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mawɛ kĩ minyi kĩ nkɛna nhihiɛ lɔkɔ pii kĩ mayaasɛla mi kufɛ, lɛmɛ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ litsedi asua yĩ osi. Mawɛ kĩ mana bati kĩ bɛtɛ Kristo bido nɛ mi kamɛ, ndɛ ayekĩ nna nɛ bati bɛbã a kĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a kamɛ a. 14Kitonɛkĩ yĩ adzuma fɔanɛ kĩ nde lɛtsã nkpa bati flee, bikĩ binyina kadi mɔ bikĩ binyína kadi, bati kĩ binyina tuvoli mɔ bikĩ binyína tuvoli. 15Ade foesũ akũ asĩ yĩ kĩ made lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ nkpa mi a kĩ mideĩ nɛ Roma lɛmɛ a.
Kalɛ Wĩ a Deĩ Kɔbɛ̃.
16Kalɛ Wĩ a lákɔ yĩ kɔnyɔã, kitonɛkĩ Baguma kɔbɛ̃ kɔanɛ. Kakpa bati a kĩ bɛtɛ ke bido a nkpã, Yudafɔ nyaa lɔtɔ fɔmɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a. 17Kitonɛkĩ Kalɛ Wĩ a kamɛ banyɛ ayekĩ Baguma abu bati kĩ bɛkpɔla a katsa. Fɔnyɛ katɛkado fɔlɛtsa kĩto kayɔkayi kɛnawo kawũna. Ndɛ ayekĩ bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ kĩ, “Oti kĩ Baguma abu kĩ yadã kpĩĩ nɛ ye katɛkado sũ ni, yaana nkpã.”
Odima Lɛnyɛ́ Oti Kpĩĩ Nɛ Baguma Anɛ.
18Baguma anyɛ ye kalɔkpa katomɛna ode kako nɛ bati a kĩ bakɔa tɔkpa mɔ ablɔ fɔtsa kasua ɔnɔkɔali a kanyi osi a akũ. 19Baguma avɛlɛ bati a sɔtɔ kitonɛkĩ binyina fɔtsa a kĩ otidziwa aapuli enyi nɛ ye akũ a. Baguma mɔawɛ a lɛnyɛ foe ɛtsa be yededeede. 20Kito anɛ kĩ Baguma bɔa katinya a, ye kutitse kĩ baámɔ mɔ anɛ a, mɔ kɔbɛ̃ kĩ kudeĩ daa mɔ ye Baguma kutidu a, anyɛ foe akũ katsa nɛ fɔtsa a kĩ ɛbɔa a kamɛ. Foesũ bati a lɛláapuli bɛnyɛ onukpɛ̃ kĩ binyína Baguma.
21Titɔ kĩ binyina Baguma malo ni, baákpa ye obu a kĩ ɛfɛta ye, ade baányɛ ye kɔlɛ a. Mbom fɔtsa a kĩ fɔlá nfasɔ akũ bakɔna, ade be adzuni kamɛ ke ɔtũ a. 22Babu be akũ kĩ binyina kadi, lɛmɛ bɛdani badzimbifɔ. 23Nɛ kĩ bɛkɔa obu bɛkpa Baguma a kĩ edzi nkpã daa a ni, basum fɔtsa a kĩ bɛmɛ mɔ awɛ kutidu, kĩ fɔla ndɛ oti kĩ yaku, ĩye kɔvɔlabi, ĩye bayaɛ, ĩye bayaɛ kĩ baboli nɛ sɛmɛ akũ.
24Nɛ foesũ Baguma fɔnɛ be awɛ kĩ bɛkɛna efĩĩ fɔtsa kĩ be tɔwɔlɛ awɛ a, kĩ bɛkɔa be sukɛna bakɛna fɔnyɔãtsa mɔ be akũ akũ. 25Bakɔa Baguma akũ ɔnɔkɔali a kavɛmɛna mɔ fɔvã. Basum fɔtsa a kĩ Baguma bɔa a kaba Baguma mɔawɛ a kĩ ɛbɔa foe a, kĩ kɛfɛta kĩ bɛkaamu daa a! Fɔya lɔmɔ.
26Nɛ fukĩ bakɛna a sũ, Baguma fɔnɛ be awɛ ɛkpa sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kĩ fɔado akũ kɔnyɔã kakɛna. Be batsole dani bawamɔ bakɔba batsole. 27Ade ayea banyole lɛmɛ fɔ̃ bɛmɔ batsole kawa ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma kɛna eyi a, mbom bakɔba banyole akɔ be odo. Foesũ banyole awamɔ akũ kĩ kɔnyɔã lɛláa foe kamɛ. Nɛ ɔbla kpa kĩ bɛbɔa kĩĩ sũ ni, Baguma vɛlɛ be sɔtɔ a kĩ sɛfɛta be a, nɛ be mɔawɛ kamɛ.
28Ayekĩ bati a sĩ kĩ baátɛ kadikanyi wĩ nɛ Baguma akũ a bido nɛ be kamɛ sũ ni, Baguma fɔnɛ be awɛ ɛkpa be adzuni kĩ bibula kade a, kĩ bɛkɛna fɔtsa a kĩ fɔtáfɛta a. 29Be kamɛ yi mɔ tɔkpa tidi nyɛ tidi kakɛna, ablɔ, anɛngbã mɔ bati tɔkpa kawɛ. Fɔbɛbã kĩ fudeĩ nɛ be kamɛ nyɛ lineke kanɔ, awudi, lɛma kavũ, bati kakɛ mɔ likesĩ. Fukĩ fubu nyɛ kĩ balɛ bati akũ kɔdzɛla, 30bɛnyɛ bati buĩ banyɛnɛ, mɔ Baguma bakesĩnɛ. Bɛnyɛ bati bavũnanɛ, akũ batanɛ, akũ bapianɛ, bawɛ tɔkpa tisi bɛbã pii kayamɛna mɔ bati kĩ baábu be bamanɛ a. 31Bɛnyɛ bati kĩ be tɔwɔlɛ lákɔ be kɔtɔ, baákɛna nɛ bɔhɛ a akũ a, bɛlá sɛmɛ kalɛ ade baámɔ oti kɔnya a. 32Titɔ kĩ binyina pefee kĩ nɛ Baguma mbla a onukpɛ̃ ni, bikĩ bidzi nkpã nɛ osi kĩĩ odu akũ a fɛta bɛkpa wuda malo ni, bɛkakɛna foe. Nnɛ́ foe odi bakɛna, mbom bɛdza nɛ bikĩ bakɛna fɔtsa kpa kĩĩ odu a liti.

Title: ROMAFƆ 2
Content:
Baguma Adzɛmɔ Bati Flee.
1Nwaɛ̃, nɔ akɔ bati bɛbã kɔtɔ? Ntɛ litsa oti anɛ malo ɔláapuli ɔnyɛ onukpɛ̃ kĩ nɔ kɔ̃ oti kpĩĩ anɛ. Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ adzɛmɔ bati bɛbã adeke akɛna lɛtsa mɔapɛ a kĩ de bakɛna a ni, nɔ mɔawɛ akũ akɔ kɔtɔ. 2Bunyina kĩ Baguma deĩ ɔtɔbɛ ntɛ ɛdzɛmɔ bati a kĩ bakɛna fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ a. 3Lɛmɛ nwaɛ̃, nɔ a kĩ akɛna fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ a lɛmɛ akɔ bati bɛbã kɔtɔ nɛ foe akũ a ni, abu kĩ aapuli olo Baguma kɔtɔkakɔ? 4Mbɔɛɛ ɔbɔɛ foe kĩ Baguma deĩ sɛmɛ kalɛ, ɔwɔlɛ kado mɔ ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ sũ ɔtsɛ́la lɛtsama? Onyina kĩ nuwĩ Baguma deĩ sɛmɛ kalɛ, kitonɛkĩ yawɛ kĩ yakpã nɔ ɔdani ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ.
5Lɛmɛ nɛ nɔ atɔ ɔsĩ kĩ aádani ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ sũ ni, ɔfɔ̃ nɔ sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ aana ɔsɛ̃ nɛ luwi a kĩ Baguma aanyɛ ye kalɔkpa mɔ ye fɔlɛtsa kadzɛ kpĩĩ akũ a kanya. 6Kitonɛkĩ Baguma aase odi nyɛ odi kɔtɔ nɛ ye adzuma a kĩ ɛkɛna a onukpɛ̃. 7Bati a kĩ bakɛna tuwĩ kĩ bawɛ kukũkpalɛ, obu mɔ daa nkpã a, Baguma aakpa be nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a. 8Lɛmɛ bati bɛbã a kĩ be odi fude bawɛ, kĩ bisĩ ɔnɔkɔali a, bitomɔ tɔkpa a, Baguma aakɔa kalɔkpa ɛvɛlɛ be sɔtɔ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ. 9Bati flee a kĩ bakɛna tɔkpa a, aamɔ lubo mɔ kalɔɛ, Yudafɔ aanya lɔtɔ, ke liti bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a lɛmɛ. 10Lɛmɛ Baguma aakpa bikĩ bakɛna tuwĩ a kukũkpalɛ, obu mɔ lukudɔ, Yudafɔ aanya lɔtɔ bɛna, fɔmɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a lɛmɛ. 11Kitonɛkĩ Baguma ládã oti anɛ nɛ ye fɔlɛtsa kadzɛ kamɛ.
12Bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a tána Mose mbla a, lɛmɛ kĩ bɛkɛna titikpa ni, Baguma aavɛlɛ be sɔtɔ, kĩ ɛláakɔa mbla a bɛdzɛmɔ be. Yudafɔ a na Mose mbla a, lɛmɛ bɛkɛna titikpa, Baguma aakɔa mbla a ɛdzɛ mɔ be. 13Kitonɛkĩ nnɛ́ bati a kĩ batse mbla a nyɛ bati kpĩĩ nɛ Baguma anɛ, mbom bati a kĩ bɛkɛna nɛ mbla akũ a, adã kpĩĩ. 14Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a tána mbla a, lɛmɛ ntɛ oti kabɔa kamɛ fɔ̃ bɛkɛna lɛtsa a kĩ Mose mbla tsa ni, fɔatsa kĩ bɛkɛna mbla bɛkpa be akũ, titɔ kĩ bɛlá Mose mbla a malo. 15Be fɔkɛlatsa atsa kĩ Baguma tsɛlɛ mbla a nɛ be tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ. Be tɔwɔlɛ lɛmɛ atsa kĩ fɔnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali, kitonɛkĩ fɔkɔ fudi be tɔwɔlɛ akɔ be kɔtɔ ade yadza nɛ be liti a. 16Nɛ foesũ nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a kĩ malɛ a onukpɛ̃ ni, ade aye fɔ́ana nɛ Luwi a akũ kĩ Baguma aatsã Yesu Kristo akũ ɛdzɛmɔ bati flee fɔlɔ kamɛ fɔlɛtsa kɔlawa a.
Lɛtsa a Kĩ Mose Mbla a Lɛ Nɛ Yudafɔ Akũ.
17Avɛ nɔ akũ kĩ Yudani, akɔa anɛ kate nɛ mbla akũ, ade apia nɛ Baguma akũ a. 18Onyina lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma awɛ kĩ kɛna, ade ɔkɔlɛ otomɛna mbla a kamɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛnyɛ fɔtsa wĩ a. 19Atɛ kado kĩ ɔnyɛ banɛkunɛ ɔkpãnɛ, ɔnyɛ ɔhaĩ ɔkpa bikĩ bideĩ nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ a. 20Ɔkɔa nɔ akũ ɔkɛna bakɔasia ɔvɛlɛnɛ mɔ bikĩ bɛtábo anɛ tɔ̃ fɔtsa ɔtsanɛ. Onyina yededeede lɛmɛ kĩ kadikanyi mɔ ɔnɔkɔali deĩ nɛ mbla a kamɛ. 21Nɔ a kĩ atsa bati bɛbã fɔtsa a, nde sũ aátsa nɔ mɔawɛ akũ? Ade lɛtsã kĩ bati bɛtaye, lɛmɛ nɔ mɔawɛ a aáye? 22Abi bati kĩ bɛtabɔa adɔpaa, lɛmɛ nɔ mɔawɛ a aábɔa adɔpaa? Aáwɛ baviɔ̃ fɔlɛtsa, lɛmɛ aáye kuviɔ̃la kamɛ fɔtsa? 23Abo ɔwɔlɛ nɛ Baguma mbla a akũ, lɛmɛ afum ye mbla a kakɔado Baguma kɔnyɔã. 24Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Mi Yudafɔ ɔbla kpa sũ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a alɛ fɔlɛtsa kpa nɛ Baguma dĩ akũ.”
25Ntɛ akɛna nɛ mbla a akũ ni, kekɔ̃ nɔ lɛkpati katsua a akũ deĩ nfasɔ, lɛmɛ ntɛ aákɛna nɛ mbla a akũ kɔ̃ ni, oketimɔ bikĩ bɛtátsua fɔkpati a. 26Ntɛ oti kĩ ɛnyɛ́ Yudani, kĩ ɛtátsua lɛkpati akɛna nɛ mbla a akũ ni, Baguma lɛláabu ye ndɛ oti kĩ etsua lɛkpati aye?
27Foesũ, mi Yudafɔ, oti kĩ ɛnyɛ́ Yudani a kĩ ɛkɛna nɛ mbla a akũ aakɔ mi kɔtɔ, kitonɛkĩ miafum mbla a, titɔ kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ ye biyi bɛkpa mi, ade miatsua lɛkpati a. 28Nnɛ́ oti kĩ bɛma Yudani ĩye oti kĩ bitsua lɛkpati nɛ Mose mbla a onukpɛ̃ nyɛ Yudani. Ade lɛkpati katsua paa ni, fɔdzɛ́ fɔkpa sukɛna katsua lɛkɛnana kĩ bamɔ nɛ oti akũ a, 29mbom Yudani kpanunuunu nyɛ oti kĩ ɛnyɛ Yudani nɛ ye kamɛkamɛ, ade foe nyɛ kĩ bitsua ye ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ lɛkpati. Lɛkpati katsua kĩĩ nyɛ Baguma Hũhũ adzuma, fɔtáto mbla a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ biyi a kamɛ. Baguma amu oti kĩĩ odu, nnɛ́ batidziwa.

Title: ROMAFƆ 3
Content:
1Litsa koũ Yudani deĩ ɛbɛ̃ oti kĩ ɛnyɛ́ Yudani, ĩye litsa nfasɔ deĩ nɛ lɛkpati katsua kamɛ? 2Ɔnɔkɔali nfasɔ a pɔnɛ nɛ tisi pii akũ. Katɔnyade nyɛ kĩ Yudafɔ awɛ Baguma kɔa ye fɔlɛtsa a edo.
3Lɛmɛ nde ntɛ be kamɛ badi tátɛ bido a? Katsa fɔatsa kĩ be katatɛkado aafɔ̃ Baguma lɛláadi ɔnɔkɔali? 4Oowo! Kɛnɛ kĩ Baguma adi ɔnɔkɔali, titɔ kĩ oti nyɛ oti ama fɔvã malo, ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ,
“Ntɛ ɔlɛ kɔdzɛla ni, nɔ fɔlɛtsa fɔnya ɔnɔkɔali.
Ntɛ bɛdzɛmɔ nɔ ni, aanya akũ.”
5Lɛmɛ ntɛ boe titikpa kakɛna anyɛ fɔtsa wĩ a kĩ Baguma akɛna a katsa yededeede a ni, bɔ́apuli bɔlɛ kĩ Baguma akɛna tɔkpa ntɛ ɛvɛlɛ boe sɔtɔ? Ade kavia kĩ otidziwa aavia a. 6Oowo! Ntɛ Baguma ládã kpĩĩ ni, nde yaakɛna ɛdzɛmɔ katinya kamɛ? 7Ntɛ yĩ fɔvã kama anyɛ Baguma ɔnɔkɔali a katsa, kĩ bamu ye a, nde sũ bakɔ yĩ kɔtɔ ndɛ tɔkpa ɔkɛnanɛ? 8Nde sũ bɔálɛ kĩ, “Mifɔ̃ bɔkɛna titikpa ayekĩ tuwĩ aanɛ tito foe kamɛ?” Ɔnɔkɔali bati badi lamɛna fɔvã kama kate nɛ yĩ akũ kĩ ade aye nlɛ a. Baguma aakɔ be kɔtɔ ndɛ ayekĩ kɛfɛta.
Odima Lɛnyɛ́ Oti Kpĩĩ.
9Mbɔɛɛ finyaa, boe Yudafɔ kadzi kamɛ nɛnɛ kɛbɛ̃ bikĩ bɛnyɛ Yudafɔ a? Oowo! Kitonɛkĩ ĩnya lɔtɔ ntsa kɔkɔɛ kĩ tɔkpa nya Yudafɔ mɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a flee akũ, 10ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ,
“Oti odima lɛláa kĩ yadã kpĩĩ. Midi oti mɔapɛ malo lɛláa.
11Odima lɛláa kĩ yanu fɔlɛtsa kayɔ,
ĩye kĩ yawɛ Baguma liti osi.
12Bati flee muniki nɛ Baguma liti,
be flee bɛyɛla osi,
ade odima lɛláa kĩ yakɛna tuwĩ a,
oti mɔapɛ malo lɛláa.
13Be tudomɛna binya tɛwaa
ndɛ linikɛ kĩ lɛwaa luto aye,
bakɛ bati mɛnɛmɛnɛ mɔ be fɔmɛ.
Be onukpɛ̃ kamɛ fɔlɛtsa la ndɛ kɔɛ kadɔ̃ aye.
14Fudumutsa mɔ fɔlɔɛwotsa yi be tunukpɛ̃ kamɛ.
15Bawɛ sɔwa kĩ bapila bati bɛkɔ be.
16Kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ kĩ banaa ni, kawɔla mɔ fɔtsa kade kabula ate nɛ liti.
17Binyína kadzi nɛ lukudɔ kamɛ,
18ade Baguma kavila kadima lɛláa be kamɛ a.”
19Finyaa, bunyina kĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa nɛ mbla a kamɛ a atamɔ bikĩ bideĩ nɛ mbla a kayɔ, ayekĩ baasua batidziwa onukpɛ̃ kanyɛ osi, lɔkɔa Baguma lɛdzɛmɔ katinya kamɛ flee. 20Kitonɛkĩ odima lɛnyɛ́ oti kpĩĩ nɛ Baguma anɛ, nɛ ayekĩ yakɛna nɛ mbla a akũ sũ. Lɛtsa a kĩ mbla a akɛna nyɛ kĩ yafɔ̃ oti anyi kĩ ɛkɛna tɔkpa.
Lɛtsa a Kĩ Lɛfɔ̃ Bɔkpɔla Nɛ Baguma Anɛ.
21Lɛmɛ finyaa, bɛnyɛ osi a kĩ Baguma atsã kakɛna bati kpĩĩ nɛ ye anɛ a bɛtsa. Fukĩĩ lɛtsɛ́la mbla a akũ, titɔ kĩ Mose mbla a mɔ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ di foe akũ adansiɛ malo. 22Baguma akɛna bati badã kpĩĩ katsãmɛna be Yesu Kristo katɛkado kamɛ. Yakɛna fukĩĩ kakpa bati a kĩ bɛtɛ Kristo bido a flee, kĩ ntsitsemu adima lɛláa foe kamɛ. 23Kitonɛkĩ odi nyɛ odi kɛna tɔkpa, ade edeĩ mɔ lugo nɛ Baguma kukũkpalɛ a ɔwɛ̃ a.
24Lɛmɛ nɛ kɔnya a kĩ Baguma amɔ faa sũ ni, ɛtsã Kristo Yesu a kĩ ese kɔtɔ nɛ boe lɔlɔ a akũ, ɛkɛna boe bati kpĩĩ. 25Baguma kɔa ye ɛkpa ndɛ lɛma ɔkplanɛ kĩ fɔtsã ye wuda kamɛ bati bɛna tɔkpa kakɔakate ntɛ bɛtɛ ye bido. Baguma kɛna fukĩĩ ɛnɛɛ yatsa kĩ yadã kpĩĩ. Nɛ kɔkɔɛ a, Baguma na ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ, ɛve sinepo esua bati tɔkpa, 26lɛmɛ finyaa kɔ̃ yate anɛ nɛ be tɔkpa akũ ɛkɔa yatsa kĩ yadã kpĩĩ. Nɛ osi kĩĩ akũ, Baguma atsa kĩ ye mɔawɛ ɛnyɛ oti kpĩĩ ade yakɛna odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ Yesu edo oti kpĩĩ a.
27Finyaa ni, litsa bɔ́akɔa bubo ɔwɔlɛ? Bɔlá lɛtsamama! Mɔ litsa sũ? Ayekĩ bɔakɛna nɛ mbla a akũ sũ mbɔɛɛ? Oowo! Mbom ayekĩ bɔtɛ budo sũ. 28Foesũ bɔ́awũna kĩ katɛkado odi akũ fɔtsã mɔ oti adã kpĩĩ nɛ Baguma anɛ, kĩ nnɛ́ mbla a akũ kakɛna sũ. 29Mbɔɛɛ Baguma a ni, Yudafɔ odi ode yanɛ? Nnɛ́ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a lɛmɛ Baguma yanɛ? Oo, be malo Baguma yanɛ! 30Baguma mɔapɛ deĩ, ade yaakɛna Yudafɔ bati kpĩĩ ɛtsãmɛna be katɛkado akũ a, ɛkɛna bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a lɛmɛ bati kpĩĩ ɛtsãmɛna be katɛkado kamɛ. 31Katsa fɔatsa kĩ katɛkado sũ bɔfɔnɛ mbla a awɛ? Oowo! Fɔlá lɔmɔ kɔlaa, mbom bupini mbla a mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ.

Title: ROMAFƆ 4
Content:
Abraham Kadzi Kpĩĩ Nyɛ Katɛkado Nfasɔ Kɛtsa.
1Litsa bɔ́apuli bɔlɛ nɛ boe kade ɔwanyɔ Abraham akũ? Litsa ɛmɔ́ eyi ɔsũ nɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ akũ? 2Ntɛ tudzuma a kĩ ɛkɛna a akũ fɔtsã sũ Baguma bu Abraham kĩ ɛnyɛ oti kpĩĩ ni, kekɔ̃ yaana litsedi kĩ yakɔa ebo ɔwɔlɛ, lɛmɛ nnɛ́ nɛ Baguma anɛ. 3Kitonɛkĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Abraham tɛ Baguma edo, ade nɛ ye katɛkado sũ Baguma tɛ ye kĩ yadã kpĩĩ.”
4Oti kĩ yakɛna adzuma ni, base ye kɔtɔ, lɛmɛ baábu kɔtɔkase a ndɛ futetsa, mbom fɔnyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ fɔfɛta fɔkpa ye adzuma a kĩ ɛkɛna a. 5Lɛmɛ ntɛ odi tátɛ dĩ nɛ adzuma kakɛna kamɛ, mɔ ɛtɛ edo kĩ Baguma akɛna bikĩ baávila ye bati kpĩĩ ni, nɛ ye katɛkado sũ Baguma aabu ye kĩ ɛnyɛ oti kpĩĩ. 6Ade foe Lɛgã Dawid lɛmɛ lɛ kĩ bihila oti a kĩ Baguma bu ye kĩ ɛnyɛ oti kpĩĩ, kĩ nnɛ́ ye adzuma wĩ a kĩ ɛkɛna a sũ. Dawid lɛ kĩ,
7“Baguma hila bikĩ ye mɔawɛ
ɛkɔa be tɔkpa ete be a,
bikĩ ɛkɔa be titikpa ɛkɔla.
8Baguma hila oti a
kĩ Baguma nyɛ anɛ nɛ ye tɔkpa akũ.”
9Nhila fɔlɛtsa a kĩ Dawid lɛ nɛ awĩ a ni, bikĩ bitsua fɔkpati a odi fude yanɛ, mbɔɛɛ kĩ mɔ bikĩ bɛtátsua fɔkpati a? Oowo! Ɛnyɛ bikĩ bɛtátsua fɔkpati a lɛmɛ ade, kitonɛkĩ bɔlɛ butomɛna Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ kĩ, “Nɛ Abraham katɛkado sũ, Baguma bu ye oti kpĩĩ.” 10Lɔkɔ lɔwɔdabe Baguma bu ye oti kpĩĩ? Nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ bitsua Abraham lɛkpati a, mbɔɛɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ bɛtátsua de tɔ̃ a? Fɔnyɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ ɛtátsua tɔ̃ lɛkpati a, nnɛ́ lɔkɔ a kĩ etsua liti a. 11Ke liti kɔlaa fɔmɔ bitsua Abraham lɛkpati. Ye lɛkpati katsua lɛmɛ nyɛ nsɛntsɛlɛni kĩ Baguma tɛ ye kĩ ɛnyɛ oti kpĩĩ nɛ ye katɛkado sũ, titɔ kĩ nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ malo bɛtátsua tɔ̃ ye lɛkpati. Foesũ Abraham yadani bati a kĩ bɛtɛ Baguma bido a flee hũhũ kamɛ ɔlɛga. Titɔ kĩ bɛtátsua fɔkpati malo ni, bɛtɛ be ndɛ bati kpĩĩ. 12Ade ayea Abraham nyɛ bikĩ bitsua fɔkpati a lɛmɛ ɔlɛga a. Lɛmɛ nnɛ́ nɛ ayekĩ bitsua be fɔkpati a odi sũ, mbom nɛ ayekĩ bidzi nkpã nɛ katɛkado kamɛ ndɛ ayekĩ boe ɔlɛga Abraham dzi fɔmɔ bitsua ye lɛkpati a sũ.
Baguma Kpa Abraham Bɔhɛ.
13Baguma kpa Abraham mɔ ye kasinu kamɛ babi bɔhɛ kĩ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ aanya be adzapadiɛ. Ɛkɛna foe nnɛ́ nɛ ayekĩ Abraham kɛna nɛ mbla a akũ sũ, mbom nɛ ayekĩ ɛtɛ edo kĩ Baguma bu ye oti kpĩĩ sũ. 14Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ bikĩ bakɛna nɛ mbla a akũ odi aanya fɔtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi a ni, kekɔ̃ katɛkado lɛnyɛ́ lɛtsama ade Baguma kalɛkayi a lɛmɛ nyɛ fɔtsa pupulidza a. 15Mbla a avɛlɛ Baguma kalɔkpa kayamɛna, lɛmɛ awã kĩ mbla lɛláa ni, mbla kafum lɛláa.
16Foesũ bɔhɛ a dzɛ̃ nɛ katɛkado akũ, ayekĩ bɔhɛ a aatim ndɛ fɔtsa a kĩ Baguma mɔ kɔnya ɛkɔa ete Abraham kasinu a kamɛ babi. Nnɛ́ bikĩ bakɛna nɛ mbla a akũ odi fɔwaa fɔkpa, mbom mɔ bikĩ bɛtɛ bido ndɛ ayekĩ Abraham tɛ edo a, kitonɛkĩ Abraham nyɛ boe flee hũhũ kamɛ ɔlɛga, 17ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Nkɔa nɔ nkɛna fude fude pii ɔlɛga.” Foesũ bɔhɛ a nɛnɛ nɛ Baguma anɛ. Ade ye nyɛ Baguma a kĩ Abraham tɛ edo kĩ yadzɛla banɔkpa bayidza kadzi nkpã, kĩ yafɔ̃ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔláa kɔkɔɛ fɔanɛ katinya.
18Titɔ kĩ anɛ kate adima buki ɛláa malo ni, Abraham tɛ edo ɛkadã anɛ, ade foesũ ɛkɛna fude pii ɔlɛga, ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma bi ye a kĩ, “Nɔ babi mɔ bawa aama bɛsa beblebee ndɛ fusibii aye.” 19Nɛ lɔkɔ a, Abraham tɛ ndɛ futeli ɔha, lɛmɛ ye katɛkado onukpɛ̃ tádɔ, titɔ kĩ ɛmɔ eyi ɔsũ kĩ kɔbɛ̃ woli nɛ ye sukɛna kamɛ, mɔ ayekĩ Sara lɛmɛ tɛ̃ kɔma kana malo a. 20Ɛtátɛ fɔtsa a kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi kĩ yaakɛna ɛkpa ye a akũ atsindze, ade ɛtáfɔnɛ ye katɛkado awɛ a, mbom ye katɛkado a do ye kɔbɛ̃, edo Baguma obu. 21Ɛtɛ edo pipiipi kĩ Baguma aapuli ɛkɛna nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi a akũ. 22Ade Abraham katɛkado sũ mɔ Baguma bu ye kĩ ɛnyɛ oti kpĩĩ a. 23Fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ kĩ, “Baguma bu ye kĩ yadã kpĩĩ” a, nnɛ́ Abraham odi sũ bɛtsɛlɛ foe, 24mbom bɛtsɛlɛ foe bɛkpa boe lɛmɛ. Boe a kĩ bɔ́atɛ oti a kĩ ɛdzɛla boe Ɔlate Yesu etomɛna kanɔkpa a budo a, baabu boe kĩ bɔnyɛ bati kpĩĩ. 25Boe titikpa sũ Baguma fɔnɛ Kristo awɛ ɛkpa kĩ bɛkɔ, ade ɛdzɛla ye edzi nkpã, ayekĩ yaabu boe bati kpĩĩ.

Title: ROMAFƆ 5
Content:
Baguma Bu Boe Bati Kpĩĩ.
1Finyaa, kĩ Baguma bu boe bati kpĩĩ nɛ boe katɛkado sũ ni, bɔtsɛ̃ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo akũ bɔna lukudɔ nɛ bɔmɔ Baguma kayite. 2Ye akũ lɛmɛ bɔtsã mɔ osi binya ɛkpa boe kĩ Baguma aamɔ boe kɔnya, budzi nɛ ye kɔnyakamɔ a kamɛ. Nɛ foesũ bɔapia nɛ kɔnɛte a kĩ budeĩ kĩ bɔ́ana tsɛfã nɛ Baguma kukũkpalɛ a kamɛ. 3Nɛ ɔhau pii kamɛ malo bɔamɔ kawɔlɛ, kitonɛkĩ bunyina kĩ ɔhau afɔ̃ bɔakɔlɛ ɔwɔlɛ kado, 4ɔwɔlɛ kado afɔ̃ bɔadza pintii, ade kadza pintii afɔ̃ bɔana kɔnɛte a. 5Ade kɔnɛte láfɔ̃ kɔnyɔã awo boe, kitonɛkĩ Baguma kɔa ye ɔdɔ edo nɛ boe tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ ɛtsãmɛna ye Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a kĩ ɛkpa boe a akũ.
6Kitonɛkĩ kĩ bubuki bɔlá kɔbɛ̃ kudima a, ade lɔkɔ a na kamɛ Kristo ku nɛ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ lɔlɔ, ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma mɔawɛ yi ɛkpa a. 7Fɔnyɛ lɛtsa mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ oti odi aku nɛ oti kpĩĩ lɔlɔ. Fɔ́apuli fɔya malo kĩ oti odi aado ɔwɔlɛ kĩ yaku nɛ oti wĩ lɔlɔ. 8Lɛmɛ Baguma tsa boe ayekĩ eti yawɛ boe kalɛ, kitonɛkĩ lɔkɔ a kĩ bubuki bɔnyɛ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ a, Kristo ku nɛ boe lɔlɔ.
9Ɛtsã ye wuda kamɛ ɛkɛna bati boe kpĩĩ nɛ Baguma anɛ. Wuda kĩĩ sũ yaanyɛ boe etomɛna Baguma kalɔkpa a kamɛ. 10Bɔnya Baguma bakesĩnɛ lɛmɛ ɛkɛna boe ye bakɔba ɛtsãmɛna ye Obi wuda a kĩ ɛkɔa ɛpata ye a kamɛ. Finyaa kĩ ɛkpɔla Baguma ɛkpa boe kĩĩ ni, yaatɛ boe ɛba, kitonɛkĩ edzi nkpã. 11Lɛmɛ nnɛ́ fukĩĩ odi, mbom bɔamɔ kawɔlɛ nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma tsã boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo akũ ɛlɔla bɔmɔ ye kayite a sũ.
Ntsitsemu a Kĩ Edeĩ Nɛ Adam Mɔ Kristo Kayite a.
12Tɔkpa tsã oti mɔa akũ tɛya nɛ katinya kamɛ, ade wuda tsã ye akũ ɛya a. Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ ni, wuda yalɛ ewo nɛ batidziwa flee kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ odi nyɛ odi kɛna tɔkpa. 13Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, tɔkpa na nɛ katinya kamɛ fɔmɔ mbla a ya, lɛmɛ awã kĩ mbla lɛláa ni, baábu lɛtsama kĩ lɛnyɛ tɔkpa. 14Lɛmɛ kito Adam lɔkɔ kɛyawo Mose lɔkɔ a ni, wuda nya batidziwa flee akũ, mɔ bikĩ bɛtákɛna tɔkpa ndɛ tikĩ Adam kɛna a malo. Adam kĩĩ dzɛ̃ ndɛ oti a kĩ yaaya a.
15Lɛmɛ be bati nviã a bɛtáketi, kitonɛkĩ Baguma futetsa faa a lɛlá ndɛ Adam tɔkpa a. Fɔnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kĩ bati pii ku nɛ oti mɔa tɔkpa sũ. Lɛmɛ Baguma kɔnyakamɔ bɛ̃ kɔlaa, foesũ ade ayea ye futetsa a kĩ yakpa bati pii faa katsãmɛna oti mɔa kĩ ɛnyɛ Yesu Kristo akũ a la a. 16Futesa a kĩ Baguma kpa faa a lɛlá ndɛ lɛtsa a kĩ oti mɔa tɔkpa vɛlɛ tɛyamɛna a, kitonɛkĩ tɔkpa a kĩ oti mɔa a kɛna a yamɔ kadzɛ mɔ kɔtɔkaku. Lɛmɛ futetsa a kĩ Baguma kpa faa a fɔ̃ bibu bati beblebee tɔkpa a kĩ bɛkɛna a kĩ badã kpĩĩ. 17Fɔnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kĩ oti mɔa tɔkpa a kĩ ɛkɛna sũ wuda yaanya akũ. Lɛmɛ lɛtsa a kĩ oti mɔa a kĩ ɛnyɛ Yesu Kristo kɛna a bɛ̃ foe flee. Bikĩ bɛna Baguma kɔnyakamɔ baũ kĩĩ flee a, kĩ ɛkɛna be bati kpĩĩ lɛmɛ a, aanya akũ nɛ nkpã kamɛ bɛtsãmɛna Kristo akũ.
18Foesũ ndɛ ayekĩ oti mɔa tɔkpa a kĩ ɛkɛna fɔ̃ bɛkɔ batidziwa flee kɔtɔ a, ade ayea oti mɔa tuwĩ kĩ ɛkɛna a kpa batidziwa flee ɔtɔbɛ, bɛna nkpã lɛmɛ a. 19Ade ndɛ ayekĩ oti mɔa atɔ ɔsĩ kakɛna fɔ̃ bati flee dani tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ a ni, ade ayea oti mɔa Baguma ɔlɛdo akũ kakɛna aafɔ̃ bɛkɛna bati pii kpĩĩ nɛ Baguma anɛ a.
20Bɛyamɛna mbla a ayekĩ tɔkpa kakɛna aapɔ ebu, lɛmɛ awã kĩ tɔkpa kakɛna pɔnɛ ni, Baguma kɔnyakamɔ lɛmɛ apɔ kabu. 21Foesũ ayekĩ tɔkpa nya akũ nɛ wuda kamɛ a ni, ade ayea Baguma kɔnyakamɔ anya akũ katsãmɛna kadzi kpĩĩ kamɛ, kakpã boe kawomɛna nkpã a kĩ kɛlá kawũna a kamɛ, nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo dĩ akũ a.

Title: ROMAFƆ 6
Content:
Budzi Nkpã Nɛ Kristo Sũ.
1Foesũ, finyaa litsa bɔ́alɛ? Bɔ́ana nɛ tɔkpa kakɛna kamɛ ayekĩ Baguma kɔnyakamɔ aapɔ kibu mbɔɛɛ? 2Oowo! Kĩ buku bɔkpa tɔkpa kɔkɔɛ a, nde bɔabuki budzi nkpã bɔkakɛna tɔkpa? 3Mbɔɛɛ minyína kĩ, kĩ bɛwɔla boe mui, bɔkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Yesu Kristo a, bɛwɔla boe mui bɔkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ ye wuda a lɛmɛ? 4Nɛ boe mui kawɔla kĩĩ kamɛ a, bɔna tsɛfã nɛ ye wuda a kamɛ, ade bibila bɔmɔ ye a. Ndɛ ayekĩ Ɔlɛga a tsã ye kukũkpalɛ kɔbɛ̃ kamɛ ɛdzɛla Kristo etomɛna banɔkpa kamɛ a, ade aye boe malo bɔ́ayidza budzi nkpã vɔɛ̃ a.
5Kitonɛkĩ ayekĩ bɔkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ ye nɛ ye wuda kamɛ a, ade ayea bɔ́abuki bɔkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ ye nɛ boe kadzɛla kadzi nkpã kamɛ ndɛ ayekĩ bɛdzɛla ye a. 6Bunyina kĩ, kĩ bɛbɔa boe kutitse kɔɛ a nɛ asendua akũ mɔ Kristo ayekĩ boe sukɛna kĩ sawɛ tɔkpa kakɛna a aawɔ, ayekĩ bɔláabuki bɔnya tɔkpa basate. 7Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ oti sila eku ni, bɛnyɛ ye nɛ tɔkpa kɔbɛ̃ kayɔ.
8Ntɛ buku mɔ Kristo ni, bɔtɛ budo kĩ bɔ́adzi nkpã lɛmɛ mɔ ye. 9Bunyina kĩ, kĩ Baguma dzɛla Kristo etomɛna kanɔkpa sũ ni, ɛláabuki eku da. Wuda buki lɛláabuki ɛna kɔbɛ̃ kudima nɛ ye akũ. 10Wuda a kĩ Kristo ku a, eku ye deedimɔapɛ ɛkpa tɔkpa, lɛmɛ nkpã a kĩ edzi finyaa, edzi ye ɛkpa Baguma. 11Ade ayea mi malo mibu mi akũ kĩ miku mikpa tɔkpa, lɛmɛ Baguma nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo Yesu kamɛ.
12Kɛtánɛ kĩ tɔkpa tibuki tɛnya mi sukɛna a kĩ saku a akũ, ayekĩ míakakɛna nɛ se fɔwɛtsa akũ. 13Mitafɔnɛ mi sukɛna kakɔma awɛ mikpa tɔkpa tɛkɔa tɛkɛna ablɔ adima, mbom mikɔa mi akũ mikpa Baguma ndɛ bati kĩ ɛnyɛ etomɛna wuda kamɛ ɛyamɛna nɛ nkpã kamɛ. Mifɔnɛ mi akũ flee awɛ mikpa Baguma fɔnya fɔtsa kĩ yaakɔa ɛkɛna tuwĩ. 14Kɛtánɛ kĩ tɔkpa tɛnya mi akũ, kitonɛkĩ miláa mbla kayɔ, mbom mideĩ nɛ Baguma kɔnyakamɔ kayɔ.
Tuwĩ Kakɛna Basate Mianɛ.
15Foesũ litsa bɔalɛ? Bɔ́akɛna tɔkpa kitonɛkĩ bɔláa mbla kayɔ, mbom budeĩ nɛ Baguma kɔnyakamɔ kayɔ sũ? Oowo! 16Minyina pefee kĩ ntɛ mikɔa mi akũ mikɛna odi basumunɛ ni, minyɛ ɔlate a kĩ ye kayɔ mideĩ a basate. Ntɛ mikɔa akũ mikpa tɔkpa kakɛna ni, lɛtsa a kĩ laanɛ nɛ foe kamɛ nyɛ wuda, lɛmɛ ntɛ mikɛna nɛ Baguma ɔlɛdo akũ ni, foe nfasɔ nyɛ kadzi kpĩĩ nɛ Baguma anɛ.
17Bɔanyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ paa, kitonɛkĩ titɔ kĩ minya tɔkpa basate miyatɛ̃ malo ni, finyaa mitɛ ɔnɔkɔali fɔtsa katsa a mɔ mi tɔwɔlɛ, milamɔ foe akũ kakɛna pɛpɛɛpɛ. 18Baguma nyɛ mi etomɛna tɔkpa kamɛ, midani fɔtsa wĩ kakɛna basate.
19Malɛ kɔdzɛla ndɛ otidziwa aye nɛ ayekĩ otidziwa adɔ nɛ sukɛna kamɛ sũ. Nɛ lɔkɔ lidi kĩ lɛtɛ̃ kamɛ ni, mifɔnɛ mi akũ flee awɛ ndɛ basate mikpa efĩĩ mɔ ablɔ fɔtsa kakɛna. Ade ayea kɛnɛ kĩ finyaa miafɔnɛ mi akũ flee awɛ mikpa ndɛ tuwĩ kakɛna basate a. 20Kĩ minya tɔkpa kakɛna basate a, tuwĩ kakɛna tánya ɔhɛ fɔkpa mi. 21Litsa nfasɔ mina mitomɛna fɔtsa a kĩ mikakɛna a kĩ finyaa fɔakɔ mi kɔnyɔã a kamɛ? Fɔtsa a na bamɛ flee kawũna nyɛ wuda.
22Lɛmɛ finyaa, Baguma nyɛ mi nɛ tɔkpa kamɛ midani ye basate. Nfasɔ a kĩ míana nyɛ kĩ miakɔa mi akũ flee mikpa Baguma ɛkpalɛ ye akũ, lɔkɔa nɛ foe kawũna mina nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a. 23Kitonɛkĩ tɔkpa kɔtɔkase nyɛ wuda, lɛmɛ Baguma futetsa faa nyɛ nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a, nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ boe Ɔlate Kristo Yesu kamɛ.

Title: ROMAFƆ 7
Content:
Nfantuhũ Kĩ Eto Kɔtsɔ̃ Kakɔã Kamɛ.
1Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mi a kĩ minyina Mose mbla a, míanu lɛtsa a kĩ mawɛ kĩ malɛ nɛ awĩ a kayɔ. Mbla anya oti akũ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ edzi nkpã a odi. 2Foe nfantuhũ nyɛ kĩ mbla sui otsole kĩ edzi kɔnyɔ edo nɛ ɔnyɔ kayɔ nɛ onyole a nkpã kamɛ. Lɛmɛ ntɛ onyole a ku ni, otsole a nɛ́ nɛ mbla a kĩ esui ye ɛmɛna mɔ onyole a kamɛ. 3Foesũ ntɛ otsole a naa onyole bɛbã sɛkɛ̃ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ ɔnyɔ a buki edzi nkpã ni, baavɛ ye ɔdɔpaani. Lɛmɛ ntɛ ɔnyɔ a ku kɔ̃ ni, mbla kĩĩ tásui ye, ade ntɛ ɛnadzi mɔ onyole bɛbã ni, ɛtábɔa adɔpaa.
4Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ade aye fɔla fɔkpa mi malo a. Nɛ mbla a onukpɛ̃ ni, mi malo miku, kitonɛkĩ minyɛ Kristo sukɛna a sɛkɛ sidi. Ade finyaa minyɛ ye a kĩ Baguma dzɛla etomɛna kanɔkpa a bade, ayekĩ bɔ́anɛ libi bɔkpa Baguma. 5Kitonɛkĩ kĩ budzi nkpã nɛ sukɛna kamɛ a ni, sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kpa a kĩ mbla a dzɛla nɛ boe kamɛ a, kɛna adzuma nɛ boe kamɛ, ɛmanɛ boe ɛkpa wuda. 6Lɛmɛ finyaa bɔnɛ́ nɛ mbla a kayɔ, kitonɛkĩ buku bɔkpa fɔtsa a kĩ fusuli boe ndɛ kɔla bawanɛ a. Bɔláabuki busum nɛ mbla kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ osi kɔɛ a akũ, mbom bɔ́asum nɛ Hũhũ kamɛ osi vɔɛ̃ a akũ.
Mbla Afɔ̃ Oti Akɛna Tɔkpa.
7Finyaa litsa bɔ́alɛ? Kalɛ bɔ́alɛ kĩ mbla nyɛ tɔkpa? Oowo! Fɔlá lɔmɔ. Lɛmɛ mbla a lɛfɔ̃ ĩnyi lɛtsa a kĩ tɔkpa anɛ. Ntɛ mbla a ɛtalɛ kĩ, “Tayɔɔla anɛ nɛ oti bɛbã fɔtsa akũ” ni, kufɛ ĩnyína anɛngbã kawɛ a na. 8Lɛmɛ fɔtsã mbla a akũ, tɔkpa na osi tinyina odo kakɔ fɔtsa kpa flee nɛ yĩ kamɛ. Ntɛ mbla kalaa ɛláa ni, kufɛ tɔkpa lɛmɛ ku. 9Yĩ mɔawɛ a ndzi tɔ̃ nkpã, kĩ mbla a tána, lɛmɛ kĩ mbla a ya a, tɔkpa yidza tidzi nkpã, 10ade nku a. Ade mbla a kĩ kufɛ ɛma yĩ nkpã a, yĩ kɔ̃ wuda ɛkɔa ɛma yĩ. 11Tɔkpa tsã mbla akũ tɛna osi tɛkɛ yĩ, ade tɛkɔ yĩ a.
12Foesũ mbla mɔawɛ a akũ kpalɛ, ade ayea ye nhihiɛ a adã kpĩĩ, ɛnɛnɛ lɛmɛ a. 13Lɔkɔa lɛtsa wĩ a kĩ lɛnɛnɛ a dani wuda lɛkpa yĩ? Oowo! Fɔlá lɔmɔ. Tɔkpa tsã tuwĩ akũ tɛkɔa wuda tɛma yĩ, ayekĩ taanyɛ te kutitse paa a tɛtsa. Foesũ fɔtsã mbla akũ bɛnyɛ tɔkpa bɛtsa ndɛ lɛtsa kpa kĩ liti lɛnɛ́nɛ koũ.
Kawũkanɔ a Kĩ Kideĩ Nɛ Oti Kamɛ.
14Bunyina kĩ mbla a nyɛ hũhũ kamɛ fɔtsa, lɛmɛ yĩ kɔ̃ ĩnyɛ otidziwa, kĩ bɛnɔ ɔsate bɛkpa tɔkpa. 15Maánu yĩ fɔtsa kɛnawa a kayɔ, kitonɛkĩ maákɛna lɛtsa a kĩ mawɛ kĩ makɛna a, mbom makɛna lɛtsa a kĩ makesĩ a. 16Ntɛ lɛtsa a kĩ maáwɛ a makɛna kɔ̃ ni, kekɔ̃ ntunɔ kĩ mbla a nɛnɛ. 17Foesũ nnɛ́ yĩ mɔawɛ akɛna fɔtsa a, mbom tɔkpa a kĩ tideĩ nɛ yĩ kamɛ a akɛna foe.
18Ĩnyina kĩ tuwĩ tidima lidzí nɛ yĩ kamɛ ayekĩ ĩnyɛ otidziwa sũ. Kitonɛkĩ titɔ kĩ kawɛ a kĩ makɛna tuwĩ deĩ nɛ yĩ kamɛ malo ni, maápuli nkɛna te. 19Tuwĩ a kĩ mawɛ kĩ makɛna a, maákɛna te, mbom makɛna tɔkpa a kĩ maáwɛ kĩ makɛna a. 20Ntɛ lɛtsa a kĩ maáwɛ a makɛna ni, kekɔ̃ nnɛ́ yĩ mɔawɛ a akɛna foe, mbom tɔkpa a kĩ tideĩ nɛ yĩ kamɛ a akɛna foe.
21Foesũ mmɔ́ mbla kĩĩ fɔlɛtsa ĩyi ɔsũ, kĩ ntɛ mawɛ kĩ makɛna tuwĩ ni, tɔkpa mbom makɛna. 22Nɛ yĩ kamɛkamɛ ni, mamɔ kawɔlɛ nɛ Baguma mbla a akũ. 23Lɛmɛ mamɔ mbla bɛbã nɛ yĩ sukɛna kamɛ kĩ yanɔ lɛma mɔ yĩ lɔlɔ kamɛ tuwĩ kĩ mawɛ a. Ɛkɛna yĩ kɔla ɔwanɛ ɛkpa tɔkpa mbla a kĩ edeĩ nɛ yĩ sukɛna kamɛ. 24Nkɛna oti kĩ ye akũ akɔ kɔnya. Owei aatɛ yĩ etomɛna sukɛna kĩ sɛkpã yĩ sanamɛna wuda kamɛ a awɛ? 25Kɔlɛ bɔanyɛ Baguma bɔtsãmɛna boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo akũ.
Finyaa, ayekĩ nla nyɛ kĩ nɛ yĩ mɔa akũ akũ ni, nnɛɛ yĩ adzuma makɛna nɛ Baguma mbla a akũ, lɛmɛ sukɛna a kɔ̃ ni, nnɛ masum tɔkpa mbla a.

Title: ROMAFƆ 8
Content:
Nkpã Kadzi Nɛ Baguma Hũhũ a Onukpɛ̃.
1Foesũ finyaa kɔtɔkakɔ lɛláa kɛkpa bikĩ bɛkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo Yesu a. 2Kitonɛkĩ Hũhũ mbla a kĩ yakpa oti nkpã nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna kamɛ mɔ Kristo Yesu a, nyɛ yĩ etomɛna tɔkpa mɔ wuda mbla a kamɛ. 3Lɛtsa a kĩ mbla a tápuli ɛkɛna a, ayekĩ sukɛna a tɛ kɔbɛ̃ nɛ ye awɛ sũ ni, Baguma kɔ̃ kɛna foe. Edo ye mɔawɛ obi ɛya nɛ otidziwa sukɛna kĩ sakɛna tɔkpa kamɛ, ade ɛyakɔ tɔkpa kɔtɔ, ɛnyɛ te a. 4Baguma kɛna fukĩĩ ayekĩ boe a kĩ budzi nɛ Hũhũ kamɛ, kĩ nnɛ́ nɛ sukɛna kamɛ a, bɔ́apuli budzi nɛ tuwĩ kakɛna a kĩ ye mbla awɛ a onukpɛ̃.
5Bati kĩ bidzi nkpã ndɛ ayekĩ be sukɛna awɛ a onukpɛ̃ ni, fɔtsa a kĩ be sukɛna awɛ a akũ bakɔna. Lɛmɛ bikĩ bidzi nkpã ndɛ ayekĩ Hũhũ a awɛ a onukpɛ̃ ni, fɔtsa a kĩ Hũhũ a awɛ a akũ be adzuni ana. 6Oti kadzi nɛ sukɛna fɔwɛtsa tsɛ̃mɔ wuda, lɛmɛ oti kĩ Hũhũ a akpã ye a, ana nkpã mɔ lukudɔ. 7Nɛ foesũ oti a kĩ ye sukɛna fɔwɛtsa nya ye akũ a adani Baguma okesĩnɛ, kitonɛkĩ yaákɛna nɛ Baguma mbla akũ, ade nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, ɛláapuli ɛkɛna nɛ ye akũ. 8Bikĩ bidzi nkpã nɛ be sukɛna kawɛ onukpɛ̃ a fɔkɛlatsa lɛláapuli fuwo Baguma anɛ.
9Lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃ midzí nɛ sukɛna kawɛ onukpɛ̃, mbom midzi ndɛ ayekĩ Hũhũ a awɛ kĩ midzi a. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ Kristo Hũhũ lɛláa ye kamɛ lɛnyɛ́ Kristo ode. 10Lɛmɛ ntɛ Kristo deĩ nɛ nɔ kamɛ a, Hũhũ a nyɛ nkpã ɛkpa nɔ, kitonɛkĩ ɛkɛna nɔ oti kpĩĩ nɛ Baguma anɛ, titɔ kĩ nɔ sukɛna ayaku malo nɛ tɔkpa sũ. 11Ntɛ Baguma Hũhũ a kĩ ɛdzɛla Yesu etomɛna banɔkpa kamɛ a deĩ nɛ mi kamɛ ni, kekɔ̃ oti a kĩ ɛdzɛla Kristo etomɛna banɔkpa kamɛ a lɛmɛ aakpa mi sukɛna kĩ saku a nkpã, nɛ ye Hũhũ a kĩ edeĩ nɛ mi kamɛ a sũ.
12Foesũ nwaɛ̃ amɛ, budeĩ adzuma adi kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ bɔkɛna lɛmɛ fɔnyɛ́ kĩ bɔadzi nkpã ndɛ ayekĩ boe sukɛna awɛ kĩ budzi a. 13Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ midzi nkpã nɛ sukɛna kawɛ onukpɛ̃ ni, míaku. Lɛmɛ ntɛ mitsã Hũhũ kamɛ mikɔ mi fɔkɛlatsa kpa a, míana nkpã. 14Bati a kĩ Baguma Hũhũ akpã a flee nyɛ Baguma babi. 15Kitonɛkĩ Hũhũ a kĩ Baguma kpa mi a tákɛna mi basate mikavila, mbom Hũhũ a akɛna mi Baguma babi. Ade Hũhũ a kɔbɛ̃ afɔ̃ bɔbɔa fɔwɔla kavɛ Baguma kĩ, “Abba!” kĩ foe kayɔ nyɛ kĩ “Ao Nda!”
16Baguma Hũhũ a mɔawɛ lɛkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ boe hũhũ yadi adansiɛ kĩ Baguma babi bɔanɛ. 17Ntɛ bɔnyɛ ye babi ni, bɔnyɛ ye adzapadiɛ lɛmɛ banyanɛ, ade bɔmɔ Kristo bɔ́anya adzapadiɛ a kĩ Baguma kɔa eyi ye a. Foesũ ntɛ bɔna tsɛfã nɛ Kristo lubo kamɔ a kamɛ ni, bɔ́ana tsɛfã lɛmɛ nɛ ye kukũkpalɛ a kamɛ a.
Kukũkpalɛ a Kĩ Kɔaya a.
18Makɔna kĩ bɔláapuli bɔkɔa lubo a kĩ bɔamɔ finyaa a bɔkɔnamɔ Baguma kukũkpalɛ a kĩ baanyɛ bɛtsa boe a kɔlaa. 19Fɔtsa a kĩ Baguma bɔa a flee dzi fɔadzɔlɛ mɔ akũ kasĩ kĩ Baguma ɛnyɛ ye babi ɛtsa. 20Kitonɛkĩ bɛkɔ fɔtsa a kĩ Baguma bɔa a flee kɔtɔ kĩ fɔnyɛ fɔtsa pupulidza, nnɛ́ nɛ foe kawɛ akũ, mbom Baguma lɛwɛ kĩ fɔna lɔmɔ. Lɛmɛ kɔnɛte a deĩ kĩ, 21luwi lidi ni, fɔtsa a kĩ bɛbɔa flee aanyɛ foe akũ nɛ tɛsate ɔsum kĩ yabu kade a kamɛ, fɔyaawo nɛ akũ akũ kadzi mɔ kukũkpalɛ a kĩ Baguma aakpa ye babi a kamɛ.
22Kitonɛkĩ bunyina kĩ kɛyawo nviã lɔkɔ kĩĩ a, fɔtsa a kĩ Baguma bɔa a flee abe ayɔlɔhɔ ndɛ ɔmatsɔ̃ kĩ sɛmɛ pi ye aye. 23Lɛmɛ nnɛ́ fɔtsa kĩ bɛbɔa a odi abe ayɔlɔhɔ, mbom boe a kĩ Baguma kpa ye Hũhũ ndɛ ye futetsa fɔtɔnyade a lɛmɛ bɔabe ayɔlɔhɔ nɛ boe kamɛ, kadzɔlɛ Baguma kĩ ɛkɛna boe ye babi a, ɛnyɛ boe kutitse a flee. 24Kitonɛkĩ ade kɔnɛte kĩĩ sũ bɔna katɛ a, lɛmɛ ntɛ bɔamɔ kɔnɛte fɔtsa kɔkɔɛ ni, fubuki fɔnyɛ́ kɔnɛte. Kitonɛkĩ owei akɔa anɛ kate nɛ fɔtsa a kĩ yamɔ a akũ? 25Lɛmɛ ntɛ boe anɛ teĩ nɛ fɔtsa a kĩ bɔámɔ akũ ni, bɔana ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ kadzɔlɛ foe.
26Ade ayea Hũhũ a lɛmɛ aayabumɔ boe a kĩ bɔdɔ a, kitonɛkĩ bunyína ayekĩ kɛfɛta kĩ bɔabɔa mpaɛ bɔkpa Baguma. Hũhũ mɔawɛ a abe ayɔlɔhɔ kapili boe lɔlɔ nɛ Baguma sɛkɛ̃ mɔ fɔlɛtsa kĩ onukpɛ̃ lɛláapuli ɛlɛ. 27Ade Baguma a kĩ yamɔ bati tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ a nyina lɛtsa a kĩ lɛnyɛ Hũhũ a adzuni, kitonɛkĩ Hũhũ a ake Baguma aduli nɛ ye bade lɔlɔ ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma awɛ a.
28Bunyina kĩ Baguma akɛna fɔtsa flee fɔaboomu kakɛna fuwĩ kakpa bati a kĩ bawɛ ye kalɛ a, kĩ ɛvɛ nɛ ye nhihiɛ onukpɛ̃ a. 29Bati a kĩ Baguma nyi ɛnyamɛna lɔtɔ a, ɛpau be eyi kĩ bɛyaakɛna ndɛ ye Obi aye, ayekĩ ye Obi a aanya be ɔtɔnyade nɛ bawaɛ̃ pii kamɛ. 30Foesũ bati a kĩ Baguma nyɛ eyi a, ade be ɛvɛ a, ade bikĩ ɛvɛ a, ɛkɛna be bɛkpɔla ade ɛkpa be tsɛfã nɛ ye kukũkpalɛ a kamɛ a.
Yesu Kristo Nyɛ Baguma Ɔdɔ a Ɛtsa Boe.
31Ntɛ bɔkɔna fukĩĩ flee akũ a, litsa bɔ́apuli bɔlɛ? Ntɛ Baguma dzɛ̃ nɛ boe liti a ni, owei aapuli eyidza ɛdza nɛ boe akũ? 32Ntɛ Baguma a kĩ ɛtásĩ ye mɔawɛ Obi kakɔa kakpa, mbom ɛkɔa ye ɛkpa faa nɛ boe flee lɔlɔ a ni, nde fɔ́anya kĩ ɛláakɔa fɔtsa bɛbã flee faa ebu Obi ɛkpa boe? 33Owei aapuli ɛbɔɛ fɔlɛtsa nɛ bati a kĩ Baguma pau a akũ? Baguma mɔawɛ di adansiɛ kĩ bɛtáku kɔtɔ. 34Foesũ owei aakɔ be kɔtɔ? Nnɛ́ Kristo Yesu a kĩ eku ĩye kĩ Baguma dzɛla ye etomɛna banɔkpa kamɛ, edzi nkpã nɛ Baguma sɔmɔna, yake ye aduli nɛ boe lɔlɔ a!
35Kekɔ̃ owei ĩye litsa aapuli etsua bɔmɔ Kristo ɔdɔ a kayite? Lubokamɔ aapuli, mbɔɛɛ ɔhau, mbɔɛɛ bati liti katomɛna, mbɔɛɛ kɔlɛkakɔ ĩye ohiã, mbɔɛɛ ɔdzɔ kadzi, mbɔɛɛ wuda libe, mbɔɛɛ kĩ wuda? 36Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ,
“Nɔ sũ, bakɔ boe lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ.
Ade babu boe ndɛ baveli kĩ bɛkpã banaakɔ aye.”
37Nɛ fukĩĩ flee kamɛ a, bɔtsã Kristo kĩ yawɛ boe kalɛ a akũ bɔba ayekĩ bɔkɔna malo. 38Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ ndo kĩ lɛtsama lɛláapuli lɛnyɛ boe nɛ boe Ɔlate Kristo ɔdɔ a kamɛ. Fɔláanya wuda ĩye nkpã, ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ ĩye hũhũ kpa kɔbɛ̃ kudi, lɔkɔ kĩĩ ĩye lɔkɔ kĩ laaya, 39katinya kĩ kideĩ nɛ ode ĩye katinya kĩ kideĩ nɛ tite kayɔ ĩye fɔtsa a kĩ bɛbɔa a kamɛ fudima. Lɛtsama koũ lɛláa katinya kamɛ flee kĩ láapuli lɛnyɛ boe nɛ Baguma ɔdɔ a kĩ bɔna bɔtsãmɛna boe Ɔlate Kristo Yesu akũ a kamɛ!

Title: ROMAFƆ 9
Content:
Baguma Pau Yudafɔ Ndɛ Ye Bati Aye.
1Lɛtsa a kĩ malɛ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali, Kristo ode manɛ ade maáma fɔvã a. Yĩ ɔwɔlɛ kĩ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa anya ye akũ a akpa yĩ katɛkado kĩ nnɛ́ fɔvã mama. 2Mabe ayɔlɔhɔ, ade ntɛ kalɔɛ kĩ kaádɔ nɛ yĩ ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ, 3kakpa yĩ bati a kĩ bɔmɔ be bɔnyɛ sukɛna mɔ babɔanɛ mɔa. Nɛ be sũ maawɛ kĩ Baguma edumu yĩ faa, ɛsɛ̃ bɔmɔ Kristo kayite malo kufɛ. 4Kitonɛkĩ ade be nyɛ Israel ɔmaĩ a kĩ Baguma pau, ɛkɔa ɛkɛna ye bade, ɛnyɛ ye kukũkpalɛ a ɛtsa be a. Esui onukpɛ̃ mɔ be, ɛkpa be ye mbla a lɛmɛ. Be nɛɛ Baguma ɔsum osi wĩ a, ade be lɛmɛ ɛkɛna bɔhɛ ɛkpa a. 5Be kasinu to Hebrifɔ bawanyɔ a kĩ bɛtɛ buĩ a kamɛ, ade be kade kamɛ Kristo lɛmɛ nɛ eto ndɛ otidziwa aye ɛya a. Mifɔ̃ bumu Baguma a kĩ yanya fɔtsa flee akũ daa daa a! Fɔya lɔmɔ.
6Nlámɔ kalɛ kĩ Baguma kalɛkayi a táya nɛ foe kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ nnɛ́ bati a kĩ bito Israel a flee nyɛ Israelfɔ kpanunu. 7Ade ayea nnɛ́ Abraham kasinu babi a flee nyɛ Baguma babi. Baguma bi Abraham kĩ, “Isak akũ fɔ́atsã mɔ aana babi mɔ bawa a kĩ nlɛ ĩyi a.” 8Foe kayɔ nyɛ kĩ nnɛ́ babi a kĩ Abraham ma ndɛ bati ayea nyɛ Baguma babi, mbom bikĩ ɛma nɛ ye bɔhɛ kamɛ a. 9Kitonɛkĩ Baguma bɔhɛ a nyɛ, “Kateliva, lɔkɔ kĩĩ kamɛ a, maamuniki ĩya ade Sara aama obinyole a.” 10Nnɛ́ fukĩĩ odi a. Babinyole nviã a kĩ Rebeka ma a ɔlɛga nyɛ boe ɔwanyɔ Isak. 11-12Lɛmɛ nɛ ayekĩ babinyole nviã kamɛ ɔmɔa kapau fɔya nɛ foe kamɛ nɛ Baguma nhihiɛ onukpɛ̃ sũ ni, Baguma bi Rebeka kĩ, “Obinɔkɔɛ̃ a aasum obisɛ̃de a.” Ebi ye eyi kɔkɔɛ fɔmɔ ɛyama babi a. Foesũ Baguma kapau a kĩ ɛkɛna a lɛdzɛ́ nɛ tuwĩ ĩye tɔkpa a kĩ nta babi a kamɛ odi kɛna a akũ, mbom Baguma kawɛ fɔanɛ. 13Bɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ kĩ, “Nwɛ Yakob kalɛ, lɛmɛ nkesĩ Esau.”
14Lɔkɔa bɔ́alɛ kĩ Baguma lɛmɛ ládã kpĩĩ? Oowo! Fɔlá lɔmɔ kɔlaa. 15Kitonɛkĩ ebi Mose kĩ,
“Odi nyɛ odi kĩ mawɛ kĩ makɛna sɛmɛ kalɛ nkpa ni,
ade ye maakɛna sɛmɛ kalɛ nkpa a.
Ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ ye akũ kɔ yĩ kɔnya ni,
maamɔ ye kɔnya.”
16Foesũ Baguma oti kapau lɛdzɛ́ nɛ ye mbɔdibɔ ĩye lɛtsa a kĩ yawɛ a akũ, mbom lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa dzɛ̃ nɛ Baguma kɔnyakamɔ odi akũ. 17Kitonɛkĩ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa kamɛ a, Baguma bi Egipte lɛgã kĩ, “Ndzina nɔ lɛgã ayekĩ maatsã nɔ akũ ĩnyɛ yĩ kɔbɛ̃ ntsa, lɔkɔa yĩ dĩ lɛgba nɛ katinya kamɛ flee.” 18Foesũ odi nyɛ odi kĩ Baguma awɛ kĩ yamɔ kɔnya a, ade ye yamɔ kɔnya a, ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ kĩ ɛna atɔ ɔsĩ a, yafɔ̃ yana atɔ ɔsĩ.
Baguma Kalɔkpa Mɔ Kɔnyakamɔ a.
19Mi kamɛ odi aavia yĩ kĩ, “Ntɛ fɔla lɔmɔ a, nde sũ Baguma buki yanyɛ nfumusu kakpa odi? Owei aapuli eyidza ɛdza nɛ Baguma kawɛ akũ?” 20Nɔ otidziwa, owei anɛ kĩ akpa Baguma mbuayɛ lɔmɔ? Lubui lávia de ɔmɛnɛ kĩ, “Nde sũ ɔmɛ yĩ lɔmɔ?” 21Fubui ɔmɛnɛ deĩ osi kĩ yakɔa tibute a kĩ enuna ɛbɔa lɔbɔ a ɛmɛ lɛtsa a kĩ yawɛ. Mbɔɛɛ ɛlá osi kĩ yakɔa tite lɔbɔ mɔapɛ a ɛmɛ fubui nviã? Yaamɛ lɔmɔa kĩ lalɛ kadã eyi ɛkpa fuwi titiliwu, lɔkɔa ɛkɔa te nkaɛ a ɛmɛ lɛbɛbã kĩ laálɛ kadã eyi ɛkpa luwi daa akũ adzuma kakɛna. 22Ade lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma kɛna a kayɔ nɛ awĩ a. Ntɛ Baguma wɛ kĩ yanyɛ ye kalɔkpa kanya, ɛfɔ̃ bɛmɔ ye otumi, lɛmɛ ebuki ɛna ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ epini bikĩ be akũ ɛna kalɔkpa, kĩ bidum be bɛkpa kawɔla a ni, litsa odeĩ kĩ aalɛ? 23Ade ntɛ Baguma wɛ lɛmɛ kĩ yanyɛ ye kukũkpalɛ baũ a kĩ biko nɛ boe a kĩ ɛmɔ kɔnya akũ a, boe a kĩ ɛmanɛ eyi ɛkpa ye kukũkpalɛ a, 24kitonɛkĩ boe nyɛ bati a kĩ ɛpau etomɛna Yudafɔ mɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a kamɛ a ni, odeĩ kadi kalɛ? 25Ade fukĩĩ Baguma lɛ nɛ Onukpɛ̃ Ɔnyɛnɛ Hosea ovoli kamɛ kĩ,
“Bati kĩ bɛnyɛ́ yĩ ɔmaĩ bati a, maavɛ be kĩ, ‘Yĩ bati.’
Kade a kĩ ntáwɛ ke kalɛ a, maavɛ ke ‘Yĩ ɔdɔ bati.’
26Nɛ kakɔ mɔapɛ a kĩ bibi be kĩ,
‘Minyɛ́ yĩ bati’ a
Ade awã baavɛ be kĩ ‘Baguma Kĩ Edzi Nkpã Daa a babi.’ ”
27Baguma Onukpɛ̃ Ɔnyɛnɛ Yesaya bɔa fɔwɔla ɛlɛ nɛ Israelfɔ akũ kĩ,
“Ntɛ Israelfɔ nɛ lidede ndɛ mpo abuĩ dã malo ni,
be kamɛ bati sukuloo badi aana katɛ,
28kitonɛkĩ boe Ɔlate aadzɛmɔ katinya kamɛ bati pɛpɛɛpɛ mɔatsɛ, etsua lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa lukũ.”
29Yesaya buki ɛlɛ eyi kĩ,
“Ntɛ boe Ɔlate Otumifɔ Flee a ɛtatina boe babi mɔ bawa a badi ni,
kufɛ bɔdani bɔkɛna ndɛ Sodom, buketimɔ Gomora!”
Kalɛ Wĩ a Nyɛ Israelfɔ Lɛmɛ Kade.
30Foesũ litsa koũ bɔ́alɛ? Matsa kĩ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Israelfɔ a kĩ bɛtápili kĩ badzi kpĩĩ nɛ Baguma anɛ a, bɛkɛna be bati kĩ bɛkpɔla bɛtsãmɛna be katɛkado akũ. 31Ade Israelfɔ a kĩ bɛkawɛ mbla a kĩ yaakɛna be bati kpĩĩ a, tápuli bɛkɛna nɛ mbla a akũ a. 32Litsa sũ bɛtápuli? Kitonɛkĩ bɛtákɔa katɛkado bɛwɛ foe, mbom bɛkɔa anɛ bite nɛ be mɔawɛ mbɔdibɔ akũ. Nɛ foesũ bitula nɛ Kristo kĩ ɛla ndɛ de a kĩ bati atula nɛ de akũ a akũ, 33ndɛ ayekĩ bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ kĩ,
“Midã! Nkɔa de lidi mayi nɛ Zion,
de kĩ bati aatula nɛ de akũ bɛnɛ bɛtɔ.
Lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ ye edo ni,
kɔnyɔã lɛláawo ye.”

Title: ROMAFƆ 10
Content:
1Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, lɛtsa a kĩ mawɛ nɛ yĩ ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ flee, mɔ mpaɛ kĩ mabɔa nɛ de akũ kakpa Baguma nyɛ kĩ, ɛfɔ̃ yĩ awɛ kade bati bɛna nkpã katɛ! 2Maapuli ndi adansiɛ kĩ bɛkɔa be akũ flee bɛkpa Baguma ɔsum, lɛmɛ binyína ayekĩ basum ye nɛ osi wĩ akũ a kanyina wĩ. 3Bɛtányi osi a kĩ Baguma atsã kabu bati kĩ bidzi kpĩĩ nɛ ye anɛ, foesũ bɛwɛ be mɔawɛ tisi kĩ batsã bɛkɛna fɔtsa biwo Baguma anɛ, ade foesũ bɛtákɔa be akũ bɛkpa Baguma osi a kĩ yatsã kakɛna bati kpĩĩ a. 4Kitonɛkĩ Kristo nyɛ Mose mbla a kawũna, ayekĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ ye edo ni, baabu ye oti kpĩĩ.
Baguma Aakpa Odi Nyɛ Odi Nkpã.
5Mose tsɛlɛ eyi ɛtsa ayekĩ oti adzi kpĩĩ nɛ Baguma anɛ ntɛ edi mbla a akũ. Ɛlɛ kĩ, “Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛkɛna nɛ mbla a akũ pɛpɛɛpɛ ni, yaana nkpã.” 6Lɛmɛ lɛtsa a kĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ nɛ ayekĩ oti aadã kpĩĩ nɛ katɛkado kamɛ nyɛ kĩ, “Tavia nɔ akũ kĩ, ‘Owei aade ɛnaa ode?’ kĩ fɔatsa kĩ ɛnaakpã Kristo eto kanɔkpade ede ɛya. 7Ĩye tavia kĩ, ‘Owei aaka ɛnaa kayɔ?’ Foe nyɛ kĩ owei aanaa kanɔkpade ɛnaakpã Kristo ɛyamɛna.”
8Lɛtsa a kĩ yatsa a nyɛ kĩ, “Baguma kalɛ a fuã nɔ plɛplɛplɛ, kideĩ nɛ nɔ onukpɛ̃ mɔ nɔ ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ.” Ade katɛkado ɔlɛdo a kĩ bɔade lɛtsã nɛ ke akũ a nɛ awĩ a. 9Ntɛ ɔkɔa onukpɛ̃ ɔlɛ kĩ Yesu nyɛ boe Ɔlate, mɔ ɔtɛ odo nɛ nɔ ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kĩ Baguma dzɛla ye etomɛna banɔkpa kamɛ ni, Baguma aakpa nɔ nkpã. 10Kitonɛkĩ ɔwɔlɛ bakɔa katɛ kado kana kadzi kpĩĩ, ade onukpɛ̃ bakɔa kanyɛ foe kanya mɔ Baguma akpa boe nkpã. 11Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ ye edo lɛláatɛ kɔnyɔã.” 12Odi nyɛ odi deĩ nɛ foe kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ ntsitsemu adima lɛláa Yudafɔ mɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a kayite. Baguma mɔapɛ a nyɛ bati flee Ɔlate, ade yakpa akũ kana fɔtsa nhila pii bikĩ babɔa mpaɛ kavɛ ye a. 13Ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ a, “Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaavɛ boe Ɔlate a dĩ ni, yaana nkpã.”
14Lɛmɛ nde bati aakɛna bɛvɛ oti a kĩ bɛtátɛ ye bido a? Nde baakɛna bɛtɛ oti a kĩ bɛtánu ye fɔlɛtsa a bido? Ade ntɛ bɛtáde lɛtsã nɛ fɔlɛtsa a akũ a, nde baakɛna binu ye dĩ? 15Ade nde baakɛna bide lɛtsã Baguma fɔlɛtsa ntɛ bɛtádo fɔtɔ banyanɛ? Ade foe akũ mɔ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Batɔ a kĩ bɛyaade lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ a kaya alɛ kadã paa!”
16Lɛmɛ nnɛ́ bati flee lɛtɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a, kitonɛkĩ Yesaya lɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, owei lɛtɛ boe kalɛ a edo?” 17Foesũ katɛkado ato kalɛ a kanu kamɛ, ade fɔlɛtsa a kanu ato lɛtsã kade nɛ Kristo akũ a. 18Lɛmɛ mavia kĩ ɔnɔkɔali fɔanɛ kĩ bɛtánu Baguma fɔlɛtsa a kɔlaa? Ɔnɔkɔali binu foe, kitonɛkĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ,
“Lɛtsã badenɛ a odo tsɛna katinya kamɛ flee,
ade be fɔlɛtsa a gba fɔnawo katinya kawũnakɔ̃ a flee.”
19Mavia bio kĩ lɔkɔa kanu Israelfɔ a tánu fɔlɛtsa a kayɔ? Mose mɔawɛ lɛnya lɔtɔ ɛlɛ kĩ, Baguma lɛ kĩ,
“Maafɔ̃ minɔ lineke mɔ bati kĩ bɛnyɛ́ ɔmaĩ a.
Maakɔa ɔmaĩ a kĩ ɛtábinya anɛ a ndo mi kalɔkpa.”
20Ade Yesaya do ɔwɔlɛ ɛba ebi be kĩ, Baguma lɛ kĩ,
“Bati a kĩ bɛtáwɛ yĩ liti osi a, ade be lɛmɔ́ yĩ a
bati a kĩ bɛtávia yĩ akũ a, ade be ĩnyɛ yĩ akũ ntsa a.”
21Baguma buki ɛlɛ nɛ Israelfɔ akũ kĩ,
“Luwi mɔa flee ndzɛlɛ yĩ akpɔ kamɛ nkpa
bati a kĩ bideĩ atɔ ɔsĩ,
kĩ biyidza bɛdza nɛ yĩ akũ lɛmɛ a.”

Title: ROMAFƆ 11
Content:
Baguma Mɔ́ Israel Ɔmaĩ a Kɔnya.
1Foesũ mavia kĩ Baguma pu ye mɔawɛ bati a flefle? Oowo! Yĩ mɔawɛ Israelni manɛ, ĩnyɛ Abraham kasinu ɔwa, kĩ nto Benyamin katete a kamɛ. 2Baguma tápu ye ɔmaĩ a kĩ ɛpau eyi kito kayɔkayi a. Mbɔɛɛ minyína lɛtsa a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ, awã a kĩ Eliya ke Baguma aduli nɛ Israelfɔ lɔlɔ a? Ɛlɛ kĩ, 3“Boe Ɔlate, bɛkɔ nɔ onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ, ade bidzuli nɔ afɔlibɔ tɛtɛnyɛ a. Yĩ odi keĩ lite ade bawɛ kĩ bakɔ yĩ malo a!” 4Lɛmɛ nde Baguma kpa Eliya mbuayɛ? Ebi ye kĩ, “Ntina bati mpim evũkɔnɔ kĩ bɛtásum Baal baviɔ̃ a ĩyi nkpa yĩ akũ.” 5Ade aye fɔla nɛ finyaa lɔkɔ kĩĩ kamɛ malo a. Israelfɔ sukuloo badi te kĩ Baguma mɔ be kɔnya ɛpau eyi a. 6Baguma mɔ be kɔnya, ɛpau be, nnɛ́ nɛ be adzuma a kĩ bɛkɛna a sũ. Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ bati kapau dzɛ̃ nɛ be lɛkɛnana akũ ni, kekɔ̃ ye kɔnyakamɔ a buki kɔnyɛ́ kɔnyakamɔ.
7Foesũ nde? Israelfɔ a tána lɛtsa a kĩ bɛkawɛ a. Lɛmɛ be kamɛ badi sukuloo a kĩ Baguma pau a lɛna foe, ade be nkaɛ kɛna atɔ ɔsĩ nɛ Baguma kavɛ akũ a. 8Ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ,
“Baguma fɔ̃ be adzuni mɔ be tɔwɔlɛ dɔ kĩ baánu fɔlɛtsa kayɔ,
Ade kito nɛ ke kɛyawo nviã kĩĩ a,
baápuli bɛmɔ́ biyi ɔsũ ĩye binu foe kayɔ.”
9Ade Dawid lɛ kĩ,
“Baguma ɛfɔ̃ be kanyakɔ̃ opunu ɛdani kpɛĩ epi be,
mɔ lɛtsa a kĩ baatula bɛtɔ fɔnya be sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ.
10Ɛfɔ̃ be anɛ eke ɔtũ ayekĩ bɛláamɔ fɔkɔ,
ɛfɔ̃ bikũũkũ nɛ be lubokamɔ kayɔ daa daa.”
11Finyaa mavia kĩ, kĩ Yudafɔ tula bɛnɛ bɛtɔ a, bɛkahɔ kɔlaa nɛ awã? Oowo! Ayekĩ bɛkɛna tɔkpa sũ ni, nkpã katɛ a ya nɛ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a sɛkɛ̃, ayekĩ Yudafɔ a aanɔ be lineke. 12Ntɛ Yudafɔ tɔkpa yamɛna akũ kana nhila baũ nɛ katinya kamɛ, mɔ ntɛ be hũhũ kamɛ katɔ a ma bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a nhila pii ni, kekɔ̃ nhila a aablusu paa ntɛ Yudafɔ a flee dani bɛkɛna Baguma bade.
Bati Kĩ Bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a Malo Na Nkpã Katɛ.
13Ade mi a kĩ minyɛ́ Yudafɔ a mabi fɔlɛtsa finyaa a. Ayekĩ ĩnyɛ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ sũ ni, maapia nɛ adzuma a akũ. 14Ɔsa fɔ́atsã ye kakɛna kamɛ ni, maapuli nfɔ̃ yĩ kade bati lɛnɔ lineke ayekĩ maapuli ntɛ badi nkpã. 15Kitonɛkĩ kĩ Baguma fɔnɛ be awɛ a, ɛkpɔla batidziwa kĩ bɛnyɛ ye bakesĩnɛ a ɛkɛna be ye bakɔba. Foesũ nde fɔ́ana ntɛ Baguma buki ɛtɛ be? Fɔ́ana ndɛ nkpã ɛkpa banɔkpa! 16Ntɛ abodoo sɛkɛ sɛtɔnyade a kĩ bɛkɔa bɛkpa Baguma akũ kpalɛ ni, kekɔ̃ ye nkaɛ a lɛmɛ akũ kpalɛ. Ade ayea ntɛ bɛkɔa kutse tunu bɛbɔa afɔliɛ bɛkpa Baguma ni, koe tɛnanɛ a lɛmɛ nyɛ ye tide.
17Bitsua kugua kutse kĩ bidu a tɛnanɛ tidi bɛnyɛ, ade bɛkɔa lupo kamɛ kugua kutsede tɛnanɛ bɛyatalɛ nɛ koe akũ a. Mi a kĩ minyɛ́ Yudafɔ a la ndɛ lupo kamɛ kutse tɛnanɛ a kĩ bɛkɔa bɛyatalɛ nɛ kukĩ bidu akũ a, ade finyaa míana kutse a tunu kamɛ funitsã a fudi. 18Foesũ mitasupa bikĩ bitsua bɛnyɛ ndɛ tɛnanɛ aye a. Nde sũ miapia akũ mitsa be? Mite anɛ kĩ tɛnanɛ kɛkɛ mianɛ, nnɛ́ mi nyɛ kutse tunu a, mbom tunu a pini mi. 19Lɛmɛ ɔsa nɔ aalɛ kĩ, “Bitsua tɛnanɛ a bɛnyɛ kĩ yĩ nna nɛ te kadokɔ̃.” 20Fɔnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali. Bitsua te kitonɛkĩ bɛtátɛ bido, ade mina kadzakɔ̃ nɛ mi katɛkado sũ a, foesũ mitapia nɛ foe akũ, mbom mikavila. 21Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ Baguma támɔ Yudafɔ a kĩ bɛla ndɛ kutse kpĩĩ a tɛnanɛ a kɔnya ni, ɔkɔna kĩ yaamɔ nɔ kɔnya?
22Dã ayekĩ Baguma deĩ sɛmɛ kalɛ, mɔ ayekĩ edeĩ ɔsĩ. Baguma deĩ ɔsĩ nɛ bikĩ bɛnɛ bɛtɔ akũ, lɛmɛ edeĩ sɛmɛ kalɛ ɛkpa nɔ ntɛ osila odzi nɛ ye sɛmɛ kalɛ a kamɛ. Lɛmɛ ntɛ ɔtádzi lɔmɔ ni, Baguma aatsua nɔ malo ɛnyɛ nɛ kutse a akũ. 23Ade ntɛ Yudafɔ a muniki bɛyatɛ Baguma bidoi ni, Baguma aakɔa be ɛdzɛla nɛ be kadzakɔ̃ kɔɛ a, kitonɛkĩ Baguma aapuli ɛkɛna foe. 24Mi a kĩ minyɛ́ Yudafɔ a, mila ndɛ lupo kamɛ kugua kutse tɛnanɛ a kĩ bitsua bɛyatalɛ nɛ kugua kutse wĩ a akũ a aye. Yudafɔ a la ndɛ kugua kutse a kĩ bidu a, foesũ fɔlá ɔsĩ fɔkpa Baguma kĩ yaabuki ɛkɔa kugua kutse mɔawɛ tɛnanɛ a kĩ bitsua bɛnyɛ a ɛtalɛ nɛ kutse mɔawɛ a akũ.
Baguma Amɔ Bati Flee Kɔnya.
