25Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ɔnɔkɔali fɔlɛtsa bɛlawa fudi deĩ kĩ mawɛ kĩ minyi, ayekĩ miláabu mi akũ anyansãfɔ. Ade foe nyɛ kĩ Israelfɔ badi atɔ ɔsĩ a aana kɛnaawo kĩ, bati a kĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a, kakã flee ya nɛ Baguma sɛkɛ̃. 26Ntɛ fɔya lɔmɔ fuyua a lɔkɔa Yudafɔ a flee aana katɛ, ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ,
“Ɔtɛnɛ a aato Zion ɛya.
Yaanyɛ ablɔ fɔtsa flee ɛnɛmɛna nɛ Yakob katete a kamɛ a.
27Maakɛna bɔhɛ kĩĩ mɔ be,
ntɛ ĩnyɛ be tɔkpa nnamɛna.”
28Nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ kɔ̃ ni, Yudafɔ a dani Baguma bakesĩnɛ nɛ mi a kĩ minyɛ́ Yudafɔ a sũ. Lɛmɛ nɛ Baguma be kapau sũ ni, bɛnyɛ Baguma bakɔba nɛ be bawanyɔ sũ. 29Kitonɛkĩ Baguma ládani ye adzuni nɛ oti a kĩ ɛpau ĩye ehila a akũ. 30Kɔkɔɛ a, mi a kĩ minyɛ́ Yudafɔ a, mitákɛna nɛ Baguma kawɛ akũ, lɛmɛ finyaa Baguma mɔ mi kɔnya kitonɛkĩ Yudafɔ a na atɔ ɔsĩ. 31Ade ayea kɔnya a kĩ Baguma mɔ mi a sũ ni, finyaa Yudafɔ lɛmɛ lákɛna nɛ Baguma kawɛ akũ ayekĩ Baguma aamɔ be malo kɔnya. 32Ayekĩ batidziwa flee sĩ kĩ baátse Baguma sũ ni, ɛfɔ̃ bati flee kɛna fɔkɔ katabu kɔla bawanɛ, ayekĩ yaamɔ be flee kɔnya.
Fɔfɛta Kĩ Bumu Baguma.
33Baguma akũ kana fɔtsa nɛ lidede paa!
Ye nyansã mɔ kadikanyi kamɛ dzũ paa!
Owei aapuli ɛnyɛ ye kɔtɔkakɔ kamɛ?
Owei aapuli enu ye tisi kayɔ?
34Ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ,
“Owei nyina boe Ɔlate a adzuni?
Owei aapuli ɛkpa ye kɔdɛ?
35Owei lɛkpa Baguma litsedi tɔ̃,
ayekĩ yaakɛna ese ye kɔtɔ?”
36Kitonɛkĩ Baguma lɛbɔa fɔtsa flee,
ye kɔbɛ̃ akũ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa dzi nkpã,
ade ye kamɛ lɛmɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa aawũna a.
Obu mɔ kamu nyɛ Baguma fude daa.
Fɔya lɔmɔ.

Title: ROMAFƆ 12
Content:
Nkpã Wĩ Kĩ Ɛfɛta Kadzi Nɛ Baguma Adzuma Kamɛ.
1Foesũ nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ayekĩ Baguma amɔ boe kɔnya sũ ni, make mi aduli paa kĩ mikɔa mi akũ mikpa Baguma ndɛ afɔliɛ fɔtsa kĩ fudeĩ nkpã, kĩ foe akũ kpalɛ, fɔawo ye anɛ. Ade fukĩĩ nyɛ ayekĩ miasum Baguma nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ mɔ mi tɔwɔlɛ a. 2Mitadzi nkpã ndɛ ayekĩ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ bati adzi nɛ tɔkpa kakɛna kamɛ a, mbom mifɔ̃ Baguma ɛdani mi adzuni ɛkɛna avɔɛ̃ lɔkɔa midani ɔbla. Fɔ́afɔ̃ minyi Baguma kawɛ, fɔtsa a kĩ fɔnɛnɛ, kĩ fɔawo ye anɛ, fɔkpɔla lɛmɛ a.
3Nɛ Baguma kɔnyakamɔ futetsa baũ a kĩ ɛkpa yĩ sũ ni, mabi mi kamɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtabu ye tɔnɔkɔɛ̃ ɛba ayekĩ kɛfɛta. Nɛ foe kadokɔ̃ a, ɛkɔna fɔtsa a kĩ fɔatsa akũ kadɔla, lɔkɔa ɛdzɛmɔ ye akũ ɛdã nɛ katɛkado a kĩ Baguma kpa ye a onukpɛ̃.
4Ayekĩ budeĩ sukɛna fɔkɔ kumɛkumɛ pii nɛ oti mɔawɛ a kamɛ, kĩ fɔakɛna tudzuma futefute a, 5ade ayea titɔ kĩ bati pii bɔanɛ malo ni, oti mɔa bɔanɛ nɛ Kristo kamɛ, kĩ bɔtsamɔ akũ ndɛ sukɛna fɔkɔ futefute nɛ oti mɔa kamɛ. 6Baguma mɔ boe kɔnya, ɛkpa boe futetsa futefute, foesũ mifɔ̃ bɔkɛna foe akũ adzuma nɛ ye kɔnyakamɔ a onukpɛ̃. Ntɛ boe futetsa nyɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa onukpɛ̃ kanyɛ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ bɔakɛna nɛ katɛkado a kĩ budeĩ a onukpɛ̃. 7Ntɛ boe futetsa nyɛ kĩ busum bati ni, kɛnɛ kĩ busum be ayekĩ kɛfɛta, ntɛ futetsa nyɛ fɔtsa katsa ni, kɛnɛ kĩ bɔtsa fɔtsa. 8Ntɛ fɔnyɛ bati ɔwɔlɛ kɔbɛ̃ kado ni, kɛnɛ kĩ bɔkɛna foe. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakpa bati fɔtsa ni, ɛkɛna foe mɔ ɔwɔlɛ faa. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ bati onukpɛ̃ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ ɛkɛna adzuma mɔ ɔsĩ, ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna sɛmɛ kalɛ kakɛna ni, kɛnɛ kĩ ɛkɛna foe mɔ anɛ kakpalɛ.
9Miwɛ akũ kalɛ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ. Mikesĩ tɔkpa, lɔkɔa mipi fɔtsa wĩ midomɔ akũ. 10Miwɛ akũ akũ kalɛ ndɛ bawaɛ̃ nɛ Kristo kamɛ aye, ade odi nyɛ odi ɛbɔa mbɔdi ɛkɔa obu ɛkpa ɔwaɛ̃ a. 11Mikɛna adzuma mɔ ɔsĩ ade mitana ɔnyɔnɛ a. Misum boe Ɔlate a mɔ ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kɔbɛ̃. 12Mifɔ̃ mi kɔnɛte a kɔkpã mi nɛ kawɔlɛ kamɛ. Mina ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ nɛ mi ɔhau kamɛ, mikaabɔa mpaɛ daa daa. 13Mibumɔ asɔli bati a kĩ badi ahiã a, ade mitɛ banɔvɔɛ̃ faa nɛ mi tɔtɔ kamɛ a.
14Miwã Baguma kĩ ehila bikĩ bitomɔ mi liti a. Mivia kĩ ehila be, ɛtadum be. 15Mimɔ kawɔlɛ mɔ bikĩ bamɔ kawɔlɛ, ade mibe mɔ bikĩ babe lɛmɛ a. 16Mina nɛ adzuni mɔapɛ kamɛ mikpa odi nyɛ odi. Mitapia akũ, mbom mikɛna tɔkɔba mɔ bikĩ bɛdɔla be akũ kĩ bati lábu nɛ lɛtsama kamɛ a. Mitabu mi akũ kĩ minyina kadi.
17Ntɛ oti odi fum nɔ ni, takɔa tɔkpa ose ye kɔtɔ. Mibɔa mbɔdi mikɛna lɛtsa kĩ odi nyɛ odi abu kĩ lɛnɛnɛ a. 18Ntɛ fɔ́alɛ kakɛna, mɔ fɔ́ato mi sɛkɛ̃ ni, mimɔ odi nyɛ odi midzi nɛ lukudɔ kamɛ. 19Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mitakɛna odima tɔkpa mise kɔtɔ da, mbom mifɔ̃ Baguma kalɔkpa kɛkɛna foe. Kitonɛkĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, Ɔlate a lɛ kĩ, “Yĩ aavɛlɛ sɔtɔ, yĩ aakɛna nse kɔtɔ.” 20Lɛmɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ,
“Ntɛ kɔlɛ akɔ nɔ okesĩnɛ ni, kpa ye funitsã ɛnya.
Ntɛ ɔmɔado akɔ ye ni, kpa ye mui ɛmɔa.
Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ ɔkɛna fukĩĩ ni, aafɔ̃ kɔnyɔã liwo ye paa.”
21Tafɔ̃ tɔkpa lɛnya nɔ akũ, mbom kɔa tuwĩ kanya tɔkpa akũ.

Title: ROMAFƆ 13
Content:
Mikɔa Obu Mikpa Ɔmaĩ Akũ Banyanɛ.
1Kɛnɛ kĩ odi nyɛ odi ebu ɔmaĩ akũ banyanɛ, kitonɛkĩ otumi odima lɛláa kĩ ɛtáto Baguma sɛkɛ̃, ade ɔmaĩ akũ banyanɛ a kĩ bidzi finyaa a, Baguma lidzina be. 2Foesũ odi nyɛ odi kĩ eyidza ɛdza nɛ ɔmaĩ akũ banyanɛ otumi akũ a, yidza ɛdza nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ ehihiɛ eyi a akũ. Ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna lɔmɔ a, aavɛlɛ kɔtɔkaku ɛkpa ye mɔawɛ.
3Bati a kĩ bakɛna tuwĩ a, lávila bati akũ banyanɛ, mbom bikĩ bakɛna tɔkpa a avila be. Ɔwɛ kĩ bati akũ ɔnyanɛ ɛtahũnahũna nɔ? Kekɔ̃ kɛna lɛtsa a kĩ lɛnɛnɛ, lɔkɔa yaamu nɔ. 4Kitonɛkĩ bati akũ ɔnyanɛ a nyɛ Baguma ɔsumunɛ kĩ yakɛna adzuma ɛkpa nɔ kalɛ. Lɛmɛ ntɛ ɔkɛna tɔkpa kɔ̃ ni, kekɔ̃ vila ye, kitonɛkĩ edeĩ kɔbɛ̃ kĩ yavɛlɛ sɔtɔ ndɛ ayekĩ kɛfɛta. Baguma fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ yanɛ, ade yadã kĩ bɛkpa bikĩ bɛkɛna tɔkpa a Baguma sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ a.
5Nɛ fukĩ sũ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ oti adɔla akũ ɛkpa ɔmaĩ akũ banyanɛ a, nnɛ́ nɛ Baguma sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ odi sũ, mbom ayekĩ oti ɔwɔlɛ fɔ̃ enyina tuwĩ a sũ.
6Ade fukĩĩ lɛmɛ sũ miase ɔmaĩ tɔgɔlɛ a, kitonɛkĩ ɔmaĩ akũ banyanɛ a akɛna adzuma kakpa Baguma ntɛ bɛkɛna be tudzuma tɛkpɔla. 7Foesũ mise be lɛtsa a kĩ midzimɔ be a. Mise ɔgɔlɛ mɔ dutɛ mikpa bikĩ kɛfɛta. Mivila oti a kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ bivila a, ade mibu oti a kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ bɛkpa obu a.
Ayekĩ Bɔadzi Mɔ Akũ Akũ.
8Mitadzimɔ odima kɔtɔ, kɔtɔ a kĩ miadzimɛna a nyɛ kĩ miwɛ mi akũ akũ kalɛ. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛwɛ ɔwaɛ̃ kalɛ ni, ɛkɛna nɛ Baguma mbla a flee akũ. 9Mbla a kĩ Baguma kpa a lɛ kĩ, “Tabɔa adɔpaa, takɔ oti, taye, tayɔɔlɛ anɛ nɛ nɔ ɔkɔba fɔtsa akũ,” mɔ tɛbɛbã a kĩ tibu a flee boomu nɛ mbla mɔapɛ kamɛ kĩ, “Wɛ nɔ ɔkɔba kalɛ ndɛ ayekĩ awɛ nɔ akũ kalɛ a.” 10Ntɛ awɛ odi kalɛ ni, ɔláakɛna tɔkpa nɛ ye akũ, foesũ ɔdɔ nyɛ mbla a flee akũ kakɛna.
11Kɛnɛ kĩ miakɛna fukĩĩ, kitonɛkĩ minyina kĩ lɔkɔ wo ɔtɔ kĩ mianyinya nɛ tida kamɛ. Kitonɛkĩ lɔkɔ a kĩ Baguma aatɛ boe a nkpã fuã finyaa lɛba lɔkɔ a kĩ bɔnya lɔtɔ bɔtɛ Kristo budo a. 12Lɛnyɛ lɔkɔ tɛ̃ liyua, kade lamɛna kanyina. Mifɔ̃ bɔfɔ̃ ɔtũ kamɛ fɔtsa kakɛna, lɔkɔa bɔbɔɛ kawũ kanɔ fɔtsa bɔbla bɔkpa kanɔ nɛ ɔhaĩ kamɛ. 13Mifɔ̃ bupi boe akũ kapi wĩ ndɛ bati kĩ bidzi nɛ ɔhaĩ kamɛ. Mitafɔ̃ bɔna nɛ kanya mɔ futo kawɔlɛ mɔ bavɛ kawuga kamɛ, ĩye adɔpaa kabɔa, ĩye ablɔ kadi, ĩye kapaa mɔ anɛngbã kakɛna kamɛ. 14Mbom mibɔɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo kawũ fɔtsa mido ndɛ atadiɛ aye, lɔkɔa mifɔ̃ mi sukɛna akũ kadã kakɔna miyaadani se odo fɔtsa akũ bakɛnanɛ.

Title: ROMAFƆ 14
Content:
Mitadzɛmɔ Mɔ Mi Bakɔba Kristofɔ.
1Mitɛ oti a kĩ ɛtátim nɛ katɛkado kamɛ a mido nɛ mi kamɛ faa, mitavɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa mɔ ye nɛ lɛtsa kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ ɛkɛna mɔ likĩ kɛtáfɛta kĩ ɛkɛna a akũ. 2Oti odi katɛkado kpa ye osi kĩ ɛnya funitsã fudi nyɛ fufudi, lɛmɛ oti a kĩ ye katɛkado tátim a kɔ̃ anya kɔba kamɛ funitsã odi. 3Oti a kĩ yanya lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a, ɛtasupa oti a kĩ yaánya foe. Ade oti a kĩ yanya kɔba funitsã odi a, ɛtadzɛmɔ ekĩ yanya lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa, kitonɛkĩ Baguma tɛ ye.
4Owei anɛ kĩ adzɛmɔ oti bɛbã ɔsumunɛ? Ye mɔawɛ ɔlate aamɔ ntɛ ɛdzɛ̃ pintii ĩye ɛtɔ. Lɛmɛ yaanya akũ kitonɛkĩ boe Ɔlate a aapuli ɛkɛna ye ɛdza pintii. 5Oti odi abu kĩ luwi lidi sĩ lɛba fuwi bɛbã a, ade odi lɛmɛ adã kĩ fuwi a flee keti a. Nɛ fukĩĩ odu akũ a, odi nyɛ odi ɛdza pintii nɛ kakɔ mɔa. 6Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ebu luwi lidi paa ni, ɛkɛna foe kĩ yado boe Ɔlate a obu. Ade ayea odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaánya funitsã fudi a, kɛna foe kĩ yado boe Ɔlate a obu, ade yanyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ nɛ foe akũ a. 7Boe kamɛ odima lidzí nkpã ɛkpa ye akũ odi, ade boe kamɛ odima láku lɛmɛ kakpa ye akũ odi a. 8Ntɛ budzi nkpã ni, boe Ɔlate a budzi bɔkpa, ade ntɛ buku a, boe Ɔlate a buku bɔkpa. Foesũ ntɛ budzi nkpã o-o ĩye buku o-o, boe Ɔlate a bade bɔanɛ.
9Ade fukĩĩ sũ mɔ Kristo ku, ade eyidza edzi nkpã ayekĩ yaanya bikĩ bidzi nkpã mɔ bikĩ biku a Ɔlate a. 10Ade nɔ kɔ̃, nde sũ akɔ awaɛ̃ kɔtɔ? Ĩye nɔ malo nde sũ asupa awaɛ̃? Boe a flee bɔ́adza nɛ Baguma anɛ kamɛ lɔkɔa ɛdzɛmɔ boe. 11Kitonɛkĩ bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ kĩ,
“Ɔlate a lɛ kĩ, ‘Kĩ ndzi nkpã kĩĩ a,
odi nyɛ odi aake aduli ɛkpa yĩ,
ade odi nyɛ odi aabinya onukpɛ̃ ɛlɛ kĩ
yĩ nyɛ Baguma a.’ ”
12Foesũ boe kamɛ odi nyɛ odi aakpa Baguma ye mɔawɛ akũ akunta.
Tafɔ̃ Awaɛ̃ Okristoni Lɛkɛna Tɔkpa.
13Foesũ mifɔ̃ bɔfɔ̃ akũ akũ kadzɛmɛna, kakɔ kɔtɔ. Fukĩ miakɛna nyɛ kĩ mikɛna adzuma kĩ miláakɛna lɛtsama kĩ fɔ́afɔ̃ awaɛ̃ lɛtɔ ĩye fɔfɔ̃ ɛkɛna tɔkpa. 14Yĩ ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu sũ, ntɛ ndo kĩ funitsã fudima nɛ foe akũ akũ lɛnyɛ́ efĩĩ fɔtsa. Lɛmɛ ntɛ odi tɛ edo kĩ funitsã fudi akũ tákpalɛ ni, kekɔ̃ fɔkɛna efĩĩ fɔtsa fɔkpa ye.
15Ntɛ nɔ funitsã kĩ anya sũ awaɛ̃ tɛ kalɔɛ ni, kekɔ̃ nnɛ́ ɔdɔ kamɛ ɔtsɛ̃mɔ ye. Tafɔ̃ funitsã a kĩ anya a lɛwɔla oti a kĩ ye lɔlɔ Kristo ku a. 16Foesũ mitafɔ̃ bati bɛbã lisupa fɔtsa a kĩ mi miakɔna kĩ fɔnɛnɛ a. 17Kitonɛkĩ Baguma lɛgãkanya a lɛnyɛ́ kanya mɔ kamɔa, mbom fɔnyɛ tuwĩ kakɛna mɔ lukudɔ, mɔ kawɔlɛ kĩ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a akpa a. 18Ade ntɛ odi asum Kristo nɛ osi kĩĩ akũ a, yawo Baguma anɛ ade bati lɛmɛ akpa ye obu a.
19Foesũ mifɔ̃ boe botaɛ ɛnya kĩ bɔakɛna lɛtsa a kĩ layamɛna lukudɔ, titiliwu mɔ fukĩ fɔ́abumɛna akũ akũ. 20Mitabula Baguma adzuma kade nɛ funitsã sũ. Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, funitsã flee akũ kpalɛ fɔkpa kanya, lɛmɛ fɔnɛ́nɛ kĩ banya lɛtsa kĩ laha odi fɔfɔ̃ ɛkɛna tɔkpa. 21Lɛtsa wĩde nyɛ kĩ taba sɛkɛna ĩye ɔmɔa waĩ ĩye akɛna lɛtsa bɛbã lidima kĩ fɔ́afɔ̃ awaɛ̃ lɛkɛna tɔkpa.
22Fɔ̃ lɛtsa a kĩ ɔtɛ odo nɛ fɔtsa kĩĩ akũ a, fɔna nɛ mimɔ nɔ Baguma odi kayite. Baguma hila oti a kĩ ɛtákɔ ye akũ kɔtɔ nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ ɛkɛna, ɛmɔ kĩ lɛnɛnɛ a sũ. 23Lɛmɛ ntɛ odi anya lɛtsa kĩ ye ɔwɔlɛ tákpa ye osi a, Baguma akɔ ye kɔtɔ, kitonɛkĩ lɛtsa a kĩ ɛkɛna a táto katɛkado kamɛ. Lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ oti akɛna kĩ fɔtáto katɛkado kamɛ ni, tɔkpa tanɛ.

Title: ROMAFƆ 15
Content:
Mifɔ̃ Bɔkɛna Lɛtsa a Kĩ Laawo Bati Bɛbã Mbom Anɛ.
1Kɛnɛ kĩ boe a kĩ budeĩ ɔsĩ nɛ katɛkado kamɛ a, bɔabumɔ bati a kĩ be katɛkado lɛlá ɔsĩ a nɛ be ɔhau kamɛ. Kɛtánɛ kĩ bɔakɛna lɛtsa a kĩ laawo boe mɔawɛ anɛ. 2Mifɔ̃ boe kamɛ odi nyɛ odi ɛkɛna lɛtsa a kĩ laawo boe bakɔba anɛ ayekĩ fɔ́alɛ fɔkpa be, bitim nɛ be katɛkado kamɛ. 3Kitonɛkĩ Kristo malo tákɛna fɔtsa a kĩ fuwo ye anɛ, mbom ndɛ ayekĩ bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ kĩ, Kristo bi Baguma kĩ, “Fuvũnatsa a kĩ bɛta bɛkpa nɔ a, yako nɛ yĩ akũ.” 4Ade lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ biyi nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ a, bɛtsɛlɛ foe batsa boe fɔtsa, kĩ bɔkɔa ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ mɔ Baguma fɔlɛtsa bɔdza pintii, budo ɔwɔlɛ bɔna lɛtsa a kĩ bɔadã anɛ a.
5Baguma a kĩ ye nyɛ ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ mɔ kɔbɛ̃ kado katokɔ̃ a, ɛfɔ̃ mina onukpɛ̃ mɔa nɛ mi kamɛ, mitomɔ Kristo Yesu osi a kĩ ɛtsa a, 6ayekĩ mi flee míakɔa ɔwɔlɛ mɔa mɔ odo mɔa mimu Baguma, kĩ ɛnyɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo Ɔlɛga a.
Paulo Kɔa Kalɛ Wĩ a Ɛma Bikĩ Bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a Lɛmɛ.
7Foesũ mitɛ mi bawaɛ̃ ndɛ ayekĩ Kristo tɛ mi a, fɔnya obu fɔkpa Baguma. 8Mabi mi kĩ Kristo yakɛna Yudafɔ a ɔsumunɛ, ɛkɔa ɛtsa kĩ Baguma adi ɔnɔkɔali, lɔkɔa ete de nɛ bɔhɛ a kĩ Baguma kɛna mɔ Yudafɔ bawanyɔ a akũ, 9ayekĩ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a lɛmɛ aamu Baguma nɛ ye kɔnyakamɔ sũ. Ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ,
“Nɛ foesũ maamu nɔ nɛ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a kamɛ.
Maasã kamu tɔnɔ ndɛla nɔ dĩ nɛ ode.”
10Ade bibuki bɛtsɛlɛ biyi kĩ,
“Mi a kĩ minyɛ́ Yudafɔ a,
mimɔ kawɔlɛ mɔ Baguma bade a.”
11Katsɛlɛ bɛbã lɛ kĩ,
“Mi a kĩ minyɛ́ Yudafɔ a flee mimu boe Ɔlate a.
Mi fude fude flee mimu ye!”
12Ade Yesaya lɛmɛ lɛ kĩ,
“Isai kasinu a kamɛ obi odi aanɛ ɛta,
ye aayanya bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a akũ.
Ade ye akũ baakɔa anɛ bite a.”
13Baguma a kĩ ye akũ bɔate anɛ a ɛfɔ̃ kawɔlɛ mɔ lukudɔ lɛtɛ mi kamɛ nɛ mi ye katɛkado sũ, ayekĩ mi kɔnɛte a aakabo anɛ nɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa kɔbɛ̃ a kamɛ.
Paulo Nyɛ Lɛtsa a Sũ Kĩ Ɛtsɛlɛ Fɔlɛtsa Kĩĩ a Kayɔ.
14Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, yĩ mɔawɛ a ntɛ ndo paa kĩ fɔtsa wĩ kakɛna tɛ mi kamɛkamɛ, ade minyina kadi pii kĩ míapuli midɛ akũ akũ. 15Lɛmɛ nɛ ovoli kĩĩ kamɛ a, ndo ɔwɔlɛ ntsɛlɛ fɔtsa fudi faa kĩ mabuki nkɔa nkai mi foe. Ndo ɔwɔlɛ kitonɛkĩ Baguma mɔ yĩ kɔnya ɛkɔa adzuma kĩĩ edo yĩ nɛ awɛ, 16kĩ ĩnya Kristo Yesu ɔsumunɛ nkɛna adzuma nkpa bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a. Nkɛna adzuma ndɛ ɔsɔfɔ nkalɛ Baguma Kalɛ Wĩ a, ayekĩ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a aakɛna ndɛ afɔlibɔ wĩ kĩ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa kpalɛ ye akũ ɛkpa Baguma.
17Foesũ yĩ ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Yesu Kristo sũ ni, maapuli mpia nɛ adzuma a kĩ nkɛna nkpa Baguma a akũ. 18Lɛtsa a kĩ odi maado ɔwɔlɛ nlɛ nyɛ kĩ Kristo tsã yĩ akũ ɛfɔ̃ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ na osetie nɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa akũ. Ɛkɛna fukĩĩ ɛtsãmɛna yĩ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ nlɛ, mɔ adzuma a kĩ nkɛna a kamɛ. 19Fukĩĩ ya nɛ foe kamɛ nɛ awãwã mɔ nsɛntsɛlɛni fɔtsa a kĩ nkɛna, nɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a kɔbɛ̃ a kamɛ. Foesũ ntsã mmini nto Yerusalem nnawo Iliriko tite akũ a, nde lɛtsã nɛ Kristo Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ ntsɛna tɛmatɔ a flee. 20Yĩ kawɛ mɔ ɔsĩ nyɛ kĩ made lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ nɛ awã kĩ bati tánu tɔ̃ Kristo dĩ, ayekĩ nlánake nte nɛ litekũ kĩ odi nya lɔtɔ eke a akũ. 21Ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ,
“Bati a kĩ bɛtábi be kadima nɛ ye akũ tɔ̃ a, aamɔ ye,
ade bikĩ bɛtánu tɔ̃ kadima nɛ ye akũ a, aanu foe kayɔ.”
Paulo Kawɛ Kĩ Yanaa Roma.
22Ade foesũ nkawɛ lɔkɔ pii kĩ maya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃, mɔ ntána osi a. 23Lɛmɛ finyaa kĩ ĩyua yĩ adzuma nɛ fuyite kĩĩ, mɔ ayekĩ nkawɛ futeli pii kĩ mayaasɛla mi a sũ ni, 24matɛ kado kĩ maapuli nkɛna foe finyaa. Mawɛ kĩ ntɛ ĩyaatɛ̃ nnnaa Spania, maadza nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ sukuloo budo akũ kawɔlɛ, lɔkɔa mibumɛna minyɛ yĩ osi nnaa. 25Finyaa kɔ̃ ni, manaa Yerusalem nkɔa futelitsa fudi mma Baguma bade a nɛ awã. 26Kitonɛkĩ Makedonia mɔ Akaia tɛsɔli a te fɔtsa faa kĩ bakɔa bibumɛna ahiãfɔ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Baguma bade a kamɛ nɛ Yerusalem. 27Be mɔawɛ a adzuni fɔanɛ, lɛmɛ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, be adzuma fɔanɛ kĩ bibumɔ be. Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a na tsɛfã nɛ Yudafɔ hũhũ nhila fɔtsa a kamɛ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a lɛmɛ akɔa be akũ kana fɔtsa bibumɛna Yudafɔ a. 28Foesũ ntɛ nkɛna adzuma kĩĩ ĩyua, mɔ nkɔa fɔtsa a kĩ bite a nkpa be ni, maatsã mi sɛkɛ̃ ntɛ̃ nnaa Spania. 29Ĩnyina kĩ ntɛ maya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ ni, maakɔa Kristo Kalɛ Wĩ kamɛ nhila baũ mma mi.
30Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, nnɛɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo mɔ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a ɔdɔ kĩ yakpa a, make mi aduli kĩ mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ yĩ bɔbɔa mpaɛ mɔ ɔsĩ bɔkpa Baguma nɛ yĩ lɔlɔ. 31Mibɔa mpaɛ kĩ ɛnyɛ yĩ etomɛna bati a kĩ bɛtátɛ bido nɛ Yudea a awɛ. Mibɔa mpaɛ lɛmɛ kĩ yĩ kasum a kĩ manaakɛna nɛ Yerusalem a kiwo Baguma bade a anɛ. 32Ntɛ fɔnyɛ Baguma kawɛ ni, maaya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ mɔ kawɔlɛ ĩyaadzi nwɛya. 33Baguma kĩ yakpa lukudɔ a, ɛnamɔ mi flee. Fɔya lɔmɔ.

Title: ROMAFƆ 16
Content:
Paulo Kɔa Kawɔ̃na Ɛmɛna Batɛ Badonɛ Nɛ Roma a.
1Mawɛ kĩ mabɔa boe ɔwaɛ̃tsole Foibe kĩ ɛnyɛ ɔsumunɛ paa nɛ Kenkrea asɔli a kamɛ dĩ ntsa mi. 2Mitɛ ye nɛ boe Ɔlate a dĩ akũ ndɛ ayekĩ fɔfɛta Baguma bade a aye. Mikpa ye kabumɛna kadi nyɛ kadi kĩ yaasĩ etomɛna mi sɛkɛ̃, kitonɛkĩ ɛnyɛ bati pii mɔ yĩ mɔawɛ malo obumɛnanɛ.
3Mawɔ̃na Priskila mɔ Akwila kĩ bɛnyɛ yĩ bakɔba adzuma bakɛnanɛ nɛ Yesu Kristo adzuma kamɛ. 4Bɛkɔa be nkpã bɛwãnɛ yĩ lɔlɔ. Nnɛ́ yĩ odi anyɛ be kɔlɛ, mbom mɔ tɛsɔli a kĩ tideĩ nɛ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ kamɛ a lɛmɛ.
5Mawɔ̃na asɔli bati a kĩ batsɛna nɛ be tɔtɔ kamɛ a lɛmɛ. Mawɔ̃na yĩ ɔwɛnɛ Epaineto kĩ ɛnya oti ɔtɔnyade kĩ ɛtɛ Kristo edo nɛ Asia amantam a kamɛ.
6Mawɔ̃na Maria kĩ ɛkɛna adzuma mɔ ɔsĩ ɛkpa mi a.
7Mawɔ̃na Androniko mɔ Yunia, yĩ akũ bati, kĩ bɔmɔ be bɔwa kɔla a. Bɛtɛ dĩ nɛ fɔtɔ banyanɛ a kamɛ, ade bɛnya yĩ lɔtɔ nɛ Kristo katɛ kado kamɛ a.
8Mawɔ̃na Ampila kĩ mawɛ kalɛ paa, kĩ edeĩ nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna kamɛ mɔ boe Ɔlate a. 9Mawɔ̃na Urbana lɛmɛ, boe ɔkɔba nɛ Kristo adzuma a kamɛ, mɔ yĩ ɔkɔba paa Staki.
10Mawɔ̃na Apele kĩ bɛmɔ́ kĩ etim nɛ Kristo kamɛ a. Mawɔ̃na Aristobulo tɔtɔ kamɛ bati a flee.
11Mawɔ̃na yĩ kade oti Herodion mɔ Narkiso tɔtɔ kamɛ bati a kĩ bɛkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo a. 12Mawɔ̃na Trifaina mɔ Trifosa kĩ bakɛna boe Ɔlate a adzuma a, mɔ yĩ ɔwɛnɛ Persi kĩ ɛkɛna adzuma paa ɛkpa boe Ɔlate a. 13Mawɔ̃na Rufo kĩ ɛtɛ dĩ nɛ boe Ɔlate adzuma kamɛ a, mɔ ɔma kĩ epi yĩ ndɛ obi aye a.
14Mawɔ̃na Asinkrito, Flegon, Herme, Patroba, Herma mɔ be bawaɛ̃ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ be sɛkɛ̃ a.
15Mawɔ̃na Filologo, Yulia, Nerea mɔ ye ɔwaɛ̃tsole, mɔ Olipa mɔ Baguma bade a kĩ bideĩ nɛ be sɛkɛ̃ a.
16Miwɔ̃na akũ mikɛna atuu nɛ Kristo ɔdɔ kamɛ. Kristo tɛsɔli bati a flee awɔ̃na mi!
Paulo Dɛ Batɛ Badonɛ Nɛ Roma a.
17Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, make mi aduli kĩ mifɔ̃ mi anɛ ɛna nɛ bati a kĩ bayamɛna kasɛ̃, kakpã badi bayɛla be katɛkado a akũ. Mivɛlɛ akũ nɛ be akũ! 18Kitonɛkĩ bati a kĩ bakɛna fukĩnaa bamɛ odu a lásum Kristo, boe Ɔlate a, mbom be mɔawɛ lupu basum. Bakɔa sɛmɛ mɛnɛmɛnɛ mɔ fɔvã fɔlɛtsa kamu bati, ade bakɛ bati a kĩ binyína tɔkpa a adzuni a. 19Lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃ odi nyɛ odi nu ayekĩ miayi atɔ katse Kalɛ Wĩ a, nɛ foesũ kawɔlɛ ade yĩ paa nɛ mi akũ. Lɛtsa a kĩ mawɛ nyɛ kĩ minyi kadi nɛ lɛtsa wĩ kakɛna kamɛ, lɛmɛ nɛ tɔkpa kakɛna kamɛ kɔ̃ ni, minya bati kpĩĩ.
20Owi lɛláabuna, Baguma a kĩ yakpa lukudɔ a, aabubuli Satana kpɛtɛkpɛtɛkpɛtɛ nɛ mi abɔa kayɔ. Boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo ɛmɔ mi kɔnya.
21Timoteo yĩ adzuma kamɛ ɔkɔba awɔ̃na mi flee. Ade aye a Lukio lɛmɛ, mɔ Yason mɔ Sosipatro kĩ bɛnyɛ yĩ kade bati awɔ̃na mi a.
22Yĩ Tertio, kĩ ntsɛlɛ ovoli kĩĩ nkpa Paulo a, lɛmɛ mawɔ̃na mi nɛ boe Ɔlate a dĩ akũ.
23Yĩ tɔtɔ ɔlate Gaio, kĩ ye awã batɛ badonɛ a atsɛna a, awɔ̃na mi.
Ade Erasto kĩ ɛnyɛ ɔmatɔ kĩĩ sika ɔkɔlanɛ mɔ boe ɔwaɛ̃nyole Kwarto awɔ̃na mi papaapa. 24Boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo ɛmɔ mi flee kɔnya. Fɔya lɔmɔ.
Paulo Mu Baguma.
25Mifɔ̃ bumu Baguma. Yaapuli edo mi katɛkado kɔbɛ̃ nɛ ayekĩ ɛfɔ̃ nde lɛtsã Kalɛ Wĩ a nɛ Yesu Kristo akũ a, mɔ ayekĩ ɛnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali fɔlɛtsa bɛlawa a kito anɛ kɔkɔɔkɔɛ a ɛtsa sũ. 26Lɛmɛ finyaa, bɛnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali a na bɛtsa fude flee bɛtsãmɛna Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ fɔlɛtsa katsɛlɛ kayi a kamɛ, ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma kĩ edzi nkpã daa hihiɛ eyi a, ayekĩ bati flee aatɛ bido, bɛkɛna nɛ ye ɔlɛdo a akũ. 27Baguma a kĩ ye mɔapɛ nyɛ ɔnyansãni a, bɔakpa kamu bɔtsãmɛna Yesu Kristo akũ kanaa daa daa. Fɔya lɔmɔ.

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 1
Content:
1Yĩ Paulo kĩ Baguma vɛ nɛ ye kawɛ onukpɛ̃, kĩ nkɛna Kristo Yesu fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ, mɔ boe ɔwaɛ̃ Sostene sɛkɛ̃ ovoli kĩĩ to.
2Bɔtsɛlɛ ovoli kĩĩ bɔakpa batɛ badonɛ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Korinto, mɔ bati a kĩ Baguma vɛ kĩ bɛkɛna ye bati kpalɛwa, kĩ bɛnyɛ ye bade nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo Yesu a. Bɛvɛ mi bati kĩĩ mɔ bati a flee kĩ basum boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo nɛ kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ. Yesu kĩĩ nyɛ be mɔ boe flee Ɔlate.
3Mawã Baguma boe Ɔlɛga mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo kĩ bɛmɔ mi kɔnya, bɛkpa mi lukudɔ lɛmɛ.
Nhila Kĩ Bɔana Katomɛna Yesu Kristo Kamɛ.
4Luwi daa manyɛ yĩ Baguma kɔlɛ nɛ mi lɔlɔ kĩ ɛtsã Yesu Kristo akũ ɛmɔ mi kɔnya. 5Nɛ mi ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo sũ ni, mina akũ nɛ fɔtsa flee kamɛ, titiliwu nɛ mi kɔdzɛla kalɛ mɔ kadikanyi kamɛ. 6Baguma fɔlɛtsa a nɛ Kristo akũ a sipi nɛ mi kamɛ paa, 7kĩ foesũ mitɛ hũhũ kamɛ futetsa fudi nyɛ fudi kĩ fusĩ mi, nɛ kĩ midzi miadzɔlɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo kaya a. 8Yaapi mi edomɔ akũ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kɛnaawo kawũna, ayekĩ nfumsu adima lɛláana nɛ mi akũ nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo Luwi a akũ. 9Baguma a kĩ ɛvɛ mi kĩ mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ ye Obi, boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo a, nyɛ oti kĩ yadi ɔnɔkɔali.
Kasɛ̃ Kĩ Kɛna Nɛ Asɔli a Kamɛ.
10Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ndzɛ̃ nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo otumi akũ make mi a flee aduli kĩ mikɛna ɔmɔa nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ mialɛ a akũ ayekĩ kasɛ̃ lɛláaya nɛ mi kayite. Mina onukpɛ̃ mɔa nɛ mi kakɔna mɔ fukĩ foe akũ mike otse a kamɛ, 11kitonɛkĩ, nwaɛ̃ amɛ, bati badi to Kloe tɔtɔ kamɛ bɛyabi yĩ pefee kĩ ɔdzɛ deĩ nɛ mi kamɛ. 12Mifɔ̃ nlɛ foe limii, bati a lɛ kĩ mi kamɛ badi alɛ kĩ, “Yĩ kɔ̃ Paulo ntomɛna.” Ɔbɛbã lɛmɛ alɛ kĩ, “Ntomɛna Apolo.” Odi lɛmɛ bo, “Ntomɔ Petro.” Ade odi lɛmɛ bo, “Ntomɔ Kristo.”
13Mavia mi ni, bɛsɛ̃ Kristo nɛ kutsukutsu kamɛ mbɔɛɛ? Paulo bɛbɔa nɛ asendua akũ nɛ mi lɔlɔ mbɔɛɛ? Mbɔɛɛ kĩ bɛkɛna mi kamɛ odi mui kawɔla amaniɛ ndɛ Paulo fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ aye? 14Manyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ kĩ ntákɛna mi kamɛ odima mui kawɔla amaniɛ kɛba Krispo mɔ Gayo odi pɛ. 15Foesũ odima lɛláapuli ɛlɛ kĩ bɛkɛna ye mui kawɔla amaniɛ nɛ yĩ dĩ akũ. 16Nuwĩ mate anɛ kĩ nkɛna Stefana mɔ ye tɔtɔ kamɛ bati mui kawɔla amaniɛ, lɛmɛ maáte anɛ kĩ nwɔla oti bɛbã odima. 17Kristo tádo yĩ kĩ ĩyaakɛna mui kawɔla amaniɛ nkpa bati. Edo yĩ kĩ ĩyaade lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ, kĩ ntákɔa batidziwa kadikanyi nlɛ ke ayekĩ Kristo wuda nɛ asendua akũ kɔbɛ̃ a lɛláakɛna fɔtsa pupulidza.
Kristo Fɔlɛtsa a Nyɛ Baguma Kɔbɛ̃ Mɔ Nyansã.
18Kristo wuda nɛ asendua akũ fɔlɛtsa a nyɛ fudzimbitsa fɔkpa bati a kĩ bɛtsɛ̃ nɛ kawɔ osi akũ, lɛmɛ boe a kĩ bɛlamɔ katɛ a, bɔmɔ́ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ buyi ɔsũ ndɛ Baguma kɔbɛ̃ aye. 19Nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa kamɛ a, Baguma lɛ kĩ,
“Maawɔla kadi banyinɛ a kadikanyi,
ade maanyɛ tuvoli banyinɛ kayɔkanu a ĩyi nɛ ɔɔwɛ̃ a.”
20Foesũ finyaa ndia kadi banyinɛ a dzɛ̃? Ndia tuvoli banyinɛ fɔtsa batsanɛ a mɔ fɔlɛtsa bavɛlɛnɛ a deĩ? Baguma kɔa foe ɛtsa kĩ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ kadikanyi nyɛ fudzimbitsa. 21Kitonɛkĩ Baguma nɛ ye kadikanyi onukpɛ̃ ni, ɛkɛna foe kĩ batidziwa bɛtatsã be kadikanyi kamɛ binyi ye. Mbom lɛtsa kĩ bavɛ boe tidzimbi lɛtsã kade fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a, Baguma kɔa foe ɛnyɛ bikĩ bɛtɛ ye bido a. 22Yudafɔ awɛ awãwã fɔtsa bɛmɔ́, ade Grikifɔ lɛmɛ tomɛna katinya kadikanyi liti a. 23Lɛmɛ boe kɔ̃ bɔade lɛtsã nɛ Kristo wuda nɛ asendua akũ. Fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ aba Yudafɔ tuwũna, ade fɔnyɛ fɔkɔasiatsa fɔkpa bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a. 24Lɛmɛ be a kĩ Baguma vɛ a kĩ bɛnyɛ Yudafɔ, mɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ Helafɔ a ni, fɔlɛtsa a nyɛ Kristo kĩ ɛnyɛ Baguma kɔbɛ̃ mɔ ye kadikanyi. 25Kitonɛkĩ lɛtsa a kĩ bɔamɔ ndɛ Baguma tidzimbi nhihiɛ a bɛ̃ otidziwa kadikanyi kɔlaa, ade ke awã kĩ fɔkɛna ndɛ Baguma kɔbɛ̃ dɔ nɛ ye lɛkɛnana kamɛ a, bɛ̃ otidziwa kɔbɛ̃ kɔlaa.
26Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mikɔna mi akũ midã ayekĩ mina fɔmɔ Baguma vɛ mi a. Nɛ batidziwa kamɔ onukpɛ̃ ni, mi badi sukuloo nyɛ kadi banyinɛ, ĩye bikĩ bideĩ kɔbɛ̃, ĩye kĩ mi akũ deĩ obu. 27Baguma bua ɛpau katinya kamɛ fɔtsa kĩ foe akũ lɛlá nfasɔ, kĩ yakɔa foe edo kadi banyinɛ kɔnyɔã, ade ɛpau fɔtsa a kĩ fɔlá akũ ɔsĩ kĩ yakɔa foe edo bikĩ bideĩ kɔbɛ̃ a kɔnyɔã. 28Baguma pau fɔtsa a kĩ bati lábu foe kado nɛ lɛtsama kamɛ, kasupa foe lɛmɛ a, kĩ yakɔa foe ɛwɔla fukĩ bati akɔna kĩ fɔtɛ kɔya a. 29Baguma kɛna fukĩĩ ayekĩ otidziwa odima lɛláapuli epia ye akũ nɛ ye anɛ. 30Lɛmɛ Baguma kĩĩ lɛfɔ̃ mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Yesu Kristo, ade ɛfɔ̃ Kristo nyɛ boe kadikanyi a. Baguma tsã ye akũ ɛkɛna boe bati kpĩĩ, ɛkpalɛ boe akũ, ɛfɔ̃ bɔna nkpã. 31Foesũ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Oti kĩ yawɛ kĩ yapia ye akũ ni, epia nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ boe Ɔlate kɛna a akũ.”

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 2
Content:
Paulo Tsa Fɔtsa Nɛ Kristo a Kĩ Bɛbɔa Nɛ Asendua Akũ a Akũ.
1Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ade foesũ lɔkɔ a kĩ ĩya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ kĩ matsa Baguma ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ kɔlawa a, ntákɔa onukpɛ̃ mɛnɛmɛnɛ fɔlɛtsa kalɛ baũbaũ mɔ nyansã dzununuunu ntsa mi foe. 2Kitonɛkĩ kĩ nna nɛ mi kamɛ a, nke otse kĩ manyɛ anɛ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa akũ mbɔɛntɛ Yesu Kristo mɔ ye wuda nɛ asendua akũ a. 3Foesũ kĩ ĩya nɛ awã a, ndã kpɛtɛɛ, nna nɛ libe mɔ kukũtila kamɛ, 4ade yĩ fɔtsa katsa mɔ yĩ ɔlɛdo a tánya batidziwa kɔdzɛla kalɛ baũ baũ ĩye nyansã tisi akũ fɔlɛtsa, mbom nde lɛtsã a kayɔ kanu a kĩ Baguma Hũhũ kɔbɛ̃ a nyɛ ɛtsa a. 5Nɛ foesũ mi katɛkado lɛdzɛ̃ nɛ batidziwa nyansã akũ, mbom kɛdzɛ̃ nɛ Baguma kɔbɛ̃ akũ.
Baguma Hũhũ a Nyina Lɛtsa Nyɛ Lɛtsa.
6Lɛmɛ made kadikanyi lɛtsã kakpa bikĩ bibo anɛ nɛ hũhũ kamɛ a. Lɛmɛ fɔnyɛ́ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ kadikanyi ĩye ke kɔbɛ̃ kĩ kanya katinya akũ. Kɔbɛ̃ a akũ ɔlɔmɛ lamɛna katinya. 7Kadikanyi fɔlɛtsa a kĩ matsa a nyɛ Baguma kadikanyi kɔlawa, kĩ bɛkɔa bɛkɔla batidziwa, lɛmɛ Baguma nyɛ foe eyi ɛkpa boe kadɛla nɛ ode fɔmɔ ɛbɔa katinya malo. 8Katinya kamɛ kĩĩ banɔkɔɛ̃ a kamɛ odima tányi kadikanyi kĩĩ. Ntɛ kanyi binyi ke kufɛ bɛtábɔa boe Ɔlate kpalɛwa a nɛ asendua akũ. 9Lɛmɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ,
“Lɛtsa a kĩ linebi támɔ tɔ̃,
sɔtɔ tánu tɔ̃,
lɛtsa a kĩ odima tákɔna tɔ̃ kĩ laapuli lɛya a,
ade foe pɛpɛɛpɛ Baguma manɛ eyi ɛkpa bati a kĩ bawɛ ye a.”
10Lɛmɛ ade boe Baguma tsã ye Hũhũ Kpalɛwa akũ ɛnyɛ foe ɛtsa a.
Hũhũ a awɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ yededeede, ade yafiifii Baguma fɔtsa a kĩ ɛkɔla a dzununuunu kamɛ malo a. 11Odima lɛláapuli enyi lɛtsa a kĩ oti bɛbã akɔna mbɔɛntɛ oti a mɔawɛ hũhũ a kĩ edeĩ nɛ ye kamɛ a. Ade ayea odima lɛláapuli enyi Baguma kakɔna mbɔɛntɛ ye mɔawɛ Hũhũ odi. 12Bɔtátɛ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ hũhũ, mbom bɔtɛ Baguma Hũhũ a kĩ edo a, ayekĩ bɔ́anyi fɔtsa a kĩ Baguma kpa boe a flee. 13Foesũ nnɛ́ batidziwa kadikanyi kĩ batsa bɔnɛɛ bɔalɛ kalɛ, mbom bɔnɛɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ Hũhũ a tsa boe a bɔkɔa bɔanyɛ hũhũ kamɛ ɔnɔkɔali fɔtsa a katsa bikĩ Hũhũ deĩ nɛ be kamɛ a. 14Odi nyɛ odi kĩ Hũhũ a lɛláa ye kamɛ ni, ɛláapuli ɛtɛ futetsa a kĩ futo Baguma Hũhũ a sɛkɛ̃. Oti a na odu tánu foe kayɔ koũ, fudzimbitsa fɔanɛ fɔkpa ye. Fɔnyɛ fudzimbitsa fɔkpa ye, kitonɛkĩ mbɔɛntɛ bikĩ Hũhũ deĩ nɛ be kamɛ a aapuli binu Hũhũ kamɛ fɔlɛtsa kayɔ. 15Odi nyɛ odi kĩ Hũhũ a deĩ nɛ ye kamɛ aapuli enu fukĩĩ flee kayɔ. Lɛmɛ odima lɛláapuli ɛdzɛmɔ ye. 16Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ,
“Owei nyina lɛtsa a kĩ de boe Ɔlate akɔna?
Owei aapuli ɛkpa ye kɔdɛ?”
Lɛmɛ boe kɔ̃ Kristo kakɔna a deĩ nɛ boe kamɛ.

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 3
Content:
Baguma Adzuma Bakɛnanɛ Bɔanɛ.
1Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, fɔnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kĩ ntápuli mbi mi fɔlɛtsa ndɛ ayekĩ maabi bikĩ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa deĩ nɛ be kamɛ aye, mbom mbi mi fɔlɛtsa ndɛ bati kĩ bidzi nɛ sukɛna kamɛ kĩ bɛnyɛ babisɛ̃ nɛ Kristo katɛkado kamɛ. 2Tɛmɛ mui nkpa mi, nnɛ́ funitsã kɔkɔlɔkɔ kitonɛkĩ mitábo anɛ tɔ̃ kĩ mianya foe. Finyaakĩĩ malo mitáwo tɔ̃ kĩ mianya foe, 3kitonɛkĩ mibuki midzi ndɛ ayekĩ katinya kamɛ kĩĩ bati dzi nkpã. Ntɛ mianɔ lineke, kapaa mɔ akũ ni, nnɛ́ katsa fɔatsa kĩ minyɛ katinya kamɛ bati kĩ bidzi nɛ ke tisi akũ?
4Ntɛ mi kamɛ ɔmɔa lɛ kĩ, “Ntomɔ Paulo,” mɔ ɔbɛbã bo, “Ntomɔ Apolo,” nnɛ́ katsa fɔatsa kĩ miakɛna fɔtsa ndɛ katinya kamɛ bati aye? 5Nɛ foe kamɛ a, owei nyɛ Apolo? Owei lɛmɛ nyɛ Paulo? Baguma adzuma bakɛnanɛ kɛkɛ bɔanɛ, ade mitsã boe akũ mitɛ mido a. Boe kamɛ odi nyɛ odi akɛna adzuma a kĩ Baguma kpa ye a. 6Yĩ lidu kutse libi a, ade Apolo ko de mui a, lɛmɛ Baguma lɛfɔ̃ kutse a bo anɛ. 7Oti a kĩ edu mɔ ekĩ eko de mui a tásĩ. Baguma lisĩ, kitonɛkĩ ade ye lɛfɔ̃ kutse a bo anɛ a. 8Kavɛmɛna kadima lɛláa ekĩ edu mɔ ekĩ eko mui a kayite. Baguma aase be kamɛ odi nyɛ odi kɔtɔ nɛ ye adzuma a kĩ ɛkɛna onukpɛ̃. 9Boe, buboomu bɔakɛna adzuma bɔkpa Baguma, ade mi nyɛ Baguma kɔba a kĩ koe kamɛ bɔakɛna adzuma a. Minyɛ Baguma kɔla a kĩ bɔake a.
10Nɛ kĩ Baguma mɔ yĩ kɔnya sũ ni, nkɛna adzuma ndɛ kɔla okenɛ wĩ. Ĩyi litekũ lɔyɔde a kayɔ ade oti bɛbã lamɛna kake kadɛla nɛ ode a. Lɛmɛ kɛnɛ kĩ ekĩ ɛlamɛna kake kadɛla ɛdã kadã wĩ nɛ ayekĩ yake a akũ. 11Kitonɛkĩ Baguma kɔa Yesu Kristo eyi kɔkɔɛ ndɛ litekũ lɔyɔde kĩ odima lɛláapuli eyi lɛbɛbã kayɔ. 12Badi aakɔa sika ngbã ĩye sika ovoe ĩye boe kĩ bɛtɛ kɔya bike bite nɛ litekũ a akũ, babɛbã aakɔa titse ĩye tuwĩ, ĩye lipili bike bite. 13Lɛmɛ baanyɛ kɔla a kĩ odi nyɛ odi lamɛna kake a kutitse bɛtsa nɛ Kristo Luwi a akũ. Kitonɛkĩ nɛ Luwi a na akũ fi aanyɛ odi nyɛ odi adzuma kĩ ɛkɛna a kanya. Baakɔa fi kĩĩ bɛsɔ tudzuma a bɛdã, fɔtsa te kɔyakatɛ lɛmɛ. 14Ntɛ fɔtsa a kĩ bike bite nɛ litekũ lɛyɔde a akũ puli fɔdza nɛ fi onukpɛ̃ ni, kɔla okenɛ a aana kɔtɔkase. 15Lɛmɛ ntɛ odi fɔtsa vio ni, ɛláana kɔtɔkase, lɛmɛ ye mɔawɛ a yaana katɛ ndɛ kalo elo ɛnɛ nɛ fi a kamɛ aye.
Minyɛ Baguma Asɔli Kɔla Kpalɛwa a.
16Minyína kĩ Baguma Asɔli Kɔla mianɛ, kĩ Baguma Hũhũ a dzi nɛ mi kamɛ? 17Foesũ ntɛ odi bula Baguma Asɔli Kɔla a kade ni, Baguma lɛmɛ aawɔla ye, kitonɛkĩ Baguma Asɔli Kɔla akũ kpalɛ. Ade mi nyɛ ye Asɔli Kɔla a. 18Odima ɛtakɛ ye akũ. Ntɛ mi kamɛ odi kɔna kĩ enyina kadi nɛ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ kamɔ onukpɛ̃ ni, kɛfɛta kĩ ɛdani ɛkɛna odzimbifɔ mbom ayekĩ yaakɛna ɔnyansãni nɛ Baguma anɛ. 19Kitonɛkĩ lɛtsa a kĩ bati abu ndɛ kadikanyi a ni, fɔnyɛ fudzimbitsa nɛ Baguma anɛ. Ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa lɛ a, “Baguma api anyansãfɔ nɛ be mɔawɛ kadikanyi kamɛ.” 20Ade bibuki bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa kamɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate nyina kĩ, bikĩ binyina kadi a be adzuni nyɛ fɔtsa pupulidza.” 21Foesũ kɛtánɛ kĩ odima apia nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bati apuli kakɛna a akũ, kitonɛkĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa nyɛ mi fude. 22Paulo, Apolo, Petro, katinya kĩĩ, nkpã ĩye wuda, lɔkɔ kĩĩ ĩye, likĩ laaya o-o, foe flee fɔnyɛ mi fude. 23Lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃ minyɛ Kristo bade, ade Kristo lɛmɛ nyɛ Baguma ode a.

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 4
Content:
Bɔnyɛ Kristo Fɔtɔ Banyanɛ.
1Mibu boe ndɛ Kristo basumunɛ a kĩ be awɛ Baguma kɔa ɔnɔkɔali fɔtsa kɔlawa a edo. 2Lɛtsa kĩ bawɛ bitomɛna adzuma ɔkɛna kĩĩ odu awɛ nyɛ kĩ, yadi ɔnɔkɔali ɛkpa ɔlate. 3Finyaakĩĩ ntsɛ́la kɔlaa ntɛ miadzɛmɔ yĩ, ĩye odi bɛbã adzɛmɔ yĩ. Ade maádzɛmɔ yĩ akũ malo a. 4Yĩ ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kpalɛ, lɛmɛ fɔátsa kĩ tɔkpa lɛláa yĩ akũ, kitonɛkĩ boe Ɔlate nyɛ oti kĩ yaadzɛmɔ yĩ. 5Foesũ odima ɛtadzɛmɔ odi kɛnaawo kĩ lɔkɔ wĩ a wo ɔtɔ. Kɛnɛ kĩ kadzɛ nkaɛ a kɛdzɔlɛ boe Ɔlate a kaya. Ade ye aanyɛ ɔtũ kamɛ fɔtsa bɛlawa mɔ bati kakɔna a kĩ bɛkɔa bɛkɔla a kanya a. Ade lɔkɔ a na Baguma aakɔa kamu ɛkpa odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛfɛta ɛkpa kamu a.
6Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, nɛ mi kalɛ sũ, nkɔa bɔmɔ Apolo fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ nkpa nfantuhũ nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ matsa a akũ, ayekĩ míanu fɔlɛtsa a kĩ balɛ a kayɔ kĩ, “Mitsã nɛ osi kpĩĩ a akũ.” Mi kamɛ odima ɛtapia nɛ oti mɔa akũ lɔkɔa esupa ɔbɛbã. 7Owei lɛkɛna mi bati kĩ bɛtɛ kɔya bɛba babɛbã? Nnɛ́ Baguma lɛkpa mi lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ mideĩ a? Lɔkɔa nde sũ miadɛla akũ ndɛ nnɛ́ Baguma lite mi fɔtsa a na?
8Mi awɛ ta lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lisĩ mi a kɔkɔɛ mbɔɛɛ? Midani asikafɔ kɔkɔɛ mbɔɛɛ? Midani fɔgã titɔ kĩ boe bɔnyɛ́ fɔgã malo? Awoo. Mawɛ kĩ minyɛ fɔgã lɔkɔa boe malo bɔnya fɔgã bubumɔ mi kufɛ. 9Fɔadã yĩ ndɛ Baguma kɔa boe fɔtɔ banyanɛ a ɛdzɛla nɛ kadzakɔ̃ nkaɛ. Bɔkɛna ndɛ bati kĩ biku kɔtɔ kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ bɛkɔ be nɛ kanade anɛ, ade bɔkɛna ndɛ fɔtsa dãwa lɛmɛ bɔkpa katinya kamɛ bati mɔ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ flee a. 10Nɛ Kristo sũ bɔnyɛ badzimbifɔ, lɛmɛ mi minyɛ kadi banyinɛ nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo kamɛ! Bɔlá kɔbɛ̃ lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃ mideĩ kɔbɛ̃! Bati lábu boe kado nɛ lɛtsama kamɛ, lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃ bakpa mi obu! 11Kito kɛyawo nviã lɔkɔ kĩĩ malo budzi kɔlɛ mɔ ɔmɔado, budeĩ nɛ tɛtadiɛ kpeliwa kamɛ, babo boe, ade bɔtsɛ̃ bɔato katɛ̃ kĩ bɔlá kadzikɔ̃. 12Bɔakɛna adzuma mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kaveli akũ. Ntɛ bati dumu boe bɔakpa be nhila, ade ntɛ bitomɔ boe liti bɔado ɔwɔlɛ katɛ foe. 13Ntɛ bivũna boe a, bɔakɔa ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ kakpa be mbuayɛ. Bɛkɛna boe ndɛ katinya kamɛ fukluku kĩ bɔnyɛ tite akũ fukluku kawulakɔ̃ kɛyawo nviã kĩĩ.
14Maátsɛlɛ mi fukĩĩ kĩ mado mi kɔnyɔã, mbom makɔa foe ndɛ mi ndɛ yĩ babi kĩ mawɛ be kalɛ aye. 15Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ mideĩ bati mpim ewua kĩ batsa mi fɔtsa nɛ Kristo akũ malo ni, ɔlɛga mɔapɛ mideĩ. Ntsã Kalɛ Wĩ a kalɛ kamɛ ndani mi ɔlɛga, kitonɛkĩ mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Yesu nɛ mi nkpã kamɛ.
16Foesũ make mi aduli kĩ mikɔlɛ yĩ ɔbla. 17Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ mado Timoteo kĩ ɛya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃. Ɛnyɛ yĩ mɔawɛ obi nɛ Kristo kamɛ, kĩ maátunɔ ye kalɛ ade ɛnyɛ oti kĩ yadi ɔnɔkɔali nɛ ye kadzi kamɛ a. Yaate mi anɛ nɛ tisi vɔɛ̃ a kĩ te akũ ndzi nkpã nɛ Kristo kamɛ a akũ. Ade foe lɛmɛ matsa nɛ tɔsɔli a flee kamɛ nɛ kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ a. 18Mi kamɛ badi miata akũ, kitonɛkĩ mikɔna kĩ nláabuki ĩyaasɛla mi. 19Lɛmɛ ntɛ boe Ɔlate tunɔ kɔ̃ ni, owi lɛláabuna kɔlaa mɔ maaya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃. Ntɛ ĩya ni, maawɛ kĩ manyi kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ bikĩ bata akũ deĩ, nnɛ́ lɛtsa a kĩ bɛtsɛ̃ balɛ a odi. 20Kitonɛkĩ Baguma lɛgãkanya a lɛnyɛ́ onukpɛ̃ kamɛ fɔlɛtsa kalɛ kɛkɛ, mbom fɔnyɛ kɔbɛ̃ fɔlɛtsa. 21Fɔɔdabe miawɛ? Ĩya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ mɔ katsei, mbɔɛɛ kĩ ĩya nɛ ɔdɔ mɔ akũ kadɔla bɔɛɛ?

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 5
Content:
Mifɔnɛ Adɔpaa Kabɔa Awɛ.
1Finyaakĩĩ bɛlamɛna kalɛ kokooko kĩ adɔpaa deĩ nɛ mi kamɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ ye odu lɛláa amamufɔ malo kamɛ. Bɛlɛ kĩ onyole odi mɔ ɔlɛga ɔtsɔ̃ dzi. 2Lɔkɔa nde míapuli midɛla mi akũ nɛ ode? Kanɛ kɛnɛ kĩ ayɔlɔhɔ api mi lɔkɔa minyɛ oti a kĩ ɛkɛna fɔtsa kpa kĩĩ odu a nɛ mi asɔli katsu a kamɛ. 3Titɔ kĩ nláa mi kamɛ nɛ sukɛna kamɛ malo ni, ndeĩ nɛ mi kamɛ nɛ hũhũ kamɛ. Ndzɛmɔ oti a, nkɔ ye kɔtɔ kɔkɔɛ nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu dĩ akũ. 4Ntɛ mitsɛna ni, maana nɛ mi kamɛ nɛ hũhũ kamɛ nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ kɔana nɛ boe kamɛ a sũ, 5mikɔa oti a mido nɛ Abonsam awɛ lɔkɔa ɛwɔla ye sukɛna a, ayekĩ ye hũhũ a aapuli ɛna katɛ nɛ boe Ɔlate Luwi a akũ.
6Fɔnɛ́nɛ fɔkpa mi kĩ miata akũ! Minyina lɛgbã a kĩ, “Oyila kabii nɛ bodobodo mawɛ kamɛ afɔ̃ ye flee yavuya.” 7Minyɛ oyila kɔɛ a kĩ ɛnyɛ tɔkpa a nɛ mi kamɛ lɔkɔa mi akũ ɛkpalɛ. Míadani mikɛna onuvoe lɔbɔ vɔɛ̃ kĩ oyila lɛláa ye kamɛ ndɛ ayekĩ ĩnyina kĩ mila a. Kitonɛkĩ bɛkɔ Kristo kĩ ɛnyɛ boe Wuda Katɛ̃ kavelibi bɛkɔa bɛbɔa afɔliɛ nɛ boe lɔlɔ. 8Foesũ mifɔ̃ bɔnya boe Wuda Katɛ̃ luwi a, nnɛ́ mɔ abodoo kĩ edeĩ oyila kɔɛ kĩ ɛnyɛ tɔkpa mɔ ablɔ kakɛna, mbom bɔnya abodoo kĩ ɛlá oyila kĩ ɛnyɛ tuwĩ kakɛna mɔ ɔnɔkɔali kadi.
9Nɛ ovoli a kĩ ntsɛlɛ nkpa mi kamɛ a, mbi mi kĩ mitakɔa akũ mibɔamɔ bati kĩ bideĩ adɔpaa. 10Finyaakĩĩ ni, nnɛ́ amamufɔ a kĩ bideĩ adɔpaa, ĩye bideĩ anɛ ngbã, ĩye baye, ĩye basum baviɔ̃ a malɛ. Ntɛ miwɛ kĩ mianyɛ mi akũ nɛ be flee kamɛ ni, kekɔ̃ kɛnɛ kĩ mianɛ nɛ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ kɔlaa. 11Lɛtsa kĩ matsa a nyɛ kĩ mitakɔa akũ mibɔamɔ oti kĩ yavɛ ye akũ kĩ ɔtɛ odonɛ lɛmɛ yabɔa adɔpaa, ĩye edeĩ anɛ ngbã, yasum baviɔ̃, ĩye yavɛ bati buĩ kpa, ĩye yawuga bavɛ ĩye yaye. Mimɔ oti a na odu mitado awɛ minya malo. 12-13Kitonɛkĩ fɔnyɛ́ yĩ adzuma kĩ madzɛmɔ bikĩ bɛláa asɔli a kamɛ. Baguma aadzɛmɔ be. Lɛmɛ kɛnɛ kĩ miadzɛmɔ bikĩ bideĩ nɛ mi asɔli a kamɛ, ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Miblɔmɛna oti kpa a nɛ mi kamɛ.”

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 6
Content:
Kɛnɛ Kĩ Batɛ Badonɛ Bɛlɔla Be Mɔawɛ Kayite.
1Ntɛ ɔdzɛ wo nɛ mi kamɛ odi mɔ ɔkɔba ɔtɛ odonɛ kayite ni, nde sũ yakɔa kalɛ a ɛma amamufɔ fɔlɛtsa badzɛnɛ, mɔ yaáfɔ̃ Baguma bati lɛdzɛ kalɛ a? 2Minyína kĩ boe a kĩ bɔnyɛ Baguma bati a aayadzɛmɔ katinya kamɛ? Ntɛ mi aayadzɛmɔ katinya kamɛ a, nde sũ miláapuli midzɛ fɔlɛtsa kubii kubii? 3Minyína kĩ boe aadzɛmɔ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ lɛmɛ mbɔɛɛ? Lɔkɔa nde sũ mɔ miláapuli midzɛ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ fɔtsa? 4Ntɛ fɔlɛtsa a na odu ya ni, miákɔa foe mikpa bati kĩ bɛla fɔdzakɔ̃ nɛ asɔli a kamɛ malo kĩ bɛdzɛ foe? 5Kɔnyɔã kuwo mi! Matɛ kado kĩ oti mɔapɛ aye kĩ enyina kadi deĩ nɛ mi kamɛ kĩ yaapuli ɛdzɛ mi batɛ badonɛ a kayite fɔlɛtsa. 6Kĩ miakɛna foe lɔmɔ mbom a ni, ɔtɛ odonɛ akpã ɔkɔba kanamɛna fɔlɛtsa kadzɛkɔ̃ kafɔ̃ bikĩ bɛtátɛ bido a adzɛ fɔlɛtsa a!
7Kalɛ ɔnɔkɔali a nyɛ kĩ nɛ ayekĩ miti miakɔa fɔlɛtsa kanamɛna fɔlɛtsa kadzɛkɔ̃ a atsa kĩ, obu salɛ nɛ mi akũ. Fɔláalɛ fɔba ntɛ bɛkɛna tɔkpa nɛ mi akũ lɔkɔa miálɛ kadima? Fɔláalɛ fɔba ntɛ mifɔnɛ be awɛ bisisi mi mbom? 8Lɛmɛ mi mɔawɛ a miakɛna tɔkpa nɛ mi bakɔba akũ, kasisi akũ mɔ mi bawaɛ̃ batɛ badonɛ malo. 9Minyina pefee kĩ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ tɔkpa a na odu lɛláana kanyakɔ̃ nɛ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kamɛ. Mitakɛ mi akũ, kitonɛkĩ bati kĩ babɔa adɔpaa, ĩye basum baviɔ̃, ĩye banɛ kɔnyɔ mɔ kɔtsɔ̃ liti, batsole kĩ bawamɔ batsole mɔ banyole kĩ bawamɔ akũ, 10ĩye bati kĩ baye, ĩye bikĩ bideĩ anɛ ngbã, ĩye bikĩ bawuga bavɛ, ĩye bikĩ banyɛ bati buĩ kpa ĩye bablɔfɔ bayekpanɛ ni, be kamɛ odima lɛláana kanyakɔ̃ nɛ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kamɛ. 11Ade aye mi kamɛ badi mina miyatɛ̃ a, lɛmɛ finyaakĩĩ bɛvɔlɛ titikpa nɛ mi akũ. Bɛkɔa mi bido nɛ Baguma awɛ, bɛkɛna mi bati kpalɛwa nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo dĩ mɔ Baguma Hũhũ akũ.
Mikɛna Mi Akũ Yedede, Mikɔa Obu Mikpa Baguma.
12Mi kamɛ badi aalɛ kĩ, “Bɛkpa yĩ osi kĩ nkɛna lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa.” Oo! Nuwĩ fɔanɛ. Lɛmɛ nnɛ́ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa nɛnɛ lɛkpa oti. Maapuli nlɛ kĩ, “Bɛkpa yĩ osi kĩ nkɛna lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa.” Lɛmɛ nláafɔ̃ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa lɛnya yĩ akũ. 13Oti bɛbã lɛmɛ aalɛ kĩ, “Funitsã waa fɔkpa lupu ade lupu lɛmɛ waa lɛkpa funitsã a.” Oo! Nuwĩ fɔanɛ. Lɛmɛ Baguma aawɔla foe nviã a. Kɛtánɛ kĩ bɔakɔa boe sukɛna bɔkpa linyolewɛ mɔ litsolewɛ, mbom kĩ bɔakɔa sukɛna busum boe Ɔlate ade boe Ɔlate lɛmɛ adãmɛna se akũ a. 14Ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma dzɛla boe Ɔlate etomɛna kanɔkpa a, ade ayea yaakɔa ye kɔbɛ̃ ɛdzɛla boe lɛmɛ a. 15Minyina kĩ mi sukɛna nyɛ Kristo sukɛna a sidi. Fɔnɛnɛ kĩ makɔa Kristo sukɛna sɛkɛ sidi nkɛna otsole ɔdɔpaani sukɛna sukɛna a sidi? Kɛtánɛ kĩ fɔna lɔmɔ koũ! 16Mbɔɛɛ minyína kĩ ntɛ odi kɔa akũ ɛta otsole kĩ yabɔa adɔpaa ni, bɛmɔ ye bɛkɛna sukɛna mɔa? Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Be bati nviã a baakɛna sukɛna mɔa.” 17Lɛmɛ oti kĩ ɛkɔa ye akũ ɛmɛnamɔ boe Ɔlate ni, bɛmɔ ye bɛkɛna ɔmɔa nɛ hũhũ kamɛ.
18Mivɛlɛ akũ nɛ linyolewɛ mɔ litsolewɛ tɔkpa ɔwɛ̃! Titikpa bɛbã kĩ oti akɛna látamɔ ye sukɛna, lɛmɛ oti kĩ ɛbɔa adɔpaa titikpa a tamɔ ye mɔawɛ sukɛna. 19Minyína kĩ mi sukɛna nyɛ asɔli kɔla kɔkpa Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a kĩ Baguma kpa mi, kĩ edeĩ nɛ mi kamɛ lɛmɛ a? Foesũ nnɛ́ mi awɛ la mi sukɛna mbom Baguma side sanɛ. 20Baguma se kɔtɔ kpale nɛ mi lɔlɔ, foesũ mikɔa mi sukɛna mido ye obu.

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 7
Content:
Bɛkpa Kɔdɛ Nɛ Kɔtsɔ̃ Mɔ Kɔnyɔ Kadzi Akũ.
1Finyaakĩĩ maalɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ mitsɛlɛ mikpa yĩ a akũ. Fɔnɛnɛ ntɛ onyole odi tákɔã ɔtsɔ̃. 2Lɛmɛ nɛ kĩ linyolewɛ mɔ litsolewɛ bɔ paa sũ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ onyole nyɛ onyole ɛkɔã ɔtsɔ̃, ade kɛnɛ kĩ otsole nyɛ otsole lɛmɛ edzi kɔnyɔ a. 3Kɛtánɛ kĩ onyole ɛkɛna ɔtsɔ̃ be kawa lɔlɔ ɔsĩ, ade ayea kɛtánɛ kĩ otsole asĩ ɔnyɔ sɛkɛ̃ kawa a. Kɛnɛ kĩ bakɛna lɛtsa sĩwa lidi nyɛ lidi bɛkpa be akũ. 4Otsole a sukɛna lɛnyɛ́ ye odi side, mbom ɔnyɔ side sanɛ lɛmɛ. Ade ayea onyole a sukɛna lɛnyɛ́ ye odi side, mbom sɛnyɛ ɔtsɔ̃ lɛmɛ side. 5Ɔtsɔ̃ mɔ ɔnyɔ bɛtakɛna be kawa akũ lɔlɔ ɔsĩ, mbɔɛntɛ binu be akũ kayɔ ade bɛwɛ lɛmɛ kĩ bakɔa lɔkɔ lidi bɛkpa mpaɛbɔ. Lɛmɛ ke liti a, kɛnɛ kĩ bamuniki bidzi tɔtsɔ̃ mɔ tɔnyɔ, ayekĩ Abonsam lɛláafɔ̃ biwo nɛ sɔhuiɛ kamɛ ntɛ bɛtápuli bɛnya be akũ akũ. 6Nlɛ fukĩĩ ndɛ osi kakpa aye nɛ mi kadzi kamɛ, lɛmɛ nnɛ́ mbla yanɛ makpa mi. 7Kufɛ maawɛ kĩ bati flee bidzi ndɛ ayekĩ ndzi a. Lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi deĩ futetsa fudi kĩ ɛtɛ etomɛna Baguma sɛkɛ̃. Odi nyɛ odi fude vɛmɛna nɛ ɔkɔba fude akũ.
8Finyaa, mabi bakutse mɔ bakunawa kĩ fɔnɛnɛ fɔkpa be fɔbɛ̃ ntɛ bidzi be odi ndɛ ayekĩ yĩ odi ndzi a. 9Lɛmɛ ntɛ bɛláapuli bɛnya be akũ kɔ̃ ni, bɛkɔã batsɔ̃ ĩye bidzi fɔnyɔ, kitonɛkĩ kɔtsɔ̃ mɔ kɔnyɔ kadzi nɛnɛ fɔbɛ̃ kĩ sukɛna kawɛ aakaha be.
10Ndeĩ mbla nkpa batsɔ̃ mɔ banyɔ. Mbla a lɛnyɛ́ yĩ ade, mbom boe Ɔlate sɛkɛ̃ eto. Ade ye nyɛ kĩ otsole ɛtasĩ ɔnyɔ, 11lɛmɛ ntɛ esĩ kɔnyɔ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ edzi ye odi, ntɛ nnɛ́ aye emuniki ɛnaakpɔla ɔnyɔ a. Ade ayea kɛtáfɛta kĩ onyole lɛmɛ asĩ ɔtsɔ̃ a. 12Mi bati nkaɛ a kɔ̃ ni, yĩ lamɔ be kabi, nnɛ́ boe Ɔlate. Ntɛ okristoni deĩ ɔtsɔ̃ kĩ ɛnyɛ ɔmamuni, kĩ etunɔ kĩ badzimɔ akũ ni, onyole a ɛtasĩ ye. 13Ade ayea ntɛ otsole okristoni dzimɔ ɔnyɔ kĩ ɛnyɛ ɔmamuni, mɔ etunɔ kĩ bɛmɔ ye badzi ni, otsole a ɛtasĩ ye. 14Kitonɛkĩ ɔnyɔ a kĩ ɛtátɛ edo a kɛna oti kpalɛwa nɛ Baguma anɛ, nɛ ayekĩ biboomu a sũ. Ade ayea ɔtsɔ̃ a kĩ ɛtátɛ edo a lɛmɛ kɛna oti kpalɛwa nɛ Baguma anɛ nɛ ayekĩ bɛmɔ ɔnyɔ a biboomu sũ a. Ntɛ nnɛ́ lɔmɔ ni, be babi a aakɛna ndɛ amamufɔ babi aye. Lɛmɛ nɛ be ɔmɔa kakɛna sũ be babi kɛna bati kpalɛwa nɛ Baguma anɛ.
15Lɛmɛ ntɛ fɔya kĩ be kamɛ odi kĩ ɛtátɛ edo tátunɔ kĩ yadzimɔ ɔtɔ odonɛ ni, yapuli ɛdzakũ faa. Ntɛ fɔya lɔmɔ a ɔtɛ odonɛ a deĩ osi kĩ yabɔɛ ye osi, kitonɛkĩ Baguma wɛ kĩ midzi nɛ lukudɔ kamɛ. 16Mi batɛ badonɛ batsole a mite anɛ kĩ fɔtsɛ̃ mi akũ mi banyɔ aapuli bɛdani be tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ. Ade ayea mi batɛ badonɛ banyole mite anɛ kĩ fɔtsɛ̃ mi akũ mi batsɔ̃ lɛmɛ aapuli bɛdani be tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ a.
Midzi Ndɛ Ayekĩ Mina Fɔmɔ Baguma Vɛ Mi a.
17Finyaakĩĩ odi nyɛ odi edzi nkpã ndɛ ayekĩ boe Ɔlate kpa ye, ndɛ ayekĩ ɛna fɔmɔ Baguma vɛ ye a. Ade mbla kĩ matsa nɛ tɛsɔli flee a kamɛ a. 18Ntɛ oti tsua lɛkpati fɔmɔ Baguma vɛ ye ni, fɔ̃ ɛna lɔmɔ. Ntɛ ɛtátsua lɛkpati fɔmɔ Baguma vɛ ye ni, ɛtalɛ kĩ yanaatsua lɛkpati. 19Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ otsua lɛkpati ĩye ɔtátsua ni, fɔtsɛ́la. Lɛtsa a kĩ lisĩ nyɛ kĩ akɛna nɛ Baguma mbla a akũ. 20Foesũ odi nyɛ odi ɛna ndɛ ayekĩ ɛla fɔmɔ Baguma vɛ ye a. 21Ɔsate anɛ fɔmɔ Baguma vɛ nɔ? Fɔtsɛ́la. Lɛmɛ ntɛ ɔna osi kĩ aanyɛ nɔ akũ nɛ tɛsate kamɛ ni tsã ye akũ, 22kitonɛkĩ ɔsate a kĩ boe Ɔlate vɛ a nɛ́ nɛ tɛtsate kamɛ. Ade ayea oti kĩ ɛnyɛ́ ɔsate fɔmɔ bɛvɛ ye ni, ye malo ɛdani ɔsate ɛkpa boe Ɔlate. 23Baguma se kɔtɔ kpale nɛ mi lɔlɔ, foesũ mibuki minyɛ́ basate mikpa batidziwa. 24Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mi kamɛ odi nyɛ odi ɛna ndɛ ayekĩ ɛla fɔmɔ Baguma vɛ ye a.
Ayekĩ Bakunawa Mɔ Bakutse Bidzi.
25Finyaakĩĩ, nɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ mitsɛlɛ nɛ bakutse akũ a ni, ntátɛ mbla ntomɛna boe Ɔlate sɛkɛ̃. Lɛmɛ ade yĩ kakɔna a, kitonɛkĩ nɛ ayekĩ boe Ɔlate mɔ yĩ kɔnya sũ miapuli mitɛ yĩ mido. 26Nɛ yĩ kamɔ onukpɛ̃ mɔ ayekĩ nviã katinya lamɛna ɔsĩ kana sũ ni, fɔnɛnɛ kĩ oti edzi ndɛ ayekĩ ɛla a. 27Ntɛ ɔkɔã ɔtsɔ̃ ni talɛ kĩ asĩ ye. Ntɛ ɔtákɔã ɔtsɔ̃ ni, talɛ kĩ awɛ odi ɔkɔã. 28Lɛmɛ ntɛ ɔkɔã ɔtsɔ̃ ni ɔtákɛna titikpa, ade ayea ntɛ odi dzi kɔnyɔ ni, ye malo ɛtákɛna titikpa a. Lɛmɛ ntáwɛ kĩ awo nɛ ɔhau a kĩ ɔtsɔ̃ mɔ ɔnyɔ amɔ a kamɛ.
29Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, lɛtsa a kĩ matsa nyɛ kĩ lɔkɔ pii buki lɛwáa nɛ boe lɔtɔ, foesũ kito finyaa kanaa ni, banyole kĩ bɛkɔã batsɔ̃ bidzi ndɛ bɛtákɔã batsɔ̃. 30Bikĩ babe ni, bidzi ndɛ bati kĩ be akũ lákɔ kɔnya, bikĩ bamɛmɛ ni, bɛkɛna ndɛ kawɔlɛ láde be. Bikĩ bɛya fɔtsa ni bɛkɛna ndɛ nnɛ́ be la fɔtsa a kĩ bɛya a. 31Bikĩ bitomɛna katinya kamɛ fɔtsa liti kĩ bawɛ kĩ foe flee fɔnya be fude ni, bidzi ndɛ bɛtsɛ́la katinya kamɛ fɔtsa akũ, kitonɛkĩ katinya kĩĩ lɛláana lɔmɔ flee ndɛ ayekĩ kɛla finyaa.
32Maáwɛ kĩ ana nɛ ɔhau odima kamɛ. Kitonɛkĩ oti kĩ ɛtákɔã ɔtsɔ̃ ni, ɛkɔa ye akũ flee ɛkpa Baguma adzuma kakɛna, ade yabɔa mbɔdi kĩ yakɛna adzuma a edo Baguma kawɔlɛ a. 33Lɛmɛ onyole kĩ ɛkɔã ɔtsɔ̃ ni, yakɔna katinya kamɛ fɔtsa akũ, kitonɛkĩ yawɛ kĩ yado ɔtsɔ̃ kawɔlɛ. 34Nɛ foesũ ye adzuni sɛ̃ tisi nviã. Otsole kĩ ɛtádzi kɔnyɔ ĩye oyitsɔ̃ kĩ enyína onyole ni, ɛkɔa Baguma adzuma ete nɛ ye akũ, kitonɛkĩ ɛwɛ kĩ yakɔa ye sukɛna mɔ hũhũ flee edzi nkpã yedede. Otsole kĩ edzi kɔnyɔ ni, ɛkɔa ye akũ ɛkpa katinya kamɛ fɔtsa kitonɛkĩ yawɛ kĩ yado ɔnyɔ kawɔlɛ. 35Malɛ fukĩĩ bamɛ flee kitonɛkĩ mawɛ kĩ makpa mi kabumɛna. Ntáwɛ kĩ miana nɛ́ kasuli kamɛ, mbom mawɛ kĩ mikɛna lɛtsa a kĩ lɛnɛnɛ mɔ likĩ lɛfɛta, lɔkɔa mikɔa mi akũ mikpa Baguma ɔsum, kĩ kavia katse lɛláa foe akũ.
36Ntɛ onyole tinya oyitsɔ̃ mɔ ɛmɔ́ kĩ yaápuli epi ye akũ, ĩye ɛmɔ kĩ lɔkɔ lamɛna katɛ̃ ni, baapuli bɛkɔã akũ. Fɔnyɛ́ titikpa ntɛ fɔya lɔmɔ. 37Lɛmɛ ntɛ onyole tinya oyitsɔ̃, mɔ ɛkɔna nɛ ye kamɛ kĩ yaapuli epi ye akũ, kĩ baadzimɔ akũ kokooko ni, ɛkɛna foe kakɛna wĩ. 38Foesũ onyole kĩ ɛkɔã ɔtsɔ̃ ni, ɛkɛna kakɛna wĩ, lɛmɛ onyole kĩ ɛtákɔã ɔtsɔ̃ ni, ye fude nɛnɛ fɔbɛ̃ kɔlaa.
39Otsole kĩ edzi kɔnyɔ ni ebuki ɛlá osi kĩ yadzi kɔnyɔ bɛbã. Lɛmɛ ntɛ ɔnyɔ a ku ni, edeĩ osi kĩ yadzimɔ onyole a kĩ yawɛ. Kɛnɛ kĩ onyole a ɛnya ɔtɛ odonɛ. 40Lɛmɛ ntɛ edzi ndɛ okunawa aye ni, yaamɔ kawɔlɛ ɛba. Ade yĩ kakɔna a, ade matɛ kado kĩ ade aye nyɛ Baguma Hũhũ a kakɔna kĩ ɛkpa yĩ a.

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 8
Content:
Bɛkpa Kɔdɛ Nɛ Baviɔ̃ Funitsã Akũ.
1Finyaa, mawɛ kĩ mabi mi litsedi nɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ mitsɛlɛ nɛ funitsã a kĩ bɛkɔa bɛbɔa afɔliɛ bɛkpa baviɔ̃ akũ. Boe flee bɔalɛ kĩ bunyina kadi. Lɛmɛ bunyina kĩ kadikanyi kĩĩ afɔ̃ oti adɛla ye akũ nɛ ode. Lɛtsa a kĩ lakpa boe kɔbɛ̃ nyɛ ɔdɔ. 2Ntɛ odi kɔna kĩ enyina fɔtsa nɛ litsedi akũ paa ni, ɛtámɔ foe kamɔ wĩ ndɛ ayekĩ kɛnɛ kĩ fɔna a. 3Lɛmɛ ntɛ odi awɛ Baguma ni, Baguma lɛmɛ nyina ye.
4Foesũ ade lɛtsa a kĩ mabi mi nɛ funitsã kĩ bɛkɔa bɛbɔa afɔliɛ bɛkpa baviɔ̃ akũ a. Bunyina kĩ baviɔ̃ nyɛ fɔtsa a kĩ bɛkɔa awɛ bɛmɛ, kĩ fɔlá nkpã, kitonɛkĩ Baguma odi pɛ deĩ nkpã. 5Titɔ kĩ bati alɛ kĩ baviɔ̃ deĩ nɛ ode mɔ tite akũ, kĩ baviɔ̃ kumɛkumɛ kĩĩ mɔ be balate deĩ malo ni, 6boe kɔ̃ bunyina kĩ Baguma mɔapɛ deĩ. Ade ye nyɛ boe Ɔlɛga kĩ ɛbɔa lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa, ade budzi bɔkpa ye a. Boe Ɔlate kĩ ɛnyɛ Yesu Kristo mɔapɛ lɛmɛ deĩ. Ade ye akũ Baguma tsã ɛbɔa lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa, kĩ fɔtsɛ̃ ye akũ budzi nkpã.
7Lɛmɛ nnɛ́ odi nyɛ odi nyina ɔnɔkɔali fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ. Baviɔ̃ akũ fɔlɛtsa nya bati badi kamɛkamɛ limii kĩ kɛyawo nviã kĩĩ ntɛ bɛnya funitsã kĩ bɛkɔa bɛbɔa afɔliɛ bɛkpa baviɔ̃ pɛ bakɔna kĩ baviɔ̃ funitsã fɔanɛ. Nɛ kĩ bɛtábo anɛ nɛ be katɛkado kamɛ sũ ni, bakɔna kĩ funitsã a do be efĩĩ. 8Funitsã lɛláapuli fɔlɔla bɔmɔ Baguma kayite. Bɔláayɛla lɛtsama ntɛ bɔtánya ade ayea bɔláana nfasɔ adima ntɛ bɔnya lɛmɛ a.
9Lɛmɛ midã kadã wĩ lɔkɔa mitafɔ̃ mi lɛkɛnana nɛ akũ akũ kadzi kamɛ lɛfɔ̃ bikĩ bɛtábo anɛ nɛ be katɛkado kamɛ liwo nɛ tɔkpa kamɛ. 10Bɔɛ foe kĩ oti kĩ ɛtábo anɛ nɛ ye katɛkado kamɛ mɔ́ kĩ nɔ a kĩ onyina kadi a odzi anya nɛ kuviɔ̃la. Nnɛ́ kɔbɛ̃ ado ye kĩ ɛnya funitsã kĩ bɛkɔa bɛbɔa afɔliɛ bɛkpa baviɔ̃? 11Awaɛ̃ ɔtɛ odonɛ a kĩ ye katɛkado tábo anɛ, lɛmɛ Kristo ku nɛ ye lɔlɔ a ni, yaawɔ nɛ nɔ kadi a kĩ onyina a sũ. 12Miafɔ̃ mi bawaɛ̃ batɛ badonɛ a kĩ bɛtábo anɛ nɛ be katɛkado kamɛ a, akɛna titikpa nɛ Kristo akũ, kitonɛkĩ miado be kɔbɛ̃ bakɛna lɛtsa kĩ bɛtɛ bido kĩ fɔnɛ́nɛ. 13Foesũ ntɛ funitsã fudi kanya aafɔ̃ nwaɛ̃ lɛkɛna titikpa ni, nláanya funitsã a na da, ayekĩ ɛláawo nɛ tɔkpa kamɛ.

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 9
Content:
Paulo Kɛna Adzuma Kĩ Ɔhɛ Tána Nɛ Foe Kamɛ.
1Miakɔna kĩ ĩnyɛ́ oti kĩ edzí ye akũ akũ mbɔɛɛ? Miakɔna kĩ ĩnyɛ́ fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ mbɔɛɛ? Miakɔna kĩ ntákɔa anɛ mmɔ́ boe Ɔlate Yesu mbɔɛɛ? Nnɛ́ mi nyɛ adzuma a kĩ nkɛna nkpa boe Ɔlate a foe akũ nfasɔ? 2Ntɛ bati bɛbã támɔ yĩ biyi ɔsũ ndɛ fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ aye ni, mi kɔ̃ mitɛ yĩ. Kitonɛkĩ ayekĩ miawɛ midzi nkpã nɛ boe Ɔlate dĩ akũ a atsa kĩ ĩnyɛ ye fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ.
3Ntɛ bati atɛ yĩ atsindze ni, ade limii manyɛ yĩ akũ onukpɛ̃ a. 4Bɔlá osi kĩ bakpa boe funitsã mɔ mui nɛ adzuma a kĩ bɔakɛna a sũ mbɔɛɛ? 5Bɔlá osi kĩ bakpã boe batsɔ̃ batɛ badonɛ bɔnamɛna osi akũ ndɛ ayekĩ fɔtɔ banyanɛ bɛbã, Petro mɔ boe Ɔlate bawaɛ̃ a akɛna mbɔɛɛ? 6Mbɔɛɛ kĩ bɔmɔ Barnaba odi pɛ kɛnɛ kĩ bɔkɛna adzuma bɔkɔa bɔdãmɛna boe akũ?
7Sodzani ɔdabe adãmɛna ye mɔawɛ akũ ntɛ edeĩ nɛ kawũkanɔ adzumamu? Okuani ɔdabe anɛ kɔba kĩ yaánya funitsã a kĩ fɔnɛ a? Ĩye owei adɔɔla ɔnantsue kĩ yaámɔa ye tɛmɛ mui badi? 8Maátsa fɔtsa nɛ bati kakɔna onukpɛ̃. Ade aye mbla a lɛmɛ tsa kalɛ mɔapɛ a. 9Bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ Mose mbla ovoli a kamɛ kĩ, “Mitasui ɔyaɛ kĩ minɛɛ miakɛna adzuma nɛ kɔba a onukpɛ̃.” Baguma tsɛla ɔyaɛ odi akũ mbɔɛɛ? 10Nnɛ́ boe sũ ɛlɛ kalɛ a na mbɔɛɛ? Ɔnɔkɔali ade boe kalɛ sũ bɛtsɛlɛ foe a. Kɛnɛ kĩ ekĩ yadu mɔ ekĩ yakpɔta a flee bakɛna adzuma a mɔ kɔnɛte kĩ baana be tsɛfã nɛ funitsã a kĩ fɔ́anɛ a kamɛ. 11Budu hũhũ kamɛ fɔtsa nɛ mi kamɛ. Ntɛ mi malo mikpa boe katinya kamɛ fɔtsa a ni, miyɛla osi? 12Ntɛ bati bɛbã deĩ osi kĩ bana nfasɔ adi bitomɛna mi sɛkɛ̃ ni, kekɔ̃ kɛnɛ kĩ boe bɔana foe butomɛna mi sɛkɛ̃, fublusu malo.
Lɛmɛ bɔtákɔa boe osi kawa a na bɔkɛna adzuma. Mbom bɔkɔa lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa bute nɛ boe mɔawɛ akũ ayekĩ lɛtsama lɛláanya mbɛtahu fɔkpa boe nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a kalɛ nɛ Kristo akũ. 13Minyina yededeede kĩ be a kĩ bakɛna adzuma nɛ Baguma Asɔli Kɔla kamɛ ana be funitsã katomɛna Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ, ade bikĩ babɔa afɔliɛ nɛ afɔliɛ de akũ a lɛmɛ ana afɔliɛ fɔtsa a foe tsɛfã a. 14Ade aye boe Ɔlate lɛmɛ lɛ eyi kĩ be a kĩ bade lɛtsã nɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa akũ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ bɛna be kanya bitomɛna lɛtsã kade a kamɛ.
15Lɛmɛ yĩ kɔ̃ ntákɛna osi kĩĩ akũ adzuma, ade nlámɛna mi ovoli kĩĩ katsɛlɛ kĩ mikɛna nɛ foe akũ mikpa yĩ a. Ntɛ foe lɔmɔ sũ ni, maaku mbom! Kitonɛkĩ ntáwɛ kĩ odi ɛkɔa lɛtsa kĩ mapia nɛ de akũ a ɛkɛna fɔtsa pupulidza. 16Nlá osi kĩ mapia nɛ kĩ made lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ sũ. Fɔnyɛ ɔhɛ fɔkpa yĩ kĩ ndɛ lɛtsã a, ade Baguma aavɛlɛ yĩ sɔtɔ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ ntɛ ntálɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a lɛmɛ. 17Ntɛ yĩ mɔawɛ kawɛ onukpɛ̃ makɛna adzuma kĩĩ ni, maadã kĩ bise yĩ foe kɔtɔ. Lɛmɛ makɛna foe ndɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bihihiɛ bɛkpa yĩ kĩ nkɛna, kitonɛkĩ fɔnyɛ adzuma kĩ Baguma hihiɛ ɛkpa yĩ. 18Foesũ litsa kɔtɔkase maana? Yĩ kɔtɔkase nyɛ kĩ made lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ faa, ade maáte anɛ kĩ maatsã osi odi akũ nna foe akũ kɔtɔkase kudi a.
19Ndzi yĩ akũ akũ ade ĩnyɛ́ ɔsate nkpa odima a. Lɛmɛ nkɔa yĩ akũ nkɛna oti kĩ yasum odi nyɛ odi ayekĩ maapuli ĩnyɛ bati pii nkpa boe Ɔlate. 20Lɔkɔ a kĩ nkɛna adzuma nɛ Yudafɔ kamɛ a, ndzi nkpã ndɛ Yudani ayekĩ maavɛlɛ be mma boe Ɔlate. Titɔ kĩ nláa Mose mbla kayɔ malo ni, ndzi nkpã ndɛ bikĩ bideĩ nɛ mbla kayɔ, ayekĩ maanyɛ bikĩ bideĩ nɛ mbla a kayɔ nkpa boe Ɔlate. 21Ade ayea kĩ makɛna adzuma nɛ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ kamɛ a, ndzi nkpã ndɛ oti kĩ ɛnyɛ́ Yudani. Ntákɛna nɛ Yudafɔ mbla akũ ayekĩ maana bati nkpa boe Ɔlate. Lɛmɛ fukĩĩ látsa kĩ mpu Baguma mbla a. Ɔnɔkɔali a nyɛ kĩ ndeĩ nɛ Kristo mbla a kayɔ. 22Ntɛ ndeĩ nɛ bikĩ be katɛkado tabo anɛ kamɛ ni, makɛna yĩ akũ ndɛ be kamɛ ɔmɔa aye, ayekĩ maavɛlɛ be nkpa boe Ɔlate. Matsã osi nyɛ osi akũ kakɛna ɔmɔa mɔ odi nyɛ odi ayekĩ maavɛlɛ be kamɛ badi nkpa boe Ɔlate. 23Makɛna fukĩĩ bamɛ flee nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a sũ, ayekĩ yĩ malo maana foe akũ nhila.
24Minyina yededeede kĩ bati pii adã akũ nɛ atsɛ kalo kamɛ, lɛmɛ be kamɛ ɔmɔapɛ anya akũ katɛ foe akũ lɔbɔɛ. Foesũ miwula atsɛ ayekĩ míapuli minya akũ mitɛ foe akũ kɔtɔkase a. 25Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛmanɛ akũ ɛkpa atsɛ kalo ni, yakɔa ye akũ kado nɛ mbla mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kayɔ ayekĩ yaana lɛgãbɔɛ a kĩ de kɔ̃ laawɔ. Lɛmɛ boe kɔ̃ bɔamanɛ akũ ayekĩ bɔ́ana lɛgãbɔɛ a kĩ lɛláawɔ da. 26Foesũ mawula atsɛ kanaa kpĩĩ kĩ manaatsua ɔwɛ̃ a. Ade foesũ nla ndɛ fukpeni ɔbɔanɛ kĩ yaáta fukpeni nɛ ɔwɛ kamɛ aye aye a. 27Mafɔ̃ fukpeni awo yĩ akũ ayekĩ yĩ sukɛna aapuli sɛdza sɛkpa lubo kamɔ. Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ made lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ kakpa bati bɛbã ni, ntáwɛ kĩ bɛyaanyɛ yĩ nɛ boe a kĩ bɔadã akũ nɛ atse kalo kɔdza a kamɛ.

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 10
Content:
Paulo Kpa Kɔdɛ Nɛ Baviɔ̃ Kasum Akũ.
1Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mawɛ kĩ mikai lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya nɛ boe bawanyɔ a kĩ bitómɔ Mose a akũ. Be flee bɛna nɛ luflututu a kɔbɛ̃ kayɔ ade bɛtsã Mpo Ngbã a kamɛ bɛnɛ yededeede a. 2Baguma kɔa luflututu mɔ mpo mui ɛkɛna be mui kawɔla amaniɛ ndɛ bati kĩ bitomɔ Mose aye. 3Be flee bɛnya hũhũ kamɛ funitsã mɔapɛ a, 4ade bɛmɔa hũhũ kamɛ bavɛ mɔapɛ a lɛmɛ a. Bɛmɔa mui bitomɛna awãwã hũhũ de a kĩ litomɔ be a kamɛ. Ade de kĩĩ nyɛ Kristo awɛ a. 5Lɛmɛ nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ ni, Baguma támɔ kawɔlɛ nɛ be pii akũ. Nɛ foesũ biku nɛ kɔsa kamɛ.
6Finyaakĩĩ ni, fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ flee nyɛ nfantuhũ fɔkpa boe ayekĩ fɔ́abɔa boe kɔkɔ, kĩ bɔláatomɔ fɔtsa kpa liti ndɛ ayekĩ bɛkɛna, 7ĩye bɔakɔa boe akũ bɔkpa baviɔ̃ kasum ndɛ ayekĩ be kamɛ badi kɛna a. Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Bati a dzi banya luwi, lɛmɛ be kanya mɔ kamɔa dani fɔkɛna bavɛ kawuga, mɔ litsolewɛ mɔ linyolewɛ kakɛna.” 8Kɛtánɛ kĩ bakɔ boe kɔtɔ nɛ litsolewɛ mɔ linyolewɛ kakɛna kamɛ, ndɛ ayekĩ be badi kɛna. Nɛ foesũ be kamɛ bati mpim tɛya ɛlalɛ ku luwi mɔapɛ. 9Kɛtánɛ kĩ bɔasɔ boe Ɔlate bɔdã ndɛ ayekĩ be kamɛ badi kɛna a, nɛ foesũ bɔɛ dɔ̃ be biku. 10Mitafɔ̃ buyidza bɔdza nɛ Baguma akũ ndɛ ayekĩ be kamɛ badi kɛna, nɛ foesũ Wuda Ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ yawɔla be.
11Fukĩĩ bamɛ flee ya nɛ be akũ ayekĩ bati bɛbã aakɔlɛ fɔtsa bitomɛna foe akũ. Bɛtsɛlɛ foe biyi ayekĩ bɔ́akɔa bɔkpã boe akũ, kitonɛkĩ budeĩ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ katinya kamɛ kawũna fuã kiyua a kamɛ. 12Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɔna kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ pintii ni, ɛdã kadã wĩ ayekĩ ɛláatɔ. 13Kasɔ kadã kadi nyɛ kadi kĩ kɛya nɛ nɔ akũ ni, ade foe odu aya nɛ bati bɛbã akũ a. Lɛmɛ Baguma akɛna nɛ ye kalɛ akũ, ade ke ɛláafɔ̃ kasɔ a na lɛba nɔ kɔbɛ̃ a. Nɛ kasɔ a kamɛ ni, yaakpa mi kɔbɛ̃ ayekĩ míapuli midza nɛ foe kamɛ, mipuli minya foe akũ lɛmɛ.
14Foesũ, nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mivɛlɛ mi akũ nɛ baviɔ̃ kasum ɔwɛ̃. 15Mabi mi fɔlɛtsa ndɛ bati kĩ binyina kadi, foesũ mikɔna fɔlɛtsa a kĩ nlɛ a akũ midã. 16Kɔɔpu a kĩ bɔalɛ kanyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ a nyɛ boe Ɔlate babɔanɛ. Ntɛ buhila kayei a na, bɔmɔa bavɛ a ni, bɔmɔ Kristo bɔkɛna ɔmɔa. Ntɛ bɔanya boe Ɔlate funitsã kpalɛwa ni, fɔatsa kĩ bɔmɔ Kristo bɔkɛna ɔmɔa. 17Titɔ kĩ bɔpɔnɛ malo ni bɔkɛna oti mɔa, kito nɛ abodoo mɔapɛ a kĩ boe flee bɔsɛ̃ bɔanya a sũ.
18Mikɔna Israelfɔ midã. Be a kĩ bɛnya funitsã a kĩ bɛkɔa bɛbɔa afɔliɛ bɛkpa Baguma a, bɛkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Baguma. 19Foesũ katsa matsa kĩ baviɔ̃ ĩye fɔtsa a kĩ bakɔa kabɔa afɔliɛ kakpa be a nyɛ fɔtsa sĩwa fudi mbɔɛɛ? 20Oowo! Lɛtsa a kĩ matsa a nyɛ kĩ fɔtsa a kĩ bɛkɔa bɛbɔa afɔliɛ bɛkpa baviɔ̃ ni, bɛkɔa foe bɛkpa hũhũ kpa, lɛmɛ nnɛ́ Baguma bɛbɔa bɛkpa. Ntáwɛ kĩ miakɛna ɔmɔa mɔ hũhũ kpa. 21Kɛtánɛ kĩ miamɔa mui nɛ boe Ɔlate kɔɔpu kamɛ lɔkɔa mibuki minaamɔa nɛ hũhũ kpa kɔɔpu lɛmɛ kamɛ, ĩye minya nɛ boe Ɔlate opunu akũ lɔkɔa minaanya nɛ hũhũ kpa opunu akũ lɛmɛ. 22Miawɛ kĩ boe Ɔlate ɛna kalɔkpa, ɛnɔ lineke lɛmɛ mbɔɛɛ? Bɔakɔna kĩ budeĩ kɔbɛ̃ bɔbɛ̃ ye mbɔɛɛ?
23Babɔa lɛgbã kĩ, “Bɛkpa boe osi kĩ bɔkɛna lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa.” Fɔnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali, lɛmɛ nnɛ́ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa nɛnɛ lɛkpa boe. “Bɛkpa boe osi kĩ bɔkɛna lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa.” Lɛmɛ nnɛ́ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa deĩ nfasɔ lɛkpa boe. 24Kɛtánɛ kĩ oti akɔna ye odi kalɛ, mbom kɛnɛ kĩ yakɔna bati bɛbã kalɛ akũ.
25Mideĩ osi kĩ mianya sɛkɛna sidi nyɛ sidi kĩ banɔ nɛ kɔyaatɔ. Mitafɔ̃ fɔha mi tɔwɔlɛ ĩye mivia ntɛ se akũ kpalɛ ĩye sɛtákpalɛ. 26Kitonɛkĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Baguma la katinya mɔ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ lideĩ nɛ ke kamɛ a.”
27Ntɛ oti kĩ ɛnyɛ́ ɔtɛ odonɛ vɛ nɔ kĩ yaanya mɔ́ otunɔ ɔnaa ni, nya funitsã a kĩ ete opunu ɛkpa nɔ a, lɛmɛ tavia ye otse ntɛ foe akũ kpalɛ ĩye fɔtákpalɛ. 28Lɛmɛ ntɛ odi bi nɔ kĩ, “Dã, bɛkɔa funitsã a na bɛbɔa afɔliɛ bɛkpa baviɔ̃” kekɔ̃ tanya foe nɛ ayekĩ fɔláaha oti a ɔwɔlɛ. 29Kitonɛkĩ nnɛ́ nɔ a kĩ ɔnya a ɔwɔlɛ fɔ́aha, mbom fɔ́aha oti a kĩ ebi nɔ a. Odi aavia kĩ, “Nde sũ ntɛ ndeĩ osi kĩ makɛna litsedi mɔ fɔaha odi ɔwɔlɛ? 30Ntɛ ĩnyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ nɛ funitsã a kĩ ɛkpa yĩ a akũ ni, nde sũ odi alɛ kɔdzɛla etia yĩ?”
31Lɛmɛ mite anɛ kĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ miakɛna, ntɛ fɔnyɛ kanya ĩye kamɔa malo ni mikɛna foe mikɔa mimu Baguma. 32Midzi nkpã ayekĩ miláavɛlɛ ɔhau adima mikpa Yudafɔ ĩye bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ mɔ be a kĩ bɛnyɛ Baguma asɔli bati a. 33Mikɛna ndɛ ayekĩ nlamɛna kakɛna. Mbɔa mbɔdi kĩ makɛna lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa fuwo odi nyɛ odi anɛ. Maákɔna yĩ akũ mbom makɔna bati flee be tuwĩ akũ ayekĩ baana nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a.

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 11
Content:
1Mikɔlɛ yĩ ɔbla mikɛna ndɛ ayekĩ yĩ malo makɔlɛ Kristo ɔbla kakɛna a.
Kristo Nyɛ Lɔlɔ Ɛkpa Odi Nyɛ Odi.
2Mamu mi nɛ ayekĩ mite anɛ nɛ yĩ akũ luwi daa mɔ ayekĩ mitomɔ fɔtsa flee a kĩ ntsa mi a.
3Lɛmɛ mawɛ kĩ minyi kĩ Kristo nyɛ lɔlɔ ɛkpa odi nyɛ odi. Onyole nyɛ ɔtsɔ̃ lɔlɔ ade Baguma lɛmɛ nyɛ Kristo lɔlɔ a. 4Foesũ ntɛ onyole kĩ yabɔa mpaɛ ĩye yalɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa nɛ asɔli kɔla kamɛ sua ye lɔlɔ ni, edo Kristo kɔnyɔã. 5Lɛmɛ otsole kĩ yabɔa mpaɛ ĩye yalɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa nɛ asɔli kɔla kamɛ, tásui duku nɛ lɔlɔ ni, edo ɔnyɔ kɔnyɔã. Ntsitsemu lɛláa bɛmɔ otsole kĩ ɛkpa lɔlɔ tsɔlitsɔli kayite. 6Ntɛ otsole tásui duku nɛ lɔlɔ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ ekpeli tɔlɔ. Lɛmɛ nɛ kĩ fɔnyɛ kɔnyɔã ntɛ otsole kpeli tɔlɔ ĩye ɛkpa lɔlɔ sũ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ esui duku nɛ lɔlɔ. 7Fɔtásĩ kĩ onyole asua lɔlɔ kitonɛkĩ ɛla ndɛ Baguma kutitse mɔ ye kukũkpalɛ. Lɛmɛ otsole kɔ̃ nyɛ onyole kukũkpalɛ. 8Kitonɛkĩ Baguma tábɔa onyole etomɛna otsole kamɛ, mbom ɛbɔa otsole etomɛna onyole kamɛ. 9Bɛtábɔa onyole bɛkpa otsole nɛ ye otsole a kalɛ sũ, lɛmɛ bɛkɛna otsole bɛkpa nɛ onyole a kalɛ sũ. 10Nɛ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ sũ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ otsole esui duku nɛ lɔlɔ ɛkɔa ɛtsa kĩ edeĩ nɛ ɔnyɔ kɔbɛ̃ kayɔ.
11Titɔ kĩ fɔla lɔmɔ malo nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ boe Ɔlate sũ ni, otsole lídzi ye akũ akũ, ade onyole lɛmɛ lídzi ye akũ akũ a. 12Kitonɛkĩ ndɛ ayekĩ bɛbɔa otsole bitomɛna onyole kamɛ a, ade aye a bɛma onyole bitomɛna otsole kamɛ a. Lɛmɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa to Baguma sɛkɛ̃.
13Mi mɔawɛ mikɔna midã ntɛ fɔnɛnɛ kĩ otsole abɔa mpaɛ ɛkpa Baguma nɛ kanade, kĩ ɛtásui duku nɛ lɔlɔ. 14Ayekĩ Baguma bɔa katinya kamɛ malo atsa boe litsedi kĩ fɔnyɛ kɔnyɔã ntɛ onyole deĩ lɔlɔ tɔlɔ gɛlɛɛlɛ. 15Lɛmɛ tɔlɔ gɛlɛɛlɛ nyɛ akũ obu fɔkpa otsole. Bɛkpa ye tɔlɔ gɛlɛɛlɛ kĩ ɛkɔa ɛkɛɛlɛ ye akũ. 16Lɛmɛ ntɛ odi awɛ kĩ yatɛ atsindze nɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ akũ ni, lɛtsa a kĩ maalɛ nɛ foe akũ nyɛ kĩ boe ĩye Baguma tɛsɔli a buki tɛlá amaniɛ bɛbã adima.
Osi a Akũ Kĩ Kɛnɛ Kĩ Bɔnya Boe Ɔlate Funitsã.
17Nɛ kɔdɛ a kĩ makpa mi finyaa kamɛ ni, maámu mi kitonɛkĩ ntɛ mikpɔta kĩ miasum Baguma ni, miakɛna mi akũ tɔkpa kaba tuwĩ. 18Kalɛ katɔnyade ni, nnu kĩ ntɛ mikpɔta ndɛ asɔli bati aye ni, miasɛ̃ mi akũ. Ntɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ fudi ndo. 19Fusĩ kĩ kasɛ̃ kɛna nɛ mi kamɛ ayekĩ bɔ́amɔ yededeede bikĩ badi ɔnɔkɔali nɛ mi kamɛ. 20Ntɛ mikpɔta nɛ kakɔ mɔa ni, nnɛ́ boe Ɔlate Funitsã kpalɛwa a mianya. 21Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ mianya ni, odi nyɛ odi abɔɛ ye funitsã kanya. Fɔfɔ̃ badi lána kanya, ade badi lɛmɛ awuga bavɛ. 22Milá tɔtɔ kĩ mianya mimɔa nɛ te kamɛ mbɔɛɛ? Kawɛ miawɛ kĩ miasupa Baguma asɔli a, mido ahiãfɔ kɔnyɔã lɛmɛ mbɔɛɛ? Litsa miwɛ kĩ mbi mi nɛ fukĩĩ akũ? Miwɛ kĩ mmu mi mbɔɛɛ? Oowo! Fukĩĩ kɔ̃ nláamu mi.
23Kitonɛkĩ lɛtsa a kĩ ntɛ ntomɛna boe Ɔlate sɛkɛ̃ a, ade foe ntsa mi a. Lɛnyɛ a kĩ ke mɔ bɛnyɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu bɛkpa a, ɛbɔɛ abodoo, 24ade ɛnyɛ kɔlɛ, ɛyɛlɛ ye ɛlɛ kĩ, “Ade yĩ sukɛna kĩ nkɔa mabɔa afɔliɛ nkpa mi a. Mikɛna fukĩĩ mikɔa mikai yĩ.” 25Ade ayea kĩ bɛnya biyua a, ɛbɔɛ kɔɔpu ade ɛlɛ kĩ, “Kɔɔpu kĩĩ nyɛ nhihiɛ vɔɛ̃ kĩ bɛkɔa yĩ babɔanɛ bisui. Lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ kĩ miamɔa bavɛ kĩĩ ni, mikɛna foe mikai yĩ.” 26Fɔatsa kĩ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ kĩ mianya abodoo, miamɔa bavɛ nɛ kɔɔpu kĩĩ kamɛ lɛmɛ ni, milamɛna lɛtsã kade nɛ boe Ɔlate wuda akũ, kɛnaawo lɔkɔ a kĩ yaabuki ɛya.
27Foesũ ntɛ odi nya boe Ɔlate abodoo, ɛmɔa kɔɔpu kĩĩ nɛ osi kpa akũ ni, baakɔ ye kɔtɔ kĩ efum nɛ boe Ɔlate sukɛna mɔ ye babɔanɛ akũ. 28Nɛ foesũ kɛnɛ kĩ odi nyɛ odi ɛkɔna ye ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ fɔmɔ yaanya funitsã, ɛmɔa bavɛ nɛ kɔɔpu a lɛmɛ kamɛ. 29Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ odi táyi boe Ɔlate babɔanɛ mɔ sukɛna ɔsũ kĩ fɔnyɛ fɔtsa kpalɛwa fɔmɔ ɛnya ĩye ɛmɔa foe nɛ osi kpa akũ ni, ɛvɛlɛ kadzɛ eko nɛ ye akũ. 30Ade foesũ mi pii miasɔ ade milá akũ ɔsĩ a. Mi kamɛ bati pii lɛmɛ ku. 31Ntɛ bɔnya lɔtɔ bɔnaa boe tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ ni, Baguma lɛláadzɛmɔ boe. 32Lɛmɛ ntɛ boe Ɔlate adzɛmɔ boe, ɛvɛlɛ boe sɔtɔ lɛmɛ ni, yalɔla boe ayekĩ Baguma lɛláakɔ bɔmɔ bikĩ bɛtátɛ bido a flee kɔtɔ ɛkpɔta.
33Foesũ nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ntɛ miyakpɔta kĩ mianya ni, midzɔlɛ mi bawaɛ̃. 34Ntɛ kɔlɛ akɔ odi ni, ɛnya nɛ kɔla ayekĩ ntɛ miyatsɛna nɛ Baguma kɔla kamɛ ni owula lɛláana kadzɛ ɛkpa ye akũ. Ntɛ ĩya ni, maadɛ mi nɛ fɔlɛtsa bɛbã a kĩ fute a akũ.

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 12
Content:
Futetsa a Kĩ Futo Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a Sɛkɛ̃.
1Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, finyaa ni mawɛ kĩ minu Hũhũ kamɛ futetsa a kĩ mitsɛlɛ mivia akũ fɔlɛtsa kayɔ a yededeede. 2Minyina kĩ fɔmɔ midani mikɛna batɛ badonɛ a, mitsã tisi pii akũ ade mikɔa mi akũ mikpa baviɔ̃ kĩ báalɛ kɔdzɛla kasum a. 3Foesũ mafɔ̃ minyi kĩ ntɛ odi kɔa Hũhũ Kpalɛwa kɔbɛ̃ yalɛ kɔdzɛla ni, ɛláalɛ kĩ, “Yesu, kɔa nɛ ke a!” ade odima lɛmɛ lɛláapuli ɛlɛ kĩ, “Yesu nyɛ boe Ɔlate,” ntɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa kɔbɛ̃ lɛláa ye kamɛ.
4Futetsa futefute deĩ lɛmɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa mɔapɛ a lɛkpa foe flee. 5Tisi pii deĩ kĩ te akũ bɔatsã kakɛna Baguma adzuma, lɛmɛ ade boe Ɔlate mɔapɛ a bɔasum a. 6Ade ayea tisi pii deĩ kĩ Baguma atsã kakpa bati kɔbɛ̃ bakɛna fɔtsa, lɛmɛ Baguma mɔapɛ akpa kɔbɛ̃ a flee.
7Baguma kɔa Hũhũ Kpalɛwa ɛtsã bati akũ bakɛna tuwĩ fɔnɛ libi fɔkpa bati flee. 8Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a apuli kakpa oti mɔa kɔbɛ̃ ɛlɛ kɔdzɛla mɔ nyansã, ade Hũhũ Kpalɛwa mɔapɛ a akpa oti bɛbã lɛmɛ kɔbɛ̃ ɛlɛ kɔdzɛla mɔ kadikanyi a. 9Hũhũ Kpalɛwa mɔapɛ a akpa oti mɔa katɛkado baũ. Ye mɔapɛ a yakpa oti bɛbã fɔsɔ katsa kɔbɛ̃. 10Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a akpa oti bɛbã kɔbɛ̃ kĩ ɛkɛna awãwã fɔtsa, odi bɛbã lɛmɛ kĩ ɛnyɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃. Yakpa oti mɔa kɔbɛ̃ kĩ epuli ɛlɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ tide ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ kamɛ, ade yakpa odi bɛbã lɛmɛ kɔbɛ̃ kĩ yapuli ɛnyɛ tide a kayɔ, oti bɛbã kɔbɛ̃ kĩ epuli enyi ntɛ futetsa kĩĩ to Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a sɛkɛ̃ ĩye fɔtáto ye sɛkɛ̃. 11Hũhũ Kpalɛwa mɔapɛ kĩĩ a akɛna fɔtsa a flee, ade yakpa odi nyɛ odi futetsa ndɛ ayekĩ yawɛ a.
Oti Deĩ Akũ Fɔtsa Kĩ Fɔakɛna Fɔtsa Futefute.
12Otidziwa kutitse a deĩ akũ fɔkɔ futefute, lɛmɛ foe flee fɔnyɛ oti mɔapɛ. Titɔ kĩ kuti a deĩ akũ fɔtsa pii malo ni, foe flee fɔkɛna oti mɔa. Ade aye Kristo lɛmɛ la a. 13Boe badi bɔnyɛ Yudafɔ ade badi lɛmɛ nyɛ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a. Badi nyɛ basate ade badi lɛmɛ dzi be akũ akũ a. Lɛmɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a wɔla boe flee mui nɛ Kristo kamɛ, bɔkɛna ɔmɔa nɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa mɔapɛ a kamɛ. Boe flee bɔtɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa mɔapɛ a mui bɔmɔa.
14Kitonɛkĩ otidziwa kutitse a lɛnyɛ́ fɔtsa fɔmɔapɛ, mbom kudeĩ fɔkɔ ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ. 15Ntɛ kɔbɔa lɛ kĩ, “Nnɛ́ awɛ manɛ sũ ĩnyɛ́ kutitse a sɛkɛ sidima” a, foe kalɛ lɔmɔ lɛláafɔ̃ kĩ kɔbɔa buki kɔnyɛ́ kutitse a sɛkɛ sidi. 16Ntɛ sɔtɔ lɛmɛ lɛ kĩ, “Nnɛ́ linebi manɛ sũ ĩnyɛ kutitse a sɛkɛ sidima,” foe kalɛ lɔmɔ lɛláafɔ̃ kĩ sɔtɔ buki sɛnyɛ́ kuti a sɛkɛ sidi. 17Ntɛ kutitse a flee nyɛ linebi odi ni, kɔláapuli kunu fɔkɔ. Ntɛ kutitse a flee nyɛ sɔtɔ odi ni, kɔláapuli kɔtɛ fɔtsa nfiã. 18Lɛmɛ Baguma bɔa boe kutitse mɔ foe akũ ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ, ade edo fudi nyɛ fudi nɛ awã kĩ yawɛ a. 19Nde otidziwa kuti a aana ndɛ akũ fɔtsa mɔapɛ fɔanɛ? 20Oti akũ fɔkɔ futefute deĩ lɛmɛ kutitse mɔapɛ kɔanɛ.
21Foesũ linebi lɛláapuli libi awɛ kĩ, “Ntásĩ nɔ!” Lɔlɔ lɛmɛ lɛláapuli libi sɛnɛta kĩ, “Ntásĩ nɔ!” 22Oti akũ fɔkɔ a kĩ fɔadã ndɛ fɔlá akũ ɔsĩ a, ade foe mbom akũ lisĩ boe a. 23Ade ke fɔkɔ a kĩ bɔakɔna kĩ fɔtátɛ kɔya a, ade foe bɔakpa obu kaba a. Fukĩ fɔálɛ kadã a, ade foe bɔakɔla kaba a. 24Boe akũ fɔkɔ a kĩ fɔalɛ kadã a tásĩ akũ kadãmɛna. Baguma awɛ boomu akũ fɔkɔ a flee ade edo obu nɛ fukĩ obu lɛláa foe akũ, 25ayekĩ boe kutitse a lɛláasɛ̃ koe akũ. Baguma wɛ kĩ fɔkɔ futefute a fɔdãmɛna fɔkɔba akũ pɛpɛɛpɛ. 26Ntɛ oti kakɔ kadi asɔ ni, fɔkɔ nkaɛ a lɛmɛ amɔ lubo kabumɔ foe. Ntɛ bido kakɔ kadi anunyam ni, fɔkɔ nkaɛ a lɛmɛ amɔ kawɔlɛ kabumɔ foe.
27Finyaakĩĩ mi a flee mikpɔta minyɛ Kristo kutitse a, ade mi kamɛ odi nyɛ odi nyɛ kutitse a sɛkɛ sĩwa sidi a. 28Baguma kɔa badi ɛdzɛla nɛ ye batɛ badonɛ onukpɛ̃. Bɛkɔa kadzakɔ̃ katɔnyade bɛkpa fɔtɔ banyanɛ, kayade bɛkpa bikĩ bɛnyɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ, ade kalalɛde a naa fɔtsa batsanɛ sɛkɛ̃ a. Ke liti Baguma kɔa kadzakɔ̃ bɛbã ɛkpa bikĩ bakɛna awãwã fɔtsa, bikĩ bideĩ kɔbɛ̃ kĩ batsa fɔsɔ, bikĩ babumɛna bati, bikĩ banya bati lɔtɔ nɛ tudzuma kakɛna kamɛ, mɔ bikĩ balɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ tide ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ kamɛ. 29Nnɛ́ bati flee nyɛ fɔtɔ banyanɛ ĩye kĩ bɛnyɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ ĩye fɔtsa batsanɛ. Ade nnɛ́ bati flee deĩ kɔbɛ̃ kĩ bakɛna awãwã fɔtsa a. 30Nnɛ́ bati flee deĩ kɔbɛ̃ kĩ batsa fɔsɔ, ĩye balɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ tide ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ kamɛ ĩye banyɛ tide a kayɔ. 31Nɛ foe flee kamɛ a, mitomɔ futetsa a kĩ fɔtɛ kɔya fɔba flee a liti.
Lɛmɛ finyaakĩĩ maatsa mi fukĩ fɔbɛ̃ a flee.

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 13
Content:
Paulo Tsa Lɛtsa Kĩ Lɛnyɛ Ɔdɔ.
1Ntɛ mapuli kalɛ batidziwa mɔ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ flee tide, mɔ bati kawɛ lɛláa yĩ kamɛ ni, kekɔ̃ yĩ kɔdzɛla kalɛ la ndɛ lɔwɔda ĩye ɔdɔũ kĩ yanɛ kɔɔba kasĩna atɔ. 2Ntɛ ndeĩ kɔbɛ̃ kĩ manyɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃, ĩye ĩnyina fɔtsa kɔlawa mɔ kadikanyi flee, ĩye ntɛ ndeĩ katɛkado kĩ maapuli ndzɛla ɔtɔ nɛ ye kadzakɔ̃, mɔ́ bati kawɛ lɛláa yĩ kamɛ ni, kekɔ̃ ĩnyɛ́ lɛtsama. 3Ntɛ nkɔa yĩ akũ fɔtsa flee nte ahiãfɔ, ĩye ntɛ nkɔa yĩ akũ mbɔa afɔliɛ kĩ bipila mɔ ntɛ bati kawɛ lɛláa yĩ kamɛ ni, nlá nfasɔ adima.
4Ɔdɔ deĩ ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ edeĩ sɛmɛ kalɛ lɛmɛ. Ɔdɔ lɛlá anɛngbã, yaátui ɔwɔlɛ ade yaáta akũ lɛmɛ a. 5Ɔdɔ lákɛna fɔnyɔãtsa, yaáwɛ ye odi fude, yaána kalɔkpa, ade yaápi tɔkpa kado nɛ ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ a. 6Ɔdɔ lámɔ kawɔlɛ nɛ tɔkpa akũ, mbom yamɔ kawɔlɛ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ kamɛ. 7Akpɔ láveli ɔdɔ, yaákpa lɔlɔ nɛ ye katɛkado kamɛ, edeĩ kɔnɛte luwi nyɛ luwi ade yadza pintii nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ a.
8Ɔdɔ lɛlá kawũna da. Baguma onukpɛ̃ kanyɛ aayatɛ̃, kɔdzɛla kalɛ nɛ tide ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ kamɛ mɔ kadikanyi deĩ, lɛmɛ lɔkɔ aaya kĩ foe flee fɔ́atsua, 9kitonɛkĩ boe kadikanyi mɔ boe Baguma onukpɛ̃ kanyɛ a lɛmɛ tákpɔla fuyua a. 10Lɛmɛ ntɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔkpɔla yawo ɔtɔ ni, futetsa kĩĩ flee aatɛ̃. 11Lɔkɔ a kĩ nna nɛ tibisɛ̃ kamɛ a, nlɛ kɔdzɛla, mbɔɛ adzuni, mbu lɔlɔ kamɛ ndɛ obisɛ̃ aye. Lɛmɛ kĩ mbo anɛ ndani ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ ni, nfɔnɛ tibisɛ̃ kamɛ fɔtsa flee awɛ. 12Finyaakĩĩ bɔamɔ fɔtsa futufutu ndɛ ayekĩ fɔla nɛ ahuhɔɛ kamɛ. Lɛmɛ ke liti ni bɔ́ayamɔ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa anɛ mɔ anɛ. Lɛtsa a kĩ ĩnyina finyaa ni, fɔtákpɔla fuyua, lɛmɛ liti maamɔ foe yededeede ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma nyina yĩ a.
13Nɛ foe kamɛ a, fɔtsa ɛlalɛ deĩ kĩ foe kɔ̃ fɔ́awa daa. Ade foe nyɛ katɛkado, kɔnɛte mɔ ɔdɔ, lɛmɛ fukĩ fɔbɛ̃ flee nyɛ ɔdɔ.

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 14
Content:
Paulo Buki Ɛlɛ Kɔdzɛla Nɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa Futetsa a Akũ.
1Foesũ ɔdɔ ɛnya fɔtsa a kĩ foe liti míatomɛna mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ, lɛmɛ miwɛ hũhũ kamɛ futetsa liti osi, titiliwu Baguma onukpɛ̃ kanyɛ. 2Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ odi deĩ kɔbɛ̃ kĩ yalɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ tide ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ kamɛ ni bɛmɔ Baguma odi alɛ kɔdzɛla, lɛmɛ nnɛ́ bɛmɔ bati kitonɛkĩ bɛláanu foe kayɔ. Fɔnyɛ fɔlɛtsa kɔlawa kĩ futo Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a sɛkɛ̃. 3Lɛmɛ ntɛ odi nyɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ ni, yabi bati kalɛ ade yabumɔ be, yado be kɔbɛ̃, kadɔla be tɔwɔlɛ lɛmɛ. 4Oti kĩ yalɛ kalɛ nɛ tide ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ kamɛ kĩ bati lánu foe kayɔ ni, ye odi akũ yabumɛna. Lɛmɛ odi kĩ ɛnyɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ ni, yabumɛna batɛ badonɛ a flee.
5Nwɛ kĩ mipuli milɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ tide ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ kamɛ, lɛmɛ ntɛ mipuli minyɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ ni fɔnɛnɛ fɔbɛ̃. Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ odi nyɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ ni, ebumɔ asɔli bati a ɛba odi kĩ yalɛ tide ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ, mbɔɛntɛ odi bɛbã nyɛ foe kayɔ fɔnya kabumɛna fɔkpa bati a flee.
6Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ntɛ ĩya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ ĩyalɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ tide ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ kamɛ kĩ odima tánu foe kayɔ a ni, nfasɔ wɔdabe deĩ nɛ foe kamɛ fɔkpa mi? Lɛmɛ ntɛ nkɔa kanyɛkatsa kadi, kadikanyi kadi, Baguma onukpɛ̃ kanyɛ kadi ĩye kadikanyi, Baguma fɔlɛtsa, fɔtsa katsa fudi mma mi ni, ade foe aakpa mi kabumɛna a. 7Ade aye kagbulɛɛ ĩye ɔsankuo, titɔ kĩ fɔlá nkpã malo ni, foe odo deĩ. Ntɛ bɛtávɔ̃ ĩye bɛbɔa foe nɛ osi odi akũ ni, ndɛ baakɛna biyi odo a ɔsũ? 8Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ oti a kĩ yavɔ̃ kagbulɛɛ távɔ̃ ke kavɔ̃ wĩ ni, nde kawũ banɔnɛ aakɛna binyi kĩ bɛpai be bɛkpa kawũkanɔ? 9Ade ayea ntɛ ɔlɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ tide bɛbã kamɛ ni, nde bati aakɛna binu nɔ fɔlɛtsa a kayɔ? Fɔatsa kĩ ɔlɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ ɔwɛ kamɛ. 10Tide ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ deĩ nɛ katinya kamɛ, ade te flee tideĩ kayɔ kanu a. 11Lɛmɛ ntɛ odi lánu yĩ tide ni, ndani oti kĩ mapɔtɔ nkpa ye, ade ke ye malo ɛdani ɔpɔtɔni ɛkpa yĩ a. 12Nɛ kĩ miawɛ kĩ miana hũhũ kamɛ futetsa mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ sũ ni, mivia Baguma ɛkpa mi fukĩ fɔ́anya kabumɛna fɔkpa asɔli bati a flee.
13Odi nyɛ odi kĩ edeĩ kɔbɛ̃ kĩ yalɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ tide ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ kamɛ ni, eke Baguma aduli ɛkpa ye foe kayɔkanyɛ kɔbɛ̃ lɛmɛ, lɔkɔa ɛnyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ de ɛlɛ a kayɔ yededeede. 14Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ mbɔa mpaɛ nɛ tide ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ kamɛ ni, yĩ hũhũ kɔ̃ bɔa mpaɛ lɛmɛ yĩ adzuni lɛláa foe kamɛ. 15Foesũ litsa kɛnɛ kĩ nkɛna? Maabɔa mpaɛ nɛ hũhũ kamɛ ade maabɔa mpaɛ lɛmɛ nɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩ manu foe kayɔ kamɛ a. Maasã tɔnɔ nɛ hũhũ kamɛ ade maasã tɔnɔ lɛmɛ mɔ fɔlɛtsa kĩ manu foe kayɔ a kamɛ. 16Ntɛ amu Baguma nɛ hũhũ kamɛ ni, nde oti a kĩ ɛtánu nɔ fɔlɛtsa kayɔ nɛ katsɛnakɔ̃ a aapuli etunɔ kĩ, “Fɔya lɔmɔ” nɛ nɔ kɔlɛ kanyɛ a onukpɛ̃? 17Ntɛ nɔ kɔlɛkanyɛ mpaɛbɔ a nɛnɛ malo ni, fɔtábumɛna oti bɛbã nɛ osi odima akũ.
18Manyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ kĩ mapuli kalɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ tide ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ kamɛ kaba mi kamɛ odi nyɛ odi. 19Lɛmɛ nɛ boe katsɛna kamɛ ni, mawɛ kĩ malɛ fɔlɛtsa sukuloo kĩ bati aanu foe kayɔ bɛkɔa bɛkɔlɛ fɔtsa, kɛba kĩ maalɛ fɔlɛtsa pii nɛ tide bɛbã kamɛ.
20Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mitato tibisɛ̃ nɛ mi kakɔna kamɛ. Mikɛna ndɛ babisɛ̃ ntɛ fɔnyɛ tɔkpa lɛmɛ mibo anɛ nɛ kadikanyi kamɛ. 21Bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ kĩ,
“Maalɛ kɔdzɛla mɔ yĩ kade bati
ntsã bati kĩ balɛ tide ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ akũ.
Ade maabi be kalɛ ntomɛna banɔvɔɛ̃ tunukpɛ̃,
lɛmɛ bɛláatse yĩ kalɛ.”
22Foesũ miamɔ kĩ kɔdzɛla kalɛ nɛ tide ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ kamɛ nyɛ nsɛntsɛlɛni fɔkpa bikĩ bɛtátɛ bido, nnɛ́ bikĩ bɛtɛ bido a. Lɛmɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ kanyɛ nyɛ nsɛntsɛlɛni ɛkpa bikĩ bɛtɛ bido a, nnɛ́ bikĩ bɛtátɛ bido a.
23Foesũ ntɛ asɔli bati flee tsɛna mɔ odi nyɛ odi lamɛna kɔdzɛla kalɛ nɛ tide ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ kamɛ, mɔ fɔya kĩ bati pupulidza ĩye bikĩ bɛtátɛ bido deĩ nɛ mi kamɛ a, nnɛ́ kalɛ baalɛ kĩ mi fɔlɔ kamɛ bu kade? 24Lɛmɛ ntɛ odi nyɛ odi lamɛna Baguma onukpɛ̃ kanyɛ mɔ oti pulidza ĩye ekĩ ɛtátɛ edo ya nɛ awã ni, lɛtsa kĩ yanu aafɔ̃ ɛdani ye ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ. Fɔlɛtsa a kĩ yanu a aadzɛmɔ ye, 25ade lɛtsa kĩ ɛkɔa ɛkɔla nɛ ye kamɛ aanɛ fɔwa pefee a. Yaadɔla ye akũ emu Baguma ɛlɛ kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔali, Baguma deĩ nɛ boe kamɛ nɛ awĩ.”
Bɛkɛna Mbla Bɛkpa Asɔli a.
26Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ade fukĩĩ mawɛ kĩ mikɛna a. Ntɛ mitsɛna kĩ miasum Baguma ni, mi kamɛ odi deĩ kĩ yasã ɔnɔ, odi atsa fɔtsa, odi deĩ kanyɛkatsa kĩ futo Baguma sɛkɛ̃, odi alɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ tide bɛbã kamɛ, ade odi lɛmɛ anyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ a kayɔ a. Kɛnɛ kĩ miakɛna lɛtsa a kĩ fɔado asɔli bati a flee kɔbɛ̃. 27Ntɛ odi aalɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ tide bɛbã kamɛ ni, bati nviã ĩye be ɛlalɛ bɛlɛ bitomɔ akũ, lɛmɛ kɛnɛ kĩ oti bɛbã anyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ a kayɔ. 28Ntɛ odima lɛláa kĩ yaanyɛ foe kayɔ ni, kekɔ̃ oti a kĩ yalɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ tide bɛbã kamɛ a ɛkɛna dĩĩ ɛlɛ kɔdzɛla ɛkpa ye akũ mɔ Baguma.
29Bati nviã ĩye be ɛlalɛ bɛnyɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ lɔkɔa bati nkaɛ a bɛsa fɔlɛtsa a kĩ baalɛ a kamɛ. 30Lɛmɛ ntɛ odi deĩ nɛ katsɛnakɔ̃ kĩ ɛtɛ kanyɛkatsa etomɛna Baguma sɛkɛ̃ ni, owula kĩ ɛlamɛna kɔdzɛla kalɛ a ɛfɔ̃ kalɛ. 31Mi a flee míapuli milɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa ɔmɔa ɔmɔa ayekĩ odi nyɛ odi aakɔlɛ fɔtsa ɛkɔa foe edo ye akũ kɔbɛ̃. 32Bikĩ banyɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ a bipuli bipi be akũ nɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ balɛ a kamɛ, 33kitonɛkĩ Baguma táwɛ kĩ bɔna nɛ ɔtutũ kamɛ mbom budzi nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ lukudɔ kamɛ.
Ade aye kɛnɛ kĩ fɔna nɛ Baguma tɛsɔli a flee kamɛ a. 34Kɛnɛ kĩ batsole bɛkɛna dĩĩ nɛ fɔtsɛnakɔ̃. Bɛtákpa be osi kĩ balɛ kɔdzɛla, ade Yudafɔ mbla lɛmɛ tsa kĩ bɛtanya lɔtɔ nɛ adzuma adima kamɛ a. 35Ntɛ bɛwɛ kĩ banyi litsedi kamɛ ni bivia be banyɔ nɛ kɔla. Fɔnyɛ kɔnyɔã fɔkpa otsole kĩ yalɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ batɛ badonɛ katsɛnakɔ̃ a.
36Mi sɛkɛ̃ Baguma kalɛ a nɛ kito mbɔɛɛ? Mbɔɛɛ kĩ mi odi bɛkɔa ke bɛma? 37Ntɛ mi kamɛ odi kɔna kĩ ɛnyɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ, ĩye edeĩ hũhũ kamɛ futetsa ni, enyi kĩ lɛtsa a kĩ ntsɛlɛ mamɛna mi a nyɛ boe Ɔlate mbla kĩ ɛkpa. 38Lɛmɛ ntɛ odi tátse fukĩĩ ni, mi malo mitatse ye kalɛ.
39Foesũ nwaɛ̃ amɛ, fɔnya mi kawɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ mianyɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃, lɛmɛ mitasua bikĩ balɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ tide ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ kamɛ a osi. 40Kɛnɛ kĩ miakɛna lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa nɛ de osi akũ mɔ obu kamɛ.

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 15
Content:
Mite Anɛ Nɛ Fɔtsa a Kĩ Bɔtɛ Budo a Akũ.
1Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, nwɛ kĩ mate mi anɛ nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a kĩ nde lɛtsa nkpa mi a akũ. Mitɛ ɔlɛdo a mido ade mi katɛkado dzɛ̃ nɛ foe akũ pintii a. 2Ade fɔlɛtsa wĩ a kĩ nde foe akũ lɛtsã nkpa mi a. Míana katɛ ntɛ mipi fɔlɛtsa wĩ kĩĩ midomɔ akũ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ, ntɛ nnɛ́ aye ni, kekɔ̃ katɛ mitɛ mido pupulidza.
3Fɔlɛtsa titiliwu a kĩ ntɛ a, ade foe nkɔa nkpa mi a. Ade foe nyɛ kĩ Kristo ku nɛ boe tɔkpa lɔlɔ, ndɛ ayekĩ bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ a. 4Bibila ye ade ke nɛ luwi lɛlalɛde akũ ni, Baguma dzɛla ye edzi nkpã ndɛ ayekĩ bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ a. 5Ɛnyɛ ye akũ ɛtsa Petro, mɔ fɔtɔ banyanɛ ewua-nviã a flee.
6Ke liti a, ɛnyɛ ye akũ ɛtsa bikĩ bitomɔ ye kĩ bɛbɛ̃ bati ɔha elo nɛ lɔkɔ mɔa kamɛ, ade be kamɛ badi pii dzi nkpã kɛyawo nviã kĩĩ lɛmɛ be pii tɛ̃ kuwa liti. 7Ɛyanyɛ ye akũ ɛtsa Yakobo, ade ke liti ɛnyɛ ye akũ ɛtsa fɔtɔ banyanɛ a flee a. 8Nɛ ke kawũna a, ɛnyɛ ye akũ ɛtsa yĩ malo, titɔ kĩ nkɛna ndɛ oti kĩ bɛtáma ye nɛ lɔkɔ wĩ kamɛ.
9Kitonɛkĩ yĩ nyɛ obisɛ̃ kɔlaa nɛ fɔtɔ banyanɛ a kamɛ, ade ntáfɛta nkpa kĩ bavɛ yĩ fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ malo, kitonɛkĩ ntomɔ Baguma asɔli bati a liti. 10Lɛmɛ nɛ kĩ Baguma mɔ yĩ kɔnya sũ ni, ɛkɛna yĩ oti a kĩ ye manɛ finyaakĩĩ. Ye kɔnyakamɔ kĩĩ tákɛna fɔtsa pupulidza. Nkɛna adzuma paa mba fɔtɔ banyanɛ bɛbã a, kĩ nnɛ́ yĩ mɔawɛ kɔbɛ̃ nkɔa nkɛna, mbom Baguma kɔnyakamɔ a libumɔ yĩ. 11Foesũ ntɛ fɔlɛtsa a to yĩ sɛkɛ̃ o-o, futo be sɛkɛ̃ o-o, ade foe akũ boe flee bɔade lɛtsã a. Fɔnyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ mi malo mitɛ mido.
Baguma Dzɛla Kristo Etomɛna Kanɔkpa.
12Finyaakĩĩ boe ɔlɛdo nyɛ kĩ Baguma dzɛla Kristo etomɛna kanɔkpa. Nde sũ mi kamɛ badi alɛ kĩ bɛláadzɛla banɔkpa bidzi nkpã? 13Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ banɔkpa láyidza ni, kekɔ̃ fɔatsa kĩ Kristo táyidza. 14Ntɛ Baguma ɛtadzɛla Kristo eto kanɔkpa ni, kekɔ̃ bɔlá lɛtsama kĩ bɔade lɛtsã nɛ de akũ, ade mi malo lɛtsama lɛláa kĩ miatɛ mido a. 15Lɛtsa a kĩ lɛbɛ̃ nyɛ kĩ fɔadã ndɛ bɔma fɔvã bɔate nɛ Baguma akũ, kitonɛkĩ bɔlɛ kĩ ɛdzɛla Kristo etomɛna kanɔkpa. Lɛmɛ ntɛ ɔnɔkɔali fɔanɛ kĩ banɔkpa lɛláayidza ni, kekɔ̃ Baguma tádzɛla Kristo. 16Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ Baguma ɛtadzɛla banɔkpa ni, ade aye a ɛtádzɛla Kristo lɛmɛ a. 17Ntɛ Baguma ɛtadzɛla Kristo ni, kekɔ̃ mi katɛkado nyɛ ɔwɛ kamɛ fɔtsa ade ke míabuki mina nɛ mi tɔkpa kamɛ a. 18Foe kayɔ lɛmɛ atsa kĩ bikĩ bɛtɛ Kristo bido fɔmɔ biku ni, bɛtána katɛ. 19Ntɛ boe anɛ teĩ nɛ Kristo akũ fɔkpa katinya kĩĩ odi kɔ̃ ni, kekɔ̃ boe akũ akɔ kɔnya paa kaba odi nyɛ odi nɛ katinya flee kamɛ.
20Lɛmɛ kalɛ ɔnɔkɔali a nyɛ kĩ Baguma dzɛla Kristo etomɛna kanɔkpa ade fɔnyɛ kasipi kĩ bikĩ biku a ni, yaadzɛla be malo. 21Kitonɛkĩ ndɛ ayekĩ wuda tsã oti akũ ɛya nɛ katinya kamɛ a, ade aye bati kayidza kato kanɔkpa lɛmɛ tsã oti akũ a. 22Ndɛ ayekĩ bati flee aaku nɛ kĩ bɛnɛ bito Adam kamɛ sũ a, ade ayea Baguma aadzɛla bati flee nɛ ayekĩ bɛkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo sũ a. 23Lɛmɛ Baguma aadzɛla odi nyɛ odi nɛ ye nhihiɛ a kĩ ɛkɛna eyi akũ. Kristo nyɛ oti ɔtɔnyade, ke liti lɔkɔ a kĩ yaabuki ɛya a, yaadzɛla bikĩ bɛnyɛ ye bade a. 24Ke liti a, katinya kawũna aaya. Kristo aanya hũhũ flee kɔbɛ̃, katinya kamɛ otumifɔ mɔ bikĩ bideĩ kɔbɛ̃ akũ, lɔkɔa ɛkɔa lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a edo nɛ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga awɛ. 25Kɛnɛ kĩ Kristo ɛnya lɛgã kɛnawo kĩ Baguma nya bakesĩnɛ flee akũ, ɛkɔa ye abɔa ete nɛ be akũ.
26Okesĩnɛ nkaɛ kĩ Baguma aanya ye akũ nyɛ wuda.
27Kitonɛkĩ bɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ kĩ, “Baguma fɔ̃ ɛkɔa ye abɔa ete nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa akũ.” Fɔwaa yedede kĩ ntɛ bɛlɛ kĩ “lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa” a, fɔátsa kĩ Baguma awɛ a kĩ ɛfɔ̃ Kristo kɔa abɔa ete nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa akũ a tsɛka nɛ foe kamɛ. 28Lɛmɛ ntɛ bɛkɔa lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa bido nɛ Kristo lɛgãkanya kayɔ ni, ye mɔawɛ kĩ ɛnyɛ Obi a, aakɔa ye akũ edo nɛ Baguma a kĩ ɛkɔa lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa edo nɛ ye kayɔ a kayɔ. Baguma aanya lɛgã nɛ fɔtsa flee akũ.
29Finyaakĩĩ, nde nyɛ bikĩ bɛkɛna be mui kawɔla amaniɛ nɛ bikĩ biku lɔlɔ a? Litsa nyɛ likĩ baamɔ nɛ foe kamɛ? Ntɛ ɔnɔkɔali fɔanɛ ndɛ ayekĩ badi alɛ kĩ Baguma lɛláadzɛla bati bidzi nkpã a, nde sũ bɛfɔ̃ bɛkɛna boe be mui kawɔla amaniɛ? 30Nde sũ boe fɔtɔ banyanɛ a malo budeĩ nɛ nkpã mɔ wuda kayite lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ? 31Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ndeĩ nɛ wuda awɛ kamɛ luwi daa. Mapia nɛ mi akũ nɛ kĩ bɔkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo sũ. Ade foe lɛfɔ̃ manyɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kanya a. 32Ntɛ fɔnyɛ otidziwa kakɔna onukpɛ̃ sũ mɔ nvũ lɛma mɔ bayaɛ kpa kĩ bɛla ndɛ bati aye nɛ Efeso nɛ awĩ ni, litsa nfasɔ nna? Lɛmɛ ntɛ bɛláadzɛla banɔkpa bidzi nkpã ni, kekɔ̃ fuketi mɔ kalɛ a kĩ balɛ kĩ,
“Mifɔ̃ bɔnya bɔmɔa,
kitonɛkĩ kunya bɔ́aku.”
33Mitafɔ̃ bɛkɛ mi. “Tɔkɔbato abula oti kĩ edeĩ ɔbla wĩ kade.” 34Milɔla adzuni wĩ kabɔɛ, lɔkɔa mifɔ̃ tɔkpa kakɛna. Mabi mi kĩ kɔnyɔã fɔanɛ fɔkpa mi kĩ mi kamɛ badi linyína Baguma.
Paulo Lɛ Kɔdzɛla Nɛ Banɔkpa Kabuki Kayidza Akũ.
35Odi aavia kĩ, “Nde banɔkpa aapuli biyidza bidzi nkpã? Sukɛna sɔwɔdabe odu baana?” 36Odzimbifɔ anɛ! Ntɛ odu kutse libi, libi a lɛláamɛ ntɛ lɛtávɔ̃ nɛ tite kamɛ. 37Lɛtsa kĩ odu a nyɛ kutse libi pupulidza, ndɛ ligbanɔbi ĩye fudutsa bɛbã. Fɔnyɛ́ kutse munumunu kĩ ɔbɔɛ odu fɔanɛ. 38Baguma kpa kutse libi a na sukɛna a kĩ yawɛ, ade ɛkpa libi nyɛ libi de sukɛna a.
39Fɔtsa kĩ fudzi nkpã flee lɛlá sukɛna mɔa odu, batidziwa deĩ be sukɛna odu, bayaɛ deĩ be side, kɔvɔlabi deĩ be side, ade kɔfɔabi lɛmɛ deĩ be side a.
40Ode kamɛ fɔtsa deĩ be sukɛna, fɔmɔ tite akũ fɔtsa lɛmɛ deĩ be sukɛna. Ayekĩ ode kamɛ bati alɛ kadã a vɛmɛna nɛ ayekĩ tite akũ bati alɛ kadã a akũ. 41Suwa deĩ se kakpalɛ, odetɔ deĩ ye kakpalɛ. Fusibii lɛmɛ deĩ foe kakpalɛ lite lɛmɛ nɛ foe kamɛ malo fudeĩ foe kakpalɛ futefute.
42Ade limii fɔ́ana ntɛ Baguma aadzɛla banɔkpa bidzi nkpã a. Ntɛ bibila ɔnɔkpa ni, sukɛna a aavɔ̃, lɛmɛ ntɛ bɛdzɛla ye ni ɛláabuki eku. 43Ntɛ bibila sukɛna a ni, saálɛ kadã ade sɛlá ɔsĩ a. Lɛmɛ ntɛ bɛdzɛla ye ni, yaalɛ kadã, ɛna kɔbɛ̃ lɛmɛ.
44Ntɛ bibila ɔnɔkpa ni, ɛnyɛ sukɛna pupulidza, lɛmɛ ntɛ bɛdzɛla ye ni, yaana hũhũ kamɛ sukɛna. Fɔwaa pefee kĩ oti sukɛna deĩ ade hũhũ kamɛ sukɛna lɛmɛ deĩ a. 45Kitonɛkĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Baguma bɔa oti ɔtɔnyade a kĩ ɛnyɛ Adam ndɛ otidziwa aye.” Lɛmɛ Adam nkaɛ a nyɛ Hũhũ kĩ yakpa nkpã. 46Nnɛ́ hũhũ a lɛnya lɔtɔ ɛya, mbom otidziwa a ya fɔmɔ hũhũ a lɛmɛ yaya. 47Baguma bɔa Adam ɔtɔnyade a etomɛna tite kamɛ, lɛmɛ Adam ɔyade a kɔ̃ to ode. 48Bati a kĩ bɛnyɛ katinya kamɛ bade a la ndɛ oti a kĩ bɛbɔa ye bitomɛna tite kamɛ a. Bikĩ bɛnyɛ ode bade lɛmɛ la ndɛ okĩ eto ode a aye. 49Ndɛ ayekĩ budeĩ nɛ ekĩ bɛbɔa bitomɛna tite kamɛ kutitse odu kamɛ a, ade aye bɔ́ana nɛ Otidziwa a kĩ eto ode kutitse a kamɛ a.
50Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, lɛtsa kĩ matsa nyɛ kĩ lɛtsa kĩ lideĩ sukɛna mɔ babɔanɛ ni, lɛláapuli lɛna kanyakɔ̃ nɛ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kamɛ. Lɛtsa a kĩ laaku ni, lɛláapuli lɛna nɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔláawɔ a kamɛ.
51-52Mitse ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ kĩĩ kĩ bɛkɔa bɛkɔla boe. Nnɛ́ boe flee aaku, lɛmɛ ntɛ bɛvɔ̃ kagbulɛɛ nkaɛ a ni, boe flee bɔ́adani deedimɔapɛ. Fɔ́aya nɛ sinepo kabɔa mɔa kamɛ. Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ bɛvɔ̃ kagbulɛɛ a pɛ, Baguma aadzɛla banɔkpa flee lɔkɔa bɛláabuki biku dadaada, yaadani be bɛkɛna bati vɔɛ̃. 53Kitonɛkĩ lɛtsa kĩ laabu kade ni, kɛnɛ kĩ lɛdani lɛkɛna lɛtsa kĩ lɛláabu kade, ade lɛtsa a kĩ laaku ni, kɛnɛ kĩ lɛdani lɛkɛna lɛtsa kĩ lɛláaku. 54Foesũ ntɛ fɔya kĩ lɛtsa a kĩ laapuli libu kade dani lɛkɛna lɛtsa a kĩ lɛláabu kade ni, lɔkɔa fɔlɛtsa nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ aaya nɛ foe kamɛ kĩ, “Bɛwɔla wuda, bɛnya ye akũ.”
55“Wuda, nde nɔ anunyam a kĩ odeĩ a?
Nde nɔ kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ ɔnɛɛ apila boe a?”
56Wuda tɛ ye kɔbɛ̃ kĩ ɛnɛɛ yapila boe a etomɛna titikpa kakɛna kamɛ, ade titikpa kakɛna lɛmɛ tɛ te kɔbɛ̃ titomɛna mbla a kamɛ a. 57Lɛmɛ bɔanyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ kĩ ɛkpa boe anunyam ɛtsãmɛna boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo akũ.
58Foesũ, nwaɛ̃ amɛ kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ, midza pintii, mitakpã nɛ mi adzuma kakɛna kamɛ. Midanɛ boe Ɔlate adzuma kakɛna, kitonɛkĩ minyina kĩ adzuma adi nyɛ adi kĩ mikɛna lɛnyɛ́ adzuma pupulidza ɛkpa boe Ɔlate.

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 16
Content:
Batɛ Badonɛ a Kɛna Sɛmɛ Kalɛ Bɛkpa Baguma Bati Bɛbã.
1Finyaakĩĩ, nɛ sika a kĩ miawɛ kĩ miate mikɔa mibumɛna Baguma bati nɛ Yudea a akũ ni, mikɛna ndɛ ayekĩ mbi Galatiafɔ batɛ badonɛ kutsu a kĩ bɛkɛna a. 2Ɛkwansieda nyɛ́ Ɛkwansieda ni, mi kamɛ odi nyɛ odi ɛmanɛ sika nɛ ye kɔtɔkase onukpɛ̃ eyi, lɔkɔa ntɛ ĩya ni, fɔláasĩ kĩ miate tɔgɔlɛ. 3Ntɛ ĩya ni, maakpa bati a kĩ mite awɛ nɛ be akũ a tuvoli, lɔkɔa bɛkɔa mi futetsa bɛnamɛna Yerusalem. 4Ntɛ fɔ́asĩ kĩ yĩ malo nnaa ni, bɔmɔ be bɔ́atsã kɔbɔa mɔa.
5Maatsã Makedonia kamɛ fɔmɔ maaya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃, kitonɛkĩ nke otse kĩ maatsã awã lɛmɛ. 6Ɔsa maana nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ sukuloo nɛ osili lɔkɔ flee a, lɔkɔa ntɛ madzakũ ni, míapuli mibumɔ yĩ nɛ yĩ osi akũ kanaa kamɛ nɛ kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ. 7Ntáwɛ kĩ yĩ kasɛla a fɔdã lukũ lɔkɔa ntɛ̃ nnaa lɔtɔ. Nwɛ kĩ mana nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ lɔkɔ gɛlɛɛlɛ ntɛ boe Ɔlate kpa osi.
8Maadzi nɛ Efeso nɛ awĩ kɛnaawo Pentekoste luwi a akũ, 9kitonɛkĩ osi waa paa ɛkpa adzuma sĩwa baũ kakɛna nɛ awĩ, titɔ kĩ bati pii yidza bɛdza nɛ yĩ akũ malo.
10Ntɛ Timoteo ya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ ni, mitɛ ye atuu kitonɛkĩ yakɛna boe Ɔlate adzuma ndɛ yĩ aye. 11Odima ɛtadã ye ndɛ oti kĩ ɛla kadzakɔ̃ kadima, lɛmɛ mikpa ye kabumɛna lɔkɔa ɛnaa ye osi akũ nɛ lukudɔ kamɛ, emuniki ɛya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃, kitonɛkĩ madã anɛ kĩ bɛmɔ boe bawaɛ̃ a aamuniki bɛya.
12Finyaakĩĩ, kalɛ nɛ boe ɔwaɛ̃ Apolo akũ nyɛ kĩ, lɔkɔ pii mado ye kɔbɛ̃ kĩ bɛmɔ bawaɛ̃ bɛbã a bɛyaasɛla mi, lɛmɛ fɔnyɛ́ ye kawɛ kɔlaa kĩ yaya nɛ awã lɔkɔ kĩĩ kamɛ. Ntɛ ɛna osi ni, yaaya ke liti.
Paulo Kɔdɛ Nkaɛ Mɔ Kawɔ̃na.
13Mina nɛ kukũmanɛ kamɛ, midza pintii nɛ mi katɛkado kamɛ. Mido ɔwɔlɛ, mido akũ kɔbɛ̃ lɛmɛ. 14Mikɛna mi tudzuma flee nɛ ɔdɔ kamɛ.
15Minyina kĩ Stefana mɔ ye tɔtɔ kamɛ bati a nyɛ bati batɔnyade kĩ bɛdani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ nɛ Akaia, kĩ bɛkɔa be akũ bɛkpa Baguma adzuma kakɛna. Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, make mi aduli kĩ, 16mitomɔ lɔtɔ banyanɛ kĩĩ odu ɔbla liti mɔ bati bɛbã kĩ bakɛna adzuma kabumɔ boe.
17Kawɔlɛ deĩ yĩ kĩ Stefana, Fortunato mɔ Akaiko ya bideĩ nɛ awĩ nɛ mi kadokɔ̃. 18Bido yĩ kɔbɛ̃ ndɛ ayekĩ bido mi kɔbɛ̃ a. Kɛnɛ kĩ buyi bati kĩĩ odu ɔsũ.
19Batɛ badonɛ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Asia kamɛkamɛ a awɔ̃na mi. Akwila mɔ Priskila mɔ asɔli bati a kĩ batsɛna nɛ be tɔtɔ kamɛ a awɔ̃na mi nɛ boe Ɔlate dĩ akũ. 20Nwaɛ̃ amɛ flee a kĩ bideĩ nɛ awĩ bo nwɔ̃na mi nkpa be tsoo!
Mitu miboomu akũ nɛ tɔwaɛ̃ kamɛ. 21Yĩ Paulo mɔawɛ lɛkɔa awɛ ntsɛlɛ kawɔ̃na kĩĩ. 22Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaáwɛ boe Ɔlate kalɛ ni, ɛkɔa nɛ ke a! O boe Ɔlate, ya!
23Boe Ɔlate Yesu kɔnyakamɔ kitomɔ mi. 24Yĩ ɔdɔ ɛnamɔ mi flee nɛ Kristo Yesu dĩ akũ. Fɔya lɔmɔ.

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 1
Content:
1Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ, Paulo, kĩ Baguma pau ndɛ Kristo Yesu fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ nɛ ye kawɛ onukpɛ̃, mɔ boe ɔwaɛ̃ Timoteo sɛkɛ̃. Bɔtsɛlɛ ovoli a bɔama Baguma asɔli a kĩ edeĩ nɛ Korinto mɔ Baguma bade a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Akaia tite flee a akũ.
2Bɔawã kĩ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo, bɛmɔ mi kɔnya bɛkpa mi lukudɔ.
Paulo Nyɛ Baguma Kɔlɛ.
3Mifɔ̃ bɔnyɛ Baguma kĩ ɛnyɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo Ɔlɛga, kĩ yamɔ bati kɔnya, kĩ ye sɛkɛ̃ kabumɛna flee lɛmɛ ato a, kɔlɛ. 4Yado boe ɔwɔlɛ nɛ boe ɔhau flee kamɛ, ayekĩ bɔ́apuli bɔdɔla bikĩ bideĩ nɛ ɔhau adi nyɛ adi kamɛ a tɔwɔlɛ, mɔ kabumna a kĩ boe mɔawɛ bɔtɛ butomɛna Baguma sɛkɛ̃ a. 5Ndɛ ayekĩ bɔamɔ lubo beblebee odu a kĩ Kristo mɔ́ a, ade aye fɔtsɛ̃ Kristo akũ bɔana tsɛfã katomɛna Baguma kabumɛna baũ a kamɛ a. 6Ntɛ bɔamɔ lubo ni, fɔnyɛ kabumɛna mɔ nkpã katɛ fɔkpa mi. Ntɛ Baguma bumɔ boe ni, ebumɔ mɔ mi malo, ɛkpa mi kɔbɛ̃ kĩ míapuli mina ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ mimɔ́ lubo odu a kĩ de bɔamɔ a. 7Foesũ boe kɔnɛte nɛ mi akũ dzɛ̃ kpli. Kitonɛkĩ bunyina kĩ ayekĩ miamɔ lubo ndɛ boe ayea, ade aye mi malo miana kabumɛna a kĩ bɔana a.
8Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, bɔawɛ kĩ minyi ɔhau a kĩ bɔna nɛ Asia kamɛkamɛ a. Fɔlɔtsa a kĩ bite nɛ boe akũ pɔnɛ paa, fɔna ɔlɔmɛ fɔba boe kalɔ kĩ bɔtákɔna kĩ bɔ́abuki budzi nkpã. 9Bɔmɔ́ nɛ boe kamɛ kĩ bɛkɔ boe kɔtɔ bɛkpa wuda. Lɛmɛ fukĩĩ ya nɛ boe akũ ayekĩ bɔláakɔa anɛ bute nɛ boe mɔawɛ akũ, mbom nɛ Baguma kĩ yadzɛla banɔkpa a akũ. 10Ɛnyɛ boe etomɛna wuda tisi kĩ tideĩ libe kamɛ, ade yaabuki ɛnyɛ boe a.
