Bɔkɔa anɛ bute nɛ ye akũ kĩ yaabuki ɛnyɛ boe, 11ndɛ ayekĩ miabumɛna boe nɛ mi mpaɛbɔ kabɔa kakpa boe kamɛ a. Foesũ fɔ́aya kĩ Baguma aatse mi mpaɛbɔ pii a kĩ mibɔa mikpa boe a, lɔkɔa ehila boe, ade bati pii aakɔa osee bɛnyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ nɛ boe lɔlɔ a.
Paulo Lɛ Lɛtsa a Kĩ De Sũ Ɛdani Ye Nhihiɛ.
12Lɛtsa mɔa kĩ de akũ bɔapia nyɛ kĩ boe tɔwɔlɛ abi boe kĩ budzi kadzi wĩ nɛ katinya kamɛ, titiliwu nɛ bɔmɔ mi kadzi kamɛ. Bɔkɛna foe nnɛ́ nɛ batidziwa kadikanyi kamɛ, mbom Baguma kɔnyakamɔ kɔbɛ̃ kamɛ futo. 13-14Bɔtsɛlɛ lɛtsa a kĩ de míapuli mikã minu foe kayɔ a odi bɔma mi. Lɛmɛ titɔ kĩ finyaa mianu boe kayɔ sɛkɛ mɔ sɛkɛ malo ni, yĩ anɛ teĩ kĩ míayanu boe kayɔ yededeede, ayekĩ nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Luwi a akũ ni, míata akũ nɛ boe akũ ndɛ ayekĩ boe malo bɔ́akɔa mi bupia a.
15Ĩnyina fɔtsa kĩĩ flee yededeede, ade foesũ nkɛna nhihiɛ kĩ maanya lɔtɔ ĩyaasɛla mi kufɛ, ayekĩ míana kasɛla titi nviã kamɛ nfasɔ. 16Kitonɛkĩ nkɛna nhihiɛ kĩ maayasɛla mi ntɛ manaa Makedonia, ade ntɛ mmuniki maya lɛmɛ maatsã awã, lɔkɔa maatɛ osi katsã kabumɛna ntomɛna mi sɛkɛ̃ nnaa Yudea. 17Kĩ nkakɛna nhihiɛ kĩĩ a, ntáke otse paa nɛ foe akũ mbɔɛɛ? Mbɔɛɛ kĩ nkɛna nhihiɛ a ni, nkɛna ye nɛ batidziwa kawɛ onukpɛ̃ kĩ maapuli nlɛ “Oo” mɔ “Oowo” nɛ lɔkɔ mɔa kamɛ?
18Nɛ ayekĩ Baguma akɛna nɛ ye kalɛ akũ sũ ni, yĩ lɛtsa a kĩ nlɛ ĩyi nkpa mi a lɛnyɛ́ “Oo” mɔ “Oowo” fɔlɛtsa. 19Kitonɛkĩ Yesu Kristo, Baguma Obi, kĩ ye akũ fɔlɛtsa Sila, Timoteo mɔ yĩ bude lɛtsã a lɛnyɛ́ oti kĩ yalɛ “Oo” mɔ “Oowo” oti, mbom ye nyɛ Baguma a kĩ yalɛ “Oo” lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ. 20Kitonɛkĩ ade ye nyɛ oti kĩ ɛnyɛ Baguma kĩ yalɛ “Oo” kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ ɛkpa ye fɔlɛtsa flee a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi a. Ade foesũ bɔamu Baguma katsãmɛna Yesu Kristo akũ kalɛ kĩ, “Fɔya lɔmɔ” a. 21Baguma mɔawɛ lɛkɛna kĩ bɔmɔ mi nkpã esipi nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna nɛ Kristo kamɛ. Ade Baguma a mɔawɛ lɛpau boe eyi lite, 22eyi boe ɔsũ kĩ ye la boe, ade ɛkɔa Hũhũ Kpalɛwa edo nɛ boe kamɛ ndɛ kasipi nɛ fɔtsa flee a kĩ yaakpa boe a akũ a.
23Baguma nyɛ yĩ ɔdansini, kitonɛkĩ enyina yĩ ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ. Fɔnɛnɛ kĩ mmɔ mi kɔnya, ade foesũ ntábuki ĩya nɛ Korinto a. 24Bɔtáwɛ kĩ bɔahɛ mi nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ mitɛ mido a akũ, kitonɛkĩ bunyina kĩ midzɛ̃ pintii nɛ mi katɛkado kamɛ. Mbom bɔakɛna adzuma mɔ mi ayekĩ míamɔ kawɔlɛ.

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 2
Content:
1Nɛ foesũ nkɛna adzuni kĩ nláaya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ ayekĩ míawo ɔblɔ. 2Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ nfɔ̃ miwo ɔblɔ ni, bawei deĩ kĩ baado yĩ kawɔlɛ? Ade mi mɔapɛ a kĩ nfɔ̃ miwo ɔblɔ a. 3Ade foesũ ntsɛlɛ ovoli a na mma mi a. Ntáwɛ kĩ maya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ lɔkɔa mi a kĩ kɛfɛta kĩ mido yĩ kawɔlɛ a miyaafɔ̃ nwo ɔblɔ. Ĩnyina yededeede kĩ ntɛ kawɔlɛ ade yĩ ni, mi malo kawɔlɛ ade mi. 4Ntsɛlɛ ovoli a nɛ ɔhau, ɔwɔlɛ kabubuli mɔ babe pii kamɛ. Nnɛ́ yĩ kawɛ nyɛ kĩ mado mi kɔnyɔã, mbom mawɛ kĩ mimɔ miyi ɔsũ ayekĩ mawɛ mi a flee kalɛ.
Paulo Kɔa Tɔkpa Ɔkɛnanɛ a Tɔkpa Ete Ye.
5Lɛmɛ ntɛ oti odi fɔ̃ odi wo ɔblɔ ni, nnɛ́ yĩ odi ɛfɔ̃ nwo ɔblɔ, mbom ntɛ nláasɛsɛ foe ni, mi badi kɔ̃ miwo ɔblɔ. Ntáwɛ kĩ mana ɔsĩ beblebee nɛ ye akũ. 6Sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ a kĩ mi bati pii mikpa ye a kpɔla. 7Finyaakĩĩ ni, mikɔa tɔkpa a mite ye, mido ye kɔbɛ̃ ayekĩ ɛláatɛnɛ ɔblɔ kawo beblebee, ɛyaatɔ flefle. 8Nɛ foesũ make mi aduli kĩ mifɔ̃ ɛmɔ kĩ miawɛ ye kalɛ paa. 9Ntsɛlɛ ovoli a na mma mi, kitonɛkĩ nwɛ kĩ manyi ayekĩ midzɛ̃ pintii nɛ mi sɔhuiɛ kamɛ, mɔ ayekĩ miakɛna nɛ yĩ fɔtsa katsa a akũ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ. 10Ntɛ mikɔa odi tɔkpa mite ye ni, yĩ malo nkɔa nte ye. Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ nkɔa oti tɔkpa nte, mɔ fusĩ malo kĩ nkɔa litsedi nte kɔ̃ ni, makɛna foe nɛ Kristo anɛ kamɛ nɛ mi sũ. 11Nkɛna foe ayekĩ Abonsam lɛláakɔa tɛdake ɛnya mi akũ, kitonɛkĩ bunyina ye tisi a flee.
Paulo Wɛ Kĩ Yanu Kalɛ Etomɛna Tito Sɛkɛ̃.
12Kĩ ĩyaade lɛtsã nɛ Kristo Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ nɛ Troa a, mmɔ́ kĩ boe Ɔlate binya osi ɛkpa ye adzuma kakɛna nɛ awã. 13Lɛmɛ fɔha yĩ paa, kitonɛkĩ ntámɔ boe ɔwaɛ̃ Tito nɛ awã. Foesũ nkla bati a ntɛ̃ nnaa Makedonia.
Kristo Fɔ̃ Bɔnya Akũ.
14Lɛmɛ bɔanyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ! Kitonɛkĩ nɛ boe ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo kamɛ ni, Baguma akpã boe ndɛ bati kĩ bipili be ndom aye nɛ Kristo akũ kanya kɔdza kamɛ. Baguma tsã boe akũ ɛfɔ̃ Kristo akũ fɔlɛtsa gba nɛ kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ ndɛ ayekĩ kugua mɔ ɔlɛ̃ abɔa kanaa mɔ lugo. 15Kalá bɔla ndɛ fɔtsa mɔ ɔlɛ̃ kĩ Kristo kɔa ɛbɔa afɔliɛ ɛkpa Baguma, ade bɔgba buko nɛ bikĩ bɛlamɛna nkpã katɛ kana, mɔ bikĩ baawɔ a kamɛ a. 16Bɔla ndɛ nfiã kpitii kĩ yakɔ bati a kĩ baawɔ, lɛmɛ bɔla ndɛ ɔlɛ̃ klɔũklɔũ kakpa bikĩ baana nkpã katɛ a. Owei aapuli ɛkɛna adzuma kpale kĩĩ odu? 17Boe kɔ̃ bɔlá ndɛ bati bɛbã pii kĩ bɛnɛɛ Baguma kalɛ a ndɛ kɔyaatɔ fɔtsa kĩ fɔlá kɔya mɔ kanɔ aye. Lɛmɛ nɛ ayekĩ Baguma do boe sũ ni, bɔalɛ kalɛ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ye anɛ kamɛ, ndɛ Kristo basumunɛ aye.

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 3
Content:
Bɔnyɛ Apam Vɔɛ̃ a Basumunɛ.
1Katsa fɔatsa kĩ bubuki bɔapia boe akũ mbɔɛɛ? Kanɛ kɛnɛ kĩ bɔkpa mi boe akũ adansiɛ tuvoli, mbɔɛɛ kĩ bɔtɛ te butomɛna mi sɛkɛ̃ ndɛ ayekĩ bati badi akɛna a? 2Ade mi mɔawɛ a nyɛ tuvoli kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ boe tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ, kĩ odi nyɛ odi aapuli enyi ɛkã lɛmɛ. 3Foe kamɛ kpalɛ kĩ Kristo mɔawɛ lɛtsɛlɛ ovoli kĩĩ ɛkpa boe bɔkɔa bɔma mi. Bɛtákɔa ovoli katsɛlɛ mui bɛtsɛlɛ ye, mbom bɛkɔa Baguma kĩ edeĩ nkpã a Hũhũ bɛtsɛlɛ foe. Bɛtátsɛlɛ ovoli a nɛ sileti akũ, mbom bɛtsɛlɛ ye nɛ batidziwa du akũ.
Baguma Kpa Boe Nkpã Nɛ Apam Vɔɛ̃ a Kamɛ.
4Bɔalɛ fukĩĩ kitonɛkĩ nɛ Kristo sũ, budeĩ kadzakɔ̃ nɛ Baguma anɛ. 5Lɛtsama lɛláa boe kamɛ kĩ laafɔ̃ bɔlɛ kĩ bɔ́apuli bɔkɛna adzuma kĩĩ. Kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ budeĩ to Baguma sɛkɛ̃. 6Ade ye lɛfɔ̃ kĩ bupuli bɔnya apam vɔɛ̃ basumunɛ, kĩ ɛnyɛ́ mbla a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ biyi a, mbom bɔasum ekĩ Hũhũ kamɛ edeĩ a. Mbla a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ a tsɛ̃mɔ wuda lɛmɛ Hũhũ ade a kɔ̃ akpa nkpã.
7Lɔkɔ a kĩ Baguma kɔa mbla a kĩ ɛtsɛlɛ nɛ boe tratra akũ yakpa Mose a ni, Baguma nyɛ ye kukũkpalɛ ɛtsa. Mose anɛ kamɛ kata muamua mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ, mɔ kukũkpalɛ paa kĩ Israelfɔ tápuli bike anɛ nɛ ye akũ, titɔ kĩ kɔkadĩ malo. Ntɛ mbla a kĩ ɛtsɛ̃mɔ wuda a nɛ́ mɔ kukũkpalɛ mɔ ɔsĩ a ni, 8kekɔ̃ ntɛ bɛkɔa Hũhũ a bakpa a, kukũkpalɛ a aana ɔsĩ kɔba paa. 9Ntɛ osi a kĩ batsã ye akũ kana kɔtɔkaku ayamɔ kukũkpalɛ, kekɔ̃ osi a kĩ ɛtsɛ̃mɔ nkpã lɛláana kukũkpalɛ baũ ɛba! 10Bɔalɛ foe lɔmɔ kitonɛkĩ finyaa kukũkpalɛ a bɛ̃ kɔtɔnyade a, ade kukũkpalɛ a kĩ kɔna ɔsĩ kɔkɔɛ a yɛla a. 11Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ kukũkpalɛ na nɛ lɛtsa kĩ lɛtábuna owi akũ ni, kekɔ̃ lɛtsa a kĩ laawa daa a kukũkpalɛ aana ɔsĩ kɔba.
12Ayekĩ budeĩ kɔnɛte kĩĩ sũ ni, budeĩ ɔwɔlɛ kado paa. 13Boe kɔ̃ bɔlá ndɛ Mose kĩ ɛkɔa lima esua anɛ kĩ Israelfɔ bɛtamɔ ye anɛ kamɛ kata muamua kĩ fɔlamɛna kadĩ a. 14Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, be adzuni kamɛ tábinya kɛyawo nviã. Ntɛ bakã tuvoli kɔɛ a kamɛ fɔlɛtsa a malo ni, lima mɔapɛ a buki lasua be anɛ. Ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo kamɛ odi mɔ baanyɛ lima a na. 15Nɛ nviã fuwi kĩĩ kamɛ malo ni, ntɛ bɛkã Mose ovoli kamɛ fɔlɛtsa a, anɛ kasua fɔtsa a buki fɔasua be adzuni. 16Lɛmɛ ntɛ odi muniki ɛya nɛ Ɔlate a sɛkɛ̃ ni, baanyɛ limakũ a nɛ ye anɛ. 17Finyaakĩĩ ni, “Ɔlate a” nɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kamɛ nyɛ Hũhũ a, ade awã kĩ boe Ɔlate Hũhũ deĩ ni, kawɛya lɛmɛ deĩ nɛ awã. 18Foesũ bɛnyɛ limakũ a nɛ boe flee anɛ, ade bɔanyɛ boe Ɔlate kukũkpalɛ a katsa yededeede a. Ɛlamɛna boe kadani kanamɛna ye kutidu odu a kamɛ, ade boe kukũkpalɛ lɛmɛ ade nɛ ode kabu a.

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 4
Content:
Hũhũ Kamɛ Fɔtsa Kĩ Fɔtɛ Kɔya Nɛ Fubui Kamɛ.
1Ayekĩ Baguma mɔ́ boe kɔnya, ɛkɔa ɔsum adzuma kĩĩ edo nɛ boe awɛ sũ ni, akpɔ láveli boe. 2Bɔfɔnɛ fɔtsa bɛlawa mɔ fɔnyɔãtsa flee awɛ buyi nɛ ɔɔ́wɛ̃. Bɔákɛna lɛtsama nɛ kakɛ osi akũ, ade bɔádani Baguma fɔlɛtsa a kalɛ a. Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, budzi nkpã wĩ nɛ Baguma anɛ, ade bɔabɔa mbɔdi kĩ boe kadzi kamɛ kiwo odi nyɛ odi anɛ a. 3Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a kĩ bɔalɛ a nyɛ fɔtsa kɔlawa ni, fɔnyɛ fɔtsa kɔlawa fɔkpa bikĩ bɛtsɛ̃ nɛ kayɛla osi akũ a. 4Katinya kĩĩ kamɛ oti kpa a kɔ bati a kĩ bɛtátɛ bido a adzuni. Esua be anɛ kĩ bɛtamɔ Kalɛ Wĩ a ɔhaĩ a nɛ Kristo kukũkpalɛ akũ a, kĩ kɔla ndɛ Baguma kutidu pɛpɛɛpɛ a kĩ kɔako nɛ be akũ a. 5Kitonɛkĩ bɔáde lɛtsã nɛ boe mɔawɛ akũ, mbom bɔade lɛtsã nɛ Yesu Kristo boe Ɔlate akũ, ade boe kɔ̃ bɔnyɛ mi basumunɛ nɛ Yesu sũ a. 6Baguma a kĩ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Ɔhaĩ ɛvɔlɛ eto ɔtũ kamɛ” a, ade ye nyɛ Baguma mɔapɛ a kĩ ye ɔhaĩ a ko nɛ boe tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ, ɛkpa boe kadikanyi kĩ bɔmɔ Baguma kukũkpalɛ nɛ Yesu anɛ kamɛ a buyi ɔsũ.
7Lɛmɛ boe a kĩ boe kamɛ hũhũ fɔtsa mɔ kɔya kĩĩ deĩ a, bɔla ndɛ tibute fubui aye. Ɛkɛna fukĩĩ yatsa kĩ kɔbɛ̃ kpale fle a nyɛ ye Baguma kude, nnɛ́ boe kude kɔanɛ. 8Lɔkɔ pii bawɛ boe kado nɛ ɔhau kamɛ lɛmɛ baánya boe akũ, ade fɔkɔ fudi bakɛna boe adzuni basabasa lɛmɛ akpɔ láveli boe da. 9Bakesĩnɛ pii deĩ nɛ boe akũ, lɛmɛ budeĩ ɔkɔba odi kĩ yaálo kafɔnɛ boe, ade fɔkɔ fudi babɔa boe kamuni kapila boe lɛmɛ baákɔ boe. 10Lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ boe sukɛna amɔ lubo ndɛ Yesu wuda tsɛfã a aye, ayekĩ baamɔ ye nkpã kadzi a nɛ boe sukɛna kamɛ. 11Nɛ boe nkpã flee kadzi kamɛ ni, wuda ado boe libe daa nɛ Yesu sũ, ayekĩ baamɔ ye nkpã nɛ boe sukɛna kĩ saaku a kamɛ. 12Fukĩĩ atsa kĩ wuda lamɛna adzuma kakɛna nɛ boe kamɛ, ade nkpã lɛmɛ lamɛna adzuma nɛ mi kamɛ a.
13Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Nlɛ kɔdzɛla kitonɛkĩ ntɛ ndo.” Nɛ hũhũ mɔapɛ a katɛkado onukpɛ̃ ni, boe malo bɔalɛ kɔdzɛla kitonɛkĩ bɔtɛ budo. 14Bunyina kĩ Baguma a kĩ ɛdzɛla boe Ɔlate Yesu edzi nkpã a aadzɛla boe malo, lɔkɔa ɛkpã bɔmɔ mi lodo ɛnamɛna Yesu anɛ kamɛ. 15Bɔakɛna fukĩĩ bamɛ flee nɛ mi kalɛ sũ. Ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma sɛmɛkalɛ lamɛna bati pii sɛkɛ̃ kawo a, ade aye baakɔa kɔlɛkanyɛ mɔ mpaɛbɔ bɛkpa Baguma nɛ ye kukũkpalɛ kamɛ a.
Bɔ́ana Obu Mɔ Kawɔlɛ Baũ.
16Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ ni, akpɔ láveli boe dadaada. Titɔ kĩ boe sukɛna kĩĩ lamɛna kavɔ̃ malo ni, boe hũhũ a kɔ̃ ana nkpã vɔɛ̃ luwi daa. 17Lubokamɔ kabii lukũ kĩĩ aakpa boe kukũkpalɛ kĩ fɔláana kawũna da, ade fɔ́aba lubo a kĩ bɔamɔ a. 18Boe anɛ líteĩ nɛ fɔtsa a kĩ bɔamɔ a akũ, mbom futeĩ nɛ fukĩ bɔámɔ mɔ anɛ a akũ. Lɛtsa a kĩ bɔapuli kamɔ mɔ anɛ waa fɔkpa nɛ lɔkɔ lukũ kamɛ, lɛmɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bɔláapuli bɔmɔ́ mɔ anɛ a aana daa.

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 5
Content:
1Kitonɛkĩ bunyina kĩ ntɛ biveli boe tite akũ lɛpɛ kĩ budzi nɛ de kamɛ, kĩ de nyɛ boe sukɛna a, Baguma aakpa boe kɔla vɔɛ̃ kĩ ye mɔawɛ eke nɛ ode budzi nɛ koe kamɛ daa. 2Finyaa bɔawɛya kake, ade boe kawɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ nyɛ kĩ Baguma ɛkɔa boe ode tɔtɔ sukɛna a esua boe akũ. 3Ntɛ ɛkɔa se esua boe akũ ni, bɔláadzi ɔdzɔ. 4Kĩ budzi nɛ tite akũ lɛpɛ kĩĩ kamɛ sũ ni, bɔawɛya kake kĩ boe fɔlɔtsa tɛ́nɛ ɔlɔmɛ. Nnɛ́ kawɛ bɔawɛ kĩ bɛnyɛ tite akũ sukɛna kĩĩ nɛ boe akũ, mbom bɔawɛ kĩ Baguma ɛkɔa ode side a edo boe ayekĩ sukɛna a kĩ saaku a, aadani flefle sɛkɛna sikĩ saana nkpã. 5Baguma nyɛ oti a kĩ ɛmanɛ boe ɛkpa kadani kĩĩ, ade ɛkɔa ye Hũhũ ɛkpa boe ndɛ kasipi nɛ fɔtsa flee a kĩ ɛmanɛ eyi boe a akũ a.
6Foesũ bɔado boe akũ kɔbɛ̃ luwi daa. Bunyina kĩ ntɛ busila budzi nɛ tɔtɔ kĩ tɛnyɛ sukɛna tɔtɔ kamɛ kɔ̃ ni, bɔvɛlɛ akũ nɛ boe Ɔlate ɔwɛ̃. 7Kitonɛkĩ katɛkado bɔkɔa budzi nkpã, nnɛ́ lɛtsa a kĩ bɔamɔ mɔ anɛ a. 8Budeĩ ɔwɔlɛ, ade bɔawɛ mbom kĩ bɔanɛ nɛ boe sukɛna tɔtɔ kamɛ bɔnaadzi nɛ tɔtɔ kamɛ nɛ boe Ɔlate a sɛkɛ̃. 9Lɛmɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛbɛ̃ flee nyɛ kĩ, bɔawɛ kĩ bɔakɛna lɛtsa a kĩ laawo boe Ɔlate anɛ, ntɛ budzi nɛ boe tɔtɔ kamɛ nɛ awĩ ĩye bɔnaa ye sɛkɛ̃. 10Kitonɛkĩ boe flee bɔ́anadza nɛ Kristo anɛ kamɛ, ɛdzɛmɔ boe. Odi nyɛ odi aatɛ kɔtɔkase nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ ɛkɛna a onukpɛ̃, ntɛ fɔnyɛ tuwĩ ĩye tɔkpa a kĩ ɛkɛna nɛ ye katinya nkpã kadzi onukpɛ̃.
Bɔtsã Kristo Akũ Bɔkɛna Tɔkɔba Mɔ Baguma.
11Bunyina ayekĩ kɛnɛ kĩ buvila boe Ɔlate, foesũ bɔabɔa mbɔdi kado bati bɛbã kɔbɛ̃ kĩ bivila ye. Baguma kɔ̃ nyina ayekĩ bɔla yededeede, ade matɛ kado kĩ mi malo minyina yĩ nɛ mi tɔwɔlɛ fii kamɛ a. 12Bɔlámɛna boe akũ kabuki kamu katsa mi, mbom bɔawɛ kĩ bɔakpa mi osi minyi lɛtsa sũ kĩ mita akũ nɛ boe akũ. Bɔkɛna foe lɔmɔ ayekĩ míapuli mina mbuayɛ mikpa bikĩ badã oti kutitse kapia nɛ ye akũ, kĩ nnɛ́ ye ɔbla badã a. 13Ntɛ bati badi alɛ kĩ boe fɔlɔ kamɛ bu kade ni, Baguma sũ fubu kade. Lɛmɛ ntɛ boe fɔlɔ kamɛ waa yedede ni, mi kalɛ sũ fɔla lɔmɔ. 14Kristo ɔdɔ anya boe akũ, kitonɛkĩ finyaa bɔmɔ́ buyi ɔsũ kĩ oti mɔapɛ liku nɛ bati flee lɔlɔ, kĩ fɔatsa kĩ bati flee liku nɛ ye wuda a kamɛ. 15Eku nɛ bati flee lɔlɔ, ayekĩ bikĩ bidzi a lɛláabuki bidzi nkpã bɛkpa be akũ, mbom baadzi bɛkpa ye odi pɛ a kĩ eku, kĩ bɛdzɛla ye edzi nkpã nɛ be kalɛ sũ a.
16Foesũ kito finyaa kanaa ni, bɔláabuki bɔdzɛmɔ odima bɔkɔ ye kɔtɔ nɛ otidziwa kakɔna onukpɛ̃. Titɔ kĩ bɔdzɛmɔ Kristo tɔ̃ nɛ bati adzuni onukpɛ̃ malo ni, bubuki bɔákɛna foe. 17Ntɛ odi kɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo ni, ɛdani oti vɔɛ̃, oti kɔɛ a naa, ɔvɔɛ̃ lɛya. 18Baguma lɛkɛna fukĩĩ flee, ɛtsã Kristo akũ ɛdani boe, ye bakesĩnɛ a ɛkɛna bakɔba, ade ɛkpa boe adzuma kĩ boe malo bɔkɛna bati bɛbã ye bakɔba a. 19Boe fɔlɛtsa nyɛ kĩ Baguma tsɛ̃ Kristo akũ yalɔla bɛmɔ batidziwa flee kayite bɛdani ye bakɔba. Baguma tátɛ batidziwa tɔkpa eyi, mbom ɛkpa boe ɔlɛdo kĩ bude lɛtsã kĩ ɛlɔla bɛmɔ batidziwa flee kayite.
20Foesũ bido boe kĩ bɔlɛ kalɛ bɔkpa Kristo. Fɔkɛna ndɛ Baguma awɛ lamɛna bati kadɛ katsãmɛna boe akũ. Bɔake mi aduli nɛ Kristo dĩ akũ kĩ mifɔ̃ Baguma ɛdani mi ndɛ ye bakesĩnɛ a ɛkɛna ye bakɔba. 21Titɔ kĩ Kristo tákɛna tɔkpa tidima malo ni, Baguma fɔ̃ ɛlɔ boe tɔkpa ɛnamɛna ayekĩ ntɛ bɔkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ ye ni, boe malo bɔ́anya bati kpĩĩ nɛ Baguma anɛ.

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 6
Content:
1Foesũ kĩ bɔmɔ Baguma bɔakɛna adzuma sũ ni, bɔake mi aduli kĩ mitafɔ̃ kɔnya a kĩ Baguma mɔ́ mi a lɛkɛna fɔtsa pupulidza. 2Mitse lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma lɛ,
“Kĩ lɔkɔ wo ɔtɔ kĩ mmɔ mi kɔnya a, ntse mi,
kĩ luwi a wo ɔtɔ kĩ matɛ mi nkpã a, mbumɔ mi.”
Mitse! Ade finyaa kɛnɛ kĩ bɔatɛ Baguma kɔnyakamɔ a, nviã nyɛ luwi a kĩ ɛtɛ boe nkpã!
Paulo Lubokamɔ.
3Bɔáwɛ kĩ odima amɔ nfumusu nɛ boe adzuma akũ, foesũ bɔáwɛ kĩ bɔakɛna lɛtsa kpa lidima kĩ laasua odi osi. 4Mbom nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bɔakɛna kamɛ ni, bɔatsa kĩ Baguma basumunɛ bɔanɛ. Nɛ foesũ bɔado ɔwɔlɛ katɛ ɔhau, kamɔ lubo mɔ ohiã mɔ ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ. 5Bibo boe, bido boe nɛ kɔla, bido ɔtutũ nɛ boe kamɛ, bɛfɔ̃ bɔkɛna adzuma bɔtɛ̃ ɔbɛ̃, ade budzi tida katawa mɔ katanya malo a.
6Nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ ni, bɔbɔa mbɔdi kĩ bɔanya bati kpalɛwa nɛ Baguma anɛ. Bɔkɔa boe kadikanyi, ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ mɔ boe sɛmɛ kalɛ kakɛna bɔatsa kĩ Baguma basumunɛ bɔanɛ. Fukĩ fubu nyɛ kĩ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa mɔ ɔdɔ dzununuunu, 7boe ɔnɔkɔali ɔlɛdo a, mɔ Baguma kɔbɛ̃ abumɔ boe. Bɔnɛɛ kadzi kpĩĩ nɛ Baguma anɛ a ndɛ boe kawũkanɔ fɔtsa kĩ bɔkɔa bɔanɔ kawũ, ade bɔakɔa foe bɔapili boe lɔlɔ lɛmɛ a. 8Bakpa boe obu, badi asupa boe, badi avũna boe badi lɛmɛ amu boe. Badi adã boe ndɛ bavãlɛvã bɔanɛ, lɛmɛ bɔalɛ ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a. 9Bakɛna boe ndɛ bati kĩ binyína, lɛmɛ bati flee nyina boe. Babu boe ndɛ bati kĩ bɛlá nkpã lɛmɛ budeĩ nkpã. Titɔ kĩ bavɛlɛ boe sɔtɔ malo ni, bɛtákɔ boe, 10titɔ kĩ bido boe nɛ ɔbɔdɔ kamɛ malo ni, bɔamɔ kawɔlɛ luwi daa. Bɔadã ndɛ ahiãfɔ lɛmɛ bɔafɔ̃ bati pii akɛna asikafɔ. Bɔkɛna ndɛ bɔlá lɛtsama lɛmɛ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, ade boe deĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a.
11Nwaɛ̃ amɛ Korintofɔ, bubinya boe tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ mɔ ɔdɔ bɔkpa mi, ade bubi mi ɔnɔkɔali fɔlɛtsa a yededeede. 12Nnɛ́ boe lɛtányɛ boe ɔdɔ kanya, mbom mi lɔkɔa mi ɔdɔ mikɔla boe. 13Foesũ finyaa mabi mi tuwuli ndɛ yĩ babi aye. Minyɛ mi tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ fɔlɛtsa mitsa boe ndɛ ayekĩ boe malo bɔakɛna kakpa mi a.
Mitakɛna Ɔmɔa Mɔ Bikĩ Bɛtátɛ Bido a Nɛ Lɛtsama Kamɛ.
14Mitakɛna ɔmɔa mɔ bikĩ bɛtátɛ bido a. Tuwĩ kakɛna mɔ tɔkpa kakɛna aapuli tɛkpɔta tɛkɛna lɛtsa mɔa mbɔɛɛ? Nde ɔhaĩ mɔ ɔtũ aapuli bidzi bɛkpɔta? 15Nde Kristo mɔ Belial baviɔ̃ a aapuli bɛkɛna onukpɛ̃ mɔa? Litsa nyɛ lɛtsa mɔa kĩ lideĩ nɛ ɔtɛ odonɛ mɔ ekĩ ɛtátɛ edo kayite?
16Nde Baguma asɔli kɔla mɔ kuviɔ̃la aapuli bɛkɛna ɔmɔa? Kitonɛkĩ boe nyɛ Baguma kĩ edzi nkpã a asɔli fɔla! Baguma mɔawɛ lɛ kĩ, “Maake tɔtɔ nɛ yĩ bati sɛkɛ̃, lɔkɔa maadzi nɛ be kamɛ. Maanya be Baguma lɔkɔa bɛnya yĩ bati.” 17Foesũ boe Ɔlate a lɛ kĩ,
“Midzakũ nɛ be sɛkɛ̃,
minyɛ mi akũ nɛ be kamɛ.
Mitakɛna lɛtsa a kĩ de akũ tákpalɛ,
lɔkɔa maatɛ mi atuu.
18Maanya mi ɔlɛga
ade mi míanya yĩ babinyole mɔ babitsole a.
Ade aye boe Ɔlate Mɔ Kɔbɛ̃ Flee a lɛ a.”

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 7
Content:
1Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ayekĩ bɛkpa boe kɔnɛte nɛ fukĩĩ flee akũ sũ ni, mifɔ̃ bɔkpalɛ boe akũ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ lado sukɛna mɔ hũhũ efĩĩ a kamɛ. Mifɔ̃ boe kadzi kamɛ flee kɛdã yedede nɛ Baguma kavila kamɛ.
Paulo Mɔ́ Kawɔlɛ Nɛ Ayekĩ Korintofɔ Dani Tɔwɔlɛ Kamɛ Sũ.
2Minyɛ mi ɔdɔ mitsa boe. Bɔtáfum odima, bɔtábula odima kadzi kamɛ kade, ade bɔtásisi odima lɛmɛ a. 3Ntálɛ fukĩĩ kĩ makɔ mi kɔtɔ, kitonɛkĩ ndɛ ayekĩ nlɛ ĩnyamɛna lɔtɔ a, mitɛ kɔya mikpa boe paa kĩ ntɛ fɔnyɛ wuda malo ni, bɔmɔ mi aaku, ade ntɛ fɔnyɛ nkpã lɛmɛ ni, bɔmɔ mi aadzi nkpã. 4Ntɛ mi ndo paa ade mapia akũ nɛ mi akũ lɛmɛ a. Ɔwɔlɛ ka edzi yĩ. Nɛ boe lubo kamɔ flee kamɛ ni, mbuki ndeĩ ɔwɔlɛ paa, ade kawɔlɛ ade yĩ paa a.
5Kĩ bɔyawo Makedonia malo ni, bɔtána kawɛya kadima. Bɔmɔ́ lubo nɛ kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ, bati do boe tɛdzɛ ade libe na nɛ boe kamɛ a. 6Lɛmɛ Baguma kĩ yado bikĩ akpɔ veli be kɔbɛ̃ a, do boe ɔwɔlɛ nɛ Tito kaya kamɛ. 7Nnɛ́ Tito kaya a odi lido boe ɔwɔlɛ, mbom ye adansiɛ a kĩ edi nɛ mi akũ kĩ mido ye ɔwɔlɛ a lɛmɛ bu. Ebi boe ayekĩ miwɛ paa kĩ miamɔ yĩ, ayekĩ fuwo mi kalɔɛ nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya a akũ, mɔ ayekĩ mimanɛ akũ midzi kĩ míadza nɛ yĩ liti mipili yĩ lɔlɔ. Nɛ foesũ finyaa mamɔ kawɔlɛ kaba kɔkɔɛ a.
8Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ ovoli a kĩ ntsɛlɛ mma mi a fɔ̃ miwo ɔbɔdɔ malo ni, fɔtáwo yĩ kalɔɛ kĩ ntsɛlɛ ye. Fɔ́apuli fuwo yĩ kalɔɛ kitonɛkĩ mmɔ́ kĩ lɔkɔ lukũ odi kamɛ mɔ miwo ɔbɔdɔ. 9Lɛmɛ finyaa, kawɔlɛ ade yĩ, nnɛ́ kĩ ndo mi ɔbɔdɔ a sũ, mbom mi ɔbɔdɔ kawo a fɔ̃ midani mi kadzi kamɛ. Baguma kawɛ fɔanɛ kĩ miwo ɔbɔdɔ, foesũ lɛtsa a kĩ bɔkɛna a nyɛ nfasɔ mbom fɔkpa mi. 10Kitonɛkĩ ɔbɔdɔ kawo a kĩ fɔnyɛ Baguma kawɛ afɔ̃ oti adani ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ, ade fɔakpã ye kanamɛna daa nkpã a kamɛ a. Fukĩnaa láwo kalɔɛ! Lɛmɛ ntɛ oti wo ɔbɔdɔ nɛ katinya kamɛ kawɛ onukpɛ̃ kɔ̃ ni, wuda fɔavɛlɛ kayamɛna. 11Midã ayekĩ ɔbɔdɔ kĩĩ odu, kĩ Baguma awɛ a akɛna adzuma nɛ mi kamɛ! Fɔfɔ̃ miayili akũ kakɛna fɔtsa wĩ, ade fɔfɔ̃ miakpalɛ mi akũ a. Fɔfɔ̃ miana kalɔkpa nɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔtákpɔla akũ, fɔfɔ̃ miavila ade fɔfɔ̃ miadã anɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ a. Fɔfɔ̃ miana ovio nɛ fɔtsa kakɛna kamɛ, ade miawɛ kĩ bɛvɛlɛ oti a kĩ ɛkɛna tɔkpa a sɔtɔ a. Nɛ foe flee kamɛ ni, minyɛ mi akũ miatsa kĩ mitádi mfumsu nɛ fɔlɛtsa a kamɛ.
12Foesũ titɔ kĩ ntsɛlɛ ovoli a na malo ni, nnɛ́ oti a kĩ efum, ĩye ekĩ ye bifum a sũ ntsɛlɛ ye. Mbom ntsɛlɛ ye matsa ayekĩ miakɔa mi akũ flee kakpa boe a nɛ Baguma anɛ. 13Ade foesũ bɔkado ɔwɔlɛ a.
Nnɛ́ ɔwɔlɛ kado odi bɔna, kawɔlɛ de boe baũ nɛ kawɔlɛ a kĩ Tito mɔ́ nɛ mi akũ a sũ, kitonɛkĩ ebi boe ayekĩ mi flee mifɔ̃ ɔwɔlɛ ka edzi ye a. 14Nkɔa mi mpia ntsa ye, ade mitádo yĩ kɔnyɔã lɛmɛ a. Bubi mi ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a, ade ayea kapia a kĩ bupia bɔtsa Tito a lɛmɛ yanya ɔnɔkɔali a. 15Ye ɔdɔ nɛ mi akũ ade nɛ ode kabu, ntɛ ete anɛ nɛ ayekĩ mi flee miwɛ kĩ míakɛna nɛ ye fɔtsa katsa akũ, mɔ ayekĩ mitɛ ye atuu nɛ obu mɔ kukũtila kamɛ a. 16Kawɔlɛ ade yĩ, kitonɛkĩ maapuli nkɔa anɛ nte nɛ mi akũ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ.

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 8
Content:
Kristofɔ Te Fɔtsa Faa.
1Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, bɔawɛ kĩ minyi lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma tsãmɛna ye kɔnya kamɔ kamɛ ɛkɛna nɛ Makedonia tɛsɔli a kamɛ. 2Bɛsɔ be bɛdã nɛ lubo kamɔ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kamɛ, lɛmɛ fude be kawɔlɛ baũ, foesũ titɔ kĩ ahiãfɔ banɛ malo ni, bite fɔtsa mɔ kawɔlɛ. 3Maapuli nlɛ pipiipi kĩ bite fɔtsa ndɛ ayekĩ baapuli, malo kɔlaa ni, bite fɔba be kɔbɛ̃. Nɛ be mɔawɛ kawɛ onukpɛ̃ bite fɔtsa faa. 4Bike boe aduli mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ bɔkpa be osi be malo bibumɛna Baguma bade a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Yudea bakɛna adzuma a. 5Fukĩ bɛkɛna kĩĩ bɛ̃ lɛtsa a kĩ de akũ bute anɛ. Lɛtsa lɛtɔnyade nyɛ kĩ bɛkɔa be akũ bɛkpa boe Ɔlate, ade ke liti a, bɛkɔa be akũ bɛkpa boe nɛ Baguma kawɛ onukpɛ̃.
6Foesũ budo Tito, kĩ ye liyi adzuma kĩĩ kayɔ a kɔbɛ̃, kĩ ɛnaa lɔtɔ mɔ ye adzuma, lɔkɔa ebumɛna mi miwũna ɔdɔ adzuma titiliwu kĩĩ. 7Finyaa minyɛ bati kĩ bɛnyaa lɔtɔ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ. Mi katɛkado, mi kɔdzɛla kalɛ, mɔ mi kadikanyi awo anɛ. Miayili akũ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ ade miawɛ boe kalɛ a. Nɛ foesũ bɔawɛ kĩ minya lɔtɔ nɛ kɔnyakamɔ adzuma kĩĩ lɛmɛ kamɛ.
8Nnɛ́ mbla adima masui nkpa mi, mbom nɛ ayekĩ bati bɛbã lamɛna akũ kayili kĩ bakpa kabumɛna sũ ni, mawɛ ĩnyi ntɛ mi ɔdɔ a kĩ mideĩ a lɛmɛ kpɔla. 9Minyina boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo kɔnya kamɔ a kĩ edeĩ ɛkpa boe, ade titɔ kĩ ɛnyɛ osikani malo ni, ɛkɛna ye akũ ndɛ ohiãni nɛ mi kalɛ sũ, ayekĩ yaakɛna boe asikafɔ nɛ ye tihiã a kamɛ.
10Yĩ kakɔna nyɛ kĩ fɔnɛnɛ kĩ miwũna adzuma a kĩ miyi kayɔ katukɔɛ a. Mi nyɛ́ bati batɔnyade kĩ biyi kayɔ, ade minya batɔnyade malo kĩ bitunɔ kĩ baakpa a. 11Finyaa mikɛna adzuma a minamɛna lɔtɔ lɔkɔa miwũna ye! Miyili akũ miwũna ye ndɛ ayekĩ mikɔa miyi ye kayɔ a. Mikɔa futetsa a kĩ mideĩ a mikɛna adzuma a. 12Ntɛ futo odi ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ paa kĩ yaate fɔtsa ni, Baguma aatɛ fukĩ ɛna ɛkpa a, lɛmɛ nnɛ́ fukĩ ɛlá a.
13Nlámɛna bati bɛbã fɔlɔtsa akũ katinya kĩ makɔa ndo mi fude ɔlɔmɛ, 14lɛmɛ ayekĩ mideĩ fɔtsa pii nɛ lɔkɔ kĩĩ kamɛ sũ ni, fɔnɛnɛ kĩ miabumɔ bikĩ fusĩ be a. Ke liti ntɛ kɛyaasĩ mi, mɔ bideĩ fɔtsa pii ni, baabumɛna mi. Nɛ osi kĩĩ akũ ni, mi akũ kabumɛna a aaketi. 15Bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ kĩ, “Ekĩ ɛkpɔta fɔtsa beblebee tána fublusu, ade ekĩ ɛkpɔta kabii lɛmɛ tásĩ lɛtsama a.”
Bido Tito Mɔ Ye Bakɔba Nɛ Korinto.
16Bɔanyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ kĩ ɛfɔ̃ Tito bɔa mbɔdi yabumɔ mi ndɛ ayekĩ boe malo bɔawɛ kĩ bɔakpa mi kabumɛna. 17Kĩ bubi ye kĩ ɛya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ a, etunɔ mɔ kawɔlɛ. Lɛmɛ fɔnyɛ ye kawɛ kɔkɔɛ kĩ yaya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃. 18Budo bɛmɔ boe ɔwaɛ̃nyole, kĩ tɛsɔli bati a flee akpa obu paa nɛ ye Baguma fɔlɛtsa kalɛ kamɛ a kĩ etomɔ ye. 19Lɛtsa a kĩ libu nyɛ kĩ tɛsɔli a lɛnyɛ ye, bitunɔ lɛmɛ kĩ ɛtsã etomɔ boe bɔkɛna ɔdɔ adzuma a fudo boe Ɔlate obu, lɔkɔa fɔtsa lɛmɛ kĩ bɔwɛ kĩ bɔakpa bati bɛbã kabumɛna.
20Bɔadã kadã wĩ kĩ odima lɛláayavia boe kadi etomɛna ayekĩ bɔakɛna sɛmɛ kalɛ futetsa kĩĩ akũ adzuma. 21Boe botaɛ nyɛ kĩ bɔakɛna lɛtsa a kĩ lɛnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali, nnɛ́ nɛ boe Ɔlate odi anɛ, mbom mɔ batidziwa lɛmɛ anɛ.
22Foesũ budo boe ɔwaɛ̃ kĩ etomɔ be. Bɔsɔ ye bɔdã lɔkɔ pii ade bɔmɔ́ kĩ yabɔa mbɔdi nɛ fɔtsa pii kakɛna kamɛ a. Ade finyaa, kĩ ɛtɛ mi edo paa sũ ni, akũ asĩ ye paa kĩ yayaakpa mi kabumɛna. 23Tito kɔ̃ ni, ɛnyɛ yĩ ɔkɔba paa kĩ bɔakɛna adzuma bubumɔ mi. Boe bawaɛ̃nyole bɛbã a kĩ bitomɔ ye a kɔ̃ ni, ade be dzɛ̃ nɛ tɛsɔli a kadzakɔ̃ bɛkɔa kamu bakpa Kristo a. 24Minyɛ mi ɔdɔ mitsa be, ayekĩ tɛsɔli a flee aatɛ bido, binyi lɛmɛ kĩ boe kukũpia nɛ mi akũ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali.

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 9
Content:
Batɛ Badonɛ Bɛbã a Kabumɛna.
1Fɔtásĩ kɔlaa kĩ matsɛlɛ mi ovoli nɛ futetsa a kĩ miakɔa kama Baguma bade a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Yudea tite akũ a akũ. 2Ĩnyina kĩ miawɛ kĩ miakpa kabumɛna, foesũ nkɔa mi mpia ntsa bati a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Makedonia tite akũ a. Nlɛ kĩ, “Boe bawaɛ̃ nɛ Akaia tite akũ a manɛ akũ kĩ bakpa kabumɛna anɛ katukɔɛ.” Mi mbɔdi nɛ foe akũ fɔ̃ fi wo nɛ be sɛkɛ mɔa pii kamɛ. 3Finyaakĩĩ mado boe bawaɛ̃ kĩĩ nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃, ayekĩ baamɔ kĩ boe kukũpia nɛ mi akũ nɛ futetsa akũ a lɛnyɛ́ kɔdzɛla pupulidza. Lɛmɛ ndɛ ayekĩ mbi be kĩ mimanɛ akũ mɔ mi fubumɛnatsa a, mawɛ kĩ mina nɛ kukũmanɛ kamɛ lɔmɔ. 4Lɛmɛ ntɛ Makedoniafɔ aatomɔ yĩ bɛyaamɔ kĩ mitámanɛ akũ mikpa futetsa a kɔ̃ ni, kɔnyɔã aawo boe, lɛmɛ kɔnyɔã baũ aawo mi kɔba, kitonɛkĩ baakɔna kĩ bɔtɛ́nɛ anɛ kate nɛ mi akũ. 5Foesũ nkɔna kĩ fusĩ kĩ mapiã boe bawaɛ̃ kĩĩ bɛnya yĩ lɔtɔ lɔkɔa bɛyaamanɛ futetsa a kĩ milɛ miyi kĩ míakpa a. Futetsa kĩĩ aakpɔta ntɛ ĩya, ade fɔ́atsa kĩ mi ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ futo sũ mikpa, fɔnyɛ́ fukĩ bɛhɛ mi kĩ mikpa.
Baguma Awɛ Oti Kĩ Yate Fɔtsa Kĩ Futo Ye Ɔwɔlɛ Kamɛ.
6Mite anɛ kĩ oti kĩ edu funitsã kabii ni, funitsã sukuloo yaana, ekĩ edu funitsã pii aanyɛ funitsã baũ. 7Foesũ odi nyɛ odi ɛkpa ndɛ ayekĩ ɛwɛ futo ye kamɛ, ɛtakɛna foe mɔ kalɔɛ ĩye kĩ fɔnyɛ ɔhɛ kĩ ɛkɛna sũ, kitonɛkĩ Baguma awɛ oti a kĩ yakpa fɔtsa mɔ kawɔlɛ. 8Baguma aapuli ɛkpa mi fɔtsa ɛba fukĩ misĩ, ayekĩ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ míana fɔtsa a kĩ misĩ mikpa mi akũ a, mina fublusu mikɔa mikɛna tudzuma wĩ tidi nyɛ tidi. 9Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ,
“Yakpa ahiãfɔ fɔtsa faa
ade ye sɛmɛ kalɛ kakɛna waa daa a.”
10Baguma kĩ yakpa okuani fudutsa mɔ funitsã kĩ yanya, aakpa mi fudutsa flee a kĩ misĩ a, ɛfɔ̃ fubo anɛ fɔkpa mi funitsã beblebee ayekĩ míakɔa mikɛna sɛmɛ kalɛ tudzuma pii. 11Baguma aafɔ̃ mina akũ fɔtsa daa, mipuli mikakɛna sɛmɛ kalɛ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ, ayekĩ bati pii aanyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ nɛ futetsa a kĩ bɛtɛ bitomɛna boe sɛkɛ̃ a sũ.
12Kitonɛkĩ kabumɛna a kĩ mikpa a ni, nnɛ́ Baguma bati a odi kasĩ onukpɛ̃ mipi, mbom fɔfɔ̃ bati pii anyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ paa. 13Lɛtsa a kĩ laato mi ɔsum kĩĩ kamɛ aafɔ̃ bati pii limu Baguma, kitonɛkĩ mitɛ Kristo Kalɛ Wĩ a mido, mikɛna nɛ ke akũ, ade mikɛna sɛmɛ kalɛ kĩ mite fɔtsa mikpa be mɔ bati bɛbã lɛmɛ a. 14Foesũ baakɔa ɔdɔ kĩ eto ɔwɔlɛ dzununuunu kamɛ bɛbɔa mpaɛ bɛkpa mi, kitonɛkĩ Baguma mɔ́ mi kɔnya pii. 15Mifɔ̃ bɔnyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ nɛ ye futetsa a kĩ ɛkpa boe, kĩ bɔláapuli bɔnyɛ foe kayɔ sũ a!

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 10
Content:
Paulo Pili Ye Adzuma Lɔlɔ.
1Yĩ Paulo mɔawɛ lamɛna mi aduli kake. Ade yĩ bati alɛ kĩ ĩnyɛ oti dɔwa ntɛ ndeĩ nɛ mi kamɛ, lɛmɛ ntɛ nláa mi sɛkɛ̃ kɔ̃ ni, ndeĩ awũni. Ntsɛ̃ Kristo akũ kadɔla mɔ ye sɛmɛ kalɛ kamɛ, 2make mi aduli kĩ ntɛ ĩya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ ni, mitafɔ̃ ĩyaana awũni, kitonɛkĩ matɛ kado kĩ maapuli nna awũni paa nɛ bikĩ balɛ kĩ katinya liti katomɛna sũ bɔakɛna adzuma kĩĩ akũ a. 3Fɔnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kĩ katinya kamɛ budzi, lɛmɛ bɔánɔ kawũ nɛ katinya kamɛ kɔbɛ̃ onukpɛ̃. 4Kawũkanɔ fɔtsa a kĩ bɔnɛɛ bɔanɔ a lɛnyɛ́ katinya kamɛ fude, mbom fɔnyɛ Baguma fude a kĩ fudeĩ kɔbɛ̃, kĩ bɔkɔa bɔabubuli okesĩnɛ fudzikɔ̃ mɔ ɔsĩ a. 5Bɔabula fɔvã kama fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bati avɛlɛ a kade. Bɔawɔla lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ latsa kapia kĩ fɔasua Baguma kanyi osi. Bɔapi adzuni adi nyɛ adi ndɛ ayekĩ bapili bati nɛ kawũ kamɛ kĩ ɛkɛna nɛ Kristo kawɛ akũ. 6Ntɛ mikɔa mi akũ flee mikpa boe, mɔ miatse boe ɔlɛdo ni, boe malo bɔmanɛ akũ bɔkpa kĩ bɔ́avɛlɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna atɔ ɔsĩ a sɔtɔ.
7Miadã oti anɛ kakɛna fɔtsa. Odi deĩ nɛ mi kamɛ kĩ yabu ye akũ kĩ ɛnyɛ Kristo ode mbɔɛɛ? Ntɛ aye ni, mifɔ̃ owula ebuki ɛkɔna ye akũ ɛdã, kitonɛkĩ ndɛ ayekĩ ɛnyɛ Kristo ode a, ade aye boe malo bɔnyɛ Kristo bade a. 8Kitonɛkĩ kɔnyɔã lákɔ yĩ, ntɛ ntɛ́nɛ kapia beblebee nɛ otumi a kĩ boe Ɔlate kpa boe a sũ. Ɛkpa boe otumi kĩ bɔkɔa bɔdɔɔla mi mibo anɛ, nnɛ́ kĩ bɔkɔa bubula mi kade. 9Ntáwɛ kĩ fɔkɛna mi ndɛ mado mi libe mɔ tuvoli kĩ ntsɛlɛ a. 10Badi aalɛ kĩ, “Paulo tuvoli kamɛ fɔlɛtsa deĩ ɔsĩ, fudeĩ kɔbɛ̃ malo, lɛmɛ ntɛ ye mɔawɛ a edeĩ nɛ boe sɛkɛ̃ kɔ̃ ni, ɛlá ɔsĩ ade ye kɔdzɛla kalɛ lɛmɛ lányɛnɛ bati akũ!” 11Bati a na odu binu foe kayɔ, kĩ kavɛmɛna kadima lɛláa lɛtsa a kĩ bɔatsɛlɛ kado nɛ boe tuvoli kamɛ ntɛ budeĩ mɔ lugo, mɔ lɛtsa a kĩ bɔ́akɛna ntɛ budeĩ nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ a kamɛ.
12Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, bɔláawɛ kĩ bɔakɔ akũ bɔbɔa mɔ ĩye bɔkɔna mɔ bati a kĩ bamu be akũ beblebee a. Badzimbifɔ paa banɛ! Bideĩ be mɔawɛ tisi kĩ te akũ batsã kakɔna akũ kadã, foesũ badzɛmɔ be akũ nɛ be mɔawɛ tisi a akũ.
13Lɛmɛ boe kɔ̃ ni, boe kukũpia lɛláanyina ɔbɛ̃. Mbom kɔ́ana nɛ awã kĩ Baguma yi ɛkpa nɛ boe adzuma kakɛna kamɛ, ade boe adzuma nɛ mi kamɛ lɛmɛ bu a. 14Nɛ ayekĩ mideĩ nɛ kakɔ a kĩ Baguma tsua ɛkpa boe a kamɛ sũ ni, kĩ bɔkɔa Kalɛ Wĩ nɛ Kristo akũ a bɔama mi a, bɔtányina bɔnaa tɛbɛ̃ a liti. 15Foesũ bɔápia nɛ adzuma a kĩ bati bɛbã kɛna binyina tɛbɛ̃ a kĩ Baguma yi ɛkpa boe a akũ. Mbom bɔadã anɛ kĩ mi katɛkado aabo anɛ, lɔkɔa bɔ́apuli bɔkɛna adzuma baũ bɔnaa lɔtɔ nɛ mi kamɛ, nɛ awã kĩ Baguma kpa boe ekpula a. 16Ke liti a, bɔ́apuli bunyina mi bɔnaade lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ nɛ fude bɛbã kamɛ, ade fɔláasĩ kĩ bɔapia nɛ adzuma a kĩ bati bɛbã kɛna kɔkɔɛ nɛ be kakɔ akũ a. 17Lɛmɛ ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ odi awɛ epia ni, kɛnɛ kĩ epia nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ boe Ɔlate kɛna a akũ.” 18Kitonɛkĩ nnɛ́ oti a kĩ yamu ye mɔawɛ akũ a nyɛ oti wĩ, mbom oti a kĩ boe Ɔlate amu nyɛ oti wĩ.

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 11
Content:
Paulo Yidza Ɛdza Nɛ Fɔvã Fɔtɔ Banyanɛ Akũ.
1Mawɛ kĩ mina ɔwɔlɛ mikpa yĩ, titɔ kĩ míadã kĩ ndzimbi sukuloo malo. Make mi aduli, mitɛ foe lɔmɔ mi kpa yĩ. 2Manɔ lineke nɛ mi lɔlɔ ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma lɛmɛ anɔ lineke a. Mila ndɛ oyitsɔ̃ kĩ enyína onyole kĩ ntinya nkpa onyole mɔapɛ odi kĩ ɛnyɛ Kristo mɔawɛ a. 3Mavila kĩ bati aabula mi adzuni kade ndɛ ayekĩ kɔɛ kɔa tɛdake kɔkɛ Eva, kĩ miláakɔa tɔwɔlɛ kpalɛwa misum Kristo ndɛ ayekĩ mikakɛna a. 4Kitonɛkĩ miatɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yade lɛtsã nɛ Yesu bɛbã kĩ nnɛ́ ye akũ bude lɛtsã bɔkpa mi a mɔ kawɔlɛ mɔatsɛ mɔatsɛ. Ade ke miatɛ hũhũ mɔ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ fɔvɛmɛna kɔlaa nɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa mɔ Kalɛ Wĩ a kĩ mitɛ mitomɛna boe sɛkɛ̃ a lɛmɛ a.
5Maábu kĩ mi fɔtɔ banyanɛ a kĩ miakɔna kĩ bɛnyɛ bati titiliwu badi odu a tɛ kɔya bɛba yĩ nɛ osi odima akũ. 6Ɔsa ĩnyɛ oti kĩ yaápuli kalɛ kɔdzɛla kalɛ wĩ, lɛmɛ mabi mi pipiipi kĩ nnɛ́ mɔ kadikanyi kamɛ. Bɔnyɛ foe bɔtsa mi pefee nɛ lɔkɔ a flee kamɛ nɛ osi nyɛ osi akũ.
7Kĩ ĩyalɛ Baguma Kalɛ Wĩ a ntsa mi a, ntátɛ lɛtsama ntomɛna mi sɛkɛ̃. Lɛmɛ ndɔla yĩ akũ ayekĩ baadɛla mi nɛ ode. Tɔkpa tanɛ kĩ nkɛna mbɔɛɛ? 8Kĩ nkakɛna adzuma nɛ mi kamɛ a, tɛsɔli bɛbã bati lise yĩ kɔtɔ. Bɔ́abɔɛ foe kĩ nkaye be kĩ makɔa mbumɛna mi.
9Ade lɔkɔ a kĩ nna nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ a, ntáha mi mɔ kabumɛna ntɛ nsĩ sika malo. Boe bawaɛ̃ batɛ badonɛ a kĩ bito Makedonia bɛya a lɛma yĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ lisĩ yĩ. Ndɛ ayekĩ fɔna kɔkɔɛ a ade aye fɔ́ana nɛ kunya kamɛ lɛmɛ a, kĩ nláakɔa yĩ akũ nkɛna fɔlɔtsa nte nɛ mi akũ da. 10Kĩ Kristo ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a deĩ nɛ yĩ kamɛ sũ ni, lɛtsama lɛláasua yĩ osi nɛ kakɔma, kĩ ntapia nɛ fukĩĩ akũ nɛ Akaia tite flee akũ. 11Kalɛ nlɛ fukĩĩ kitonɛkĩ maáwɛ mi kalɛ sũ mbɔɛɛ? Baguma nyina kĩ mawɛ mi kalɛ!
12Maakakɛna lɛtsa a kĩ makɛna finyaa, kĩ nláakɔa yĩ fɔlɔtsa nte nɛ mi akũ, ayekĩ fɔtɔ banyanɛ babɛbã a lɛláana osi bipia akũ bɛlɛ kĩ bɔmɔ be akɛna adzuma nɛ osi mɔapɛ akũ.
13Bati a na lɛnyɛ́ fɔtɔ banyanɛ wĩ, mbom bɛnyɛ fɔvã fɔtɔ banyanɛ kĩ bakɛ bati nɛ be adzuma a kĩ bakɛna a kamɛ. Bakɛna be akũ ndɛ Kristo fɔtɔ banyanɛ mɔawɛ paa banɛ. 14Fukĩĩ tákɛna wãwã, kitonɛkĩ Abonsam malo apuli kadani ye akũ kadã ndɛ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ aye nɛ ɔhaĩ kamɛ. 15Foesũ fɔnyɛ́ lɛtsa baũ lidima ntɛ ye basumunɛ lɛmɛ dani be akũ bɛkɛna ndɛ Baguma basumunɛ kĩ bakɛna fɔtsa nɛ osi kpĩĩ akũ. Nɛ ke kawũna a, baana lɛtsa a kĩ be lɛkɛnana fɛta a pɛpɛɛpɛ.
Lubo a Kĩ Paulo Mɔ Ndɛ Fɔtɔ Ɔnyanɛ Aye.
16Mbuki malɛ kĩ odima ɛtakɔna kĩ ndzimbi. Lɛmɛ ntɛ mibu yĩ lɔmɔ kɔ̃ ni, mitɛ yĩ ndɛ odzimbifɔ aye lɔkɔa yĩ malo mia sukuloo. 17Ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ kĩ malɛ kĩĩ lɛnyɛ́ lɛtsa a kĩ boe Ɔlate aawɛ kĩ nlɛ. Nɛ kukũpia fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kamɛ ni, malɛ kɔdzɛla koũ ndɛ odzimbifɔ aye. 18Lɛmɛ nɛ ayekĩ bati pii apia akũ nɛ katinya kamɛ fɔtsa akũ sũ ni, yĩ malo maakɔa foe mpia. 19Mi mɔawɛ a minyɛ bati kĩ binyina kadi paa, foesũ miana ɔwɔlɛ katɛ bikĩ bidzimbi a nɛ kawɔlɛ kamɛ. 20Ntɛ odi akpã mi nɛ ɔhɛ kamɛ, ĩye yasisi mi, ĩye yadã mi nɛ kayɔ kayɔ ĩye yabalɛ mi nɛ anɛ kamɛ malo ni, miatɛ foe mɔ ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ. 21Kɔnyɔã fɔanɛ fɔkpa yĩ kĩ bɔtána ɔwɔlɛ bɔkɛna fukĩna bamɛ odu. Mbɔɛɛ fɔfɛta kĩ bɔkɛna lɔmɔ?
Lɛmɛ ntɛ odi do ɔwɔlɛ kĩ yapia nɛ litsedi akũ ni, yĩ malo maado ɔwɔlɛ ndɛ ye aye, lɛmɛ finyaa malɛ kɔdzɛla ndɛ odzimbifɔ aye. 22Balɛ kĩ Hebrifɔ banɛ. Oo, yĩ malo Hebrini manɛ. Balɛ kĩ Israelfɔ banɛ. Yĩ malo Israelni manɛ. Balɛ kĩ Abraham babi mɔ bawa banɛ. Yĩ malo nto Abraham kasinu a kamɛ. 23Balɛ kĩ Kristo basumunɛ banɛ. Malɛ kɔdzɛla ndɛ ɔbɔndamfɔ manɛ, lɛmɛ ĩnyɛ ɔsumunɛ wĩ mbɛ̃ be! Nkɛna adzuma mɔ ɔsĩ mba be, bido yĩ nɛ kɔla mba be, bibo yĩ mɔ kutsei fɔba be, ade nkawo nɛ wuda awɛ kamɛ mɔatsɛ mɔatsɛ. 24Titi elo mɔa kĩ Yudafɔ bo yĩ kutsei taalɛ-avedi. 25Titi ɛlalɛ kĩ Romafɔ bo yĩ mɔ mpile ade bɛnɔ yĩ boe deedi a. Ndzi nɛ ɔkɔlɔ kamɛ titi ɛlalɛ kĩ ɔwɛ bubuli ye, luwi mɔa mɔ lɛnyɛ flee nkahɔ nɛ mui anɛ. 26Nɛ yĩ tisi pii katsã kamɛ ni, tɔwɔ kayili, bayekpanɛ kado yĩ libe ade ayea Yudafɔ mɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ kawɛ kĩ bakɔ yĩ a. Nna nɛ nkpã mɔ wuda kayite nɛ tɛmatɔ tɛkpale tɛkpale kamɛ, nɛ fupo kamɛ, nɛ mpo anɛ mɔ fɔvã lɛtsã badenɛ awɛ kamɛ. 27Ĩyili akũ nkɛna adzuma mɔ ɔsĩ, fɔkɔ fudi ndzi kĩ maána tida nwa. Kɔlɛ mɔ ɔmɔado kakɔ yĩ, fɔkɔ fudi ndzi maána funitsã ĩnya nwĩ, ade maána kawakɔ̃ ĩye tɛtadiɛ kĩ mado a. 28Nɛ fukĩĩ flee liti ni, luwi nyɛ luwi tɛsɔli a akũ kakɔna kɛna fɔlɔtsa kĩ futeĩ nɛ yĩ ɔwɔlɛ. 29Ntɛ akpɔ veli odi nɛ ye katɛkado kamɛ ni, akpɔ aveli yĩ kaba. Ntɛ bɛfɔ̃ odi wo nɛ tɔkpa kamɛ ni, mana foe akũ kalɔkpa baũ.
30Ntɛ kɛnɛ kĩ mpia akũ ni, maapia nɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔatsa kĩ nlá kɔbɛ̃ a akũ. 31Baguma, kĩ ɛnyɛ boe Ɔlate Kristo Ɔlɛga, kĩ bamu ye dĩ daa a, nyina kĩ nnɛ́ fɔvã mama. 32Kĩ nna nɛ Damasko a, Lɛgã Areta fɔ̃ bikĩ badã ɔmatɔ a akũ a dza nɛ ɔmatɔ a seebi kɔbã onukpɛ̃ kĩ bipi yĩ. 33Lɛmɛ bati do yĩ nɛ ɔtsɛtsɛ kamɛ bɛtsãmɛna nɛ seebi nfansili kamɛ bɛkamɛna bɛdzɛla, ade nlo nfɔnɛ ye a.

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 12
Content:
Paulo Lɛ Ye Anɛ Ketee Fɔda Mɔ Fɔtsa Kanyɛkatsa.
1Titɔ kĩ nfasɔ adima lɛláa kapia kamɛ malo ni, kɛnɛ kĩ mpia akũ. Lɛmɛ finyaa maalɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ fɔtsa a kĩ mmɔ́ nɛ anɛ ketee fɔda kamɛ, mɔ fɔtsa a kĩ boe Ɔlate nyɛ ɛtsa yĩ a akũ. 2Ĩnyina onyole odi kĩ ɛnyɛ Kristo ode. Ade futeli ewua-ana kĩ fɔtɛ̃ kĩ bɛbɔɛ ye bɛnamɛna ode flefle a. Ĩnyína ntɛ sukɛna kamɛ ɛna ĩye nnɛ́ sukɛna kamɛ ɛna, mbɔɛntɛ Baguma odi nyina. 3-4Mbuki malɛ kĩ ĩnyina kĩ bipi onyole kĩĩ bɛnamɛna Paradiso kamɛ, lɛmɛ ĩnyína ntɛ ɛna nɛ sukɛna kamɛ, ĩye nnɛ́ sukɛna kamɛ ɛna, mbɔɛntɛ Baguma odi nyina. Ade awã enu fɔtsa a kĩ otidziwa lɛláapuli ɛlɛ, mɔ fɔtsa a kĩ bɛtákpa odima osi kĩ ebinya onukpɛ̃ nɛ foe akũ. 5Foesũ maapia nɛ onyole kĩĩ akũ, lɛmɛ nláapia nɛ yĩ mɔawɛ akũ, mbɔɛntɛ nɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔatsa kĩ nlá kɔbɛ̃ a akũ. 6Ntɛ kawɛ nwɛ kĩ mapia akũ malo ni, nláakɛna foe ndɛ odzimbifɔ aye, kitonɛkĩ maakalɛ ɔnɔkɔali a. Lɛmɛ nláapia akũ, kitonɛkĩ ntáwɛ kĩ odima ebu yĩ ɛba ayekĩ enyina kĩ nla a, nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ ɛmɔ́ kĩ nkɛna mɔ likĩ enu kĩ nlɛ a sũ.
7Lɛmɛ nɛ ayekĩ nláadɛla yĩ akũ nɛ ode nɛ awãwã fɔtsa pii a kĩ Baguma nyɛ ɛtsa yĩ a sũ ni, bido fɔsɔ ndɛ su kĩ sawo paa nɛ yĩ sukɛna kamɛ. Fɔsɔ a kɛna ndɛ Abonsam fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ kĩ fɔkaaha yĩ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ, ayekĩ nláatɛnɛ yĩ akũ kadɛla nɛ ode. 8Mbɔa mpaɛ titi ɛlalɛ nkpa boe Ɔlate kĩ ɛnyɛ fɔsɔ kĩĩ nɛ yĩ kamɛ. 9Lɛmɛ mbuayɛ kĩ ɛkpa yĩ nyɛ kĩ, “Yĩ kɔnyakamɔ nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ de osĩ, kitonɛkĩ yĩ kɔbɛ̃ ana ɔsĩ paa ntɛ nɔ ɔlá kɔbɛ̃.” Foesũ kawɔlɛ ade yĩ paa kĩ mapia akũ nɛ yĩ ɔsĩ katana a akũ, ayekĩ maamɔ Kristo kɔbɛ̃ a nɛ yĩ kamɛ. 10Foesũ kawɔlɛ ade yĩ nɛ ɔsĩ katana, fuvũnatsa, lubo kamɔ, liti katomɛna, mɔ ɔhau kamɔ akũ nɛ Kristo sũ. Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ nlá kɔbɛ̃ ni, Kristo ado yĩ kɔbɛ̃.
Paulo Sĩ Akũ Nɛ Korintofɔ Batɛ Badonɛ a Ɔbla Akũ.
11Malɛ kɔdzɛla ndɛ odzimbifɔ aye, lɛmɛ mi lɛfɔ̃ nkɛna foe, kitonɛkĩ mi nyɛ bati kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ bimu yĩ kufɛ. Kitonɛkĩ titɔ kĩ ĩnyɛ́ lɛtsama malo ni, mi fɔtɔ banyanɛ titiliwu a lɛbɛ̃ yĩ nɛ osi odima akũ. 12Awãwã mɔ kɔbɛ̃ fɔtsa, mɔ nsɛntsɛlɛni a kĩ nkɔa ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ nkɛna nɛ mi kamɛ a atsa pefee kĩ fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ wĩ manɛ. 13Nkɛna tuwĩ tidi nkpa tɛsɔli bɛbã a mba mi mbɔɛɛ? Nnɛ́ foe nyɛ kĩ ntákɔa yĩ akũ kadã nte nɛ mi akũ sũ mbɔɛɛ? Make mi aduli kĩ mikɔa mite yĩ, nɛ ayekĩ ntákɛna mi kakɛna wĩ sũ!
14Finyaa ade lɛlalɛde kĩ mmanɛ akũ kĩ mayaasɛla mi a, lɛmɛ nláawã mi lɛtsama. Mi mɔawɛ a mawɛ, nnɛ́ mi sika. Malo kɔlaa ni, nnɛ́ babi kɛnɛ kĩ bɛmanɛ fɔtsa biyi be bamanɛ, mbom bamanɛ kɛnɛ kĩ bɛkpɔta fɔtsa biyi be babi. 15Maamɔ kawɔlɛ ntɛ mbula yĩ kɔbɛ̃ flee a kĩ ndeĩ a kade, nkɔa mbumɛna mi. Ntɛ mawɛ mi kalɛ paa a ni, nde sũ kɛnɛ kĩ mi ɔdɔ a kĩ mideĩ mikpa yĩ a akũ etinya?
16Foesũ mitɛ foe kĩ ntánya fɔlɔtsa nte nɛ mi akũ. Lɛmɛ badi aalɛ kĩ ndeĩ tɛdake, ade nkɛ mi nɛ nyansã kamɛ ntɛ fɔtsa a. 17Ntsã batɔ a kĩ ndo nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ a kamɛ odi akũ nsisi mi mbɔɛɛ? 18Nke Tito aduli kĩ ɛya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃, ade ndo ɔtɛ odonɛ bɛbã lɛmɛ kĩ etomɔ ye a. Míalɛ kĩ Tito sisi mi mbɔɛɛ? Mbɔɛɛ nnɛ́ kakɔna mɔapɛ a bɔmɔ ye bɔnɛɛ, bɔtsɛ̃ osi mɔapɛ a lɛmɛ akũ bɔakɛna adzuma?
19Ɔsa miakɔna kĩ nɛ foe kamɛ a, bɔbɔa mbɔdi kĩ bɔapili boe lɔlɔ nɛ mi anɛ. Oowo, fɔlá lɔmɔ! Bɔalɛ kɔdzɛla ndɛ ayekĩ Kristo awɛ kĩ bɔlɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ Baguma anɛ. Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ bɔakɛna ni, bɔakɛna foe kĩ fubumɛna mi mibo anɛ nɛ mi katɛkado kamɛ. 20Mavila kĩ ntɛ ĩyawo awã ni, maamɔ mi kĩ miláana ndɛ ayekĩ maawɛ kĩ mina, ade ayea mi malo miláamɔ yĩ ndɛ ayekĩ miawɛ kĩ nna a. Mavila kĩ maayamɔ ɔdzɛ kakɛna, mɔ lineke kanɔ, mɔ kalɔkpa kana mɔatsɛ mɔatsɛ, mɔ akũ odi fude kawɛ, mɔ fuvũnatsa, mɔ bati buĩ kanyɛ, mɔ lukũta mɔ onukpɛ̃ mɔa katakɛna nɛ mi kamɛ. 21Mavila lɛmɛ kĩ ntɛ mbuki ĩya ni, yĩ Baguma aadɔla yĩ nɛ mi anɛ, ade maabe nko nɛ bati pii a kĩ bɛkɛna tɔkpa bɛtɛ̃ a akũ. Kitonɛkĩ bɛtádani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ nɛ efĩĩ fɔtsa mɔ sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kpa kakɛna kamɛ, mɔ litsolewɛ mɔ linyolewɛ akũ a.

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 13
Content:
Paulo Kpa Korintofɔ Kɔdɛ Nkaɛ.
1Ade fukĩĩ nyɛ lɛlalɛde kĩ maayasɛla mi a. Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ bɛbɔɛ fɔlɛtsa nɛ odi akũ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ adansifɔ nviã ĩye be ɛlalɛ bɛlɛ kĩ fɔlɛtsa a deĩ nɛ foe kamɛ fɔmɔ baakɔ ye kɔtɔ.” 2Kĩ ĩya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ lɛyade a, ndɛ bati a kĩ bɛkɛna titikpa nɛ lɔkɔ kĩ lɛtɛ̃ kamɛ, mɔ bati bɛbã lɛmɛ. Lɛmɛ maabuki nlɛ foe finyaa, kĩ nláa mi sɛkɛ̃ malo. Ntɛ mbuki ĩya ni, odima lɛláanɛ nɛ sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ kamɛ. 3Míamɔ yĩ kadzakɔ̃ a kĩ miawɛ a, kĩ fɔatsa kĩ Kristo alɛ kɔdzɛla katsãmɛna yĩ akũ a. Ntɛ yakɛna adzuma nɛ mi kamɛ ni, ye kɔ̃ ɛtádɔ, mbom yanyɛ ye kɔbɛ̃ katsa nɛ mi kamɛ. 4Kĩ bɛbɔa ye nɛ asendua akũ a, ɛdɔ lɛmɛ Baguma kɔbɛ̃ fɔ̃ edzi nkpã. Ade ayea boe a kĩ bɔkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo a bɔlá ɔsĩ a, lɛmɛ Baguma aado boe kɔbɛ̃ ayekĩ bɔ́apuli bɔkɛna adzuma a kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ bɔkɛna nɛ mi kamɛ a.
5Minaa mi kamɛ, misɔ mi akũ midã ntɛ midzi nɛ mi katɛkado onukpɛ̃. Mitámɔ miyi ɔsũ kĩ Yesu Kristo deĩ nɛ mi kamɛ mbɔɛɛ? Minyina kĩ edeĩ nɛ mi kamɛ, mbɔɛntɛ mitákpɔla nɛ mi akũ kasɔkadã a kamɛ. 6Matɛ kado kĩ míayanyi kĩ boe kɔ̃ bɔnya akũ nɛ kasɔkadã a kamɛ. 7Bɔake Baguma aduli kĩ mitakɛna nfumusu adima, nnɛ́ kĩ bati aamɔ kĩ bɔnya akũ nɛ boe akũ kasɔkadã a kamɛ, mbom kĩ miakɛna fɔtsa wĩ titɔ kĩ fɔadã ndɛ boe adzuma kakɛna tákpɔla malo. 8Kitonɛkĩ bɔláapuli bɔkɛna lɛtsama butia ɔnɔkɔali a, mbom kɛnɛ kĩ bɔadza pintii bɔkpa ɔnɔkɔali a. 9Kawɔlɛ ade boe ntɛ bɔdɔ, mɔ mi kɔ̃ midzɛ̃ pintii nɛ mi katɛkado kamɛ. Nɛ foesũ bɔabɔa mpaɛ kĩ mibo anɛ mikpɔla flefle. 10Ade foesũ matsɛlɛ mi ovoli kĩĩ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ ndzakũ nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ a. Nkɛna foe lɔmɔ ayekĩ ntɛ ĩyawo awã ni, nláakɔa kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ boe Ɔlate kpa yĩ a nvɛlɛ mi mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ. Ɛkpa yĩ kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ nkɔa ndɔɔla mi mibo anɛ nɛ mi katɛkado kamɛ, nnɛ́ kĩ makɔa mbula mi kade.
11Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, nɛ kawũna ni, midzi kadzi wĩ. Mibo anɛ mikpɔla flefle nɛ mi katɛkado kamɛ. Mibɔa mbɔdi mikɛna nɛ yĩ kɔdɛ a akũ, mikɛna onukpɛ̃ mɔa, midzi nɛ lukudɔ kamɛ lɛmɛ. Baguma kĩ yawɛ bati kalɛ, mɔ ye lukudɔ lɛmɛ litomɔ mi flee.
12Miwɔ̃na akũ flee nɛ Baguma lukudɔ kamɛ.
13Baguma bade a flee awɔ̃na mi!
14Boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo kɔnyakamɔ, Baguma ɔdɔ, mɔ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a ɔmɔa kakɛna a, fɔna nɛ mi flee kamɛ.

Title: GALATIAFƆ 1
Content:
1Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ, Paulo, kĩ ĩnyɛ Kristo fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a sɛkɛ̃. Nnɛ́ batidziwa lɛpau yĩ, ĩye nnɛ́ otidziwa akũ bɛtsã bɛpau yĩ ndɛ fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ aye, mbom yĩ kavɛ a to Yesu Kristo mɔ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga a kĩ ɛdzɛla Yesu etomɛna kanɔkpa a sɛkɛ̃. 2Bɔmɔ nwaɛ̃ amɛ flee a kĩ bideĩ nɛ awĩ a, bɔnɛɛ ovoli kĩĩ a bɔawɔ̃na tɛsɔli bati a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Galatia a.
3Baguma boe Ɔlɛga mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo bɛmɔ mi kɔnya, bɛkpa mi lukudɔ lɛmɛ.
4Yesu Kristo kɔa ye akũ ɛbɔa afɔliɛ nɛ boe tɔkpa lɔlɔ, ayekĩ yaanyɛ boe etomɛna nviã katinya kpa kĩĩ kamɛ, nɛ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga kawɛ onukpɛ̃. 5Mifɔ̃ bumu Baguma kito finyaa kanaa daa! Fɔya lɔmɔ.
Baguma Kalɛ Wĩ Mɔapɛ Deĩ.
6Mi fɔlɛtsa kɛna yĩ wãwã, kitonɛkĩ owi tábuna kɔlaa kĩ mimuniki nɛ oti a kĩ ɛtsã Kristo kɔnyakamɔ kamɛ ɛvɛ mi a liti, ade minaatɛ kalɛ wĩ bɛbã a. 7Lɛmɛ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, kalɛ wĩ bɛbã kadima buki kɛláa, mbom bati badi tsɛ̃ babula mi atɔ kade, ade bawɛ kĩ badani Kristo Kalɛ Wĩ a bɛkɛna lɛtsa bɛbã a. 8Lɛmɛ ntɛ boe, ĩye Baguma fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ odi malo to ode ɛyalɛ kalɛ wĩ kĩ kɛvɛmɛna nɛ kikĩ ke akũ bude lɛtsã bɔkpa mi a ni, Baguma edumu ye ɛkpa lubo kamɔ! 9Kalɛ a kĩ bɔlɛ bɔtɛ̃ a, ade ke a finyaa mbuki malɛ a. Nlɛ kĩ ntɛ odi aato ode ɛyaabi mi kalɛ wĩ kĩ kɛvɛmɛna nɛ kikĩ mitɛ a akũ ni, Baguma edumu ye ɛkpa lubo kamɔ!
10Fɔlɛtsa a kĩ malɛ a ni, kalɛ malɛ foe nwo bati ĩye Baguma anɛ mbɔɛɛ? Oowo! Kawɛ mawɛ kĩ fuwo Baguma anɛ. Ntɛ mbuki makɛna foe fuwo batidziwa anɛ ni, kufɛ nláabuki ĩnya Kristo ɔsumunɛ.
Ayekĩ Paulo Yadani Fɔtɔ Ɔnyanɛ.
11Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mifɔ̃ mbi mi yededeede kĩ Kalɛ Wĩ a kĩ ke akũ made lɛtsã a lɛnyɛ́ otidziwa kade. 12Ntátɛ ke ntomɛna otidziwa odima sɛkɛ̃ ade odima lɛmɛ tátsa yĩ ke a, mbom Yesu Kristo mɔawɛ lɛnyɛ ke ɛtsa yĩ.
13Minu ayekĩ ndzi nkpã tɔ̃ a, kĩ mpi Yudafɔ ɔsum a ndomɔ akũ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ. Minu lɛmɛ ayekĩ nkɔa kɔnɛyɔɔlɛ ntomɛna asɔli bati a liti, mbɔa mbɔdi kĩ mawɔla be dzɔrɔbii. 14Nnaa lɔtɔ mba yĩ bakɔba Yudafɔ pii a kĩ bɔmɔ́ be bɔnyɛ lɛtsã nɛ boe Yudafɔ ɔsum a kamɛ, ade ntomɔ boe bawanyɔ tɛmaniɛ a liti mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ a. 15-16Lɛmɛ Baguma nɛ ye kɔnyakamɔ kamɛ pau yĩ eyi malo fɔmɔ bɛma yĩ, ade ɛvɛ yĩ kĩ ĩyasum ye a. Ade kĩ ɛwɛ kĩ yanyɛ Obi ɛtsa yĩ ayekĩ maade lɛtsã nɛ ye Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ nkpa bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a, ntánaa otidziwa odima sɛkɛ̃ kĩ ɛtsa yĩ foe tisi. 17Ntánaa Yerusalem lɛmɛ kĩ manaamɔ bikĩ bɛnya fɔtɔ banyanɛ bɛnyaa yĩ lɔtɔ, mbom lɛtalɛta nnaa Arabia tite akũ. Ke liti a, mmuniki nto awã ntɛ̃ nnaa Damasko.
18Futeli ɛlalɛ liti fɔmɔ nnaa Yerusalem kĩ manaamɔ Petro. Ndzi nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ tɛkwansieda nviã. 19Ntámɔ fɔtɔ banyanɛ a kamɛ odima kɛba Yakobo, boe Ɔlate ɔwaɛ̃nyole a.
20Lɛtsa a kĩ matsɛlɛ kĩĩ nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali. Baguma nyina kĩ nnɛ́ fɔvã mama.
21Ke liti a, ndzakũ nnaa fɔkɔ kumɛkumɛ nɛ Siria mɔ Kilikia tite akũ. 22Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ a, Kristo batɛ badonɛ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Yudea linyína yĩ anɛ mɔ anɛ. 23Kanu binu nɛ bati tunukpɛ̃ kĩ, “Oti a kĩ ɛkatomɔ boe liti kɔkɔɛ a ni, finyaa kɔ̃ ɛlamɔ lɛtsã kade nɛ katɛkado a kĩ ɛwɛ kĩ yawɔla a akũ!” 24Nɛ foesũ bimu Baguma nɛ yĩ sũ.

Title: GALATIAFƆ 2
Content:
Fɔtɔ Banyanɛ Bɛbã a Tɛ Paulo Bido Nɛ Be Kamɛ.
1Nɛ futeli ewuana liti a, bɔmɔ́ Barnaba bubuki bumuniki bɔnaa Yerusalem, ade nkpã Tito lɛmɛ nnamɛna a. 2Nnaa awã kitonɛkĩ Baguma nyɛ ɛtsa yĩ kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ nnaa. Nɛ bɔmɔ́ lɔtɔ banyanɛ a odi katsɛna kamɛ ni, nkpalɛ fɔlɛtsa kamɛ ntsa be nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ lɛtsã a kĩ nlamɛna kade kakpa bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a akũ. Ntáwɛ kĩ adzuma a kĩ nkɛna ntɛ̃ a, mɔ ekĩ makɛna finyaa a, ɛkɛna fɔtsa pupulidza. 3Titɔ kĩ yĩ obumɛnanɛ Tito lɛnyɛ́ Yudani malo ni, odima táhɛ ye kĩ etsua lɛkpati. 4Lɛmɛ bavãlɛvã batɛ badonɛ badi tsã tɛdake osi akũ biwo nɛ asɔli bati a kamɛ kĩ banaĩ bɛmɔ boe akũ akũ kadzi a kĩ bɔna nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo Yesu a. Bɛwɛ kĩ bakɛna boe basate bɛkpa be tɛmaniɛ a kĩ bɛnɛɛ a. 5Lɛmɛ ayekĩ bɔwɛ kĩ kalɛ wĩ a ɔnɔkɔali a ɛdza pintii kɛkpa mi sũ ni, bɔtákpa be osi kɔlaa.
6Lɛmɛ bati a kĩ badã ndɛ be nyɛ lɔtɔ banyanɛ a tákpa yĩ kɔdɛ kudima. Lɛmɛ ntɛ bɛnyɛ bati titiliwu badi malo ni, yĩ kɔ̃ ntsɛ́la, kitonɛkĩ Baguma ládã oti anɛ. Mbuki malɛ kĩ lɔtɔ banyanɛ a tákpa yĩ kɔdɛ vɔɛ̃ kudima. 7Mbom bɛmɔ́ kĩ adzuma a kĩ Baguma do yĩ nɛ awɛ nyɛ kĩ nde lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ nkpã bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a, ndɛ ayekĩ edo ye nɛ Petro lɛmɛ awɛ kĩ ede lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ ɛkpa Yudafɔ a. 8Kitonɛkĩ fɔtsã Baguma kɔbɛ̃ akũ, bɛkɛna yĩ fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ bɛkpa bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ ndɛ ayekĩ bɛkɛna Petro fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ bɛkpa Yudafɔ a. 9Yakobo, mɔ Petro mɔ Yohanes, kĩ bɛkɛna ndɛ lɔtɔ banyanɛ a mɔ́ biyi ɔsũ kĩ Baguma lido yĩ adzuma pɔtii kĩĩ nɛ awɛ. Foesũ bigua bɔmɔ́ Barnaba bɛkɔa bɛtsa kĩ boe flee bɔnyɛ adzuma mɔa bakɛnanɛ. Bɔkɛna onukpɛ̃ mɔa kĩ bɔmɔ́ Barnaba bɔ́akɛna adzuma nɛ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a kamɛ, lɔkɔa be malo bɛkɛna adzuma nɛ Yudafɔ a kamɛ. 10Lɛtsa a kĩ bivia bitomɛna boe sɛkɛ̃ nyɛ kĩ bute anɛ nɛ batɛ badonɛ ahiãfɔ a akũ, kĩ fɔnyɛ lɛtsa titiliwu a kĩ fɔasĩ yĩ akũ kĩ nkɛna.
Paulo Yidza Ɛdza Nɛ Petro Akũ Nɛ Antiokia.
11Lɛmɛ kĩ Petro ya nɛ Antiokia a, ĩyidza ndza nɛ ye akũ nɛ kanade, kitonɛkĩ ɛkɛna lɛtsa kĩ lɛtáfɛta. 12Fɔmɔ batɔ a kĩ Yakobo do a ayawo awã ni, Petro kado awɛ kanya mɔ batɛ badonɛ a kĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a. Lɛmɛ kĩ bati a ya liti a, Petro vɛlɛ ye akũ nɛ be akũ, esĩ kanya mɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a, kitonɛkĩ evila be a kĩ batsa kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ oti ɛtsua lɛkpati a. 13Yudafɔ batɛ badonɛ bɛbã a do kakɛna awɛ ndɛ babelibe bitomɔ Petro nɛ liti, ade Barnaba malo fɔ̃ libe lɛkɛnana kĩĩ nya ye akũ a.
14Lɛmɛ kĩ mmɔ́ kĩ bɛtsɛ́ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali Kalɛ Wĩ a osi kpĩĩ akũ ni, mbi Petro nɛ bati a flee anɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ nɔ a kĩ ɔnyɛ Yudani, odzi nkpã ndɛ oti kĩ ɛnyɛ́ Yudani a ni, nde sũ mɔ finyaakĩĩ kɔ̃ ahɛ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a kĩ bidzi ndɛ Yudafɔ aye?”
Yudafɔ Mɔ Bikĩ Bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ Na Nkpã Katɛ Bɛtsãmɛna Katɛkado Kamɛ.
15Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, Yudafɔ bɔanɛ kito nɛ kama kamɛ, ade ke nnɛ́ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ a bɔanɛ. 16Lɛmɛ bunyina kĩ nnɛ́ oti a kĩ yakɛna nɛ mbla a akũ nyɛ oti kĩ ɛkpɔla nɛ Baguma anɛ, mbom oti kĩ ɛtɛ Kristo edo. Boe malo bɔtɛ Kristo Yesu budo, ayekĩ bɔ́akpɔla nɛ Baguma anɛ kĩ bɔtɛ Kristo budo sũ, lɛmɛ nnɛ́ nɛ mbla akũ kakɛna sũ. Kitonɛkĩ odima lɛláakpɔla nɛ Baguma anɛ, nɛ ayekĩ yakɛna nɛ mbla a akũ sũ.
17Foesũ ntɛ bɔabɔa mbɔdi kĩ bɔakɛna bati kĩ bɛkpalɛ nɛ Baguma anɛ nɛ boe ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo sũ, mɔ bɛmɔ́ kĩ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ bɔanɛ ndɛ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a aye ni, katsa fɔatsa kĩ Kristo lɛmɛ tomɔ tɔkpa liti? Oowo, fɔlá lɔmɔ! 18Ntɛ mbuki madzɛla mbla a akũ kakɛna a kĩ nfɔnɛ awɛ a ni, ke kɔ̃ ĩnyɛ yĩ akũ kanya ndɛ odi kĩ yaádi mbla a akũ. 19Nɛ mbla a onukpɛ̃ ni, nku nkpa mbla a, ayekĩ maadzi nkpã nkpa Baguma. 20Bɛbɔa bɔmɔ́ Kristo nɛ asendua akũ. Foesũ finyaa ni, nnɛ́ yĩ mɔawɛ a ndzi nkpã, mbom Kristo dzi nkpã nɛ yĩ kamɛ. Nkpã a kĩ ndzi finyaa nɛ sukɛna kamɛ a, ndzi ye nɛ Baguma Obi a kĩ yawɛ yĩ kalɛ, ɛkɔa ye akũ ɛbɔa afɔliɛ nɛ yĩ lɔlɔ a nɛ katɛkado kamɛ. 21Maáwɛ kĩ masĩ Baguma kɔnyakamɔ a. Lɛmɛ ntɛ oti akpɔla nɛ Baguma anɛ nɛ ayekĩ ɛkɛna nɛ mbla akũ sũ ni, kekɔ̃ fɔatsa kĩ Kristo ku pupulidza!

Title: GALATIAFƆ 3
Content:
Míakɛna Nɛ Mbla a Akũ Mbɔɛɛ Kĩ Míatɛ Kristo Mido?
1Mi Galatiafɔ kĩ minyína kadi! Owei koũ libula mi lɔlɔ kamɛ kade lɔmɔ? Mi mɔawɛ anɛ kamɛ bɛnyɛ bɛtsa mi yededeede ayekĩ bɛbɔa Yesu Kristo nɛ asendua akũ a! 2Mikpa yĩ kalɛ mɔa kĩĩ mbuayɛ. Baguma Hũhũ a kĩ mitɛ a ni, mbla a akũ mikɛna sũ, mbɔɛɛ kĩ Kalɛ Wĩ a mitse, mitɛ mido sũ mitɛ Hũhũ a? 3Nde mitɛnɛ kadzimbi lɔmɔ! Mikɔa Baguma Hũhũ a miyi adzuma kayɔ a ni, finyaakɔ̃ miawɛ kĩ miwũna ye mɔ miawɛ kɔbɛ̃? 4Mbɔɛɛ fɔtsa flee a kĩ foe kamɛ mitsã mitɛ̃ a dani fɔtsa pupulidza? Fɔláanya fɔtsa pupulidza da! 5Ayekĩ miakɛna nɛ mbla a akũ sũ Baguma kpa mi Hũhũ yakɛna awãwã fɔtsa nɛ mi kamɛ, mbɔɛɛ nɛ ayekĩ mitse Baguma fɔlɛtsa a mitɛ foe mido sũ?
6Midã Abraham kadzi kamɛ. Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Abraham tɛ Baguma edo, ade nɛ ye katɛkado sũ Baguma tɛ ye ndɛ oti kĩ ɛkpɔla.” 7Foesũ kɛnɛ kĩ mianyi kĩ bati kĩ bɛtɛ bido nyɛ Abraham babi mɔ bawa. 8Bɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ biyi kĩ Baguma aakɛna bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a bati kpĩĩ nɛ be katɛkado sũ. Ade foesũ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a bi Abraham Kalɛ Wĩ a kɔkɔɛ eyi kĩ, “Baguma aatsã nɔ akũ ehila katinya kamɛ fude flee.” 9Abraham tɛ edo ade Baguma hila ye a. Foesũ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ edo ni, Baguma ahila ye ndɛ Abraham aye.
10Lɛmɛ bati a kĩ bipi mbla a akũ kakɛna bido mɔ akũ ni, bidum be, kitonɛkĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaákɛna nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ lideĩ nɛ mbla a kamɛ ni, Baguma dumu ye!” 11Nɛ foesũ finyaa foe kamɛ kpalɛ kĩ odima lɛláapuli ɛkɛna oti kpĩĩ nɛ Baguma anɛ nɛ mbla a akũ kakɛna sũ. Kitonɛkĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Oti a kĩ ɛtsã katɛkado kamɛ ɛkɛna oti kpĩĩ nɛ Baguma anɛ a, odi aadzi nkpã.” 12Lɛmɛ mbla a lɛtsɛ́la oti katɛkado akũ. Mbom Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna nɛ mbla a flee akũ ni, yaatsã foe kamɛ edzi nkpã.”
13Kĩ Kristo yadani fudumutsa nɛ boe lɔlɔ sũ ni, ɛnyɛ boe etomɛna mbla kadumu a kamɛ. Kitonɛkĩ bɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ kĩ, “Odi nyɛ odi kĩ bɛvɛla ye nɛ asendua akũ ni, Baguma dumu ye.” 14Kristo kɛna fukĩĩ ayekĩ Baguma nhila a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi ɛkpa Abraham a aata mɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a, ade fɔtsãmɛna Kristo Yesu akũ, bɔ́atsã katɛkado kamɛ bɔtɛ Hũhũ a kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi a.
Ntsitsemu Deĩ Nɛ Mose Mbla a Mɔ Baguma Nhihiɛ a Kayite.
15Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mawɛ kĩ makpa mi kadzi kamɛ nfantuhũ adi. Ntɛ bati nviã kɛna nhihiɛ adi, mɔ bɛtsɛlɛ ovoli bido awɛ nɛ kayɔ ni, odima lɛláapuli ɛnyɛ lɛtsama ĩye ɛkɔa lɛtsa bɛbã ebu. 16Mite anɛ kĩ Abraham mɔ ye obi Baguma kɛna nhihiɛ ɛkpa. Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a tálɛ kĩ, “Abraham babi” kĩ fɔatsa kĩ bati beblebee, mbom ɛlɛ kĩ, “obi” kĩ fɔatsa kĩ oti mɔapɛ. Ade oti kĩĩ nyɛ Kristo a. 17Lɛtsa a kĩ matsa nyɛ kĩ Baguma kɛna nhihiɛ ɛkpa Abraham mɔ ye obi, ade eke otse kĩ yaakɛna nɛ ye akũ a. Foesũ mbla a kĩ Baguma kpa Mose nɛ futeli ɔha ɛna mɔ foe taalɛ liti a, lɛláapuli ɛdani ĩye ɛwɔla Baguma nhihiɛ a. 18Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ Baguma futetsa a tsã mbla akũ ni, kekɔ̃ fubuki fɔtsɛ́ ye nhihiɛ a akũ. Lɛmɛ Baguma mɔawɛ nhihiɛ yanɛ sũ ɛkɔa futetsa a ɛkpa Abraham.
19Kekɔ̃, litsa sũ bɛkɛna mbla a? Bɛkɛna mbla a bibu ayekĩ oti aamɔ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛnyɛ tɔkpa, ade fɔwaa kɛnaawo lɔkɔ a kĩ Abraham obi a kĩ bɛkpa nhihiɛ a aaya. Baguma ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ lɛkɔa mbla a bɛma oti a kĩ edeĩ nɛ bati mɔ Baguma kayite. 20Lɛmɛ kayite ɔnanɛ tásĩ ntɛ fɔnyɛ kĩ oti mɔapɛ akɛna nhihiɛ, ade Baguma mɔapɛ yanɛ a.
Lɛtsa Sũ Kĩ Bɛkpa Mbla a.
21Katsa fukĩĩ atsa kĩ mbla a tia Baguma nhihiɛ a? Oowo. Fɔlá lɔmɔ! Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ batidziwa tɛ mbla adi kĩ yaapuli ɛkpa oti nkpã ni, kufɛ odi nyɛ odi aapuli ɛkɛna oti kpĩĩ nɛ Baguma anɛ, ntɛ ɛkɛna nɛ ye akũ. 22Lɛmɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ katinya kamɛ flee deĩ nɛ tɔkpa kɔbɛ̃ kayɔ, foesũ futetsa a kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi nɛ Yesu Kristo katɛkado kamɛ a waa fɔkpa bikĩ bɛtɛ bido.
23Lɛmɛ fɔmɔ Kristo katɛkado ya ni, mbla a pili boe flee edo nɛ kɔla ndɛ kɔla bawanɛ aye, kɛnawo lɔkɔ a kĩ baanyɛ Kristo katɛkado kĩĩ kanya. 24Foesũ mbla a lɛkadãmɛna boe akũ kɛnawo kĩ Kristo ya, ayekĩ fɔ́atsã boe katɛkado kamɛ bɛkɛna boe bati kpĩĩ nɛ Baguma anɛ. 25Finyaakĩĩ, kĩ katɛkado a yawo boe kamɛ a, mbla a buki ɛnyɛ́ boe ɔdãmɛnanɛ.
26Ayekĩ mi flee mitɛ Kristo Yesu mido sũ ni, mi flee midani Baguma babi. 27Mi a kĩ bɛwɔla mi mui, kĩ mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo a, mido Kristo ndɛ atadiɛ aye. 28Nɛ foesũ ntsitsemu adima buki ɛláa Yudafɔ mɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ kayite, mɔ basate ĩye bikĩ bidzi be akũ akũ, mɔ batsole ĩye banyole, mbom mi flee mikɛna ɔmɔa nɛ Kristo Yesu kamɛ. 29Ntɛ minyɛ Kristo bade ni, kekɔ̃ minyɛ Abraham babi mɔ bawa, ade míakɛna fɔtsa a kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi a banyanɛ a.

Title: GALATIAFƆ 4
Content:
1Lɛmɛ lɛtsa a kĩ matsa nyɛ kĩ obinyole a kĩ ɛtábo tɔ̃ anɛ kĩ yaanya ɔlɛga adzapadiɛ ni, babu ye ndɛ ɔsate aye, titɔ kĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa nyɛ ye fude malo. 2Lɔkɔ a kĩ ɛnyɛ obisɛ̃ a, bati deĩ kĩ badãmɛna ye mɔ ye fɔtsa a akũ kanaawo lɔkɔ a kĩ ɔlɛga yi ɛkpa ye fɔtsa a katɛ. 3Ade ayea boe malo bɔna nɛ hũhũ kĩ yanya katinya kamɛ akũ kayɔ ndɛ basate aye, kɛyawo kĩ bubo anɛ nɛ hũhũ kɔbɛ̃ kamɛ. 4Lɛmɛ kĩ lɔkɔ wĩ a wo ɔtɔ a, Baguma do ye mɔawɛ Obi ɛya. Ɛya ndɛ otidziwa kĩ otsole ma aye, edzi nkpã nɛ Yudafɔ mbla a kayɔ. 5Baguma do ye kĩ ɛyaase kɔtɔ ɛnyɛ bikĩ bideĩ nɛ mbla a kayɔ, ayekĩ bɔ́adani bɔkɛna ye Baguma babi. 6Kĩ Baguma wɛ kĩ yatsa kĩ minyɛ ye babi sũ ni, ɛkɔa ye Obi Hũhũ a edo nɛ boe tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ. Hũhũ kĩĩ abɔa fɔwɔla kĩ, “Ao Nda!” 7Nɛ foesũ obuki ɔnyɛ́ ɔsate, mbom ɔnyɛ obi. Kĩ ɔnyɛ ye obi sũ ni, Baguma aakɔa lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ edeĩ ɛkpa ye babi a ɛkpa nɔ.
Galatiafɔ Fɔlɛtsa Kaha Paulo.
8Kɔkɔɛ a kĩ minyína Baguma a, minya basate mikpa fɔtsa kumɛkumɛ kĩ fɔnyɛ́ Baguma. 9Lɛmɛ finyaa kĩ minyina Baguma, ĩye maalɛ kĩ Baguma nyina mi a, nde sũ miawɛ kĩ miamuniki minaa hũhũ a kĩ ɛla kɔbɛ̃, kĩ ye akũ akɔ kɔnya a sɛkɛ̃? Nde sũ miawɛ kĩ miabuki mikɛna be basate? 10Minyɛ fuwi fudi, tidetɔ tidi, fɔkɔ́ fudi mɔ futeli fudi koũ miyi miakɛna tɛmaniɛ nɛ foe akũ. 11Mi fɔlɛtsa aha yĩ ɔwɔlɛ paa! Fɔakɛna ndɛ yĩ adzuma a kĩ nkɛna nɛ mi kamɛ a flee kɛna pupulidza.
12Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, make mi aduli kĩ midani mikɛna ndɛ yĩ aye, kitonɛkĩ yĩ malo nkɛna yĩ akũ ndɛ mi aye. Mitákɛna tɔkpa tidima nɛ yĩ akũ. 13Míate anɛ kĩ kĩ ĩnya lɔtɔ ĩyade lɛtsã nɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa a akũ nkpa mi a, nna nɛ fɔsɔ kamɛ. 14Lɛmɛ titɔ kĩ ayekĩ yĩ akũ na a nya sɔhuiɛ baũ fɔkpa mi malo ni, yĩ akũ tákɔ mi kɔwɛ̃ misĩ yĩ katɛ, mbom mitɛ yĩ ndɛ Baguma ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ aye, ĩye ndɛ ayekĩ míatɛ Kristo Yesu mɔawɛ a. 15Kawɔlɛ a kĩ mimɔ́ mɔ ɔmɛnɛ a kĩ mido nɛ yĩ akũ nɛ lɔkɔ a kamɛ a ni, nɛ ndia fudeĩ finyaa? Yĩ mɔawɛ maapuli nlɛ kĩ ntɛ kapuli míapuli kufɛ mibɔlɛ mi mɔawɛ banebi malo mikpa yĩ. 16Kadani ndani mi okesĩnɛ finyaa kɔ̃, nɛ ayekĩ mbi mi ɔnɔkɔali a sũ?
17Bati bɛbã kĩĩ a amɔ kawɔlɛ paa nɛ mi akũ, lɛmɛ baákɔna fɔtsa wĩ nɛ mi akũ. Lɛtsa a kĩ bawɛ nyɛ kĩ banyɛ mi nɛ yĩ akũ, ayekĩ míadani mimɔ́ kawɔlɛ nɛ be akũ ndɛ ayekĩ be malo bamɔ nɛ mi akũ a. 18Fɔnɛnɛ kĩ bati amɔ kawɔlɛ nɛ mi fɔtsa wĩ kakɛna akũ, ntɛ be botaɛ a nɛnɛ daa, nnɛ́ ntɛ ndeĩ nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ odi. 19Yĩ babi kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ! Mbuki manu kalɔɛ nɛ yĩ kamɛ ndɛ ayekĩ sɛmɛ api ɔmatsɔ̃ kakpa mi, kɛnaawo kĩ Kristo ɔbla a aatɛ mi kamɛ. 20Nwɛ kĩ mana nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ finyaakĩĩ kufɛ, ayekĩ maadɔla yĩ odo nɛ mi akũ ĩnyɛ ayekĩ mila a ntsa. Mi fɔlɛtsa aha yĩ ɔwɔlɛ paa!
Paulo Kɔa Hagar Mɔ Sara Ɛkpa Nfantuhũ.
21Mi a kĩ miawɛ kĩ mbla a ɛnya mi akũ a, mikpa yĩ kalɛ kĩĩ mbuayɛ. Mbɔɛɛ mitánu lɛtsa a kĩ mbla a lɛ a? 22Ɛlɛ kĩ Abraham ma babinyole nviã, ɔmɔa nyɛ ye ɔsatetsole a obi, ade ɔyade a nyɛ otsole a kĩ edzi ye akũ akũ a obi a. 23Bɛma ɔsate obinyole a ndɛ ayekĩ otidziwa ama obi aye, lɛmɛ obinyole a kĩ otsole a kĩ edzi ye akũ akũ a ma a kɔ̃ ni, bɛma ye bɛtsãmɛna nɛ Baguma kalɛ kayi a onukpɛ̃.
24Fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ nyɛ nfantuhũ. Batsole nviã kĩĩ dzɛ̃ bɛkpa apam atsu nviã. Be kamɛ ɔmɔa a kĩ ɛnyɛ Hagar dzɛ̃ ɛkpa apam a kĩ bɛkɛna nɛ Sinai ɔtɔ a akũ a, ade ye babi a kĩ ɛma a nyɛ basate a. 25Hagar dzɛ̃ ɛkpa Sinai ɔtɔ nɛ Arabia tite akũ. Ade ye nyɛ nviã Yerusalem ɔmatɔ a, kitonɛkĩ ye mɔ ye bati a flee buki bideĩ nɛ tɛsate kamɛ. 26Lɛmɛ ode Yerusalem a nyɛ otsole a kĩ edzi ye akũ akũ a, ade ye nyɛ boe ɔma a. 27Kitonɛkĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ,
“Nɔ oduko, mɔ kawɔlɛ!
Bɔa fɔwɔla, kamɔ kawɔlɛ,
nɔ a kĩ ɔtámɔ tɔ̃ kama lubo.
Kitonɛkĩ otsole kĩ ɔnyɔ lɛtsɛ́la ye akũ a,
babi aapɔ bɛba otsole a kĩ ɔnyɔ deĩ nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ daa a bade.”
28Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, finyaa ni, mi malo minyɛ Baguma babi nɛ ye nhihiɛ a onukpɛ̃ ndɛ Isak aye. 29Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ ni, obinyole a kĩ bɛma ndɛ ayekĩ otidziwa ama obi kɛkɛ a yidza ɛdza nɛ ekĩ bɛma nɛ Baguma Hũhũ kamɛ a akũ. Ade aye fubuki fɔla nviã kĩĩ malo a. 30Lɛmɛ litsa Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ? Kɛlɛ kĩ, “Blɔmɛna ɔsatetsole a mɔ ye obinyole a bɛdzakũ, kitonɛkĩ ɔsate a obi a mɔ otsole a kĩ edzi ye akũ akũ obi lɛláasɛ̃ be ɔlɛga adzapadiɛ.” 31Nɛ foesũ, nwaɛ̃ amɛ, bɔnyɛ́ ɔsatetsole a babi, mbom otsole a kĩ edzi ye akũ akũ a babi bɔanɛ.

Title: GALATIAFƆ 5
Content:
Mipi Akũ Akũ Kadzi a Kĩ Mina a Kapi Wĩ.
1Akũ akũ kadzi Kristo awɛ kĩ bɔna ade foesũ ɛnyɛ boe a. Nɛ foesũ midza pintii ndɛ bati kĩ bidzi be akũ akũ aye, mitafɔ̃ bibuki bɛkɛna mi basate.
2Mitse fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ katse wĩ! Yĩ Paulo mabi mi kĩ ntɛ mifɔ̃ bitsua mi fɔkpati ni, fɔatsa kĩ Kristo buki ɛlá nfasɔ adima ɛkpa mi. 3Mbuki masipi kĩ ntɛ odi tunɔ bitsua ye lɛkpati ni, kɛnɛ kĩ ɛkɛna nɛ mbla a flee akũ. 4Mi a kĩ miawɛ kĩ miakɛna nɛ mbla a akũ lɔkɔa minya bati kĩ bɛkpɔla nɛ Baguma anɛ ni, minyɛ mi akũ nɛ Kristo akũ. Minɛ́ nɛ Baguma kɔnyakamɔ a kamɛ. 5Boe kɔ̃ ni, kĩ bɔtɛ budo Baguma Hũhũ a sũ ni, bɔna ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ kĩ Baguma aakɛna boe bati kĩ bɛkpɔla. 6Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ bɔkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo Yesu ni, lɛkpati katsua ĩye de katatsua távɛmɛna lɛtsama. Lɛtsa a kĩ lisĩ nyɛ kĩ bɔ́alɛ katɛkado a kĩ kakɛna adzuma nɛ ɔdɔ kamɛ.
7Mikabɔa mbɔdi paa kufɛ! Owei lisua mi osi kĩ mitakɛna nɛ ɔnɔkɔali osi a akũ? 8Nnɛ́ Baguma a kĩ ɛvɛ mi a lɛdani mi adzuni. 9Balɛ kĩ, “Fuyilatsa kabii bakɔa kado nɛ mbɔli kamɛ fɔmɔ yayila.” 10Lɛmɛ nɛ boe ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ boe Ɔlate sũ ni, matɛ kado kĩ miláabuki mitɛ oti bɛbã adzuni kɛba yĩ ade. Lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛlamɛna mi adzuni kadani a ni, nde eti ɛla o-o, Baguma aavɛlɛ ye sɔtɔ kokooko. 11Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, yĩ kɔ̃ ntɛ mbuki made lɛtsã kĩ lɛkpati katsua sĩ ni, nde sũ bati buki biyidza bɛdza nɛ yĩ akũ? Ntɛ fɔnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali ni, kekɔ̃ yĩ lɛtsã kade nɛ Kristo wuda nɛ asendua akũ a lɛláayamɛna ɔhau odima. 12Mawɛ kĩ bati a kĩ batutulu mi a bipi akũ bɛnaa lɔtɔ bɛnyɛ be akũ tɛsaɛ lɔkɔa kalɛ kiwoli!
13Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mi kɔ̃ bɛvɛ mi kĩ mina mi akũ akũ kadzi. Lɛmɛ mitafɔ̃ mi akũ akũ kadzi kĩĩ lɛkpa mi osi mikɛna sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kpa, mbom mikɔa ɔdɔ misum mi akũ akũ. 14Kitonɛkĩ mbla a ɔlɛdo flee nyɛ kĩ, “Wɛ nɔ ɔkɔba kalɛ ndɛ ayekĩ awɛ nɔ akũ a.” 15Lɛmɛ ntɛ miakɛna mi akũ awɔda ndɛ bayaɛ kpa aye ni, midã kadã wĩ, ntɛ nnɛ́ aye míawɔla akũ.
Ntsitsemu Deĩ Nɛ Baguma Hũhũ Mɔ Oti Kutidu Kayite.
16Lɛtsa a kĩ malɛ nyɛ kĩ mifɔ̃ Hũhũ a ɛkpã mi nɛ mi nkpã kadzi kamɛ, ayekĩ miláakɔa akũ mikpa sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kpa kakɛna. 17Kitonɛkĩ lɛtsa a kĩ oti kutidu awɛ a ayidza kadza nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ Hũhũ a awɛ a akũ. Ade lɛtsa a kĩ Hũhũ a awɛ a lɛmɛ ayidza kadza nɛ oti kutidu fɔwɛtsa a akũ a. Fɔtsa nviã kĩĩ akesĩ akũ, ade fɔatsa kĩ miláapuli mikɛna lɛtsa a kĩ miawɛ a. 18Foesũ ntɛ Hũhũ akpã mi ni, mibuki miláa mbla a kayɔ.
19Fɔtsa a kĩ oti kutidu akɛna a anɛ kawa yedede. Ade foe nyɛ litsolewɛ mɔ linyolewɛ, fɔtsa a kĩ fɔado akũ efĩĩ, kɔkɔbato, 20baviɔ̃ kasum, mɔ kabɔ katsɔ. Fɔbɛbã nyɛ likesĩ, ɔdzɛ kakɛna, anɛngbã, kalɔkpa kana, yĩ odi fude kalɛ, bati kayalɛ mɔ kasɛ̃ nɛ kutsu kutsu kamɛ, 21lineke kanɔ, bavɛ kawuga, kawɔlɛ kamɔ mɔ kuto kpa katɛ̃ ɔbɛ̃, mɔ fɔtsa bɛbã ndɛ fukĩĩ bamɛ. Mbuki madɛ mi finyaa ndɛ ayekĩ ĩnya lɔtɔ ndɛ mi a, kĩ bikĩ bakɛna fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ odu a lɛláanaa Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kamɛ.
22Lɛmɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔanɛ kato Hũhũ a kamɛ nyɛ ɔdɔ, kawɔlɛ, lukudɔ, ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ, sɛmɛkalɛ, tuwĩ kakɛna, fɔtsa kakɛna nɛ osi wĩ akũ, 23akũ kadɔla mɔ akũ akũ kanya. Mbla adima lɛláa kĩ etia fukĩĩ flee kamɛ fudima. 24Bati a kĩ bɛnyɛ Kristo Yesu bade a, kɔa be sukɛna bɛbɔa bɛmɛna nɛ asendua akũ, mɔ sɛ fɔwɛtsa mɔ ɔbla kpa flee. 25Ntɛ Hũhũ a akpã boe ni, kekɔ̃ mifɔ̃ ye ɛkpã boe nɛ boe kadzi kamɛ. 26Mitafɔ̃ bɔdɛla akũ nɛ ode, ĩye budo akũ kalɔkpa, ĩye bɔna anɛngbã nɛ boe akũ akũ.

Title: GALATIAFƆ 6
Content:
Mibumɔ Mi Akũ Akũ Nɛ Ɔhau Kamɛ.
1Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ntɛ mi kamɛ odi kɛna tɔkpa tidi ni, mi a kĩ Baguma Hũhũ a deĩ nɛ mi kamɛ a, mikɔa ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ midɛ ye ɛdani ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ. Midã mi mɔawɛ a akũ kadã wĩ ayekĩ mi malo bɛláasɔ mi bɛdã. 2Mibumɛna akũ akũ nɛ ɔhau adi nyɛ adi kamɛ, lɔkɔa nɛ osi kĩĩ akũ ni, míakɛna nɛ Kristo mbla a akũ. 3Ntɛ odi abu ye akũ kĩ ɛnyɛ oti odi odu lɛmɛ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ɛnyɛ́ lɛtsama a, ye odi akũ yakɛ. 4Odi nyɛ odi ɛdzɛmɔ ye mɔawɛ akũ ɛdã. Ntɛ fɔnɛnɛ ni, owula aapuli epia nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ ɛkɛna a akũ, kɛtánɛ kĩ yakɔa ye fɔkɛlatsa ɛkɔna mɔ oti bɛbã fude. 5Kitonɛkĩ odi nyɛ odi aalɔ ye mɔawɛ fɔlɔtsa.
6Ntɛ batsa odi Kristo fɔlɛtsa a ni, kɛnɛ kĩ oti a ɛkpa ye fɔtsa ɔtsanɛ a ye fɔtsa wĩ flee a kĩ edeĩ a fudi.
7Mitakɛ mi akũ, kitonɛkĩ odima lɛmɛ lɛláapuli ebu Baguma tɛkɔasia. Lɛtsa a kĩ oti du a, ade foe mɔapɛ a yaana a.
8Ntɛ edu fɔtsa nɛ sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kamɛ ni, lɛtsa a kĩ yaana etomɛna foe kamɛ nyɛ wuda. Lɛmɛ ntɛ edu fɔtsa nɛ Hũhũ a fɔwɛtsa kamɛ ni, yaana nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a etomɛna ye kamɛ. 9Mitafɔ̃ akpɔ liveli boe nɛ tuwĩ kakɛna kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ ntɛ akpɔ táveli boe ni, lɔkɔ aaya kĩ bɔ́ana foe akũ nfasɔ. 10Nɛ foesũ kĩ lɔkɔ buki lideĩ lɛkpa boe sũ ni, mifɔ̃ bɔkɛna tuwĩ bɔkpa odi nyɛ odi, titiliwu bikĩ bɔmɔ́ be bɛkɛna ɔmɔa nɛ Kristo katɛkado kamɛ a.
Paulo Kɔdɛ Mɔ Kawɔ̃na Nkaɛ.
11Midã ayekĩ yĩ mɔawɛ nkɔa katsɛlɛ baũ baũ matsɛlɛ mi ovoli finyaa!
12Bati a kĩ bawɛ kĩ bahɛ mi mitsua fɔkpati a nyɛ bikĩ bata akũ, kawɛ kĩ bawo bati anɛ. Lɛtsa a sũ kĩ bakɛna fukĩĩ nyɛ kĩ bɛtáwɛ kĩ bana liti katomɛna nɛ Kristo wuda nɛ asendua akũ a. 13Bati a kĩ batsua fɔkpati a malo lákɛna nɛ mbla a akũ. Bawɛ kĩ mitsua fɔkpati ayekĩ baapuli bipia kĩ miakɛna nɛ be amaniɛ akũ. 14Lɛmɛ yĩ kɔ̃ ni, maapia nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo wuda nɛ asendua akũ a odi akũ. Kitonɛkĩ fɔtsã Kristo wuda kamɛ ni, bɛbɔa katinya kamɛ nɛ asendua akũ bɛkpa yĩ, ade nɛ Kristo wuda kamɛ lɛmɛ fɔtsã bɛbɔa yĩ malo nɛ asendua akũ bɛkpa katinya kamɛ. 15Ntɛ bitsua odi lɛkpati ĩye bɛtátsua ye ni, fɔnyɛ́ lɛtsama. Lɛtsa a kĩ lisĩ nyɛ kĩ oti a dani ɛkɛna oti vɔɛ̃. 16Baguma ɛmɔ bati a kĩ bitomɔ osi kĩĩ nɛ be nkpã kamɛ a kɔnya, ɛkpa be lukudɔ lɛmɛ. Ɛkɛna foe lɔmɔ lɛmɛ ɛkpa Baguma bati a flee.
17Kito finyaa kanaa ni, odima ɛtabuki ɛkpa yĩ ɔhau odima, kitonɛkĩ fuloi nɛ yĩ akũ a atsa kĩ ĩnyɛ Yesu ɔsate.
18Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo ɛmɔ mi hũhũ flee kɔnya. Fɔya lɔmɔ.

Title: EFESOFƆ 1
Content:
1Yĩ Paulo kĩ ĩyadani Kristo Yesu fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ nɛ Baguma kawɛ onukpɛ̃, lɛtsɛlɛ ovoli kĩĩ mamɛna mi Baguma bati nɛ Efeso a kĩ miadi ɔnɔkɔali nɛ mi kadzi kamɛ, mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo Yesu a. 2Baguma boe Ɔlɛga, mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo bɛmɔ mi kɔnya bɛkpa mi lukudɔ lɛmɛ.
Baguma Hila Bati a Kĩ Bɛkɛna Ɔmɔa Mɔ Kristo a.
3Mifɔ̃ bɔnyɛ Baguma boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo Ɔlɛga a kɔlɛ, kitonɛkĩ nɛ ayekĩ bɔkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo sũ ni, ɛkpa boe hũhũ kamɛ nhila adi nyɛ adi kĩ edeĩ nɛ ode katinya a kamɛ a. 4Fɔmɔ Baguma labɔa katinya malo ni, ɛpau boe eyi kɔkɔɛ kĩ bɔ́anya ye bade fɔtsã ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo akũ, ayekĩ bɔ́akɛna bati kpalɛwa kĩ nfumusu adima lɛláa be akũ nɛ ye anɛ. 5Ayekĩ Baguma awɛ boe kalɛ sũ ni, ehihiɛ kɔkɔɛ kĩ fɔ́atsã Kristo akũ yaakɛna boe ye babi. Ade fukĩĩ koũ nyɛ ye kakɔna mɔ kawɔlɛ a. 6Nɛ foesũ mifɔ̃ bumu Baguma, nɛ kɔnya baũ a kĩ ɛmɔ boe faa ɛtsãmɛna ye Obi kĩ yaátunɔ kalɛ a akũ! 7-8Kitonɛkĩ fɔtsã Kristo babɔanɛ kawula kamɛ sũ ni, bɔna katɛ, ade foe nyɛ kĩ Baguma kɔa boe tɔkpa ete boe. Midã ayekĩ Baguma kɔnya a kĩ ɛmɔ́ boe, ɛkpa boe nyansã mɔ fɔtsa kayɔkanu a pɔnɛ! 9Baguma fɔ̃ bunyi nhihiɛ a kĩ ɛkɛna ɛkɔla eyi anɛ kɔkɔɛ, kĩ yaawũna ɛtsãmɛna Kristo akũ a. 10Nhihiɛ a nyɛ kĩ ntɛ lɔkɔ a wo ɔtɔ ni, Baguma aakpɔta lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ ɛbɔa nɛ tite mɔ ode a ɛkɔa edo nɛ Kristo kayɔ.
11Baguma fɔ̃ bɛkɛna lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa nɛ ye kawɛ mɔ nhihiɛ onukpɛ̃. Ade ɛpau boe kĩ bɔnya ye mɔawɛ bati nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo kamɛ, nɛ ye kawɛ mɔ kalɛkayi, nɛ kayɔkayi a onukpɛ̃. 12Nɛ foesũ mifɔ̃ boe a kĩ bɔnya lɔtɔ bɔadã Kristo anɛ a, bumu Baguma kukũkpalɛ a. 13Ade mi malo, kĩ minu ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a kĩ kɛnyɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a, kĩ kɛma mi nkpã katɛ a, midani Baguma bati. Ayekĩ mitɛ Kristo mido sũ ni, Baguma kɔa Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi a eyi mi ɔsũ kĩ minya ye bade. 14Hũhũ Kpalɛwa kĩĩ nyɛ kasipi kĩ bɔ́atɛ lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi ɛkpa ye bati a. Kasipi kĩĩ akpa boe anɛ kate kĩ Baguma aakpa bati a kĩ bɛnyɛ ye bade a akũ akũ kadzi. Mifɔ̃ bumu ye kukũkpalɛ a!
Mpaɛ Kĩ Paulo Bɔa.
15Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ, kito anɛ kĩ nnu kĩ mitɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu mido, miawɛ Baguma bati a flee kalɛ a, 16ntáfɔ̃ Baguma kɔlɛ kanyɛ nɛ mi lɔlɔ. Mate anɛ nɛ mi akũ nɛ yĩ mpaɛbɔ kamɛ, 17ade mawã Baguma, boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo Ɔlɛga, kĩ ɛnyɛ kukũkpalɛ flee a, kĩ ɛkpa mi Hũhũ a kĩ yaakpa mi nyansã, ɛnyɛ Baguma ɛtsa mi ayekĩ míanyi ye kanyi wĩ.
18Make Baguma aduli kĩ ebinya mi anɛ mipuli mimɔ ye ɔhaĩ a, ayekĩ míanyi lɛtsa a kĩ de akũ ɛvɛ mi ɛkpa kĩ midã anɛ a. Ye awãwã nhila a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi kĩ yaakpa ye bati a kĩ bɛkpalɛ be akũ a atɛ kɔya paa. 19Midã ayekĩ ye kɔbɛ̃ kpale a akɛna adzuma nɛ boe a kĩ bɔtɛ ye budo a kamɛ. Kɔbɛ̃ kĩĩ kĩ kɔakɛna adzuma nɛ boe kamɛ a, 20ketimɔ kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ Baguma kɔa ɛdzɛla Kristo etomɛna kanɔkpa, ɛkɔa ye edzina nɛ ye sɔmɔna nɛ ode flee a. 21Ade awã Kristo anya lɛgã nɛ ode fɔgã flee, bati kĩ bideĩ otumi flee, bati kĩ bideĩ kɔbɛ̃ flee mɔ balate flee akũ a. Ye lɛgã kadzakɔ̃ bɛ̃ lɛgã nyɛ lɛgã kadzakɔ̃ nɛ katinya kĩĩ mɔ kikĩ kaaya a kamɛ. 22Baguma kɔa lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa edo nɛ Kristo abɔa kayɔ ade ɛkɔa ye ɛkpa asɔli a ndɛ ye lɔlɔ nɛ fɔtsa flee kamɛ a. 23Asɔli kĩĩ nyɛ Kristo sukɛna, kĩ sɛfɔ̃ asɔli a kpɔla, ade Kristo mɔawɛ lɛmɛ afɔ̃ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa akpɔla nɛ kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ a.

Title: EFESOFƆ 2
Content:
Bɔtsã Kristo Akũ Bɔna Nkpã.
1Kɔkɔɛ a, nɛ mi atɔ ɔsĩ mɔ tɔkpa sũ ni, miku nɛ hũhũ kamɛ. 2Nɛ lɔkɔ na kamɛ a, midzi nkpã nɛ katinya kamɛ tisi akũ. Mikɔa akũ mikpa kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ kɔanya lɛgã nɛ ɔwɛ kamɛ hũhũ a akũ a. Ade koe nyɛ hũhũ a kĩ finyaa yakɛna adzuma nɛ bati a kĩ baátse Baguma ɔlɛdo a kamɛ a. 3Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, boe flee bɔna ndɛ be, budzi nkpã nɛ boe sukɛna fɔwɛtsa onukpɛ̃, bɔkakɛna fɔtsa a kĩ boe sukɛna mɔ adzuni awɛ a. Nɛ katinya kamɛ ɔbla kpa a kĩ edeĩ nɛ boe kamɛ sũ ni, Baguma na kalɔkpa nɛ boe akũ ndɛ ayekĩ ɛna nɛ batidziwa kasinu flee a akũ a. 4Lɛmɛ kĩ Baguma deĩ kɔnyakamɔ, mɔ ɔdɔ baũ ɛkpa boe sũ ni, 5titɔ kĩ boe tɔkpa fɔ̃ buku nɛ hũhũ kamɛ malo a, ɛfɔ̃ bɔna nkpã nɛ Kristo kamɛ. Baguma sɛmɛkalɛ odi sũ mina nkpã katɛ. 6Ayekĩ bɔkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Yesu Kristo sũ ni, Baguma dzɛla boe mɔ ye etomɛna kanɔkpa kĩ bɔnya lɛgã mɔ ye nɛ ode. 7Baguma kɛna fukĩĩ kĩ yanyɛ ye sɛmɛkalɛ baũ a kĩ edeĩ ɛkpa boe nɛ lɔkɔ flee kamɛ a, nɛ ayekĩ edeĩ ɔdɔ ɛkpa boe nɛ Kristo sũ a. 8-9Baguma sɛmɛkalɛ odi, mɔ mi katɛkado akũ fɔtsã sũ mina katɛ. Nnɛ́ mi mɔawɛ mbɔdi kabɔa kamɛ futo, mbom Baguma futetsa fɔanɛ kĩ odima lɛláapuli ɛkɔa foe epia. 10Baguma lɛbɔa boe mɔ ye mɔawɛ awɛ, kĩ bɔkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo Yesu, budzi nkpã bɔkɛna adzuma wĩ a kĩ ye mɔawɛ a ɛkɔa eyi kĩ bɔyaakɛna a.
Batɛ Badonɛ a Flee Kɛna Ɔmɔa Mɔ Kristo.
11Mite anɛ kĩ kɔkɔɛ a, nnɛ́ Yudafɔ babi mianɛ. Yudafɔ a kĩ bitsua fɔkpati a avũna mi kĩ bati kĩ bɛtátsua fɔkpati. Lɛmɛ lɛkpati katsua nyɛ sukɛna katsua kɛkɛ, kĩ otidziwa lɛkɔa awɛ ɛkɛna foe. 12Mite anɛ kĩ nɛ lɔkɔ na kamɛ a, mina mɔ lugo nɛ Kristo sɛkɛ̃. Minya banɔvɔɛ̃ kĩ bɛtána nɛ bati a kĩ Baguma pau a kamɛ. Mitána nɛ apam a kĩ Baguma kɛna mɔ fɔtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi ɛkpa ye bati a kamɛ. Midzi nɛ katinya kamɛ kĩ mitána anɛ kate nɛ lɛtsama akũ, ade mitána Baguma adima a. 13Lɛmɛ finyaakĩĩ fɔtsã Kristo Yesu wuda kamɛ bɛkpã mi a kĩ mina mɔ lugo a mifuã miyakɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo.
14Kitonɛkĩ Kristo mɔawɛ a lɛkɔa lukudɔ ɛma boe, ɛkɛna bikĩ bɛnyɛ Yudafɔ mɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a ɔmɔa. Ɛkɔa ye mɔawɛ sukɛna ɛnyɛ likesĩ ndɛ seebi a nɛ be kayite. 15Ɛwɔla Yudafɔ mbla mɔ ye akũ tɛmaniɛ a, ayekĩ yaakpɔta bati kutsu nviã a bɛkɛna oti vɔɛ̃ mɔa mɔ ye, lɔkɔa lukudɔ lɛya. 16Kristo tsã ye wuda nɛ asendua akũ a kamɛ ɛwɔla likesĩ a kĩ lideĩ nɛ be kamɛ a. Eboomu fude nviã a, bɛkɛna ɔmɔa ade bɛdani bɛya nɛ Baguma sɛkɛ̃ a. 17Foesũ Kristo yade lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a lukudɔ akũ ɛkpa bati flee, bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a kĩ bɛna mɔ lugo nɛ Baguma sɛkɛ̃ a, mɔ Yudafɔ a kĩ bifuã Baguma a. 18Kristo akũ fɔtsã mɔ boe a kĩ bɔnyɛ Yudafɔ mɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a bɔ́apuli bɔtsã Hũhũ a akũ bɔya nɛ Ɔlɛga a sɛkɛ̃.
19Nɛ foesũ ni, mi a kĩ minyɛ́ Yudafɔ a mibuki minyɛ́ basitsãnɛ ĩye banɔvɔɛ̃, mbom finyaa mimɔ Baguma bati a midani kade mɔa bati mɔ Baguma kɔla babi. 20Bike mi malo mite nɛ seebi sɛyɔde a kĩ fɔtɔ banyanɛ mɔ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a ke a akũ, ade Kristo Yesu mɔawɛ nyɛ́ kɔla a akũ de titiliwu a. 21Ade ye pini kɔla akũ fɔtsa a flee ɛkpɔta a, kafɔ̃ kɔabo anɛ kakɛna ndɛ afɔliɛ kɔla kpalɛwa kakpa Baguma a. 22Nɛ mi ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo kamɛ a, bɛkɔa mi malo bibumɔ be nkaɛ a bake kɔla a kĩ Baguma aadzi nɛ Hũhũ kamɛ a.

Title: EFESOFƆ 3
Content:
Paulo Kɛna Adzuma Nɛ Bikĩ Bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a Kamɛ.
1Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ ni, yĩ, Paulo, kĩ bido nɛ kɔla nɛ Kristo Yesu mɔ mi a kĩ minyɛ́ Yudafɔ a sũ, mabɔa mpaɛ kakpa Baguma. 2Matɛ kado kĩ minu ayekĩ Baguma mɔ́ yĩ kɔnya, ɛkpa yĩ adzuma kĩĩ kĩ nkɛna nkpa mi kalɛ. 3Ndɛ ayekĩ ntsɛlɛ foe lukũ mma mi ĩyatɛ̃ a, Baguma nyɛ ye nhihiɛ a kĩ ɛkɛna ɛkɔla a ɛtsa yĩ. 4Ntɛ miakã ovoli a ni, míapuli mimɔ́ ayekĩ nnu Kristo fɔtsa kɔlawa a kayɔ. 5Nɛ kɔkɔɛ lɔkɔ a, Baguma tányɛ nhihiɛ kɔlawa kĩĩ ɛtsa batidziwa, lɛmɛ finyaa ni, Baguma nyɛ foe ɛtsa ɛtsãmɛna Hũhũ a akũ ɛkpa ye fɔtɔ banyanɛ kpalɛwa mɔ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a. 6Nhihiɛ kɔlawa a nyɛ kĩ fɔtsã Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a lɛmɛ kɛna ndɛ Yudafɔ aye. Bɛkɛna sukɛna mɔapɛ a bati, kĩ bɛna tsɛfã nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi ɛtsãmɛna Kristo Yesu akũ a kamɛ.
7Baguma tsã ye kɔbɛ̃ akũ ɛmɔ yĩ kɔnya ɛkɔa yĩ ɛkɛna Kalɛ Wĩ kĩĩ ɔsumunɛ. 8Titɔ kĩ ĩnyɛ obisɛ̃de kɔlaa nɛ Baguma bati a kamɛ malo ni, Baguma mɔ yĩ kɔnya kĩ nkɔa fɔtsa wĩ beblebee a kĩ fudeĩ nɛ Kristo kamɛ, kĩ fɔtɛ kɔya baũ lɛmɛ a nde lɛtsã nkpa bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a. 9Ade edo yĩ kĩ nfɔ̃ bati flee binyi ayekĩ Baguma nhihiɛ kɔlawa a aanɛ kanya ɛkɛna adzuma. Baguma kĩ ye nyɛ fɔtsa flee ɔbɔanɛ a, kɔa fɔtsa ɛkɔla anɛ kɔkɔɛ, 10ayekĩ nɛ finyaa lɔkɔ kamɛ, baatsã asɔli bati a akũ bɛnyɛ Baguma nyansã ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ a bɛtsa fɔgã mɔ otumifɔ a kĩ banya akũ nɛ ode katinya kamɛ a. 11Fukĩĩ nyɛ Baguma nhihiɛ kĩ ɛlá kawũna a kĩ ɛkɛna eyi anɛ kɔkɔɛ, ade fɔtsã boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo akũ fɔya nɛ foe kamɛ a. 12Ayekĩ bɔkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo, bɔtɛ ye budo lɛmɛ sũ ni, budeĩ ɔwɔlɛ kado kĩ bɔ́apuli bɔnaa Baguma anɛ faa. 13Nɛ foesũ make mi aduli, mitafɔ̃ akpɔ liveli mi nɛ lubo a kĩ mamɔ nɛ mi lɔlɔ a sũ, kitonɛkĩ foe flee fɔ́anya mi nfasɔ.
Ayekĩ Kristo Awɛ Boe Kalɛ.
14Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ ni, nke aduli mabɔa mpaɛ nɛ boe Ɔlɛga a, 15kĩ ɛla katete kadi nyɛ kadi nɛ tite mɔ ode anɛ. Ade ye ate ke dĩ lɛmɛ a. 16Mabaɔ mpaɛ kĩ Baguma ɛtsã ye Hũhũ akũ edo mi ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ kudeĩ nɛ ye kukũkpalɛ beblebee kamɛ a. 17Mabɔa mpaɛ kĩ mi katɛkado kɛfɔ̃ Kristo ɛna nɛ mi kamɛ. Mabɔa mpaɛ lɛmɛ kĩ midza pintii nɛ ɔdɔ kamɛ, 18ayekĩ mi mɔ Baguma bati a flee míana kɔbɛ̃ minu Kristo ɔdɔ a kadzɛlɛ mɔ ye lugo, ye kade mɔ kadzũ a kayɔ. 19Baguma ɛfɔ̃ miyaanyi Kristo ɔdɔ a, titɔ kĩ otidziwa lɛláapuli enu foe kayɔ dzununuunu eyua malo, ayekĩ Baguma kutidu a aatɛ mi kamɛ flee.
20Baguma a kĩ yapuli kakɛna fukĩ bɔavia a flee mɔ fukĩ bɔakɛna a, nɛ kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ kɔakɛna adzuma nɛ boe kamɛ a, 21ade ye kade nyɛ kamu nɛ asɔli bati a mɔ Kristo Yesu kamɛ, fɔnaa kasinu flee kamɛ, kito finyaakĩĩ kanaa daa daa! Fɔya lɔmɔ.

Title: EFESOFƆ 4
Content:
Bɔnyɛ Oti Mɔa Nɛ Kristo Kamɛ.
1Foesũ yĩ a kĩ nwaa kɔla nɛ ayekĩ masum boe Ɔlate sũ a, makpa mi kɔdɛ kĩ midzi nkpã a kĩ yaaketi mɔ ayekĩ Baguma vɛ mi kĩ midzi a. 2Midɔla mi akũ, minya bati dɔwa, mina ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ. Minyɛ mi ɔdɔ mitsa nɛ mi kamɛ nɛ ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ kana kamɛ. 3Nɛ ayekĩ mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Hũhũ a sũ ni, mibɔa mbɔdi mipi ɔmɔa kakɛna midomɔ akũ nɛ lukudɔ kamɛ. 4Sukɛna mɔapɛ mɔ Hũhũ mɔapɛ deĩ, ade ayea budeĩ kɔnɛte nɛ lɛtsa mɔapɛ a kĩ Baguma vɛ boe ɛkpa a akũ a. 5Ɔlate mɔapɛ mɔ katɛkado mɔapɛ deĩ, ade mui kawɔla mɔapɛ lɛmɛ deĩ a. 6Ade ayea budeĩ Baguma mɔapɛ, batidziwa flee Ɔlɛga kĩ ɛnyɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa Ɔlate a. Yakɛna adzuma katsãmɛna boe flee akũ, ade edeĩ nɛ boe flee kamɛ a.
7Boe kamɛ odi nyɛ odi tɛ futetsa pɔtii fudi kĩ fuketimɔ kɔnyakamɔ a kĩ Kristo kpa a. 8Ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ,
“Kĩ ede ɛnaa ode flee a, ɛkpã bati pii a kĩ bideĩ nɛ ndom kamɛ a ebumɔ ye akũ,
ɛsɛ̃ futetsa ɛkpa batidziwa.”
9Finyaa, kĩ bɛlɛ kĩ ede ɛnaa ode flee a ni, foe kayɔ nyɛ litsa? Foe kamɛ kpalɛ kĩ ɛnya lɔtɔ ɛka ɛnaa tite ɔda flee a. 10Foesũ oti a kĩ ɛka ɛnaa tite ɔda flee a, ade ye mɔapɛ a lide ɛnaa ode flee a, ayekĩ yaatɛ katinya flee a kamɛ. 11Ade ye lite batidziwa futetsa, ɛpau bati kĩ bɛnya fɔtɔ banyanɛ, babɛbã onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ, badi lɛtsã badenɛ, badi bɛnya batɛ badonɛ akũ badãmɛnanɛ mɔ fɔtsa batsanɛ. 12Ɛkɛna fukĩĩ ayekĩ yaalɔla Baguma bati a flee ɛkpa Kristo adzuma kakɛna, lɔkɔa bido Kristo sukɛna a kĩ sɛnyɛ asɔli bati a kɔbɛ̃. 13Foesũ boe flee bɔ́akɛna ɔmɔa nɛ boe katɛkado kamɛ, lɔkɔa bunyi Baguma Obi a lɛmɛ. Fɔ́afɔ̃ bubo anɛ buketi mɔ Kristo, bɔna ye kutitse flee a.
14Lɔkɔa bɔláabuki bɔnya ndɛ babisɛ̃ kĩ bavãlɛvã fɔtsa katsa vɔɛ̃ fudi nyɛ fudi abɔa be katomɛna katɛ̃mɛna ndɛ ɔwɛ aye, ade tɛdake bati akɛ be kado nɛ be adzuni tɔkpa kamɛ a. 15Nɛ foe kadokɔ̃ ni, ntɛ bɔalɛ ɔnɔkɔali nɛ ɔdɔ kamɛ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ bubo anɛ nɛ osi nyɛ osi akũ nɛ Kristo kĩ ɛnyɛ lɔlɔ a kamɛ. 16Ade ye pini sukɛna fɔtsakɔ̃ fɔtsakɔ̃ mɔ tisĩ fɔatsa mɔ akũ kakɛna adzuma a. Foesũ ntɛ sukɛna kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ akɛna se adzuma ndɛ ayekĩ kɛfɛta ni, oti mɔawɛ a abo anɛ kana ɔsĩ nɛ ɔdɔ kamɛ.
Nkpã Vɔɛ̃ Kadzi Nɛ Kristo Kamɛ.
17Foesũ mabi mi nɛ boe Ɔlate dĩ akũ kĩ mitabuki midzi nkpã ndɛ bati a kĩ binyína Baguma, kĩ be adzuni adã faa faa, 18ade be lɔlɔ kamɛ mɔ fɔlɛtsa kayɔkanu lɛmɛ deĩ nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ a. Ayekĩ binyína lɛtsama, bideĩ atɔ ɔsĩ lɛmɛ sũ ni, nkpã a kĩ bidzi a táketi mɔ nkpã a kĩ Baguma awɛ kĩ ye bati bidzi a. 19Bibuki bɛlá kɔnyɔã nɛ lɛtsama akũ, foesũ bɛkɔa be akũ bɛkpa tɔkpa mɔ fɔtsa kumɛkumɛ a kĩ fɔado akũ efĩĩ kakɛna.
20Midã, nnɛ́ fɔtsa kĩĩ odu mikɔlɛ nɛ Kristo akũ! 21Fɔnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kĩ minu Yesu nkã, ade ndɛ bati kĩ bitomɛna ye ni, bɛtsa mi ɔnɔkɔali a kĩ edeĩ nɛ ye kamɛ a. 22Foesũ mifɔnɛ mi ɔbla kpa kɔɛ a kĩ midzi mitɛ̃ a awɛ. Fɔwɛtsa kĩ fɔakɛ bati libula mi nkpã a kĩ midzi tɔ̃ a kade. 23Midani mi tɔwɔlɛ mɔ mi adzuni kamɛ fɔkɛna fɔtsa vɔɛ̃, 24mibɔa ɔbla vɔɛ̃ kĩ ɛla ndɛ Baguma kutidu a, kĩ yanyɛ akũ katsa nɛ nkpã wĩ kĩ ɛkpalɛ kamɛ a aye. Ɛna nɛ mi akũ ndɛ atadiɛ aye.
25Foesũ mifɔ̃ fɔvã kama! Kɛnɛ kĩ odi nyɛ odi edi ɔnɔkɔali ɛkpa ye ɔkɔba ɔtɛ odonɛ, kitonɛkĩ boe flee bɔnyɛ Kristo sukɛna a akũ sɛkɛ sidi. 26Ntɛ mina kalɔkpa ni, mitafɔ̃ kalɔkpa lɛfɔ̃ mikɛna tɔkpa, ade mitafɔ̃ kade lɛdɔ nɛ mi kalɔkpa a akũ. 27Mitakpa Abonsam osi odima. 28Oti a kĩ ɛkaye a ɛfɔ̃ kaye. Ɛkɔa awɛ ɛkɛna adzuma ayekĩ yaana ɛnya nɛ foe kamɛ, ete ahiãfɔ lɛmɛ fɔtsa.
29Mitafɔ̃ tuwuli kpa lɛnɛ nɛ mi onukpɛ̃, mbom milɛ tuwuli wĩ kĩ taabumɔ bati a kĩ batse mi nɛ lɔkɔ a odu kamɛ a, lɔkɔa fɔvɛlɛ nhila fɔma be. 30Mitakɛna lɛtsa a kĩ laawo Baguma Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a kalɔɛ, kitonɛkĩ Hũhũ a Baguma kɔa eyi mi ɔsũ, esipi kĩ Baguma aatɛ mi nɛ Luwi nkaɛ a akũ. 31Mifɔnɛ kako katɛ awɛ, minyɛ kalɔkpa mɔ likesĩ nɛ mi kamɛ. Ade ayea mifɔ̃ awũni mɔ bati buĩ kanyɛ, mɔ adzuni kpa kakɛna nɛ bati akũ a. 32Nɛ foe kadokɔ̃ ni, mikɛna sɛmɛ kalɛ mina ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ mikpa akũ. Mikɔa tɔkpa mite akũ ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma lɛmɛ kɔa ete mi ɛtsãmɛna Kristo akũ a.

Title: EFESOFƆ 5
Content:
Kɛnɛ Kĩ Bɔadzi Nɛ Ɔhaĩ a Kamɛ.
1Ayekĩ minyɛ Baguma babi kĩ yawɛ kalɛ sũ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ miabɔa mbɔdi mina ndɛ ye aye. 2Kɛnɛ kĩ ɔdɔ ɛnya mi kadzi kamɛ akũ ndɛ ayekĩ Kristo wɛ boe kalɛ, ɛkɔa ye akũ ɛkpa nɛ boe lɔlɔ ndɛ futetsa mɔ ɔlɛ̃ kĩ bɛkɔa bɛbɔa bɛkpa Baguma, fuwo ye anɛ.
3Nɛ ayekĩ minyɛ babi kĩ bɛkpalɛ be akũ sũ ni, kɛtáfɛta kĩ adɔpaa, efĩĩ fɔtsa mɔ anɛngbã lɛkɛnana anɛ nɛ mi kamɛ malo. 4Ade ayea kɛtánɛ kĩ mialɛ okendze tuwuli, tuwuli kĩ taálɛ katse, ĩye kĩ takɔ kɔnyɔã. Nɛ fukĩĩ kadokɔ̃ ni, mikaanyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ. 5Minu foe kayɔ kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yabɔa adɔpaa, yado ye akũ efĩĩ, mɔ edeĩ anɛngbã, kitonɛkĩ anɛngbã keti mɔ baviɔ̃ kasum a, ɛláana tsɛfã nɛ Kristo mɔ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kamɛ da.
6Mitafɔ̃ odima lɛkɔa tɔkɔsia tuwuli ɛkɛ mi, kitonɛkĩ ade foe bamɛ sũ Baguma sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ aaya nɛ bikĩ bideĩ atɔ ɔsĩ a akũ a. 7Foesũ mimɔ bati a na odu mitakɛna ɔmɔa.
8Kitonɛkĩ, mi mɔawɛ a mina nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ tɔ̃, lɛmɛ finyaa kĩ midani boe Ɔlate bati sũ ni, mideĩ nɛ ɔhaĩ kamɛ. Foesũ midzi nkpã ndɛ bati kĩ bideĩ nɛ ɔhaĩ kamɛ, 9kitonɛkĩ fɔtsa wĩ a kĩ nkpã kadzi nɛ ɔhaĩ kamɛ ayamɛna nyɛ tuwĩ kakɛna, kadzi nɛ osi kpĩĩ akũ mɔ ɔnɔkɔali kadi. 10Mibɔa mbɔdi mikɔlɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lawo boe Ɔlate a anɛ. 11Mitado akũ nɛ fɔtsa kpa a kĩ bati akɛna nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ a kamɛ, mbom minyɛ foe miwɛla, 12kitonɛkĩ fɔnyɛ kɔnyɔã kĩ balɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bakɛna nɛ kabɛla kamɛ a akũ malo. 13Ade ntɛ bɛnyɛ fɔtsa flee biko nɛ ɔhaĩ kamɛ ni, bamɔ foe kutidu kamɔ wĩ, 14kitonɛkĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ bɛnyɛ kanya ni, liwo nɛ ɔhaĩ kamɛ. Ade foesũ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ,
“Nyinya, nɔ kĩ ɔwaa tida a,
yidza kato kanɔkpa,
lɔkɔa Kristo ɔhaĩ a aako nɛ nɔ akũ.”
15Foesũ midã kadã wĩ nɛ ayekĩ midzi nkpã akũ. Mitadzi ndɛ bati kĩ binyína kadi, mbom midzi ndɛ anyansãfɔ aye. 16Mikɛna osi nyɛ osi kĩ mina finyaa akũ adzuma kakɛna wĩ, kitonɛkĩ budeĩ nɛ tɔkpa kakɛna fuwi kamɛ. 17Nɛ foesũ mitakɛna mi akũ badzimbifɔ, mbom mibɔa mbɔdi kĩ míanu lɛtsa a kĩ boe Ɔlate awɛ kĩ mikɛna a kayɔ. 18Mitamɔa bavɛ miwuga, kitonɛkĩ fɔafɔ̃ oti akɛna fɔtsa kpa, mbom mifɔ̃ Hũhũ a ɛtɛ mi kamɛ flee. 19Mikɔa fɔlɛtsa a kĩ fudeĩ nɛ Psalomo Ovoli, asɔli tɔnɔ mɔ hũhũ kamɛ tɔnɔ milɔmɛna mɔ akũ. Misã kamu tɔnɔ mɔ kawɔlɛ tɔnɔ mikpa boe Ɔlate nɛ mi tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ. 20Minyɛ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga kɔlɛ daa nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ, nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo dĩ akũ.
Batsɔ̃ Mɔ Banyɔ Bidzi Ndɛ Batɛ Badonɛ Aye.
21Ayekĩ miakɔa obu kakpa Kristo sũ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ miadɔla mi akũ mikpa akũ.
22Mi batsole kĩ bidzi fɔnyɔ, midɔla mi akũ mikpa mi banyɔ ndɛ ayekĩ miadɔla akũ kakpa boe Ɔlate a, 23kitonɛkĩ onyole nyɛ lɔlɔ ɛkpa ɔtsɔ̃ ndɛ ayekĩ Kristo lɛmɛ nyɛ asɔli a lɔlɔ. Asɔli bati a nyɛ Kristo sukɛna, ade Kristo mɔawɛ a nyɛ ye Ɔtɛnɛ a. 24Nɛ foesũ batsole bɛdɔla be akũ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ bɛkpa banyɔ, ndɛ ayekĩ asɔli bati a lɛmɛ adɔla be akũ kakpa Kristo a.
25Mi banyɔ, miwɛ mi batsɔ̃ kalɛ ndɛ ayekĩ Kristo wɛ asɔli bati a kalɛ, ɛkɔa ye nkpã ɛkpa nɛ ye lɔlɔ. 26Ɛkɛna fukĩĩ yakɔa ɛkpalɛ asɔli bati a akũ, nɛ kĩ ɛkɔa ye kalɛ ɛkpalɛ be akũ, ndɛ ayekĩ bawɔla oti mui a aye. 27Ɛwɛ kĩ asɔli bati a kĩ yaakɔa ɛkpa ye a akũ bɛkpalɛ yededeede, bɛlɛ kadã, ĩye tuduli, ĩye katsĩĩtsĩĩ, mɔ efĩĩ adima ɛtana nɛ be akũ.
28Ade ayea kɛnɛ kĩ banyole bɛwɛ be batsɔ̃ kalɛ ndɛ ayekĩ bawɛ be mɔawɛ sukɛna kalɛ a. Onyole kĩ yawɛ ɔtsɔ̃ kalɛ ni, ye mɔawɛ akũ ɛwɛ kalɛ. 29Odima lákesĩ ye mɔawɛ sukɛna, mbom yadɔɔla se, kadã se kadã wĩ, ndɛ ayekĩ Kristo lɛmɛ adãmɛna asɔli bati a akũ, 30kitonɛkĩ ye sukɛna a akũ fɔkɔ fudi bɔanɛ. 31Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ onyole aafɔnɛ ɔlɛga mɔ ɔma eyi ɛkɔa akũ ɛmɛna mɔ ɔtsɔ̃, lɔkɔa be nviã a bɛkɛna oti mɔa.” 32Ɔnɔkɔali a kĩ ɛbɛla nɛ Baguma kalɛ kĩĩ kamɛ a dzũ paa. Manu foe kayɔ kĩ Kristo mɔ asɔli bati a ɔmɔa kakɛna balɛ. 33Lɛmɛ fɔatamɔ mi malo. Mi kamɛ odi nyɛ odi ɛwɛ ɔtsɔ̃ kalɛ ndɛ ayekĩ yawɛ ye akũ kalɛ, ade ayea mi kamɛ odi nyɛ odi lɛmɛ ebu ɔnyɔ a.

Title: EFESOFƆ 6
Content:
Ayekĩ Bamanɛ Mɔ Babi Adzi Nkpã.
1Mi babisɛ̃, mibu mi bamanɛ, kitonɛkĩ Kristo kamɛ lɛkɛnana wĩ fɔanɛ kĩ miakɛna. 2Mbla atɔnyade kĩ nfasɔ deĩ nɛ ye akũ nyɛ kĩ, “Bu aga mɔ ama, 3ayekĩ nɔ kadzi kamɛ aalɛ, odzi nkpã gɛlɛɛlɛ nɛ tite akũ.”
4Mi balɛga, mitakado mi babi kalɔkpa, mbom midɔɔla be kadɔɔla wĩ, mivɛlɛ be, mikpa be kɔdɛ nɛ boe Ɔlate osi a akũ.
Kɛnɛ Kĩ Basate Mɔ Balate Bidzi Kadzi Wĩ.
5Mi basate, mibu mi tite akũ balate nɛ libe mɔ kukũtila kamɛ. Mikɛna foe mɔ mi tɔwɔlɛ flee ndɛ ayekĩ míasum Kristo. 6Mitakɛna foe anɛ kamɛ kɛkɛ kasum, ayekĩ baamu mi sũ, mbom ndɛ Kristo basumunɛ aye ni, mikɛna lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma awɛ a futo mi tɔwɔlɛ flee kamɛ. 7Mikɛna mi basate tudzuma nɛ kawɔlɛ kamɛ ndɛ boe Ɔlate miasum, kĩ nnɛ́ batidziwa miasum. 8Mite anɛ kĩ boe Ɔlate aase odi nyɛ odi kɔtɔ nɛ adzuma wĩ a kĩ ɛkɛna a akũ, ntɛ ɛnyɛ ɔsate ĩye edzi ye akũ akũ.
9Mi balate lɛmɛ, kɛnɛ kĩ miakɛna foe lɔmɔ mikpa mi basate, lɔkɔa mifɔ̃ be libe kado. Mite anɛ kĩ mi atsu nviã a flee Ɔlate mɔapɛ mideĩ nɛ ode, kĩ yaadzɛmɔ odi nyɛ odi, ade ɛláadã odima anɛ a.
Mido Hũhũ Kamɛ Kawũkanɔ Fɔtsa.
10Ke kawũna kamɛ a, mi ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ boe Ɔlate ɛna ɔsĩ ebu, fɔtsã ye kɔbɛ̃ kpale akũ. 11Mibla kawũkanɔ fɔtsa flee a kĩ Baguma kpa mi a, ayekĩ míapuli miyidza midza nɛ Abonsam tɛdake tisi a akũ. 12Kitonɛkĩ nnɛ́ bɔmɔ́ batidziwa lamɛna kawũ kanɔ, mbom bɔmɔ́ ablɔ hũhũ kpa kĩ edeĩ kɔbɛ̃ nɛ ɔwɛ kamɛ, hũhũ kĩ yanya akũ, hũhũ kĩ edeĩ otumi, mɔ hũhũ kpa kĩ edeĩ nɛ ɔtũ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ lamɔ kanɔ. 13Foesũ mibla Baguma kawũkanɔ fɔtsa flee a finyaa, ayekĩ ntɛ Luwi kpa a ya ni, míapuli midza minɔ kawũ a minaawũna, mibuki mina kɔbɛ̃ nɛ mi kamɛ.
14Foesũ mina nɛ kukũmanɛ kamɛ, mikɔa ɔnɔkɔali mibɔa abɔsɔ, mikɔa tuwĩ kakɛna misua mi ɔwɔlɛ ndɛ tɔwɔlɛ libĩĩ katɛ sɔbɔtsaɛ aye. 15Ade mina nɛ kukũmanɛ kamɛ milɛ lukudɔ Kalɛ Wĩ a kĩ kɛnyɛ mi kawũkanɔ tɛpambua kĩ miado. 16Lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ ni, milɛ katɛkado ndɛ fubĩĩ katɛ sɔbɔtsaɛ, kitonɛkĩ ade foe bɔakɔa budina fubĩĩ mɔ fi a kĩ Okesĩnɛ a atalɛ a. 17Mitsa Baguma nkpã katɛ a ndɛ sɔbɔtsaɛ lɔbɔɛ aye, milɛ Baguma kalɛ a ndɛ lɛpamɛ gɛlɛɛlɛ kĩ Hũhũ a kɔa edo nɛ mi awɛ. 18Mikɛna fukĩĩ flee nɛ mpaɛbɔ kamɛ, mikaavia Baguma kabumɛna. Mifɔ̃ Hũhũ a ɛkpã mi mibɔa mpaɛ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ. Nɛ foesũ ni, mina nɛ kukũmanɛ kamɛ, mitafɔ̃ akpɔ liveli mi. Mibɔa mpaɛ daa nɛ bati a kĩ bɛkpalɛ be akũ a flee lɔlɔ.
19Mibɔa mpaɛ nɛ yĩ malo lɔlɔ kĩ Baguma edo yĩ fɔlɛtsa wĩ nɛ onukpɛ̃, ayekĩ ntɛ maalɛ kɔdzɛla ni, maapuli ndo ɔwɔlɛ ĩnyɛ Kalɛ Wĩ fɔlɛtsa kɔlawa a ntsa bati. 20Baguma Kalɛ Wĩ kĩĩ fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ manɛ sũ, ade foesũ nwaa kɔla malo a. Mibɔa mpaɛ mikpa yĩ kĩ mpuli ndo ɔwɔlɛ nlɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a ndɛ ayekĩ fɔfɛta.
Paulo Kawɔ̃na Nkaɛ.
21Tihiko, boe ɔwaɛ̃ paa, kĩ ɛnyɛ boe Ɔlate adzuma wĩ ɔkɛnanɛ a, aaya nɛ awã, ebi mi yĩ akũ fɔlɛtsa, ɛfɔ̃ minyi ayekĩ nlamɛna adzuma a. 22Kado ndo ye nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ kĩ ɛyaabi mi ayekĩ boe flee bɔlamɛna adzuma nɛ awĩ, lɔkɔa edo mi kɔbɛ̃ lɛmɛ.
23Baguma boe Ɔlɛga mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo bɛkpa boe bawaɛ̃ a flee lukudɔ, ɔdɔ mɔ katɛkado. 24Baguma ɛmɔ be flee a kĩ bɛkɔa ɔdɔ kĩ ɛla kawũna a bawɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo kalɛ a kɔnya.

Title: FILIPIFƆ 1
Content:
1Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ, Paulo, mɔ Timoteo kĩ bɔnyɛ Kristo Yesu basumunɛ sɛkɛ̃.
Bɔtsɛlɛ ye bɔama mi Baguma bade a kĩ mideĩ nɛ Filipi, kĩ mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo Yesu a, mɔ asɔli banɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ babumɛnanɛ a flee.
2Baguma boe Ɔlɛga mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo bɛmɔ mi kɔnya, bɛkpa mi lukudɔ lɛmɛ.
Paulo Bɔa Mpaɛ Nɛ Ye Ovoli a Bakãnɛ a Lɔlɔ.
3Manyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ kĩ nte anɛ nɛ mi akũ, 4ade lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ kĩ mabɔa mpaɛ nɛ mi flee lɔlɔ ni, mabɔa ye mɔ kawɔlɛ, 5nɛ ayekĩ mibumɔ yĩ nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a kalɛ kamɛ, kito luwi lɛtɔnyade a kɛyawo nviã kĩĩ. 6Nɛ foesũ matɛ kado kĩ Baguma a kĩ eyi adzuma wĩ kĩĩ kakɛna kayɔ nɛ mi kamɛ a, aafɔ̃ mikɛna ye ɛnaawũna nɛ Kristo Yesu luwi a akũ.
7Yĩ anɛ teĩ nɛ mi akũ daa! Fɔnɛnɛ kĩ nkaakɔna mi akũ lɔmɔ, kitonɛkĩ Baguma mɔ bɔmɔ mi flee kɔnya kĩ miamɔ lubo mɔ yĩ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ nwaa kɔla a. Lɛtsa a kĩ libu nyɛ kĩ mibumɔ yĩ bɔlamɛna Kalɛ Wĩ a lɔlɔ kapili, kĩ kitim lɛmɛ. 8Baguma nyɛ yĩ ɔdansini kĩ ɔnɔkɔali malɛ, kĩ makɔna mi flee mɔ ɔdɔ a kĩ eto Kristo Yesu kamɛ a.
