9Mabɔa mpaɛ kĩ mi ɔdɔ a ebu ebo anɛ nɛ kadikanyi mɔ fɔlɛtsa kayɔkanu dzununuunu kamɛ, 10ayekĩ míapuli misa fɔtsa wĩ mikpa mi akũ, lɔkɔa míanya bati kpalɛwa kĩ efĩĩ mɔ nfumusu adima lɛláana nɛ be akũ nɛ Kristo Luwi a akũ. 11Mi nkpã kadzi kamɛ aayi mɔ ɔbla wĩ kabɔa a kĩ Yesu Kristo odi aapuli ɛkpa a, fɔnya kukũkpalɛ mɔ kamu fɔkpa Baguma.
Ɔmɔa Kakɛna Mɔ Kristo Kamɛ Nkpã Wĩ a Deĩ.
12Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mawɛ kĩ mianyi kĩ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔya nɛ yĩ akũ a bumɛna Kalɛ Wĩ a kɛnaa lɔtɔ. 13Nɛ foesũ sodzafɔ a kĩ badzɔlɛ lɛgã tɔtɔ akũ a flee, mɔ bati bɛbã a kĩ bideĩ nɛ awĩ a mɔ́ biyi ɔsũ kĩ Kristo sũ mɔ nwaa kɔla. 14Ade yĩ kɔla kawa a lɛmɛ fɔ̃ Kristofɔ pii kɔa anɛ bite nɛ boe Ɔlate akũ, ade bado ɔwɔlɛ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ, kalɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa a mɔ libe katana nɛ foe kamɛ a.
15Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, be kamɛ badi ade lɛtsã nɛ Kristo akũ kitonɛkĩ banɔ yĩ lineke kawɛ yĩ sɔwã, lɛmɛ badi kɔ̃ ade lɛtsã a mɔ adzuni wĩ. 16Bati katsu kayade kĩĩ akɛna adzuma mɔ ɔdɔ kitonɛkĩ binyina kĩ Baguma lɛkpa yĩ adzuma kĩ mpili ye Kalɛ Wĩ a lɔlɔ. 17Bati bɛbã a láde lɛtsã nɛ Kristo akũ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ, mbom bade de nɛ be odi kawɛ onukpɛ̃. Bɛkɔna kĩ bakɛna foe bɛkɔa bɛwɛ fɔlɛtsa bɛkpa yĩ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ nwaa kɔla, lɔkɔa lubo kamɔ lɛna ɔsĩ libu.
18Fukĩĩ lɛnyɛ́ latsama! Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ bide lɛtsã nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ĩye nɛ fɔvã kama osi akũ malo ni, kĩ Kristo akũ bide lɛtsã a sũ ni, kawɔlɛ de yĩ. 19Kitonɛkĩ ĩnyina kĩ mi mpaɛbɔ nɛ yĩ lɔlɔ mɔ Yesu kabumɛna a kĩ kito Kristo Hũhũ a sũ ni, baanyɛ yĩ nɛ kɔla. 20Yĩ kawɛ mɔ ɔsĩ, mɔ lɛtsa a kĩ madã anɛ nyɛ kĩ kɔnyɔã kɔtakɔ yĩ nɛ yĩ adzuma kamɛ, titiliwu nɛ lɔkɔ kĩĩ, mbom nna ɔwɔlɛ ayekĩ maakɔa yĩ sukɛna flee ndo Kristo obu ntɛ ndzi nkpã ĩye nku malo.
21Litsa nyɛ nkpã? Nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ kɔ̃ ni, Kristo ndzi nkpã nkpa, lɛmɛ ntɛ maaku ni, maana foe akũ nfasɔ mba. 22Lɛmɛ ntɛ maadzi nkpã mpuli nkɛna adzuma kĩ edeĩ nfasɔ ni, kekɔ̃ maáti ĩnyi foe kamɛ fukĩ ĩnyɛ ntɛ nkpã ĩye wuda. 23Ndeĩ nɛ fɔtsa atsu nviã kayite. Mawɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ manɛ nɛ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ nnaa Kristo sɛkɛ̃, kĩ lɛnɛnɛ lɛbɛ̃. 24Lɛmɛ nɛ mi sũ ni, fusĩ paa kĩ ndzi nkpã nɛ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ. 25Ntɛ fukĩĩ ndo, foesũ ĩnyina kĩ maadzi nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃, mbuki nkɛna adzuma mɔ mi flee minamɛna lɔtɔ, mimɔ́ kawɔlɛ nɛ Kristo katɛkado kamɛ. 26Fukĩĩ aafɔ̃ kĩ ntɛ mbuki ĩya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ ni, míapuli mipia nɛ yĩ akũ kĩ mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo Yesu.
27Lɛtsa a kĩ lisĩ finyaa nyɛ kĩ, midzi nkpã ndɛ bati kĩ bɛtɛ Kristo Kalɛ Wĩ a, ayekĩ ntɛ ĩya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ ĩye ntápuli ĩya malo ni, maanu kĩ midzɛ̃ pintii, nɛ hũhũ mɔa adzuni mɔa kamɛ, miapili katɛkado a Kalɛ Wĩ a lɔlɔ. 28Mitavila mi bakesĩnɛ, mbom mido ɔwɔlɛ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ. Fukĩĩ aafɔ̃ binyi kĩ Baguma aawɔla be kokooko, lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃ yaakpa mi nkpã, kitonɛkĩ Baguma lɛfɔ̃ minya akũ. 29Kitonɛkĩ Baguma kpa mi osi kĩ misum Kristo nnɛ́ nɛ ayekĩ mitɛ ye mido a odi sũ, mbom nɛ ayekĩ miamɔ lubo nɛ ye lɔlɔ a sũ. 30Finyaakĩĩ míapuli minɔ kawũ a mɔ yĩ. Ade kawũ mɔapɛ a kĩ mimɔ́ kĩ nnɔ ntɛ̃ a, ndɛ ayekĩ minu a, ade ke mɔapɛ a nlamɛna kanɔ a.

Title: FILIPIFƆ 2
Content:
Yesu Kristo Nyɛ Boe Ɔlate.
1Nkpã a kĩ midzi nɛ Kristo kamɛ a ado mi kɔbɛ̃, ade ye ɔdɔ adɔla mi ɔwɔlɛ a. Mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Hũhũ a, ade miakɛna mi akũ sɛmɛ kalɛ, kamɔ akũ kɔnya a. 2Nɛ foesũ mifɔ̃ kawɔlɛ de yĩ paa kĩ mideĩ adzuni mɔa. Miawɛ akũ kalɛ, kakɛna ɔmɔa nɛ hũhũ mɔ adzuni mɔa kamɛ nɛ lɛtsa mɔapɛ akũ. 3Mitakɛna lɛtsama nɛ mi odi kawɛ onukpɛ̃, ĩye miwɛ kĩ miapia akũ. Midɔla akũ mikpa akũ, mibu bati bɛbã kĩ bɛnɛnɛ bɛbɛ̃ mi. 4Odima ɛtakɔna fɔtsa wĩ ɛkpa ye odi akũ, mbom ɛwɛ bati bɛbã lɛmɛ fude.
5Mifɔ̃ ɔbla a kĩ ɛna nɛ Kristo Yesu kamɛ a, ɛna nɛ mi malo kamɛ. 6Titɔ kĩ edeĩ nɛ Baguma kutidu kamɛ malo ni, ɛtákɔna kĩ yakɔa ye kɔbɛ̃ ɛtsa kĩ bɛmɔ Baguma biketi. 7Mbom ɛfɔnɛ ye obu kadzakɔ̃ a awɛ faa, ɛkɔa ye akũ ɛkɛna osumunɛ. Bɛma ye ndɛ otidziwa aye, ade ɛya nɛ oti kutidu kamɛ a. 8Nɛ foesũ ɛdɔla ye akũ, etse Baguma kɛnawo wuda nɛ asendua akũ. 9Nɛ foesũ Baguma dɛla ye nɛ ode flee, ade ete ye dĩ kĩ lɛbɛ̃ dĩ lidi nyɛ lidi a. 10Foesũ ntɛ bɛbɔa Yesu dĩ ni, kɛfɛta kĩ fɔtsa a kĩ fudzi nkpã nɛ tite mɔ ode, mɔ tite ɔda fɔ́ake aduli. 11Ade foe flee aanyɛ onukpɛ̃ kĩ Yesu Kristo nyɛ boe Ɔlate, bɛkɔa bimu Baguma boe Ɔlɛga a.
Mivɔlɛ Ndɛ Fusibii Aye Nɛ Katinya Kamɛ.
12Foesũ nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ndɛ ayekĩ miatse yĩ ɔlɛdo lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ kĩ nna nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ a, ade ayea fusĩ kĩ ntɛ nláa mi sɛkɛ̃ malo ni, miakɛna miba ayekĩ ndeĩ nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ a. Mikɔa libe mɔ kukũtila mikɛna adzuma miwũna mitsa kĩ mina nkpã katɛ, 13kitonɛkĩ Baguma lamɛna adzuma kakɛna nɛ mi kamɛ daa ayekĩ míafɔnɛ akũ awɛ mikɛna nɛ ye kawɛ wĩ akũ.
14Mikɛna lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa onukpɛ̃ kanyɛ ĩye fɔlɛtsa kavɛlɛ fɔtana nɛ foe kamɛ, 15ayekĩ míanya bati kĩ bɛtákɔ be kɔtɔ, kĩ be akũ kpalɛ ndɛ Baguma babi kĩ bɛkpɔla, kĩ bidzi nɛ katinya kpa kĩ kiyi mɔ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ kamɛ, lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃ tɔkpa lɛláa mi akũ. Kɛnɛ kĩ miavɔlɛ nɛ be kamɛ ndɛ ayekĩ fusibii avɔlɛ nɛ ode, 16ntɛ miatsa be nkpã kalɛ a. Nɛ Kristo Luwi a akũ ni, maapuli mpia nɛ mi akũ kĩ yĩ mbɔdibɔ mɔ adzuma tákɛna pupulidza. 17Lɛmɛ ntɛ baako yĩ babɔanɛ nɛ tite nɛ mi katɛkado akũ ndɛ afɔliɛ fɔtsa aye ni, kawɔlɛ aade yĩ, ade fɔ́anya bɔmɔ mi flee kawɔlɛ a. 18Ade ayea kɛnɛ kĩ mi malo kawɔlɛ kide mi, mimɔ kawɔlɛ mɔ yĩ a.
Paulo Mu Timoteo Mɔ Epafrodito.
19Ntɛ fɔnyɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu kawɛ ni, matɛ kado kĩ owi lɛláabuna mɔ maado Timoteo nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃, ayekĩ mi akũ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ yayabi yĩ a aado yĩ kawɔlɛ. 20Ye odi keĩ nyɛ oti kĩ yanu yĩ fɔlɛtsa kayɔ mɔ oti kĩ mi fɔlɛtsa tsɛla ye. 21Bati bɛbã a kɔ̃ ni, be odi kalɛ liti bitomɛna, kĩ nnɛ́ fukĩ fɔnyɛ Yesu Kristo fude. 22Mi mɔawɛ minyina ayekĩ Timoteo nyɛ oti titiliwu mɔ ayekĩ ndɛ obi mɔ ɔlɛga aye ni, bɔmɔ ye bɔkɛna adzuma nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a kalɛ kamɛ. 23Foesũ madã anɛ kĩ ntɛ nsila mmɔ́ ayekĩ yĩ fɔlɛtsa kamɛ la ni, maado ye nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃. 24Matɛ kado nɛ boe Ɔlate dĩ akũ kĩ yĩ mɔawɛ a maapuli ĩya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ mɔatsɛ.
25Lɛmɛ nkɔna kĩ fusĩ kĩ mado boe ɔwaɛ̃ Epafrodito nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃. Ɛnyɛ oti kĩ bɔmɔ ye bɔkɛna adzuma, bɔnɔ kawũ, ade ɛnya mi fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ mɔ yĩ obumɛnanɛ a. 26Akũ asĩ ye kĩ ɛmɔ mi flee, ade ewo ɔblɔ kĩ minu kĩ ye fukɛna kamɛ bu kade. 27Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, ɛsɔ paa kĩ ɛna nɛ wuda mɔ nkpã kayite, lɛmɛ Baguma mɔ́ bɔmɔ ye kɔnya. Ntɛ fɔtana lɔmɔ ni, kufɛ yĩ kalɔɛ aaba yĩ kalɔ. 28Ade foesũ akũ asĩ yĩ kĩ mado ye nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃, ayekĩ ntɛ mimɔ́ ye ni, kawɔlɛ aabuki kide mi lɔkɔa yĩ malo yĩ ɔwɔlɛ lɛka edzi yĩ. 29Nɛ foesũ mitɛ ye mɔ kawɔlɛ ndɛ ɔwaɛ̃ nɛ boe Ɔlate dĩ akũ. Mikpa bati kĩ bɛla ndɛ ye aye a obu, 30kitonɛkĩ ɛkɔa ye akũ ɛkpa kĩ yakɛna Kristo adzuma ebumɔ yĩ nɛ mi kadokɔ̃, ade kite sukuloo kufɛ eku nɛ foe kamɛ a.

Title: FILIPIFƆ 3
Content:
Kadzi Kpĩĩ Nɛ Baguma Anɛ.
1Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, nɛ kawũna kamɛ a, kawɔlɛ kide mi kĩ mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ boe Ɔlate a. Fɔtápiã yĩ kĩ mbuki matsɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ĩnya lɔtɔ ntsɛlɛ mma mi a mma mi. Ntɛ nkɛna foe lɔmɔ malo ni, fɔ́afɔ̃ lɛtsama lɛláakɛna mi.
2Midã kadã wĩ nɛ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ akũ! Midã kadã wĩ nɛ bakpete a kĩ bɛdzɛ̃ nɛ mi akũ kĩ mitsua mi sukɛna a. 3Kitonɛkĩ boe a kĩ bɔasum Baguma nɛ Hũhũ kamɛ a, mbom bitsua boe nɛ osi wĩ akũ, foesũ bɔamɔ kawɔlɛ kĩ bɔakɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo Yesu. Boe kɔ̃ bɔáte anɛ nɛ sukɛna kamɛ tɛmaniɛ akũ.
4Yĩ aapuli nkɔa anɛ ntɛ nɛ tɛmaniɛ a na akũ kufɛ. Ntɛ odi kɔna kĩ yaapuli ɛkɔa anɛ ete nɛ te akũ ni, ndeĩ kadzakɔ̃ kĩ makɔna lɔmɔ mbɛ̃ oti a na kɔlaa. 5Bitsua yĩ lɛkpati kĩ bɛma yĩ ke luwi lɛlɛ̃de a. Israelni manɛ, nto Benyamin katete a kamɛ. Ĩnyɛ Hebrini kpanunuunu, ade ke nɛ Yudafɔ mbla a onukpɛ̃ ni, Farisini manɛ. 6Mpi mbla a ndo mɔ akũ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ ade foesũ ĩyidza ndza nɛ asɔli a akũ a. Ntɛ oti kakɛna nɛ mbla a akũ pɛpɛɛpɛ akɛna ye oti kpĩĩ nɛ Baguma anɛ ni, maapuli nlɛ kĩ nfumusu adima tána nɛ yĩ akũ.
7Lɛmɛ fɔtsa a kĩĩ bamɛ a kĩ nkɔna kĩ fudeĩ yĩ nfasɔ a, finyaakĩĩ nɛ Kristo sũ mabu foe fɔtsa pupulidza. 8Nnɛ́ fɔtsa a na odi, mbom mabu lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ lɛnyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛlá nfasɔ, kitonɛkĩ fɔtátɛ kɔya fuwo Kristo Yesu kanyi ndɛ yĩ Ɔlate. Nɛ ye sũ nfɔnɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa awɛ, ade mabu foe flee ndɛ fukluku, ayekĩ Kristo aanya yĩ ode sũ, 9lɔkɔa nkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ ye. Ade ke nláabuki nna kadzi kpĩĩ nɛ yĩ mɔawɛ akũ akũ nɛ ayekĩ makɛna nɛ mbla a akũ sũ, mbom maakɛna oti kpĩĩ nɛ Kristo katɛkado sũ. Ade fukĩĩ nyɛ kadzi kpĩĩ kĩ kito Baguma sɛkɛ̃ nɛ katɛkado kamɛ a. 10Lɛtsa a kĩ nti mawɛ nyɛ kĩ manyi Kristo, mmɔ́ kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ kɔdzɛla ye kutomɛna kanɔkpa a, mmɔ́ mɔ ye lubo, lɔkɔa nkɛna ndɛ ye aye nɛ ye wuda kamɛ, 11mɔ katɛkado kĩ yĩ malo Baguma aadzɛla yĩ etomɛna kanɔkpa ndzi nkpã.
Paulo Lamɔ Atsɛ Yanaa Kawũnakɔ̃ a.
12Nlámɔ kalɛ kĩ yĩ awɛ tá lɛtsa a kĩ mawɛ ĩye kĩ nkpɔla kɔkɔɛ. Lɛmɛ nlamɛna kapili mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ yĩ awɛ ɛta fɔtsa a kĩ foesũ Kristo Yesu kɔa yĩ ɛkɛna ye ode a. 13Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, maákɔna kĩ yĩ awɛ ta fɔtsa a kɔkɔɛ. Mbom lɛtsa a kĩ makɛna nyɛ kĩ nlɛla fɔtsa a kĩ fɔya fɔtɛ̃ a, lɔkɔa nkɔa yĩ kɔbɛ̃ flee ntomɔ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛwaa nɛ lɔtɔ a liti. 14Ade foesũ nlamɛna atsɛ kawula kɔɔba kĩ maawo akũ kanyakɔ̃ a lɔkɔa ntɛ futelitsa a kĩ Baguma vɛ yĩ ɛtsãmɛna Kristo Yesu akũ kĩ ĩyaatɛ nɛ ode a.
15Kɛnɛ kĩ boe flee a kĩ bubo anɛ nɛ Baguma Hũhũ kamɛ a bɔna adzuni kĩĩ odu. Lɛmɛ ntɛ mi kamɛ badi deĩ adzuni bɛbã ni, Baguma aakpalɛ foe malo kamɛ ɛtsa mi. 16Ntɛ nde aye fɔla malo ni, mifɔ̃ bubuki bɔkɛna nɛ osi a kĩ ye akũ bɔtsɛ̃ kɛyawo finyaakĩĩ a akũ.
17Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mi a flee midã yĩ ɔbla mibɔa ye odu, midã bikĩ bidzi nkpã nɛ osi wĩ akũ ndɛ ayekĩ budzi bɔtsa mi a. 18Mbi mi fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ lɔkɔ pii kɛyatɛ̃, lɛmɛ mbuki malɛ foe finyaa mɔ babe malo. Bati pii deĩ kĩ be nkpã kadzi kamɛ a fɔ̃ bɛdani bakesĩnɛ bɛkpa Kristo wuda nɛ asendua akũ a. 19Nɛ kawũna kamɛ a, bati kĩĩ aawɔ nɛ fi luwotu kpale kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ be baguma nyɛ sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kpa kakɛna. Bamɔ kawɔlɛ nɛ be fɔnyɔãtsa kakɛna akũ, ade katinya kĩĩ kamɛ fɔtsa odi akũ bakɔna a. 20Lɛmɛ boe kɔ̃ ni, boe ɔtɔ nyɛ ode, ade budzi bɔadã boe Ɔtɛnɛ kĩ ɛnyɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo anɛ kĩ eto ode ɛya a. 21Yaakɔa kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ kɔfɔ̃ yapuli kanya lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa akũ a, ɛdani boe sukɛna kĩ sɛlá kɔbɛ̃ kĩĩ siketi mɔ ye sukɛna kpalɛwa a.

Title: FILIPIFƆ 4
Content:
Paulo Dɛ Filipifɔ.
1Foesũ nwaɛ̃ amɛ, bati kĩ mawɛ kalɛ, kĩ makɔna mi akũ, miado yĩ kawɔlɛ. Ade aye kɛnɛ kĩ midza pintii nɛ mi nkpã kadzi kamɛ nɛ boe Ɔlate a dĩ akũ a.
2Make Ewodia mɔ Sinteke aduli kĩ bɛbɔa mbɔdi binu akũ kayɔ ndɛ bawaɛ̃tsole aye nɛ boe Ɔlate dĩ akũ. 3Nɔ malo yĩ ɔkɔba adzuma ɔkɛnanɛ kĩ yadi ɔnɔkɔali, mawɛ kĩ bumɛna batsole kĩĩ, kitonɛkĩ be mɔ Klemens mɔ asɔli bati bɛbã a bɛkɛna adzuma mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ bibumɔ yĩ bɔlɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a. Bɛtsɛlɛ bati kĩĩ buĩ bido nɛ Baguma ovoli a kĩ nkpã badzinɛ buĩ deĩ a kamɛ.
4Kawɔlɛ kide mi luwi daa kĩ mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ boe Ɔlate a. Mbuki malɛ kĩ kawɔlɛ kide mi!
5Mina ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ mikpa odi nyɛ odi. Boe Ɔlate kaya wo ɔtɔ kiyua. 6Mitaha akũ nɛ lɛtsama akũ, mbom nɛ mi mpaɛbɔ kamɛ ni, mivia Baguma lɛtsa a kĩ lisĩ mi, minyɛ ye kɔlɛ luwi daa. 7Ade Baguma lukudɔ a kĩ lide lɛba otidziwa kayɔkanu a, lɛdãmɛna mi tɔwɔlɛ mɔ adzuni akũ nɛ Kristo Yesu dĩ akũ. 8Nɛ ke kawũna kamɛ ni, nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mifɔ̃ fɔtsa a wĩ mɔ fukĩ fɔfɛta kamu fɔtɛ mi adzuni kamɛ. Fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ nyɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali, lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lideĩ obu, lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛtsɛ̃ nɛ osi kpĩĩ akũ, lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ de akũ kpalɛ, lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lalɛ kadã mɔ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛfɛta oti. 9Midzi nkpã nɛ yĩ fɔtsa a kĩ mikɔlɛ nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃, fukĩ mitɛ, fukĩ minu mɔ ɔbla a kĩ mimɔ́ nɛ yĩ akũ a onukpɛ̃. Ade Baguma a kĩ yakpa boe lukudɔ a aadzi nɛ mi kamɛ.
Paulo Nyɛ Filipifɔ Kɔlɛ Nɛ Be Futelitsa a Akũ.
10Nɛ boe Ɔlate a sũ ni, kawɔlɛ de yĩ paa kĩ nɛ lɔkɔ gɛlɛɛlɛ liti a, mibuki mina osi miatsa kĩ miakɔna yĩ akũ. Maátsa kĩ mifɔ̃ yĩ akũ kadãmɛna, mbom kana mitána osi kĩ mianyɛ foe mitsa. 11Ade nlámɛna katsa kĩ nsĩ litsedi, kitonɛkĩ nkɔlɛ nɛ kadzi kadi nyɛ kadi kamɛ kĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ ndeĩ liwo yĩ anɛ. 12Ĩnyina lɛtsa a kĩ lɛnyɛ ohiã ade ĩnyina lɛtsa a kĩ lɛnyɛ akũ kana fɔtsa lɛmɛ a. Nɛ kadzi osi nyɛ osi akũ ni, nkɔlɛ ayekĩ kɛnɛ kĩ fɔtsa fuwo yĩ anɛ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ ntɛ fɔnyɛ kɔlɛ ĩye funitsã kabɔ lɔkɔ, ntɛ ndeĩ foe sukuloo ĩye fɔbɔ yĩ malo. 13Maapuli ndza pintii nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ nɛ kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ Kristo ado yĩ a akũ.
14Lɛmɛ mikɛna foe kakɛna wĩ paa kĩ mibumɔ yĩ nɛ yĩ kasuli kamɛ. 15Mi Filipifɔ minyina yededeede kĩ ndzakũ nɛ Makedonia nɛ kayɔkayi, kĩ nkade lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ a, mi odi nyɛ asɔli bati a kĩ bɛkabumɛna yĩ. 16Lɔkɔ lɔkɔ kĩ nna nɛ Tesalonika malo ni, ntɛ nsĩ kabumɛna miamɛna yĩ futelitsa. 17Nnɛ́ futelitsa mawɛ kufɛ, mbom nfasɔ a kĩ míana mibu mitomɛna mi fɔtsa kate kamɛ a mawɛ. 18Finyaa mise yĩ kɔtɔ minyina malo. Futelitsa a kĩ mimɛna mitsãmɛna Epafrodito akũ a yawo yĩ sɛkɛ̃, foesũ finyaa nna fɔtsa a kĩ fusĩ a flee. Futelitsa a na kɛna ndɛ afɔliɛ mɔ ɔlɛ̃ mɔ ɔlɛ̃ kĩ bɛbɔa bɛkpa Baguma, kĩ fuwo ye anɛ fudo ye kawɔlɛ lɛmɛ. 19Yĩ Baguma a kĩ masum a, aakpa mi lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ misĩ a etomɛna ye kukũkpalɛ beblebee nɛ Yesu Kristo kamɛ a.
20Mifɔ̃ bumu boe Baguma boe Ɔlɛga kito finyaa kanaa daa daa. Fɔya lɔmɔ.
Paulo Kawɔ̃na Nkaɛ.
21Mawɔ̃na Baguma bati a kĩ bɛkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo Yesu a. Boe bawaɛ̃ Kristofɔ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ nɛ awĩ awɔ̃na mi a flee. 22Baguma bati kpalɛwa nɛ awĩ a awɔ̃na mi, titiliwu bikĩ bideĩ nɛ Romafɔ Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃ tɔtɔ kamɛ a lɛmɛ awɔ̃na mi flee.
23Boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo nhila ɛmɔ mi hũhũ.

Title: KOLOSEFƆ 1
Content:
1Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ, Paulo, kĩ ndani Kristo Yesu fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ nɛ Baguma kawɛ onukpɛ̃, kĩ bɔmɔ Timoteo lɛtsɛlɛ ye bɔama mi. 2Bɔtsɛlɛ ye bɔamɛna boe bawaɛ̃ a kĩ Baguma kpalɛ be akũ, kĩ bideĩ nɛ Kolose, kĩ bɛtɛ Kristo bido, bɛkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ ye a.
Baguma, boe Ɔlɛga ɛmɔ mi kɔnya, ɛkpa mi lukudɔ lɛmɛ.
Paulo Nyɛ Baguma Kɔlɛ Nɛ Kolosefɔ Lɔlɔ.
3Ntɛ bɔabɔa mpaɛ nɛ mi lɔlɔ daa ni, bɔanyɛ Baguma boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo Ɔlɛga a kɔlɛ, 4kitonɛkĩ bunu ayekĩ mitɛ Kristo Yesu mido, mɔ ayekĩ miawɛ Baguma bade a flee kalɛ. 5Kĩ bɛnya lɔtɔ bɛkɔa ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a, Kalɛ Wĩ a bɛma mi a, minu kɔnɛte a kĩ kudeĩ kɔkpa mi a. Foesũ mi katɛkado mɔ ɔdɔ dzɛ̃ nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ miadã anɛ a, kĩ bɛmanɛ biyi nɛ ode bɛkpa mi a akũ. 6Kalɛ Wĩ a lamɛna anɛ kabo kawũ babi wĩ, ade kɛlamɛna kagba nɛ katinya kamɛ flee, ndɛ ayekĩ kɛgba nɛ mi kamɛ kito luwi a kĩ minya lɔtɔ minu ayekĩ Baguma amɔ bati kɔnya, ade minu ke kayɔ kanu wĩ a. 7Epafra lɛtsa mi fɔtsa nɛ Baguma bati kɔnyakamɔ akũ. Ɛnyɛ boe ɔkɔba adzuma ɔkɛnanɛ kĩ bɔawɛ kalɛ paa, kĩ yakɛna Kristo adzuma a nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ nɛ boe kadokɔ̃. 8Ye libi boe mi ɔdɔ a kĩ Baguma Hũhũ a kɔa edo nɛ mi kamɛ a.
9Nɛ foesũ bɔabɔa mpaɛ daa nɛ mi lɔlɔ, kito luwi a kĩ bunu mi nkã a. Bɔake Baguma aduli kĩ ebinya mi adzuni kamɛ mipuli minyi ye, mina nyansã mɔ fɔlɛtsa kayɔkanu flee a kĩ Baguma Hũhũ a akpa a. 10Fukĩĩ aafɔ̃ mipuli midzi nkpã ndɛ ayekĩ Boe Ɔlate awɛ, mikɛna lɛtsa a kĩ fɔ́awo ye anɛ daa, lɔkɔa mi adzuma wĩ adi nyɛ adi aawũ babi, mibo anɛ nɛ Baguma kanyi kamɛ. 11Baguma ɛkɔa ye kɔbɛ̃ flee a kĩ kuto ye kukũkpalɛ kɔbɛ̃ a kamɛ epi mi, ayekĩ míapuli mido ɔwɔlɛ mina ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ lɛmɛ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ. 12Mikɔa kawɔlɛ minyɛ Ɔlɛga a kɔlɛ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ, kitonɛkĩ ye lɛfɔ̃ mikpɔla, kĩ mimɔ bati a kĩ Baguma kpalɛ be akũ a, míana tsɛfã nɛ ye lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ ɔhaĩ a kamɛ. 13Baguma lɛnyɛ boe sɔũ etomɛna ɔtũ kamɛ kɔbɛ̃ kamɛ, ɛkɔa edo nɛ ye Obi kĩ yaátunɔ ye kalɛ a lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kamɛ. 14Obi kĩĩ akũ bɔtsã bɔna akũ akũ kadzi, mɔ tɔkpa kakɔakate.
Oti a Odu Kĩ Kristo Anɛ Mɔ Adzuma a Kĩ Ɛkɛna a.
15Kristo nyɛ Baguma a kĩ bɔámɔ mɔ anɛ a kutidu. Ade ye nyɛ Baguma Obi ɔtɔnyade kĩ yanya fɔtsa flee a kĩ bɛbɔa nɛ katinya kamɛ a akũ a. 16Kitonɛkĩ Baguma tsã Kristo akũ ɛbɔa lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ lideĩ nɛ tite mɔ ode, fukĩ bɔamɔ mɔ fukĩ bɔámɔ, mɔ hũhũ kamɛ kɔbɛ̃, kĩ fɔnyɛ fɔgã, abãã mɔ otumifɔ. Baguma tsã ye akũ ɛbɔa katinya kamɛ fɔtsa flee edo nɛ ye awɛ. 17Kristo deĩ katinya fɔmɔ bɛbɔa lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa, ade fɔtsɛ̃ ye akũ fɔtsa flee akɛna ɔmɔa a. 18Ye nyɛ asɔli a lɔlɔ, ade asɔli a lɛmɛ nyɛ ye sukɛna a. Asɔli a nɛ́ eto ye kamɛ, ade ɛnyɛ Baguma Obi ɔtɔnyade kĩ eyidza eto kanɔkpa, ayekĩ ye odi aanya lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ. 19Kitonɛkĩ fɔnyɛ Baguma kawɛ kĩ Obi ɛna ye Baguma kutidu a flee odu. 20Baguma tsã obi akũ, ɛlɔla bɛmɔ katinya kamɛ flee kayite. Ade foe nyɛ kĩ ɛtsã ye Obi a kĩ ewula babɔanɛ nɛ asendua akũ a akũ, ɛyamɛna lukudɔ nɛ ye mɔ fɔtsa a kĩ fudeĩ nɛ tite mɔ ode a flee kayite.
21Nɛ lɔkɔ lidi kamɛ ni, mina mɔ lugo nɛ Baguma akũ, ade minya ye bakesĩnɛ nɛ fɔtsa kpa a kĩ mikakɛna mɔ tɔkpa a kĩ mikakɔna a sũ. 22Lɛmɛ finyaa, nɛ Obi wuda nɛ asendua akũ a sũ ni, Baguma kɛna mi ye bakɔba ayekĩ yaakpã mi ɛyamɛna nɛ ye anɛ ndɛ bati kĩ mi akũ kpalɛ, kĩ nfumusu lɛláa mi akũ, kĩ odima lɛmɛ lɛláapuli ɛkɔ mi kɔtɔ. 23Foesũ kɛnɛ kĩ midza pintii nɛ mi katɛkado kamɛ, mitafɔnɛ mi kɔnɛte a kĩ mideĩ nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ a kĩ bubi mi minu a awɛ. Ade Kalɛ Wĩ kĩĩ akũ bide lɛtsã bɛkpa katinya kamɛ flee a. Ade Kalɛ Wĩ kĩĩ osumunɛ yĩ, Paulo, ndani a.
Paulo Kɛna Adzuma Ndɛ Asɔli a Ɔsumunɛ Aye.
24Finyaa, kawɔlɛ ade yĩ kĩ mmɔ́ lubo nɛ mi lɔlɔ. Mamɔ lubo nɛ yĩ sukɛna kamɛ nkɔa nwũna lubo a kĩ lite kĩ Kristo kĩ ɛnyɛ asɔli a lɔlɔ ɛmɔ nɛ sukɛna kamɛ. 25Baguma kɛna yĩ asɔli a ɔsumunɛ, kĩ nde lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ nkpa mi, ayekĩ bati flee aanyi Baguma fɔlɛtsa a flee kanyi wĩ. 26Ade fɔlɛtsa kɔlawa kĩĩ Baguma kɔa ɛkɔla batidziwa kasinu flee kito anɛ kɔkɔkɔɛ a. Lɛmɛ finyaa Baguma nyɛ foe kanya ɛtsa ye bati a kĩ bɛtɛ ye bido a. 27Baguma kawɛ nyɛ kĩ yanyɛ ye fɔtsa kɔlawa mɔ kɔya a, mɔ foe kukũkpalɛ a ɛtsa bati flee. Fɔlɛtsa kɔlawa a nyɛ kĩ, Kristo deĩ nɛ mi kamɛ, foesũ mideĩ Baguma kukũkpalɛ a kudi. 28Ade foesũ bɔade lɛtsã nɛ Kristo akũ kakpa odi nyɛ odi a. Bɔnɛɛ boe nyansã flee bɔadɛ odi nyɛ odi katsa be fɔtsa lɛmɛ, ayekĩ bɔ́akpã be bɔnamɛna Baguma anɛ ndɛ bati kĩ bibo anɛ bɛkpɔla, bɛkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo lɛmɛ. 29Ade fukĩĩ sũ nlamɛna kapili mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kakɛna adzuma a, mɔ kɔbɛ̃ kpale a kĩ Kristo ado yĩ a.

Title: KOLOSEFƆ 2
Content:
1Mawɛ kĩ minyi adzuma mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ a kĩ nkɛna nkpa mi, mɔ bati a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Laodikea, mɔ bati nkaɛ flee a kĩ binyína yĩ mɔ anɛ a. 2Malɛ fukĩĩ ayekĩ baado ɔwɔlɛ, bɛkɛna ɔmɔa nɛ ɔdɔ kamɛ. Fɔfɔ̃ bɛna fɔlɛtsa kayɔkanu yededeede a kĩ bike otse nɛ foe akũ a, binyi Baguma fɔtsa kɔlawa a kĩ foe fɔnyɛ Kristo mɔawɛ a. Fukĩĩ nyɛ akũ kana fɔtsa kpale. 3Kristo kamɛ Baguma kɔa ye fɔtsa mɔ kɔya a, kĩ foe nyɛ ye nyansã mɔ kadikanyi a ɛkɔla. 4Foesũ mabi mi kĩ mitafɔ̃ odima kĩ edeĩ sɛmɛ lɛkɛ mi mɔ fɔvã fɔlɛtsa kayɔkanyɛ. 5Titɔ kĩ nláa mi kamɛ nɛ sukɛna kamɛ malo ni, ndeĩ nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ nɛ hũhũ kamɛ, ade kawɔlɛ ade yĩ kĩ mmɔ́ kĩ mitsɛ̃ nɛ osi kpĩĩ akũ, ade midzɛ̃ pintii nɛ Kristo katɛkado kamɛ lɛmɛ a.
Oti Nkpã Flee Kana Deĩ Nɛ Kristo Kamɛ.
6Ayekĩ mitɛ Kristo Yesu ndɛ Ɔlate aye sũ ni, mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ ye nɛ mi nkpã kadzi kamɛ. 7Minɛ tunu nɛ ye kamɛ, midzi nkpã ndɛ ye aye, lɔkɔa midza pintii nɛ mi katɛkado kamɛ ndɛ ayekĩ bɔtsa mi a. Nɛ foe kawũna a ni, mikaanyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ daa.
8Foesũ midã kadã wĩ kĩ odima ɛtakɔa katinya kamɛ kadikanyi mɔ kakɛ pupulidza ɛkɛ mi miyɛla osi wĩ a. Kitonɛkĩ kadikanyi a na to batidziwa tɛmaniɛ katsa kĩ bɛnyɛ bitomɛna hũhũ kĩ yanya ɔwɛ akũ a kamɛ, kĩ nnɛ́ Kristo sɛkɛ̃ futo. 9Kitonɛkĩ Kristo kamɛ Baguma kutidu a flee deĩ, 10ade mi ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo kpa mi nkpã kĩ ɛkpɔla flee nɛ ye kamɛ a. Kristo deĩ kɔbɛ̃ kpale nɛ hũhũ kamɛ kɔbɛ̃ mɔ otumi adi nyɛ adi akũ.
11Kristo kamɛ mikɛna ndɛ bitsua mi fɔkpati, nnɛ́ lɛkpati katsua a kĩ batidziwa akɛna mɔ awɛ a, mbom mi tɔkpa a kĩ mikɛna nɛ sukɛna kamɛ a bɛwɔla nɛ mi akũ. Ade fukĩĩ nyɛ lɛkpati katsua nɛ Kristo kamɛ a. 12Kitonɛkĩ, kĩ bɛwɔla mi mui a, mimɔ Kristo bibila, ade nɛ mui kawɔla kamɛ a, mimɔ Kristo Baguma dzɛla etomɛna kanɔkpa, kitonɛkĩ mitɛ Baguma kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ ɛkɔa ɛdzɛla ye a mido.
13Nɛ lɔkɔ lidi kamɛ ni, minyɛ bati kĩ biku nɛ hũhũ kamɛ, nɛ mi tɔkpa mɔ ayekĩ minyɛ́ Yudafɔ kĩ milá mbla a lɛmɛ sũ. Lɛmɛ finyaa Baguma kpa mi mɔ Kristo nkpã, kitonɛkĩ ɛkɔa boe tɔkpa flee ete boe. 14Baguma wɔla nhihiɛ a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ biyi kĩ esui boe, ɛkɔ boe kɔtɔ nɛ mbla a onukpɛ̃ a, ade ɛkɔa ɛbɔa nɛ asendua a akũ a. 15Nɛ asendua akũ a, Kristo tɛ kɔbɛ̃ nɛ hũhũ kamɛ fɔgã mɔ hũhũ kamɛ batumifɔ a flee awɛ, ade edo be kɔnyɔã nɛ kanade, ade ɛkpã be ndɛ bati kĩ bipili be ndom aye nɛ ye kawɔlɛ kamɛ ɛnamɛna a.
16Foesũ mitafɔ̃ odima lɛkã mi anɛ nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ mianya ĩye miamɔa a akũ, ĩye luwi kpalɛwa kanya, odetɔ vɔɛ̃ kade fuwi kanya mɔ Kawɛya Luwi kanya akũ. 17Fukĩĩ bamɛ flee nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lideĩ nɛ liti laya a kuyo kɛkɛ. Lɛtsa mɔawɛ a nyɛ Kristo. 18Mitafɔ̃ odima kĩ ɛbɔɛ ye akũ kĩ ɛbɛ̃ mi, kitonɛkĩ ɛna kanyɛkatsa titiliwu sũ lɛkɔ mi kɔtɔ, lɔkɔa ɛkɛ mi kĩ midɔla mi akũ nɛ tɛdake kamɛ misum ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ. Oti kĩĩ odu adɛla ye akũ nɛ ode pupulidza, kitonɛkĩ batidziwa adzuni odi edeĩ. 19Oti kĩĩ odu wai akũ nɛ Kristo a kĩ ye nyɛ lɔlɔ a akũ. Lɛmɛ ade Kristo a kĩ ɛnyɛ lɔlɔ a sɛkɛ̃ sukɛna a flee ana funitsã katomɛna a. Ade Kristo pini sukɛna fɔtsakɔ̃ fɔtsakɔ̃ mɔ tisĩ flee ɛkpɔta, fɔabo anɛ ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma awɛ a.
Ayekĩ Bɔ́adzi Nkpã Vɔɛ̃ Nɛ Kristo Kamɛ.
20Ayekĩ mimɔ Kristo liku sũ ni, minɛ́ nɛ hũhũ a kĩ yanya katinya kamɛ akũ a kɔbɛ̃ kayɔ. Lɔkɔa nde sũ midzi nkpã ndɛ katinya kĩĩ bati mianɛ? Nde sũ miadi tɛbla ndɛ, 21“Takɛna fukĩĩ akũ adzuma, tata fukĩĩ onukpɛ̃,” ĩye “takɔa awɛ ɔta fɔbɛbã lɛmɛ”? 22Tɛbla kĩĩ flee nyɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔawɔ ntɛ bakɛna foe akũ adzuma, kitonɛkĩ batidziwa tɛbla mɔ fɔtsa katsa fɔanɛ. 23Nɛ kamɔ kamɛ ni, ntɛ odi pi tɛbla kĩĩ edomɔ akũ, ɛdɔla ye akũ, mɔ ɛmɔna ye sukɛna lubo ni, nyansã baũ adi deĩ nɛ foe kamɛ, lɛmɛ fukĩna kakɛna lábumɔ oti yapuli kanya ye sukɛna kamɛ fɔwɛtsa akũ kɔlaa.

Title: KOLOSEFƆ 3
Content:
1Baguma dzɛla mimɔ Kristo etomɛna kanɔkpa, foesũ mikɔa mi anɛ mite nɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fudeĩ nɛ ode, awã kĩ Kristo dzi nɛ Baguma sɔmɔna a akũ. 2Mifɔ̃ mi adzuni ete nɛ ode fɔtsa akũ, kĩ nnɛ́ nɛ tite kĩĩ fɔtsa akũ, 3kitonɛkĩ kĩ miku a, bɛkɔa mi nkpã mɔ Kristo bɛkɔla nɛ Baguma kamɛ. 4Ntɛ Kristo kĩ ɛnyɛ mi nkpã a, nyɛ ye akũ katinya ni, mi malo míanɛ kanya mɔ ye, nɛ ye kukũkpalɛ a kamɛ.
Nkpã Kɔɛ a Mɔ Avɔɛ̃ Kadzi.
5Foesũ mikɔ tite akũ fɔwɛtsa a kĩ fudeĩ nɛ mi kamɛ a. Ade foe nyɛ, adɔpaa kabɔa, fɔtsa kpa kĩ fɔado oti efĩĩ, sukɛna odo fɔwɛtsa kpa, odo fɔtsa kpa mɔ anɛ ngbã. Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, anɛ ngbã nyɛ baviɔ̃ kasum. 6Ade fukĩĩ bamɛ aafɔ̃ Baguma kalɔkpa lɛya nɛ bati a kĩ bideĩ atɔ ɔsĩ akũ a. 7Nɛ nkpã kĩ midzi mitɛ̃ a kamɛ a, mi malo mibɔa ɔbla kpa a na odu.
8Lɛmɛ finyaa kɛnɛ kĩ miafɔnɛ fukĩĩ flee awɛ. Ade foe nyɛ kalɔkpa kana, ɔwɔlɛ kahulu, likesĩ, bati kavũna, fubusuotsa mɔ fɔnyɔãtsa kalɛ. Kɛtánɛ kĩ fukĩĩ flee anɛ nɛ mi onukpɛ̃. 9Mitakama fɔvã kakpa akũ, kitonɛkĩ mifɔnɛ mi tɛbla kɔɛ a awɛ. 10Mibɔɛ ɔbla vɔɛ̃ kĩĩ mido. Baguma lamɛna tɛbla kɔɛ kadani lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ nɛ ye kutidu onukpɛ̃, ayekĩ míanyi ye kanyi wĩ.
11Nɛ fukĩĩ kamɛ kɔ̃ ni, ntsitsemu adima lɛláa Yudafɔ mɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ, ĩye bikĩ bitsua fɔkpati mɔ bikĩ bɛtátsua fɔkpati a kayite. Ade ayea ntsitsemu buki ɛláa banɔvɔɛ̃, bikĩ be anɛ tábinya, mɔ bikĩ bidzi be akũ akũ mɔ basate kayite. Be flee bɛnyɛ ɔmɔa nɛ Kristo kamɛ ade Kristo lɛmɛ deĩ nɛ be flee kamɛ a.
12Kĩ minyɛ Baguma bati kpalɛwa kĩ ɛpau, yawɛ kalɛ lɛmɛ sũ ni, mibɔa ɔbla vɔɛ̃ a kĩ eketimɔ foe a. Ade ye nyɛ oti kɔnyakamɔ, sɛmɛ kalɛ kakɛna, kadɔ mɔ ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ kana. 13Mina ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ mikpa akũ. Ntɛ odi fum odi ni, miakɔa mite ye ndɛ ayekĩ boe Ɔlate lɛmɛ kɔa mi tɔkpa ete mi a. 14Fukĩ fɔbɛ̃ nyɛ kĩ ɔdɔ ɛna nɛ mi kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ ɔdɔ aboomu fɔtsa flee kakpɔta mɔ fɔakpɔla kakpɔla wĩ.
15Mifɔ̃ Kristo lukudɔ a lɛnya akũ nɛ mi kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ ade lukudɔ kĩĩ sũ Baguma vɛ mi ɛkpɔta ndɛ oti mɔa aye a. Minya kɔlɛ banyɛnɛ. 16Mifɔ̃ Kristo Kalɛ Wĩ a, mɔ ke kɔyakatɛ a flee kidzi nɛ mi kamɛ. Mitsa akũ fɔtsa, mikpa kɔdɛ nɛ nyansã flee kamɛ. Misã Psalomo tɔnɔ, asɔli tɔnɔ, mɔ Hũhũ kamɛ tɔnɔ mikɔa minyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ nɛ mi tɔwɔlɛ flee kamɛ. 17Foesũ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ míakɛna ĩye míalɛ ni, mikɛna foe nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu dĩ akũ, mitsã ye dĩ akũ minyɛ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga kɔlɛ.
Batɛ Badonɛ Kadzi Nɛ Nkpã Vɔɛ̃ a Kamɛ.
18Mi fɔnyɔ badzinɛ, midɔla mi akũ mikpa mi banyɔ, ndɛ ayekĩ kɛfɛta Kristofɔ.
19Mi batsɔ̃ bakɔãnɛ miwɛ mi batsɔ̃ kalɛ, mitakɛna be aũkani.
20Mi babisɛ̃, mitse mi bamanɛ ɔlɛdo nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ ade foe awo Baguma anɛ a.
21Mi balɛga, mitado mi babi kalɔkpa, ayekĩ akpɔ lɛláaveli be.
22Mi basumunɛ, mibu mi balate nɛ tite akũ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ, mitakɛna anɛ kamɛ kɛkɛ fɔtsa kĩ bati bimu mi. Mbom misum be nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ndɛ bati kĩ bavila Baguma. 23Adzuma adi nyɛ adi kĩ miakɛna ni, mikɛna ye mɔ mi tɔwɔlɛ flee, ndɛ boe Ɔlate miakɛna mikpa, kĩ nnɛ́ batidziwa miakɛna mikpa. 24Mite anɛ kĩ boe Ɔlate aakpa mi ndɛ kɔtɔkase aye, lɛtsa a kĩ ɛmanɛ eyi ye bati, kitonɛkĩ Kristo, boe Ɔlate mɔawɛ a bɔasum. 25Baguma aase tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ a tɔkpa a kĩ bɛkɛna a kɔtɔ, kĩ oti anɛ kadã lɛláana nɛ foe kamɛ.

Title: KOLOSEFƆ 4
Content:
1Mi balate mikɛna lɛtsa a kĩ lɛfɛta, mɔ likĩ lɛnɛnɛ lɛmɛ mikpa mi basumunɛ, kitonɛkĩ minyina kĩ mideĩ Ɔlate nɛ ode.
Paulo Kpa Kɔdɛ.
2Mina nɛ mpaɛbɔ kamɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ. Ntɛ miabɔa mpaɛ ni, mi adzuni ɛdza nɛ lɛtsa mɔa akũ, mikaanyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ luwi daa. 3Mibɔa mpaɛ nɛ boe malo lɔlɔ, ayekĩ Baguma aabinya osi ɛkpa boe bude lɛtsã nɛ Kristo kalɛ kɔlawa a akũ, kĩ ke sũ finyaa malo nwaa kɔla a. 4Mibɔa mpaɛ mikpa yĩ mpuli nkpalɛ fɔlɛtsa kɔlawa kĩĩ kamɛ ntsa yededeede ndɛ ayekĩ kɛfɛta kĩ nkɛna a.
5Minyi ayekĩ míatsã nɛ nyansã kamɛ mɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ batɛ badonɛ a, lɔkɔa mikɛna osi nyɛ osi kĩ ebinya ɛkpa mi a akũ adzuma kakɛna wĩ. 6Milɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ obu kamɛ, ayekĩ fɔ́alɛ bati katse, lɔkɔa minyi ayekĩ kɛfɛta kĩ miakpa odi nyɛ odi mbuayɛ.
Kukũwɔ̃na Nkaɛ.
7Tihiko, boe ɔwaɛ̃ kĩ bɔátunɔ kalɛ, aayabi mi yĩ akũ fɔlɛtsa flee. Ɛnyɛ boe ɔkɔba ɔsumunɛ kĩ yadi ɔnɔkɔali nɛ boe Ɔlate adzuma a kamɛ. 8Ade foesũ nlamɛna ye kado nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ kĩ ɛyaabi mi boe akũ fɔlɛtsa, lɔkɔa edo mi kɔbɛ̃. 9Onesimo, boe ɔwaɛ̃ kĩ yadi ɔnɔkɔali, kĩ ɛnyɛ mi kamɛ ɔmɔa a, aatomɔ ye bɛya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃. Baabi mi lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ lɛlamɛna kaya nɛ awĩ a flee.
10Aristarko, kĩ bɔmɔ ye waa kɔla a, awɔ̃na mi. Ade ayea Marko, Barnaba ɔwaɛ̃nyole lɛmɛ awɔ̃na mi a. Ĩnya lɔtɔ nkpa mi kanyi kĩ ntɛ Marko ya ni, mitɛ ye mɔ kawɔlɛ. 11Yosua kĩ bibuki bavɛ Yusto lɛmɛ awɔ̃na mi. Bati ɛlalɛ kĩĩ odi nyɛ Yudafɔ kĩ bɛdani Kristofɔ bakɛna mɔ yĩ adzuma a bɔkpa Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a. Ade ye alɛ kado yĩ a.
12Epafra, Kristo ɔsumunɛ, kĩ ɛnyɛ mi kamɛ ɔmɔa a lɛmɛ awɔ̃na mi. Yabɔa mpaɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ luwi daa nɛ mi lɔlɔ kĩ midza pintii, mibo anɛ mikpɔla nɛ katɛkado kamɛ, lɔkɔa mikɛna Baguma kawɛ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ. 13Yĩ mɔawɛ a maapuli ndi ye akũ adansiɛ kĩ yakɛna adzuma mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kakpa mi, mɔ bati a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Laodikea mɔ Hierapoli. 14Boe ɔwaɛ̃ Luka, tutsonu ɔkɛnanɛ a kĩ bɔátunɔ kalɛ a, mɔ Dema awɔ̃na mi. 15Miwɔ̃na boe bawaɛ̃ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Laodikea mikpa boe. Ade ayea miwɔ̃na boe ɔwaɛ̃ Nimfa mɔ asɔli bati a kĩ batsɛna nɛ ye tɔtɔ kamɛ a lɛmɛ mikpa boe a.
16Ntɛ mikã ovoli kĩĩ miyua ni, midã kĩ bɛnakã ye bɛkpa asɔli bati a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Laodikea lɛmɛ. Ade ayea kɛnɛ kĩ mi malo miakã ovoli a kĩ asɔli bati a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Laodikea aakɔa bɛma mi a.
17Nɛ kawũna a, mibi Arkipo kĩ boe Ɔlate ɔsum adzuma a kĩ bɛkɔa bido nɛ ye awɛ a ni, ɛdã kĩ ɛkɛna ye ewũna pɛpɛɛpɛ.
18Yĩ Paulo mɔawɛ lɛkɔa yĩ awɛ ntsɛlɛ kawɔ̃na fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ. Mite anɛ kĩ mbuki nwaa kɔla!
Baguma kɔnyakamɔ a, kitomɔ mi.

Title: 1 TESALONIKAFƆ 1
Content:
Bɔawɔ̃na Mi.
1Yĩ Paulo, Silvano mɔ Timoteo, bɔtsɛlɛ ovoli kĩĩ bɔama mi a kĩ minyɛ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo bade a nɛ Tesalonika a. Baguma boe Ɔlɛga mɔ boe Ɔlate bɛmɔ mi kɔnya, bɛkpa mi lukudɔ lɛmɛ.
Bɔanyɛ Baguma Kɔlɛ Kĩ Mikɔa Mi Akũ Mikpa Ye.
2Bɔanyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ nɛ mi flee lɔlɔ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ ade daa ntɛ bɔabɔa mpaɛ ni, bɔakɔa mi fɔlɛtsa kayi nɛ ye anɛ. 3Bɔálɛla Baguma boe Ɔlɛga kabi ayekĩ mipini mi katɛkado miakɔa kakɛna adzuma. Bɔalɛ lɛmɛ ayekĩ miabumɔ bati nɛ ɔdɔ kamɛ, mɔ ayekĩ mikɔa anɛ mite nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo akũ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ.
4Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, bunyina kĩ Baguma awɛ mi kalɛ paa, ade ɛpau mi kĩ minya ye bati lɛmɛ a. 5Kalɛ Wĩ a kĩ bɔyabi mi a ni, nnɛ́ kalɛ pupulidza kanɛ, mbom nɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa kɔbɛ̃ kamɛ ni, mitɛ foe kĩ ɔnɔkɔali fɔlɛtsa fɔanɛ. Mimɔ́ ayekĩ bupi boe akũ nɛ mi kamɛ kĩ fɔnya kabumɛna fɔkpa mi. 6Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, mitomɔ boe mɔ boe Ɔlate ɔbla a, foesũ titɔ kĩ mimɔ́ lubo pii malo ni, mitɛ kalɛ a mɔ kawɔlɛ kĩ kito Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a sɛkɛ̃. 7Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ ni, midani nfantuhũ mikpa batɛ badonɛ flee a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Makedonia mɔ Akaia. 8Lɛmɛ nnɛ́ boe Ɔlate kalɛ kĩĩ odi lɛgba kito mi sɛkɛ̃ kɛnaa Makedonia mɔ Akaia flee, mbom mi Baguma katɛkado lɛmɛ gba nɛ kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ. Foesũ fɔtásĩ kĩ bɔlɛ kadi nɛ foe akũ. 9Be mɔawɛ a balɛ ayekĩ mitɛ boe nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ bɔya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃, mɔ ayekĩ mifɔ̃ baviɔ̃ kasum, mikɔa mi akũ mikpa Baguma kĩ ye odi dzi nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna a. 10Ade midzi miadzɔlɛ ye Obi Yesu a kĩ ɛdzɛla etomɛna banɔkpa kamɛ, kĩ yaabuki eto ode lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ ɛya a. Ade Yesu kĩĩ odi aapuli ɛnyɛ boe etomɛna kalɔkpa a kĩ Baguma aana nɛ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ flee akũ a kamɛ a.

Title: 1 TESALONIKAFƆ 2
Content:
Paulo Kɛna Adzuma Nɛ Tesalonika.
1Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, miawɛ minyina kĩ boe kaya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ a tánya kɔa. 2Minyina ayekĩ bɛmɔna boe lubo, bivũna boe nɛ Filipi fɔmɔ bɔyawo mi sɛkɛ̃ nɛ Tesalonika. Lɛmɛ titɔ kĩ biyidza bɛdza nɛ boe akũ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ nɛ awã malo ni, Baguma do boe kɔbɛ̃ bubi mi ye Kalɛ Wĩ a. 3Kɔdɛ a kĩ bɔakpa mi a táto bati kakɛ, adzuni kpa ĩye tɛdake tisi kamɛ, 4mbom bubi mi kalɛ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma wɛ kĩ bɔlɛ, kitonɛkĩ ye mɔawɛ a ɛsɔ boe ɛdã, ɛmɔ́ kĩ bɔfɛta bɔkpa ye Kalɛ Wĩ a kalɛ. Foesũ bɔáwɛ kĩ bɔalɛ bati limu boe, mbom kĩ boe kɔdzɛla kalɛ aawo Baguma a kĩ enyina bati ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ a anɛ. 5Minyina pefee kĩ nnɛ́ onukpɛ̃ mɛnɛmɛnɛ fɔlɛtsa bɔkɔa bɔma mi, ade ke bɔtábɛɛlɛ anɛ nɛ odima fɔtsa akũ da a. Baguma odi nyɛ boe ɔdansini. 6Bɔtáwɛ kamu butomɛna mi ĩye bati bɛbã sɛkɛ̃.
Titɔ kĩ boe ndɛ Kristo fɔtɔ banyanɛ aye budeĩ osi kĩ bɔavia fɔtsa butomɛna mi sɛkɛ̃ malo ni, 7bupi boe akũ nɛ mi kamɛ ndɛ obima kĩ yadãmɛna ye babi akũ aye. 8Nɛ ayekĩ bɔawɛ mi kalɛ paa sũ ni, bɔawɛ kĩ mi malo minu Kalɛ Wĩ kĩĩ. Ade fɔnyɛ́ Baguma Kalɛ Wĩ kĩĩ odi, mbom bɔkɔa boe mɔawɛ akũ bɔkpa mi, kitonɛkĩ mitɛ kɔya mikpa boe paa. 9Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mite anɛ ayekĩ lɔkɔ a kĩ bɔna nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃, bɔkabi mi Baguma Kalɛ Wĩ a, bɔkɛna adzuma lɛnyɛ mɔ suwa bɔdã boe akũ, ayekĩ bɔláakɔa fɔlɔtsa fudima bute nɛ odima akũ.
10Mi mɔawɛ a mɔ Baguma míapuli midi boe akũ adansiɛ kĩ, kĩ budzi nɛ mi batɛ badonɛ kamɛ a, bupi boe akũ kapi wĩ. Bɔkɛna fɔtsa wĩ, ade odima támɔ nfumusu nɛ boe akũ a. 11Minyina lɛmɛ kĩ bɔlɛ odi nyɛ odi ndɛ ayekĩ obilɛga alɛ ye babi. 12Budo mi kɔbɛ̃, bɔkadɔla mi tɔwɔlɛ, ade bɔkadɛ mi kĩ midzi nkpã kĩ yaadɔ Baguma sɛmɛ. Ye mɔawɛ lɛvɛ mi kĩ mina nkpã katɛ nɛ ye lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ mɔ kukũkpalɛ a kamɛ.
13Ade lɛtsa bɛbã sũ kĩ bɔanyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ daa nyɛ kĩ lɔkɔ a kĩ bubi mi Baguma kalɛ wĩ kĩĩ a, mitákɔa ke mikɛna batidziwa kalɛ, mbom mibu ke, mitɛ ke ndɛ Baguma kalɛ aye, kĩ kɛnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ. Baguma kalɛ kĩĩ akɛna adzuma nɛ mi batɛ badonɛ a nkpã kadzi kamɛ.
14Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya nɛ mi akũ nɛ awĩ a, ade foe mɔapɛ a lɛya nɛ Baguma bati akũ nɛ Yudea tite akũ a. Lubo a kĩ mimɔ́ mitomɛna mi bati mɔawɛ kamɛ a, ade de Yudafɔ a kĩ bɛtɛ Yesu bido a lɛmɛ mɔ́ bitomɛna Yudafɔ mɔawɛ kamɛ a. 15Yudafɔ kĩĩ lɛkɔ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ, bɛfɔ̃ bɛkɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu lɛmɛ, ade be tomɔ boe malo liti a. Be fɔkɛlatsa do Baguma kalɔkpa ade biyidza bɛdza nɛ bati flee akũ a. 16Bɛbɔa mbɔdi kĩ basua boe osi kĩ bɔtabi bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a kalɛ wĩ a kĩ kaafɔ̃ bɛna nkpã a kĩ ɛlá kawũna a. Nɛ fukĩĩ kakɛna kamɛ ni, bɛkakɛna tɔkpa pii kabu be tɔkpa. Finyaa Baguma kalɔkpa yidza nɛ be akũ.
Paulo Kawɛ Kĩ Yanaasɛla Asɔli a.
17Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ade fuwi sukuloo kĩ bɔdzakũ bɔfɔnɛ mi a. Titɔ kĩ bɔámɔ akũ anɛ mɔ anɛ malo ni, bɔakɔna mi akũ paa. Bɔwɛ paa ade bɔbɔa mbɔdi kĩ bɔayaamɔ mi a. 18Bɔwɛ kĩ bubuki bɔyaasɛla mi. Yĩ Paulo kɔ̃ ɔnɔkɔali mbɔa mbɔdi pii kĩ maya, lɛmɛ Abonsam tákpa osi. 19Fɔnyɛ yĩ kawɛ paa kĩ ĩyaasɛla mi kitonɛkĩ mi akũ bute anɛ, minyɛ boe kawɔlɛ lɛmɛ. Ade minyɛ boe nfasɔ a kĩ foesũ bɔ́ata akũ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ boe Ɔlate Yesu aabuki ɛya a. 20Ɔnɔkɔali ni, minyɛ boe obu mɔ kawɔlɛ a.

Title: 1 TESALONIKAFƆ 3
Content:
1Nɛ ayekĩ bɔláapuli bubuki budo ɔwɔlɛ sũ ni, buke otse kĩ bɔakahɔ nɛ Atene, 2ade ke budo Timoteo kĩ ɛyaado mi kɔbɛ̃, ebumɛna mi nɛ mi katɛkado kamɛ. Ɛnyɛ boe ɔwaɛ̃ kĩ yabumɛna boe nɛ Baguma adzuma mɔ Kristo Kalɛ Wĩ a kalɛ kamɛ. 3Bɔkɛna foe lɔmɔ kitonɛkĩ bɔtáwɛ kĩ bati liti katomɛna kĩĩ kiveli odima akpɔ. Mi mɔawɛ minyina kĩ bati liti katomɛna kĩĩ waa kɛkpa boe a kĩ butomɔ Kristo. 4Míate anɛ kĩ lɔkɔ a kĩ bɔna nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ a, bɔkpa kanyi bɔnyamɛna lɔtɔ kĩ bati liti katomɛna aaya. Ade ndɛ ayekĩ minyina a, fɔya lɔmɔ pɛpɛɛpɛ. 5Nɛ ayekĩ maápuli mbuki ndo ɔwɔlɛ sũ ni, ndo Timoteo kĩ ɛyaadã ayekĩ mi katɛkado la. Nkavila kĩ ɔsa okesĩnɛ a yasɔ mi ɛdã, lɔkɔa boe adzuma kakɛna a flee kɛna pupulidza.
Mi Katɛkado Ade Boe Kawɔlɛ.
6Lɛmɛ Timoteo muniki ɛya mɔ kawɔlɛ ɛyabi boe kĩ mi katɛkado mɔ tɔwaɛ̃ kawɛ távɛmɛna. Ɛlɛ kĩ miate anɛ nɛ boe akũ daa, ade miawɛ osi kĩ míamɔ boe ndɛ ayekĩ boe malo bɔawɛ kĩ bɔamɔ mi a. 7Foesũ nwaɛ̃ amɛ, nɛ boe lubo kamɔ mɔ kasuli kamɛ malo ni, mi katɛkado do boe kɔbɛ̃, 8kitonɛkĩ ntɛ midzɛ̃ kɔɔba nɛ boe Ɔlate kamɛ ni, nkpã vɔɛ̃ awo nɛ boe kamɛ.
9Bɔ́apuli bɔnyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ nɛ mi lɔlɔ fuwo ye anɛ? Kawɔlɛ baũ ade boe nɛ Baguma anɛ, nɛ mi sũ. 10Lɛnyɛ mɔ suwa bɔake boe Ɔlate aduli mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ ɛfɔ̃ bubuki bɔmɔ́ akũ lɔkɔa bɔkpa mi lɛtsa a kĩ lisĩ nɛ mi katɛkado kamɛ.
11Finyaakĩĩ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga, mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu bibinya osi bɛkpa boe lɔkɔa bɔya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃. 12Boe Ɔlate ɛfɔ̃ mi akũ kalɛkawɛ mɔ bati bɛbã kalɛkawɛ a kide nɛ ode kibu, ndɛ ayekĩ bɔwɛ mi a. 13Fukĩĩ fɔfɔ̃ edo mi kɔbɛ̃, ɛkɛna mikpɔla, ɛkɛna mi bati kpalɛwa nɛ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga anɛ, kɛnaawo luwi a kĩ boe Ɔlate Yesu mɔ ye bade a flee kĩ bɛkpalɛ a aabuki bɛya.

Title: 1 TESALONIKAFƆ 4
Content:
Midzi Nkpã a Kĩ Yaawo Baguma Anɛ.
1Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ke kawũna a, mikɔlɛ mitomɛna boe sɛkɛ̃ ayekĩ míadzi nkpã kĩ yaawo Baguma anɛ. Ade aye midzi kɔkɔɛ a, lɛmɛ bɔado mi fi, nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu dĩ akũ kĩ mikɛna fɔba lɔmɔ. 2Minyina fɔtsa a kĩ foe bɔtsa mi nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu dĩ akũ a. 3Baguma awɛ kĩ mi akũ ɛkpalɛ nɛ linyolewɛ mɔ litsolewɛ akũ. 4Onyole nyɛ onyole enyi ɔtsɔ̃ kapi wĩ nɛ kukũkpalɛ mɔ obu kamɛ, 5ɛtatomɔ sukɛna fɔwɛtsa ɔmɛnɛ liti ndɛ bikĩ binyína Baguma aye. 6Nɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ akũ ni, odima ɛtakɛna tɔkpa nɛ ɔkɔba akũ ĩye esisi ye. Bubi mi fukĩĩ tɔ̃, buke mi awɛ nɛ akũ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ boe Ɔlate aavɛlɛ bikĩ bakɛna fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ a sɔtɔ. 7Baguma távɛ boe kĩ bɔnya bati kĩ be akũ deĩ efĩĩ, mbom bɔnya bikĩ be akũ kpalɛ. 8Nɛ foesũ ntɛ odi sĩ nhihiɛ kĩĩ akũ kakɛna ni, nnɛ́ otidziwa esĩ, mbom eyidza ɛdza nɛ Baguma kĩ yakɔa ye Hũhũ Kpalɛwa kakpa mi a akũ.
9Nɛ mi bawaɛ̃ batɛ badonɛ akũ kalɛkawɛ akũ kɔ̃ ni, fɔtásĩ kĩ matsɛlɛ litsedi nɛ foe akũ, kitonɛkĩ Baguma tsa mi kɔkɔɛ kĩ miwɛ mi akũ kalɛ. 10Fɔnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kĩ miawɛ mi bawaɛ̃ batɛ badonɛ flee a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Makedonia flee a kalɛ, lɛmɛ bɔake mi aduli kĩ mikɛna foe fɔba lɔmɔ. 11Mi botaɛ fɔnya kĩ miadzi nkpã nɛ akũ kadɔla kamɛ, odi nyɛ odi ɛdã ye adzuma. Mikɔa awɛ mikɛna mi mɔawɛ adzuma minya ndɛ ayekĩ bubi mi a. 12Fukĩĩ aafɔ̃ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ batɛ badonɛ a lɛkpa mi obu, lɔkɔa miláakɔa anɛ mite nɛ odima lɛtsama akũ.
Mitakabe Kɔnya Ndɛ Bati Kĩ Bɛlá Kɔnɛte.
13Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, bɔawɛ kĩ bɔabi mi lɛtsa kĩ laaya nɛ bati kĩ biku bɛtɛ̃ a akũ, ayekĩ miláadzi nɛ ayɔlɔhɔ kamɛ ndɛ bati kĩ bɛlá kɔnɛte. 14Bɔtɛ budo kĩ Yesu ku ade ebuki eyidza edzi nkpã a. Foesũ bɔtɛ budo kĩ batɛ badonɛ flee a kĩ biku a ni, Baguma aafɔ̃ Yesu lɛkpã be ɛyamɛna nɛ ye kaya kamɛ. 15Lɛtsa a kĩ bɔatsa mi finyaakĩĩ nyɛ boe Ɔlate fɔtsa katsa, kĩ boe a kĩ bɔ́adzi nkpã nɛ luwi a kĩ boe Ɔlate aaya akũ a ni, bɔláanya bikĩ biku a lɔtɔ mɔ ode kanaa. 16Nɛ lɔkɔ a na ni, bɔ́anu boe Ɔlate kaya a mɔ fɔwɔla kɔɔba. Bɔ́anu ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a odo. Baguma kagbulɛɛ aanɛ, lɔkɔa boe Ɔlate mɔawɛ aato ode ɛya. Bati a kĩ bɛtɛ Kristo bido fɔmɔ biku a aanya lɔtɔ biyidza. 17Ke liti a, Baguma aakpɔta boe a kĩ bute budzi nkpã a ɛnaabumɔ bikĩ biyidza a, bɔnaatsɛlamɔ boe Ɔlate nɛ odetɔ́ kamɛ. Lɔkɔa bɔ́adzi nɛ boe Ɔlate a sɛkɛ̃ daa. 18Foesũ mikɔa fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ mikaadɔla mi bawaɛ̃ tɔwɔlɛ.

Title: 1 TESALONIKAFƆ 5
Content:
Mimanɛ Akũ Mikpa Boe Ɔlate Kaya Luwi a.
1Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, fɔtásĩ kĩ matsɛlɛ lɛtsama mma mi futomɛna lɔkɔ ĩye fuwi a kĩ fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ aaya a akũ, 2kitonɛkĩ mi mɔawɛ minyina yededeede kĩ boe Ɔlate Kaya Luwi a aaya ndɛ ayekĩ oyekpanɛ afuta oti mɔ lɛnyɛ. 3Lɔkɔ a kĩ bati alɛ kĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa yamɔ lukudɔ mɔ kadzi wĩ a, ade lɔkɔ a na kamɛ pɛpɛɛpɛ mɔ baawɔla be deedimɔapɛ a. Fɔ́aya ndɛ ayekĩ sɛmɛ api ɔmatsɔ̃, ade kalo lɛláana a.
4Lɛmɛ, nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mi kɔ̃ miláa ɔtũ kamɛ. Foesũ luwi a na lɛtayaafuta mi ndɛ oyekpanɛ aye, 5kitonɛkĩ mi flee minyɛ ɔhaĩ bati. Ade bɔnyɛ́ bati kĩ bakɛna fɔtsa nɛ lɛnyɛ ĩye ɔtũ kamɛ a. 6Foesũ mitawa tida ndɛ bati bɛbã, mbom mina nɛ kukũmanɛ mɔ kɔnɛte kamɛ. 7Lɛnyɛ bati awa tida, ade bikĩ bavɛ bamɔa kawuga ni, lɛnyɛ bawugɛla be. 8Lɛmɛ kĩ ɔhaĩ kamɛ bati bɔanɛ sũ ni, mifɔ̃ bɔkɔa boe katɛkado mɔ ɔdɔ bɔkɛna ɔwɔlɛ libĩĩ katɛ sɔbɔtsaɛ, mɔ boe kɔnɛte nɛ boe nkpã akũ bɔkɛna sɔbɔtsaɛ lɔbɔɛ. 9Kitonɛkĩ Baguma tápau boe kĩ yaakɔa ye kawũnaba a ɛwɔla boe, mbom kĩ bɔ́atsã boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo akũ bɔna nkpã katɛ. 10Yesu ku nɛ boe lɔlɔ, kĩ ntɛ budzi o-o, ĩye ntɛ buku o-o, bɔ́adzimɔ ye nɛ ye kabuki kaya kamɛ. 11Nɛ foesũ ni, mikaado akũ fi, mikaabumɛna akũ ndɛ ayekĩ milamɛna kakɛna finyaa a.
Minyɛ Mi Akũ Nɛ Osi Kpa a Akũ.
12Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, bɔake mi aduli kĩ mikɔa obu wĩ mikpa mi lɔtɔ banyanɛ a kĩ bakɛna adzuma nɛ mi kamɛ, kakpã mi nɛ Kristo nkpã kadzi kamɛ a. 13Miwɛ be kalɛ, mikpa be obu paa nɛ adzuma a kĩ bakɛna a sũ. Ade midzi mɔ akũ nɛ lukudɔ kamɛ a.
14Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, bɔawɛ kĩ midɛ banyɔnɛpo, mido bikĩ bideĩ libe a ɔwɔlɛ, mibumɛna bikĩ akpɔ veli be a. Mina ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ mikpa odi nyɛ odi. 15Midã kadã wĩ kĩ odima ɛtakɔa tɔkpa ese tɔkpa kɔtɔ, mbom mibɔa mbɔdi kĩ miakɛna tuwĩ mikpa akũ mɔ odi nyɛ odi.
16Mimɔ kawɔlɛ luwi daa. 17Mikaabɔa mpaɛ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ. 18Minyɛ boe Ɔlate kɔlɛ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ ade fukĩĩ bamɛ Baguma awɛ etomɛna be a kĩ bitomɔ Yesu Kristo a.
19Mitasua Hũhũ Kpalɛwa kɔbɛ̃ a osi. 20Mitasupa Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ fɔlɛtsa a. 21Mbom misɔ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa midã lɔkɔa mipi fuwĩ a midomɔ akũ. 22Milo nɛ tɔkpa tidi nyɛ tidi ɔwɛ̃.
23Bɔwɛ kĩ Baguma kĩ yakpa boe lukudɔ a, ɛkpalɛ mi akũ nɛ osi nyɛ osi akũ, ɛdã mi hũhũ, mi tɛkla mɔ mi sukɛna flee. Ɛnyɛ mi nɛ mfumsu flee kamɛ nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo kabuki kaya a kamɛ. 24Baguma a kĩ ɛvɛ mi a aakɛna foe, kitonɛkĩ yadi ɔnɔkɔali.
25Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mikaabɔa mpaɛ nɛ boe malo lɔlɔ. 26Bɔawɔ̃na batɛ badonɛ a flee nɛ ɔdɔ mɔ kawɔlɛ kamɛ. 27Mawã mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo kɔbɛ̃ akũ kĩ mikã ovoli kĩĩ mitsa batɛ badonɛ a flee.
28Boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo ɛmɔ mi kɔnya.

Title: 2 TESALONIKAFƆ 1
Content:
1Yĩ, Paulo, Silvano mɔ Timoteo, bɔtsɛlɛ ovoli kĩĩ bɔama mi a kĩ minyɛ Baguma mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo bade a nɛ Tesalonika. 2Bɔwɛ kĩ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga, mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo, bɛmɔ mi kɔnya, bɛkpa mi lukudɔ lɛmɛ.
Bɔawã Baguma Kĩ Mi Kadzi Kamɛ Kiketimɔ Ye Kavɛ a.
3Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, kɛnɛ kĩ bɔanyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ nɛ mi lɔlɔ. Fɔnɛnɛ kĩ bɔanyɛ ye kɔlɛ, kitonɛkĩ mi katɛkado abo anɛ, ade mi bawaɛ̃ akũ kawɛ lɛmɛ lamɛna lɔtɔ kanaa a. 4Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ bɔapia nɛ mi akũ katsa Baguma tɛsɔli a. Bɔapia lɛmɛ nɛ ayekĩ midzɛ̃ pintii nɛ mi katɛkado a akũ, titɔ kĩ bitomɔ mi liti ade miamɔ lubo lɛmɛ.
5Fukĩĩ flee atsa kĩ Baguma kadzɛ kamɛ kpalɛ, nɛ foesũ yaamɔ mi kĩ mikpɔla mikpa kadzikɔ̃ nɛ ye lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kĩ de akũ miamɔ lubo a kamɛ. 6Baguma aakɛna lɛtsa a kĩ lɛnɛnɛ nɛ de osi akũ, ade yaavɛlɛ lubo kamɔ eko nɛ bikĩ bɛmɔna mi lubo akũ a. 7Yaafɔ̃ mi a kĩ mimɔ́ lubo a, mɔ boe a flee bɔna kawɛya. Baguma aakɛna fukĩĩ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ boe Ɔlate Yesu mɔ ye ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ anɛ nɛ odetɔ́ kamɛ nɛ fi mɔ kɔbɛ̃ kamɛ. 8Yaavɛlɛ bati a kĩ binyína Baguma, mɔ bikĩ bisĩ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo Kalɛ Wĩ a sɔtɔ. 9Boe Ɔlate aablɔmɛna be nɛ ye anɛ kamɛ mɔ ye awã kĩ ye kukũkpalɛ mɔ ye kɔbɛ̃ deĩ a. Yaawɔla be mɔ odu mɔ odu, 10ntɛ ɛya nɛ Luwi kpale a akũ. Yaatɛ obu mɔ kamu etomɛna ye batɛ badonɛ a flee sɛkɛ̃. Mi malo míana nɛ be kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ mitɛ ye fɔlɛtsa wĩ a kĩ bubi mi a mido.
11Ade fukĩĩ sũ bɔabɔa mpaɛ nɛ mi lɔlɔ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ a. Bɔawã Baguma kĩ ɛfɔ̃ mi kadzi kamɛ kiketimɔ kavɛ a kĩ ɛvɛ mi a. Ye kɔbɛ̃ kɔfɔ̃ mi tuwĩ kakɛna flee nɛ mi katɛkado kamɛ a fɔya nɛ foe kamɛ. 12Fɔ́atsã fukĩĩ akũ boe Ɔlate Yesu dĩ aade nɛ ode, mi malo mina dĩ kadɛla nɛ ode mitomɛna ye sɛkɛ̃ nɛ Baguma mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo kɔnyakamɔ sũ.

Title: 2 TESALONIKAFƆ 2
Content:
Mitafɔ̃ Bati Badima Lɛkɛ Mi.
1Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, bɔawɛ kĩ bɔabi mi fɔlɛtsa fudi nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo kabuki kaya mɔ boe kakpɔta nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ a akũ. 2Ntɛ minu kĩ boe Ɔlate kaya luwi a ya kɔkɔɛ ni, mitafɔ̃ mi kakɔna litutulu ĩye libe liwo mi. Ɔsa míakɔna kĩ boe lɛlɛ fukĩĩ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ bɔnyɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃, ĩye kĩ bɔlɛ Baguma kalɛ a, ĩye kĩ bɔtsɛlɛ ovoli odi bɔma mi. 3Mitafɔ̃ oti odima lɛkɛ mi nɛ osi odima akũ, kitonɛkĩ boe Ɔlate luwi a lɛláaya mbɔɛntɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ bati pii aayidza bɛdza nɛ Baguma akũ a ya, ade oti kpa a kĩ Baguma nyɛ eyi kĩ yaawɔla a aanɛ ɛdza a. 4Oti Kpa a aayidza ɛdza nɛ Baguma Hũhũ kɔbɛ̃ adi nyɛ adi akũ, ĩye lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ bati asum akũ, lɔkɔa ɛbɔɛ ye akũ kĩ ɛbɛ̃ hũhũ a flee. Malo kɔlaa, yanadzá nɛ Baguma Asɔli Kɔla kamɛ, ɛkɛna ye akũ kĩ ye nyɛ Baguma mɔawɛ a.
5Miáte anɛ kĩ lɔkɔ a kĩ nna nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ a mbi mi fukĩĩ bamɛ? 6Lɛmɛ kɔbɛ̃ kudi sua foe kaya osi finyaakĩĩ. Mi mɔawɛ a minyina lɛtsa kĩ fɔanɛ. Oti Kpa a aanyɛ ye akũ kanya ntɛ ye lɔkɔ wo ɔtɔ. 7Tɔkpa kakɛna kɔbɛ̃ lamɛna adzuma kakɛna nɛ kabɛla kamɛ kɔkɔɛ. Lɛmɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔ́aya a ni, fɔláaya nɛ foe kamɛ tɔ̃ kɛnaawo kĩ Baguma nyɛ oti a kĩ yasua foe osi. 8Fukĩĩ liti ni, Baguma aanyɛ oti kpa a kanya, lɛmɛ ntɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu ya ni, yaakɔa ye onukpɛ̃ kamɛ otutuo ɛkɔ ye lɔkɔa ɛkɔa ye kukũkpalɛ ɛwɔla ye. 9Oti Kpa a na aaya mɔ Abonsam kɔbɛ̃, lɔkɔa ɛkɛna awãwã mɔ fɔvã nsɛntsɛlɛni fɔtsa kumɛkumɛ. 10Ade bati a kĩ baya kawɔkɔ̃ a ni, oti kpa a aatsã ablɔ tɛdake tisi nyɛ tisi akũ ɛkɛ be. Baawɔ kitonɛkĩ bɛtátɛ ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ wĩ a kĩ fɔ́afɔ̃ Baguma lɛkpa be nkpã a bido. 11Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ, Baguma aakɔa hũhũ kĩ yaafɔ̃ bɛyɛla osi edo nɛ be kamɛ ayekĩ baatɛ fɔvã kama fɔlɛtsa bido. 12Foe kawũna aanya kĩ, Baguma aakɔ be flee kɔtɔ, kitonɛkĩ bɛtátɛ ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a bido, mbom bamɔ kawɔlɛ nɛ tɔkpa kakɛna akũ.
Bɛpau Mi Kĩ Mina Nkpã.
13Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, kɛfɛta kĩ bɔanyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ daa nɛ mi lɔlɔ, kitonɛkĩ yawɛ mi kalɛ paa. Kito anɛ kayɔkayi a, Baguma nyɛ mi kĩ mina katɛ. Ɛkɔa ye Hũhũ Kpalɛwa ɛkpalɛ mi akũ nɛ ayekĩ mitɛ kalɛ wĩ a mido sũ. 14Ade fɔtsã Kalɛ Wĩ a kĩ bubi mi a akũ sũ ni, Baguma vɛ mi kĩ miyaana tsɛfã nɛ boe Ɔlate Kristo kukũkpalɛ a kamɛ. 15Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ, nwaɛ̃ amɛ, midza kɔɔba, mipi ɔnɔkɔali fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɔtsa mi nɛ boe fɔtsa katsa, mɔ boe tuvoli kamɛ a midomɔ akũ.
16Bɔawã boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo, mɔ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga kĩ yawɛ boe kalɛ a, kĩ nɛ ye kɔnyakamɔ kamɛ ni, ɛkpa boe ɔwɔlɛ kado mɔ kɔnɛte pii, 17ɛkpa mi kɔbɛ̃, edo mi tɔwɔlɛ fi nɛ kɔdzɛla wĩ kalɛ, mɔ tudzuma wĩ kakɛna kamɛ.

Title: 2 TESALONIKAFƆ 3
Content:
Mite Anɛ Mikaabɔa Mpaɛ Nɛ Boe Lɔlɔ.
1Yĩ kalɛ kawũnade nyɛ kĩ, nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mibɔa mpaɛ nɛ boe lɔlɔ ayekĩ boe Ɔlate kalɛ a aagba nɛ fɔkɔ kumɛkumɛ, lɔkɔa bɛtɛ ke mɔ obu ndɛ ayekĩ fɔna nɛ mi kamɛ a. 2Mibɔa mpaɛ lɛmɛ kĩ Baguma ɛnyɛ boe etomɛna tɔkpa mɔ bati kpa awɛ kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ nnɛ́ bati flee lɛtɛ kalɛ a bido. 3Lɛmɛ boe Ɔlate nyɛ ɔnɔkɔalini, ade yaado mi kɔbɛ̃, ɛdã mi akũ ayekĩ okesĩnɛ a lɛláanya mi akũ. 4Boe Ɔlate akpa boe katɛkado nɛ mi akũ kĩ míakɛna nɛ fukĩ bɔtsa mi a akũ, ade bɔatɛ kado kĩ míakɛna nɛ foe akũ lɛmɛ a. 5Bɔawã Baguma kĩ ɛkpa mi ye ɔdɔ a kayɔkanu baũ, mɔ ɔwɔlɛ kado a kĩ Kristo akpa a.
Mikɛna Mi Tudzuma.
6Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, bɔasi mi mbla nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo dĩ akũ kĩ mivɛlɛ mi akũ nɛ batɛ badonɛ banyɔnɛpo a kĩ baákɛna nɛ fɔtsa kĩ bɔtsa mi akũ a ɔwɛ̃. 7Mi mɔawɛ minyina yededeede kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ miakɛna adzuma ndɛ ayekĩ boe malo bɔkɛna a, kitonɛkĩ bɔtákɛna ɔnyɔnɛ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ bɔna nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ a. 8Bɔtákɔa boe kanya bute nɛ odima akũ kĩ bɔtáse kɔtɔ. Mbom bɔkɛna adzuma mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ lɛnyɛ mɔ suwa ayekĩ odima lɛláabɔa kɔtɔ nɛ boe akũ kadã kamɛ. 9Budeĩ osi kufɛ kĩ bɔakɔa boe akũ kadã bute nɛ mi akũ, lɛmɛ bɔkɛna foe kĩ mikɔlɛ mitomɛna boe sɛkɛ̃. 10Míate anɛ kĩ lɔkɔ a kĩ bɔna nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ a, bɔkabi mi kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ esĩ kĩ yaakɛna adzuma ni, ɛtanya lɛmɛ.
11Bɔabi mi fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ kitonɛkĩ bɔanu kĩ banyɔnɛpo badi deĩ nɛ mi kamɛ, kĩ baákɛna lɛtsama kɛba bakɔba akũ fɔlɛtsa katsã kalɛ. 12Bɔasi bati kĩĩ mbla bɔkpa be kɔdɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo dĩ akũ, kĩ bidzi kadzi wĩ lɔkɔa bɛkɛna adzuma bɛdã be mɔawɛ akũ.
13Lɛmɛ, nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mitafɔ̃ akpɔ liveli mi nɛ tuwĩ kakɛna kamɛ. 14Ade ntɛ odi lákɛna nɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɔabi mi nɛ ovoli kĩĩ kamɛ akũ ni, miyi ye ɔsũ lɔkɔa mifɔnɛ ye awɛ, kɔnyɔã kuwo ye. 15Lɛmɛ mitabɔɛ ye likesĩ, mbom midɛ ye ndɛ ɔwaɛ̃ aye.
Bɔakla Mi.
16Bɔawã boe Ɔlate mɔawɛ a kĩ ɛnyɛ lukudɔ oti a, kĩ ɛkpa mi lukudɔ daa nɛ mi kadzi kamɛ. Boe Ɔlate ɛdãmɛna mi flee akũ.
17Yĩ Paulo mɔawɛ lɛtsɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ makla mi. Ade aye mado awɛ nɛ yĩ tuvoli flee kayɔ a, ade aye lɛmɛ matsɛlɛ fɔtsa a. 18Bɔawã kĩ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo ɛmɔ mi flee kɔnya.

Title: 1 TIMOTEO 1
Content:
1Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ, Paulo, kĩ ĩnyɛ Yesu Kristo fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ, kĩ Baguma boe Ɔtɛnɛ a pau, mɔ Kristo Yesu kĩ ye akũ budeĩ kɔnɛte a sɛkɛ̃. 2Nkɔa mmɛna nɔ Timoteo, kĩ ɔnyɛ yĩ obi nɛ katɛkado kamɛ. Mawã kĩ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga, mɔ Kristo Yesu boe Ɔlate bɛmɔ mi kɔnya, bɛkɛna mi sɛmɛ kalɛ, bɛkpa mi lukudɔ lɛmɛ.
Paulo Kpa Kɔdɛ Nɛ Fɔvã Fɔlɛtsa Batsanɛ a Akũ.
3Mawɛ kĩ buki kadzi nɛ Efeso ndɛ ayekĩ nwɛ ntomɛna nɔ sɛkɛ̃ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ ndzakũ manaa Makedonia a. Bati badi deĩ nɛ awã kĩ batsa fɔvã fɔtsa nɛ Kristo katɛkado a akũ, ade kɛnɛ kĩ ate awɛ nɛ be akũ a. 4Bi be kĩ bɛfɔ̃ lɔkɔ kade kabula nɛ atitifɔ fɔlɛtsa mɔ bawanyɔ bawanyɔ kasinu katokɔ̃ fɔtsa katsa awɛ. Fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ bamɛ katsa ayamɛna fɔlɛtsa kavɛlɛ nɛ bati kayite. Foe bamɛ lɛnyɛ́ Baguma nhihiɛ kĩ ɛkɛna. Katɛkado odi kamɛ bɔatsã kanyi foe. 5Lɛtsa a kĩ de sũ makpa nɔ mbla kĩĩ nyɛ kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ bɔanyi ɔdɔ a kĩ eto ɔwɔlɛ kpalɛwa, adzuni kpalɛwa mɔ katɛkado wĩ kamɛ. 6Lɛmɛ bati badi muniki nɛ fɔtsa kĩĩ liti, foesũ bɛyɛla osi wĩ a, ade bɛkɔa be lɔkɔ bɛkpa fɔlɛtsa kavɛlɛ mɔ fɔkɔasiatsa kalɛ a. 7Bawɛ kĩ banya Mose mbla fɔtsa batsanɛ. Lɛmɛ baánu be mɔawɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ balɛ, ĩye fukĩ bɛtɛ bido mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ a kayɔ malo.
8Boe flee bunyina kĩ Mose mbla a nɛnɛ, ntɛ bɔakɛna nɛ ye akũ ndɛ ayekĩ fɔfɛta a. 9Kɛnɛ kĩ bɔate anɛ kĩ bɛtákɛna mbla bɛkpa bati wĩ, mbom bikĩ bafum Baguma mbla, bikĩ bideĩ atɔ ɔsĩ, bikĩ bɛnyɛ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ, bikĩ binyína Baguma, mɔ bikĩ tɔkpa yi be kamɛkamɛ. Badi lɛmɛ nyɛ bikĩ bɛláa katɛkado kadima kamɛ, bikĩ bakɔ be balɛga mɔ bama, mɔ awudifɔ. 10Bati bɛbã lɛmɛ nyɛ bikĩ bɛkɔa akũ bɛkpa linyolewɛ mɔ litsolewɛ, banyole kĩ bawamɔ akũ, bati kĩ bapili bati kanɔ, bavãlɛvã, bikĩ balɔ fubo kama fɔvã, mɔ be flee a kĩ bitómɔ fɔtsa wĩ a katsa. 11Fɔtsa katsa kĩĩ a deĩ nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a kĩ bɛkɔa bido nɛ yĩ awɛ kĩ nlɛ a kamɛ. Kalɛ Wĩ a to Baguma a kĩ bɔakɔa obu mɔ nhila kakpa a sɛkɛ̃.
Bɔanyɛ Baguma Kɔlɛ Nɛ Ye Kɔnya Kamɔ Sũ.
12Nláapuli ĩnyɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo kɔlɛ nɛ kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ ɛkpa yĩ nnɛɛ makɛna adzuma wĩ kĩĩ akũ. Manyɛ ye kɔlɛ kĩ ɛmɔ́ kĩ nkpɔla sũ ɛpau yĩ kĩ nkɛna ye adzuma, 13titɔ kĩ nɛ lɔkɔ lidi kamɛ ni, nsupa ye, ntomɔ ye liti, nvũna ye malo. Lɛmɛ Baguma mɔ́ yĩ kɔnya, kitonɛkĩ nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ ni, ntátɛ ye ndo ade ntányi lɛtsa a kĩ de nkakɛna a. 14Ade boe Ɔlate mɔ́ yĩ kɔnya pii, ɛfɔ̃ nna katɛkado mɔ ɔdɔ kĩ fɔnyɛ boe fude nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo Yesu kamɛ.
15Fɔlɛtsa a kĩ malɛ nɛ awĩ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ paa, kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ bati bɛtɛ ke bido. Ade foe nyɛ kĩ Kristo Yesu ya nɛ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ kĩ yayaatɛ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ. Yĩ nyɛ ɔkpade flefle nɛ be kamɛ. 16Lɛmɛ Baguma mɔ́ yĩ kɔnya ayekĩ Kristo Yesu aapuli ɛkɔa yĩ a kĩ ĩnyɛ tɔkpa ɔkɛnanɛ flee a, ɛtsa bati bɛmɔ́ ayekĩ edeĩ ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ, lɔkɔa bikĩ bayatɛ ye bido a bɛna nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna a. 17Mifɔ̃ bɔkɔa obu mɔ kamu bɔkpa boe Lɛgã kĩ edzi kito titiiti a, kĩ bɔámɔ mɔ anɛ, kĩ ye odi keĩ nyɛ Baguma a daa daa. Fɔya lɔmɔ.
18Yĩ obi Timoteo, kɔdɛ a kĩ makpa nɔ nɛ awĩ a tsɛ̃ nɛ katɛ mɔ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ lɛ nɛ nɔ akũ biyi a akũ. Kɔa fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kakɛna ndɛ kawũkanɔ fɔtsa lɔkɔa kanɔ kawũ a kanɔ wĩ. 19Pi nɔ katɛkado nɛ Kristo kamɛ mɔ ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kakpalɛ kalɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ. Bati badi tátse be tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kɔdɛ ade bɛyɛla be katɛkado a. 20Be kamɛ badi nyɛ Himenaio mɔ Aleksandro, kĩ nvɛlɛ be sɔtɔ, nkɔa be ndo nɛ Abonsam awɛ. Fukĩĩ aafɔ̃ bɛfɔ̃ fubusuotsa kalɛ nɛ Baguma akũ.

Title: 1 TIMOTEO 2
Content:
Paulo Kpa Kɔdɛ Nɛ Ɔsum Akũ.
1Fɔtsa fɔtɔnyade kĩ mawɛ kĩ mikɛna nyɛ kĩ mibɔa mpaɛ nɛ bati flee lɔlɔ. Mikaavia mi fɔtsa sĩwa mɔ be fude flee katomɛna Baguma sɛkɛ̃, mikaanyɛ ye kɔlɛ nɛ be flee lɔlɔ. 2Mikaabɔa mpaɛ kakpa fɔgã mɔ bikĩ bɛdzɛ̃ nɛ bati onukpɛ̃, ayekĩ bɔ́adzi kulokulo nɛ lukudɔ kamɛ, lɔkɔa bupuli busum Baguma nɛ obu kamɛ. 3Fukĩĩ nɛnɛ, fɔade Baguma boe Ɔtɛnɛ a kawɔlɛ, 4kitonɛkĩ yawɛ kĩ odi nyɛ odi ɛna katɛ lɔkɔa enu ɔnɔkɔali a kayɔ. 5Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, Baguma mɔapɛ deĩ, ade ayea lɛmɛ lɛma ɔkplanɛ mɔapɛ deĩ nɛ Baguma mɔ batidziwa kayite a. Ade ye nyɛ Kristo Yesu a. 6Ade ye lɔkɔa ye akũ ɛbɔa afɔliɛ nɛ bati flee lɔlɔ a. Ade fukĩĩ atsa kĩ lɔkɔ wĩ a kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi kĩ yaatɛ katinya kamɛ bati flee a wo ɔtɔ a. 7Ade fukĩĩ sũ Baguma do yĩ ndɛ fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ mɔ fɔtsa ɔtsanɛ nɛ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ sɛkɛ̃ kĩ nde lɛtsã nɛ katɛkado mɔ ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a akũ. Nnɛ́ fɔvã mama, ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ malɛ.
8Nɛ asɔli adi nyɛ adi kamɛ ni, banyole a bɛnya bikĩ be tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kpalɛ kĩ baapuli bɛdɛla akpɔ nɛ ode bɛbɔa mpaɛ kĩ kalɔkpa ĩye ɔdzɛ lɛláa be kamɛ. 9Mawɛ lɛmɛ kĩ batsole bɛdɔla be akũ, bidzi tilima nɛ osi kĩ fɔláatsɔlɛ anɛ akũ. Fɔnɛ́nɛ kĩ basui tɔlɔ nɛ kahɛhɛ kamɛ, bido sika ngbã mɔ fɔtsa kĩ fɔtɛ kɔya. Bɛtado tɛtadiɛ kĩ tatɛ kɔya lɛmɛ. 10Mbom be fɔtsakɛlawa fɔnya fɔtsa wĩ ndɛ batsole kĩ bɛkɔa be akũ bɛkpa Baguma. 11Kɛnɛ kĩ batsole bɛdɔla be akũ, bitse kulokulo bɛkɔlɛ fɔtsa. 12Ntákpa be osi kĩ batsa banyole fɔtsa ĩye kĩ bɛnya banyole akũ, mbom kɛnɛ kĩ bisua onukpɛ̃ bidzi kulokulo. 13Kitonɛkĩ Adam Baguma nya lɔtɔ ɛbɔa fɔmɔ ɛyakɛna Eva. 14Ade nnɛ́ Adam Abonsam kɛ, mbom otsole a ɛkɛ ade ɛfɔ̃ efum Baguma mbla a. 15Lɛmɛ otsole aana nkpã nɛ ye kɔma kamɛ ntɛ edzi nɛ katɛkado mɔ ɔdɔ kamɛ, ɛkɛna ye akũ yedede nɛ akũ kadɔla kamɛ lɛmɛ.

Title: 1 TIMOTEO 3
Content:
Paulo Tsa Kutidu a Kĩ Kɔfɛta Asɔli Lɔtɔ Banyanɛ.
1Fɔnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kĩ ntɛ oti odi awɛ kĩ yanya asɔli lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ ni, adzuma wĩ liti etomɛna. 2Kɛnɛ kĩ asɔli lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ ɛnya oti kĩ nfumusu lɛláa ye akũ, kĩ ɛkɔã ɔtsɔ̃ mɔapɛ, ye adzuni waa yedede, yapi ye akũ ade bati akpa ye obu a. Kɛnɛ kĩ ɛnya oti kĩ yapuli katɛ banɔvɔɛ̃ ade yapuli katsa fɔtsa a. 3Kɛtánɛ kĩ ɛnya bavɛ owuganɛ ĩye oti kĩ ye anɛ kamɛ tádɔ, mbom kɛnɛ kĩ ɛnya oti kĩ ɛdɔ, kĩ yaákɛna ɔdzɛ, ade ɛlá anɛngbã nɛ sika akũ a. 4Kɛnɛ kĩ epuli ɛdãmɛna ye tɔtɔ akũ kadãmɛna wĩ, lɔkɔa ye babi bibu fɔkɔ nɛ osi nyɛ osi akũ. 5Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ onyole lápuli ɛdãmɛna ye tɔtɔ akũ ni, nde yaapuli ɛkpã Baguma asɔli a? 6Kɛnɛ kĩ ɛnya oti kĩ ebuna owi nɛ asɔli a kamɛ, ntɛ nnɛ́ aye ni yaadɛla ye akũ nɛ ode, lɔkɔa fɔtsã lukũta kamɛ ɛyaatɔ ndɛ ayekĩ fɔya fɔkpa okesĩnɛ a. 7Kɛnɛ kĩ ɛnya oti kĩ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ batɛ badonɛ a malo abɔa ye dĩ wĩ, ayekĩ ɛláado ye akũ kɔnyɔã lɔkɔa ewo nɛ okesĩnɛ a awɛ kamɛ.
Paulo Tsa Bikĩ Be Kɛnɛ Kĩ Bɛnya Babumɛnanɛ Nɛ Asɔli Kamɛ.
8Ade aye lɛmɛ kɛnɛ kĩ asɔli lɔtɔ banyanɛ babumɛnanɛ a malo banya bati kĩ bideĩ ɔbla wĩ mɔ ɔnɔkɔali a. Bɛnya bati kĩ baáwuga bavɛ ade bɛlá anɛngbã nɛ sika lɛmɛ akũ. 9Kɛnɛ kĩ bapi katɛkado fɔlɛtsa wĩ a kĩ bɛnyɛ bɛtsa a bidomɔ akũ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ, bidzi mɔ tɔwɔlɛ kpalɛwa. 10Ade kɛnɛ kĩ basɔ be bɛdã nɛ asɔli tudzuma tidi kakɛna kamɛ. Ntɛ bɛkpɔla ni, baapuli bɛkɛna adzuma ndɛ lɔtɔ banyanɛ babumɛnanɛ aye. 11Kɛnɛ kĩ batsɔ̃ malo bɛna tɛbla wĩ, kĩ bɛtanya bati kĩ balɛ bati akũ fɔlɛtsa. Bɛnya batsole kĩ baámɔa bavɛ kawuga, kĩ badi ɔnɔkɔali nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kakɛna kamɛ. 12Dã kĩ babumɛnanɛ kĩĩ be kamɛ odi nyɛ odi deĩ ɔtsɔ̃ mɔapɛ, epuli yadãmɛna ye babi mɔ tɔtɔ kamɛ bati flee akũ kadã wĩ. 13Babumɛnanɛ a kĩ bakɛna be adzuma kakɛna wĩ a deĩ kadzakɔ̃ wĩ nɛ bati anɛ, ade baapuli bɛna ɔwɔlɛ kɔbɛ̃ bɛlɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ be Kristo Yesu katɛkado akũ a.
Miyi Kalɛ Bɛlawa Kpale a Ɔsũ.
14-15Titɔ kĩ matsɛlɛ ovoli kĩĩ mma nɔ malo ni, nlamɛna osi kadã kĩ maayasɛla nɔ nɛ lɔkɔ lukũ kamɛ. Lɛmɛ matsɛlɛ ye ayekĩ ntɛ nkpa liti ni, aanyi ayekĩ bati bipi be akũ nɛ Baguma asɔli a kamɛ. Ade asɔli a nyɛ bikĩ bɛtɛ Baguma a kĩ edzi nkpã daa bido, kĩ fɔnyɛ luku kĩ lɛnɔnɛ ɔnɔkɔali a. 16Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, kalɛ a kĩ bɛkɔa bɛkɔla nɛ Baguma ɔsum kamɛ a nyɛ kalɛ kpale kĩ odima lɛláapuli esĩ ke. Ade foe nyɛ kĩ,
“Kristo ya nɛ katinya kamɛ ndɛ otidziwa aye
Baguma Hũhũ a nyɛ ɛtsa kĩ oti kpalɛwa yanɛ.
Ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ mɔ́ ye,
ade bide lɛtsã nɛ ye akũ nɛ fude fude kamɛ a.
Bɛtɛ ye bido nɛ katinya kamɛ flee,
ade Baguma bɔɛ ye ɛnamɛna ode nɛ kukũkpalɛ kamɛ a.”

Title: 1 TIMOTEO 4
Content:
Bati Aatomɔ Fɔvã Fɔtsa Batsanɛ Liti.
1Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a nyɛ ɛtsa yededeede kĩ, nɛ fuwi nkaɛ a kamɛ ni, bati badi aafɔnɛ ɔnɔkɔali katɛkado kĩĩ awɛ bitse hũhũ kpa a kĩ yakɛ bati, mɔ hũhũ kpa fɔtsa katsa. 2Fɔvã bati kĩĩ aagbamɛna fɔtsa katsa kĩĩ odu. Bɛnyɛ bikĩ be tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kakɔna ku ndɛ sɔbɔtsaɛ mɔ ovio bɛkɔa bipila te. 3Batsa fɔtsa kĩ kɔtsɔ̃ mɔ kɔnyɔ kadzi lɛnɛ́nɛ. Balɛ lɛmɛ kĩ kɛtánɛ kĩ bati anya funitsã fudi odu. Lɛmɛ Baguma lɛkɛna funitsã a na bamɛ, kĩ bikĩ bɛtɛ bido mɔ binyi ɔnɔkɔali a, bɛbɔa mpaɛ nɛ foe akũ bɛnya. 4Nɛ ayekĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ Baguma bɔa nɛnɛ sũ ni, kɛtánɛ kĩ bati asĩ funitsã fudima, mbom kɛnɛ kĩ bɔatɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa mɔ kɔlɛkanyɛ nɛ foe akũ. 5Kitonɛkĩ Baguma kalɛ a mɔ boe kɔlɛkanyɛ a akpalɛ funitsã a akũ.
Paulo Tsa Bati Kĩ Bɛnyɛ Kristo Yesu Basumunɛ Wĩ.
6Ntɛ atsa awaɛ̃ amɛ batɛ badonɛ fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ ni, lɔkɔa aanya Kristo Yesu ɔsumunɛ wĩ, kĩ bɛdɔɔla mɔ katɛkado fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ mɔ boe fɔtsa katsa wĩ a kĩ opini a. 7Foesũ vɛlɛ nɔ akũ nɛ atitifɔ katɛkado fɔlɛtsa mɛwa mɔ fɔlɛtsa kĩ fɔlá kayɔ ɔwɛ̃. Kɔa hũhũ kamɛ nkpã kadzi kavɛlɛ nɔ akũ. Baguma fɔlɛtsa a, tomɔ foe liti pintii, kadzi nkpã wĩ ndɛ ɔtɛ odonɛ aye. 8Akũ ɔsĩ nɛnɛ kɔ̃, lɛmɛ ayekĩ bakɔlɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa mɔ foe akũ kakɛna akpa nfasɔ kĩ ɛbɛ̃ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa. Kitonɛkĩ fɔakpa nɔ nfasɔ nɛ nkpã kĩĩ kamɛ mɔ nkpã nɛ wuda liti a lɛmɛ kamɛ. 9Ade ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ kĩĩ kɛnɛ kĩ odi nyɛ odi atɛ edo a. 10Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ bɔapuli kakɛna adzuma kɔɔba, kitonɛkĩ boe anɛ teĩ nɛ Baguma kĩ edzi nkpã a akũ. Ye nyɛ bati flee a kĩ titiliwu bikĩ bɛtɛ bido a Ɔtɛnɛ.
11Kɛnɛ kĩ atsa be fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ flee, ɔdã kĩ odi nyɛ odi kɔlɛ foe. 12Tafɔ̃ oti odima lɛdã nɔ ndɛ obisɛ̃ nɛ ayekĩ ɔnyɛ opopo sũ. Mbom kɔa nɔ akũ kakɛna nfantuhũ wĩ kakpa batɛ badonɛ a nɛ nɔ kɔdzɛla, nɔ ɔbla, nɔ bati kawɛ, nɔ katɛkado, mɔ nɔ kadzi yedede kamɛ. 13Fɔmɔ maaya ni, kaakã Baguma kalɛ a katsa be nɛ asɔli, kakaanyɛ foe kayɔ katsa be, katsa be fɔtsa lɛmɛ. 14Tafɔ̃ hũhũ kamɛ futetsa a kĩ Baguma kɔa edo nɛ nɔ kamɛ a akũ adzuma kakɛna. Bɛkpa nɔ foe bɛtsãmɛna Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ akũ nɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi a kamɛ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ asɔli banɔkɔɛ̃ te awɛ nɛ nɔ akũ a. 15Kɔa nɔ akũ flee kakpa nɛ tudzuma kĩĩ flee kakɛna kamɛ. Pi te kadomɔ akũ ayekĩ bati flee aamɔ nɔ adzuma lɔtɔ kanaa biyi ɔsũ. 16Di nɔ akũ oni nɛ fɔtsa a kĩ atsa a akũ. Pi nɔ adzuma a kadomɔ akũ, kitonɛkĩ ntɛ ɔkɛna foe lɔmɔ ni, aatɛ nɔ mɔawɛ a akũ mɔ bikĩ batse nɔ kalɛ a nkpã.

Title: 1 TIMOTEO 5
Content:
Dã Bakunawa, Lɔtɔ Banyanɛ Mɔ Adzuma Bakɛnanɛ a Akũ Kadã Wĩ.
1Tawũni nɛ onyolenɔkɔɛ̃ akũ, mbom dɛ ye nɛ obu kamɛ ndɛ aga aye. Bi bapopo tuwuli ndɛ awaɛ̃nyole amɛ aye. 2Bi batsolenɔkɔɛ̃ tuwuli ndɛ ama amɛ, mɔ bayitsɔ̃ lɛmɛ ndɛ awaɛ̃tsole amɛ nɛ akũ yedede kamɛ.
3Kɔa obu kakpa bakunawa kĩ bɛlá babumɛnanɛ. 4Lɛmɛ ntɛ okunawa odi deĩ babi ĩye bawa ni, babi a bɛnya lɔtɔ bɛkɔlɛ be ɔsum kamɛ adzuma kakɛna kakpa be akũ bati, lɔkɔa fɔtsã foe akũ bɛdã be bamanɛ akũ bɛkɔa biyi be ayɛ. Ade fukĩĩ nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lawo Baguma anɛ a. 5Okunawa kĩ ɛlá odima kĩ yadãmɛna ye akũ kɔa ye anɛ ete nɛ Baguma akũ, yabɔa mpaɛ lɛnyɛ mɔ suwa kavia ye kabumɛna. 6Lɛmɛ okunawa kĩ ɛkɔa ye akũ ɛkpa nkpã kanya ni, eku kɔkɔɛ nɛ Baguma anɛ titɔ kĩ edzi nkpã malo. 7Kpa be kɔdɛ nɛ fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ akũ ayekĩ odima lɛláamɔ mfumsu nɛ be akũ. 8Ade ntɛ mi kamɛ odi ládãmɛna ye akũ bati akũ, titiliwu ye tɔtɔ kamɛ bade akũ ni, ade emuniki nɛ katɛkado a liti a. Oti kĩĩ nyɛ oti kpa ɛbɛ̃ bikĩ bɛtátɛ bido malo a.
9Takɔa okunawa odima kĩ ɛtátɛ futeli aduesia tɔ̃ dĩ obumɔ bakunawa kĩ bideĩ a. Lɛtsa kĩ libu nyɛ kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ okunawa ɛnya otsole kĩ bɛkɔã deedimɔapɛ, 10ade kɛnɛ kĩ ɛna dĩ wĩ nɛ ye sɛmɛ kalɛ kakɛna sũ, ɛnya otsole kĩ ɛdɔɔla ye babi kadɔɔla wĩ, yatɛ banɔvɔɛ̃ lɛmɛ. Ɛnya otsole kĩ yasum ye bakɔba batɛ badonɛ, yabumɔ bati kĩ bideĩ nɛ lubokamɔ kamɛ, ade ɛkɔa ye akũ ɛkpa tuwĩ kakɛna a.
11Takɔa bakunawa kĩ bɛtábo anɛ buĩ odo nɛ katsu a kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ ntɛ kɔnyɔ kadzi kɔ be odo ni, baafɔnɛ Kristo awɛ, 12ade baatu fubo a kĩ bɛlɔ bɛkpa ye a lɔkɔa ɛkɔ be kɔtɔ. 13Fukĩ fubu nyɛ kĩ, babula be lɔkɔ kade, katsã kamini nɛ bati tɔtɔ kamɛ, kadani banyɔnɛpo, kĩ balɛ bati akũ fɔlɛtsa, mɔ fɔlɛtsa kĩ fɔtáfɛta kalɛ. 14Foesũ, mawɛ kĩ bakunawa kĩ bɛtábo anɛ a bidzi fɔnyɔ bɛma babi, lɔkɔa bɛdãmɛna be tɔtɔ akũ. Fukĩĩ aafɔ̃ bɛláakɛna fɔtsa kĩ fɔtáfɛta kĩ fɔ́akpa boe bakesĩnɛ osi bɛkalɛ tuwuli kpa nɛ boe akũ. 15Malɛ fukĩĩ kitonɛkĩ bakunawa pii yɛla osi kɔkɔɛ bitomɔ Abonsam.
16Lɛmɛ ntɛ bakunawa deĩ nɛ otsole ɔtɛ odonɛ odi awɛ nɛ ye tɔtɔ kamɛ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ ɛdã be akũ, ɛtakɔa fɔlɔtsa a ete nɛ asɔli a akũ. Fukĩĩ aafɔ̃ batɛ badonɛ a lɛdã bakunawa a kĩ bɛlá babumɛnanɛ a akũ. 17Kɛnɛ kĩ bɛkpa batɛ badonɛ banɔkɔɛ̃ a kĩ bakpã bati kakpã wĩ a obu mɔ kɔtɔkase kutsu nviã, titiliwu bikĩ bakɛna adzuma mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ nɛ fɔtsa katsa mɔ fɔtsa kayɔ kanyɛ kamɛ. 18Kitonɛkĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Tasui ɔyaɛ kĩ yabumɔ nɔ kamɔnɛ kagɔlɛ onukpɛ̃.” ade, “Kɛnɛ kĩ bise adzuma ɔkɛnanɛ kɔtɔ bɛkpa adzuma a kĩ ɛkɛna a.” 19Ntɛ odi bɔɛ kalɛ nɛ asɔli ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ akũ ni, tatɛ foe ɔkpa ye mbɔɛntɛ otse kalɛ otomɛna adansifɔ nviã ĩye be ɛlalɛ sɛkɛ̃. 20Kã bati a kĩ bakɛna tɔkpa anɛ nɛ batɛ badonɛ flee anɛ kamɛ, ayekĩ fɔ́ado babɛbã a libe.
21Ndzɛ̃ nɛ Baguma, mɔ Kristo mɔ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ anɛ kamɛ mabi nɔ nɛ kudulike kamɛ kĩ pi fɔtsa katsa a kadomɔ akũ, tadã oti anɛ nɛ nɔ tudzuma kakɛna kamɛ. 22Tawɛ sɔwa kĩ ate awɛ nɛ odi akũ ɔkpa ye boe Ɔlate adzuma kĩ ɛkɛna. Tado akũ nɛ bati bɛbã tɔkpa kakɛna kamɛ. Pi nɔ akũ yededeede.
23Nɛ sɛmɛ kpa kĩ odeĩ sũ ni, takamɔa mui odi mbom kaamɔa bavɛ sukuloo sukuloo fubumɛna nɔ.
24Bati badi titikpa anɛ kanya mɔatsɛ kanya be lɔtɔ kanamɛna kadzɛ kamɛ, lɛmɛ badi kɔ̃, liti liti fɔmɔ be tɔkpa anɛ kanya. 25Ade aye a tuwĩ kakɛna lɛmɛ lábɛla a, ade fukĩ fɔbɛla a malo fɔ́anɛ kanya.

Title: 1 TIMOTEO 6
Content:
1Kɛnɛ kĩ bi batɛ badonɛ a kĩ bɛnyɛ basumunɛ a kĩ bɛkɔa obu bɛkpa be balate ayekĩ odima lɛláalɛ tuwuli kpa nɛ Baguma dĩ mɔ boe fɔtsa katsa a akũ. 2Ade kɛtáfɛta kĩ basumunɛ a kĩ be balate nyɛ batɛ badonɛ bɛkɔa be katɛkado kamɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna sũ bisupa be balate a. Mbom kɛnɛ kĩ bisum be kasum wĩ bɛba, kitonɛkĩ balate a kĩ bana be akũ nfasɔ a nyɛ be batɛ badonɛ mɔ bawɛnɛ. Kɛnɛ kĩ atsa be ɔnɔkɔali fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ lɔkɔa odo be fi bɛkɛna nɛ foe akũ.
Misĩ Fɔvã Fɔtsa Katsa Mitomɔ Baguma Liti.
3-4Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yatsa fɔtsa kĩ fɔtáketi mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo ɔnɔkɔali fɔlɛtsa, mɔ boe katɛkado fɔtsa katsa a ni, oti a naa dɛla ye akũ nɛ ode, ade enyína lɛtsama a. Edeĩ ɔdɔ nɛ fɔlɛtsa kavɛlɛ mɔ ɔdzɛ kakɛna mɔ bati akũ. Fukĩĩ ayamɛna lineke kanɔ, ɔdzɛ kakɛna, bati kavũna mɔ adzuni kpa kakɔna nɛ oti akũ. 5Foe lɛmɛ fɔayamɛna fɔlɛtsa kavɛlɛ mɔatsɛ mɔatsɛ. Bati kĩĩ be lɔlɔ kamɛ lɛ́waa yedede ade bɛyɛla ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a lɛmɛ a. Bakɔna kĩ Baguma ɔsum nyɛ akũ kana fɔtsa osi odi.
6Fɔnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kĩ ntɛ oti yɔɔla anɛ nɛ Baguma liti katomɛna akũ, mɔ fɔtsa a kĩ edeĩ a fuwo ye anɛ ni, ɛdani osikani, 7kitonɛkĩ awɛ pupulidza bɔkɔa bɔya nɛ katinya kamɛ, ade bɔ́adzakũ mɔ awɛ pupulidza a. 8Foesũ ntɛ budeĩ tilima mɔ funitsã ni, mifɔ̃ fuwo boe anɛ. 9Lɛmɛ bati a kĩ anɛ ayɔɔla be nɛ akũ kana fɔtsa akũ ni, bawo nɛ sɔhuiɛ kamɛ ade batɔ a. Fɔkɔasiatsa mɔ fɔwɛtsa kpa tɔwɛ̃ pini be fɔavɛlɛ be kanamɛna lubo kamɔ mɔ kawɔ kamɛ. 10Kitonɛkĩ sika anɛngbã kamɛ tɔkpa kumɛkumɛ flee anɛ kato. Badi tomɔ sika kawɛ liti limii kĩ bɛyɛla katɛkado a, ade biwo nɛ ayɔlɔhɔ pii kĩ ɛfɔ̃ be tɔwɔlɛ tɛ kaakpa kamɛ a.
Dza Pintii Nɛ Katɛkado Adzuma a Akũ.
11Lɛmɛ Timoteo, Baguma oti anɛ sũ vɛlɛ nɔ akũ nɛ fɔlɛtsa kpa kĩĩ flee ɔwɛ̃. Pili kakpa tuwĩ kakɛna, katomɔ Baguma liti nɛ katɛkado, ɔdɔ mɔ ɔwɔlɛ kado, mɔ akũ kadɔla kamɛ. 12Pili kɔɔba kanya nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna a kakpa nɔ akũ. Ade nkpã kĩĩ sũ Baguma pau nɔ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ ɔnyɛ nɔ katɛkado ɔtsa pefee nɛ adansifɔ pii anɛ a. 13Ade makpa nɔ mbla kĩĩ nɛ Baguma kĩ yakpa lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa nkpã, mɔ Kristo Yesu kĩ ɛnyɛ ye katɛkado ɛtsa pefee nɛ Pontio Pilato anɛ kamɛ a dĩ akũ kĩ, 14pi fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kadomɔ akũ pɛpɛɛpɛ ayekĩ odima lɛláamɔ tɔkpa nɛ nɔ akũ, kɛnaawo Luwi a kĩ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo aabuki ɛya. 15Baguma fɛta ɛkpa obu, yanya lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa akũ, ɛnyɛ fɔgã flee Lɛgã. Lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa avɛ ye kĩ Baguma Kpale. Ade ye aanyɛ Kristo kanya nɛ lɔkɔ wĩ a kĩ eyi ɛkpa a kamɛ a. 16Ye odi keĩ dzi nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna dadaada, edzi nɛ ɔhaĩ kĩ odima lɛláapuli efuã ɛdã ye a kamɛ. Odima támɔ tɔ̃ ye ade odima lɛláapuli ɛmɔ́ ye da. Ye fude nyɛ kamu, obu mɔ otumi daa. Fɔya lɔmɔ.
17Dɛ bikĩ bideĩ katinya kamɛ akũ fɔtsa kĩ bɛtapia be akũ, ade bɛtakɔa anɛ bite nɛ akũ kana fɔtsa a kĩ fɔláawa daa akũ, mbom bɛkɔa anɛ bite nɛ Baguma kĩ ye akpa boe lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa mɔ sɛmɛ kalɛ ayekĩ bɔ́amɔ kawɔlɛ a akũ. 18Bi be kĩ bɛkakɛna tuwĩ bɛnya asikafɔ nɛ tudzuma wĩ kakɛna kamɛ, bɛkɛna sɛmɛ kalɛ, bɛkaate ahiãfɔ fɔtsa faa. 19Ntɛ bɛkɛna foe lɔmɔ ni, baakpɔta fɔtsa kĩ fɔáwɔ biyi bɛkpa be akũ nɛ kunya kamɛ, lɔkɔa be awɛ aata nkpã wĩ a.
20Timoteo, dã fɔtsa a kĩ Baguma kɔa edo nɔ nɛ awɛ a akũ kadã wĩ. Tado akũ nɛ kɔlɔmɛna pupulidza mɔ fɔkɔasiatsa kavɛlɛ kamɛ. Ade fukĩĩ badi nɛɛ bakɛ bati kĩ kadikanyi fɔlɛtsa fɔanɛ a. 21Kitonɛkĩ badi bɔɛ be akũ kĩ binyina fukĩna bamɛ, lɛmɛ fɔtsɛ̃ foe akũ bɛyɛla katɛkado osi a.
Mawã Baguma kĩ ɛmɔ mi kɔnya.

Title: 2 TIMOTEO 1
Content:
1Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ, Paulo, kĩ fɔtsɛ̃ Baguma kawɛ sũ ĩnyɛ Kristo Yesu fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a sɛkɛ̃. Bido yĩ kĩ nde lɛtsã nɛ nkpã a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi kĩ budeĩ nɛ boe Ɔlate Kristo Yesu sɛkɛ̃, mɔ bɔmɔ ye ɔmɔa kakɛna a kamɛ.
2Matsɛlɛ mma yĩ obi Timoteo kĩ maátunɔ ye kalɛ. Baguma boe Ɔlɛga mɔ boe Ɔlate Kristo Yesu bɛmɔ nɔ kɔnya, bɛkɛna nɔ sɛmɛ kalɛ, bɛkpa nɔ lukudɔ lɛmɛ.
Dza Pintii Nɛ Katɛkado a Akũ.
3Manyɛ Baguma a kĩ masum mɔ ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kpalɛwa ndɛ ayekĩ boe bawanyɔ kakɛna a kɔlɛ. Ntɛ mabɔa mpaɛ makai nɔ daa. Manyɛ ye kɔlɛ lɛnyɛ mɔ suwa ntɛ nkai nɔ nɛ yĩ mpaɛbɔ kamɛ. 4Mate anɛ nɛ nɔ babe a akũ, ade mawɛ kĩ mbuki mmɔ́ nɔ ayekĩ kawɔlɛ aade yĩ. 5Mate anɛ nɛ nɔ katɛkado wĩ a kĩ odeĩ a akũ. Ade katɛkado kĩ kɛna nɛ nɔ ɔwatsɔ̃ Lois mɔ ama Eunike amɛ kamɛ a. Matɛ kado kĩ ade ke odu nɔ malo odeĩ a. 6Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ makai nɔ kĩ pi futetsa a kĩ Baguma kpa nɔ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ nte awɛ nɛ nɔ akũ a kɔɔba. 7Kitonɛkĩ Hũhũ a kĩ Baguma kpa boe a láfɔ̃ bɔavila, mbom ye Hũhũ a afɔ̃ kɔbɛ̃ awo nɛ boe kamɛ, kawɛ bati kalɛ, kapuli kanya boe akũ.
8Foesũ tafɔ̃ kɔnyɔã lɔkɔ nɔ nɛ boe Ɔlate fɔlɛtsa kalɛ kamɛ, ĩye kɔnyɔã lɔkɔ nɔ nɛ yĩ kĩ nwaa kɔla nɛ Kristo sũ. Mbom nɔ malo dza kɔɔba nɛ lubo kamɔ kamɛ, nɛ boe Ɔlate Kalɛ Wĩ a sũ, ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma kpa nɔ kɔbɛ̃ kĩ kɛna a. 9Baguma lɛkpa boe nkpã ɛvɛ boe kĩ bɔnya ye bade. Nnɛ́ ayekĩ bɔfɛta sũ, mbom fɔnyɛ ye mɔawɛ nhihiɛ mɔ kɔnyakamɔ a kĩ edeĩ ɛkpa boe a sũ. Ɛkpa boe kɔnyakamɔ kĩĩ ɛtsãmɛna boe Ɔlate Kristo Yesu akũ, fɔmɔ katinya yi kayɔ. 10Lɛmɛ finyaakĩĩ ni, Baguma nyɛ foe kanya ɛtsa boe pefee fɔtsã boe Ɔtɛnɛ Kristo Yesu kaya kamɛ. Ade ye lɛwɔla wuda kɔbɛ̃ a. Ɛtsã Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ ɛtsa boe nkpã a kĩ ebuki ɛlá kawũna dadaada a osi a. 11Baguma pau yĩ ndɛ fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ, mɔ fɔtsa ɔtsanɛ kĩ nde lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ. 12Ade fukĩĩ sũ mamɔ lubo kĩĩ a. Lɛmɛ kɔnyɔã lákɔ yĩ, kitonɛkĩ ĩnyina oti a kĩ ye ntɛ ndo. Ade ĩnyina kĩ yaapuli ɛdãmɛna lɛtsa a kĩ ɛkɔa edo nɛ yĩ awɛ kɛnaawo Luwi nkaɛ a akũ.
13Pi ɔnɔkɔali fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ntsa nɔ a kalɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ fɔkɛna lɛtsa kĩ de liti otomɛna. Na nɛ katɛkado kĩĩ mɔ ɔdɔ a kĩ fɔnyɛ boe fude nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo Yesu kamɛ pintii. 14Baguma Hũhũ kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ kudeĩ nɛ boe kamɛ a kudo nɔ kɔbɛ̃, kapi fɔtsa wĩ a kĩ bɛkɔa bido nɛ nɔ awɛ a kapi wĩ.
15Onyina kĩ Asiafɔ batɛ badonɛ a flee dzakũ bɛfɔnɛ yĩ, ade ayea Figelo mɔ Hermogene lɛmɛ dzakũ a.
16Mawã Baguma kĩ ɛmɔ Onesiforo mɔ ye tɔtɔ kamɛ bati kɔnya, kitonɛkĩ ɛkado yĩ ɔwɔlɛ lɔkɔ pii. Kɔnyɔã tákɔ ye kĩ nwaa kɔla sũ. 17Kĩ esila ewo Roma a, ɛtsã emini ɛwɛ yĩ flee kɛnawo kĩ ɛmɔ́ yĩ. 18Mawã Baguma kĩ ɛmɔ ye kɔnya nɛ Kadzɛ Luwi a akũ. Ade nɔ mɔawɛ onyina pefee kabumɛna a kĩ ɛkpa yĩ nɛ Efeso a.

Title: 2 TIMOTEO 2
Content:
Nya Oti Wĩ Kĩ Etomɔ Kristo Yesu.
1Yĩ obi, do nɔ akũ kɔbɛ̃ mɔ Baguma kɔnyakamɔ nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo Yesu a kĩ bɛkpa boe a kamɛ. 2Kɔa fɔtsa a kĩ onu kĩ ntsa nɛ adansifɔ pii anɛ kamɛ a kado nɛ bikĩ ɔtɛ odo kĩ baapuli bɛtsa bati bɛbã lɛmɛ a awɛ. 3Do ɔwɔlɛ kamɔ lubo ndɛ sodzani wĩ kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ ɛkpa Kristo Yesu. 4Sodzani kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ ye adzuma akũ ni, yawɛ kĩ yakɛna fɔtsa fuwo ye lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ anɛ, foesũ ɛláado akũ nɛ adzuma kĩ ɛnyɛ́ sodzafɔ adzuma kamɛ. 5Ade ayea fɔmɔ atsɛ owulanɛ aanya akũ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ ɛkɛna nɛ atsɛ kalo mbla akũ. 6Okuani kĩ yanɛ kɔba mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ ni, ade ye anya lɔtɔ kanya funitsã a kĩ fubo a. 7Kɔna fɔtsa a kĩ mbi nɔ a akũ, kitonɛkĩ boe Ɔlate aabumɔ nɔ onu foe flee kayɔ.
8Te anɛ nɛ Yesu Kristo kĩ ɛnyɛ Lɛgã Dawid kasinu obi a kĩ Baguma dzɛla ye etomɛna banɔkpa kamɛ a akũ ndɛ ayekĩ bɛtsa a. Ade foe nyɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a kĩ made lɛtsã nɛ ke akũ a. 9Ade Kalɛ Wĩ a kĩ malɛ a sũ nlamɛna lubo kamɔ, ade ke bido yĩ nɛ nkɔsɔnkɔsɔ kamɛ ndɛ oti kĩ efum a. Lɛmɛ Baguma kalɛ kɔ̃ bɛtádo ke nkɔsɔnkɔsɔ! 10Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ mado ɔwɔlɛ kamɔ lubo nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ nɛ Baguma bati a kĩ ɛpau a sũ, ayekĩ nɛ Kristo Yesu akũ be malo baana katɛ mɔ kawɔlɛ nkpã a kĩ ɛla kawũna a.
11Fukĩĩ nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali fɔlɛtsa kĩ balɛ,
“Ntɛ buku mɔ boe Ɔlate ni,
bɔ́adzi nkpã lɛmɛ mɔ ye.
12Ntɛ budo ɔwɔlɛ bɔmɔ́ lubo ni,
bɔ́anya lɛgã lɛmɛ mɔ ye.
Ade ntɛ busĩ ye ni,
ye malo yaasĩ boe.
13Ntɛ boe bɔákɛna nɛ boe katɛkado akũ malo ni,
ye kɔ̃ yakɛna nɛ ye kalɛ akũ daa,
kitonɛkĩ ɛláapuli esĩ ye akũ da.”
Pi Nɔ Akũ Kapi Wĩ Ayekĩ Baguma Aatsa Nɔ Lɛgãbɔɛ.
14Te bati a fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ anɛ, lɔkɔa kasi be mbla nɛ Baguma anɛ kĩ bɛtakavɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa, kitonɛkĩ nfasɔ adima lɛláa foe kamɛ, mbom kabula fɔabula bati a kĩ batse foe a katɛkado kade. 15Bɔa mbɔdi kakɛna adzuma mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ ayekĩ fɔ́awo Baguma anɛ. Kɛna adzuma ndɛ oti kĩ ye adzuma lákɔ ye kɔnyɔã mbom yatsa Baguma ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a pɛpɛɛpɛ.
16Tado nɔ akũ nɛ kɔlɔmɛna kĩ fɔátsa Baguma kavila kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ fɔakpã bati kanɛlitimɛna nɛ Baguma akũ. 17Fɔtsa katsa a na la ndɛ kaakpa kĩ kasa kaba sukɛna. Bati nviã kĩ bɛtsa foe odu nyɛ Himenaio mɔ Fileto. 18Bimuniki nɛ ɔnɔkɔali osi a akũ, ade badani batɛ badonɛ a badi katɛkado a. Bɛkatsa fɔtsa kĩ banɔkpa kabuki kayidza kadzi nkpã ya kɛtɛ̃ kɔkɔɛ. 19Lɛmɛ, Baguma kɔla kayɔkayi litekũ a kĩ eke a ni, lɛtsama lɛláapuli likuna de. Ade kayɔkayi litekũ kĩĩ akũ bɛtsɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate nyina bikĩ bɛnyɛ ye bade a.” ade “Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yalɛ kĩ ɛnyɛ boe Ɔlate a ode ni, kɛnɛ kĩ emuniki nɛ tɔkpa liti.”
20Nɛ tɔtɔ kpale kamɛ ni, fɔɔdaɛ mɔ titsensi kumɛkumɛ deĩ. Fudi nyɛ sika ngbã fude, fudi lɛmɛ nyɛ sika ovoe fude. Ade fudi lɛmɛ nyɛ tite ĩye titse fude a. Bɛkɔa fukĩ fudeĩ kɔya biyi bɛkpa fuwi titiliwu kanya, ade bɛkɔa fɔbɛbã biyi bɛkpa luwi daa akũ a. 21Foesũ ntɛ oti odi vɔlɛ ye akũ ɛkɛna ye akũ yedede, ɛnɛ nɛ tɔkpa kamɛ ni, yaanya adzuma titiliwu ɔkɛnanɛ kitonɛkĩ bɛkpalɛ ye akũ ade edeĩ nfasɔ ɛkpa boe Ɔlate a.
22Takɔa nɔ akũ ɔkpa fɔwɛtsa kpa a kĩ foe kakɛna akɔ bapopo odo. Pili katɛkado, nkpã wĩ kadzi, mɔ bati kawɛ. Mimɔ bati a mikɛna fukĩĩ mɔ kadzi nɛ lukudɔ kamɛ, mibɔa mpaɛ mivia boe Ɔlate kabumɛna mɔ ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ yedede. 23Tado onukpɛ̃ nɛ fɔlɛtsa kavɛlɛ kĩ nyansã lɛláa foe kamɛ. Nɔ mɔawɛ a onyina kĩ fɔlɛtsa kavɛlɛ naa bamɛ ayamɔ ɔdzɛ. 24Kɛtánɛ kĩ boe Ɔlate ɔsumunɛ akɛna ɔdzɛ, mbom kɛnɛ kĩ ɛkɛna sɛmɛ kalɛ ɛkpa odi nyɛ odi, ɛnya fɔtsa ɔtsanɛ wĩ kĩ edeĩ ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ ɛkpa bikĩ bideĩ ɔsĩ a. 25Ade ke kɛnɛ kĩ ɛkɔa ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ ɛkaanyɛ fɔlɛtsa kamɛ katsa bati a kĩ biyidza bɛdza nɛ kalɛ wĩ a akũ a. Ɔsa Baguma aafɔ̃ bɛdani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ lɔkɔa bɛyaanyi ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a. 26Nɛ foe kamɛ a, be adzuni kamɛ aabinya lɔkɔa bɛnɛ nɛ Abonsam kpeĩ kĩ bɛtɔ a, kĩ ɛkɔa be ɛkɛna ye fɔwɛtsa bakɛnanɛ a kamɛ.

Title: 2 TIMOTEO 3
Content:
Bati Aasĩ Baguma Nɛ Fuwi Nkaɛ a Kamɛ.
1Te anɛ kĩ nɛ fuwi nkaɛ kamɛ ni, kadzi kamɛ aana ɔsĩ. 2Bati aawɛ be odi kalɛ fɔtsa bawɛnɛ, bɛna sika anɛngbã, bɛkabɔa tɔwɔlɛ, bɛkapia akũ. Baanya bati kĩ be akũ awo be anɛ, kĩ bavũna bati, kĩ baákɔa obu kakpa be bamanɛ. Baanya bati kĩ baáyi bati ayɛ, mɔ bikĩ bɛlá katɛkado. 3Baanya bati kĩ bideĩ sɛmɛ ɔnyɛ, bikĩ baámɔ bati kɔnya, bikĩ bama fɔvã kate nɛ bati akũ, mɔ bikĩ baápuli kanya be mɔawɛ akũ. Baanya bati kĩ bideĩ aũkani, baáwɛ kĩ bakɛna tuwĩ. 4Ade badi lɛmɛ aanya bati liti osi batsãnɛ, bati kĩ baakɛna fɔtsa kĩ badɛla be akũ nɛ ode, mɔ bikĩ bawɛ katinya kamɛ kawɔlɛ kamɔ fɔtsa kaba Baguma kawɛ. 5Bati kĩĩ odu aakɛna be akũ ndɛ bati wĩ, lɛmɛ baasĩ Baguma kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ kɔ́akpa be nkpã wĩ kadzi a. Vɛlɛ akũ nɛ bati kĩĩ odu ɔwɛ̃.
6Bati kĩĩ odu kamɛ badi atsã nɛ bati tɔtɔ kamɛ kakɛ batsole kĩ baápuli kapi be adzuni. Be titikpa kĩĩ odu kakɛna fɔ̃ batsole a kakɔna láwa kpĩĩ ade bitomɔ fɔwɛtsa pii liti a. 7Batsole kĩĩ odu akɔlɛ fɔtsa vɔɛ̃ luwi daa lɛmɛ baápuli binu ɔnɔkɔali a kayɔ. 8Ndɛ ayekĩ Yane mɔ Yambi yidza bɛdza nɛ Mose akũ a, ade aye fɔtsa batsanɛ kĩĩ lɛmɛ yidza bɛdza nɛ ɔnɔkɔali a akũ a. Be tɔkpa kakɛna bula be adzuni kade, ade bɛyɛla be katɛkado lɛmɛ a. 9Lɛmɛ bati kĩĩ lɛláanaa lɔtɔ mɔ foe kakɛna, kitonɛkĩ be fudzimbitsa a aanɛ fɔwa odi nyɛ odi lɛmɔ. Ade aye pɛpɛɛpɛ fɔya nɛ Yane mɔ Yambi akũ a.
Paulo Kpa Kɔdɛ Nkaɛ.
10Lɛmɛ nɔ kɔ̃ otomɔ yĩ fɔtsa katsa, yĩ ɔbla, yĩ kakɔna mɔ yĩ katɛkado, yĩ bati kalɛ kawɛ, yĩ ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ kana mɔ yĩ ɔwɔlɛ kado nɛ lubo kamɔ kamɛ. 11Onyina ayekĩ bitomɔ yĩ liti, bɛmɔna yĩ lubo nɛ Antiokia, Ikonio mɔ Listra, mɔ bati liti katomɛna pii a kĩ mpuli ndza nɛ foe kamɛ a. Lɛmɛ boe Ɔlate nyɛ yĩ nɛ foe flee kamɛ.
12Ɔnɔkɔali fɔanɛ kĩ, odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ kĩ yadzi nkpã wĩ nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna nɛ Kristo Yesu kamɛ ni, baatomɔ ye liti. 13Lɛmɛ bati kpa mɔ bati bakɛnɛ kɔ̃ ni, be tɔkpa aakade nɛ ode kaba, ade baakakɛ bati, bati bɛbã lɛmɛ lɛkɛ be a. 14Lɛmɛ nɔ kɔ̃ ni, pi ɔnɔkɔali fɔtsa a kĩ bɛtsa nɔ, kĩ ɔtɛ odo lɛmɛ a kadomɔ akũ, kitonɛkĩ onyina bati a kĩ be sɛkɛ̃ ɔkɔlɛ foe otomɛna. 15Kito anɛ nɔ tibisɛ̃ kamɛ kĩ bɛtsa nɔ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ fɔlɛtsa, kĩ fɔkpa nɔ kadikanyi a kĩ fɔ́akpa nɔ nkpã ntɛ ɔtɛ Kristo Yesu odo.
16Baguma kɔbɛ̃ liwo nɛ bati kamɛ kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ fɔlɛtsa, foesũ fɔnɛnɛ fɔkpa fɔtsa katsa, oti anɛ kakã, kɔdɛ kakpa, mɔ oti kavɛlɛ kakpa nkpã wĩ kadzi. 17Bɛtsɛlɛ foe ayekĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yasum Baguma ni, yaakpɔla, epuli ɛna nɛ kukũmanɛ kamɛ ɛkpa fɔtsa wĩ fudi nyɛ fudi kakɛna.

Title: 2 TIMOTEO 4
Content:
1Ndzɛ̃ nɛ Baguma mɔ Kristo Yesu kĩ yayadzɛmɔ batidziwa mɔ banɔkpa, mɔ ye a kĩ yayanya akũ ndɛ lɛgã aye a anɛ kamɛ, makpa nɔ kɔdɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ, 2ntɛ odeĩ aya ĩye ɔtána aya malo ni, bɔa mbɔdi kade lɛtsã nɛ fɔlɛtsa wĩ a akũ. Dã kĩ atsa bati a fɔtsa, kakã be anɛ lɔkɔa kakaado be kɔbɛ̃. Na ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ kanyɛ fɔlɛtsa kayɔ katsa bati nɛ fukĩĩ flee kakɛna kamɛ. Tafɔ̃ fɔtsa katsa lɛmɛ. 3Kitonɛkĩ lɔkɔ lidi aaya kĩ bati lɛláabuki bitse fɔtsa katsa wĩ kĩĩ a. Mbom baatomɛna be mɔawɛ fɔwɛtsa, ade baawɛ fɔtsa batsanɛ bɛbã kĩ baabi be fɔtsa a kĩ akũ asĩ be kĩ binu a. 4Bɛláawɛ kĩ batse ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a, mbom baayi atɔ bitse fɔlɛtsa mɛwa. 5Lɛmɛ nɔ kɔ̃ kɛnɛ kĩ api nɔ akũ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ, kaado ɔwɔlɛ nɛ lubo lidi nyɛ lidi kamɛ. Kɛna Kalɛ Wĩ a ɔlɛnɛ kawũna ndɛ Baguma ɔsumunɛ aye.
6Yĩ kɔ̃ ni, lɔkɔ kpɔla liyua kĩ baakɔa yĩ bɛbɔa ndɛ afɔliɛ bɛkpa Baguma, ade lɔkɔ lɛmɛ wo ɔtɔ kĩ manɛ nɛ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ a. 7Nvũ lɛma wĩ a kavũ wĩ, nlo atsɛ a flee ĩyua ade mpini yĩ katɛkado a nɛ Kristo kamɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ a. 8Ade kito finyaa ni, futetsa wĩ a kĩ bakpa akũ banyanɛ nɛ nkpã wĩ kadzi kamɛ a adzɔlɛ yĩ. Ade futetsa kĩĩ boe Ɔlate kĩ ɛnyɛ fɔlɛtsa ɔdzɛnɛ wĩ a, aakɔa ɛkpa yĩ nɛ luwi nkaɛ a akũ a. Ade ke nnɛ́ yĩ odi keĩ aatɛ de, mbom mɔ bati flee a kĩ bidzi nɛ ɔdɔ kamɛ badã boe Ɔlate kabu kaya a anɛ.
Wɛ Sɔwa Kayaamɔ Yĩ.
9Bɔa mbɔdi kaya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ mɔatsɛ, 10kitonɛkĩ Dema dzakũ ɛfɔnɛ yĩ, ɛnɛ etomɛna katinya kamɛ fɔtsa kawɛ liti nɛ Tesalonika. Kreske dzakũ ɛnaa Galatia, ade Tito lɛmɛ naa Dalmatia a. 11Luka odi lite nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃. Kpã Marko kayamɛna kitonɛkĩ yaanya obumɛnanɛ paa ɛkpa yĩ nɛ adzuma a kamɛ. 12Ndo Tihiko ɛnaa Efeso. 13Ntɛ aya ni, bɔɛ yĩ osili atadiɛ wulaa a kĩ nkɔa ĩyi nɛ Karpo sɛkɛ̃ nɛ Troa kama yĩ. Bɔɛ yĩ tuvoli lɛmɛ, titiliwu tikĩ bɛkɛna mɔ ɔyaɛ ovoli a kayamɛna.
14Aleksandro kĩ ɛnyɛ otumfɔ a kɛna yĩ fɔlɔɛwotsa paa. Boe Ɔlate aase ye lɛtsa kĩ ɛkɛna yĩ a kɔtɔ. 15Foesũ dã nɔ akũ kadã wĩ nɛ ye akũ, kitonɛkĩ eyidza ɛdza nɛ fɔtsa a kĩ bɔatsa a akũ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ.
16Kĩ bɛnya lɔtɔ bɛkpã yĩ bɛnamɛna fɔlɛtsa ɔdzɛnɛ anɛ a, odima tátomɔ yĩ, be flee bilo bɛfɔnɛ yĩ. Lɛmɛ mawã Baguma kĩ ɛtase be foe kɔtɔ. 17Lɛmɛ boe Ɔlate dza nɛ yĩ liti, edo yĩ kɔbɛ̃ ɛfɔ̃ mpuli nlɛ ye Kalɛ Wĩ a nkpa bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a nɛ awã, ade ɛnyɛ yĩ etomɛna wuda awɛ kamɛ a. 18Boe Ɔlate aanyɛ yĩ etomɛna tɔkpa tidi nyɛ tidi kamɛ, ade yaakpã yĩ bɔɛɛ bɔɛɛ nnaawo nɛ ode lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kamɛ a. Kamu mɔ kukũkpalɛ bɔakpa Baguma kito finyaa kanaa daa daa. Fɔya lɔmɔ.
Makla Mi a Flee.
19Mawɔ̃na Priska mɔ Akwila, mɔ Onesiforo tɔtɔ kamɛ bati a flee. 20Erasto kahɔ nɛ Korinto ade nfɔnɛ Trofimo kĩ yasɔ awɛ nɛ Mileto a. 21Bɔa mbɔdi kĩ ayawo yĩ sɛkɛ̃ nɛ awĩ fɔmɔ osili lɔkɔ aawo ɔtɔ. Eubolo, Pude, Lino, Klaudia, mɔ batɛ badonɛ, batsole mɔ banyole, flee awɔ̃na nɔ!
22Boe Ɔlate ɛnamɔ nɔ hũhũ. Baguma ɛmɔ mi kɔnya.

Title: TITO 1
Content:
1Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ, Paulo, kĩ ĩnyɛ Baguma ɔsumunɛ, mɔ Yesu Kristo fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ sɛkɛ̃. Baguma pau yĩ ade edo yĩ kĩ mbumɛna bati a kĩ ɛpau a, ntsa be ɔnɔkɔali a kĩ boe katɛkado ɔsum atsa a. 2Ade ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ nɛ nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a akũ a. Baguma kĩ yaáma fɔvã a mɔawɛ lɛma boe kalɛ a kĩ ɛkɛna eyi fɔmɔ ɛkɛna katinya kamɛ a. 3Nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ ɛpau eyi akũ a, ɛnyɛ ye Kalɛ Wĩ a kanya nɛ ye kalɛ a kĩ mabi mi nɛ awĩ a kamɛ. Bɛkɔa fukĩĩ bido nɛ yĩ awɛ kĩ nde lɛtsã nɛ foe akũ nɛ Baguma boe Ɔtɛnɛ dĩ akũ.
4Yĩ obi wĩ Tito, matsɛlɛ nɔ ovoli kĩĩ, kitonɛkĩ bɔnyɛ ɔmɔa nɛ boe katɛkado a kamɛ. Boe Ɔlɛga Baguma mɔ Kristo Yesu boe Ɔtɛnɛ, bɛmɔ nɔ kɔnya, bɛkpa nɔ lukudɔ lɛmɛ.
Paulo Kpa Tito Adzuma Adi Nɛ Kreta.
5Nkɔa nɔ ndzina nɛ Kreta ayekĩ aalɔla fɔtsa a kĩ fute a kakɛna. Mawɛ kĩ pau asɔli banɔkɔɛ̃ nɛ ɔmatɔ odi nyɛ odi kamɛ ndɛ ayekĩ ntsa nɔ a. 6Kɛtánɛ kĩ bamɔ mfumsu nɛ batɛ badonɛ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ akũ. Kɛnɛ kĩ ɛnya oti kĩ ɛkɔã ɔtsɔ̃ mɔapɛ, ade kɛnɛ kĩ ye babi lɛmɛ bɛnya batɛ badonɛ, bɛtanya bati kĩ bideĩ atɔ ɔsĩ ĩye baábu fɔkɔ. 7Nɛ ayekĩ asɔli batɛ badonɛ lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ adã Baguma adzuma akũ sũ ni, kɛtánɛ kĩ bɛmɔ mfumsu nɛ ye akũ. Kɛtánɛ kĩ yata akũ, ĩye ɛkana kalɔkpa mɔatsɛ mɔatsɛ, ĩye ɛkamɔa bavɛ kawuga, ĩye ɛnya oti kĩ yadã kitikiti, ĩye ɛyɔɔla anɛ nɛ sika akũ. 8Kɛnɛ kĩ epuli ɛtɛ banɔvɔɛ̃, ɛwɛ lɛtsa kĩ lɛnɛnɛ, epi ye akũ kapi wĩ. Kɛnɛ kĩ ɛnya oti kĩ edeĩ ɔbla wĩ, kĩ efĩĩ lɛláa ye akũ ade yapuli kanya ye akũ lɛmɛ a. 9Kɛnɛ kĩ yapi ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a kĩ bɔtɛ budo a, kĩ fuketi mɔ fɔtsa katsa a ɛlɛ. Ade osi kĩĩ akũ yaatsã epuli ɛtsa fɔtsa wĩ, ɛkado bati bɛbã kɔbɛ̃, lɔkɔa ɛnyɛ bikĩ biyidza bɛdza nɛ kalɛ a akũ nfumusu ɛtsa be.
10Malɛ fukĩĩ kitonɛkĩ bati pii, titiliwu Yudafɔ a kĩ bɛtɛ bido a, deĩ atɔ ɔsĩ, bɛtsɛ̃ balɛ tuwuli pupulidza, kakɛ bati lɛmɛ. 11Kɛnɛ kĩ asua be osi bɛfɔ̃ foe odu katsa, kitonɛkĩ bɛlamɛna bati adzuni kade kabula nɛ be katɛkado kamɛ. Bɛtsɛ̃mɔ fɔtsa kpa kĩ kɛtáfɛta kĩ bɛtsa a katsa, nɛ sika fuu sũ. 12Kretani odi kĩ ɛnyɛ be onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ lɛlɛ kĩ, “Kretafɔ nyɛ bavãlɛvã bati daa, bayaɛ kpa kĩ bideĩ ablɔ, banyakpanɛ mɔ banyɔnɛpo lɛmɛ.”
13Fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali. Nɛ foesũ kã be anɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ ayekĩ baana katɛkado kĩ kideĩ ɔsĩ. 14Fukĩĩ aafɔ̃ bɛnyɛ atɔ nɛ Yudafɔ fɔlɛtsa mɛwa mɔ mbla a kĩ bikĩ bisĩ kalɛ wĩ a atsa a. 15Lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa adã yedede kakpa bikĩ be mɔawɛ tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kpalɛ, lɛmɛ bikĩ be mɔawɛ akũ tákpalɛ, kĩ bɛtátɛ bido lɛmɛ ni, lɛtsama ládã yedede kakpa be, kitonɛkĩ be adzuni mɔ tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ tákpalɛ. 16Bati kĩĩ odu abɔa ɔwɔlɛ kĩ binyina Baguma lɛmɛ be fɔkɛlatsa atsa kĩ bisĩ ye. Bɛnyɛ bati kĩ be akũ deĩ libe, kĩ baábu fɔkɔ ade bɛtáfɛta bɛkpa lɛtsa wĩ lidima kakɛna a.

Title: TITO 2
Content:
Tsa Katɛkado a Nɛ Osi Wĩ Akũ.
1Lɛmɛ nɔ kɔ̃ ni, tsa fɔtsa a kĩ fuketimɔ katɛkado fɔtsa katsa wĩ a. 2Tsa banyolenɔkɔɛ̃ a kĩ bidzi mɔ anɛ yedede nɛ kadikanyi mɔ be akũ kapi wĩ kamɛ. Bɛnya bati kĩ bɛdzɛ̃ pintii nɛ be katɛkado kamɛ, bati kĩ bideĩ bati akũ ɔdɔ mɔ bikĩ bado ɔwɔlɛ. 3Ade ayea batsole banɔkɔɛ̃ a lɛmɛ ni, tsa be kĩ bidzi nkpã kĩ ɛfɛta batsole kĩ be akũ kpalɛ. Kɛtánɛ kĩ banyɛ bati buĩ, ĩye bɛkawuga bavɛ, mbom kɛnɛ kĩ bɛtsa bati lɛtsa kĩ lɛnɛnɛ, 4bɛtsa bayitsɔ̃ kĩ bidzi fɔnyɔ ayekĩ baawɛ be banyɔ mɔ be babi kalɛ. 5Kɛnɛ kĩ binyi ayekĩ bapi be akũ, bɛkɛna be akũ ɛkpalɛ lɔkɔa bɛnya batsɔ̃ wĩ kĩ badɔla be akũ kakpa be banyɔ. Fukĩĩ aafɔ̃ odima lɛláalɛ tuwuli kpa nɛ Baguma kalɛ a akũ.
6Ade osi mɔapɛ a akũ atsã ɔdɛ bapopo lɛmɛ bɛnya be akũ akũ a. 7Nɛ foe flee kamɛ a, kɛnɛ kĩ nɔ mɔawɛ a anya oti kĩ ye ɔbla wĩ bati akɔlɛ. Kɔa anɛ ovio katsa fɔtsa nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ. 8Bi bati tuwuli nɛ osi kpĩĩ akũ ayekĩ bɛláanyɛ nɔ nfumusu. Fukĩĩ aafɔ̃ kɔnyɔã liwo nɔ bakesĩnɛ nɛ ayekĩ bɛláana lɛtsa kpa bɛlɛ nɛ boe akũ sũ.
9Bati kĩ basum badi ni, bɛdɔla be akũ bɛkpa be balate, bɛkɛna fɔtsa a kĩ fɔ́awo balate a anɛ. Kɛtánɛ kĩ bakpa onukpɛ̃ bɛkpa be. 10Kɛtánɛ kĩ baye be lɛmɛ, mbom bɛtsa be akũ kĩ bɛnyɛ bati wĩ, ade badi ɔnɔkɔali kĩ baapuli bɛtɛ be bido a. Fukĩĩ aafɔ̃ bɛkɔa obu bɛkpa boe fɔtsa katsa nɛ Baguma boe Ɔtɛnɛ a akũ.
11Kitonɛkĩ Baguma nyɛ ye kɔnyakamɔ a kĩ edeĩ ɛkpa katinya kamɛ bati nkpã katɛ a ɛtsa. 12Kɔnyakamɔ kĩĩ atsa boe kĩ bɔfɔnɛ nkpã kpa kadzi mɔ katinya kamɛ fɔtsa kpa liti katomɛna awɛ. Kɛnɛ kĩ bɔadzi nkpã kĩ bɔ́anya boe akũ, budzi nkpã wĩ nɛ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ. 13Ade osi kĩĩ akũ bɔ́atsã bɔkadzɔlɛ Luwi kpale a kĩ bɔadã anɛ a. Ade luwi kĩĩ akũ mɔ boe Baguma Kpale, mɔ boe Ɔtɛnɛ Yesu Kristo aanɛ nɛ kukũkpalɛ kamɛ a. 14Ɛkɔa ye akũ ɛkpa nɛ boe lɔlɔ kĩ yanyɛ boe etomɛna tɔkpa flee kamɛ, ɛkɛna boe bati kpalɛwa kĩ bɛnyɛ ye odi bade a kĩ bɔawɛ kĩ bakakɛna tuwĩ. 15Tsa fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ mɔ kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ Baguma kpa nɔ, kado bikĩ batse nɔ a kɔbɛ̃. Kã bikĩ bitómɔ osi kĩĩ akũ a anɛ. Tafɔ̃ be kamɛ odima lɛmɔ nɔ ndɛ oti kĩ ɛtákpɔla.

Title: TITO 3
Content:
Kaakɛna Tuwĩ Kĩ Taana Nfasɔ Tɛkpa Bati Flee.
1Te be anɛ kĩ bɛdɔla be akũ bɛkpa abãã mɔ bati a kĩ banya be akũ a, bitse be kalɛ, bɛna nɛ kukũmanɛ kamɛ bɛkɛna tuwĩ nɛ osi nyɛ osi akũ. 2Bi be kĩ bɛtalɛ tɔkpa nɛ odima akũ, mbom bidzi nɛ lukudɔ mɔ tɔkɔba kakɛna kamɛ. Bɛkaakɔa obu kakpa odi nyɛ odi.
3Kitonɛkĩ kɔkɔɛ a, boe mɔawɛ malo bɔkɛna fɔkɔasiatsa mɔ atɔ ɔsĩ, ade bɔyɛla osi wĩ a. Kɔkɔɛ lɛmɛ a sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kpa mɔ kawɔlɛkamɔ futefute nya boe akũ. Bɔkɔa boe lɔkɔ bɔkpa fɔtsa kpa kakɛna mɔ anɛ kayɔɔla. Bati badi kesĩ boe ade boe malo bukesĩ be a. 4Lɛmɛ kĩ Baguma boe Ɔtɛnɛ nyɛ ye sɛmɛ kalɛ mɔ kawɛ ɛtsa boe a ni, 5ɛtɛ boe nkpã. Nnɛ́ boe tuwĩ a kĩ bɔkɛna sũ, mbom ye mɔawɛ kɔnyakamɔ sũ ɛtɛ boe. Ɛfɔ̃ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa yako nɛ boe akũ, ɛlɔla boe kama, ɛwɔla boe mui ade ɛkpa boe nkpã vɔɛ̃ a. 6Baguma tsã Yesu Kristo boe Ɔtɛnɛ akũ ɛkɔa ye Hũhũ Kpalɛwa kɔbɛ̃ pii a eko nɛ boe akũ, 7ayekĩ nɛ ye sɛmɛ kalɛ sũ bɔmɔ ye kayite kɛlɛ, lɔkɔa boe malo bɔna nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a, kĩ ye akũ lɛmɛ budeĩ kɔnɛte a. 8Kalɛ kĩĩ nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali paa.
Mawɛ kĩ lɛ kasisa fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ bamɛ ayekĩ bikĩ bɛtɛ Baguma bido a aakɔa be lɔkɔ bɛkpa tuwĩ kakɛna kĩ fudeĩ nfasɔ fɔkpa odi nyɛ odi.
9Tado onukpɛ̃ nɛ fɔkɔasiatsa kavɛlɛ kamɛ, nɛ bati kasinu katokɔ̃ kakã akũ. Tawɛ sɔwa ɔkɛna ɔdzɛ ĩye ɔtɛ atsindze nɛ Yudafɔ mbla a akũ. Foe flee fɔlá nfasɔ adima. 10Ntɛ oti odi ayamɛna kasɛ̃ nɛ bati kamɛ ni, sua ye osi deedi ĩye titi nviã. Nɛ ke liti a, tabuki odo ye onukpɛ̃. 11Nyi kĩ oti a na odu ni, tɔkpa nya ye kamɛkamɛ ade ye titikpa aakɔ ye kɔtɔ a.
Kɔdɛ Nkaɛ Kakpa Mɔ Kakla.
12Ntɛ ndo Artema ĩye Tihiko nɛ nɔ sɛkɛ̃ ni, bɔa mbɔdi kayawo yĩ sɛkɛ̃ nɛ Nikopoli, kitonɛkĩ ade awã mawɛ kĩ maadzi nɛ osili lɔkɔ a. 13Bɔa mbɔdi kanyɛ Sena kĩ ɛnyɛ fɔlɛtsa ɔdzɛnɛ a mɔ Apolo osi bɛnaa be osi akũ. Dã kĩ bɛna lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ laasĩ be. 14Kɛnɛ kĩ batɛ badonɛ a bɛkɔlɛ ayekĩ baakɔa be lɔkɔ flee bɛkpa tudzuma wĩ kakɛna, kĩ baapuli bɛkabumɔ bati bɛbã lɛmɛ. Bɛtadzi nkpã kĩ ɛlá nfasɔ.
15Bati flee a kĩ bideĩ nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ nɛ awĩ a awɔ̃na nɔ! Wɔ̃na batɛ badonɛ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ awã kakpa boe.
Baguma ɛmɔ mi flee kɔnya.

Title: FILEMON 1
Content:
1Yĩ, Paulo kĩ bido nɛ kɔla nɛ Kristo Yesu sũ, mɔ boe ɔwaɛ̃ Timoteo sɛkɛ̃ ovoli kĩĩ to. Bɔtsɛlɛ ye bɔama nɔ, Filemon boe ɔkɔba adzuma ɔkɛnanɛ kĩ bɔawɛ kalɛ paa. 2Bɔtsɛlɛ ye lɛmɛ bɔama batɛ badonɛ a kĩ batsɛna nɛ nɔ tɔtɔ kamɛ, mɔ boe ɔwaɛ̃tsole Apia, mɔ boe ɔkɔba paa Arkipo kĩ yakɛna boe Ɔlate adzuma mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ ndɛ sodzani aye a. 3Baguma boe Ɔlɛga mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo bɛmɔ mi kɔnya, bɛkpa mi lukudɔ lɛmɛ.
Filemon Deĩ Ɔdɔ Mɔ Katɛkado.
