4Nwaɛ̃ Filemon, lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ kĩ mabɔa mpaɛ ni, mate anɛ nɛ nɔ akũ, ade manyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ nɛ nɔ lɔlɔ, 5kitonɛkĩ nnu ayekĩ awɛ Baguma bati kalɛ, mɔ ayekĩ ɔtɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu odo a sũ. 6Mabɔa mpaɛ kĩ ɔmɔa a kĩ bɔakɛna ndɛ batɛ badonɛ aye a ɛna ɔsĩ ebu, ayekĩ bɔ́apuli bunu fɔtsa wĩ flee a kĩ fudeĩ nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo kayɔ a dzununuunu. 7Nwaɛ̃, mmɔ́ kawɔlɛ ade ɔwɔlɛ ka edzi yĩ a, kitonɛkĩ nɔ ɔdɔ a kĩ odeĩ ɔkpa Baguma bati a fɔ̃ bɛna kawɛya.
Paulo Ke Aduli Nɛ Onesimo Lɔlɔ.
8Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ, yĩ ndɛ awaɛ̃ nɛ Kristo kamɛ aye a, maapuli nkɔa otumi mbi nɔ kĩ kɛna lɛtsa a kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ kɛna. 9Lɛmɛ kĩ mawɛ nɔ kalɛ sũ ni, nkɔa kudulike makpa nɔ mbom. Makɛna fukĩĩ midi kĩ yĩ, Paulo, Kristo Yesu fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ, nwaa kɔla nɛ ye sũ. 10Nɛ foesũ nkɔa kudulike makpa nɔ nɛ Onesimo lɔlɔ. Ɛnyɛ yĩ mɔawɛ obi nɛ Kristo kamɛ. Ndani hũhũ kamɛ kɔlɛga nkpa ye nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ nwaa kɔla a. 11Titɔ kĩ ye dĩ kayɔ nyɛ nfasɔ malo a, kɔkɔɛ a, ɔtána ye akũ nfasɔ adima, lɛmɛ finyaakĩĩ a, ye akũ deĩ nfasɔ ɛkpa bɔmɔ nɔ flee.
12Nfɔ̃ emuniki yaya nɛ nɔ sɛkɛ̃, ade fɔakɛna yĩ ndɛ yĩ ɔwɔlɛ flee tomɔ ye a. 13Kĩ nwaa kɔla nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a sũ ni, nwɛ kĩ ɛkahɔ nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ nɛ awĩ kufɛ, ɛkaabumɔ yĩ adzuma nɛ nɔ kadokɔ̃. 14Lɛmɛ ntáwɛ kĩ mahɛ nɔ kĩ kpa yĩ kabumɛna, mbom mawɛ kĩ kɛna foe futo nɔ ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ. Foesũ nláakɛna lɛtsama mbɔɛntɛ otunɔ nɛ foe akũ.
15Ɔsa Onesimo dzakũ nɛ nɔ sɛkɛ̃ nɛ lɔkɔ lukũ kamɛ, ayekĩ yaabuki emuniki ɛya nɛ nɔ sɛkɛ̃ ɛyaadzi flee. 16Finyaakĩĩ nnɛ́ ɔsate odi ebuki yanɛ, mbom ɛnyɛ oti kĩ ɛbɛ̃ ɔsate kɔlaa. Ɛnyɛ ɔwaɛ̃nyole kĩ maátunɔ ye kalɛ nɛ Kristo kamɛ. Dã ayekĩ ɛtɛ kɔya ɛkpa yĩ! Lɛmɛ yaabuki ɛtɛ kɔya ɛkpa nɔ ɛba ndɛ ɔsate aye, ade yaabuki ɛnya ɔwaɛ̃nyole nɛ boe Ɔlate dĩ akũ a.
17Foesũ ntɛ ɔbɔɛ yĩ ndɛ nɔ ɔkɔba adzuma ɔkɛnanɛ aye ni, tɛ ye mɔ kawɔlɛ ndɛ ayekĩ aatɛ yĩ. 18Ntɛ edi nfumusu adi nɛ nɔ akũ, ĩye edzimɔ nɔ kɔtɔ kudi malo ni, bu foe akũ akunta kakɔa kakpa yĩ. 19Yĩ Paulo mɔawɛ lɛkɔa awɛ matsɛlɛ kĩ maase nɔ kɔtɔ. Lɛmɛ ntáwɛ kĩ mate nɔ anɛ kĩ nɔ mɔawɛ a odzimɔ yĩ nɔ nkpã kɔtɔ. 20Foesũ nwaɛ̃, mawɛ kĩ kpa yĩ kabumɛna kĩĩ nɛ boe Ɔlate sũ. Nɛ Kristo sũ kɛna foe ayekĩ ɔwɔlɛ aaka edzi yĩ.
21Ntsɛlɛ ovoli kĩĩ mamɛna nɔ, ade matɛ kado kĩ aakɛna nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ mavia nɔ a akũ a. Ĩnyina pefee kĩ aakɛna ɔkpa yĩ fɔba ayekĩ nvia nɔ malo.
22Fukĩ fubu nyɛ kĩ wɛ kɔla kayi yĩ, kitonɛkĩ matɛ kado kĩ Baguma aatse mi flee mpaɛbɔ lɔkɔa etunɔ ĩya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃.
Kawɔ̃na Nkaɛ.
23Epafra, kĩ bɔmɔ ye waa kɔla nɛ Kristo sũ a bo yawɔ̃na nɔ! 24Ade ayea Marko, mɔ Aristarko, mɔ Dema, mɔ Luka, yĩ bakɔba kĩ babumɔ yĩ adzuma kĩĩ kakɛna a, awɔ̃na nɔ.
25Boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo ɛmɔ mi hũhũ flee kɔnya.

Title: HEBRIFƆ 1
Content:
Baguma Tsã Obi Akũ Ɛlɛ Kɔdzɛla.
1Nɛ kɔkɔɛ a, Baguma lɛmɔ boe bawanyɔ a kɔdzɛla lɔkɔ pii nɛ tisi ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ akũ, ɛtsãmɛna ye onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ akũ. 2Lɛmɛ nɛ fuwi nkaɛ kĩĩ kamɛ ni, Baguma lɛmɔ boe kɔdzɛla ɛtsãmɛna ye Obi akũ. Ade Obi kĩĩ akũ ɛtsã ɛbɔa katinya flee, ɛpau ye kĩ ɛnya lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa ɔlate a. 3Obi a lɛnyɛ ayekĩ Baguma kukũkpalɛ la ɛtsa, ade Baguma kutidu a pɛpɛɛpɛ ye malo edeĩ a. Obi a kɔa Baguma kalɛ a kɔbɛ̃ epini katinya flee. Kĩ ɛvɔlɛ bati tɔkpa eyua a, ɛnadzi nɛ Baguma Kpale nɛ ode flee a sɔmɔna.
Baguma Obi a Nyɛ Ode Fɔtɔ Banyanɛ a Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃.
4Baguma kɛna ye Obi a ɛbɛ̃ Baguma ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ a, kitonɛkĩ dĩ a kĩ Baguma te ye a tɛ kɔya lɛba be bade a.
5Kitonɛkĩ Baguma tábi ye fɔtɔ banyanɛ a kamɛ odima tɔ̃ kĩ,
“Nɔ nyɛ yĩ Obinyole.
Nviã luwi kĩĩ mma nɔ.”
Bio Baguma tálɛ nɛ ye ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ a kamɛ odima akũ kĩ,
“Maanya ye Ɔlɛga,
ade ye malo ɛnya yĩ Obi a.”
6Ade lɔkɔ a kĩ Baguma wɛ kĩ yado ye obinyole ɔtɔnyade nɛ katinya kamɛ a ni, ɛlɛ kĩ,
“Ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ a flee, misum ye.”
7Lɛmɛ nɛ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ a akũ ni, Baguma lɛ kĩ,
“Baguma kɛna ye ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ ndɛ ɔwɛ,
ade ɛkɛna ye ode basumunɛ ndɛ fi fɔmɛ a.”
8Lɛmɛ nɛ ye Obi akũ ni, Baguma lɛ kĩ,
“O Baguma, nɔ lɛgãkanya aawa daa daa.
Nɔ bati akũ kanya tsɛ̃ osi kpĩĩ akũ.
9Awɛ tuwĩ kakɛna lɛmɛ akesĩ tɔkpa a.
Ade foesũ Baguma, nɔ Baguma a pau nɔ a,
ɛkpa nɔ obũ kadzikɔ̃ kĩ kawɔlɛ deĩ kɛbɛ̃ nɔ bakɔba flee kade a.”
10Baguma buki ɛlɛ kĩ,
“Boe Ɔlate, nɔ lɛbɔa tite nɛ kayɔkayi a,
ade ɔkɔa nɔ mɔa awɛ ɔkɛna ode lɛmɛ a.
11Fɔtsa kĩĩ flee aawɔ, lɛmɛ nɔ kɔ̃ aana daa,
foe flee fɔ́adɛ fɔtsɛ ndɛ tɛtadiɛ.
12Aabuta foe ndɛ atadiɛ,
ade fɔ́adani ndɛ tɛtadiɛ.
Lɛmɛ nɔ kɔ̃ ade ayea aana daa a,
ade nɔ nkpã kadzi lɛlá kawũna a.”
13Baguma tábi ye ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ a kamɛ odima tɔ̃ kĩ,
“Dzi nɛ yĩ sɔmɔna nɛ awĩ,
kɛnaawo kĩ nkɔa nɔ bakesĩnɛ nkɛna nɔ abɔa katekɔ̃.”
14Kekɔ̃ baáde nyɛ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ a? Ade be nyɛ hũhũ a kĩ basum Baguma, ade yado be lɛmɛ kĩ bɛnaabumɛna bati a kĩ baana nkpã katɛ a.

Title: HEBRIFƆ 2
Content:
Baguma Kpa Boe Nkpã Katɛ Kpale.
1Ade foesũ kɛnɛ kĩ bɔapi ɔnɔkɔali fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bunu a budomɔ akũ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ, ayekĩ bɔláayɛla osi. 2Bɛtsa kĩ ntɛ Baguma ɔlɛdo a kĩ ye ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ kɔa bɛma boe bawanyɔ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali, mɔ odi nyɛ odi kĩ efum ĩye ɛtákɛna nɛ ye akũ a tɛ foe sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ kĩ sɛfɛta a ni, 3nde bɔ́apuli bulo sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ a kĩ baakpa boe a, ntɛ bɔtátɛ nkpã katɛ kpale kĩĩ a? Boe Ɔlate mɔawɛ lɛnya lɔtɔ ɛlɛ nkpã katɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ, ade bikĩ binu foe a di adansiɛ kĩ fɔnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali a. 4Nɛ lɔkɔ mɔapɛ a kamɛ a, Baguma mɔawɛ kɔa nsɛntsɛlɛni mɔ awãwã fɔtsa futefute kakɛna edi adansiɛ nɛ nkpã katɛ a akũ, ade ɛsɛ̃ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa futetsa a ɛkpa bati nɛ ye kawɛ onukpɛ̃ a.
Yesu Kpã Boe Yanamɛna Nkpã Katɛ Kamɛ.
5Baguma tákɔa katinya a kĩ kaaya, kĩ ke akũ fɔlɛtsa bɔlamɛna kalɛ a akũ kanya edo nɛ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ a awɛ. 6Mbom bɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kakɔ kadi kamɛ kĩ,
“Litsa nyɛ otidziwa obi kĩ akɔna ye akũ?
Litsa koũ nyɛ otidziwa kĩ api ye kadunamɔ akũ?
7Ɔkɛ́na ye nɛ kayɔ lɔkɔ lukũ lidi ɔba ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ a.
Lɛmɛ ɔkɔa kukũkpalɛ mɔ obu ɔtsa ye ndɛ lɛgãbɔɛ aye.
8Ade ɔkɛna ye kĩ ɛnya fɔtsa flee akũ a.”
Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ ɔkɛna ye kĩ ɛnya fɔtsa flee akũ, foesũ lɛtsama tábuki lite kĩ ɛlá kɔbɛ̃ nɛ de akũ. Lɛmɛ finyaa bɔámɔ kĩ otidziwa deĩ kɔbɛ̃ nɛ fɔtsa flee akũ. 9Lɛmɛ bɔmɔ́ Yesu a kĩ bɛkɛna nɛ kayɔ nɛ lɔkɔ lukũ kamɛ ɛba ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ a, ayekĩ fɔtsã Baguma kɔnyakamɔ kamɛ ɛyaaku nɛ odi nyɛ odi lɔlɔ a, finyaa kɔ̃ bɔmɔ́ ye kĩ Baguma kɔa obu mɔ kukũkpalɛ ɛtsa ye ndɛ lɛgãbɔɛ aye, nɛ wuda lubo a kĩ ɛmɔ́ a sũ.
10Fɔnɛnɛ kĩ Baguma kĩ ɛbɔa fɔtsa flee, epini foe a, ɛkɛna Yesu ɛkpɔla ɛtsãmɛna lubo kamɔ kamɛ, ayekĩ yaakpã bati beblebee bɛyaana tsɛfã nɛ ye kukũkpalɛ a kamɛ. Kitonɛkĩ oti a kĩ yakpã be kanamɛna nkpã katɛ kamɛ a nyɛ Kristo. 11Kitonɛkĩ oti a kĩ yakpalɛ bati akũ a, mɔ bati a kĩ bɛkpalɛ be akũ a flee deĩ Ɔlɛga mɔapɛ. Ade foesũ kɔnyɔã lákɔ Yesu kĩ yavɛ be ye bawaɛ̃ a. 12Yabi Baguma kĩ,
“Maade nɔ dĩ akũ lɛtsã nkpa awaɛ̃ amɛ,
ade maasã tɔnɔ mmu nɔ nɛ be katsɛnakɔ̃ a.”
13Ebuki ɛlɛ kĩ,
“Maakɔa anɛ nte nɛ Baguma akũ.”
Ade ebuki ɛlɛ kĩ,
“Amɔ yĩ mɔ babi a kĩ Baguma kɔa ɛkpa yĩ a nɛ awĩ.”
14Nɛ ayekĩ babi a kĩ yawɛ a nyɛ batidziwa, kĩ bideĩ sukɛna mɔ babɔanɛ sũ ni, Yesu malo dani ɛkɛna otidziwa, edzi nkpã ndɛ be aye. Ɛkɛna fukĩĩ fɔtsã ye wuda kamɛ, ɛwɔla Abonsam a kĩ ye nɛɛ wuda kɔbɛ̃ a. 15Ke liti lɛmɛ, Yesu kɛna fukĩĩ kĩ bati a kĩ wuda kavila nɛ be nkpã kadzi flee kamɛ fɔ̃ bɛdani basate a, bɛfɔ̃ wuda kavila. 16Kitonɛkĩ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, nnɛ́ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ a yakpa kabumɛna, mbom Abraham babi mɔ bawa yabumɛna. 17Fukĩĩ atsa kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ bɛkɛna ye ndɛ ye bawaɛ̃ aye nɛ osi nyɛ osi akũ, ayekĩ yaapuli ɛnya be Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee kĩ yamɔ bati kɔnya. Yaakasum Baguma nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ lɛmɛ, ayekĩ yaafɔ̃ bɛnyɛ tɔkpa nɛ bati akũ. 18Nɛ ayekĩ ye mɔawɛ ɛmɔ lubo, ɛtsã sɔhuiɛ kamɛ lɛmɛ sũ ni, yaapuli ebumɔ bikĩ be malo bideĩ nɛ sɔhuiɛ kamɛ a lɛmɛ.

Title: HEBRIFƆ 3
Content:
Yesu Bɛ̃ Mose.
1Nwaɛ̃ amɛ Kristofɔ, kĩ Baguma vɛ etomɛna ode lɛmɛ a, mikɔna Yesu a kĩ Baguma do kĩ ɛnya Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee nɛ katɛkado a kĩ bɔnɛɛ a midã. 2Edi ɔnɔkɔali ɛkpa Baguma a kĩ ye lɛpau ye kĩ ɛkɛna adzuma kĩĩ, ndɛ ayekĩ Mose lɛmɛ di ɔnɔkɔali ɛkɛna adzuma nɛ Baguma tɔtɔ kamɛ a. 3Ndɛ ayekĩ babu kɔla okenɛ kaba kɔla mɔawɛ a ni, ade aye kɛfɛta kĩ Yesu ɛna obu baũ ɛba Mose a. 4Kɔla nyɛ kɔla ni, oti ake koe. Lɛmɛ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, Baguma nyɛ oti a kĩ eke fɔtsa a flee. 5Mose di ɔnɔkɔali ndɛ ɔsumunɛ aye nɛ Baguma tɔtɔ kamɛ, ade edi adansiɛ nɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ Baguma aanyɛ ɛtsa nɛ kunya kamɛ a akũ a. 6Lɛmɛ Kristo kɔ̃ dã Baguma tɔtɔ akũ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ndɛ Obi aye. Boe nyɛ ye kɔla a, ntɛ budo ɔwɔlɛ, bɔna katɛkado nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ boe anɛ teĩ nɛ de akũ a akũ.
Kawɛyakɔ̃ Deĩ Kɛkpa Baguma Bade a.
7Nɛ foesũ ndɛ ayekĩ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a lɛ a,
“Ntɛ minu Baguma odo nɛ nviã ni,
8mitakɛna atɔ ɔsĩ,
ndɛ ayekĩ mi bawanyɔ kɛna a,
kĩ biyidza bɛdza nɛ Baguma akũ luwi a nɛ kɔsa kamɛ, bɛsɔ ye bɛdã a.
9Ade bɛsɔ yĩ bɛdã nɛ awã bɛwɛ fɔlɛtsa lɛmɛ nɛ yĩ akũ,
titɔ kĩ bɛmɔ́ fɔtsa a kĩ nkɛna nɛ futeli tɛna kamɛ a malo.
10Nɛ foesũ nna kalɔkpa nɛ bati a akũ ade nlɛ kĩ,
‘Bafum ade bayɛla osi a,
ade bisĩ baákɛna nɛ yĩ mbla a akũ a.’
11Nna kalɔkpa ade nlɔ fubo nlɛ kĩ,
‘Bɛláake kɔbɔa nɛ tite a kĩ kufɛ maakpa be kawɛya a akũ da!’ ”
12Nwaɛ̃ amɛ batɛ badonɛ, midã kadã wĩ kĩ mi kamɛ odima ɛtana ɔwɔlɛ kpa mɔ katatɛkado lɔkɔa emuniki nɛ Baguma a kĩ edzi nkpã a liti. 13Mbom mikaabumɛna akũ akũ luwi nyɛ luwi, kĩ nviã nɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa kamɛ a tsɛla boe akũ, ayekĩ tɔkpa lɛláakɛ mi, ĩye mina atɔ ɔsĩ. Tsɛla boe akũ.
14Kitonɛkĩ boe flee budeĩ tsɛfã mɔ Kristo ntɛ bupini boe katɛkado mɔ ɔsĩ kɛnawo kawũna a, ndɛ ayekĩ buyi kayɔ a. 15Bɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ kĩ,
“Ntɛ minu Baguma odo nviã ni,
mitakɛna atɔ ɔsĩ
ndɛ ayekĩ mi bawanyɔ kɛna a,
kĩ biyidza bɛdza nɛ Baguma akũ a.”
16Bawei linu Baguma odo mɔ biyidza bɛdza nɛ ye akũ a? Ade be nyɛ bati flee a kĩ Mose kpã etomɛna Egipte tite akũ a.
17Bawei akũ mɔ Baguma na kalɔkpa futeli tɛna flee? Ade be nyɛ bati a kĩ bɛkɛna tɔkpa kĩ biku bɛkahɔ nɛ kɔsa kamɛ a. 18Bawei akũ Baguma lɔ fubo ɛlɛ kĩ, “Bɛláake kɔbɔa nɛ tite a kĩ kufɛ maakpa be kawɛya a akũ da”? Ade bati a kĩ biyidza bɛdza nɛ Baguma akũ a. 19Foesũ bɔmɔ́ kĩ bɛtápuli biwo tite akũ, kitonɛkĩ bɛtátɛ Baguma bido.

Title: HEBRIFƆ 4
Content:
1Foesũ kĩ Baguma buki ebinya osi eyi nɛ ye kawɛya a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi a kamɛ kawo sũ ni, mifɔ̃ bɔdã kadã wĩ ayekĩ bɛláamɔ kĩ mi kamɛ odi tápuli ɛna kawɛya a kamɛ kawo. 2Kitonɛkĩ bibi boe Kalɛ Wĩ a ndɛ ayekĩ bibi be malo a. Binu fɔlɛtsa a, lɛmɛ bɛtána foe akũ nfasɔ, kitonɛkĩ kĩ binu foe a, bɛtátɛ foe bido. 3Lɛmɛ boe a kĩ bɔtɛ budo a, buwo nɛ kawɛya a kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi a kamɛ. Ndɛ ayekĩ ɛlɛ kĩ,
“Nna kalɔkpa ade nlɔ fubo kĩ,
‘Bɛláake kɔbɔa nɛ tite a
kĩ kufɛ maakpa be kawɛya a akũ da!’ ”
Baguma lɛ fukĩĩ titɔ kĩ eyua ye mɔawɛ adzuma kito lɔkɔ a kĩ ɛbɔa katinya a malo. 4Kitonɛkĩ Baguma lɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kakɔ kadi nɛ luwi luvũkɔnɔde a akũ kĩ,
“Nɛ luwi luvũkɔnɔde akũ a,
Baguma dzi ɛwɛya,
ade ɛtábuki ɛkɛna adzuma adima a.”
5Ebuki ɛlɛ kalɛ mɔapɛ a kĩ, “Bɛláake kɔbɔa nɛ tite a kĩ kufɛ maakpa be kawɛya a akũ da!”
6Bikĩ bɛnya lɔtɔ binu Kalɛ Wĩ a tápuli biwo nɛ kawɛyakɔ̃ a, kitonɛkĩ bɛtátɛ bido, lɛmɛ osi buki ebinya kĩ badi biwo. 7Baguma yi luwi bɛbã kĩ bavɛ Nviã, nɛ futeli pii liti. Ke liti a, Lɛgã Dawid lɛ kɔdzɛla ɛtsãmɛna fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɔlɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ foe akũ bɔyatɛ̃ a kĩ,
“Ntɛ minu Baguma odo nviã ni,
mitakɛna atɔ ɔsĩ.”
8Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ Yosua ɛkpã be ewo nɛ kawɛyakɔ̃ a kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi a ni, kufɛ Baguma lɛláabuki ɛlɛ kalɛ nɛ kawɛya luwi bɛbã akũ ke liti a. 9Foesũ kawɛya luwi buki lideĩ lɛkpa Baguma bade a, ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma awɛya nɛ luwi luvũkɔnɔde akũ a 10kitonɛkĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ewo nɛ Baguma kawɛyakɔ̃ a, aatɛ kawɛya nɛ be adzuma kamɛ ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma lɛmɛ fɔ̃ ye mɔawɛ adzuma kakɛna, ɛwɛya a. 11Foesũ mifɔ̃ bɔbɔa mbɔdi buwo nɛ kawɛyakɔ̃ a kamɛ, ayekĩ boe kamɛ odima lɛláatomɛna be ɔbla kpa a, ɛtɔ nɛ atɔ ɔsĩ sũ.
12Kitonɛkĩ Baguma kalɛ a deĩ nkpã ade kɛlamɛna adzuma a. Kideĩ ɔbɔ̃ kɛbɛ̃ atugbe adi nyɛ adi, ade katsɔɛ kanaawo awã kĩ kasɛ̃ ɔkla mɔ hũhũ kayite. Kawo kanaasɛ̃ fɔtsakɔ̃ fɔtsakɔ̃ mɔ fɔtsɔ̃ kamɛ tɔbɔ̃ kayite. Kalɛ a adzɛmɔ oti adzuni mɔ ye ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ fɔwɛtsa yededeede. 13Lɛtsama lɛláa kĩ baapuli bɛkɔa bɛkɔla Baguma, kitonɛkĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ ɛbɔa nɛ katinya kamɛ waa ɔdzɔ nɛ ye anɛ kamɛ. Ade ye mɔ bɔ́akɛna akunta nɛ boe kadzi kamɛ akũ bɔkpa a.
Yesu Nyɛ́ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee a.
14Foesũ mifɔ̃ bupi boe katɛkado a kĩ bɔanyɛ katsa a budomɔ akũ mɔ ɔsĩ, kitonɛkĩ budeĩ Yesu, Baguma Obi kĩ ɛnyɛ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee a kĩ ɛtsã ode flee kamɛ ɛnɛ́ edzi nɛ Baguma ɔwɛ̃ a. 15Nnɛ́ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee kĩ ɛláapuli enu boe katɛkado onukpɛ̃ kadɔ kayɔ budeĩ, mbom oti kĩ ye malo bɛsɔ ye bɛdã nɛ osi nyɛ osi akũ ndɛ boe aye, lɛmɛ ɛtákɛna tɔkpa tidima a budeĩ. 16Foesũ mifɔ̃ budo ɔwɔlɛ bufuã Baguma kɔnyakamɔ lɛgãkpo a, ayekĩ bɔ́ana Baguma sɛmɛkalɛ mɔ kɔnyakamɔ fubumɔ boe nɛ kasĩ lɔkɔ.

Title: HEBRIFƆ 5
Content:
1Bapau Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee a odi nyɛ odi katomɛna ye bakɔba kamɛ, kate awɛ nɛ ye akũ kĩ ɛdza nɛ be onukpɛ̃ esum Baguma. Ye adzuma nyɛ kĩ ɛkɔa bati futetsa ɛkpa Baguma, ɛbɔa afɔliɛ nɛ be tɔkpa akũ. 2Nɛ ayekĩ ye mɔawɛ a ɛlá kɔbɛ̃ nɛ tisi pii akũ sũ ni, yana ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ kakpa bikĩ binyína kadi mɔ bikĩ bɛyɛla osi a. 3Ade foesũ kɛnɛ kĩ ɛbɔa tɔkpa afɔliɛ nɛ ye mɔawɛ lɔlɔ mɔ bati bɛbã tɔkpa flee lɛmɛ akũ a.
4Odima ládzina ye akũ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee kado ye akũ foe obu, mbom Baguma avɛ ye ndɛ ayekĩ ɛvɛ Aron a. 5Ade ayea Kristo lɛmɛ tádo ye akũ obu kĩ yanya Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee, mbom Baguma lidzina ye ebi ye kĩ,
“Yĩ Obinyole anɛ.
Nviã luwi kĩĩ mma nɔ.”
6Ebuki ɛlɛ nɛ kakɔ bɛbã kĩ,
“Aanya ɔsɔfɔ daa,
nɛ Melkizedek osi a akũ.”
7Kĩ Yesu dzi nkpã nɛ tite akũ a, ɛbɔa mpaɛ, eke aduli mɔ fɔwɔla mɔ babe ɛkpa Baguma a kĩ ye lipuli ɛnyɛ ye nɛ wuda awɛ kamɛ a. Baguma tse ye, kitonɛkĩ ɛdɔla ye akũ ɛkpa Baguma ɔsum a. 8Titɔ kĩ Baguma Obi yanɛ malo ni, ɛkɔlɛ osetie etomɛna ye lubokamɔ kamɛ. 9Kĩ Baguma kɛna Yesu ɛkpɔla nɛ osi nyɛ osi akũ a, ɛdani oti a kĩ ye akũ bikĩ babu ye a flee aatsã bɛna nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a. 10Ade ye nyɛ oti a kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi kĩ yaanya Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee nɛ Melkizedek osi a akũ a.
Mitafɔnɛ Mi Katɛkado a Awɛ.
11Fɔlɛtsa pii deĩ kĩ bɔ́alɛ nɛ fukĩĩ akũ kufɛ, lɛmɛ foe kayɔkanyɛ deĩ ɔsĩ, kitonɛkĩ miápuli kanu fɔlɛtsa kayɔ mɔatsɛ. 12Fɔnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kĩ titɔ kĩ mɔ lɔkɔ kĩĩ kɛnɛkĩ minya fɔtsa batsanɛ malo ni, mibuki misĩ odi kĩ ɛtsa mi Baguma fɔlɛtsa kayɔkayi fude a. Mila ndɛ akɔkɔa amɛ kĩ bisĩ tɛmɛ mui, lɛmɛ nnɛ́ ndɛ bikĩ bisĩ funitsã kĩ fudeĩ ɔsĩ. 13Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yamɛmɛ ni, akɔkɔa ebuki yanɛ, foesũ enyína lɛtsama nɛ tɔkpa mɔ tuwĩ akũ. 14Banɔkɔɛ̃ anya funitsã kĩ fudeĩ ɔsĩ, kitonɛkĩ bɛvɛlɛ be adzuni nɛ fɔtsa pii kamɛ, kĩ foesũ bapuli kamɔ tɔkpa mɔ tuwĩ kayi ɔsũ.

Title: HEBRIFƆ 6
Content:
1Foesũ mifɔ̃ bɔnaa lɔtɔ bɔkɔlɛ banɔkɔɛ̃ fɔtsa katsa, lɔkɔa bɔfɔnɛ kayɔkayi fɔtsa a kĩ bɛtsa nɛ Kristo akũ a awɛ buyi. Mitafɔ̃ bumuniki bɔnaayi kayɔ mɔ fɔtsa katsa nɛ ayekĩ bɔdani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ, bɔfɔnɛ tudzuma kĩ tɛla nfasɔ, mɔ ayekĩ bɔtɛ Baguma budo, 2mɔ fɔtsa katsa nɛ mui kawɔla amaniɛ, awɛ kate nɛ bati akũ, kayidza kato kanɔkpa mɔ kadzɛmɛna nkaɛ a akũ. 3Mifɔ̃ bɔnaa lɔtɔ bubo anɛ! Ade lɛtsa a kĩ ntɛ Baguma tunɔ ni, bɔ́akɛna a.
4Kitonɛkĩ nde bati a kĩ bimuniki nɛ be katɛkado liti a, aapuli bibuki bɛdani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ? Bɛna nɛ Baguma ɔhaĩ kamɛ tɔ̃ bɛta ode futetsa a onukpɛ̃ bɛmɔ́, bɛna Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a lɛmɛ tsɛfã. 5Ade bɛta lɛtsa wĩ a kĩ lideĩ nɛ Baguma kalɛ kamɛ a onukpɛ̃ bɛmɔ́, bɛna katinya a kĩ kaaya a kamɛ kɔbɛ̃ a tsɛfã a. 6Lɛmɛ bimuniki nɛ be katɛkado liti! Bɛláapuli bimuniki mɔ be bibuki bɛdani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ bibuki babɔa Baguma Obi a nɛ asendua akũ, kado ye kɔnyɔã nɛ kanade.
7Baguma ahila tite a, kĩ tamɔa oni mui kafɔ̃ futse amɛ nɛ te akũ kana nfasɔ kakpa bikĩ be sũ banɛ fɔba nɛ te akũ a. 8Lɛmɛ ntɛ fu mɔ tuwĩ kpa mɛ nɛ te akũ ni, nfasɔ adima lɛláa te akũ. Baguma aapuli edumu te ade nɛ kawũna kamɛ a, baapila te mɔ fi.
9Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, titɔ kĩ bɔlɛ foe lɔmɔ malo ni, mi kɔ̃ bɔtɛ budo kĩ minyina fɔtsa wĩ a kĩ fɔnɛnɛ fɔbɛ̃, kĩ fɔ́afɔ̃ mina nkpã katɛ. 10Kitonɛkĩ Baguma lɛ́nyɛ oti kĩ yaádã kpĩĩ, kĩ yaálɛla adzuma a kĩ mikɛna mɔ ɔdɔ a kĩ minyɛ mitsa nɛ yĩ dĩ sũ. Mibumɛna mi bakɔba Kristofɔ ade milamɛna be kabumɛna finyaa malo a. 11Boe kawɛ mɔ ɔsĩ nyɛ kĩ mi kamɛ odi nyɛ odi epi ye mbɔdi kabɔa kamɛ lɔmɔ kɛnaawo kawũna, ayekĩ mi awɛ aata lɛtsa a kĩ de akũ miate anɛ a. 12Bɔtáwɛ kĩ mikɛna ɔnyɔnɛ, mbom mikɛna fɔtsa ndɛ bati kĩ bɛtɛ bido, kĩ bideĩ ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ, kĩ foesũ bɛna fɔtsa a kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi kĩ yaakpa a.
Lɛtsa a Kĩ Baguma Lɛ Eyi a Lávɛmɛna.
13Kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi kĩ yaakpa Abraham fɔtsa a, ɛtani ye mɔawɛ akũ ɛkpa ye, kitonɛkĩ odima lɛbɛ̃ ye Baguma kĩ yaatani. 14Ɛlɛ kĩ, “Maahila nɔ ade maakpa nɔ babi mɔ bawa beblebee lɛmɛ a.” 15Abraham na ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ, foesũ ye awɛ ta lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma ke otse kĩ yaakpa ye a.
16Bati atani fɔtsa kavɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛbɛ̃ be a kakɔa katsua fɔlɛtsa kavɛlɛ a kamɛ. 17Ade foesũ Baguma tani fɔtsa nɛ ye bɔhɛ a akũ a, kitonɛkĩ ɛwɛ kĩ foe kamɛ fɔkpalɛ bikĩ baatɛ lɛtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi a kĩ ye nhihiɛ lɛláavɛmɛna da. 18Foesũ Baguma kɛna fɔtsa nviã kĩ fɔnyɛ bɔhɛ mɔ katani, kĩ fɔláapuli fɔdani, ade Baguma lɛmɛ lɛláapuli ɛma fɔvã nɛ foe akũ a. Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ ni, boe a kĩ bulo bɔnatani ye a bubuki bɔana ɔwɔlɛ, bɔate anɛ nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi kĩ yaakpa boe a akũ. 19Budeĩ kɔnɛte kĩĩ bɔkpa boe akũ nɛ boe kadzi kamɛ, ndɛ ayekĩ kutse tunu api koe kadzɛla kpli a. Kɔnɛte a akpã boe katsãmɛna lima a kĩ litsua kɔla a kamɛ kawomɛna nɛ kakɔ kpalɛwa flee a. 20Ade awĩ Yesu nya lɔtɔ ewo ndɛ boe lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ aye, ɛdani daa Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee nɛ Melkizedek osi a akũ a.

Title: HEBRIFƆ 7
Content:
Melkizedek Nyɛ Ɔsɔfɔ.
1Melkizedek kĩĩ nyɛ Salem lɛgã, ade ɛnyɛ Baguma Kpale a ɔsɔfɔ a. Kĩ Abraham to kawũ a kĩ ke kamɛ ɛnya fɔgã ɛna akũ yaya a, Melkizedek natsɛlamɔ ye ehila ye. 2Awã naa, Abraham kɔa kawũ kamɛ fɔtsa a kĩ ɛna a flee katsu kawuade a ɛkpa ye.
Dĩ Melkizedek kayɔkanyɛ katɔnyade nyɛ kĩ Lɛgã, fɔtsa kpĩĩ akũ ɔkɛnanɛ. Kayade nyɛ Salem lɛgã kĩ fɔatsa kĩ Lukudɔ Lɛgã. 3Bɛtálɛ lɛtsama nɛ ɔlɛga ĩye ɔma akũ. Bɛtálɛ lɛtsama nɛ ye babi mɔ bawa akũ, bɛtátsa lɔkɔ a kĩ bɛma ye, ĩye lɔkɔ a kĩ eku a. Melkizedek kĩĩ la ndɛ Baguma Obi a ade ɛnyɛ ɔsɔfɔ daa daa a.
4Midã ayekĩ Melkizedek tɛ dĩ! Boe ɔwanyɔ Abraham ndɛ otinɔkɔɛ̃ malo a kpa ye kawũ kamɛ fɔtsa a kĩ ɛna a kasɛ̃ kamɛ katsu kawuade a. 5Nɛ mbla a onukpɛ̃ ni, Levi babi mɔ bawa kĩ banya basɔfɔ a deĩ osi kĩ batɛ fɔtsa kasɛ̃ kamɛ katsu kawuade nɛ Israelfɔ awɛ, titɔ kĩ be malo bɛnyɛ Abraham kasinu kamɛ babi malo. 6Ade Melkizedek táto Levi kasinu a kamɛ a, lɛmɛ ɛtɛ fɔtsa katsu kawuade etomɛna Abraham sɛkɛ̃, ade ehila ye oti a kĩ Baguma kpa bɔhɛ a. 7Atsindze adima lɛláa foe kamɛ kĩ oti a kĩ yakpa nhila a bɛ̃ oti a kĩ ye bihila a. 8Nɛ basɔfɔ sɛmakɛ ni, batidziwa kĩ baku a atɛ fɔtsa katsu kawuade, lɛmɛ nɛ Melkizedek sɛmakɛ kɔ̃ ni, oti kĩ bidi adansiɛ nɛ ye akũ kĩ edzi nkpã daa, ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma fɔlɛtsa a lɛ a, lɛtɛ fɔtsa a. 9Foesũ bɔ́apuli bɔlɛ malo kĩ, Levi kĩ yatɛ fɔtsa kasɛ̃ kamɛ katsu kawuade a malo kpa fɔtsa ɛtsãmɛna Abraham akũ, 10kitonɛkĩ bɛtáma tɔ̃ Levi, lɛmɛ ntɛ bɔ́alɛ ni, ɛna nɛ ɔwanyɔ Abraham kate kamɛ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ Melkizedek natsɛlamɔ ɔwanyɔ a.
11Levifɔ a tɔsɔfɔ kanya kamɛ fɔtsã mɔ bɛkpa Israelfɔ mbla a. Ade finyaa ntɛ Levifɔ tɔsɔfɔ kanya a kakpɔla kɛkpɔla ni, kufɛ fɔtásĩ kĩ ɔsɔfɔ bɛbã ndɛ Melkizedek aye ebuki ɛnɛ, kĩ nnɛ́ Aron kasinu a kamɛ eto. 12Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ bɛvɛmɛna tɔsɔfɔ kanya a ni, kɛnɛ kĩ kavɛmɛna kɛya nɛ tɔsɔfɔ kanya mbla a lɛmɛ kamɛ. 13Boe Ɔlate kĩ ye akũ fɔlɛtsa bɔlamɛna kalɛ a to katete bɛbã kamɛ, ade ke katete a kamɛ obi odima tánya tɔ̃ ɔsɔfɔ a. 14Fɔnɛ fɔwaa pefee kĩ Yuda katete kamɛ bɛma ye, lɛmɛ Mose tábɔa katete kĩĩ dĩ ɛlɛ tɔsɔfɔ kanya lɛtsama.
Yesu La Ndɛ Ɔsɔfɔ Melkizedek Aye.
15Fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kamɛ kpalɛ fɔba kĩ ɔsɔfɔ bɛbã kĩ ɛla ndɛ Melkizedek aye ya. 16Oti kĩĩ nya ɔsɔfɔ nnɛ́ nɛ batidziwa mbla onukpɛ̃, mbom ɛtsã nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna a kɔbɛ̃ akũ ɛya. 17Kitonɛkĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ nɛ ye akũ kĩ,
“Aanya ɔsɔfɔ daa,
nɛ Melkizedek osi a akũ.”
18Foesũ bɛnyɛ mbla kɔɛ a biyi nɛ ɔɔ́wɛ̃, kitonɛkĩ ɛtána kɔbɛ̃ ĩye nfasɔ adima. 19Kitonɛkĩ Mose mbla a tápuli ɛkɛna lɛtsama lɛkpɔla. Finyaa budeĩ kɔnɛte kĩ kɔnɛnɛ kɔbɛ̃, kĩ bɔtsɛ̃ koe akũ bɔafuã Baguma.
20Fukĩ fubu nyɛ kĩ Baguma lɔ fubo nɛ tɔsɔfɔ kanya kĩĩ akũ. Kɔkɔɛ a Baguma tálɔ fubo ɛkpa bikĩ bidzina basɔfɔ a. 21Lɛmɛ kĩ Yesu yanya ɔsɔfɔ a, Baguma lɔ fubo ɛkpa ye ɛlɛ kĩ,
“Boe Ɔlate a lɔ fubo
ade ɛláadani ye adzuni a,
‘Aanya ɔsɔfɔ daa.’ ”
22Fubo kĩĩ sũ Yesu dani apam a kĩ ɛnɛnɛ ɛbɛ̃ kɔlaa a liti ɔdzanɛ.
23Ntsitsemu bɛbã buki edeĩ. Kɔkɔɛ a basɔfɔ nɛ lidede, kitonɛkĩ bɛkaku mɔatsɛ mɔatsɛ kafɔnɛ adzuma a. 24Lɛmɛ kĩ Yesu kɔ̃ dzi nkpã daa sũ ni, ye tɔsɔfɔ kanya a lɛláato ye akũ tɛnaa odima akũ. 25Foesũ yaapuli ɛtɛ bati a kĩ batsã ye akũ kaya nɛ Baguma sɛkɛ̃ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ, kitonɛkĩ edzi nkpã daa, ade yake Baguma aduli kakpa be a.
26Foesũ Yesu nyɛ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee a kĩ busĩ. Ɛnyɛ oti kpalɛwa kĩ nfumusu adima lɛláa ye akũ, ade tɔkpa tidima lɛláa ye akũ a. Bɛnyɛ ye nɛ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ kamɛ, ade bɛdɛla ye flee ɛtɛ̃ ode a. 27Yesu lɛlá ndɛ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ nkaɛ a, ade fɔtásĩ kĩ yabɔa afɔliɛ luwi nyɛ luwi nɛ ye mɔawɛ tɔkpa akũ, lɔkɔa ke liti ɛbɔa nɛ bati bɛbã tɔkpa lɔlɔ. Ɛbɔa afɔliɛ deedimɔapɛ ɛkpa fɔkɔ a flee, nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ ɛkɔa ye akũ ɛbɔa afɔliɛ a. 28Mose mbla a apau banyole kĩ badɔ kadzina be basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ flee, lɛmɛ Baguma tsã ye fubo kalɔ akũ nɛ mbla a liti a, ɛpau Obi a kĩ ɛkɛna ye ɛkpɔla a yanya ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ flee daa.

Title: HEBRIFƆ 8
Content:
Yesu Nyɛ́ Boe Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee.
1Kalɛ titiliwu nɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɔlamɛna kalɛ a kamɛ nyɛ kĩ budeĩ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee kĩĩ odu, kĩ edzi nɛ Obu Lɛgã Kpale lɛgãkpo a sɔmɔna nɛ ode. 2Yasum ndɛ ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ aye nɛ Kakɔ Kpalɛwa Flee a kĩ kɛnyɛ lima patampa wĩ a kamɛ, kĩ nnɛ́ otidziwa lɛbɔa de, mbom boe Ɔlate a lɛbɔa de.
3Badzina ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ flee kamɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛkɔa afɔliɛ fɔtsa ɛkpa Baguma ɛbɔa afɔliɛ lɛmɛ, foesũ kɛnɛ kĩ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee kĩĩ lɛmɛ ɛna afɔliɛ litsedi ɛkpa Baguma. 4Ade ntɛ tite akũ edzi ni, kufɛ ɛláanya ɔsɔfɔ kɔlaa, kitonɛkĩ basɔfɔ a kĩ be akɔa futetsa kakpa Baguma nɛ Yudafɔ mbla a onukpɛ̃ a deĩ kɔkɔɛ. 5Adzuma kĩ bakɛna ndɛ basɔfɔ aye nɛ kasumkɔ̃ la ndɛ fukĩ fudeĩ nɛ ode a kuyo odi.
Ade foesũ kĩ Mose aabɔa Lima Patampa Kpalɛwa a ni, Baguma bi ye kĩ, “Dã kĩ ɔkɛna nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bɛtsa nɔ nɛ ɔtɔ akũ a onukpɛ̃.” 6Lɛmɛ finyaa Baguma kpa Yesu ɔsɔfɔ adzuma kĩ ɛnɛnɛ ɛbɛ̃ basɔfɔ a tide kɔlaa, ndɛ ayekĩ apam a kĩ ɛkɛna nɛ Baguma mɔ ye bati kayite a nɛnɛ ɛbɛ̃ a, kitonɛkĩ bɛkɛna ye nɛ bɔhɛ a kĩ ɛnɛnɛ ɛbɛ̃ a akũ.
7Ntɛ mfumsu adima ɛtana nɛ apam atɔnyade a akũ ni, kufɛ fɔláabuki fusĩ kĩ bakɛna ayade. 8Lɛmɛ Baguma amɔ mfumsu nɛ ye bati akũ kĩ ɛlɛ kĩ,
“Boe Ɔlate a lɛ kĩ,
fuwi fudi aya kĩ maakɛna apam vɔɛ̃ mɔ
Israel kade a
mɔ Yuda kade a lɛmɛ.
9Apam kĩĩ lɛláana ndɛ ekĩ
nkɛna mɔ be bawanyɔ
nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ mpi be nɛ akpɔ
nkpã be nnɛmɛna nɛ Egipte tite akũ a.
Kitonɛkĩ bɛtákɛna nɛ apam a kĩ nkɛna mɔ be a akũ,
foesũ yĩ malo mbɔa kanɛ nkpa be.”
10Ɔlate a buki ɛlɛ kĩ,
“Ade apam kĩ maakɛna mɔ Israel bati
nɛ fuwi a kĩ fɔ́aya a liti a.
Maakɔa yĩ mbla ndo nɛ be adzuni kamɛ,
ade maatsɛlɛ ye nɛ be tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ a.
Maanya be Baguma,
ade be baanya yĩ bati a.
11Odima lɛláabuki ɛtsa ɔkɔba fɔtsa
ĩye ebi ɔwaɛ̃ kĩ, ‘Nyi Baguma,’
kitonɛkĩ odi nyɛ odi aanyi yĩ
kito babisɛ̃ akũ kɛnawo banɔkɔɛ̃ akũ.
12Maamɔ be kɔnya nɛ be ɔbla kpa a kĩ bɛbɔa akũ,
ade nláabuki nte anɛ nɛ be tɔkpa akũ kɔlaa a.”
13Kĩ Baguma lɛ kĩ apam vɔɛ̃ a, fɔatsa kĩ ɛkɛna atɔnyade a akɔɛ. Ade finyaakĩĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ lɛkɛna lɔkɔɛ ni, owi lɛláabuna mɔ laatɛ̃ lɛnaa.

Title: HEBRIFƆ 9
Content:
Baguma Kasum Nɛ Tite Mɔ Ode.
1Apam atɔnyade a na tɛbla kĩ te akũ batsã kasum, mɔ tite akũ kɔla, awã kĩ basum lɛmɛ. 2Bike patampa bɛkɔa lima bɛsɛ̃ ye kamɛ. Bavɛ kakɔ katɔnyade a kĩ Kakɔ Kpalɛwa, ade awã lɛmɛ bike ɔsɛdza otse mɔ opunu a kĩ ye akũ bate abodoo kakpa Baguma a. 3Nɛ kɔla kamɛ katsua lima a liti ni, patampa bɛbã deĩ kĩ bavɛ Kakɔ Kpalɛwa Flee. 4Fɔtsa a kĩ fudeĩ nɛ awã nyɛ sika ngbã atɛnyɛ a kĩ ye akũ bate lifii ɔnyɔ, apam adakã kĩ bidue mɔ sika ngbã. Adakã a kamɛ fɔtsa a nyɛ sika ngbã okluwa kĩ funitsã kĩ bavɛ mana deĩ nɛ ye kamɛ, Aron otse kĩ yake katsã, kĩ ɛnyɛ tɔɔta, mɔ boe tratra nviã kĩ be akũ bɛtsɛlɛ mbla ewua a bite a. 5Bɛmɛ Kerubifɔ kutidu bɛdzɛ̃ nɛ adakã a akũ, kĩ banyɛ Baguma kukũkpalɛ katsa, ade bɛdzɛlɛ be fupoki bɛtsa awã kĩ bakɔa bati tɔkpa kate a. Lɛmɛ bɔláapuli bɔlɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ fɔtsa a na flee akũ dzununuunu finyaa.
6Ade ntɛ bɛmanɛ fɔtsa a biyi lɔmɔ a, basɔfɔ awo nɛ Patampa atɔnyade a kamɛ kakɛna be tɔsɔfɔ adzuma. 7Lɛmɛ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee a odi awo nɛ kɔla kɔyade a kamɛ deedimɔapɛ nɛ kateli kamɛ. Ntɛ yanaa a, kɛnɛkĩ yalɛ bayaɛ babɔanɛ kĩ yaakɔa ɛbɔa afɔliɛ ɛkpa Baguma nɛ ye mɔawɛ tɔkpa mɔ tɔkpa a kĩ bati kɛna nɛ katanyi kamɛ a lɔlɔ. 8Nɛ nhihiɛ kĩĩ onukpɛ̃ ni, Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a nyɛ ɛtsa kĩ, nɛ ayekĩ patampa atɔnyade a buki ɛdzɛ̃ sũ ni, osi tábinya kĩ bati biwo nɛ Kakɔ Kpalɛwa Flee a kamɛ. 9Fukĩĩ nyɛ nfantuhũ fɔtsa katsa fɔkpa nviã fuwi kĩĩ. Fɔatsa kĩ afɔliɛ mɔ futetsa a kĩ bakpa Baguma a lápuli kafɔ̃ basumunɛ a ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ akpalɛ flefle, 10kitonɛkĩ be ɔsum a manɛ mɔ funitsã, bavɛ mɔ akũ kakpalɛ tɛmaniɛ ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ odi. Fukĩĩ flee nyɛ katinya kamɛ tɛbla kĩ bakɛna kɛnaawo lɔkɔ a kĩ Baguma aalɔla foe.
11Lɛmɛ Kristo ya kɔkɔɛ ndɛ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee ɛkpa fɔtsa wĩ a kĩ fɔya kɔkɔɛ a. Patampa Kpalɛwa a kĩ ye kamɛ yasum a pɔnɛ lububu, ade ɛkpɔla ɛba akɔɛ a. Ade ye kɔ̃ nnɛ́ patampa kĩ batidziwa like ye, ade foe nyɛ kĩ ɛtáto katinya kĩĩ kamɛ. 12Kĩ Kristo wo nɛ patampa a kamɛ ɛnaa Kakɔ Kpalɛwa Flee kamɛ deedimɔapɛ a, ɛtákɔa kutukpabi mɔ banantsue babi babɔanɛ ɛbɔa afɔliɛ, mbom ye mɔawɛ babɔanɛ ɛkɔa ɛvɛlɛ nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna ɛma boe.
13Kutukpabi, banantsue babɔanɛ mɔ ɔnantsue obi kĩ bipila ye batɔ bakɔa kasã nɛ oti a kĩ efĩĩ deĩ nɛ ye akũ, lɔkɔa ye akũ akpalɛ. 14Ayekĩ fukĩĩ nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali sũ ni, nde mɔ Kristo babɔanɛ lɛláakɛna fɔtsa kpale kɔlaa? Kristo tsã daa Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a kɔbɛ̃ akũ, ɛkɔa ye a kĩ efĩĩ adima lɛláa ye akũ a, ɛbɔa afɔliɛ ɛkpa Baguma. Ye babɔanɛ a akpalɛ boe tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ, ɛnyɛ boe tɛmaniɛ kĩ tɛlá nfasɔ ayekĩ bɔ́apuli busum Baguma a kĩ edzi nkpã a.
15Ade fukĩĩ sũ Kristo kɛna apam vɔɛ̃ a kamɛ ɔkpɔlanɛ, ayekĩ bati a kĩ Baguma vɛ a, aana daa adzapadiɛ a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi a. Fukĩĩ aaya nɛ foe kamɛ kitonɛkĩ oti liku, ade fɔnyɛ tɔkpa a kĩ bati kɛna nɛ apam atɔnyade a kamɛ a.
16Awã kĩ adzapadiɛ akũ ovoli deĩ ni, baákɛna ye akũ adzuma ntɛ bɛtámɔ́ foe kamɛ kĩ ovoli a ɔkɔnanɛ ku, 17kitonɛkĩ adzapadiɛ akũ ovoli lɛnyɛ́ lɛtsama ntɛ oti a kĩ ɛkɛna ye a dzi nkpã. Mbɔɛntɛ oti a ku fɔmɔ baapuli bɛkɛna ye akũ adzuma. 18Ade foesũ apam atɔnyade a malo ni, bɛtánɛ babɔanɛ liti bɛkɛna ye adzuma.
19Mose nya lɔtɔ ede lɛtsã nɛ tɛbla flee a kĩ tideĩ nɛ mbla ovoli kamɛ a ɛkpa bati a. Ke liti a, ɛkɔa mui ɛtsɛka mɔ kutukpabi mɔ banantsue babɔanɛ, ɛkɔa kuveli tɛtsã mɔ tuwĩ mɔ ɔlɛ̃ ɛta ade ɛnyɛ ɛsã nɛ mbla ovoli a mɔ bati a flee akũ. 20Ɛlɛ kĩ, “Ade apam a kĩ Baguma kɛna mɔ mi a kĩ mikɛna nɛ ye akũ a babɔanɛ nɛ awĩ a.” 21Ade ayea Mose lɛmɛ akɔa babɔanɛ kasã nɛ Patampa Kpalɛwa a mɔ fɔtsa a kĩ foe akũ adzuma bakɛna nɛ kasum kamɛ a flee akũ a. 22Ɔnɔkɔali, bɔ́apuli bɔlɛ kĩ nɛ mbla a onukpɛ̃ ni, babɔanɛ bakɔa kakpalɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa akũ, ade ntɛ bɛtáko babɔanɛ nɛ tite ni, tɔkpa kakɔa kate láya.
Kristo Kɔa Ye Akũ Ɛbɔa Afɔliɛ Ɛnyɛ Tɔkpa.
23Foesũ fusĩ kĩ bɛkpalɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔla ndɛ ode fude kuyo a akũ nɛ osi kĩĩ akũ. Lɛmɛ ode fɔtsa a mɔawɛ kɔ̃ afɔliɛ kĩ ɛnɛnɛ ɛbɛ̃ tite akũ ade bɛkɔa bɛkpalɛ foe akũ. 24Kitonɛkĩ Kristo táwo ɛnaa Patampa Kpalɛwa a kĩ batidziwa like, kĩ ɛnyɛ ode fude a odi kuyo a kamɛ. Ewo ɛnaa ode mɔawɛ a, awã kĩ finyaa ɛnanyɛ ye akũ nɛ Baguma anɛ nɛ boe onukpɛ̃. 25Lɛmɛ Kristo táwo nɛ awã kĩ yakɔa ye akũ ɛbɔa afɔliɛ ebuli ndɛ ayekĩ Yudafɔ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee a akɔa ɔyaɛ babɔanɛ kawomɛna nɛ Kakɔ Kpalɛwa Flee a kamɛ kateli nyɛ kateli a. 26Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ aye fɔla ni, kufɛ kɛnɛ kĩ ɛkaamɔ lubo lɔkɔ pii, kito anɛ katinya kayɔkayi a. Lɛmɛ finyaa kĩ katinya anaa kawũna a, Kristo ya deedimɔapɛ kĩ yakɔa ye akũ ɛbɔa afɔliɛ ɛnyɛ tɔkpa.
27Baguma hihiɛ kĩ otidziwa eku deedimɔapɛ, ade nɛ wuda liti a, yaadzɛmɔ ye. 28Ade ayea Kristo lɛmɛ kɔa ye akũ ɛbɔa afɔliɛ deedimɔapɛ, ɛnyɛ bati pii tɔkpa a ɛnamɛna a. Yaabuki ɛya lɛyade, lɛmɛ ɛláabuki ɛkɛna lɛtsama nɛ tɔkpa akũ, mbom yaatɛ bati a kĩ bidzi badã ye anɛ a bɛna nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a.

Title: HEBRIFƆ 10
Content:
1Yudafɔ mbla a lɛnyɛ́ fɔtsa wĩ a kutidu, mbom ɛla ndɛ fɔtsa wĩ a kĩ fɔ́aya a kuyo kɛkɛ. Nɛ mbla a onukpɛ̃ ni, kateli nyɛ kateli basɔfɔ a abɔa afɔliɛ mɔapɛ a kakpa Baguma. Ade foesũ ntɛ fɔtsã mbla kĩĩ akũ ni, bɛláapuli bɛkɛna bati a kĩ baya nɛ Baguma sɛkɛ̃ a bɛkpɔla da a. 2Ntɛ bipuli bɛkpalɛ bati a kĩ basum Baguma a akũ deedimɔapɛ ni, kufɛ be tɔwɔlɛ lɛláabuki tɛkakɔ be kɔtɔ bio kĩ tɔkpa deĩ nɛ be akũ, lɔkɔa bɛfɔ̃ afɔlibɔ flee kabɔa. 3Lɛmɛ ndɛ ayekĩ fɔla a, kateli nyɛ kateli afɔlibɔ afɔ̃ bati akai be tɔkpa kɛkɛ, 4kitonɛkĩ banantsue mɔ kutukpabi babɔanɛ lɛláapuli bɛnyɛ tɔkpa da.
5Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ kĩ Kristo aaya nɛ katinya kamɛ a, ebi Baguma kĩ,
“Aáwɛ afɔlibɔ mɔ futetsa,
mbom ɔkɛna sukɛna ɔkpa yĩ.
6Ɔyaɛ kĩ bipila ye lodo nɛ afɔlibɔ atɛnyɛ akũ
ĩye tɔkpa kanyɛ afɔliɛ
láwo nɔ anɛ.
7Ade ke nlɛ kĩ, ‘O Baguma, amɔ yĩ nɛ awĩ.
Ĩya kĩ mayaakɛna nɔ kawɛ
ndɛ ayekĩ bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ yĩ akũ
nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ a.’ ”
8Ɛnya lɔtɔ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Aáwɛ afɔlibɔ, mɔ futetsa, ĩye ɔyaɛ kĩ bapila ye nɛ afɔlibɔ atɛnyɛ akũ, mɔ tɔkpa kanyɛ afɔliɛ láwo nɔ anɛ.” Ɛlɛ fukĩĩ titɔ kĩ babɔa afɔliɛ kĩĩ flee nɛ mbla a onukpɛ̃ malo. 9Ade ke ɛlɛ kĩ, “O Baguma, amɔ yĩ nɛ awĩ. Ĩya kĩ mayaakɛna nɔ kawɛ.” Nɛ osi kĩĩ akũ a, Baguma fɔnɛ afɔlibɔ kɔɛ a flee awɛ ɛkɔa Kristo afɔliɛ a edo nɛ te kadokɔ̃. 10Ayekĩ Yesu Kristo kɛna Baguma kawɛ akũ, ɛkɔa ye akũ ɛbɔa afɔliɛ deedimɔapɛ, ɛkpa fɔkɔ flee ɛkpalɛ boe akũ.
11Yudafɔ ɔsɔfɔ odi nyɛ odi akɛna ye ɔsɔfɔ adzuma luwi nyɛ luwi, kabɔa afɔliɛ mɔapɛ a kabuli, titɔ kĩ afɔlibɔ kĩĩ lɛláapuli ɛnyɛ tɔkpa malo. 12Lɛmɛ kĩ Kristo kɔa ye akũ ɛbɔa afɔliɛ mɔapɛ nɛ tɔkpa akũ eyua a, ɛnadzi nɛ Baguma sɔmɔna, 13awã kĩ edzi yadzɔlɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ Baguma aakɔa ye bakesĩnɛ ɛkɛna ye abɔa katekɔ̃. 14Kristo kɔa afɔliɛ mɔapɛ a kĩ ɛbɔa a, ɛkɛna bati a kĩ bɛkpalɛ be akũ a bɛkpɔla daa.
15Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a lɛmɛ adi adansiɛ nɛ foe akũ. Ɛnya lɔtɔ ɛlɛ kĩ,
16“Boe Ɔlate lɛ kĩ,
‘Ade apam vɔɛ̃ kĩ maakɛna mɔ be,
nɛ lɔkɔ kĩ laya a kamɛ a.
Maakɔa yĩ mbla a ndo nɛ be tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ.
Ade maatsɛlɛ ye nɛ be adzuni kamɛ a.’ ”
17Ebuki ɛlɛ kĩ,
“Nláabuki nte anɛ nɛ be tɔkpa mɔ be ɔbla kpa akũ.”
18Foesũ ntɛ bɛkɔa fukĩĩ flee bite ni, tɔkpa kanyɛ afɔliɛ tábuki esĩ.
Mifɔ̃ Bufuã Bɔya Nɛ Baguma Sɛkɛ̃.
19Foesũ nwaɛ̃ amɛ, bɔtsã Yesu wuda akũ, bɔna osi faa kĩ bɔ́apuli buwo nɛ Kakɔ Kpalɛwa Flee a kamɛ. 20Ebinya nkpã osi vɔɛ̃ ɛkpa boe ɛtsãmɛna lima a kĩ lɛsɛ̃ patampa kamɛ a kĩ lɛdza lɛkpa ye sukɛna a. 21Budeĩ Ɔsɔfɔ Kpale kĩ ye adãmɛna Baguma tɔtɔ a akũ, 22foesũ mifɔ̃ bɔkɔa ɔnɔkɔali ɔwɔlɛ, mɔ katɛkado kĩ kitim, mɔ tɔwɔlɛ kĩ tɛkpalɛ kĩ kɔtɔkaku lɛláa, mɔ sukɛna kĩ bɛwɔla se mui klɛĩklɛĩ bufuã Baguma. 23Mifɔ̃ bupi kɔnɛte fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɔanyɛ katsa a budomɔ akũ pintii nɛ boe katɛkado kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ bɔ́apuli bɔtɛ Baguma budo kĩ yaakɛna nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi a akũ. 24Mifɔ̃ bɔkɔna ayekĩ bɔ́ado boe bawaɛ̃ kɔbɛ̃ bibumɛna akũ akũ, bɛwɛ akũ kalɛ, bɛkɛna tudzuma wĩ lɛmɛ. 25Mitafɔ̃ bɔfɔ̃ boe katsɛna kanaa ndɛ ayekĩ mi kamɛ badi akɛna a, mbom mifɔ̃ budo akũ kɔbɛ̃ bubu, kitonɛkĩ mimɔ́ kĩ boe Ɔlate Luwi a lamɛna kafuã.
26Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ bunyi ɔnɔkɔali a buyua, mɔ bubua pa bɔakɛna tɔkpa ni, afɔliɛ adima buki ɛláa kĩ yaapuli ɛnyɛ tɔkpa. 27Mbom lɛtsa a kĩ lite nyɛ kĩ bɔadzi bɔkadã Kadzɛ mɔ libe a kĩ laaya a anɛ, mɔ fi gɛĩgɛĩ a kĩ fɔ́awɔla Baguma bakesĩnɛ a! 28Ntɛ odi fum Mose mbla a ni, baámɔ ye kɔnya, kakɔ bakɔ ye ntɛ bɛdza nɛ bati nviã ĩye bati ɛlalɛ adansiɛ kadi akũ.
29Kekɔ̃ mikɔna midã ni, litsa sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ aaya nɛ oti a kĩ esupa Baguma Obi a, kĩ ebu Baguma apam babɔanɛ a kĩ ɛkɔa ɛvɔlɛ tɔkpa nɛ ye akũ a fɔtsa pupulidza? Litsa lɛmɛ miakɔna kĩ laaya nɛ oti a kĩ yasupa Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a kĩ yamɔ bati kɔnya a akũ? Mikɔna midã sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ mɔ ɔsĩ a kĩ baakpa ye a! 30Kitonɛkĩ bunyina oti a kĩ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Yĩ aavia tɔkpa kɔtɔkase, yĩ aase te kɔtɔ.” Ebuki ɛlɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate a aadzɛmɔ ye bati.” 31Fɔnyɛ libe paa kĩ odi aawo nɛ Baguma kĩ edzi nkpã a kalɔkpa kamɛ!
32Mite anɛ nɛ fuwi a kĩ fɔtɛ̃, kĩ minya lɔtɔ minyi Baguma laa a. Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ a, kĩ Baguma ɔhaĩ ko nɛ mi akũ a, mido ɔwɔlɛ mipili mɔ ɔsĩ titɔ kĩ mimɔ́ lubo pii malo. 33Fɔkɔ fudi bavũna mi nɛ kanade, kakɛna mi awɔda. Fɔkɔ bɛbã lɛmɛ miakɔa mi akũ kabumɛna bikĩ bamɔna be lubo kĩĩ odu a. 34Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, mimɔ́ lubo ndɛ bati a kĩ bɛwaa kɔla, ade titɔ kĩ bɛkɔa kɔbɛ̃ bɛtɛ mi akũ fɔtsa flee nɛ mi awɛ malo ni, mido ɔwɔlɛ mitɛ foe mɔ kawɔlɛ, kitonɛkĩ minyina kĩ mibuki mideĩ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛnɛnɛ lɛbɛ̃, kĩ laana daa a.
35Foesũ akpɔ ɛtaveli mi, kitonɛkĩ fɔ́ama mi kɔtɔkase kpale. 36Fusĩ kĩ miana ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ, ayekĩ míapuli mikɛna nɛ Baguma kawɛ akũ, lɔkɔa mi awɛ aata lɛtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi a. 37Kitonɛkĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ,
“Kite sukuloo oti a kĩ yaaya a, aaya, ade ɛláabuna owi a.
38Yĩ oti kpĩĩ aatɛ yĩ edo, edzi nkpã.
Lɛmɛ ntɛ odi muniki liti ni,
ɛláabuki ewo yĩ anɛ.”
39Lɛmɛ boe kɔ̃ bɔnyɛ́ bati a kĩ bamuniki liti kanaa kayɛla kamɛ, mbom budeĩ katɛ kado ade bɔna nkpã katɛ a.

Title: HEBRIFƆ 11
Content:
Katɛkado Akũ Nfantuhũ.
1Katɛkado nyɛ fɔatsa kĩ nɔ anɛ teĩ nɛ foe akũ a anɛ kadã mɔ fɔtsa a kĩ aámɔ mɔ anɛ a foe katɛkado kĩ fudeĩ. 2Katɛkado akũ fɔtsã mɔ Baguma mɔ́ kawɔlɛ nɛ boe atitifɔ bawanyɔ a akũ a.
3Katɛkado kamɛ fɔtsã mɔ bunu foe kayɔ kĩ Baguma kalɛ a ɛkɔa ɛbɔa katinya, ayekĩ lɛtsa a kĩ bɔamɔ a, ɛkɛna de etomɛna lɛtsa a kĩ bɔámɔ mɔ anɛ a kamɛ.
4Katɛkado lɛfɔ̃ Abel bɔa afɔliɛ kĩ ɛnɛnɛ ɛbɛ̃ Kain ade ɛkpa Baguma. Ye katɛkado kamɛ ɛtsã ɛna Baguma adansiɛ nɛ ye akũ kĩ ɛnyɛ oti kpĩĩ, kitonɛkĩ Baguma mɔawɛ lɛtɛ ye futetsa a. Titɔ kĩ Abel ku malo ni, ɛtsã ye katɛkado kamɛ ebuki yalɛ kɔdzɛla nviã.
5Katɛkado lɛfɔ̃ bɛbɔɛ Henok bɛnamɛna ode kĩ ɛtáku. Odima tábuki ɛmɔ́ ye, kitonɛkĩ Baguma yabɔɛ ye ɛnamɛna ode. Fɔmɔ ɛbɔɛ ye ɛnamɛna ode a ni, Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a di adansiɛ nɛ ye akũ kĩ ye fɔlɛtsa wo Baguma anɛ. 6Ntɛ odi lɛlá katɛkado ni, ye fɔlɛtsa lɛláawo Baguma anɛ, kitonɛkĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaya nɛ Baguma sɛkɛ̃ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ ɛna katɛkado kĩ Baguma deĩ, ade ɛnyɛ bikĩ bawɛ ye liti osi a kɔtɔ osenɛ a.
7Katɛkado lɛfɔ̃ Noa tɛ Baguma kɔdɛ nɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔ́aya kĩ ɛláapuli ɛmɔ́ a akũ. Ebu Baguma ade ke ɛmɛ mui anɛ adakã kpale kĩ ɛnyɛ ye mɔ ye tɔtɔ bati a. Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ ni, ye katɛkado nyɛ kɛtsa kĩ katinya kamɛ bati ku kɔtɔ ade Baguma bɔɛ ye kĩ ɛnyɛ oti kpĩĩ a.
8Katɛkado lɛfɔ̃ Abraham bu Baguma, kĩ ɛvɛ ye kĩ ɛdzakũ ɛnaa tite a kĩ taanya ye adzapadiɛ akũ a. Ade ɛdzakũ nɛ ye mɔawɛ tite akũ ɛnaa awã kĩ enyína malo a. 9Katɛkado ɛkɔa ɛnanya ɔnɔvɔɛ̃ nɛ tite a kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi yaakpa ye a akũ. Edzi nɛ patampa kamɛ, ade ayea Isak mɔ Yakob lɛmɛ dzi nɛ tɛpatampa kamɛ a, titɔ kĩ bɛkpa be tite mɔapɛ a bɔhɛ a. 10Abraham kɛna foe lɔmɔ, kitonɛkĩ ɛkadã anɛ kakpa ɔmatɔ kpale a kĩ Baguma awɛ tsua ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ kayɔkayi futekũ mɔ ɔsĩ akũ.
11Katɛkado lɛfɔ̃ Sara lɛmɛ na kɔbɛ̃ epuli ɛtsãmɔ kɔma, titɔ kĩ ɛkɛna katsɔkpa malo, kitonɛkĩ ebu Baguma a kĩ ɛkpa ye bɔhɛ a ɔnɔkɔalini. 12Foesũ kito Abraham mɔapɛ a kĩ eku eyua malo a kamɛ babi mɔ bawa kĩ bɛnɛ lidede ndɛ fusibii, mɔ mpo abuĩ dã kĩ bɛláapuli bɛkã a nɛ́ bito a.
13Bati kĩĩ flee ku nɛ be katɛkado kamɛ, kĩ be awɛ táta lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi kĩ yaakpa be a. Lɛmɛ bɛmɔ́ foe mɔ lugo, bɛtɛ foe mɔ kawɔlɛ ade bitunɔ nɛ foe akũ kĩ banɔvɔɛ̃ mɔ basitsãnɛ banɛ nɛ tite kĩĩ akũ a. 14Kitonɛkĩ bati a kĩ balɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ odu a, nyɛ bɛtsa pefee kĩ bɛlamɔ be mɔawɛ tite kawɛ. 15Ntɛ tite a kĩ te akũ bɛdzakũ a bɛkakɔna ni, kufɛ bɛna osi bimuniki bɛnaa te akũ. 16Mbom bɛkawɛ tite kĩ tɛnɛnɛ tɛbɛ̃, kĩ tɛnyɛ ode tide a lɛmɛ. Nɛ foesũ fɔákɔ Baguma kɔnyɔã kĩ bavɛ ye kĩ be Baguma, kitonɛkĩ ɛlɔla ɔmatɔ kpale odi eyi be.
17Katɛkado lɛfɔ̃ Abraham kɔa ye obi Isak ɛbɔa afɔliɛ, lɔkɔ a kĩ Baguma sɔ ye ɛdã a. Titɔ kĩ obi a na Baguma lɛ eyi kĩ yaakpa Abraham malo ni, etunɔ faa kĩ yakɔa ye obinyole mɔapɛ a ɛbɔa afɔliɛ ɛkpa Baguma. 18Baguma bi ye kɔkɔɛ kĩ, “Isak akũ fɔ́atsã mɔ aana babi mɔ bawa a kĩ nlɛ ĩyi a.” 19Abraham kɔna kĩ Baguma aapuli ɛdzɛla Isak etomɛna kanɔkpa malo. Ade foesũ emuniki ɛtɛ ye obi ndɛ wuda kamɛ bɛdzɛla ye bitomɛna a.
20Katɛkado lɛfɔ̃ Isak hila Yakob mɔ Esau nɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔ́aya a akũ a.
21Katɛkado lɛfɔ̃ kĩ Yakob aaku a, ehila Yosef babinyole a, ade kĩ ɛkɛna lɔlɔ ete nɛ ye otse kĩ yake katsã akũ a, esum Baguma.
22Katɛkado lɛfɔ̃ kĩ Yosef aaku a, ɛlɛ eyi kĩ Israelfɔ aadzakũ nɛ Egipte tite akũ, ade ɛtsa ayekĩ bɛkɛna mɔ ye fɔtsɔ̃ a.
23Katɛkado lɛfɔ̃ kĩ bɛma Mose a, ye bamanɛ kɔla ye tidetɔ ɛlalɛ, kitonɛkĩ bɛmɔ́ kĩ yalɛ kadã paa, ade bɛtávila mbla a kĩ Egipte Lɛgã si a katu a.
24Katɛkado lɛfɔ̃ kĩ Mose bo anɛ a, esĩ kĩ bɛtavɛ ye kĩ Egipte Lɛgã obitsole obi. 25Mbom ɛwɛ kĩ yamɔ lubo mɔ Baguma bati kɛba kĩ yamɔ tɔkpa kamɛ ɔmɛnɛ lɔkɔ lukũ lidi. 26Mose kɔna kĩ kɔnyɔã a kĩ baado ye nɛ Kristo sũ tɛ kɔya paa kɔba akũ kana fɔtsa flee a kĩ fudeĩ nɛ Egipte a, kitonɛkĩ ɛkɔa anɛ ete nɛ kɔtɔkase a kĩ Baguma aakpa ye nɛ lɔkɔ kĩ laaya a akũ. 27Katɛkado lɛfɔ̃ Mose dzakũ nɛ Egipte, kĩ ɛtávila lɛgã kalɔkpa a. Edo ɔwɔlɛ ɛtámuniki liti, ɛkɛna ndɛ yamɔ Baguma a kĩ bɔámɔ mɔ anɛ a. 28Katɛkado Mose kɔa eyi Wuda Katɛ̃ Luwi a, ade ɛfɔ̃ bɛkɔa babɔanɛ bikputa nɛ be tunyukpɛ̃ titse akũ, ayekĩ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a lɛláakɔ Israelfɔ babinyole batɔnyade a.
29Katɛkado lɛfɔ̃ Israelfɔ puli bitsua Mpo Ngbã a binyina ndɛ tite akũ bɛtsɛ̃. Kĩ Egiptefɔ bɔa mbɔdi kĩ be malo banyina a ni, bɛkamu nɛ mui a kamɛ. 30Katɛkado lɛfɔ̃ Yeriko ɔmatɔ foebi a kĩ Israelfɔ tsã bisinya foe fuwi evũkɔnɔ a veliveli.
31Katɛkado lɛfɔ̃ bɛtákɔ Rahab ɔdɔpaani a bibumɔ bati a kĩ bɛtábu Baguma a, kitonɛkĩ ɛtɛ Israelfɔ a kĩ bɛbɛla bɛnadã tite a kamɛ mɔ kawɔlɛ.
32Litsa mbuki nlɛ mbu? Lɔkɔ lɛláa kĩ maalɛ fɔlɛtsa nɛ Gideon, Barak, Samson, Yefta, Dawid, Samuel mɔ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a akũ. 33Bɛtsã katɛkado kamɛ bɛnɔ mɔ fude pii bɛnya be akũ. Bɛnya akũ nɛ osi kpĩĩ akũ, ade bɛna fɔtsa a kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi kĩ yaakpa be a. Badi sua dzata tunukpɛ̃, 34badi dina fi gɛĩgɛĩ, ade fɔfɔ̃ kĩ badi lo nɛ kawũ onukpɛ̃ a. Katɛkado fɔ̃ bikĩ bɛkɛna kpɛtɛɛ a na kɔbɛ̃, ade bɛna ɔsĩ nɛ kawũ kamɛ bɛnɔ bɛnya banɔvɔɛ̃ kawũ banɔnɛ akũ a. 35Katɛkado kamɛ fɔtsã mɔ batsole tɛ be akũ bati banɔkpa kĩ bɛdzɛla bidzi nkpã. Nɛ katɛkado sũ bati bɛbã kĩ bɛtáwɛ kĩ bɛnyɛ be nɛ kɔla fɔnɛ be akũ awɛ bɛkɛna be awɔda biku, ayekĩ baadzɛla be bidzi nkpã kĩ ɛnɛnɛ ɛbɛ̃ a.
36Bidi badi nsekuo, bibo be mɔ mple, ade bido badi nkɔsɔnkɔsɔ bɛnado nɛ kɔla kamɛ a. 37Bɛtalɛ badi boe, bɛbɛ̃ badi nɛ kayite mɔ ɔsaɛ, bɛkɔ badi mɔ apã. Badi na nɛ baveli ĩye kutukpã tuvoli kamɛ bɛtsã bɛkamini nɛ ohiã kamɛ, bitomɔ be liti ade bɛkɛna be awɔda a. 38Nɛ be kalɛ sũ katinya kĩĩ tákpa be kadzi! Bɛtsã bɛkamini ndɛ bati kĩ bilo kawũ nɛ kɔsa kamɛ, bidzi nɛ tɔtɔ akũ, bɛbɛla nɛ tɔtɔ tɛkɛ mɔ tite fɔkɛ kamɛ.
39Lɛmɛ bati kĩĩ flee kĩ be katɛkado di adansiɛ nɛ be akũ malo ni, be kamɛ odima awɛ táta lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi a, 40kitonɛkĩ Baguma kɛna nhihiɛ kĩ ɛnɛnɛ ɛbɛ̃ eyi ɛkpa boe. Ye botaɛ nyɛ kĩ ɛláanɛ boe liti ɛkɛna be bɛkpɔla.

Title: HEBRIFƆ 12
Content:
Baguma Nyɛ Boe Ɔlɛga.
1Nɛ foe sũ ni, kĩ budeĩ bati kɔdabu kĩĩ odu kĩ bisinya boe, bado boe kɔbɛ̃ sũ ni, mifɔ̃ bɔnyɛ fɔlɔtsa fudi nyɛ fudi kĩ futeĩ nɛ boe akũ, mɔ tɔkpa a kĩ tɛmanɛ nɛ boe akũ buwula, lɔkɔa buwula atsɛ a kĩ ɛwaa nɛ boe lɔtɔ a mɔ kɔnɛyɔɔlɛ. 2Mifɔ̃ bɔkɔa anɛ bute nɛ Yesu akũ daa, oti a kĩ ye akũ boe katɛkado dzɛ̃ a, kito kayɔkayi kɛnawo kawũna a. Kĩ enyina kawɔlɛ a kĩ kadzɔlɛ ye a sũ ni, edo ɔwɔlɛ ɛmɔ́ lubo nɛ asendua akũ, ade ɛtábu asendua akũ wuda kɔnyɔã lɛtsama a. Lɛmɛ finyaa ɛnɛ edzi nɛ Baguma lɛgãkpo a sɔmɔna.
3Mikɔna lɛtsa a kĩ de kamɛ Yesu tsã ɛtɛ̃ a, mɔ ayekĩ ɛmɔ́ lubo kĩ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ yidza bɛdza nɛ ye akũ pii a midã. Nɛ foesũ mitafɔ̃ akpɔ liveli mi mimuniki nɛ ye liti. 4Kitonɛkĩ nɛ mi kanɔ mɔ tɔkpa kamɛ a, mitánɔ miwo tɔ̃ awã kĩ baako mi babɔanɛ nɛ tite. 5Mbɔɛɛ milɛla ɔwɔlɛ kado fɔlɛtsa a kĩ Baguma abi mi ndɛ ye babi a? Ade foe nyɛ kĩ,
“Yĩ obi, ntɛ Ɔlate a vɛlɛ nɔ sɔtɔ ni, tabu foe fɔtsa kabii.
Ntɛ ɛkã nɔ anɛ ni, tafɔ̃ fɔha nɔ ɔwɔlɛ.
6Kitonɛkĩ oti a kĩ boe Ɔlate awɛ kalɛ ni,
ade ye yavɛlɛ sɔtɔ a.
Ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ ye tibi ni,
yavɛlɛ ye sɔtɔ.”
7Ntɛ miamɔ sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ lubo ni, mido ɔwɔlɛ. Mi lubo kamɔ a atsa kĩ Baguma lamɛna mi kavɛlɛ ndɛ ye babi aye. Obisɛ̃ odi deĩ kĩ ɔlɛga lávɛlɛ ye sɔtɔ? 8Ntɛ baávɛlɛ mi ndɛ ayekĩ yavɛlɛ ye babi flee a ni, fɔatsa kĩ minyɛ́ ye babi kpanunu a, mbom minyɛ oti bɛbã babi. 9Fukĩ fubu nyɛ kĩ budeĩ tite akũ balɛga kĩ bavɛlɛ boe sɔtɔ, lɛmɛ bɔakɔa obu kakpa be. Nde sũ bɔláadɔla boe akũ bɔkpa boe hũhũ Ɔlɛga pii fɔba lɔkɔa budzi nkpã? 10Boe balɛga a avɛlɛ boe sɔtɔ lɔkɔ lukũ odi ndɛ ayekĩ fɔnɛnɛ be. Lɛmɛ Baguma kɔ̃ akɛna foe nɛ boe kalɛ sũ, ayekĩ bɔ́anya bati kpalɛwa ndɛ ye aye. 11Ntɛ bavɛlɛ boe sɔtɔ a, fɔawo boe kalɔɛ nɛ lɔkɔ a kamɛ, ade kawɔlɛ láde boe a. Lɛmɛ ke liti a, fɔafɔ̃ be a kĩ bɛvɛlɛ be a akɛna bati kpĩĩ, kana lukudɔ nɛ nkpã kamɛ.
Bɛkpa Kɔdɛ Bisi Mbla Lɛmɛ.
12Foesũ mido akpɔ a kĩ ɛdɔ a, mɔ mi aduli a kĩ ɛdɔũdɔũ kɔbɛ̃. 13Mikaatsã tisi yedede akũ ayekĩ oti kĩ ɛnɛ lɛkpɛ̃ a kɔbɔa lɛláatɛ̃ ye, mbom kĩ yaana fɔsɔ katsa.
14Mibɔa mbɔdi kĩ míadzi nɛ lukudɔ kamɛ mɔ odi nyɛ odi, midzi nkpã kĩ ɛkpalɛ, kitonɛkĩ odi kĩ ɛtákpalɛ lɛláapuli ɛmɔ́ɔ boe Ɔlate a. 15Midã kadã wĩ kĩ mitáyɛla Baguma kɔnyakamɔ a. Mitafɔ̃ odima lɛkɛna ndɛ tuwĩ mɔ ɔnyɛ tibo anɛ, tido ɔhau mɔ efĩĩ nɛ bati pii kamɛ. 16Mitafɔ̃ odima lɛkɛna adɔpaa, ĩye ɛkɛna oti kĩ enyína Baguma ndɛ Esau, kĩ ɛnɔ ye tibinyole lɔnɔkɔɛ̃ ɛtɛ funitsã sɔɔdaɛ mɔapɛ a. 17Ndɛ ayekĩ minyina a, ke liti a Esau wɛ kĩ ɔlɛga ɛkpa ye nhila a, lɛmɛ ɛtákpa ye, ade titɔ kĩ ɛkɔa kabe ɛwɛ kĩ yadani lɛtsa a kĩ ɛkɛna a malo ni, ɛtána foe akũ osi.
18Nnɛ́ Sinai ɔtɔ a kĩ oti aapuli ɛkɔa awɛ ɛta a sɛkɛ̃ miya. Fɔlá ndɛ ayekĩ Israelfɔ mɔ́ fi gɛĩgɛĩ katɛ̃ nɛ ye akũ, kĩ ɔtũ ke, fɔkɛna kusuu, ade ɔwɛ kpale kavũ a, 19mɔ kĩ binu kagbulɛɛ kavɔ̃ mɔ odo a kĩ ɛlɛ kɔdzɛla a. Kĩ odo a nɛ a, bike aduli kĩ oti a ɛtabuki ɛlɛ kalɛ kadima ebu. 20Kitonɛkĩ bɛtápuli bɛdza nɛ mbla a kĩ bisi a onukpɛ̃ kĩ, “Ntɛ ɔyaɛ malo lɛta ɔtɔ a ni, kɛnɛ kĩ bɛtalɛ ye boe bɛkɔ.” 21Lɛtsa a kĩ bɛmɔ́ a deĩ libe paa kĩ Mose malo lɛ kĩ, “Libe wo yĩ, nkatila bliblibli!”
22Lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃ ni, Zion ɔtɔ a sɛkɛ̃ miya, Baguma kĩ edzi nkpã a ɔmatɔ kpale kĩ ɛnyɛ ode Yerusalem. Miya nɛ ye ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ mpim mpim a ɔmatɔ kamɛ. 23Miyawo nɛ Baguma babi batɔnyade a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ be buĩ nɛ ode kawɔlɛ katsɛna a kamɛ. Miya nɛ Baguma kĩ ɛnyɛ batidziwa flee fɔlɛtsa ɔdzɛnɛ, mɔ bati wĩ a kĩ bɛkɛna be hũhũ bɛkpɔla a sɛkɛ̃. 24Miya nɛ Yesu kĩ ɛnyɛ apam vɔɛ̃ a ɔkplanɛ sɛkɛ̃, mɔ ye babɔanɛ a kĩ bɛsã a kĩ bɛdza bɛkpa bɔhɛ fɔtsa wĩ kaba Abel bade a.
25Foesũ midã kadã wĩ kĩ mitásĩ oti a kĩ yalɛ kɔdzɛla a fɔlɛtsa katse. Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ bikĩ bisĩ bɛtátse oti a kĩ ɛlɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa nɛ tite akũ a tápuli bilo a ni, nde bɔ́apuli bulo ntɛ busĩ kĩ bɔátse oti a kĩ yalɛ kɔdzɛla katomɛna ode a? 26Lɔkɔ a na kamɛ ni, ye odo kuna tite, lɛmɛ finyaa kɔ̃ ɛlɛ eyi kĩ, “Maakuna deedi bio, lɛmɛ nnɛ́ tite odi, mbom mɔ ode lɛmɛ.” 27Fɔlɛtsa “deedi bio” a atsa pefee kĩ yaakuna fɔtsa a kĩ ɛbɔa a, ɛwɔla foe, lɛmɛ fɔtsa a kĩ ɛláakuna a aakahɔ.
28Foesũ mifɔ̃ bɔnyɛ kɔlɛ kĩ lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kĩ kɛláakuna a ta boe awɛ. Mifɔ̃ bɔkɔa obu mɔ kavila busum Baguma ayekĩ fɔ́awo ye anɛ, 29kitonɛkĩ boe Baguma a nyɛ fi kĩ fɔawɔla fɔtsa.

Title: HEBRIFƆ 13
Content:
Ayekĩ Bɔ́awo Baguma Anɛ.
1Mikaawɛ akũ kalɛ daa ndɛ Kristofɔ bawaɛ̃ aye. 2Mite anɛ mikaatɛ banɔvɔɛ̃ nɛ mi awã. Badi kɛna foe lɔmɔ bɛtɛ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ lɛmɛ binyína. 3Mite anɛ nɛ bikĩ bɛwaa kɔla a akũ ndɛ mimɔ be waa kɔla. Mite anɛ nɛ bikĩ bamɔna be lubo akũ a ndɛ mimɔ be amɔ lubo.
4Kɛnɛ kĩ mi flee mido obu nɛ kɔtsɔ̃ mɔ kɔnyɔ kadzi kamɛ, ade kɛnɛ kĩ batsɔ̃ mɔ banyɔ bidi ɔnɔkɔali bɛkpa akũ a. Baguma aadzɛmɔ bati a kĩ bɛtsɛ̃mɔ linyolewɛ mɔ litsolewɛ, mɔ bikĩ babɔa adɔpaa. 5Minyɛ sika anɛngbã nɛ mi kadzi kamɛ, lɔkɔa fɔtsa a kĩ mideĩ fuwo mi anɛ. Kitonɛkĩ Baguma lɛ kĩ,
“Nláadzakũ nfɔnɛ nɔ,
ade nláafɔnɛ nɔ awɛ lɛmɛ a.”
6Foesũ mifɔ̃ bɔna ɔwɔlɛ bɔlɛ kĩ,
“Boe Ɔlate nyɛ yĩ obumɛnanɛ, nláavila.
Litsa otidziwa aapuli ɛkɛna yĩ?”
7Mite anɛ nɛ mi lɔtɔ banyanɛ kɔɛ a kĩ bide lɛtsã nɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa a akũ bɛkpa mi a akũ. Midã ayekĩ be kadzi kamɛ na, lɔkɔa mitomɔ be katɛkado. 8Yesu Kristo mɔapɛ a lɛna kɔkɔɛ, edeĩ nviã kĩĩ, yaana daa.
9Mitafɔ̃ fɔtsa vɔɛ̃ ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ katsa lɛkpã mi miyɛla osi wĩ a. Fɔnɛnɛ kĩ miatɛ ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kɔbɛ̃ mitomɛna Baguma kɔnyakamɔ kamɛ odi, kɛba kĩ míakɛna nɛ funitsã kanya tɛbla akũ, kitonɛkĩ fɔtábumɛna bikĩ bɛkɛna nɛ te akũ a.
10Budeĩ afɔlibɔ atɛnyɛ kĩ Yudafɔ basɔfɔ a kĩ basum nɛ patampa kamɛ a lɛlá osi kĩ banya ye akũ afɔlibɔ lɛtsama.
11Yudafɔ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee a akɔa bayaɛ babɔanɛ kawomɛna nɛ Kakɔ Kpalɛwa Flee a kabɔa bati tɔkpa akũ afɔliɛ, lɛmɛ bapila bayaɛ sɛkɛna a nɛ katsɛnakɔ̃ a ɔbaɛ̃. 12Ade fukĩĩ sũ Yesu lɛmɛ mɔ́ lubo eku nɛ ɔmatɔ a ɔbaɛ̃, ayekĩ yaakɔa ye mɔawɛ babɔanɛ ɛkpalɛ bati akũ. 13Foesũ mifɔ̃ bɔnɛ bɔnaa ye sɛkɛ̃ nɛ ɔmatɔ a ɔbaɛ̃, bɔnaatɛ kɔnyɔã a kĩ bido ye a kudi. 14Kitonɛkĩ bɔlá ɔmatɔ odima nɛ tite kĩĩ akũ kĩ yaawa daa, mbom ɔmatɔ a kĩ yaaya a liti osi bɔlamɛna kawɛ.
15Foesũ mifɔ̃ bɔtsã Yesu akũ bɔkɔa kamu kĩ kɛla ndɛ afɔliɛ aye bɔkpa Baguma luwi nyɛ luwi. Ade foe nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lanɛ kato bikĩ babɔa ye dĩ ndɛ boe Ɔlate ayea tunukpɛ̃ a. 16Mitalɛla fɔtsa wĩ kakɛna mɔ mi bawaɛ̃ fɔtsa kakpa, kitonɛkĩ ade fukĩĩ nyɛ afɔliɛ kĩ yawo Baguma anɛ a.
17Mibu mi lɔtɔ banyanɛ, midɔla akũ mikpa be lɛmɛ. Be adzɔlɛ mi tɛkla akũ daa, ndɛ bati kĩ baakɛna akunta bɛkpa Baguma nɛ be adzuma kakɛna a akũ. Foesũ ntɛ mikpa be obu ni, baakɛna ye mɔ kawɔlɛ, lɛmɛ ntɛ nnɛ́ aye ni, baakɛna ye mɔ tuko kabe kĩ fɔláanya libi fɔkpa mi.
18Mikaabɔa mpaɛ nɛ boe lɔlɔ. Bɔtɛ budo kĩ boe tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kpalɛ, kitonɛkĩ bɔawɛ kĩ bɔakɛna fɔtsa wĩ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ. 19Mibɔa mpaɛ kĩ Baguma ɛfɔ̃ mmuniki ĩya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ mɔatsɛ.
Mpaɛbɔ Nɛ Hebrifɔ Lɔlɔ.
20Baguma, lukudɔ ɔkpanɛ a kĩ ɛdzɛla boe Ɔlate Yesu kĩ ɛnyɛ Baveli Bakpãnɛ Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a etomɛna kanɔkpa ɛtsãmɛna apam babɔanɛ vɔɛ̃ a kĩ ɛlá kawũna kamɛ a, 21ɛkɔa lɛtsa wĩ lidi nyɛ lidi kĩ lisĩ mi ɛkpa mi, ayekĩ miakɛna nɛ ye kawɛ akũ. Ade mawã kĩ ɛtsã Yesu Kristo akũ ɛkɛna lɛtsa a kĩ yawɛ a nɛ boe kamɛ. Kukũkpalɛ kɔnya ye fude! Fɔya lɔmɔ.
Fɔlɛtsa Nkaɛ.
22Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, make mi aduli kĩ mina ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ mitse kɔdɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ, kitonɛkĩ ovoli a kĩ ntsɛlɛ mma mi a kamɛ fɔlɛtsa lɛ́la lugo.
23Mawɛ kĩ makpa mi kanyi kĩ bɛnyɛ boe ɔwaɛ̃ Timoteo nɛ kɔla. Ntɛ ewo yĩ sɛkɛ̃ mɔatsɛ ni, bɔmɔ ye bɔ́ayasɛla mi.
24Miwɔ̃na mi lɔtɔ banyanɛ a mɔ Baguma bade a flee mikpa boe. Boe bawaɛ̃ a kĩ bito Italia awɔ̃na mi.
25Baguma ɛmɔ mi a flee kɔnya.

Title: YAKOBO 1
Content:
1Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ, Yakobo, Baguma mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo ɔsumunɛ sɛkɛ̃. Ntsɛlɛ ye mama Yuda futete ewua-nviã a kĩ bɛgba biko nɛ katinya kamɛ flee a.
Katɛkado Mɔ Nyansã.
2Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ntɛ miwo nɛ sɔhuiɛ ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ kamɛ malo ni, mitɛ foe mɔ kawɔlɛ baũ, 3kitonɛkĩ minyina kĩ ntɛ bɛsɔ mi katɛkado bɛdã ni, fɔafɔ̃ miana kadza pintii mɔ ɔwɔlɛ kado. 4Mifɔ̃ mi kadza pintii a kɛnyɛ ke akũ nɛ mi lɛkɛnana kamɛ, ayekĩ míanya bati kĩ be ɔbla kpɔla flee, kĩ bɛláabuki bisĩ lɛtsama. 5Lɛmɛ ntɛ mi kamɛ odi sĩ nyansã ni, kɛnɛ kĩ evia Baguma, yaakpa ye, kitonɛkĩ Baguma akɛna sɛmɛ kalɛ faa kakpa odi nyɛ odi fɔtsa kĩ yaádã oti anɛ. 6Lɛmɛ ntɛ yabɔa mpaɛ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ ɛtɛ edo, kĩ ɛtatɛ atsindze nɛ ye kamɛ. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yatɛ atsindze nɛ ye kamɛ ni, ɛla ndɛ mpo anɛ mui kpale kĩ ɔwɛ abɔa kato katɛ̃mɛna. 7-8Oti a na odu kĩ ye adzuni adani mɔatsɛ mɔatsɛ, kĩ yaápuli kasipi nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ yakɛna a akũ ni, ɛtakɔna kĩ yaana litsedi etomɛna boe Ɔlate sɛkɛ̃.
Ohiã Mɔ Akũ Kana.
9Okristoni ohiãni a kĩ Baguma dɛla nɛ ode ni, kɛnɛ kĩ epia ye akũ. 10Ade ayea okristoni osikani kĩ Baguma kɛna nɛ kayɔ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ ye malo epia akũ. Kitonɛkĩ osikani nkpã aayatɛ̃ ndɛ ayekĩ fɔgbangbã akpalɛ katɔ a. 11Ntɛ suwa de sɛta kɔɔba ni, sapila tuwĩ tavɛ, te fɔgbangbã a akpalɛ katɔ lɔkɔa tuwĩ a kalɛ ayɛla flefle. Ade aye osikani lɛmɛ aakapilipili nɛ ye tudzuma kamɛ flee ɛyaaku a.
Sɔhuiɛ Mɔ Ɔhau Kamɛ Katsã.
12Baguma hila oti a kĩ epuli edo ɔwɔlɛ nɛ sɔhuiɛ kamɛ. Ntɛ epuli ɛnya sɔhuiɛ a akũ ni, Baguma aakpa ye nkpã a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi ɛkpa bati a kĩ bawɛ ye kalɛ a. 13Ntɛ odi wo nɛ sɔhuiɛ kamɛ ni, ɛtalɛ kĩ, “Baguma sɛkɛ̃ sɔhuiɛ kĩĩ to.” Kitonɛkĩ odima lɛláapuli ɛsɔ Baguma ɛdã kĩ ɛkɛna tɔkpa, ade ye mɔawɛ a lɛmɛ yaásɔ odima kadã a. 14Mbom oti mɔawɛ sukɛna fɔwɛtsa akɛ ye, kavɛlɛ ye kado nɛ sɔhuiɛ kamɛ. 15Lɔkɔa oti sukɛna fɔwɛtsa a atsamɔ kɔma kama tɔkpa, ade ntɛ tɔkpa a bo anɛ ni, tama wuda.
Baguma Sɛkɛ̃ Fɔtsa Wĩ Flee Ato.
16Nwaɛ̃ amɛ kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ, mitafɔ̃ odima lɛkɛ mi. 17Futetsa wĩ flee mɔ futelitsa a kĩ fɔkpɔla a fudi nyɛ fudi to ode. Foe flee futo Baguma a kĩ lɛbɔa ode tɛsɛdza a sɛkɛ̃. Ɛnyɛ oti kĩ yaádani ade lɛtsama lɛmɛ ládani ɔtũ nɛ ye akũ a. 18Baguma kɔa ye mɔawɛ kawɛ ɛtsã ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a akũ, ɛma boe kĩ bɔna ye fɔtsa a kĩ ɛbɔa flee a kamɛ ɔtɔnyade.
Kalɛ Wĩ a Kanu Mɔ Ke Akũ Kakɛna.
19Nwaɛ̃ amɛ kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ, mite anɛ nɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ akũ! Odi nyɛ odi etse fɔlɛtsa mɔatsɛ, lɛmɛ ɛtawɛ sɔwa ɛlɛ kɔdzɛla mɔatsɛ mɔatsɛ ĩye ɛna kalɔkpa mɔatsɛ mɔatsɛ. 20Kitonɛkĩ oti kalɔkpa láfɔ̃ yakɛna tuwĩ a kĩ Baguma awɛ kĩ ɛkɛna a. 21Foesũ mifɔnɛ ɔbla kĩ yado efĩĩ mɔ ablɔ kakɛna flee awɛ. Midɔla mi akũ mikpa Baguma, ayekĩ míapuli mitɛ ye kalɛ a kĩ edu nɛ mi tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ a, kĩ kaafɔ̃ mina nkpã katɛ a.
22Mitakatse Kalɛ Wĩ a kɛkɛ mikɔa mikakɛ mi akũ, mbom mikɛna nɛ ke akũ. 23Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yatse kalɛ a lɛmɛ yaákɛna nɛ ke akũ ni, ɛla ndɛ oti kĩ ɛdã ahuhɔɛ kamɛ ɛmɔ́ ye akũ ndɛ ayekĩ ɛla a. 24Yadã ye akũ, lɛmɛ mɔ ye kadzakũ pɛ ɛla ayekĩ ɛla a. 25Lɛmɛ oti a kĩ yadã mbla a kĩ ɛkpɔla a, kĩ yakpa bati akũ akũ kadzi, mɔ yakɛna nɛ ye akũ a, kĩ ɛnyɛ́ oti kĩ yatse kalɛ a kɛkɛ kalɛla ke a ni, Baguma aahila ye nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ yakɛna a kamɛ.
26Ntɛ odi kɔna kĩ yasum Baguma lɛmɛ yaápuli ɛnya ye sɛmɛ akũ ni, kakɛ ye akũ, ade ye ɔsum a lɛmɛ nyɛ fɔtsa pupulidza a. 27Ɔsum a kĩ ɛkpalɛ, kĩ efĩĩ adima lɛmɛ lɛláa ye akũ a nɛ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga anɛ nyɛ bibumɛna banɔkpabi mɔ bakunawa nɛ be kasĩ kamɛ, kĩ bati bɛnyɛ be akũ nɛ katinya efĩĩ fɔtsa kamɛ.

Title: YAKOBO 2
Content:
Mitadã Bati Anɛ Mikɛna Fɔtsa.
1Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ndɛ bati kĩ bɛtɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo, kĩ ɛnyɛ kukũkpalɛ Ɔlate a bido sũ ni, mitadã bati anɛ nɛ mi fɔtsa kakɛna kamɛ. 2Mifɔ̃ bɔbɔɛ foe kĩ osikani sua lima wĩ akũ, edo sika lipetia, ɛya nɛ mi katsɛnakɔ̃, ade ohiãni odi lɛmɛ do tɛtadiɛ kpeliwa ɛya nɛ awã a. 3Ntɛ mikpalɛ anɛ mido oti a kĩ edo fɔtsa wĩ, mibi ye kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃, yaadzi nɛ awĩ,” lɛmɛ mibi ohiãni a kɔ̃ kĩ, “Naadza nɛ akĩĩ!” ĩye “Kɛna akũ kadzi nɛ ɔda nɛ yĩ abɔa kayɔ!” 4Ntɛ mikɛna foe lɔmɔ a, lɔkɔa fɔátsa kĩ adzuni kpa mikɔa miadzɛ mi fɔlɛtsa, kĩ miado ntsitsemu lɛmɛ nɛ mi kamɛ?
5Nwaɛ̃ amɛ kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ, mitse katse wĩ! Nnɛ́ kapau Baguma pau katinya kĩĩ kamɛ ahiãfɔ kĩ bɛkɛna katɛkado kamɛ asikafɔ, bɛna kanyakɔ̃ nɛ ode lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi ɛkpa bati a kĩ bawɛ ye kalɛ a kamɛ? 6Lɛmɛ mi miasupa ohiãni! Mbɔɛɛ nnɛ́ asikafɔ amɛnana mi, kavɛlɛ mi kanamɛna fɔlɛtsa badzɛnɛ anɛ? 7Nnɛ́ asikafɔ alɛ tuwuli kpa kasupa dĩ wĩ a kĩ Baguma te mi a?
8Ntɛ miakɛna nɛ ode lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ mbla a akũ ndɛ ayekĩ bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ ni, kekɔ̃ miakɛna fɔtsa wĩ. Lɛtsa a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ a nyɛ kĩ, “Wɛ nɔ ɔkɔba kalɛ ndɛ ayekĩ awɛ nɔ akũ kalɛ a.” 9Lɛmɛ ntɛ miadã bati anɛ ni, miakɛna tɔkpa, ade mbla a akɔ mi kɔtɔ ndɛ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ a. 10Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛkɛna nɛ mbla a flee akũ, mɔ efum nɛ amɔapɛ akũ ni, efum te flee. 11Kitonɛkĩ oti mɔapɛ a kĩ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Tanɛ kɔtsɔ̃ ĩye kɔnyɔ liti” a, ade ye lɛlɛ kĩ, “Takɔ oti” a. Foesũ ntɛ ɔtánɛ kɔtsɔ̃ ĩye kɔnyɔ liti malo, mɔ ɔkɔ oti ni, ofum mbla a. 12Foesũ milɛ kɔdzɛla mikɛna fɔtsa ndɛ bati kĩ mbla a kĩ yakpa boe akũ akũ kadzi a, Baguma aakɔa ɛdzɛmɔ be. 13Kitonɛkĩ nɛ kadzɛ kamɛ ni, Baguma lɛláamɔ okĩ ɛtámɔ ɔkɔba kɔnya a kɔnya. Lɛmɛ Baguma kɔnyakamɔ a lɛláadzɛmɔ ye.
Mikɛna Fɔtsa Mikɔa Mitsa Kĩ Mitɛ Mido.
14Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ntɛ mi kamɛ odi lɛ kĩ edeĩ katɛkado mɔ ye lɛkɛnana lányɛ katsa lɔmɔ a, nfasɔ wɔdabe deĩ nɛ foe kamɛ? Ye katɛkado aapuli kɛkpa ye nkpã mbɔɛɛ? 15Mifɔ̃ bɔbɔɛ foe kĩ boe bawaɛ̃nyole ĩye bawaɛ̃tsole badi deĩ kĩ bɛlá tilima ade bɛlá funitsã kĩ banya malo a. 16Ntɛ ɔtákpa bati fɔtsa a kĩ fusĩ be a, litsa nfasɔ deĩ nɛ foe kamɛ ntɛ obi be kĩ, “Baguma ehila mi. Akũ ede mi ovio, mina funitsã minya.” 17Ade ayea ntɛ odi deĩ katɛkado mɔ lɛkɛnana tábumɔ foe a, ye katɛkado a nyɛ fɔtsa pupulidza.
18Lɛmɛ odi aalɛ kĩ, “Oti mɔa deĩ katɛkado, ade ɔbɛbã lɛmɛ akɛna adzuma a.”
Yĩ mbuayɛ nyɛ kĩ, “Nyɛ nɔ katɛkado a kĩ lɛkɛnana lɛláa foe kamɛ a katsa yĩ. Yĩ malo maatsã yĩ tuwĩ kakɛna kamɛ ĩnyɛ yĩ katɛkado ntsa.” 19Ɔtɛ odo kĩ Baguma odi pɛ deĩ? Ɔnɔkɔali fɔanɛ. Hũhũ kpa lɛmɛ tɛ bido ade bavila katila nɛ ye anɛ a.
20Ɔkɔasia anɛ! Awɛ kĩ ĩnyɛ ntsa nɔ kĩ katɛkado kĩ lɛkɛnana wĩ tábu nɛ foe kamɛ nyɛ fɔtsa pupulidza? 21Nde fɔya fɔmɔ Baguma mɔ boe ɔwanyɔ Abraham kĩ ɛnyɛ oti kĩ ɛkpɔla? Fɔtsɛ̃ ye lɛkɛnana kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ ɛkɔa ye mɔawɛ obi Isak ɛnamɛna afɔlibɔ atɛnyɛ akũ kĩ yakɔa ye ɛbɔa afɔliɛ ɛkpa Baguma. 22Mimɔ́ foe lɔmɔ? Ye katɛkado mɔ lɛkɛnana a kɛna adzuma fɔkpɔta, ade ye lɛkɛnana a fɔ̃ ye katɛkado a kpɔla a. 23Ade Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa fɔlɛtsa a ya nɛ foe kamɛ kĩ, “Abraham tɛ Baguma edo, ade nɛ ye katɛkado sũ ni, Baguma mɔ ye kĩ ɛnyɛ oti kĩ ɛkpɔla.” Nɛ foesũ Baguma vɛ Abraham kĩ ye ɔkɔba. 24Foesũ miamɔ kĩ fɔtsɛ̃ oti lɛkɛnana wĩ kamɛ ade Baguma amɔ ye kĩ ɛnyɛ oti kĩ ɛkpɔla, lɛmɛ fɔtsɛ́ ye katɛkado kamɛ odi.
25Ade aye pɛpɛɛpɛ Baguma kɔna nɛ Rahab kĩ ɛbɔa adɔpaa a akũ a. Ɛmɔ́ kĩ ɛnyɛ oti kpalɛwa nɛ ye lɛkɛnana kamɛ. Lɛtsa a kĩ ɛkɛna nyɛ kĩ ɛtɛ Israelfɔ fɔtɔ banyanɛ a kĩ bɛnabɛla bɛsɛla tite akũ bɛdã a, ade ebumɔ be bɛtsã osi bɛbã akũ bilo a.
26Foesũ ndɛ ayekĩ sukɛna nyɛ fɔtsa kuwa ntɛ kawɛya lɛláa se kamɛ a, ade aye katɛkado lɛmɛ nyɛ fɔtsa kuwa ntɛ lɛkɛnana lɛláa foe kamɛ a.

Title: YAKOBO 3
Content:
Midã Mi Sɛmɛ Akũ Kadã Wĩ.
1Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mi kamɛ bati pii bɛtanya fɔtsa batsanɛ, kitonɛkĩ minyina kĩ boe a kĩ bɔatsa fɔtsa a ni, Baguma aadzɛmɔ boe mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ ɛba bati bɛbã. 2Kitonɛkĩ boe flee bɔakɛna nfumusu pii. Lɛmɛ ntɛ odi táfum nɛ ye kɔdzɛla kalɛ kamɛ ni, ɛnyɛ oti kĩ ɛkpɔla ade yapuli kanya ye kutidu a flee akũ a. 3Bɔado ɔpɔnkɔ sɔbɔtsaɛ nɛ onukpɛ̃ kamɛ kĩ ɛkɛna nɛ boe kawɛ akũ, kapuli kafɔ̃ yanaa awã kĩ bɔawɛ a. 4Midã ɔkɔlɔ baũ lɛmɛ. Titɔ kĩ ɛpɔnɛ lububu, kĩ ɔwɛ mɔ ɔsĩ abɔa ye kanamɛna malo a ni, sɔbɔtsaɛ kabii bakɔa kadanidani ye, yanaa awã kĩ ye ɔtanɛ a awɛ kĩ ɛnaa a. 5Ade aye sɛmɛ lɛmɛ la a. Titɔ kĩ sukɛna akũ lɛtsa kabii sanɛ malo a, sapia nɛ fɔtsa baũ baũ akũ.
Midã ayekĩ fi kabii kĩ fɔka fɔtɔ nɛ lupo baũ kamɛ apuli kapila de bubloo! 6Sɛmɛ la ndɛ fi. Sɛmɛ dzɛ̃ ndɛ katinya kĩ tɔkpa kakɛna tɛ ke kamɛ. Nɛ sukɛna akũ fɔtsa a flee kamɛ ni, sɛmɛ ado oti mɔa a flee tuduli, kado fi nɛ bati kadzi kamɛ mɔ kĩ futo Abonsam fi luwotu kamɛ a. 7Batidziwa apuli kadɔla bayaɛ, ade bapuli kadɔla lupo kamɛ bayaɛ kpa, kɔvɔlabi, bayaɛ kĩ baboli nɛ tite mɔ kɔfɔabi lɛmɛ a. 8Lɛmɛ sɛmɛ kɔ̃ odima lɛláapuli ɛdɔla se. Sɛmɛ nyɛ lɛtsa kpa kĩ odima lápuli kadɔla, ade otsonu kĩ yakɔ bati yi sɛ kamɛ tɛtɛɛtɛ a. 9Bɔakɔa sɛmɛ kamu boe Ɔlate mɔ Ɔlɛga, se mɔapɛ a bɔakɔa kadumu oti kĩ Baguma bɔa nɛ ye mɔawɛ kutidu akũ. 10Onukpɛ̃ mɔapɛ a kamɛ nhila fɔlɛtsa mɔ fudumutsa flee anɛ kato. Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, kɛtánɛ kĩ fukĩĩ fɔna lɔmɔ! 11Mui wĩ mɔ lɛdɛmɛ mui aapuli bɛnɛ nɛ lɔwɔkɛ mɔa kamɛ? 12Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, atɔ kutse aapuli kuwũ gowa babi, ĩye akateleku aapuli ewũ atɔ babi, mbɔɛɛ? Ade aye mɔ lɛdɛmɛ mui lɔwɔkɛ lɛláapuli lɛnyɛ mui wĩ a.
Nyansã Kĩ Eto Ode.
13Mi kamɛ owei nyɛ nyansãni, kĩ yanu fɔlɛtsa kayɔ? Ɛkɔa ɔbla wĩ ɛnyɛ foe ɛtsa nɛ ye lɛkɛnana kamɛ, nɛ akũ kadɔla kĩ kito nyansã kamɛ. 14Lɛmɛ ntɛ lineke kanɔ, kawũnaba mɔ yĩ odi fude fɔlɛ kawɛya deĩ nɛ mi tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ ni, mitama fɔvã nɛ ɔnɔkɔali a akũ, mipia nɛ mi nyansã akũ. 15Nyansã kĩĩ odu táto ode, mbom katinya kamɛ ade yanɛ, ɛnyɛ́ hũhũ kamɛ ade, hũhũ kpa kamɛ eto. 16Awã kĩ lineke kanɔ mɔ yĩ odi fude fɔlɛ deĩ ni, ade awã ɔtutũ mɔ tɔkpa tidi nyɛ tidi kakɛna ana a. 17Lɛmɛ nyansã a kĩ eto ode a, ye lɛtsa a kĩ lɛnya lɔtɔ nyɛ kĩ ye akũ kpalɛ, yawɛ lukudɔ mɔ akũ kadɔla, edeĩ sɛmɛ kalɛ, kakɛna tɔwaɛ̃, yafɔ̃ banu oti kayɔ, yamɔ kɔnya, ade yawũ babi wĩ a. Yaádã oti anɛ, ade yaákɛna anɛ kamɛ kɛkɛ fɔtsa a. 18Bati a kĩ balɔla bati kayite ni, badu fudutsa nɛ lukudɔ kamɛ, ade foe babi nyɛ nkpã wĩ kadzi a.

Title: YAKOBO 4
Content:
Mitakɛna Tɔkɔba Mɔ Katinya Kamɛ.
1Litsa avɛlɛ kawũ mɔ ɔdzɛ kado nɛ mi kamɛ? Nnɛ́ mi sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kpa a kĩ fɔanɔ mɔ a mi kamɛ futo? 2Miawɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔakɔ mi odo, lɛmɛ miláapuli mina foe, nɛ foesũ miawɛ kĩ miakɔ oti. Anɛ ayɔɔla mi mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ nɛ fɔtsa akũ, lɛmɛ mi awɛ tata foe, nɛ foesũ miawɛ sɔwã kanɔ kawũ. Miána lɛtsa a kĩ miawɛ a, kitonɛkĩ miávia Baguma. 3Ntɛ mivia Baguma fɔtsa ni, miána foe, kitonɛkĩ miavia foe mɔ adzuni kpa. Miavia fɔtsa a kĩ míakɔa mido mi mɔa odi akũ kawɔlɛ. 4Mi bati kĩ miádi ɔnɔkɔali! Minyína kĩ ntɛ mibɔɛ katinya kamɛ tɔkɔba ni, mikɛna mi akũ Baguma bakesĩnɛ? Foesũ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ kĩ yanya katinya kamɛ ɔkɔba kɛna ye akũ Baguma okesĩnɛ. 5Miakɔna kĩ pupulidza bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ kĩ, “Hũhũ a kĩ Baguma do nɛ boe kamɛ a anɔ mɔ boe sukɛna fɔwɛtsa a lineke.” 6Lɛmɛ Baguma amɔ boe kɔnya pii, ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Baguma asua bati a kĩ bata akũ osi, lɛmɛ yamɔ bati a kĩ badɔla be akũ a kɔnya.”
7Nɛ foesũ mifɔnɛ mi akũ awɛ mikpa Baguma. Misua Abonsam osi, lɔkɔa yaalo nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃. 8Mifuãmɔ Baguma, lɔkɔa ye malo yaafuã mi. Mi tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ, mivɔlɛ awɛ! Mi anɛ kamɛ kɛkɛ fɔtsa bakɛnanɛ, mikpalɛ mi tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ. 9Miwo ɔblɔ, mitɛ kalɔɛ, mibe lɛmɛ. Mifɔ̃ mi kamɛmɛ kɛdani ayɔlɔhɔ kabe, mi kawɔlɛkamɔ lɛmɛ kɛdani ɔblɔ kawo. 10Midɔla mi akũ nɛ boe Ɔlate anɛ lɔkɔa yaadɛla mi nɛ ode.
Mitadzɛmɔ Mi Bawaɛ̃ Kristofɔ.
11Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mitalɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩ fɔtáfɛta nɛ mi akũ akũ. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yalɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩ fɔtáfɛta nɛ ye ɔwaɛ̃ okristoni akũ, ĩye yadzɛmɔ ɔwaɛ̃ ni, yalɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩ fɔtáfɛta nɛ mbla a akũ, ade yadzɛ mɔ mbla a. Ntɛ ɔdzɛmɔ mbla a ni, obuki ɔnyɛ́ oti kĩ yakɛna nɛ mbla a akũ, mbom oti kĩ yadzɛmɔ mbla a. 12Baguma odi nyɛ mbla a ɔkpanɛ mɔ ye fɔlɛtsa ɔdzɛnɛ. Ye odi keĩ aapuli ɛkpa nkpã ĩye ɛwɔla ye. Owei anɛ kĩ adzɛmɔ nɔ ɔkɔba?
Kɔdɛ Nɛ Kukũpia Akũ.
13Finyaa mitse, mi a kĩ mialɛ kĩ, “Nviã ĩye kunya bɔ́anaa ɔmatɔ kpale kĩĩ ĩye okĩ a kamɛ, budzi nɛ awã kateli mɔa bɔnya kɔyaatɔ bɔna nfasɔ.” 14Minyína ayekĩ mi nkpã aana nɛ kunya kamɛ malo! Mi nkpã, litsa yanɛ? Mila ndɛ luflututu kĩ laka kako nɛ lɔkɔ lukũ kamɛ kabuki kayɛla. 15Lɛtsa a kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ mialɛ nyɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ boe Baguma tunɔ mɔ budeĩ nkpã ni, bɔ́akɛna fukĩĩ ĩye fukĩ nɛ akĩĩ.” 16Lɛmɛ finyaa miata akũ kapia akũ. Akũ kata kĩĩ flee nyɛ tɔkpa.
17Foesũ odi nyɛ odi kĩ enyina tuwĩ kakɛna mɔ yaákɛna te ni, fɔnyɛ tɔkpa fɔkpa ye.

Title: YAKOBO 5
Content:
Kɔdɛ Kĩ Bɛkpa Akũ Bananɛ.
1Finyaa mi a kĩ mideĩ akũ a, mibe, mibɔa fɔwɔla nɛ lubo kamɔ a kĩ laya nɛ mi akũ a sũ. 2Mi akũ kana fɔtsa a titi, ade fupuka ba mi tɛtadiɛ a. 3Mi sika ngbã mɔ sika ovoe dzi nkandɔlɔ, ade nkandɔlɔ kĩĩ aadi adansiɛ etia mi, ɛba mi sukɛna ndɛ fi aye a. Mikpɔta akũ kana fɔtsa miyi akũ nɛ fuwi nkaɛ kĩĩ kamɛ. 4Lɛmɛ midã! Mitáse bati a kĩ bɛkɛna adzuma nɛ mi fɔba kamɛ a kɔtɔ kudima. Mitse be kabe! Kɔtɔ a kĩ misisi mitáse apaafɔ a kĩ bɛnɛ fɔba bɛkpa mi mi a lamɔ mi onukpɛ̃ katsua mɔ fɔwɔla. Bati a kĩ bakpɔta mi fɔba kamɛ fudutsa a kabe wo boe Ɔlate Asafu Yehowa atɔ kamɛ. 5Mikɔa fɔtsa a kĩ fɔatɛ kɔya mido mi akũ kawɔlɛ beblebee, midɔli ndɛ bayaɛ aye mikpa luwi a kĩ baakɔ mi a. 6Mikɔ́ oti wĩ a kɔtɔ, ade titɔ kĩ ɛtápili mɔ mi malo a, mikɔ ye.
Mina Ɔwɔlɛ Bɔɛɛ, Mikaabɔa Mpaɛ Lɛmɛ.
7Foesũ nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mina ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ kɛnaawo lɔkɔ a kĩ boe Ɔlate a aaya. Midã ayekĩ okuani a kĩ edzi yadzɔlɛ funitsã mɔ kɔya a kĩ ye tite akpa a, ana ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ kadzɔlɛ oni kako nɛ kanɔde mɔ kɔtsɛ lɔkɔ. 8Mi malo kɛnɛ kĩ mina ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ lɔmɔ, mido ɔwɔlɛ, kitonɛkĩ boe Ɔlate kaya luwi a wo ɔtɔ liyua.
9Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mitakɔa mi ɔhau mite nɛ mi bawaɛ̃ akũ mɔ Baguma aadzɛmɔ mi. Midã Ɔdzɛnɛ a dzɛ̃ nɛ onyukpɛ̃! 10Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mikai Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a kĩ bide lɛtsã nɛ boe Ɔlate dĩ akũ a akũ. Mifɔ̃ ayekĩ bido ɔwɔlɛ bɛmɔ́ lubo a fɔnya nfantuhũ fɔkpa mi. 11Bɔabu bati kĩ bado ɔwɔlɛ nɛ lubo kamɔ kamɛ kĩ kawɔlɛ bati. Minu ayekĩ Hiob do ɔwɔlɛ, mɔ lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma kɛna ɛkpa ye nɛ kawũna kamɛ a. Oti fɔlɛtsa api boe Ɔlate a nɛ sɛmɛ, ade yamɔ oti kɔnya a.
12Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, yĩ kalɛ titiliwu nyɛ kĩ mitatani fɔtsa nɛ nhihiɛ adi kakɛna kamɛ. Mitatani ode, ĩye tite, ĩye lɛtsama. Ntɛ kalɛ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali ni, milɛ kĩ, “Oo”, ntɛ kɛnyɛ́ ɔnɔkɔali ni, milɛ kĩ, “Oowo”, ayekĩ Baguma lɛláakɔ mi kɔtɔ.
13Ntɛ mi kamɛ odi deĩ nɛ ɔhau kamɛ ni, ɛbɔa mpaɛ ɛkpa Baguma. Ntɛ kawɔlɛ de mi kamɛ odi ni, ɛsã tɔnɔ emu Baguma. 14Ntɛ mi kamɛ odi asɔ ni, ɛvɛ asɔli banɔkɔɛ̃ a bɛyaabɔa mpaɛ bɛkpa ye, lɔkɔa bɛtsɛla ye kugua nɛ boe Ɔlate a dĩ akũ. 15Mpaɛ kĩ bɔbɔa nɛ katɛkado kamɛ a, aafɔ̃ ɔsɔnɛ a lɛsaɛ. Boe Ɔlate a aafɔ̃ ɛna akũ ɔsĩ, ade ntɛ ɛkɛna tɔkpa tidi malo ni, Baguma aakɔa ete ye. 16Nɛ foesũ mibinya mi tɔkpa kamɛ mitsa mi akũ akũ, mibɔa mpaɛ mikpa akũ, ayekĩ míana kasaɛ. Oti kĩ edzi kpĩĩ mpaɛbɔ deĩ kɔbɛ̃ kĩ kɔapuli kakɛna fɔtsa pii. 17Eliya nyɛ otidziwa ndɛ boe aye, ade kĩ ɛbɔa mpaɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ oni ɛtako a, oni táko nɛ tite futeli ɛlalɛ mɔ sɛkɛ. 18Ke liti a, ebuki ɛbɔa mpaɛ ade Baguma fɔ̃ oni ko tite nyɛ funitsã a.
19Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ntɛ mi kamɛ odi muniki nɛ katɛkado a liti, mɔ oti bɛbã buki ɛkpã ye ɛyamɛna ni, 20mite anɛ kĩ oti a kĩ ɛnyɛ tɔkpa ɔkɛnanɛ a nɛ osi kpa akũ, aafɔ̃ bɛnyɛ tɔkpa ɔkɛnanɛ a nkpã nɛ wuda awɛ, ɛna ye tɔkpa beblebee a kakɔa kate.

Title: 1 PETRO 1
Content:
1Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ, Petro, Yesu Kristo fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ sɛkɛ̃. Ntsɛlɛ ye mamɛna bati a kĩ Baguma pau, kĩ bɛgba biko ndɛ banɔvɔɛ̃ aye nɛ Ponto, Galatia, Kapadokia, Asia mɔ Bitinia amantam kamɛ a. 2Baguma boe Ɔlɛga pau mi ndɛ ayekĩ ehihiɛ eyi a, ade ye Hũhũ a kpalɛ mi akũ kĩ míakɔa obu mikpa Yesu Kristo, lɔkɔa ɛkɔa ye babɔanɛ ɛvɔlɛ mi akũ.
Baguma ɛmɔ mi kɔnya, ɛfɔ̃ lukudɔ lɛpɔ nɛ mi kamɛ daa.
Lɛtsa a Kĩ Budzi Bɔadã Anɛ Kakpa Daa a.
3Mifɔ̃ bumu Baguma, boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo Ɔlɛga a! Nɛ ye kɔnyakamɔ beblebee a sũ ɛkpa boe nkpã vɔɛ̃ ɛtsãmɛna Yesu Kristo kadzɛla katomɛna kanɔkpa kamɛ. Fukĩĩ fɔ̃ budeĩ kɔnɛte a kĩ kɔkpɔla. 4Lɛtsa a kĩ boe anɛ teĩ kĩ boe awɛ aata nyɛ adzapadiɛ mɔ kɔya a kĩ Baguma manɛ eyi ɛkpa ye bati nɛ ode, awã kĩ yaávɔ̃, yaábu kade ade yaátsɛ lɛmɛ a. 5Mi a kĩ mitɛ Kristo mido, kĩ bɛkɔa Baguma kɔbɛ̃ bɛmanɛ mi, kĩ Baguma aakpa mi nkpã nɛ luwi nkaɛ akũ a, ade mi lá adzapadiɛ kĩĩ a.
6Mimɔ kawɔlɛ nɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ akũ, titɔ kĩ nɛ lɔkɔ lukũ kamɛ malo, míamɔ lubo nɛ sɔhuiɛ ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ pii kamɛ, 7ayekĩ baadã ntɛ mi katɛkado a sipi. Sika ngbã kĩ sapuli kawɔ malo, basɔ se kadã nɛ fi kamɛ. Ade aye kɛnɛ kĩ bɛsɔ mi katɛkado a kĩ kɛtɛ kɔya kɛba sika a bɛdã ayekĩ kɛna daa, lɔkɔa baamu mi, bɛkpa mi kukũkpalɛ mɔ obu nɛ Luwi a kĩ Yesu Kristo aaya a akũ. 8Titɔ kĩ mitámɔ ye malo a, miawɛ ye kalɛ, ade kĩ miámɔ ye finyaa malo a, mitɛ ye mido, ade miamɔ kawɔlɛ wĩ kadi kĩ oti lɛláapuli ɛlɛ. 9Ayekĩ mitɛ Kristo mido a sũ, Baguma kpa mi tɛkla nkpã.
10Ade nkpã kĩĩ akũ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a dzi bɛkɔna, bɛwɛ fɔlɛtsa kamɛ yededeede, ade bɛlɛ biyi ayekĩ Baguma aamɔ mi kɔnya, ɛkpa mi nkpã a. 11Bɛbɔa mbɔdi bɛwɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ fɔ́aya mɔ ayekĩ fɔ́aya nɛ foe kamɛ a. Ade fukĩĩ nyɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ Kristo Hũhũ nɛ be kamɛ a katsa ayekĩ Kristo aamɔ lubo, mɔ kukũkpalɛ a kĩ kɔ́atomɔ koe a. 12Baguma nyɛ ɛtsa onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a kĩ nnɛ́ be kalɛ sũ bɛkɛna adzuma, mbom nɛ mi kalɛ sũ. Bɛlɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ finyaa fɔtɔ banyanɛ a tsã Hũhũ Kpalɛwa kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ Baguma do etomɛna ode a akũ, bide lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ. Ade fukĩĩ nyɛ fɔtsa a kĩ Baguma ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ malo wɛ kĩ banu kayɔ kufɛ a.
Baguma Vɛ Boe Kĩ Bɔyadzi Nkpã Wĩ.
13Nɛ foesũ mina nɛ kukũmanɛ kamɛ mikpa adzuma kakɛna, mipi mi akũ kapi wĩ. Mikɔa anɛ flee mite nɛ nhila a kĩ Baguma aakpa mi nɛ luwi a kĩ Kristo aaya a akũ. 14Ndɛ babi kĩ babu Baguma ni, mitafɔ̃ sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kpa a kĩ fɔna nɛ mi kamɛ nɛ kadikatanyi kamɛ kɔkɔɛ a lɛnya mi akũ. 15Ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma a kĩ ɛvɛ mi a nyɛ oti kpalɛwa a, ade aye kɛnɛ kĩ mi malo mianya bati kpalɛwa nɛ mi fɔtsakɛlawa fudi nyɛ fudi kamɛ a. 16Kitonɛkĩ Baguma lɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Minya bati kpalɛwa, kitonɛkĩ oti kpalɛwa manɛ.”
17Ntɛ miavɛ Baguma a kĩ yaádã oti anɛ ade yadzɛmɔ odi nyɛ odi nɛ ye lɛkɛnana onukpɛ̃ a kĩ boe Ɔlɛga nɛ mi mpaɛ kamɛ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ miavila ye nɛ mi fuwi nkaɛ kamɛ nɛ tite kĩĩ akũ. 18Kitonɛkĩ minyina kĩ nnɛ́ sika ngbã ĩye sika ovoe a kĩ savɔ̃ Baguma kɔa ese kɔtɔ nɛ mi lɔlɔ, ɛnyɛ mi nɛ nkpã pupulidza kadzi a kĩ mi bawanyɔ kɔa biyi mi a kamɛ, 19mbom Kristo babɔanɛ mɔ kɔya paa a ɛkɔa ɛtɛ mi. Kristo la ndɛ kavelibi kĩ kɛkpɔla ade mfumsu lɛmɛ lɛláa ke akũ a. 20Baguma pau ye eyi fɔmɔ ɛbɔa katinya, ade ɛnyɛ ye ɛtsa nɛ fuwi nkaɛ kĩĩ kamɛ nɛ mi sũ. 21Mitsã Kristo akũ mitɛ Baguma a kĩ ɛdzɛla ye etomɛna kanɔkpa, edo ye obu lɛmɛ a mido. Nɛ foesũ mi katɛkado mɔ kɔnɛte deĩ nɛ Baguma kamɛ.
22Finyaa kĩ mitɛ ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a, mitsã ke kamɛ mikpalɛ mi akũ, ade miawɛ mi bawaɛ̃ Kristofɔ kalɛ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ a, kɛnɛ kĩ miakɔa mi tɔwɔlɛ flee miwɛ akũ kalɛ papaapa. 23Baguma kalɛ a kĩ kideĩ nkpã, kĩ kɛlá kawũna a akũ fɔtsã mɔ Baguma kpa mi nkpã vɔɛ̃, mikɛna ndɛ oti a kĩ yaáku a babi. Lɛmɛ nnɛ́ ekĩ yaku a babi mianɛ. 24Ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ,
“Batidziwa flee la ndɛ tuwĩ aye
ade be kahɛhɛ flee la ndɛ nhuilɛ a.
Tuwĩ avɛ ade te nhuilɛ a awili.
25Lɛmɛ boe Ɔlate kalɛ a kɔ̃ waa daa.”
Ade kalɛ kĩĩ nyɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a kĩ ke akũ bide lɛtsã bɛkpa mi a.

Title: 1 PETRO 2
Content:
Kristo Nyɛ́ Kɔla Okonto De a.
1Nɛ foesũ mifɔ̃ tɔkpa tidi nyɛ tidi odu kakɛna. Mifɔ̃ fɔvã kama mɔ anɛ kamɛ kɛkɛ fɔtsa kakɛna, mɔ anɛngbã mɔ bati buĩ kanyɛ. 2Miwɛ Baguma ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a ndɛ ayekĩ akɔkɔa awɛ tɛmɛ mui luwi daa, ayekĩ míabo anɛ nɛ mi nkpã katɛ kamɛ. 3Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Mi mɔawɛ mita onukpɛ̃ midã, mimɔ ayekĩ boe Ɔlate a deĩ sɛmɛ kalɛ.”
4Nɛ foesũ mifuã miya nɛ boe Ɔlate a sɛkɛ̃. Ade ye nyɛ nkpã kɔla kake de a kĩ bati sĩ kĩ lɛnyɛ fɔtsa pupulidza, lɛmɛ ade de Baguma nyɛ kĩ lɛtɛ kɔya nɛ ye anɛ a. 5Mi malo mila ndɛ kɔla kake nkpã boe, foesũ miya Baguma ɛkɔa mi eke hũhũ kamɛ afɔliɛ kɔla. Ade kɔla kĩĩ kamɛ míasum ndɛ basɔfɔ kpalɛwa kĩ bɛbɔa hũhũ kamɛ afɔliɛ kĩ yawo Baguma anɛ bɛtsãmɛna Yesu Kristo akũ bɛkpa Baguma. 6Kitonɛkĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ,
“Midã! Ĩnyɛ kɔla akũ de titiliwu a,
nkɔa de mayi nɛ Zion.
Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ ye edo ni,
kɔnyɔã lɛláawo ye da.”
7Foesũ mi a kĩ mitɛ mido a ni, de kĩĩ tɛ kɔya paa lɛkpa mi, lɛmɛ bikĩ bɛtátɛ bido a kɔ̃ ni, binyi kĩ,
“De a kĩ kɔla bakenɛ sĩ a,
ade de lɛyadani okonto akũ de
kĩ lisĩ lɛba flee a.”
8Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a fɔlɛtsa bɛbã lɛmɛ lɛ kĩ,
“Ade de a kĩ laafɔ̃ bati litula a,
de kpale kĩ laafɔ̃ bati lɛnɛ bɛtɔ.”
Bitula bɛtɔ kitonɛkĩ bɛtátɛ ye kalɛ a bido. Baguma awɛ lihihiɛ foe lɔmɔ eyi ɛkpa be.
9Lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃ kade a kĩ Baguma pau, lɛgãkanya basɔfɔ, ɔmaĩ kpalɛwa, mɔ bati kĩ Baguma kɔa ɛkɛna ye bade mianɛ. Baguma vɛ mi etomɛna ɔtũ kamɛ ɛyamɛna nɛ ye awãwã ɔhaĩ a kamɛ, kĩ mide lɛtsã nɛ ye awãwã fɔtsa a akũ. 10Nɛ lɔkɔ lidi kĩ lɛtɛ̃ kamɛ ni, mitánya Baguma ɔmaĩ, lɛmɛ finyaa minyɛ ye ɔmaĩ. Nɛ kɔkɔ lɔkɔ lidi kamɛ ni, Baguma támɔ mi kɔnya, lɛmɛ finyaa ɛmɔ mi kɔnya.
Midzi Nkpã Ndɛ Baguma Basate Aye.
11Nwaɛ̃ amɛ bawɛnɛ, ndɛ banɔvɔɛ̃ mɔ basitsãnɛ nɛ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ ni, mitakɛna nɛ sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kpa a kĩ fɔakɔ odo kayidza kadza nɛ mi akũ a. 12Mibɔa ɔbla wĩ nɛ amamufɔ a kamɛ, ayekĩ ntɛ bɛlɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ mi akũ kĩ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ mianɛ malo ni, ke liti, baamɔ adzuma wĩ a kĩ mikɛna, lɔkɔa baamu Baguma nɛ ye kaya Luwi a akũ.
13Nɛ boe Ɔlate sũ ni, midɔla mi akũ mikpa batidziwa a kĩ bidzina nɛ mbla onukpɛ̃. Midɔla mi akũ mikpa Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃ Flefle a kĩ lideĩ otumi lɛbɛ̃ flee a. 14Midɔla akũ lɔmɔ lɛmɛ mikpa abãã banɔkɔɛ̃ a kĩ Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃ a ado kĩ bɛyaavɛlɛ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ a sɔtɔ, bimu bati a kĩ bakɛna tuwĩ a lɛmɛ. 15Kitonɛkĩ Baguma kawɛ nyɛ kĩ mikɔa tuwĩ kakɛna midina fɔkɔasiatsa a kĩ bati alɛ nɛ mi akũ nɛ kadikatanyi kamɛ a. 16Midzi nkpã ndɛ bati kĩ bidzi be akũ akũ aye, lɛmɛ mitakɔa akũ akũ kadzi a mikɛna ndɛ tɔkpa kakɛna osi kana, mbom midzi nkpã ndɛ Baguma basate aye. 17Mikɔa obu mikpa odi nyɛ odi. Miwɛ mi bawaɛ̃ batɛ badonɛ kalɛ. Mivila Baguma. Mikɔa obu mikpa Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃ Flefle a lɛmɛ.
Kristo Lubokamɔ a Nyɛ Nfantuhũ Fɔkpa Mi.
18Mi basumunɛ, midɔla mi akũ mikpa mi balate, mikɔa obu flee mikpa be. Nnɛ́ mi balate a kĩ bɛdɔ, bideĩ sɛmɛ kalɛ a odi kɛnɛ kĩ miakpa obu, mbom mibu bikĩ bideĩ sɛmɛ ɔnyɛ a lɛmɛ. 19Ntɛ odi lamɔ lubo a kĩ lɛtáfɛta kĩ ɛmɔ kamɔ, lɛmɛ nɛ Baguma sũ edo ɔwɔlɛ ɛmɔ lubo ni, Baguma aahila ye. 20Ntɛ mikɛna fɔtsa kpa mɔ mido ɔwɔlɛ mitɛ sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ a ni, kamu kawɔdabe deĩ nɛ foe kamɛ? Lɛmɛ ntɛ mikɛna tuwĩ mɔ mido ɔwɔlɛ mimɔ́ lubo nɛ foe kamɛ ni, Baguma aahila mi. 21Ade fukĩĩ sũ Baguma vɛ mi a, kitonɛkĩ Kristo mɔawɛ a malo mɔ́ lubo nɛ mi lɔlɔ, ɛkɔa foe ɛtsa mi nfantuhũ kĩ míatsã ye abɔa kakekɔ̃.
22“Ɛtákɛna tɔkpa tidima,
ade ɛtákɛ odima lɛmɛ a.”
23Kĩ bivũna ye a, ɛtávũna odima ese kɔtɔ. Kĩ bɛmɔna ye lubo a, ɛtáhũnahũna odima, mbom ɛkɔa anɛ ete nɛ Baguma a kĩ yadzɛ fɔlɛtsa nɛ osi kpĩĩ akũ a akũ.
24Kristo mɔawɛ lɛlɔ boe tɔkpa nɛ ye sukɛna kamɛ ɛnamɛna asendua a akũ, ayekĩ bɔ́anɛ nɛ tɔkpa kɔbɛ̃ kayɔ, budzi nkpã bɔkɛna tuwĩ. Ɛkɔa fɔɔkpa a kĩ ɛtɛ a ɛtsa mi fɔsɔ. 25Kɔkɔɛ a, mina ndɛ baveli kĩ bɛyɛla osi, lɛmɛ finyaa Baguma muniki mi miya nɛ mi Baveli Ɔkpãnɛ kĩ ɛnyɛ mi Akũ Ɔdãmɛnanɛ sɛkɛ̃.

Title: 1 PETRO 3
Content:
Batsɔ̃ Mɔ Banyɔ Akũ Kɔdɛ.
1Ade ayea mi batsɔ̃ midɔla mi akũ mikpa mi banyɔ, ayekĩ ntɛ be kamɛ badi tátɛ Baguma kalɛ a bido malo ni, mi ɔbla wĩ aafɔ̃ bɛtɛ bido. Ade fɔláasĩ malo kĩ miabinya onukpɛ̃ milɛ kadima, 2kitonɛkĩ baamɔ ayekĩ mi ɔbla kabɔa nɛ Baguma kavila kamɛ kpalɛ mi akũ. 3Mi kalɛkadã kɛtana nɛ sukɛna kalɔla ndɛ tɔlɔ kasui, sika ngbã fɔtsa kado, mɔ tilima kĩ tɛtɛ kɔya kadzi kamɛ. 4Mbom mi kalɛkadã a kɛna nɛ hũhũ kĩ ɛdɔ, yadã dĩĩ kamɛ, ade ɛnya lɛtsa a kĩ lɛláawɔ lɛmɛ a. Tiyitsɔ̃ kĩĩ odu tɛ kɔya paa nɛ Baguma anɛ. 5Nɛ kɔkɔɛ a, batsole kpalɛwa a kĩ bɛkɔa anɛ bite nɛ Baguma akũ a, dɔla be akũ bɛkpa be banyɔ, ade fɔnya akũ kakɛɛlɛ fɔkpa be a. 6Ade aye Sara dɔla ye akũ ɛkpa Abraham a, ade ɛvɛ ye kĩ, “Yĩ Ɔlate” a. Finyaa mi malo midani Sara babitsole, ntɛ miakɛna tuwĩ mɔ miávila lɛtsama.
7Ade aye mi banyɔ lɛmɛ midzi mɔ mi batsɔ̃ nɛ akũ kayɔkanu kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ mi batsɔ̃ lɛlá kɔbɛ̃ ndɛ mi aye. Mikpa be obu kitonɛkĩ mimɔ be flee Baguma mɔ́ kɔnya kĩ míadzi nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna. Ntɛ miakɛna foe lɔmɔ ni, lɛtsama lɛláasua mi mpaɛbɔ osi.
Lubokamɔ Nɛ Tuwĩ Kakɛna Sũ.
8Nɛ kawũna kamɛ a ni, mi flee mina nɛ adzuni mɔa kamɛ, oti akũ ɛkɔ mi kɔnya, miwɛ akũ kalɛ, mikɛna sɛmɛ kalɛ midɔla akũ lɛmɛ mikpa mi akũ akũ. 9Mitakɔa tɔkpa mise tɔkpa kɔtɔ, ĩye midumu mise kadumu kɔtɔ, mbom mivia nhila mikpa be, kitonɛkĩ kavɛ Baguma vɛ mi kĩ miyaana nhila.
10Ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa lɛ a,
“Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ kĩ edzi nkpã wĩ
ɛmɔ fuwi wĩ ni,
tuwuli kpa tɛtanɛ tito ye onukpɛ̃
ade ɛtáma fɔvã lɛmɛ a.
11Kɛnɛ kĩ ɛfɔ̃ tɔkpa kakɛna, ɛkɛna tuwĩ,
ɛbɔa mbɔdi ɛwɛ lukudɔ osi,
etomɔ de liti mɔ ye ɔwɔlɛ flee.
12Kitonɛkĩ boe Ɔlate anɛ teĩ nɛ tuwĩ bakɛnanɛ a akũ,
ade ebinya atɔ yatse be mpaɛbɔ a.
Lɛmɛ boe Ɔlate a abɔa kanɛ liti kakpa tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ.”
13Ntɛ akũ asĩ mi kĩ miakɛna tuwĩ ni, owei deĩ kĩ yaakɛna mi fɔlɔɛwotsa? 14Lɛmɛ ntɛ míamɔ lubo malo nɛ tuwĩ a kĩ miakɛna sũ ni, Baguma ahila mi! Mitavila odima, lɛtsama lɛmɛ lɛtaha mi tɔwɔlɛ. 15Mbom mikɔa obu mikpa Kristo, boe Ɔlate a nɛ mi tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ. Mimanɛ akũ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ, kĩ míapuli minyɛ foe kayɔ mitsa odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaavia mi fɔlɛtsa nɛ kɔnɛte a kĩ mideĩ a akũ. 16Lɛmɛ mikɛna foe nɛ obu mɔ akũ kadɔla kamɛ. Mifɔ̃ mi tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ tɛkpalɛ, ayekĩ ntɛ bivũna mi malo ni, kɔnyɔã kuwo bikĩ balɛ tuwuli kpa nɛ ɔbla wĩ a kĩ miabɔa ndɛ Kristo batomɛnanɛ a sũ.
17Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ fɔnyɛ Baguma kawɛ ni, fɔnɛnɛ kĩ miamɔ lubo ndɛ tuwĩ bakɛnanɛ, kɛba kĩ míamɔ lubo ndɛ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ. 18Kristo lɛmɛ ku nɛ bati tɔkpa lɔlɔ deedimɔapɛ ɛkpa fɔkɔ a flee. Titɔ kĩ ɛnyɛ oti wĩ malo a, eku nɛ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ lɔlɔ ayekĩ yaakpã mi ɛnamɛna Baguma sɛkɛ̃. Bɛkɔ ye nɛ sukɛna kamɛ, lɛmɛ Baguma dzɛla ye edzi nkpã nɛ Hũhũ kamɛ. 19Ɛna nɛ Hũhũ a kamɛ, ade ɛnalɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa ɛkpa hũhũ a kĩ ɛwaa kɔla a. 20Ade be nyɛ bati a kĩ bɛtátse Baguma ɔlɛdo, titɔ kĩ Baguma na ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ ɛkpa be malo a nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ Noa kamɛ ye adakã kpale a. Ye kamɛ bati sukuloo kĩ biwo be ɛlɛ̃ lɛna nkpã nɛ mui kayili a kamɛ. 21Mui kayili kĩĩ ketimɔ mui kawɔla amaniɛ a kĩ finyaa bɛkɔa bɛtɛ mi nkpã. Nnɛ́ tuduli kavɔlɛ nɛ oti akũ fɔanɛ, mbom fɔnyɛ fubo kalɔ kĩ oti aakɔa ye ɔwɔlɛ flee ɛkpa Baguma. Baguma mui kawɔla a lɛtɛ mi nkpã fɔtsãmɛna Yesu Kristo kayidza kato kanɔkpa a akũ. 22Kristo naa ode, ade edzi nɛ Baguma sɔmɔna, yanya Baguma ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ, mɔ ode otumifɔ mɔ kɔbɛ̃ flee akũ a.

Title: 1 PETRO 4
Content:
Kɛnɛ Kĩ Batɛ Badonɛ Nkpã Kadzi Kɛvɛmɛna.
1Ayekĩ Kristo mɔ́ lubo ndɛ otidziwa aye a ni, mi malo miakɔa adzuni mɔapɛ a mido mi akũ kɔbɛ̃, kitonɛkĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛmɔ lubo nɛ sukɛna kamɛ ni, yafɔ̃ tɔkpa kakɛna. 2Foesũ kito finyaa kanaa ni, midzi mi nkpã fuwi nkaɛ nɛ tite akũ a nɛ Baguma kawɛ onukpɛ̃, nnɛ́ nɛ otidziwa fɔwɛtsa kĩ fɔakɔ odo a onukpɛ̃. 3Kɔkɔɛ a, mibula lɔkɔ kade, midzi nkpã mikakɛna fɔtsa ndɛ amamufɔ aye nɛ lɔkɔ pii kamɛ. Nkpã a kĩ midzi tɔ̃ a nyɛ kɔkɔbato kpa kabɔa, sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kpa liti katomɛna, bavɛ kawuga, anya kpa kanya, futo kpa kato, mɔ baviɔ̃ kasum kĩ fɔláa mbla adima kayɔ. 4Finyaa fɔakɛna amamufɔ a wãwã kĩ mibuki miádo akũ nɛ be nkpã pupulidza kadzi kamɛ, nɛ foesũ balɛ mi akũ tuwuli kpa. 5Lɛmɛ baanyɛ be akũ onukpɛ̃ bɛkpa Baguma a kĩ ɛmanɛ akũ kĩ yaadzɛmɔ bati a kĩ bidzi nkpã mɔ banɔkpa flee a. 6Ade foesũ Kristo de lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ ɛkpa banɔkpa a lɛmɛ a. Ade titɔ kĩ Baguma adzɛmɔ be ndɛ kɛfɛta odi nyɛ odi malo ni, Kristo de lɛtsã ɛkpa be ayekĩ nɛ hũhũ kamɛ ni, baadzi nkpã ndɛ Baguma aye.
Kɛnɛ Kĩ Bɔkɛna Baguma Futetsa Akũ Adzuma, Bɔkɔa Busum Akũ Akũ.
7Fɔtsa flee kawũna lɔkɔ fuã, foesũ mipi mi akũ kapi wĩ, mina nɛ kukũmanɛ kamɛ, ayekĩ míapuli mibɔa mpaɛ. 8Lɛtsa titiliwu nyɛ kĩ, miwɛ akũ kalɛ mɔ ɔdɔ kĩ eto mi tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ flee, kitonɛkĩ ɔdɔ afɔ̃ bati akɔa bati bɛbã tɔkpa pii kate. 9Ntɛ mi kamɛ odi nase ɔwaɛ̃ ni, ɛtɛ ye mɔ kawɔlɛ hũhũhũhũ kakɛna fɔtana nɛ foe kamɛ. 10Mi kamɛ odi nyɛ odi tɛ futetsa pɔtii etomɛna Baguma sɛkɛ̃. Foesũ ndɛ Baguma futetsa futefute kĩĩ akũ badãmɛnanɛ ni, mikɛna foe akũ adzuma kakɛna wĩ, ayekĩ fɔ́ana libi fɔkpa mi akũ akũ. 11Ntɛ odi alɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa ni, ɛlɛ foe ndɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa aye. Ntɛ odi asum ni, ɛkɔa kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ Baguma kpa ye a esum, ayekĩ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ ni, bati aatsã Yesu Kristo akũ bimu Baguma. Ye fude nyɛ kukũkpalɛ mɔ kɔbɛ̃ daa daa. Fɔya lɔmɔ.
Lubokamɔ Ndɛ Okristoni Aye.
12Yĩ bawɛnɛ, mitafɔ̃ ayekĩ bɛlamɔ mi kasɔ kadã, milamɔ lubo kamɔ mɔ kalɔɛ lɛkɛna mi wãwã ndɛ lɛtsa vɔɛ̃ kĩ miádã anɛ kɔlaa. 13Mbom mifɔ̃ kawɔlɛ kide mi kĩ miamɔ lubo ndɛ Kristo aye, ayekĩ ntɛ ɛnɛ́ ɛta nɛ ye kukũkpalɛ a kamɛ ni, mi malo míapuli mimɔ́ kawɔlɛ mitu osee. 14Ntɛ bati vũna mi kĩ mi nɛ ayekĩ mitomɔ Kristo sũ ni, kawɔlɛ kide mi, kitonɛkĩ kukũkpalɛ Hũhũ a, kĩ ɛnyɛ Baguma Hũhũ a tomɔ mi. 15Ntɛ mi kamɛ odi amɔ lubo ni, fɔtanya kĩ ɛnyɛ owudini, ĩye oyekpanɛ, ĩye fɔtsa kpa ɔkɛnanɛ ĩye kĩ edo onukpɛ̃ nɛ bati bɛbã fɔlɛtsa kĩ fɔtsɛ́la ye akũ a kamɛ. 16Lɛmɛ ntɛ mi kamɛ odi amɔ lubo kĩ ɛnyɛ Kristo ode sũ ni, kɔnyɔã kɔtakɔ ye, mbom emu Baguma kĩ Kristo dĩ teĩ nɛ ye akũ. 17Lɔkɔ wo ɔtɔ kĩ Baguma aayi bati kadzɛmɛna kayɔ, ade ye mɔawɛ tɔtɔ kamɛ yaanya lɔtɔ ɛdzɛmɛna a. Ade ntɛ eyi kayɔ nɛ boe akũ a, nde fɔ́awũna fɔkpa bati a kĩ bɛtátɛ ye Kalɛ Wĩ a bido a? 18Ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ a,
“Ntɛ fudeĩ ɔsĩ fɔmɔ Baguma aatɛ bati kpĩĩ bɛna nkpã ni,
kekɔ̃ nde fɔ́ana fɔkpa bati a kĩ baávila Baguma mɔ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ a?”
19Foesũ bati a kĩ bamɔ lubo ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma wɛ ɛkpa be a bɛkɛna tuwĩ, bɛkɔa be ɔkla flee bido nɛ be Ɔbɔanɛ a kĩ yaápãã nɛ ye kalɛkayi akũ da a awɛ kamɛ.

Title: 1 PETRO 5
Content:
Midã Baguma Baveli Kɔdabu a Kadã Wĩ.
1Finyaa, yĩ ndɛ asɔli ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ aye ni, mawɛ kĩ madɛ asafu banɔkɔɛ̃ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ mi kamɛ a. Yĩ mɔawɛ a mmɔ́ ayekĩ Kristo mɔ́ lubo, ade maana tsɛfã nɛ ye kukũkpalɛ a kĩ baanyɛ bɛtsa a kamɛ a. Makpa mi kɔdɛ kĩ, 2Mikpã Baguma baveli kɔdabu a kĩ ɛkɔa edo nɛ mi awɛ a kadã wĩ. Midã be akũ ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma awɛ nɛ ɔdɔ kamɛ, kĩ nnɛ́ nɛ ɔhɛ kamɛ. Mitakɛna adzuma nɛ kɔtɔkase sũ, mbom mifɔ̃ futo mi ɔwɔlɛ faa kamɛ. 3Mitawɛ kĩ mianya bati a kĩ Baguma kɔa edo mi nɛ awɛ a akũ, mbom mi ɔbla ɛnya nfantuhũ ɛkpa baveli kɔdabu a. 4Ntɛ Baveli Ɔdãmɛnanɛ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a nɛ ɛta ni, míana kukũkpalɛ lɛgãbɔɛ a kĩ de ɔhaĩ a lɛláabu kade.
5Ade ayea mi bapopo lɛmɛ midɔla mi akũ mikpa mi banɔkɔɛ̃ a. Mi a flee midɔla akũ mikpa mi akũ, misum akũ nɛ mi lɛkɛnana lidi nyɛ lidi kamɛ. Kitonɛkĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ,
“Baguma ayidza kadza nɛ bati a
kĩ badɛla be akũ nɛ ode a akũ,
lɛmɛ yamɔ bikĩ bɛdɔla be akũ a kɔnya.”
6Nɛ foesũ midɔla akũ mido nɛ Baguma kɔbɛ̃ awɛ a kayɔ, ayekĩ yaadɛla mi nɛ ode nɛ ye mɔawɛ lɔkɔ wĩ a kamɛ. 7Mikɔa fɔtsa a kĩ fɔaha mi a flee mido nɛ Baguma awɛ kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ ye adãmɛna mi akũ.
8Mina nɛ kukũmanɛ kamɛ, mikaadã kadã wĩ! Mi okesĩnɛ, Abonsam, tsɛ̃ yamini ndɛ Dzata kĩ yakulumɛ, kĩ yawɛ odi epi ɛyɛlɛ ɛba. 9Mikɔa kadza pintii nɛ katɛkado kamɛ misua tɔkpa osi, kitonɛkĩ minyina kĩ mi bakɔba Kristofɔ nɛ katinya kamɛ flee lamɛna lubo kĩĩ odu kamɔ.
10Lɛmɛ nɛ mi lubo kamɔ lɔkɔ lukũ liti ni, Baguma a kĩ ye kɔnyakamɔ pɔnɛ a, aakɛna mi mikpɔla, edo mi kɔbɛ̃ midza pintii. Kitonɛkĩ ɛvɛ mi kĩ miyaana tsɛfã nɛ ye daa kukũkpalɛ a kamɛ, nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo sũ. 11Ade ye deĩ kɔbɛ̃ daa daa a! Fɔya lɔmɔ.
Kawɔ̃na Nkaɛ.
12Ntsɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa lukũ kĩĩ ntsãmɛna Silvano akũ mama mi. Mabu ye ndɛ ɔkɔba okristoni kĩ yadi ɔnɔkɔali. Mawɛ kĩ mado mi kɔbɛ̃ mɔ lɛtsa a kĩ yĩ mɔawɛ mmɔ́ kĩ ade Baguma kɔnyakamɔ a nɛ awĩ a. Midza pintii nɛ ye kamɛ.
13Babilonia asafu a, kĩ Baguma pau ndɛ mi aye a, awɔ̃na mi. Ade aye yĩ obi Marko lɛmɛ awɔ̃na mi a. 14Miwɔ̃na akũ nɛ Kristo ɔdɔ kamɛ.
Lukudɔ litomɔ mi flee a kĩ mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo.

Title: 2 PETRO 1
Content:
1Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ, Simon Petro, Yesu Kristo osumunɛ mɔ fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ sɛkɛ̃. Ntsɛlɛ ye mamɛna bati a kĩ bɛtsã boe Baguma mɔ boe Ɔtɛnɛ Yesu Kristo tuwĩ kakɛna akũ bɛna katɛkado kĩ kideĩ kɔya ndɛ boe kade a aye.
2Baguma kɔnyakamɔ, mɔ ye lukudɔ lɛpɔ nɛ mi akũ, ayekĩ míabuki minyi ye mɔ Yesu kĩ ɛnyɛ boe Ɔlate a mibu.
Ayekĩ Baguma Vɛ Bati Ɛpau Be.
3Baguma kɔa ye mɔawɛ kɔbɛ̃ ɛkpa boe lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ busĩ nɛ nkpã kamɛ a faa kĩ bupuli budzi nkpã busum ye kasum wĩ. Ɛkɛna fukĩĩ ɛnɛɛ yabumɔ boe kĩ bunyi oti a kĩ ɛvɛ boe kĩ bɔyaana tsɛfã nɛ ye mɔawɛ kukũkpalɛ mɔ tuwĩ kakɛna a kamɛ. 4Baguma tsã osi kĩĩ akũ ete boe fɔtsa kpale mɔ kɔya a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi a, ayekĩ bɔ́apuli bɔtsã futetsa kĩĩ akũ bulo nɛ fɔtsa kpa kĩ fɔakɔ oti odo kĩ fɔawɔla oti nɛ katinya onukpɛ̃, lɔkɔa bɔtsã foe akũ bɔna tsɛfã nɛ Baguma kutidu a kamɛ.
5Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ, mibɔa mbɔdi mikɔa tuwĩ kakɛna mibumɔ mi katɛkado. Ade ayea kadikanyi kibumɔ mi tuwĩ kakɛna, 6akũ kanya kibumɔ kadikanyi, ɔwɔlɛ kado kibumɔ akũ kanya, Baguma kavila kibumɔ ɔwɔlɛ kado. 7Mikɔa tɔwaɛ̃ kakɛna nɛ Kristo kamɛ mibumɔ Baguma kavila, ade mikɔa ɔdɔ mibumɔ tɔwaɛ̃ kakɛna a. 8Ntɛ mideĩ ɔbla kĩĩ mɔ ɛtɛ mi kamɛ flee ni, fɔafɔ̃ mikabɔa mbɔdi, mi akũ lɛna nfasɔ, nɛ ayekĩ minyi boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo sũ. 9Lɛmɛ ntɛ ɔbla kĩĩ lɛláa odi kamɛ ni, kekɔ̃ eku anɛ eyua, kĩ ɛláapuli ɛmɔ mɔ lugo, ade yalɛla tɔkpa a kĩ ɛkɛna ɛtɛ̃ a kĩ Baguma wɔla nɛ ye akũ a.
10Foesũ, nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mibɔa mbɔdi mɔ ɔsĩ miba kɔkɔɛ, mido akũ ɔsĩ mifɔ̃ kavɛ a kĩ Baguma vɛ mi, mɔ kapau a kĩ ɛpau mi a, fɔnya fɔtsa kɔlɛwa fɔkpa mi. Ntɛ mikɛna foe lɔmɔ ni, miláamuniki nɛ mi katɛkado a liti. 11Ntɛ fɔtsã osi kĩĩ akũ a, baakpa mi osi faa miwo nɛ boe Ɔlate mɔ boe Ɔtɛnɛ Yesu Kristo lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kĩ kɛwaa daa a kamɛ.
12Titɔ kĩ minyina fɔtsa kĩĩ kɔkɔɛ, midzɛ̃ pintii nɛ ɔnɔkɔali a kĩ bɔtsa mi a kamɛ malo ni, mawɛ kĩ makate mi foe anɛ luwi daa. 13Mbu kĩ, kĩ ndzi kpã ni, fɔnɛnɛ kĩ nkaanyina mi nɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ akũ. 14Ĩnyina kĩ owi lɛláabuna mɔ maaku ndɛ ayekĩ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo nyɛ ɛtsa yĩ pefee a. 15Nɛ foesũ maabɔa mbɔdi ntsa mi osi a kĩ nɛ yĩ wuda liti ni, míapuli mite anɛ nɛ fɔtsa kĩĩ akũ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ.
Bati a Kĩ Bɛmɔ́ Kristo Kukũkpalɛ a.
16Nnɛ́ tugu kĩ bɛmɛ nɛ nyansã kamɛ bɔkɔa bɔlɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo kaya nɛ kɔbɛ̃ kamɛ a bɔtsa mi. Boe mɔawɛ a lɛmɔ ye kɔbɛ̃, obu mɔ kukũkpalɛ a mɔ anɛ. 17Bɔna nɛ awã luwi a fɔmɔ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga a kɔa ye obu mɔ kukũkpalɛ ɛkpa ye, ade odo to ode nɛ Kukũkpalɛ Flee Ɔlate a sɛkɛ̃ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Ade yĩ Obi kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ a. Yawo yĩ anɛ.” 18Boe mɔawɛ a linu odo kĩĩ kĩ eto ode nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ bɔna nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ nɛ ɔtɔ kpalɛwa a akũ.
19Nɛ foesũ boe mbom bɔtɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ lɛtsã a kĩ bide nɛ ye akũ a budo bɔba. Mibɔa mbɔdi mipi ɔlɛdo a kĩ ɛla ndɛ ɔsɛdza kĩ yavɔlɛ nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ a mido mɔ akũ, kɛnaawo odenyinawi kĩ ɔnɔnɛ lisibii a aade lɛvɔlɛ nɛ mi tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ. 20Lɛmɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛbɛ̃ foe flee nyɛ kĩ, mite anɛ kĩ odima lɛláapuli ɛnyɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi a kayɔ nɛ ye mɔawɛ akũ akũ. 21Kitonɛkĩ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ fɔlɛtsa fudima táto otidziwa kawɛ kamɛ fɔya tɔ̃ da, mbom Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a kɔbɛ̃ lɛfɔ̃ bati lɛ Baguma ɔlɛdo a biyi.

Title: 2 PETRO 2
Content:
Petro Kpa Kɔdɛ Nɛ Bavãlɛvã Fɔtsa Batsanɛ Akũ.
1Ndɛ ayekĩ fɔvã onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ nɛ́ nɛ bati kamɛ kɔkɔɛ a, ade ayea bavãlɛvã fɔtsa batsanɛ aanɛ nɛ mi kamɛ a. Baatsã tɛdake kamɛ bɛyamɛna fɔvã fɔtsa katsa a kĩ fɔ́abula bati kade, ade baasĩ boe Ɔlate a kĩ ɛya be ɛtɛ be nkpã a malo.
