Be fɔtsakɛlawa aafɔ̃ bɛwɔla be mɔatsɛ. 2Bati pii aatomɔ be ɔbla kpa kabɔa a liti, ade nɛ fɔvã fɔtsa batsanɛ a sũ ni, bati bɛbã aalɛ kɔdzɛla kpa bitia ɔnɔkɔali osi a. 3Ayekĩ bavãlɛvã fɔtsa batsanɛ kĩĩ deĩ anɛngbã nɛ sika akũ sũ ni, baatsã tɛdake mɔ fɔvã kamɛ bɛna mi akũ nfasɔ. Lɛmɛ Baguma kɔ be kɔtɔ eyi anɛ kɔkɔkɔɛ, ade Oti a kĩ yaawɔla be a lɛmɛ lanyɛ anɛ nɛ be akũ!
4Baguma támɔ ye ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ a kĩ bɛkɛna tɔkpa a kɔnya, mbom edo be nkɔsɔnkɔsɔ, ɛta be edo nɛ fi kĩ fɔádĩ da a kamɛ, awã kĩ bideĩ nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ badzɔlɛ kadzɛ Luwi a. 5Ade ayea Baguma támɔ atitifɔ katinya bati a kɔnya a. Ɛfɔ̃ mui kayili wɔla bati a kĩ bɛtávila Baguma nɛ katinya kamɛ flee a, mbɔɛntɛ Noa kĩ ede lɛtsã nɛ nkpã kadzi kpĩĩ akũ, mɔ bati evũkɔnɔ bɛbã odi Baguma nyɛ nɛ foe kamɛ.
6Baguma kɔ Sodom mɔ Gomora tɛmatɔ tɛkpale tɛkpale a kɔtɔ, ade ɛfɔ̃ fi wɔla te bubloo tɛdani batɔ nɛnɛ a. Ɛkɛna be kĩ bɛnya nfantuhũ bɛkpa bikĩ baávila Baguma a lɛtsa a kĩ laaya nɛ be akũ. 7Lɛmɛ Baguma nyɛ Lot, oti kpĩĩ kĩ bati ɔbla kpa kabɔa kaha ye ɔwɔlɛ. 8Oti wĩ kĩĩ dzi nɛ be kamɛ, ade be ɔbla kpa a kĩ ɛkamɔ ɛkanu mɔ be titikpa a kaha ye ɔwɔlɛ luwi nyɛ luwi. 9Nɛ foesũ boe Ɔlate nyina ayekĩ yanyɛ bati a kĩ bavila ye a etomɛna be sɔhuiɛ kamɛ, mɔ ayekĩ yafɔ̃ bati kpa aana nɛ sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ kamɛ bɛkɔa bɛdzɔlɛ kadzɛ luwi a. 10Yakɛna foe titiliwu nɛ bati a kĩ bitomɔ sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kpa kĩ fɔakɔ odo liti, kĩ foesũ baábu Baguma otumi kĩ yanya be akũ a kado nɛ lɛtsama kamɛ.
Fɔvã fɔtsa batsanɛ kĩĩ deĩ anɛ ɔsĩ, ade badɛla be akũ nɛ ode a. Baákɔa obu kakpa ode bati kpalɛwa a, ade ntɛ balɛ tɔkpa nɛ be akũ malo ni, akũ lányɛnɛ be. 11Baguma ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ a kĩ bideĩ kɔbɛ̃ mɔ otumi bɛbɛ̃ fɔvã fɔtsa batsanɛ malo a lákɔa fɔlɛtsa kpa katsua be onukpɛ̃ nɛ boe Ɔlate a anɛ. 12Lɛmɛ bati kĩĩ la ndɛ bayaɛ kpa kĩ bɛlá adzuni, kĩ katinya nyɛ be kĩ bati bipili be bɛkɔ. Balɛ fɔlɛtsa kpa nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bɛtánu de kayɔ a akũ. Baguma aawɔla be ndɛ ayekĩ batidziwa awɔla tuwĩ kamɛ bayaɛ.
13Baamɔ lubo nɛ lubo a kĩ bɛfɔ̃ bati mɔ́ a sũ. Be kawɔlɛ nyɛ kĩ bɛkɛna be sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kpa fudi nyɛ fudi nɛ suwa ketee. Bɛnyɛ kɔnyɔã mɔ tuduli fɔtsa bakɛnanɛ, ade ntɛ mi mɔ be midzi mianya a, bamɔ kawɔlɛ nɛ be bati kakɛ tisi a akũ. 14Bideĩ anɛ kĩ yamɔ batsole adɔpaafɔ, ade anɛ a kakɔa kakɛna tɔkpa láplo be a. Bavɛlɛ bati kĩ be katɛkado lɛdzɛ́ pintii kado nɛ tɔkpa kamɛ. Bɛvɛlɛ be akũ bɛkpa anɛngbã. Baguma kadumu tomɔ be! 15Bɛfɔnɛ nɛ osi kpĩĩ a awɛ, ade bɛyɛla osi a. Bɛtsã osi a kĩ Balam, Boer obinyole a tsã a. Balam mɔ kawɔlɛ nɛ sika a kĩ yaana etomɛna tɔkpa kakɛna kamɛ a akũ. 16Lɛmɛ Baguma kã ye anɛ nɛ ye tɔkpa a sũ. Ye mɔawɛ aflimu kĩ ɛnɔnɛ lɛ kɔdzɛla mɔ oti odo, ade esua onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ a fɔbɔdamtsa kakɛna osi a.
17Fɔvã fɔtsa batsanɛ kĩĩ la ndɛ fɔwɔkɛ kĩ fuviɔ̃, ĩye luflututu kĩ ɔwɛ mɔ ɔsĩ abɔa kanamɛna. Baguma manɛ kadzikɔ̃ eyi ɛkpa be nɛ ɔtũ kpli kamɛ. 18Balɛ kɔdzɛla mɔ akũ kata, kalɛ fɔkɔasiatsa lɛmɛ. Bakɔa sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kĩ fɔakɔ odo kakɛ bikĩ owi tábuna kĩ bilo nɛ amamu kadzi kamɛ. 19Bakpa be anɛ kate nɛ akũ akũ kadzi akũ, lɛmɛ be mɔawɛ a bɛnyɛ ɔbla kpa a kĩ yawɔla bati a basate, kitonɛkĩ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛnya oti akũ ni, oti a adani ɔsate ɛkpa lɛtsa a.
20Ntɛ bati tsã boe Ɔlate mɔ Ɔtɛnɛ Yesu Kristo kanyi kamɛ bilo nɛ katinya kamɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔado oti efĩĩ sɛkɛ̃, mɔ́ ɔbla a na muniki ewo nɛ be kamɛ ɛnya be akũ ni, bati a na nkpã awũnade a abu kade kaba atɔnyade a. 21Ntɛ kanyi kĩĩ bɛtanyi lɛtsama nɛ kadzi nɛ osi kpĩĩ akũ ni, kufɛ fɔnɛnɛ kɔlaa fɔkpa be kɛba kĩ binyi osi wĩ kĩĩ lɛmɛ bibuki bimuniki nɛ mbla kpalɛwa a kĩ Baguma kpa be a liti.
22Lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya nɛ be akũ a atsa kĩ fɔgbã kĩĩ nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kĩ, “Okpete amuniki kanaabɔɛ ye mɔawɛ tɛdã,” ade, “Ɔplakuo kĩ bɛwɔla ye mui yededeede amuniki kanaato tɔdɔ̃.”

Title: 2 PETRO 3
Content:
Mimanɛ Akũ Mikpa Boe Ɔlate Kabuki Kaya.
1Nwaɛ̃ amɛ kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ, ade ovoli ɔyade kĩ ntsɛlɛ mamɛna mi a. Nɛ tuvoli nviã a kamɛ a, nwɛ kĩ manyina mi adzuni nɛ fɔtsa wĩ kakɛna akũ, ndɛ fɔlɛtsa kakai aye. 2Mawɛ kĩ mite anɛ nɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ kpalɛwa a lɛ biyi anɛ kɔkɔɛ a, mɔ tɛbla a kĩ mi fɔtɔ banyanɛ a tɛ bitomɛna boe Ɔlate mɔ Ɔtɛnɛ sɛkɛ̃ bɛma mi a akũ.
3Minya lɔtɔ minu foe kayɔ kĩ nɛ fuwi nkaɛ a kamɛ ni, nsekuo badinɛ aaya. Baadzi nkpã nɛ be sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kĩ fɔakɔ oti odo onukpɛ̃ bidi mi nsekuo. 4Ade baalɛ kĩ, “Ɛlɛ eyi kĩ yaaya. Nde ye? Kitonɛkĩ anɛ kĩ boe bawanyɔ ku kɛyawo finyaa, ade ayea lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa buki lideĩ ndɛ ayekĩ fɔna kĩ Baguma bɔa katinya a!” 5Bibua pa bisĩ ɔnɔkɔali a kĩ anɛ kɔkɔɛ mɔ Baguma kɔa kalɛ ɛbɔa tite mɔ ode. Ɛkɛna tite etomɛna mui kamɛ, tɛdzɛ̃ nɛ mui kamɛ, 6ade mui lɛmɛ, mui a kĩ biyili a ɛkɔa ɛwɔla katinya kɔɛ a. 7Ade Baguma kalɛ mɔapɛ kĩĩ pini tite mɔ ode a kĩ fudeĩ finyaa, ade ɛmanɛ foe eyi kĩ yaakɔa fi ɛwɔla foe a. Baguma manɛ foe eyi ɛkpa kadzɛ luwi a kĩ yaawɔla bati a kĩ bɛtávila ye a.
8Lɛmɛ nwaɛ̃ amɛ kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ, mitalɛla kalɛ mɔa kĩĩ! Ade ke nyɛ kĩ nɛ boe Ɔlate sɛkɛ̃ ni, luwi mɔa la ndɛ futeli apim, ade futeli apim lɛmɛ la ndɛ luwi mɔa a. 9Nɛ badi kakɔna onukpɛ̃ ni, boe Ɔlate lána sɔwa nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi a kakɛna akũ. Fɔlá lɔmɔ, mbom ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ edeĩ ɛkpa mi, kitonɛkĩ yaáwɛ kĩ odima ɛyaawɔ, mbom yawɛ kĩ bati flee bɛdani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ.
10Lɛmɛ boe Ɔlate Luwi a aaya ndɛ ayekĩ oyekpanɛ aya a aye. Nɛ luwi a akũ ni, ode aatɛ̃ ɛnaa nɛ odo kpaa kanɛ kamɛ, ade odetɔ́ kamɛ fɔtsa flee a aatɛ̃ fuvio fɔwɔ, ade tite mɔ te akũ fɔtsa flee lɛmɛ aavio a.
11Foesũ ntɛ baawɔla fɔtsa kĩĩ flee nɛ osi kĩĩ akũ ni, bati bawɔdabe odu kɛnɛ kĩ mianya? Kɛnɛ kĩ mibɔa ɔbla kĩ ɛkpalɛ, mikɔa mi akũ flee misum Baguma, 12nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ midzi miadzɔlɛ Baguma Luwi a mɔ akũ kasĩ kĩ lɛya mɔatsɛ. Ade luwi a mɔ ode aapi fi evio, ade fi ɔwɛ a aanyinyina odetɔ́ kamɛ fɔtsa flee a. 13Lɛmɛ boe kɔ̃ nɛ Baguma kalɛkayi onukpɛ̃ ni, bɔadzɔlɛ ode vɔɛ̃ mɔ tite vɔɛ̃, awã kĩ fɔtsa wĩ kakɛna tɛ tɔtɔ.
14Foesũ nwaɛ̃ amɛ, kĩ miadzɔlɛ boe Ɔlate Luwi a ni, mibɔa mbɔdi kĩ míanya bati kpalɛwa, kĩ nfumusu lɛláa mi akũ nɛ Baguma anɛ, mbom lukudɔ lɛna nɛ mimɔ Baguma kayite. 15Kɛnɛ kĩ bɔabu boe Ɔlate a ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ kana kakpa boe a ndɛ osi kĩ ebinya ɛkpa mi kĩ mina nkpã katɛ. Ade fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ boe ɔwɛnɛ Paulo malo tsɛlɛ ɛma mi nɛ nyansã a kĩ Baguma kpa ye a onukpɛ̃ a. 16Ade lɛtsa a kĩ yalɛ nɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ akũ nɛ ye tuvoli a kamɛ a. Ye tuvoli a kamɛ fɔlɛtsa a fudi kayɔ kanu deĩ ɔsĩ. Nɛ foesũ bati a kĩ binyína tuvoli mɔ bikĩ bɛtátim nɛ be katɛkado kamɛ a adani foe kayɔ kanyɛ, ndɛ ayekĩ bakɛna mɔ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa fɔlɛtsa bɛbã a fudi. Fukĩĩ kakɛna aafɔ̃ bɛwɔla be akũ.
17Lɛmɛ mi yĩ bakɔba, minyina fukĩĩ kɔkɔɛ. Foesũ midã mi akũ kadã wĩ ayekĩ bati a kĩ baábu mbla a lɛláanyɛ kudu nɛ mi abɔa kayɔ minɛ mitɔ! 18Mibo anɛ nɛ boe Ɔlate mɔ Ɔtɛnɛ Yesu Kristo kɔnyakamɔ mɔ kanyi kamɛ. Ye kade nyɛ kukũkpalɛ kito finyaa kanaa daa. Fɔya lɔmɔ.

Title: 1 YOHANES 1
Content:
Baguma Kalɛ a Akpa Nkpã.
1Bɔtsɛlɛ ovoli kĩĩ bɔamɛna mi nɛ Baguma kalɛ a kĩ kakpa nkpã, kĩ kideĩ anɛ kayɔkayi a akũ. Bunu kalɛ kĩĩ, bɔmɔ́ ke mɔ anɛ, nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, bɔmɔ́ ke, ade bɔta ke mɔ awɛ lɛmɛ a. 2Kĩ nkpã kĩĩ nyɛ ye akũ kanya a, bɔmɔ́ ye, foesũ bɔlɛ fɔlɛtsa nɛ ye akũ, ade bude lɛtsã nɛ nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a, kĩ edeĩ nɛ Ɔlɛga a sɛkɛ̃ kĩ Baguma nyɛ ɛtsa boe malo akũ a, bɔkpa mi. 3Lɛtsa a kĩ bɔmɔ́, bunu a, ade de bɔabi mi malo a, ayekĩ míayabumɔ boe nɛ ɔmɔa a kĩ bɔkɛna mɔ Ɔlɛga a mɔ ye Obi Yesu Kristo. 4Bɔtsɛlɛ ovoli kĩĩ katsɛlɛ bɔama mi, ayekĩ boe kawɔlɛkamɔ a aakpɔla.
Baguma Nyɛ Ɔhaĩ.
5Finyaa ni, ɔlɛdo a kĩ bunu butomɛna ye Obi sɛkɛ̃ a, kĩ bɔkɔa bɔade lɛtsã nɛ ye akũ bɔkpa mi a nyɛ Baguma nyɛ ɔhaĩ, ade ɔtũ odima lɛláa ye kamɛ a. 6Foesũ ntɛ bɔlɛ kĩ budeĩ nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna kamɛ mɔ ye mɔ bubuki bɔtsɛ̃ nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ ni, kekɔ̃ bɔama fɔvã nɛ boe kɔdzɛla kalɛ mɔ boe fɔkɛlatsa kamɛ. 7Lɛmɛ ntɛ budeĩ nɛ ɔhaĩ kamɛ ndɛ ayekĩ ye malo edeĩ nɛ ɔhaĩ a kamɛ ni, kekɔ̃ bɔakɛna ɔmɔa mɔ boe akũ akũ, ade ye Obi Yesu babɔanɛ a vɔlɛ tɔkpa tidi nyɛ tidi nɛ boe akũ a.
8Ntɛ bɔlɛ kĩ tɔkpa lɛláa boe akũ ni, kakɛ bɔakɛ boe akũ, ade ɔnɔkɔali a lɛláa boe kamɛ a. 9Lɛmɛ ntɛ bubinya boe tɔkpa kamɛ bɔtsa Baguma ni, ɛnyɛ ɔnɔkɔalini mɔ oti kpĩĩ kĩ yaakɔa boe tɔkpa ete boe, ɛvɔlɛ efĩĩ adi nyɛ adi nɛ boe akũ. 10Lɛmɛ ntɛ bɔlɛ kĩ bɔtákɛna tɔkpa ni, bute Baguma fɔvã, ade ke ye kalɛ a lɛmɛ lɛláa boe kamɛ a.

Title: 1 YOHANES 2
Content:
Kristo Nyɛ Boe Obumɛnanɛ.
1Yĩ babi, nlamɛna fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ katsɛlɛ kamɛna mi ayekĩ miláakɛna tɔkpa. Lɛmɛ ntɛ odi kɛna tɔkpa ni, budeĩ odi kĩ yawãnɛ boe lɔlɔ nɛ Ɔlɛga a sɛkɛ̃. Ade ye nyɛ Yesu Kristo kĩ ɛnyɛ oti kpĩĩ a. 2Kristo akũ Baguma tsã ɛkɔa boe tɔkpa ete boe. Nnɛ́ boe odi tɔkpa ɛkɔa ete, mbom ɛkɔa ete batidziwa flee.
3Ntɛ bɔakɛna nɛ Baguma mbla a akũ ni, fɔ́afɔ̃ bɔmɔ́ buyi ɔsũ kĩ bunyina ye. 4Oti a kĩ yalɛ kĩ, “Ĩnyina ye,” lɛmɛ yaákɛna nɛ ye mbla a akũ ni, ɔvãlɛvã yanɛ, ade ɔnɔkɔali a lɛláa ye kamɛ a. 5Lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna nɛ ye kalɛ a akũ ni, ade ye ɔdɔ a kĩ edeĩ ɛkpa Baguma a lɛkpɔla a. Ayekĩ bɔ́akɛna bunyi kĩ bɔkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Baguma nyɛ kĩ, 6Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yalɛ kĩ edeĩ nɛ Baguma kamɛ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ edzi nkpã ndɛ ayekĩ Yesu Kristo dzi a.
Mikɛna Nɛ Mbla Vɔɛ̃ a Akũ.
7Yĩ bakɔba kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ, nnɔ mbla vɔɛ̃ ntsɛlɛ mama mi, mbom mbla kɔɛ a kĩ bɛkpa mi kito anɛ kayɔkayi a yanɛ. Mbla kɔɛ a nyɛ ɔlɛdo a kĩ minu kɔkɔɔkɔɛ a. 8Lɛmɛ mbla a kĩ ntsɛlɛ finyaa mamɛna mi a nyɛ avɔɛ̃, ade ɔnɔkɔali a kĩ edeĩ nɛ ye kamɛ a lɛmɛ nyɛ akũ nɛ Kristo mɔ mi kamɛ a. Kitonɛkĩ ɔtũ a lamɛna katɛ̃ ade ɔhaĩ mɔawɛ a lamɛna kavɔlɛ kɔkɔɛ a.
9Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yalɛ kĩ edeĩ nɛ ɔhaĩ a kamɛ, lɛmɛ yakesĩ ɔwaɛ̃ ni, ebuki edeĩ nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ kɛyawo finyaa. 10Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ ɔwaɛ̃ kalɛ ni, edeĩ nɛ ɔhaĩ a kamɛ, foesũ lɛtsama lɛláafɔ̃ ɛkɛna tɔkpa. 11Lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakesĩ ɔwaɛ̃ ni, edeĩ nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ, ɛtsɛ̃ nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ, ade enyína awã kĩ yakpa, kitonɛkĩ ɔtũ a kɔ ye anɛ.
12Mi babisɛ̃, mi nlamɛna ovoli kĩĩ katsɛlɛ kama, kitonɛkĩ bɛkɔa mi tɔkpa bite mi nɛ Kristo sũ.
13Mi balɛga, mi nlamɛna ovoli kĩĩ katsɛlɛ kama, kitonɛkĩ minyi Kristo a kĩ edeĩ nkpã kito anɛ kayɔkayi a.
Mi bapopo, mi nlamɛna ovoli kĩĩ katsɛlɛ kama, kitonɛkĩ minya Oti Kpa a akũ.
14Mi babisɛ̃, mi nlamɛna ovoli kĩĩ katsɛlɛ kama, kitonɛkĩ minyina Ɔlɛga a.
Mi balɛga a, ntsɛlɛ mma mi, kitonɛkĩ minyina Kristo a kĩ edeĩ nkpã kito anɛ kayɔkayi a.
Mi bapopo, ntsɛlɛ mma mi, kitonɛkĩ mideĩ kɔbɛ̃, Baguma kalɛ a deĩ nɛ mi kamɛ, ade minya Oti Kpa a akũ a.
15Mitawɛ katinya ĩye fɔtsa a kĩ fudeĩ nɛ ke kamɛ a fudima kalɛ. Ntɛ odi awɛ katinya kalɛ ni, Ɔlɛga a ɔdɔ lɛláa ye kamɛ. 16Kitonɛkĩ katinya kamɛ fɔtsa flee kĩ fɔakɔ sukɛna odo, ĩye fɔakɔ anɛ odo, mɔ fɔtsa a kĩ oti apia nɛ foe akũ a lɛmɛ, fudima táto Ɔlɛga a sɛkɛ̃, mbom katinya kamɛ futo. 17Katinya mɔ ke kamɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔakɔ oti odo aatɛ̃, lɛmɛ oti a kĩ yakɛna nɛ Baguma kawɛ akũ a, aadzi nkpã daa.
Midã Kadã Wĩ Nɛ Kristo Bakesĩnɛ a Akũ.
18Yĩ babi, katinya kawũna a fuã! Ndɛ ayekĩ minu kĩ Kristo okesĩnɛ a aaya a, finyaakĩĩ malo Kristo bakesĩnɛ pii nɛ́ kɔkɔɛ, nɛ foesũ bunyina kĩ katinya kawũna a fuã. 19Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, boe kamɛ bati kĩĩ nɛ́ bito, lɛmɛ bɛláa boe kamɛ. Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ boe kamɛ bideĩ ni, kufɛ bibuki bideĩ nɛ boe kamɛ. Lɛmɛ bɛdzakũ ayekĩ fɔ́anɛ fɔwa pefee kĩ be kamɛ odima lɛnyɛ́ boe ode.
20Lɛmɛ Kristo kɔa Hũhũ Kpalɛwa eko nɛ mi akũ, ade mi flee minyi ɔnɔkɔali a. 21Nnɛ́ kĩ minyína ɔnɔkɔali a sũ mɔ matsɛlɛ mi ovoli kĩĩ, mbom ayekĩ minyina ɔnɔkɔali a, ade minyina lɛmɛ kĩ fɔvã lɛláa ɔnɔkɔali a kamɛ sũ.
22Foesũ owei koũ nyɛ ɔvãlɛvã a? Ade ye nyɛ oti a kĩ yalɛ kĩ nnɛ́ Yesu nyɛ Kristo a. Ade oti kĩĩ odu liti ɛnyɛ Kristo okesĩnɛ a kĩ esĩ Ɔlɛga a mɔ Obi a flee a. 23Kitonɛkĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ esĩ Obi a ni, Ɔlɛga a lɛnyɛ́ ye ode. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ Obi ni, Ɔlɛga a nyɛ ye ode.
24Mifɔ̃ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ minu kito kayɔkayi a fɔna nɛ mi tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ. Ntɛ mipi fɔlɛtsa a kĩ minu a midomɔ akũ ni, míapuli mina nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna kamɛ mɔ Obi a mɔ Ɔlɛga a. 25Lɛtsa a kĩ Kristo mɔawɛ lɛ eyi kĩ yaakpa boe nyɛ nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a.
26Ade bati a kĩ bawɛ kĩ bakɛ mi a akũ fɔlɛtsa nlamɛna katsɛlɛ kama mi a. 27Lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃ kugua a kĩ Kristo tsɛla mi buki kudeĩ nɛ mi kamɛ, foesũ fɔtásĩ kĩ odima abuki ɛtsa mi fɔtsa. Kitonɛkĩ ye kugua katsɛla a atsa mi lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa, ade fɔtsa a kĩ kɔatsa a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kĩ fɔvã lɛláa foe kamɛ. Foesũ mikɛna nɛ ye fɔtsa katsa a akũ lɔkɔa mina nɛ Kristo kamɛ.
28Foesũ finyaa, yĩ babi, midzi nɛ Kristo kamɛ, ayekĩ ntɛ ɛyanɛ ɛta nɛ Luwi akũ ni, bɔ́ado ɔwɔlɛ, kĩ kɔnyɔã lɛmɛ lɛláakɔ boe nɛ ye anɛ. 29Ntɛ minyina kĩ Kristo nyɛ oti kpĩĩ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ mitɛ mido kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna fɔtsa wĩ ni, Baguma obi yanɛ.

Title: 1 YOHANES 3
Content:
Baguma Babi Bɔanɛ.
1Midã ɔdɔ a odu kĩ Ɔlɛga a deĩ ɛkpa boe! Yawɛ boe kalɛ paa kĩ bavɛ boe Baguma babi. Ɔnɔkɔali fɔanɛ kĩ ye babi bɔanɛ lɛmɛ. Lɛtsa a sũ kĩ katinya kamɛ bati linyína boe nyɛ kĩ bɛtányi Baguma. 2Yĩ bakɔba kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ, finyaa Baguma babi bɔanɛ. Bɛtányɛ lɛtsa a kĩ de bɔ́adani bɔkɛna a bɛtsa boe tɔ̃, lɛmɛ bunyina kĩ ntɛ Kristo ya ni, bɔ́ana ndɛ ye aye, kitonɛkĩ bɔ́amɔ ye ndɛ ayekĩ eti ɛla a. 3Odi nyɛ odi kĩ edeĩ kɔnɛte kĩĩ nɛ Kristo akũ ni, yakpalɛ ye akũ ndɛ ayekĩ Kristo nyɛ oti kpalɛwa a.
4Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna tɔkpa ni, efum Baguma mbla a, kitonɛkĩ tɔkpa nyɛ Baguma mbla kafum. 5Lɛmɛ minyina kĩ kaya Kristo ya kĩ yayaalɔ boe tɔkpa ɛnamɛna, ade nɛ ye kamɛ ni, tɔkpa tidima lɛláa. 6Foesũ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo ni, yaádzi kakɛna tɔkpa, lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ edzi yakɛna tɔkpa ni, ɛtámɔ tɔ̃ ye ĩye ɛtányi tɔ̃ ye.
7Yĩ babi, mitafɔ̃ odima lɛkɛ mi! Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna tuwĩ ni, ɛnyɛ oti kpĩĩ ndɛ ayekĩ Kristo lɛmɛ nyɛ oti kpĩĩ a. 8Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna tɔkpa ni, Abonsam ode yanɛ, kitonɛkĩ Abonsam kɛna tɔkpa kito anɛ kayɔkayi a. Lɛtsa a sũ kĩ Baguma Obi a ya nɛ katinya kamɛ nyɛ kĩ yayaawɔla Abonsam fɔkɛlatsa a flee.
9Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛnyɛ Baguma obi ni, yaádzi kakɛna tɔkpa, kitonɛkĩ Baguma kutidu a deĩ nɛ ye kamɛ. Ɛláapuli edzi ɛkakɛna tɔkpa kitonɛkĩ Baguma nyɛ ye Ɔlɛga. 10Ntsitsemu a kĩ edeĩ nɛ Baguma babi mɔ Abonsam babi kayite nyɛ kĩ, odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaákɛna fɔtsa nɛ osi kpĩĩ akũ ĩye yaáwɛ ɔwaɛ̃ kalɛ ni, ɛnyɛ́ Baguma obi.
Miwɛ Akũ Kalɛ.
11Ɔlɛdo a kĩ minu kito anɛ kayɔkayi a nyɛ kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ bɔawɛ akũ kalɛ. 12Mitana ndɛ Kain aye kĩ ɛnya oti kpa a ode, ɛkɔ ye mɔawɛ ɔwaɛ̃ Abel a. Litsa sũ Kain kɔ ye? Ɛkɔ ye kitonɛkĩ ye mɔawɛ a ɛkɛna tɔkpa lɛmɛ ɔwaɛ̃ kɔ̃ kɛna fɔtsa nɛ osi kpĩĩ akũ.
13Foesũ, nwaɛ̃ amɛ, fɔtakɛna mi saa kĩ katinya kamɛ bati akesĩ mi. 14Boe kɔ̃ bunyina kĩ bɔtsã wuda kamɛ buwo nɛ nkpã kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ bɔawɛ akũ kalɛ. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaáwɛ oti kalɛ ni, ɛkahɔ nɛ wuda kamɛ. 15Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakesĩ ɔwaɛ̃ ni, owudini yanɛ, ade minyina kĩ nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna a lɛláa owudini odima kamɛ a.
16Ade limii bɔ́anyi ayekĩ ɔdɔ la a. Kristo kɔa ye nkpã ɛbɔa afɔliɛ nɛ boe lɔlɔ, foesũ kɛnɛ kĩ boe malo bɔkɔa boe nkpã bɔbɔa afɔliɛ nɛ boe bawaɛ̃ lɔlɔ. 17Ntɛ odi deĩ akũ fɔtsa mɔ ɛmɔ́ ɔwaɛ̃ kĩ kisĩ ye lɛmɛ fɔtákɔ ye kɔnya kĩ yabumɔ ɔwaɛ̃ a ni, nde yaapuli ɛlɛ nɛ ye ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kĩ yawɛ Baguma kalɛ? 18Yĩ babi, mitafɔ̃ bɔkɔa fɔlɛtsa mɔ kɔdzɛla kalɛ pupulidza bɔwɛ oti kalɛ, mbom mifɔ̃ boe oti kawɛ kɛna nɛ boe fɔkɛlatsa mɔ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ.
Bɔ́apuli Budo Ɔwɔlɛ Nɛ Baguma Anɛ.
19Fɔtsɛ̃ fukĩĩ akũ bunyina kĩ bɔnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali a bade, ade bɔ́apuli budo ɔwɔlɛ nɛ Baguma anɛ a. 20Ntɛ boe tɔwɔlɛ kɔ boe kɔtɔ malo ni, bunyina kĩ Baguma bɛ̃ boe tɔwɔlɛ ade enyina lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a.
21Yĩ bawaɛ̃ kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ, ntɛ boe tɔwɔlɛ lákɔ boe kɔtɔ ni, kekɔ̃ bunyina kĩ bɔ́ado ɔwɔlɛ nɛ Baguma anɛ, 22lɔkɔa bɔtɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ buvia a butomɛna ye sɛkɛ̃, kitonɛkĩ bɔakɛna nɛ ye mbla akũ, ade bɔakɛna fɔtsa fɔawo ye anɛ a. 23Ye mbla a nyɛ kĩ bɔtɛ ye Obi Yesu Kristo budo, lɔkɔa bɔwɛ akũ kalɛ ndɛ ayekĩ Kristo wɛ etomɛna boe sɛkɛ̃ a. 24Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna nɛ Baguma mbla akũ a, edeĩ nɛ Baguma kamɛ, ade Baguma lɛmɛ deĩ nɛ ye kamɛ a. Hũhũ a kĩ Baguma kpa boe sũ ni, bunyina kĩ edeĩ nɛ boe kamɛ.

Title: 1 YOHANES 4
Content:
Ɔnɔkɔali Hũhũ Mɔ Fɔvã Hũhũ.
1Yĩ bakɔba kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ, mitatɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yalɛ kĩ Baguma Hũhũ deĩ nɛ ye kamɛ mido, mbom misɔ ye midã ntɛ hũhũ a kĩ edeĩ nɛ ye kamɛ a to Baguma sɛkɛ̃. Kitonɛkĩ fɔvã onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ pii nɛ bɛtsɛ̃ bamini nɛ katinya kamɛ. 2Ade fukĩĩ míakɔa minyi ntɛ Hũhũ a to Baguma sɛkɛ̃ a. Hũhũ adi nyɛ adi kĩ yalɛ kĩ Yesu Kristo ya nɛ katinya kamɛ ndɛ otidziwa aye ni, eto Baguma sɛkɛ̃. 3Lɛmɛ hũhũ adi nyɛ adi kĩ yaádi Yesu akũ adansiɛ ni, ɛtáto Baguma sɛkɛ̃. Ade ekĩĩ nyɛ Kristo okesĩnɛ hũhũ a kĩ minu kĩ yaaya a, ade finyaakĩĩ malo ɛya edeĩ nɛ katinya kamɛ kɔkɔɛ.
4Lɛmɛ yĩ babi, Baguma bade mianɛ, ade minya fɔvã onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a akũ, kitonɛkĩ Hũhũ a kĩ edeĩ nɛ mi kamɛ a bɛ̃ hũhũ a kĩ edeĩ nɛ katinya kamɛ bati kamɛ a. 5Ayekĩ katinya kamɛ bati banɛ sũ ni, fɔvã onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a alɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ katinya kamɛ fɔtsa odi akũ, ade katinya kamɛ bati a atse be ɔlɛdo a. 6Lɛmɛ boe kɔ̃ ni, Baguma bade bɔanɛ. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛnyina Baguma ni, yatse boe ɔlɛdo, lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛnyɛ́ Baguma ode ni, yaátse boe. Foesũ fukĩĩ bɔ́akɔa bɔmɔ́ ɔnɔkɔali Hũhũ mɔ fɔvã hũhũ.
Baguma Nyɛ Ɔdɔ.
7Bakɔba kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ, mifɔ̃ bɔwɛ akũ kalɛ, kitonɛkĩ Baguma sɛkɛ̃ ɔdɔ to. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ bati kalɛ ni, Baguma obi yanɛ ade enyina Baguma a. 8Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaáwɛ bati kalɛ ni, enyína Baguma kitonɛkĩ Baguma nyɛ ɔdɔ. 9Ayekĩ Baguma nyɛ ye ɔdɔ ɛtsa boe nyɛ kĩ edo ye Obi mɔapɛ nɛ katinya kamɛ, fɔtsɛ̃ ye akũ ni, bɔna nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna a. 10Ade fukĩĩ kamɛ bunyi lɛtsa a kĩ liti lɛnyɛ ɔdɔ a. Nnɛ́ ayekĩ bɔwɛ Baguma kalɛ, mbom ayekĩ Baguma wɛ boe kalɛ, edo ye Obi kĩ ɛnya oti kĩ yaatsã ye akũ ɛkɔa boe tɔkpa ete boe.
11Yĩ bakɔba kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ, ntɛ aye Baguma wɛ boe kalɛ kɔ̃ ni, kɛfɛta kĩ boe malo bɔawɛ akũ akũ kalɛ. 12Odima támɔ tɔ̃ Baguma. Lɛmɛ ntɛ bɔawɛ akũ akũ kalɛ ni, kekɔ̃ Baguma deĩ nɛ boe kamɛ, ade ɛkɛna ye ɔdɔ a ɛkpɔla nɛ boe kamɛ a.
13Bɔtɛ budo kĩ budeĩ nɛ Baguma kamɛ, ade ye malo edeĩ nɛ boe kamɛ a, kitonɛkĩ ɛkɔa ye mɔawɛ Hũhũ ɛkpa boe. 14Bɔmɔ́ fukĩĩ ade bude lɛtsã nɛ foe akũ bɔkpa bati kĩ Ɔlɛga a do ye Obi kĩ ɛyaanya katinya kamɛ Ɔtɛnɛ. 15Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ebinya ye kamɛ ɛlɛ kĩ Yesu nyɛ Baguma Obi ni, Baguma deĩ nɛ ye kamɛ ade ke ye malo edeĩ nɛ Baguma kamɛ a. 16Boe mɔawɛ a bunyina ade bɔtɛ Baguma ɔdɔ a kĩ edeĩ ɛkpa boe a budo a.
Baguma nyɛ ɔdɔ, ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ bati kalɛ ni, edeĩ nɛ Baguma kamɛ ade Baguma lɛmɛ deĩ nɛ ye kamɛ a. 17Ade fukĩĩ kamɛ ɔdɔ a aakpɔla nɛ boe kamɛ ayekĩ bɔ́ado ɔwɔlɛ nɛ Kadzɛ Luwi a akũ, kitonɛkĩ boe nkpã kadzi kamɛ nɛ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ ketimɔ Kristo ade a. 18Libe lɛláa ɔdɔ kamɛ, mbom ɔdɔ a kĩ ɛkpɔla a, ablɔmɛna libe nɛ bati kamɛ. Nɛ foesũ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yavila ni, ye ɔdɔ tákpɔla kitonɛkĩ libe mɔ sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ tsɛ̃.
19Bɔawɛ Baguma kalɛ kitonɛkĩ ye lɛnya lɔtɔ ɛwɛ boe kalɛ. 20Ntɛ odi lɛ kĩ, “Mawɛ Baguma kalɛ” lɛmɛ yakesĩ ɔwaɛ̃ ni, ɔvãlɛvã yanɛ. Kitonɛkĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaáwɛ ɔwaɛ̃ a kĩ yamɔ mɔ anɛ kalɛ a, lɛláapuli ɛwɛ Baguma kĩ yaámɔ mɔ anɛ a kalɛ. 21Mbla a kĩ Kristo kpa boe nyɛ kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ Baguma kalɛ ni, ɛwɛ ɔwaɛ̃ lɛmɛ kalɛ.

Title: 1 YOHANES 5
Content:
Bɔnya Katinya Kamɛ Akũ.
1Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ edo kĩ Yesu nyɛ Kristo a ni, Baguma obi yanɛ. Ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ obilɛga kalɛ ni, yawɛ ye obi lɛmɛ kalɛ. 2Foesũ ntɛ bɔawɛ Baguma kalɛ mɔ bɔakɛna nɛ ye mbla akũ ni, kekɔ̃ bunyina kĩ bɔawɛ Baguma babi lɛmɛ kalɛ. 3Ntɛ bɔkɛna nɛ Baguma mbla a akũ ni, fɔatsa kĩ bɔawɛ ye kalɛ. Baguma mbla akũ kakɛna lɛlá ɔsĩ ɛkpa boe, 4kitonɛkĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛnyɛ Baguma obi anya katinya kamɛ akũ. Lɛtsa a kĩ bɔkɔa bɔnya katinya akũ nyɛ boe katɛkado. 5Owei aapuli ɛnya katinya akũ kɛba oti a kĩ ɛtɛ edo kĩ Yesu nyɛ Baguma Obi a?
Adansiɛ Kadi Nɛ Yesu Kristo Akũ.
6Yesu Kristo nyɛ oti kĩ ɛtsã mui mɔ babɔanɛ kamɛ ɛya nɛ katinya kamɛ. Ɛtáya nɛ mui odi kamɛ mbom ɛya nɛ mui mɔ babɔanɛ kamɛ. Ade Baguma Hũhũ a mɔawɛ adi adansiɛ kĩ ɔnɔkɔali fɔanɛ, kitonɛkĩ Hũhũ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali a. 7Adansifɔ ɛlalɛ deĩ. 8Ade be nyɛ Hũhũ a, mui a mɔ babɔanɛ a. Be ɛlalɛ a flee alɛ onukpɛ̃ mɔa. 9Bɔtɛ otidziwa adansiɛ kadi a budo, lɛmɛ Baguma adansiɛ kadi a deĩ kɔbɛ̃ kɛbɛ̃, kitonɛkĩ ye lidi adansiɛ nɛ ye Obi akũ. 10Foesũ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ Baguma Obi a edo ni, adansiɛ kadi kĩĩ deĩ nɛ ye ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ. Lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtátɛ Baguma edo ni, ɛfɔ̃ Baguma dani ɔvãlɛvã, kitonɛkĩ ɛtátɛ adansiɛ a kĩ Baguma di nɛ ye Obi akũ a edo. 11Adansiɛ kadi a nyɛ kĩ, Baguma kpa boe nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a, ade nkpã kĩĩ lɛmɛ deĩ nɛ ye Obi kamɛ a. 12Odi nyɛ odi kĩ edeĩ Baguma Obi a ni, edeĩ nkpã kĩĩ. Ade aye odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛlá Obi a ni, ɛlá nkpã kĩĩ.
Nkpã Kĩ Ɛlá Kawũna.
13Ntsɛlɛ ovoli kĩĩ mama mi a kĩ mitɛ Baguma Obi a mido, ayekĩ míanyi kĩ mideĩ nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna a. 14Budeĩ ɔwɔlɛ kado nɛ Baguma anɛ kitonɛkĩ ntɛ buvia ye lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa nɛ ye kawɛ onukpɛ̃ ni, yatse boe. 15Ntɛ bunyina kĩ yatse lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bɔavia ye ni, kekɔ̃ bunyina lɛmɛ kĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ bɔavia ni, bɔatɛ katomɛna ye sɛkɛ̃.
16Ntɛ odi mɔ ɔwaɛ̃ kĩ yakɛna tɔkpa kĩ tɛláakpã ye tɛnamɛna wuda kamɛ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ yabɔa mpaɛ ɛkpa Baguma lɔkɔa yaakpa ye nkpã. Bati a kĩ bakɛna tɔkpa a kĩ taávɛlɛ wuda kayamɛna a fɔlɛtsa malɛ. Lɛmɛ tɔkpa tidi deĩ kĩ takpã oti kanamɛna wuda kamɛ, nlámɛna kalɛ kĩ mibɔa mpaɛ mikpa Baguma nɛ te akũ. 17Lɛkɛnana kpa lidi nyɛ lidi nyɛ tɔkpa, lɛmɛ tɔkpa tidi deĩ kĩ taánamɛna oti wuda kamɛ.
18Bunyina kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛnyɛ Baguma obi ládzi kakɛna tɔkpa, kitonɛkĩ Baguma Obi a adãmɛna ye akũ, ade Okesĩnɛ a lɛláapuli ɛkɛna ye ablɔ adima a.
19Bunyina kĩ Baguma bade bɔanɛ, ade katinya kamɛ flee lɛmɛ deĩ nɛ Okesĩnɛ a kɔbɛ̃ kayɔ. 20Bunyina kĩ Baguma Obi a ya, ade ɛkpa boe fɔlɛtsa kayɔkanu ayekĩ bɔ́anyi Baguma a kĩ ɛnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali a. Budzi nkpã nɛ ɔnɔkɔali Baguma a kamɛ, budzi nkpã nɛ Obi Yesu Kristo lɛmɛ kamɛ. Ade ye nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali Baguma mɔ nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a.
21Yĩ babi, mivɛlɛ mi akũ nɛ baviɔ̃ ɔwɛ̃.

Title: 2 YOHANES 1
Content:
1Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ, asɔli lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a sɛkɛ̃. Ntsɛlɛ ye mamɛna boe Ɔma a kĩ Baguma pau, mɔ ye babi a kĩ mawɛ kalɛ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ a. Nnɛ́ yĩ odi awɛ mi kalɛ mbom bati a kĩ binyina ɔnɔkɔali a flee lɛmɛ, 2kitonɛkĩ ɔnɔkɔali a deĩ nɛ boe kamɛ ade yaana nɛ boe kamɛ daa a.
3Baguma boe Ɔlɛga mɔ Yesu Kristo, kĩ ɛnyɛ Ɔlɛga a Obi a bɛmɔ boe kɔnya, bɛkɛna boe sɛmɛ kalɛ, bɛkpa boe lukudɔ lɛmɛ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali mɔ ɔdɔ kamɛ.
Midzi Nɛ Ɔnɔkɔali Mɔ Ɔdɔ Kamɛ.
4Kawɔlɛ de yĩ paa kĩ mmɔ́ nɔ babi badi kĩ bidzi nkpã nɛ ɔnɔkɔali a kamɛ, ndɛ ayekĩ Ɔlɛga a wɛ etomɛna boe sɛkɛ̃ a. 5Nɛ foesũ, boe Ɔma, ntsɛlɛ ovoli kĩĩ makpa mi kĩ bɔwɛ akũ akũ kalɛ. Nnɛ́ mbla vɔɛ̃ yanɛ ntsɛlɛ mama mi, mbom mbla a kĩ bɔtɛ kito anɛ kayɔkayi a yanɛ. 6Ɔdɔ a kĩ ye akũ fɔlɛtsa malɛ a nyɛ kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ bɔakɛna nɛ Baguma mbla a akũ. Mbla a kĩ ye mi flee minu kito anɛ kayɔkayi a nyɛ kĩ mi flee midzi nɛ ɔdɔ kamɛ.
7Bati bakɛnɛ pii gba bɛtsɛ̃ nɛ katinya kamɛ, bati kĩ baálɛ kĩ Yesu Kristo ya nɛ katinya kamɛ ndɛ otidziwa aye. Oti a na odu nyɛ bati ɔkɛnɛ mɔ Kristo okesĩnɛ. 8Foesũ midã kadã wĩ kĩ miláayɛla lɛtsa a kĩ mipili mina a, mbom kĩ míana mi kɔtɔkase lodo.
9Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtápi Kristo fɔtsa katsa edomɔ akũ mɔ ɛtsa fɔtsa bɛbã ni, Baguma lɛláa ye kamɛ. Lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ epi foe edomɔ akũ ni, Ɔlɛga mɔ Obi a flee deĩ nɛ ye kamɛ. 10Nɛ foesũ ntɛ odi ya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ mɔ ɛtákɔa fɔtsa katsa kĩĩ ɛyamɛna ni, mitatɛ ye nɛ mi tɔtɔ kamɛ. Mitatunɔ ye kawɔ̃na titau malo, 11kitonɛkĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ etunɔ ye kawɔ̃na a, na tsɛfã nɛ ye tɔkpa a kĩ ɛkɛna a kamɛ.
Yohanes Fɔlɛtsa Nkaɛ.
12Ndeĩ fɔlɛtsa pii kufɛ kĩ maatsɛlɛ mma mi, lɛmɛ ntáwɛ kĩ mate foe nɛ ovoli akũ. Nɛ foe kadokɔ̃ ni, madã anɛ kĩ yĩ mɔawɛ maaya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃, bɔlɔmɛna anɛ mɔ anɛ, ayekĩ boe flee kawɔlɛkamɔ a aakpɔla.
13Awaɛ̃tsole a kĩ Baguma pau a babi awɔ̃na mi.

Title: 3 YOHANES 1
Content:
1Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ, asɔli lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ sɛkɛ̃. Ntsɛlɛ ye mamɛna Gayo kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ, kĩ mawɛ kalɛ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ lɛmɛ.
2Yĩ ɔkɔba kĩ maátunɔ nɔ kalɛ, mabɔa mpaɛ kĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa lɛlɛ lɛkpa nɔ, kana akũ ɔsĩ lɛmɛ. Matɛ kado kĩ nɔ hũhũ lɛmɛ deĩ kadeĩ wĩ. 3Mmɔ́ kawɔlɛ paa kĩ boe bakɔba batɛ badonɛ badi yabi yĩ ayekĩ opini ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a ndɛ ayekĩ opi ke kɔkɔɛ a. 4Kĩ nnu kĩ yĩ babi dzi nkpã nɛ ɔnɔkɔali a onukpɛ̃ a, mmɔ́ kawɔlɛ paa.
Batɛ Badonɛ a Mu Gayo.
5Yĩ ɔkɔba kĩ maátunɔ nɔ kalɛ, adi ɔnɔkɔali paa nɛ adzuma a kĩ akɛna a kamɛ kakpa nɔ bakɔba batɛ badonɛ, titiliwu banɔvɔɛ̃. 6Bɛyabɔa asɔli bati a amaniɛ nɛ ɔdɔ a kĩ odeĩ ɔkpa be a akũ. Make nɔ aduli kĩ bumɔ be ndɛ ayekĩ fɔtɛta nɛ Baguma adzuma kakɛna kamɛ, lɔkɔa bɛnaa lɔtɔ nɛ be osi katsã kamɛ. 7Kitonɛkĩ Kristo adzuma sũ bipi osi ade bɛtátɛ kabumɛna kadima bitomɛna amamufɔ a sɛkɛ̃ a. 8Foesũ kɛnɛ kĩ bɔabumɛna bati kĩĩ odu ayekĩ bɔ́anyɛ bɔtsa kĩ bɔmɔ́ be flee bɔnyɛ bakɔba nɛ adzuma kakɛna kamɛ bɔkpa ɔnɔkɔali a.
Yohanes Lɛ Kalɛ Nɛ Diotrefo Mɔ Demetrio Akũ.
9Ntsɛlɛ ovoli lukũ mmɛna asɔli bati a, lɛmɛ Diotrefo kĩ ɛbɔɛ ye akũ ndɛ lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ aye, tábu yĩ edo nɛ lɛtsama kamɛ. 10Foesũ ntɛ ĩya ni, maavɛlɛ mi adzuni nnamɛna lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ ɛkɛna akũ. Maalɛ fɔtsa kpa a kĩ yalɛ nɛ boe akũ mɔ fɔvã a kĩ yama a! Nnɛ́ foe odi. Esĩ kĩ yaátɛ Kristofɔ a kĩ bayaa nɛ awã a, ade yasua bikĩ bawɛ kĩ batɛ be a osi malo a. Yabɔa mbɔdi kĩ yablɔmɛna bati a nɛ asɔli a kamɛ.
11Yĩ ɔkɔba kĩ maátunɔ nɔ kalɛ, tatomɔ tɔkpa liti, mbom tomɛna fɔtsa wĩ liti. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna tuwĩ ni, Baguma ode yanɛ. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna tɔkpa ni, ɛtámɔ Baguma eyi ɔsũ.
12Odi nyɛ odi abɔa Demetrio dĩ wĩ. Ye ɔbla alɛ kalɛ wĩ nɛ ye akũ. Boe malo bɔadi adansiɛ nɛ ye akũ, ade minyina kĩ lɛtsa a kĩ bɔalɛ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali a.
Yohanes Kawɔ̃na Nkaɛ.
13Ndeĩ fɔlɛtsa pii kĩ mawɛ kĩ mabi nɔ, lɛmɛ nláakɔa fɔtsa katsɛlɛ otse mɔ katsɛlɛ mui ntsɛlɛ foe. 14Lɛmɛ matɛ kado kĩ owi lɛláabuna mɔ maamɔ nɔ, lɔkɔa bɔ́alɔmɛna nɛ foe akũ anɛ mɔ anɛ.
15Lukudɔ lɛna mɔ nɔ.
Nɔ bakɔba flee nɛ awĩ awɔ̃na nɔ. Wɔ̃na boe bakɔba a ɔmɔa ɔmɔa nɛ awã kakpa boe.

Title: YUDA 1
Content:
1Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ, Yuda, Yesu Kristo ɔsumunɛ a kĩ ĩnyɛ Yakobo ɔwaɛ̃ a sɛkɛ̃. Ntsɛlɛ ye mamɛna bati a kĩ Baguma vɛ, kĩ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga awɛ be kalɛ, ade yadãmɛna be akũ kayi Yesu Kristo a. 2Baguma kɔnyakamɔ, ye lukudɔ mɔ ye ɔdɔ ɛpɔ nɛ mi akũ ebu.
Lubo a Kĩ Fɔvã Fɔtsa Batsanɛ Aayamɔ.
3Yĩ bakɔba kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ, titɔ kĩ mbɔa mbɔdi kĩ matsɛlɛ mi ovoli nɛ ayekĩ Baguma kpa boe flee nkpã a akũ malo ni, finyaa fɔyasĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ ntsɛlɛ mi ovoli mɔatsɛ nkɔa ndo mi kɔbɛ̃ mipuli mipili katɛkado osi a. Ade katɛkado kĩĩ Baguma kɔa ɛkpa ye bati a deedimɔapɛ a. 4Kitonɛkĩ bati kĩ baávila Baguma badi bɛla pɛtɛɛ biwo nɛ mi kamɛ nɛ mi katanyi kamɛ. Bɛdani boe ɔlɛdo a kĩ bɔtɛ nɛ ayekĩ Baguma amɔ oti kɔnya akũ a, batsa fɔtsa bɛbã kĩ fɔkpa be osi bɛbɔa ɔbla kpa. Bisĩ boe Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔapɛ kĩ ɛnyɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo. Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ eyi anɛ titiiti kĩ Baguma aakɔ be kɔtɔ lɔmɔ.
5Titɔ kĩ minyina fukĩĩ flee kɔkɔɛ malo ni, mawɛ kĩ makai mi kĩ boe Ɔlate a nyɛ Israelfɔ etomɛna Egiptefɔ tite akũ, lɛmɛ ke liti a, ɛwɔla bikĩ bɛtátɛ ye bido a. 6Mite anɛ kĩ Baguma ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ a kĩ bɛtákɛna nɛ otumi a kĩ bɛkpa be a akũ kakɛna wĩ, mbom bɛdzakũ nɛ be mɔawɛ fudzikɔ̃ a, Baguma do be nɛ nkɔsɔnkɔsɔ kamɛ daa nɛ ɔtũ kpli kamɛ, kĩ bɛna nɛ awã kɛnaawo Luwi Kpale a kĩ yaadzɛmɔ be ɛkɔ be kɔtɔ. 7Ade ayea Sodom mɔ Gomora mɔ tɛmatɔ a kĩ tifuã te a, bati kɔa be akũ bɛkpa adɔpaa mɔ ɔbla kpa mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ a. Baguma kɔa be edo nɛ fi kĩ fɔádĩ da kamɛ kĩ fɔnya nfantuhũ fɔkpa bati flee.
8Ade ayea fɔda bawanɛ kĩĩ akɛna tɔkpa nɛ be mɔawɛ sukɛna akũ malo a. Baábu Baguma otumi a kĩ yanya be akũ a, ade balɛ tuwuli kpa nɛ ode fɔtsa a kĩ obu deĩ nɛ foe akũ a akũ. 9Baguma Ode Fɔtɔ Ɔnyanɛnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee Mikael malo tákɛna fukĩĩ odu. Kĩ ye mɔ Abonsam bɛvɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa nɛ be kamɛ oti a kĩ ye aabɔɛ Mose ɔnɔkpa akũ malo ni, ɛtádo ɔwɔlɛ ɛlɛ tuwuli kpa ɛkɔ Abonsam kɔtɔ, mbom ɛlɛ kĩ, “Ɔlate a ɛkã nɔ anɛ.” 10Lɛmɛ bati kĩĩ alɛ fuvũnatsa nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ bɛtánu de kayɔ a akũ, ade fɔtsa a kĩ binyina bitomɛna be kabɔa kamɛ ndɛ ayekĩ tuwĩ kamɛ bayaɛ kĩ bɛlá adzuni a malo nyina a, ade foe mɔapɛ a awɔla be a.
11Bɔbɔɛ makpa be! Bɛtsã osi a kĩ Kain tsã a. Nɛ sika a kĩ baana sũ ni, bɛkɔa be akũ bido nɛ tɔkpa a kĩ Balam kɛna a kamɛ. Biyidza bɛdza nɛ Baguma mbla a akũ ndɛ Kora aye, ade ke bɛwɔla be ndɛ ye aye a.
12Ntɛ mikpɔta mianya boe Ɔlate ɔdɔ funitsã a, bati kĩĩ nyɛ efĩĩ nɛ mi kamɛ, awã kĩ baányɔã kanya mɔ kamɔa kpafũũ nɛ Baguma anɛ. Be odi akũ badãmɛna. Bɛla ndɛ luflututu kĩ oni lɛláa de kamɛ, kĩ ɔwɛ abɔa de katɛ̃mɛna. Bɛla ndɛ futse kĩ fɔáwũ babi nɛ kawũ lɔkɔ, ndɛ futse kĩ bɛbɔlɛ mɔ tunu fuku, fuku fubuli. 13Bɛla ndɛ mpo mui kĩ ɔwɛ mɔ ɔsĩ abɔa be bafũ kanyɛ be fɔnyɔãtsa katsa ndɛ mui anɛ kuvũ aye. Bɛla ndɛ fusibii kĩ fɔato katɛ̃, bati kĩ Baguma manɛ kadzikɔ̃ ɛkpa be nɛ ɔtũ kpli kamɛ, awã kĩ baana daa.
14Ade bati kĩĩ akũ Henok kĩ ɛnyɛ Adam kasinu kavũkɔnɔde a oti lɛ eyi kɔkɔɔkɔɛ kĩ, “Ɔlate a mɔ ye ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ kpalɛwa mpim mpim aya, 15ɛyaadzɛmɔ katinya kamɛ bati flee. Yaakɔ bati a kĩ baávila Baguma a kɔtɔ nɛ fɔtsa kpa a kĩ bɛkɛna, mɔ tuwuli kpa a kĩ bɛlɛ nɛ ye akũ a sũ.” 16Bati kĩĩ akɛna hũhũhũhũ daa, kanyɛ nfumusu kakpa bati bɛbã. Batomɛna be mɔawɛ fɔwɛtsa kpa liti, bapia akũ, ade bakɛ bati mɔ sɛmɛ mɛnɛmɛnɛ ayekĩ baana lɛtsa a kĩ de bawɛ a.
Osi Kasua Mɔ Kɔdɛ Kakpa.
17Lɛmɛ mi yĩ bakɔba, mite anɛ nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo fɔtɔ banyanɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ lɛyatɛ̃ kamɛ a akũ. 18Bibi mi kĩ, “Nɛ fuwi nkaɛ a kamɛ ni, bati aanɛ, bidi mi nsekuo, bitomɛna be sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kĩ fɔakɔ odo liti nɛ Baguma katavila kamɛ.” 19Ade be nyɛ bati kĩ basɛ̃ bati kamɛ a, bati kĩ katinya kamɛ fɔwɛtsa nya be akũ, mɔ bati kĩ Hũhũ a lɛláa be kamɛ.
20Lɛmɛ mi yĩ bakɔba, mi kɔ̃ ni, mikaabo anɛ nɛ mi katɛkado kĩ kɛnyɛ mi fɔtsa kpalɛwa a kamɛ, lɔkɔa mibɔa mpaɛ nɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a kɔbɛ̃ kamɛ. 21Mikɔla mi akũ nɛ Baguma ɔdɔ kamɛ, nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ miadzɔlɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo kɔnyakamɔ a kĩ kɔayakpa mi nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a.
22Mimɔ́ be kamɛ bikĩ bɛtásipi nɛ katɛkado kamɛ a kɔnya. 23Bati bɛbã a kĩ banaa fi kamɛ a ni, miwãnɛ be minyɛ, mitɛ be nkpã. Mimɔ́ bati bɛbã kɔnya lɛmɛ mivila be, lɔkɔa mikesĩ be fɔkɛlatsa ndɛ ayekĩ míawɛ̃ sukɛna tɛtadiɛ kpitii a.
Kɔlɛkanyɛ Mpaɛbɔ.
24Baguma a kĩ yaapuli epi mi ayekĩ miláatɔ, ɛkpã mi nɛ kawɔlɛ kamɛ minaawo ye kukũkpalɛ a anɛ, kĩ nfumusu adima lɛláa mi akũ. 25Baguma odi keĩ kĩ ɛtsã boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo akũ ɛkɛna ye boe Ɔtɛnɛ a, ade ye mɔ obu, kamu, kɔbɛ̃ mɔ otumi nyɛ ye fude a, kito anɛ kɔkɔɛ, mɔ finyaa kanaa daa. Fɔya lɔmɔ.

Title: KANYƐ KATSA 1
Content:
1Ovoli kĩĩ kamɛ fɔlɛtsa nyɛ Yesu Kristo kanyɛ katsa a kĩ Baguma kpa ye, kĩ ɛnyɛ ɛtsa ye basumunɛ nɛ fɔtsa a kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ fɔya nɛ lɔkɔ lukũ kamɛ a akũ. Kristo tsã ye ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ akũ ɛfɔ̃ ye ɔsumunɛ Yohanes nyi fɔtsa kĩĩ flee. 2Yohanes lɛmɛ lɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ɛmɔ a flee. Edi adansiɛ nɛ Baguma kalɛ a mɔ ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a kĩ Yesu Kristo nyɛ ɛtsa ye a akũ. 3Baguma ahila oti a kĩ yakã ovoli kĩĩ, mɔ bati a kĩ batse fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi, kĩ bɛkɛna nɛ foe akũ lɛmɛ a, kitonɛkĩ lɔkɔ a wo ɔtɔ kĩ fɔtsa kĩĩ flee fɔya nɛ foe kamɛ.
Yohanes Wɔ̃na Tɛsɔli Evũkɔnɔ a.
4Yĩ, Yohanes, lamɛna fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ katsɛlɛ kamɛna mi tɛsɔli evũkɔnɔ a kĩ tideĩ nɛ Asia amantam kamɛ a.
Baguma kĩ edzi nkpã, kĩ ɛna kɔkɔɛ, kĩ yaaya a, ɛmɔ mi kɔnya, ɛkpa mi lukudɔ. Ade ayea hũhũ evũkɔnɔ a kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ ye lɛgãkpo anɛ a, 5mɔ Yesu Kristo ɔnɔkɔali ɔdansini, kĩ ɛnyɛ bati a kĩ Baguma dzɛla etomɛna kanɔkpa kamɛ ɔtɔnyade, kĩ yanya tite akũ fɔgã flee akũ a, bɛmɔ mi kɔnya bɛkpa mi lukudɔ lɛmɛ.
Yawɛ boe kalɛ ade ɛtsã ye wuda kamɛ ɛnyɛ boe etomɛna tɔkpa kamɛ. 6Oti a kĩ eyi lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ ɛkpa boe kĩ bɔnya basɔfɔ busum ye Baguma mɔ Ɔlɛga a, ade ye mɔ mikɔa kukũkpalɛ mɔ kɔbɛ̃ mikpa daa daa! Fɔya lɔmɔ.
7Midã, ɛtsɛ̃ nɛ luflututu akũ yaya!
Odi nyɛ odi aamɔ ye,
ade bati a kĩ bɛtsɔɛ ye lɔtsɔɛ nɛ sɛklabi a lɛmɛ aamɔ ye.
Tite akũ bati flee aawula babe yoo nɛ ye akũ!
Ade aye kɛnɛ kĩ fɔna a!
Fɔya lɔmɔ.
8Boe Ɔlate, Baguma Kpale, kĩ edzi nkpã, kĩ ɛna kɔkɔɛ, kĩ yaaya a, lɛ kĩ, “Yĩ nyɛ Ɔtɔnyade mɔ Owũnade.”
Kristo Kanyɛ Katsa.
9Yĩ, Yohanes, mi ɔwaɛ̃ kĩ bɔmɔ́ mi bɔtsã butomɛna Yesu a, ĩnyɛ mi ɔkɔba kĩ bɔdɔla boe akũ, bɔmɔ́ lubo a kĩ laya kakpa bikĩ bɛnyɛ ye ode lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ bade a. Bɛkɔa yĩ bɛnadzina nɛ tite nɛ mui kayite a kĩ bavɛ Patmos a akũ, kitonɛkĩ nde lɛtsã nɛ Baguma kalɛ a, mɔ ɔnɔkɔali a kĩ Yesu nyɛ ɛtsa a akũ sũ. 10Nɛ boe Ɔlate Luwi a akũ ni, Hũhũ a tɛ yĩ kamɛ, ade nnu odo kɔɔba kĩ ɛnɛ́ ndɛ kagbulɛɛ aye, ade ɛkalɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ yĩ liti a. 11Odo a lɛ kĩ, “Tsɛlɛ lɛtsa a kĩ ɔmɔ́ a kayi, lɔkɔa kakɔa ovoli a kamɛna tɛsɔli a kĩ tideĩ nɛ tɛmatɔ tɛkpale tɛkpale evũkɔnɔ kĩĩ kamɛ. Ade te nyɛ Efeso, Smirna, Pergamo, Tiatira, Sardis, Filadelfia mɔ Laodikea a.”
12Ndani anɛ kĩ madã oti a kĩ ɛlamɛna yĩ kalɛ kabi a, ade mmɔ́ sika ngbã ɔsɛdza titse evũkɔnɔ a. 13Litsedi kĩ lɛla ndɛ Otidziwa Obi aye kĩ edo atadiɛ wulaa kĩ ɛka eko nɛ ye fɔnɛta, ade ɛkɔa sika ngbã abɔsɔ ɛbɔa nɛ ɔwɔlɛ a. 14Ye lɔlɔ tɔlɔ voe fitaa ndɛ kuveli tɛtsã ĩye ndɛ lɛdãglɛglɛ aye, ade ye banebi ata ndɛ fi luwotu aye a. 15Ye fɔnɛta ata ndɛ kɔɔble kĩ bɛvɔlɛ nɛ fi kamɛ, ade ye odo anɛ ndɛ ɔwɔ mui kĩ baka kato ɔtɔ akũ kako waa nɛ lutubu kamɛ a. 16Ɛnɛɛ fusibii evũkɔnɔ nɛ ye sɔmɔna awɛ, ade atugbe mɔ ɔbɔ̃ lɛmɛ nɛ eto ye onukpɛ̃ kamɛ a, ade anɛ kamɛ amɔanɛ ndɛ suwa ketee aye a.
17Kĩ mmɔ́ ye a, nnɛ́ ntɔ nɛ ye abɔa kamɛ ndɛ oti kĩ eku, ade ɛkɔa ye sɔmɔna awɛ ete nɛ yĩ akũ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Tavila! Yĩ nyɛ Ɔtɔnyade mɔ Owũnade, 18mɔ oti a kĩ edzi nkpã! Nku tɔ̃ lɛmɛ finyaa ndzi nkpã daa. Wuda mɔ kanɔkpade tɛsafi deĩ nɛ yĩ awɛ. 19Foesũ tsɛlɛ fɔtsa a kĩ ɔmɔ́, fukĩ fudeĩ finyaa mɔ fukĩ fɔ́aya nɛ foe kamɛ ke liti a kayi. 20Kalɛ kɔlawa kĩ kideĩ nɛ fusibii evũkɔnɔ a kĩ ɔmɔ́ nɛ yĩ sɔmɔna awɛ, mɔ sika ngbã ɔsɛdza titse evũkɔnɔ a kayɔ nyɛ. Fusibii evũkɔnɔ a nyɛ tɛsɔli evũkɔnɔ a ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ, ade ɔsɛdza titse evũkɔnɔ a lɛmɛ nyɛ́ tɛsɔli evũkɔnɔ a.”

Title: KANYƐ KATSA 2
Content:
Baguma Ɔlɛdo a Kĩ Ɛkpa Efeso Asɔli a.
1“Tsɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kama Efeso asɔli a ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a.
Ade oti a kĩ epini fusibii evũkɔnɔ nɛ ye sɔmɔna, kĩ ɛtsɛ̃ nɛ sika ngbã ɔsɛdza titse evũkɔnɔ kayite a ɔlɛdo nɛ awĩ a.
2Ĩnyina nɔ adzuma flee mɔ ayekĩ ɔbɔa mbɔdi odo ɔwɔlɛ ɔmɔ́ lubo. Ĩnyina kĩ aáwɛ bati kpa fɔlɛtsa kalɛ. Ɔsɔ bati a kĩ bavɛ be akũ kĩ fɔtɔ banyanɛ lɛmɛ bɛnyɛ́ fɔtɔ banyanɛ a ɔdã, ade ɔmɔ́ oyi ɔsũ kĩ bavãlɛvã banɛ a. 3Ĩnyina ayekĩ ɔna ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ ɔmɔ́ lubo nɛ yĩ sũ, lɛmɛ akpɔ táveli nɔ.
4Lɛmɛ ndeĩ kalɛ kadi nɛ nɔ akũ. Ade ke nyɛ kĩ aáwɛ yĩ kalɛ finyaa ndɛ ayekĩ ɔnya lɔtɔ ɔwɛ yĩ kalɛ a. 5Nɛ foesũ ni, te anɛ nɛ nɔ kadzakɔ̃ a kĩ ɔdza oto ɔtɔ a akũ! Dani ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ lɔkɔa kakɛna lɛtsa a kĩ ɔnya lɔtɔ ɔkɛna a. Ntɛ ɔtádani ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kɔ̃ ni, maaya nɛ nɔ sɛkɛ̃ ĩyaabɔɛ nɔ ɔsɛdza otse a nɛ ye kadzakɔ̃. 6Lɛmɛ lɛtsa a kĩ odeĩ kĩ lawo yĩ anɛ nyɛ kĩ akesĩ Nikolatiafɔ fɔkɛlatsa ndɛ ayekĩ yĩ malo kakesĩ foe a.
7Oti a kĩ edeĩ atɔ ni, etse lɛtsa a kĩ Hũhũ a lamɛna tɛsɔli a kabi,
Oti a kĩ ɛnya akũ ni, maakpa ye nkpã kutse a kĩ kɔdzɛ̃ nɛ Baguma kɔbã a kĩ bavɛ Paradiso a kamɛ babi badi ɛnya.”
Ɔlɛdo a Kĩ Ɛkpa Smirna Asɔli a.
8“Tsɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kama Smirna Asɔli ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a.
Ade ɔlɛdo kĩ eto oti a kĩ ɛnyɛ Ɔtɔnyade mɔ Owũnade, oti a kĩ eku lɛmɛ ebuki edzi nkpã a sɛkɛ̃ nɛ awĩ a.
9Ĩnyina nɔ ɔhau flee. Ĩnyina kĩ ohiãni anɛ lɛmɛ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, osikani anɛ! Ĩnyina tuwuli kpa a kĩ bikĩ bavɛ be akũ Yudafɔ lɛmɛ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a, alɛ nɛ nɔ akũ. Bɛnyɛ Abonsam katsu a kamɛ bati. 10Tavila lubo lidi nyɛ lidi kĩ laaya nɛ nɔ akũ a kamɔ. Dã! Abonsam aafɔ̃ bipili mi kamɛ badi bido nɛ kɔla ɛsɔ mi ɛdã, ade míamɔ lubo fuwi ewua a. Di ɔnɔkɔali kakpa yĩ ntɛ fɔ́anya wuda malo, lɔkɔa maakpã nɔ nkpã ndɛ akũ kanya lɛgãbɔɛ aye.
11Oti a kĩ edeĩ atɔ ni, etse lɛtsa a kĩ Hũhũ a lamɛna tɛsɔli bati a kabi!
Bati a kĩ baanya akũ ni, wuda ayade a lɛláatamɔ be.”
Ɔlɛdo a Kĩ Ɛkpa Pergamo Asɔli a.
12“Tsɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kama Pergamo Asɔli a ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a kĩ,
Ade oti a kĩ ɛnɛɛ atugbe mɔ ɔbɔ̃ a fɔlɛtsa nɛ awĩ a.
13Ĩnyina nɔ kadzikɔ̃ nɛ awã kĩ Abonsam lɛgãkpo a deĩ a. Opini yĩ dĩ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ. Lɔkɔ a kĩ bɛkɔ Antipa, yĩ ɔdansini mɔ ɔnɔkɔalini nɛ mi kamɛ nɛ awã kĩ Abonsam dzi malo ni, ɔtámuniki nɛ yĩ liti, mbom ɔtɛ yĩ odo.
14Lɛmɛ ndeĩ nɔ akũ fɔlɛtsa sukuloo. Bati badi deĩ nɛ mi kamɛ kĩ bitomɔ Balam fɔtsa katsa. Ade Balam kĩĩ lɛtsa Balak tisi ɛkpã Israelfɔ edo nɛ tɔkpa kamɛ, ade ɛfɔ̃ bɛnya funitsã kĩ bɛtɔ bɛkpa baviɔ̃, ade bɛbɔa adɔpaa a. 15Ade ayea odeĩ bati badi nɛ mi kamɛ kĩ bitomɔ Nikolatiafɔ fɔtsa katsa liti a. 16Finyaa, dani ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ! Ntɛ nnɛ́ aye ni, maaya nɛ nɔ akũ mɔatsɛ nkɔa lɛpamɛ a kĩ lideĩ nɛ yĩ onukpɛ̃ kamɛ a nnɔ mɔ bati a.
17Oti kĩ edeĩ atɔ ni, etse lɛtsa a kĩ Hũhũ a lamɛna tɛsɔli bati a kabi. Oti a kĩ ɛnya akũ ni, maakpa ye mana a kĩ bɛkɔa bɛkɔla a adi ɛnya. Bio maakpa ye de fitaa kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ dĩ vɔɛ̃ bite nɛ de akũ. Odima linyína dĩ a, mbɔɛntɛ owula a kĩ ɛtɛ de a odi.”
Ɔlɛdo a Kĩ Ɛkpa Tiatira Asɔli a.
18“Tsɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kamɛna Tiatira Asɔli a ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ kĩ,
Ade fɔlɛtsa a kĩ futo Baguma Obi, kĩ ye anɛ atɛ̃ ndɛ fi luwotu aye, ade ye abɔa lɛmɛ amɔanɛ ndɛ kɔɔble kĩ bɛvɔlɛ tsɔlitsɔli a nɛ awĩ a.
19Ĩnyina nɔ adzuma a kĩ ɔkɛna. Ĩnyina nɔ ɔdɔ, nɔ katɛkado, nɔ ɔsum, mɔ ayekĩ odeĩ ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ. Ĩnyina kĩ ɔlamɛna adzuma kakɛna finyaa kaba ayekĩ ɔkɛna nɛ kayɔkayi a.
20Lɛmɛ kalɛ a kĩ ndeĩ nɛ nɔ akũ a nyɛ kĩ ɔkpa otsole Isabel a kĩ yavɛ ye akũ Baguma onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ osi, kĩ yatsa yĩ basumunɛ fɔtsa, ade yakɛ be kĩ bɛbɔa adɔpaa, bɛnya funitsã kĩ bɛtɔ bɛkpa baviɔ̃ a. 21Nkpa ye lɔkɔ kĩ ɛdani ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ, lɛmɛ yaáwɛ kĩ yafɔ̃ adɔpaa kabɔa. 22Foesũ maafɔ̃ ɛkahɔ nɛ ɔkɛna akũ, awã kĩ bɛmɔ bikĩ babɔa adɔpaa a, ntɛ bɛtádani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ finyaa ni, baamɔ lubo mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ. 23Maakɔ bikĩ bitomɔ ye a flee lɔkɔa asafu a flee linyi kĩ yĩ nyɛ oti a kĩ enyina oti ɔwɔlɛ mɔ ye lɔlɔ kamɛ yededeede. Maase mi kamɛ odi nyɛ odi kɔtɔ nɛ ye adzuma a kĩ ɛkɛna a onukpɛ̃.
24Lɛmɛ mi Tiatira bati nkaɛ a kĩ mitátɛ Isabel fɔtsa katsa a, mɔ mi a kĩ mitákɔlɛ fɔtsa a kĩ bavɛ Abonsam kadikanyi dzununuunu a kɔ̃ ni, minu kĩ nláalɔla mi fɔlɔtsa bɛbã. 25Lɛmɛ mipi lɛtsa a kĩ mideĩ a mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kɛnaawo kĩ maaya.
26-27Oti a kĩ epi yĩ adzuma a kĩ mawɛ edomɔ akũ kɛnawo kawũna, mɔ ɛnya akũ ni, maakpa ye otumi a kĩ ntɛ ntomɛna Nda sɛkɛ̃ a. Maakpa ye otumi nɛ fude fude akũ, ɛkɔa sɔbɔtsaɛ otse ɛkpã be, lɔkɔa ebubuli be ndɛ ayekĩ babubuli lubui a.
28Ade maakpa ye odenyinawi lisibii a.
29Oti a kĩ edeĩ atɔ ni, etse fɔlɛtsa a kĩ Baguma Hũhũ a lamɛna tɛsɔli bati a kabi.”

Title: KANYƐ KATSA 3
Content:
Ɔlɛdo a Kĩ Ɛkpa Sardis Asɔli a.
1“Tsɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kamɛna Sardis Asɔli a ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a kĩ,
Oti a kĩ ɛnɛɛ Baguma Hũhũ evũkɔnɔ mɔ fusibii evũkɔnɔ a fɔlɛtsa nyɛ fukĩĩ,
Ĩnyina nɔ adzuma a kĩ ɔkɛna a. Ĩnyina kĩ ɔtɛ dĩ kĩ odzi nkpã, lɛmɛ oku. 2Nɛ foesũ nyinya, kado lɛtsa a kĩ lite nɛ nɔ kamɛ a kĩ laaku a kɔbɛ̃. Kitonɛkĩ mmɔ́ kĩ lɛtsa a kĩ ɔkɛna a tákpɔla tɔ̃ nɛ yĩ Baguma anɛ. 3Foesũ te anɛ nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bɛtsa nɔ, mɔ lɛtsa a kĩ onu a akũ, kakɛna nɛ foe akũ, kadani ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ. Ntɛ ɔtányinya ni, maayawo nɛ nɔ akũ ndɛ oyekpanɛ aye, ade ɔláanyi lɔkɔ a kĩ maawo nɛ nɔ akũ a malo a. 4Lɛmɛ mi kamɛ badi sukuloo deĩ nɛ Sardis kĩ bɛtádo be tɛtadiɛ tuduli. Baado tɛtadiɛ ovoe bɔmɔ be bɔtsã, kitonɛkĩ bɛkpɔla bɛkpa foe. 5Owula a kĩ ɛnya akũ ni, yaado ye tɛtadiɛ ovoe lɔmɔ, ade nláawɔla ye dĩ ĩnyɛ nɛ nkpã badzinɛ ovoli a kamɛ. Maanyɛ ye ntsa nɛ kanade nɛ Nda mɔ ye ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ anɛ kĩ yĩ ode yanɛ.
6Oti a kĩ edeĩ atɔ ni, etse fɔlɛtsa a kĩ Hũhũ a lamɛna tɛsɔli bati a kabi.”
Ɔlɛdo a Kĩ Ɛkpa Filadelfia Asɔli a.
7“Tsɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kama Filadelfia Asɔli a ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a.
Ade fɔlɛtsa a kĩ futo oti kpalɛwa mɔ ɔnɔkɔalini a kĩ ɛnɛɛ Lɛgã Dawid safi a nɛ awĩ a. Ntɛ ebinya kɔla ni, odima lɛláapuli ɛbalɛ koe, ade ntɛ ɛbalɛ koe lɛmɛ ni, odima lápuli kabinya koe.
8Ĩnyina nɔ adzuma a kĩ ɔkɛna a. Mbinya opunu ĩyi nɛ nɔ lɔtɔ kĩ odima lɛláapuli ɛbalɛ ye. Ĩnyina kĩ odeĩ kɔbɛ̃ kabii, lɛmɛ otomɔ yĩ fɔtsa katsa, ade ɔtámuniki nɛ yĩ liti a. 9Dã! Bati katsu kadi deĩ kĩ kɛnyɛ Satana kade, bavãlɛvã a kĩ balɛ kĩ bɛnyɛ Yudafɔ lɛmɛ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a. Maafɔ̃ bɛyaake aduli nɛ nɔ anɛ, lɔkɔa be flee binyi kĩ mawɛ nɔ kalɛ. 10Nɛ ayekĩ odo ɔwɔlɛ ɔkɛna nɛ yĩ kalɛ akũ, ɔmɔ lubo sũ ni, yĩ malo maanyɛ nɔ ntomɛna sɔhuiɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ laaya nɛ katinya kamɛ flee, kĩ baasɔ bati flee bɛdã a.
11Maaya mɔatsɛ. Pi lɛtsa a kĩ lideĩ nɛ nɔ awɛ a mɔ kɔɔba, ayekĩ odima lɛláatɛ nɔ akũ kanya lɛgãbɔɛ a nɛ nɔ awɛ. 12Maakɛna oti a kĩ ɛnya akũ a ndɛ luku ɛdza nɛ Baguma Asɔli kɔla a kamɛ. Yaadza nɛ awã daa kĩ ɛláabuki ɛnɛ́ nɛ awã da. Maatsɛlɛ yĩ Baguma dĩ, mɔ yĩ Baguma ɔmatɔ dĩ kĩ lɛnyɛ Yerusalem vɔɛ̃ a kĩ ɛka eto ode a nte nɛ ye akũ. Maatsɛlɛ yĩ mɔawɛ dĩ vɔɛ̃ lɛmɛ nte nɛ ye akũ.
13Oti a kĩ edeĩ atɔ ni, etse fɔlɛtsa a kĩ Hũhũ a lamɛna tɛsɔli bati a kabi.”
Ɔlɛdo a Kĩ Ɛkpa Laodikea Asɔli a.
14“Tsɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kakɔa kamɛna Laodikea Asɔli a ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a kĩ,
Ade oti a kĩ ɛnyɛ Fɔya lɔmɔ, kĩ ɛnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali ɔdansini wĩ a, kĩ ye nyɛ fɔtsa a kĩ Baguma bɔa katokɔ̃ a fɔlɛtsa nɛ awĩ kĩ,
15Ĩnyina nɔ adzuma a kĩ ɔkɛna a. Ĩnyina kĩ ɔtádɔ, ĩye ɔlá ovio. Mawɛ kĩ adɔ, ĩye ɔna ovio kufɛ! 16Lɛmɛ nɛ ayekĩ adã blɔblɔ, kĩ ɔtádɔ ĩye ɔlá ovio lɛmɛ sũ ni, maatua nɔ ntomɛna yĩ onukpɛ̃ kamɛ nwula! 17Alɛ kĩ, ‘Nna akũ, ndeĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa, ade ntásĩ lɛtsama lɛmɛ a.’ Lɛmɛ onyína ayekĩ ɔkɛna pasapasa, mɔ ayekĩ nɔ akũ akɔ kɔnya. Ɔnyɛ ohiãni, odzi ɔdzɔ, ade ɔnyɛ ɔnɛkunɛ a. 18Foesũ madɛ nɔ kĩ ya sika ngbã kĩ binyinyina nɛ fi kamɛ katomɛna yĩ sɛkɛ̃, ayekĩ aadani osikani. Ya lima ovoe lɛmɛ kasua akũ, ayekĩ bɛláamɔ nɔ kɔnyɔã ɔdzɔ a. Ya anɛ kugua kado nɛ banebi kamɛ, ayekĩ aamɔ fɔkɔ. 19Bati a kĩ mawɛ kalɛ a ni, makã be anɛ, ade mavɛlɛ be sɔtɔ a. Foesũ mibɔa mbɔdi midani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ. 20Mitse! Ndzɛ̃ nɛ onyukpɛ̃ mabɔa awɛ. Ntɛ odi nu yĩ odo mɔ ebinya kɔla a ni, maawo nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ bɔmɔ ye bɔnya, ade ye malo yaanya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ a. 21Oti a kĩ ɛnya akũ ni, maafɔ̃ edzi nɛ yĩ ɔwɛ̃ nɛ yĩ lɛgãkpo akũ, ndɛ ayekĩ yĩ malo ĩnya akũ ndzi nɛ Nda ɔwɛ̃ nɛ ye lɛgãkpo akũ a aye.
22Oti a kĩ edeĩ atɔ ni, etse fɔlɛtsa a kĩ Hũhũ a lamɛna tɛsɔli a kabi!”

Title: KANYƐ KATSA 4
Content:
Ayekĩ Basum Baguma Nɛ Ode.
1Fukĩĩ liti a, nna kanyɛkatsa bɛbã kadi ade mmɔ́ kĩ bibinya opunu odi biyi nɛ ode a.
Odo a kĩ ĩnya lɔtɔ nnu ndɛ kagbulɛɛ aye a, kĩ ebi yĩ tuwuli tɔ̃ a lɛ kĩ, “De kaya nɛ ode nɛ awĩ, lɔkɔa ntsa nɔ fɔtsa a kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ fɔya nɛ foe kamɛ nɛ fukĩĩ liti a.” 2Deedimɔapɛ Hũhũ wo nɛ yĩ kamɛ. Nɛ ode naa, mmɔ́ kĩ bike lɛgãkpo lidi kĩ odi dzi nɛ de akũ. 3Lukpo a akũ odzinɛ akũ ata muamua ndɛ ahuhɔɛ boe bawovoe mɔ bangbã kĩ bɛtɛ kɔya, ade odetɔ́ kamɛ sinigbɛnɛ kĩ se kalɛkadã la ndɛ tɔɔta gɔ̃ sinya lɛgãkpo a. 4Fɔgãkpo tɛya-ana bɛbã keni fusinya lɛgãkpo a, ade banɔkɔɛ̃ tɛya-ana kĩ bido tɛtadiɛ ovoe, bɛtsa sika ngbã fɔgãbɔɛ dzi nɛ foe akũ a. 5Ɔdetɔ́ kamɛ kamɔanɛ, ɔplala kakpɛnɛ, mɔ fɔwɔla kɔɔba kanɛ kato lɛgãkpo a kamɛ. Tibia evũkɔnɔ kĩ tatɛ̃ dzɛ̃ nɛ lɛgãkpo a anɛ kamɛ. Ade te nyɛ Baguma Hũhũ evũkɔnɔ a. 6Litsedi kĩ ladã ndɛ mpo kĩ bɛkɔa ahuhɔɛ bɛkɛna deĩ nɛ awã nɛ lɛgãkpo a anɛ kamɛ. Ye kamɛ kpalɛ klɛĩklɛĩklɛĩ.
Fɔtsa ɛna kĩ fudzi nkpã, kĩ fudeĩ banebi nɛ liti mɔ lɔtɔ tsua fusinya lɛgãkpo a nɛ fɔkɛ ɛna a akũ. 7Fɔtsa a kĩ fudzi nkpã a fɔtɔnyade a la ndɛ dzata, fɔyade a la ndɛ ɔnantsuenyole, fɔlalɛde a deĩ anɛ ndɛ otidziwa, ade fɔnade a anɛ la ndɛ ɔkɔliɛ kĩ yayidza a. 8Fɔtsa ɛna a kĩ fudzi nkpã a fudi nyɛ fudi deĩ fupoki evũ, ade banebi tsɛna foe kamɛ mɔ foe akũ flee a. Baáfɔ̃ tɔnɔ kasã lɛnyɛ mɔ suwa flee kĩ,
“Boe Ɔlate Baguma Kpale, nɔ akũ kpalɛ!
Nɔ akũ kpalɛ, nɔ akũ kpalɛ!
Ɔna anɛ kɔkɔɛ, odeĩ finyaa, ade aabuki ɔya a.”
9Fɔtsa ɛna a kĩ fudzi nkpã a sã kamu, obu, mɔ kɔlɛkanyɛ tɔnɔ kakpa oti a kĩ edzi nɛ lɛgãkpo akũ, kĩ edzi nkpã daa daa a. Ntɛ bɛsã te lɔmɔ a, 10banɔkɔɛ̃ tɛya-ana a atsa anɛ nɛ tite nɛ oti a kĩ edzi nɛ lɛgãkpo akũ a anɛ kamɛ, kasum ye a kĩ edzi nkpã daa a. Banyɛ be fɔgãbɔɛ kayi nɛ lɛgãkpo a lɔtɔ kalɛ kĩ,
11“Boe Ɔlate mɔ boe Baguma!
Nɔ kĩĩ kukũkpalɛ, obu mɔ otumi fɛta fɔkpa,
kitonɛkĩ nɔ lɛbɔa fɔtsa flee.
Ɔbɔa foe ndɛ ayekĩ awɛ a,
ade fudzi nɛ nɔ kawɛ onukpɛ̃ a.”

Title: KANYƐ KATSA 5
Content:
Bɛkɔa Ovoli a Bɛkpa Kavelibi a.
1Fukĩĩ liti a, mmɔ́ ovoli butawa odi nɛ oti a kĩ edzi nɛ lɛgãkpo akũ a sɔmɔna awɛ. Bɛtsɛlɛ fɔtsa nɛ ye kamɛ mɔ liti ade bɛkɔa kɔma fɔtsa evũkɔnɔ bɛtalɛ ye onukpɛ̃ a. 2Mmɔ́ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ mɔ kɔbɛ̃ odi kĩ ɛbɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba nɛ ode, evia kĩ, “Owei lɛkpɔla kĩ yaapuli ɛwai kɔma a, ebinya ovoli butawa a?” 3Lɛmɛ odima lɛláa nɛ ode, nɛ tite akũ, ĩye nɛ tite ɔda kĩ yaapuli ebinya ovoli a, ĩye ɛdã ye kamɛ. 4Mbe paa, kitonɛkĩ bɛtámɔ odima kĩ ɛkpɔla kĩ yabinya ovoli a, ĩye ɛdã ye kamɛ.
5Ade banɔkɔɛ̃ a kamɛ ɔmɔa bi yĩ kĩ, “Fɔ̃ kabe! Dã! Dzata a kĩ eto Yuda katete kamɛ a, kĩ ɛnyɛ Dawid kasinu kamɛ obi a nya akũ, kĩ ɛkpɔla kĩ yawai kɔma fɔtsa evũkɔnɔ a kĩ bɛkɔa bɛtalɛ ovoli a onukpɛ̃, ebinya ye lɛmɛ.”
6Kĩ ndã a, mmɔ́ Kavelibi kadi kĩ kɛdzɛ̃ nɛ lɛgãkpo a kayite nɛ fɔtsa ɛna a kĩ fudzi nkpã a kamɛ, ade banɔkɔɛ̃ tɛya-ana a sinya ye a. Fɔdã ndɛ kakɔ bɛkɔ Kavelibi a. Kavelibi a deĩ tɛlɛ evũkɔnɔ mɔ banebi evũkɔnɔ kĩ fɔnyɛ Baguma hũhũ evũkɔnɔ a kĩ edo nɛ tite flee akũ a. 7Kavelibi a naa kɛnatɛ ovoli a etomɛna oti a kĩ edzi nɛ lɛgãkpo a akũ a sɔmɔna awɛ. 8Kĩ yatɛ ovoli a, fɔtsa ɛna a kĩ fudzi nkpã a, mɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ tɛya-ana a tsa anɛ nɛ tite nɛ Kavelibi a anɛ kamɛ. Be kamɛ odi nyɛ odi nɛɛ ɔsankuo mɔ sika ngbã lɔɔda kĩ biyula mɔ titsonu mɔ ɔlɛ̃, kĩ fɔnyɛ bati a kĩ Baguma kpalɛ be akũ a mpaɛbɔ. 9Bɛsã ɔnɔ vɔɛ̃ odi kĩ,
“Nɔ kĩĩ lɛkpɔla kĩ atɛ ovoli a
lɔkɔa ɔwai kɔma evũkɔnɔ a
kĩ bɛkɔa bɛtalɛ ye onukpɛ̃ a.
Kitonɛkĩ nɔ bɛkɔ,
ade ɔkɔa nɔ babɔanɛ,
ɔya bati ɔkpa Baguma a.
Bati kĩ bito fude nyɛ fude, tide nyɛ tide,
ɔmaĩ nyɛ ɔmaĩ kamɛ,
mɔ batidziwa ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ a kamɛ.
10Ɔkɛna be lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ basɔfɔ kĩ bisum boe Baguma,
ade baanya fɔgã nɛ tite akũ a.”
11Ade kĩ mbuki ndã a, nnu ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ mpim mpim kĩ bɛláapuli bɛkã odo. Bɛdza bisinya lɛgãkpo a, mɔ fɔtsa ɛna a kĩ fudzi nkpã a, mɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ tɛya-ana a. 12Ade bɛsã ɔnɔ kɔɔba kĩ,
“Kavelibi a kĩ bɛkɔ a,
lɛkpɔla kĩ katɛ otumi, mɔ akũ kana, mɔ nyansã,
mɔ kɔbɛ̃, mɔ obu, mɔ kukũkpalɛ mɔ kamu!”
13Adeke nnu kĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma bɔa nɛ tite mɔ ode, mɔ tite ɔda, mɔ mpo kamɛ, mɔ fɔtsa a kĩ fudeĩ nɛ foe kamɛ a flee lamɛna ɔnɔ kasã kĩ,
“Kamu, mɔ obu, mɔ kukũkpalɛ
mɔ otumi fɔna daa fɔkpa,
oti a kĩ edzi nɛ lɛgãkpo akũ a mɔ Kavelibi a!”
14Ade fɔtsa ɛna a kĩ fudzi nkpã a tɛ futunɔ kĩ, “Fɔya lɔmɔ!” Ade banɔkɔɛ̃ a tsa anɛ nɛ tite bisum Baguma mɔ Kavelibi a.

Title: KANYƐ KATSA 6
Content:
Kavelibi a Wũnya Kɔma Fɔtsa a Kĩ Bɛkɔa Bɛtalɛ Ovoli a.
1Ke liti a, mmɔ́ kĩ Kavelibi a wai kɔma evũkɔnɔ a kĩ bɛkɔa bɛtalɛ ovoli a foe fɔtɔnyade. Ade nnu kĩ fɔtsa ɛna a kĩ fudzi nkpã a kamɛ fɔmɔa lɛ kɔdzɛla ndɛ ɔplala lɛkpɛnɛ kĩ, “Ya!” 2Ndã fɔkɔ ade mmɔ́ ɔpɔnkɔ ovoe odi a. Oti a kĩ edzi nɛ ye akũ a nɛɛ kɔta nɛ awɛ, ade bɛkpa ye lɛgãbɔɛ lidi a. Edzi ye ɛnɛ ndɛ kawũ akũ ɔnyanɛ aye kĩ yanaanya akũ.
3Ke liti a, Kavelibi a wai kɔma kɔyade a, ade nnu kĩ fɔtsa a kĩ fudzi nkpã a fɔyade a lɛ kĩ, “Ya!” 4Ɔpɔnkɔ bɛbã kĩ ɛyɔɔlɛ nɛ́. Bɛkpa oti a kĩ edzi nɛ ye akũ a kɔbɛ̃ kĩ ɛnyɛ lukudɔ nɛ tite akũ, lɔkɔa bati bɛkɔ be akũ akũ. Bɛkpa ye kɔpã kpale kudi.
5Kavelibi a wai kɔma kɔlalɛde a, ade nnu kĩ fɔtsa a kĩ fudzi nkpã a fɔlalɛde a lɛ kĩ, “Ya!” Kĩ ndã fɔkɔ a, mmɔ́ ɔpɔnkɔ tũũtũ odi. Oti a kĩ edzi nɛ ye akũ a nɛɛ sɔbɔtsaɛ a kĩ bakɔa kakali fɔtsa a nɛ awɛ. 6Nnu odo odi kĩ ɛnɛ́ eto fɔtsa ɛna a kĩ fudzi nkpã a kayite ɛlɛ kĩ, “Kamɔnɛ lɔɔda mɔa lɛtɛ luwi mɔa kɔtɔkase, ade fugbanɔ tsensi futukũ ɛlalɛ fɔtɛ luwi mɔa kɔtɔkase, lɛmɛ mitabula kugua mɔ waĩ kade!”
7Ke liti a, Kavelibi a wai kɔma fɔnade a, ade nnu kĩ fɔtsa a kĩ fudzi nkpã a fɔnade a lɛ kĩ, “Ya!” 8Kĩ ndã fɔkɔ a, mmɔ́ ɔpɔnkɔ odi kĩ ye akũ la ndɛ batɔ aye. Oti a kĩ edzi nɛ ye akũ a dĩ nyɛ Wuda ade Kanɔkpade tomɔ ye nɛ liti a. Bɛkpa be kɔbɛ̃ nɛ katinya kamɛ kasɛ̃ kanade a akũ, kĩ bɛkɔa kawũkanɔ, kɔlɛ, fɔsɔ kpa mɔ bayaɛ kpa bɛkɔ bati.
9Kĩ Kavelibi a wai kɔma kulode a, mmɔ́ bati a kĩ bɛkɔ, nɛ ayekĩ bide lɛtsã nɛ Baguma kalɛ a akũ, mɔ ayekĩ bidi adansiɛ nɛ ke akũ sũ a tɛkla nɛ afɔlibɔ atɛnyɛ a kayɔ. 10Bɛbɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba kĩ, “Baguma Kpale, oti kpalɛwa mɔ ɔnɔkɔalini anɛ! Lɔkɔ lɔwɔdabe koũ aadzɛmɔ tite akũ bati, lɔkɔa ɔvɛlɛ bikĩ bɛkɔ boe a sɔtɔ?” 11Bɛkpa be kamɛ odi nyɛ odi atadiɛ ovoe wulaa ade bibi be kĩ bibuki bidzi bɛwɛya sukuloo kɛnaawo lɔkɔ a kĩ baakɔa be bakɔba basumunɛ mɔ be bawaɛ̃ a kĩ baakɔ ndɛ be aye a lidede bibumɔ be, ayekĩ kakã a onukpɛ̃ aakpɔla.
12Mmɔ́ Kavelibi a kĩ ɛwai kɔma kuvũde a. Tite kuna mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ, ade suwa dani ndɛ lima ɔɔwɔ tsutsulitsui, odetɔ lɛmɛ dani gbãã ndɛ babɔanɛ aye a. 13Fusibii ka fɔtɔ nɛ tite ndɛ ayekĩ ɔwɛ mɔ ɔsĩ awili kutse babi bũũ kawula a. 14Odetɔ́ kamɛ yɛla ndɛ ɔyaɛ ovoli kĩ bibuta aye, ade bɛbɔlɛ tɔtɔ mɔ tite kĩ mui sinya a tidi nyɛ tidi nɛ te kadzakɔ̃ a.
15Tite akũ fɔgã, abãã banɔkɔɛ̃, sodzafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃, asikafɔ, otumifɔ, bati flee, basate mɔ bikĩ bidzi be akũ akũ a, bɛla nɛ tite tɛkɛ mɔ tɔtɔ akũ boe tɛkɛ kamɛ. 16Ade bɛbɔa fɔwɔla bibi tɔtɔ a kĩ, “Midzuli miko nɛ boe akũ, lɔkɔa mikɔla boe nɛ oti a kĩ edzi nɛ lɛgãkpo akũ a anɛ, mɔ Kavelibi a kalɔkpa onukpɛ̃. 17Kitonɛkĩ be kalɔkpa luwi mɔ libe a wo ɔtɔ. Owei aapuli ɛdza nɛ de onukpɛ̃?”

Title: KANYƐ KATSA 7
Content:
Bɛpau Bati Mpim Ɔha Tɛna-ana Nɛ Israel.
1Fukĩĩ liti a, mmɔ́ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ ɛna kĩ bɛdzɛ̃ nɛ tite tukontoũ ɛna a akũ. Bisua tite akũ ɔwɛ fɔkɔ ɛna a osi, kĩ ɛtavũ nɛ tite akũ, ĩye mpo akũ, ĩye nɛ kutse kudima kamɛ.
2Ade mmɔ́ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ bɛbã kĩ eto suwa kadekɔ̃ yaya, kĩ ɛnɛɛ Baguma kĩ edzi nkpã a ɔsũkayi fɔtsa a nɛ awɛ. Ɛbɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba ɛvɛ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ ɛna a kĩ Baguma kpa kɔbɛ̃ kĩ bɛkɛna tite mɔ mpo awɔda a, 3ɛlɛ kĩ, “Mitakɛna tite, mpo ĩye futse lɛtsamanɔ kɛnaawo kĩ bɔ́akɔa ɔsũkayi fɔtsa buyi boe Baguma basumunɛ a ɔsũ nɛ be nnyɛ.” 4Ade nnu kĩ bati a kĩ biyi be ɔsũ mɔ Baguma ɔsũkayi a kĩ bito Israelfɔ futete ewua-nviã kamɛ a lidede nyɛ bati mpim ɔha tɛna-ana (144,000).
5Nɛ Yuda katete a kamɛ biyi bati mpim ewua-nviã ɔsũ.
Ruben katete kamɛ bati mpim ewua-nviã.
Gad katete kamɛ bati mpim ewua-nviã.
6Aser katete kamɛ bati mpim ewua-nviã.
Naftali katete kamɛ bati mpim ewua-nviã.
Manase katete kamɛ bati mpim ewua-nviã.
7Simeon katete kamɛ bati mpim ewua-nviã.
Levi katete kamɛ bati mpim ewua-nviã.
Isakar katete kamɛ bati mpim ewua-nviã.
8Zebulon katete kamɛ bati mpim ewua-nviã.
Yosef katete kamɛ biyi bati mpim ewua-nviã.
Ade nɛ Benyamin lɛmɛ katete kamɛ biyi bati mpim ewua-nviã ɔsũ a.
Yohanes Mɔ́ Bati Kɔdabu Baũ.
9Fukĩĩ liti a, mmɔ́ bati kɔdabu baũ kudi kĩ odima lɛláapuli ɛkã. Bito batidziwa ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ a, kade nyɛ kade, ɔmaĩ nyɛ ɔmaĩ, mɔ tide nyɛ tide flee kamɛ, ade bɛdza bɛtsɛlamɔ lɛgãkpo mɔ Kavelibi a. Be flee bido tɛtadiɛ ovoe wulaa, ade bɛnɛɛ tukuo nɛ awɛ a. 10Bɛbɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba kĩ, “Nkpã katɛ a to boe Baguma a kĩ edzi nɛ lɛgãkpo a akũ, mɔ Kavelibi a sɛkɛ̃!” 11Ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ a flee dza bisinya lɛgãkpo a, mɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a, mɔ fɔtsa ɛna a kĩ fudzi nkpã a, ade bɛka bɛtsa anɛ nɛ tite nɛ lɛgãkpo a anɛ bisum Baguma, 12bɛlɛ kĩ,
“Fɔya lɔmɔ!
Kamu, mɔ kukũkpalɛ,
mɔ nyansã, mɔ kɔlɛkanyɛ, obu,
kɔbɛ̃ mɔ otumi
nyɛ boe Baguma fude daa daa!
Fɔya lɔmɔ!”
13Banɔkɔɛ̃ a kamɛ ɔmɔa odi via yĩ kĩ, “Bawei nyɛ bikĩ bido tɛtadiɛ ovoe wulaa kĩĩ a? Nɛ ndia bito?”
14Nkpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Yĩ Ɔlate, ĩnyína. Nɔ nyina.”
Ade ebi yĩ kĩ, “Ade be nyɛ bati a kĩ bɛtsã lubo kamɔ kpale kamɛ bɛnɛ sɔũ a. Bɛvɔlɛ be tɛtadiɛ tivoe fitaa nɛ Kavelibi babɔanɛ a kamɛ. 15Ade foesũ bɛdzɛ̃ nɛ Baguma lɛgãkpo a anɛ basum ye lɛnyɛ mɔ suwa flee nɛ ye Asɔli Kɔla kamɛ a. Oti a kĩ edzi nɛ lɛgãkpo a akũ a, aafɔ̃ lɛtsama lɛláakɛna be nɛ ye anɛ kamɛ.
16Kɔlɛ ĩye ɔmɔado lɛláabuki ɛkɔ be da.
Suwa lɛláapila be ĩye ovio libuki ɛkɔ be da.
17Kitonɛkĩ Kavelibi a kĩ kideĩ nɛ lɛgãkpo a kayite a nyɛ be ɔkpãnɛ.
Yaakpã be ɛnamɛna awã kĩ nkpã mui anɛ kato a,
ade Baguma aayɔ babe flee nɛ be anɛ a.”

Title: KANYƐ KATSA 8
Content:
Kavelibi a Wai Kɔma Kuvũkɔnɔde a.
1Kĩ Kavelibi a wai kɔma kuvũkɔnɔde a, ode kɛna dĩĩ fɔ́ana ndɛ dɔũhuilɛ sɛkɛ.
2Ke liti a, mmɔ́ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ evũkɔnɔ kĩ badza nɛ Baguma anɛ a, ade bɛkɔa kugbulɛɛ evũkɔnɔ bido be nɛ awɛ a.
3Ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ bɛbã kĩ ɛnɛɛ sika ngbã ɔnyɔ kate lubui a nɛ́ ɛyadza nɛ afɔlibɔ atɛnyɛ a ɔwɛ̃. Bɛkpa ye tutsonu mɔ ɔlɛ̃ beblebee kĩ ɛkɔa ebumɔ Baguma bati flee mpaɛbɔ, ɛkɔa ɛbɔa afɔliɛ nɛ sika ngbã afɔliɛ atɛnyɛ a kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ lɛgãkpo a anɛ a akũ. 4Tutsonu a kĩ bite fi a ɔnyɔ, mɔ Baguma bati mpaɛbɔ a nɛ́ nɛ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ a awɛ fude fɔnaa Baguma sɛkɛ̃. 5Ke liti a, ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a nyɛ fi nɛ afɔlibɔ atɛnyɛ a kamɛ eyula ɔnyɔ kate lubui a, ade ɛta foe eko nɛ tite akũ a. Ɔplala kpɛnɛ kɔɔba, odetɔ́ kamɛ mɔanɛ ade tite kuna a.
Ode Fɔtɔ Banyanɛ a Vɔ̃ Be Kugbulɛɛ.
6Ade ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ evũkɔnɔ a kĩ bɛnɛɛ kugbulɛɛ a manɛ akũ kĩ baavɔ̃ be kugbulɛɛ a.
7Ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ ɔtɔnyade a vɔ̃ ye kagbulɛɛ a. Lɛtalɛta lɛdãglɛglɛ mɔ fi kĩ babɔanɛ tsɛka nɛ foe kamɛ ka fɔyako nɛ tite akũ. Tite kasɛ̃ kamɛ katsu kalalɛde vio, tite akũ futse foe kasɛ̃ kamɛ katsu kalalɛde vio mɔ tuwĩ gɔ̃ flee vio.
8Ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ ɔyade a lɛmɛ vɔ̃ ye kagbulɛɛ a. Bɛta litsedi kĩ ladã ndɛ ɔtɔ kpale kĩ ɛkatɛ̃ mɔ fi bido nɛ mpo kamɛ, ade mpo a kasɛ̃ kamɛ katsu kalalɛde dani babɔanɛ a. 9Fɔtsa a kĩ fudzi nkpã nɛ mpo kamɛ a foe kasɛ̃ kamɛ katsu kalalɛde ku, ade tɔkɔlɔ a kĩ titeĩ nɛ mui anɛ a te kasɛ̃ kamɛ katsu kalalɛde bu kade a.
10Ke liti a, ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ ɔlalɛde a vɔ̃ ye kagbulɛɛ a, ade lisibii kpale kĩ latɛ̃ ndɛ ɔbia aye to ode lɛyatɔ nɛ tɔwɔ kasɛ̃ kamɛ katsu kalalɛde mɔ mui kanɛkɔ̃ kamɛ a. 11Bavɛ lisibii kĩĩ kĩ tuwĩ mɔ ɔnyɛ, ade mui kasɛ̃ kamɛ katsu kalalɛde a dani mɔ ɔnyɛ mɔ ɔnyɛ, ade bati beblebee ku a, kitonɛkĩ mui a dani otsonu kpa.
12Ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ ɔnade a lɛmɛ vɔ̃ ye kagbulɛɛ a. Deedimɔapɛ bɛbɔa suwa kasɛ̃ kamɛ kalalɛde, odetɔ kasɛ̃ kamɛ kalalɛde mɔ fusibii kasɛ̃ kamɛ katsu kalalɛde a. Fukĩĩ fɔ̃ kade kanyina kasɛ̃ kamɛ kalalɛde mɔ lɛnyɛ kasɛ̃ kamɛ kalalɛde tána ɔhaĩ.
13Ke liti a, ndã fɔkɔ ade nnu ɔkɔliɛ odi kĩ ɛlamɛna kayidza nɛ ɔwɛ kamɛ flee ɛlɛ mɔ odo kɔɔba kĩ, “Bɔbɔɛ, bɔbɔɛ, bɔbɔɛ makpa bati a kĩ bidzi nkpã nɛ tite akũ ntɛ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ ɛlalɛ a kĩ bite a yavɔ̃ be kugbulɛɛ a.”

Title: KANYƐ KATSA 9
Content:
1Ade ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ olode a vɔ̃ ye kagbulɛɛ a. Mmɔ́ lisibii lidi kĩ lɛka lɛtɔ nɛ tite akũ, ade bɛkɔa lɛkɛ dzununuunu a safi bido nɛ ye awɛ a. 2Lisibii a binya lɛkɛ dzununuunu a ade ɔnyɔ tugbluu ndɛ fi luwotu kpale kamɛ ɔnyɔ a nɛ́ eto de kamɛ a. Ɔnyɔ nɛ lɛkɛ dzununuunu a kamɛ fɔ̃ suwa anɛ mɔ odetɔ́ kamɛ ke ɔtũ. 3Koolo nɛ́ eto ɔnyɔ a kamɛ ɛyako nɛ tite akũ, ade bɛkpa koolo kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ kakpɔ̃na deĩ a odu. 4Bibi be kĩ bɛtabula tuwĩ, futse ĩye tuwĩ blɔblɔ tidima kade, mbom bɛkɛna bati a kĩ Baguma ɔsũkayi lɛláa nɛ be nnyɛ a ablɔ. 5Bɛtákpa koolo a osi kĩ bɛkɔ bati kĩĩ, mbom kĩ bɛkɛna be awɔda tidetɔ elo. Ntɛ bɛta oti a, fɔawo ndɛ ayekĩ kakpɔ̃na kata aye. 6Nɛ tidetɔ elo a na kamɛ ni, bati aawɛ wuda, lɛmɛ bɛláana ye, baawɛ kĩ baku lɛmɛ wuda aalo be.
7Koolo a la ndɛ bapɔnkɔ kĩ bɛmanɛ be bɛkpa kawũkanɔ. Litsedi teĩ nɛ be fɔlɔ ndɛ sika ngbã lɔbɔɛ aye, ade be anɛ la ndɛ otidziwa ade aye a. 8Be tɔlɔ la ndɛ batsole tide, ade be adɔ̃ la ndɛ dzata ade a. 9Bɛkɔa litsedi kĩ ladã ndɛ babĩĩ katɛ sɔbɔtsaɛ bɛtsa nɛ tɔwɔlɛ. Be fupoki kamɛ kakuna atunɔ ndɛ ayekĩ bapɔnkɔ mɔ kawũkanɔ tihilili beblebee wula atsɛ banaa kawũ a. 10Bideĩ tɛkã mɔ fubĩĩ ndɛ kakpɔ̃na aye, ade be tɛkã kĩĩ kamɛ kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ baakɔa bɛkɛna bati awɔda a deĩ a. 11Bideĩ lɛgã kĩ lanya be akũ. Ade ye nyɛ fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a kĩ yadãmɛna lɛkɛ dzununuunu a akũ a. Ye dĩ nɛ Hebri tide kamɛ nyɛ Abadon, ade bavɛ de nɛ Hela tide kamɛ kĩ Apolion.
12Lubokamɔ kpale lɛtɔnyade a yatɛ̃, lɛmɛ lubo kamɔ nviã buki fɔaya.
13Ke liti a, ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ ovũde a vɔ̃ ye kagbulɛɛ a, ade nnu odo odi kĩ ɛnɛ́ eto sika ngbã afɔlibɔ atɛnyɛ a kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ Baguma anɛ a atɔ ɛna a kamɛ a. 14Odo a bi Baguma ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ ovũde a kĩ ɛnɛɛ kagbulɛɛ a kĩ, “Wũnya Baguma ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ ɛna a kĩ bisuli bɛdzɛla nɛ Frat ɔwɔ kpale abuĩ a!” 15Ade biwũnya Baguma ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ ɛna a, kĩ bɛmanɛ biyi badzɔlɛ ɔdɔũ a, mɔ luwi a, mɔ odetɔ a, mɔ kateli a kĩ bɛkɔ batidziwa be kasɛ̃ kamɛ katsu kalalɛde a.
16Bibi yĩ kĩ bapɔnkɔ badzinɛ a lidede nyɛ mpim mpim ɔha nviã. 17Ade ayekĩ mmɔ́ bapɔnkɔ mɔ be badzinɛ a nɛ kanyɛkatsa kamɛ a nɛ awĩ a. Bɛbla ɔwɔlɛ babĩĩ katɛ fɔbɔtsaɛ kĩ fɔadã gbãã ndɛ fi katɛ̃ aye, fubuki fɔadã ndɛ safir de aye, fɔyɔɔlɛ lɛmɛ ndɛ sulfa de aye. Bapɔnkɔ a fɔlɔ la ndɛ dzata fɔlɔ aye, ade fi, ɔnyɔ mɔ fukpokpo gɛĩgɛĩ nɛ́ futo be tunukpɛ̃ kamɛ a. 18Bɛkɔa lubo kamɔ fɔtsa ɛlalɛ kĩ fɔnyɛ fi, ɔnyɔ, mɔ fukpokpo gɛĩgɛĩ kĩ futo bapɔnkɔ a tunukpɛ̃ a bɛkɔ batidziwa kasɛ̃ kamɛ katsu kalalɛde. 19Kitonɛkĩ bapɔnkɔ a kɔbɛ̃ deĩ nɛ be tunukpɛ̃ mɔ tɛkã kamɛ. Be tɛkã a la ndɛ bɔɛ aye, kĩ tideĩ fɔlɔ. Ade te bakɔa kakɛna bati ablɔ a.
20Bati a kĩ bite bidzi nkpã a flee, kĩ bɛtákɔ be nɛ lubo kamɔ kĩĩ kamɛ a, támuniki nɛ fɔtsa a kĩ be mɔawɛ bɛkɔa awɛ bɛmɛ a kasum liti. Bɛtáfɔ̃ hũhũ kpa, baviɔ̃ kĩ bɛkɛna mɔ sika ngbã, sika ovoe, kɔɔble, de, ĩye otse, kĩ fɔámɔ, fɔánu ĩye fɔátsã a kasum! 21Bɛtádani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ nɛ bati kakɔ, kanɔkɔnɛ kadã, linyolewɛ mɔ litsolewɛ, mɔ kaye kamɛ.

Title: KANYƐ KATSA 10
Content:
Ode Fɔtɔ Ɔnyanɛ Odi Mɔ Kavolibi a.
1Ke liti a, mmɔ́ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ mɔ kɔbɛ̃ bɛbã odi kĩ eto ode yaka. Edeĩ nɛ luflututu kamɛ, ade sinigbɛnɛ sinya ye lɔlɔ a. Ye anɛ ata ndɛ suwa aye, ade ye abɔa la ndɛ fi fɔmɛ fuku aye kĩ fɔade nɛ ode a. 2Ɛnɛɛ kavolibi kadi kĩ bibinya a nɛ awɛ. Ɛkɔa ye sɔmɔna kɔbɔa eke nɛ mpo akũ ade ɛkɔa sɛba kɔbɔa lɛmɛ eke nɛ tite akũ a. 3Ɛbɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba ndɛ dzata amɛ kaklumɛ aye. Kĩ ɛbɔa fɔwɔla a, ɔplala evũkɔnɔ a nyɛ tunukpɛ̃. 4Kĩ ɔplala evũkɔnɔ a nyɛ tunukpɛ̃ a, nwɛ kĩ matsɛlɛ fɔtsa ĩyi, lɛmɛ nnu odo odi kĩ eto ode ɛlɛ kĩ, “Talɛ lɛtsa a kĩ ɔplala evũkɔnɔ a lɛ a onukpɛ̃, tatsɛlɛ foe oyi.”
5Ade ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a kĩ mmɔ́ kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ mpo mɔ tite akũ a dzɛla ye sɔmɔna awɛ nɛ ode, 6ɛlɔ fubo nɛ Baguma kĩ edzi nkpã daa a, kĩ ɛkɛna tite mɔ te akũ fɔtsa, ode mɔ ye kamɛ fɔtsa, mpo mɔ ye kamɛ fɔtsa a dĩ akũ kĩ, “Liti kakpa lɛláabuki lɛna! 7Lɛmɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ ovũkɔnɔde a aavɔ̃ ye kagbulɛɛ ni, Baguma nhihiɛ kɔlawa a aaya nɛ foe kamɛ ndɛ ayekĩ ɛnyɛ ɛtsa ye onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a kĩ bɛnyɛ basumunɛ a.”
8Ke liti a, odo a kĩ nnu ntomɛna ode a buki ebi yĩ kĩ, “Naatɛ kavolibi a kĩ bibinya a nɛ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ mui mɔ tite akũ a awɛ.”
9Nnaa ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a sɛkɛ̃ mbi ye kĩ ɛkɔa kavolibi a ɛkpa yĩ. Ebi yĩ kĩ, “Tɛ ke kaba ke. Fɔ́akɛna mɔ ɔnyɛ mɔ ɔnyɛ nɛ nɔ lupu kamɛ, lɛmɛ fɔ́ana ɔmɛnɛ nɛ nɔ onukpɛ̃ kamɛ ndɛ kɔsã aye.”
10Ntɛ kavolibi a nɛ ye awɛ mba ke. Fɔna ɔmɛnɛ ndɛ kɔsã aye nɛ yĩ onukpɛ̃ kamɛ, lɛmɛ kĩ mmɛna foe a, fɔna ɔnyɛ nɛ yĩ lupu kamɛ. 11Ke liti a, ebi yĩ kĩ, “Kɛnɛ kĩ abuki ode lɛtsã Baguma fɔlɛtsa a nɛ bati, tɛmaĩ, tide mɔ fɔgã pii akũ.”

Title: KANYƐ KATSA 11
Content:
Adansifɔ Nviã a.
1Ke liti a, bɛkɔa otse kĩ ɛla ndɛ fɔtsa kakɔna otse bɛkpa yĩ, ade bibi yĩ kĩ, “Naakɔna yĩ Baguma Asɔli Kɔla a mɔ afɔlibɔ atɛnyɛ a, kakã bati a kĩ basum nɛ Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ lɛmɛ. 2Lɛmɛ takɔna ablanda nɛ Asɔli Kɔla akũ a, kitonɛkĩ bɛkɔa awã bɛkpa amamufɔ. Ade be aasumini Ɔmatɔ Kpalɛwa a nɛ tidetɔ tɛna-nviã kamɛ a. 3Maado yĩ adansifɔ nviã kĩ bidzi nɛ tikpekpe tilima kamɛ, bɛyaade lɛtsã nɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa akũ nɛ fuwi apim mɔa mɔ ɔha nviã mɔ aduesia kamɛ.”
4Adansifɔ nviã kĩĩ nyɛ kugua futse nviã mɔ ɔsɛdza titse nviã a kĩ tɛdzɛ̃ nɛ tite Ɔlate a anɛ kamɛ a. 5Ntɛ odi wɛ kĩ yakɛna foe ablɔ ni, fi anɛ kato foe tunukpɛ̃ kamɛ kawɔla be mɔ bakesĩnɛ a. Ntɛ odi wɛ kĩ yakɛna be ablɔ ni, baakɔ ye. 6Bideĩ kɔbɛ̃ kĩ basua ode osi kĩ oni ɛtako nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ bade lɛtsã nɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa akũ a kamɛ. Bideĩ kɔbɛ̃ lɛmɛ kĩ badani mui bɛkɛna babɔanɛ, ade bideĩ kɔbɛ̃ kĩ bayamɛna lubo kamɔ lidi nyɛ lidi nɛ tite akũ nɛ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ kĩ bawɛ.
7Ntɛ bide lɛtsã nɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa a akũ biyua a, ɔyaɛ kpa a kĩ eto lɛkɛ dzununuunu kamɛ ɛnɛ a, aanɔ kawũ mɔ be. Yaanya be akũ, ɛkɔ be. 8Be banɔkpa aawa nɛ ɔmatɔ kpale a ɔblɔnu akũ nɛ awã kĩ bɛbɔa be Ɔlate nɛ asendua akũ a. Ɔmatɔ a dĩ kɔlawa nyɛ Sodom ĩye Egipte. 9Bati aato ɔmaĩ nyɛ ɔmaĩ, kade nyɛ kade, tide nyɛ tide mɔ katinya kamɛ bati flee kamɛ bɛyaadã banɔkpa a nɛ fuwi ɛlalɛ mɔ sɛkɛ kamɛ, ade bɛláakpa osi kĩ bibila be a. 10Tite akũ bati flee aamɔ kawɔlɛ nɛ bati nviã kĩĩ wuda akũ. Baanya luwi bɛmɛna akũ futelitsa kitonɛkĩ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ nviã kĩĩ vɛlɛ lubo kamɔ baũ bɛma batidziwa.
11Fuwi ɛlalɛ mɔ sɛkɛ a liti a, nkpã kawɛya to Baguma sɛkɛ̃ kɛyawo nɛ be kamɛ, ade biyidza bɛdza a. Libe paa wo bati a kĩ bɛmɔ́ be a flee. 12Adeke Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ nviã a nu odo mɔ ɔsĩ odi kĩ eto ode ebi be kĩ, “Mide miya nɛ awĩ!” Kĩ be bakesĩnɛ a dza bɛkadã a, bide bɛnaa ode nɛ luflututu kamɛ.
13Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ pɛpɛɛpɛ a, tite kuna mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ, ɔmatɔ kpale a ye kasɛ̃ kamɛ katsu kawuade a bubuli bubloo, ade bati mpim evũkɔnɔ ku a. Libe wo bati nkaɛ a, ade bimu ode Baguma a.
14Lubokamɔ mɔ libe lɛyade a yatɛ̃, lɛmɛ fɔlalɛde mɔ libe a aaya finyaa.
Bɛvɔ̃ Kagbulɛɛ Kavũkɔnɔde a.
15Ke liti a, ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ ovũkɔnɔde a vɔ̃ ye kagbulɛɛ a, ade tido kɔɔba nɛ́ nɛ ode tɛlɛ kĩ, “Katinya kamɛ lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a dani boe Ɔlate mɔ ye Kristo a fude, ade yaanya akũ daa daa a!” 16Adeke banɔkɔɛ̃ tɛya-ana a kĩ bidzi nɛ be fɔgãkpo akũ nɛ Baguma anɛ kamɛ a, ka bɛtsa anɛ nɛ tite bisum Baguma, 17bɛlɛ kĩ,
“Boe Ɔlate otumifɔ,
kĩ edeĩ, kĩ ɛna anɛ kɔkɔɛ.
Bɔanyɛ nɔ kɔlɛ kĩ ɔtɛ nɔ otumi kpale a,
oyi lɛgãkanya a kayɔ!
18Amamufɔ na kalɔkpa,
kitonɛkĩ lɔkɔ a wo ɔtɔ kĩ anyɛ nɔ kalɔkpa ɔtsa.
Lɔkɔ wo ɔtɔ kĩ adzɛmɔ banɔkpa.
Lɔkɔ wo ɔtɔ kĩ ase nɔ basumunɛ onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a kɔtɔ,
mɔ nɔ bati kpalɛwa a kĩ bakpa nɔ obu,
mɔ bati a kĩ bavila nɔ dĩ a,
banɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ babisɛ̃.
Lɔkɔ wo ɔtɔ,
kĩ awɔla bati a kĩ babula tite akũ kade a!”
19Ke liti a, bibinya Baguma Asɔli Kɔla nɛ ode a biyi, ade bɛmɔ́ ye apam adakã a nɛ koe kamɛ a. Deedimɔapɛ, odetɔ́ kamɛ mɔanɛ, tido nɛ́, ɔplala kpɛnɛ, tite kuna ade oni ko mɔ fɔdãglɛglɛ baũbaũ a.

Title: KANYƐ KATSA 12
Content:
Otsole a Mɔ Kɔɛ Kpale a.
1Ke liti a, nsɛntsɛlɛni kpale adi nɛ́ nɛ odetɔ́ kamɛ. Otsole odi kɔa suwa esua akũ ndɛ atadiɛ aye. Odetɔ deĩ nɛ ye abɔa kayɔ, ade ɛtsa lɛgãbɔɛ kĩ bɛkɔa fusibii ewua-nviã bɛkɛna de nɛ ye lɔlɔ a. 2Ɛtsɛ̃mɔ kɔma. Ade kĩ sɛmɛ pi ye sũ a, ɛkatsimtsim akũ mɔ fɔwɔla kɔɔba nɛ foe kawo sũ. 3Nsɛntsɛlɛni bɛbã nɛ́ nɛ odetɔ́ kamɛ. Dã, fɔnyɛ kɔɛ kpale ngbã, kĩ kudeĩ fɔlɔ evũkɔnɔ, mɔ tɛlɛ ewua, ade kɔtsa fɔgãbɔɛ evũkɔnɔ nɛ fɔlɔ a akũ a. 4Kɔkɔa koe ɔkã kɔlɔ fusibii kasɛ̃ kamɛ katsu kalalɛde a kutomɛna odetɔ́ kamɛ kɔta kuwula nɛ tite akũ. Finyaa kɔɛ kpale a yidza kɔdza nɛ ɔmatsɔ̃ a kĩ sɛmɛ pi ye a anɛ kamɛ, kĩ ntɛ esila ɛma pɛ kɔ́abɔɛ obisɛ̃ a kɔmɛna. 5Otsole a má obinyole kĩ yaakɔa sɔbɔtsaɛ otse ɛnya fude fude bati flee akũ. Lɛmɛ bɛbɔɛ kabisɛ̃ɛ̃ a lɛtalɛta bɛnamɛna Baguma mɔ ye lɛgãkpo a sɛkɛ̃. 6Otsole a lo ɛnaa kɔsa kamɛ, awã kĩ Baguma manɛ eyi ɛkpa ye kĩ bɛdã ye akũ fuwi apim mɔa, ɔha nviã mɔ aduesia.
7Ke liti a, kawũ nɛ́ nɛ ode. Mikael mɔ ye ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ nɔ kawũ mɔ kɔɛ kpale a, ade kɔɛ a mɔ koe fɔtɔ banyanɛ a nɔ bɛtsɛlamɔ be a. 8Lɛmɛ bɛnya kɔɛ kpale a akũ, ade bɛtákpa koe mɔ koe basumunɛ a osi kĩ bibuki bidzi nɛ ode a. 9Bɛta kɔɛ kpale a bimuni nɛ tite akũ. Ade koe nyɛ anɛ kɔkɔɛ kɔɛ a kĩ bavɛ kĩ Abonsam ĩye Satana, kĩ kɔkɛ katinya kamɛ bati flee a. Koe mɔ koe fɔtɔ banyanɛ a flee bɛta bimuni nɛ tite akũ.
10Ke liti a, nnu odo kpaa odi nɛ ode ɛlɛ kĩ, “Finyaakɔ̃ Baguma oti katɛ ya! Baguma nyɛ ye kɔbɛ̃ ɛtsa ndɛ Lɛgã aye! Finyaa ye Kristo a nyɛ ye otumi kanya! Kitonɛkĩ ɛta oti a kĩ ɛdza nɛ Baguma anɛ ɛkatsua boe bawaɛ̃ onukpɛ̃ kakpa Baguma lɛnyɛ mɔ suwa a emuni. 11Ade be lɛtsã Kavelibi a babɔanɛ, mɔ ɔnɔkɔali fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bidi adansiɛ nɛ ye akũ a bɛnya ye akũ. Bɛwɛ kĩ bakɔa be nkpã bɛkpa faa ntɛ fɔ́anya wuda malo. 12Nɛ foesũ ni, kawɔlɛ kide mi ode, mɔ mi a kĩ mideĩ nɛ awã a flee! Lɛmɛ tite mɔ mpo, bɔbɔɛ makpa mi, kitonɛkĩ Abonsam duma ɛya nɛ mi kamɛ mɔ kalɔkpa, ade enyina kĩ fuwi sukuloo lite ye.”
13Kĩ kɔɛ kpale a mɔ́ kĩ biɛta koe bimuni nɛ tite akũ a, kutomɔ otsole a kĩ ɛma obinyole a liti. 14Lɛmɛ bɛkpa otsole a ɔkɔliɛ kpale fupoki nviã a eyidza ɛnaa awã kĩ Baguma manɛ eyi ɛkpa ye nɛ kɔsa kamɛ a. Baadãmɛna ye akũ nɛ awã futeli ɛlalɛ mɔ sɛkɛ, lɔkɔa ɛwɛya nɛ kɔɛ kpale a awɛ kamɛ. 15Ade kɔɛ kpale a vũma mui kĩ bitini ndɛ ɔwɔ kutomɛna koe onukpɛ̃, bitomɔ otsole a kĩ bɛbɔɛ ye bɛnamɛna. 16Lɛmɛ tite bumɔ otsole a. Tite binya onukpɛ̃ tɛmɔa mui a kĩ kɔɛ kpale a vũma etomɛna otsole a flee. 17Kɔɛ kpale a na kalɔkpa mɔ ɔsĩ nɛ otsole a akũ, ade kɔdzakũ kĩ kɔnaanɔ kawũ mɔ ye babi mɔ bawa nkaɛ a. Ade be nyɛ bati a kĩ bakɛna nɛ Baguma mbla a akũ, kĩ bipini ɔnɔkɔali fɔlɛtsa a kĩ Yesu nyɛ ɛtsa lɛmɛ a. 18Ade kɔɛ kpale a nɛ́ kɔnadza nɛ mpo abuĩ a.

Title: KANYƐ KATSA 13
Content:
Yohanes Mɔ́ Bayaɛ Kpa Nviã.
1Ke liti a, mmɔ́ ɔyaɛ kpa odi kĩ ɛnɛ yato mpo kamɛ. Edeĩ fɔlɔ evũkɔnɔ mɔ tɛlɛ ewua, ade lɛgãbɔɛ tsanɛ nɛ ɔlɛ odi nyɛ odi akũ a. Bɛtsɛlɛ mbusuo dĩ kĩ lasupa Baguma bite nɛ lɔlɔ lidi nyɛ lidi akũ. 2Ɔyaɛ kpa a la ndɛ dzakpa aye. Ye abɔa la ndɛ kalikii abɔa, ade ye onukpɛ̃ lɛmɛ la ndɛ dzata onukpɛ̃ a. Kɔɛ kpale a kɔa ye mɔawɛ kɔbɛ̃, ye lɛgãkpo mɔ ye lɛgãkanya otumi kpale a ɛkpa ɔyaɛ kpa kĩĩ. 3Fɔdã ndɛ ɔyaɛ kpa a lɔlɔ mɔa tɛ wuda kaakpa nɛ de akũ, lɛmɛ kaakpa a ku. Fɔkɛna katinya kamɛ bati flee wãwã, ade bitomɔ ye a. 4Bati flee sum kɔɛ kpale a, kitonɛkĩ ɛkɔa ye kɔbɛ̃ ɛkpa ɔyaɛ kpa a. Bisum ɔyaɛ kpa a lɛmɛ bɛlɛ kĩ, “Owei la ndɛ ɔyaɛ kpa kĩĩ? Owei aapuli ɛnɔ kawũ mɔ ye?”
5Bɛkpa ɔyaɛ kpa a osi kĩ ɛlɛ kukũpia mɔ fubusuotsa pii ɛnya akũ tidetɔ tɛna-nviã. 6Eyi kayɔ mɔ Baguma, mɔ ye dĩ, mɔ awã kĩ edzi, mɔ bati flee a kĩ bideĩ nɛ ode a kadumu. 7Bɛkpa ye osi kĩ ɛnɔ kawũ mɔ Baguma bade a ɛnya be akũ, ade bɛkpa ye otumi lɛmɛ nɛ fude nyɛ fude, ɔmaĩ nyɛ ɔmaĩ, tide nyɛ tide mɔ tite bati flee akũ a. 8Tite akũ bati flee aasum ye, mbɔɛntɛ bikĩ be buĩ bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ Kavelibi a kĩ bɛkɔ a nkpã ovoli kamɛ, kito anɛ kĩ bɛbɔa katinya a.
9Foesũ oti a kĩ edeĩ atɔ ni, etse! 10Odi nyɛ odi kĩ bihihiɛ biyi kĩ bipi ye ndom ni, baapi ye ndom, ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ bihihiɛ biyi kĩ yaatɔ nɛ kɔpã onukpɛ̃ ni, yaatɔ nɛ kɔpã onukpɛ̃ kokooko. Ade fukĩĩ kamɛ mɔ kɛnɛ kĩ Baguma bade a bɛna ɔwɔlɛ kado mɔ katɛkado a.
11Ke liti a, mmɔ́ ɔyaɛ kpa bɛbã kĩ ɛnɛ́ eto tite kamɛ. Edeĩ tɛlɛ nviã ndɛ kavelibi aye, ade yalɛ kɔdzɛla ndɛ kɔɛ kpale a. 12Ɛkɛna kɔbɛ̃ kpale a kĩ ɛtɛ etomɛna ɔyaɛ kpa ɔtɔnyade a sɛkɛ̃ a akũ adzuma nɛ ye anɛ kamɛ. Ɛhɛ tite mɔ te akũ bati flee kĩ bisum ɔyaɛ kpa ɔtɔnyade a kĩ ye kaakpa ku a. 13Ɔyaɛ kpa ɔyade kĩĩ kɛna awãwã fɔtsa pii. Ɛfɔ̃ fi malo nɛ futo ode fɔyatɔ nɛ tite akũ nɛ bati anɛ.
14Ɛkɛ tite akũ bati flee mɔ awãwã fɔtsa a kĩ bɛkpa ye osi kĩ ɛkɛna nɛ ɔyaɛ kpa ɔtɔnyade a anɛ sũ. Ɔyaɛ kpa a bi be kĩ bɛmɛ ɔyaɛ kpa a kĩ bipila mɔ kɔpã a lɛmɛ ebuki edzi nkpã a kutidu bɛdzɛla. 15Bɛkpa ɔyaɛ kpa ɔyade a osi kĩ ɛwɛya nkpã edo nɛ ɔyaɛ kpa ɔtɔnyade kutidu a kĩ bɛmɛ a kamɛ, ayekĩ yaapuli ɛlɛ kɔdzɛla, ɛfɔ̃ bɛkɔ bati a kĩ baasĩ kĩ bɛláasum ye a.
16Ɔyaɛ kpa kĩĩ hɛ bati flee, babisɛ̃ mɔ banɔkɔɛ̃, asikafɔ mɔ ahiãfɔ, basate mɔ akũ akũ badzinɛ, kĩ bite sɔkpɔ̃na nɛ be sɔmɔna kɔkpɔ ĩye nɛ be nnyɛ. 17Odima lɛláapuli ɛya fɔtsa ĩye ɛnɔ lɛtsama ntɛ sɔkpɔ̃na kĩĩ liteĩ nɛ ye akũ. Sɔkpɔ̃na kĩĩ nyɛ ɔyaɛ kpa a dĩ, ĩye kakã katsɛlɛ kĩ fɔdzɛ̃ fɔkpa dĩ a.
18Fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ akũ kakɔna sĩ nyansã. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ enyina kadi aapuli ebu ɔyaɛ a dĩ kakã katsɛlɛ a akũ akunta, enu foe kayɔ, kitonɛkĩ kakã katsɛlɛ a dza fɔkpa oti dĩ. Ye kakã katsɛlɛ a nyɛ ɔha evũ mɔ taavũ-evũ (666).

Title: KANYƐ KATSA 14
Content:
Kavelibi a Mɔ Ye Bati.
1Ke liti a, ndã fɔkɔ ade mmɔ́ Kavelibi a kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ Zion ɔtɔ a akũ a. Bati mpim ɔha tɛna-ana (144,000) kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ Kavelibi a dĩ mɔ Ɔlɛga a dĩ bite nɛ be nnyɛ a dzɛ̃ nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ nɛ awã. 2Ade nnu odo odi kĩ ɛnɛ́ eto ode kĩ ɛla ndɛ ayekĩ mui ato ɔtɔ akũ kaka kako, ĩye ndɛ ayekĩ ɔplala kakpɛnɛ aye. Odo a buki ɛla ndɛ tɔnɔ kĩ babɔa nɛ tɛsankuo akũ. 3Bati mpim ɔha tɛna-ana a dza bɛkasã ɔnɔ vɔɛ̃ nɛ lɛgãkpo a, mɔ fɔtsa ɛna a kĩ fudzi nkpã a, mɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a anɛ. Otidziwa odima lɛláapuli ɛkɔlɛ ɔnɔ a na, mbɔɛntɛ bati mpim ɔha tɛna-ana a kĩ be odi lɔlɔ kɔtɔ bise nɛ tite akũ a. 4Ade be nyɛ bati a kĩ bɛkpalɛ be akũ, kĩ binyína batsole, bɛnyɛ badedzaa. Ade be atomɔ Kavelibi a kanaa kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ kĩ yanaa a. Ade be lɛmɛ nyɛ bati a kĩ bise be lɔlɔ kɔtɔ nɛ batidziwa kasinu a kamɛ, bɛkɛna be bati batɔnyade lɛmɛ bɛkpa Baguma mɔ Kavelibi a. 5Bɛtámɔ tɔ̃ kĩ bɛma fɔvã, ade nfumusu adima lɛmɛ lɛláa be akũ a.
Ode Fɔtɔ Banyanɛ Ɛlalɛ.
6Ke liti a, mmɔ́ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ bɛbã kĩ yayidza nɛ tite mɔ ode kayite. Ɛnɛɛ Kalɛ wĩ a kĩ kɛlá kawũna a, kĩ yaade lɛtsã nɛ ke akũ ɛkpa tite akũ bati, batidziwa ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ, fude nyɛ fude, tide nyɛ tide mɔ ɔmaĩ nyɛ ɔmaĩ. 7Ɛbɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba ɛlɛ kĩ, “Mivila Baguma, mikpa ye obu, kitonɛkĩ lɔkɔ wo ɔtɔ kĩ yadzɛmɔ batidziwa. Misum ye a kĩ ɛkbɔa tite mɔ ode, mpo mɔ mui kĩ banɛ nɛ tite kamɛ a!”
8Ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ ɔyade tomɔ ɔtɔnyade a ɛkalɛ kĩ, “Ɛtɔ o-o! Babilonia a kĩ ɛtɛ dĩ a tɔ tsoo! Ɛfɔ̃ fude fude flee mɔa ye waĩ mɔ ɔsĩ a kĩ fɔnyɛ linyolewɛ mɔ litsolewɛ a!”
9Ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ ɔlalɛde a tomɔ be nviã a ɛkabɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba kĩ, “Ntɛ odi sum ɔyaɛ kpa mɔ ye kutidu a kĩ bɛmɛ a, mɔ ɛtɛ ye sɔkpɔ̃na nɛ ye nnyɛ ĩye kɔkpɔ ni, 10yaamɔa Baguma kawũnaba waĩ a kĩ ɛkɔa eko nɛ ye kalɔkpa kɔɔpu kamɛ a. Bati flee a kĩ bɛkɛna fukĩĩ odu a, Baguma aamɔna be lubo nɛ fi mɔ fukpokpo gɛĩgɛĩ kamɛ nɛ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ kpalɛwa a mɔ Kavelibi a anɛ kamɛ. 11Be lubo kamɔ fi ɔnyɔ a aakade nɛ ode daa daa. Bati a kĩ basum ɔyaɛ kpa a mɔ ye kutidu a kĩ bɛmɛ a, mɔ bikĩ ye dĩ sɔkpɔ̃na a teĩ nɛ be akũ a, lɛláana kawɛya lɛnyɛ mɔ suwa da.”
12Ade awĩ mɔ Baguma bade a kĩ bakɛna nɛ ye mbla a akũ, bɛtɛ Yesu bido lɛmɛ a, sĩ ɔwɔlɛ kado a.
13Ke liti a, nnu odo odi kĩ eto ode ɛkalɛ kĩ, “Tsɛlɛ kayi kĩ, Kito finyaa kanaa ni, Baguma hila bati a kĩ biku nɛ Kristo katɛkado kamɛ a!” Hũhũ a tɛ etunɔ kĩ, “Nuwĩ, Baguma hila be! Baawɛya bitomɛna be lubo kamɔ kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ be tudzuma kakɛna tomɔ be!”
Tite Akũ Bati Kakpɔta.
14Ke liti a, ndã fɔkɔ ade mmɔ́ luflututu fitaa lidi, kĩ litsedi ndɛ otidziwa aye dzi nɛ de akũ. Ɛtsa sika ngbã lɔbɔɛ, ɛnɛɛ lɛsɛga mɔ ɔbɔ̃ nɛ awɛ. 15Ade Baguma ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ bɛbã nɛ́ eto Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ, ɛbɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba ebi oti a kĩ edzi nɛ luflututu akũ a kĩ, “Kɔa nɔ lɛsɛga a kanɛna fudutsa, kitonɛkĩ lɔkɔ wo ɔtɔ, tite akũ fudutsa bo fɔkpa kakpɔta!” 16Ade ke oti a kĩ edzi nɛ luflututu akũ a wũnya ye lɛsɛga nɛ tite akũ ɛkpɔta fudutsa a flee a.
17Ke liti a, mmɔ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ bɛbã odi kĩ ɛnɛ́ eto ode Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ. Ye malo ɛnɛɛ lɛsɛga mɔ ɔbɔ̃ lidi.
18Ade ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ bɛbã odi kĩ edeĩ otumi nɛ fi akũ a nɛ́ eto afɔlibɔ atɛnyɛ a kamɛ a. Ɛbɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba ebi ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a kĩ ɛnɛɛ lɛsɛga mɔ ɔbɔ̃ a kĩ, “Kɔa nɔ lɛsɛga a kakpalɛ waĩ babi a nɛ tite akũ kɔbã a kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ waĩ babi a yɔɔlɛ!”
19Foesũ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a wũnya ye lɛsɛga a nɛ tite akũ ade ɛna waĩ babi a nɛ tɔwɛ̃ akũ a. Ɛta be eko nɛ waĩ kakã lɛkɛ kpale, kĩ lɛnyɛ Baguma kalɔkpa a kamɛ. 20Binuna waĩ babi a mɔ fɔnɛta nɛ ɔmatɔ a ɔbaɛ̃, ade babɔanɛ tini bito waĩ kakã lɛkɛ a kamɛ a, bɛtɛ̃ ndɛ ɔwɔ a. Babɔanɛ a kadzũ kamɛ aana ndɛ fɔnɛta elo ĩye ɔpɔnkɔ akũ kadzɛla, ade bitini bɛnaa ndɛ fusikũ ɔha nviã a.

Title: KANYƐ KATSA 15
Content:
Ode Fɔtɔ Banyanɛ Kɔa Lubokamɔ Nkaɛ a Bɛyamɛna.
1Ke liti a, mmɔ́ awãwã fɔtsa kpale bɛbã kĩ fɔanyɛnɛ akũ paa nɛ odetɔ́ kamɛ. Ade foe nyɛ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ evũkɔnɔ kĩ bɛnɛɛ lubokamɔ evũkɔnɔ a. Lubokamɔ kĩĩ nyɛ nkaɛ flee a kĩ foe aanyɛ Baguma kalɔkpa nkaɛ a fɔtsa.
2Ade mmɔ́ litsedi ndɛ mpo kĩ ladã ndɛ ahuhɔɛ kĩ fi tsɛka mɔ ye. Mmɔ́ bati a kĩ bɛnya ɔyaɛ kpa, mɔ ye kutidu a kĩ bɛmɛ́, mɔ ye kakã katsɛlɛ dĩ akũ a, kĩ bɛdzɛ̃ nɛ ahuhɔɛ mpo a abuĩ, bɛnɛɛ tɛsankuo kĩ Baguma kpa be. 3Bɛkasã Baguma ɔsumunɛ Mose mɔ Kavelibi a ɔnɔ kĩ,
“O boe Ɔlate Baguma Kpale,
nɔ tudzuma pɔnɛ,
ade takɛna wãwã a!
Nɔ fude fude flee Lɛgã,
Nɔ tisi adã kpĩĩ,
ade tɛnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali a!
4O boe Ɔlate, owei koũ lɛláavila nɔ?
Owei aasĩ kĩ ɛláado nɔ dĩ obu?
Kitonɛkĩ nɔ odi nyɛ oti kpalɛwa,
fude fude flee a aayasum nɔ,
kitonɛkĩ bɛnyɛ nɔ fɔtsa kakɛna kpĩĩ a bɛtsa bati flee.”
5Ke liti a, ndã fɔkɔ ade mmɔ́ kĩ bibinya Asɔli Kɔla nɛ ode a kĩ Lɛpɛ Kpalɛwa a deĩ nɛ koe kamɛ a biyi. 6Ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ evũkɔnɔ a kĩ bɛnɛɛ lubo kamɔ evũkɔnɔ a nɛ́ bito Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ. Bido aklala fitaa kĩ yata muamua tɛtadiɛ, ade bɛkɔa sika ngbã abɔsɔ bɛbɔa nɛ tɔwɔlɛ a. 7Ade fɔtsa ɛna a kĩ fudzi nkpã a kamɛ fɔmɔa kɔa sika ngbã tɔkɔɔpu evũkɔnɔ kĩ tiyi tsɔnɔnɔɔnɔ mɔ Baguma kĩ edzi nkpã daa a kalɔkpa, ɛkpa ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ evũkɔnɔ a. 8Ade ɔnyɔ a kĩ eto Baguma kukũkpalɛ mɔ ye kɔbɛ̃ kamɛ a yi Asɔli Kɔla a flee kamɛ a. Odima tápuli ewo nɛ Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ kɛnawo kĩ lubo kamɔ evũkɔnɔ a kĩ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ evũkɔnɔ a yamɛna a onukpɛ̃ tsua.

Title: KANYƐ KATSA 16
Content:
Bitsokui Baguma Kalɔkpa Nɛ Tɔkɔɔpu Kamɛ a Biko Nɛ Tite Akũ.
1Ade nnu odo kɔɔba odi kĩ ɛnɛ́ eto Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ ɛkabi ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ evũkɔnɔ a kĩ, “Minaatsokui Baguma kalɔkpa nɛ tɔkɔɔpu kamɛ a miko nɛ tite akũ!”
2Adeke Baguma ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ ɔtɔnyade a natsokui ye kɔɔpu kamɛ fɔtsa a eko nɛ tite akũ a. Bati a kĩ bite be ɔyaɛ kpa sɔkpɔ̃na a, mɔ be a kĩ bisum ye kutidu mɛwa a nɛ́ fɔɔkpa kĩ fɔawo, kĩ fɔakũ lɛmɛ nɛ akũ.
3Ade ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ ɔyade a naa ɛnatsokui ye kɔɔpu kamɛ fɔtsa a eko nɛ mpo kamɛ a. Mui a dani ndɛ ɔnɔkpa babɔanɛ aye, ade lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ lidzi nkpã nɛ mpo kamɛ a ku a.
4Ke liti a, ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ ɔlalɛde a lɛmɛ tsokui ye kɔɔpu kamɛ fɔtsa a eko nɛ tɔwɔ mɔ mui kanɛkɔ̃ kamɛ, ade mui a dani babɔanɛ a. 5Nnu kĩ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a kĩ yadãmɛna mui akũ a lɛ kĩ,
“O Oti Kpalɛwa, nɔ kĩ odeĩ daa, kĩ ɔna anɛ kɔkɔɛ a,
akɔ ɔtɔ nɛ osi kpĩĩ akũ!
6Bati kĩĩ ko Baguma bade a mɔ ye onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ babɔanɛ nɛ tite,
nɛ foesũ ɔkpa be babɔanɛ kĩ bɛmɔa.
Nuwĩ, sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ kĩĩ fɛta be!”
7Ade nnu odo odi kĩ ɛnɛ́ eto afɔlibɔ atɛnyɛ a kamɛ kĩ, “O boe Ɔlate Baguma, nɔ otumifɔ adi ɔnɔkɔali, ade akɔ kɔtɔ nɛ osi kpĩĩ akũ a.”
8Ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ ɔnade a tsokui ye kɔɔpu kamɛ fɔtsa a eko nɛ suwa akũ, ade bɛkpa se osi kĩ sipila bati mɔ se fi a. 9Fi a otutuo mɔ ɔsĩ a pila bati ade bɛlɛ fubusuotsa nɛ Baguma a kĩ ye deĩ otumi nɛ lubo kamɔ kĩĩ akũ a, lɛmɛ bisĩ kĩ baádani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ bimu ye.
10Ke liti a, ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ olode a tsokui ye kɔɔpu kamɛ fɔtsa a eko nɛ ɔyaɛ kpa a lɛgãkpo akũ. Adeke ɔtũ ke nɛ ɔyaɛ kpa a lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a, ade bati dɔ̃ fɔmɛ nɛ ayekĩ fɔawo be a sũ. 11Nɛ foesũ bɛlɛ fubusuotsa nɛ Baguma kĩ edeĩ nɛ ode a akũ. Titɔ kĩ fɔɔkpa a kĩ bɛnɛ́ a awo be malo ni, bisĩ kĩ baádani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ nɛ bɛ fɔtsa kpa kakɛna kamɛ.
12Ade ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ ovũde a tsokui ye kɔɔpu kamɛ fɔtsa a eko nɛ Frat ɔwɔ kpale a kamɛ a. Ɔwɔ a viɔ̃ ade ɛnyɛ osi ɛkpa fɔgã a kĩ futo suwa kadekɔ̃ a. 13Ke liti a, mmɔ́ hũhũ fĩĩ ɛlalɛ kĩ bɛla ndɛ fɔpɔtrɔlɔ, bɛnɛ bito kɔɛ kpale a onukpɛ̃, mɔ ɔyaɛ kpa a onukpɛ̃ mɔ fɔvã onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ a onukpɛ̃ kamɛ. 14Be nyɛ hũhũ kpa a hũhũ kĩ yakɛna awãwã fɔtsa a. Hũhũ ɛlalɛ kĩĩ anɛ kanaa katinya kamɛ fɔgã flee sɛkɛ̃, kakpɔta be kakpa kawũkanɔ nɛ Baguma Otumifɔ Flee Luwi kpale a akũ.
15“Mitse! Maya ndɛ oyekpanɛ aye! Baguma hila oti a kĩ esi lipe yadãmɛna ye tɛtadiɛ akũ, ayekĩ ɛláatsã ɔdzɔ, kɔnyɔã liwo ye nɛ kanade!”
16Ade hũhũ kpa a kpɔta fɔgã a nɛ awã kĩ bavɛ nɛ Hebri tide kamɛ kĩ Armagedon a.
17Ke liti a, ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ ovũkɔnɔde a natsokui ye kɔɔpu kamɛ fɔtsa a eko nɛ ɔwɛ kamɛ. Ade odo kɔɔba odi nɛ́ eto lɛgãkpo a nɛ Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ kĩ, “Fuwoli!” 18Ade odetɔ́ kamɛ kamɔanɛ, tido mɔ ɔsĩ kanɛ, ɔplala kakpɛnɛ kɔɔba, ade tite lɛmɛ kuna mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ a. Kito anɛ kĩ otidziwa nɛ katinya ni, tite tákuna mɔ libe lɔmɔ tɔ̃. Ade fukĩĩ nyɛ tite kakuna kĩ kiwo libe kɛba flee a! 19Ɔmatɔ kpale a bɛ̃ nɛ fɔkɛ ɛlalɛ kamɛ, ade fude flee tɛmatɔ tɛkpale tɛkpale bubuli a. Baguma te anɛ nɛ Babilonia kĩ ɛtɛ dĩ a akũ, ade ɛfɔ̃ ɛmɔa ye kalɔkpa waĩ mɔ ɔsĩ a nɛ ye kɔɔpu a kamɛ a. 20Tite a kĩ mui sinya te a flee yɛla, ade tɔtɔ flee lɛmɛ buki tɛláa kĩ bamɔ a. 21Fɔdãglɛglɛ baũ baũ kĩ lidi nyɛ lidi ɔlɔmɛ aana ndɛ kilo taalo to ode fɔyawula nɛ bati akũ. Ade bɛlɛ fubusuotsa nɛ Baguma akũ nɛ foe kawo a sũ a.

Title: KANYƐ KATSA 17
Content:
Ɔdɔpaani a Kĩ Ɛtɛ Dĩ a Sɔtɔ Kavɛlɛ.
1Ke liti a, ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ a kĩ bɛlɛ tɔkɔɔpu evũkɔnɔ a kamɛ ɔmɔa ya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ ebi yĩ kĩ, “Ya, ntsa nɔ ayekĩ bɛvɛlɛ adɔpaani a kĩ ɛtɛ dĩ, kĩ edzi nɛ tɔwɔ pii akũ a sɔtɔ. 2Tite akũ fɔgã bɔa adɔpaa mɔ ye, ade ye adɔpaa kabɔa waĩ a wugɛla tite akũ bati a.”
3Ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a kpã yĩ nɛ hũhũ kamɛ ɛnamɛna kɔsa kamɛ. Nɛ awã mmɔ́ otsole odi kĩ edzi nɛ ɔyaɛ kpa ngbã odi akũ. Bɛtsɛlɛ mbusuo buĩ kĩ basupa Baguma bite nɛ ɔyaɛ a akũ flee, ade edeĩ fɔlɔ evũkɔnɔ mɔ tɛlɛ ewua a. 4Otsole a do atadiɛ ngbã mɔ fɔwɔwa ntsɛkantsɛka, ade ɛhɛhɛ akũ mɔ sika ngbã fɔtsa, boe mɔ kɔya, mɔ fulitsa mɔ kɔya a. Ɛnɛɛ sika ngbã kɔɔpu kĩ eyi mɔ efĩĩ mɔ kɔwɛ̃ fɔtsa a kĩ ɛna etomɛna ye adɔpaa kabɔa kamɛ a nɛ awɛ. 5Bɛtsɛlɛ dĩ kĩ de kayɔkanyɛ bɛla bite nɛ ye nnyɛ kĩ,
Babilonia kĩ ɛtɛ dĩ,
Adɔpaafɔ mɔ tite akũ fubusuotsa flee ɔma.
6Otsole a kĩ mmɔ́ a wuga Baguma bade a, mɔ bikĩ bidi adansiɛ nɛ Yesu katɛkado akũ sũ a babɔanɛ.
Kĩ mmɔ́ ye a, fɔkɛna yĩ wãwã paa. 7Ade ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a via yĩ kĩ, “Nde sũ fɔkɛna nɔ wãwã? Maabi nɔ kalɛ nɛ otsole a, mɔ ɔyaɛ a kĩ edeĩ fɔlɔ evũkɔnɔ mɔ tɛlɛ ewua, kĩ ye akũ edzi a fɔlɛtsa kɔlawa. 8Ɔyaɛ kpa a kĩ ɔmɔ́ a dzi nkpã tɔ̃ lɛmɛ finyaa eku. Yaanɛ eto lɛkɛ dzununuunu a kamɛ ɛyaatɛ̃ ɛnaa bɛwɔla ye. Fɔ́akɛna bati a kĩ bidzi nkpã nɛ tite akũ, kĩ bɛtátsɛlɛ be buĩ bido nɛ nkpã ovoli a kamɛ, kito anɛ kĩ bɛbɔa katinya a wãwã ntɛ bɛmɔ́ ɔyaɛ a, kitonɛkĩ ɛnyɛ oti kĩ edzi nkpã tɔ̃, finyaa ɛláa, lɛmɛ yaabuki ɛya.
9“Fukĩĩ sĩ fɔkpa nyansã mɔ fɔtsa kayɔkanu mɔ nyansã. Fɔlɔ evũkɔnɔ a nyɛ kɔtɔbii evũkɔnɔ, awã kĩ otsole a adzi a. 10Fubuki fɔnyɛ fɔgã evũkɔnɔ, kĩ foe elo tɔ kɔkɔɛ, lɔmɔa anya akũ finyaa, ade de nkaɛ a táya tɔ̃. Ntɛ lɛya ni, kɛnɛ kĩ lɛnya akũ lɔkɔ lukũ odi. 11Ɔyaɛ kpa a kĩ edzi tɔ̃, lɛmɛ ebuki ɛláa a nyɛ lɛgã lɛlɛ̃de, kĩ lɛnyɛ fɔgã evũkɔnɔ a kamɛ ɔmɔa kĩ laanaa bɛwɔla de.
12“Tɛlɛ ewua a kĩ ɔmɔ́ a nyɛ fɔgã ewua kĩ bɛtádo tɔ̃ fɔgã kanya awɛ, lɛmɛ bɛkpa be kɔbɛ̃ kĩ baanya fɔgã dɔũhuilɛ mɔa mɔ ɔyaɛ kpa a. 13Fɔgã ewua kĩĩ flee deĩ botaɛ mɔapɛ, ade baakɔa be kɔbɛ̃ mɔ otumi bɛkpa ɔyaɛ kpa a. 14Baanɔ kawũ mɔ Kavelibi a, lɛmɛ Kavelibi a aanya be akũ, kitonɛkĩ ye nyɛ balate flee Ɔlate, fɔgã flee Lɛgã. Bɛmɔ ye bade a kĩ ɛvɛ, ɛpau, mɔ bikĩ bitomɔ ye nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ a, aanya akũ mɔ ye.”
15Ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a buki ebi yĩ kĩ, “Mui a kĩ ɔmɔ́ kĩ ɔdɔpaani a dzi nɛ be akũ a nyɛ ɔmaĩ nyɛ ɔmaĩ, fude nyɛ fude, batidziwa flee mɔ tide ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ. 16Tɛlɛ ewua a kĩ ɔmɔ́ a mɔ ɔyaɛ kpa a aakesĩ ɔdɔpaani a. Baatɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa nɛ ye awɛ bɛfɔ̃ edzi ɔdzɔ. Baaba ye sɛkɛna bido ye fi evio. 17Kitonɛkĩ Baguma lɛkɔa foe edo nɛ be tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kĩ bɛkɛna nɛ nhiɛhiɛ a kĩ ɛkɛna eyi a akũ, fɔfɔ̃ bɛkɛna ɔmɔa bɛkɔa be kɔbɛ̃ bɛkpa ɔyaɛ kpa a ɛnya akũ, kɛnaawo lɔkɔ a kĩ Baguma fɔlɛtsa a ya nɛ foe kamɛ.
18“Otsole a kĩ ɔmɔ́ a nyɛ ɔmatɔ kpale a kĩ yanya tite akũ fɔgã akũ a.”

Title: KANYƐ KATSA 18
Content:
Bibubuli Babilonia Ɔmatɔ a.
1Ke liti a, mmɔ́ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ bɛbã kĩ eduma eto ode yaka. Edeĩ kɔbɛ̃ paa, ade ye akũ ɔhaĩ kpalɛ tite flee akũ a. 2Ɛbɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba ɛlɛ kĩ,
“Ɛtɔ o-o! Babilonia ɔmatɔ a kĩ ɛtɛ dĩ a tɔ tsoo!
Ɛdani hũhũ kpa mɔ hũhũ kĩ efĩĩ deĩ nɛ ye akũ,
mɔ efĩĩ kɔvɔlabi, mɔ kɔvɔlabi kĩ bakesĩ a kadzikɔ̃.
3Kitonɛkĩ fude flee mɔa ye adɔpaa akũ kalɔkpa bavɛ a.
Tite akũ fɔgã bɔa adɔpaa mɔ ye,
ade katinya kamɛ fɔyaatɔ banyanɛ tsã ye anɛngbã kana kamɛ bɛdani asikafɔ a.”
4Ade nnu odo bɛbã kĩ eto ode ɛlɛ kĩ,
“Yĩ bati, minɛ́ nɛ ye kamɛ!
Kɛtánɛ kĩ miakɛna tɔkpa a na odu,
ade kɛtánɛ kĩ miana ye sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ a na odu a.
5Kitonɛkĩ bɛtɛɛtɛɛ ye tɔkpa tide tɛnatamɔ ode,
ade Baguma te anɛ nɛ ye tɔkpa akũ a.
6Mikɛna ye ndɛ ayekĩ ye malo ɛkɛna mi a.
Mise ye foe titi nviã nɛ fukĩ ɛkɛna a onukpɛ̃.
Miyula bavɛ mɔ ɔsĩ tɛkɔɔpu nviã mikpa ye,
nɛ amɔa a kĩ ɛkpa mi a onukpɛ̃!
7Mimɔna ye lubo,
ebe kɔnya ayekĩ kɛfɛta
fuketimɔ ayekĩ edzi nɛ akũ kahɛhɛ mɔ nkpã kanya kamɛ a.
Kitonɛkĩ yabi ye akũ daa kĩ,
‘Ndzi nɛ awĩ ndɛ lɛgãtsole aye!
Nnɛ́ okunawa manɛ,
ade nláabe ayɔlɔhɔ da a!’
8Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ ni, nɛ luwi mɔapɛ kamɛ,
lubo kamɔ kĩ fɔnyɛ,
wuda, fɔsɔ, kɔnya kabe mɔ kɔlɛ aaya nɛ ye akũ.
Baapila ye mɔ fi evio gbunugbunugbunu,
kitonɛkĩ boe Ɔlate Baguma a kĩ ɛkɔ ye kɔɔtɔ a nyɛ ɔbɛlɛbɛ.
9“Ntɛ tite akũ fɔgã a kĩ bɛbɔa adɔpaa mɔ ɔmatɔ a, bɛnya nkpã mɔ ye a, mɔ́ fi a kĩ fɔapila ye ɔnyɔ a yade ni, baabɔa fɔwɔla bibe ye. 10Baadza mɔ lugo nɛ ye lubo kamɔ kavila a sũ bɛlɛ kĩ,
‘Ao! Ao! Nɔ, ɔmatɔ kĩ ɛtɛ dĩ!
Nɔ, Babilonia kĩ odeĩ kɔbɛ̃!
Dɔũhuilɛ mɔapɛ kamɛ bɛkɔ nɔ kɔtɔ!’
11“Tite akũ fɔyaatɔ banyanɛ a lɛmɛ aabe biwo ɔblɔ mɔ ye, kitonɛkĩ odima buki yaáya be fɔtsa. 12Kɔyaatɔ fɔtsa a nyɛ sika ngbã, sika ovoe, boe mɔ kɔya, fulitsa mɔ kɔya, aklala, tilima ngbã, tilima ɔɔwa, tilima plɔplɔ, titse kĩ tabɔa mɔ ɔlɛ̃, kunu adɔ̃ fɔtsa, mɔ titse mɔ kɔya, kɔɔble mɔ sɔbɔtsaɛ ɔɔwa fɔtsa, mɔ kɔla kake boe kĩ bɛtɛ kɔya. 13Fɔbɛbã nyɛ futse fɔkpã mɔ ɔlɛ̃ kĩ bavɛ sinamɔn mɔ kutu ɔlɛ̃ kado fɔtsa, lifii mɔ klubɔũ, bavɛ mɔ kugua kĩ bakɔa katɔ, onuvoe kpɛtɛɛ mɔ fɔwã, kugua kĩ batsɛla, banantsue mɔ baveli, bapɔnkɔ mɔ tihilili, basate mɔ batidziwa kĩ baya kɔkɔ malo.
14“Fɔyaatɔ banyanɛ a aalɛ kĩ, ‘Futse babi a kĩ fɔakɔ nɔ odo a aalo fɔfɔnɛ nɔ. Nɔ akũ kana fɔtsa flee mɔ nɔ akũ kahɛhɛ a yɛla nɛ nɔ akũ, ɔláabuki ɔmɔ́ foe da!’ 15Fɔyaatɔ banyanɛ a kĩ bɛnya kɔyaatɔ fɔtsa kumɛkumɛ kamɛ mɔ ɔmatɔ a bɛdani asikafɔ a, aadza mɔ lugo, nɛ lubo kamɔ kavila sũ. Bibe, biwo ɔblɔ,
16bɛlɛ kĩ, ‘Ao! Ao! Ɔmatɔ kĩ ɛtɛ dĩ!
Ɔmatɔ kĩ bɛhɛhɛ ye mɔ aklala fitaa, tilima ngbã, tilima ɔɔwa,
sika ngbã fɔtsa, boe kĩ bɛtɛ kɔya mɔ fulitsa mɔ kɔya!
17Dɔũhuilɛ mɔapɛ kamɛ ye akũ kana fɔtsa a flee bu kade pasaa.’
“Ɔkɔlɔ a kamɛ banɔkɔɛ̃ flee, mɔ ɔwɔ akũ basitsãnɛ, ɔkɔlɔ batanɛ a mɔ bati bɛbã a kĩ batsã mpo akũ kanya kɔyaatɔ a dza mɔ lugo, 18bɛbɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ bɛmɔ́ ɔmatɔ a kĩ ɛlamɛna kavio a ɔnyɔ a kĩ, ‘Ɔmatɔ kpale kĩĩ odu nɛ́ katinya tɔ̃?’ 19Bifila kudu biko nɛ be fɔlɔ kamɛ ade bibe mɔ kɔnya bɛlɛ kĩ,
