‘Bɔbɔɛ bɔbɔɛ bɔakpa ɔmatɔ kpale kĩĩ!
Ɔmatɔ kpale kĩ ye kamɛ futima balate
na akũ bitomɛna ye akũ kana fɔtsa kamɛ bɛdani asikafɔ.
Kitonɛkĩ nɛ dɔũhuilɛ mɔapɛ kamɛ bɛkɛna ye bubloo!
20O ode, mɔ mi Baguma bade a, mɔ mi fɔtɔ banyanɛ mɔ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a, mimɔ kawɔlɛ!
Kitonɛkĩ Baguma kɔ ye kɔtɔ ɛkpa mi nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ ɛkɛna mi a sũ!’ ”
21Ke liti a, ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ mɔ kɔbɛ̃ odi bɔɛ de kĩ lɔpɔnɛ lububu ndɛ kɔwɔlɛ ade ɛta edo nɛ mpo kamɛ, ɛlɛ kĩ,
“Ade aye baabɔɛ Babilonia ɔmatɔ kpale a bibo mɔ fɔkɔ,
ade bɛláabuki bɛmɔ́ ye da a.
22Bɛláabuki binu tɔwɛ̃ tɛsankuo, tifluti mɔ kugbulɛɛ tido
nɛ nɔ kamɛ da.
Bɛláabuki bɛmɔ́ awɛ adzuma ɔkɛnanɛ odima lɛmɛ
nɛ nɔ kamɛ da,
ade ayea lɛmɛ bɛláabuki binu fɔtsa kawɔlɛ
nɛ kɔwɔlɛ akũ nkã da nɛ nɔ kamɛ a!
23Bɛláabuki bɛmɔ́ ɔsɛdza katɛ̃
nɛ nɔ kamɛ da,
ade bɛláabuki binu olitsɔ̃ mɔ obolitsɔ̃ nyɔ tido
nɛ nɔ kamɛ da a.
Nɔ kɔyaatɔ banyanɛ a
nyɛ katinya kamɛ banɔkɔɛ̃ banɔkɔɛ̃,
ade ɔkɔa nɔ kanɔkɔnɛ kadã ɔkɛ katinya kamɛ bati flee a.
24Bɛvɛlɛ Babilonia sɔtɔ, kitonɛkĩ ye kamɛ bɛmɔ́ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ mɔ Baguma bade a babɔanɛ.
Nnɛ́ be odi bade bɛmɔ́, mbom mɔ bati a kĩ bɛkɔ nɛ tite akũ a
babɔanɛ bɛ́mɔ nɛ ye kamɛ.”

Title: KANYƐ KATSA 19
Content:
1Fukĩĩ liti a, nnu litsedi ndɛ bati kɔdabu baũ odo nɛ ode, ɛkalɛ kĩ,
“Mimu Baguma!
Nkpã katɛ, kukũkpalɛ mɔ kɔbɛ̃ nyɛ boe Baguma fude!
2Yadzɛ fɔlɛtsa nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ, ade yakɔ kɔtɔ nɛ osi kpĩĩ akũ a.
Ɛkɔ ɔdɔpaani kpale a kĩ ɛkɔa ye adɔpaa ebula katinya kamɛ kade a kɔtɔ.
Baguma vɛlɛ ye sɔtɔ kitonɛkĩ ɛkɔ́ ye basumunɛ a.”
3Bibuki bɛbɔa fɔwɔla kĩ,
“Mimu Baguma!
Ɔnyɔ a kĩ yanɛ nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ a ade nɛ ode daa.”
4Banɔkɔɛ̃ tɛya-ana, mɔ fɔtsa ɛna a kĩ fudzi nkpã a ka bɛtsa nɛ tite bisum oti a kĩ edzi nɛ lɛgãkpo akũ, ade bɛlɛ kĩ,
“Fɔya lɔmɔ! Mimu Baguma!”
Kavelibi a Obolitsɔ̃ Kapi Luwi Kanya.
5Ade odo odi nɛ́ eto lɛgãkpo a kamɛ kĩ,
“Mimu boe Baguma,
mi flee a kĩ mi ye basumunɛ mɔ ye bati flee,
banɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ babisɛ̃ a kĩ miavila ye a.”
6Ke liti a, nnu odo odi ndɛ bati kɔdabu baũ fɔwɔla kabɔa ĩye ndɛ ato ɔtɔ akũ mui kaka kako nɛ lutubu kamɛ, ĩye ɔplala kakpɛnɛ mɔ ɔsĩ aye. Odo a lɛ kĩ,
“Mimu Baguma!
Kitonɛkĩ boe Ɔlate Baguma Kpale anya Lɛgã!
7Mifɔ̃ bɔmɔ kawɔlɛ, butu osee budo ye obu.
Kitonɛkĩ Kavelibi a obolitsɔ̃ kapi luwi a wo ɔtɔ,
ade ye obolitsɔ̃ a manɛ akũ ɛkpa foe a.
8Bɛkɔa aklala fitaa, kĩ yata muamua lima bɛkpa ye kĩ edzi.”
Aklala fitaa kpalɛwa a nyɛ fɔtsa wĩ a kĩ Baguma bade a kɛna.
9Ade ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a bi yĩ kĩ, “Tsɛlɛ kayi kĩ bihila bati a kĩ bɛvɛ kĩ bɛya nɛ Kavelibi a obolitsɔ̃ kanyakɔ̃.” Ebuki ɛlɛ kĩ, “Baguma onukpɛ̃ kamɛ fɔlɛtsa pɛpɛɛpɛ nyɛ fukĩĩ.”
10Ade ntɔ nɛ ye abɔa kamɛ kĩ masum ye a, lɛmɛ ebi yĩ kĩ, “Takɛna foe! Bɔmɔ nɔ mɔ awaɛ̃ amɛ a kĩ bidi adansiɛ nɛ Kristo akũ a kamɛ ɔmɔa manɛ. Ke aduli kakpa Baguma odi!”
Kitonɛkĩ adansiɛ a kĩ Kristo di a ado Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ kɔbɛ̃.
Ɔpɔnkɔ Ovoe Akũ Odzinɛ a.
11Ke liti a, mmɔ́ kĩ ode binya ɛwaa, ade mmɔ́ ɔpɔnkɔ ovoe odi kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ a. Oti a kĩ edzi nɛ ɔpɔnkɔ a akũ a dĩ nyɛ Oti Kpĩĩ mɔ Ɔnɔkɔalini. Yadzɛ fɔlɛtsa kanɔ kawũ nɛ osi kpĩĩ akũ. 12Ye banebi la ndɛ fi sɛmɛ aye, ade fɔgãbɔɛ beblebee tsanɛ nɛ ye lɔlɔ a. Bɛtsɛlɛ dĩ lidi bite nɛ ye akũ, kĩ odima linyína de kayɔ, mbɔɛntɛ ye odi. 13Edo atadiɛ kĩ bisi bido nɛ babɔanɛ kamɛ. Ye dĩ nyɛ Baguma Kalɛ a. 14Ode sodzafɔ kɔdabu kɔdabu do aklala ovoe fitaa tɛtadiɛ, bidzi nɛ bapɔnkɔ ovoe akũ bitomɔ ye. 15Lɛpamɛ mɔ ɔbɔ̃ nɛ́ lito ye onukpɛ̃ kamɛ, kĩ yaakɔa ɛwɔla fude akũ. Yaakɔa sɔbɔtsaɛ otse ɛnya be akũ, ade yaasumini Baguma Kpale kalɔkpa mɔ ɔsĩ a ɛnyɛ ye waĩ kanunakɔ̃ a. 16Dĩ a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ ye atadiɛ wulaa mɔ lutolo akũ a nyɛ
Fɔgã Flee Lɛgã mɔ Balate Flee Ɔlate.
17Ke liti a, mmɔ́ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ odi kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ suwa akũ. Ɛbɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba ebi kɔvɔlabi a kĩ kɔayidza nɛ ɔwɛ kamɛ a kĩ, “Miyaatsɛna minya Baguma olobe funitsã kpale a. 18Miyaatsuli fɔgã, sodzafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃, sodzafɔ, bapɔnkɔ mɔ bapɔnkɔ badzinɛ sɛkɛna, akũ akũ badzinɛ, banɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ babisɛ̃ flee sɛkɛna!”
19Adeke mmɔ́ kĩ ɔyaɛ kpa a, mɔ tite akũ fɔgã a kpɔta be sodzafɔ kɔdabu a kĩ banɔ kawũ mɔ oti a kĩ edzi nɛ ɔpɔnkɔ akũ a mɔ ye sodzafɔ flee a. 20Bipi ɔyaɛ kpa a, mɔ fɔvã onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ a kĩ ɛkɛna awãwã fɔtsa nɛ ye anɛ a. Ade awãwã fɔtsa kĩĩ ɛkɔa ɛkɛ bati a kĩ bɛtɛ ɔyaɛ kpa a sɔkpɔ̃na mɔ bikĩ bisum ye kutidu kamɛ a. Bɛta ɔyaɛ kpa a mɔ fɔvã onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ a ɔgɔ̃ bido nɛ fi lutubu kĩ latɛ̃ gɛĩgɛĩ a kamɛ. 21Bɛkɔa oti a kĩ edzi nɛ ɔpɔnkɔ akũ a lɛpamɛ a kĩ lɛnɛ lito ye onukpɛ̃ kamɛ a bɛkɔ bati nkaɛ, ade kɔvɔlabi flee yatsuli be sɛkɛna ayekĩ kɔ́apuli a.

Title: KANYƐ KATSA 20
Content:
Bido Okesĩnɛ a Nɛ Kɔla Futeli Apim Mɔa.
1Ke liti a, mmɔ́ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ odi kĩ eto ode yaka, kĩ ɛnɛɛ lɛkɛ dzununuunu a safi mɔ nkɔsɔnkɔsɔ kpale adi nɛ awɛ. 2Epi kɔɛ kpale a, kĩ kɔna kɔkɔɔkɔɛ a, kĩ bavɛ Abonsam ĩye Satana a, esuli koe eyi ɛkpa futeli apim mɔa. 3Ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ kɔa ye edo nɛ lɛkɛ dzununuunu a kamɛ ɛbalɛ de onukpɛ̃, ɛtalɛ de lɛmɛ ayekĩ ɛláapuli ebuki ɛkɛ fude fude bati kɛnaawo kĩ futeli apim mɔa a yatɛ̃. Lɛmɛ nɛ foe liti a, kɛnɛ kĩ bɛfɔnɛ ye awɛ sukuloo.
4Ke liti a, mmɔ́ fɔgãkpo fudi, ade bati a kĩ bidzi nɛ foe akũ a, bɛkpa be kɔbɛ̃ kĩ bɛdzɛ fɔlɛtsa. Mbuki mmɔ́ bati a kĩ bikpeli be fɔlɔ, nɛ ayekĩ bidi adansiɛ nɛ Yesu ɔnɔkɔali, mɔ Baguma kalɛ a akũ sũ a tɛkla. Ade be lɛtásum ɔyaɛ kpa ĩye ye kutidu a kĩ bɛmɛ a, ĩye bɛtɛ ye sɔkpɔ̃na nɛ be nnyɛ ĩye nɛ awɛ a. Biyidza bibuki bidzi nkpã bɛnya lɛgã mɔ Kristo futeli apim mɔa. 5Ade fukĩĩ nyɛ banɔkpa kayidza kadzi nkpã atɔnyade a. Banɔkpa nkaɛ a kɔ̃ táyidza bidzi nkpã kɛnawo kĩ futeli apim mɔa a aatɛ̃. 6Baguma hila bati a kĩ bɛna tsɛfã nɛ banɔkpa kayidza katɔnyade kĩĩ kamɛ a, kĩ ɛkpalɛ be akũ lɛmɛ a. Wuda ayade a lɛlá kɔbɛ̃ nɛ be akũ, baanya Baguma mɔ Kristo basɔfɔ, ade baanya fɔgã mɔ ye futeli apim mɔa a.
Bɛnya Satana Akũ.
7Ntɛ futeli apim mɔa wũna a, baanyɛ Satana nɛ kɔla, 8ade yanaa ɛnaakɛ fude fude kĩ fudeĩ nɛ katinya tukontoũ ɛna a kamɛ kĩ fɔnyɛ Gog mɔ Magog, ɛkpɔta be ɛkpa kawũkanɔ. Be lidede aana ndɛ mpo abuĩ dã. 9Bɛtsã tite dzɛlɛwa a akũ bɛnadza bisinya Baguma bade a kadzikɔ̃ mɔ ye ɔmatɔ kpale a kĩ yawɛ kalɛ a. Lɛmɛ fi to ode fɔyawɔla be flee. 10Ade bɛta Abonsam a kĩ ɛkɛ be a bido nɛ fi lutubu mɔ fukpokpo gɛĩgɛĩ a kamɛ, nɛ awã kĩ bɛnya lɔtɔ bɛta ɔyaɛ kpa mɔ fɔvã onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ a bido a. Baamɔna be lubo lɛnyɛ mɔ suwa daa daa.
Katinya Kamɛ Kadzɛmɛna Nkaɛ.
11Ke liti a, mmɔ́ lɛgãkpo kpale ovoe lidi mɔ oti a kĩ edzi nɛ de akũ a. Tite mɔ ode lo nɛ ye anɛ kamɛ, ade bɛtána kakɔma bɛkpa te a. 12Ade mmɔ́ banɔkpa, banɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ babisɛ̃ kĩ bɛdzɛ̃ nɛ lɛgãkpo a anɛ a. Bibinya tuvoli biyi, ade bibinya ovoli bɛbã odi lɛmɛ kĩ ɛnyɛ nkpã ovoli a. Bɛdzɛmɔ banɔkpa nɛ be fɔkɛlatsa onukpɛ̃ ndɛ ayekĩ bɛtsɛlɛ biyi nɛ tuvoli a kamɛ a. 13Mpo nyɛ banɔkpa a kĩ bideĩ nɛ ye kamɛ a ɛkpa, ade wuda mɔ kanɔkpade lɛmɛ nyɛ banɔkpa a kĩ bɛnɛɛ a bɛkpa a. Ade bɛdzɛmɔ be kamɛ odi nyɛ odi nɛ ye fɔkɛlatsa onukpɛ̃ a. 14Ke liti a, bɛta wuda mɔ kanɔkpade biwula nɛ fi lutubu baũ a kamɛ. Fi lutubu baũ kĩĩ nyɛ wuda ayade a. 15Ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ bɛtámɔ ye dĩ nɛ nkpã ovoli a kamɛ ni, bɛta ye bido nɛ fi lutubu baũ a kamɛ.

Title: KANYƐ KATSA 21
Content:
Tite Mɔ Ode Vɔɛ̃.
1Ke liti a, mmɔ́ tite vɔɛ̃ mɔ ode vɔɛ̃, kitonɛkĩ tite tɛtɔnyade a mɔ ode ɔtɔnyade a yɛtɛ̃, ade mpo lɛmɛ buki ɛláa a. 2Ade mmɔ́ Ɔmatɔ Kpalɛwa, Yerusalem vɔɛ̃ a, kĩ eto ode nɛ Baguma sɛkɛ̃ yaka. Bɛhɛhɛ ye ndɛ obolitsɔ̃ kĩ bɛmanɛ bɛkpa ɔnyɔ aye. 3Ade nnu odo kɔɔba kĩ ɛnɛ eto lɛgãkpo a kamɛ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Finyaa kɔ̃ Baguma kadzikɔ̃ deĩ nɛ batidziwa kayite! Yaadzi nɛ be sɛkɛ̃, ade baanya ye bati a. Baguma mɔawɛ aadzi nɛ be kamɛ, ade yaanya be Baguma a. 4Yaayɔ ɛnyɛ babe nɛ be anɛ kamɛ. Wuda lɛláabuki ɛna. Ade ayea ayɔlɔhɔ, kabe mɔ kalɔɛ lɛláabuki fɔna a, kitonɛkĩ kɔkɔɛ fɔtsa a yatɛ̃.”
5Ade oti a kĩ edzi nɛ lɛgãkpo akũ a lɛ kĩ, “Dã, finyaa nkɛna fɔtsa flee fɔvɔɛ̃!” Ebi yĩ lɛmɛ kĩ, “Tsɛlɛ fukĩĩ kayi, kitonɛkĩ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kĩ baapuli bɛtɛ foe bido.”
6Ade ɛlɛ kĩ, “Biyua, lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa! Yĩ nyɛ ɔtɔnyade mɔ owũnade, kayɔkayi a mɔ kawũna a. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɔmɔado akɔ ye ni, maakpa ye osi ɛmɔa mui etomɛna nkpã lɔwɔkɛ kamɛ faa. 7Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛnya akũ ni, yaana fukĩĩ etomɛna yĩ sɛkɛ̃. Maanya ye Baguma ade ye malo yaanya yĩ obi a. 8Lɛmɛ babelibe, bati abɔa banyɛnɛ, kɔwɛ̃ fɔtsa bakɛnanɛ, awudifɔ, adɔpaafɔ, kanɔkɔnɛ badãnɛ, baviɔ̃ basumunɛ mɔ bavãlɛvã flee a, aana be tsɛfã nɛ fi lutubu baũ a kĩ latɛ̃ mɔ fukpokpo gɛĩgɛĩ a kamɛ. Ade fukĩĩ nyɛ́ wuda ayade a.”
Yerusalem Vɔɛ̃ a.
9Ke liti a, ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ evũkɔnɔ a kĩ bɛnɛɛ tɔkɔɔpu evũkɔnɔ a kĩ tiyi mɔ lubo kamɔ evũkɔnɔ nkaɛ a, kamɛ ɔmɔa ya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃, ade ebi yĩ kĩ, “Ya, ntsa nɔ Obolitsɔ̃ a kĩ ɛnyɛ Kavelibi a ɔtsɔ̃ a.” 10Hũhũ a wo nɛ yĩ kamɛ, ade ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a bɔɛ yĩ ɛnamɛna ɔtɔ geĩ odi kalete a. Ɛtsa yĩ Yerusalem, Ɔmatɔ Kpalɛwa a, kĩ ɛka eto ode nɛ Baguma sɛkɛ̃ yaya a, 11ade ɛkata mɔ Baguma kukũkpalɛ a. Ɔmatɔ a kata la ndɛ de kĩ lideĩ kɔya, fɔla lɛmɛ ndɛ yaspa de kĩ de kamɛ kpalɛ ndɛ ahuhɔɛ aye. 12Bike seebi kpale gɛlɛlɛɛlɛ bisinya ye ade bɛnyɛ tunyukpɛ̃ ewua-nviã kĩ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ ewua-nviã dzi nɛ te tunyukpɛ̃ a. Bɛtsɛlɛ Israel futete ewua-nviã a buĩ bite nɛ tunyukpɛ̃ a akũ. 13Tunyukpɛ̃ ɛlalɛ deĩ nɛ sɛkɛ sidi nyɛ sidi akũ, te ɛlalɛ deĩ nɛ suwa kadekɔ̃, te ɛlalɛ deĩ nɛ kayɔ, te ɛlalɛ deĩ nɛ nyangɛ, ade te ɛlalɛ deĩ nɛ suwa katomukɔ̃ a. 14Bike ɔmatɔ a seebi a nɛ kayɔkayi futekũ boe ewua-nviã akũ, ade Kavelibi a fɔtɔ banyanɛ ewua-nviã a buĩ teĩ nɛ be akũ a.
15Ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a kĩ bɔmɔ ye bɔlɛ kɔdzɛla a nɛɛ sika fɔtsa kakɔna otse, kĩ yaakɔa ɛkɔna ɔmatɔ a, ye tunyukpɛ̃ mɔ seebi a. 16Ɔmatɔ a deĩ fɔkɛ ɛna, kĩ ye lɛsa mɔ ye lugo kamɛ keti. Ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a kɔna ɔmatɔ a mɔ ye fɔtsa kakɔna otse a. Ɛmɔ́ kĩ sɛkɛ mɔa tɛ fusikũ apim mɔa mɔ ɔha elo (1,500). Ɔmatɔ a lɛsa, ye lugo mɔ ye akũ kadzɛla flee keti. 17Ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a kɔna seebi a lɛmɛ, ade se akũ kadzɛla nyɛ fɔnɛta ɔha nviã mɔ ye ewua-avũ (216) nɛ ye fɔtsa kakɔna otse a onukpɛ̃ a. 18Bɛkɔa boe kĩ bavɛ Yaspa bɛkɔa bike seebi a, ade bɛkɔa sika ngbã kĩ se kamɛ kpalɛ ndɛ ahuhɔɛ aye bitsua ɔmatɔ mɔawɛ a. 19Bɛkɔa boe ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ kĩ bideĩ kɔya bɛhɛhɛ ɔmatɔ a seebi kayɔkayi futekũ boe a. Litekũ lɛtɔnyade a nyɛ ahuhɔɛ de kĩ bavɛ yaspa, lɛyade nyɛ safir, lɛlalɛde nyɛ yalkedon, lɛnade nyɛ smaragdo, 20lilode nyɛ sardonik, livũde nyɛ sardis, livũkɔnɔde nyɛ krisolit, lɛlɛ̃de nyɛ beril, livedide nyɛ topas, liwuade nyɛ krisopras, liwua-odide nyɛ hiakint, ade liwua-nviãde a nyɛ ametist a. 21Tunyukpɛ̃ ewua-nviã a fulitsa bowa ewua-nviã. Litsabi bowa mɔapɛ bɛkɔa bɛkɛna onyukpɛ̃ odi nyɛ odi. Ɔmatɔ a ɔblɔnu nyɛ sika ngbã, kĩ se kamɛ kpalɛ ndɛ ahuhɔɛ aye.
22Ntámɔ asɔli kɔla nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ boe Ɔlate Baguma Kpalɛ mɔ Kavelibi a nyɛ ye asɔli kɔla. 23Ɔmatɔ a tásĩ suwa kĩ sɛta ĩye odetɔ kĩ ɛvɔlɛ nɛ ye kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ Baguma kukũkpalɛ nyɛ́ ye ɔhaĩ ade Kavelibi a lɛmɛ nyɛ́ ye ɔsɛdza a. 24Katinya kamɛ bati aatsã ye haĩ kamɛ, ade tite akũ fɔgã aakɔa be akũ kana fɔtsa bɛyamɛna nɛ ye kamɛ a. 25Bɛláabalɛ ɔmatɔ a tunyukpɛ̃ mɔ suwa da, kitonɛkĩ kade lɛláadɔ nɛ awã da. 26Baakɔa fude fude akũ obu fɔtsa mɔ akũ kana fɔtsa bɛyamɛna nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ. 27Lɛmɛ lɛtsa a kĩ de akũ tákpalɛ lidima lɛláawo nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ. Ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna fɔnyɔãtsa ĩye ɛnyɛ ɔvãlɛvã lɛmɛ lɛláawo nɛ awã, mbɔɛntɛ bati a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ be buĩ bido nɛ Kavelibi a nkpã ovoli a kamɛ aawo nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ.

Title: KANYƐ KATSA 22
Content:
Nkpã Ɔwɔ Mɔ Nkpã Kutse a.
1Ke liti a, ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a tsa yĩ nkpã ɔwɔ kĩ ye mui akpa nkpã. Ye mui a kamɛ kpalɛ ndɛ ahuhɔɛ aye, ade bɛkanɛ kato Baguma mɔ Kavelibi a lɛgãkpo a kamɛ, 2ade batɛ̃ nɛ ɔmatɔ a ɔblɔnu kayite a. Nkpã kutse a dzɛ̃ nɛ ɔwɔ a futuni nviã akũ. Kɔawũ babi titi ewua-nviã nɛ kateli mɔa kamɛ, nɛ odetɔ mɔa kamɛ deedi. Koe tɔɔta bakɔa katsa fude fude bati fɔsɔ. 3Bɛláabuki bɛmɔ́ lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma dumu lidima nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ. Baguma mɔ Kavelibi a lɛgãkpo aana nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ ade ye basumunɛ aasum ye a. 4Baamɔ ye anɛ ade ye dĩ aana nɛ be nnyɛ a. 5Kade lɛláabuki kɛdɔ ade bɛláasĩ ɔsɛdza ĩye suwa, kitonɛkĩ boe Ɔlate, Baguma aanya be ɔhaĩ, ade baanya akũ ndɛ fɔgã aye daa daa a.
Yesu Kaya.
6Ke liti a, ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a bi yĩ kĩ, “Fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali ade baapuli bɛtɛ foe bido a. Boe Ɔlate, onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ Hũhũ Baguma a lido ye ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ kĩ ɛyaanyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ laaya mɔatsɛ a ɛtsa ye basumunɛ.”
7Yesu lɛ kĩ, “Midã! Maya mɔatsɛ! Baguma hila bati a kĩ bakɛna nɛ ovoli kĩĩ kamɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi a akũ!”
8Yĩ, Yohanes, nyɛ́ oti a kĩ ye linu, ɛmɔ fɔtsa kĩĩ flee a. Kĩ nnu fukĩĩ, mmɔ́ foe a, nke aduli nɛ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a kĩ ɛnyɛ foe ɛtsa yĩ a anɛ kĩ masum ye. 9Lɛmɛ ebi yĩ kĩ, “Takɛna foe! Basumunɛ bɔmɔ́ nɔ, mɔ awaɛ̃ amɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ, mɔ bati a kĩ bakɛna nɛ ovoli kĩĩ kamɛ fɔlɛtsa akũ a bɔanɛ. Sum Baguma odi!”
10Ade ebi yĩ kĩ, “Takɔa fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi nɛ ovoli kĩĩ kamɛ a ɔkɔla, kitonɛkĩ lɔkɔ fuã kĩ foe flee fɔya nɛ foe kamɛ. 11Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna tɔkpa ni, ɛdanɛ tɔkpa kakɛna, odi nyɛ odi kĩ yado akũ efĩĩ ni, ɛdanɛ akũ efĩĩ kado. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna tuwĩ ni, ɛdanɛ tuwĩ kakɛna, ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛnyɛ oti kpalɛwa ni, ɛdanɛ oti kpalɛwa kanya.”
12Yesu lɛ kĩ, “Maaya mɔatsɛ! Maya mɔ yĩ kɔtɔkase, nkpa odi nyɛ odi nɛ ye lɛkɛnana onukpɛ̃. 13Yĩ nyɛ Ɔtɔnyade mɔ Owũnade, Kayɔkayi mɔ Kawũna a.
14“Bihila bati a kĩ bɛvɔlɛ be tɛtadiɛ wulaa tɛnɛ fitaa a, kĩ nɛ foesũ bideĩ osi kĩ banya nkpã kutse a babi, kĩ bideĩ osi lɛmɛ kĩ batsã tunyukpɛ̃ a kamɛ biwo nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ. 15Lɛmɛ ɔmatɔ a ɔbaɛ̃ badzinɛ nyɛ́ fɔnyɔãtsa bakɛnanɛ ndɛ bakpete aye, kanɔkɔnɛ badãnɛ, bikĩ bɛtsɛ̃ mɔa linyolewɛ mɔ litsolewɛ, awudifɔ, baviɔ̃ basumunɛ mɔ bikĩ bawɛ fɔvã, kama fɔvã lɛmɛ.
16“Yĩ, Yesu, lido yĩ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ kĩ ɛyaadi adansiɛ nɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ akũ ɛkpa mi nɛ tɛsɔli a kamɛ. Ĩnyɛ Dawid onu mɔ ye kasinu a kamɛ obi, ade yĩ lɛmɛ nyɛ ɔnɔnɛ lisibii a kĩ lavɔlɛ a.”
17Hũhũ a mɔ Obolitsɔ̃ a lɛ kĩ, “Ya!”
Odi nyɛ odi kĩ enu fukĩĩ ni, ɛlɛ kĩ, “Ya!”
Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɔmɔado akɔ ye ni, ɛya. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ nkpã mui ni, ɛyaatɛ be faa.
Fɔlɛtsa a Kawũna.
18Yĩ, Yohanes, mabi odi nyɛ odi kĩ enu fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi a, kĩ bide foe lɛtsã nɛ ovoli kĩĩ kamɛ a kĩ ntɛ odi kɔa litsedi ebumɔ foe ni, Baguma aakɔa lubo kamɔ a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ ovoli kĩĩ kamɛ a ebumɔ ye sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ. 19Ade ayea ntɛ odi nyɛ litsedi nɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi nɛ ovoli kĩĩ kamɛ a kamɛ ni, Baguma aanyɛ ye tsɛfã nɛ nkpã kutse libi a kamɛ, ade ɛláana tsɛfã nɛ Ɔmatɔ Kpalɛwa a lɛmɛ kamɛ a.
20Oti a kĩ yadi adansiɛ nɛ fɔtsa kĩĩ flee akũ a lɛ kĩ, “Oo, maaya mɔatsɛ!”
Fɔya lɔmɔ. Boe Ɔlate Yesu, ya!
21Boe Ɔlate Yesu kɔnyakamɔ kɔtamɔ odi nyɛ odi.
